Genesis1:1 Pakutanga Mwari akasika denga nenyika. 
Genesis1:2 Nyika yakanga isina kugadzirwa, isina chinhu; rima rakanga riripo pamusoro pemvura yakadzika; Mweya waMwari akanga uchigarira pamusoro pemvura." 
Genesis1:3 Mwari akati: Chiedza ngachivepo, chiedza chikavapo." 
Genesis1:4 Mwari akaona chiedza, kuti chakanaka; Mwari akaparadzanisa chiedza nerima." 
Genesis1:5 Mwari akatumidza chiedza, akati Masikati, nerima akaritumidza akati Usiku. Usiku akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva rimwe." 
Genesis1:6 Mwari akati: Nzvimbo ngaivepo pakati pemvura, kuti iparadzanise mvura nemvura." 
Genesis1:7 Mwari akaita nzvimbo, akaparadzanisa mvura yakanga iri pasi penzvimbo, nemvura yakanga iri pamusoro penzvimbo; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:8 Mwari akatumidza nzvimbo, akati Denga. Madeko akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva repiri." 
Genesis1:9 Mwari akati: Mvura iri pasi pedenga ngaiungane pamwechete, kuti pasi pakaoma paonekwe; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:10 Mwari akatumidza pasi pakaoma, akati Nyika; nemvura yakaungana akaitumidza, akati Makungwa; Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:11 Mwari akati: Nyika ngaimerese uswa nemiriwo inobereka mbeu, nemiti inobereka michero ina marudzi ayo, mbeu dzayo dziri mukati mayo, panyika; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:12 Nyika ikameresa uswa, nemiriwo inobereka mbeu dzina marudzi adzo, nemiti inobereka michero, mbeu dzayo dziri mukati mayo, ina marudzi ayo; Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:13 Madeko akavapo namangwanani akavapo zuva retatu. 
Genesis1:14 Mwari akati: Zviedza ngazvivepo panzvimbo yedenga, kuti zviparadzanise masikati nousiku; kuti zvive zviratidzo, nenguva, namazuva, namakore;" 
Genesis1:15 ngazvive zviedza panzvimbo yedenga, kuti zvivhenekere panyika; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:16 Mwari akaita zviedza zvikuru zviviri; chiedza chikuru kuti chibate ushe masikati, nechiedza chiduku, kuti chibate ushe usiku, nenyenyedziwo." 
Genesis1:17 Mwari akazviisa pasi penzvimbo yedenga, kuti zvivhenekere panyika," 
Genesis1:18 zvibate ushe masikati nousiku, nokuparadzanisa chiedza nerima; Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:19 Madeko akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva rechina." 
Genesis1:20 Mwari akati: Mvura ngaizare nezvipenyu zvizhinji, neshiri dzibhururuke pamusoro penyika munzvimbo yedenga." 
Genesis1:21 Mwari akasika mhuka huru dzegungwa, nezvipenyu zvose zvinokambaira, izvo mvura yakanga izere nazvo, zvina marudzi azvo, neshiri dzose dzina mapapiro, dzina marudzi adzo; Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:22 Mwari akazviropafadza, akati: Berekai, muwande, muzadze mvura iri mumakungwa; neshiri ngadziwande panyika." 
Genesis1:23 Madeko akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva reshanu." 
Genesis1:24 Mwari akati: Nyika ngaibereke zvipenyu zvina marudzi azvo, nezvipfuwo, nezvinokambaira, nemhuka dzenyika, zvina marudzi azvo; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:25 Mwari akaita mhuka dzenyika dzina marudzi adzo, nezvipfuwo zvina marudzi azvo, nezvinhu zvose zvinokambaira panyika zvina marudzi azvo; Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:26 Mwari akati: Ngatiite munhu nomufananidzo wedu, akafanana nesu; ngaave nesimba pamusoro pehove dzegungwa, napamusoro peshiri dzedenga, napamusoro pezvipfuwo, napamusoro penyika yose, napamusoro pezvipenyu zvose zvinokambaira panyika." 
Genesis1:27 Mwari akasika munhu nomufananidzo waMwari; akavasika murume nomukadzi. 
Genesis1:28 Mwari akavaropafadza, Mwari akati kwavari: Berekai, muwande, muzadze nyika, mubate ushe pairi; muve nesimba pamusoro pehove dzegungwa, napamusoro peshiri dzedenga, napamusoro pezvipenyu zvose zvinokambaira panyika." 
Genesis1:29 Mwari akati: Tarirai, ndakakupai miriwo yose inobereka mbeu, iri panyika yose, nemiti yose ine michero yemiti inobereka mbeu, kuti zvive zvokudya zvenyu." 
Genesis1:30 Mhuka dzose dzenyika, neshiri dzose dzedenga, nezvipenyu zvose zvinokambaira panyika, zvine mweya woupenyu, ndakazvipa miriwo yose minyoro kuti zvive zvokudya zvazvo; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:31 Mwari akaona zvose zvaakaita, onei zvakanaka kwazvo. Madeko akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva retanhatu." 
Genesis2:1 Denga nenyika zvikapera saizvozvo, nouzhinji hwazvo." 
Genesis2:2 Mwari akapedza basa rake raakaita nomusi wechinomwe; akazorora nomusi wechinomwe pabasa rake rose raakaita. 
Genesis2:3 Mwari akaropafadza musi wechinomwe, akauita mutsvene; nokuti akazorora nawo pabasa rake rose, raakanga asika nokuita iye Mwari." 
Genesis2:4 Ndiko kuvamba kwedenga nenyika, musi wazvakasikwa: Nezuva iroro Jehovha Mwari raakasika naro nyika nedenga," 
Genesis2:5 makwenzi esango akanga achigere kuvapo panyika, nemiriwo yesango yakanga ichigere kumera; nokuti Jehovha Mwari akanga asati anaisa mvura panyika, uye kwakanga kusina munhu kuzorima pasi;" 
Genesis2:6 asi mhute yaisikwira ichibva panyika ichinyorevesa nyika yose. 
Genesis2:7 Jehovha Mwari akaumba munhu neguruva revhu, akafuridzira mweya woupenyu mumhino dzake; munhu akava mweya mupenyu." 
Genesis2:8 Jehovha Mwari akasima munda muEdheni, kumabvazuva, akaisapo munhu waakanga aumba." 
Genesis2:9 Jehovha Mwari akameresa pasi miti yose inofadza meso, neyakanaka kudya; uye muti woupenyu pakati pomunda, nomuti wokuziva zvakanaka nezvakaipa." 
Genesis2:10 MuEdheni mukabuda rwizi kuzodiridza munda uyo, rukaparadzana ipapo, dzikaita hova ina." 
Genesis2:11 Zita rorwokutanga ndiPishoni; ndirwo runopoteredza nyika yose yeHavhira, pane ndarama ipapo;" 
Genesis2:12 ndarama yenyika iyoyo yakanaka; uyewo pane dheriumu nebwe reonikisi. 
Genesis2:13 Zita rorwizi rwechipiri ndiGihoni; ndirwo runopoteredza nyika yose yeKushi. 
Genesis2:14 Zita rorwizi rwechitatu ndiTigirisi, ndirwo runoyerera kumabvazuva kweAsiria. Rwizi rwechina ndiYufuretesi." 
Genesis2:15 Jehovha Mwari akatora munhu, akamuisa mumunda weEdheni, kuti aurime nokuuchengeta." 
Genesis2:16 Jehovha Mwari akaraira munhu achiti, “Ungadya hako miti yose yomunda," 
Genesis2:17 asi muti wokuziva zvakanaka nezvakaipa usaudya; nokuti nomusi waunoudya, uchafa zviro kwazvo.”" 
Genesis2:18 Jehovha Mwari akatizve, “Hazvina kunaka kuti munhu agare ari woga; ndichamuitira mubatsiri akamukwanira.”" 
Genesis2:19 Jehovha Mwari akaumba nevhu mhuka dzose dzesango, neshiri dzose dzedenga, akadziisa kumunhu kuti aone kuti achadzitumidza mazita api; zvipenyu zvose sezvazvakatumidzwa nomunhu, ndiwo akava mazita azvo." 
Genesis2:20 Munhu akatumidza zvipfuwo zvose mazita, neshiri dzedenga, nemhuka dzose dzesango; asi kwakashaikwa mubatsiri akamukwanira iye munhu." 
Genesis2:21 Ipapo Jehovha Mwari akavatisa munhu hope huru, akavata; akatora rumbabvu rwake rumwe, akadzivira nyama panzvimbo yarwo." 
Genesis2:22 Norumbabvu urwo Jehovha Mwari rwaakatora pamunhu, akaita mukadzi narwo, akamuisa kumunhu." 
Genesis2:23 Munhu akati, “Zvino uyu ipfupa ramapfupa angu, nenyama yenyama yangu, uchatumidzwa Mukadzi, nokuti wakabviswa paMurume.”" 
Genesis2:24 Naizvozvo munhu anofanira kusiya baba vake namai vake, anamatire mukadzi wake, vave nyama imwe." 
Genesis2:25 Vose vari vaviri vakanga vasina kusimira, munhu nomukadzi wake, asi havana kunyara." 
Genesis3:1 Zvino nyoka yakanga ina mano kupfuura mhuka dzose dzesango dzakanga dzaitwa naJehovha Mwari. Ikati kumukadzi, “Nhai, ndizvo here kuti Mwari akati, ‘Regai kudya miti yose yomunda?’ ”" 
Genesis3:2 Mukadzi akati kunyoka, “Tingadya hedu michero yemiti pamunda," 
Genesis3:3 asi kana iri michero yomuti uri pakati pomunda, Mwari akati, ‘Regai kuudya, kana kuubata, kuti murege kufa.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Nyoka ikati kumukadzi, “Hamungafi zviro kwazvo," 
Genesis3:5 nokuti Mwari anoziva kuti nomusi wamunozvidya nawo, meso enyu achasvinudzwa, mukava saMwari, muchiziva zvakanaka nezvakaipa.”" 
Genesis3:6 Zvino mukadzi akati achiona kuti muti wakanaka kudyiwa, uye kuti unofadza meso, uye kuti muti unodikanwa kungwadza munhu, akatora muchero wawo, akadya, akapawo murume wake, akadya naiyewo." 
Genesis3:7 Ipapo meso avo, ivo vaviri, akasvinudzwa, vakaziva kuti havana kusimira; vakasonanidza mashizha omuonde, vakazviitira nguo." 
Genesis3:8 Vakanzwa izwi raJehovha Mwari achifamba mumunda kwotonhorera madekwana, munhu nomukadzi wake ndokundohwanda pamberi paJehovha Mwari pakati pemiti yomunda." 
Genesis3:9 Jehovha Mwari akadana munhu, akati kwaari, “Uripiko?”" 
Genesis3:10 Iye akati, “Ndakanzwa izwi renyu mumunda, ndikatya, nokuti ndakanga ndisina kusimira, ndikahwanda.”" 
Genesis3:11 Iye akati, “Ndianiko akakuudza kuti hauna kusimira? Wakadya kani muti wandakakuraira kuti urege kuudya?”" 
Genesis3:12 Munhu akati, “Mukadzi wamakandipa kuti ave neni, ndiye wakandipa zvomuti ndikadya.”" 
Genesis3:13 Jehovha Mwari akati kumukadzi, “Chiiko icho chawakaita?” Mukadzi akati, “Nyoka yakandinyengera, ndikadya.”" 
Genesis3:14 Jehovha Mwari akati kunyoka, “Zvawaita izvozvo, watukwa kupfuura mhuka dzose dzesango; uchafamba nedumbu rako, uchadya guruva mazuva ose oupenyu hwako." 
Genesis3:15 Ndichaisa ruvengo pakati pako nomukadzi, napakati porudzi rwako norudzi rwake, irwo rwuchapwanya musoro wako, newe uchapwanya chitsitsinho charwo.”" 
Genesis3:16 Kumukadzi akati, “Ndichawanza zvikuru kurwadziwa kwako nokutora mimba kwako, uchabereka vana uchirwadziwa; kuda kwako kuchava kumurume wako, iye achava ishe wako.”" 
Genesis3:17 Kumunhu akati, “Zvawakateerera izwi romukadzi wako, ukadya muti wandakakuraira ndichiti, ‘Usaudya, zvino nyika yatukwa nemhosva yako, uchadya zvibereko zvayo nokutambudzika mazuva ose oupenyu hwako;" 
Genesis3:18 ichakuberekera minzwa norukato, iwe uchadya miriwo yomusango;" 
Genesis3:19 uchadya zvokudya zvako neziya rechiso chako kusvikira wadzokera kuvhu; nokuti wakatorwa kwariri. Zvauri guruva, uchadzokerazve kuguruva.’ ”" 
Genesis3:20 Munhu akatumidza mukadzi wake zita rinonzi Evha; nokuti ndiye mai vavapenyu vose. 
Genesis3:21 Jehovha Mwari akaitira munhu nomukadzi wake nguo dzamatehwe, akavafukidza nadzo." 
Genesis3:22 Zvino Jehovha Mwari akati, “Tarirai, munhu ava somumwe wedu zvaanoziva zvakanaka nezvakaipa; zvino zvimwe angatambanudza ruoko rwake akatorawo zvomuti woupenyu, akadya, akararama nokusingaperi.”" 
Genesis3:23 Naizvozvo Jehovha Mwari akamubudisa mumunda weEdheni, kuti arime ivhu raakatorwa kwariri." 
Genesis3:24 Naizvozvo akadzinga munhu, akaisa makerubhi kurutivi rwamabvazuva rwomunda weEdheni, nomurazvo womunondo waimonereka kumativi ose, kurindira nzira yomuti woupenyu." 
Genesis4:1 Zvino Adhamu wakaziva mukadzi wake Evha; iye ndokutora mimba, akapona Kaini, akati, “Ndawana munhu, ndichibatsirwa naJehovha.”" 
Genesis4:2 Akazoponazve munun'una wake Abhero. Abhero wakanga ari mufudzi wamakwai, Kaini wakanga ari murimi wevhu." 
Genesis4:3 Zvino nguva yakati yapfuura, Kaini akauya nezvibereko zvevhu, zvive zvipo kuna Jehovha." 
Genesis4:4 NaAbherowo akauya namakwayana ake ematangwe akakorawo. Jehovha ndokugamuchira Abhero nechipiriso chake; 
Genesis4:5 asi Kaini nechipiriso chake haana kumugamuchira. Ipapo Kaini akatsamwa kwazvo, chiso chake chikaunyana." 
Genesis4:6 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Kaini, “Watsamwireiko? Chiso chako chakaunyana nei?" 
Genesis4:7 Kana ukaita zvakanaka, haungafari here pachiso chako? Kana usingaiti zvakanaka, zvivi zvinokuhwandira pamusuwo; zvichakutsvaka, asi iwe unofanira kuzvikunda.”" 
Genesis4:8 Zvino Kaini wakataurirana nomunun'una wake Abhero; vakati vari kusango, Kaini ndokumukira Abhero munun'una wake, akamuuraya." 
Genesis4:9 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Kaini, “Ari kupiko Abhero, munun'una wako?” Iye akati, “Handizivi, ndini mufudzi womunun'una wangu here?”" 
Genesis4:10 Akati, “Waiteiko? Izwi reropa romunun'una wako rinodaidzira kwandiri panyika." 
Genesis4:11 Zvino watukwa, wadzingwa panyika, iyo yakashamisa muromo wayo kugamuchira ropa romunun'una wako paruoko rwako;" 
Genesis4:12 kana uchirima ivhu, haringakupi simba raro; uchava mutizi nomudzungairi panyika.”" 
Genesis4:13 Ipapo Kaini akati kuna Jehovha, “Kurohwa kwangu kukuru, handingakutakuri." 
Genesis4:14 Tarirai, mandidzinga nhasi panyika ino, ndichavanda pamberi penyu; ndichava mutizi nomudzungairi panyika; ani naani anondiwana achandiuraya.”" 
Genesis4:15 Jehovha akati kwaari, “Naizvozvo ani naani anouraya Kaini achatsiviwa kanomwe.” Jehovha ndokuisira Kaini chiratidzo, kuti munhu anozomuwana arege kumuuraya." 
Genesis4:16 Ipapo Kaini wakabva pamberi paJehovha, akandogara panyika yeNodhi, kumabvazuva kweEdheni." 
Genesis4:17 Kaini akaziva mukadzi wake, akatora mimba, akapona Inoki; akavaka guta, akatumidza guta zita romwanakomana wake Inoki." 
Genesis4:18 Inoki akaberekerwa Iradhi; Iradhi akabereka Mehujaeri; Mehujaeri akabereka Metushaeri; Metushaeri akabereka Rameki; 
Genesis4:19 Rameki akawana vakadzi vaviri, zita romumwe rainzi Adha, zita romumwe rainzi Zira." 
Genesis4:20 Adha akapona Jabhari; iye waiva baba vavanhu vanogara mumatende vane zvipfuwo. 
Genesis4:21 Zita romunun'una wake raiva Jubhari; iye waiva baba vavose vanoridza mbira nenyere. 
Genesis4:22 Zira wakapona Tubharikaini, mupfuri wenhumbi dzose dzendarira nedare; hanzvadzi yaTubharikaini waiva Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Rameki akati kuvakadzi vake; “Adha naZira, inzwai izwi rangu, Imi vakadzi vaRameki, teererai zvandinotaura; Nokuti ndinouraya munhu unondikuvadza, Nejaya rakandirova;" 
Genesis4:24 Kana Kaini achitsiviwa kanomwe; Zvirokwazvo Rameki kana makumi manomwe nenomwe.” 
Genesis4:25 Adhamu akazivazve mukadzi wake, akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Seti; nokuti wakati, “Mwari wandipa mumwe mwana pachigaro chaAbhero, zvaakaurayiwa naKaini.”" 
Genesis4:26 NaSeti wakaberekerwa mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Enoshi. Nenguva iyo vanhu vakatanga kudana zita raJehovha." 
Genesis5:1 Ndirori bhuku ramarudzi aAdhamu. Musi waakasika munhu, Mwari wakamuita nomufananidzo waMwari;" 
Genesis5:2 wakavasika murume nomukadzi; akavaropafadza, akavatumidza zita rinonzi Munhu, musi wavakasikwa." 
Genesis5:3 Adhamu wakagara makore ane zana namakumi matatu, akabereka mwanakomana wakafanana naye, wakamutodza; akamutumidza zita rinonzi Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Mazuva aAdhamu shure kwokuberekwa kwaSeti akanga ari makore ana mazana masere; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana. 
Genesis5:5 Mazuva ose oupenyu hwaAdhamu akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi matatu, akafa." 
Genesis5:6 Seti wakagara makore ane zana namashanu, akabereka Enoshi;" 
Genesis5:7 Seti akagara makore ana mazana masere namanomwe shure kwokuberekwa kwaEnoshi, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana;" 
Genesis5:8 mazuva ose aSeti akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfumbamwe negumi namaviri, akafa." 
Genesis5:9 Enoshi wakagara makore makumi mapfumbamwe, akabereka Kenani;" 
Genesis5:10 shure kwokuberekwa kwaKenani Enoshi akagara makore ana mazana masere negumi namashanu; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana; 
Genesis5:11 mazuva ose aEnoshi akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfumbamwe namashanu, akafa." 
Genesis5:12 Kenani wakagara makore makumi manomwe, akabereka Maharareri;" 
Genesis5:13 shure kwokuberekwa kwaMaharareri Kenani wakagara makore ana mazana masere namakumi mana; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana. 
Genesis5:14 Mazuva ose aKenani akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfumbamwe negumi, akafa." 
Genesis5:15 Maharareri wakagara makore makumi matanhatu namashanu, akabereka Jaredhi;" 
Genesis5:16 shure kwokuberekwa kwaJaredhi, Maharareri akagara makore ana mazana masere namakumi matatu, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana;" 
Genesis5:17 mazuva ose aMaharareri akanga ari makore ana mazana masere namakumi mapfumbamwe namashanu, akafa." 
Genesis5:18 Jaredhi wakagara makore ane zana namakumi matanhatu namaviri, akabereka Inoki;" 
Genesis5:19 shure kwokuberekwa kwaInoki Jaredhi akagara makore ana mazana masere; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana; 
Genesis5:20 mazuva ose aJaredhi akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi matanhatu namaviri, akafa." 
Genesis5:21 Inoki wakagara makore makumi matanhatu namashanu, akabereka Metusera;" 
Genesis5:22 shure kwokuberekwa kwaMetusera, Inoki wakafamba naMwari makore ana mazana matatu; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis5:23 Mazuva ose aInoki akanga ari makore ana mazana matatu namakumi matanhatu namashanu. 
Genesis5:24 Inoki akafamba naMwari, akasazovapo, nokuti Mwari akamutora." 
Genesis5:25 Metusera wakagara makore ane zana namakumi masere namanomwe, akabereka Rameki;" 
Genesis5:26 shure kwokuberekwa kwaRameki, Metusera akagara makore ana mazana manomwe namakumi masere namaviri; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis5:27 Mazuva ose aMetusera akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi matanhatu namapfumbamwe, akafa." 
Genesis5:28 Rameki wakagara makore ane zana namakumi masere namaviri; akabereka mwanakomana; 
Genesis5:29 akamutumidza zita rinonzi Nowa, achiti, “Uyu achativaraidza pabasa redu napakutambudzika kwamaoko edu, zvinobva panyika yakatukwa naJehovha.”" 
Genesis5:30 Shure kwokuberekwa kwaNowa, Rameki akagara makore ana mazana mashanu namakumi mapfumbamwe namashanu; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis5:31 Mazuva ose aRameki akanga ari makore ana mazana manomwe namakumi manomwe namanomwe, akafa." 
Genesis5:32 Nowa wakanga ana makore ana mazana mashanu; Nowa akabereka Shemu, naHamu, naJafeti." 
Genesis6:1 Zvino vanhu vakati votanga kuwanda panyika, vachiberekerwa vanasikana," 
Genesis6:2 vanakomana vaMwari vakaona vakunda vavanhu kuti vakanaka, vakazvisarudzira pakati pavose vavakada kuva vakadzi vavo." 
Genesis6:3 Ipapo Jehovha akati, “Mweya wangu haungarambi uchigara mumunhu nokusingaperi, zvaari wenyamawo hake; naizvozvo mazuva ake achava makore ane zana namakumi maviri.”" 
Genesis6:4 Panguva iyo kwakanga kuna vanhu varefu kwazvo panyika, napashurewo, kana vanakomana vaMwari vakapinda kuvanasikana vavanhu, ivo vakavaberekera vana. Ndivo vaiva vanhu vane simba vakare, vakanga vakakurumbira." 
Genesis6:5 Zvino Jehovha akaona kuti kuipa kwavanhu kwakanga kuri kukuru panyika, nendangariro dzokufunga kwemwoyo yavo dzakanga dzakaipa bedzi nguva dzose." 
Genesis6:6 Jehovha akazvidemba pamusoro pokuita kwake vanhu panyika, akava neshungu pamwoyo pake." 
Genesis6:7 Jehovha akati, “Ndichaparadza vanhu vandakasika ndivabvise panyika vanhu, nemhuka, nezvinokambaira, neshiri dzedenga; nokuti ndinozvidemba kuti ndakazviita.”" 
Genesis6:8 Asi Nowa wakawana tsitsi pamberi paJehovha. 
Genesis6:9 Marudzi aNowa ndiwo: Nowa wakanga ari munhu wakarurama, asina chipomerwa mumarudzi ake; Nowa wakafamba naMwari." 
Genesis6:10 Nowa akabereka vanakomana vatatu, vaiti: Shemu, naHamu, naJafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Nyika yakanga yakaora pamberi paMwari, nyika yakanga izere nokumanikidzana." 
Genesis6:12 Mwari akaona nyika kuti yakaora; nokuti vanhu vose vakanga vaodza mufambiro wavo panyika. 
Genesis6:13 Ipapo Mwari wakati kuna Nowa, “Kupera kwavanhu vose kwasvika pamberi pangu; nokuti vakazadza nyika nokumanikidzana; tarira, ndichavauraya pamwechete nenyika." 
Genesis6:14 Uzviitire areka nomuti wegoferi; uite makamuri muareka, uinamire nechomukati nechokunze nenamo." 
Genesis6:15 Unofanira kuiita kudai: Kureba kweareka ngakuve makubhiti ana mazana matatu, nokufara kwayo makubhiti makumi mashanu, nokukwirira kwayo makubhiti makumi matatu." 
Genesis6:16 Usiye buri paareka; uripedze kana kwasara kubhiti rimwe kubva kumusoro; nomusuwo weareka uuise parutivi rwayo; uiite ine dzimba nhatu, mutsara wokutanga, nowechipiri, nowechitatu." 
Genesis6:17 Tarira, ini ndinouyisa panyika mvura zhinji, kuti iparadze zvipenyu zvose, zvinomweya woupenyu, pasi pedenga; zvose zviri panyika zvichafa." 
Genesis6:18 Asi ndichaita sungano yangu newe; unofanira kupinda muareka, iwe navanakomana vako, nomukadzi wako, navakadzi vavanakomana vako pamwechete newe." 
Genesis6:19 Napazvipenyu zvose zvenyama uise muareka zviviri zviviri zvamarudzi ose, kuti zvirarame pamwechete newe; ngazvive mukono nehadzi." 
Genesis6:20 Shiri namarudzi adzo, nezvipfuwo namarudzi azvo, nezvinokambaira pasi zvose namarudzi azvo, zvichauya kwauri zviviri zviviri zvamarudzi ose, kuti zviraramiswe." 
Genesis6:21 Iwe utore marudzi ose ezvokudya zvose zvinodyiwa, uzviunganidzire kwauri; kuti zvive zvokudya zvako nezvazvo.”" 
Genesis6:22 Nowa akaita saizvozvo; sezvaakarairwa naMwari, wakaita zvose saizvozvo." 
Genesis7:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Nowa, “Pindai muareka, iwe nemhuri yako yose; nokuti ndakuona iwe kuti wakarurama pamberi pangu parudzi urwu." 
Genesis7:2 Pamhuka dzose dzakanaka utore nomwe nomwe, mukono nehadzi yayo; napamhuka dzose dzisina kunaka utore mbiri mbiri, mukono nehadzi yayo;" 
Genesis7:3 napashiri dzedenga utore nomwe nomwe, jongwe nemhambo, kuti uraramise marudzi ose ari panyika." 
Genesis7:4 Nokuti kwasara mazuva manomwe, ipapo ndichanaisa mvura panyika mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana; zvipenyu zvose zvandakaita ndichazviparadza panyika.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nowa akaita zvose sezvaakarairwa naJehovha. 
Genesis7:6 Nowa wakanga ava namakore ana mazana matanhatu panguva yokuuya kwemvura zhinji panyika. 
Genesis7:7 Ipapo Nowa wakapinda muareka, navanakomana vake, nomukadzi wake, navakadzi vevanakomana vake, nokuda kwemvura zhinji." 
Genesis7:8 Pamhuka dzakanaka, napamhuka dzisina kunaka, neshiri, nezvose zvinokambaira panyika," 
Genesis7:9 zvakapinda kuna Nowa muareka zviviri zviviri, mukono nehadzi, Mwari sezvaakaraira Nowa." 
Genesis7:10 Mazuva manomwe akati apfuura, mvura zhinji ikavapo panyika." 
Genesis7:11 Pagore ramazana matanhatu roupenyu hwaNowa, nomwedzi wechipiri, nezuva regumi namanomwe romwedzi, nezuva iroro matsime ose apakadzika–dzika akadziurwa, namahwindo edenga akazarurwa;" 
Genesis7:12 mvura zhinji ikanaya panyika mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana. 
Genesis7:13 Nomusi iwoyo Nowa wakapinda muareka, naShemu, naHamu, naJafeti, vanakomana vaNowa, nomukadzi waNowa, navakadzi vatatu vavanakomana vake pamwechete naye;" 
Genesis7:14 ivo, nemhuka dzose namarudzi adzo, nezvipfuwo zvose namarudzi azvo, nezvinokambaira zvose zvinokambaira panyika namarudzi azvo, nezvinobhururuka zvose namarudzi azvo, neshiri dzose dzamarudzi ose." 
Genesis7:15 Zvakapinda kuna Nowa muareka, zviviri zviviri zvezvipenyu zvose zvinomweya woupenyu." 
Genesis7:16 Zvose, zvakapinda, zvakapinda zvichiita mukono nehadzi, zvose zvipenyu, sezvaakarairwa naMwari, Jehovha akamuzaririra mukati." 
Genesis7:17 Mvura zhinji ikavapo panyika mazuva ana makumi mana; mvura ikawanda, ikasimudza areka, ikakwiridzirwa pamusoro penyika." 
Genesis7:18 Mvura ikakwirira, ikawanda kwazvo panyika, areka ikafamba pamusoro pemvura." 
Genesis7:19 Mvura ikakwirira kwazvo kwazvo panyika, makomo marefu ose pasi pedenga rose akafukidzwa." 
Genesis7:20 Mvura ikakwirira kusvikira pamakubhiti ane gumi namashanu pamusoro pawo; makomo akafukidzwa. 
Genesis7:21 Zvipenyu zvose zvaifamba panyika zvikafa, zvaiti, shiri, nezvipfuwo, nemhuka, nezvinokambaira, zvose zvaikambaira panyika, navanhu vose;" 
Genesis7:22 zvinhu zvose zvakanga zviine kufema kwomweya woupenyu mumhino dzazvo, zvose zvakanga zviri pakaoma pasi, zvikafa." 
Genesis7:23 Zvipenyu zvose, zvakanga zviri pasi pose, zvikaparadzwa, zvaiti, vanhu, nezvipfuwo, nezvinokambaira, neshiri dzedenga; zvikaparadzwa panyika; Nowa oga akasara, nezvakanga zviri muareka naye." 
Genesis7:24 Mvura ikaramba yakakwirira panyika mazuva ane zana namakumi mashanu. 
Genesis8:1 Zvino Mwari wakarangarira Nowa nezvipenyu zvose, nezvipfuwo zvose zvakanga zviri muareka naye; Mwari akafambisa mhepo panyika, mvura ikaserera," 
Genesis8:2 namatsime apakadzika namahwindo edenga akazarirwa, nemvura yakabva kudenga ikadziviswa," 
Genesis8:3 mvura ikaramba ichidzoka panyika; mazuva ane zana namakumi mashanu akati apfuura, mvura ikaderera." 
Genesis8:4 Nomwedzi wechinomwe, nezuva regumi namanomwe romwedzi, areka ikamira pamusoro pamakomo eArarati." 
Genesis8:5 Mvura ikaramba ichiderera kusvikira pamwedzi wegumi; nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi misoro yamakomo ikaonekwa." 
Genesis8:6 Mazuva ana makumi mana akati apfuura, Nowa akazarura hwindo reareka raakanga aita;" 
Genesis8:7 akabudisa gunguo, iro rikaramba richibhururuka–bhururuka kusvikira mvura yapwa panyika." 
Genesis8:8 Ipapo akabhururutsa njiva paakanga ari, kuti aone kana mvura yaserera panyika;" 
Genesis8:9 asi njiva haina kuwana pokuzorodza rutsoka rwayo, ikadzokera kwaari kuareka, nokuti mvura yakanga iri pamusoro penyika yose; akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akaitora, akaipinza kwaari muareka." 
Genesis8:10 Ipapo akagara mamwe mazuva manomwezve, akabudisazve njiva paareka;" 
Genesis8:11 njiva ikapinda kwaari madekwana; onei mumuromo mayo makanga muine rushizha rwomuorivhi rwakatanhwa; naizvozvo Nowa wakaziva kuti mvura yakanga yaserera panyika. 
Genesis8:12 Akagarazve mazuva manomwe, akabudisazve njiva; iyo haina kudzokerazve kwaari." 
Genesis8:13 Pagore ramazana matanhatu nerimwe, pamwedzi wokutanga, nomusi wokutanga womwedzi, mvura yakanga yapwa panyika; ipapo Nowa akabvisa denga reareka, akatarira, onei pasi pose paoma." 
Genesis8:14 Nomwedzi wechipiri, nezuva ramakumi maviri namanomwe romwedzi, nyika yakanga yaoma." 
Genesis8:15 Zvino Mwari wakataura naNowa akati," 
Genesis8:16 “Budai muareka, iwe, nomukadzi wako, navanakomana vako, navakadzi vavanakomana vako, pamwechete newe." 
Genesis8:17 Budisawo pamwechete newe zvipenyu zvose zvenyama zvinewe, zvinoti, shiri, nezvipfuwo, nezvinokambaira zvose, nezvinokambaira panyika, kuti zviwande panyika, zvibereke, zvive zvizhinji panyika.”" 
Genesis8:18 Ipapo Nowa akabuda, iye navanakomana vake, nomukadzi wake, navakadzi vavanakomana vake pamwechete naye;" 
Genesis8:19 nemhuka dzose, nezvinokambaira zvose, neshiri dzose, nezvose zvinofamba panyika, namarudzi azvo, zvakabuda paareka." 
Genesis8:20 Nowa akavakira Jehovha atari, akatora dzimwe pamhuka dzose dzakanaka neshiri dzose dzakanaka, akapisira zvipiriso zvinopiswa paatari." 
Genesis8:21 Jehovha akanzwa kunhuwira kwakanaka, Jehovha akati mumwoyo make, “Handichazotukizve nyika nokuda kwomunhu; nokuti kufunga kwomwoyo womunhu kwakaipa kubva pauduku hwake; handichazorovizve zvipenyu zvose, sezvandakaita." 
Genesis8:22 Nguva yose yenyika kudyara nokucheka, kutonhora nokudziya, zhizha nechando, masikati nousiku hazvingagumi.”" 
Genesis9:1 Zvino Mwari akaropafadza Nowa navanakomana vake, akati kwavari, “Berekai, muwande, muzadze nyika." 
Genesis9:2 Mhuka dzose dzenyika, neshiri dzose dzedenga, dzichakutyai nokukuvhundukai; zvose zvinokambaira pasi, nehove dzose dzegungwa, zvinoiswa pamaoko enyu." 
Genesis9:3 Zvose zvinofamba zvipenyu zvichava zvokudya zvenyu; ndinokupai zvose, sezvandakakupai miriwo mitema." 
Genesis9:4 Asi nyama, kana ine upenyu hwayo, iro ropa rayo, musaidya iyo." 
Genesis9:5 Zvirokwazvo ropa renyu, roupenyu hwenyu, ndicharitsiva; ndicharitsiva pazvipenyu zvose, ndichatsiva upenyu hwomunhu paruoko rwomunhu naparuoko rwehama yomunhu." 
Genesis9:6 Ani naani anoteura ropa romunhu, ropa rake richateurwawo nomunhu; nokuti Mwari akaita munhu nomufananidzo wake." 
Genesis9:7 As imi berekai, muwande, berekai zvikuru panyika, muwande mukati mayo.”" 
Genesis9:8 Zvino Mwari akataura naNowa navanakomana vake vakanga vanaye, akati," 
Genesis9:9 “Tarirai, ini ndinoita sungano yangu nemi navana venyu vanokuteverai;" 
Genesis9:10 nezvipenyu zvose zvinemi, zvinoti, shiri, nezvipfuwo, nemhuka dzose dzenyika dzinemi; zvose zvinobuda paareka, idzo mhuka dzose dzapanyika." 
Genesis9:11 Ndichaita sungano yangu nemi; zvose zvenyama hazvingazopedzwizve nemvura zhinji: mvura zhinji haingazovepozve kuti iparadze nyika.” 
Genesis9:12 Ipapo Mwari akati, “Ndicho chiratidzo chesungano yandinoita pakati pangu nemi nezvipenyu zvose zvinemi kusvikira kumarudzi asingaperi." 
Genesis9:13 Ndinoisa muraraungu wangu mugore, kuti chive chiratidzo chesungano pakati pangu nenyika." 
Genesis9:14 Zvino ndichati kana ndikauyisa gore pamusoro penyika, muraraungu uyu ukaonekwa mugore," 
Genesis9:15 ndicharangarira sungano yangu iri pakati pangu nemi, napakati pezvipenyu zvose zvenyama, mvura haichazovi zhinjizve kuti iparadze zvose zvenyama." 
Genesis9:16 Muraraungu uchavapo mugore; ndichautarira, kuti ndirangarire sungano isingaperi pakati paMwari nezvipenyu zvose zvenyama zviri panyika.”" 
Genesis9:17 Mwari akati kuna Nowa, “Ndicho chiratidzo chesungano yandakaita pakati pangu nezvose zvenyama zviri panyika.”" 
Genesis9:18 Vanakomana vaNowa vakabuda muareka ndivava: Shemu, naHamu, naJafeti; Hamu ndiye baba vaKenani." 
Genesis9:19 Ndivava vakanga vari vanakomana vaNowa; nyika yose yakazadzwa navo. 
Genesis9:20 Nowa akatanga kuva murimi, akarima munda womuzambiringa;" 
Genesis9:21 akanwa waini, akabatwa, akazvifukura mutende rake." 
Genesis9:22 Zvino Hamu, baba vaKenani, akaona kusasimira kwababa vake, akazivisa vakuru vake vaviri." 
Genesis9:23 Ipapo Shemu naJafeti vakatora nguo, vakaiisa pamafudzi avo, vakaenda manhenda shure, vakafukidzira kusasimira kwababa vavo; zviso zvavo zvakanga zvakatarira shure, vakasaona kusasimira kwababa vavo." 
Genesis9:24 Zvino Nowa akapengenuka pawaini yake, akaziva zvaakaitirwa nomwanakomana wake muduku," 
Genesis9:25 akati, “Kenani ngaatukwe; achava muranda wavaranda kuvakuru vake.”" 
Genesis9:26 Akati, “Jehovha Mwari waShemu ngaakudzwe, Kenani ngaave muranda wake." 
Genesis9:27 Mwari ngaakurise Jafeti, ngaagare mumatende aShemu, Kenani ngaave muranda wake.”" 
Genesis9:28 Nowa akagara shure kwemvura zhinji makore ana mazana matatu namakumi mashanu. 
Genesis9:29 Mazuva ose aNowa akanga ari mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi mashanu, akafa." 
Genesis10:1 Ndiwo marudzi avanakomana vaNowa, naShemu, naHamu, naJafeti; ivo vakaberekerwa vana shure kwemvura zhinji." 
Genesis10:2 Vanakomana vaJafeti ndivo: Gomeru, naMagogi, naMadhai, naJavhani, naTubhari, naMesheki, naTirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Vanakomana vaGomeru ndivo: Ashikenazi, naRifati, naTogarima." 
Genesis10:4 Vanakomana vaJavhani ndivo: Erisha, naTashisi, naSaipurasi, naDhodhanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Kwavari kwakabva vanhu vezvivi zvakapararira. Ndivo vanakomana vaJafeti munyika dzavo, mumwe nomumwe norurimi rwake, nemhuri dzavo, nendudzi dzavo." 
Genesis10:6 Vanakomana vaHamu ndivo: Kushi, naIjipiti, naRibhia, naKenani." 
Genesis10:7 Vanakomana vaKushi ndivo: Sebha, naHavhira, naSabhata, naRama, naSabhuteka; navanakomana vaRama ndivo: Shebha naDhedhani." 
Genesis10:8 Kushi akabereka Nimurodhi, ndiye akatanga kuva nesimba panyika." 
Genesis10:9 Akanga ari mudzimba mukuru pamberi paJehovha; naizvozvo vanoti, “SaNimurodhi, mudzimba mukuru pamberi paJehovha.”" 
Genesis10:10 Ushe hwake hwakatanga paBhabheri, neEreki, neAkadhi, neKarine, panyika yeShinari." 
Genesis10:11 Akabuda kunyika iyo, akaenda Asiria, akavaka Ninivha neRohobhoti–iri, neKara," 
Genesis10:12 neReseni, pakati peNinivha neKara (iri iguta guru)." 
Genesis10:13 Ijipiti akabereka vaRidhia, navaAnami, navaRehabhi, navaNafituhimu," 
Genesis10:14 navaPaturusi navaKasiruhi, (vaFirisitia vakabva kwavari), navaKafutori." 
Genesis10:15 Kenani akabereka Sidhoni, dangwe rake, naHeti;" 
Genesis10:16 naVaJebhusi, naVaAmori, naVaGirigashi;" 
Genesis10:17 naVaHivhi, naVaAriki, navaSini," 
Genesis10:18 navaArivhadhi, navaZemari, navaHamati. Shure kwaivava mhuri dzaVaKenani dzakapararira." 
Genesis10:19 Muganhu waVaKenani wakatanga paSidhoni, ukaenda Gerari, ukasvika Gaza, ukaenda Sodhoma, neGomora, neAdhamu, neZibhoimu, ukasvika paRasha." 
Genesis10:20 Ndivo vanakomana vaHamu, mhuri dzavo, nendimi dzavo, munyika dzavo, nendudzi dzavo." 
Genesis10:21 Naiye Shemu, baba vevana vose vaEbheru, mukuru waJafeti, akaberekerwa vana." 
Genesis10:22 Vanakomana vaShemu ndivo: Eramu, naAsheri, naAripakishadhi, naRudhi, naAramu." 
Genesis10:23 Vanakomana vaAramu ndivo: Uzi, naHuri, naGeteri, naMashi." 
Genesis10:24 Aripakishadhi akabereka Shera, Shera akabereka Ebheru." 
Genesis10:25 Ebheru akaberekerwa vanakomana vaviri, zita romumwe rakanga riri Peregi, nokuti pamazuva ake nyika yakakamurwa; zita romunun'una wake rakanga riri Jokitani." 
Genesis10:26 Jokitani akabereka Arimodhadhi, naSherefi, naHazarimavheti, naJera;" 
Genesis10:27 naHadhoramu, naUsari, naDhikira;" 
Genesis10:28 naObhari, naAbhimaeri, naShebha;" 
Genesis10:29 naOfiri, naHavhira, naJobhabhu; ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaJokitani." 
Genesis10:29 naOfiri, naHavhira, naJobhabhu; ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaJokitani." 
Genesis10:30 Kwavakagara ndiko: kubva paMesha, kuenda Sefari, kugomo rokumabvazuva." 
Genesis10:31 Ndivo vanakomana vaShemu, mhuri dzavo, nendimi dzavo, munyika dzavo, nendudzi dzavo." 
Genesis10:32 Ndidzo mhuri dzavanakomana vaNowa, nedzimba dzavo, nendudzi dzavo; kwavari kwakabva ndudzi dzose dzakapararira, shure kwemvura zhinji." 
Genesis11:1 Nyika yose yakanga ino rurimi rumwe nokutaura kumwe. 
Genesis11:2 Zvino vakati vachitamira mabvazuva, vakawana bani munyika yeShinari, vakagarako." 
Genesis11:3 Vakataurirana, vachiti, “Uyai, ngatiite zvidhina, tizvipise kwazvo.” Zvidhina zvakava mabwe avo, nebitumini rakava dope ravo." 
Genesis11:4 Vakati, “Uyai, ngatizvivakire guta, norusvingo, runomusoro unosvikira kudenga; tizvimutsire mukurumbira, kuti tirege kupararira panyika yose.”" 
Genesis11:5 Ipapo Jehovha akaburuka kuzotarira guta norusvingo, rwakanga ruchivakwa navanakomana vavanhu." 
Genesis11:6 Jehovha akati, “Tarirai, vanhu ava ndivamwe, vanorurimi rumwe vose; zvino ndizvo zvavanotanga kuita; zvino hakuchina chinhu chavangada kuita chavangadziviswa." 
Genesis11:7 Hendei, tiburuke, tinopesanisa rurimi rwavo ipapo, kuti varege kunzwana kana votaurirana.”" 
Genesis11:8 Jehovha akavaparadzira ipapo, vakapararira panyika yose, vakarega kuvaka guta ravo." 
Genesis11:9 Naizvozvo vakaritumidza Bhabheri, nokuti ipapo Jehovha akapesanisa rurimi rwenyika yose; Jehovha akavaparadzira ipapo, vakaenda kunyika dzose." 
Genesis11:10 Ndiwo marudzi aShemu. Shemu wakanga ana makore ane zana, akabereka Aripakishadhi, mvura zhinji yapfuura makore maviri;" 
Genesis11:11 wakati abereka Aripakishadhi, Shemu akagara makore ana mazana mashanu; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:12 Aripakishadhi wakagara makore ana makumi matatu namashanu, akabereka Shera;" 
Genesis11:13 wakati abereka Shera, Aripakishadhi akagara makore ana mazana mana namatatu, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:14 Shera wakagara makore ana makumi matatu, akabereka Ebheru." 
Genesis11:15 Wakati abereka Ebheru, Shera akagara makore ana mazana mana namatatu; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:16 Ebheru wakagara makore ana makumi matatu namana, akabereka Peregi," 
Genesis11:17 wakati abereka Peregi, Ebheru akagara makore ana mazana mana namakumi matatu, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:18 Peregi wakagara makore ana makumi matatu, akabereka Rehu;" 
Genesis11:19 wakati abereka Rehu, Peregi akagara makore ana mazana maviri namapfumbamwe, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:20 Rehu wakagara makore ana makumi matatu namaviri, akabereka Serugu;" 
Genesis11:21 wakati abereka Serugu, Rehu akagara makore ana mazana maviri namanomwe; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:22 Serugu wakagara makore ana makumi matatu, akabereka Nahori;" 
Genesis11:23 wakati abereka Nahori, Serugu akagara makore ana mazana maviri, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori wakagara makore ana makumi maviri namapfumbamwe, akabereka Tera;" 
Genesis11:25 Nahori akagara makore ane zana negumi namapfumbamwe, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:26 Tera wakagara makore ana makumi manomwe, akabereka Abhuramu naNahori, naHarani." 
Genesis11:27 Ndiwo marudzi aTera; Tera wakabereka Abhuramu, naNahori, naHarani; Harani akabereka Roti;" 
Genesis11:28 Harani akafa, baba vake Tera vachiri vapenyu, panyika yokuberekwa kwake, paUri yavaKaradhia." 
Genesis11:29 Abhuramu naNahori vakazviwanira vakadzi; zita romukadzi waAbhuramu rainzi Sarai; zita romukadzi waNahori rainzi Mirika, mukunda waHarani, baba vaMirika, nababa vaIsika." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai wakanga asingabereki, wakanga asina mwana." 
Genesis11:31 Zvino Tera wakatora mwanakomana wake Abhuramu, naRoti, mwanakomana waHarani, mwanakomana womwanakomana wake, naSarai, mukadzi womwanakomana wake Abhuramu; vakatama navo vakabva Uru yavaKaradhia, kuti vaende kunyika yeKenani, vakasvika Harani, vakagarapo." 
Genesis11:32 Mazuva aTera akanga ari makore ana mazana maviri namashanu; Tera akafira Harani. 
Genesis12:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Abhuramu, “Ibva panyika yako, nokuhama dzako, nokuimba yababa vako, uende kunyika yandichakuratidza iyo;" 
Genesis12:2 ndichakuita rudzi rukuru, ndichakuropafadza, ndichakudza zita rako, iwe uropafadze vamwe." 
Genesis12:3 Ndicharopafadza ivo vanokuropafadza; unokutuka, ndichamutukawo; marudzi ose enyika acharopafadzwa mauri.”" 
Genesis12:4 Naizvozvo Abhuramu wakaenda sezvaakaudzwa naJehovha; naRoti wakaenda naye. Abhuramu wakanga ana makore ana makumi manomwe namashanu pakubva kwake Harani. 
Genesis12:5 Abhuramu akatora Sarai, mukadzi wake, naRoti, mwanakomana womunun'una wake, nepfuma yavo yose yavakanga vaunganidza, navana vavakanga vabereka paHarani, vakabuda kuenda kunyika yeKenani; vakandosvika kunyika yeKenani." 
Genesis12:6 Abhuramu akagura nenyika iyo akasvika panzvimbo inonzi Shekemu, pamuti womuouki weMore; nguva iyo VaKenani vakanga vari munyika iyo." 
Genesis12:7 Zvino Jehovha akazviratidza kuna Abhuramu, akati, “Ndichapa vana vako nyika iyi;” akavakira Jehovha atari ipapo, iye wakanga azviratidza kwaari." 
Genesis12:8 Akabva ipapo, akaenda kugomo riri kumabvazuva aBhetieri, akadzikapo tende rake; Bhetieri rakanga riri kumavirazuva neAi kumabvazuva; akavakirapo Jehovha atari, akanamata Zita raJehovha ipapo." 
Genesis12:9 Kubva ipapo Abhuramu wakaramba achitamira kumavirazuva. 
Genesis12:10 Zvino nzara yakanga iripo panyika iyo; Abhuramu ndokuburukira Ijipiti kundogarako; nokuti nzara yakanga iri huru panyika iyo. 
Genesis12:11 Zvino wakati oda kupinda Ijipiti, akati kuna Sarai, mukadzi wake, “Tarira, ndinoziva kuti uri mukadzi wakanaka pachiso chako;" 
Genesis12:12 kana VaIjipiti vachikuona, vachati, ‘Ndiye mukadzi wake,’ vachandiuraya, asi iwe vachakurega uri mupenyu." 
Genesis12:13 Uti hako uri hanzvadzi yangu, kuti ndiitirwe zvakanaka nokuda kwako, kuti mweya wangu urarame nokuda kwako.”" 
Genesis12:14 Zvino Abhuramu achisvika Ijipiti, vaIjipiti vakaona mukadzi kuti wakanaka kwazvo." 
Genesis12:15 Namachinda aFarao akamuonawo, vakandomurumbidza kuna Farao; mukadzi akatorwa, akaiswa mumba maFarao." 
Genesis12:16 Akaitira Abhuramu zvakanaka nokuda kwake; waiva namakwai, nemombe, namakono emadhongi, navaranda, navarandakadzi, namadhongi echikadzi, namakamera." 
Genesis12:17 Asi Jehovha akatambudza Farao neveimba yake namatambudziko makuru nokuda kwaSarai, mukadzi waAbhuramu." 
Genesis12:18 Zvino Farao wakadana Abhuramu akati, “Chiiko ichi chawakandiitira? Wakaregereiko kundizivisa kuti mukadzi wako." 
Genesis12:19 Wakarevereiko uchiti, ‘Ihanzvadzi yangu?’ Naizvozvo ndakamutora kuti ave mukadzi wangu; naizvozvo zvino hoyu mukadzi wako, mutore, uende hako.”" 
Genesis12:20 Zvino Farao akaraira vamwe varume pamusoro pake, vakamuperekedza iye nomukadzi wake nezvose zvaakanga anazvo." 
Genesis13:1 Zvino Abhuramu wakakwira, akabva Ijipiti, iye nomukadzi wake, nezvose zvaakanga anazvo, naRotiwo anaye; vakaenda kurutivi rwenyasi." 
Genesis13:2 Abhuramu akanga akapfuma kwazvo mombe, nesirivha, nendarama." 
Genesis13:3 Akafamba nzendo dzake achibva nyasi kusvikira paBhetieri, kunzvimbo iya kwaiva netende rake pakutanga, pakati peBhetieri neAi;" 
Genesis13:4 kunzvimbo yeatari, yaakanga aitapo pakutanga; Abhuramu akanamata zita raJehovha ipapo." 
Genesis13:5 NaRoti, iye wakaenda naAbhuramu, wakanga aine makwai, nemombe, namatende." 
Genesis13:6 Nyika ikasavaringana, kuti vagare panzvimbo imwe; nokuti pfuma yavo yakanga iri zhinji; vakasagona kugara panzvimbo imwe." 
Genesis13:7 Vafudzi vezvipfuwo zvaAbhuramu navafudzi vezvipfuwo zvaRoti vakaita nharo; VaKenani navaPerezi vakanga vagere panyika iyo. 
Genesis13:8 Ipapo Abhuramu akati kuna Roti, “Nharo ngadzirege kuvapo pakati pangu newe, napakati pavafudzi vangu navafudzi vako, nokuti tiri hama." 
Genesis13:9 Ko nyika yose haizi pamberi pako here? Paradzana hako neni; kana iwe ukaenda kuruboshwe, ini ndichaenda kurudyi; kana iwe ukaenda kurudyi ini ndichaenda kuruboshwe.”" 
Genesis13:10 Roti akasimudzira meso ake, akaona bani rose reJodhani, kuti rakanga riine mvura pose, Jehovha achigere kuparadza Sodhoma neGomora; rakanga rakaita somunda waJehovha, senyika yeIjipiti, kana munhu achienda Zoari." 
Genesis13:11 Roti akazvitsaurira bani rose reJodhani; Roti akaenda kurutivi rwamabvazuva; vakaparadzana havo. 
Genesis13:12 Abhuramu akagara panyika yeKenani, Roti akagara pamaguta aiva kubani, akaswededzera tende rake kusvikira paSodhomu." 
Genesis13:13 Zvino varume veSodhomu vakanga vakaipa, vaitadzira Jehovha kwazvokwazvo." 
Genesis13:14 Zvino Roti wakati aparadzana naye, Jehovha akati kuna Abhuramu, “Simudza hako meso ako ipapo paugere, utarire kurutivi rwokumusoro, norwenyasi, norwokumabvazuva, norwokumavirira;" 
Genesis13:15 nokuti nyika yose yaunoona, ndichaipa iwe navana vako nokusingaperi." 
Genesis13:16 Ndichaita vana vako seguruva renyika; kuti kana kuine munhu anogona kuverenga guruva renyika, navana vako vangaverengwawo." 
Genesis13:17 Simuka, ufambe nenyika pakureba kwayo, napaupamhi hwayo, nokuti ndichakupa iyo.”" 
Genesis13:18 Ipapo Abhuramu wakabvisa tende rake, akandogara pamiti yemiouki yeMamure, iri paHebhuroni, akavakirapo Jehovha atari." 
Genesis14:1 Zvino nenguva yaAmuraferi, mambo weShinari, naArioki mambo weErasari, naKedhoriraomeri, mambo weEramu, naTidhari, mambo weGoyimi," 
Genesis14:2 vakarwa naBhera, mambo weSodhomu, naBherisha, mambo weGomora, naShinabhi, mambo weAdhamu, naShemebheri, mambo weZebhoimi, namambo weBhera (rinonziwo Zoari)." 
Genesis14:3 Ava vose vakasangana mumupata weSidhimu (ndiro Gungwa Romunyu). 
Genesis14:4 Vakanga vava varanda veKedhoriameri makore ane gumi namaviri, vakamumukira negore regumi namatatu." 
Genesis14:5 Ipapo Kedhoriameri wakauya negore regumi namana, namadzimambo aakanga anawo, akakunda vaRefaimi paAshiteroti–karinaimi, navaZuzimi paHamu, navaEmimi paShave–kiriataimi," 
Genesis14:6 navaHori pagomo ravo reSeiri, kusvikira paEriparani, pedyo nesango." 
Genesis14:7 Vakadzoka, vakasvika Enimishipati (rinonziwo Kadheshi), vakakunda nyika yose yavaAmareki, navaAmori, vakanga vagere paHazazoni–tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Zvino mambo weSodhoma, namambo weGomora, namambo weAdhamu, namambo weZebhoimi, namambo weBhera (rinonziwo Zoari), vakabuda vakagadzira hondo kuzorwa navo pamupata weSidhimu;" 
Genesis14:9 kuti varwe naKedhoriraomeri, mambo weEramu, naTidhari, mambo weGoyimi, naAmuraferi, mambo weShinari, naArioki, mambo weErasari; madzimambo mana kuti arwe namadzimambo mashanu." 
Genesis14:10 Zvino mupata weSidhimu wakanga uzere namakomba ane tara, madzimambo eSodhomu neGomora vakatiza vakawiramo; vakasara vakatizira kugomo." 
Genesis14:11 Vakatora pfuma yose yeSodhoma neGomora, nezvokudya zvavo zvose, vakaenda." 
Genesis14:12 Vakatorawo Roti, mwanakomana womunun'una waAbhuramu wakanga agere paSodhoma, nepfuma yake, vakaenda." 
Genesis14:13 Zvino mumwe wakanga apukunyuka wakasvika, akaudza Abhuramu, muHebheru; iye wakanga agere pamiti yemiouki yaMamure, muAmori, munun'una waEshikori, munun'una waAneri; ava vakanga vaita sungano naAbhuramu." 
Genesis14:14 Zvino Abhuramu wakati achinzwa kuti hama yake yatapwa, akaraira varume vake vakanga vadzidziswa kurwa, vakazvarwa paimba yake, vana mazana matatu negumi navasere, akavateverera kusvikira paDhani;" 
Genesis14:15 akakamura varwi vake usiku, iye navaranda vake, akavakunda, akavateverera kusvikira paHobha, riri kurudyi rweDhamasikosi." 
Genesis14:16 Akadzosa pfuma yose, akadzosawo Roti, hama yake, nepfuma yake, navakadziwo navanhu." 
Genesis14:17 Ipapo mambo weSodhomu wakabuda kundosangana naye pakudzoka kwake pakuuraya Kedhoriameri namadzimambo akanga anavo pamupata weShave (ndiwo mupata wamambo). 
Genesis14:18 Merikizedheki, mambo weSaremi, akauya nechingwa newaini; iye wakanga ari mupristi waMwari woKudengadenga." 
Genesis14:19 Akamuropafadza, akati, “Abhuramu ngaaropafadzwe naMwari woKudengadenga, muridzi wokudenga napasi." 
Genesis14:20 Mwari woKudengadenga ngaakudzwe, wakapa vavengi venyu mumaoko enyu.” Akamupa chegumi chezvose." 
Genesis14:21 Zvino mambo weSodhomu akati kuna Abhuramu, “Ndipe vanhu, iwe utore hako pfuma.”" 
Genesis14:22 Abhuramu akati kuna mambo weSodhomu, “Ndakasimudzira ruoko rwangu kuna Jehovha, Mwari woKudengadenga, muridzi wokudenga napasi," 
Genesis14:23 kuti handingatori rushinda kana rukanda rweshangu, kana chinhu chimwe chezvinhu zvenyu, kuti murege kuzoti, ‘Ndini ndakapfumisa Abhuramu,’" 
Genesis14:24 ini handidi hangu, asi zvakadyiwa namajaya chete, nomugove wavanhu vakaenda neni, vanaAneri, naEshikori, naMamure, ngavatore migove yavo.”" 
Genesis15:1 Shure kwaizvozvo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Abhuramu pane zvaakaratidzwa, richiti, “Usatya Abhuramu; ini ndiri nhoo yako nomubairo wako mukurukuru.”" 
Genesis15:2 Abhuramu akati, “Ishe Jehovha, muchandipeiko, zvondofa hangu ndisina mwana; uchava mudyi wenhaka yeimba yangu ndiEriezeri weDhamasiko kani?”" 
Genesis15:3 Abhuramu akati, “Tarirai, hamuna kundipa mwana; zvino uyo wakaponerwa mumba mangu ndiye achava mudyi wenhaka yangu.”" 
Genesis15:4 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwaari rikati, “Uyu haangavi mudyi wenhaka yako; asi uyo, achabuda paura hwako, ndiye achava mudyi wenhaka yako.”" 
Genesis15:5 Akamubudisa panze akati, “Zvino tarira kudenga, uverenge nyenyedzi, kana uchigona kudziverenga.” Akati kwaari, “Ndizvo zvichaita vana vako.”" 
Genesis15:6 Iye akatenda Jehovha, akamuti ndiko kururama kwake." 
Genesis15:7 Akati kwaari, “Ndini Jehovha akakubudisa panyika yeUri yavaKaradhia, kuti ndikupe nyika iyi, ive nhaka yako.”" 
Genesis15:8 Iye akati, “Ishe Jehovha, ndichaziva seiko kuti ichava nhaka yangu?”" 
Genesis15:9 Akati kwaari, “Nditorere tsiru rina makore matatu, nesheche yembudzi ina makore matatu, nehondohwe ina makore matatu, nenjiva, namwana wenjiva.”" 
Genesis15:10 Akandomutorera izvozvo zvose, akazvipamura napakati, akagadzika rumwe rutivi rwakatarisana norumwe; asi shiri haana kudzipamura." 
Genesis15:11 Ipapo magora akaburukira kunyama, asi Abhuramu wakaadzinga." 
Genesis15:12 Zvino zuva rakati rovira, Abhuramu ndokubatwa nehope huru; akawirwa nokutya kwakabva parima guru." 
Genesis15:13 Mwari akati kuna Abhuramu, “Uzive kwazvo kuti vana vako vachava vatorwa munyika isati iri yavo, vachava varanda vavo, vachatambudzwa makore ana mazana mana;" 
Genesis15:14 asi ini ndichatonga rudzi urwo rwavachashumira, pashure vachabudapo nepfuma zhinji." 
Genesis15:15 Asi iwe uchaenda kuna madzibaba ako norugare; uchavigwa wakwegura kwazvo. 
Genesis15:16 Rudzi rwechina ruchadzokera pano, nokuti kusarurama kwaVaAmori kuchigere kuzara.”" 
Genesis15:17 Zvino zuva rakati ravira, kwasviba, choto chinopfungaira nezhenje romoto zvakaonekwa zvichipfuura napakati penhindi idzodzo dzenyama." 
Genesis15:18 Nomusi iwoyo Jehovha akaita sungano naAbhuramu, akati, “Vana vako ndavapa nyika iyi, kubva parwizi rweIjipiti kusvikira kurwizi rukuru, runonzi Yufuretesi." 
Genesis15:19 VaKeni, navaKenizi, navaKadhimoni," 
Genesis15:20 navaHeti, navaPerezi, navaRefaimi," 
Genesis15:21 naVaAmori, naVaKenani, naVaGirigashi, naVaJebhusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Zvino Sarai, mukadzi waAbhuramu, wakanga asingamuberekeri vana; iye wakanga aine murandakadzi, muIjipiti, wainzi Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai akati kuna Abhuramu, “Tarira Jehovha akandikonesa kubereka, pinda hako kumurandakadzi wangu, zvimwe ndingawana vana naye.” Abhuramu akateerera shoko raSarai." 
Genesis16:3 Zvino Sarai mukadzi waAbhuramu, wakatora Hagari muIjipiti, murandakadzi wake; Abhuramu zvino wakanga agara makore ane gumi panyika yeKenani akamupa Abhuramu, murume wake, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis16:4 Akapinda kuna Hagari, iye akatora mimba; zvino wakati aona kuti wava nemimba, akashora vatenzi vake." 
Genesis16:5 Ipapo Sarai akati kuna Abhuramu, “Kukanganiswa kwangu ngakuve pamusoro pako; ndini ndakapa murandakadzi wangu pachipfuva chako, zvino iye wakati aona kuti wava nemimba, akandishora; Jehovha ngaatonge pakati pangu newe.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abhuramu akati kuna Sarai, “Tarira, murandakadzi wako uri paruoko rwako, umuitire sezvaunoda.” Zvino Sarai wakamunetsa, akatiza." 
Genesis16:7 Mutumwa waJehovha akamuwana patsime remvura musango, patsime riri panzira inoenda Shuri." 
Genesis16:8 Akati, “Nhai Hagari, murandakadzi waSarai, wabvepiko? Unoendepiko?” Iye akati, “Ndinotiza vatenzi vangu Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Mutumwa waJehovha akati kwaari, “Dzokera kuna vatenzi vako, uzvidukupise pasi pake.”" 
Genesis16:10 Mutumwa waJehovha akati kwaari, “Ndichawandisa vana vako, varege kuverengwa nokuwanda kwavo.”" 
Genesis16:11 Mutumwa waJehovha akatiwo kwaari, “Tarira wava nemimba, uchabereka mwanakomana; umutumidze zita rinonzi Ishimaeri, nokuti Jehovha akanzwa kutambudzika kwako." 
Genesis16:12 Iye uchava sedhongi romusango pakati pavanhu; ucharwa navanhu vose, navanhu vose vacharwa naye; uchagara akatarisana nehama dzake dzose.”" 
Genesis16:13 Hagari akatumidza Jehovha akataurirana naye, zita rinonzi: Ndimi Mwari anoona; nokuti wakati, “Zviro kwazvo ndamuona pano oenda, iye unondiona!”" 
Genesis16:14 Naizvozvo tsime iro rakatumidzwa kuti Bheeriahiroi (tsime raiye mupenyu unondiona); riri pakati peKadheshi neBheredhi. 
Genesis16:15 Hagari akaberekera Abhuramu mwanakomana; Abhuramu akatumidza mwanakomana wake, wakaberekwa naHagari, zita rinonzi Ishimaeri." 
Genesis16:16 Abhuramu wakanga ana makore makumi masere namatanhatu, Hagari achimuberekera Ishimaeri." 
Genesis17:1 Abhuramu wakati asvika makore ana makumi mapfumbamwe namapfumbamwe, Jehovha akazviratidza kuna Abhuramu, akati kwaari, “Ndini Mwari waMasimbaose, famba pamberi pangu, uve wakarurama." 
Genesis17:2 Ndichaita sungano yangu pakati pangu newe, ndichakuwanza kwazvo.”" 
Genesis17:3 Ipapo Abhuramu akawira pasi nechiso chake, Mwari akataura naye akati," 
Genesis17:4 “Kana ndirini, tarira, sungano yangu inewe, uchava baba vendudzi zhinji zhinji." 
Genesis17:5 Zita rako harichazonzi Abhuramu, asi zita rako richanzi Abhurahamu; nokuti ndakakuita baba vendudzi zhinji zhinji." 
Genesis17:6 Ndichakuitai kuti muberekane muwande zvikuru; ndichakuita ndudzi, namadzimambo achabva kwauri." 
Genesis17:7 “Ndichasimbisa sungano yangu pakati pangu newe, navana vako vanokutevera pamarudzi avo ose, kuti ive sungano isingaperi; ndichava Mwari wako nevevana vako vanokutevera." 
Genesis17:8 Ndichakupa iwe navana vako vanokutevera, nyika mauri mutorwa iwe, nyika yeKenani yose, kuti ive yako nokusingaperi; ini ndichava Mwari wako.”" 
Genesis17:9 Mwari akatiwo kuna Abhurahamu, “Kana uriwe, chengeta sungano yangu, iwe navana vako vanokutevera pamarudzi avo ose." 
Genesis17:10 Ndiyo sungano yangu, yamunofanira kuchengeta pakati pangu nemi navana vako vanokutevera, vanakomana vose pakati penyu ngavadzingiswe." 
Genesis17:11 Mudzingiswe panyama yechikanda chenyu chepamberi, kuti chive chiratidzo chesungano iri pakati pangu nemi." 
Genesis17:12 Mwanakomana ane mazuva masere pakati penyu ngaadzingiswe, mukomana mumwe nomumwe pamarudzi enyu, kana akazvarwa mumba, kana akatengwa nemari kuvatorwa vapi navapi, vasati vari vavana vako." 
Genesis17:13 Wakazvarwa mumba mako, nowakatengwa nemari, vanofanira kudzingiswa; sungano yangu ive panyama penyu, ive sungano isingaperi." 
Genesis17:14 Munhurume asina kudzingiswa, asina kudzingiswa panyama yechikanda chake chepamberi, munhu akadai anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake, akaputsa sungano yangu.”" 
Genesis17:15 Mwari akatiwo kuna Abhurahamu, “Kana ari Sarai, mukadzi wako haufaniri kuzomutumidza zita rinonzi Sarai, asi zita rake richanzi Sara;" 
Genesis17:16 ndichamuropafadza iye, ndikupe mwanakomana kwaari; ndichamuropafadza iye, kuti ave mai vendudzi; madzimambo avanhu achabva maari.”" 
Genesis17:17 Ipapo Abhurahamu wakawira pasi nechiso chake, akaseka, akati mumwoyo make, “Ko munhu ana makore ane zana ungaberekerwa mwana here? NaSara, wava namakore ana makumi mapfumbamwe, angabereka here?”" 
Genesis17:18 Abhurahamu akati kuna Mwari, “Dai Ishimaeri achirarama hake pamberi penyu!”" 
Genesis17:19 Mwari akati kwaari, “Kwete, asi Sara, mukadzi wako, ndiye achakuberekera mwanakomana, unofanira kumutumidza zita rinonzi Isaka; ndichaita sungano yangu naye, ive sungano isingaperi pakati pavana vake vanomutevera." 
Genesis17:20 Kana ari Ishimaeri, ndakunzwawo; tarira, ndamuropafadza, ndichamuberekesa vana vazhinji, nokumuwanzisa kwazvo; achabereka madzishe ane gumi namaviri, ndichamuita rudzi rukuru." 
Genesis17:21 Asi sungano yangu ndichaisimbisa naIsaka, uyo wauchaberekerwa naSara nenguva ino.”" 
Genesis17:22 Akapedza kutaura naye, Mwari akakwira achibva kuna Abhurahamu." 
Genesis17:23 Ipapo Abhurahamu wakatora Ishimaeri, mwanakomana wake, navose vakazvarwa mumba make, navose vakatengwa nemari yake, munhurume mumwe nomumwe kuvanhu vakanga vari paimba yaAbhurahamu, akavadzingisa zvikanda zvavo zvapamberi nomusi iwoyo, sezvaakaudzwa naMwari." 
Genesis17:24 Abhurahamu wakanga ana makore ana makumi mapfumbamwe namapfumbamwe musi wokudzingiswa kwake. 
Genesis17:25 Ishimaeri, mwanakomana wake, wakanga ana makore ane gumi namatatu musi wokudzingiswa kwake." 
Genesis17:26 Nomusi uyo Abhurahamu wakadzingiswa pamwechete naIshimaeri mwanakomana wake. 
Genesis17:27 Navarume vose veimba yake, vakanga vazvarirwa mumba make, navakanga vatengwa nemari kuvatorwa, vakadzingiswa pamwechete naye." 
Genesis18:1 Zvino Jehovha akazviratidza kwaari pamiti yemiouki yeMamure, agere pamusuwo wetende masikati zuva richipisa;" 
Genesis18:2 akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, akaona varume vatatu vamire vakatarisana naye; akati achivaona, akabva pamusuwo wetende, akamhanya kundosangana navo, akakotamira pasi," 
Genesis18:3 akati, “Ishe wangu, kana ndawana nyasha kwamuri, musapfuura henyu pamuranda wenyu." 
Genesis18:4 Ngavauye nemvura shomanana, mushambidze tsoka dzenyu, muzorore pasi pomuti;" 
Genesis18:5 ini nditore chimedu chechingwa, musimbise mwoyo yenyu; mugozopfuura henyu, nokuti ndizvo zvamauyira kumuranda wenyu.” Ivo vakati, “Ita hako sezvawataura.”" 
Genesis18:6 Abhurahamu akakurumidza kupinda mutende kuna Sara, akati, “Kurumidza ugadzire zviyero zvitatu zvoupfu hwakatsetseka, ukanye, ubike zvingwa zviduku.”" 
Genesis18:7 Naiye Abhurahamu akamhanyira kumombe, akatora mhuru ine nyama yakapfava, yakanaka, akapa muranda wake, iye akakurumidza kuigadzira." 
Genesis18:8 Akatora mukaka wakafa, nomukaka mumbishi, nemhuru yaakanga agadzira, akazviisa pamberi pavo; akamira navo munyasi momuti, vakadya." 
Genesis18:9 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Sara, mukadzi wako, ari kupiko?” Iye akati, “Tarirai, ari mutende.”" 
Genesis18:10 Iye akati, “Zvirokwazvo, kana gore rapfuura, ndichauyazve kwamuri, nenguva iyo Sara, mukadzi wako, achava nomwanakomana.” Zvino Sara akanga achiteerera ari pamusuwo wetende shure kwake." 
Genesis18:11 Zvino Abhurahamu naSara vakanga vakwegura, vava namakore mazhinji; nomutoo wavakadzi wakanga watoguma kuna Sara." 
Genesis18:12 Sara akaseka mumwoyo make akati, “Ini ndingazvifarirawo here zvandachembera, naiye tenzi wangu akwegurawo?”" 
Genesis18:13 Jehovha akati kuna Abhurahamu, “Sara wasekereiko, achiti, ‘Ko ini muchembere ndichabereka mwana zvirokwazvo here?’" 
Genesis18:14 Kune chinhu chingakunda Jehovha here? Nguva ino, gore rapfuura, ndichadzokera kwauri; Sara achava nomwanakomana.”" 
Genesis18:15 Asi Sara akaramba achiti, “Handina kuseka,” nokuti akanga achitya. Iye akati, “Kwete waseka hako.”" 
Genesis18:16 Zvino vaya varume vakasimuka, vakabva ipapo, vakatarira Sodhomu; Abhurahamu akaenda navo achivaperekedza." 
Genesis18:17 Zvino Jehovha akati, “Ndichavanzira Abhurahamu zvandinoita here?" 
Genesis18:18 Abhurahamu zvaachava rudzi rukuru rune simba, nendudzi dzose dzenyika dzicharopafadzwa maari?" 
Genesis18:19 Nokuti ndakamutsaura, kuti araire vana vake naveimba yake vanomutevera, kuti vachengete nzira yaJehovha, vaite zvakarurama nezvakanaka; kuti Jehovha auyise pamusoro paAbhurahamu izvo zvaakataura pamusoro pake.”" 
Genesis18:20 Ipapo Jehovha akati, “Kunyangadza kukuru kweSodhomu neGomora kukuru kwazvo; zvirokwazvo zvivi zvavo zvakaipa kwazvo;" 
Genesis18:21 ndichaburuka zvino kuti ndione izvo zvavaita, kana zvakafanana nokunyangadza kwavo kwakasvika kwandiri; kana zvisina kudaro, ndichazviziva.”" 
Genesis18:22 Zvino vaya varume vakabva, vakaenda Sodhomu; asi Abhurahamu akaramba amire pamberi paJehovha." 
Genesis18:23 Zvino Abhurahamu wakaswedera, akati, “Muchaparadza vakarurama pamwechete navakaipa here?" 
Genesis18:24 Zvimwe vangavapo vakarurama vana makumi mashanu muguta; muchaparadza nzvimbo iyo, mukasainzwira tsitsi nokuda kwavakarurama vana makumi mashanu varimo here?" 
Genesis18:25 Ngazvive kure nemi kuita kudaro kuuraya vakarurama pamwechete navakaipa, kuti vakarurama vave savakaipa, ngazvive kure nemi. Mutongi wenyika yose haangaiti zvakarurama here?”" 
Genesis18:26 Ipapo Jehovha akati, “Kana ndikawana muSodhomu vakarurama vana makumi mashanu mukati meguta, ndichanzwira nzvimbo yose tsitsi nokuda kwavo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Abhurahamu akapindura akati, “Tarirai zvino, ndatsunga kutaura naJehovha, ini guruva nedota hangu;" 
Genesis18:28 zvimwe kuchashaikwa vashanu kuvakarurama vana makumi mashanu; mungaparadza guta rose kana vashanu vashaikwa here?” Akati, “Handingariparadzi, kana ndikawanamo makumi mana navashanu.”" 
Genesis18:29 Akataurazve naye akati, “Zvimwe kuchawanikwamo makumi mana.” Akati, “Handingazviiti nokuda kwamakumi mana.”" 
Genesis18:30 Akati, “Jehovha ngaarege hake kunditsamwira, kana ndikataurazve. Zvimwe vana makumi matatu vachawanikwamo.” Akati, “Handingazviiti, kana ndikawana makumi matatu.”" 
Genesis18:31 Akati, “Tarirai, ndatsunga kutaura naJehovha, zvimwe vana makumi maviri vachawanikwamo.” Akati, “Handingariparadzi nokuda kwamakumi maviri.”" 
Genesis18:32 Akati, “Jehovha ndikataurazve kamwechete; zvimwe vane gumi rimwechete vangawanikwamo.” Akati, “Handingariparadzi nokuda kwaivavo vane gumi.”" 
Genesis18:33 Ipapo Jehovha akabva, apedza kutaura naAbhurahamu; naAbhurahamu akadzokera kumba kwake." 
Genesis19:1 Vatumwa vaviri vakasvika Sodhomu madekwana; Roti akanga agere pasuwo reSodhomu; Roti akavaona, akasimuka, akaenda kundosangana navo, akakotamira pasi nechiso chake;" 
Genesis19:2 akati, “Tarirai, madzishe angu, chidotsaukirai henyu kumba kwomuranda wenyu, muvate usiku hwose, mushambidze tsoka dzenyu, mugofumira parwendo rwenyu.” Ivo vakati, “Kwete tichavata hedu padare usiku hwose.”" 
Genesis19:3 Akavanyengetera zvikuru; vakadzimara votsaukira kwaari, vakapinda mumba make; akavagadzirira chirayiro, akabika chingwa chisina mbiriso, vakadya;" 
Genesis19:4 zvino vasati vavata, varume veguta, ivo varume veSodhomu, vakakomba imba, vaduku navakuru, vanhu vose vokumativi ose;" 
Genesis19:5 vakadanidzira kuna Roti, vakati kwaari, “Vari kupiko varume vakapinda kumba kwako usiku huno? Vaburitsirei kwatiri, kuti tivazive.”" 
Genesis19:6 Roti akabuda akaenda kwavari kumusuwo, akazarira musuwo shure kwake." 
Genesis19:7 Akati, “Regai henyu kuita zvakaipa zvakadai, hama dzangu." 
Genesis19:8 Tarirai, ndine vakunda vaviri vasina kumboziva murume, regai ndivabudisire kwamuri, muvaitire ivo sezvamunoda; asi varume ava, musavaitira chinhu, nokuti ndizvo zvavakapindira mumumvuri wedenga rangu.”" 
Genesis19:9 Ivo vakati, “Suduruka!” Vakati, “Munhu uyu wakauya kuzogara pano ari mutorwa, iye zvino anoda kuva mutongi. Zvino tichakuitira zvakaipa iwe kupfuura ivo.” Vakamanikidza murume uyo Roti, vakaswedera kuputsa gonhi." 
Genesis19:10 Asi varume vakatambanudza maoko avo, vakakwevera Roti mumba mavakanga vari, vakapfiga gonhi." 
Genesis19:11 Vakapofomadza vakanga vari pamusuwo, vaduku navakuru; vakazvinetsa vachitsvaka musuwo." 
Genesis19:12 Varume vakati kuna Roti, “Une vamwe pano here? Kana mukuwasha, kana vanakomana vako, kana vanasikana vako, navose vaunavo muguta; uvabudise muno." 
Genesis19:13 Nokuti tava kuda kuparadza nzvimbo ino; nokuti kudanidzira kwavo kwava kukuru kuna Jehovha; Jehovha wakatituma kuiparadza.” 
Genesis19:14 Ipapo Roti akabuda, akandotaura navakuwasha vake, vakanga vachazowana vakunda vake, vakati, “Simukai, ibvai muno; nokuti Jehovha achaparadza guta rino.” Asi vakuwasha vake vakati, “Anoita hake musara.”" 
Genesis19:15 Utonga huchitsvuka vatumwa vakakurumidzisa Roti vachiti, “Simuka, uende nomukadzi wako, navakunda vako vaviri vari pano, kuti urege kuparadzwa kana guta rorohwa.”" 
Genesis19:16 Asi vakanonoka; varume vakabata ruoko rwake, noruoko rwomukadzi wake, namaoko avakunda vake vaviri; nokuti Jehovha akanga ane tsitsi naye; vakamubudisa, vakamuisa kunze kweguta." 
Genesis19:17 Zvino vakati vavabudisa kunze, mumwe akati, “Tiza nokuda kwoupenyu hwako, usacheuka shure kwako, kana kumira pabani rose, tizira kugomo, kuti urege kuparadzwa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Roti akati kwavari, “Kwete, ishe wangu, regai kudaro." 
Genesis19:19 Tarirai, muranda wenyu wakawana nyasha kwamuri, makurisa tsitsi dzenyu dzamakandiitira, zvamandiraramisa; asi handigoni kutizira kugomo, zvimwe zvakaipa zvingandiwira ndikafa." 
Genesis19:20 Tarirai, guta iri riri pedyo, nditizire hangu ikoko; iduku haro, nditenderei kuti nditizire ikoko, (harizi duku here?) Mweya wangu urarame.”" 
Genesis19:21 Iye akati kwaari, “Tarira, ndakunzwira tsitsi pachinhu ichiwo, kuti handingaparadzi guta iri rawareva." 
Genesis19:22 Kurumidza, utizireko, nokuti handigoni kuita chinhu usati wasvikapo.” Naizvozvo zita reguta rakanzi Zoari." 
Genesis19:23 Zuva rakanga rabuda panyika, Roti achisvika paZoari." 
Genesis19:24 Ipapo Jehovha akanaisa pamusoro peSodhomu neGomora sarufa nomoto, zvichibva kudenga kuna Jehovha," 
Genesis19:25 akaparadza maguta iwayo, nebani rose, navose vakanga vagere mumaguta, nezvose zvakanga zvamera pavhu." 
Genesis19:26 Asi mukadzi wake wakacheuka ari shure kwake, akaitwa shongwe yomunyu." 
Genesis19:27 Zvino Abhurahamu wakamuka mangwanani, akaenda ikoko kwaakanga amire pamberi paJehovha;" 
Genesis19:28 akatarira kurutivi rweSodhoma neGomora nokunyika yose yebani, akaona utsi hwenyika iyo huchikwira soutsi hwechoto." 
Genesis19:29 Zvino Mwari wakati achiparadza maguta ebani, Mwari akarangarira Abhurahamu, akabudisa Roti pakati pokuparadzwa ikoko, nguva yaakaparadza maguta makanga muchigara Roti." 
Genesis19:30 Zvino Roti akakwira, achibva muZoari, akandogara mugomo, navakunda vake vaviri pamwechete naye; nokuti wakatya kugara muZoari; akagara, mubako, iye navakunda vake vaviri." 
Genesis19:31 Zvino dangwe rakati kumuduku, “Baba vedu vakwegura; hakuna murume panyika ino angapinda kwatiri nomutoo wenyika yose;" 
Genesis19:32 uya, tinwise baba vedu waini, tivate navo, kuti tichengete rudzi nababa vedu.”" 
Genesis19:33 Usiku ihwohwo vakanwisa baba vavo waini, wedangwe akapinda, akandovata nababa vake; ivo havana kuziva kuvata kwake pasi kana kumuka kwake." 
Genesis19:34 Fume mangwana wedangwe akati kumuduku, “Tarira, ndavata nababa vangu usiku hwane zuro; ngativanwise waini usiku hwunowo, iwe ugopinda, unovata navo, kuti tichengete rudzi nababa vedu.”" 
Genesis19:35 Vakanwisa baba vavo waini usiku ihwohwowo, muduku akasimuka, akandovata navo; ivo havana kuziva kuvata kwake pasi kana kumuka kwake." 
Genesis19:36 Naizvozvo vakunda vaRoti vaviri vakava nemimba kuna baba vavo. 
Genesis19:37 Wedangwe akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Moabhu, kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Genesis19:38 Nomudukuwo wakabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Bheniami; ndivo baba vavana vaAmoni kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Genesis20:1 Zvino Abhurahamu wakabvapo, akaenda kunyika yenyasi, akandogara pakati peKadheshi neShuru; akava mutorwa muGerari." 
Genesis20:2 Abhurahamu akati pamusoro paSara, mukadzi wake, “Ihanzvadzi yangu.” Abhimereki, mambo weGerari, akatuma vanhu kundotora Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Asi Mwari akauya kuna Abhimereki usiku pakurota, akati kwaari, “Tarira, uchafa nokuda kwomukadzi wawatora; nokuti mukadzi uyu ane murume.”" 
Genesis20:4 Zvino Abhimereki wakanga asina kuswedera kwaari; akati, “Ishe, muchauraya norudzi rwakaruramawo here?" 
Genesis20:5 Ko iye haana kundiudza here, achiti, ihanzvadzi yangu; naiye mukadzi haana kuti, ihanzvadzi yangu, here? Ndakaita izvozvo nomwoyo wakarurama, namaoko akachena.”" 
Genesis20:6 Mwari akati kwaari pakurota, “Hongu, ndinoziva kuti wakaita chinhu ichi nomwoyo wakarurama, ndikakudzivisawo kuti urege kunditadzira; naizvozvo handina kukutendera kumubata." 
Genesis20:7 Saka zvino dzosa mukadzi womurume uyu, nokuti muporofita; iye achakunyengeterera, kuti urarame; kana ukasamudzosa, uzive kuti uchafa zvirokwazvo, iwe navose vari vako.”" 
Genesis20:8 Abhimereki akamuka mangwanani, akadana varanda vake vose, akavaudza izvozvo zvose munzeve dzavo; varume vakavhunduka kwazvo." 
Genesis20:9 Ipapo Abhimereki akadana Abhurahamu akati kwaari, “Chiiko chinhu ichi chawatiitira? Ini ndakutadzireiko, zvawauyisa mhosva huru pamusoro pangu napamusoro poushe hwangu?”" 
Genesis20:10 Abhimereki akati kuna Abhurahamu, “Wanga uchiti kudiniko, zvawaita chinhu ichi?”" 
Genesis20:11 Abhurahamu akati, “Nokuti ndakati, ‘Zvirokwazvo havatyi Mwari panzvimbo ino; zvimwe vachandiuraya pamusoro pomukadzi wangu.’" 
Genesis20:12 Uye, zvirokwazvo ihanzvadzi yangu, mukunda wababa vangu, asi haazi mwana wamai vangu; akazowanikwa neni." 
Genesis20:13 Zvino Mwari wakati achindibudisa paimba yababa vangu, kuti ndidzungaire, ndikati kwaari, ‘Hechi chinhu chakanaka chaunofanira kundiitira. Pose patinosvika, uti pamusoro pangu, ihanzvadzi yangu.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Abhimereki akatora makwai, nemombe, navaranda, navarandakadzi, akapa Abhurahamu izvozvo, akamudzoserawo Sara, mukadzi wake." 
Genesis20:15 Abhimereki akati, “Tarira, nyika yangu iri pamberi pako; gara hako paunoda.”" 
Genesis20:16 Akati kuna Sara, “Tarira, ndapa hanzvadzi yako mashekeri esirivha ane chiuru chezana; chichava chifukidziro chameso ako kuna vose vaunavo; waruramiswa pamberi pavose.”" 
Genesis20:17 Abhurahamu akanyengetera kuna Mwari, Mwari akaporesa Abhimereki, nomukadzi wake, navarandakadzi vake, vakabereka vana." 
Genesis20:18 Nokuti Jehovha akanga azarira zvizvaro zvose zveveimba yaAbhimereki nokuda kwaSara, mukadzi waAbhurahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Zvino Jehovha akashanyira Sara, sezvaakataura; Jehovha akaitira Sara sezvaakavaudza." 
Genesis21:2 Sara akava nemimba, akaberekera Abhurahamu mwanakomana pakukwegura kwake nenguva iyeyo yakanga yarehwa naMwari." 
Genesis21:3 Abhurahamu akatumidza mwanakomana wake, waakaberekerwa naSara, zita rinonzi Isaka." 
Genesis21:4 Abhurahamu akadzingisa mwanakomana wake Isaka aita mazuva masere, sezvaakarairwa naMwari." 
Genesis21:5 Abhurahamu wakanga asvika makore ane zana, nguva yaakaberekerwa mwanakomana wake Isaka." 
Genesis21:6 Ipapo Sara akati, “Mwari wandisekesa; vose, vanonzwa izvozvi, vachaseka neni.”" 
Genesis21:7 Akati, “Ndianiko waitongoti kuna Abhurahamu, ‘Sara achayamwisa vana?’ Nokuti ndakamuberekera mwanakomana pakukwegura kwake.”" 
Genesis21:8 Mwanakomana wakazokura, akarumurwa; Abhurahamu akaita mutambo mukuru nomusi wokurumurwa kwaIsaka." 
Genesis21:9 Zvino Sara akaona mwanakomana waHagari, muIjipiti, waakaberekera Abhurahamu, achiseka." 
Genesis21:10 Saka wakati kuna Abhurahamu, “Dzinga mubatiri uyu nomwanakomana wake, nokuti mwanakomana womubatiri uyu haangadyi nhaka pamwechete nomwanakomana wangu Isaka.”" 
Genesis21:11 Shoko iro rakanga rakaipa kwazvo kuna Abhurahamu, nokuda kwomwanakomana wake." 
Genesis21:12 Ipapo Mwari akati kuna Abhurahamu, “Ngazvirege hazvo kuva zvakaipa kwauri nokuda kwomukomana nokwo mubatiri wako; uteerere Sara pazvinhu zvose zvaanotaura kwauri, nokuti rudzi rwako ruchatumidzwa nezita raIsaka." 
Genesis21:13 Naiye mwanakomana womubatiri ndichamuita rudzi rukuruwo, nokuti mwanakomana wako.”" 
Genesis21:14 Abhurahamu akamuka mangwanani, akatora chingwa neguchu remvura, akapa Hagari, akazviisa pafudzi rake, nomwanawo, akamuendesa; iye akaenda akandodzungaira murenje reBheerishebha." 
Genesis21:15 Mvura yeguchu yakati yapera, akakanda mwana pasi munyasi megwenzi;" 
Genesis21:16 iye akandogara pasi pakatarisana naye nhambwe inenge ingasvika museve kana wapotserwa, nokuti wakati, “Ndirege kuona hangu mwana achifa.” Akagara pakatarisana naye, akachema kwazvo." 
Genesis21:17 Mwari akanzwa izwi romukomana; mutumwa waMwari akadanidzira kuna Hagari, ari kudenga, akati kwaari, “Zvaita seiko Hagari? Usatya, nokuti Mwari wanzwa izwi romukomana apo paari." 
Genesis21:18 Simuka usimudze mukomana, umubate noruoko rwako, nokuti ndichamuita rudzi rukuru.”" 
Genesis21:19 Ipapo Mwari akasvinudza meso ake, akaona tsime remvura; akaenda, akazadza guchu nemvura, akanwisa mukomana." 
Genesis21:20 Mwari akava nomukomana, akakura, akagara murenje, akava munhu anopfura nouta." 
Genesis21:21 Akagara murenje reParani, mai vake vakamutorera mukadzi kunyika yeIjipiti." 
Genesis21:22 Zvino nenguva iyo Abhimereki naPikori, mukuru wehondo yake, vakataura naAbhurahamu, vakati, “Mwari anewe pazvinhu zvose zvaunoita;" 
Genesis21:23 naizvozvo zvino ndipikire pano naMwari kuti haungandinyengeri ini, kana vana vangu, kana vana vavana vangu; asi sezvandakakuitira tsitsi, uitewo saizvozvo kwandiri, nokunyika mawakagara uri mutorwa.”" 
Genesis21:24 Abhurahamu akati, “Ndichapika.”" 
Genesis21:25 Asi Abhurahamu akatuka Abhimereki nokuda kwetsime remvura rakanga ratorwa nesimba navaranda vaAbhimereki. 
Genesis21:26 Abhimereki akati, “Handizivi akaita izvozvo, newe hauna kundiudza, ini handina kumbozvinzwa, asi nhasi.”" 
Genesis21:27 Abhurahamu akatora makwai nenzombe, akapa Abhimereki, ivo vaviri vakaita sungano." 
Genesis21:28 Abhurahamu akaraura zvisheche zvinomwe zvamakwai; 
Genesis21:29 Abhimereki akati kuna Abhurahamu, “Ko zvisheche izvi zvinomwe zvawaraura ndezveiko?”" 
Genesis21:30 Iye akati, “Zvisheche izvi zvinomwe uzvigamuchire paruoko rwangu, chive chapupu changu, kuti ndini ndakachera tsime iri.”" 
Genesis21:31 Naizvozvo akatumidza nzvimbo iyo zita rinonzi Bheerishebha, nokuti ndipo pavakapika ivo vaviri." 
Genesis21:32 Saizvozvo vakaita sungano paBheerishebha; Abhimereki akasimuka, naPikori, mukuru wehondo yake, vakadzokera kunyika yavaFirisitia." 
Genesis21:33 Abhurahamu akasima muti womutamarisiki paBheerishebha, akanamatapo zita raJehovha Mwari asingaperi." 
Genesis21:34 Abhurahamu akagara ari mutorwa panyika yavaFirisitia mazuva mazhinji. 
Genesis22:1 Shure kwaizvozvo Mwari wakaedza Abhurahamu, akati kwaari, “Abhurahamu!” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano hangu.”" 
Genesis22:2 Akati, “Zvino tora mwanakomana wako, mwanakomana wako mumwechete, waunoda, Isaka, uende kunyika yeMoria umuite chibayiro chinopiswa pane rimwe gomo randichakuudza.”" 
Genesis22:3 Abhurahamu akamuka mangwanani, akasunga mbongoro yake, akatora majaya ake maviri naIsaka, mwanakomana wake, akatsemura huni dzechibayiro chinopiswa, ndokusimuka, akaenda kunzvimbo yaakaudzwa naMwari." 
Genesis22:4 Zvino nomusi wetatu Abhurahamu akasimudza meso ake, akaona nzvimbo iyo ari kure." 
Genesis22:5 Abhurahamu akati kumajaya ake, “Imi chigarai henyu pano nembongoro, ini nomwana tichaenda ikoko; tichambondonamata, tigodzokera kwamuri.”" 
Genesis22:6 Abhurahamu akatora huni dzechibayiro chinopiswa, akadzitakudza Isaka, mwanakomana wake; akatora moto nebanga muruoko rwake, vakaenda vari vaviri." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka akataura naAbhurahamu, baba vake, akati, “Baba vangu!” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano hangu, mwana wangu.” Akati, “Hoyu moto nehuni; asi gwayana rechibayiro chinopiswa riripiko?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abhurahamu akati, “Mwari uchatipa gwayana rechibayiro chinopiswa, mwana wangu;” saizvozvo vakafamba vari vaviri." 
Genesis22:9 Vakandosvika panzvimbo yaakaudzwa naMwari; Abhurahamu akavakapo atari, akagadzira huni, ndokusunga mwanakomana wake, akamuisa paatari pamusoro pehuni." 
Genesis22:10 Zvino Abhurahamu akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akatora banga, kuti abaye mwanakomana wake." 
Genesis22:11 Ipapo mutumwa aJehovha akadanidzira kwaari, ari kudenga akati, “Abhurahamu! Abhurahamu!” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano hangu.”" 
Genesis22:12 Akati, “Usaisa ruoko rwako kumwana, usamuitira chinhu, nokuti zvino ndinoziva kuti unotya Mwari, zvausina kundinyima mwanakomana wako, iye mwanakomana wako mumwechete.”" 
Genesis22:13 Abhurahamu akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, ndokuona shure kwake hondohwe yakanga yakabatwa nyanga dzayo mugwenzi. Abhurahamu akatora hondohwe iya, akaipisa chikava chibayiro panzvimbo yomwanakomana wake." 
Genesis22:14 Abhurahamu akatumidza nzvimbo iyo zita rinonzi Jehovha–jire; saka nanhasi vanositi, “Pagomo raJehovha ndipo paachaonekwa.”" 
Genesis22:15 Ipapo mutumwa waJehovha akadana Abhurahamu rwechipiri, ari kudenga," 
Genesis22:16 akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndakapika neni ndimene,’ ndichiti, ‘Zvawaita izvozvo, ukasandinyima mwanakomana wako mumwechete;" 
Genesis22:17 ndicharopafadza kwazvo, ndichawanza vana vako kwazvo senyenyedzi dzokudenga, uye sejecha riri pamahombekombe egungwa; vana vako vachava varidzi vamasuwo avavengi vavo;" 
Genesis22:18 ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzicharopafadzwa muvana vako, zvawakateerera izwi rangu.’ ”" 
Genesis22:19 Ipapo Abhurahamu wakadzokera kumajaya ake, vakasimuka vakaenda vose Bheerishebha; Abhurahamu akagara paBheerishebha." 
Genesis22:20 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo Abhurahamu wakaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Tarira, Mirika wakaberekerawo munun'una wako Nahori vanakomana ava:" 
Genesis22:21 Uzi, dangwe rake, naBuzi, munun'una wake, naKemueri, baba vaAramu," 
Genesis22:22 naKesedhi, naHazo, naPiradhashi, naJidhirafi, naBhetueri." 
Genesis22:23 Bhetueri akabereka Rabheka; ava vasere ndivo vakaberekerwa Nahori, munun'una waAbhurahamu, naMirika.”" 
Genesis22:24 Nomurongo wake wainzi Ruma, wakaberekawo Tebha, naGahami, naTahashi, naMaaka." 
Genesis23:1 Zvino Sara wakagara makore ane zana namakumi maviri namanomwe; ndiwo makore oupenyu hwaSara. 
Genesis23:2 Sara akafa paKiriyatiabha (rimwe zita ndiHebhuroni) panyika yeKenani; Abhurahamu akauya kuzochema Sara nokumuririra. 
Genesis23:3 Zvino Abhurahamu akasimuka panowakafa wake, akataurirana navana VaHeti, akati," 
Genesis23:4 “Ndiri mweni nomutorwa pakati penyu, ndipei nzvimbo yokuviga pakati penyu, ive nzvimbo yangu, kuti ndivige wakafa wangu, ndirege kumuona.”" 
Genesis23:5 Vana VaHeti vakapindura Abhurahamu, vakati kwaari," 
Genesis23:6 “Chitinzwai, ishe wedu, imi muri muchinda waMwari pakati pedu; vigai wakafa wenyu pahwiro hwakanaka pakati pamahwiro edu ose; hakuna munhu pakati pedu angakunyimai hwiro hwake, kuti muvige wakafa wenyu.”" 
Genesis23:7 Ipapo Abhurahamu wakasimuka akakotamira pasi pamberi pavanhu venyika iyo, ivo vana VaHeti," 
Genesis23:8 akataurirana navo, akati, “Kana muchitenda kuti ndivige wakafa wangu, ndirege kumuona, chindinzwai, mundikumbirire kuna Efuroni, mwanakomana waZohari," 
Genesis23:9 kuti andipe bako reMakapera, raanaro, riri pamagumo emunda wake, andipe iroro, ndiripe mutengo wose, ive nzvimbo yangu yokuviga pakati penyu.”" 
Genesis23:10 Efuroni zvino wakanga agere pakati pavana VaHeti; Efuroni, muHeti, akapindura Abhurahamu, vana VaHeti, vachizvinzwa, ivo vose vaipinda pasuwo reguta rake, akati," 
Genesis23:11 “Kwete, ishe wangu, chindinzwai; teererai, ndinokupai munda, nairo bako ririmo, ndinokupai iro; ndinokupai izvozvo pamberi pavana vavanhu vangu; vigai henyu wakafa wenyu.”" 
Genesis23:12 Abhurahamu akakotama pamberi pavanhu venyika iyo," 
Genesis23:13 akataura naEfuroni, vanhu venyika iyo vachizvinzwa, achiti, “Kana uchida, chinditeerera hako, ndichakupa mutengo womunda, uugamuchire kwandiri, kuti ndivige wakafa wangupo.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efuroni akapindura Abhurahamu akati kwaari," 
Genesis23:15 “Ishe wangu, chinditeererai; munda unotengwa namashekeri esirivha ana mazana mana, chingava chiiko pakati pangu newe? Vigai henyu wakafa wenyu.”" 
Genesis23:16 Abhurahamu akateerera Efuroni. Abhurahamu akayerera Efuroni mashekeri esirivha aakareva, vana VaHeti vachizvinzwa, mashekeri esirivha ana mazana mana, avanotenga nawo kuvatengesi." 
Genesis23:17 Naizvozvo munda waEfuroni, wakanga uri paMakapera pakatarisana neMamure, munda nebako rakanga ririmo, nemiti yose yakanga iri mumunda neyakanga iri panyika yose yakapoteredza," 
Genesis23:18 zvikava zvaAbhurahamu pamberi pavana VaHeti, pamberi pavose vaipinda pasuwo reguta rake." 
Genesis23:19 Shure kwaizvozvo Abhurahamu akaviga Sara, mukadzi wake, mubako romunda weMakapera, pakatarisana neMamure (rimwe zita ndiHebhuroni), panyika yeKenani." 
Genesis23:20 Zvino munda nebako rakanga ririmo zvakasimbisiwa kuna Abhurahamu navana VaHeti, kuti zvive zvake, ikava nzvimbo yake yokuviga." 
Genesis24:1 Abhurahamu zvino wakanga akwegura, ava mutana kwazvo; Jehovha akanga aropafadza Abhurahamu pazvinhu zvose." 
Genesis24:2 Abhurahamu akataura nomuranda wake, waiva mukuru weimba yake, waichengeta zvose zvaakanga anazvo, achiti, “Chimboisa chanza chako pasi pechidya changu," 
Genesis24:3 ndikupikise naJehovha, Mwari wokudenga, naMwari wenyika, kuti haungatoreri mwanakomana wangu mukadzi kuvanasikana veKenani, vandinogara pakati pavo;" 
Genesis24:4 asi uende kunyika yangu, nokuhama dzangu, unotorera ikoko mwanakomana wangu Isaka mukadzi.”" 
Genesis24:5 Muranda akati kwaari, “Zvimwe mukadzi haangatendi kunditevera kunyika ino, zvino ndingafanira kudzosera mwanakomana wenyu kunyika kwamakabva here?”" 
Genesis24:6 Abhurahamu akati kwaari, “Chenjera kuti urege kudzosera mwanakomana wangu ikoko." 
Genesis24:7 Jehovha, Mwari wokudenga, wakandibvisa paimba yababa vangu nomunyika yokuzvarwa kwangu, wakataura neni, akandipikira, achiti, ‘Nyika ino ndichapa vana vako,’ ndiye achatuma mutumwa wake pamberi pako, kuti utorere mwanakomana wangu mukadzi ikoko." 
Genesis24:8 Kana mukadzi asingatendi kukutevera, iwe uchasunungurwa pakupika kwako uku kwandiri; asi usadzosera mwanakomana wangu ikoko.”" 
Genesis24:9 Ipapo muranda akaisa chanza chake pasi pechidya chatenzi wake, akamupikira pamusoro pechinhu ichocho." 
Genesis24:10 Muranda akatora makamera ane gumi pamakamera atenzi wake, akaenda, aine nhumbi dzose dzakanaka dzatenzi wake; akasimuka, akaenda Mesopotamia kuguta raNahori." 
Genesis24:11 Akapfugamisa makamera kunze kweguta patsime remvura nenguva yamadekwana, iri nguva yaibuda vakadzi kundochera mvura;" 
Genesis24:12 akati, “Jehovha, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhurahamu, ndifambisei henyu zvakanaka nhasi; muitire tenzi wangu Abhurahamu ngoni." 
Genesis24:13 Tarirai ndimire patsime remvura, vakunda vavanhu veguta vobuda kuzochera mvura." 
Genesis24:14 Zvino ngakuitwe kuti musikana wandichati kwaari, ‘Nditurirewo chirongo chako, ndinwe;’ kana akati, ‘Inwai henyu, namakamera enyu ndichaanwisawo;’ ngaave iye wamakatsaurira muranda wenyu Isaka; naizvozvo ndichaziva kuti makaitira tenzi wangu ngoni.”" 
Genesis24:15 Zvino wakanga asati apedza kutaura, Rabheka, wakaberekerwa Bhetueri, mwanakomana waMirika, mukadzi waNahori, munun'una waAbhurahamu, wakasvika ane chirongo pafudzi rake." 
Genesis24:16 Zvino musikana uyu wakanga akanaka kwazvo pameso ake, mhandara isina kumboziviwa nomurume; akaburukira kutsime, akazadza chirongo chake, akakwirazve." 
Genesis24:17 Ipapo muranda wakamhanyira kunosangana naye, akati, “Dondipawo mvura pachirongo chako, ndinwe.”" 
Genesis24:18 Iye akati, “Inwai henyu, ishe wangu;” akakurumidza kutura chirongo chake paruoko rwake, akamunwisa." 
Genesis24:19 Wakati apedza kumunwisa, akati, “Ndichacherera makamera enyuwo kusvikira aguta.”" 
Genesis24:20 Akakurumidza, akadurura mvura yakanga iri muchirongo chake muchinwiro; akamhanyira kutsime kundocherazve, akacherera makamera ake ose." 
Genesis24:21 Murume akamutarisisa, anyerere, kuti azive kana Jehovha amufambisa zvakanaka parwendo rwake, kana kwete." 
Genesis24:22 Makamera akati apedza kunwa murume akatora chindori chendarama chakaita hafu yeshekeri rimwe rendarama pakurema kwacho, nezvishongo zviviri zvamaoko zvakaita mashekeri ane gumi pakurema kwazvo;" 
Genesis24:23 akati, “Uri mukunda waaniko? Ndiudze hako. Kumba kwababa vako kune pokuvata here?”" 
Genesis24:24 Iye akati, “Ndiri mukunda waBhetueri, mwanakomana waMirika, waakaberekera Nahori.”" 
Genesis24:25 Akati kwaariwo, “Tinahwo uswa hwakaoma nezvokudya zvizhinji, nopokuvatawo.”" 
Genesis24:26 Murume akakotamisa musoro wake, akanamata Jehovha." 
Genesis24:27 Akati, “Jehovha, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhurahamu ngaakudzwe, asina kurega nyasha dzake nokutendeka kwake kuna tenzi wangu; kana ndirini, Jehovha akandifambisa, akandisvitsa kuimba yehama dzatenzi wangu.”"
