Genesis24:28 Ipapo musikana wakamhanya, akandoudza veimba yamai vake mashoko iwaya." 
Genesis24:29 Zvino Rabheka wakanga ane hanzvadzi yainzi Rabhani; Rabhani akabuda, akamhanyira kumurume kutsime." 
Genesis24:30 Nokuti wakati achiona chindori nezvishongo pamaoko ehanzvadzi yake, achiti, “Ndizvo zvakataura murume kwandiri,” akaenda kumurume akamuwana amire pamakamera patsime." 
Genesis24:31 Akati, “Pinda, iwe, wakaropafadzwa naJehovha; unomirireiko kunze? Nokuti ndagadzira imba nenzvimbo yamakamera.”" 
Genesis24:32 Murume akapinda mumba; akasunungura makamera akapa makamera uswa hwakaoma nezvokudya; nemvura kuti ashambidze tsoka dzake netsoka dzavarume vaakanga anavo. 
Genesis24:33 Ipapo zvokudya zvakaiswa pamberi pake kuti adye; asi iye akati, “Handingadyi ndisati ndambotaura mashoko angu.” Akati, “Taura hako.”" 
Genesis24:34 Iye akati, “Ndiri muranda waAbhurahamu." 
Genesis24:35 Jehovha akaropafadza tenzi wangu kwazvo; wava mukuru; wakamupa makwai, nemombe, nesirivha, nendarama, navaranda, navarandakadzi, namakamera, nembongoro." 
Genesis24:36 NaSara, mukadzi watenzi wangu, wakaberekera tenzi wangu mwanakomana pakukwegura kwake; ndiye waakapa zvose zvaanazvo." 
Genesis24:37 Tenzi wangu akandipikisa, akati, ‘Usatorera mwanakomana wangu mukadzi kuvanasikana veKenani, pandigere munyika yavo;" 
Genesis24:38 asi uende kune veimba yababa vangu nokuhama dzangu unotorera mwanakomana wangu mukadzi ikoko.’ 
Genesis24:39 Ndikati kuna tenzi wangu, ‘Zvimwe mukadzi haangatendi kunditevera.’" 
Genesis24:40 Iye akati, ‘Jehovha wandinosifamba pamberi pake, achatuma mutumwa wake newe, akufambise zvakanaka parwendo rwako; unotorera mwanakomana wangu mukadzi kuhama dzangu nokune veimba yababa vangu;" 
Genesis24:41 uchasunungurwa pakupika kwako kwandiri kana wasvika kuhama dzangu; kana vakaramba kukupa iye, uchasunungurwa pakupika kwako kwandiri.’" 
Genesis24:42 Zvino ndakasvika nhasi kutsime, ndikati, ‘Jehovha, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhurahamu, kana muchida kundifambisa zvakanaka parwendo rwangu rwandinofamba," 
Genesis24:43 tarirai, ndimire patsime remvura; zvino ngazviitwe, kuti musikana anobuda kuzochera mvura,’ wandichati kwaari, ‘Dondipawo zvimvura pachirongo chako, ndinwe,’" 
Genesis24:44 iye akati kwandiri, ‘Inwai henyu, imi, uye ndichacherera makamera enyuwo,’ iye ave mukadzi wakatsaurirwa mwanakomana watenzi wangu naJehovha." 
Genesis24:45 Zvino ndisati ndapedza kutaura mumwoyo mangu, ndikaona Rabheka achiuya aine chirongo chake pafudzi rake; akaburukira kutsime, akachera; ndikati kwaari, ‘Dondipawo, ndinwe.’" 
Genesis24:46 Iye akakurumidza, akatura chirongo chake pafudzi rake, akati, ‘Inwai henyu, uye ndichanwisa makamera enyuwo’; ini ndikanwa, akanwisa makamerawo." 
Genesis24:47 Zvino ndakamubvunza, ndikati, ‘Uri mukunda waaniko?’ Iye akati, ‘Ndiri mukunda waBhetueri, mwanakomana waNahori, waakaberekerwa naMirika;’ ipapo ndakaisa chindori mumhino dzake, nezvishongo pamaoko ake." 
Genesis24:48 Ndikakotamisa musoro wangu, ndikanamata Jehovha, ndikatenda Jehovha, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhurahamu, iye wakandifambisa panzira yakarurama, kuti nditorere mwanakomana watenzi wangu mukunda womunun'una watenzi wangu, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis24:49 Zvino kana muchida kuitira tenzi wangu mwoyochena nokutendeka, mundiudze; kana musingadi, mundiudze, kuti ndiende kurudyi kana kuruboshwe.”" 
Genesis24:50 Ipapo Rabhani naBhetueri vakapindura vakati, “Chinhu ichi chinobva kuna Mwari. Isu hatigoni kutaura kwauri zvakaipa kana zvakanaka." 
Genesis24:51 Tarira, Rabheka ari pamberi pako, umutore uende, kuti ave mukadzi wake, sezvakarehwa naJehovha.”" 
Genesis24:52 Zvino muranda waAbhurahamu wakati anzwa mashoko avo, akakotamira pasi pamberi paJehovha;" 
Genesis24:53 muranda akabudisa zvishongo zvesirivha, nezvendarama, nenguo; akazvipa Rabheka; akapawo hanzvadzi yake namai vake nhumbi dzinokosha." 
Genesis24:54 Vakadya, vakanwa, iye navarume vaakanga anavo; vakagarapo usiku hwose, vakamuka mangwanani; iye akati, “Regai, ndiende kuna tenzi wangu.”" 
Genesis24:55 Asi hanzvadzi yake namai vake vakati, “Musikana achimbogara nesu mazuva zvimwe ane gumi, agozoenda hake.”" 
Genesis24:56 Asi iye wakati kwavari, “Musandidzora henyu, Jehovha zvaakandifambisa zvakanaka parwendo rwangu; regai ndiende kuna tenzi wangu.”" 
Genesis24:57 Ivo vakati, “Ngatidane musikana, tinzwe muromo wake.”" 
Genesis24:58 Vakadana Rabheka, vakati kwaari, “Uchaenda nomurume uyu here?” Akati, “Ndichaenda.”" 
Genesis24:59 Ipapo vakatendera Rabheka, hanzvadzi yavo, nomureri wake, kuti vaende nomuranda waAbhurahamu, navanhu vake." 
Genesis24:60 Vakaropafadza Rabheka, vakati kwaari, “Iwe, hanzvadzi yedu, uve mai vezviuru zvamazana; vana vako ngavave varidzi vamasuwo avavengi vavo.”" 
Genesis24:61 Rabheka akasimuka, navasikana vake, vakatasva makamera, vakatevera murume uyo; muranda akatora Rabheka, akaenda parwendo rwake." 
Genesis24:62 Zvino Isaka wakanga achibva nenzira yeBheeri–rakai–roi; nokuti wakanga agere kunyika yenyasi. 
Genesis24:63 Isaka akabuda kundorangarira kusango nenguva yamadekwana; akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, akaona makamera achiuya." 
Genesis24:64 Rabheka akasimudzawo meso ake; akati achiona Isaka, akaburuka pakamera rake." 
Genesis24:65 Akati kumuranda, “Murume uyu, anofamba musango kuzosangana nesu ndianiko?” Muranda akati, “Nditenzi wangu;” iye akatora chokufukidzira chiso chake, akazvifukidza." 
Genesis24:66 Zvino muranda akaudza Isaka zvose zvaakanga aita. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka akamuisa mutende ramai vake Sara, akawana Rabheka, akava mukadzi wake; akamuda. Isaka akanyaradzwa shure kwokufa kwamai vake." 
Genesis25:1 Zvino Abhurahamu akawanazve mumwe mukadzi, wainzi Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Iye akamuberekera Zimurami, naJokishani, naMedhani, naMidhiani, naIshibhaki, naShua." 
Genesis25:3 Jokishani akabereka Shebha naDhedhani. Vanakomana vaDhedhani vakanga vari vaAshuri, navaRetushi, navaReumi." 
Genesis25:4 Vanakomana vaMidhiani vakanga vari Efa, naEferi, naHanoki, naAbhidha, naEridha. Ava vose vakanga vari vana vaKetura." 
Genesis25:5 Abhurahamu akapa Isaka zvose zvaakanga anazvo. 
Genesis25:6 Asi vanakomana vavarongo vaAbhurahamu vaakanga anavo, Abhurahamu wakavapa zvipo; akavatuma, iye achiri mupenyu, vabve kuna Isaka mwanakomana wake, vaende kumabvazuva, kunyika yokumabvazuva." 
Genesis25:7 Ndiwo mazuva amakore oupenyu hwaAbhurahamu. Makore ane zana namakumi manomwe namashanu. 
Genesis25:8 Abhurahamu akabudisa mweya wake, akafa akwegura kwazvo, ava mutana, makore ake ave mazhinji, akasanganiswa navanhu vake." 
Genesis25:9 Isaka naIshimaeri, vanakomana vake, vakamuviga mubako reMakapera, mumunda waEfuroni, mwanakomana waZohari, waVaHeti, wakatarisana neMamure;" 
Genesis25:10 ndiwo munda wakanga watengwa naAbhurahamu kuvana VaHeti; ndipo pakavigwa Abhurahamu naSara, mukadzi wake." 
Genesis25:11 Zvino Abhurahamu wakati afa, Mwari akaropafadza Isaka, mwanakomana wake; Isaka akagara paBheeri–rakai–roi." 
Genesis25:12 Ndiwo marudzi aIshimaeri, mwanakomana waAbhurahamu, wakaberekerwa Abhurahamu naHagari, muIjipiti, murandakadzi waSara." 
Genesis25:13 Ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaIshimaeri, ndiwo mazita avo pakuzvarwa kwavo. Wedangwe waIshimaeri wakanga ari Nebhayoti, naKedhari, naAdhibheri, naMibhisami," 
Genesis25:14 naMishima, naDhuma, naMasa," 
Genesis25:15 naHadhadhi, naTema, naJeturi, naNafishi, naKedhema;" 
Genesis25:16 ndivo vanakomana vaIshimaeri, ndiwo mazita avo, pamisha yavo napamatende avo; machinda ane gumi namaviri nendudzi dzavo." 
Genesis25:17 Ndiwo makore oupenyu hwaIshimaeri, makore ane zana namakumi matatu namanomwe; akabudisa mweya wake, akafa, akasanganiswa navanhu vake." 
Genesis25:18 Vakagara kubva paHavhira kusvikira paShuru, mberi kweIjipiti, kana munhu achienda Asiria; akandogara akatarisana nehama dzake dzose." 
Genesis25:19 Ndiwo marudzi aIsaka, mwanakomana waAbhurahamu. Abhurahamu akabereka Isaka;" 
Genesis25:20 Isaka akanga ana makore ana makumi mana pakuwana kwake Rabheka, mukunda waBhetueri, muAramu, wePadhani-aramu, hanzvadzi yaRabhani, muAramu, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis25:21 Zvino Isaka wakanyengeterera mukadzi wake kuna Jehovha, nokuti wakanga asingabereki; Jehovha akanzwa kunyengetera kwake, Rabheka, mukadzi wake, akave nemimba." 
Genesis25:22 Zvino vana vakasundana mukati make, akati, “Kana zvakadaro, ndakaitirweiko izvozvi?” Akandobvunza Jehovha." 
Genesis25:23 Jehovha akati kwaari, “Mune ndudzi mbiri muchizvaro chako, ndudzi mbiri dzichaparadzana, dzichibva mudumbu rako; rumwe rudzi ruchakunda rumwe rudzi nesimba; mukuru achashumira muduku.”" 
Genesis25:24 Zvino mazuva ake okubereka akati asvika, onei vana vaviri vari muchizvaro chake." 
Genesis25:25 Wokutanga akabuda ari mutsvuku, muviri wose wakaita senguo ine mvere; vakatumidza zita rake Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Pashure munun'una wake akabuda, ruoko rwake rwakabata chitsitsinho chaEsau, vakatumidza zita rake Jakobho. Isaka akanga ana makore makumi matanhatu pakuberekwa kwavo." 
Genesis25:27 Vakomana vakakura; Esau akava mudzimba wakachenjera, murume wesango; Jakobho wakanga ari murume wakarurama, waigara mumatende." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka akada Esau, nokuti waida nyama yemhuka, asi Rabheka wakanga achida Jakobho." 
Genesis25:29 Zvino Jakobho wakanga abika zvokudya, Esau akasvika achibva kusango aziya;" 
Genesis25:30 Esau akati kuna Jakobho, “Dondipawo izvo zvakatsvuka ndidye, nokuti ndaziya;” saka wakatumidzwa zita rinonzi Edhomu." 
Genesis25:31 Jakobho akati, “Chimbonditengesera udangwe hwako.”" 
Genesis25:32 Esau akati, “Tarira, ndofa hangu, udangwe uchandibatsireiko?”" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobho akati, “Chimbondipikira;” akamupikira, akatengesera Jakobho udangwe hwake." 
Genesis25:34 Jakobho akapa Esau chingwa nezvokudya zvenyemba; akadya, akanwa, akasimuka, ndokuenda hake; Esau akazvidza udangwe hwake saizvozvo." 
Genesis26:1 Zvino nzara yakanga iripo panyika; isati iri nzara yakanga iripo pamazuva aAbhurahamu. Isaka akenda Gerari kuna Abhimereki, mambo wavaFirisitia." 
Genesis26:2 Jehovha akazviratidzazve kwaari akati, “Usaburukira Ijipiti, gara munyika yandakakuudza;" 
Genesis26:3 gara hako munyika ino uri mutorwa; ini ndichava newe, ndichakuropafadza; nokuti ndichakupa iwe, navana vako, nyika idzi dzose; ndichasimbisa mhiko yandakapikira Abhurahamu, baba vako;" 
Genesis26:4 ndichawanza vana vako senyenyedzi dzedenga; ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzicharopafadzwa muvana vako; 
Genesis26:5 nokuti Abhurahamu wakateerera izwi rangu, akachengeta zvandakamuraira, nemirairo yangu, nemitemo yangu, nemirau yangu.”" 
Genesis26:6 Isaka akagara Gerari; 
Genesis26:7 vanhu venyika iyoyo vakamubvunza pamusoro pomukadzi wake, akati, “Ihanzvadzi yangu;” nokuti wakanga achitya kuti, mukadzi wangu, achiti, “Zvimwe vanhu venyika ino vangandiuraya nokuda kwaRabheka;” nokuti akanga akanaka kumeso." 
Genesis26:8 Zvino wakati avapo nguva refu, Abhimereki, mambo wavaFirisitia, wakatarira napahwindo, akaona Isaka achitamba naRabheka, mukadzi wake." 
Genesis26:9 Ipapo Abhimereki akadana Isaka akati, “Tarira, zvirokwazvo mukadzi wako; wakataura seiko uchiti, ‘Ihanzvadzi yangu?’ ” Isaka akati kwaari, “Nokuti ndakati, ‘Zvimwe ndingafa nokuda kwake.’ ”" 
Genesis26:10 Abhimereki akati kwaari, “Ndokudiniko kuti watiitira chinhu ichi? Dai mumwe wavanhu aivata nomukadzi wako, ungadai watiisa pamhosva.”" 
Genesis26:11 Abhimereki akaraira vanhu vose, akati, “Anobata munhu uyu kana mukadzi wake, achauraiwa zvirokwazvo.”" 
Genesis26:12 Zvino Isaka akadyara zviyo munyika iyoyo, akawana gore iro zvakapetwa kazana; Jehovha akamuropafadza." 
Genesis26:13 Munhu uyu akava mukuru, akaramba achiwedzerwa, kusvikira ava mukuru kwazvo;" 
Genesis26:14 akanga aine pfuma yamakwai, neyemombe, nemhuri huru; vaFirisitia vakamugodora." 
Genesis26:15 VaFirisitia vakadzivira matsime ose akanga acherwa navaranda vababa vake pamazuva ababa vake Abhurahamu, vakaafutsira nevhu." 
Genesis26:16 Abhimereki akati kuna Isaka, “Ibva hako kwatiri, nokuti watipfuura kwazvo nesimba.”" 
Genesis26:17 Isaka akabvapo, akandodzika matende ake mumupata weGerari, akagarapo." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka akacherazve matsime emvura, akanga acherwa pamazuva ababa vake, Abhurahamu; nokuti vaFirisitia vakanga vaadzivira Abhurahamu afa; akaatumidza mazita aakanga atumidzwa nababa vake." 
Genesis26:19 Varanda vaIsaka vakachera mumupata, vakawanapo tsime remvura inotubuka." 
Genesis26:20 Vafudzi veGerari vakaitirana nharo navafudzi vaIsaka, vachiti, “Imvura yedu;” akatumidza tsime iroro zita rinonzi Eseki; nokuti vakapesana naye." 
Genesis26:21 Zvino akandocherazve rimwe tsime; vakaitirana nharo pamusoro pairorozve; akaritumidza zita rinonzi Sitina. 
Genesis26:22 Akabvapo, akandocherazve rimwe tsime; iroro havana kuzoitirana nharo pamusoro paro; akaritumidza zita rinonzi Rehobhoti; akati, “Nokuti zvino Jehovha akandiitira nzvimbo huru, kuti tiwande munyika ino.”" 
Genesis26:23 Akabvapo, akakwira Bheerishebha;" 
Genesis26:24 Jehovha akazviratidza kwaari usiku ihwohwo, akati, “Ndini Mwari waAbhurahamu, baba vako; usatya, nokuti ndinewe, ndichakuropafadza, nokuwanza rudzi rwako nokuda kwaAbhurahamu, muranda wangu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Akavakapo atari, akanamata zita raJehovha, akadzika tende rake ipapo; varanda vaIsaka vakacherapo tsime." 
Genesis26:26 Ipapo Abhimereki akaenda kwaari, achibva Gerari, aine shamwari yake Ahuzati, naPikori, mukuru wehondo yake." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka akati kwavari, “Mauyireiko kwandiri, zvamunondivenga, mukandidzinga kwamuri?”" 
Genesis26:28 Ivo vakati, “Takaona kwazvo kuti Jehovha anewe, tikati, ‘Zvino mhiko ngaivepo pakati pedu, pakati pedu newe, tiite sungano newe;" 
Genesis26:29 kuti urege kutiitira zvakaipa, sezvatisina kukubata iwe, sezvatakakuitira zvakanaka bedzi, tikakuendesa norugare;’ zvino iwe ndiwe hako muropafadzwa waJehovha.”" 
Genesis26:30 Iye akavagadzirira zvokudya, vakadya, vakanwa," 
Genesis26:31 vakamuka mangwanani, vakapikirana; ipapo Isaka akavatendera kuenda, vakabva kwaari norugare." 
Genesis26:32 Nomusi iwoyo varanda vaIsaka vakauya, vakamuudza kuti vakanga vachera tsime, vakati kwaari, “Mvura taiwana.”" 
Genesis26:33 Akaritumidza zita rinonzi Shebha; naizvozvo zita reguta ndiBheerishebha kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
Genesis26:34 Zvino Esau wakati asvika makore makumi mana, akawana Judhisi, mukunda waBheeri, muHeti, naBhasimati, mukunda waEroni, muHeti;" 
Genesis26:35 ivavo vakarwadza mwoyo waIsaka naRabheka. 
Genesis27:1 Zvino Isaka wakati ava mutana, meso ake owonera madzerere, asisaoni zvakanaka, akadana Esau, mwanakomana wake mukuru, akati kwaari, “Mwana wangu;” iye akati kwaari, “Ndiri pano hangu.”" 
Genesis27:2 Akati, “Tarira zvino ndakwegura; handizivi zuva rokufa kwangu." 
Genesis27:3 Zvino tora hako nhumbi dzako dzokuvhima nadzo, dzinoti goba rako, nouta hwako, uende kusango undivhimire mhuka;" 
Genesis27:4 undigadzirire nyama yakanaka, sezvandinoda, uuye nayo kwandiri, ndidye, mweya wangu ukuropafadze, ndisati ndafa.”" 
Genesis27:5 Zvino Rabheka akanzwa Isaka achitaura naEsau, mwanakomana wake. Esau akaenda kusango kundovhima mhuka, kuti auye nayo." 
Genesis27:6 Rabheka akataura naJakobho, mwanakomana wake, akati, “Tarira, ndanzwa baba vako vachitaura naEsau, mukoma wako, vachiti," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Nditorere mhuka, undigadzirire nyama yakanaka, kuti ndiidye, ndikuropafadze pamberi paJehovha ndisati ndafa.’" 
Genesis27:8 Zvino mwana wangu, teerera izwi rangu sezvandinokuraira." 
Genesis27:9 Enda zvino kuzvipfuwo, unditorerepo mbudzana mbiri dzakanaka, ndigadzirire baba vako nadzo nyama yakanaka, sezvavanoda;" 
Genesis27:10 ugoenda nayo kuna baba vako, vadye, kuti vakuropafadze vasati vafa.”" 
Genesis27:11 Jakobho akati kuna Rabheka mai vake, “Tarirai, Esau, mukoma wangu, munhu ane mvere, asi ini ndiri munhu asina mvere." 
Genesis27:12 Zvimwe baba vangu vachandibata–bata, ndikava somunyengedzeri pamberi pavo, ndikazviuyisira kutukwa pachigaro chokuropafadzwa.”" 
Genesis27:13 Mai vake vakati kwaari, “Kutukwa kwako ngakuve pamusoro pangu, mwana wangu; teerera hako izwi rangu, uende unditorere idzo.”" 
Genesis27:14 Iye akaenda, akadzitora, akadziisa kuna mai vake; mai vake vakagadzira nyama yakanaka, yaidikanwa nababa vake." 
Genesis27:15 Zvino Rabheka akatora nguo dzakaisvonaka dzaEsau, mwanakomana wake mukuru, dzaaiva nadzo mumba, akadzifukidza Jakobho, mwanakomana wake muduku;" 
Genesis27:16 akaisa nguo dzembudzana pamaoko ake, napamutsipa wake pakanga pasina mvere;" 
Genesis27:17 akaisa nyama yakanaka nechingwa, zvaakanga agadzira, muruoko rwaJakobho, mwanakomana wake." 
Genesis27:18 Iye akaenda kuna baba vake, akati, “Baba vangu;” ivo vakati, “Ndiri pano hangu; ndiwe aniko mwana wangu?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobho akati kuna baba vake, “Ndini Esau, dangwe renyu; ndaita sezvamandiraira; simukai henyu, mugare, mudye nyama yangu yemhuka, mweya wenyu undiropafadze.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isaka akati kumwanakomana wake, “Wakurumidza seiko kuiwana, mwana wangu?” Iye akati, “Nokuti Jehovha, Mwari wenyu, waituma pamberi pangu.”" 
Genesis27:21 Isaka akati kuna Jakobho, “Chimboswedera hako, ndikubate–bate, mwana wangu, kuti ndizive kuti uri mwanakomana wangu Esau chaiye, kana kuti hausi iwe.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakobho akaswedera kuna Isaka, baba vake; ivo vakamubata–bata, vakati, “Izwi, izwi raJakobho, asi maoko maoko aEsau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Asi haana kumuziva, nokuti maoko ake akanga aine mvere, samaoko omukuru wake Esau; akamuropafadza." 
Genesis27:24 Akati, “Ndiwe mwanakomana wangu Esau chaiye here?” Iye akati, “Ndini iye.”" 
Genesis27:25 Akati, “Uiswededze pedyo neni, kuti ndidye nyama yemhuka yomwanakomana wangu, mweya wangu ukuropafadze.” Iye akaiswededza pedyo naye, akadya; akamupawo waini, akanwa." 
Genesis27:26 Ipapo baba vake Isaka vakati kwaari, “Swedera zvino unditsvode, mwana wangu.”" 
Genesis27:27 Akaswedera, akamutsvoda; akanzwa munhuwi wenguo dzake, akamuropafadzwa, akati, “Tarira munhuwi womwanakomana wangu wakaita somunhuwi wesango rakaropafadzwa naJehovha;" 
Genesis27:28 Mwari ngaakupe dova rokudenga, mafuta enyika, nezviyo newaini zvakawanda." 
Genesis27:29 Vanhu ngavakushumire, marudzi ose ngaakupfugamire; uve ishe wehama dzako, vanakomana vamai vako ngavakupfugamire; vose vanokutuka ngavatukwe, vose vanokuropafadza ngavaropafadzwe.”" 
Genesis27:30 Zvino Isaka wakati apedza kuropafadza Jakobho, Jakobho achangobuda pamberi paIsaka baba vake, Esau mukoma wake, akapinda, achibva pakuvhima kwake." 
Genesis27:31 Naiye akagadzira nyama yakanaka, akaenda nayo kuna baba vake; akati kuna baba vake, “Baba vangu ngavasimuke, ngavadye nyama yemhuka yomwanakomana wavo, kuti mweya wenyu undiropafadze.”" 
Genesis27:32 Ipapo Isaka baba vake vakati, “Ndiwe aniko?” Iye akati, “Ndini mwanakomana wenyu, dangwe renyu Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaka akabvunda kwazvo–kwazvo, akati, “Ndianiko wakanga avhima mhuka, akauya nayo kwandiri ndikadya zvose, iwe usati wasvika, ndikamuropafadza? Hongu, zvirokwazvo iye acharopafadzwa hake.”" 
Genesis27:34 Esau akati achinzwa mashoko ababa vake, akachema nokuchema kukuru kunorwadza mwoyo, akati kuna baba vake, “Ndiropafadzei neniwo, baba vangu!”" 
Genesis27:35 Akati, “Munun'una wako wakauya nokunyengedzera, akatora kuropafadzwa kwako.”" 
Genesis27:36 Iye akati, “Haana kutumidzwa zita rakamufanira here, rokuti Jakobho? Nokuti zvino wandinyengedzera kaviri; wambonditorera udangwe hwangu, zvino tarira, wanditorera kuropafadzwa kwangu.” Akati, “Hamuna kundichengeterawo kuropafadzwa here?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka akapindura, akati kuna Esau, “Tarira, ndamuita ishe wako, nehama dzake dzose ndakamupa iye, kuti vave varanda vake; ndamusimbisa nezviyo newaini; zvino chiiko chandingakuitira iwe, mwana wangu?”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau akati kuna baba vake, “Munongova nokuropafadza kumwe kwoga here, baba vangu? Ndiropafadzei, neniwo, baba vangu!” Esau akachema nokuchema kukuru." 
Genesis27:39 Ipapo Isaka baba vake, akapindura akati kwaari, “Tarira, ugaro hwako uchava kure namafuta enyika, kure nedova rokudenga rinobva kumusoro;" 
Genesis27:40 uchararama nomunondo wako, uchashumira munun'una wako; uchati kana wozvimutsa iwe, uchavhuna joko rake ribve pamutsipa wako.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau akavenga Jakobho nokuda kwokuropafadzwa kwaakaropafadzwa nako nababa vake; Esau akati mumwoyo make, “Mazuva okuchema baba vangu ava kuda kusvika; ipapo ndichauraya munun'una wangu Jakobho.”" 
Genesis27:42 Zvino Rabheka akaudzwa mashoko aEsau, mwanakomana wake mukuru; akatuma munhu kundodana Jakobho, mwanakomana wake muduku, akati kwaari, “Tarira, mukoma wako Esau anozvinyaradza pamusoro pako, achiti achakuuraya." 
Genesis27:43 Saka zvino, mwana wangu, teerera izwi rangu; simuka utizire Harani kuna Rabhani hanzvadzi yangu;" 
Genesis27:44 undogara kwaari mazuva mashomanana, kusvikira shungu dzomukoma wako dzanyarara;" 
Genesis27:45 kusvikira kutsamwa kwomukoma wako kwanyarara kwauri, kana akanganwa izvo zvawamuitira. Ipapo ndichatuma munhu kuzokutora ikoko; ndichatorerwa seiko nomusi mumwe imi mose muri vaviri?”" 
Genesis27:46 Rabheka akati kuna Isaka, “Ndanetswa noupenyu hwangu nokuda kwavakunda VaHeti; kana Jakobho akawanawo mukadzi kuvakunda VaHeti, wakaita saivava, kuvakunda venyika ino, upenyu hwangu ungandibatsirei?”" 
Genesis28:1 Zvino Isaka wakadana Jakobho, akamuropafadza, akamuraira, akati kwaari, “Usawana mukadzi kuvakunda veKenani." 
Genesis28:2 Simuka uende Padhani-aramu, kuimba yaBhetueri, baba vamai vako, uzviwanire ikoko mukadzi kuvakunda vaRabhani, hanzvadzi yamai vako." 
Genesis28:3 Mwari waMasimbaose ngaakuropafadze, akuberekese vana, akuwanze, kuti uve ndudzi zhinji dzavanhu;" 
Genesis28:4 akupe kuropafadzwa kwaAbhurahamu, iwe, navana vako pamwechete newe; kuti ugare nhaka yenyika maugere uri mutorwa, iyo yakapiwa Abhurahamu naMwari.”" 
Genesis28:5 Isaka akati Jakobho aende, akaenda Padhani-aramu, kuna Rabhani, mwanakomana waBhetueri, muAramu, hanzvadzi yaRabheka, mai vaJakobho naEsau." 
Genesis28:6 Zvino Esau wakaona kuti Isaka wakanga aropafadza Jakobho, akati aende Padhani-aramu, kuti azviwanire ikoko mukadzi; uyewo kuti pakumuropafadza kwake akamuraira, achiti, “Usawana mukadzi kuvakunda veKenani”;" 
Genesis28:7 uyezve, kuti Jakobho akateerera baba vake namai vake, akaenda Padhani-aramu." 
Genesis28:8 Esau akaona kuti vakunda veKenani havana kufadza Isaka baba vake; 
Genesis28:9 Esau akaenda kuna Ishimaeri, akawedzera kuvakadzi vake, vaakanga anavo, Maharati mukunda waIshimaeri, mwanakomana waAbhurahamu, hanzvadzi yaNebhayoti, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis28:10 Zvino Jakobho akabuda paBheerishebha, akaenda Harani," 
Genesis28:11 akasvika pane imwe nzvimbo, akavatapo usiku, nokuti zuva rakanga ravira; akatora rimwe ibwe ipapo, akaritsamira, akavata pasi ipapo." 
Genesis28:12 Akarota, akaona danhu rakanga ramiswa panyika, musoro waro wakasvika kudenga; akaona vatumwa vaMwari vachikwira nokuburuka naro." 
Genesis28:13 Akaona Jehovha amire naye, akati, “Ndini Jehovha, Mwari waAbhurahamu baba vako, naMwari waIsaka; nyika yauvete pamusoro payo ndichakupa iyoyo, iwe navana vako;" 
Genesis28:14 vana vako vachaita seguruva renyika; uchapararira kumavirazuva, nokumabvazuva, nokumusoro, nenyasi; ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzicharopafadzwa mauri nomuvana vako." 
Genesis28:15 Tarira, ndinewe, ndichakuchengeta kwose kwaunoenda, nokukudzosera kunyika ino; nokuti handingakusiyi kusvikira ndaita izvozvo zvandakakuudza.”" 
Genesis28:16 Ipapo Jakobho akapepuka pahope dzake, akati, “Zvirokwazvo Jehovha ari panzvimbo ino, asi ini handina kuzviziva.”" 
Genesis28:17 Akatya akati, “Nzvimbo ino inotyisa seiko! Iyi imba chaiyo yaMwari, isuwo rokudenga.”" 
Genesis28:18 Jakobho akamuka mangwanani, akatora ibwe raakanga akatsamira, akarimisa kuti rive shongwe, akadira mafuta pamusoro paro;" 
Genesis28:19 akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rinonzi Bhetieri, asi zita reguta pakutanga rainzi Ruzi." 
Genesis28:20 Ipapo Jakobho akapika mhiko achiti, “Kana Mwari akava neni, akandichengeta panzira yandinoenda, akandipa zvokudya, ndidye, nezvokufuka, ndifuke;" 
Genesis28:21 ndikadzokerazve norugare kuimba yababa vangu, Jehovha achava Mwari wangu;" 
Genesis28:22 neiri ibwe, randakamisa rikava shongwe, richava imba yaMwari; nezvinhu zvose zvamuchandipa, zvirokwazvo ndichakupai chegumi chazvo.”" 
Genesis29:1 Jakobho akasimukapo, akaenda kunyika yavanhu vamabvazuva." 
Genesis29:2 Akatarira, akaona tsime kusango, namapoka matatu amakwai avete pasi pariri; nokuti vainwisa mapoka avo patsime iroro; pamuromo wetsime iroro pakanga paine ibwe guru." 
Genesis29:3 Ndipapo paiungana mapoka ose; zvino vaikungurutsa ibwe pamuromo wetsime, vakanwisa makwai avo, vachidzoserazve ibwe pamuromo wetsime paugaro hwaro." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobho akati kwavari, “Hama dzangu, mabvepiko?” Ivo vakati, “Tabva Harani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Iye akati kwavari, “Munoziva Rabhani, mwanakomana waNahori, here?” Vakati, “Tinomuziva.”" 
Genesis29:6 Akati kwavari, “Unofara here?” Ivo vakati, “Unofara hake; hoyo Racheri mukunda wake, wouya namakwai.”" 
Genesis29:7 Akati, “Tarirai, achiri masikati makuru, nguva yokuunganidza zvipfuwo ichigere kusvika; nwisai makwai, mugondoafudza.”" 
Genesis29:8 Ivo vakati, “Hatingagoni kusvikira mapoka ose aunganidzwa pamwechete, ibwe rikakungurutswa pamuromo wetsime; ipapo tinonwisa makwai.”" 
Genesis29:9 Akati achiri kutaura navo, Racheri akasvika namakwai ababa vake, nokuti ndiye aiva mufudzi wawo." 
Genesis29:10 Zvino Jakobho akati achiona Racheri, mukunda waRabhani, hanzvadzi yamai vake, Jakobho akaswedera, akakungurutsa ibwe pamuromo wetsime, akanwisa makwai aRabhani, hanzvadzi yamai vake." 
Genesis29:11 Jakobho akatsvoda Racheri, akachema kwazvo." 
Genesis29:12 Jakobho akaudza Racheri kuti iye ihama yababa vake, mwanakomana waRabheka. Ipapo iye akamhanya, akandoudza baba vake." 
Genesis29:13 Rabhani akati anzwa mashoko aJakobho, mwanakomana wehanzvadzi yake, akamhanya kundosangana naye, akamumbundikira, akamutsvoda, akamuisa kumba kwake. Iye akaudza Rabhani zvinhu izvo zvose." 
Genesis29:14 Rabhani akati kwaari, “Zvirokwazvo uri pfupa rangu renyama yangu.” Akagara naye mwedzi wose." 
Genesis29:15 Zvino Rabhani akati kuna Jakobho, “Ko ungandibatira usingapiwi mubairo, nokuti uri hama yangu here? Ndiudze kuti mubairo wako uve weiko.”" 
Genesis29:16 Zvino Rabhani akanga ana vakunda vaviri; zita romukuru rakanga riri Rea, nezita romuduku Racheri." 
Genesis29:17 Rea akanga ana meso akaneta, asi Racheri akanga akanaka kwazvo pamuviri napachiso." 
Genesis29:18 Zvino Jakobho akanga achida Racheri, akati, “Ndichakubatirai makore manomwe pamusoro paRacheri, mukunda wenyu muduku.”" 
Genesis29:19 Rabhani akati kwaari, “Zviri nani kuti ndimupe iwe, ndirege kumupa mumwe murume; gara hako neni.”" 
Genesis29:20 Jakobho akamubatira makore manomwe pamusoro paRacheri; asi akava samazuva mashoma kwaari, nokuti akanga achimuda." 
Genesis29:21 Zvino Jakobho akati kuna Rabhani, “Ndipei mukadzi wangu, nokuti mazuva angu asvika, kuti ndipinde kwaari.”" 
Genesis29:22 Rabhani akakoka vanhu vose voko, akaita mutambo." 
Genesis29:23 Zvino kuzoti ava madeko, akatora Rea, mukunda wake, akamuisa kwaari; iye akapinda kwaari." 
Genesis29:24 Rabhani akapa Rea, mukunda wake Ziripa, murandakadzi wake, kuti ave mushandiri wake." 
Genesis29:25 Zvino mangwana akaona kuti ndiRea; akati kuna Rabhani, “Chiiko ichi chawandiitira? Handina kukubatira pamusoro paRacheri here? Wandinyengedzera seiko?”" 
Genesis29:26 Rabhani akati, “Hakunzarwo kuno kwedu, kuti munun'una atange kuwaniswa, mukuru achigere." 
Genesis29:27 Pedzisa vhiki yewaniso naiyeyu, tigokupa mumwewo pamusoro pebasa rauchandibatira mamwe makore manomwezve.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobho akaita saizvozvo, akapedza vhiki yewaniso naye; akamupa Racheri, mukunda wake, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis29:29 Rabhani akapa Racheri, mukunda wake, Bhiriha murandakadzi wake, kuti ave mushandiri wake." 
Genesis29:30 Akapindawo kuna Racheri, akada Racheriwo kupfuura Rea, akamubatira mamwe makore manomwezve." 
Genesis29:31 Zvino Jehovha akaona kuti Rea akanga asingadikanwi, akamuberekesa; asi Racheri akanga asingabereki." 
Genesis29:32 Rea akava nemimba, akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Rubheni; nokuti wakati, “Jehovha akaona dambudziko rangu; nokuti zvino murume wangu achandida.”" 
Genesis29:33 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwanakomana, akati, “Jehovha akanzwa kuti handidikanwi, naizvozvo akandipawo uyu;” akamutumidza zita rinonzi Simioni." 
Genesis29:34 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwanakomana, akati, “Zvino nguva ino murume wangu achandinamatira, nokuti ndamuberekera vanakomana vatatu;” naizvozvo zita rake rakanzi Revhi." 
Genesis29:35 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwanakomana, akati, “Nguva ino ndicharumbidza Jehovha;” naizvozvo akamutumidza zita rinonzi Judha; akaguma kubereka." 
Genesis30:1 Zvino Racheri akati achiona kuti haaberekeri Jakobho vana, Racheri akagodora mukoma wake, akati kuna Jakobho, “Ndipe vana; kana usingandipi, ndichafa.”" 
Genesis30:2 Ipapo Jakobho akatsamwira Racheri akati, “Ndiri panzvimbo yaMwari kani, wakakushaisa chibereko?”" 
Genesis30:3 Iye akati, “Hoyu murandakadzi wangu Bhiriha; pinda kwaari, kuti abereke pamabvi angu, neni ndiwane vana kwaari.”" 
Genesis30:4 Akamupa Bhiriha, murandakadzi wake, kuti ave mukadzi wake; Jakobho akapinda kwaari." 
Genesis30:5 Zvino Bhiriha akava nemimba, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana." 
Genesis30:6 Racheri akati, “Mwari akandiruramisira, akandipa mwanakomana”; naizvozvo akamutumidza zita rinonzi Dhani." 
Genesis30:7 Bhiriha, murandakadzi waRacheri akava nemimbazve, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana wechipiri." 
Genesis30:8 Zvino Racheri akati, “Ndakarwa nokurwa kukuru nomukoma wangu, ndikakunda;” akamutumidza zita rinonzi Nafutari." 
Genesis30:9 Zvino Rea akati achiona kuti waguma kubereka vana akatora Ziripa, murandakadzi wake, akamupa Jakobho, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis30:10 Ziripa, murandakadzi waRea, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana." 
Genesis30:11 Rea akati, “Makorokoto!” Akamutumidza zita rinonzi Gadhi." 
Genesis30:12 Ziripa, murandakadzi waRea, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana wechipiri." 
Genesis30:13 Rea akati, “Ndinomufaro mukuru, nokuti vanasikana vachati, ndinomufaro mukuru,” akamutumidza zita rinonzi Ashuru." 
Genesis30:14 Zvino Rubheni akaenda pamazuva okucheka zviyo, akandowana michero kusango, akauya nayo kuna mai vake Rea. Racheri akati kuna Rea, “Dondipawo michero yomwanakomana wako.”" 
Genesis30:15 Iye akati kwaari, “Chinhu chiduku here kuti wakatora murume wangu?” Racheri akati, “Naizvozvo ngaavate newe usiku huno nokuda kwemichero yomwanakomana wako.”" 
Genesis30:16 Zvino Jakobho akati obva kusango madeko, Rea akabuda kundosangana naye, akati, “Unofanira kupinda kwandiri, nokuti ndakakutenga nemichero yomwanakomana wangu.” Akavata naye usiku ihwohwo." 
Genesis30:17 Zvino Mwari akanzwa Rea, akava nemimba, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana wechishanu." 
Genesis30:18 Rea akati, “Mwari akandipa mubairo wangu, nokuti ndakapa murandakadzi wangu murume wangu;” akamutumidza zita rinonzi Isakari." 
Genesis30:19 Rea akava nemimbazve, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana wechitanhatu." 
Genesis30:20 Rea akati, “Mwari akandipa chipo chakanaka; zvino murume wangu achagara neni, nokuti ndamuberekera vanakomana vatanhatu”; akamutumidza zita rinonzi Zebhuroni." 
Genesis30:21 Pashure akazobereka mwanasikana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Dhina." 
Genesis30:22 Zvino Mwari akarangarirawo Racheri, Mwari akamunzwa, akazarura chizvaro chake." 
Genesis30:23 Iye akava nemimba, akabereka mwanakomana; akati, “Mwari akabvisa kuzvidzwa kwangu;”" 
Genesis30:24 akamutumidza zita rinonzi Josefa, achiti, “Jehovha ngaandiwedzere mumwe mwanakomana.”" 
Genesis30:25 Zvino Racheri akati abereka Josefa, Jakobho akati kuna Rabhani, “Ndiregei, ndiende kumusha kwangu, nokunyika yangu." 
Genesis30:26 Ndipei vakadzi vangu navana vangu, vandakakubatirai, ndiende hangu, nokuti imi munoziva kubata basa kwangu kwandakakubatirai nako.”" 
Genesis30:27 Rabhani akati, “Zvino kana ndawana nyasha pamberi pako, gara hako, nokuti ndakaona kuti Jehovha akandiropafadza nokuda kwako.”" 
Genesis30:28 Akati, “Ndiudze mubairo wako, ndigokupa iwo.”" 
Genesis30:29 Iye akati, “Imi munoziva mumene sezvandakakubatirai, uye kugara kwezvipfuwo zvenyu kwandiri." 
Genesis30:30 Nokuti zvamaiva nazvo, ndisati ndasvika, zvanga zviri zvishoma, zvikazowanda, zvikava zvizhinji; Jehovha akakuropafadzai pose pandakatsika; zvino ndichabatira imba yangu rinhiko?”" 
Genesis30:31 Iye akati, “Ndokupeiko?” Jakobho akati, “Musandipa chinhu; kana mukandiitira chinhu ichi, ndichafudzazve zvipfuwo zvenyu nokuzvichengeta." 
Genesis30:32 Ndichafamba pakati pezvipfuwo zvenyu zvose nhasi, ndichiraura pakati pazvo zvose zvina mavara nezvina makwapa, namatema pakati pamakwai, nedzina mavara nedzina makwapa pakati pembudzi; ndizvozvo zvichava mubairo wangu." 
Genesis30:33 Nenzira iyi kururama kwangu kuchandipupurira pashure, kana muchizouya kuona mubairo wangu uri pamberi penyu; dzose dzisina mavara nedzisina makwapa pakati pembudzi, namatema pakati pamakwai, izvozvo kana zvikawanikwa kwandiri mungati zvabiwa neni.”" 
Genesis30:34 Rabhani akati, “Ndizvo hazvo, ngazvive sezvawataura.”" 
Genesis30:35 Nomusi iwoyo akaraura nhongo dzembudzi dzakanga dzine mitsetse, nedzina makwapa, nenhunzvi dzose dzembudzi dzakanga dzina mavara nedzina makwapa, dzose dzakanga dzino ruvara ruchena, napakati pamakwai ose akanga ano ruvara rutema, akazvipa vana vake;" 
Genesis30:36 akaisa runhambo rwamazuva matatu pakati pake naJakobho; Jakobho akafudza zvipfuwo zvaRabhani zvakanga zvasara. 
Genesis30:37 Zvino Jakobho akatora matanda omusitorakisi, noomuarimobdi, noomupurani, akasvuura mitaro michena paari, kuti kuchena kuonekwe kwakanga kuri maari;" 
Genesis30:38 akaisa matanda aakanga asvuura pamberi pezvipfuwo muzvinwiro, paiuya zvipfuwo zvichinwa; zvikatora zamu kana zvouya kunwa." 
Genesis30:39 Zvipfuwo zvikatora zamu pamberi pamatanda, zvipfuwo zvikabereka vana vane mitsetse, navana mavara, navana makwapa." 
Genesis30:40 Zvino Jakobho akatsaura makwayana, akataridza zvipfuwo kune zvaiva nemitsetse, nezvitema pakati pezvipfuwo zvaRabhani; akaisa mapoka ake ari oga; haana kuzviisa kuzvipfuwo zvaRabhani." 
Genesis30:41 Zvino nguva imwe neimwe kana zvaiva nesimba pazvipfuwo zvichitora zamu, Jakobho akaisa matanda pamberi pezvipfuwo muzvinwiro, kuti zvitore zamu pakati pamatanda;" 
Genesis30:42 asi kana zvipfuwo zvichishaiwa simba haana kuaisa; naizvozvo zvakanga zvisina simba zvakanga zviri zvaRabhani, asi zvaiva nesimba zvakanga zviri zvaJakobho." 
Genesis30:43 Murume uyu akava mukuru kwazvo, akava nezvipfuwo zvizhinji, navaranda, navarandakadzi, namakamera, namadhongi." 
Genesis31:1 Zvino Jakobho akanzwa mashoko avanakomana vaRabhani, vachiti, “Jakobho atora zvose zvaiva zvababa vedu; azviwanira pfuma yose iyi kune zvaiva zvababa vedu.”" 
Genesis31:2 Jakobho akaona Rabhani akange asisamubati zvakanaka sepakutanga. 
Genesis31:3 Jehovha akati kuna Jakobho, “Dzokera kunyika yamadzibaba ako, nokuhama dzako; ini ndichava newe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Ipapo Jakobho akatuma munhu kundodana Racheri naRea vauye kusango kuzvipfuwo zvake; 
Genesis31:5 akati kwavari, “Ndinoona kuti chiso chababa venyu hachizakaita kwandiri sapakutanga; asi Mwari wababa vangu akanga aneni." 
Genesis31:6 Munoziva kuti ndakabatira baba venyu nesimba rangu rose. 
Genesis31:7 Baba venyu vakandinyengedzera, vakashandura mubairo wangu kagumi; asi Mwari haana kutendera kuti vandiitire zvakaipa." 
Genesis31:8 Kana vakati, ‘Zvina mavara ngazvive mubairo wako, zvipfuwo zvose ndokubereka zvina mavara;’ kana vakati, ‘Zvine mitsetse ngazvive mubairo wako,’ zvipfuwo zvose ndokubereka zvine mitsetse." 
Genesis31:9 Naizvozvo Mwari akatorera baba venyu zvipfuwo zvavo, akandipa ini izvozvo." 
Genesis31:10 “Zvino zvipfuwo zvakati zvichitora mazamu, ndakatarira ndikaona pakurota kwangu zvipfuwo, zvichisangana zvakanga zvine mitsetse, namavara, nedzakaita pfumbu." 
Genesis31:11 Ipapo mutumwa waMwari akati kwandiri pakurota kwangu, ‘Jakobho!’ Ini ndikati, ‘Ndiri pano hangu.’" 
Genesis31:12 Akati, ‘Zvino tarira, uone, kuti zvipfuwo zvose, zvinosangana, zvine mitsetse, namavara, zvakaita zvipfumbu; nokuti ndazviona zvose Rabhani zvaanoita kwauri." 
Genesis31:13 Ndini Mwari weBhetieri, paya pawakazodza shongwe, paya pawakandipikira mhiko; zvino simuka, ubve munyika ino, udzokere kunyika kwawakaberekerwa.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Ipapo Racheri naRea vakapindura vakati kwaari, “Ko tichine mugove nenhaka kuimba yababa vedu here?" 
Genesis31:15 Hatizi tatova vatorwa kwavari here? Nokuti vakatitengesa, vakaparadza chose mutengo wedu." 
Genesis31:16 Nokuti pfuma yose, yakatorerwa baba vedu naMwari, ndeyedu neyavana vedu; naizvozvo zvino chiita hako sezvawaudzwa naMwari.”" 
Genesis31:17 Ipapo Jakobho akasimuka, akatasvisa vana vake navakadzi vake pamakamera;" 
Genesis31:18 akatora zvipfuwo zvake zvose, nepfuma yake yose, yaakanga aunganidza, zvipfuwo zvaakanga apfuwa, zvaakanga aunganidza paPadhai-naramu, kuti aende kuna Isaka baba vake, kunyika yeKenani." 
Genesis31:19 Zvino Rabhani akanga aenda kundoveura makushe amakwai ake; Racheri akaba chifananidzo chainamatwa chababa vake. 
Genesis31:20 Jakobho akanyengedzera Rabhani, muAramu, nokuti haana kumuudza kuti ndotiza." 
Genesis31:21 Naizvozvo akatiza nezvose zvaakanga anazvo; akasimuka, akayambuka rwizi, akaringira kugomo reGiriadhi." 
Genesis31:22 Zvino nomusi wetatu Rabhani akaudzwa kuti Jakobho watiza. 
Genesis31:23 Iye akaenda nehama dzake, akamuteverera rwendo rwamazuva manomwe; akandomubata kugomo reGiriadhi." 
Genesis31:24 Mwari akauya kuna Rabhani, muAramu, pakurota usiku, akati kwaari, “Chenjera, kuti urege kutaura kuna Jakobho chinhu, kana chakanaka kana chakaipa.”" 
Genesis31:25 Rabhani akasvika kuna Jakobho. Zvino Jakobho akanga adzika tende rake mugomo; Rabhani nehama dzake vakadzika matende avowo mugomo reGiriadhi. 
Genesis31:26 Zvino Rabhani akati kuna Jakobho, “Waita seiko iwe, nokuti wandinyengedzera, ukaenda navakunda vangu vakaita savakatapwa nomunondo?" 
Genesis31:27 Watizireiko pakavanda, ukandinyengedzera; wakaregerei kundiudza, ndikakutendera kuti uende nomufaro, nenziyo, nengoma, norudimbwa?" 
Genesis31:28 Hauna kunditendera kuti nditsvode vanakomana vangu navakunda vangu. Zvino waita sebenzi. 
Genesis31:29 Ndine simba paruoko rwangu rokuitira zvakaipa; asi Mwari wababa vako akataura neni usiku hwazuro, akati, ‘Chenjera, kuti urege kutaura kuna Jakobho kana chakanaka kana chakaipa.’" 
Genesis31:30 Zvino, kana wakada kuenda hako, zvawakanga uchishuva zvikuru imba yababa vako, wagobireiko vamwari vangu?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobho akapindura, akati kuna Rabhani, “Nokuti ndakanga ndichitya, nokuti ndakati, ‘Zvimwe munganditorera vakunda venyu nesimba.’" 
Genesis31:32 Iye wamungawana ana vamwari venyu, ngaarege kurarama. Zvino hama dzedu dzichiriko, natsai kutsvaka zvinhu zvenyu zviri kwandiri, mugozvitora;” nokuti Jakobho akanga asingazivi kuti Racheri akanga azviba." 
Genesis31:33 Zvino Rabhani akapinda mutende raJakobho, nomutende raRea, nomutende ravarandakadzi vaviri, asi haana kuzviwana. Ipapo akabuda patende raRea, akapinda patende raRacheri." 
Genesis31:34 Zvino Racheri akanga atora vamwari, akavaisa muchigaro chekamera, akagara pamusoro pazvo. Rabhani akabatabata pose mutende, asi haana kuzviwana." 
Genesis31:35 Iye akati kuna baba vake, “Ishe wangu ngaarege kutsamwa, nokuti handigoni kusimuka pamberi penyu; nokuti mutoo wavakadzi uri kwandiri.” Iye akatsvakisisa, asi haana kuwana vamwari." 
Genesis31:36 Zvino Jakobho akatsamwa, akapopotera Rabhani; Jakobho akapindura akati kuna Rabhani, “Kudarika kwangu ndokweiko? Ko kutadza kwangu ndokwei, zvamanditevera neshungu dzakadai?" 
Genesis31:37 Zvino zvamabata–bata nhumbi dzangu dzose, magowaneiko panhumbi dzose zvokumba kwenyu? Zviisei pano pamberi pehama dzangu nedzenyu, vatonge pakati pedu isu vaviri." 
Genesis31:38 Ndakagara nemi makore aya makumi maviri; matunzvi enyu amakwai nenhunzvi dzenyu dzembudzi hazvina kusvodza, makondohwe enyu amakwai handina kuadya." 
Genesis31:39 Zvakarumwa nezvikara handina kuuya nazvo kwamuri; asi ndakazviripa ini; makazvireva pamaoko angu, kana zvakabiwa masikati, kana zvakabiwa usiku." 
Genesis31:40 Masikati ndakafa nezuva, usiku nechando; hope dzangu dzikabva kumeso angu." 
Genesis31:41 Makore aya makumi maviri ndakagara mumba menyu; ndakakubatirai makore ane gumi namana pamusoro pavakunda venyu vaviri, namakore matanhatu pamusoro pezvipfuwo zvenyu; mukashandura mubairo wangu kagumi." 
Genesis31:42 Dai Mwari wababa vangu, Mwari waAbhurahamu, iye wakatyiwa naIsaka, asaiva neni, zvirokwazvo mungadai maindiendesa ndisina chinhu. Mwari akaona kutambudzika kwangu namabasa amaoko angu, akakurairai usiku hwazuro.”" 
Genesis31:43 Rabhani akapindura, akati kuna Jakobho, “Vakunda ava vakunda vangu; vana ava vana vangu; zvipfuwo izvi zvipfuwo zvangu, nezvose zvaunoona ndezvangu; nhasi ndingaitei kuvakunda vangu ava, kana vana vavo vavakazvara?" 
Genesis31:44 Uya zvino ngatiite sungano, ini newe; chive chapupu pakati pangu newe.”" 
Genesis31:45 Jakobho akatora ibwe, akarimisa, rikava shongwe." 
Genesis31:46 Jakobho akati kuhama dzake, “Unganidzai mabwe;” ivo vakatora mabwe, vakaita murwi; vakadya ipapo pamurwi." 
Genesis31:47 Rabhani akautumidza Jegarisahadhuta; asi Jakobho akautumidza Garidhi. 
Genesis31:48 Rabhani akati, “Murwi uyu ngachive chapupu pakati pangu newe zuva ranhasi.” Naizvozvo akatumidzwa zita rinonzi Garidhi," 
Genesis31:49 uyewo Mizipa, nokuti akati, “Jehovha ngaarinde pakati pangu newe, kana tisingaonani." 
Genesis31:50 Kana ukazotambudza vakunda vangu, kana kuwana vamwe vakadzi kunze kwavakunda vangu, hakuna munhu achava nesu; asi tarira, Mwari ndicho chapupu pakati pangu newe.”" 
Genesis31:51 Zvino Rabhani akati kuna Jakobho, “Tarira murwi uyu, tarira shongwe iyi, yandakamisa pakati pangu newe." 
Genesis31:52 Murwi uyu chichava chapupu, neshongwe iyi chichava chapupu, kuti ini handingapfuuri murwi uyu, neshongwe iyi, uchienda kwandiri, kuti tiitirane zvakaipa." 
Genesis31:53 Mwari waAbhurahamu, Mwari waNahori, Mwari wababa vavo, ngaatonge pakati pedu.” Jakobho akapika naiye waityiwa naIsaka, baba vake." 
Genesis31:54 Ipapo Jakobho akabayira chibayiro mugomo; akakoka hama dzake kuti vadye zvokudya; vakadya zvokudya, vakavata usiku mugomo." 
Genesis31:55 Rabhani akamuka mangwanani, akatsvoda vanakomana vake navakunda vake, akavaropafadza; Rabhani akabva, akadzokera kumusha kwake." 
Genesis32:1 Zvino Jakobho akaenda nenzira yake, vatumwa vaMwari ndokusangana naye." 
Genesis32:2 Akati achivaona, Jakobho akati, “Ihondo yaMwari;” akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rinonzi Mahanaimi." 
Genesis32:3 Zvino Jakobho akatuma nhume pamberi pake kuna Esau, mukuru wake, kunyika yeSeiri, munyika yeEdhomu." 
Genesis32:4 Akavaraira, akati, “Taurai nashe wangu, Esau, muti, ‘Zvanzi nomuranda wenyu Jakobho, ndakanga ndiri mutorwa kuna Rabhani, ndikagarako kusvikira zvino;" 
Genesis32:5 ndine mombe, nembongoro, namakwai, navaranda, navarandakadzi; ndatuma vanhu kuzoudza ishe wangu izvozvi, kuti ndiwane nyasha pamberi penyu.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Nhume dzikadzokera kuna Jakobho, dzikati, “Takandosvika kumukuru wenyu Esau; naiye anouya kuzosangana nemi ana varume vana mazana mana.”" 
Genesis32:7 Jakobho akatya kwazvo, akatambudzika; akaparadzanisa vanhu vaakanga anavo, namakwai nemombe namakamera, akaita mapoka maviri;" 
Genesis32:8 akati, “Kana Esau akasvika kune rimwe boka, akariparadza, boka rakasara ringatiza.”" 
Genesis32:9 Zvino Jakobho akati, “Imi, Mwari wababa vangu Abhurahamu, naMwari wababa vangu Isaka; imi Jehovha, ndimi makati kwandiri, ‘Dzokera kunyika yako, nokuhama dzako, ndigokuitira zvakanaka’;" 
Genesis32:10 handina kufanirwa nenyasha dzenyu dzose nokutendeka kwenyu kwose kwamakaitira muranda wenyu; nokuti ndakayambuka Jodhani urwu netsvimbo yangu yoga; zvino ndava mapoka maviri. 
Genesis32:11 Dondirwirai paruoko rwomukuru wangu, paruoko rwaEsau; nokuti ndinomutya, kuti achauya akandiparadza ini, namai, pamwechete navana." 
Genesis32:12 Ndimi makati, ‘Zvirokwazvo ndichakuitira zvakanaka, ndichaitawo rudzi rwako sejecha regungwa, risingagoni kuverengwa nokuwanda kwaro.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Akavatapo usiku ihwohwo; akatora zvimwe kune zvaakanga anazvo, kuti chive chipo kuna Esau, mukuru wake;" 
Genesis32:14 zvaiti: Nhunzvi dzembudzi dzina mazana maviri, nenhongo dzina makumi maviri, namatunzvi amakwai ana mazana maviri, namakondohwe ana makumi maviri," 
Genesis32:15 namakamera anokamwa ana makumi matatu nemhuru dzawo, nemhou dzemombe dzina makumi mana, nehando dzemombe dzine gumi, namakadzi embongoro ana makumi maviri, nemhuru dzine gumi." 
Genesis32:16 Akazvipa mumaoko avaranda vake, boka rimwe nerimwe riri roga; akati kuvaranda vake, “Yambukai pamberi pangu, musiye runhambo pakati peboka rimwe nerimwe.”" 
Genesis32:17 Akaraira wokutanga, akati, “Kana Esau, mukuru wangu, akasangana newe, akabvunza, achiti, ‘Uri munhu waaniko? Unoendepiko? Izvi zviri pamberi pako ndezvaani?’" 
Genesis32:18 Uti, ‘Ndezvomuranda wenyu Jakobho; chipo chakatumirwa ishe wangu Esau; tarirai, naiye ari kumashure kweduwo;’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 akarairawo wechipiri newechitatu, navose vakanga vachitevera mapoka, akati, “Kana mukamuwana Esau, mutaure kwaari muchidaro;" 
Genesis32:20 muti, ‘Tarirai, naiye muranda wenyu Jakobho ari mumashure medu.’ ” Nokuti akati, “Ndichambomunyaradza nechipo chinonditungamirira, ndigoti ndoona chiso chake; zvimwe achandigamuchira.”" 
Genesis32:21 Naizvozvo chipo chakayambutswa mberi kwake; asi iye pachake akavata usiku ihwohwo pakati peungano. 
Genesis32:22 Zvino akamuka usiku ihwohwo, akatora vakadzi vake vaviri navarandakadzi vake vaviri, navana vake vane gumi nomumwe, akayambuka pazambuko raJakobho." 
Genesis32:23 Akavatora, akavayambutsa parukova, akayambutsawo zvaakanga anazvo." 
Genesis32:24 Asi Jakobho akasara ari oga; mumwe murume akaita mitsimba naye kusvikira utonga huchitsvuka. 
Genesis32:25 Zvino akati achiona kuti haagoni kumukunda, akamubata pahudyu, hudyu ikatyoka nemitsimba naye." 
Genesis32:26 Iye akati, “Chindirega ndiende, nokuti utonga hwotsvuka.” Iye akati, “Handingakuregei kuti muende, musati mandiropafadza.”" 
Genesis32:27 Akati kwaari, “Zita rako ndianiko?” Iye akati, “Jakobho.”" 
Genesis32:28 Akati, “Zita rako harichazonzi Jakobho, asi Isiraeri; nokuti wakarwa naMwari navanhu, ukakunda.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakobho akamubvunza, akati, “Ndiudzeiwo zita renyu.” Iye akati, “Unondibvunzireiko zita rangu?” Akamuropafadza ipapo." 
Genesis32:30 Zvino Jakobho akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rinonzi Penieri; nokuti akati, “Ndakaonana naMwari, upenyu hwangu hukachengetwa.”" 
Genesis32:31 Zuva rikamubudira achipfuura napaPenieri; akakamhina pahudyu yake. 
Genesis32:32 Naizvozvo vana VaIsiraeri havadyi nanhasi runda rehudyu riri papfupa rehudyu; nokuti akabata hudyu yaJakobho parunda rehudyu. 
Genesis33:1 Zvino Jakobho akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, akaona Esau achiuya ana varume vana mazana mana. Akagovera vana kuna Racheri naRea navarandakadzi vaviri." 
Genesis33:2 Akaisa varandakadzi navana vavo mberi, Rea navana vake shure kwavo, naRacheri naJosefa pakupedzisira." 
Genesis33:3 Iye pachake akapfuura achivatungamirira, akakotamira pasi kanomwe, kusvikira aswedera pedyo nomukuru wake." 
Genesis33:4 Ipapo Esau akamhanyira kundosangana naye, akamumbundikira, akawira pamutsipa wake, ndokumutsvoda; vakachema vose." 
Genesis33:5 Akasimudza meso ake, akaona vakadzi navana, akati, “Ava vaunavo ndivanani?” Iye akati, “Ndivo vana vakapiwa muranda wenyu naMwari nenyasha dzake.”" 
Genesis33:6 Varandakadzi vakaswedera, ivo navana vavo, vakakotama." 
Genesis33:7 NaRea navana vake vakaswederawo, vakakotama; pashure Josefa naRacheri vakaswedera, vakakotama." 
Genesis33:8 Akati, “Ko boka iri rose randasangana naro ndereiko?” Iye akati, “Kuti ndiwane nyasha kuna ishe wangu.”" 
Genesis33:9 Esau akati, “Ini ndine zvizhinji, munun'una wangu; izvo zvaunazvo, ngazvive zvako.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobho akati, “Kwete, kana ndawana nyasha kwamuri zvino, ndinokumbira kuti mugamuchire chipo changu paruoko rwangu; nokuti ndaona chiso chenyu, chikaita sechiso chaMwari, mukafara neni." 
Genesis33:11 Gamuchirai henyu chipo changu chamunopiwa; nokuti Mwari akandiitira nyasha, ndine zvizhinji.” Akamugwaririra, akazochitora." 
Genesis33:12 Akati, “Ngatipfuure hedu parwendo rwedu, tiende, ini ndichakutungamirira.”" 
Genesis33:13 Iye akati kwaari, “Ishe wangu anoziva kuti vana vachiri vaduku, uye kuti makwai nemombe zvandinazvo zvinoyamwisa; kana vakazvitinhisa zuva rimwe, zvipfuwo zvose zvichafa." 
Genesis33:14 Ishe wangu ngaapinde hake mberi kwomuranda wake; ini ndichanyatsozvisesedza sezvazvinogona kufamba, izvo zvipfuwo zviri pamberi pangu, navana sezvavanogona kufamba, kudzimara ndasvika kuna ishe wangu paSeiri.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau akati, “Zvino ngandisiye kwauri vamwe vanhu vandinavo.” Iye akati, “Muchaitireiko kudaro? Ndiwane hangu nyasha kuna ishe wangu.”" 
Genesis33:16 Naizvozvo Esau akadzoka zuva iroro, akaenda Seiri." 
Genesis33:17 Asi Jakobho akaenda Sukoti, akazvivakira imba, akaitira zvipfuwo zvake matanga; naizvozvo zita renzvimbo iyoyo rakanzi Sukoti." 
Genesis33:18 Jakobho akasvika zvakanaka kuguta reShekemu, riri panyika yeKenani, pakubva kwake paPadhani-aramu; akadzika matende ake pakatarisana neguta." 
Genesis33:19 Akatenga rutivi rwenyika, paakanga apetenura tende rake, kuvana vaHamori, baba vaShekemu, nezana remari." 
Genesis33:20 Akavakapo atari, akaritumidza zita rinonzi Eri-erohe-Isiraeri." 
Genesis34:1 Zvino Dhina, mwanasikana waRea, waakaberekera Jakobho, akabuda kundoona vakunda venyika iyoyo." 
Genesis34:2 Ipapo Shekemu, mwanakomana waHamori, muHivhi, muchinda wenyika, akamuona; akamutora, akavata naye, akamunyadzisa." 
Genesis34:3 Mweya wake ukakwezverwa kuna Dhina, mukunda waJakobho, akamuda musikana uyo, akataura zvakafadza mwoyo womusikana." 
Genesis34:4 Zvino Shekemu akataura nababa vake, Hamori akati, “Nditorerei musikana uyo, ave mukadzi wangu.”" 
Genesis34:5 Zvino Jakobho akanzwa kuti akasvibisa Dhina, mukunda wake; vanakomana vake vakanga vari kuzvipfuwo zvake kusango, Jakobho akanyarara hake kusvikira vauya." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori, baba vaShekemu, vakaenda kuna Jakobho kundotaurirana naye." 
Genesis34:7 Vakati vachinzwa izvozvo vanakomana vaJakobho vakauya vachibva kusango; zvino varume ava vakanga vane shungu kwazvo, vakatsamwa zvikuru, nokuti akanga aita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo pakati paVaIsiraeri kuti avate nomukunda waJakobho; chinhu icho chakanga chisingafaniri kuitwa." 
Genesis34:8 Zvino Hamori akataurirana navo, akati, “Mweya womwanakomana wangu, Shekemu, unoshuva mukunda wenyu; domupai henyu iye, ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis34:9 Wananai henyu nesu, tipei vakunda venyu, mugotora vakunda vedu." 
Genesis34:10 Garai henyu nesu, nyika ichava pamberi penyu; garaimo, mushambadzire, muzviunganidziremo pfuma.”" 
Genesis34:11 Ipapo Shekemu akati kuna baba vake nokuhanzvadzi dzake, “Ndiwane hangu nyasha kwamuri; zvamunoreva kwandiri, ndichakupai." 
Genesis34:12 Kumbirai henyu kwandiri roora guru nechipo chikuru; zvamunoreva kwandiri ndichakupai; asi ndipei musikana ave mukadzi wangu.” 
Genesis34:13 Ipapo vana vaJakobho vakapindura Shekemu naHamori, baba vake, nokunyengera, vakataura nokuti akanga achinya hanzvadzi yavo Dhina," 
Genesis34:14 vakati kwavari, “Hatingagoni kuita chinhu ichi, kuti tipe munhu asina kudzingiswa hanzvadzi yedu, nokuti izvozvi zvingatinyadza;" 
Genesis34:15 tingatenderana nemi kwoga kana mukaita chinhu ichi, kuti muve sesu, murume mumwe nomumwe ari kwamuri adzingiswe;" 
Genesis34:16 ipapo isu tichakupai vakunda vedu, nesuwo tichatora vakunda venyu; tigare nemi, tive savanhu vamwe." 
Genesis34:17 Kana musingatitereri, kuti mudzingiswe, tichatora mukunda wedu, tikabva.”" 
Genesis34:18 Mashoko avo akafadza Hamori naShekemu, mwanakomana waHamori." 
Genesis34:19 Jaya harina kunonoka kuita chinhu ichocho, nokuti akanga achifarira mukunda waJakobho; naiye akanga achikudzwa kupfuura vose veimba yose yababa vake." 
Genesis34:20 Zvino Hamori naShekemu, mwanakomana wake, vakauya kusuwo reguta ravo, vakataurirana navanhu veguta ravo vakati," 
Genesis34:21 “Vanhu ava vane rugare nesu; naizvozvo ngavagare havo munyika ino, vashambadziremo; nokuti tarirai nyika inovaringana; ngatitore vakunda vavo vave vakadzi vedu, nesu tivape vakunda vedu." 
Genesis34:22 Asi vanhu ava vachatenderana nesu kugara nesu, nokuita savanhu vamwe nesu, kwoga kana tichiita chinhu ichi, kuti varume vose kwatiri vadzingiswe, sezvavakadzingiswa ivo." 
Genesis34:23 Ko mombe dzavo, nepfuma yavo, nezvipfuwo zvavo zvose hazvichavi zvedu here? Ngatitenderane navo kwoga, vagogara nesu.”" 
Genesis34:24 Zvino vose vaibuda pasuwo reguta rake vakateerera Hamori, naShekemu, mwanakomana wake; ipapo varume vose vakadzingiswa, vose vaibuda pasuwo reguta rake." 
Genesis34:25 Zvino pazuva retatu, vachiri pakurwadziwa, vanakomana vaviri vaJakobho, Simioni naRevhi, hanzvadzi dzaDhina, vakatora mumwe nomumwe munondo wake, vakapinda muguta vanhu vasingarindiri, vakauraya varume vose." 
Genesis34:26 Vakauraya Hamori naShekemu, mwanakomana wake, neminondo inopinza, vakatora Dhina mumba maShekemu, vakaenda." 
Genesis34:27 Vanakomana vaJakobho vakaenda kune vakauraiwa, vakapamba guta, nemhaka yokuti vakanga vachinya hanzvadzi yavo." 
Genesis34:28 Vakatora makwai avo, nemombe dzavo, nembongoro dzavo, nezvakanga zviri muguta, nezvakanga zviri kusango;" 
Genesis34:29 vakatapa pfuma yavo yose, navana vavo vaduku, navakadzi vavo, vakazviita mhambara, nezvinhu zvose zvakanga zviri mudzimba." 
Genesis34:30 Ipapo Jakobho akati kuna Simioni naRevhi, “Manditorera mufaro, zvamandinhuwisa pakati pavanhu vanogara munyika ino, pakati paVaKenani navaPerezi; ini zvandiine vanhu vashoma, vachandiunganira, vakandiuraya; ndichaparadzwa ini neveimba yangu.”" 
Genesis34:31 Ivo vakati, “Iye agoitireiko nehanzvadzi yedu sezvinoitwa nechifeve?”" 
Genesis35:1 Zvino Mwari akati kuna Jakobho, “Simuka, ukwire Bhetieri, undogara ikoko; uitire Mwari atari ipapo, iye akazviratidza kwauri panguva yokutiza kwako pamberi paEsau, mukuru wako.”" 
Genesis35:2 Ipapo Jakobho akati kumhuri yake, navose vakanga vanaye, “Bvisai vamwari vedzimwe ndudzi vari pakati penyu, zvinatsei, mufuke dzimwe nguo;" 
Genesis35:3 tisimuke, tikwire Bhetieri; ipapo ndichaitira Mwari atari, iye akanga aneni panzira yandakanga ndichifamba nayo.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ivo vakapa Jakobho vamwari vose vedzimwe ndudzi vakanga vari pamaoko avo, nezvindori zvakanga zviri panzeve dzavo; Jakobho akazvicherera pasi pomuti womuouki wakanga uri paShekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Vakapfuura norwendo rwavo, maguta akanga akavakomba akatya Mwari kwazvo, vakasateverera vanakomana vaJakobho." 
Genesis35:6 Jakobho akasvika Ruzi, guta riri panyika yeKenani (rimwe zita ndiBhetieri), iye navanhu vose vaakanga anavo." 
Genesis35:7 Akavakapo atari, akatumidza zita renzvimbo iyoyo kuti Eribhetieri; nokuti Mwari akanga azviratidza kwaari ipapo, panguva yokutiza kwake pamberi pomukuru wake." 
Genesis35:8 Debhora, mureri waRabheka, akafa, akavigwa zasi kweBhetieri munyasi momuoki; zita rapo rikanzi Aronibhakuti." 
Genesis35:9 Ipapo Mwari akazviratidzazve kuna Jakobho pakubva kwake Padhani-aramu, akamuropafadza." 
Genesis35:10 Mwari akati kwaari, “Zita rako ndiJakobho, zita rako harichazonzi Jakobho, asi zita rako richanzi Isiraeri;” akamutumidza zita rinonzi Isiraeri." 
Genesis35:11 Zvino Mwari akati kwaari, “Ndini Mwari waMasimbaose; bereka vana, uwande; rudzi neboka rendudzi zvichabuda kwauri, namadzishe achabuda pachiuno chako;" 
Genesis35:12 nyika yandakapa Abhurahamu naIsaka, ndichakupa iyoyo; vana vako vanokutevera ndichavapa nyika iyoyo.”" 
Genesis35:13 Mwari akakwira, akabva kwaari, ipapo paakanga achitaura naye." 
Genesis35:14 Jakobho akamisa shongwe ipapo paakanga ataura naye, shongwe yebwe; akadurura pamusoro payo chipiriso chinodururwa, akadirawo mafuta pamusoro payo." 
Genesis35:15 Jakobho akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo, pakanga pataura Mwari naye, zita rinonzi Bhetieri." 
Genesis35:16 Zvino vakafamba vachibva Bhetieri; chinhambo chakanga chichipo chokusvika Efurata; Racheri akazvara, akatambudzika pakupona kwake." 
Genesis35:17 Akati achitambudzika pakupona kwake, mbuya vakati kwaari, “Usatya hako, nokuti zvino uchava nomumwe mwanakomanazve.”" 
Genesis35:18 Zvino mweya wake wakati uchibuda (nokuti wakafa), akamutumidza Bhenoni; asi baba vake vakamutumidza Bhenjamini." 
Genesis35:19 Racheri akafa, akavigwa panzira inoenda Efurata (rimwe zita ndiBhetirehemu)." 
Genesis35:20 Jakobho akamisa shongwe pamusoro perinda rake, ndiyo shongwe yerinda raRacheri kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Genesis35:21 Isiraeri akafamba, akapfuurira mberi, akadzika tende rake neseri kweshongwe yeEdheri." 
Genesis35:22 Zvino Isiraeri agere munyika iyoyo, Rubheni akandovata naBhiriha, murongo wababa vake, Isiraeri akazvinzwa. Zvino vanakomana vaJakobho vaiva gumi navaviri;" 
Genesis35:23 vanakomana vaRea: Rubheni, dangwe raJakobho, naSimioni, naRevhi, naJudha, naIsakari, naZebhuroni;" 
Genesis35:24 vanakomana vaRacheri: Josefa naBhenjamini; 
Genesis35:25 vanakomana vaBhiriha, murandakadzi waRacheri: Dhani naNafutari;" 
Genesis35:26 vanakomana vaZiripa, murandakadzi waRea: Gadhi naAsheri. Ndivo vanakomana vaJakobho, vaakazvarirwa paPadhani-aramu." 
Genesis35:27 Jakobho akasvika kuna Isaka, baba vake paMamure, paKiriyatiabha (rimwe zita ndiHebhuroni), paigara Abhurahamu naIsaka vari vatorwa." 
Genesis35:28 Mazuva aIsaka akanga ari makore ane zana namakumi masere. 
Genesis35:29 Mweya waIsaka ukabuda, akafa, akasanganiswa navanhu vake, akwegura, ava namazuva mazhinji; Esau naJakobho, vanakomana vake, vakamuviga." 
Genesis36:1 Ndiwo marudzi aEsau (rimwe zita ndiEdhomu): 
Genesis36:2 Esau akawana vakadzi vake kuvakunda veKenani, vaiti: Adha, mukunda waEroni, muHeti, naOhoribhama, mukunda waAna, mukunda waZibhioni, muHivhi;" 
Genesis36:3 naBhasimati, mukunda waIshimaeri, hanzvadzi yaNebhayoti." 
Genesis36:4 Adha akabereka Esau Erifazi; Bhasimati akabereka Rueri; 
Genesis36:5 Ohoribhama akabereka Jeushi, naJarami, naKora; ndivo vanakomana vaEsau, vaakaberekerwa panyika yeKenani." 
Genesis36:6 Zvino Esau akatora vakadzi vake, navanakomana vake, navakunda vake, navanhu vose veimba yake, nezvipfuwo zvake, nemombe dzake dzose, nepfuma yake yose yaakanga aunganidza munyika yeKenani, akaenda kunyika iri kure nomunun'una wake Jakobho." 
Genesis36:7 Nokuti pfuma yavo yakanga yawanda, naizvozvo vakanga vasingagoni kugara panzvimbo imwe; nyika youtorwa hwavo yakanga isingavaringani nokuda kwezvipfuwo zvavo." 
Genesis36:8 Esau akandogara kugomo reSeiri; Esau ndiye Edhomu. 
Genesis36:9 Marudzi aEsau, baba vavaEdhomu, kugomo reSeiri, ndiwo:" 
Genesis36:10 Mazita avanakomana vaEsau ndiwo: Erifazi, mwanakomana waAdha, mukadzi waEsau, naRueri, mwanakomana waBhasimati, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:11 Vanakomana vaErifazi vaiva Temani, naOmari, naZefo, naGatamu, naKenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Timuna akanga ari murongo waErifazi, mwanakomana waEsau; iye akaberekera Erifazi Amareki; ndivo vanakomana vaAdha, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:13 Vanakomana vaRueri ndivo: Nahati, naZera, naShama naMiza; ndivo vanakomana vaBhasimati, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:14 Vanakomana vaOhoribhama, mukunda waAna, mukunda waZibhioni, mukadzi waEsau, ndivo: iye akaberekera Esau Jeushi, naJarami, naKora." 
Genesis36:15 Ava ndivo madzishe pakati pavana vaEsau: Vanakomana vaErifazi, dangwe raEsau: Ishe Temani, nashe Omari, nashe Zefo, nashe Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 nashe Kora, nashe Gatamu, nashe Amareki; ndiwo madzishe okwaErifazi munyika yeEdhomu; ndivo vanakomana vaAdha." 
Genesis36:17 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaRueri, mwanakomana waEsau: Ishe Nahati, nashe Zera, nashe Shama, nashe Miza; ndiwo madzishe okwaRueri munyika yeEdhomu; ndivo vanakomana vaBhasimati, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:18 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaOhoribhama, mukadzi waEsau: Ishe Jeushi, nashe Jarami, nashe Kora; ndiwo madzishe okwaOhoribhama, mukunda waAna, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:19 Ndivo vanakomana vaEsau, ndiwo madzishe avo. Ndiye Edhomu." 
Genesis36:20 Ndivo vanakomana vaSeiri, muHori, vaigara panyika iyo: Rotani, naShobharu, naZibhioni, naAna," 
Genesis36:21 naDhishoni, naEzeri, naDhishani; ndiwo madzishe okuvaHori, vanakomana vaSeiri munyika yeEdhomu." 
Genesis36:22 Vanakomana vaRotani, vaiva Hori, naHemani; hanzvadzi yaRotani aiva Timuna." 
Genesis36:23 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaShobharu: Avhani, naManahati, naEbhari, naShefo, naOnamu." 
Genesis36:24 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaZibhioni: Aja, naAna; ndiye Ana akawana matsime emvura inopisa kusango, achifudza mbongoro dzaZibhioni, baba vake." 
Genesis36:25 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaAna: Dhishoni, naOhoribhama, mukunda waAna." 
Genesis36:26 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaDhishoni: Hemudhani, naEshibhani, naIturani, naKerani." 
Genesis36:27 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaEzeri: Bhirihani, naZaavhani, naAkani." 
Genesis36:28 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaDhishani: Uzi naArani. 
Genesis36:29 Ava ndiwo madzishe okuvaHori: Ishe Rotani, nashe Shobharu, nashe Zibhioni, nashe Ana," 
Genesis36:30 nashe Dhishoni, nashe Ezeri, nashe Dhishani; ndiwo madzishe okuvaHori, namarudzi avo munyika yeSeiri." 
Genesis36:31 Ava ndivo madzimambo akabata ushe munyika yeEdhomu, vana VaIsiraeri vachigere kuva namadzimambo:" 
Genesis36:32 Bhera, mwanakomana waBheori, akabata ushe paEdhomu; zita reguta rake rainzi Dhinihabha." 
Genesis36:33 Akafa, Jobhabhu, mwanakomana waZera weBhozara akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:33 Akafa, Jobhabhu, mwanakomana waZera weBhozara akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:34 Jobhabhu akafa, Hushamu wenyika yavaTemani akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:34 Jobhabhu akafa, Hushamu wenyika yavaTemani akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:35 Hushamu akafa, Hadhadhi, mwanakomana waBhedhadhi, uya akauraya Midhiani kusango reMoabhu, akabata ushe pachigaro chake; zita reguta rake rainzi Avhiti." 
Genesis36:36 Hadhadhi akafa, Samura weMasereka akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:37 Samura akafa, Shauri weRehobhoti paRwizi akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:38 Shauri akafa, Bhaarihanani, mwanakomana waAkibhori akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:39 Bhaarihanani, mwanakomana waAkibhori, akafa, Hadhari akabata ushe pachigaro chake; zita reguta rake rainzi Pau; zita romukadzi wake rainzi Mehetabheri, mukunda waMatiredhi, mukunda waMehazahadhi." 
Genesis36:40 Aya ndiwo mazita amadzishe okwaEsau, nedzimba dzavo, namaguta avo, namazita avo; Ishe Timuna, nashe Arivha, nashe Jeteti;" 
Genesis36:41 nashe Ohoribhama, nashe Era, nashe Pinoni;" 
Genesis36:42 nashe Kenazi, nashe Temani, nashe Mibhizari;" 
Genesis36:43 nashe Magidhieri, nashe Iramu; ndiwo madzishe aEdhomu, pavakagara munyika yakanga iri yavo. Ndiye Esau, baba vaEdhomu." 
Genesis37:1 Zvino Jakobho akagara munyika youtorwa hwababa vake, munyika yeKenani." 
Genesis37:2 Marudzi aJakobho ndiwo: Josefa akanga ana makore ane gumi namanomwe, akafudza makwai pamwechete navakoma vake; akanga achiri mukomana pamwechete navanakomana vaBhiriha, navanakomana vaZiripa, vakadzi vababa vake; Josefa akasivaudzira kuna baba vavo." 
Genesis37:3 Zvino Isiraeri akanga achida Josefa kupfuura vana vake vose, nokuti akanga ari mwanakomana woutana hwake; akamuitira nguo yakanga yakareba ina maoko." 
Genesis37:4 Vakoma vake vakaona kuti baba vavo vanomuda kupfuura vakoma vake vose; vakamuvenga, vakasagona kutaura naye nomufaro." 
Genesis37:5 Zvino Josefa akarota hope, akaudza vakoma vake, ipapo vakanyanya kumuvenga." 
Genesis37:6 Akati kwavari, “Inzwaiwo hope dzangu dzandarota." 
Genesis37:7 Tarirai, takanga tichisunga zvisote mumunda, onei chisote changu chikasimuka, chikaramba chimire; ndikaona zvisote zvenyu zvichikomba changu, zvikakotama pamberi pechisote changu.”" 
Genesis37:8 Vakoma vake vakati kwaari, “Ko iwe uchabata ushe pamusoro pedu kani? Ko iwe uchava nesimba pamusoro pedu kani?” Vakanyanya kumuvenga nokuda kwokurota kwake nokwamashoko ake." 
Genesis37:9 Akapamha kurotazve, akaudza vakoma vake, akati, “Tarirai, ndarotazve dzimwe hope; ndakaona zuva, nomwedzi, nenyenyedzi dzine gumi neimwe, dzichikotamira pamberi pangu.”" 
Genesis37:10 Akaudza baba vake navakoma vake izvozvo; baba vake vakamutuka, vakati kwaari, “Kurota kwako uku kwawarota kurota kunyi? Ini namai vako navakoma vako tichauya tikakotama pasi pamberi pako kani?”" 
Genesis37:11 Vakoma vake vakamugodora; asi baba vake vakachengeta shoko iro. 
Genesis37:12 Zvino vakoma vake vakandofudza makwai ababa vavo paShekemu. 
Genesis37:13 Isiraeri akati kuna Josefa, “Vakoma vako havafudzi makwai paShekemu here? Uya ndikutumire kwavari.” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano hangu.”" 
Genesis37:14 Akati kwaari, “Zvino chienda undotarira kana vakoma vako vakafara, namakwai kana akafarawo; ugodzoka kuzondiudza.” Naizvozvo akamutuma, ari pamupata weHebhuroni, akandosvika Shekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Zvino mumwe murume akamuwana achidzungaira musango; murume akamubvunza, akati, “Unotsvakeiko?”" 
Genesis37:16 Iye akati, “Ndinotsvaka vakoma vangu; dondiudza hako kwavanofudza makwai.”" 
Genesis37:17 Murume akati, “Vabva pano, nokuti ndakavanzwa vachiti, ‘Ngatiende Dhotani.’ ” Josefa akatevera vakoma vake, akandovawana paDhotani." 
Genesis37:18 Ivo vakamuona achiri kure; zvino asati asvika kwavari, vakarangana kuti vamuuraye." 
Genesis37:19 Vakataurirana, vachiti, “Hoyo muroti uya wauya." 
Genesis37:20 Uyai zvino timuuraye, timukandire mune rimwe ramakomba aya, tigoti, ‘Wadyiwa nechikara;’ tigoona kuti kurota kwake kuchazoitwa seiko.”" 
Genesis37:21 Rubheni akazvinzwa, akamurwira mumaoko avo, akati, “Ngatirege kumuuraya.”" 
Genesis37:22 Rubheni akati kwavari, “Musadurura ropa; mukandirei mugomba iri riri musango, asi regai kutambanudza maoko enyu kwaari;” kuti amurwire pamaoko avo, agomudzosera kuna baba vake." 
Genesis37:23 Zvino Josefa akati asvika kuvakoma vake, vakabvisira Josefa nguo yake, nguo iya yakanga yakareba ina maoko, yaakanga akafuka;" 
Genesis37:24 vakamutora, vakamukandira mugomba; gomba rakanga risina chinhu, makanga musina mvura." 
Genesis37:25 Vakagara pasi, vakadya zvokudya; zvino vakasimudza meso avo, vakatarira, vakaona boka ravaIshimaeri vachifamba, vachibva Giriadhi, makamera avo akatakura zvinhu zvinonhuwira, nebarisami, nemura, vachindozviisa Ijipiti." 
Genesis37:26 Zvino Judha akati kuvana vababa vake, “Tingawaneiko kana tikauraya munun'una wedu tichivanza ropa rake?" 
Genesis37:27 Uyai timutengese kuvaIshimaeri; maoko edu arege kuva kwaari; nokuti munun'una wedu, nyama imwe nesu.” Vana vababa vake vakamuteerera." 
Genesis37:28 Zvino vatengesi vavaMidhiani vakapfuurapo, vakakwidza Josefa vachimubudisa mugomba, vakatengesa Josefa kuvaIshimaeri namashekeri ana makumi maviri; ivo vakaisa Josefa Ijipiti." 
Genesis37:29 Zvino Rubheni akadzokera kugomba, akawana Josefa asisimo mugomba; akabvarura nguo dzake." 
Genesis37:30 Akadzokera kuvanun'una vake, akati, “Mwana haachipo; ini zvino ndichaendepiko?”" 
Genesis37:31 Zvino vakatora nguo yaJosefa, vakauraya nhongo yembudzi, vakanyika nguo muropa;" 
Genesis37:32 vakatumira nguo iyo yakareba ina mavoko kuna baba vavo, vakati, “Tanonga chinhu ichi; fananidzai zvakanaka kana iri nguo yomwanakomana wenyu, kana isati iri iyo.”" 
Genesis37:33 Ivo vakafananidza vakati, “Inguo yomwanakomana wangu; wadyiwa nechikara; Josefa zvirokwazvo waparadzwa.”" 
Genesis37:34 Jakobho akabvarura nguo dzake, akasimira mamvemve pachiuno chake, akachema mwanakomana wake mazuva mazhinji." 
Genesis37:35 Vanakomana vake vose navakunda vake vose vakasimuka vakamunyaradza; asi akaramba kunyaradzwa, akati, “Ndichaburukira kuhwiro kumwanakomana wangu, ndichichema.” Baba vake vakamuwungudzira." 
Genesis37:36 Zvino vaMidhiani vakandomutengesa Ijipiti kuna Potifari, muranda waFarao, mukuru wavarindi." 
Genesis38:1 Nenguva iyoyo Judha akabva kuvana vababa vake, akaburuka, akatsaukira kuno mumwe murume muAdhuramu, ainzi Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Judha akaonapo mukunda womumwe munhu muKenani, ainzi Shua, akamutora, akapinda kwaari." 
Genesis38:3 Iye akava nemimba, akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Shera; iye akanga ari paKezibhi mukadzi wake achimubereka." 
Genesis38:6 Zvino Judha akatorera dangwe rake Eri mukadzi ainzi Tamari. 
Genesis38:7 Asi dangwe raJudha, akanga ari munhu akaipa pamberi paJehovha; Jehovha akamuuraya." 
Genesis38:8 Zvino Judha akati kuna Onani, “Pinda kumukadzi womukoma wako, umuwane, umuitire zvakafanira munun'una womurume, umutsire mukoma wako vana.”" 
Genesis38:9 Zvino Onani akaziva kuti vana avo havangavi vake; naizvozvo wakati kana opinda kumukadzi womukoma wake, orasira mbeu pasi, kuti arege kupa mukoma wake vana." 
Genesis38:10 Chinhu ichi chaakaita chakanga chakaipa pamberi paJehovha; akamuuraya naiyewo. 
Genesis38:11 Ipapo Judha akati kuna Tamari, mukadzi womwana wake, “Chigara hako uri chirikadzi paimba yababa vako, kusvikira Shera, mwanakomana wangu, akura;” nokuti akati, “Zvimwe angafa savakoma vake.” Tamari akandogara kumba kwababa vake." 
Genesis38:12 Mazuva mazhinji akati apfuura, mukunda waShua, mukadzi waJudha, akafa; zvino Judha akati anyaradzwa, akakwira kuvaveuri vamakwai ake paTimuna, iye naHira, shamwari yake muAdhuramu." 
Genesis38:13 Tamari akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Tarira baba vomurume wako vanokwira Timuna kundoveura makwai avo”;" 
Genesis38:14 ipapo iye akabvisa nguo dzouchirikadzi hwake, akazvifukidza nechokufukidzira chake, akazviputira, akagara pasuwo reEnaimu, guta riri panzira inoenda Timuna; nokuti akanga aona kuti Shera akura, akasamupiwa iye kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis38:15 Zvino Judha akati achimuona, akati chifeve, nokuti akanga afukidza chiso chake." 
Genesis38:16 Akatsaukira kwaari panzira, akati, “Douya, ndipinde kwauri;” nokuti akanga asingazivi, kuti mukadzi womwanakomana wake. Iye akati, “Unogondipeiko, kuti upinde kwandiri?”" 
Genesis38:17 Akati, “Ndichakutumira mbudzana inobva kuzvipfuwo zvangu.” Akati, “Uchandipa rubatso kusvikira waituma here?”" 
Genesis38:18 Akati, “Ndichagokupa rubatso rweiko?” Iye akati, “Chimhete chako, netambo yako, netsvimbo yako iri paruoko rwako.” Akamupa izvozvo, akapinda kwaari, akava nemimba naye." 
Genesis38:19 Akasimuka, akaenda, akabvisa chokufukidzira chake, akafuka nguo dzouchirikadzi hwake." 
Genesis38:20 Zvino Judha akatuma mbudzana noruoko rweshamwari yake, muAdhuramu, kuti atore rubatso paruoko rwomukadzi, asi haana kumuwana." 
Genesis38:21 Akabvunza vanhu vokwake, achiti, “Chiripo chifeve chiya, chakanga chiri paEnaimu panzira?” Vakati, “Kwakanga kusina chifeve pano.”" 
Genesis38:22 Akadzokera kuna Judha, akati, “Handina kumuwana; navanhu voko vakati, ‘Kwakanga kusina chifeve pano.’ ”" 
Genesis38:23 Ipapo Judha akati, “Ngaazvitore hake, kuti tirege kunyadziswa; tarira ndatuma mbudzana iyi, iwe ukasamuwana.”" 
Genesis38:24 Zvino mwedzi inenge mitatu yakati yapfuura, Judha akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Tamari, mukadzi womwanakomana wako, akaita upombwe; wava nemimba noupombwe hwake.” Judha akati, “Uyai naye, apiswe.”" 
Genesis38:25 Zvino vakati vachiuya naye, akatuma shoko kuna baba vomurume wake, achiti, “Ndine mimba nomurume ane nhumbi idzi, akati, ‘Docherechedzai kuti izvi ndezvani, zvinoti, chimhete netambo, netsvimbo.’ ”" 
Genesis38:26 Judha akazviziva, akati, “Iye wakarurama kukunda ini, nokuti handina kumupa Shera, mwanakomana wangu.” Haana kuzomuzivazve." 
Genesis38:27 Zvino nenguva yokubereka kwake vana vaviri vakanga vari mudumbu rake. 
Genesis38:28 Zvino akati achibereka, mumwe akabudisa ruoko; ipapo mbuya vakatora rwodzi rutsvuku, vakarusungira paruoko rwake, vachiti, “Uyu atanga kubuda.”" 
Genesis38:29 Zvino uyu akati adzosera ruoko rwake, munun'una wake akabuda; ivo vakati, “Wazvipasanurira seiko?” Naizvozvo akamutumidza zita rinonzi Perezi." 
Genesis38:30 Pashure mukoma wake akabuda, akanga aine rwodzi rutsvuku paruoko rwake; zita rake rikatumidzwa Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Josefa akanga aburutsirwa Ijipiti; Potifari, jinda raFarao, mukuru wavarindi, muIjipiti, akamutenga pamaoko avaIshimaeri, vakanga vamuburutsira Ijipiti." 
Genesis39:2 Jehovha zvino akanga ana Josefa, akaramba achikwirira; akagara mumba matenzi wake muIjipiti." 
Genesis39:3 Tenzi wake akaona kuti Jehovha anaye, uye kuti Jehovha akafambisa zvakanaka zvose zvaaiita namaoko ake." 
Genesis39:4 Josefa akawana nyasha kwaari, akamubatira; iye akamuita mutariri weimba yake; zvose zvaakanga anazvo akazviisa pamaoko ake." 
Genesis39:5 Zvino kubva pakuitwa kwake mutariri weimba yake nowazvose zvaakanga anazvo, Jehovha akaropafadza imba yomuIjipiti nokuda kwaJosefa; kuropafadza kwaJehovha kwakanga kuri pamusoro pezvose zvaakanga anazvo mumba nokumunda." 
Genesis39:6 Waisiya zvose zvaakanga anazvo pamaoko aJosefa; iye anaye, haazairangarira chinhu, asi zvokudya zvake zvoga zvaaidya. Zvino Josefa akanga ano muviri wakanaka, akanakawo pachiso." 
Genesis39:7 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo mukadzi watenzi wake akatarira Josefa, akati, “Vata neni.”" 
Genesis39:8 Asi iye akaramba, akati kumukadzi watenzi wake, “Tarirai, nokuda kwangu tenzi wangu haarangariri zviri mumba, asi akaisa zvose zvaanazvo pamaoko angu;" 
Genesis39:9 hakuna mukuru kwandiri paimba ino; haana kundidzivisa chinhu, asi imi moga; nokuti muri mukadzi wake; zvino ndingaita seiko chinhu ichi chakaipa zvikuru nditadzire Mwari?”" 
Genesis39:10 Zvino akati ataura naJosefa mazuva ose, iye asingamuteereri kuti avate naye, kana kuva naye," 
Genesis39:11 nenguva iyoyo akapinda mumba kuti abate basa rake; makanga musina vamwe varume veimba imomo. 
Genesis39:12 Ipapo akamubata nguo yake, akati, “Vata neni;” iye akasiya nguo yake muruoko rwake, akabuda panze." 
Genesis39:13 Zvino akati achiona kuti asiya nguo yake muruoko rwake, atiza, aenda," 
Genesis39:14 akadana varume veimba yake, akataura navo akati, “Tarirai, iye akauyisa muHebheru pakati pedu kuti atidadire; akapinda kwandiri, kuti avate neni, ndikaridza mhere neizwi guru." 
Genesis39:15 Zvino akati achinzwa kuti ndinodanidzirisa ndichiridza mhere, akasiya nguo yake neni, akatiza, akabuda panze.”" 
Genesis39:16 Akachengeta nguo yake kusvikira tenzi wake achipinda mumba. 
Genesis39:17 Akataura kwaari mashoko iwayo akati, “Muranda muHebheru awakaisa pakati pedu, akauya kwandiri kuti andidadire." 
Genesis39:18 Ndikadanidzirisa, ndikaridza mhere, akasiya nguo yake neni, akatizira panze.”" 
Genesis39:19 Tenzi wake akati achinzwa mashoko aakaudzwa nomukadzi wake, achiti, “Ndizvo zvandaitirwa nomuranda wako,” hasha dzake dzikamuka." 
Genesis39:20 Tenzi waJosefa akamutora, akamupinza mutorongo, paisungwa vasungwa vamambo; akava mutorongo." 
Genesis39:21 Asi Jehovha akava naJosefa, akamuitira tsitsi, kuti anzwirwe ngoni nomutariri wetorongo." 
Genesis39:22 Mutariri wetorongo akapa mumaoko aJosefa vasungwa vose vakanga vari mutorongo; iye akanga ari muiti wezvose zvaiitwamo. 
Genesis39:23 Mutariri wetorongo akanga asina hanya nechinhu chakanga chiri pamaoko ake, nokuti Jehovha akanga anaye; zvose zvaaiita, Jehovha akazviruramisa." 
Genesis40:1 Shure kwaizvozvo mudiri wamambo weIjipiti nomubiki wake vakatadzira tenzi wavo, mambo weIjipiti." 
Genesis40:2 Farao akatsamwira kwazvo varanda vake vaviri, ivo mukuru wavadiri nomukuru wavabiki." 
Genesis40:3 Akavasunga kuti vachengetwe mumba momukuru wavarindi, mutorongo, pakanga pakasungwa Josefa." 
Genesis40:4 Mukuru wavarindi akaraira Josefa kuvachengeta; iye akavabatira, vakaita nguva vachichengetwa." 
Genesis40:5 Zvino vose vaviri vakarota hope usiku humwe, mumwe nomumwe kurota kwake, kurota kumwe nokumwe kune dudziro yako, ivo mudiri nomubiki vamambo weIjipiti, vakanga vakasungwa mutorongo." 
Genesis40:6 Zvino fume mangwana Josefa akapinda kwavari, akavatarira, akaona kuti havafari." 
Genesis40:7 Akabvunza varanda vaFarao vakanga vachengetwa pamwechete naye mumba matenzi wake, akati, “Nhasi makasuwa neiko?”" 
Genesis40:8 Vakati kwaari, “Tarota hope, asi hakuna munhu anogona kudzidudzira.” Josefa akati kwavari, “Kududzira hakuzi kwaMwari here? Dondirondedzerai henyu.”" 
Genesis40:9 Zvino mukuru wavadiri akarondedzera kurota kwake kuna Josefa, akati, kwaari, “Pakurota kwangu ndakaona muzambiringa pamberi pangu; pamuzambiringa pakanga pana matavi matatu;" 
Genesis40:10 ukaita sokutumbuka, ukabudisa maruva; masumbu awo akabereka mazambiringa akaibva;" 
Genesis40:11 mukombe waFarao wakanga uri muruoko rwangu; zvino ndikatora mazambiringa, ndikaasvinira mumukombe waFarao, ndikaisa mukombe muruoko rwaFarao.”" 
Genesis40:12 Josefa akati kwaari, “Kududzirwa kwadzo ndiko: Matavi matatu mazuva matatu;" 
Genesis40:13 mazuva matatu agere kupera Farao achasimudza musoro wako, nokukudzosera kubasa rako; ipapo uchaisa mukombe waFarao muruoko rwakezve, sezvawaiita kare uchiri mudiri wake." 
Genesis40:14 Asi undirangarire hako kana woitirwa zvakanaka; undiitire ngoni, undireverere kuna Farao, kuti ndibudiswe paimba ino;" 
Genesis40:15 nokuti zvirokwazvo, ndakabiwa kunyika yaVaHebheru; napano handina kuita chinhu chakafanira kuti vandiise mugomba iri.”" 
Genesis40:16 Zvino mukuru wavabiki akati aona kuti dudziro yakanaka, akati kuna Josefa, “Neniwo ndakanga ndiri pakurota kwangu, ndikaona tswanda nhatu dzechingwa chichena dzakanga dziri pamusoro wangu;" 
Genesis40:17 mutswanda yapamusoro makanga mune zvokudya zvamarudzi ose zvakabikwa zvaFarao; shiri dzikazvidya mutswanda yaiva pamusoro wangu.” 
Genesis40:18 Ipapo Josefa akapindura, akati, “Kududzirwa kwadzo ndiko: Tswanda nhatu mazuva matatu;" 
Genesis40:19 mazuva matatu agere kupera, Farao achasimudza musoro wako akaubvisa pamusoro pako, akusungirire pamuti; shiri dzichadya nyama yako dzichiibvisa kwauri.”" 
Genesis40:20 Zvino nomusi wetatu, musi wokuzvarwa kwaFarao, iye akaitira varanda vake vose mutambo. Akasimudza musoro womukuru wavadiri, nomusoro womukuru wavabiki pakati pavaranda vake," 
Genesis40:21 akadzosera mukuru wavadiri kubasa rake rokudira kwake, akapa mukombe waFarao muruoko rwaFarao;" 
Genesis40:22 asi akasungirira mukuru wavabiki sezvavakanga vadudzirwa naJosefa. 
Genesis40:23 Asi mukuru wavadiri haana kurangarira Josefa, asi akamukanganwa." 
Genesis41:1 Makore maviri akati apera, Farao akarota hope; akazviona amire parwizi." 
Genesis41:2 Akaona mhou nomwe dzichikwira dzichibuda murwizi, dzakanga dzakanaka, dzakakora; dzichifura pakati penhokwe." 
Genesis41:3 Zvino akaona dzimwe mhou nomwe dzichikwira mashure madzo, dzichibva murwizi, dzakanga dzakaipa, dzakaonda; dzikamira nedzimwe mhou pamhenderekedzo yorwizi." 
Genesis41:4 Zvino mhou dzakaipa, dzakaonda, dzikadya mhou dziya nomwe dzakanaka, dzakakora. Farao akapepuka." 
Genesis41:5 Akavatazve, akarota rwechipiri; akaona hura nomwe dzezviyo dzakanga dzatumbuka padzinde rimwe, dzakanga dzakakora, dzakanaka," 
Genesis41:6 akaona hura nomwe, dzakanga dzakatetepa, dzakanga dzapiswa nemhepo yokumabvazuva, dzichibuda shure kwadzo." 
Genesis41:7 Zvino hura dzakatetepa dzikamedza hura nomwe dzakakora, dzakanga dzizere. Farao akapepuka, akaona kuti arota." 
Genesis41:8 Zvino fume mangwana mweya wake ukatambudzika, akatuma vanhu kundodana n'anga dzose dzeIjipiti navakachenjera vose voko; Farao akavaudza kurota kwake; asi kwakanga kusina munhu waigona kuzvidudzira kuna Farao." 
Genesis41:9 Ipapo mukuru wavadiri akaudza Farao, akati, “Nhasi ndinorangarira kutadza kwangu;" 
Genesis41:10 Farao akanga akatsamwira varanda vake, mukandisunga, ndikachengetwa mumba momukuru wavarindi, ini nomukuru wavabiki;" 
Genesis41:11 tikarota hope nousiku humwe, ini naiye; tikarota mumwe nomumwe hope dzine dudziro yadzo." 
Genesis41:12 Zvino ipapo patakange tiri pakanga paine muHebheru wechidiki, ari muranda womukuru wavarindi; tikamuudza, iye akatidudzira kurota kwedu; akadudzira mumwe nomumwe sezvaakarota." 
Genesis41:13 Zvikazoitika sezvaakatidudzira; ini ndakadzoserwa kubasa rangu, asi iye akasungirirwa.”" 
Genesis41:14 Ipapo Farao akatuma munhu kundodana Josefa, akakurumidza kumubudisa mugomba; vakaveura ndebvu dzake nokumufukidza dzimwe nguo; akapinda kuna Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao akati kuna Josefa, “Ndarota hope, asi hakuna munhu anogona kundidudzira idzo; zvino ndanzwa kuti iwe, kana wanzwa kurota, unogona kuzvidudzira.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefa akapindura Farao, akati, “Kwete, handizini; Mwari ndiye angapa Farao dudziro yorugare.”" 
Genesis41:17 Farao akarondedzera kuna Josefa akati, “Pakurota kwangu ndakazviona ndimire pamhenderekedzo yorwizi;"
