Genesis41:18 ndikaona murwizi muchibuda mhou nomwe, dzakanga dzakakora, dzakanaka; dzikafura pakati penhokwe;" 
Genesis41:19 ndikaonazve dzimwe mhou nomwe dzichikwira shure kwadzo dzine nzara, dzakaipa kwazvo, dzakaonda, handina kumboona dzakaipa dzakadai panyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:20 Zvino mhou idzodzo dzakaonda, dzakaipa, dzikadya, mhou dziya dzakakora dzokutanga;" 
Genesis41:21 dzakati dzadzidya, hadzina kutongozikanwa kuti dzadzidya; asi dzakanga dzakangoipa sapakutanga. Zvino ndikapepuka." 
Genesis41:22 Ndikaonazve pakurota kwangu hura nomwe dzakanga dzatumbuka padzinde rimwe, dzizere, dzakanaka;" 
Genesis41:23 ndikaonazve dzimwe hura nomwe, dzakaoma, dzakatetepa, dzakapiswa nemhepo yokumabvazuva, dzichibuda shure kwadzo." 
Genesis41:24 Hura idzodzo dzakatetepa dzikamedza hura nomwe dzakanaka; ndikaudza n'anga, asi kwakanga kusina munhu akagona kundidudzira izvozvo.”" 
Genesis41:25 Ipapo Josefa akati kuna Farao, “Kurota kwaFarao ndokumwe; izvo Mwari zvaanoda kuita, ndizvo zvaakazivisa Farao." 
Genesis41:26 Mhou nomwe dzakanaka makore manomwe, nehura nomwe dzakanaka makore manomwewo; kurota ndokumwe." 
Genesis41:27 Mhou nomwe dzakaonda, dzakaipa, dzakakwira shure kwaidzodzo, makore manomwe, nehura nomwe dzakaputana, dzakapiswa nemhepo yokumabvazuva, achava makore manomwe enzara." 
Genesis41:28 Ndiro shoko randataura kuna Farao; izvo Mwari zvaanoda kuita, ndizvo zvaakaratidza Farao." 
Genesis41:29 Tarirai, kunouya makore manomwe amaguta kwazvo panyika yose yeIjipiti;" 
Genesis41:30 shure kwaiwayo kuchatevera makore manomwe enzara; ipapo maguta ose achakanganikwa panyika yeIjipiti; nzara ichapedza nyika; 
Genesis41:31 maguta haangazozikanwi munyika nokuda kwenzara iyoyo inozotevera, nokuti ichanyanya kwazvo." 
Genesis41:32 Kurota uku kwakapamhidzwa kuna Farao kaviri, nokuti izvozvo zvakatarwa naMwari, uye Mwari achakurumidza kuzviita." 
Genesis41:33 “Naizvozvo Farao ngaatsvake munhu akangwara, akachenjera, amuite mubati wenyika yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:34 Farao ngaaite izvozvo, ngaaise vatariri panyika yose, atore cheshanu chezviyo zvenyika yeIjipiti pamakore manomwe eguta." 
Genesis41:35 Ngaaunganidze zvokudya zvose zvamakore iwayo akanaka anouya, avige zviyo nomurairo waFarao, zvive zvokudya mumaguta; vazvichengete." 
Genesis41:36 Zvokudya izvozvo zvichachengeterwa nyika makore manomwe enzara, ichazovapo panyika yeIjipiti, kuti nyika irege kuparadzwa nenzara.”" 
Genesis41:37 Chinhu ichi chakanga chakanaka kuna Farao navaranda vake vose. 
Genesis41:38 Farao akati kuvaranda vake, “Ko tingawana mumwe munhu akafanana nouyu, ano mweya waMwari maari here?”" 
Genesis41:39 Farao akati kuna Josefa, “Mwari zvaakakuratidza izvozvo zvose, hapana munhu akangwara, akachenjera sewe;" 
Genesis41:40 ndiwe uchava mubati weimba yangu; vanhu vangu vose vacharairwa neshoko rako; asi pachigaro changu choushe ndipo pandichava mukuru kwauri.” 
Genesis41:41 Zvino Farao akati kuna Josefa, “Tarira, ndakuita mubati panyika yeIjipiti yose.”" 
Genesis41:42 Farao akabvisa chimhete chake paruoko rwake, akachiisa paruoko rwaJosefa, akamufukidza nguo dzomucheka wakanakisa, akamushongedza kangetani kendarama pamutsipa wake;" 
Genesis41:43 akamufambisa nengoro yechipiri yaakanga anayo; vakadanidzira pamberi pake, vachiti, “Pfugamai!” Akamuita mubati wenyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:44 Farao akati kuna Josefa, “Ndini Farao, asi kunze kwako hapana munhu achasimudza ruoko rwake kana rutsoka rwake panyika yose yeIjipiti.”" 
Genesis41:45 Farao akatumidza Josefa zita rinonzi Zafanatipanea; akamupa Asenati, mukunda waPotifari, mupristi weOni, kuti ave mukadzi wake. Josefa akabuda, akafamba nenyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:46 Zvino Josefa akanga ana makore makumi matatu, nguva yaakamira pamberi paFarao, mambo weIjipiti. Josefa akabuda pamberi paFarao, akafamba, akapota nenyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:47 Nyika ikabereka zvizhinji zhinji, namakore manomwe amaguta." 
Genesis41:48 Akaunganidza zvokudya zvose zvamakore manomwe, akanga aripo panyika yeIjipiti, akaviga zvokudya mumaguta; zvokudya zveminda yakanga yakapoteredza guta rimwe nerimwe, akazvivigamo." 
Genesis41:49 Josefa akaviga zviyo, zvikaita sejecha regungwa, zvizhinji zhinji, kusvikira akarega kuzviverenga; nokuti zvakanga zvisingagoni kuverengwa." 
Genesis41:50 Zvino gore renzara risati rasvika, Josefa akaberekerwa vanakomana vaviri, vaakaberekerwa naAsenati, mukunda waPotifari, mupristi weOni." 
Genesis41:51 Josefa akatumidza wedangwe zita rinonzi Manase, achiti, “Nokuti Mwari akandikanganwisa kutambudzika kwangu kwose neimba yababa vangu yose.”" 
Genesis41:52 Zita rowechipiri akaritumidza Efuremu, achiti, “Nokuti Mwari akandiberekesa vana panyika yokutambudzika kwangu.”" 
Genesis41:53 Zvino makore manomwe amaguta, akanga avapo panyika yeIjipiti, akapera." 
Genesis41:54 Makore manomwe enzara akatanga kusvika, sezvakataura Josefa; nzara ikavapo panyika dzose; asi panyika yose yeIjipiti pakanga pane zvokudya." 
Genesis41:55 Zvino vanhu vose veIjipiti vofa nenzara, vakachemera zvokudya kuna Farao; Farao akati kuna vose veIjipiti, “Endai kuna Josefa; itai zvaanotaura kwamuri.”" 
Genesis41:56 Nzara ikavapo panyika dzose; Josefa akazarura matura ose, akatengesera vaIjipiti; nokuti nzara yakanga yakanyanya panyika yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:57 Vanhu venyika dzose vakaenda Ijipiti kuna Josefa kuzotenga zviyo; nokuti nzara yakanga yakanyanya panyika dzose. 
Genesis42:1 Zvino Jakobho akaona kuti zviyo zviripo muIjipiti, Jakobho akati kuvanakomana vake, “Munotarirana neiko?”" 
Genesis42:2 Akati, “Ndanzwa kuti zviyo zviripo muIjipiti; burukiraiko, mundotitengerako, tipone, tirege kufa.”" 
Genesis42:3 Ipapo vakoma vaJosefa vane gumi vakaburuka kundotenga zviyo Ijipiti. 
Genesis42:4 Asi Bhenjamini, munun'una waJosefa, Jakobho haana kumutuma navakoma vake; nokuti akati, “Zvimwe angawirwa nenjodzi.”" 
Genesis42:5 Zvino vanakomana VaIsiraeri vakauya kuzotenga pakati pavamwe vaiuya, nokuti nzara yakanga iripo panyika yeKenani." 
Genesis42:6 Zvino Josefa akanga ari mubati wenyika; ndiye aitengesera vanhu vose venyika; vakoma vaJosefa vakauya, vakamupfugamira, zviso zvavo zvakatarira pasi." 
Genesis42:7 Josefa akaona vakoma vake, akavaziva, asi akaita saasingavazivi, akataura nehasha navo, akati kwavari, “Mabvepiko?” Ivo vakati, “Tabva kunyika yeKenani kuzotenga zvokudya.”" 
Genesis42:8 Josefa akaziva vakoma vake, asi ivo havana kumuziva." 
Genesis42:9 Ipapo Josefa akarangarira kurota kwake kwaakadeya kurota pamusoro pavo, akati kwavari, “Muri vashori, mauya kuzoona kuti nyika yakashama papi.”" 
Genesis42:10 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Kwete, ishe wedu, asi varanda venyu vauya kuzotenga zvokudya." 
Genesis42:11 Tiri vanakomana vomunhu mumwechete tose; tiri vanhu vakatendeka, varanda venyu havazi vashori”;" 
Genesis42:12 iye akati kwavari, “Kwete, mauya kuzoona nyika kuti yakashama papi.”" 
Genesis42:13 Ivo vakati, “Isu varanda venyu, tiri vanakomana vane gumi navaviri vomunhu mumwechete panyika yeKenani; zvino worugotwe ari kuna baba vedu nhasi; mumwe haachisipo.”" 
Genesis42:14 Josefa akati kwavari, “Ndizvo zvandanga ndichitaura kwamuri, ndichiti muri vashori;" 
Genesis42:15 hechi chinhu chamuchaedzwa nacho. Noupenyu hwaFarao, hamungabudi pano kana munun'una wenyu worugotwe asina kuuya pano." 
Genesis42:16 Tumai mumwe wenyu kuti andotora munun'una wenyu, asi imi muchafanira kugara makasungwa, kuti mashoko enyu aedzwe, kana makatendeka; kana zvisina kudaro, zvirokwazvo, noupenyu hwaFarao muri vashori.”" 
Genesis42:17 Ipapo akavaisa pamwechete vose mutorongo, kuti vachengetwe mazuva matatu." 
Genesis42:18 Josefa akati kwavari nezuva retatu, “Itai chinhu ichi, mupone; ini ndinotya Mwari;" 
Genesis42:19 kana muri vanhu vakatendeka, mumwe wavanun'una venyu ngaagare akasungwa mutorongo yenyu; asi imi endai makatakura zviyo kundopa mhuri dzenyu dzine nzara." 
Genesis42:20 Mugouya nomunun'una wenyu worugotwe kwandiri; naizvozvo mashoko enyu achasimbiswa, murege kufa.” Vakaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis42:21 Vakataurirana vachiti, “Zvirokwazvo tine mhosva nokuda kwomunun'una wedu, nokuti takaona kutambudzika kwomweya wake musi uya waakatinyengetera, tikaramba kumuteerera; naizvozvo tawirwa nokutambudzika.”" 
Genesis42:22 Ipapo Rubheni akapindura, akati, “Handina kukuudzai here, ndichiti, ‘Regai kutadzira mwana,’ mukaramba kunditeerera? Naizvozvo tarirai, ropa rake rotsvakwa.”" 
Genesis42:23 Zvino vakanga vasingazivi kuti Josefa anonzwisisa, nokuti kwanga kuine mupinduri pakati pavo." 
Genesis42:24 Ipapo Josefa akabva kwavari, akachema; akadzokerazve kwavari, akataura navo, akatora Simioni pakati pavo, akamusunga vachizviona." 
Genesis42:25 Josefa akaraira kuti midziyo yavo izadzwe nezviyo, uye kuti mumwe nomumwe adzoserwe mari yake muhomwe yake, uye kuti vapiwewo mbuva yokufamba nayo; vakaitirwa saizvozvo." 
Genesis42:26 Ipapo vakatakudza mbongoro dzavo zviyo zvavo, vakaenda." 
Genesis42:27 Zvino mumwe wavo akati achisunungura homwe yake, kuti ape mbongoro yake zvokudya pavakavata usiku, akawana mari yake; heyo yakanga iri mumuromo wehomwe yake." 
Genesis42:28 Akati kuhama dzake, “Mari yangu yadzoswa; heyi iri muhomwe yangu; ipapo vakaora mwoyo, vakatarirana, vachibvunda, vakati, ‘Chiiko ichi chataitirwa naMwari?’ ”" 
Genesis42:29 Vakasvika kuna baba vavo panyika yeKenani, vakavaudza zvose zvakanga zvavawira;" 
Genesis42:30 vakati, “Murume uya, ishe wenyika iyoyo, akataura nesu nehasha, akati, tiri vashori venyika." 
Genesis42:31 Tikati kwaari, ‘Tiri vanhu vakatendeka, hatizi vashori;" 
Genesis42:32 tiri vanakomana vane gumi navaviri vomunhu mumwechete, vanakomana vababa vedu; mumwe haachipo, worugotwe ari kuna baba vedu nhasi panyika yeKenani.’ ”" 
Genesis42:33 Zvino murume uya, ishe wenyika, akati kwatiri, “Hechi chinhu chandichaziva nacho kuti muri vakatendeka, ‘Siyai mumwe wenyu kwandiri, mutore zviyo, mundopa mhuri dzenyu dzine nzara, muende.’" 
Genesis42:34 Mugouyazve kwandiri nomunun'una wenyu worugotwe; ipapo ndichaziva kuti hamuzi vashori, asi kuti muri vanhu vakatendeka; ipapo ndichakupai munun'una wenyu, mugotenga panyika ino.”" 
Genesis42:35 Zvino vakati vachidurura homwe dzavo, tarira chiputu chemari yomumwe nomumwe chakanga chiri muhomwe yake; vakati vachiona zviputu zvemari yavo, vakatya ivo nababa vavo." 
Genesis42:36 Zvino Jakobho akati kwavari, “Manditorera vana; Josefa haachipo, naSimioni haachipo, zvino moda kutora naBhenjaminiwo; zvinhu zvose izvi zvandiwira.”" 
Genesis42:37 Ipapo Rubheni akataura nababa vake, akati, “Mungauraya henyu vanakomana vangu vaviri, kana ndisingadzoki naye kwamuri; chimuisai henyu mumaoko angu, ini ndichauya nayezve kwamuri.”" 
Genesis42:38 Vakati, “Mwanakomana wangu haangaburuki nemi, nokuti mukoma wake wafa, iye asiyiwa ari oga; kana akawirwa nenjodzi parwendo rwamunofamba, muchaburutsira vhudzi rangu jena kuhwiro nokuchema.”" 
Genesis43:1 Zvino nzara yakanga iri huru munyika iyoyo. 
Genesis43:2 Zvino vakati vapedza zviyo, zvavakanga vabva nazvo Ijipiti, baba vavo vakati kwavari, “Dzokai, endaizve mutitengere zvokudya zvishoma.”" 
Genesis43:3 Judha akataura navo, akati, “Murume uya akatinyevera kwazvo, akati, ‘Hamungatongooni chiso changu, kana munun'una wenyu asati anemi.’" 
Genesis43:4 Kana mukatuma munun'una wedu nesu, tichaburuka, kundotenga zvokudya;" 
Genesis43:5 asi kana musingamutumi, hatingaburuki; nokuti murume uya akati kwatiri, ‘Hamungaoni chiso changu, kana munun'una wenyu asati anemi.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Isiraeri akati, “Makandiitireiko zvakaipa zvakadai, zvamakaudza murume uya kuti mune munun'una?”" 
Genesis43:7 Ivo vakati, “Murume uya akatibvunzisisa pamusoro pedu, napamusoro pehama dzedu, akati, ‘Baba venyu vapenyu here? Mune munun'una here?’ ” Tikamupindura namashoko aya; taigoziva here kuti achati, “Burukai nomunun'una wenyu?”" 
Genesis43:8 Zvino Judha akati kuna Isiraeri, baba vake, “Tumai henyu mukomana neni, tisimuke, tiende, tirarame, tirege kufa, isu nemi, navana vedu." 
Genesis43:9 Ini ndichava rubatso rwake; mungamureva paruoko rwangu; kana ndikasauya naye, ndikamuisa pamberi penyu, ini ndichava nemhosva kwamuri nokusingaperi." 
Genesis43:10 Nokuti dai tisina kunonoka, zvirokwazvo, tingadai tadzoka zvino rwechipiri.”" 
Genesis43:11 Ipapo Isiraeri, baba vavo, akati kwavari, “Kana zvakadaro, itai chinhu ichi; torai michero yakanaka yenyika mumidziyo yenyu, muburuke nechipo kumunhu uyo, chebhasami shomanana, nouchi ushomanana, nezvinonhuwira, nemura, nemichero yomuti wepisitakio, namaarimondi;" 
Genesis43:12 mutore mari yakapamhidzwa kaviri mumaoko enyu, neiya mari yakanga yadzoserwa mumiromo yehomwe dzenyu, muende makaibata mumaoko enyu; zvimwe vakakanganisa." 
Genesis43:13 Nomunun'una wenyu mumutorei, musimuke, mudzokere kumurume uyo;" 
Genesis43:14 Mwari waMasimbaose ngaakupei nyasha pamberi pomurume uyo, akusunungurirei mumwe munun'una wenyu naBhenjaminiwo. Kana ndatorerwa vana vangu, ndatorerwa hangu.”" 
Genesis43:15 Zvino varume vakatora chipo ichocho, vakabata mumaoko avo mari yakapamhidzwa kaviri, naBhenjamini, vakasimuka, vakaburukira Ijipiti, vakandomira pamberi paJosefa." 
Genesis43:16 Zvino Josefa akati achiona Bhenjamini anavo, akati kumutariri weimba yake, “Uya navarume mumba, ubaye, ugadzire; nokuti varume ava vachadya neni masikati.”" 
Genesis43:17 Murume uyo akaita sezvaakaudzwa naJosefa; murume uyo akaisa varume avo mumba maJosefa. 
Genesis43:18 Varume vakatya, zvavakaiswa mumba maJosefa, vakati, “Tinoiswamo nokuda kwemari yakadzoserwa muhomwe dzedu panguva yokutanga, kuti atsvake mhosva kwatiri, ativambe, nokutiita varanda vake, achitorawo mbongoro dzedu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Ipapo vakaswedera kumutariri weimba yaJosefa, vakataura naye pamusuwo weimba;" 
Genesis43:20 vakati, “Haiwa, ishe wedu, zvirokwazvo panguva yokutanga takaburuka kuzotenga zvokudya;" 
Genesis43:21 tikati tichisvika patakavata usiku, tikasunungura homwe dzedu, onei mari yomumwe nomumwe iri mumuromo wehomwe yake, mari yedu yose sezvayakayerwa; zvino tadzoka nayo pamaoko edu." 
Genesis43:22 Zvino taburuka tiine imwe marizve mumaoko edu kuti titenge zvokudya nayo; hatizivi kuti mari yedu yakaiswa muhomwe dzedu nani?” 
Genesis43:23 Iye akati, “Farai henyu, musatya; Mwari wenyu, Mwari wababa venyu, akakupai pfuma muhomwe dzenyu; mari yenyu yakasvika kwandiri.” Akavabudisira Simioni." 
Genesis43:24 Murume uyo akaisa varume avo muimba yaJosefa, akavapa mvura, vakashambidza tsoka dzavo, akapawo mbongoro dzavo zvokudya." 
Genesis43:25 Vakagadzira chipo kusvikira kuuya kwaJosefa masikati, nokuti vakanga vanzwa kuti vachadya zvokudya ipapo." 
Genesis43:26 Josefa akati asvika kumba, vakapinda mumba nechipo chakanga chiri mumaoko avo, vakakotamira pasi pamberi pake." 
Genesis43:27 Iye akavabvunza mufaro wavo, akati, “Baba venyu vakafara here, uya mutana wamaireva? Vachiri vapenyu here?”" 
Genesis43:28 Ivo vakati, “Muranda wenyu, baba vedu, vakafara havo, vachiri vapenyu.” Vakakotama, vakanamata." 
Genesis43:29 Iye akasimudza meso ake, akaona Bhenjamini, munun'una wake, mwanakomana wamai vake, akati, “Ndiye here munun'una wenyu muduku worugotwe, wamakandiudza?” Akati, “Mwari ngaave nenyasha newe, mwana wangu.”" 
Genesis43:30 Zvino Josefa akakurumidza, nokuti mwoyo wake wakachema munun'una wake, akatsvaka paangachema; akapinda muimba yake yomukati, akachemapo." 
Genesis43:31 Akazoshambidza chiso chake, akabudazve, akazvidzora akati, “Pakurai zvokudya.”" 
Genesis43:32 Vakamupakurira iye oga, naivo voga, naVaIjipiti havana kutenderwa kudya naVaHebheru, nokuti zvinonyangadza kuna VaIjipiti." 
Genesis43:33 Vakagara pamberi pake, wedangwe paudangwe hwake, nomuduku kuna vose pauduku hwake; varume vakatarirana, vakashamiswa." 
Genesis43:34 Akavagovera zvokudya zvakanga zviri pamberi pake, asi mugove waBhenjamini wakaenzana nowavashanu vavo. Vakanwa, vakafara naye." 
Genesis44:1 Zvino akaraira mutariri weimba yake, achiti, “Zadza homwe dzavarume nezvokudya, sezvavanogona kutakura, uisewo mari yomumwe nomumwe pamuromo wehomwe yake." 
Genesis44:2 Nomukombe wangu, mukombe wesirivha, uuise pamuromo wehomwe yomuduku, pamwechete nemari yezviyo zvake.” Iye akaita sezvaakaudzwa naJosefa." 
Genesis44:3 Zvino fume mangwana kwoedza varume vakatenderwa kuenda, ivo nembongoro dzavo." 
Genesis44:4 Vakati vabuda muguta, vasati vaenda kure, Josefa akaudza mutariri wake, akati, “Simuka, tevera varume; kana wavabata, uti kwavari, ‘Matsindikireiko zvamaitirwa zvakanaka?’" 
Genesis44:5 Ko hachizi chinhu chinonwira ishe wangu, chaanoshopera nacho here? Chinhu ichi chamaita chakaipa.”" 
Genesis44:6 Akandovabata, akataura mashoko iwayo kwavari." 
Genesis44:7 Vakati kwaari, “Ko ishe wedu anotaurirei mashoko akadai? Haisva, varanda venyu havangaiti chinhu chakadai." 
Genesis44:8 Tarirai, mari yatakawana pamiromo yehomwe dzedu takadzoka nayo kwamuri tichibva kunyika yeKenani; taigoba seiko sirivha kana ndarama mumba mashe wenyu?" 
Genesis44:9 Ani naani wavaranda venyu anowanikwa anawo, ngaafe; nesu tichava vasungwa vashe wedu.”" 
Genesis44:10 Iye akati, “Ndizvo hazvo, ngazvive sezvamataura; iye anowanikwa aine mukombe, ndiye achava musungwa wangu; imi vamwe hamungavi nemhosva.”" 
Genesis44:11 Ipapo vakakurumidza mumwe nomumwe kuburutsira homwe yake pasi, mumwe nomumwe akasunungura homwe yake." 
Genesis44:12 Iye akatsvaka, akatanga kumukuru, akaguma kumuduku; mukombe ukawanikwa muhomwe yaBhenjamini." 
Genesis44:13 Ipapo vakabvarura nguo dzavo, mumwe nomumwe akatakudza mbongoro yake, akadzokera kuguta." 
Genesis44:14 Judha navana vababa vake vakadzokera kuimba yaJosefa, iye achirimo, vakawira pasi pamberi pake." 
Genesis44:15 Zvino Josefa akati kwavari, “Chiiko ichi chamaita? Hamuzivi kuti munhu akaita seni anogona kushopera here?”" 
Genesis44:16 Judha akati, “Ko tingadiniko kuna ishe wangu? Tingataureiko? Tingazvipembedza sei? Mwari akawana kutadza kwavaranda venyu; tarirai tiri vasungwa vashe wedu, isu naiye akawanikwa aine mukombe.”" 
Genesis44:17 Iye akati, “Haisva, handingaiti saizvozvo; munhu uyo akawanikwa ano mukombe muruoko, ndiye achava musungwa wangu; kana muri imi, endai henyu norugare kuna baba venyu.”" 
Genesis44:18 Ipapo Judha akaswedera kwaari, akati, “Haiwa, ishe wangu, dotenderai henyu muranda wenyu kutaura shoko munzeve dzashe wangu, kutsamwa kwenyu kurege kumukira muranda wenyu, nokuti imi makaenzana naFarao." 
Genesis44:19 Ishe wangu akabvunza varanda vake, achiti, ‘Muna baba here, kana munun'una?’" 
Genesis44:20 Isu tikati kuna ishe wedu, ‘Tina baba vava mutana, vano mwana woutana hwavo, achiri muduku hake; mukoma wake akafa, iye akasara ari oga, mwana wamai vake, baba vake vanomuda.’" 
Genesis44:21 Imi mukati kuvaranda venyu, ‘Burukai naye kwandiri, ndimuone nameso angu.’" 
Genesis44:22 Isu tikati kuna ishe wedu, ‘Mukomana haangasiyi baba vake, nokuti kana akasiya baba vake, baba vake vangafa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Zvino makati kuvaranda venyu, ‘Kana munun'una wenyu worugotwe asingaburuki nemi, hamungaonizve chiso changu.’" 
Genesis44:24 Zvino takati takwira kumuranda wenyu, baba vedu, tikavaudza mashoko ashe wedu." 
Genesis44:25 Baba vedu vakati, ‘Endaizve, mutitengere zvokudya zvishomanana.’" 
Genesis44:26 Isu tikati, ‘Hatingaburuki, kana munun'una wedu asingaburuki nesu; nokuti hatingaoni chiso chomurume uya, kana munun'una wedu asi nesu.’" 
Genesis44:27 Muranda wenyu, baba vedu, vakati kwatiri, ‘Munoziva kuti mukadzi wangu akandiberekera vanakomana vaviri;" 
Genesis44:28 mumwe akabva kwandiri,’ ndikati, ‘Zvirokwazvo akabvamburwa; kubva musi iwoyo handina kuzomuonazve;" 
Genesis44:29 kana mukanditorera nouyuwo, akawirwa nenjodzi, muchaburutsira vhudzi rangu jena kuhwiro nokuchema.’" 
Genesis44:30 Naizvozvo, kana zvino ndikandosvika kumuranda wenyu, baba vangu, tisinaiye mukomana, mweya wavo zvawakabatanidzwa nomweya womukomana," 
Genesis44:31 vachati kana vachiona kuti mukomana asinesu, vachafa; naizvozvo varanda venyu vachaburutsira vhudzi jena romuranda wenyu, baba vedu, kuhwiro nokuchema." 
Genesis44:32 Nokuti muranda wenyu akazviita rubatso rwomukomana kuna baba vangu, ndikati, ‘Kana ndikasauya naye kwamuri, ini ndichava nemhosva kuna baba vangu nokusingaperi.’" 
Genesis44:33 Naizvozvo zvino ndinokumbira kuti muranda wenyu agare hake ari musungwa washe wangu pachigaro chomukomana, asi mukomana akwire hake navana vababa vake." 
Genesis44:34 Nokuti ndingakwira seiko kuna baba vangu, ndisina mukomana? Ndirege hangu kuona njodzi ichawira baba vangu.”" 
Genesis45:1 Zvino Josefa haana kugona kuzvidzora pamberi pavose vakanga vamire naye, akadana, achiti, “Budisai vanhu vose vari pano neni.” Zvino kwakanga kusina munhu akamira naye Josefa achizvizivisa kuvana vababa vake." 
Genesis45:2 Akachema kwazvo, VaIjipiti naveimba yaFarao vakazvinzwawo." 
Genesis45:3 Ipapo Josefa akati kuvana vababa vake, “Ndini Josefa! Baba vangu vachiri vapenyu here?” Vana vababa vake vakasagona kumupindura, nokuti vakanga vachitya pamberi pake." 
Genesis45:4 Josefa akati kuvana vababa vake, “Doswederai henyu kwandiri.” Zvino vakaswedera. Iye akati, “Ndini Josefa, mwana wababa venyu wamakatengesa ndikaiswa Ijipiti." 
Genesis45:5 Zvino musazvidya mwoyo, kana kuzvitsamwira, zvamakanditengesera kuno; nokuti Mwari akandituma pamberi penyu, kuti ndichengete upenyu." 
Genesis45:6 Nokuti zvino ava makore maviri enzara panyika ino; mamwe makore mashanu achiko, avasingazorimi nokukohwa nawo." 
Genesis45:7 Mwari akandituma pamberi penyu kuti ndikuchengetei, muve navamwe vachasara panyika, ndikuraramisei kuti musunungurwe nokusunungurwa kukuru." 
Genesis45:8 Zvino hamuzimi makandituma pano, asi Mwari; iye akandiita baba kuna Farao nashe weimba yake yose, nomubati wenyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis45:9 Kurumidzai, mukwire kuna baba vangu, mundoti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naJosefa, mwanakomana wenyu, Mwari akandiita ishe weIjipiti rose; burukirai kwandiri musanonoka;" 
Genesis45:10 mugare panyika yeGosheni, mugova pedyo neni, imi, navanakomana venyu, navana vevana venyu, namakwai enyu, nemombe dzenyu, nezvose zvamunazvo;" 
Genesis45:11 ndichakuchengetaipo, nokuti mamwe makore mashanu enzara achiripo, kuti murege kuzova varombo, imi, naveimba yenyu, nezvose zvamunazvo.’" 
Genesis45:12 Tarirai meso enyu anoona, nameso omunun'una wangu Bhenjamini kuti muromo wangu unotaura kwamuri." 
Genesis45:13 Mundoudza baba vangu kukudzwa kwangu kwose muIjipiti, nezvose zvamaona; mukurumidze kuburutsira baba vangu kuno.”" 
Genesis45:14 Akawira pamutsipa waBhenjamini, munun'una wake, akachema, naiye Bhenjamini akachema pamutsipa wake." 
Genesis45:15 Akatsvoda vakoma vake vose, akachema pamusoro pavo; shure kwaizvozvo vakoma vake vakataura naye." 
Genesis45:16 Zvino mukurumbira wazvo wakanzwika mumba maFarao, zvichinzi, “Vana vababa vaJosefa vasvika!” Farao navaranda vake vakafara naizvozvo." 
Genesis45:17 Farao akati kuna Josefa, “Iti kuvana vababa vako, ‘Itai chinhu ichi: Takudzai zvipfuwo zvenyu, mufambe, muende kunyika yeKenani;" 
Genesis45:18 munotora baba venyu navedzimba dzenyu muuye kwandiri; ndichakupai zvinhu zvakaisvonaka zvenyika yeIjipiti, mudye zvakakora zvenyika.’" 
Genesis45:19 Zvino varairwa, chiita izvozvo; torerai vana venyu vaduku navakadzi venyu ngoro panyika yeIjipiti, munotora baba venyu, muuye." 
Genesis45:20 Musafunga nhumbi dzenyu, nokuti zvakaisvonaka zvenyika yose yeIjipiti ndezvenyu.”" 
Genesis45:21 Vanakomana VaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo. Josefa akavapa ngoro, sezvaakarairwa naFarao, akavapa mbuva yokufamba nayo." 
Genesis45:22 Akapa vose, mumwe nomumwe nguo dzakanaka; asi Bhenjamini akamupa mashekeri ana mazana matatu esirivha nenguo dzakanaka shanu." 
Genesis45:23 Nababa vake akavatumira mbongoro dzine gumi, dzakanga dzakatakura zvinhu zvakaisvonaka zveIjipiti, namakadzi embongoro ane gumi akanga akatakura zviyo, nechingwa, nezvokudya zvababa vake zvorwendo." 
Genesis45:24 Zvino akatendera vana vababa vake kuenda, vakabva; akati kwavari, “Chenjerai, musatukana munzira.”" 
Genesis45:25 Ipapo vakabva Ijipiti, vakakwira, vakandosvika kunyika yeKenani kuna Jakobho, baba vavo." 
Genesis45:26 Vakavaudza, vakati, “Josefa achiri mupenyu; ndiye mubati wenyika yose yeIjipiti.” Ipapo mwoyo wavo wakati rukutu, nokuti havana kutenda." 
Genesis45:27 Vakavaudza mashoko ose aJosefa; zvino vakati vaona ngoro dzakanga dzatumwa naJosefa kuzovatakura, mweya waJakobho, baba vavo, ukaponazve;" 
Genesis45:28 Isiraeri akati, “Zvaringana! Josefa, mwanakomana wangu achiri mupenyu; ndichaenda ndimuone ndisati ndafa.”" 
Genesis46:1 Zvino Isiraeri akabva nezvose zvaakanga anazvo, akasvika Bheerishebha, akabayira Mwari wababa vake Isaka zvibairo." 
Genesis46:2 Mwari akataura naIsiraeri nezviratidzo usiku, akati, “Jakobho! Jakobho!” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano hangu.”" 
Genesis46:3 Akati, “Ndini Mwari, iye Mwari wababa vako; usatya hako kuburukira Ijipiti; nokuti ndichakuita rudzi rukuru ikoko;" 
Genesis46:4 ndichaburukira Ijipiti newe, ndigokudzosazve zvirokwazvo; Josefa ndiye achavhara meso ako.”" 
Genesis46:5 Jakobho akasimuka, akabva Bheerishebha; vanakomana VaIsiraeri vakatakura Jakobho baba vavo, navana vavo vaduku, navakadzi vavo, nengoro dzakanga dzatumwa naFarao kuti dzivatakure." 
Genesis46:6 Vakatora mombe dzavo nenhumbi dzavo dzavakanga vawana munyika yeKenani, vakasvika Ijipiti, Jakobho navanakomana vake vose pamwechete naye;" 
Genesis46:7 vanakomana vake, navana vevanakomana vake pamwechete naye, navakunda vake, navakunda vavanakomana vake, navose vorudzi rwake, vakaenda navo Ijipiti." 
Genesis46:8 Ndiwo mazita avana VaIsiraeri vakasvika Ijipiti: Jakobho, navanakomana vake, vachiti: Rubheni, dangwe raJakobho." 
Genesis46:9 Navanakomana vaRubheni: Hanoki, naParu, naHezironi, Karami." 
Genesis46:10 Navanakomana vaSimioni: Jemueri, naJamini, naOhadhi, naJakini, naZohari, naShauri, waiva mwanakomana womukadzi weKenani." 
Genesis46:11 Navanakomana vaRevhi: Gerishoni, naKohati, naMerari." 
Genesis46:12 Navanakomana vaJudha: Eri, naOnani, naShera, naPerezi, naZera; asi Zera naOnani vakafira panyika yeKenani. Vanakomana vaPerezi vaiva Hezironi, naHamori." 
Genesis46:13 Navanakomana vaIsakari: Tora, naPuwa, naJobho, naShimuroni." 
Genesis46:13 Navanakomana vaIsakari: Tora, naPuwa, naJobho, naShimuroni." 
Genesis46:14 Navanakomana vaZebhuroni: Seredhi, naEroni, naJareeri." 
Genesis46:15 Ndivo vanakomana vaRea, vaakaberekera Jakobho paPadhanaramu, nomukunda wake Dhina; vanakomana vake navakunda vake vose vaiva vanhu vana makumi matatu navatatu." 
Genesis46:16 Navanakomana vaGadhi: Zifioni, naHagi, naShumi, naEzibhoni, naEri, naArodhi, naAreri." 
Genesis46:17 Navanakomana vaAshuru: Imuna, naIshivha, naIshivhi, naBheria, naSera, hanzvadzi yavo; navanakomana vaBhiriha vaiva Hebheri, naMakieri." 
Genesis46:18 Ndivo vanakomana vaZiripa, Rabhani waakapa Rea, mukunda wake; akaberekera Jakobho vanhu ava vane gumi navatanhatu." 
Genesis46:19 Vanakomana vaRacheri, mukadzi waJakobho, vaiva Josefa naBhenjamini." 
Genesis46:20 Josefa akaberekerwa Manase naEfuremu panyika yeIjipiti, ndivo vaakaberekerwa naAsenati, mukunda waPotifari, mupristi weOni." 
Genesis46:21 Navanakomana vaBhenjamini: Bhera, naBhekeri, naAshibheri naGera, naNaamani, naEhi, naRoshi, naMupimi, naHupimi, naAdhi." 
Genesis46:22 Ndivo vanakomana vaRacheri, vakaberekerwa Jakobho; vose vaiva vane gumi navana." 
Genesis46:23 Navanakomana vaDhani: Hushimi. 
Genesis46:24 Navanakomana vaNafutari: Jazeeri, naGuni, naJezeri, naShiremi." 
Genesis46:25 Ndivo vanakomana vaBhiriha, Rabhani waakapa Racheri, mukunda wake; ndivo vaakaberekera Jakobho; vose vaiva vanomwe." 
Genesis46:26 Zvino vanhu vose vakauya naJakobho Ijipiti, vakanga vabuda pachiuno chake, vakadzi vevanakomana vaJakobho vasingaverengwi, vose vaiva vanhu vana makumi matanhatu navatanhatu." 
Genesis46:27 Vanakomana vaJosefa vaakanga aberekerwa Ijipiti vaiva vanhu vaviri; vose veimba yaJakobho vakauya Ijipiti, vaiva vanhu vana makumi manomwe." 
Genesis46:28 Akatuma Judha pamberi pake kuna Josefa kuti amuratidze nzira inoenda Gosheni. 
Genesis46:29 Ipapo Josefa akagadzira ngoro yake, akakwira Gosheni, kunosangana naIsiraeri, baba vake; akazvizivisa kwavari, akawira pamutsipa wavo, akachema pamutsipa wavo nguva huru." 
Genesis46:30 Isiraeri akati kuna Josefa, “Zvino ngandichifa hangu, nokuti ndaona chiso chako, kuti uchiri mupenyu.”" 
Genesis46:31 Zvino Josefa akati kuvana vababa vake naveimba vababa vake, “Ini ndichakwira kundoudza Farao, ndichiti kwaari, ‘Vana vababa vangu, naveimba yababa vangu, vaigara kunyika yeKenani, vasvika kwandiri’;" 
Genesis46:32 varume ava vafudzi, nokuti vaipfuwa zvipfuwo; vauya namakwai avo, nemombe dzavo, nezvose zvavainazvo." 
Genesis46:33 Zvino kana modanwa naFarao, akati, ‘Basa renyu nderei?’" 
Genesis46:34 Muti, ‘Varanda venyu vaiva vapfuwi vezvipfuwo kubva paucheche hwedu kusvikira zvino, isu namadzibaba edu;’ kuti mugare munyika yeGosheni, nokuti vafudzi vose vanonyangadza vaIjipiti.”" 
Genesis47:1 Zvino Josefa akaenda, akandoudza Farao, akati, “Baba vangu navana vababa vangu vasvika, vachibva kunyika yeKenani, vane makwai avo, nemombe dzavo, nezvose zvavainazvo; zvino, tarirai vari munyika yeGosheni.”" 
Genesis47:2 Akatora varume vashanu kuvana vababa vake, akavaisa pamberi paFarao." 
Genesis47:3 Farao akati kuvakoma vake, “Basa renyu ndereiko?” Vakati kuna Farao, “Varanda venyu vafudzi, isu namadzibaba edu tose.”" 
Genesis47:4 Vakati kuna Farao, “Tauya kuzogara tiri vatorwa munyika ino; nokuti hakuna mafuro amakwai avaranda venyu, nokuti kune nzara kunyika yeKenani; zvino tinokumbira kuti varanda venyu vagare munyika yeGosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Ipapo Farao akataura naJosefa, akati, “Baba vako navana vababa vako vauya kwauri;" 
Genesis47:6 nyika yeIjipiti iri pamberi pako; baba vako navana vababa vako ngavagare panzvimbo yakaisvonaka panyika ino, ngavagare panyika yeGosheni; kana uchiziva kuti pakati pavo pana varume vakangwara, uvaite vatariri vemombe dzangu.”" 
Genesis47:7 Josefa akapinda naJakobho, baba vake, akavaisa pamberi paFarao; Jakobho akaropafadza Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Farao akati kuna Jakobho, “Manganiko mazuva amakore oupenyu hwenyu?”" 
Genesis47:9 Jakobho akati kuna Farao, “Mazuva amakore outorwa hwangu makore ane zana namakumi matatu; mazuva amakore oupenyu hwangu akanga ari mashoma hawo, akaipa, haana kusvikira pamazuva amakore oupenyu hwamadzibaba angu pamazuva outorwa hwavo.”" 
Genesis47:10 Jakobho akaropafadza Farao, akabuda pamberi paFarao." 
Genesis47:11 Zvino Josefa akapa baba vake navana vababa vake pokugara, akavapa nzvimbo panyika yeIjipiti, kuti ive yavo, pakaisvonaka panyika iyo, panyika yeRamesesi, sezvaakarairwa naFarao." 
Genesis47:12 Josefa akachengeta baba vake, navana vababa vake, navose veimba yababa vake, akavapa zvokudya achiverenga navana vavowo." 
Genesis47:13 Zvino pakanga pasina zvokudya panyika yose, nokuti nzara yakanga iri huru, nyika yeIjipiti nenyika yeKenani dzikaziya nenzara." 
Genesis47:14 Josefa akaunganidza mari yose yakanga iri panyika yeIjipiti, nenyika yeKenani, yavakatenga zviyo nayo, Josefa akaisa mari iyo mumba maFarao." 
Genesis47:15 Mari yose yakati yapera munyika yeIjipiti, napanyika yeKenani, VaIjipiti vose vakauya kuna Josefa, vakati, “Tipei zvokudya, nokuti tingafa seiko pamberi penyu? Nokuti mari yapera.”" 
Genesis47:16 Josefa akati, “Uyai nemombe dzenyu, ndikupei zvokudya pamusoro pezvipfuwo zvenyu, kana mari yapera.”" 
Genesis47:17 Zvino vakauya kuna Josefa nezvipfuwo zvavo; Josefa akavapa zvokudya, vachitsinhanha namabhiza, namakwai, nemombe, nembongoro; akavararamisa nezvokudya, vachitsinhanha nezvipfuwo zvavo zvose gore iroro." 
Genesis47:18 Gore iroro rakati rapera, vakauya kwaari negore rechipiri, vakati kwaari, “Hatingavanziri ishe wedu kuti mari yedu yose yapera, mapoka ezvipfuwo ava ashe wedu; hakuchina chakasara pamberi pashe wedu, asi miviri yedu neminda yedu;" 
Genesis47:19 zvino tingafa seiko pamberi penyu, isu nenyika yedu? Titengei henyu, isu nenyika yedu, tive varanda vaFarao; tipeiwo mbeu, tirarame, tirege kufa, nenyika irege kushanduka iite sango.”" 
Genesis47:20 Zvino Josefa akatengera Farao nyika yose yeIjipiti, nokuti VaIjipiti vakatengesa mumwe nomumwe munda wake, nokuti nzara yakanga iri huru pamusoro pavo, nyika ikava yaFarao." 
Genesis47:21 Kana vari vanhu akavatamisa kumaguta, kubva kumuganhu mumwe weIjipiti kusvikira kuno mumwe muganhu wayo." 
Genesis47:22 Asi nyika yavapristi yoga haana kuitenga, nokuti vapristi vakanga vaganhurirwa mugove wavo naFarao; vaidya mugove wavo wavaipiwa naFarao. Naizvozvo havana kutengesa nyika yavo." 
Genesis47:23 Zvino Josefa akati kuvanhu, “Tarirai, ndakatengera Farao imi nenyika yenyu nhasi, hedzi mbeu, mudyare panyika." 
Genesis47:24 Nenguva yokukohwa munofanira kupa Farao cheshanu, zvina zvichava zvenyu, zvive mbeu dzeminda, nezvokudya zvenyu, nezvavari mudzimba dzenyu, nezvokudya zvepwere dzenyu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Ivo vakati, “Ndimi makatichengeta; ngatiwane hedu nyasha panashe wedu, tive varanda vaFarao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Josefa akatema mutemo panyika yeIjipiti, uripo nanhasi, kuti Farao apiwe cheshanu; asi nyika yavapristi yoga haina kuva yaFarao." 
Genesis47:27 Zvino VaIsiraeri vakagara panyika yeIjipiti, panyika yeGosheni, vakazviwanira pfuma imomo, vakabereka vana, vakawanda kwazvo." 
Genesis47:28 Jakobho akagara panyika yeIjipiti makore ane gumi namanomwe; naizvozvo mazuva aJakobho makore oupenyu hwake, akanga ari makore ane zana namakumi mana namanomwe." 
Genesis47:29 Zvino nguva yokufa kwaIsiraeri yakanga yaswedera, iye akadana mwanakomana wake Josefa, akati kwaari, “Kana ndawana nyasha kwauri, chiisa hako ruoko rwako pasi pechidya changu, undiitire ngoni nezvokwadi; rega hako kundiviga muIjipiti;" 
Genesis47:30 asi kana ndavata namadzibaba angu, undibvise muIjipiti, unondiviga muhwiro hwavo.” Iye akati, “Ndichaita sezvamataura.”" 
Genesis47:31 Vakati, “Ndipikire;” iye akavapikira. Ipapo Isiraeri akakotamira pamusoro wouvato hwake." 
Genesis48:1 Shure kwaizvozvo Josefa akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Tarira, baba vako vanorwara;” iye akatora vanakomana vake vaviri, Manase naEfuremu." 
Genesis48:2 Jakobho akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Tarirai, mwanakomana wenyu, Josefa, wauya kwamuri.” Isiraeri akazvisimbaradza, akagara pauvato." 
Genesis48:3 Zvino Jakobho akati kuna Josefa, “Mwari waMasimbaose akazviratidza paRuzi, panyika yeKenani, akandiropafadza," 
Genesis48:4 akati kwandiri, ‘Tarira, ndichakuberekesa, ndichakuwanza, ndichakuita ndudzi zhinji; ndichapa vana vako vanokutevera nyika ino, ive yavo nokusingaperi.’" 
Genesis48:5 “Zvino vanakomana vako vaviri, vawakaberekerwa panyika yeIjipiti, ndisati ndasvika kwauri paIjipiti, ndavangu; Efuremu naManase vachava vangu savana Rubheni naSimioni." 
Genesis48:6 Asi vana vako, vawakabereka shure kwavo, vachava vana vako, vachatumidzwa nezita ravakuru vavo panhaka yavo." 
Genesis48:7 Kana ndirini, pakubva kwangu paPadhani, ndakafirwa naRacheri panyika yeKenani munzira ndasvika pedyo neEfurata, ndikamuvigapo panzira inoenda Efurata (rimwe zita ndiBhetirehemu).”" 
Genesis48:8 Isiraeri akaona vanakomana vaJosefa, akati, “Ndivananiko?”" 
Genesis48:9 Josefa akati kuna baba vake, “Ndivo vanakomana vangu vandakapiwa pano naMwari.” Vakati, “Douya navo kwandiri ndivaropafadze.”" 
Genesis48:10 Zvino meso aIsiraeri akanga oona madzerere nokukwegura, akanga asisagoni kuona. Akavaswededza kwavari, Isiraeri akatsvoda, akavambundikira." 
Genesis48:11 Isiraeri akati kuna Josefa, “Handina kufunga kuti ndichaona chiso chakozve, zvino tarira, Mwari akandionesa navana vakowo.”" 
Genesis48:12 Josefa akavabvisa pakati pamabvi avo akakotamira pasi nechiso chake. 
Genesis48:13 Josefa akavabata vari vaviri, Efuremu norudyi rwake kuruboshwe rwaIsiraeri, naManase noruboshwe rwake kurudyi rwaIsiraeri, akavaswededza pedyo naye." 
Genesis48:14 Isiraeri akatambanudza ruoko rwake rworudyi, akaruisa pamusoro paEfuremu, aiva muduku, noruoko rwake rworuboshwe pamusoro waManase, akapesanisa maoko ake achizviziva, nokuti Manase akanga ari wedangwe." 
Genesis48:15 Akaropafadza Josefa, akati, “Mwari uya, akafamba madzibaba angu pamberi pake, vana Abhurahamu naIsaka, Mwari akandifudza paupenyu hwangu hwose kusvikira zuva ranhasi;" 
Genesis48:16 mutumwa wakandidzikinura pane zvakaipa zvose, ngaaropafadze vanakomana ava; zita rangu ngaritumidzwe kwavari, namazita amadzibaba angu, Abhurahamu naIsaka, vawande kwazvo panyika.”" 
Genesis48:17 Zvino Josefa akati achiona kuti baba vake vaisa ruoko rwavo rworudyi pamusoro waEfuremu, hazvina kumufadza, akabata ruoko rwababa vake, kuti arubvise pamusoro waEfuremu, aruise pamusoro waManase." 
Genesis48:18 Josefa akati kuna baba vake, “Regai kudaro, baba vangu, nokuti ndiye wedangwe, isai ruoko rwenyu pamusoro wake.”" 
Genesis48:19 Baba vake vakaramba, vakati, “Ndinoziva, mwana wangu, ndinoziva; naiyewo achava rudzi, naiye achava mukuruwo, asi munun'una wake achava mukuru kwaari, vana vake vachava ndudzi zhinji.”" 
Genesis48:20 Akavaropafadza nomusi iwoyo, akati, “Newe VaIsiraeri vacharopafadza, vachiti, ‘Mwari ngaakuite saEfuremu naManase.’ ” Akaisa Efuremu pamberi paManase." 
Genesis48:21 Zvino Isiraeri akati kuna Josefa, “Tarira, ndofa, asi Mwari achava nemi, achakudzoserai kunyika yamadzibaba enyu." 
Genesis48:22 Newe ndinokupa mugove mumwe kupfuura vamwe vana vababa vako, uya wandakatorera VaAmori nomunondo wangu nouta hwangu.”" 
Genesis49:1 Zvino Jakobho akadana vanakomana vake, akati, “Unganai, ndikuudzei zvamuchaitirwa namazuva anotevera." 
Genesis49:2 Unganai, munzwe imi vanakomana vaJakobho, Teererai Isiraeri, baba venyu." 
Genesis49:3 Rubheni, iwe uri dangwe rangu, simba rangu, nokutanga kwesimba rangu; Ukuru hwokukudzwa, noukuru hwesimba;" 
Genesis49:4 Unotutuma semvura, haungavi noukuru; Nokuti wakakwira kuuvato hwababa vako, Ukausvibisa; wakakwira kumubedha wangu." 
Genesis49:5 Simeoni naRevhi vana vamai vamwe; Minondo yavo inhumbi dzokurwa nesimba. 
Genesis49:6 Mweya wangu, rega kupinda pakurangana kwavo. Kukudzwa kwangu, rega kusanganiswa neungano dzavo; Nokuti pakutsamwa kwavo vakauraya vanhu, Nokuda kwavo vakagura marunda emombe." 
Genesis49:7 Kutsamwa kwavo ngakutukwe, nokuti kwakanga kuri kukuru; Nehasha dzavo, nokuti dzakanga dzakaipa; Ndichavaparadzanisa pakati paJakobho, nokuvaparadzira pakati paIsiraeri." 
Genesis49:8 Iwe Judha, ucharumbidzwa nehama dzako; Ruoko rwako ruchava pamitsipa yavavengi vako, Vana vababa vako vachakotamira pamberi pako." 
Genesis49:9 Judha mwana weshumba; Iwe mwanakomana wangu, wakwira uchibva pane zvakaurayiwa; Wakakotama, wakanyanga seshumba, Seshumbakadzi; ndianiko achamumutsa?" 
Genesis49:10 Tsvimbo youshe haingabvi kuna Judha, Kana mudonzvo, womubati pakati petsoka dzake, Kusvikira Shiro auya; Ndudzi dzose dzavanhu dzichamuerera iye." 
Genesis49:11 Unosungira mbongoro yake pamuzambiringa, Nomwana wembongoro yake pamuzambiringa wakaisvonaka; Wakasuka nguo dzake newaini, Nezvokufuka zvake muropa ramazambiringa." 
Genesis49:12 Meso ake achatsvuka newaini, Meno ake achachena nomukaka." 
Genesis49:13 Zebhuroni uchagara pamhenderekedzo dzegungwa; iye achava mhenderekedzo panopinda zvikepe; Muganhu wake uchasvika paSidhoni. 
Genesis49:14 Isakari imbongoro ine simba, Inovata pasi, pakati pamatanga amakwai;" 
Genesis49:15 Akaona zororo kuti rakanaka, Nenyika kuti inofadza, Akarerekera fudzi rake kuti atakure, akava mubatiri wechibharo." 
Genesis49:16 Dhani achatonga mhaka dzavanhu vake, Sorumwe rwamarudzi aIsiraeri." 
Genesis49:17 Dhani achava senyoka munzira, Semvumbi mugwara, Inoruma zvitsitsinho zvebhiza; Kuti mutasvi waro awire pasi neshure." 
Genesis49:18 Ndakamirira ruponeso rwenyu imi Jehovha. 
Genesis49:19 Gadhi achavambwa nehondo, Asi iye achavavamba pazvitsitsinho zvavo." 
Genesis49:20 Ashuru achava nezvokudya zvakakora; Iye achauya nezvinonaka zvinofanira madzishe. 
Genesis49:21 Nafutari isheche yemhembwe yakasununguka, Anotaura mashoko akanaka." 
Genesis49:22 Josefa idavi rinobereka, Idavi rinobereka patsime; matavi ake anodarika madziro." 
Genesis49:23 Vapfuri nouta vakamutambudza kwazvo, Vakamupfura, vakamuvenga;" 
Genesis49:24 asi uta hwake hwakaramba hune simba, Maoko ezvanza zvake akasimbiswa Namaoko owaMasimbaose waJakobho, (Ndipo panobva Mufudzi, neBwe raIsiraeri)," 
Genesis49:25 Mwari wababa vako achakubatsira; waMasimbaose, achakuropafadza, Neropafadzo dzinobva kudenga kumusoro, Ropafadzo dzinobva pamvura yakadzika iri pasi, Ropafadzo dzamazamu nedzechizvaro." 
Genesis49:26 Ropafadzo dzababa vako Dzinopfuura ropafadzo dzamateteguru angu, kusvikira kumugumo wamakomo asingaperi; dzichagara pamusoro waJosefa, Pamusoro waiye akanga ari muchinda pakati pehama dzake." 
Genesis49:27 Bhenjamini igava rinoparadza; Mangwanani achadya chakaurayiwa, Madeko achagovera zvaakapamba.”" 
Genesis49:28 Ava vose ndiwo marudzi ane gumi namaviri aIsiraeri; ndizvo zvakataura baba vavo kwavari, akavaropafadza; vakaropafadza mumwe nomumwe nokuropafadzwa kwake." 
Genesis49:29 Akavaraira, akati kwavari, “Ini ndobva ndosanganiswa navanhu vangu; mundondiviga kuna madzibaba angu, mubako riri mumunda waEfuroni, muHeti," 
Genesis49:30 bako riri mumunda weMakapera, pakatarisana neMamure, panyika yeKenani, riya rakatengwa naAbhurahamu pamwechete nomunda kuna Efuroni, muHeti, kuti zvive zvake, ive nzvimbo yake yokuviga;" 
Genesis49:31 ndipo pavakaviga Abhurahamu naSara, mukadzi wake; ndipo pavakaviga Isaka naRabheka, mukadzi wake; ndipo pandakaviga Rea;" 
Genesis49:32 munda uya nebako riri mukati mawo, zvakatengwa kuvana VaHeti.”" 
Genesis49:33 Zvino Jakobho akati apedza kuraira vanakomana vake, akadzosera tsoka dzake pauvato, mweya wake ukabuda, akasanganiswa navanhu vake." 
Genesis50:1 Zvino Josefa akawira pamusoro pechiso chababa vake, akachema pamusoro pake, akamutsvoda." 
Genesis50:2 Josefa akaraira varanda vake vakanga vari vanachiremba vehutano, kuti vasasike baba vake, vanachiremba vezvehutano vakasasika Isiraeri." 
Genesis50:3 Vakapedza mazuva makumi mana naye, nokuti ndiwo aiva mazuva okusasika; naVaIjipiti vakamuchema mazuva makumi manomwe." 
Genesis50:4 Zvino mazuva okuchema akati apera, Josefa akataura naveimba yaFarao, akati, “Zvino kana ndawana nyasha kwamuri, dorevai munzeve dzaFarao, muti," 
Genesis50:5 ‘Baba vangu vakandipikisa, vachiti tarirai, ndofa, muhwiro hwandakazvicherera munyika yeKenani, ndimo maunofanira kundivigamo.’ Naizvozvo zvino donditenderai henyu kuti ndikwire, ndindoviga baba vangu, ndogodzoka.”" 
Genesis50:6 Farao akati, “Kwira, undoviga baba vako, sezvavakakupikisa.”" 
Genesis50:7 Ipapo Josefa akakwira kundoviga baba vake, navaranda vose vaFarao vakakwira naye, vakuru veimba yake, navakuru venyika yeIjipiti," 
Genesis50:8 naveimba yose yaJosefa, navana vababa vake, naveimba yababa vake; asi pwere dzavo dzoga, namakwai avo, nemombe dzavo, vakazvisiya panyika yeGosheni," 
Genesis50:9 ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza vakakwirawo naye, rikava boka guru–guru." 
Genesis50:10 Vakasvika paburiro raAtadhi, riri mhiri kwaJodhani, vakamuchemapo nokuchema kukuru kwazvo; akachema baba vake mazuva manomwe." 
Genesis50:11 Zvino vanhu vaigara panyika yeKenani vakati vachiona kuchema ikoko paburiro raAtadhi, vakati, “Kuchema uku kukuru ndokwaVaIjipiti;” naizvozvo nzvimbo iyoyo ikatumidzwa Abherimiziraimu, iri mhiri kwaJodhani." 
Genesis50:12 Vanakomana vake vakamuitira sezvaakanga avaraira; 
Genesis50:13 nokuti vanakomana vake vakandomuisa kunyika yeKenani, vakamuviga mubako romunda weMakapera, riya rakatengwa naAbhurahamu, pamwechete nomunda kuna Efuroni muHeti, pakatarisana neMamure, kuti zvive zvake, ive nzvimbo yake yokuviga." 
Genesis50:14 Zvino Josefa akati aviga baba vake, akadzokera Ijipiti, iye navakoma vake, navose vakanga vakwira naye kundoviga baba vake." 
Genesis50:15 Zvino vakoma vaJosefa vakati vachiona kuti baba vavo vafa, vakati, “Zvimwe Josefa achativenga, nokutitsiva kwazvo zvakaipa zvose zvatakamuitira.”" 
Genesis50:16 Naizvozvo vakatuma shoko kuna Josefa, vachiti, “Baba venyu vakaraira, vasati vafa, vachiti," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Taurai naJosefa,’ muti, ‘Zvino dokanganwirai henyu kutadza kwavakoma venyu; nezvivi zvavo, nokuti vakakuitirai zvakaipa; zvino dokanganwirai kutadza kwavaranda vaMwari wababa venyu.’ ” Josefa akachema pakutaura kwavo naye." 
Genesis50:18 Vakuru vake vakaendawo, vakawira pasi pamberi pake, vakati, “Tarirai, tiri varanda venyu.”" 
Genesis50:19 Josefa akati kwavari, “Musatya, nokuti ini ndiri pachigaro chaMwari here?" 
Genesis50:20 Kana murimi, makandifungira zvakaipa, asi Mwari akafunga kuti zvive zvakanaka, kuti zviitwe sezvinoitwa nhasi, kuti vanhu vazhinji vararamiswe." 
Genesis50:21 Naizvozvo zvino musatya, ndichakuchengetai, nepwere dzenyu.” Akavanyaradza, akataura navo nomwoyo wakanaka." 
Genesis50:22 Josefa akagara Ijipiti, iye naveimba yababa vake; Josefa akagara makore ane zana negumi." 
Genesis50:23 Josefa akaona vana vaEfuremu vorudzi rwechitatu, navana vaMakiri, mwanakomana waManase, vakaberekerwa pamabvi aJosefa." 
Genesis50:24 Josefa akati kuhama dzake, “Ndofa, asi Mwari achakumutsai zvirokwazvo, nokukubudisai panyika ino, muende kunyika yaakapikira Abhurahamu naIsaka, naJakobho.”" 
Genesis50:25 Josefa akapikisa vana VaIsiraeri, akati, “Mwari achakumutsai zvirokwazvo, nemi mutakure mapfupa angu abve pano.”" 
Genesis50:26 Ipapo Josefa akafa, ava namakore ane zana negumi; vakamusasika, akaiswa mubhokisi paIjipiti." 
Exodus1:1 Ndiwo mazita avana VaIsiraeri vakanga vaenda Ijipiti: mumwe nomumwe akaenda naJakobho ana veimba yake: 
Exodus1:2 Rubheni, naSimioni, naRevhi, naJudha," 
Exodus1:3 naIsakari, naZebhuruni, naBhenjamini," 
Exodus1:4 naDhani, naNafutari, naGadhi, naAshuru." 
Exodus1:5 Zvino vanhu vose vakanga vabva muchiuno chaJakobho vakanga vari vanhu vana makumi manomwe; asi Josefa akanga atova Ijipiti. 
Exodus1:6 Zvino Josefa akafa, navana vababa vake vose, navose vakanga vane zero navo." 
Exodus1:7 Vana VaIsiraeri vakaberekana, vakawanda kwazvo, vakava nesimba guru–guru; nyika yakanga izere navo." 
Exodus1:8 Zvino muIjipiti makamuka mumwe mambo mutsva, akanga asina kuziva Josefa." 
Exodus1:9 Iye akati kuvanhu vake, “Tarirai, vanhu ava, vana VaIsiraeri, vanotipfuura isu pakuwanda nesimba;" 
Exodus1:10 uyai, ngativafungire zano, varege kuwandisa, kuti kana kurwa kukamuka, ivo vangabatsirana navavengi vedu, vakarwa nesu, vakabva panyika ino.”" 
Exodus1:11 Naizvozvo vakagadza pamusoro pavo vatariri vebasa, kuti vavanetse nemirimo yavo. Vakavakira Farao maguta ana matura, Pitomu naRamesesi." 
Exodus1:12 Asi vachiramba vachivanetsa, ivo vakaramba vachiwanda kwazvo, vachingopararira. Vakaora mwoyo nokuda kwavana VaIsiraeri." 
Exodus1:13 VaIjipiti vakavabatisa zvinorema; 
Exodus1:14 vakanetsa upenyu hwavo nebasa rinorema pamatope nezvitina, vachivabatisa zvinorema." 
Exodus1:15 Zvino mambo weIjipiti akaudza madzimbuya aVaHebheru, vainzi mumwe Shifura, mumwe Pua;" 
Exodus1:16 akati, “Kana muchibatsira vakadzi vaVaHebheru pabasa ramadzimbuya, muchivaona pakupona, kana ari mwanakomana mumuuraye kana ari mwanasikana, ngaararame hake.”" 
Exodus1:17 Asi madzimbuya akanga achitya Mwari, akasaita sezvaakarairwa namambo weIjipiti, asi vakarega vanakomana vari vapenyu havo." 
Exodus1:18 Mambo weIjipiti akadana madzimbuya, akati kwavari, “Makaitireiko izvozvo, mukarega vanakomana vari vapenyu?”" 
Exodus1:19 Madzimbuya akati kuna Farao, “Nokuti vakadzi vaVaHebheru havana kufanana navakadzi vaVaIjipiti, nokuti vane simba; mbuya vasati vasvika kwavari, vatopona havo.”" 
Exodus1:20 Naizvozvo Mwari akaitira madzimbuya zvakanaka, vanhu vakawanda kwazvo, vakava nesimba kwazvo." 
Exodus1:21 Zvino madzimbuya zvaakanga achitya Mwari, iye akavapa mhuri." 
Exodus1:22 Farao akaraira vanhu vake vose, akati, “Vanakomana vose vanozoberekwa, muvakandire murwizi, asi vasikana vose muvarege vari vapenyu havo.”" 
Exodus2:1 Zvino mumwe murume weimba yavaRevhi akawana mukunda wavaRevhi. 
Exodus2:2 Mukadzi akava nemimba, akabereka mwanakomana; zvino akati achiona kuti mwana akanaka, akamuvanza mwedzi mitatu." 
Exodus2:3 Akati asisagoni kumuvanza, akamutorera tswanda yenhokwe, akainamira nebhitumini nenamo, akaisa mwana mukati mayo, akaigadzika pakati petsanga pamhenderekedzo dzorwizi." 
Exodus2:4 Hanzvadzi yake ikandomira kure zvishoma, kuti azive zvichaitwa kwaari." 
Exodus2:5 Zvino mukunda waFarao akaburuka kundoshamba murwizi, vasikana vake vakafamba–famba pamhenderekedzo dzorwizi; iye akaona tswanda pakati petsanga, ndokutuma musikana wake kunoitora." 
Exodus2:6 Akaizarura, akona mwana, mwana wechikomana, onei anochema. Akamunzwira ngoni, akati, “Ndomumwe wavana vaVaHebheru.”" 
Exodus2:7 Ipapo hanzvadzi yake yakati kumukunda waFarao, “Ko handingaendi ndikakudanirai mumwisi kuvakadzi vaVaHebheru, kuti akumwisirei mwana here?”" 
Exodus2:8 Mukunda waFarao akati kwaari, “Enda.” Musikana akaenda, akandodana mai vomwana." 
Exodus2:9 Mukunda waFarao akati kwavari, “Tora mwana uyu, undimwisire ndigokupa mubairo wako.” Mukadzi akatora mwana, akandomuyamwisa." 
Exodus2:10 Mwana akakura, akandomuisa kumukunda waFarao, akava mwanakomana wake, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Mosesi, akati, “Nokuti ndamunyukura mumvura.”" 
Exodus2:11 Zvino namazuva iwayo Mosesi akura, akaenda kunoona hama dzake, akandotarira mabasa avo; akaona muIjipiti achirova muHebheru, mumwe wehama dzake." 
Exodus2:12 Akaringa–ringa, zvino achiona kuti hapana munhu aripo, akauraya muIjipiti, akamuviga mujecha." 
Exodus2:13 Akabudazve nezuva rechipiri, akaona varume vaviri VaHebheru vachirwa; akati kuna iye waiva nemhosva, “Unorovereiko munhu wokwako?”" 
Exodus2:14 Iye akati, “Ndianiko akakuita ishe nomutongi wedu? Unoda kundiuraya ini sezvawakauraya uya muIjipiti kani?” Mosesi akatya, akati, “Zvirokwazvo, chinhu ichi chazikanwa.”" 
Exodus2:15 Zvino Farao akati anzwa chinhu icho, akatsvaka kuuraya Mosesi. Asi Mosesi akatiza pamberi paFarao, akandogara kunyika yeMidhiani, akagara pasi patsime." 
Exodus2:16 Zvino mupristi weMidhiani akanga ana vakunda vanomwe; ivo vakauya kuzochera mvura, vakazadza zvinwiro, kuti vanwise makwai ababa vavo." 
Exodus2:17 Vafudzi vakauya, vakavadzingapo, asi Mosesi akasimuka, akavabatsira, akanwisa makwai avo." 
Exodus2:18 Zvino vakati vachisvika kuna Rueri, baba vavo, ivo vakati, “Makurumidza kudzoka seiko nhasi?”" 
Exodus2:19 Vakati, “MuIjipiti akatirwira pamaoko avafudzi, akaticherera mvura, akanwisa makwai.”" 
Exodus2:20 Akati kuvakunda vake, “Zvino aripiko? Munhu uyu mamusiyirei? Mudanei, adye zvokudya.”" 
Exodus2:21 Mosesi akatenda kugara nomunhu uyo; akapa Mosesi mukunda wake Zipora. 
Exodus2:22 Akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Geshomi, nokuti akati, “Ndakanga ndiri mutorwa munyika yavamwe.”" 
Exodus2:23 Zvino mazuva mazhinji akati apfuura, mambo weIjipiti akafa, vana VaIsiraeri vakagomera nokuda kwouranda hwavo, vakadanidzira, kudanidzira kwavo kukasvika kuna Mwari nokuda kwouranda." 
Exodus2:24 Mwari akanzwa kugomba kwavo, Mwari akarangarira sungano yake naAbhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho." 
Exodus2:25 Mwari akaona vana VaIsiraeri, Mwari akavarangarira." 
Exodus3:1 Zvino Mosesi akanga achifudza makwai aJeturo, mukarabwe wake, mupristi weMidhiani; akaisa makwai mberi murenje, akasvika kugomo raMwari rinonzi Horebi." 
Exodus3:2 Ipapo mutumwa waJehovha akazviratidza kwaari mumurazvo womoto pakati pegwenzi; akatarira, akaona gwenzi richipfuta nomoto, asi rakanga risingatsvi." 
Exodus3:3 Mosesi akati, “Regai, nditsaukire ndione chishamiso icho chikuru, kuti gwenzi haritsvi neiko.”" 
Exodus3:4 Zvino Jehovha akati achiona kuti wotsaukira kuti aone, Mwari akadana ari mukati megwenzi, akati, “Mosesi, Mosesi!” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano hangu.”" 
Exodus3:5 Akati, “Usaswedera pano; bvisa shangu dzako patsoka dzako, nokuti paumire patsvene.”" 
Exodus3:6 Akatiwo, “Ndini Mwari wababa vako, naMwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaka, naMwari waJakobho.” Mosesi akavanza chiso chake, nokuti akatya kutarira Mwari." 
Exodus3:7 Zvino Mwari akati, “Zvirokwazvo, ndakaona kunetswa kwavanhu vangu vari muIjipiti, ndikanzwa kudanidzira kwavo nokuda kwavatariri vavo vamabasa; nokuti ndinoziva kuchema kwavo;" 
Exodus3:8 ndaburuka kuti ndivarwire mumaoko avaIjipiti nokuvabudisa munyika iyoyo, ndindovaisa kunyika yakanaka huru, kunyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi; uko kunogara VaKenani, naVaHeti, naVaAmori, naVaPerezi, naVaHivhi, naVaJebhusi." 
Exodus3:9 Zvino tarira, kuchema kwavana VaIsiraeri kwasvika kwandiri, ndaona kutambudzwa kwavanotambudzwa nako naVaIjipiti." 
Exodus3:10 Naizvozvo zvino uya ndikutume kuna Farao, kuti undobudisa vanhu vangu, vana VaIsiraeri muIjipiti.”" 
Exodus3:11 Zvino Mosesi akati kuna Mwari, “Ini ndini aniko, kuti ndiende kuna Farao, ndibudise vana VaIsiraeri muIjipiti here?”" 
Exodus3:12 Akati, “Zvirokwazvo ndichava newe; hechi chiratidzo chokuti ndakutuma: Kana mabudisa vanhu vangu muIjipiti, muchanamata Mwari pagomo rino.”" 
Exodus3:13 Ipapo Mosesi akati kuna Mwari, “Tarirai, kana ndikasvika kuvana VaIsiraeri, ndikati kwavari, ‘Mwari wamadzibaba enyu akandituma kwamuri,’ ivo vakati kwandiri, ‘Ko zita rake ndiani?’ Ndichatiyi kwavari?”" 
Exodus3:14 Mwari akati kuna Mosesi, “NDICHAVA IYE WANDICHAVA.” Akati, “Unoti kuvana VaIsiraeri, ‘NDICHAVA ndiye akandituma kwamuri.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Mwari akatiwo kuna Mosesi, “Unoti kuvana VaIsiraeri, Jehovha, Mwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaka, naMwari waJakobho, akandituma kwamuri; ndiro zita rangu nokusingaperi, ndiro zita ravachandirangarira naro kusvikira kumarudzi ose." 
Exodus3:16 Enda, undounganidza vakuru VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu, Mwari waAbhurahamu, nowaIsaka, nowaJakobho, akazviratidza kwandiri,’ akati, ‘Ndakakushanyirai zvirokwazvo, ndikaona izvo zvamakaitirwa Ijipiti;’" 
Exodus3:17 ndikati, ‘Ndichakubudisai pakunetswa kwenyu muIjipiti, ndimuise kunyika yaVaKenani, neyaVaHeti, neyaVaAmori, neyaVaPerezi, neyaVaHivhi, neyaVaJebhusi, kunyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi.’" 
Exodus3:18 Vachateerera izwi rako; uende, iwe navakuru VaIsiraeri, kuna mambo weIjipiti, muti kwaari, ‘Jehovha, Mwari waVaHebheru, akasangana nesu; zvino titendere kuenda rwendo rwamazuva matatu murenje, tindobayira Jehovha, Mwari wedu.’" 
Exodus3:19 Ndinoziva kuti mambo weIjipiti haangakutendereyi kuenda, kwete, kunyangwe noruoko rune simba." 
Exodus3:20 Ndichatambanudza ruoko rwangu, ndirove Ijipiti nezvishamiso zvangu zvose, zvandichaitamo; pashure achakutenderai kuenda." 
Exodus3:21 Ndichapa vanhu ava nyasha pamberi paVaIjipiti, kuti kana muchizoenda, murege kuenda musina chinhu." 
Exodus3:22 Asi mukadzi mumwe nomumwe anofanira kukumbira kune waanogara naye, nokumutorwa anogara mumba make, zvishongo zvesirivha nozvendarama, nenguo, kuti mufukidze vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu; munofanira kutorera VaIjipiti nhumbi dzavo.”" 
Exodus4:1 Zvino Mosesi akapindura akati, “Asi tarirai, havanganditendi, kana kuteerera izwi rangu, nokuti vachati, ‘Jehovha haana kuzviratidza kwauri.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 Jehovha akati kwaari, “Chiiko icho chiri muruoko rwako?” Akati, “Itsvimbo.”" 
Exodus4:3 Akati, “Ikandire pasi.” Akaikandira pasi, ikashanduka kuva nyoka, Mosesi akaitiza." 
Exodus4:4 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tambanudza ruoko rwako, uibate parumhinda; (iye akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akaibata, ikashanduka kuva tsvimbo muruoko rwake);" 
Exodus4:5 kuti vatende kuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba avo, Mwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaka, naMwari waJakobho, akazviratidza kwauri.”" 
Exodus4:6 Jehovha akatiwo kwaari, “Isa ruoko rwako muchipfuva chako.” Akaisa ruoko rwake muchipfuva chake; zvino akati achirubvisa, onei ruoko rwake rwava namaperembudzi rwati mbembe sechando." 
Exodus4:7 Akati, “Isa ruoko rwako muchipfuva chakozve. (Iye akaisa ruoko rwake muchipfuva chakezve; zvino akati achirubvisa muchipfuva chake, onei rwashandukazve senyama yake.)" 
Exodus4:8 Zvino kana vachiramba kukutenda, kana kuteerera izwi rechiratidzo chokutanga, vachatenda izwi rechiratidzo chechipiri." 
Exodus4:9 Zvino kana vachiramba kutenda zviratidzo izvo zviviri, kana kutenda izwi rako, uchere mvura yomurwizi, uidururire pakaoma, ipapo mvura yawachera ichashanduka ropa ipapo pakaoma.”" 
Exodus4:10 Zvino Mosesi akati kuna Jehovha, “Haiwa, Jehovha, handizi munhu anogona kutaura zvakanaka, kunyangwe zuro, kana zuro riya, kana kubva panguva yamakataura nomuranda wenyu; nokuti ndiri munhu anomuromo usingagoni norurimi rusingagoni.”" 
Exodus4:11 Jehovha akati kwaari, “Ndianiko akaita muromo womunhu, ndianiko anoita mbeveve kana matsi, kana anoona, kana bofu? Ko handizi Jehovha here?" 
Exodus4:12 Naizvozvo zvino chienda, ini ndichava muromo wako, ndikudzidzise zvaunofanira kutaura.”" 
Exodus4:13 Iye akati, “Haiwa, Ishe, tumai henyu wamunoda kutuma naye.”" 
Exodus4:14 Zvino kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira Mosesi, akati, “Ko Aroni, mukoma wako, muRevhi, haapo here? Ndinoziva kuti iye anogona kutaura kwazvo. Zvino tarira, wotobuda kusangana newe; kana achikuona achafara mumwoyo make." 
Exodus4:15 Utaure naye, ugoisa mashoko mumuromo make; ini ndichava nomuromo wako, uye nomuromo wake, ndikudzidzisei zvamunofanira kuita." 
Exodus4:16 “Iye achataura navanhu panzvimbo yako, agova muromo wako, iwe uchava saMwari kwaari." 
Exodus4:17 Zvino tora tsvimbo iyi muruoko rwako, ugoita zviratidzo nayo.”" 
Exodus4:18 Zvino Mosesi akaenda, akadzokera kuna Jeturo, mukarabwe wake, akati kwaari, “Donditenderai henyu kuenda, ndidzokere kuhama dzangu Ijipiti, ndindoona kana vachiri vapenyu.” Jeturo akati kuna Mosesi, “Enda hako norugare.”" 
Exodus4:19 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi paMidhiani, “Enda, udzokere Ijipiti, nokuti vanhu vose vaitsvaka kukuuraya vakafa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Ipapo Mosesi akatora mukadzi wake navana vake vavakomana, akavatasvisa pambongoro, akadzokera kunyika yeIjipiti; Mosesi akatora tsvimbo yaMwari muruoko rwake." 
Exodus4:21 Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Kana wodzokera Ijipiti, chenjera kuti uite pamberi paFarao zvishamiso zvose zvandaisa muruoko rwako; asi ndichaomesa mwoyo wake, kuti arege kutendera vanhu kuenda." 
Exodus4:22 Zvino unoti kuna Farao, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Isiraeri, mwanakomana wangu, idangwe rangu’;" 
Exodus4:23 ndakati kwauri, ‘Tendera mwanakomana wangu kuenda andinamate’; iwe ukaramba kumutendera; zvino tarira ndichauraya mwanakomana wako wedangwe.”" 
Exodus4:24 Zvino vachiri panzira, pavakanga vavata, Jehovha akasangana naye, akatsvaka kumuuraya." 
Exodus4:25 Ipapo Zipora akatora ibwe rinopinza, akacheka rukanda rwapamberi rwomwanakomana wake, akarukanda patsoka dzake akati, “Zvirokwazvo, kwandiri uri murume weropa.”" 
Exodus4:26 Naizvozvo akamurega. Ipapo akati, “Uri murume weropa nokuda kwokudzingiswa.”" 
Exodus4:27 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Aroni, “Enda kurenje unosangana naMosesi.” Iye akaenda, akandosangana naye pagomo raMwari, akamutsvoda." 
Exodus4:28 Ipapo Mosesi akaudza Aroni mashoko ose aJehovha, aakanga amutuma nawo, nezviratidzo zvose zvaakanga amuraira." 
Exodus4:29 Mosesi naAroni vakaenda, vakaunganidza vakuru vose vavana VaIsiraeri." 
Exodus4:30 Aroni akataura mashoko ose akataurwa naJehovha kuna Mosesi, akaita zviratidzo pamberi pameso avanhu." 
Exodus4:31 Vanhu vakatenda; zvino vakati vanzwa kuti Jehovha washanyira vana VaIsiraeri, akaona kunetswa kwavo, vakakotamisa misoro yavo, vakanamata Jehovha." 
Exodus5:1 Shure kwaizvozvo Mosesi naAroni vakaenda, vakati kuna Farao, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda, kuti vandiitire mutambo murenje.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Farao akati, “Jehovha ndiye aniko, kuti nditeerere izwi rake, kuti nditendere VaIsiraeri kuenda? Handimuzivi iye Jehovha, neni handingatenderi VaIsiraeri kuenda.”" 
Exodus5:3 Vakati, “Mwari waVaHebheru akasangana nesu; dotitenderai kuenda rwendo rwamazuva matatu murenje, tindobayira Jehovha Mwari wedu; kuti arege kutirova nedenda kana nomunondo.”" 
Exodus5:4 Ipapo mambo weIjipiti akati kwavari, “Imi Mosesi naAroni, munotsautsireiko vanhu pamabasa avo? Endai kumabasa enyu.”" 
Exodus5:5 Farao akati, “Tarirai, vanhu venyika ino vatova vazhinji, zvino imi moda kuvazorodza pakuita mabasa avo akaomarara.”" 
Exodus5:6 Nomusi iwoyo Farao akaraira varairi vamabasa avanhu, navatariri vavo, akati," 
Exodus5:7 “Musaramba muchipa vanhu uswa hwokuita zvitina nahwo, sezvamakaita kusvikira zvino; ngavaende vanozviunganidzira uswa vega." 
Exodus5:8 Asi zvitina zvavakaita kusvikira zvino, muvatarire izvozvo; musazvitapudza, nokuti havana chavanobata, saka vanodana, vachiti, ‘Titenderei tindobayira Mwari wedu.’" 
Exodus5:9 Varume ngavawedzerwe basa rinorema, varemerwa naro; kuti varege kurangarira mashoko enhema.”" 
Exodus5:10 Ipapo varairi vamabasa avanhu navatariri vavo vakabuda, vakataura navanhu, vakati, “Zvanzi naFarao, ‘Handichakupiyi uswa." 
Exodus5:11 Endai mega munozvitorera uswa pamungauwana, nokuti basa renyu haritapudzwi.’ ”" 
Exodus5:12 Zvino vanhu vakapararira kunyika yose yeIjipiti kuzounganidza mashanga panzvimbo youswa. 
Exodus5:13 Varairi vamabasa vakavakurudzira, vachiti, “Pedzai basa renyu, mabasa amaifanira kuita mazuva ose muchino uswa.”" 
Exodus5:14 Navatariri vavana VaIsiraeri, vakanga vaiswa pamusoro pavo navarairi vaFarao, vaisirohwa, zvichinzi, “Makaregerei kupedza basa renyu razuro neranhasi muchiita zvitina sezvamakaita kusvikira zvino?”" 
Exodus5:15 Zvino vatariri vavana VaIsiraeri vakauya vachichema kuna Farao, vachiti, “Munoitireiko kudaro navaranda venyu?" 
Exodus5:16 Varanda venyu havapiwi uswa, asi vanoti kwatiri, ‘Itai zvitina’; tarirai varanda venyu vanorohwa, asi mhaka iri kuvanhu venyu.”" 
Exodus5:17 Asi iye akati, “Hamuna chamunobata, hamuna chamunobata, saka munoti, ‘Titenderei kunobayira Jehovha.’" 
Exodus5:18 Naizvozvo endai zvino, mubate, nokuti hamuchapiwi uswa, asi munofanira kupedza zvitina zvakatarwa.”" 
Exodus5:19 Zvino vatariri vavana VaIsiraeri vakaona kuti vari panjodzi, zvazvakanzi, “Hamungatapudzi pazvitina zvenyu, zvamunofanira kuita mazuva ose.”" 
Exodus5:20 Vakasangana naMosesi naAroni, vakanga vamire panzira pakubuda kwavo pamberi paFarao;" 
Exodus5:21 vakati kwavari, “Jehovha ngaakutarirei akutongei, nokuti matinyadzisa pamberi paFarao navaranda vake, mukaisa munondo muruoko rwavo wokutiuraya nawo.”" 
Exodus5:22 Ipapo Mosesi akadzokera kuna Jehovha, akati, “Ishe, maitireiko vanhu ava zvakaipa? Manditumireiko?" 
Exodus5:23 Nokuti kubva panguva yandakaenda nayo kuna Farao kunotaura nezita renyu, iye akaitira vanhu ava zvakaipa; hamuna kutongorwira vanhu venyu.”" 
Exodus6:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Zvino muchaona zvandichaitira Farao, nokuti achavatendera kuenda noruoko rune simba, uchavadzinga munyika yake noruoko rune simba.”" 
Exodus6:2 Mwari akataurawo naMosesi, akati kwaari, “Ndini JEHOVHA." 
Exodus6:3 Ndakazviratidza kuna Abhurahamu, nokuna Isaka, nokuna Jakobho, ndiri Mwari waMasimbaose, asi ndakanga ndisingazikanwi navo nezita rangu rinonzi JEHOVHA." 
Exodus6:4 Zvino ndakasimbisa sungano yangu navo kuti ndivape nyika yeKenani, nyika youtorwa hwavo, mavakanga vari vatorwa." 
Exodus6:5 Ndakanzwa kugomera kwavana VaIsiraeri vakasungwa naVaIjipiti pauranda, ndikarangarira sungano yangu." 
Exodus6:6 Naizvozvo muti kuvana VaIsiraeri, ‘Ndini Jehovha, ini ndichakubudisai pamitoro yaVaIjipiti, ndichakusunungurai pauranda hwenyu, ndichakudzikinurai noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, uye nokutonga kukuru.’" 
Exodus6:7 Ndichakutorai imi kuti muve vanhu vangu, ini ndichava Mwari wenyu, iye anokubudisai pamitoro yaVaIjipiti." 
Exodus6:8 Ndichakuisai kunyika yandakasimudzira ruoko rwangu kuti ndiipe Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho, ndichakupai iyo ive nhaka yenyu; ndini Jehovha.”" 
Exodus6:9 Mosesi akataura saizvozvo kuvana VaIsiraeri, asi havana kuteerera Mosesi nokuda kweshungu dzomweya nedzouranda hwakanga uchirema." 
Exodus6:10 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Exodus6:11 “Pinda, unotaura naFarao mambo weIjipiti, kuti atendere vana VaIsiraeri kubuda munyika yake.”" 
Exodus6:12 Mosesi akataura pamberi paJehovha, akati, “Tarirai, vana VaIsiraeri havana kunditeerera; zvino Farao anganditeerera seiko, ini munhu ane miromo isina kudzingiswa?”" 
Exodus6:13 Ipapo Jehovha akataura naMosesi naAroni, akavatuma neshoko kuvana VaIsiraeri nokuna Farao, mambo weIjipiti, kuti vabudise vana VaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus6:14 Ndiyo misoro yedzimba dzamadzibaba avo: Vanakomana vaRubheni, dangwe raIsiraeri, vaiva Hanoki, naParu, naHezironi, naKarimi; ndivo vedzimba dzaRubheni." 
Exodus6:15 Vanakomana vaSimioni vaiva Jemueri, naJamini, naOhadhi, naJakini, naZohari, naShauri, mwanakomana womukadzi muKenani; ndivo vedzimba dzaSimioni." 
Exodus6:16 Ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaRevhi namarudzi avo: Gerishoni, naKohati, naMerari; makore oupenyu hwaRevhi aiva makore ane zana namakumi matanhatu namanomwe." 
Exodus6:17 Vanakomana vaGerishoni vaiva Ribhini, naShimei, namarudzi avo." 
Exodus6:18 Vanakomana vaKohati vaiva Amurami, naIzhari, naHebhuroni, naUzieri; makore oupenyu hwaKohati aiva makore ane zana namakumi matatu namatatu." 
Exodus6:19 Vanakomana vaMerari vaiva Makiri, naMushi. Ndivo vedzimba dzavaRevhi pamarudzi avo." 
Exodus6:20 Amurami akawana Jokebhedhi, hanzvadzi yababa vake, iye akamuberekera Aroni naMosesi; makore oupenyu hwaAmurami aiva makore ane zana namakumi matatu namanomwe." 
Exodus6:21 Vanakomana vaIzhari vaiva Kora naNefegi, naZikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Vanakomana vaUzieri vaiva Mishaeri, naErizafani, naSitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Aroni akawana Erishebha, mukunda waAminadhabhu, hanzvadzi yaNashoni, iye akamuberekera Nadhabhi naAbhihu, naEriazari, naItamari." 
Exodus6:24 Vanakomana vaKora vaiva Asiri, naErikana, naAbhiasafi; ndivo vedzimba dzavaKora." 
Exodus6:25 Eriazari, mwanakomana waAroni, akawana mumwe wavakunda vaPutieri, iye akamuberekera Finiasi. Ndiyo misoro yedzimba dzamadzibaba avaRevhi nemhuri dzavo." 
Exodus6:26 Ndivo vaya vanaAroni naMosesi vakanzi naJehovha, “Budisai vana VaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti nehondo dzavo.”" 
Exodus6:27 Ndivo vakataura naFarao, mambo weIjipiti, kuti vabudise vana VaIsiraeri muIjipiti; ndivo vaya vanaMosesi naAroni." 
Exodus6:28 Nomusi iwoyo Jehovha akataura naMosesi munyika yeIjipiti," 
Exodus6:29 Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati, “Ndini Jehovha; udza Farao, mambo weIjipiti, zvinhu zvose zvandakakuudza.”" 
Exodus6:30 Ipapo Mosesi akati pamberi paJehovha, “Tarirai, ndiri munhu ane miromo isina kudzingiswa, zvino Farao achanditeerera seiko?”" 
Exodus7:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tarira, ndakuita saMwari kuna Farao; Aroni, mukoma wako, achava muporofita wako." 
Exodus7:2 Taura zvose zvandinokuraira; Aroni, mukoma wako, achataura naFarao, kuti atendere vana VaIsiraeri, vabude munyika yake." 
Exodus7:3 Ini ndichaomesa mwoyo waFarao, ndichawanza zviratidzo zvangu nezvishamiso zvangu panyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus7:4 Asi Farao haangakuteerereyi; ipapo ndichaisa ruoko rwangu pamusoro peIjipiti, ndikabudisa hondo dzangu, ivo vanhu vangu, vana VaIsiraeri, munyika yeIjipiti nokutonga kukuru." 
Exodus7:5 VaIjipiti vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichitambanudza ruoko rwangu pamusoro peIjipiti, ndichibvisa vana VaIsiraeri pakati pavo.”" 
Exodus7:6 Mosesi naAroni vakaita saizvozvo; sezvavakanga varairwa naJehovha, vakaita saizvozvo." 
Exodus7:7 Mosesi akanga ana makore makumi masere, naAroni makore makumi masere namatatu, panguva yavakataura naFarao." 
Exodus7:8 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi naAroni, akati," 
Exodus7:9 “Kana Farao achitaura nemi, akati, ‘Tiratidzei chinoshamisa,’ uti kuna Aroni, ‘Tora tsvimbo yako, uikandire pasi pamberi paFarao, ishanduke kuita nyoka.’ ”" 
Exodus7:10 Mosesi naAroni vakapinda kuna Farao, vakaita sezvavakarairwa naJehovha, Aroni akakandira tsvimbo pasi pamberi paFarao napamberi pavaranda vake, ikashanduka kuita nyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Ipapo Farao akadanawo vakachenjera navaroyi; naivowo, idzo n'anga dzeIjipiti, vakaita saizvozvo nouroyi hwavo." 
Exodus7:12 Nokuti mumwe nomuwe akakandira pasi tsvimbo yake, dzikashanduka nyoka; asi tsvimbo yaAroni yakamedza tsvimbo dzavo." 
Exodus7:13 Zvino mwoyo waFarao ukawomeswa, akasavateerera; sezvakarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus7:14 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Mwoyo waFarao mukukutu, haadi kutendera vanhu kuenda." 
Exodus7:15 Enda kuna Farao mangwanani; tarira, achabuda achienda kumvura, iwe undomira pamhenderekedzo dzorwizi kuti usangane naye, wakabata muruoko rwako tsvimbo iya yakashanduka kuva nyoka." 
Exodus7:16 Ugoti kwaari, ‘Jehovha, Mwari waVaHebheru, akandituma kwauri,’ achiti, ‘Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate murenje; zvino tarira, kusvikira zvino hauna kunditeerera.’" 
Exodus7:17 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Uchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha nechinhu ichi: Tarira ndicharova mvura iri murwizi netsvimbo iri muruoko rwangu, ikashanduka kuva ropa.’" 
Exodus7:18 Hove dziri murwizi dzichafa, rwizi ruchanhuwa; VaIjipiti vachanetswa nokutsvaka kunwa mvura yorwizi.”" 
Exodus7:19 Jehovha akatiwo kuna Mosesi, “Uti kuna Aroni, ‘Tora tsvimbo yako, utambanudzire ruoko rwako pamusoro pemvura yaVaIjipiti, pamusoro penzizi dzavo, napamusoro pehova dzavo, napamusoro pamadziva avo, napamusoro pamakungwa avo ose,’ zvishanduke kuva ropa; rivepo panyika yose yeIjipiti, mumidziyo yamatanda nemidziyo yamabwe.”" 
Exodus7:20 Mosesi naAroni vakaita sezvavakarairwa naJehovha, vakasimudza tsvimbo, vakarova mvura yakanga iri murwizi pamberi paFarao napamberi pavaranda vake, mvura yose yomurwizi ikashanduka kuita ropa." 
Exodus7:21 Hove dzomurwizi dzikafa, rwizi rukanhuwa, vaIjipiti vakasagona kunwa mvura yorwizi; ropa rikavapo panyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Exodus7:22 N'anga dzeIjipiti dzikaitawo saizvozvo nouroyi hwadzo; asi mwoyo waFarao wakaomeswa, akasavateerera, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus7:23 Ipapo Farao akadzoka, akapinda mumba make; haana kurangarira nechinhu ichiwo." 
Exodus7:24 VaIjipiti vose vakachera nhivi dzorwizi vachitsvaka mvura yokunwa; nokuti vakanga vasingagoni kunwa mvura yorwizi. 
Exodus7:25 Mazuva manomwe akapera kubva pakurohwa kwerwizi naJehovha. 
Exodus8:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Pinda kuna Farao, uti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandondinamata.’" 
Exodus8:2 Kana ukaramba kuvatendera, tarira, ndicharova nyika yako yose namatatya;" 
Exodus8:3 rwizi ruchazara kwazvo namatatya; achakwira, achipinda mumba mako, nomuimba yako yokuvata, napanhoo dzako, nomudzimba dzavaranda vako, napamusoro pavanhu vako, nomuzvoto zvako, nomumidziyo yako mamunokanyira zvokudya;" 
Exodus8:4 matatya achakwira pamusoro pako napamusoro pavanhu vako, napamusoro pavaranda vako vose.”" 
Exodus8:5 Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Iti kuna Aroni, ‘Tambanudzira ruoko rwako rwakabata tsvimbo yako pamusoro penzizi, napamusoro pehova, napamusoro pamadziva, uraire matatya kuti akwire panyika yeIjipiti.’ ”" 
Exodus8:6 Ipapo Aroni akatambanudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pemvura yeIjipiti, matatya akakwira, akafukidza nyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus8:7 N'anga dzikaita saizvozvo nouroyi hwadzo dzikaraira matatya kuti akwire panyika yeIjipiti. 
Exodus8:8 Zvino Farao akadana Mosesi naAroni, akati, “Nyengeterai kuna Jehovha kuti abvise matatya kwandiri nokuvanhu vangu, nditendere vanhu kuenda kundobayira Jehovha.”" 
Exodus8:9 Mosesi akati kuna Farao, “Imi mukudzwe kupfuura ini! Ndokunyengetererai nguva ipi, imi navaranda venyu, navanhu venyu, kuti matatya aparadzwe kwamuri, nomudzimba dzenyu, asare murwizi bedzi?”" 
Exodus8:10 Iye akati, “Mangwana.” Akati, “Zvichaitwa sezvamareva; kuti muzive kuti hakuna mumwe akafanana naJehovha, Mwari wedu." 
Exodus8:11 Matatya achabva kwamuri, nomudzimba dzenyu, nokuvaranda venyu, nokuvanhu venyu; achasara murwizi bedzi.”" 
Exodus8:12 Mosesi naAroni vakabuda muna Farao, Mosesi akadana kuna Jehovha nokuda kwamatatya aakanga atuma kuna Farao." 
Exodus8:13 Jehovha akaita sezvakanga zvarehwa naMosesi, matatya akafa mudzimba nomuzvivanze nokuruwa." 
Exodus8:14 Vakaaunganidza, vakaaita mirwi, nyika ikanhuwa." 
Exodus8:15 Zvino Farao akati achiona kuti zvava zviri nani, akaomesa mwoyo wake, akasavateerera; sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus8:16 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Iti kuna Aroni, ‘Tambanudza tsvimbo yako, urove guruva rapasi, rishanduke utunga panyika yeIjipiti.’ ”" 
Exodus8:17 Vakaita saizvozvo; Aroni akatambanudza ruoko rwake rwakabata tsvimbo yake, akarova guruva rapasi, utunga ukavapo pavanhu napazvipfuwo; guruva rose rapasi rikashanduka utunga panyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Exodus8:18 N'anga dzikaita saizvozvo nouroyi hwadzo kuti dzibudise utunga, asi hadzina kugona; utunga hwakanga huri pavanhu napazvipfuwo." 
Exodus8:19 Zvino n'anga dzakati kuna Farao, “Munwe waMwari”; asi mwoyo waFarao wakaomeswa, akasavateerera, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus8:20 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Fumira mangwanani, undomira pamberi paFarao; tarira, achabuda achienda kumvura, uti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate.’" 
Exodus8:21 Nokuti kana ukaramba kutendera vanhu vangu, tarira ndichatuma bute renhunzi pamusoro pako, napamusoro pavaranda vako, napamusoro pavanhu vako, nomudzimba dzako; dzimba dzaVaIjipiti dzichazara namapute enhunzi, kunyangwe nevhu padzimire." 
Exodus8:22 Nomusi iwoyo ndichatsaura nyika yeGosheni pagere vanhu vangu, kuti ipapo mapute enhunzi arege kuvapo; kuti uzive kuti ndini Jehovha pakati penyika dzose." 
Exodus8:23 Ndichaparadzanisa vanhu vangu navanhu vako; chiratidzo ichi chichavapo mangwana.” 
Exodus8:24 Zvino Jehovha akaita saizvozvo, mapute makuru–kuru enhunzi akapinda mumba maFarao, nomudzimba dzavaranda vake, nomunyika yose yeIjipiti; nyika ikaodzwa namapute enhunzi." 
Exodus8:25 Zvino Farao akadana Mosesi naAroni, akati, “Endai, mundobayira Mwari wenyu munyika ino.”" 
Exodus8:26 Mosesi akati, “Hazvina kunaka kuita saizvozvo, nokuti tichabayira Jehovha, Mwari wedu, zvibairo zvinonyangadza vaIjipiti; tarirai, kana tikabayira zvinonyangadza vaIjipiti havangatitaki namabwe here?" 
Exodus8:27 Tichaenda rwendo rwamazuva matatu murenje, tigobayira Jehovha Mwari wedu sezvaanotiraira.”" 
Exodus8:28 Farao akati, “Ndichakutenderai kuenda mundobayira Jehovha Mwari wenyu murenje, asi musaenda kure–kure. Ndinyengetererei.”" 
Exodus8:29 Mosesi akati, “Tarirai, ndinobuda kwamuri, ndichandonyengetera kuna Jehovha kuti mapute enhunzi abve kuna Farao, nokuvaranda vake, nokuvanhu vake mangwana; asi Farao ngaarege kuzonyengerazve, achiramba kutendera vanhu kuenda kundobayira Jehovha.”" 
Exodus8:30 Ipapo Mosesi akabuda kuna Farao, akandonyengetera kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus8:31 Jehovha akaita sezvakakumbira Mosesi, akabvisa mapute enhunzi kuna Farao, nokuvaranda vake, nokuvanhu vake; haana kusara kunyangwe neimwe." 
Exodus8:32 Asi Farao akaomesa mwoyo wake nenguva iyowo, akasatendera vanhu kuenda." 
Exodus9:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Pinda kuna Farao, undomuudza, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waVaHebheru: Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate.’" 
Exodus9:2 Nokuti kana ukaramba kuvatendera, ukaramba uchivadzivisa," 
Exodus9:3 tarira, ruoko rwaJehovha ruchava pamusoro pezvipfuwo zvako zviri kusango, napamusoro pamabhiza, napamusoro pembongoro, napamusoro pamangamera, napamusoro pemombe, napamusoro pezvipfuwo zviduku; chirwere chakaipa kwazvo chichavapo." 
Exodus9:4 Jehovha acharaura zvipfuwo zvaVaIsiraeri pazvipfuwo zvaVaIjipiti; hapana chimwe chingafa pazvipfuwo zvose zvaVaIsiraeri.” 
Exodus9:5 Zvino Jehovha akatara nguva akati, “Mangwana Jehovha achaita chinhu ichi munyika ino.”" 
Exodus9:6 Fume mangwana Jehovha akaita chinhu ichocho, zvipfuwo zvose zveIjipiti zvikafa; asi pazvipfuwo zvavana VaIsiraeri hapana zvakafa, kunyangwe nechimwechete." 
Exodus9:7 Farao akatuma vanhu, vakawana kuti pazvipfuwo zvaVaIsiraeri hapana zvakafa, kunyangwe nechimwechete. Asi mwoyo waFarao wakava mukukutu, akasatendera vanhu kuenda." 
Exodus9:8 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi naAroni, “Torai tsama dzamadota echoto, Mosesi aakushire kudenga pamberi paFarao." 
Exodus9:9 Achashanduka guruva rakatsetseka panyika yose yeIjipiti, achiita mamota anoputika semhoni pavanhu napazvipfuwo zvose zveIjipiti.”" 
Exodus9:10 Ivo vakatora madota echoto, vakamira pamberi paFarao, Mosesi akaakushira kudenga, akaita mamota anoputika semhoni pavanhu napazvipfuwo." 
Exodus9:11 Zvino n'anga dzakanga dzisingagoni kumira pamberi paMosesi nokuda kwamamota, nokuti mamota akanga ari pan'anga napaVaIjipiti vose." 
Exodus9:12 Asi Jehovha akaomesa mwoyo waFarao, akasavateerera, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha kuna Mosesi." 
Exodus9:13 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Fumira mangwanani, unomira pamberi paFarao, uti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waVaHebheru: Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate.’" 
Exodus9:14 Nokuti nenguva ino ndichatuma matambudziko angu ose pamusoro pomwoyo wako, napamusoro pavaranda vako, napamusoro pavanhu vako, uzive kuti hapana akafanana neni panyika dzose." 
Exodus9:15 Nokuti dai ndisakadaro, ndingadai ndaitambanudza ruoko rwangu, ndikakurova iwe navanhu vako nechirwere chakaipa, ukaparadzwa chose panyika;" 
Exodus9:16 asi zvirokwazvo ndakakuraramisa nokuda kwaizvozvo, kuti ndikuratidze simba rangu, uye kuti zita rangu rikurumbire kunyika dzose." 
Exodus9:17 Zvino ucharamba uchingozvikudza uchirwa navanhu vangu, usingadi kuvatendera kuenda here?" 
Exodus9:18 Tarira, mangwana, nenguva yakaita seino, ndichanaisa chimvuramabwe chakaipa kwazvo, chisina kumbovapo paIjipiti kubva pakuvambwa kwayo kusvikira zvino." 
Exodus9:19 Naizvozvo zvino tuma vanhu, uunganidze zvipfuwo zvako nezvose zvaunazvo kusango, nokuti vanhu vose nezvipfuwo zvose zvinowanikwa kusango, zvisina kuiswa mudzimba, zvicharohwa nechimvuramabwe zvikafa.”" 
Exodus9:20 Zvino vakatya shoko raJehovha pakati pavaranda vaFarao vakaraira kuti varanda vavo nezvipfuwo zvavo zvitizire mudzimba. 
Exodus9:21 Asi vakanga vasingateereri shoko raJehovha, vakarega varanda vavo nezvipfuwo zvavo kusango." 
Exodus9:22 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tambanudzira ruoko rwako kudenga, chimvuramabwe chivepo panyika yose yeIjipiti, pamusoro pavanhu, napamusoro pezvipfuwo, napamusoro pemiriwo yose yeminda panyika yose yeIjipiti.”" 
Exodus9:23 Mosesi akatambanudzira tsvimbo yake kudenga, Jehovha akatuma kutinhira nechimvuramabwe, moto wemheni ukarova pasi. Jehovha akanaisa chimvuramabwe panyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus9:24 Chimvuramabwe chikavapo, nomoto wakavengana nechimvuramabwe, chikanyanya kwazvo, chisina kumbovapo panyika yose yeIjipiti, kubva pakutanga kworudzi ipapo." 
Exodus9:25 Chimvuramabwe chikarova zvose zvakanga zviri kusango, vanhu nezvipfuwo, panyika yose yeIjipiti; chimvuramabwe chikarova miriwo yose yeminda, chikavhuna miti yose yesango." 
Exodus9:26 Asi munyika yeGosheni bedzi, imo makanga muna vana VaIsiraeri, ndimo makanga musina chimvuramabwe." 
Exodus9:27 Zvino Farao akatuma vanhu kunodana Mosesi naAroni, akati kwavari, “Nguva ino ndatadza; Jehovha akarurama, asi ini navaranda vangu takaipa." 
Exodus9:28 Nyengeterai kuna Jehovha, nokuti kutinhira kukuru kwaMwari nechimvuramabwe zvaringana; ndichakutenderai kuenda, murege kugara.”" 
Exodus9:29 Mosesi akati kwaari, “Kana ndangobuda paguta, ndichatambanudzira maoko angu kuna Jehovha; ipapo kutinhira kuchanyarara, nechimvuramabwe hachizovipo; muchaziva kuti nyika yose ndeyaJehovha." 
Exodus9:30 Asi kana murimi navaranda venyu, ndinoziva kuti hamungatyi Jehovha Mwari.”" 
Exodus9:31 Miti yoruchinda nebhari zvikarohwa, nokuti bhari yakanga yatumbuka, nemiti yoruchinda yakanga yava namaruva." 
Exodus9:32 Asi zviyo zvekoroni nezvesipereti hazvina kurohwa, nokuti zvakanga zvisina kukura." 
Exodus9:33 Zvino Mosesi akabuda muguta pamberi paFarao, akatambanudzira maoko ake kuna Jehovha, kutinhira nechimvuramabwe zvikanyarara, nemvura ikasadururirwa panyika." 
Exodus9:34 Zvino Farao akati aona kuti mvura nechimvuramabwe nokutinhira zvanyarara, akawedzera kutadza, akaomesa mwoyo wake, iye navaranda vake." 
Exodus9:35 Mwoyo waFarao ukaomeswa, akasatendera vana VaIsiraeri kuenda; sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha nomuromo waMosesi." 
Exodus10:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Enda kuna Farao, nokuti ndaomesa mwoyo wake, nemwoyo yavaranda vake, kuti ndiise zviratidzo zvangu izvo pakati pavo;" 
Exodus10:2 kuti iwe ugotaura munzeve dzomwanakomana wako, nedzomwanakomana womwanakomana wako, zvose zvandakaitira Ijipiti, nezviratidzo zvandakaita pakati pavo; muzive kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Exodus10:3 Zvino Mosesi naAroni vakapinda kuna Farao, vakati kwaari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waVaHebheru, ‘Ucharamba kuzvininipisa pamberi pangu kusvikira rinhiko?’ Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate." 
Exodus10:4 Nokuti kana ukaramba kutendera vanhu vangu kuenda, tarira, mangwana ndichauyisa mhashu panyika yenyu;" 
Exodus10:5 dzichafukidza nyika yose, kuti munhu asagona kuona pasi; dzichadya zvakasara zvakapukunyuka, zvamakasiyirwa nechimvuramabwe, dzichadya miti yose inokumererai muminda;"
