Exodus29:9 Uvasunge zviuno zvavo nebhandi, iye Aroni navanakomana vake, ugovaisa nguwani; vave vapristi nomutemo usingaperi; ugadze Aroni navanakomana vake." 
Exodus29:10 “Zvino unofanira kuuyisa nzombe pamberi petende rokusangana, Aroni navanakomana vake vagoisa maoko avo pamusoro wenzombe." 
Exodus29:11 Ugobaya nzombe pamberi paJehovha pamukova wetende rokusangana. 
Exodus29:12 Zvino utore ropa renzombe, ugoriisa panyanga dzeatari nomunwe wako, nokudururira ropa rose mujinga meatari." 
Exodus29:13 Zvino utorewo mafuta ose anofukidza ura, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari padziri, uzvipise pamusoro peatari." 
Exodus29:14 Asi nyama yenzombe, nedehwe rayo, namazvizvi ayo, unofanira kuzvipisa nomoto kunze kwemisasa; chipiriso chezvivi." 
Exodus29:15 “Unofanira kutorawo gondohwe rimwe, Aroni navanakomana vake vagoisa maoko avo pamusoro wegondohwe;" 
Exodus29:16 zvino ubaye gondohwe, utore ropa raro, urisase panhivi dzose dzeatari." 
Exodus29:17 Ipapo uchekanye gondohwe, nokusuka ura hwaro, namakumbo aro, uise izvozvo pamwechete nenhindi dzaro nomusoro waro." 
Exodus29:18 Zvino unofanira kupisa gondohwe rose paatari; chipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha, chipo chinonhuwira, chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha, pamoto." 
Exodus29:19 “Zvino utorewo gondohwe rimwe, Aroni navanakomana vake vaise maoko avo pamusoro wegondohwe." 
Exodus29:20 Ipapo unofanira kubaya gondohwe, nokutora rimwe ropa raro, ugoriisa pamucheto wezasi wenzeve yorudyi yaAroni, napamicheto yenzeve dzorudyi dzavanakomana vake napazvigunwe zvamaoko orudyi, napazvigunwe zvetsoka dzavo dzorudyi, nokusasawo ropa panhivi dzose dzeatari." 
Exodus29:21 Zvino unofanira kutora rimwe ropa, riri paatari, namamwe mafuta okuzodza, uzvisase pamusoro paAroni napanguo dzake, napamusoro pavanakomana vake, napanguo dzavanakomana vake, pamwechete naye, kuti ave mutsvene iye, nenguo dzake, navanakomana vake, nenguo dzavanakomana vake, pamwechete naye." 
Exodus29:22 “Zvino utorewo mamwe mafuta egondohwe, nebemhe raro, namafuta anofukidza ura, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari padziri, nebandauko rorudyi, (nokuti igondohwe rokugadza naro)," 
Exodus29:23 nebundu rimwe rechingwa, nechingwa chimwe chiduku china mafuta, nechingwa chimwe chitete chinobva mudengu rezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa, zviri pamberi paJehovha." 
Exodus29:24 Zvino uzviise zvose pamaoko aAroni napamaoko avanakomana vake, vagozvizunguzira, chive chipo chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha." 
Exodus29:25 Zvino uzvibvise pamaoko avo, uzvipise paatari pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa, kuti chive chipo chinonhuwira pamberi paJehovha; chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha pamoto." 
Exodus29:26 “Utorewo chityu chegondohwe rokugadzwa naro kwaAroni, urizunguzire pamberi paJehovha, kuti chive chipo chinozunguzirwa; ndiwo mugove wako." 
Exodus29:27 Zvino chityu chinozunguzirwa uchitsaure, nebandauko rechipiriso chinosimudzwa, chinozunguzirwa nokusimudzwa, zvegondohwe rokugadza naro, kuti zvive zvaAroni nezvavanakomana vake." 
Exodus29:28 Izvozvo zvinofanira kupiwa Aroni navanakomana vake navana VaIsiraeri nokusingaperi nokuti chipiriso chinosimudzwa, chinobva kuvana VaIsiraeri pazvibairo zvezvipiriso zvavo zvokuyananisa, chive chipiriso chavo chinosimudzirwa Jehovha." 
Exodus29:29 “Nguo dzaAroni dzichava dzavanakomana vake vanomutevera, kuti vazodzwe vakadzifuka, vagadzwe vakadzifuka." 
Exodus29:30 Mwanakomana wake anopinda paupristi panzvimbo yake, unofanira kudzifuka mazuva manomwe, kana achipinda mutende rokusangana kushumira panzvimbo tsvene." 
Exodus29:31 “Zvino unofanira kutora gondohwe rokugadza naro, ubike nyama yaro panzvimbo tsvene." 
Exodus29:32 Aroni navanakomana vake ngavadye nyama yegondohwe, nechingwa chiri mudengu pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Exodus29:33 Vanofanira kudya izvozvo zvaiyananiswa nazvo, pakugadzwa nokutsaurwa kwavo; asi mweni ngaarege kuzvidya, nokuti zvitsvene." 
Exodus29:34 Kana imwe nyama yokugadza nayo ikasara, kana chimwe chingwa, kusvikira mangwana, unofanira kupisa zvasara nomoto; hazvifaniri kudyiwa, nokuti zvitsvene." 
Exodus29:35 “Unofanira kuitira Aroni navanakomana vake saizvozvo, zvose sezvandakuraira; uite mazuva manomwe uchivagadza." 
Exodus29:36 Zuva rimwe nerimwe unofanira kubayira nzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, chokuyananisa nacho; unofanira kunatsa atari, kana uchiiyananisira; uizodze kuti uitsaure." 
Exodus29:37 Unofanira kuita mazuva manomwe pakuyananisira atari, nokuitsaura; kuti atari ive tsvene kwazvo, uye zvose zvinobata paatari zvinofanira kuva zvitsvene." 
Exodus29:38 “Zvino ndizvo zvaunofanira kubayira paatari: Zuva rimwe nerimwe nguva dzose makwayana maviri ane gore rimwechete rekuzvarwa. 
Exodus29:39 Rimwe gwayana unofanira kuribayira mangwanani, rimwe gwayana unofanira kuribayira madekwana." 
Exodus29:40 Pamwechete negwayana rimwe unofanira kuisa chipiriso choupfu hwakatsetseka hwakasvika pachegumi cheefa hwakakanyiwa nechechina chehini yamafuta akavhenganiswa nechechina chehini yewaini, chive chipiriso chinodururwa." 
Exodus29:41 Rimwe gwayana uribayire madekwana, uriitire sezvawakaitira chipiriso choupfu chamangwanani, nezvawakaitira chipiriso charo chinonwiwa, kuti chive chipiriso chinonhuwira, chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha pamoto." 
Exodus29:42 Chinofanira kuva chipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose pamarudzi enyu ose, pamukova wetende rokusangana pamberi paJehovha, pandichasangana nemi, nditaurepo newe." 
Exodus29:43 Ndipo pandichasangana navana VaIsiraeri, uye tende richatsaurwa nokubwinya kwangu." 
Exodus29:44 Tende rokusangana neatari ndichazvitsaura; uye Aroni navanakomana vake ndichavatsaura, kuti vandishumire pabasa roupristi." 
Exodus29:45 Ndichagara pakati pavana VaIsiraeri, kuti ndive Mwari wavo." 
Exodus29:46 Vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha wavo, wakavabudisa panyika yeIjipiti, kuti ndigare pakati pavo; ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo." 
Exodus30:1 “Unofanira kuitawo atari yokupisirapo zvinonhuwira; uiite nomuti womuakeshia. 
Exodus30:2 Kureba kwayo ngakuve kubhiti rimwe, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwe, nhivi dzose dzienzane; kukwirira kwayo ngakuve makubhiti maviri, uye nyanga dzayo ngadzive chinhu chimwechete nayo." 
Exodus30:3 “Unofanira kuifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka, kumusoro kwayo, nokunhivi dzayo dzose, nenyanga dzayo; uiitirewo hata yendarama inoikomberedza." 
Exodus30:4 Uiitirewo zvindori zviviri zvendarama pasi pehata yayo, pakona dzayo mbiri, panhivi dzayo mbiri, pave paingatakurwa namatanda." 
Exodus30:5 Uitewo matanda omuakeshia, nokuafukidza nendarama." 
Exodus30:6 Zvino unofanira kuiisa pamberi peketeni riri paareka yechipupuriro, pamberi pechifunhiro chokuyananisa chiri pamusoro pechipupuriro, pandichasangana newe." 
Exodus30:7 Aroni anofanira kupisa pamusoro payo zvinonhuwira zvemiti yakanaka; ngaazvipise mangwanani ose, kana achigadzira mwenje." 
Exodus30:8 Kana Aroni achitungidza mwenje madekwana, ngaazvipise, zvive zvinonhuwira pamberi paJehovha nokusingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose." 
Exodus30:9 Musapisira pamusoro payo zvinonhuwira zvisina kufanira, kana chipiriso chinopiswa, kana chipiriso choupfu; musadururira pamusoro payo chipiriso chinodururwa." 
Exodus30:10 Aroni anofanira kuyananisa panyanga dzayo kamwechete pagore; anofanira kuyananisa pamusoro payo kamwechete pagore, neropa rechipiriso chezvivi chinoyananisa, kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose; chinhu chitsvene kwazvo kuna Jehovha.”" 
Exodus30:11 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Exodus30:12 “Kana uchiverenga vana VaIsiraeri, kuti uwone kuwanda kwavo, mumwe nomumwe anofanira kupa Jehovha rudzikinuro rwomweya wake, kana uchivaverenga; kuti varege kubatwa nechirwere kana uchivaverenga." 
Exodus30:13 Vanofanira kupa kudai: Mumwe nomumwe unodarika kuna vakaverengwa hafu yeshekeri vachienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene; (chidimbu chapakati cheureu hweshekeri china makumi maviri,) hafu yeshekeri chive chipo kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus30:14 “Mumwe nomumwe unodarika kuna vakaverengwa, wava namakore makumi maviri kana wapfuura makore iwayo, anofanira kupa Jehovha chipo ichocho." 
Exodus30:15 Mupfumi ngaarege kuwedzera, nomurombo ngaarege kutapudza pahafu yeshekeri, kana vopa chipo icho, kuti muyananisire mweya yenyu." 
Exodus30:16 Zvino unofanira kutora mari yokuyananisira kuvana VaIsiraeri, ugoripira basa retende rokusangana; kuti chive chirangaridzo kuvana VaIsiraeri pamberi paJehovha, kuti mweya yenyu iyananisirwe.”" 
Exodus30:17 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Exodus30:18 “Unofanira kuitawo mudziyo wendarira wokushambidzira, nechigadziko chawo chendarira, ugouisa pakati petende rokusangana neatari, nokuisamo mvura." 
Exodus30:19 Kuti Aroni navanakomana vake vashambemo maoko avo netsoka dzavo. 
Exodus30:20 Kana vopinda mutende rokusangana, vanofanira kuzvishambidza nemvura, kuti varege kufa, kana voswedera paatari kuzoshumira, kana kupisira Jehovha chipiriso chinopiswa nomoto." 
Exodus30:21 Vanofanira kushamba maoko avo namakumbo avo, kuti varege kufa; unofanira kuva mutemo usingaperi kwavari, kwaari nokuva vake kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose.”" 
Exodus30:22 Jehovha akataurawo naMosesi akati," 
Exodus30:23 “Torawo miti inonhuwira inokunda imwe, anoti mashekeri ana mazana mashanu emura inoyerera, nehafu yakadaro yesinamoni inonaka, ndiwo mashekeri ana mazana maviri namakumi mashanu, namashekeri ana mazana maviri namakumi mashanu ekaramusi yakanaka;" 
Exodus30:24 namazana mashanu ekasia, vachienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene, nehini imwe yamafuta amaorivhi;" 
Exodus30:25 uite nazvo mafuta matsvene okuzodza nawo, zvive zvinonhuwira zvakavhenganiswa nouchenjeri hwomuvhenganisi wezvinonhuwira; ave mafuta matsvene okuzodza nawo." 
Exodus30:26 “Zvino unofanira kuzodza navo tende rokusangana neareka yechipupuriro," 
Exodus30:27 netafura nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nechigadziko chemwenje nenhumbi dzacho, neatari yezvinonhuwira," 
Exodus30:28 neatari yezvibairo zvinopiswa nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira nechigadziko chawo." 
Exodus30:29 Uzvitsaure, zvive zvinhu zvitsvene kwazvo; zvose zvinozvigunzva zvichava zvitsvenewo." 
Exodus30:30 Unofanira kuzodzawo Aroni navanakomana vake, nokuvaita vatsvene, kuti vandishumire pabasa roupristi." 
Exodus30:31 Uudzewo vana VaIsiraeri, uti, ‘Iwaya anofanira kuva pamberi pangu mafuta matsvene okuzodza nawo kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose.’" 
Exodus30:32 Ngaarege kudirwa panyama yomunhu; uye musaita mamwe akafanana nawo, akaitwa saiwo; matsvene, anofanira kuva chinhu chitsvene kwamuri." 
Exodus30:33 Ani naani unovhenganisa mafuta akafanana nawo, uye ani naani unoisa mamwe awo pamutorwa, ngaabviswe pakati porudzi rwake.”" 
Exodus30:34 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tora miti inonhuwira, inoti: Sitake, neonika, negabhano, miti yakanaka nezvinonhuwira zvakaisvonaka; zvose zvienzane pakurema kwazvo." 
Exodus30:35 Ugoita nazvo zvinonhuwira, zvinonhuwira zvinonaka, zvakavhenganiswa nouchenjeri hwomuvhenganisi wezvinonhuwira, zvakarungwa nomunyu, zvakaisvonaka, zvitsvene." 
Exodus30:36 Unofanira kutswa zvimwe zvazvo kwazvo, ugozviisa pamberi pechipupuriro mutende rokusangana, mandichasangana newe, kuti zvive zvitsvene kwazvo kwamuri." 
Exodus30:37 Zvinonhuwira zvamunozviitira imi, musazviita sezvamunoita izvozvi; zvinofanira kuva kwamuri zvitsvene kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus30:38 Ani naani unoita zvakafanana nazvo, kuti azvinhuwidze, ngaabviswe pakati porudzi rwake.”" 
Exodus31:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Exodus31:2 “Tarira, ndadana Bhezareri, mwanakomana waUri, mwanakomana waHuri, worudzi rwaJudha, nezita rake," 
Exodus31:3 ndikamuzadza noMweya waMwari, nouchenjeri, nokunzwisisa, nokuziva kwose, nokugona marudzi ose amabasa," 
Exodus31:4 kuti afunge mano oumhizha, nokubata nendarama, nesirivha, nendarira," 
Exodus31:5 nokuveza mabwe anoiswa mukati, nokuveza matanda, nokugona marudzi ose amabasa." 
Exodus31:6 Uye ini, tarira ndakagadza pamwechete naye Ohoriabhu, mwanakomana waAhisamaki, worudzi rwaDhani; nomumwoyo yavose vane mwoyo yakangwara ndakaisa uchenjeri, kuti vaite zvose zvandakakuraira," 
Exodus31:7 zvinoti: Tende rokusangana, neareka yechipupuriro, nechifunhiro chokuyananisa chiri pamusoro payo, nenhumbi dzose dzetabhenakeri," 
Exodus31:8 netafura nenhumbi dzayo, nechigadziko chemwenje chakaisvonaka nenhumbi dzacho dzose, neatari yezvinonhuwira," 
Exodus31:9 neatari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira nechigadziko chawo," 
Exodus31:10 nenguo dzakarukwa zvakanaka, nenguo tsvene dzaAroni mupristi, nenguo dzavanakomana vake dzokubata basa roupristi nadzo," 
Exodus31:11 namafuta okuzodza nawo, nezvinonhuwira zvemiti inonaka zvapanzvimbo tsvene; vanofanira kuita zvose sezvandakakuraira.”" 
Exodus31:12 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Exodus31:13 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti, ‘Zvirokwazvo munofanira kuchengeta maSabata angu; nokuti chiratidzo pakati pangu nemi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose, muzive kuti ndini Jehovha unokutsaurai." 
Exodus31:14 Naizvozvo chengetai Sabata, nokuti idzvene kwamuri; ani naani unorizvidza ngaaurawe zvirokwazvo; nokuti ani naani unobata basa ripi neripi naro, munhu uyo ngaabviswe pakati porudzi rwake." 
Exodus31:15 Mabasa ose ngaabatwe namazuva matanhatu, asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata rokuzorora kwazvo, idzvene kuna Jehovha; ani naani unobata basa ripi neripi nezuva reSabata, ngaaurawe zvirokwazvo.’" 
Exodus31:16 Naizvozvo vana VaIsiraeri vanofanira kuchengeta Sabata, varangarire Sabata kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose; ive sungano isingaperi." 
Exodus31:17 Chiratidzo pakati pangu navana VaIsiraeri nokusingaperi; nokuti Jehovha akaita denga nenyika namazuva matanhatu, akazorora nezuva rechinomwe, akasimbiswa.”" 
Exodus31:18 Zvino wakati apedza kutaura naMosesi pagomo reSinai, akamupa mahwendefa maviri echipupuriro, mahwendefa amabwe akanga akanyorwa nomunwe waMwari." 
Exodus32:1 Zvino vanhu vakati vachiona kuti Mosesi wononoka kuburuka mugomo, vakaungana kuna Aroni, vakati kwaari, “Simuka, utiitire vamwari vangatitungamirira, nokuti kana ari Mosesi uyu, uya munhu wakatibudisa munyika yeIjipiti, hatizivi chakaitika naye.”" 
Exodus32:2 Zvino Aroni akati kwavari, “Gurai zvindori zvendarama zviri panzeve dzavakadzi venyu nedzavanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu, muuye nazvo kwandiri.”" 
Exodus32:3 Zvino vanhu vose vakagura zvindori zvendarama zvakanga zviri panzeve dzavo, vakauya nazvo kuna Aroni." 
Exodus32:4 Iye akazvigamuchira pamaoko avo, akazviveza nenhumbi yokuveza nayo, akaita nazvo mhuru yakaumbwa. Ivo vakati, “Ndivo vamwari venyu, imi VaIsiraeri, vakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti.”" 
Exodus32:5 Zvino Aroni wakati achizviona, akavaka atari pamberi payo, Aroni akadanidzira, akati, “Mangwana mutambo uchavapo kuna Jehovha.”" 
Exodus32:6 Vakafumira mangwanani, vakapisira zvipiriso zvinopiswa, vakauyawo nezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, vanhu vakagara pasi, vakadya nokunwa, vakasimuka, vakatamba." 
Exodus32:7 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati, “Enda, buruka, nokuti vanhu vako, vawakabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, vazvitadzira." 
Exodus32:8 Vakurumidza kutsauka panzira yandakavaraira, vakazviitira mhuru yakaumbwa, vakainamata, vakaibayira zvibairo, vachiti, ‘Ndivo vamwari venyu, imi VaIsiraeri, vakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Ndatarira vanhu ava, ndaona kuti vanhu vane mitsipa mikukutu;" 
Exodus32:10 naizvozvo zvino ndirege hako, kuti shungu dzangu dzivamukire, ndivapedze, ndikuite iwe rudzi rukuru.”" 
Exodus32:11 Ipapo Mosesi akakumbira kuna Jehovha Mwari wake akati, “Haiwa, Jehovha, shungu dzenyu dzingagomukireiko vanhu venyu, vamakabudisa munyika yeIjipiti nesimba guru uye noruoko rune simba." 
Exodus32:12 VaIjipiti vangazoreva seiko vachiti, ‘Wakavabudisira kune zvakaipa, kuti avauraye mumakomo, nokuvaparadza panyika?’ Dzorai shungu dzenyu huru, muzvidembe pamusoro pokuitira vanhu venyu zvakaipa zvakadai." 
Exodus32:13 Rangarirai henyu Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naIsiraeri, varanda venyu, vamakazvipikira mumene, mukati kwavari, ‘Ndichawanza vana venyu senyenyedzi dzokudenga, nenyika yose iyi, yandakareva, ndichaipa vana venyu, vaigare nhaka nokusingaperi.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Zvino Jehovha akazvidemba pamusoro pezvakaipa zvaakanga achifunga kuitira vanhu vake. 
Exodus32:15 Zvino Mosesi akatendeuka, akaburuka pagomo, ana mahwendefa maviri echipupuriro muruoko rwake; mahwendefa akanga akanyorwa nhivi dzawo dzose, akanga akanyorwa seri neseri." 
Exodus32:16 Mahwendefa iwayo rakanga riri basa raMwari, norunyoro rwakanga ruri runyoro rwaMwari, rwakanga rwakatemwa pamahwendefa." 
Exodus32:17 Zvino Joshua wakati achinzwa mhere–mhere yavanhu vanopururudza, akati kuna Mosesi, “Kune mhere–mhere yokurwa kumisasa.”" 
Exodus32:17 Zvino Joshua wakati achinzwa mhere–mhere yavanhu vanopururudza, akati kuna Mosesi, “Kune mhere–mhere yokurwa kumisasa.”" 
Exodus32:18 Iye akati, “Haazi mazwi avanhu vanodanidzira pakukunda kwavo, kana Mazwi avanhu vanodanidzira pakukundwa kwavo; asi ndinonzwa mhere–mhere yavanhu vanoimba.”" 
Exodus32:19 Zvino wakati aswedera kumisasa, akaona mhuru nokutamba. Ipapo shungu dzaMosesi dzikamuka, akakanda mahwendefa aiva mumaoko pasi, akaaputsa mujinga megomo." 
Exodus32:20 Akatora mhuru yavakanga vaita, akaipisa nomoto, akaikuya ikaita upfu, akaikanda mumvura, ndokunwisa VaIsiraeri izvozvo." 
Exodus32:21 Mosesi akati kuna Aroni, “Vanhu ava vakakuitireiko, zvawauyisa chivi ichi chikuru pamusoro pavo?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni akati, “Shungu dzashe wangu ngadzirege kumuka hadzo; munoziva vanhu ava, kuti vanongoda kutadza." 
Exodus32:23 Nokuti vakati kwandiri, ‘Tiitirei vamwari vangatitungamirira, nokuti kana ari Mosesi uyu, munhu uya wakatibudisa munyika yeIjipiti, hatizivi chakaitika naye.’" 
Exodus32:24 Ndikati kwavari, ‘Ani naani une ndarama, ngaaigure;’ zvino vakandipa, ndikaikandira mumoto, mhuru iyi ikabudamo.”" 
Exodus32:25 Zvino Mosesi wakati aona kuti vanhu varasa Jehovha, nokuti Aroni wakanga avarasisa, kuti vasekwe navavengi vavo," 
Exodus32:26 Mosesi akandomira musuwo remisasa, akati, “Ani naani ari kurutivi rwaJehovha, ngaauye kwandiri.” Vana vaRevhi vose vakaungana kwaari." 
Exodus32:27 Akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waVaIsiraeri, ‘Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaasungire munondo wake pachidya chake, mufambe–fambe muchibva pane rimwe suwo muchienda kune rimwe suwo pakati pemisasa, mumwe nomumwe auraye hama yake, nomumwe nomumwe shamwari yake, nomumwe nomumwe munhu wokwake.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Vana vaRevhi vakaita sezvakanga zvarehwa naMosesi; nomusi iwoyo vakafa pakati pavanhu vanenge vane zviuru zvitatu. 
Exodus32:29 Zvino Mosesi akati, “Zviparadzanisei nhasi kuna Jehovha, kuti munhu mumwe nomumwe arwe nomwanakomana wake uye nehama yake, kuti akuropafadzei nhasi.”" 
Exodus32:30 Zvino fume mangwana Mosesi akati kuvanhu, “Imi makatadza nokutadza kukuru, asi zvino ini ndichakwira kuna Jehovha, zvimwe ndingayananisira zvivi zvenyu.”" 
Exodus32:31 Mosesi akadzokera kuna Jehovha, akati, “Haiwa, vanhu ava vakatadza nokutadza kukuru, vakazviitira vamwari vendarama;" 
Exodus32:32 zvino dai muchivakanganwira henyu zvivi zvavo; asi kana musingadi henyu, ndidzimei pabhuku renyu ramakanyora.”" 
Exodus32:33 Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Uyo wakanditadzira, ndiye wandichadzima pabhuku rangu." 
Exodus32:34 Zvino chienda, uperekedze vanhu vaende kwandakavaudza; tarira, mutumwa wangu achakutungamirira; asi nomusi wandicharova nawo, ndichavarova nokuda kwezvivi zvavo.”" 
Exodus32:35 Jehovha akarova vanhu nedenda, nokuti vakanga vaumbisa Aroni chimhuru chendarama." 
Exodus33:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati, “Ibva pano, kwira, iwe navanhu vawakabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, muende kunyika yandakapikira Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho, ndichiti, ndichaipa vana vako;" 
Exodus33:2 ndichatuma mutumwa pamberi penyu, kuti ndidzinge VaKenani, naVaAmori, naVaHeti, naVaPerezi, naVaHivhi, naJebhusi," 
Exodus33:3 muende kunyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, nokuti ini handingakwiri pakati penyu, nokuti muri vanhu vane mitsipa mikukutu, kuti ndirege kukuparadzai panzira.”" 
Exodus33:4 Zvino vanhu vakati vachinzwa mashoko iwayo akaipa, vakachema; kwakanga kusina munhu wakashonga zvishongo zvake." 
Exodus33:5 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Uti kuvana VaIsiraeri, ‘Muri vanhu vane mitsipa mikukutu; kana ndikapinda pakati penyu chinguva chimwe chiduku–duku, ndingakuparadzai; naizvozvo bvisai zvishongo zvenyu zvino, ndizive chandingakuitirai.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Ipapo vana VaIsiraeri vakabvisa zvishongo zvavo kubva pagomo reHorebhu. 
Exodus33:7 Zvino Mosesi waisitora tende, achindoridzika kunze kwemisasa, kure nemisasa, akaritumidza zita rinonzi, Tende rokusangana. Zvino mumwe nomumwe waitsvaka Jehovha, waibudira kutende rokusangana, rakanga riri kunze kwemisasa." 
Exodus33:8 Zvino kwaiti kana Mosesi obudira kuTende, vanhu vose vaisimuka, vakamira mumwe nomumwe pamukova wetende rake, vakaramba vakatarira Mosesi kusvikira apinda muTende." 
Exodus33:9 Zvino kana Mosesi apinda muTende, shongwe yegore yaJehovha yaiburuka ikamira pamukova weTende, Jehovha akataura naMosesi." 
Exodus33:10 Vanhu vose vakaona shongwe yegore imire pamukova weTende, vanhu vose vakasimuka, vakanamata pasi mumwe nomumwe pamukova wetende rake." 
Exodus33:11 Ipapo Jehovha waitaura naMosesi zviso zvakatarisana, somunhu anotaurirana neshamwari yake. Zvino wodzokerazve kumisasa; asi muranda wake Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, mujaya, haazaibva paTende." 
Exodus33:11 Ipapo Jehovha waitaura naMosesi zviso zvakatarisana, somunhu anotaurirana neshamwari yake. Zvino wodzokerazve kumisasa; asi muranda wake Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, mujaya, haazaibva paTende." 
Exodus33:12 Zvino Mosesi akati kuna Jehovha, “Tarirai, makati kwandiri, ‘Kwira navanhu ava, asi hamuna kundizivisa kuti muchatuma ani neni,’ kunyangwe makati, ‘Ndinokuziva nezita rako, wakawana nyasha pamberi pangu.’" 
Exodus33:13 Zvino kana ndakawana nyasha pamberi penyu, chindiratidzai nzira dzenyu, kuti ndikuzivei, ndiwane nyasha pamberi penyu; rangariraiwo kuti rudzi urwu ndivanhu venyu.”" 
Exodus33:14 Jehovha akati, “Ini ndimene ndichaenda newe, ndikupe zororo.”" 
Exodus33:15 Akati kwaari, “Kana imi mumene musingaendi neni, regai henyu kutibvisa pano." 
Exodus33:16 Nokuti zvichazikanwa seiko kuti ndakawana nyasha pamberi penyu, ini navanhu venyu? Hakuzi kuti muende nesu, tigova vakatsaurwa, ini navanhu venyu pakati pavamwe vanhu vose vapanyika dzose here?”" 
Exodus33:17 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Ndichaitawo chinhu ichi chawareva, nokuti wawana nyasha pamberi pangu, ndinokuziva nezita rako.”" 
Exodus33:18 Iye akati, “Dondiratidzai henyu kubwinya kwenyu.”" 
Exodus33:19 Jehovha akati, “Ndichapfuudza kunaka kwangu kwose pamberi pako, nokudana zita raJehovha pamberi pako, asi ndichanzwira nyasha wandinoda kunzwira nyasha, ndichanzwira tsitsi wandinoda kunzwira tsitsi.”" 
Exodus33:20 Akatiwo, “Haungaoni chiso changu, nokuti hakuna munhu angandiona, akazorarama.”" 
Exodus33:21 Jehovha akatiwo, “Tarira pane nzvimbo uno kwandiri, ungamira pabwe." 
Exodus33:22 Zvino kana kubwinya kwangu kwopfuura, ndichakupinza mumukana webwe, ndigokufukidza noruoko rwangu kusvikira ndapfuura;" 
Exodus33:23 ipapo ndichabvisa ruoko rwangu, ugondiona necheshure; asi chiso changu hachionekwi.”" 
Exodus34:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Zvivezere mahwendefa maviri amabwe akafanana nookutanga, kuti ndinyore pamahwendefa mashoko aya akanga ari pamahwendefa okutanga awaputsa." 
Exodus34:2 Gara wazvigadzira mangwanani, ukwire mugomo reSinai mangwanani, umire pamberi pangu pamusoro pegomo." 
Exodus34:3 Asi mumwe munhu ngaarege kukwira newe, uye ngakurege kuonekwa munhu pagomo rose, namakwai nemombe ngazvirege kufura pamberi pegomo iri.”" 
Exodus34:4 Ipapo Mosesi akaveza mahwendefa maviri akafanana nookutanga, akamuka mangwanani, akakwira mugomo reSinai, sezvaakanga arairwa naJehovha, akabata mahwendefa maviri muruoko rwake." 
Exodus34:5 Jehovha akaburuka ari mugomo, akamirapo naye, akadana zita raJehovha." 
Exodus34:6 Jehovha akapfuura pamberi pake, akadanidzira, achiti, “Jehovha, Jehovha, Mwari azere nyasha nengoni, anononoka kutsamwa, ane tsitsi huru nezvokwadi," 
Exodus34:7 anochengetera vane zviuru zvamazana nyasha dzake, anovakanganwira zvakaipa zvavo nokudarika kwavo nezvivi zvavo, asi asingapembedzi munhu ane mhosva, anorova vana nokuda kwezvakaipa zvamadzibaba avo, navana vavana vavo kusvikira kurudzi rwechitatu norwechina.”" 
Exodus34:8 Ipapo Mosesi akakurumidza kukotamisa musoro wake pasi, akapfugama." 
Exodus34:9 Akati, “Ishe, kana ndakawana nyasha kwamuri, Ishe ngaafambe pakati pedu, nokuti vanhu ava vane mitsipa mikukutu; tikanganwirei henyu zvakaipa zvedu nezvivi zvedu, mutigamuchirei, tive nhaka yenyu.”" 
Exodus34:10 Jehovha akati, “Tarira, ndinoita sungano newe; ndichaita pamberi pavanhu vako zvinoshamisa, zvisina kumboitwa panyika yose, kana kundudzi dzose; kuti vanhu vose vauri pakati pavo vaone basa raJehovha, nokuti ndinoita chinhu chinotyisa newe." 
Exodus34:11 Rangarira zvandinokuraira nhasi: Tarira, ndodzinga pamberi pako VaAmori, naVaKenani, naVaHeti, naVaPerezi, naVaHivhi, naVaJebhusi." 
Exodus34:12 Chenjera kuti urege kuita sungano navanhu vagere munyika iyo kwaunoenda, kuti zvirege kuva musungo kwauri;" 
Exodus34:13 asi munofanira kuputsa atari dzavo, nokuputsanya mabwe emifananidzo yavo, nokutema matanda avo avanonamata nawo;" 
Exodus34:14 nokuti usapfugamira vamwe vamwari, nokuti Jehovha, ane zita rinonzi Ane godo, ndiMwari ane godo;" 
Exodus34:15 kuti urege kuita sungano navanhu vagere munyika iyo, zvino kana ivo vopata vachitevera vamwari vavo, vachibayira vamwari vavo, mumwe akudane kuti udye nyama yezvibairo zvake;" 
Exodus34:16 iwe ukatorera vanakomana vako vakunda vavo, zvino kana vakunda vavo vopata vachitevera vamwari vavo, vapatise vanakomana vakowo vatevere vamwari vavo." 
Exodus34:17 “Usazviitira vamwari vakaumbwa. 
Exodus34:18 Uite mutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa. Unofanira kudya zvingwa zvisina kuviriswa mazuva manomwe, sezvandakakuraira nenguva yakatarwa pamwedzi weAbhibhi, nokuti wakabuda paIjipiti pamwedzi weAbhibhi." 
Exodus34:19 “Zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro ndezvangu, napazvipfuwo zvako zvikono zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro, kana pamombe kana pamakwai;" 
Exodus34:20 mwana wokutanga wembongoro unofanira kumudzikinura negwayana; kana usingadi kumudzikinura, unofanira kuvhuna mutsipa wawo. Matangwe ose pavanakomana vako unofanira kuvadzikinura. Kurege kuva nomunhu anouya pamberi pangu asina chinhu." 
Exodus34:21 “Unofanira kubata mazuva matanhatu, asi nezuva rechinomwe uzorore, nenguva yokurima neyokukohwa uzorore." 
Exodus34:22 Unofanira kurangarira mutambo wamavhiki, wezvitsva zvekoroni inokohwiwa, nomutambo wokuunganidza pakupera kwegore." 
Exodus34:23 “Varume vako vose ngavauye pamberi paShe Mwari, iye Mwari waIsiraeri, katatu negore." 
Exodus34:24 Nokuti ndichadzinga ndudzi pamberi pako, ndikurise miganhu yako; hakungavi nomunhu achachiva nyika yako, kana achikwira katatu pagore kuti azviratidze pamberi paJehovha, Mwari wako." 
Exodus34:25 “Usauya neropa rechibayiro changu pamwechete nechingwa chakaviriswa; uye chibayiro chomutambo wePasika ngachirege kuvata usiku kusvikira mangwana. 
Exodus34:26 Zvokutanga zvezvitsva zvomunda wako unofanira kuuya nazvo kumba kwaJehovha Mwari wako. Usabika mbudzana mumukaka wamai vayo.” 
Exodus34:27 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Nyora mashoko iwaya, nokuti ndaita sungano newe naVaIsiraeri sezvinoreva mashoko iwaya.”" 
Exodus34:28 Akavako kuna Jehovha mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana; wakanga asingadyi zvokudya kana kunwa mvura. Akanyora pamahwendefa mashoko esungano, iyo mirairo ine gumi." 
Exodus34:29 Zvino Mosesi wakati achiburuka pagomo reSinai, Mosesi akabata mahwendefa maviri echipupuriro mumaoko ake, Mosesi wakanga asingazivi, achiburuka pagomo, kuti ganda rechiso chake rakanga richibwinya zvaakanga ataura naye." 
Exodus34:30 Zvino Aroni navana VaIsiraeri vose vakati vachiona Mosesi, vakaona ganda rechiso chake richibwinya, vakatya kuswedera kwaari;" 
Exodus34:31 ipapo Mosesi akavadana, Aroni navakuru vose veungano vakadzokera kwaari, Mosesi akataura navo." 
Exodus34:32 Pashure vana VaIsiraeri vose vakaswedera, iye akavaraira zvose zvaakanga audzwa naJehovha pagomo reSinai." 
Exodus34:33 Zvino Mosesi wakati apedza kutaura navo akaisa chifukidzo pachiso chake. 
Exodus34:34 Asi kana Mosesi opinda pamberi paJehovha kundotaura naye, waibvisa chifukidzo kusvikira achibuda; zvino wobuda, ndokuudza vana VaIsiraeri zvarairwa." 
Exodus34:35 Vana VaIsiraeri vakaona chiso chaMosesi, kuti ganda rechiso chaMosesi raibwinya; zvino Mosesi wodzoserazve chifukidzo pachiso chake, kusvikira opinda kundotaura naye." 
Exodus35:1 Zvino Mosesi wakaunganidza ungano yose yavana VaIsiraeri, akati kwavari, “Ndiwo mashoko akarairwa naJehovha kuti muaite." 
Exodus35:2 Mabasa ose ngaabatwe namazuva matanhatu, asi zuva rechinomwe rinofanira kuva kwamuri zuva dzvene, Sabata rokuzorora kwazvo pamberi paJehovha; ani naani anobata basa ripi neripi naro, ngaauraiwe." 
Exodus35:3 Regai kuvesa moto padzimba dzenyu dzose nezuva reSabata.” 
Exodus35:4 Mosesi akataura neungano yose yavana VaIsiraeri, akati, “Ndicho chinhu chakarairwa naJehovha, achiti," 
Exodus35:5 ‘Ripirai Jehovha chipo pazvinhu zvenyu; ani naani ane mwoyo unoda, ngaauye nacho, chive chipo chaJehovha, zvinoti: Ndarama, nesirivha, nendarira," 
Exodus35:6 nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, nemvere dzembudzi," 
Exodus35:7 namatehwe amakondohwe akazodzwa zvitsvuku, namatehwe ambudzi, namatanda omuakeshia," 
Exodus35:8 namafuta omwenje, nezvinonhuwira zvamafuta okuzodza, noupfu hunonhuwira," 
Exodus35:9 nezvibwe zveonikisi, nezvibwe zvokuisa paefodhi napahombodo yechipfuva." 
Exodus35:10 “ ‘Varume vose pakati penyu vane mwoyo yakachenjera ngavauye, vaite zvose zvakarairwa naJehovha;" 
Exodus35:11 zvinoti: Tabhenakeri netende rayo, nechifukidzo chayo, nezvikorekedzo zvayo, namapuranga ayo, nembariro dzayo, nembiru dzayo, nezvigadziko zvayo;" 
Exodus35:12 neareka, namatanda ayo, nechifunhiro chokuyananisa, neketeni rinodzitira," 
Exodus35:13 netafura, namatanda ayo, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nechingwa chokuratidza," 
Exodus35:14 nechigadziko chemwenje yokuvheneka nayo, nenhumbi dzacho, nemwenje yacho, namafuta okuvhenekesa nawo," 
Exodus35:15 neatari yezvinonhuwira, namatanda ayo, namafuta okuzodza nawo, noupfu hunonhuwira, neketani romukova pamukova wetabhenakeri," 
Exodus35:16 neatari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, nechakarukwa chayo chendarira, namatanda ayo, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira, nechigadziko chawo," 
Exodus35:17 nezvidzitiro zvoruvanze, nembiru dzazvo, nezvigadziko zvadzo, neketani resuwo roruvanze," 
Exodus35:18 nembambo dzetabhenakeri, nembambo dzoruvanze, netambo dzadzo," 
Exodus35:19 nenguo dzakarukwa zvakanaka dzokushumira nadzo panzvimbo tsvene, nenguo tsvene dzaAroni mupristi, nenguo dzavanakomana vake dzokushumira nadzo pabasa roupristi.’ ”" 
Exodus35:20 Zvino ungano yose yavana VaIsiraeri yakabva kuna Mosesi," 
Exodus35:21 vakauya, mumwe nomumwe wakamutswa nomwoyo wake, nomumwe nomumwe wakatendiswa nomweya wake, vakauya nechipo chaJehovha, chokubata basa retende rokusangana namabasa aro ose, nenguo tsvene." 
Exodus35:22 Vakauya varume navakadzi, vose vaiva nemwoyo yakanga ichida, vakauya nezvikorekedzo, nezvindori zvenzeve, nezvindori zvokusimbisa, nezvishongo zvamaoko, nezvishongo zvose zvendarama; mumwe nomumwe wakavigira Jehovha chipo chendarama." 
Exodus35:23 Murume mumwe nomumwe waiva nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, nemvere dzembudzi, namatehwe amakondohwe akazodzwa zvitsvuku, namatehwe amatenhe, wakauya nazvo." 
Exodus35:24 Mumwe nomumwe waigona kuripa chipo chesirivha nechendarira wakauya nechipo chaJehovha; mumwe nomumwe waiva namatanda omuakasia, avaigona kubata nawo, wakauya nawo." 
Exodus35:25 Vakadzi vose vaiva nemwoyo yakangwara vakaruka namaoko avo, vakauya nezvavakaruka, zvaiti: Zvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus35:26 Vakadzi vose vakanga vamutswa nemwoyo yavo kuva vakachenjera vakaruka mvere dzembudzi. 
Exodus35:27 Navakuru vakauya nezvibwe zveonikisi, nezvibwe zvokuisa paefodhi, napahombodo yechipfuva," 
Exodus35:28 nemiti inonhuwira, namafuta okuvhenekesa nawo, nezvokuzodza nazvo, noupfu hunonhuwira." 
Exodus35:29 Vana VaIsiraeri vakauya nemwoyo yavo nezvipo zvokupa Jehovha; murume mumwe nomumwe nomukadzi mumwe nomumwe waitendiswa nomwoyo wake kuti avigire zvokubata nazvo basa rose rakanga rarairwa naJehovha, kuti riitwe naMosesi." 
Exodus35:30 Zvino Mosesi akati kuvana VaIsiraeri, “Tarirai, Jehovha akadana nezita rake Bhezareri, mwanakomana waUri, mwanakomana waHuri, worudzi rwaJudha," 
Exodus35:31 akamuzadza noMweya waMwari kuti ave nokuchenjera, nokunzwisisa, nokuziva kwose, nokugona marudzi ose amabasa," 
Exodus35:32 kuti afunge mano oumhizha, nokubata nendarama, nesirivha, nendarira," 
Exodus35:33 nokuveza mabwe anoiswa mukati, nokuveza matanda, nokugona kubata mabasa ose oumhizha." 
Exodus35:34 Akaisa mumwoyo make uchenjeri hwokudzidzisa vamwe, iye naOhoriabhu, mwanakomana waAhisamaki, worudzi rwaDhani." 
Exodus35:35 Akavazadza nokuchenjera kwomwoyo, kuti vagone kubata mabasa ose omuvezi wamabwe, neemhizha, naavasoni vezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, naavaruki vanobata mabasa ose, naavose vanofunga mano amabasa oumhizha.”" 
Exodus36:1 “Zvino Bhezareri naOhoriabhu vanofanira kubata basa pamwechete navarume vose vane mwoyo yakangwara, vakapiwa naJehovha kuchenjera nokunzwisisa kuti vazive kubata mabasa ose okushuma panzvimbo tsvene, zvose zvakarairwa naJehovha.”" 
Exodus36:2 Zvino Mosesi akadana Bhezareri naOhoriabhu, navarume vose vaiva nemwoyo yakangwara, vakapiwa kuchenjera mumwoyo yavo naJehovha, vose vakanga vamutswa nemwoyo yavo, kuti vauye kuzobata basa;" 
Exodus36:3 vakapiwa naMosesi zvipo zvose zvakanga zvauyiswa navana VaIsiraeri, zvokubatisa nazvo basa rokushuma panzvimbo tsvene. Asi ivo vakaramba vachiuya nemwoyo yavo kwaari mangwanani ose nezvipo zvavo." 
Exodus36:4 Zvino varume vose vakachenjera, vakanga vachibata mabasa ose enzvimbo tsvene, vakabva mumwe nomumwe pabasa rake raakanga achiita," 
Exodus36:5 vakataura naMosesi, vachiti, “Vanhu vanouya nezvakawandisa kupfuura zvinokwana kuita basa rakarairwa naJehovha kuti riitwe.”" 
Exodus36:6 Mosesi akaraira kuti shoko riparidzwe kumisasa, rokuti, “Kunyangwe murume kana mukadzi ngaarege kuzoitazve basa rimwe nezvipo zvokupa nzvimbo tsvene.” Naizvozvo vanhu vakadziviswa kuzouya nezvimwe." 
Exodus36:7 Nokuti zvavakanga vanazvo, zvakakwanira mabasa ose avaifanira kuita, zvimwe zvikasara." 
Exodus36:8 Zvino varume vose vaiva nemwoyo yakangwara pakati pavabati vakaita tabhenakeri namachira ane gumi; vakazviita nemicheka yakarukwa yakaisvonaka, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, zvinamakerubhi; raiva basa romubati waigona kubata." 
Exodus36:9 Kureba kwejira rimwe kwaiva makubhiti makumi maviri namasere, noupamhi hwejira rimwe makubhiti mana; machira ose akanga akaenzana." 
Exodus36:10 Akabatanidza machira mashanu pamwechete, namamwe machira akaabatanidza pamwechetezve." 
Exodus36:11 Akaita zvishwe zvitema pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira pana akabatanidzwa pamwechete; akaitawo saizvozvo pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira pana mamwe akabatanidzwa pamwechete. 
Exodus36:12 Akaitawo zvishwe zvina makumi mashanu pajira rimwe, nezvishwe zvina makumi mashanuzve pamupendero wejira ramamwe akabatanidzwa pamwechete; zvishwe zvakanga zvakatarisana." 
Exodus36:13 Akaitawo zvikorekedzo zvendarama zvina makumi mashanu, akabatanidza machira nezvikorekedzo izvozvo; naizvozvo tabhenakeri ikava chinhu chimwechete." 
Exodus36:14 Akaitawo machira emvere dzembudzi, rikava tende pamusoro petabhenakeri; akaita machira ane gumi nerimwe." 
Exodus36:15 Kureba kwejira rimwe nerimwe kwaiva makubhiti ana makumi matatu, noupamhi hwejira rimwe nerimwe makubhiti mana; machira ane gumi nerimwe akanga akaenzana." 
Exodus36:16 Akabatanidza machira mashanu pamwechete, namachira matanhatu pamwechetezve;" 
Exodus36:17 akaita zvishwe zvina makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rimwe rokupedzisira panaakabatanidzwa pamwechete, nezvimwe zvishwe zvina makumi mashanuzve pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira pana mamwe akabatanidzwa pamwechetezve." 
Exodus36:18 Akaitawo zvikorekedzo zvina makumi mashanu zvendarira zvokubatanidza tende, kuti chive chinhu chimwechete." 
Exodus36:19 Akaitirawo tende chifukidzo chamatehwe amakondohwe akazodzwa muti mutsvuku, nechifukidzo chamatehwe amatenhe pamusoro paizvozvo." 
Exodus36:20 Akaitirawo tabhenakeri mapuranga omuakeshia akamiswa. 
Exodus36:21 Kureba kwepuranga rimwe kwaiva makubhiti ane gumi, noupamhi hwepuranga rimwe nerimwe hwaiva kubhiti rimwe nehafu." 
Exodus36:22 Puranga rimwe nerimwe rakaitirwa zvibato zviviri zvakabatanidzwa; akaita mapuranga ose etabhenakeri saizvozvo. 
Exodus36:23 Akaita mapuranga etabhenakeri ana makumi maviri okurutivi rwezasi, akatarira zasi." 
Exodus36:24 Akaitawo zvigadziko zvesirivha zvina makumi mana pasi pamapuranga ana makumi maviri, zvigadziko zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe pazvibato zvaro zviviri." 
Exodus36:25 Akaita mapuranga ana makumi maviri kurutivi rwechipiri rwetabhenakeri kurutivi rwokumusoro," 
Exodus36:26 nezvigadziko zvawo zvesirivha zvina makumi mana, zvigadziko zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe, nezvigadziko zviviri pasi perimwe purangazve." 
Exodus36:27 Akaitawo mapuranga matanhatu kurutivi rwemberi rwetabhenakeri kumavirazuva. 
Exodus36:28 Akaitawo mapuranga maviri kumakona etabhenakeri kurutivi rwemberi. 
Exodus36:29 Akanga akaita maviri nechenyasi; saizvozvozve akanga akaita maviri akabatanidzwa kusvikira kumusoro kuchindori chokutanga; saizvozvo akaaitira ose maviri pamakona maviri. 
Exodus36:30 Akava mapuranga masere ane zvigadziko zvawo zvesirivha, zvikava zvigadziko zvine gumi nezvitanhatu, zvigadziko zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe nerimwe." 
Exodus36:31 Akaitawo mbariro dzomuakeshia, shanu dzamapuranga orumwe rutivi rwetabhenakeri," 
Exodus36:32 nembariro shanuzve dzamapuranga etabhenakeri kurutivi rwemberi kumavirazuva. 
Exodus36:33 Akaitawo rumbariro rwapakati rwaiva pakati pamapuranga rwaibva kuno rumwe rutivi rukandosvikira kuno rumwe rutivi. 
Exodus36:34 Akafukidza mapuranga nendarama, akaita zvindori zvawo zvendarama, kuti mbariro dzigarepo, akafukidzawo mbariro nendarama." 
Exodus36:35 Akaitawo keteni nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa; akachiita namakerubhi, rikava basa romunhu anogona." 
Exodus36:36 Akachiitira mbiru ina dzomuakeshia, akadzifukidza nendarama; zvikorekedzo zvadzo zvakanga zviri zvendarama, akadziumbirawo zvigadziko zvina zvesirivha." 
Exodus36:37 Akaitirawo mukova weTende keteni rezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa; rakanga riri basa romusoni anogona." 
Exodus36:38 Uye mbiru dzacho shanu nezvikorekedzo zvadzo; akafukidza misoro yadzo nezvindori zvadzo nendarama; nezvigadziko zvadzo zvakanga zviri zvendarira. 
Exodus37:1 Zvino Bhezareri akaita areka yamatanda omuakeshia; kureba kwayo kwaiva makubhiti maviri nehafu, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu, nokukwirira kwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu;" 
Exodus37:2 akaifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka nechomukati nechokunze, akaita pamusoro payo hata yendarama yakaipoteredza." 
Exodus37:3 Akaiumbira zvindori zvina zvendarama, akazviisa pamakumbo ayo mana; zvindori zviviri zvaiva parutivi rumwe, nezvindori zviviri panorumwe rutivizve." 
Exodus37:4 Akaveza matanda omuakeshia, akaafukidza nendarama," 
Exodus37:5 akapinza matanda iwayo muzvindori zvaiva panhivi dzeareka, kuti areka itakurwe nawo." 
Exodus37:6 Akaitawo chifunhiro chokuyananisa nendarama yakaisvonaka; kureba kwacho kwaiva makubhiti maviri nehafu, noupamhi hwacho kubhiti rimwe nehafu;" 
Exodus37:7 akaita makerubhi maviri endarama, akaaita nendarama yakapambadzirwa pamiromo miviri yechifunhiro chokuyananisa," 
Exodus37:8 kerubhi rimwe pamuromo mumwe, nerimwe kerubhi panomumwe muromo; akaita makerubhi pamiromo yacho miviri, zvikava chinhu chimwechete nechifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Exodus37:9 Makerubhi akanga akatambanudzira mapapiro awo kumusoro, akafukidza chifunhiro chokuyananisa namapapiro awo, zviso zvawo zvakatarisana; zviso zvamakerubhi zvakanga zvakatarira chifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Exodus37:10 Akaitawo tafura yamatanda omuakeshia; kureba kwayo kwaiva makubhiti maviri, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwe, nokukwirira kwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu." 
Exodus37:11 Akaifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka, akaiitirawo hata yendarama yakanga ichiipoteredza;" 
Exodus37:12 akaiitirawo ukomba hwakanga huchiipoteredza, upamhi hwahwo sechanza; akaiitirawo hata yendarama yaipoteredza ukomba hwayo." 
Exodus37:13 Akaiitira zvindori zvina zvendarama, akaisa zvindori pamakona mana aiva pamakumbo ayo mana." 
Exodus37:14 Zvindori zvaiva pedyo noukomba, paiva pokutakura tafura napo namatanda." 
Exodus37:15 Akaita matanda omuakeshia, akaafukidza nendarama, kuti tafura itakurwe nawo." 
Exodus37:16 Akaitawo midziyo yaigara pamusoro petafura, ndiro dzayo, nembiya dzayo, nemikombe yayo, nezvirongo zvayo zvokudira nazvo, zvose zvendarama yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus37:17 Akaitawo chigadzikiro chemwenje chendarama yakaisvonaka; akaita chigadzikiro nendarama yakapambadzirwa, chigadzikiro chacho, nehunde yacho, notumbiya twacho, namapfundo acho, namaruva acho; zvose zvikava chinhu chimwechete nacho;" 
Exodus37:18 kumativi acho kukabuda matavi matanhatu, matavi matatu echigadzikiro kuno rumwe rutivi rwacho, namatavi matatu echigadzikiro kuno rumwe rutivi rwacho." 
Exodus37:19 Tumbiya tutatu twakaumbwa samaruva omuamanda padavi rimwe, nefundo neruva, notumbiya tutatuzve twakaumbwa samaruva omuarimondi pane rimwe davi, nefundo neruva; saizvozvo matavi matanhatu akabuda pachigadzikiro." 
Exodus37:20 Uye pachigadzikiro pakanga panotumbiya tuna twakanga twakaumbwa samaruva omuarimondi, namafundo atwo, namaruva atwo;" 
Exodus37:21 nefundo panyasi pamatavi maviri akanga akaumbwa pamwechete nacho; nefundozve panyasi pamatavi maviri akaumbwa pamwechete nacho, akafanana namatavi matanhatu akabuda pachigadzikiro." 
Exodus37:22 Mafundo azvo namatavi azvo akanga akaumbwa pamwechete nazvo, zvose zvikava chinhu chimwe chakanga chakumbwa nendarama yakaisvonaka, yakapambadzirwa." 
Exodus37:23 Akaita mwenje yacho minomwe, nembato dzacho, nendiro dzacho, zvose nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus37:24 Akachiumba netarenda rendarama yakaisvonaka, pamwechete nemidziyo yayo yose." 
Exodus37:25 Akaitawo atari yezvinonhuwira nomuakeshia; kureba kwayo kwakanga kuri kubhiti rimwe, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwezve; nhivi dzose ina dzakanga dzakaenzana; kukwirira kwayo kwaiva makubhiti maviri, nenyanga dzayo dzakanga dziri chinhu chimwechete nayo." 
Exodus37:26 Akaifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka, kumusoro kwayo, nenhivi dzayo dzose, nenyanga dzayo; akaiitirawo hata yendarama yakanga yakaipoteredza." 
Exodus37:27 Akaiitirawo zvindori zviviri zvendarama pasi pehata yayo, pakona dzayo mbiri panhivi dzayo mbiri, pakava pokuitakura napo namatanda." 
Exodus37:28 Akaitawo matanda omuakeshia, akaafukidza nendarama." 
Exodus37:29 Akaitawo mafuta matsvene okuzodza nawo, nezvinonhuhwira zvakaisvonaka zvemiti inonaka, zvikava zvakavhenganiswa nouchenjeri hwomuvhenganisi wezvinonhuhwira." 
Exodus38:1 Akaita atari yezvibairo zvinopiswa nomuakeshia; kureba kwayo kwaiva makubhiti mashanu, noupamhi hwayo makubhiti mashanu; yakanga iine nhivi ina dzakanga dzakaenzana, nokukwirira kwayo kwaiva makubhiti matatu." 
Exodus38:2 Akaitawo nyanga dzayo pamakona ayo mana, nyanga dzayo dzikava chinhu chimwechete nayo; akaifukidza nendarira." 
Exodus38:3 Akaita nhumbi dzose dzeatari, hari, nefoshoro, nemidziyo, nezvikokonho zvenyama, nezvaenga zvomoto, nhumbi dzose akadziita nendarira." 
Exodus38:4 Akaitirawo atari chakarukwa chendarira, chakarukwa samambure, pasi pechitsiko chakaipoteredza nechenyasi, chakasvikira pakati payo." 
Exodus38:5 Akaitira makona mana echakarukwa chendarira zvindori zvina paiva pokutakura napo namatanda. 
Exodus38:6 Akaita matanda omuakeshia, akaafukidza nendarira." 
Exodus38:7 Akaisa matanda mukati mezvindori zvaiva panhivi dzeatari, kuti itakurwe nawo; akaiita namapuranga, ikasava nechinhu mukati." 
Exodus38:8 Akaitawo mudziyo wokushambidzira wendarira, nechigadzikiro chawo chendarira, nezvionioni zvavakadzi vaishandira pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Exodus38:9 Akaitawo ruvanze; kurutivi rwezasi, rwakatarira zasi, kwakanga kune irzvirembedzwa zvemicheka yakaisvonaka yakarukwa, makubhiti ane zana;" 
Exodus38:10 mbiru dzayo dzakanga dzina makumi maviri, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina makumi maviri zvendarira, nezvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:11 Kurutivi rwokumusoro kwaiva namakubhiti ane zana, nembiru dzayo dzina makumi maviri, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina makumi maviri zvendarira, nezvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:12 Kurutivi rwamavirazuva kwakanga kune zvirembedzwa zvemicheka zvina makubhiti ana makumi mashanu, nembiru dzazvo dzine gumi, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvine gumi; zvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:13 Kurutivi rwemberi kunotarira kumabvazuva kwaiva namakubhiti makumi mashanu. 
Exodus38:14 Zvirembedzwa zvemicheka kurutivi rumwe rwesuwo zvakanga zvina makubhiti ane gumi namashanu, nembiru dzazvo nhatu, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvitatu." 
Exodus38:15 Nokuno rumwe rutiviwo; kurutivi rumwe norumwe rwesuwo roruvanze kwakanga kune zvirembedzwa zvemicheka zvina makubhiti ane gumi namashanu, nembiru dzazvo nhatu, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvitatu." 
Exodus38:16 Zvirembedzwa zvose zvemicheka paruvanze zvaipotedza nhivi dzose, zvaiva zvomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa." 
Exodus38:17 Nezvigadziko zvembiru zvaiva zvendarira, nezvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha; nemisoro yadzo yakanga yakafukidzwa nesirivha; mbiru dzose dzoruvanze dzakanga dzakabatanidzwa nezvindori zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:18 Keteni resuwo roruvanze rakanga rakaitwa nomusoni, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa; kureba kwacho kwaiva namakubhiti ana makumi maviri, nokukwirira paupamhi hwacho makubhiti mashanu, zvakafanana nezvirembedzwa zvemicheka paruvanze." 
Exodus38:19 Mbiru dzayo dzaiva ina, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina zvendarira; zvikorekedzo zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha, misoro yadzo nezvindori zvadzo zvakanga zvakafukidzwa nesirivha." 
Exodus38:20 Mbambo dzose dzetabhenakeri nedzoruvanze, rwakanga ruchiipoteredza kunhivi dzose, dzaiva dzendarira." 
Exodus38:21 Ndiko kuwanda kwezvinhu zvetabhenakeri, zvetabhenakeri yechipupuriro, pakuverengwa kwazvo nokuraira kwaMosesi; vaRevhi vakaita basa iro vachirairwa naItamari, mwanakomana waAroni mupristi." 
Exodus38:22 Bhezareri, mwanakomana waUri, mwanakomana waHuri, worudzi rwaJudha, wakaita zvose zvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha," 
Exodus38:23 anaOhoriabhu, mwanakomana waAhisamaki, worudzi rwaDhani, muvezi nomubati wakachenjera, nomusoni wezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, zvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus38:24 Ndarama yose yavaibatisa nayo mabasa ose apaimba tsvene, iyo ndarama yezvipo, aiva matarenda ana makumi maviri namapfumbamwe, namashekeri ana mazana manomwe namakumi matatu, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri rapaimba tsvene." 
Exodus38:25 Nesirivha yaivo vakanga vachiverengwa paungano aiva matarenda ane zana, namashekeri ane chiuru chimwe namazana manomwe namakumi manomwe namashanu, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri rapaimba tsvene." 
Exodus38:26 Munhu mumwe nomumwe wakaripa bheka rimwe, iri hafu yeshekeri rimwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri rapaimba tsvene; mumwe nomumwe wakadarika kuna vakaverengwa, wakanga ana makore makumi maviri, kana wakapfuura makore iwayo, vakanga vari varume vane zviuru zvina mazana matanhatu nezvitatu namazana mashanu namakumi mashanu." 
Exodus38:27 Namatarenda esirivha ane zana aiva okuumbisa nawo zvigadziko zvapaimba tsvene nezvigadziko zvechidzitiro; zvigadziko zvine zana zvakaitwa namatarenda ane zana, chigadziko chimwe nechimwe netarenda rimwe." 
Exodus38:28 Namashekeri ane chiuru chimwe namazana manomwe namakumi manomwe namashanu wakaita zvikorekedzo zvembiru, akafukidza misoro yadzo, nokuzviitirawo zvindori." 
Exodus38:29 Ndarira yezvipo yakanga ina matarenda ana makumi manomwe namashekeri ane zviuru zviviri namazana mana. 
Exodus38:30 Nayo wakaita zvigadziko zvomukova wetende rokusangana, neatari yendarira, nechakarukwa chayo chendarira, nenhumbi dzose dzapaatari," 
Exodus38:31 nezvigadziko zvose zvoruvanze rwakanga rwakapotedza, nezvigadziko zvesuwo roruvanze, nembambo dzose dzetabhenakeri, nembambo dzose dzoruvanze rwakanga rwakapoteredza." 
Exodus39:1 Vakaitawo nguo dzakarukwa zvakanaka nezvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, dzokushumira nadzo panzvimbo tsvene; vakaita nguo tsvene dzaAroni, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:2 Akaita efodhi nendarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa." 
Exodus39:3 Vakapambadzira ndarama, vakaita mabape matete, vakaicheka, vakaita nhare dzokusonisa nadzo zvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka yakarukwa, riri basa romunhu anogona." 
Exodus39:4 Vakaiitira mabande pamafudzi akabatanidzwa; akanga akabatanidzwa pamiromo yayo miviri. 
Exodus39:5 Nebhandi rakarukwa nomubati wakachenjera, rakanga riri pamusoro payo, rokuisunga naro; chakanga chiri chinhu chimwechete nayo, rakaitwa saiyo; rendarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka yakarukwa, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:6 Vakagadzira mabwe eonikisi, akanyudzwa mukati mezviruva zvendarama, mazita avana VaIsiraeri akanyorwapo, sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa." 
Exodus39:7 Akaaisa pamabande apamafudzi eefodhi, kuti ave mabwe okurangaridza vana VaIsiraeri, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:8 Akaitawo hombodo yechipfuva, raiva basa romubati wakachenjera, sezvakaitwawo efodhi; akaiita nendarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka yakarukwa." 
Exodus39:9 Yakanga ine nhivi ina dzakaenzana; vakaita hombodo yechipfuva ine mheto mbiri; kureba kwayo kwakanga kwakaita sapanosvika minwe, noupamhi hwayo sapanosvika minwewo, ine mheto mbiri." 
Exodus39:10 Vakaisa mukati mayo misara mina yamabwe, mumwe musara waiva nesadhio, netopasi, nekabhunakeri. Ndiwo musara wokutanga." 
Exodus39:11 Napamusara wechipiri simaradhino, nesafiri, nedhaimani." 
Exodus39:12 Napamusara wechitatu haikindi, neagati, neametisi." 
Exodus39:13 Napamusara wechina bheriri, neonikisi, nejasipiri; akanga akanyudzwa muzviruva zvendarama." 
Exodus39:14 Mabwe akanga akaita samazita avana VaIsiraeri, ane gumi namaviri, samazita avo; akanga akanyorwa sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa, rimwe nerimwe rine zita raro, mazita amarudzi ane gumi namaviri." 
Exodus39:15 Napahombodo akaita zviketani zvakafanana netambo yendarama yakamoniwa yakaisvonaka. 
Exodus39:16 Vakaitawo zviruva zviviri zvendarama, nezvindori zviviri zvendarama, akaisa zvindori zviviri pamicheto miviri yehombodo yechipfuva." 
Exodus39:17 Vakaisawo zviketani zviviri zvendarama yakamoniwa pazvindori zviviri zvaiva pamicheto yehombodo yechipfuva. 
Exodus39:18 Nemimwe miromo miviri yezviketani zviviri, vakaiisa pamabande apachipfuva cheefodhi nechemberi kwayo." 
Exodus39:19 Vakaitawo zvindori zviviri zvendarama, vakazviisa pamicheto miviri yehombodo yechipfuva pamupendero wayo, uri kurutivi rweefodhi nechomukati." 
Exodus39:20 Vakaitawo zvindiro zviviri zvendarama vakazviisa pamabhande maviri apamafudzi eefodhi zasi nechemberi kwayo, pedyo napayakabatanidzwa napo, pamusoro pebhandi reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri." 
Exodus39:21 Vakasunganidza hombodo yechipfuva nezvindori zvayo pazvindori zveefodhi netambo nhema, kuti ive pamusoro pebhandi reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri, kuti hombodo yechipfuva irege kusununguka paefodhi, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:22 Akaitawo jasi reefodhi rakarukwa; rose rakanga riri romucheka mutema. 
Exodus39:23 Akaita buri rejasi pakati paro, seburi renguo yokurwa, rakanga rine mupendero wakapoteredza buri raro, kuti rirege kubvaruka." 
Exodus39:24 Pamipendero yejasi vakaita matamba ezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakarukwa." 
Exodus39:25 Vakaitawo zvitare zvinorira zvendarama yakaisvonaka; vakaisa zvitare pakati pamatamba pamipendero yejasi, kunhivi dzose, pakati pamatamba;" 
Exodus39:26 pakava nechitare chimwe nedamba rimwezve, pamipendero yejasi kunhivi dzose, rikava jasi rokushumira naro, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:27 Vakaitira Aroni navanakomana vake nguo dzakarukwa nomucheka wakaisvonaka," 
Exodus39:28 nenguwani yomucheka wakaisvonaka, nedzimwe nguwani dzakanaka dzomucheka wakaisvonaka, namabhuruku omucheka wakarukwa wakaisvonaka," 
Exodus39:29 nebhandi romucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, rikava basa romusoni anogona, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:30 Vakaitawo hwendefa rekorona tsvene nendarama yakaisvonaka, vakanyora pamusoro paro sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa, vachiti: MUTSVENE KUNA JEHOVHA." 
Exodus39:31 Vakasungira pariri tambo nhema, kuti vaibatanidze naro panguwani kumusoro, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:32 Naizvozvo basa rose retabhenakeri yetende rokusangana rakapera; vana VaIsiraeri vakaita zvose zvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha, vakaita saizvozvo." 
Exodus39:33 Zvino vakauya netabhenakeri kuna Mosesi, zvaiti: Tende nenhumbi dzaro dzose, nezvikorekedzo zvaro, namatanda aro, nembariro dzaro, nembiru dzaro, nezvigadziko zvaro;" 
Exodus39:34 nechifukidzo chamatehwe amakondohwe akazodzwa muti mutsvuku, nechifukidzo chamatehwe amatenhe, neketani rokudzitira naro;" 
Exodus39:35 neareka yechipupuriro, namatanda okutakura nawo, nechifunhiro chokuyananisa;" 
Exodus39:36 netafura, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nechingwa chokuratidza;" 
Exodus39:37 nechigadziko chakaisvonaka, nemwenje yacho, mwenje yokugadzirirapo, nenhumbi dzacho dzose, namafuta okuvhenekesa nawo;" 
Exodus39:38 neatari yendarama, namafuta okuzodza nawo, nezvinonhuwira zvakanaka, nechidzitiro chomukova weTende;" 
Exodus39:39 neatari yendarira, nechakarukwa chayo chendarira, namatanda, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira, nechigadziko chawo;" 
Exodus39:40 nezvirembedzwa zvaparuvanze, nembiru dzazvo, nezvigadziko zvadzo, neketeni resuwo roruvanze, netambo yacho, nembambo dzacho, nenhumbi dzose dzokubata nadzo patabhenakeri, patende rokusangana;" 
Exodus39:41 nenguo dzakarukwa zvakanaka nouchenjeri dzokushumira nadzo panzvimbo tsvene, nenguo tsvene dzaAroni mupristi, nenguo dzavanakomana vake, dzokushumira nadzo pabasa roupristi." 
Exodus39:42 Zvose sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha, saizvozvo vana VaIsiraeri vakaita mabasa ose." 
Exodus39:43 Mosesi akatarira mabasa ose, akaona kuti vakanga vaaita sezvakanga zvarairwa naJehovha, ndizvo zvavakaita; Mosesi akavaropafadza." 
Exodus40:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Exodus40:2 “Nomusi wokutanga womwedzi unofanira kumisa tabhenakeri netende rokusangana. 
Exodus40:3 Unofanira kuisa mukati mayo areka yechipupuriro, nokudzitira areka neketeni." 
Exodus40:4 Upinzewo tafura, nokugadzira zvinhu zvinofanira kuva pamusoro payo; upinzewo chigadziko chemwenje, ugotungidza mwenje yacho." 
Exodus40:5 Uisewo atari yendarama yezvinonhuwira pamberi peareka yechipupuriro, ugoisa keteni romukova wetabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:6 Zvino uisewo atari yezvibairo zvinopiswa pamberi pomukova wetabhenakeri yetende rokusangana. 
Exodus40:7 Uisewo mudziyo wokushambidzira pakati petende rokusangana neatari, ugodira mvura mukati mawo." 
Exodus40:8 Zvino ugadzirewo ruvanze nokurembedza keteni resuwo roruvanze. 
Exodus40:9 “Utorewo mafuta okuzodza nawo, uzodze tabhenakeri nawo, nezvose zviri mukati mayo; ugoitsaura, iyo nezvose zvirimo, kuti chive chinhu chitsvene." 
Exodus40:10 Uzodzewo atari nezvibairo zvinopiswa, nemidziyo yayo yose, kuti utsaure atari, atari chive chinhu chitsvene–tsvene." 
Exodus40:11 Uzodzewo mudziyo wokushambidzira nechigadziko chawo, uutsaure." 
Exodus40:12 “Zvino uswededze Aroni navanakomana vake kumukova wetende rokusangana, ugovashambidza nemvura." 
Exodus40:13 Ipapo ufukidze Aroni nguo tsvene, ugomuzodza nokumutsaura, kuti andishumire pabasa roupristi." 
Exodus40:14 Usededzewo vanakomana vake, ugovafukidza nguo." 
Exodus40:15 Uvazodze, sezvawazodza baba vavo, kuti vandishumire pabasa roupristi; kuzodzwa kwavo kunofanira kuva kwavari upristi nokusingaperi, kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose.”" 
Exodus40:16 Mosesi akaita saizvozvo; zvose zvaakanga arairwa naJehovha, wakazviita saizvozvo." 
Exodus40:17 Tabhenakeri ikamiswa nomwedzi wokutanga wegore rechipiri nomusi wokutanga womwedzi. 
Exodus40:18 Mosesi akamisa tabhenakeri, akaisa zvigadziko zvayo, akamisa mapuranga ayo, akaisa mbariro dzayo, nokumisa mbiru dzayo." 
Exodus40:19 Akawarira tende pamusoro petabhenakeri, akaisa chifukidzo chetende pamusoro payo, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:20 Akatora chipupuriro, akachiisa muareka, akapinza matanda paareka, akaisa chifunhiro chokuyananisa pamusoro peareka;" 
Exodus40:21 akapinza areka mutabhenakeri, akarembedza keteni rokudzitira nacho, akadzitira areka yechipupuriro; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:22 Akaisa tafura mutende rokusangana, kurutivi rwetabhenakeri nechokumusoro, kunze kweketeni." 
Exodus40:23 Akarongedzawo chingwa pamusoro payo pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:24 Akaisa chigadzikiro chemwenje mutende rokusangana, chakatarisana netafura, kurutivi rwetabhenakeri nechenyasi." 
Exodus40:25 Akatungidza mwenje pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:26 Akaisa atari yendarama mutende rokusangana pamberi peketeni; 
Exodus40:27 akapisirapo zvinonhuwira zvemiti yakanaka, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:28 Akagadzira zvirembedzwa zvomukova wetabhenakeri. 
Exodus40:29 Akaisa atari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa pamukova wetabhenakeri yetende rokusangana, akapisira pamusoro payo chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:30 Akaisa mudziyo wokushambidzira pakati petende rokusangana neatari, akaisa mukati mayo mvura yokushambidza nayo." 
Exodus40:31 Ipapo Mosesi naAroni navanakomana vake vakashamba maoko avo netsoka dzavopo; 
Exodus40:32 pakupinda kwavo mutende rokusangana, napakuswedera kwavo kuatari, vaishamba, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:33 Akagadzirawo ruvanze rwaipoteredza tabhenakeri neatari, akarembedza keteni resuwo roruvanze. Naizvozvo Mosesi akapedza basa rose." 
Exodus40:34 Ipapo gore rakafukidza tende rokusangana, kubwinya kwaJehovha kukazadza tabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:35 Mosesi akasagona kupinda mutende rokusangana, nokuti gore rakaramba rigere pamusoro paro uye kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakanga kwazadza tabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:36 Zvino kana gore rokwidzwa richibva pamusoro petabhenakeri, vana VaIsiraeri vakapfuura vachifamba nzendo dzavo dzose." 
Exodus40:37 Asi kana gore risina kukwidzwa, vaisafamba, kusvikira musi warinozokwidzwa." 
Exodus40:38 Nokuti gore raJehovha rakanga riri pamusoro petabhenakeri masikati, nomoto waiva mariri usiku, pamberi pavose veimba yaIsiraeri panzendo dzavo dzose." 
Leviticus1:1 Zvino Jehovha akadana Mosesi, akataura naye ari mutende rokusangana, akati," 
Leviticus1:2 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti, kwavari, ‘Kana mumwe wenyu achida kuvigira Jehovha chipo chake, munofanira kumuvigira zvipo zvenyu zvezvipfuwo, kana zvemombe kana zvamakwai.’" 
Leviticus1:3 “Kana chipo chake chiri chipiriso chinopiswa chemombe, anofanira kuvigira mukono asina chipomerwa; ngaachibayire pamukova wetende rokusangana, kuti agamuchirwe pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus1:4 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechipiriso chinopiswa, kuti chigamuchirwe panzvimbo yake, chimuyananisire." 
Leviticus1:5 Ngaabaye nzombe pamberi paJehovha, vanakomana vaAroni, vapristi, vagouya neropa, vasase ropa kunhivi dzose dzeatari, iri pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus1:6 Zvino ngaavhiye chipiriso chinopiswa, nokuchigura–gura." 
Leviticus1:7 “Zvino vanakomana vaAroni, mupristi, ngavaise moto paatari, nokugadzirawo huni pamusoro pomoto." 
Leviticus1:8 Ipapo vanakomana vaAroni, vapristi, vanofanira kugadzira nhindi, nomusoro, namafuta pamusoro pehuni dziri pamoto uri pamusoro peatari." 
Leviticus1:9 Asi ngaasuke hura hwacho namakumbo acho nemvura, mupristi agopisa zvose paatari, chive chipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus1:10 “Kana chipo chake chiri chipiriso chinopiswa chezvipfuwo zviduku zvamakwai kana mbudzi, anofanira kuvigira mukono asina chipomerwa." 
Leviticus1:11 “Ngaachibaye parutivi rweatari nechokumusoro pamberi paJehovha; zvino vanakomana vaAroni, vapristi, vanofanira kusasa ropa racho kunhivi dzose dzeatari." 
Leviticus1:12 Ipapo anofanira kugura–gura nhindi pamwechete nomusoro wacho namafuta acho, mupristi agozvigadzira pamusoro pehuni dziri pamoto pamusoro peatari." 
Leviticus1:13 Asi ura namakumbo ngaazvisuke nemvura, mupristi agozvibayira zvose, nokuzvipisira paatari, kuti chive chipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chakaitwa nomoto, chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus1:14 “Kana chipo chake kuna Jehovha chiri chipiriso chinopiswa cheshiri, ngaavigire chibayiro chake chenjiva, kana twana twenjiva." 
Leviticus1:15 Zvino mupristi anofanira kuchiisa paatari, agodonhedzera ropa racho parutivi rweatari;" 
Leviticus1:16 zvino anofanira kutora chihururu chayo neminhenga yayo, ndokuzvirasa kurutivi rweatari kumabudazuva kunoraswa madota." 
Leviticus1:17 Ipapo anofanira kuibvambura namapapiro ayo asingaiparadzanisi, mupristi agoipisa paatari pamusoro pehuni dziri pamoto; icho chipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chakaitwa nomoto, chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus2:1 “Kana munhu achiuya kuna Jehovha nechipo choupfu, chipo chake ngachive choupfu hwakatsetseka; zvino ngaadire mafuta pamusoro pacho, agoisawo zvinonhuwira pamusoro pacho." 
Leviticus2:2 Ipapo ngaachiise kuvanakomana vaAroni, vapristi; iye atsamure tsama yake imwe youpfu hwakatsetseka namafuta nezvinonhuwira zviripo, mupristi agozvipisa paatari, chive chokurangaridza chipo icho, chipiriso chakaitwa nomoto, chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus2:3 Zvakasara pachipiriso choupfu zvichava zvaAroni navanakomana vake; icho chinhu chitsvene–tsvene pakati pezvipiriso zvaJehovha zvakaitwa nomoto. 
Leviticus2:4 “Kana achiuya nechipo choupfu chakabikwa muchoto, ngachive chezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa zvoupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nezvingwa zvitete zvisina kuviriswa zvakazodzwa mafuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Kana chipo chako chiri chipiriso choupfu chakabikwa mugango, ngachive choupfu hwakatsetseka, husina kuviriswa, hwakakanyiwa namafuta." 
Leviticus2:6 Unofanira kuchimedura, nokudira mafuta pamusoro pacho; ndicho chipiriso choupfu." 
Leviticus2:7 Kana chipo chako chiri chipiriso choupfu chakabikwa muhari, ngachiitwe noupfu hwakatsetseka namafuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Unofanira kuuya kuna Jehovha nechipiriso choupfu chakaitwa nezvinhu izvi; ngachipiwe mupristi, iye agochiisa paatari." 
Leviticus2:9 Zvino mupristi ngaatsamure pachipiriso choupfu chokurangaridza chacho, achipisire pamusoro peatari, icho chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus2:10 Zvakasara pachipiriso choupfu ngazvive zvaAroni navanakomana vake; icho chinhu chitsvene–tsvene pakati pezvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto. 
Leviticus2:11 Chipiriso chipi nechipi choupfu chamunouya nacho kuna Jehovha ngachirege kuitwa nembiriso, nokuti hamufaniri kupisira Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto chine mbiriso kana uchi." 
Leviticus2:12 Mungazvivigira Jehovha zviri zvipiriso zvezvitsva zvenyu, asi ngazvirege kuiswa paatari kuti zvive zvinonhuwira zvakanaka." 
Leviticus2:13 Zvipiriso zvako zvose zvoupfu unofanira kuzvirunga nomunyu; usarega kuisa munyu wesungano yaMwari wako pachipiriso chako choupfu, asi uise munyu pazvipiriso zvako zvose." 
Leviticus2:14 “Kana uchivigira Jehovha chipiriso choupfu chezvitsva, uuye nehura dzezviyo dzakakangiwa pamoto, zviyo zvakatswiwa zvehura itsva, chive chipiriso choupfu chezvitsva." 
Leviticus2:15 Unofanira kuisa mafuta pamusoro pacho, nokuisawo furakisenzi, kuti chive chipiriso chembesa." 
Leviticus2:16 Zvino mupristi ngaapise chokurangaridza chacho, zvimwe zvezviyo zvacho zvakatswiwa, nezvimwe zvamafuta acho, pamwechete nezvinonhuwira zvacho; chipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto." 
Leviticus3:1 “Kana chipo chake chiri chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, kana achiuya nemombe, kana iri nzombe kana hadzi, ngaauye nechisina chipomerwa pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus3:2 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechipiriso chake, achiuraye pamukova wetende rokusangana, vanakomana vaAroni, vapristi, vagosasa ropa pamusoro peatari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus3:3 Zvino ngaape Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto pachibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, chokuti mafuta anofukidza hura, namafuta ose ari pahura," 
Leviticus3:4 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, ngaazvibvise pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus3:5 Ipapo vanakomana vaAroni vanofanira kuzvipisa paatari pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa, chiri pamusoro pehuni dziri pamoto; kuti chive chipiriso chinopiswa chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus3:6 “Kana chipo chake chechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa chiri chezvipfuwo zviduku, kana uri mukono kana hadzi, ngaauye nechisina chipomerwa." 
Leviticus3:7 Kana achiuya negwayana rechipiriso chake, ngaauye naro pamberi paJehovha," 
Leviticus3:8 zvino aise ruoko rwake pamusoro pechipo chake, ndokuchiuraya pamberi petende rokusangana, vanakomana vaAroni vagosasa ropa racho pamusoro peatari panhivi dzose." 
Leviticus3:9 Zvino ngaape Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa pamoto pachibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, chokuti mafuta aro nebhemhe rose, azvibvise pedyo nomusana, namafuta anofukidza hura, namafuta ose ari pamusoro pohura," 
Leviticus3:10 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, ngaazvibvise pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus3:11 Ipapo mupristi ngaazvipise pamusoro peatari; ndizvo zvokudya zvechipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto. 
Leviticus3:12 “Kana chipo chake chiri chembudzi, ngaauye nayo pamberi paJehovha;" 
Leviticus3:13 zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wayo, aiuraye pamberi petende rokusongana; vanakomana vaAroni vagosasa ropa rayo pamusoro peatari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus3:14 Zvino ngaape zvimwe zvazvo chive chipo chake, chipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto; zvinoti mafuta anofukidza hura, namafuta ose ari pamusoro pehura," 
Leviticus3:15 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, azvibvise pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus3:16 Zvino mupristi ngaazvipise pamusoro peatari; ndizvo zvokudya zvechipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, zvive zvinonhuwira zvakanaka; mafuta ose ndeaJehovha." 
Leviticus3:17 Ngauve murairo usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose padzimba dzenyu dzose, kuti murege kudya mafuta neropa.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus4:2 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti, ‘Kana munhu akatadza nokusaziva pachinhu chimwe chezvakarairwa naJehovha kuti zvirege kuitwa, akaita chimwe chazvo;" 
Leviticus4:3 kana mupristi wakazodzwa akatadza, akapinza vanhu pamhosva, anofanira kuvigira Jehovha nzombe duku isina chipomerwa, nokuda kwezvivi zvake zvaakatadza, kuti chive chipiriso chezvivi.’" 
Leviticus4:4 Ngaauye nenzombe duku pamukova wetende rokusangana pamberi paJehovha, aise ruoko rwake pamusoro wenzombe, nokuuraya nzombe pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus4:5 Zvino mupristi wakazodzwa ngaatore rimwe ropa renzombe, ariise patende rokusangana," 
Leviticus4:6 mupristi agonyika munwe wake muropa, nokusasa rimwe ropa kanomwe pamberi paJehovha, pamberi peketeni renzvimbo tsvene." 
Leviticus4:7 Zvino mupristi aise rimwe ropa pamberi paJehovha panyanga dzeatari yezvinonhuwira zvakanaka, iri mutende rokusangana, agodurura rimwe ropa rose renzombe mujinga meatari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, iri pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus4:8 Zvino ngaabvise mafuta ose enzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, mafuta anofukidza hura, namafuta ose ari pamusoro pohura," 
Leviticus4:9 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, ngaazvibvise pamwechete netsvo," 
Leviticus4:10 sezvaanobviswa panzombe yechipiriso chokuyananisa nacho; zvino mupristi ngaazvipise pamusoro peatari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa. 
Leviticus4:11 Dehwe renzombe, nenyama yayo yose, pamwechete nomusoro wayo namakumbo ayo, nohura hwayo, namazvizvi ayo;" 
Leviticus4:12 nzombe yose iyo unofanira kuitakurira kunze kwemisasa, pakanaka, panorasirwa madota, nokuipisira pamusoro pehuni nomoto; ngaipisirwe panorasirwa madota." 
Leviticus4:13 “Kana ungano yose yaIsiraeri ikatadza nokusaziva chinhu ichocho chikasazikanwa neungano, kana vakaita chimwe chezvinhu zvakarairwa naJehovha kuti zvirege kuitwa, vakapara mhaka;" 
Leviticus4:14 kana chivi chavakatadza chikazozikanwa, zvino ungano ngaiuye nenzombe duku, chive chipiriso chezvivi, iwuyiswe pamberi petende rokusangana." 
Leviticus4:15 Zvino vakuru veungano ngavaise maoko avo pamusoro wenzombe pamberi paJehovha, nzombe igourayiwa pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus4:16 Zvino mupristi wakazodzwa ngaauye nerimwe ropa renzombe patende rokusangana," 
Leviticus4:17 mupristi anyike munwe wake muropa, arisase kanomwe pamberi paJehovha, pamberi peketeni." 
Leviticus4:18 Zvino ngaaise rimwe ropa panyanga dzeatari iri pamberi paJehovha, iri mutende rokusangana; rimwe ropa rose agoridururira mujinga meatari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, iri pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus4:19 Zvino ngaabvise mafuta ose aripo, aapise pamusoro peatari." 
Leviticus4:20 Ndizvo zvaanofanira kuitira nzombe; sezvaakaitira nzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, ndizvo zvaanofanira kuitira iyi; mupristi anofanira kuvayananisira, vakanganwirwe." 
Leviticus4:21 Zvino unofanira kutakurira nzombe kunze kwemisasa, anoipisa, sezvaakapisa nzombe yokutanga; ndicho chipiriso chezvivi cheungano." 
Leviticus4:22 “Kana mukuru akatadza, akaita nokusaziva chimwe chezvinhu zvose zvakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wake kuti zvirege kuitwa, akapara mhaka;" 
Leviticus4:23 kana chivi chake chaakatadza akachiziviswa, ngaauye nenhongo yembudzi isina chipomerwa, chive chipiriso chake." 
Leviticus4:24 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wembudzi, aiuraye panourayirwa chipiriso chinopiswa pamberi paJehovha, chive chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus4:25 Zvino mupristi ngaatore rimwe ropa rechipiriso chezvivi nomunwe wake, ariise panyanga dzeatari yechipiriso chinopiswa, nerimwe ropa rayo aridururire mujinga meatari yechipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus4:26 Mafuta ayo ose ngaapiswe pamusoro peatari, sezvavakaita namafuta echipiriso chokuyananisa; mupristi amuyananisire pamusoro pezvivi zvake, akanganwirwe." 
Leviticus4:27 “Kana mumwe wavanhu zvavo akatadza akaita nokusaziva chimwe chezvinhu zvakarairwa naJehovha kuti zvirege kuitwa, akapara mhaka;" 
Leviticus4:28 kana chivi chake chaakatadza akachiziviswa, ngaauye nesheche yembudzi isina mhosva, chive chipiriso chake pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza." 
Leviticus4:29 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechipiriso chezvivi, auraye chipiriso chezvivi panourayirwa chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus4:30 Zvino mupristi ngaatore rimwe ropa rayo nomunwe wake, ariise panyanga dzeatari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, asi rimwe ropa rayo rose ngaaridururire mujinga meatari." 
Leviticus4:31 Zvino ngaabvise mafuta ayo ose, sezvinobviswa mafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa nazvo, mupristi agoapisa pamusoro peatari, chive chinhu chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha; mupristi anofanira kumuyananisira, akanganwirwe." 
Leviticus4:32 “Kana akauya negwayana rokuita naro chipiriso chake chezvivi, ngaauye nesheche isina chipomerwa." 
Leviticus4:33 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechipiriso chezvivi, agoriuraya panourayirwa chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus4:34 Zvino mupristi ngaatore rimwe ropa rechipiriso chezvivi nomunwe wake, ariise panyanga dzeatari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, asi rimwe ropa raro rose ngaaridururire mujinga meatari;" 
Leviticus4:35 zvino ngaabvise mafuta aro ose, sezvinobviswa mafuta egwayana pachibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa nazvo; mupristi aapise pamusoro peatari sezvinoitwa nezvipiriso zvose zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto; mupristi anofanira kumuyananisira pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza, akanganwirwe." 
Leviticus5:1 “Kana munhu akatadza, ari chapupu akapikirwa kupupura chinhu chaakaona, kana chaanoziva, akasadudza, achava nemhosva yake." 
Leviticus5:2 “Kunyangwe kana munhu akanga abata chinhu chisakanaka, kana chiri chitunha chemhuka isakanaka, kana chitunha chemombe isakanaka, kana chitunha chezvinokambaira zvisakanaka, zvikasazikanwa naye, akasvibiswa, achava nemhosva." 
Leviticus5:3 “Kana akanga abata zvisakanaka zvomunhu, kana zviri zvisakanaka zvipi nezvipi akasvibiswa nazvo, zvikasazikanwa naye; kana akazozviziva, achava nemhosva." 
Leviticus5:4 “Kana munhu akapika nomuromo wake, asingafungi kwazvo, kundoita zvakaipa kana kundoita zvakanaka, chinhu chipi nechipi chaakapika, asingafungi kwazvo, chikasazikanwa naye; kana akazochiziva, achava nemhosva kune chimwe chaizvozvo;" 
Leviticus5:5 zvino kana akava nemhosva kune chimwe chaizvozvo, anofanira kuzvireurura zvaakatadza." 
Leviticus5:6 “Zvino ngaauye nechipiriso chake chemhosva pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza, ngaive hadzi yezvipfuwo zviduku, kana gwayana kana mbudzana, chive chipiriso chezvivi; mupristi ngaamuyananisire pamusoro pezvivi zvake." 
Leviticus5:7 “Kana asingagoni kuuya negwayana, ngaavigire Jehovha njiva mbiri, kana twana tuviri twenjiva, chive chipiriso chemhosva yake yaakatadza; imwe ive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus5:8 Zvino ngaauye nadzo kumupristi, iye atange kubaya imwe yechipiriso chezvivi, agure musoro wayo pamutsipa, asi arege kuiparadzanisa;" 
Leviticus5:9 zvino ngaasase ropa rechipiriso chezvivi kurutivi rweatari, asi ropa rakasara risvinirwe mujinga meatari; chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus5:10 Yechipiri ngaaite nayo chipiriso chinopiswa, sezvamakarairwa; mupristi amuyananisire pamusoro pezvivi zvaakatadza, akanganwirwe." 
Leviticus5:11 “Asi kana akasagona kuuya nenjiva mbiri, kana notwana tuviri twenjiva, ngaauye nechipiriso chake pamusoro pokutadza kwake, chive chegumi cheefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso chezvivi; ngaarege kudira mafuta pamusoro pahwo, kana kuisa zvinonhuwira pamusoro pahwo, nokuti chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus5:12 Zvino ngaauye nahwo kumupristi, mupristi atsamure tsama imwe yahwo, chive chokurangaridza chacho; zvino ngaahwuise pamusoro peatari, sezvinoitwa nezvimwe zvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto; chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus5:13 Mupristi anofanira kumuyananisira pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza pachinhu chimwe chaizvozvo, akanganwirwe. Zvakasara ngazvive zvomupristi, sezvinoitwa nechipiriso choupfu.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus5:15 “Kana munhu akadarika, akatadza nokusaziva pazvinhu zvitsvene zvaJehovha, ngaauye kuna Jehovha nechipiriso chemhosva yake, chehondohwe isina chipomerwa chamakwai ake, uchimutarira mashekeri esirivha uchienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene; chive chipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus5:16 Ngaatsive chinhu chaakatadza pachinhu chitsvene, awedzere pachiri chimwe cheshanu chacho, achipe mupristi, mupristi agomuyananisira negondohwe rechipiriso chemhosva, akanganwirwe." 
Leviticus5:17 “Kana munhu akatadza, akaita chinhu chimwe chezvinhu zvakanga zvarairwa naJehovha kuti zvirege kuitwa; kunyangwe asina kuziva, ane mhosva, uchatakura kutadza kwake." 
Leviticus5:18 Ngaauye kumupristi negondohwe ramakwai ake risina chipomerwa, sezvaunofunga iwe, chive chipiriso chemhosva, mupristi agomuyananisira pamusoro pechinhu chaakanga atadza nokusaziva, asingazivi, akanganwirwe." 
Leviticus5:19 Chipiriso chemhosva; zvirokwazvo une mhosva pamberi paJehovha.” 
Leviticus6:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus6:2 “Kana munhu akatadza, akadarika murairo waJehovha, akanyengera wokwake pachinhu chaakanga apiwa kuchengeta, kana chakanga chaiswa paruoko rwake, kana pakumubira, kana pakumanikidza wokwake;" 
Leviticus6:3 kana akanonga chakanga charashika, akanyengera pachiri, akapika nhema; pachinhu chipi nechipi chazvose izvo, kana munhu achinge aita akatadza pachiri;" 
Leviticus6:4 zvino kana akatadza, ane mhosva, anofanira kudzosa chaakanga atora nokuba, kana chaakanga awana nokumanikidza, kana chaakanga apiwa kuchengeta, kana chakanga charashika akachinonga;" 
Leviticus6:5 kana chinhu chipi nechipi chaakanga apika nhema pamusoro pacho; ngaachidzose chose, awedzere kwachiri cheshanu chacho, achipe muridzi wacho nomusi waanowanikwa kuti ane mhosva." 
Leviticus6:6 Anofanira kuuya kumupristi nechipiriso chemhosva yake kuna Jehovha, chehondohwe yamakwai ake isina chipomerwa, sezvaunotara iwe, chive chipiriso chemhosva;" 
Leviticus6:7 zvino mupristi amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha, akanganwirwe pamusoro pemhosva ipi neipi yaakaita.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus6:9 “Raira Aroni navanakomana vake, uti, ‘Murairo wechipiriso chinopiswa ndiwo: Chipiriso chinopiswa chinofanira kuvata pachoto pamusoro peatari usiku hwose kusvikira mangwanani, moto urambe uchipfuta pamusoro pacho.’" 
Leviticus6:10 Zvino mupristi ngaafuke nguo yake yomucheka, nokufukawo bhurukwa rake romucheka pamuviri wake, abvise madota echipiriso chinopiswa, chapiswa nomoto paatari, aaise parutivi rweatari." 
Leviticus6:11 Zvino ngaabvise nguo dzake, afuke dzimwe nguo, agotakurira madota kunze kwemisasa panzvimbo yakanaka." 
Leviticus6:12 Moto paatari unofanira kuramba uchipfuta pamusoro payo, haufaniri kudzima; mupristi anofanira kubatidza huni pamusoro payo mangwanani ose; zvino ngaagadzire chipiriso chinopiswa pamusoro payo, apise mafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa pamusoro payo." 
Leviticus6:13 Moto ngaurambe uchipfuta pamusoro peatari nguva dzose, urege kudzima." 
Leviticus6:14 “Murairo wechipiriso choupfu ndiwo: Vanakomana vaAroni vanofanira kuuya nacho pamberi paJehovha paatari. 
Leviticus6:15 Zvino ngaatsamure tsama imwe yake youpfu, namamwe mafuta acho, nezvinonhuwira zvose zviri pamusoro pechipiriso choupfu, azvipise pamusoro peatari, chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka, chokurangaridza chacho, kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus6:16 Zvakasara zvacho ngazvidyiwe naAroni navanakomana vake; zvidyiwe zvisina mbiriso panzvimbo tsvene; ngavazvidye paruvanze rwetende rokusangana. 
Leviticus6:17 Ngachirege kubikwa nembiriso; ndakachipa semugove wavo wezvipiriso zvangu zvinoitwa nomoto; chinhu chitsvene kwazvo, sechipiriso chezvivi, nechipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus6:18 Varume vose kuvana vaAroni ngavazvidye, uve murairo usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose pazvipiriso zvose zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto; munhu upi noupi unozvibata, uchava mutsvene.”" 
Leviticus6:19 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus6:20 “Ndicho chipo chaAroni nechavanakomana vake chavanofanira kupa Jehovha nomusi waanozodzwa nawo: Chegumi cheefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso choupfu nguva dzose, hafu yacho mangwanani, hafu yacho madekwana." 
Leviticus6:21 Ngachibikwe namafuta mugango; kana chaibva, uuye nacho; unofanira kuuya nechipiriso choupfu zvimedu–zvimedu zvakakangwa, chive chinhu chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus6:22 Mupristi unozodzwa panzvimbo yake pakati pavanakomana vake, ndiye anofanira kuuya nacho; uve mutemo usingaperi kuti chipisirwe Jehovha chose." 
Leviticus6:23 Chipiriso chimwe nechimwe choupfu chomupristi chinofanira kupiswa chose; hachifaniri kudyiwa.” 
Leviticus6:24 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus6:25 “Taura naAroni navanakomana vake uti, ‘Murairo wechipiriso chezvivi ndiwo: Panourayiwa chipiriso chinopiswa ndipo panofanira kuurayirwawo chipiriso chezvivi pamberi paJehovha; chitsvene kwazvo.’" 
Leviticus6:26 Mupristi unochibayira pamusoro pezvivi, ndiye anofanira kuchidya; chinofanira kudyiwa panzvimbo tsvene, paruvanze rwetende rokusangana."
