Leviticus6:27 Chinhu chipi nechipi chinogunzva nyama yacho chichava chitsvene; kana rimwe ropa racho rikadonhera panguo ipi neipi, unofanira kusuka icho chakadonherwa naro panzvimbo tsvene." 
Leviticus6:28 Asi hari yevhu mayakabikirwa, inofanira kuputswa; kana yakabikwa muhari yendarira inofanira kukwizwa nokusukurudzwa nemvura." 
Leviticus6:29 Zvino varume vose kuvapristi vanofanira kuchidya; chitsvene kwazvo. 
Leviticus6:30 Zvipiriso zvose zvezvivi, kana rimwe ropa razvo rakaiswa mutende rokusangana kuzoyananisira panzvimbo tsvene, ngazvirege kudyiwa; zvinofanira kupiswa nomoto." 
Leviticus7:1 “Murairo wechipiriso chemhosva ndiwo uyu: Mutsvene kwazvo. 
Leviticus7:2 Pavanourayira chipiriso chinopiswa, ndipo pavanofanira kuuraya chipiriso chemhosva; ropa racho unofanira kurisasa pamusoro peatari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus7:3 Zvino ngaapisire mafuta acho ose, mafuta ebhemhe, namafuta anofukidza ura," 
Leviticus7:4 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, ngaazvibvise pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus7:5 Zvino mupristi ngaazvipise paatari, chive chipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto; chipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus7:6 Varume vose kuvapristi ngavachidye; chidyiwe panzvimbo tsvene; chitsvene kwazvo. 
Leviticus7:7 “Sezvinoitwa nechipiriso chezvivi, ndizvo zvinoitwawo nechipiriso chemhosva; murairo wazvo ndomumwe; chichava chomupristi unoyananisira nacho." 
Leviticus7:8 Uye mupristi, unopisira chipiriso chinopiswa chomunhu, uyo mupristi anofanira kupiwa dehwe rechipiriso chinopiswa chaakauya nacho." 
Leviticus7:9 Chipiriso chimwe nechimwe choupfu, chakabikwa muchoto, nezvose zvakagadzirwa mugango kana muhari, zvichava zvomupristi unouya nazvo." 
Leviticus7:10 Chipiriso chimwe nechimwe choupfu, chakakanyiwa namafuta, kana chakaoma, chinofanira kupiwa vanakomana vaAroni, mumwe nomumwe, vachienzaniswa." 
Leviticus7:11 “Ndiwo murairo wezvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, zvinofanira kupiwa Jehovha:" 
Leviticus7:12 Kana munhu akazvipa, kuti avonge nazvo, pamwechete nechibayiro chokuvonga nacho, anofanira kupa zvingwa zviduku zvisina kuviriswa zvakakanyiwa namafuta, nezvingwa zvitete zvisina kuviriswa zvakazodzwa mafuta, nezvingwa zvakakanyiwa namafuta zvoupfu hwakatsetseka zvakakangwa." 
Leviticus7:13 Anofanira kupawo chipo chake chezvingwa zvakaviriswa pamwechete nechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa zvokuvonga nazvo. 
Leviticus7:14 Zvino pachipiriso chimwe nechimwe chive chipiriso chinosimudzirwa Jehovha; chichava chomupristi unosasa ropa rezvipiriso zvokuyananisa. 
Leviticus7:15 Nyama yechibayiro chezvipiriso zvake zvokuyananisa zvokuvonga nazvo inofanira kudyiwa nomusi waanopa chipo chake; haafaniri kusiya chimwe chacho kusvikira mangwanani. 
Leviticus7:16 “Asi kana chibayiro chechipo chake chiri chinhu chaakapika, kana chipo chokuda kwake, chinofanira kudyiwa nomusi waanobayira chibayiro chake; zvakasara pazviri zvinofanira kudyiwa mangwanani;" 
Leviticus7:17 asi zvakasara zvenyama yechibayiro zvinofanira kupiswa nomoto nezuva retatu. 
Leviticus7:18 Kana imwe nyama yechibayiro chezvipiriso zvake zvokuyananisa ikadyiwa nezuva retatu, hazvingagamuchirwi nomufaro kana kunzi zvakanaka kuna iye wakazvipa; chichava chinhu chinonyangadza, nomunhu unozvidya uchava nemhosva." 
Leviticus7:19 Nyama yakabatana nechinhu chisakanaka, haifaniri kudyiwa, inofanira kupiswa nomoto. “Asi imwe nyama mumwe nomumwe wakanatswa ungaidya." 
Leviticus7:20 Asi munhu unodya nyama yechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, zviri zvaJehovha, achiri netsvina yake, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus7:21 Kana ani naani akabata chinhu chisakanaka, kana zviri zvisakanaka zvomunhu kana zvemhuka isakanaka, kana chimwe chinhu chisakanaka chinonyangadza, akadya nyama yechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa zviri zvaJehovha, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus7:23 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti, ‘Musadya mafuta, kana emombe, kana egwai, kana embudzi." 
Leviticus7:24 Mafuta echinhu chakangofa choga, namafuta echinhu chakaurayiwa nezvikara, angabatwa nawo pamabasa ose, asi hamufaniri kutongoadya.’" 
Leviticus7:25 Nokuti ani naani unodya mafuta ezvipfuwo zvavanoitira Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, munhu unoadya anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus7:26 Regai kudya ropa ripi neripi, kana riri reshiri, kana rezvipfuwo, padzimba dzenyu dzose." 
Leviticus7:27 Ani naani unodya ropa ripi neripi, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus7:29 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri uti, ‘Munhu unobayira Jehovha chibayiro chake chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, anofanira kuuya nechipo chake kuna Jehovha chinobva pachibayiro chezvipiriso zvake zvokuyananisa;" 
Leviticus7:30 maoko ake amene anofanira kuuya nezvipiriso zvinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto; ngaauye namafuta pamwechete nechityu, kuti chityu chizunguzirwe, chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha.’" 
Leviticus7:31 Zvino mupristi ngaapise mafuta paatari, asi chityu ndechaAroni navanakomana vake." 
Leviticus7:32 Munofanira kupa mupristi bandauko rorudyi, chive chipiriso chinosimudzwa pazvibairo zvezvipiriso zvenyu zvokuyananisa." 
Leviticus7:33 Uyo pakati pavanakomana vaAroni unopisira ropa rezvipiriso zvokuyananisa namafuta, ndiye uchapiwa bandauko rorudyi uve mugove wake." 
Leviticus7:34 Nokuti chityu chinozunguzirwa nebandauko rinosimudzwa, ndizvo zvandakatora kuvana VaIsiraeri pakati pezvibairo zvezvipiriso zvavo zvokuyananisa, ndikazvipa Aroni mupristi, navanakomana vake, chive chavo nokusingaperi, chinobva kuvana VaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus7:35 “Ndiwo mugove waAroni, nomugove wavanakomana vake pazvipiriso zvinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto, nomusi waakavagadza nawo kuti vabatire Jehovha pabasa roupristi;" 
Leviticus7:36 wakarairwa naJehovha kuti vapiwe navana VaIsiraeri nomusi wokuzodzwa kwavo. Ndiwo mugove wavo nokusingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose. 
Leviticus7:37 Ndiwo murairo wechipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu, nechipiriso chezvivi, nechipiriso chemhosva, nowokugadza, nowezvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa;" 
Leviticus7:38 wakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha pagomo reSinai, nomusi waakaraira vana VaIsiraeri, kuti vape Jehovha zvipo zvavo murenje reSinai.”" 
Leviticus8:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus8:2 “Tora Aroni, navanakomana vake, nenguo, namafuta okuzodza nawo, nenzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, namakondohwe maviri nedengu rezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa;" 
Leviticus8:3 uunganidze ungano yose pamukova wetende rokusangana.” 
Leviticus8:4 Mosesi akaita sezvaakarairwa naJehovha, ungano ikaunganidzwa pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus8:5 Zvino Mosesi akati kuungano, “Ndizvo zvakarairwa naJehovha kuti zviitwe.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Mosesi akauya naAroni navanakomana vake, akavashambidza nemvura," 
Leviticus8:7 akamufukidza jasi, ndokumusunga chiuno nebhandi, akamufukidza nguo, akamuisa efodhi, nokumusunga chiuno nebhandi reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri, ndokurisungira kwaari naro." 
Leviticus8:8 Akamuisa hombodo yechipfuva, ndokuisa Urimi neTumimi muhombodo yechipfuva." 
Leviticus8:9 Akaisawo ngowani pamusoro wake; pangowani nechemberi akaisa hwendefa rendarama, ndiyo korona tsvene; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:10 Zvino Mosesi akatora mafuta okuzodza nawo, akazodza tabhenakeri, nezvose zvakanga zvirimo, akazvitsaura." 
Leviticus8:11 Akasasa mamwe kanomwe paatari, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira, nechigadziko chawo, kuti azvitsaure." 
Leviticus8:12 Akadirawo mamwe mafuta okuzodza nawo pamusoro waAroni, akamuzodza kuti amutsaure." 
Leviticus8:13 Ipapo Mosesi akauya navanakomana vaAroni, akavafukidza majasi, akavasunga zviuno namabhandi, akavaisa ngowani, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:14 Akauya nenzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro wenzombe yechipiriso chezvivi;" 
Leviticus8:15 akaibaya; Mosesi ndokutora ropa, ndokuriisa panyanga dzeatari kunhivi dzose nomunwe wake, akanatsa atari, ndokudururira ropa mujinga meatari, akaitsaura, kuti aiyananisire." 
Leviticus8:16 Akatora mafuta ose akanga ari pamusoro poura, namafuta akanga ari pamusoro pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, namafuta adzo, Mosesi akazvipisa paatari." 
Leviticus8:17 Asi nzombe nedehwe rayo, nenyama yayo, namazvizvi ayo, wakazvipisa nomoto kunze kwemisasa, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:18 Akauya negondohwe rechipiriso chinopiswa; Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro wegondohwe. 
Leviticus8:19 Akariuraya; Mosesi akasasa ropa pamusoro peatari kunhivi dzose. 
Leviticus8:20 Akagura–gura gondohwe, Mosesi akapisa musoro nenhindi namafuta." 
Leviticus8:21 Akasuka ura namakumbo nemvura, Mosesi akapisa gondohwe rose paatari, chikava chipiriso chinopiswa chainhuwira zvakanaka; chikava chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha nomoto; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:22 Zvino akauyawo nerimwe gondohwe, gondohwe rokugadza naro, Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro wegondohwe." 
Leviticus8:23 Akaribaya, Mosesi akatora rimwe ropa raro, akariisa pamucheto wezasi wenzeve yaAroni yorudyi, napagunwe roruoko rwake rworudyi, napagunwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi." 
Leviticus8:24 Akauyisa vanakomana vaAroni, Mosesi akaisa rimwe ropa pamicheto yezasi yenzeve dzavo dzorudyi, napazvigunwe zvamaoko avo orudyi, napamagunwe etsoka dzavo dzorudyi; Mosesi akasasa ropa pamusoro peatari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus8:25 Akatora mafuta nebhemhe, namafuta ose akanga ari pamusoro poura, namafuta akanga ari pamusoro pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, namafuta adzo, nebandauko rorudyi;" 
Leviticus8:26 akatora mudengu rezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa, zvaiva pamberi paJehovha, chingwa chimwe chiduku chisina kuviriswa, nechingwa chimwe chiduku chezvingwa zvakazodzwa mafuta, nechingwa chitete chimwe, akazviisa pamusoro pamafuta, napamusoro pebandauko rorudyi;" 
Leviticus8:27 akaisa zvose pamaoko aAroni, napamaoko avanakomana vake, akazvizunguzira pamberi paJehovha, kuti chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa." 
Leviticus8:28 Ipapo Mosesi akazvitora zvose pamaoko ake, akazvipisa paatari pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa; zvikava zvokugadza nazvo, zvikanhuwira zvakanaka; chikava chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha nomoto." 
Leviticus8:29 Zvino Mosesi akatora chityu akachizunguzira pamberi paJehovha, kuti chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa; ndiwo waiva mugove waMosesi pagondohwe rokugadza naro; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:30 Ipapo Mosesi akatora mamwe mafuta okuzodza nawo, nerimwe ropa rakanga riri paatari, akarisasa pamusoro paAroni napamusoro penguo dzake, napamusoro pavanakomana vake, napamusoro penguo dzavanakomana vake pamwechete naye; akatsaura Aroni nenguo dzake, navanakomana vake, nenguo dzavanakomana vake pamwechete naye." 
Leviticus8:31 Mosesi akati kuna Aroni navanakomana vake, “Bikai nyama pamukova wetende rokusangana, muidyirepo nechingwa chiri mudengu rokugadza naro, sezvandakaraira ndichiti, ‘Aroni navanakomana vake vanofanira kuzvidya.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Asi zvakasara zvenyama nechingwa munofanira kuzvipisa nomoto. 
Leviticus8:33 Musabuda pamukova wetende rokusangana mazuva manomwe, kusvikira mazuva okugadza kwenyu apera; nokuti iye uchakugadzai mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus8:34 Sezvakaitwa zuva ranhasi, Jehovha wakaraira kuti zviitwe saizvozvo, kuti muyananisirwe." 
Leviticus8:35 Garai pamukova wetende rokusangana masikati nousiku mazuva manomwe, muchengete zvamakarairwa naJehovha, kuti urege kufa; nokuti ndizvo zvandakarairwa.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Zvino Aroni navanakomana vake vakaita zvose zvakanga zvarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMosesi. 
Leviticus9:1 Zvino nomusi werusere Mosesi wakadana Aroni navanakomana vake, navakuru VaIsiraeri," 
Leviticus9:2 akati kuna Aroni, “Tora mukomo wemhuru chive chipiriso chezvivi, negondohwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa, zvisina mhosva, uuye nazvo pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus9:3 Utaure navana VaIsiraeri, uti, ‘Torai nhongo yembudzi chive chipiriso chezvivi, nemhuru, negwayana, zvose zvegore rimwe, zvisina chipomerwa, chive chipiriso chinopiswa," 
Leviticus9:4 nenzombe, negondohwe zvive zvipiriso zvokuyananisa, muzvibayire pamberi paJehovha; nechipiriso choupfu hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nokuti nhasi Jehovha unozviratidza kwamuri.’ ”" 
Leviticus9:5 Zvino ivo vakauya nezvakanga zvarairwa naMosesi pamberi pomukova wetende rokusangana, ungano yose ikaswedera, vakamira pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus9:6 Ipapo Mosesi akati, “Ndicho chinhu chakarairwa naJehovha kuti muchiite, kuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kuzviratidze kwamuri.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Mosesi akati kuna Aroni, “Swedera kuatari ubayire chipiriso chako chezvivi, nechipiriso chako chinopiswa, uzviyananisire iwe navanhu; uuyewo nechipo chavanhu, kuti uvayananisire, sezvakarairwa naJehovha.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Ipapo Aroni wakaswedera kuatari, akabaya mhuru yechipiriso chezvivi, chakanga chiri chake." 
Leviticus9:9 Vanakomana vaAroni vakauya neropa, akariisa panyanga dzeatari, akadurura ropa mujinga meatari;" 
Leviticus9:10 asi mafuta, netsvo, namafuta akanga ari pamusoro pechiropa chechipiriso chezvivi, wakazvipisa pamusoro peatari, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Leviticus9:11 Nyama nedehwe akazvipisa nomoto kunze kwemisasa. 
Leviticus9:12 Akabaya chipiriso chinopiswa; vanakomana vaAroni vakamugamuchidza ropa, iye akarisasa pamusoro peatari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus9:13 Ipapo vakamugamuchidzawo chipiriso chinopiswa, nhindi imwe neimwe, nomusoro, akazvipisa pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa pamusoro peatari." 
Leviticus9:14 Akasuka ura namakumbo, akazvipisa pamusoro peatari." 
Leviticus9:15 Ipapo akauya nechipo chavanhu, akatora mbudzi yechipiriso chezvivi, chaiva chavanhu, akaibaya, akaibayira zvivi, seyokutanga." 
Leviticus9:16 Ipapo akauya nechipiriso chinopiswa, akachibayira sezvakanga zvarairwa." 
Leviticus9:17 Akauyawo nechipiriso choupfu, akatsamurapo tsama yake, ndokuchipisira pamusoro peatari, achiwedzera pachipiriso chinopiswa chamangwanani." 
Leviticus9:18 Akabayawo nzombe negondohwe, kuti chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisira vanhu; vanakomana vaAroni vakamugamuchidza ropa, akarisasa pamusoro peatari kunhivi dzose;" 
Leviticus9:19 namafuta enzombe, neehondohwe, nebhemhe, namafuta anofukidza ura, netsvo, namafuta anofukidza chiropa;" 
Leviticus9:20 akaisa mafuta pamusoro pechityu, akapisa mafuta pamusoro peatari;" 
Leviticus9:21 Aroni akazunguzira zvityu nebandauko rorudyi, kuti chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvarairwa naMosesi." 
Leviticus9:22 Zvino Aroni wakasimudzira maoko ake kuvanhu, akavaropafadza; akaburuka, apedza kubayira chipiriso chezvivi, nechipiriso chinopiswa, nezvibairo zvokuyananisa nazvo." 
Leviticus9:23 Mosesi naAroni vakapinda mutende rokusangana, vakabudazve, vakaropafadza vanhu; kubwinya kwaJehovha kukaonekwa navanhu vose." 
Leviticus9:24 Ipapo moto wakabuda pamberi paJehovha, ukapisa chipiriso chinopiswa namafuta pamusoro peatari; vanhu vose vakati vachizviona vakadanidzira, vakawira pasi nezviso zvavo." 
Leviticus10:1 Zvino Nadhabhi naAbhihu, vanakomana vaAroni, vakatora mumwe nomumwe harana yake yezvinonhuwira, vakaisamo moto, ndokuisa zvinonhuwira pamusoro pawo, vakauya pamberi paJehovha nomoto usina kutenderwa waasina kuraira." 
Leviticus10:2 Ipapo moto wakabuda pamberi paJehovha, ukavauraya, vakafa pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus10:3 Zvino Mosesi akati kuna Aroni, “Jehovha akataura chinhu ichi, akati, ‘Ndichazviratidza kuti ndiri mutsvene muna vose vanoswedera kwandiri, ndichazvirumbidza pamberi pavanhu vose.’ ” Aroni akanyarara." 
Leviticus10:4 Ipapo Mosesi akadana Mishaeri naErizafani, vanakomana vaUzieri, babamunini vaAroni, akati kwavari, “Swederai, mubvise hama dzenyu pamberi penzvimbo tsvene, muvatakurire kunze kwemisasa.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Ipapo vakaswedera, vakavatakurira kunze kwemisasa vanamajasi avo, sezvakanga zvataurwa naMosesi." 
Leviticus10:6 Zvino Mosesi akati kuna Aroni nokuna Ereazari nokuna Itamari, vanakomana vake, “Musasunungura vudzi remisoro yenyu, kana kubvarura nguo dzenyu, kuti murege kufa, naiye arege kutsamwira ungano yose; asi hama dzenyu, veimba yose yaIsiraeri, ivo ngavacheme kupisa kwakatungidzwa naJehovha." 
Leviticus10:7 Musabuda pamukova wetende rokusangana, kuti murege kufa, nokuti mafuta okuzodza aJehovha ari pamusoro penyu.” Vakaita sezvavakaudzwa naMosesi." 
Leviticus10:8 Zvino Jehovha akataura naAroni akati," 
Leviticus10:9 “Usanwa waini kana chinhu chinodhakwa, iwe navanakomana vako pamwechete newe, kana muchipinda mutende rokusangana, kuti murege kufa; uve murairo usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose." 
Leviticus10:10 Munofanira kutsaura pakati pezvitsvene nezvisati zviri zvitsvene, pakati pezvisina kunaka nezvakanaka;" 
Leviticus10:11 munofanira kudzidzisa vana VaIsiraeri mirairo yose yakarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMosesi.” 
Leviticus10:12 Zvino Mosesi wakataura naAroni naEreazari naItamari, vanakomana vake vakanga vasara, akati, “Torai chipiriso choupfu chakasara pazvipiriso zvakapisirwa Jehovha nomoto, muzvidyire kurutivi rweatari zvisina mbiriso, nokuti zvitsvene kwazvo;" 
Leviticus10:13 munofanira kuzvidyira panzvimbo tsvene, nokuti ndiwo mugove wako nomugove wavanakomana vako pazvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto, nokuti ndizvo zvandakarairwa." 
Leviticus10:14 Munofanira kudyira panzvimbo tsvene chityu chinozunguzirwa nebandauko rinosimudzwa, iwe navanakomana vako navanasikana vako pamwechete newe, nokuti makazvipiwa, kuti uve mugove wako, nomugove wavanakomana vako pazvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa zvevana VaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus10:15 Vanofanira kuuya nebandauko rinosimudzwa; nechityu chinozunguzirwa, pamwechete nezvipiriso zvamafuta zvinopiswa nomoto, kuti vazvizunguzire, chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha; chinofanira kuva chako nechavanakomana vako, pamwechete newe; unofanira kuva murairo usingaperi, sezvakarairwa naJehovha.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Zvino Mosesi wakanatsotsvaka mbudzi yechipiriso chezvivi, akawana kuti yapiswa, akatsamwira Ereazari naItamari, vanakomana vaAroni vakanga vasara, akati," 
Leviticus10:17 “Makaregerei kudyira chipiriso chezvivi panzvimbo tsvene, zvachiri chitsvene kwazvo, uye nokuti wakakupai icho, kuti mubvise kutadza kweungano, muvayananisire pamberi paJehovha?" 
Leviticus10:18 Tarirai, ropa rayo harina kuuyiswa mukati menzvimbo tsvene, sezvandakaraira.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Ipapo Aroni akati kuna Mosesi, “Tarira, vakapisa nhasi chipiriso chavo chezvivi, nechipiriso chavo chinopiswa pamberi paJehovha, ini ndikawirwa nezvinhu izvi zvakadai; zvino dai ndakadya chipiriso chezvivi nhasi, zvingadai zvaifadza Jehovha here?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Mosesi wakati achinzwa izvozvo, akatenda nazvo." 
Leviticus11:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi naAroni, akati kwavari," 
Leviticus11:2 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, muti, ‘Ndizvo zvipenyu zvamungadya pakati pemhuka dzose dziri panyika:" 
Leviticus11:3 Zvose pakati pemhuka zvinamahwanda akaparadzana, kana zvine tsoka dzakaparadzana, zvinodzeya, mungazvidya." 
Leviticus11:4 Asi pakati pezvinodzeya, kana pakati pezvina mahwanda akaparadzana, regai kudya kamera, nokuti inodzeya, asi haina mahwanda akaparadzana; inofanira kuva chinhu chisina kunaka kwamuri;" 
Leviticus11:5 nembira, nokuti inodzeya, asi haina mahwanda akaparadzana; inofanira kuva chinhu chisina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:6 “ ‘Netsuro, nokuti inodzeya, asi haina mahwanda akaparadzana; inofanira kuva chinhu chisina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:7 Nenguruve, nokuti ine tsoka dzakaparadzana, asi haidzeyi; inofanira kuva chinhu chisina kunaka kwamuri.’" 
Leviticus11:8 “Regai kudya nyama yazvo, kana zvitunha zvazvo; zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:9 “Ndizvo zvamungadya kune zvose zviri mumvura: Zvose zviri mumvura, mumakungwa nomunzizi, zvine zvimbi namakwande, ndizvo zvamungadya." 
Leviticus11:10 Asi zvose zvisina zvimbi namakwande zviri mumakungwa nomunzizi, pazvose zvinopfakanyika mumvura, pazvose zvipenyu zviri mumvura, zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:11 Ngazvive zvinonyangadza kwamuri; musadya nyama yazvo, nezvitunha zvazvo zvinofanira kuva chinhu chinonyangadza kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:12 Zvose zviri mumvura zvisina zvimbi namakwande zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza kwamuri. 
Leviticus11:13 “Izvi pakati peshiri zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza kwamuri, ngazvirege kudyiwa, ngazvive zvinonyangadza: Gora guru, negondo guru, nenyamudzura;" 
Leviticus11:14 noruvangu, nenjerere, namarudzi adzo;" 
Leviticus11:15 namarudzi ose amakunguo; 
Leviticus11:16 nemhou, nezizi, neshiri yegungwa, namarudzi ose oruvangu;" 
Leviticus11:17 nezizi duku, nekanyururahove, nezizi guru;" 
Leviticus11:18 nejichidza, nekondo, negora;" 
Leviticus11:19 nezimudo, namarudzi ose ekondo, nemhupupu, nechiremwaremwa." 
Leviticus11:20 “Zvose zvina mapapiro zvichikambaira, zvichifamba namakumbo mana, zvinofanira kuva zvinhu zvinonyangadza kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:21 Asi izvi mungadya pakati pezvose zvina mapapiro zvichikambaira, zvichifamba namakumbo mana, zvinamakumbo pamusoro petsoka dzazvo azvinokwakuka nawo panyika." 
Leviticus11:22 Ndizvo zvamungadya pakati pazvo: Marudzi ose emhashu, namarudzi ose echinjiki, namarudzi ebambamukota, namarudzi egwatakwata." 
Leviticus11:23 Asi zvose zvina mapapiro zvichikambaira, zvina makumbo mana, zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:24 “Muchasvibiswa nezvizvi: Ani naani unobata zvitunha zvazvo uchava usina kunaka kusvikira usiku. 
Leviticus11:25 Ani naani wakatakura chitunha chazvo, anofanira kusuka nguo dzake, ave usina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus11:26 Mhuka dzose dzina mahwanda akaparadzana, asi dzisina tsoka dzakaparadzana, dzisingadzeyi, zvinofanira kuva zvisakanaka kwamuri; mumwe nomumwe unozvibata uchava usina kunaka." 
Leviticus11:27 Zvose zvinofamba netsoka dzakapfava pakati pemhuka dzose dzinofamba namakumbo mana, zvinofanira kuva zvisakanaka kwamuri; ani naani unobata zvitunha zvazvo uchava usina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus11:28 Munhu unotakura zvitunha zvazvo ngaasuke nguo dzake, ave asina kunaka kusvikira usiku; zvinofanira kuva zvisakanaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:29 “Zvisakanaka kwamuri pakati pezvinokambaira, zvinokambaira panyika ndizvo izvi: Chidembo, negonzo, namarudzi egwavava," 
Leviticus11:30 nechipfira, nedzvinyu, negoroodyo, nedhambakura, norwaivhi." 
Leviticus11:31 Izvozvo zvinofanira kuva zvisakanaka kwamuri pakati pezvose zvinokambaira; ani naani unozvibata kana zvakafa uchava usina kunaka kusvikira usiku. 
Leviticus11:32 Chinhu chipi nechipi chinowirwa nechimwe chazvo kana chakafa, chichava chisina kunaka; kana iri nhumbi yamatanda, kana nguo, kana dehwe, kana hombodo, kana iri nhumbi ipi neipi inobatwa basa nayo, inofanira kunyikwa mumvura, ive isina kunaka kusvikira usiku; ipapo ichava yakanaka." 
Leviticus11:33 Hari imwe neimwe yevhu yawirwa mukati mayo nechimwe chazvo, zvose zviri mukati mayo zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka, naiyo munofanira kuiputsa." 
Leviticus11:34 Zvokudya zvose zvirimo zvingadyiwa, kana zvadirwa mvura, zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka; nezvinonwiwa zvose zviri muhari iyo zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka." 
Leviticus11:35 Zvose zvinowirwa nechitunha chazvo, zvichava zvisina kunaka, kana choto, kana chikuva chehari, zvinofanira kuputswa chose; hazvina kunaka, ngazvive zvisina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:36 Asi tsime kana dziva makachengetwa mvura, zvichava zvakanaka; asi chinogunzva chitunha chazvo chichava chisina kunaka." 
Leviticus11:37 Kana chitunha chechimwe chazvo chikawira pamusoro pembeu yakanga yakushwa, ichava yakanaka." 
Leviticus11:38 Asi kana mbeu ikadirwa mvura, chitunha chechimwe chazvo chakwira pamusoro payo, inofanira kuva isina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:39 “Kana mhuka ipi neipi ingadyiwa, ikafa, ani naani unogunzva chitunha chayo uchava usina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus11:40 Unodya chitunha chayo ngaasuke nguo dzake, ave asina kunaka kusvikira usiku; nomunhu unotakura chitunha chayo ngaasuke nguo dzake, ave asina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus11:41 “Zvose zvinokambaira, zvinokambaira panyika, zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza, hazvifaniri kudyiwa." 
Leviticus11:42 Zvose zvinofamba nedumbu, uye zvose zvinofamba namakumbo mana, uye zvose zvinofamba namakumbo mazhinji, zvose zvinokambaira, zvinokambaira panyika, hamufaniri kuzvidya; nokuti zvinonyangadza." 
Leviticus11:43 Musazviita vanonyangadza nechinokambaira chipi nechipi, musazviita vasina kunaka nazvo, kuti murege kusvibiswa nazvo." 
Leviticus11:44 Nokuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu; naizvozvo zvitsaurei, muve vatsvene, nokuti ini ndiri mutsvene; musazvisvibisa nechinokambaira chipi nechipi chinopfakanyika panyika." 
Leviticus11:45 Nokuti ndini Jehovha akakubudisai panyika yeIjipiti, kuti ndive Mwari wenyu; naizvozvo muve vatsvene, nokuti ini ndiri mutsvene." 
Leviticus11:46 “Ndiwo murairo wemhuka, noweshiri, nowezvipenyu zvose zvinopfakanyika mumvura, nezvisikwa zvose zvinokambaira panyika;" 
Leviticus11:47 kuti mutsaure pakati pezvisakanaka nezvakanaka, napakati pezvipenyu zvingadyiwa nezvipenyu zvisingadyiwi.”" 
Leviticus12:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus12:2 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri uti, ‘Kana mukadzi akava nemimba, akapona mwanakomana, uchava asina kunaka mazuva manomwe, uchava asina kunaka sapanguva yaari kumwedzi." 
Leviticus12:3 Nomusi worusere mwanakomana anofanira kudzingiswa chikanda chake chapamberi.’ 
Leviticus12:4 Zvino mukadzi anofanira kugara mazuva makumi matatu namatatu achizvinatsa paropa rake; ngaarege kubata chinhu chitsvene, kana kupinda paimba tsvene, kusvikira mazuva okuzvinatsa kwake apera." 
Leviticus12:5 Asi kana akapona mwana womusikana, uchava asina kunaka vhiki mbiri, sapamazuva okuva kwake kumwedzi; ngaagare achizvinatsa paropa rake mazuva ana makumi matanhatu namatanhatu." 
Leviticus12:6 Kana mazuva okuzvinatsa kwake apera pakupona mwanakomana kana mwanasikana, ngaauye negwayana regore rimwe, kuti chive chipiriso chinopiswa, nakamwana kenjiva, kana vhukutiwa, kuti chive chipiriso chezvivi, kumukova wetende rokusangana kumupristi;" 
Leviticus12:7 agochibayira pamberi paJehovha, kumuyananisira; zvino wanatswa pakuyerera kweropa rake. Ndiwo murairo kune anopona mwana womukomana kana womusikana." 
Leviticus12:8 Kana akasakwanisa kuuya negwayana, ngaatore njiva mbiri kana twana tuviri twenjiva; imwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa, neimwe chipiriso chezvivi; kuti mupristi amuyananisire, anake.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi naAroni akati," 
Leviticus13:2 “Kana munhu ane pakazvimba kana panofunuka, kana chivara paganda romuviri wake, pakaita sechirwere chamaperembudzi paganda romuviri wake, anofanira kuiswa kuna Aroni mupristi, kana kuno mumwe wavanakomana vake vapristi;" 
Leviticus13:3 mupristi zvino anofanira kucherechedza chirwere chiri paganda romuviri wake; kana mvere dziri pane chirwere dzikashanduka dzikava chena, chirwere chikaonekwa kuti chakapinda kwazvo mukati meganda romuviri wake, chirwere chamaperembudzi; mupristi ngaamucherechedze, agoreva kuti haana kunaka." 
Leviticus13:4 Kana chivara chiri chichena paganda romuviri wake, chakaonekwa kuti hachina kupinda mukati meganda kwazvo, mvere dzisina kushanduka, dzikava chena, mupristi anofanira kupfigira munhu uyo une chirwere mazuva manomwe;" 
Leviticus13:5 nomusi wechinomwe mupristi anofanira kumucherechedza; kana akaona kuti chirwere chaita sechamira, kuti chirwere hachina kupararira paganda, zvino mupristi anofanira kumupfigira mamwe mazuva manomwezve;" 
Leviticus13:6 zvino mupristi anofanira kumucherechedza nezuva rechinomwe; kana akaona kuti chirwere chaita nani, kuti chirwere hachina kupararira paganda, zvino mupristi uchareva kuti munhu wakanaka hake; pakanga pakafunuka hapo; ipapo anofanira kusuka nguo dzake agova wakanaka." 
Leviticus13:7 Asi kana pakafunuka pachiramba pachipararira paganda, ambozviratidza kumupristi kuti anzi wakanaka, ipapo anofanira kuzviratidzazve kumupristi;" 
Leviticus13:8 zvino mupristi anofanira kucherechedza; kana akaona kuti pakafunuka pakapararira paganda, ipapo mupristi anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka, maperembudzi." 
Leviticus13:9 “Kana chirwere chemaperembudzi chiri pamunhu, anofanira kuiswa kumupristi;" 
Leviticus13:10 zvino mupristi anofanira kucherechedza; kana akaona kuti pane pakazvimba pachena paganda, mvere dzikashanduka, dzikaita chena, pakazvimba pakava nenyama yakatsvuka," 
Leviticus13:11 ndiwo maperembudzi anguva avapo paganda romuviri wake, zvino mupristi ngaarege kumupfigira, nokuti haana kunaka, ngaareve kuti haana kunaka." 
Leviticus13:12 Kana maperembudzi akabuda pose pose paganda, maperembudzi akafukidza ganda rose romunhu ane chirwere, kubva pamusoro wake kusvikira kutsoka dzake, pose panoonekwa nomupristi;" 
Leviticus13:13 zvino mupristi anofanira kutarira; kana akaona kuti maperembudzi akazadza muviri wake wose, anofanira kureva kuti munhu ane chirwere akanaka, zvose zvashanduka zvachena, akanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:14 Asi kana nyama yakatsvuka ikaonekwa kwaari, uchava asina kunaka." 
Leviticus13:15 Kana mupristi akaona nyama yakatsvuka, anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; nyama yakatsvuka haina kunaka, maperembudzi." 
Leviticus13:16 Kana nyama yakatsvuka ikashandukazve, ikaita chena, anofanira kuuya kumupristi." 
Leviticus13:17 Ipapo mupristi anofanira kumucherechedza; kana akaona kuti chirwere chashanduka, chikachena, mupristi anofanira kureva kuti ane chirwe chakanaka, akanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:18 “Zvino kana nyama ine mota paganda, pakapora," 
Leviticus13:19 panzvimbo yemota pakauya pakazvimba pakachena, kana chivara chakaita sechitsvuku, zvinofanira kuratidzwa mupristi;" 
Leviticus13:20 zvino mupristi anofanira kucherechedza; kana akaona kuti pakadzika pasi peganda, mvere dzapo dzikashanduka dzikaita chena, mupristi anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; chirwere chamaperembudzi chabuda napamota." 
Leviticus13:21 Asi kana mupristi akapacherechedza, akaona kuti hakuna mvere chena ipapo, pasina kudzika pasi peganda, asi pava nani; mupristi anofanira kumupfigira mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:22 Kana pakapararira pose paganda, mupristi anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; chirwere." 
Leviticus13:23 Asi kana chivara chikarambira panzvimbo yacho, chikasapararira, ivanga haro remota; mupristi anofanira kuti wakanaka." 
Leviticus13:24 “Kana nyama yomunhu ina pakatsva paganda rake, nyama yakatsvuka yapo ikaita chivara chichena chakaita sechitsvuku kana chichena," 
Leviticus13:25 mupristi anofanira kupacherechedza; kana akaona kuti mvere dzapachivara dzashanduka, dzikaita chena, akaona kuti pakaita sapakadzika paganda, ava maperembudzi akabuda napakatsva; mupristi anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; chirwere chamaperembudzi." 
Leviticus13:26 Asi kana mupristi akapacherechedza, akaona kuti hapana mvere chena pachivara, uye kuti hapana kudzika pasi peganda, asi pava nani hapo, mupristi anofanira kumupfigira mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:27 Zvino mupristi anofanira kumucherechedza nezuva rechinomwe; kana pakaramba pachipararira paganda, mupristi anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; chirwere chamaperembudzi." 
Leviticus13:28 Kana chivara chikaramba chiri panzvimbo yacho, chikasapararira paganda, asi chava nani, ndiko kuzvimba kwokutsva hako, mupristi anofanira kureva kuti wakanaka hake, nokuti chivara chokutsva." 
Leviticus13:29 “Kana murume kana mukadzi ane chirwere pamusoro kana pandebvu," 
Leviticus13:30 mupristi anofanira kucherechedza chirwere; kana akaona kuti chakapinda mukati, pasi peganda, mvere dziripo dziri tsvuku dzakaita sechena, dziri nhete, mupristi anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; pafunuka, ndiwo maperembudzi omusoro kana endebvu." 
Leviticus13:31 Kana mupristi akacherechedza chirwere chokufunuka, akaona kuti hachina kupinda mukati pasi peganda, pasina mvere nhema ipapo, mupristi anofanira kupfigira munhu ane chirwere chokufunuka mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:32 Nomusi wechinomwe mupristi anofanira kucherechedza chirwere; kana akaona kuti hachina kupinda mukati pasi peganda," 
Leviticus13:33 anofanira kuveurwa, asi ngaarege kuveura pakafunuka; zvino mupristi anofanira kupfigira munhu ane pakafunuka mamwe mazuva manomwezve;" 
Leviticus13:34 nomusi wechinomwe mupristi anofanira kucherechedza pakafunuka; kana akaona kuti pakafunuka hapana kupararira paganda, uye kuti hapana kupinda mukati pasi peganda, mupristi anofanira kureva kuti wakanaka hake; zvino iye ngaasuke nguo dzake, anake." 
Leviticus13:35 Asi kana pakafunuka pakapararira pose paganda shure kwokunatswa kwake; 
Leviticus13:36 mupristi anofanira kumucherechedza; kana akaona kuti pakafunuka papararira paganda, ngaarege hake kutsvaka mvere tsvuku dzakaita sechena; haana kunaka." 
Leviticus13:37 Asi kana iye akaona kuti pakafunuka paita sapamira, nemvere nhema dzabudapo, pakafunuka papora hapo, wakanaka; mupristi anofanira kureva kuti wakanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:38 “Kana murume kana mukadzi ane zvivara paganda renyama yavo, zviri zvivara zvichena;" 
Leviticus13:39 mupristi anofanira kuzvicherechedza; kana akaona kuti zvivara paganda renyama zviri zvichena, zvisingabwinyi, imhezi dzakabuda paganda, vakanaka havo." 
Leviticus13:40 “Kana vhudzi romunhu rakabva pamusoro wake, wava nemhanza; asi akanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:41 Kana vhudzi rake rakabva pamusoro wake nechemberi, une mhanza pahuma, asi wakanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:42 Asi kana pamhanza, kana pamhanza yapahuma, pane chirwere chichena chakaita sechitsvuku, maperembudzi anobuda pamhanza." 
Leviticus13:43 Zvino mupristi anofanira kumucherechedza; kana akaona kuti pakazvimba pechirwere pachena pakaita sapatsvuku pamhanza yake pakafanana namaperembudzi paganda renyama," 
Leviticus13:44 munhu uyo ane maperembudzi, haana kunaka; mupristi anofanira kureva kwazvo kuti haana kunaka; chirwere chake chiri pamusoro wake." 
Leviticus13:45 Zvino munhu ane maperembudzi, ane chirwere ichi, nguo dzake dzinofanira kubvarurwa, nevhudzi romusoro wake rinofanira kusunungurwa, uye anofanira kufukidza muromo wake wokumusoro, agodanidzira, achiti, ‘Ndakaipa, ndakaipa!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Mazuva ose aane chirwere ayo, achava asina kunaka; haana kunaka; ngaagare ari oga; pokugara kwake panofanira kuva kunze kwemisasa." 
Leviticus13:47 “Nguo ine chirwere chamaperembudzi, kana iri nguo yamakushe amakwai, kana iri nguo yomucheka;" 
Leviticus13:48 kana iri yakarukwa, kana yakakoswa; kana yomucheka, kana yamakushe amakwai; kana yedehwe, kana chinhu chakaitwa nedehwe;" 
Leviticus13:49 kana chirwere chakaita senhema, kana tsvuku panguo, kana padehwe, kana pane zvakarukwa, kana pane zvakakoswa, kana pachinhu chipi nechipi chedehwe; chirwere chamaperembudzi chinofanira kuratidzwa mupristi;" 
Leviticus13:50 zvino mupristi anofanira kucherechedza chirwere chacho, agopfigira chinhu chine chirwere mazuva manomwe;" 
Leviticus13:51 zvino anofanira kucherechedza chirwere nezuva rechinomwe; kana chirwere chakaparira panguo, kana iri yakarukwa, kana yakakoswa, kana yedehwe, rine basa ripi neripi; chirwere icho ndechamaperembudzi akaipa kwazvo; hachina kunaka." 
Leviticus13:52 Zvino anofanira kupisa nguo, kana iri yakarukwa, kana yakakoswa, kana yamakushe amakwai, kana yomucheka, kana ipi neipi yedehwe, ine chirwere icho; nokuti maperembudzi akaipa kwazvo; anofanira kupiswa nomoto." 
Leviticus13:53 “Kana mupristi akatarira, akaona kuti chirwere hachina kupararira panguo, kana pakarukwa, kana pakakoswa, kana pachinhu chipi nechipi chedehwe;" 
Leviticus13:54 mupristi anofanira kuraira kuti vasuke chinhu chine chirwere, zvino achipfigire mamwe mazuva manomwezve;" 
Leviticus13:55 mupristi agocherechedzazve kana chirwere chasukwa; kana akaona kuti chirwere hachina kushanduka ruvara rwacho, uye kuti chirwere hachina kupararira, hachina kunaka; anofanira kuchipisa nomoto; chapinda mukati kwazvo, kana nechapamusoro kana nechapanyasi." 
Leviticus13:56 Kana mupristi akacherechedza, akaona kuti chirwere chava nani pakusukwa kwacho, anofanira kubvarura nguo kupabvisapo, kana padehwe, kana pakarukwa, kana pakakoswa;" 
Leviticus13:57 asi kana chikaramba chichionekwa panguo, kana pakarukwa, kana pakakoswa, kana pachinhu chipi nechipi chedehwe, chirwere chinobuda; anofanira kupisa chinhu icho chine chirwere nomoto;" 
Leviticus13:58 asi nguo yaunosuka, kana pakarukwa, kana pakakoswa, kana chiri chinhu chipi nechipi chedehwe, kana chirwere chikabva kwachiri, chinofanira kusukwa rwechipiri, chigova chakanaka." 
Leviticus13:59 “Ndiwo murairo wechirwere chamaperembudzi panguo yamakushe amakwai, kana yomucheka, kana chinhu chipi nechipi chedehwe, kuti chigonzi chakanaka, kana hachina kunaka.”" 
Leviticus14:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus14:2 “Ndiwo murairo womunhu una maperembudzi nomusi wokunatswa kwake: Unofanira kuiswa kumupristi; 
Leviticus14:3 zvino mupristi anofanira kubuda kunze kwemisasa, mupristi ugocherechedza munhu uyu; kana akaona kuti chirwere chamaperembudzi chapora hacho kumunhu una maperembudzi;" 
Leviticus14:4 mupristi anofanira kuraira kuti anoda kunatswa atorerwe shiri mbiri mhenyu dzakanaka, nedanda romusidhari, nomucheka mutsvuku, nehisopi." 
Leviticus14:5 Zvino mupristi araire kuti shiri imwe iurawe muhari yevhu, pamusoro pemvura inoyerera." 
Leviticus14:6 Zvino anofanira kutora shiri mhenyu, nedanda romusidhari, nomucheka mutsvuku, nehisopi, okuzvinyika pamwechete neshiri mhenyu muropa reshiri yakaurayiwa pamusoro pemvura inoyerera." 
Leviticus14:7 Zvino anofanira kurisasa kanomwe pamusoro pomunhu unoda kunatswa pamaperembudzi ake, ndokureva kuti wakanaka; ipapo woregedza shiri mhenyu, iende hayo kusango." 
Leviticus14:8 Zvino munhu unoda kunatswa anofanira kusuka nguo dzake, nokuveura vhudzi rake rose, nokushamba mumvura, agova wakanaka; pashure anofanira kupinda mukati memisasa, asi ngaagare kunze kwetende mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus14:9 Nomusi wechinomwe anofanira kuveura vhudzi rake rose romusoro wake, nendebvu dzake, netsiye dzake, aveure vhudzi rake rose; zvino ngaasuke nguo dzake, nokushamba muviri wake, agova wakanaka." 
Leviticus14:10 Nomusi worusere anofanira kutora makwayana maviri amakondohwe, asina chipomerwa, negwayana rimwe resheche rine gore rimwe, risina chipomerwa, nezvegumi zvitatu zveefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso choupfu, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nerogi imwe yamafuta." 
Leviticus14:11 “Zvino mupristi, unomunatsa, anofanira kuisa munhu unoda kunatswa pamberi paJehovha, pamwechete nezvinhu izvi, pamukova wetende rokusangana;" 
Leviticus14:12 mupristi ndokutora rimwe ramakwayana amakondohwe, ndokuribayira, chive chipiriso chemhosva, nerogi yamafuta, agozvizunguzira, chive chipiriso chokuzunguzira pamberi paJehovha;" 
Leviticus14:13 zvino anofanira kuuraya gwayana regondohwe pavanourayira chipiriso chezvivi nechipiriso chinopiswa panzvimbo tsvene; nokuti chipiriso chemhosva ndechomupristi sechipiriso chezvivi; chitsvene kwazvo. 
Leviticus14:14 Ipapo mupristi anofanira kutora rimwe ropa rechipiriso chemhosva, mupristi agoriisa pamucheto wenzeve yorudyi yomunhu unonatswa, napagunwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi;" 
Leviticus14:15 zvino mupristi anofanira kutora mamwe mafuta erogi, ndokuadira muchanza choruoko rwake rworuboshwe;" 
Leviticus14:16 zvino mupristi ngaanyike mutendeka wake worudyi mumafuta ari muruoko rwake rworuboshwe, asase mamwe mafuta nomunwe wake kanomwe pamberi paJehovha;" 
Leviticus14:17 mamwe mafuta akasara muruoko rwake mupristi anofanira kuaisa pamucheto wenzeve yorudyi yomunhu unonatswa, napagunwe roruoko rwake rworudyi, napagunwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi, pamusoro peropa rechipiriso chemhosva;" 
Leviticus14:18 mamwe mafuta akasara muruoko rwomupristi anofanira kuaisa pamusoro womunhu unonatswa; kuti mupristi amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha. 
Leviticus14:19 Mupristi anofanira kupisa chipiriso chezvivi, kuti ayananisire munhu unonatswa, nokuda kwokusanaka kwake; pashure anofanira kuuraya chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Leviticus14:20 mupristi anofanira kupisa chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu pamusoro peatari, kuti mupristi amuyananisire, anake." 
Leviticus14:21 “Kana ari murombo, asingagoni kuwana zvizhinji zvakadai, anofanira kutora gwayana rimwe regondohwe, chive chipiriso chemhosva chokuzunguzira, kumuyananisira, nechegumi cheefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu, pamwechete nerogi yamafuta;" 
Leviticus14:22 nenjiva mbiri, notwana tuviri twenjiva, sezvaanogona kuwana; imwe chive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Leviticus14:23 nomusi worusere anofanira kuuya nazvo kumupristi pamusoro pokunatswa kwake, kumukova wetende rokusangana pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus14:24 Zvino mupristi anofanira kutora gwayana rechipiriso chemhosva, nerogi yamafuta, mupristi agozvizunguzira, chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus14:25 Zvino ngaauraye gwayana rechipiriso chemhosva, agotora rimwe ropa rechipiriso chemhosva, ariise pamucheto wenzeve yomunhu unonatswa, napagunwe roruoko rworudyi, napagunwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi;" 
Leviticus14:26 zvino mupristi ngaadire mamwe mafuta muchanza choruoko rwake rworuboshwe; 
Leviticus14:27 mupristi agosasa nomutendeka wake worudyi mamwe mafuta ari muruoko rwake rworuboshwe kanomwe pamberi paJehovha. 
Leviticus14:28 Zvino mupristi ngaaise mamwe mafuta ari muruoko rwake pamucheto wenzeve yorudyi yomunhu unonatswa, napagunwe roruoko rwake rworudyi, napagunwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi, panzvimbo yeropa rechipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus14:29 Mamwe mafuta akasara muruoko rwomupristi anofanira kuaisa pamusoro womunhu unonatswa, kuti amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus14:30 Zvino anofanira kubayira njiva imwe, kana kana kenjiva, sezvaanogona kuwana;" 
Leviticus14:31 sezvaanogona kuwana, imwe chive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chipiriso chinopiswa, pamwechete nechipiriso choupfu; kuti mupristi ayananisire munhu unonatswa pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus14:32 Ndiwo murairo wechirwere chamaperembudzi kumunhu usingagoni kuwana zvakakwanisira kunatswa kwake.” 
Leviticus14:33 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi naAroni akati," 
Leviticus14:34 “Kana masvika kunyika yeKenani, iyo yandakupai, kuti ive yenyu, kana ndikaisa chirwere chamaperembudzi muimba yenyika yenyu;" 
Leviticus14:35 muridzi weimba anofanira kuuya kuzoudza mupristi, achiti, ‘Ndinoona kuti imba yangu inenge ine chirwere.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Ipapo mupristi anofanira kuraira kuti vabudise zvose zviri mumba, iye mupristi asina kupinda kundotarira chirwere, kuti zvose zviri mumba zvirege kusvibiswa; pashure mupristi apinde kundotarira imba iyo." 
Leviticus14:37 Zvino ngaacherekedze chirwere; kana akaona kuti chirwere chiri mumadziro eimba; ina mavara akapinda, akaita samatema kana matsvuku, akaita saakapinda mukati mamadziro," 
Leviticus14:38 mupristi anofanira kubuda paimba, ndokuenda kumukova weimba, ndokupfiga imba mazuva manomwe;" 
Leviticus14:39 zvino mupristi anofanira kudzokazve nezuva rechinomwe, kuti acherechedze; kana akaona kuti chirwere chakapararira pamadziro eimba;" 
Leviticus14:40 mupristi anofanira kuraira kuti vabvise mabwe ane chirwere paari, vaakandire panzvimbo isina kunaka kunze kweguta;" 
Leviticus14:41 ipapo ngaaraire kuti imba iparwe mukati mayo kunhivi dzose, mavhu avanopara agodururirwa kunze kweguta panzvimbo isina kunaka;" 
Leviticus14:42 zvino mamwe mabwe atorwe, aiswe panzvimbo yamamwe iwayo, iye atore rimwe ivhu aumbe imba naro." 
Leviticus14:43 Kana chirwere chikadzokazve, chikabuda muimba iyo, mabwe ambobviswa, imba yaparwa," 
Leviticus14:44 mupristi anofanira kupinda nokucherechedza; kana akaona kuti chirwere chapararira mumba, ndiwo maperembudzi akaipa kwazvo, yava yakaipa." 
Leviticus14:45 Zvino anofanira kuputsa imba, namabwe ayo, namatanda ayo, nevhu rose reimba, ndokuzvitakurira kunze kweguta kunzvimbo isina kunaka." 
Leviticus14:46 Uye ani naani unopinda mumba panguva yose yokupfigwa kwayo uchava usina kunaka kusvikira usiku. 
Leviticus14:47 Munhu wakavata muimba iyo, anofanira kusuka nguo dzake." 
Leviticus14:48 “Kana mupristi akapinda, akatarira, akaona kuti chirwere hachina kupararira mumba, kubva pakuuyiwa kwemba, mupristi anofanira kureva kuti imba yakanaka, nokuti chirwere chapera." 
Leviticus14:49 Zvino anofanira kutora shiri mbiri, nedanda romusidhari, nomucheka mutsvuku, nehisopi, kuti anatse imba;" 
Leviticus14:50 ipapo ngaauraye shiri imwe muhari yevhu pamusoro pemvura inoyerera," 
Leviticus14:51 nokutora danda romusidhari, nehisopi, nomucheka mutsvuku, neshiri mhenyu, azvinyike muropa reshiri yakaurayiwa uye mumvura inoyerera, ndokusasa imba kanomwe;" 
Leviticus14:52 anofanira kunatsa imba neropa reshiri nemvura inoyerera neshiri mhenyu, nedanda romusidhari, nehisopi nomucheka mutsvuku;" 
Leviticus14:53 asi shiri mhenyu anofanira kuiregedza kuti iende hayo kunze kweguta kusango; saizvozvo anofanira kuyananisira imba iyo, kuti ive yakanaka." 
Leviticus14:54 “Ndiwo murairo wamarudzi ose amaperembudzi napakafunuka; 
Leviticus14:55 nowamaperembudzi enguo, neeimba," 
Leviticus14:56 nowa pakazvimba, nowa pakafunuka, nowe chivara," 
Leviticus14:57 kuzivisa mupristi kana chinhu chisina kunaka kana chakanaka. Ndiwo murairo wamaperembudzi.” 
Leviticus15:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi naAroni akati," 
Leviticus15:2 “Taurai navana VaIsiraeri, muti kwavari, ‘Kana murume ane zvimwe zvinoyerera, zvinobuda pamuviri wake, uchava asina kunaka nokuda kwokuyerera kwake.’" 
Leviticus15:3 Ndiko kusanaka kwokuyerera kwake: Kana muviri wake uchibudisa zvinoyerera, kana muviri warega hawo kubudisa zvinoyerera, ndiko kusanaka kwokuyerera kwake." 
Leviticus15:4 Nhoo imwe neimwe yaanovata pamusoro payo ichava isina kunaka; nechinhu chimwe nechimwe chaanogara chichava chisina kunaka. 
Leviticus15:5 Ani naani unobata nhoo dzake, ngaasuke nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave asina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:6 Munhu unogara pachinhu chakagarwa naiye une zvinoyerera, ngaasuke nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:7 Munhu unobata muviri waiye une zvinoyerera, ngaasuke nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave asina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:8 Kana munhu une zvinoyerera akapfira mumwe wakanaka mate, iye ngaasuke nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave asina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:9 Chigaro chipi nechipi chinogarwa nomunhu une zvinoyerera chichava chisina kunaka. 
Leviticus15:10 Ani naani unobata chinhu chakanga chiri pasi pake, uchava usina kunaka kusvikira usiku, kunyangwe wakatakura zvinhu izvo ngaasuke nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave asina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:11 Ani naani unobatwa nomunhu une zvinoyerera, kana asina kumboshamba maoko ake nemvura, ngaasuke nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave asina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:12 Hari yevhu inobatwa nomunhu une zvinoyerera ngaiputswe; kana uri mudziyo wamatanda, mumwe nomumwe anofanira kusukurudzwa nemvura." 
Leviticus15:13 “Kana munhu une zvinoyerera akanatswa pakuyerera kwake, anofanira kuzvitarira mazuva manomwe okuzvinatsa kwake, zvino asuke nguo dzake, ndokushambidza muviri wake nemvura inoyerera, anake." 
Leviticus15:14 “Nomusi worusere anofanira kutora njiva mbiri kana twana tuviri twenjiva, auye pamberi paJehovha pamukova wetende rokusangana, ape mupristi idzedzo;" 
Leviticus15:15 zvino mupristi anofanira kudzibayira, imwe chive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chipiriso chinopiswa; mupristi amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pokuyerera kwake." 
Leviticus15:16 “Kana mbeu yomurume upi noupi ikabuda kwaari, anofanira kushambidza muviri wake wose nemvura, agova asina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:17 Nguo ipi neipi, nedehwe ripi neripi, zvadonherwa nembeu, zvinofanira kusukwa nemvura, zvive zvisina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:18 Mukadziwo wakavata nomurume nembeu, vose vari vaviri vanofanira kuzvishambidza nemvura, vave vasina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:19 “Kana mukadzi ane zvinoyerera, zvinoyerera pamuviri wake riri ropa, uchava pakusanaka kwake mazuva manomwe; ani naani unomubata uchava usina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:20 Chinhu chipi nechipi chaanovata pamusoro pacho pakusanaka kwake chichava chisina kunaka, uye chinhu chipi nechipi chaanogara chichava chisina kunaka." 
Leviticus15:21 Ani naani unobata nhoo dzake anofanira kusuka nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:22 Ani naani unobata chinhu chipi nechipi chaanogara, anofanira kusuka nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:23 Kana akabata chinhu chiri panhoo, kana chinhu chipi nechipi chaanogara, uchava usina kunaka kusvikira usiku." 
Leviticus15:24 Uye murume upi noupi kana akavata naye achiri pakusanaka kwake, uchava usina kunaka mazuva manomwe; nhoo dzose dzaanovata pamusoro padzo dzichava dzisina kunaka." 
Leviticus15:25 “Kana mukadzi anokuyerera kweropa rake mazuva mazhinji panguva isati iri yokuva kwake kumwedzi, uye kana ane zvinoyerera kudarika nguva yokuva kwake kumwedzi, mazuva ose okuyerera kwokusanaka kwake anofanira kuita sezvaanoita pamazuva okuva kwake kumwedzi. Wava usina kunaka." 
Leviticus15:26 Nhoo ipi neipi yaanovata pamusoro payo mazuva ose okuyerera kwake ichava kwaari senhoo yokuva kwake kumwedzi; chinhu chipi nechipi chaanogara chichava chisina kunaka, sapanguva yokusanaka kwokuva kwake kumwedzi." 
Leviticus15:27 Ani naani unobata zvinhu izvo uchava asina kunaka, ngaasuke nguo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave asina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:28 Asi kana anatswa pakuyerera kwake, anofanira kuzvitarira mazuva manomwe; kana iwo apera uchava wakanaka." 
Leviticus15:29 Nomusi worusere anofanira kutora njiva mbiri, kana twana tuviri twenjiva, auye nadzo kumupristi, kumukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus15:30 Zvino mupristi anofanira kuuraya imwe, chive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa; mupristi amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pokuyerera kwokusanaka kwake." 
Leviticus15:31 “Saizvozvo munofanira kuparadzanisa vana VaIsiraeri pakusanaka kwavo, kuti varege kufa pakusanaka kwavo, kana vachisvibisa tabhenakeri yangu iri pakati pavo." 
Leviticus15:32 “Ndiwo murairo womunhu une zvinoyerera, nounobudisa mbeu yake, akazova usina kunaka nazvo;" 
Leviticus15:33 nounorwara nokuva kwake kumwedzi, noune zvinoyerera, kana ari murume, kana ari mukadzi, neanorara naiye asina kunaka.”" 
Leviticus16:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, shure kwokufa kwavanakomana vaAroni, musi wavakaswedera pamberi paJehovha, vakafa;" 
Leviticus16:2 Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Taura naAroni mukuru wako, kuti arege kupinda nguva dzose panzvimbo tsvene mukati meketeni, pamberi pechifunhiro chokuyananisa, chiri pamusoro peareka, kuti urege kufa; nokuti ndichazviratidza mugore pamusoro pechifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Leviticus16:3 Zvino Aroni ngaapinde munzvimbo tsvene nezvinhu izvi: nzombe duku, chive chipiriso chezvivi, negondohwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus16:4 “Anofanira kufuka jasi dzvene romucheka, avewo namabhurukwa omucheka pamuviri wake, nokuzvisunga chiuno chake nebhandi romucheka, nokudzikawo nguwani yomucheka; ndidzo nguo tsvene; ngaashambidze muviri wake nemvura, agozvifuka." 
Leviticus16:5 “Zvino anofanira kutora kuungano yavana VaIsiraeri nhongo mbiri dzembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi, negondohwe rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus16:6 Aroni anofanira kuuya nenzombe yake duku yechipiriso chezvivi, kuti azviyananisire, iye neveimba yake." 
Leviticus16:7 Zvino ngaatore mbudzi mbiri, adziise pamberi paJehovha pamukova wetende rokusangana;" 
Leviticus16:8 Aroni zvino anofanira kukanda mijenya pamusoro pembudzi mbiri, mumwe mujenya waJehovha, mumwe waAzazeri." 
Leviticus16:9 “Zvino Aroni anofanira kuuya nembudzi yakabatwa nomujenya pamberi paJehovha, ndokuibayira chive chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus16:10 Asi mbudzi yakabatwa nomujenya waAzazeri, inofanira kuiswa iri mhenyu pamberi paJehovha kuti ayananisire pamusoro payo, igoregedzwa iende kurenje, ive yaAzazeri." 
Leviticus16:11 “Zvino Aroni anofanira kuuya nenzombe duku yake yechipiriso chezvivi, kuti azviyananisire nayo, iye naveimba yake, auraye nzombe yake yechipiriso chezvivi;" 
Leviticus16:12 ipapo ngaatore harana yezvinonhuwira, izere namazimbe omoto uri paatari pamberi paJehovha, namaoko ake azere nezvinonhuwira zvakanaka zvakakuyiwa, auye nazvo mukati meketeni;" 
Leviticus16:13 zvino ngaaise zvinonhuwira pamusoro pomoto pamberi paJehovha, kuti gore routsi hwezvinonhuwira rifukidze chifunhiro chokuyananisa chiri pamusoro pechipupuriro, kuti arege kufa;" 
Leviticus16:14 zvino ngaatore rimwe ropa renzombe, arisase nomunwe wake pamusoro pechifunhiro chokuyananisa, kurutivi rwamabvazuva, nerimwe ropa arisase nomunwe wake kanomwe pamberi pechifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Leviticus16:15 “Ipapo anofanira kuuraya mbudzi yechipiriso chezvivi chavanhu, ndokuuya neropa rayo mukati meketeni, agoita neropa rayo sezvaakaita neropa renzombe, arisase pamusoro pechifunhiro chokuyananisa;" 
Leviticus16:16 anofanira kuyananisirawo nzvimbo tsvene nokuda kwokusanaka kwavana VaIsiraeri, uye nokuda kwokudarika kwavo nezvivi zvavo zvose; saizvozvo anofanira kuitirawo tende rokusangana rinogara navo pakati pokusanaka kwavo." 
Leviticus16:17 Ngakurege kuva nomunhu mutende rokusangana, kana iye achipindamo kuyananisira panzvimbo tsvene kusvikira abuda, apedza kuzviyananisira iye naveimba yake, neungano yose yaVaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus16:18 Ipapo anofanira kubuda kuatari iri pamberi paJehovha, agondoiyananisira; ngaatore rimwe ropa renzombe, nerimwe ropa rembudzi, ariise panyanga dzeatari panhivi dzose." 
Leviticus16:19 Rimwe ropa ngaarisase kanomwe pamusoro payo nomunwe wake, kuti ainatse nokuiita tsvene pakusanaka kwavana VaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus16:20 “Kana apedza kuyananisira nzvimbo tsvene netende rokusangana, neatari, ngaauye nembudzi mhenyu," 
Leviticus16:21 Aroni agoisa maoko ake ose pamusoro wembudzi mhenyu, ndokureurura pamusoro payo zvakaipa zvose zvavana VaIsiraeri nokudarika kwavo kwose, izvo zvivi zvavo zvose; ngaazviise pamusoro wembudzi, ndokuiregedza, itumwe kurenje nomunhu wakanga arairwa." 
Leviticus16:22 Mbudzi iyo inofanira kutakurira zvakaipa zvavo zvose kunyika isina vanhu; anofanira kuregedza mbudzi iyo murenje. 
Leviticus16:23 “Zvino Aroni anofanira kupinda mutende rokusangana, anofanira kubvisa nguo dzake dzomucheka, idzo dzaakanga akafuka pakupinda kwake panzvimbo tsvene, agodzisiyapo." 
Leviticus16:24 Anofanira kushambidza muviri wake nemvura munzvimbo tsvene, ndokufuka nguo dzake ndokubuda, agobayira chipiriso chake chinopiswa nechipiriso chinopiswa chavanhu, kuti azviyananisire iye navanhu." 
Leviticus16:25 Zvino ngaapise mafuta echipiriso chezvivi pamusoro peatari. 
Leviticus16:26 Uya munhu unonoregedza mbudzi yaAzazeri anofanira kusuka nguo dzake, nokushambidza muviri wake nemvura, agozopinda mumisasa pashure." 
Leviticus16:27 Asi nzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, nembudzi yechipiriso chezvivi zvakaisirwa ropa razvo panzvimbo tsvene kuti zviyananisire, zvinofanira kutakurirwa kunze kwemisasa; zvino vanofanira kupisa matehwe azvo nenyama yazvo namazvizvi azvo nomoto." 
Leviticus16:28 Nomunhu unozvipisa anofanira kusuka nguo dzake, nokushambidza muviri wake nemvura, agozopinda mumisasa pashure." 
Leviticus16:29 “Unofanira kuva murairo usingaperi kwamuri: Nomwedzi wechinomwe, nezuva regumi romwedzi, munofanira kuchema pamweya yenyu, nokusabata mabasa ose, kana ari munhu wakaberekerwa pakati penyu, kana ari mutorwa agere pakati penyu;" 
Leviticus16:30 nokuti munofanira kuyananisirwa nezuva iro, kuti munatswe; munofanira kunatswa pazvivi zvenyu zvose pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus16:31 Rinofanira kuva Sabata rokuzorora kwazvo kwamuri, munofanira kuchema pamweya yenyu; murairo usingaperi." 
Leviticus16:32 Mupristi uchazozodzwa nokugadzwa paupristi panzvimbo yababa vake, iye anofanira kuyananisira nokufuka nguo dzomucheka, idzo nguo tsvene;" 
Leviticus16:33 anofanira kuyananisira nzvimbo tsvene, uye anofanira kuyananisira tende rokusangana neatari; uye anofanira kuyananisira vapristi navanhu vose veungano." 
Leviticus16:34 Uyu unofanira kuva murairo usingaperi kwamuri, kuyananisira vana VaIsiraeri kamwechete pagore pamusoro pezvivi zvavo.” Akaita sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Leviticus17:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus17:2 “Taura naAroni navanakomana vake navana VaIsiraeri vose, uti kwavari, ‘Ndiro shoko rakarairwa naJehovha:" 
Leviticus17:3 Munhu upi noupi kuna veimba yaIsiraeri unouraya nzombe, kana gwayana, kana mbudzi, mukati memisasa, kana unozviuraya kunze kwemisasa," 
Leviticus17:4 asina kuzviisa pamukova wetende rokusangana, kuzviisa pamberi petabhenakeri yaJehovha kuti chive chipo kuna Jehovha, munhu uyu anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake;" 
Leviticus17:5 kuti vana VaIsiraeri vauye nezvibairo zvavo zvavanobayira kusango, vauye nazvo kuna Jehovha kumukova wetende rokusangana kumupristi, kuti vazvibayire Jehovha, zvive zvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisira.’" 
Leviticus17:6 Zvino mupristi ngaasase ropa razvo paatari yaJehovha, pamukova wetende rokusangana; apisewo mafuta, kuti zvinhuwire zvakanaka pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus17:7 Havafaniri kuzobayira nhongo zvibairo zvavo, idzo dzavaitevera pakupata kwavo. Uyo unofanira kuva murairo usingaperi kwavari kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose." 
Leviticus17:8 “Iwe unofanira kuti kwavari, ‘Munhu upi noupi waveimba yaIsiraeri, kana wavatorwa vagere pakati pavo, unopisira chipiriso chinopiswa kana chimwe chibayiro," 
Leviticus17:9 asingauyi nacho kumukova wetende rokusangana, kuti achibayire Jehovha, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake.’" 
Leviticus17:10 “Munhu upi noupi waveimba yaIsiraeri, kana wavatorwa vagere pakati pavo, unodya ropa ripi neripi, ndichatonga munhu uyo unodya ropa, ndimubvise pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus17:11 Nokuti upenyu hwenyama huri muropa; randakakupai iro paatari, kuti riyananisire mweya yenyu; nokuti iropa rinoyananisira nokuda kwoupenyu hurimo." 
Leviticus17:12 Naizvozvo ndakati kuvana VaIsiraeri, ‘Kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu uchadya ropa, kana mutorwa upi noupi ugere pakati penyu, ngaarege kudya ropa.’" 
Leviticus17:13 “Munhu upi noupi kuvana VaIsiraeri, kana kuvatorwa vagere pakati pavo, wakabata pakuvhima kwake mhuka ipi neipi kana shiri inodyiwa, anofanira kudurura ropa rayo, nokurifukidza neguruva." 
Leviticus17:14 Nokuti kana huri upenyu hwenyama yose, ropa razvo ndihwo upenyu hwazvo, naizvozvo ndakati kuvana VaIsiraeri, ‘Regai kudya ropa razvo; ani naani unoridya anofanira kubviswa.’" 
Leviticus17:15 “Munhu upi noupi unodya chinhu chakangofa choga, kana chakaurayiwa nezvikara, kana ari munhu wakaberekerwa pakati penyu, kana ari mutorwa, anofanira kusuka nguo dzake, nokuzvishambidza nemvura, ave asina kunaka kusvikira usiku; ipapo uchazova wakanaka." 
Leviticus17:16 Asi kana asingadzisuki, kana kushambidza muviri wake, uchafanira kuva nemhosva yake.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus18:2 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus18:3 Regai kuita sezvakanga zvichiitwa munyika yeIjipiti mamakanga mugere, uye regai kuita sezvinoitwa panyika yeKenani, kwandichazokuisai; musafamba netsika dzavo." 
Leviticus18:4 Itai zvandakatonga ini, chengetai zvirevo zvangu, kuti mufambe mazviri; ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu.’" 
Leviticus18:5 Naizvozvo chengetai zvirevo zvangu, nezvandakatonga; kana munhu akazviita uchararama nazvo; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus18:6 “Ngakurege kuva nomunhu unoswedera kuhama yake yomumba, kuti amufukure, ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus18:7 Usafukura baba vako, namai vako; ndimai vako, usavafukura." 
Leviticus18:8 Usafukura mukadzi wababa vako; ndiko kufukura baba vako. 
Leviticus18:9 Usafukura hanzvadzi yako, mwanasikana wababa vako, kana mwanasikana wamai vako, kana vakaberekerwa mumusha kana vakaberekerwa kumwe." 
Leviticus18:10 Usafukura mwanasikana womwanakomana wako, kana mwanasikana womwanasikana wako; nokuti kufukurwa kwavo ndiko kwako." 
Leviticus18:11 Usafukura mwanasikana womukadzi wababa vako, wakaberekwa nababa vako, ihanzvadzi yako." 
Leviticus18:12 Usafukura vatete vako; ihama yomumba mababa vako. 
Leviticus18:13 Usafukura mainini vako, nokuti ihama yomumba mamai vako." 
Leviticus18:14 Usafukura babamunini vako, usaswedera kumukadzi wake, ndimainini vako." 
Leviticus18:15 Usafukura mukadzi womwanakomana wako, ndimukadzi womwanakomana wako; usamufukura." 
Leviticus18:16 Usafukura mukadzi womun'una wako, ndiko kufukurwa kwomwanakomana wako." 
Leviticus18:17 Usafukura mukadzi pamwechete nomwanasikana wake; usatora mwanasikana womwanakomana wake, kuti umufukure; ihama dzomumba; zvakashata." 
Leviticus18:18 Usatora mukadzi pamwechete nomun'una wake, arwidzane naye, kuti umufukure pamwechete nomumwe achiri mupenyu." 
Leviticus18:19 “Usaswedera kumukadzi kuti umufukure, achakaipa nokuva kumwedzi kwake." 
Leviticus18:20 Usavata nomukadzi wowokwako, kuti uzvisvibise naye." 
Leviticus18:21 Usapa mumwe wavana vako kuti apinde mumoto kuna Moreki, uye usamhura zita raMwari wako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus18:22 Usavata nomurume sezvinoitwa nazvo nomukadzi; zvinonyangadza. 
Leviticus18:23 Usavata nechipfuwo chipi nechipi kuti uzvisvibise nacho; nomukadzi ngaarege kumira pamberi pechipfuwo kuti arare nacho; zvinonyangadza kwazvo. 
Leviticus18:24 “Regai kuzvisvibisa nekuita chinhu chimwe chaizvozvi; nokuti vahedheni vakasvibiswa nezvinhu izvi zvose, ivo vandakadzinga pamberi penyu;" 
Leviticus18:25 nenyika yakasvibiswa; naizvozvo ndinoirova pamusoro pezvakaipa zvayo, nyika irutse vanhu vageremo." 
Leviticus18:26 Naizvozvo imi chengetai mitemo yangu nezvandakatonga, kuti murege kuita chinhu chimwe chaizvozvo zvinonyangadza; kana ari wakaberekerwa munyika yenyu, kana ari mutorwa ugere pakati penyu." 
Leviticus18:27 (Nokuti vanhu venyika ino, vakakutangirai, vakaita zvinhu izvi zvose zvinonyangadza, nyika ikasvibiswa;)" 
Leviticus18:28 kuti nyika irege kukurutsaiwo, kana muchiisvibisa, sezvayakarutsa vanhu vakakutangirai." 
Leviticus18:29 Nokuti ani naani unoita chinhu chimwe chaizvozvi zvinonyangadza, vanhu vanozviita vachabviswa pakati porudzi rwavo." 
Leviticus18:30 Naizvozvo chengetai zvandakakurairai, kuti murege kuita tsika idzo dzose dzinonyangadza, dzaiitwa musati mavapo, kuti murege kuzvisvibisa nazvo; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus19:2 “Taura neungano yose yavana VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Ivai vatsvene, nokuti ini Jehovha Mwari wenyu ndiri mutsvene." 
Leviticus19:3 Mumwe nomumwe wenyu anofanira kutya mai vake nababa vake, uye munofanira kuchengeta maSabata angu; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:4 “ ‘Musava nehanya nezvifananidzo, kana kuzviitira vamwari vakaumbwa; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:5 “ ‘Kana muchipa Jehovha chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, munofanira kuchipa kuti mugamuchirwe." 
Leviticus19:6 Chinofanira kudyiwa nomusi wamunochipa nawo, uye nomusi unotevera; kana zvimwe zvikasara kusvikira pazuva retatu, zvinofanira kupiswa nomoto." 
Leviticus19:7 Kana chikatongodyiwa nezuva retatu, zvinonyangadza; hachigamuchirwi." 
Leviticus19:8 Asi mumwe nomumwe unochidya, uchava nemhosva, nokuti wamhura chinhu chitsvene chaJehovha; munhu uyu anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake.’" 
Leviticus19:9 “Kana muchikohwa goho reminda yenyu, rega kukohwa micheto yomunda wako, uye usaunganidza zvawira pasi pakukohwa kwako." 
Leviticus19:10 Usakohwa zvose pamunda wako wemizambiringa, uye usaunganidza michero yawira pasi yomunda wako wemizambiringa; unofanira kuzvisiyira varombo navaeni; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:11 “Musaba; musanyengera, musareverana nhema." 
Leviticus19:12 Musapika nhema nezita rangu, kuti usamhura zita raMwari wako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:13 “Usamanikidza wokwako, kana kumutorera; haufaniri kugara usiku hwose kusvikira mangwana nomubairo womuranda unokubatira." 
Leviticus19:14 Usatuka matsi, kana kupinganidza bofu; asi unofanira kutya Mwari wako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:15 “Musaita zvisakarurama pakutonga; usatsaura murombo, kana kukudza une simba; asi unofanira kutonga wokwako nokururama." 
Leviticus19:16 Usafamba–famba pakati pavanhu vokwako, uchivachera; usapupurira ropa rowokwako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:17 “Usavenga hama yako mumwoyo mako; unofanira kuraira wokwako kwazvo, kuti urege kuva nezvivi nokuda kwake." 
Leviticus19:18 Usatsiva, kana kugara wakatsamwira vana vavanhu vokwako, asi unofanira kuda wokwako sezvaunozvida iwe; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:19 “Chengetai mitemo yangu. Usaberekesa zvipfuwo zvako norumwe rudzi; usadyara mbeu dzamarudzi maviri mumunda mako; usafuka nguo yakarukwa nezvinhu zvamarudzi maviri. 
Leviticus19:20 Ani naani unovata nomukadzi ari murandakadzi, akapiwa kune mumwe murume, asati adzikinurwa, kana kusunungurwa, vanofanira kurohwa; asi havafaniri kuurayiwa, nokuti wakanga asina kusunungurwa." 
Leviticus19:21 Ngaauye nechipiriso chemhosva kuna Jehovha pamukova wetende rokusangana, rive gondohwe rechipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus19:22 Zvino mupristi anofanira kumuyananisira negondohwe rechipiriso chemhosva pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza; ipapo uchakanganwirwa zvivi zvake zvaakatadza. 
Leviticus19:23 “Kana muchisvika munyika, mukasima miti yamarudzi ose anodyiwa, munofanira kuti michero yayo yakaita seisina kudzingiswa; makore matatu ichava kwamuri seisina kudzingiswa; haifaniri kudyiwa." 
Leviticus19:24 Asi negore rechina michero yayo yose ichava mitsvene, kuti murumbidze Jehovha nazvo." 
Leviticus19:25 Negore rechishanu mungadya michero yayo; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu. 
Leviticus19:26 Musadya chinhu chine ropa racho; musaita mazango, kana kutenda mashura." 
Leviticus19:27 Musaveura misoro yenyu muchiita matendeure, uye musashatisa nhivi dzendebvu dzenyu." 
Leviticus19:28 Musazvicheka miviri yenyu nokuda kwavakafa, kana kuzvitema nyora; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:29 “Usasvibisa mwanasikana wako, uchimuita chifeve; kuti nyika irege kupata, nyika izare nezvakaipa." 
Leviticus19:30 Chengetai maSabata angu, nokukudza imba yangu tsvene; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:31 “Musaenda kunobvunzira kumasvikiro nokuvauki; musavatsvaka, kuti murege kusvibiswa navo; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:32 “Unofanira kusimukira wachena vhudzi, nokukudza mutana, uye utye Mwari wako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:33 “Kana mutorwa agere newe panyika yenyu, usamuitira zvakaipa." 
Leviticus19:34 Mutorwa ugere nemi ngaave kwamuri somunhu wakaberekerwa pakati penyu, unofanira kumuda sezvaunozvida iwe, nokuti nemiwo makanga muri vatorwa munyika yeIjipiti; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Musaita zvisina kururama pakutonga, kana pakuyera nechitanda, kana pakuyera kurema, kana pachiyero." 
Leviticus19:36 Ivai nezviyero zvakarurama, nezvokuenzanisa nazvo zvakarurama, neefa yakarurama, nehini yakarurama; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti." 
Leviticus19:37 Chengetai mitemo yangu yose, nezvandakatonga zvose, kuti muzviite; ndini Jehovha.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus20:2 “Uyezve, uti kuvana VaIsiraeri, ‘Ani naani pakati pavana VaIsiraeri, kana pavatorwa vagere pakati paVaIsiraeri, unopa Moreki vana vake, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurayiwa; vanhu venyika vanofanira kumutaka namabwe." 
Leviticus20:3 Neniwo ndichafuratidza chiso changu kumunhu uyo, ndichamubvisa pakati porudzi rwake; nokuti wakapa Moreki vamwe pakati pavana vake, kuti asvibise imba yangu tsvene, nokumhura zita rangu dzvene.’" 
Leviticus20:4 Kana vanhu vakaita savasingaoni munhu uyo, kana achipa Moreki vamwe pakati pavana vake, vakasamuuraya;" 
Leviticus20:5 ipapo ini ndichafuratidza chiso changu kumunhu uyo nemhuri yake, ndimubvise pakati porudzi rwake, iye navose vanomutevera pakufambidzana naMoreki." 
Leviticus20:6 “Kana munhu achienda kumasvikiro navauki achifambidzana navo, ndichafuratidza chiso changu kubva kwaari, ndimubvise pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus20:7 Naizvozvo zvitsaurei, muve vatsvene; nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus20:8 Munofanira kuchengeta mitemo yangu, nokuiita; ndini Jehovha unokutsaurai." 
Leviticus20:9 “Nokuti mumwe nomumwe unotuka baba vake, kana mai vake, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurayiwa; munhu wakatuka baba vake kana mai vake, mhosva yeropa rake ichava pamusoro pake." 
Leviticus20:10 “Munhu unoita upombwe nomukadzi womumwe, iye unoita upombwe nomukadzi wowokwake, zvirokwazvo mhombwe nechifeve vose vachaurayiwa." 
Leviticus20:11 Munhu unovata nomukadzi wababa vake, wafukura baba vake, zvirokwazvo vose vari vaviri vanofanira kuurayiwa; mhosva yeropa ravo ichava pamusoro pavo." 
Leviticus20:12 Kana munhu akavata nomukadzi womwanakomana wake, zvirokwazvo vose vari vaviri vanofanira kuurayiwa; vakaita zvinonyangadza kwazvo; mhosva yeropa ravo ichava pamusoro pavo." 
Leviticus20:13 Kana munhu akavata nomurume sezvinoitwa nazvo nomukadzi, zvirokwazvo vose vari vaviri vakaita zvinonyangadza, vose vanofanira kuurayiwa; mhosva yeropa ravo ichava pamusoro pavo." 
Leviticus20:14 Kana munhu akatora mukadzi pamwechete namai vake, zvakaipa; vanofanira kupiswa nomoto vose, iye naivo; kuti kurege kuva nezvakaipa pakati penyu." 
Leviticus20:15 Kana munhu akavata nechipfuwo, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurayiwa; nechipfuwowo munofanira kuchiuraya." 
Leviticus20:16 Kana mukadzi akaswedera kuchipfuwo chipi nechipi kuti avate pamberi pacho, munofanira kuuraya mukadzi nechipfuwo; zvirokwazvo zvinofanira kuurayiwa; mhosva yeropa razvo ichava pamusoro pazvo." 
Leviticus20:17 Kana munhu akatora hanzvadzi yake, mwanasikana wababa vake, kana mwanasikana wamai vake, akamufukura, naiyewo akamufukura, chinhu chinonyadza; vachabviswa pamberi pavana vorudzi rwavo; wafukura hanzvadzi yake, iye uchava nemhosva yake." 
Leviticus20:18 Kana munhu akavata nomukadzi panguva yokuva kumwedzi kwake, akamufukura, wafukura tsime rake, naiye wafukura tsime reropa rake; ivo vaviri vose vanofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwavo." 
Leviticus20:19 “Usafukura mainini vako, kana vatete vako, nokuti wafukura hama yako yomumba; vachava nemhosva yavo." 
Leviticus20:20 Kana munhu akavata nomukadzi wababamunini vake, wafukura babamunini vake; vachava nezvivi zvavo; vachafa vasina vana." 
Leviticus20:21 Kana munhu akatora mukadzi womun'una wake, chinhu chine tsvina; wafukura mun'una wake; vachashaiwa vana." 
Leviticus20:22 “Naizvozvo chengetai mitemo yangu yose, nezvose zvandakatonga, kuti muzviite; kuti nyika yandinozokuisai kwairi, kuti mugaremo, irege kukurutsai." 
Leviticus20:23 Musafamba netsika dzorudzi rwavanhu vandichadzinga pamberi penyu; nokuti ivo vakaita izvozvo zvose, naizvozvo ndakavasema." 
Leviticus20:24 Asi ndakakuudzai imi, ndikati, ‘Muchagara nhaka yenyika yavo, ndichakupai iyo ive yenyu; inyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu, wakakutsaurai pakati pedzimwe ndudzi." 
Leviticus20:25 Naizvozvo tsaurai zvipfuwo zvakanaka pane zvakaipa, neshiri dzakaipa pane dzakanaka; kuti murege kuva vanhu vanonyangadza nezvipfuwo, kana neshiri, kana nechinhu chipi nechipi chinokambaira panyika chandakatsaura kwamuri ndichiti, hazvina kunaka.’" 
Leviticus20:26 Munofanira kuva vatsvene kwandiri; nokuti ini Jehovha ndiri mutsvene, ndakakutsaurai pakati pedzimwe ndudzi, kuti muve vangu." 
Leviticus20:27 “Murume kana mukadzi unosvikirwa, kana uri muuki, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurayiwa; vanofanira kutakwa namabwe; mhosva yeropa ravo ichava pamusoro pavo.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Taura navapristi, vanakomana vaAroni, uti kwavari, ‘Mupristi ngaarege kuzvisvibisa kuna vakafa pakati porudzi rwake;" 
Leviticus21:2 asi kuhama yake yomumba, kana mai vake, kana baba vake, kana mwanakomana wake, kana mwanasikana wake, kana munun'una wake;" 
Leviticus21:3 kana hanzvadzi yake ichiri mhandara, hama yomumba, asina kumbova nomurume; ungazvisvibisa kwaari.’" 
Leviticus21:4 Ngaarege kuzvisvibisa, zvaari mukuru pakati pehama dzake, kuti azvishatise." 
Leviticus21:5 “Havafaniri kuveura misoro yavo, vachiita mhanza, kana kuveura rutivi rumwe rwendebvu dzavo, kana kutema nyora pamiviri yavo." 
Leviticus21:6 Vanofanira kuva vatsvene kuna Mwari wavo, varege kumhura zita raMwari wavo; nokuti ndivo vanouya nezvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinopiswa, zvokudya zvaMwari wavo; naizvozvo ngavave vatsvene." 
Leviticus21:7 Havafaniri kutora mukadzi chifeve, kana wakachinyiwa; ngavarege kutora mukadzi wakarambwa nomurume wake, nokuti mutsvene kuna Mwari wake." 
Leviticus21:8 Naizvozvo unofanira iwe kumutsaura, nokuti ndiye unouya nezvokudya zvaMwari wako; anofanira kuva mutsvene kwauri, nokuti ini Jehovha ndinokutsaurai, ndiri mutsvene." 
Leviticus21:9 Kana mwanasikana womupristi upi noupi achizvisvibisa nokuita chipfambi, anosvibisa baba vake; anofanira kupiswa nomoto." 
Leviticus21:10 “Munhu, ari Mupristi Mukuru pakati pehama dzake, wakadirwa mafuta echizoro pamusoro pake, wakatsaurwa kuti afuke nguo dzoMupristi Mukuru, ngaarege kusunungura vhudzi romusoro wake, kana kubvarura nguo dzake." 
Leviticus21:11 Ngaarege kusvika pachitunha, kana kuzvisvibisa kuna baba vake kana mai vake;" 
Leviticus21:12 ngaarege kubuda panzvimbo tsvene, kana kusvibisa nzvimbo tsvene yaMwari wake, nokuti mafuta okugadza aMwari wake ari pamusoro pake; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus21:13 Ngaazvitorere mukadzi ichiri mhandara. 
Leviticus21:14 Ngaarege kutora chirikadzi, kana wakarambwa nomurume wake, kana wakachinyiwa, kana chifeve, asi ngaatore mukadzi ichiri mhandara pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus21:15 Ngaarege kusvibisa vana vake pakati porudzi rwake; nokuti ndini Jehovha ndinomutsaura.” 
Leviticus21:16 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Leviticus21:17 “Taura naAroni, uti, ‘Ani naani wakaremara pakati pavana vako pamarudzi avo ose, ngaarege kuswedera kuuya nezvokudya zvaMwari wake.’" 
Leviticus21:18 Nokuti munhu upi noupi wakaremara ngaarege kuswedera kana riri bofu, kana ano kamhina, kana wakaremara pachiso, kana uno mutezo wakarebesa," 
Leviticus21:19 kana munhu ano rutsoka rwakavhunika, kana ruoko rwakavhunika," 
Leviticus21:20 kana ano musana wakakombama, kana wakawonda kwazvo, kana uno ruvara paziso rake, kana ane mhizi, kana ane pakafunuka, kana wakaremara pamberi;" 
Leviticus21:21 munhu upi noupi worudzi rwomupristi Aroni akaremara haafaniri kuswedera kuuya nezvipiriso zvinopiswa zvaJehovha; wakaremara, haafaniri kuswedera kuuya nezvokudya zvaMwari wake." 
Leviticus21:22 Ungadya hake zvokudya zvaMwari wake, zvitsvene zvikuru nezvitsvene zvose." 
Leviticus21:23 Asi haafaniri kupinda mukati meketeni, kana kuswedera kuatari nokuti wakaremara; kuti arege kusvibisa nzvimbo dzangu tsvene; nokuti ndini Jehovha ndinovatsaura.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Mosesi akataura saizvozvo naAroni navanakomana vake navana VaIsiraeri vose. 
Leviticus22:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus22:2 “Taura naAroni navanakomana vake, kuti vazvitsaure pazvinhu zvitsvene zvevana VaIsiraeri, zvavanonditsaurira, kuti varege kusvibisa zita rangu dzvene; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:3 Uti kwavari, ‘Ani naani kuvana venyu kumarudzi enyu ose, unoswedera kuzvinhu zvitsvene, zvakatsaurirwa Jehovha navana VaIsiraeri, asina kunaka, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pamberi pangu;’ ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:4 “Ani naani kuvana vaAroni ane maperembudzi kana ane zvinoyerera ngaarege kudya zvinhu zvitsvene kusvikira anaka. Ani naani unobata chinhu chakasvibiswa nowakafa kana munhu unobudirwa nembeu yake; 
Leviticus22:5 kana ani naani unobata chinhu chipi nechipi chinokambaira chingamusvibisa, kana munhu waangasvibiswa naye, uno kusanaka kupi nokupi." 
Leviticus22:6 Munhu unobata chinhu chipi nechipi chakadai, uchava asina kunaka kusvikira usiku; haafaniri kudya zvinhu zvitsvene asati ashambidza muviri wake nemvura." 
Leviticus22:7 Kana zuva ravira uchava wakanaka; pashure ungadya hake zvinhu zvitsvene; nokuti ndizvo zvokudya zvake. 
Leviticus22:8 Ngaarege kudya chinhu chakafa choga, kana chakaurayiwa nezvikara, achisvibisa nacho; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:9 “Naizvozvo vanofanira kuchengeta zvandakaraira, kuti varege kuva nezvivi nokuda kwazvo, vafe nazvo, kana vazvisvibisa; ndini Jehovha, ndinovatsaura." 
Leviticus22:10 “Mweni ngaarege kudya chinhu chitsvene; mutorwa ugere nomupristi, kana muranda, ngavarege kudya chinhu chitsvene." 
Leviticus22:11 Asi kana mupristi akatenga munhu nomutengo wemari yake, iye ungazvidya; uye vose vanoberekerwa mumba make, vangadya zvokudya zvake." 
Leviticus22:12 Kana mwanasikana womupristi akawanikwa nomweni, ngaarege kudya chipiriso chinotsaurwa chezvinhu zvitsvene." 
Leviticus22:13 Asi kana mwanasikana womupristi iri chirikadzi, kana warambwa nomurume, asina vana, akadzokera kumba kwababa vake, sapausikana hwake, iye ungadya zvokudya zvababa vake; asi mweni ngaarege kuzvidya." 
Leviticus22:14 “Kana munhu akadya chinhu chitsvene asingazivi, uchafanira kuwedzera cheshanu chacho kwachiri, kuti adzosere kumupristi chinhu chitsvene." 
Leviticus22:15 Ngavarege kusvibisa zvinhu zvitsvene zvevana VaIsiraeri zvavanopa Jehovha; 
Leviticus22:16 kuti varege kuva nemhosva yezvivi, kana vachidya zvinhu zvavo zvitsvene; nokuti ndini Jehovha ndinovatsaura.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus22:18 “Taura naAroni, navanakomana vake, navana VaIsiraeri vose, uti kwavari, ‘Ani naani wemba yaIsiraeri, kana wavatorwa pakati paVaIsiraeri, unouya nechipo chake, kana chiri chemhiko, kana iri nhendo ipi neipi yokuda kwavo, chavanouya nacho kuna Jehovha, kuti chipiswe;" 
Leviticus22:19 munofanira kuuya nomukono asina kuremara kana wemombe, kana gondohwe ramakwai, kana nhongo yembudzi, kuti mugamuchirwe." 
Leviticus22:20 Asi musauya nechinhu chakaremara, nokuti hamungagamuchirwi nokuda kwacho." 
Leviticus22:21 Ani naani unouya nechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa kuna Jehovha, chokupika nacho, kana kuti ive nhendo yokuda kwake, kana chiri chemombe kana chamakwai, chinofanira kuva chakakwana, kuti chigamuchirwe; ngachirege kuva chakaremara." 
Leviticus22:22 Kana chiri chinhu chakaita bofu, kana chakavhunika, kana chakakuvara, kana china maronda, kana chine chikwekwe, kana china pakafunuka, murege kupa Jehovha izvozvo, musapisira Jehovha izvozvo paatari." 
Leviticus22:23 Kana iri nzombe duku kana gwayana zvine mitezo yakarebesa kana yakapfupika, mungauya nazvo kuti muite nhendo yokuda kwenyu, asi hazvingagamuchirwi pakuripira mhiko." 
Leviticus22:24 Musapa Jehovha chinhu china manhu akakuvadzwa, kana akapwanyika, kana akaputswa, kana akachekwa; musadaro panyika yenyu." 
Leviticus22:25 Musagamuchira zvakadai paruoko rwomutorwa, kuti mupe Mwari wenyu zvokudya zvakadai, nokuti zvakaipa, zvakaremara, hazvingagamuchirwi nokuda kwenyu.’ ”" 
Leviticus22:26 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus22:27 “Kana nzombe, kana gwai, kana mbudzi zvichiberekwa, zvinofanira kugara pana mai vazvo mazuva manomwe; kubva pazuva rorusere napashure paro zvingagamuchirwa kuti zviite chipo chinopisirwa Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:28 Kana iri mhou kana nhunzvi, musazviuraya pamusi mumwe navana vazvo." 
Leviticus22:29 Kana muchibayira Jehovha chibayiro chokuvonga, munofanira kuchibayira saizvozvo kuti mugamuchirwe." 
Leviticus22:30 Chinofanira kudyiwa nomusi iwoyo; musasiya zvimwe kusvikira mangwana; ndini Jehovha. 
Leviticus22:31 “Naizvozvo chengetai mirairo yangu, muiite; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:32 Usashatisa zita rangu dzvene; ndinoda kutsaurwa pakati pavana VaIsiraeri, ndini Jehovha, ndinokutsaurai;" 
Leviticus22:33 ndakakubudisai panyika yeIjipiti, kuti ndive Mwari wenyu; ndini Jehovha.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi akati," 
Leviticus23:2 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Mitambo yakatarwa naJehovha, yamunofanira kuparidzira muchiti ndidzo ungano tsvene, ndiyo mitambo yangu yakatarwa.’" 
Leviticus23:3 Mabasa ngaabatwe mazuva matanhatu; asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata rokuzorora kwazvo, iungano tsvene; musabata basa ripi neripi; iSabata raJehovha mudzimba dzenyu dzose." 
Leviticus23:4 “Ndiyo mitambo yaJehovha yakatarwa, ndidzo ungano tsvene, dzamunofanira kuparidzira nenguva dzakatarwa:" 
Leviticus23:5 Nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva regumi namana romwedzi, madekwana, iPasika raJehovha."
