Numbers26:15 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaGadhi nemhuri dzavo: Zefoni, kwakabva mhuri yavaZefoni; naHagi, kwakabva mhuri yavaHagi; naShuni, kwakabva mhuri yavaShuni;" 
Numbers26:16 naOzini, kwakabva mhuri yavaOzini; naEri, kwakabva mhuri yavaEri;" 
Numbers26:17 naArodhi, kwakabva mhuri yavaArodhi; naAreri, kwakabva mhuri yavaAreri." 
Numbers26:18 Ndidzo mhuri dzavanakomana vaGadhi; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana namazana mashanu. 
Numbers26:19 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaJudha: Eri naOnani; asi Eri naOnani vakafira munyika yeKenani. 
Numbers26:20 Ndivo vanakomana vaJudha, nemhuri dzavo: Shera, kwakabva mhuri yavaShera; naPerezi kwakabva mhuri yavaPerezi; naZera, kwakabva mhuri yavaZera." 
Numbers26:21 Ndivo vanakomana vaPerezi: Hezironi, kwakabva mhuri yavaHezironi; naHamuri, kwakabva mhuri yavaHamuri." 
Numbers26:22 Ndidzo mhuri dzaJudha; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi manomwe nezvitanhatu namazana mashanu. 
Numbers26:23 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaIsakari, nemhuri dzavo: Tora, kwakabva mhuri yavaTora; naPuva, kwakabva mhuri yavaPuva;" 
Numbers26:24 naJashubhi, kwakabva mhuri yavaJashubhi; naShimironi, kwakabva mhuri yavaShimironi." 
Numbers26:25 Ndidzo mhuri dzaIsakari; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu nezvina namazana matatu. 
Numbers26:26 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaZebhuruni, nemhuri dzavo: Seredhi, kwakabva mhuri yavaSeredhi; naEroni, kwakabva mhuri yavaEroni; naJareeri, kwakabva mhuri yavaJareeri." 
Numbers26:27 Ndidzo mhuri dzaZebhuruni; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu namazana mashanu. 
Numbers26:28 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaJosefa, nemhuri dzavo: Manase naEfuremu." 
Numbers26:29 Ndivo vanakomana vaManase: Makiri, kwakabva mhuri yavaMakiri; Makiri wakabereka Gireadhi; kunaGireadhi kwakabva mhuri yavaGireadhi." 
Numbers26:30 Ndivo vanakomana vaGireadhi: Jezeri, kwakabva mhuri yavaJezeri; naHereki, kwakabva mhuri yavaHereki;" 
Numbers26:31 naAsirieri, kwakabva mhuri yavaAsirieri; naShekemu, kwakabva mhuri yavaShekemu;" 
Numbers26:32 naShemidha, kwakabva mhuri yavaShemidha; naHeferi, kwakabva mhuri yavaHeferi." 
Numbers26:33 Asi Zerofehadhi, mwanakomana waHeferi, akanga asina vanakomana, asi vanasikana bedzi; mazita avanasikana vaZerofehadhi aiva Makira, naNowa, naHogira, naMirika, naTiriza." 
Numbers26:34 Ndidzo mhuri dzaManase; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezviviri namazana manomwe. 
Numbers26:35 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaEfuremu, nemhuri dzavo: Shutera, kwakabva mhuri yavaShutera; naBhekeri, kwakabva mhuri yavaBhekeri; naTahani, kwakabva mhuri yavaTahani." 
Numbers26:36 Ndivo vanakomana vaShutera: Erani, kwakabva mhuri yavaErani." 
Numbers26:37 Ndidzo mhuri dzavanakomana vaEfuremu; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matatu nezviviri, namazana mashanu. Ndivo vanakomana vaJosefa, nemhuri dzavo." 
Numbers26:38 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaBhenjamini, nemhuri dzavo: Bhera, kwakabva mhuri yavaBhera; naAshibheri, kwakabva mhuri yavaAshibheri; naAhirami, kwakabva mhuri yavaAhirami;" 
Numbers26:39 naShefufami, kwakabva mhuri yavaShufami; naHufami, kwakabva mhuri yavaHufami." 
Numbers26:40 Ndivo vanakomana vaBhera: Aridhi naNamani; kuna Aridhi kwakabva mhuri yavaAridhi; naNamani, kwakabva mhuri yavaNamani." 
Numbers26:41 Ndivo vanakomana vaBhenjamini, nemhuri dzavo; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nezvishanu namazana matanhatu." 
Numbers26:42 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaDhani, nemhuri dzavo: Shuhami, kwakabva mhuri yavaShuhami. Ndivo vemhuri dzaDhani, nedzimba dzavo." 
Numbers26:43 Mhuri dzose dzavaShuhami, vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu nezvina namazana mana." 
Numbers26:44 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaAsheri, nemhuri dzavo: Imuna, kwakabva mhuri yavaImuna; naIshivhi, kwakabva mhuri yavaIshivhi; naBheria, kwakabva mhuri yavaBheria." 
Numbers26:45 Ndivo vanakomana vaBheria: Hebheri, kwakabva mhuri yavaHebheri; naMakieri, kwakabva mhuri yavaMakieri." 
Numbers26:46 Zita romwanasikana waAsheri rakanga riri Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Ndidzo mhuri dzaAsheri; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezvitanhatu namazana mana. 
Numbers26:48 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaNafutari, nemhuri dzavo: Jazeeri, kwakabva mhuri yavaJazeri; naGuni, kwakabva mhuri yavaGuni;" 
Numbers26:49 naJezeri, kwakabva mhuri yavaJezeri; naShiremi, kwakabva mhuri yavaShiremi." 
Numbers26:50 Ndidzo mhuri dzaNafutari, nemhuri dzavo; vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nezvishanu namazana mana." 
Numbers26:51 Ndivo vakaverengwa kuvana VaIsiraeri, vakasvika zviuru zvina mazana matanhatu nechiuru chimwe namazana manomwe namakumi matatu." 
Numbers26:52 Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Numbers26:53 “Nyika inofanira kugoverwa pakati paivava, ive nhaka yavo, vachiverengwa namazita avo." 
Numbers26:54 Vazhinji nofanira kuvapa nhaka zhinji; vashoma unofanira kuvapa nhaka shoma; mumwe nomumwe unofanira kupiwa sezvavakaverengwa. 
Numbers26:55 Kunyangwe zvakadaro nyika inofanira kugoverwa nemijenya; vachapiwe nhaka namazita amarudzi amadzibaba avo. 
Numbers26:56 Nhaka yavo inofanira kugoverwa nemijenya kana vari vazhinji kana vari vashoma.” 
Numbers26:57 Zvino ndivo vakaverengwa kuvaRevhi, nemhuri dzavo: Gerishoni, kwakabva mhuri yavaGerishoni; Kohati, kwakabva mhuri yavaKohati; Merari, kwakabva mhuri yavaMerari." 
Numbers26:58 Ndidzo mhuri dzavaRevhi: Mhuri yavaRibhini, nemhuri yavaHebhuroni, nemhuri yavaMari, nemhuri yavaMushi, nemhuri yavaKora. Kohati akabereka Amuramu." 
Numbers26:59 Zita romukadzi waAmuramu rakanga riri Jokebhedhi, mwanasikana waRevhi, wakaberekerwa Revhi paIjipiti; ndiye wakaberekera Amuramu, Aroni, naMosesi, naMiriami, hanzvadzi yavo." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni akaberekerwa Nadhabhi, naAbhihu, naEreazari, naItamari." 
Numbers26:61 Nadhabhi naAbhihu vakafa, nguva yavakauyisa moto usina kufanira pamberi paJehovha." 
Numbers26:62 Vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi maviri nezvitatu, murume mumwe nomumwe wakanga ano mwedzi mumwe navanopfuura; nokuti havana kuverengwa pakati pavana VaIsiraeri, nokuti havana kupiwa nhaka pakati pavana VaIsiraeri." 
Numbers26:63 Ndivo vakaverengwa naMosesi naEreazari mupristi, vakaverenga vana VaIsiraeri pamapani aMoabhu, paJodhani paJeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Asi pakati pavo kwakanga kusina murume mumwe wavaya vakaverengwa naMosesi naAroni, vakanga vaverenga vana VaIsiraeri murenje reSinai." 
Numbers26:65 Nokuti Jehovha akanga ati napamusoro pavo, “Zvirokwazvo vachafira murenje.” Hakuna mumwe wavo akanga asara, asi Karebhu, mwanakomana waJefune, naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni." 
Numbers26:65 Nokuti Jehovha akanga ati napamusoro pavo, “Zvirokwazvo vachafira murenje.” Hakuna mumwe wavo akanga asara, asi Karebhu, mwanakomana waJefune, naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni." 
Numbers27:1 Zvino vanasikana vaZerofehadhi, mwanakomana waHeferi, mwanakomana waGireadhi, mwanakomana waMakiri, mwanakomana waManase, wemhuri dzaManase, mwanakomana waJosefa, vakaswedera kuna Mosesi; ndiwo mazita avanasikana vake: Mara, naNowa, naHogira, naMirika, naTiriza;" 
Numbers27:2 vakamira pamberi paMosesi napamberi paEreazari mupristi, napamberi pamachinda neungano yose, pamukova wetende rokusangana, vakati," 
Numbers27:3 “Baba vedu vakafira murenje, asi vakanga vasi pakati peboka ravaya vakaungana kuzorwa naJehovha, veboka raKora; vakafira havo muzvivi zvavo, vasina vanakomana." 
Numbers27:4 Zvino zita rababa vedu richabvisirweiko pakati pemhuri yavo, nokuti vakanga vasina vanakomana? Tipeiwo nhaka pakati pehama dzababa vedu.”" 
Numbers27:5 Mosesi akaisa shoko ravo pamberi paJehovha. 
Numbers27:6 Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Numbers27:7 “Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi vanotaura kwazvo; zvirokwazvo, unofanira kuvapa nhaka pakati pehama dzababa vavo; unofanira kuvagarisa nhaka yababa vavo." 
Numbers27:8 Zvino unofanira kutaura navana VaIsiraeri, uchiti, ‘Kana munhu akafa asina mwanakomana, munofanira kugarisa mwanasikana wake nhaka yake." 
Numbers27:9 Kana asina mwanasikana, munofanira kupa vakuru vake navanun'una vake nhaka yake." 
Numbers27:10 Kana asina vakuru kana vanun'una, munofanira kupa vakuru kana vanun'una vababa vake nhaka yake." 
Numbers27:11 Kana baba vake vasina vakuru kana vanun'una, munofanira kupa hama yake yomumba nhaka yake, ive yake.’ Unofanira kuva mutemo wokutonga nawo pakati pavana VaIsiraeri,” sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Numbers27:12 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Kwira pagomo iri reAbharimu, uone nyika yandakapa vana VaIsiraeri." 
Numbers27:13 Ipapo kana waiona, newewo uchasanganiswa navanhu vako, sezvakasanganiswa mukuru wako Aroni;" 
Numbers27:14 nokuti makaramba shoko rangu murenje reZini, panguva yokurwa kweungano, mukarega kunditsaura pamberi pavo pamvura.” (Ndiyo mvura yeMeribha paKadheshi, murenje reZini.)" 
Numbers27:15 Zvino Mosesi akataura naJehovha, akati," 
Numbers27:16 “Jehovha, Mwari wemweya yavanhu vose, ngaagadze murume paungano iyi," 
Numbers27:17 achabuda pamberi pavo, nokupinda pamberi pavo, angavabudisa nokuvapinza; kuti ungano yaJehovha irege kuva samakwai asina mufudzi.”" 
Numbers27:18 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tora Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, murume uno mweya mukati make, uise ruoko rwako pamusoro pake." 
Numbers27:18 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tora Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, murume uno mweya mukati make, uise ruoko rwako pamusoro pake." 
Numbers27:19 Umuise pamberi paEreazari mupristi, napamberi peungano yose, ugomurairira pamberi pavo." 
Numbers27:20 Uise pamusoro pake zvoukuru hwako, kuti ungano yose yavana VaIsiraeri imuteerere." 
Numbers27:21 Iye anofanira kumira pamberi pomupristi Ereazari, iye amuunzire pamberi paJehovha nokutonga kweUrimi; nokuraira kwake, vanofanira kubuda, nokuraira kwake, vanofanira kupinda, iye pamwechete navana VaIsiraeri vose, ungano yose.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mosesi akaita sezvaakarairwa naJehovha; akatora Joshua, akamuisa pamberi pemupristi Ereazari, napamberi peungano yose;" 
Numbers27:22 Mosesi akaita sezvaakarairwa naJehovha; akatora Joshua, akamuisa pamberi pemupristi Ereazari, napamberi peungano yose;" 
Numbers27:23 akaisa maoko ake pamusoro pake, akamurairira, sezvakataura Jehovha nomuromo waMosesi." 
Numbers28:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Numbers28:2 “Raira vana VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Munofanira kurangarira kundipa nenguva yazvo yakafanira zvipo zvangu, izvo zvokudya zvangu zvezvipiriso zvangu zvinopiswa, chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka kwandiri.’" 
Numbers28:3 Unofanira kuti kwavari, ‘Ndicho chipiriso chinopiswa chamunofanira kupa Jehovha: Makwayana amakondohwe egore rimwe, asina kuremara, maviri zuva rimwe nerimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose." 
Numbers28:4 Rimwe gwayana unofanira kuuya naro mangwanani, rimwe gwayana unofanira kuuya naro madekwana;" 
Numbers28:5 nechegumi cheefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso choupfu, hwakakanyiwa nechechina chehini yamafuta akasviniwa." 
Numbers28:6 Ndicho chipiriso chinofanira kupiswa nguva dzose, chakarairwa pagomo reSinai, chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka, chipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha.’" 
Numbers28:7 Nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa chinofanira kuva chechina chehini chegwayana rimwe nerimwe; unofanira kudururira Jehovha chipiriso chezvinodhaka. 
Numbers28:8 Rimwe gwayana unofanira kuuya naro madekwana; unofanira kuuya naro pamwechete nechipiriso choupfu, nechipiriso chinodururwa, zvakafanana nezvamangwanani, chive chipiriso chinopiswa, chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Numbers28:9 “Asi nomusi weSabata munofanira kuuya namakwayana amakondohwe maviri egore rimwe, asina kuremara, nezvegumi zviviri zveefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso choupfu, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers28:10 Ndicho chipiriso chinopiswa cheSabata rimwe nerimwe, kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers28:11 “Pakuvamba kwemwedzi yenyu munofanira kuuya nechipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha: Nzombe mbiri duku negondohwe rimwe, namakwayana manomwe amakondohwe egore rimwe, asina kuremara;" 
Numbers28:12 nezvegumi zvitatu zveefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso choupfu, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, panzombe imwe neimwe; nezvegumi zviviri zvoupfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso choupfu, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, pagondohwe rimwe nerimwe;" 
Numbers28:13 nechegumi chimwe choupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu pagwayana rimwe nerimwe; chive chipiriso chinopiswa chinonhuwira zvakanaka chinopisirwa Jehovha." 
Numbers28:14 Zvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa zvinofanira kuva zvehafu yehini pagondohwe rimwe, nechechina chehini pagwayana rimwe; ndicho chipiriso chinopiswa chinofanira kuitwa mwedzi mumwe nomumwe wemwedzi yegore rose." 
Numbers28:15 Uye nhongo imwe yembudzi chive chipiriso chezvivi kuna Jehovha; chinofanira kuuyiswa kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers28:16 “Nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva regumi namana romwedzi, munofanira kurangarira Pasika yaJehovha." 
Numbers28:17 Mutambo unofanira kuitwa nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi uyo; chingwa chisina kuviriswa chinofanira kudyiwa mazuva manomwe. 
Numbers28:18 Pazuva rokutanga kunofanira kuva neungano tsvene; kuSabata mabasa avaranda pazuva iro; 
Numbers28:19 asi munofanira kuuya nechipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha: Nzombe mbiri duku, negondohwe rimwe, namakwayana amakondohwe manomwe egore rimwe, zvive zvisina kuremara kwamuri;" 
Numbers28:20 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, choupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta; munofanira kuuya nezvegumi zvitatu panzombe imwe, nezvegumi zviviri pagondohwe rimwe." 
Numbers28:21 Unofanira kuuya nechegumi chimwe pagwayana rimwe nerimwe pamakwayana manomwe; 
Numbers28:22 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi, chokuyananisira nacho." 
Numbers28:23 Munofanira kuuya naizvozvo kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa chamangwanani, chinofanira kupiswa nguva dzose." 
Numbers28:24 Saizvozvo munofanira kuuya nezvokudya zvechipiriso chinopiswa zuva rimwe nerimwe pamazuva manomwe, chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha; chinofanira kuuyiswa kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers28:25 Pazuva rechinomwe munofanira kuita ungano tsvene; musabata mabasa avaranda naro. 
Numbers28:26 “Uye pazuva rezvitsva, kana muchiuya nechipiriso chitsva choupfu kuna Jehovha pamutambo wenyu wamavhiki, munofanira kuita ungano tsvene; musabata mabasa avaranda." 
Numbers28:27 Asi munofanira kuuya nechipiriso chinopiswa chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha, zvinoti: Nzombe mbiri duku, negondohwe rimwe, namakwayana amakondohwe egore rimwe;" 
Numbers28:28 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, choupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta; zvegumi zvitatu panzombe imwe, nezvegumi zviviri pagondohwe rimwe," 
Numbers28:29 nechegumi chimwe pagwayana rimwe nerimwe ramakwayana manomwe; 
Numbers28:30 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, zvokuyanisira nazvo." 
Numbers28:31 Munofanira kuuya nazvo (zvive kwamuri zvisina kuremara) nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa, kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu." 
Numbers29:1 “Nomwedzi wechinomwe, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, munofanira kuita ungano tsvene; hamufaniri kubata mabasa avaranda naro; rinofanira kuva kwamuri zuva rokuridza hwamanda naro." 
Numbers29:2 Munofanira kuuya nechipiriso chinopiswa, chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha, zvinoti: Nzombe imwe duku, negondohwe rimwe, namakwayana amakondohwe manomwe, egore rimwe, asina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:3 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, choupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, zvegumi zvitatu panzombe, nezvegumi zviviri pagondohwe," 
Numbers29:4 nechegumi chimwe pagwayana rimwe nerimwe ramakwayana manomwe; 
Numbers29:5 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi, chokuyananisira nacho;" 
Numbers29:6 kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa pakugara kwomwedzi, nechipisiro chacho choupfu, nechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa, sezvakarairwa; chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka, chive chipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha." 
Numbers29:7 “Nezuva regumi romwedzi wechinomwe munofanira kuita ungano tsvene; munofanira kuchema pamweya yenyu; musatongobata basa. 
Numbers29:8 Asi munofanira kuuya nechipiriso chokupisira Jehovha, chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka, zvinoti: Nzombe imwe duku, negondohwe rimwe, namakwayana amakondohwe manomwe egore rimwe; zvive zivisina kuremara kwamuri;" 
Numbers29:9 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, choupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta; zvegumi zvitatu panzombe, nezvegumi zviviri pagondohwe rimwe;" 
Numbers29:10 nechegumi chimwe pagwayana rimwe nerimwe ramakwayana manomwe; 
Numbers29:11 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chezvivi chokuyananisira nacho, nechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa." 
Numbers29:12 Nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechinomwe munofanira kuita ungano tsvene; hamufaniri kubata basa ravaranda naro; munofanira kuitira Jehovha mutambo wamazuva manomwe. 
Numbers29:13 Munofanira kuuya nechipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chinopiswa nomoto, chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha, zvinoti: Nzombe duku dzine gumi nenhatu, namakondohwe maviri, namakwayana amakondohwe ane gumi namana egore rimwe; zvive zvisina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:14 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, choupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta; zvegumi zvitatu panzombe imwe neimwe panzombe dzine gumi nenhatu, nezvegumi zviviri pagondohwe rimwe nerimwe pamakondohwe maviri;" 
Numbers29:15 nechegumi chimwe pagwayana rimwe nerimwe pamakwayana ane gumi namana; 
Numbers29:16 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers29:17 “Nezuva repiri munofanira kuuya nenzombe duku dzine gumi nembiri, namakondohwe maviri, namakwayana amakondohwe ane gumi namana egore rimwe asina kuremara." 
Numbers29:18 Nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa zvenzombe, namakondohwe namakwayana, zvakaenzana nokuwanda kwazvo, sezvakarairwa;" 
Numbers29:19 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose; nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa." 
Numbers29:20 “Nezuva retatu munofanira kuuya nenzombe duku dzine gumi neimwe, namakondohwe maviri, namakwayana amakondohwe ane gumi namana egore rimwe, asina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:21 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa zvenzombe, namakondohwe, namakwayana, zvakaenzana nokuwanda kwazvo, sezvakarairwa;" 
Numbers29:22 nenhongo imwe yembudzi chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers29:23 “Nezuva rechina munofanira kuuya nenzombe duku dzine gumi, namakondohwe maviri, namakwayana amakondohwe ane gumi namana egore rimwe, asina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:24 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa, zvenzombe, namakondohwe, namakwayana, zvakaenzana nokuwanda kwazvo, sezvakarairwa;" 
Numbers29:25 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers29:26 “Nezuva reshanu munofanira kuuya nenzombe duku pfumbamwe, nemakondohwe maviri, namakwayana amakondohwe ane gumi namana egore rimwe asina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:27 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa, nenzombe, namakondohwe namakwayana, zvakaenzana nokuwanda kwazvo, sezvakarairwa;" 
Numbers29:28 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers29:29 “Nezuva retanhatu munofanira kuuya nenzombe sere, namakondohwe maviri, namakwayana amakondohwe ane gumi namana egore rimwe, asina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:30 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa, zvenzombe, namakondohwe, namakwayana, zvakaenzana nokuwanda kwazvo, sezvakarairwa;" 
Numbers29:31 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nezvipiriso zvacho zvinodururwa." 
Numbers29:32 Nezuva rechinomwe munofanira kuuya nenzombe duku nomwe, namakondohwe maviri, namakwayana amakondohwe ane gumi namana egore rimwe, asina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:33 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa, zvenzombe, namakondohwe, namakwayana, zvakaenzana nokuwanda kwazvo, sezvakarairwa;" 
Numbers29:34 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers29:35 “Nezuva rorusere munofanira kuita ungano tsvene; hamufaniri kubata basa ravaranda naro. 
Numbers29:36 Asi munofanira kuuya nechipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chinopiswa nomoto, chive chinonhuwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha, zvinoti: Nzombe imwe duku, negondohwe rimwe, namakwayana amakondohwe manomwe egore rimwe, asina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:37 nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa, zvenzombe, namakondohwe, namakwayana, zvinofanira kuenzana nokuwanda kwazvo, sezvakarairwa;" 
Numbers29:38 nenhongo imwe yembudzi chive chipiriso chezvivi; kunze kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers29:39 “Ndizvo zvamunofanira kuuya nazvo kuna Jehovha pamitambo yenyu yakatarwa, kunze kwemhiko dzenyu, nezvipo zvokuda kwenyu, zvive zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa, nezvipiriso zvenyu zvoupfu, nezvipiriso zvenyu zvinodururwa, nezvipiriso zvenyu zvokuyananisa.”" 
Numbers29:40 Mosesi akaudza vana VaIsiraeri zvose zvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha. 
Numbers30:1 Zvino Mosesi akataura navakuru vamarudzi avana VaIsiraeri, akati, “Ndicho chinhu chakarairwa naJehovha:" 
Numbers30:2 Kana munhu achinge apikira Jehovha mhiko, kana kuzvisunga nokupika, haafaniri kushandura shoko rake; anofanira kuita zvose zvakabuda mumuromo make." 
Numbers30:3 Nomukadziwo, kana achinge apikira Jehovha, kana kuzvisunga nokusunga kwokupika, achiri mumba mababa vake, achiri musikana;" 
Numbers30:4 baba vake vakanzwa kupika kwake, nokuzvisunga kwaakazvisunga nako, baba vake vakamunyararira havo, ipapo kupika kwake kwose kuchava nesimba, nokusunga kwake kwose, kwaakazvisunga nako, kuchava nesimba." 
Numbers30:5 Asi kana baba vake vakamudzivisa nomusi wavanozvinzwa nawo, kupika kwake kwose, nokuzvisunga kwake kwose, kwaakazvisunga nako, hakungavi nesimba; Jehovha achamukanganwira, nokuti baba vake vamudzivisa." 
Numbers30:6 Kana akawanikwa nomurume achakasungwa nokupika kwake, kana namashoko aakareva asina kurangarira zvakanaka, aakazvisunga nawo;" 
Numbers30:7 murume wake akazvinzwa, akamunyararira hake nomusi waanozvinzwa nawo, ipapo kupika kwake kuchava nesimba, nokuzvisunga kwake, kwaakazvisunga nako, kuchava nesimba." 
Numbers30:8 Asi kana murume wake akamudzivisa nomusi waanozvinzwa nawo, ipapo iye anokonesa kupika kwake, kwaakazvisunga nako, namashoko aakareva asina kurangarira zvakanaka, aakazvisunga nawo; Jehovha achamukanganwira." 
Numbers30:9 Asi kupika kwechirikadzi, kana kwomukadzi akarambwa nomurume wake, chinhu chipi nechipi chaakazvisunga nacho, zvichava nesimba kwaari." 
Numbers30:10 Kana achinge apika ari mumba momurume wake, kana kuzvisunga nokupika," 
Numbers30:11 murume wake akazvinzwa, akamunyararira, asingamudzivisi, ipapo kupika kwake kuchava nesimba, nokuzvisunga kwose, kwaakazvisunga nako, kuchava nesimba." 
Numbers30:12 Asi kana murume wake akazvikonesa kwazvo nomusi waakazvinzwa nawo, ipapo zvose zvakabuda mumuromo make pakupika kwake, kana kuzvisunga kwake, hazvingavi nesimba; murume wake wazvikonesa; Jehovha achamukanganwira." 
Numbers30:13 Mhiko dzose, nokupika kwose kwaanozvisunga nako kuchema pamweya wake, murume wake angazvikonesa." 
Numbers30:14 Asi kana murume wake akamunyararira chose zuva rimwe nerimwe, ipapo unosimbisa mhiko dzake dzose nokuzvisunga kwake kwose, kwaakazvisunga nako; azvisimbisa, nokuti amunyararira nomusi waakazvinzwa nawo." 
Numbers30:15 Asi kana akazozvikonesa kwazvo, azvinzwa hake, iye anofanira kuva nemhosva yake.”" 
Numbers30:16 Ndiyo mitemo yakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha, pakati pomurume nomukadzi wake, napakati pababa nomwanasikana wavo, achiri musikana paimba yababa vake." 
Numbers31:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Numbers31:2 “Tsiva vana VaIsiraeri kuvaMidhiani; shure kwaizvozvo iwe uchasanganiswa navanhu vako.” 
Numbers31:3 Mosesi akataura navanhu, akati, “Varume pakati penyu ngavazvigadzirire kurwa, kuti vandorwa navaMidhiani, vatsivire Jehovha kuvaMidhiani." 
Numbers31:4 Munofanira kutumira kuhondo vane chiuru chimwe kurudzi rumwe norumwe amarudzi aVaIsiraeri.” 
Numbers31:5 Naizvozvo vakaverenga kuzviuru zvaVaIsiraeri chiuru chimwe kurudzi rumwe norumwe, vakasvika zviuru gumi nezviviri vakazvigadzirira kundorwa." 
Numbers31:6 Mosesi akavatuma kundorwa, chiuru chimwe kurudzi rumwe norumwe, ivo naFiniasi, mwanakomana waEreazari mupristi, kundorwa, iye akabata nhumbi dzeimba tsvene nehwamanda dzokuridzisa nadzo." 
Numbers31:7 Vakarwa navaMidhiani, sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha, vakauraya varume vose." 
Numbers31:8 Vakaurayawo madzimambo avaMidhiani, pamwechete navamwe vakaurayiwa, vaiti: Evhi, naRekemu, naZuri, naHuri, naRebha, madzimambo mashanu avaMidhiani; naBharamu, mwanakomana waBheori, vakamuurayawo nomunondo." 
Numbers31:9 Vana VaIsiraeri vakatapa vakadzi vavaMidhiani navana vavo; nemombe dzavo dzose namakwai avo ose, nepfuma yavo yose, vakazvitapa." 
Numbers31:10 Namaguta avo ose mavakanga vagere, nemisasa yavo yose, vakazvipisa nomoto." 
Numbers31:11 Vakatora zvavakapamba zvose, nenhapwa dzose dzavanhu nedzezvipfuwo." 
Numbers31:12 Vakauya navatapwa, nezvavakatapa, nezvavakapamba kuna Mosesi, nokuna Ereazari mupristi, nokuungano yose yavana VaIsiraeri, kumisasa pamapani aMoabhu, ari paJodhani paJeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Zvino Mosesi naEreazari mupristi, namachinda ose eungano, vakaenda kundosangana navo kunze kwemisasa." 
Numbers31:14 Mosesi akatsamwira vatariri vehondo, navakuru vezviuru navakuru vamazana, vakanga vachidzoka pakundorwa;" 
Numbers31:15 Mosesi akati kwavari, “Makachengeta vakadzi vose vari vapenyu here?" 
Numbers31:16 Tarirai, ndivo vakatadzisa vana VaIsiraeri pamberi paJehovha pazvakaitwa paPeori, vapiwa mano naBharamu, denda rikavapo pakati peungano yaJehovha." 
Numbers31:17 Naizvozvo zvino urayai vakomana vose vari pakati pavana, muurayewo mukadzi mumwe nomumwe akavata nomurume;" 
Numbers31:18 asi muzvichengetere vanasikana vose, vasina kumbovata nomurume." 
Numbers31:19 Asi imi, endai mundogara mazuva manomwe kunze kwemisasa; ani naani akauraya munhu, ani naani akabata munhu akaurayiwa, muzvinatse pazuva retatu nerechinomwe, imi navatapwa venyu." 
Numbers31:20 Munofanirawo kusuka nguo dzenyu dzose, nezvose zvakaitwa namatehwe, nezvose zvakarukwa nemvere dzembudzi, nezvinhu zvose zvakaitwa namatanda.”" 
Numbers31:21 Ereazari mupristi akati kuvarwi vose vakanga vandorwa, “Uyu ndiwo murairo wakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha:" 
Numbers31:22 Ndarama, nesirivha, nendarira, nedare, netini, nomutobvu," 
Numbers31:23 zvose zvisingaparadzwi nomoto, munofanira kuzvipinza mumoto kuti zvinatswe; kunyangwe zvakadaro zvinofanira kucheneswa nemvura yokunatsa; asi zvose zvingaparadzwa nomoto, munofanira kuzvipinza mumvura." 
Numbers31:24 Munofanira kusuka nguo dzenyu nezuva rechinomwe, kuti muve vakanaka, mugopinda mumisasa pashure.”" 
Numbers31:25 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Numbers31:26 “Verenga vakatapwa zvamakatapa zvavanhu nezvezvipfuwo, iwe naEreazari mupristi, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba eungano;" 
Numbers31:27 mukamure zvakatapwa napakati, ive migove miviri; mugovere pakati pavarume vanoziva kurwa, vakanga vandorwa, neungano yose;" 
Numbers31:28 zvino uraire kuti mugove wakatarwa utsaurirwe Jehovha navarume vehondo vakanga vandorwa: Chipenyu chimwe kumazana mashanu, kuvanhu, nokumombe, nokumbongoro, nokumakwai;" 
Numbers31:29 uzvitore pahafu yavo, ugozvipa Ereazari mupristi, chive chipiriso chinotsaurirwa Jehovha." 
Numbers31:30 Asi pahafu yavana VaIsiraeri unofanira kutora chimwe kumakumi mashanu, kuvanhu, nokumombe, nokumbongoro, nokumakwai, kuzvipfuwo zvose, ugozvipa vaRevhi vanochengeta tabhenakeri yaJehovha.”" 
Numbers31:31 Mosesi naEreazari vakaita sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha. 
Numbers31:32 Zvino zvakatapwa zvakanga zvasara, varume vehondo vatora mugove wavo, zvaiva makwai ane zviuru zvina mazana matanhatu nezviuru zvina makumi manomwe nezviuru zvishanu," 
Numbers31:33 nemombe dzine zviuru zvina makumi manomwe nezviviri," 
Numbers31:34 nembongoro dzine zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu nechiuru chimwe; 
Numbers31:35 navakadzi vasina kumbovata navarume vane zviuru zvina makumi matatu nezviviri. 
Numbers31:36 Hafu, yakagoverwa vakanga vaenda kundorwa, aiva makwai ane zviuru zvina mazana matatu, nezviuru zvina makumi matatu, nezviuru zvinomwe, namazana mashanu;" 
Numbers31:37 mugove wakatarwa, wakatsaurirwa Jehovha, waiva makwai ana mazana matanhatu namakumi manomwe namashanu." 
Numbers31:38 Mombe dzaiva zviuru zvina makumi matatu nezvitanhatu; mugove wakatarwa, wakatsaurirwa Jehovha kunaidzo, waiva mombe dzina makumi manomwe nembiri." 
Numbers31:39 Mbongoro dzaiva zviuru zvina makumi matatu namazana mashanu; mugove wakatarwa, wakatsaurirwa Jehovha kunaidzo, waiva mbongoro dzina makumi matanhatu neimwe." 
Numbers31:40 Vanhu vaiva zviuru zvine gumi nezvitanhatu; mugove wakatarwa, wakatsaurirwa Jehovha kuna ivo, waiva vanhu vana makumi matatu navaviri." 
Numbers31:41 Mosesi akapa Ereazari mupristi mugove wakatarwa, chakanga chiri chipiriso chakatsaurirwa Jehovha, sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Numbers31:42 Pahafu yavana VaIsiraeri, yakanga yakamurwa naMosesi kuvanhu vakanga vandorwa," 
Numbers31:43 (zvino hafu yeungano yaiva makwai ane zviuru zvina mazana matatu namakumi matatu, nezviuru zvinomwe namazana mashanu," 
Numbers31:44 nemombe dzine zviuru zvina makumi matatu nezviuru zvitatu," 
Numbers31:45 nembongoro dzine zviuru zvina makumi matatu namazana mashanu," 
Numbers31:46 navanhu vane zviuru zvine gumi nezvitanhatu). 
Numbers31:47 Pahafu yavana VaIsiraeri Mosesi akatora chimwe kumakumi mashanu, kuvana nokuzvipfuwo, akazvipa vaRevhi vaichengeta tabhenakeri yaJehovha; sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Numbers31:48 Zvino vatariri vaiva pamusoro pezviuru zvehondo, navakuru vezviuru, navakuru vamazana vakaswedera kuna Mosesi," 
Numbers31:49 vakati kuna Mosesi, “Varanda venyu vakaverenga varume vehondo vanorairwa nesu; hakuna mumwe wedu usipo." 
Numbers31:50 Zvino tauya nechipo chaJehovha, zvakawanikwa nomumwe nomumwe: Zvishongo zvendarama, neketani dzomumakumbo nedzomumaoko, nezvindori zveminwe, nezvindori zvomunzeve, nezvomumutsipa, kuyananisira mweya yedu pamberi paJehovha.”" 
Numbers31:51 Mosesi naEreazari mupristi vakagamuchira kwavari ndarama, zviri zvishongo zvamarudzi ose zvakaitwa nayo." 
Numbers31:52 Ndarama yose yechipiriso chakatsaurwa, chavakapa Jehovha, chavakuru vezviuru nechavakuru vamazana, aiva mashekeri ane zviuru zvine gumi nezvitanhatu namazana manomwe namakumi mashanu." 
Numbers31:53 (Nokuti varume vehondo vakanga vatora mugove wavo wezvakatapwa, mumwe nomumwe.)" 
Numbers31:54 Mosesi naEreazari mupristi vakagamuchira ndarama kuvakuru vezviuru navamazana, vakaiisa mutende rokusangana, kuti chive chirangaridzo kuvana VaIsiraeri pamberi paJehovha." 
Numbers32:1 Vana vaRubheni navana vaGadhi vakanga vane zvipfuwo zvizhinji kwazvo; zvino vakati vachitarira nyika yeJazeri nenyika yeGireadhi, vakaona kuti inzvimbo yakafanira zvipfuwo." 
Numbers32:2 Ipapo vana vaGadhi navana vaRubheni vakauya vakataurirana naMosesi naEreazari mupristi namachinda eungano, vakati," 
Numbers32:3 “Ataroti neDhibhoni neJazeri neNimura neHeshibhoni neEreari neSebhami neNebho neBheoni. 
Numbers32:4 Nyika dzakakundwa naJehovha pamberi peungano yaIsiraeri, inyika yakafanira zvipfuwo; zvino isu varanda venyu, tine zvipfuwo.”" 
Numbers32:5 Vakati, “Kana takawana nyasha pamberi penyu, nyika ino ngaipiwe varanda venyu, ive yavo; musatiyambutsa henyu Jodhani.”" 
Numbers32:6 Mosesi akati kuvana vaGadhi navana vaRubheni, “Ko hama dzenyu dzingaenda kundorwa, imi mukagara pano here?" 
Numbers32:7 Munoodzereiko mwoyo yavana VaIsiraeri varege kuenda kunyika yavakapiwa naJehovha? 
Numbers32:8 Ndizvo zvakaita madzibaba enyu nguva yandakavatuma vari paKadheshi–bharinea, kundoshora nyika." 
Numbers32:9 Nokuti vakati vakwira kumupata weEshikori, vakaona nyika, vakaodza mwoyo yavana VaIsiraeri, kuti varege kupinda munyika yavakanga vapiwa naJehovha." 
Numbers32:10 Jehovha akatsamwa nomusi iwoyo, akapika, akati," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Zvirokwazvo, hakungavi nomumwe wavarume vakabuda Ijipiti, anamakore makumi maviri nounopfuura, ungandoona nyika yandakapikira Abhurahamu naIsaka naJakobho, nokuti havana kunditevera nomwoyo wose;" 
Numbers32:12 asi Karebhu, mwanakomana waJefune, muKenizi, naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni, nokuti ivo vakatevera Jehovha nomwoyo wose.’" 
Numbers32:12 asi Karebhu, mwanakomana waJefune, muKenizi, naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni, nokuti ivo vakatevera Jehovha nomwoyo wose.’" 
Numbers32:13 Jehovha akatsamwira VaIsiraeri, akavadzungairisa murenje makore ana makumi mana, kusvikira rudzi rwose rwakanga rwatadza pamberi paJehovha rwaparadzwa." 
Numbers32:14 Zvino tarirai, imi makamuka panzvimbo yamadzibaba enyu, vana chaivo vavanhu vezvivi, kuti muwedzere kutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha pamusoro paIsiraeri." 
Numbers32:15 Nokuti kana mukatsauka pakumutevera, uchavasiyazve murenje; imi muchaparadza vanhu ava vose.”" 
Numbers32:16 Vakaswedera kwaari, vakati, “Tichavakira zvipfuwo zvedu matanga navana vedu vaduku maguta pano;" 
Numbers32:17 asi isu tichazvigadzirira kurwa, kuti titungamirire vana VaIsiraeri, kudzimana tavasvitsa kunzvimbo yavo; vana vedu vachagara mumaguta akakombwa namasvingo nokuda kwavanhu vagere munyika." 
Numbers32:18 Hatingadzokeri kudzimba dzedu kudzimana vana VaIsiraeri vose vapiwa nhaka yavo. 
Numbers32:19 Nokuti hatingagari nhaka pamwechete navo mhiri kwaJodhani nemberi; nokuti isu tagoverwa nhaka yedu nechouno mhiri kwaJodhani kurutivi rwamabvazuva.” 
Numbers32:20 Zvino Mosesi akati kwavari, “Kana mukaita chinhu ichi, kana mukashonga nhumbi dzenyu dzokurwa, kuti muende pamberi paJehovha kundorwa," 
Numbers32:21 mumwe nomumwe wenyu wakashonga akayambuka Jodhani pamberi paJehovha, kudzimana iye adzinga vavengi vake pamberi pake," 
Numbers32:22 nyika ikakundwa pamberi paJehovha, ipapo mungadzoka henyu, hamungavi nemhosva kuna Jehovha nokuVaIsiraeri; nyika ino igova nhaka yenyu pamberi paJehovha." 
Numbers32:23 Asi kana mukasaita saizvozvo, tarirai matadzira Jehovha, muzive kuti zvivi zvenyu zvichakuwanai." 
Numbers32:24 Vakirai henyu vana venyu maguta namakwai enyu matanga; itai sezvamakataura.” 
Numbers32:25 Vana vaGadhi navana vaRubheni vakataura naMosesi, vakati, “Varanda venyu vachaita sezvakaraira tenzi wedu." 
Numbers32:26 Vana vedu, navakadzi vedu, nezvipfuwo zvedu, nemombe dzedu dzose, zvichagara mumaguta eGireadhi;" 
Numbers32:27 asi varanda venyu vachayambuka, vose vakazvigadzirira kundorwa, kundorwa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakataurwa natenzi wedu.”" 
Numbers32:28 Naizvozvo Mosesi akaraira pamusoro pavo Ereazari mupristi, naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba amarudzi avana VaIsiraeri;" 
Numbers32:28 Naizvozvo Mosesi akaraira pamusoro pavo Ereazari mupristi, naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba amarudzi avana VaIsiraeri;" 
Numbers32:29 Mosesi akati kwavari, “Kana vana vaGadhi navana vaRubheni vakayambuka nemi, murume mumwe nomumwe wakazvigadzira kundorwa pamberi paJehovha, nyika ikakundwa pamberi penyu; ipapo munofanira kuvapa nyika yeGireadhi, ive yavo." 
Numbers32:30 Asi kana vasingayambuki nemi, vakashonga nhumbi dzavo dzokurwa, vanofanira kupiwa nhaka yavo pakati penyu panyika yeKenani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Ipapo vana vaGadhi navana vaRubheni vakapindura, vakati, “Sezvakareva Jehovha kuvaranda venyu, ndizvo zvatichaita." 
Numbers32:32 Tichayambukira pamberi paJehovha kunyika yeKenani, takashonga nhumbi dzedu dzokurwa, kuti tipiwe nhaka yedu nechouno mhiri kwaJodhani.”" 
Numbers32:33 Zvino Mosesi akavapa, ivo vana vaGadhi navana vaRubheni, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase, mwanakomana waJosefa, ushe hwaSihoni, mambo wavaAmori, noushe hwaOgi, mambo weBhashani, nyika namaguta ayo nemiganhu yayo, iwo maguta enyika yose yakapoteredza." 
Numbers32:34 Vana vaGadhi vakavaka Dhibhoni, neAtaroti, neAroeri," 
Numbers32:35 neAtiroti–shofani, neJazeri, neJogibheha," 
Numbers32:36 neBheti–nimura, neBheti–harani, ari maguta akakombwa namasvingo, ana matanga amakwai." 
Numbers32:37 Vana vaRubheni vakavaka Heshibhoni, neEreari, neKiriataimi," 
Numbers32:38 neNebho, neBhaari–meoni (vashandura mazita awo), neSibhima; vakatumidza maguta avakavaka mamwe mazita." 
Numbers32:39 Vana vaMakiriri, mwanakomana waManase, vakaenda Gireadhi, vakarikunda, vakadzinga vaAmori vakanga vageremo." 
Numbers32:40 Mosesi akapa Makiri, mwanakomana waManase, Gireadhi, iye akagaramo." 
Numbers32:41 Jairi, mwanakomana waManase, akakunda misha yaro, akaitumidza Misha yaJairi." 
Numbers32:42 Nobha akandokunda Kenati, nemisha yaro yakanga yakabatwa naro, akaritumidza Nobha, nezita rake." 
Numbers33:1 Ndidzo nzendo dzavana VaIsiraeri, pakubuda kwavo panyika yeIjipiti namapoka avo vachitungamirirwa naMosesi naAroni." 
Numbers33:2 Mosesi akanyora kusimuka kwavo nenzendo dzavo, arairwa naJehovha; ndidzo nzendo dzavo nokusimuka kwavo." 
Numbers33:3 Vakasimuka paRamesesi nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wokutanga; mangwanani akatevera Pasika vana VaIsiraeri vakabuda noruoko rune simba pamberi pavaIjipiti vose," 
Numbers33:4 vaIjipiti vachiviga matangwe avo ose, akanga aurayiwa naJehovha pakati pavo; Jehovha akatongawo vamwari vavo." 
Numbers33:5 VaIsiraeri vakasimuka paRamesesi, vakandodzika matende avo paSukoti." 
Numbers33:6 Vakasimuka paSukoti, vakandodzika paEtami, pamuuyo werenje." 
Numbers33:7 Vakasimuka paEtami, vakadzokera Pi–hahiroti, pamberi peBhaari–sefoni, vakadzika pamberi peMigidhori." 
Numbers33:8 Vakasimuka pamberi peHahiroti, vakapinda nomukati megungwa, vakasvika murenje; vakafamba mazuva matatu murenje reEtami, vakandodzika paMara." 
Numbers33:9 Vakasimuka paMara, vakasvika Erimi; paErimi pakanga pana matsime ane gumi namaviri emvura, nemiti yemichindwe ina makumi manomwe; vakadzika matende avo ipapo." 
Numbers33:10 Vakasimuka paErimi, vakandodzika paGungwa Dzvuku." 
Numbers33:11 Vakasimuka paGungwa Dzvuku, vakandodzika murenje reSini." 
Numbers33:12 Vakasimuka murenje reSini, vakandodzika paDhofika." 
Numbers33:13 Vakasimuka paDhofika, vakandodzika paArushi." 
Numbers33:14 Vakasimuka paArushi, vakandodzika paRefidhimu, pakanga pasina mvura yokunwa yavanhu." 
Numbers33:15 Vakasimuka paRefidhimu, vakandodzika murenje reSinai." 
Numbers33:16 Vakasimuka murenje reSinai, vakandodzika paKibhuroti–hatava." 
Numbers33:17 Vakasimuka paKibhuroti–hatava, vakandodzika paHazeroti." 
Numbers33:18 Vakasimuka paHazeroti, vakandodzika paRitima." 
Numbers33:19 Vakasimuka paRitima, vakandodzika paRimoni–perezi." 
Numbers33:20 Vakasimuka paRimoni–perezi, vakandodzika paRibhina." 
Numbers33:21 Vakasimuka paRibhina, vakandodzika paRisa." 
Numbers33:22 Vakasimuka paRisa, vakandodzika paKeherata." 
Numbers33:23 Vakasimuka paKeherata, vakandodzika pagomo reSheferi." 
Numbers33:24 Vakasimuka pagomo reSheferi, vakandodzika paHaradha." 
Numbers33:25 Vakasimuka paHaradha, vakandodzika paMakeroti." 
Numbers33:26 Vakasimuka paMakeroti, vakandodzika paTahati." 
Numbers33:27 Vakasimuka paTahati, vakandodzika paTera." 
Numbers33:28 Vakasimuka paTera, vakandodzika paMitika." 
Numbers33:29 Vakasimuka paMitika, vakandodzika paHashimona." 
Numbers33:30 Vakasimuka paHashimona, vakandodzika paMoseroti." 
Numbers33:31 Vakasimuka paMoseroti, vakandodzika paBhene–jakani." 
Numbers33:32 Vakasimuka paBhene–jakani, vakandodzika paHori–hagidhigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Vakasimuka paHori–hagidhigadi, vakandodzika paJotibhata." 
Numbers33:34 Vakasimuka paJotibhata, vakandodzika paAbhurona." 
Numbers33:35 Vakasimuka paAbhurona, vakandodzika paEzioni–gebheri." 
Numbers33:36 Vakasimuka paEzioni–gebheri, vakandodzika murenje reZini (ndipo paKadheshi)." 
Numbers33:37 Vakasimuka paKadheshi, vakandodzika pagomo reHori, pamuuyo wenyika yeEdhomu." 
Numbers33:38 Aroni mupristi akakwira pagomo reHori, arairwa naJehovha, akafirapo, negore ramakumi mana rokubuda kwavana VaIsiraeri paIjipiti, nomwedzi wechishanu, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni wakanga anamakore ane zana namakumi maviri namatatu pakufa kwake pagomo reHori. 
Numbers33:40 Zvino mambo weAradhi, muKenani, wakanga agere kurutivi rweZasi munyika yeKenani, akanzwa kuti vana VaIsiraeri vouya." 
Numbers33:41 Vakasimuka pagomo reHori, vakandodzika matende avo paZarimona." 
Numbers33:42 Vakasimuka paZarimona, vakandodzika paPunoni." 
Numbers33:43 Vakasimuka paPunoni, vakandodzika paObhoti." 
Numbers33:44 Vakasimuka paObhoti, vakandodzika paIye–aBharimi, pamuganhu weMoabhu." 
Numbers33:45 Vakasimuka paIyimi, vakandodzika paDhibhoni–gadhi." 
Numbers33:46 Vakasimuka paDhibhoni–gadhi, vakandodzika paArimoni–dhibhurataimi." 
Numbers33:47 Vakasimuka paArimoni–dhibhurataimi, vakandodzika paAbharimu, pamberi peNebho." 
Numbers33:48 Vakasimuka pamakomo eAbharimu, vakandodzika pamapani eMoabhu, paJodhani paJeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Vakadzika matende avo paJodhani, kubva paBheti–jeshimoti kusvika paAbherishitimu, pamapani eMoabhu." 
Numbers33:50 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi pamapani eMoabhu, paJodhani paJeriko, akati," 
Numbers33:51 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Kana mayambuka Jodhani, mukasvika munyika yeKenani," 
Numbers33:52 munofanira kudzinga vanhu vose vagere munyika pamberi penyu, nokuparadza zvifananidzo zvavo zvamabwe, nokuparadza zvifananidzo zvavo zvakaumbwa, nokuputsa nzvimbo dzavo dzakakwirira." 
Numbers33:53 Munofanira kutora nyika, ive yenyu, mugaremo; nokuti ndakakupai nyika iyo, ive yenyu." 
Numbers33:54 Munofanira kupiwa nhaka yenyika iyo nemijenya, nemhuri dzenyu; vazhinji munofanira kuvapa nhaka zhinji, vashoma munofanira kuvapa nhaka shoma; sezvakagoverwa nemijenya, saizvozvo inofanira kuva nhaka yomunhu; munofanira kugara nhaka namarudzi amadzibaba enyu." 
Numbers33:55 Asi kana musingadi kudzinga vanhu vagere munyika pamberi penyu, ipapo ivo kwavari vamunorega vachava sechinhu chinobaya pameso enyu, neseminzwa panhivi dzenyu, vacharwa nemi munyika mamugere." 
Numbers33:56 Ipapo ndichakutirai imi sezvandakafunga kuvaitira ivo.’ ” 
Numbers34:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Numbers34:2 “Raira vana VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Kana masvika munyika yeKenani, (ndiyo nyika ichava nhaka yenyu, iyo nyika yeKenani, kusvikira kumiganhu yayo,)" 
Numbers34:3 rutivi rwenyu rwezasi runofanira kutanga murenje reZini ruchienda nokurutivi rweEdhomu; muganhu wenyu wezasi uchatanga pamuuyo weGungwa roMunyu, uchienda kumabvazuva;" 
Numbers34:4 zvino muganhu wenyu upote nechezasi kwegomo reAkirabhimu, ndokupfuurira kuZini, ugobuda nechezasi kweKadheshi–bharinea; zvino upfuure kuHazari–adhari, ugondosvika Azimoni;" 
Numbers34:5 zvino muganhu unofanira kupota uchitanga paAzimoni, kusvika kurukova rweIjipiti, ndokuba paGungwa." 
Numbers34:6 Muganhu wenyu wokumavirazuva ndiro Gungwa Guru nenyika yaro; ndiwo muganhu wokumavirazuva. 
Numbers34:7 Ndiwo muganhu wenyu wokumusoro: Kubva paGungwa Guru munofanira kutara muganhu wenyu kusvika pagomo reHori; 
Numbers34:8 kubva paHori munofanira kutara muganhu wenyu kusvika pavanopinda paHamati, muganhu ugondogumira paZedhadhi." 
Numbers34:9 Zvino muganhu upfuurire kusvika paZifuroni, ugondoguma paHazari–enani; ndiwo muganhu wenyu wokumusoro." 
Numbers34:10 Munofanira kutarawo muganhu wenyu wokumabvazuva, kubva paHazari–enani kusvika paShefami." 
Numbers34:11 Kubva paShefami muganhu uburukire Ribhira, kumabvazuva kweAini; zvino muganhu uburuke, ugondosvika kurutivi rwegungwa reKinereti kumabvazuva;" 
Numbers34:12 zvino muganhu uburukire kuJodhani, ugondoguma paGungwa roMunyu; ndiyo ichava nyika yenyu nemiganhu yayo kunhivi dzose.’ ”" 
Numbers34:13 Mosesi akaraira vana VaIsiraeri, akati, “Ndiyo nyika yamuchapiwa nemijenya ive nhaka yenyu, yakarairwa naJehovha kuti ipiwe marudzi mapfumbamwe nehafu;" 
Numbers34:14 nokuti rudzi rwavana vaRubheni, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, norudzi rwavana vaGadhi, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, vatopiwa havo, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase vatopiwa havo nhaka yavo;" 
Numbers34:15 marudzi awa maviri nehafu akapiwa nhaka yawo nechemhiri kwaJodhani paJeriko, kumabvazuva kunobuda zuva nako.”" 
Numbers34:16 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Numbers34:17 “Ndiwo mazita avarume vanofanira kukugoverai nyika kuti ive nhaka yenyu: Ereazari mupristi, naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni." 
Numbers34:17 “Ndiwo mazita avarume vanofanira kukugoverai nyika kuti ive nhaka yenyu: Ereazari mupristi, naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni." 
Numbers34:18 Munofanira kutsaurawo muchinda mumwe kurudzi rumwe norumwe kugovera nyika ive nhaka yenyu. 
Numbers34:19 Ndiwo mazita avarume ivavo: Kurudzi rwaJudha, Karebhu, mwanakomana waJefune;" 
Numbers34:20 kurudzi rwavana vaSimeoni, Shemueri, mwanakomana waAmihudhi;" 
Numbers34:21 kurudzi kwaBhenjamini, Eridhadhi, mwanakomana waKisironi;" 
Numbers34:22 kurudzi rwavaDhani, muchinda Bhuki, mwanakomana waJogiri;" 
Numbers34:23 kuvana vaJosefa, kurudzi rwavana vaManase, muchinda Hanieri, mwanakomana waEfodhi;" 
Numbers34:24 kurudzi rwavana vaEfuremu, muchinda Kemueri, mwanakomana waShifitani;" 
Numbers34:25 kurudzi rwavana vaZebhuruni, muchinda Erizafani, mwanakomana waAzani;" 
Numbers34:26 kurudzi rwavana vaIsakari, muchinda Patieri, mwanakomana waAzani," 
Numbers34:27 kurudzi rwavana vaAsheri, muchinda Ahihudhi, mwanakomana waSheromi;" 
Numbers34:28 kurudzi rwavana vaNafutari, muchinda Pedhaheri, mwanakomana waAmihudhi.”" 
Numbers34:29 Ndivo vakarairwa naJehovha kuti vagovere nyika yeKenani, ive nhaka yavana VaIsiraeri." 
Numbers35:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi pamapani eMoabhu, paJodhani paJeriko, akati," 
Numbers35:2 “Raira vana VaIsiraeri, kuti vape vaRevhi panhaka yavakagara ivo, maguta mavangagara; munofanirawo kupa vaRevhi ruwa runopoteredza maguta avo." 
Numbers35:3 Vanofanira kuva namaguta mavangagara; noruwa rwawo runofanira kuva rwemombe dzavo, nepfuma yavo, nezvipfuwo zvavo zvose." 
Numbers35:4 Ruwa rwamaguta, amunofanira kupa vaRevhi, runofanira kutanga parusvingo rweguta ndokupoteredza guta kusvika pamakubhiti ane chiuru chimwe kunhivi dzose." 
Numbers35:5 Munofanira kuyera kunze kweguta, kurutivi rwokumabvazuva makubhiti ane zviuru zviviri, nokurutivi rwezasi makubhiti ane zviuru zviviri, nokurutivi rwokumusoro makubhiti ane zviuru zviviri, guta riri pakati. Ndirwo runofanira kuva ruwa rwamaguta avo." 
Numbers35:6 Maguta amunopa vaRevhi anofanira kuva maguta matanhatu outiziro, amunofanira kuvapa, kuti muurayi atizire kwaari; kunze kwaiwayo munofanira kuvapa maguta ana makumi mana namaviri." 
Numbers35:7 Maguta ose amunopa vaRevhi anofanira kuva maguta ana makumi mana namasere, iwo noruwa rwawo." 
Numbers35:8 Kana ari maguta amunotora panhaka dzavana VaIsiraeri, kuna vana mazhinji munofanira kutora mazhinji, kuna vana mashoma munofanira kutora mashoma; rudzi rumwe norumwe runofanira kupa vaRevhi mamwe maguta, sezvarwakapiwa nhaka yarwo.”" 
Numbers35:9 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi, akati," 
Numbers35:10 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Kana mayambuka Jodhani, mukapinda munyika yeKenani," 
Numbers35:11 munofanira kuzvisanangurira maguta, ave maguta outiziro kwamuri; kuti muurayi, anouraya munhu asingaiti nohwoni atizireko." 
Numbers35:12 Maguta iwayo anofanira kuva kwamuri utiziro pamutsivi, kuti muurayi arege kufa, asina kumbotongwa pamberi peungano." 
Numbers35:13 Maguta amunovapa, anofanira kuva kwamuri maguta matanhatu outiziro." 
Numbers35:14 Munofanira kuvapa maguta matatu mhiri kwaJodhani, namamwe maguta matatu munofanira kuvapa munyika yeKenani; ndiwo anofanira kuva maguta outiziro." 
Numbers35:15 Maguta iwayo matanhatu anofanira kuva utiziro kuvana VaIsiraeri, nokumweni, nokumutorwa ugere pakati pavo; kuti mumwe nomumwe wakauraya munhu, asina kuita nohwoni, atizireko." 
Numbers35:16 Asi kana achinge amurova nenhumbi yedare, akafa, wava muurayi; zvino muurayi anofanira kuurayiwa zvirokwazvo." 
Numbers35:17 Kana achinge amuuraya nebwe riri muruoko rwake, ringauraya munhu, akafa, wava muurayi; zvino muurayi anofanira kuurayiwa zvirokwazvo." 
Numbers35:18 Kana achinge amurova nenhumbi yamatanda iri muruoko rwake, ingauraya munhu, akafa, wava muurayi; muurayi anofanira kuurayiwa zvirokwazvo." 
Numbers35:19 Mutsivi weropa ndiye anofanira kuuraya muurayi amene; kana akasangana naye, unofanira kumuuraya." 
Numbers35:20 Kana achinge amusunga achimuvenga, kana kumuposhera, amuvandira, akafa;" 
Numbers35:21 kana zvimwe akamurova noruoko, achimuvenga, akafa, wakamurova anofanira kuurayiwa zvirokwazvo; muurayi; mutsivi weropa, anofanira kuuraya muurayi, kana akasangana naye." 
Numbers35:22 Asi kana achinge amusunda kamwe–kamwe, asina kumuvenga, kana kumuposhera nechinhu, asina kumuvandira," 
Numbers35:23 kana nebwe, ringauraya munhu, akarikanda pamusoro pake, asingamuoni, akafa, iye asina kumuvenga, kana kutsvaka kumukuvadza;" 
Numbers35:24 zvino ungano inofanira kutonga mhosva pakati pomukuvadzi nomutsivi weropa nemirairo iyi: 
Numbers35:25 Ipapo ungano inofanira kurwira muurayi paruoko rwomutsivi weropa, ungano igomudzosera kuguta rake routiziro, kwaakanga atizira; zvino iye anofanira kugaramo kusvikira mupristi mukuru afa, iye wakazodzwa namafuta matsvene." 
Numbers35:26 Asi kana nguva ipi neipi muurayi akadarika muganhu weguta rake routiziro, kwaakanga atizira," 
Numbers35:27 mutsivi weropa akamuwana kunze kwomuganhu weguta rako routiziro, mutsivi weropa akauraya muurayi uyo, iye haangavi nemhosva yeropa rake;" 
Numbers35:28 nokuti waifanira kugara muguta rake routiziro kusvikira mupristi mukuru afa; asi kana mupristi mukuru afa, muurayi anofanira kudzokera kunyika yake." 
Numbers35:29 Izvi zvinofanira kuva kwamuri murairo wokutonga nawo kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose kwamunogara kwose. 
Numbers35:30 Ani naani unouraya munhu, muurayi anofanira kuurayiwa nokupupura kwezvapupu; asi chapupu chimwe hachifaniri kupupurira munhu akaurayiwa." 
Numbers35:31 Uye hamufaniri kugamuchira dzikinuro pamusoro poupenyu hwomuurayi, anofanira kuti aurawe; asi anofanira kuurayiwa zvirokwazvo." 
Numbers35:32 Musagamuchira dzikinuro pamusoro pomunhu wakatizira kuguta routiziro, kuti adzokere kugara munyika yake, kusvikira mupristi afa." 
Numbers35:33 Naizvozvo hamufaniri kusvibisa nyika mamugere, nokuti ropa rinosvibisa nyika; nyika haingayananisirwi pamusoro peropa rakateurirwamo, asi kwoga neropa romunhu wakariteura." 
Numbers35:34 Musasvibisa nyika mamugere, mandigerewo ini; nokuti ini Jehovha ndigere pakati pavana VaIsiraeri.’ ”" 
Numbers36:1 Zvino vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba vemhuri yavana vaGireadhi, mwanakomana waManase, vemhuri dzavana vaJosefa, vakaswedera, vakataura pamberi paMosesi, napamberi pamachinda, vaiva vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba avana VaIsiraeri," 
Numbers36:2 vakati, “Jehovha akaraira tenzi wangu, kuti agovere nyika nemijenya pakati pavana VaIsiraeri, ive nhaka yavo; uyezve, tenzi wangu wakarairwa naJehovha kupa vanasikana vaZerofehadhi, mun'una wedu, nhaka yake." 
Numbers36:3 Zvino kana ivo vakawanikwa nomumwe wavanakomana vamarudzi mamwe avana VaIsiraeri, nhaka yavo ichafanira kubviswa panhaka yamadzibaba edu, ikawedzerwa panhaka yorudzi kwavanozondogara; saizvozvo ichabviswa panhaka yatakapiwa nemijenya." 
Numbers36:4 Zvino kana gore reJubheri ravana VaIsiraeri richisvika, nhaka yavo ichawedzerwa panhaka yorudzi kwavagere; naizvozvo nhaka yavo ichabviswa panhaka yorudzi rwamadzibaba edu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Zvino Mosesi akaraira vana VaIsiraeri sezvakataura Jehovha, akati, “Rudzi rwavana vaJosefa runotaura kwazvo." 
Numbers36:6 Ndiro shoko rakarairwa naJehovha pamusoro pavanasikana vaZerofehadhi: Ngavawanikwe navavanoda; asi ngavawanikwe naveimba yorudzi rwababa vavo. 
Numbers36:7 Naizvozvo hapana nhaka yavana VaIsiraeri ingabva kuno rumwe rudzi ikaenda kuno rumwe; nokuti vana VaIsiraeri vanofanira, mumwe nomumwe, kunamatira nhaka yorudzi rwamadzibaba avo." 
Numbers36:8 Mwanasikana mumwe nomumwe ane nhaka parudzi rupi norupi rwavana VaIsiraeri, ngaawanikwe nomumwe weimba yorudzi rwababa vake, kuti vana VaIsiraeri, mumwe nomumwe, vagare nhaka yamadzibaba avo." 
Numbers36:9 Naizvozvo hapana nhaka ingazobva kuno rumwe rudzi, ikaenda kuno rumwe rudzi, nokuti marudzi avana VaIsiraeri achanamatira, rumwe norumwe, nhaka yarwo.”" 
Numbers36:10 Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi vakaita sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha. 
Numbers36:11 Nokuti Mara, naTiriza, naHogira, naMirika, naNowa, ivo vanasikana vaZerofehadhi, vakawanikwa navanakomana vavanun'una vababa vavo." 
Numbers36:12 Vakawanikwa padzimba dzavana vaManase, mwanakomana waJosefa, nhaka ikagara parudzi rweimba yababa vavo." 
Numbers36:13 Ndiyo mirairo nemitemo, yakarairwa vana VaIsiraeri naJehovha nomuromo waMosesi pamapani eMoabhu paJodhani paJeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Ndiwo mashoko akataurwa naMosesi kuVaIsiraeri vose mhiri kwaJodhani murenje, muMupata wakatarisana neSufi, pakati peParani, neTofera, neRabhani, neHazeroti, neDhizahabhi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Kubva paHorebhu, nenzira yokugomo reSeiri, kusvika paKadheshi–bhania, munhu anofamba mazuva ane gumi nerimwe." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Zvino pagore ramakumi mana, pamwedzi wegumi nomumwe, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, Mosesi wakaudza vana VaIsiraeri zvose zvavakarairwa naJehovha naye;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 akati akunda Sihoni, mambo waVaAmori, akanga agere Heshibhoni, naOgi, mambo weBhashani, akanga agere Ashitaroti, paEdhirei," 
Deuteronomy1:5 Mosesi akatanga kududzira murairo uyu vari mhiri kwaJodhani, panyika yokwaMoabhu akati," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Jehovha Mwari wedu akataura nesu paHorebhu, akati, ‘Makagara nguva yakaringana pagomo iri." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Dzokai, mufambe, muende kumakomo aVaAmori nokunzvimbo dzose dziri pedyo nawo, kuMupata, nokumakomo, nokumapani, nokurutivi rwezasi, nokumhenderekedzo dzegungwa, okunyika yaVaKenani, nokuRebhanoni, kusvikira kurwizi rukuru, rwizi Yufuretesi." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Tarirai, ndakaisa nyika pamberi penyu; pindai, mutore nyika yakapikirwa madzibaba enyu naJehovha, kuna Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho, kuti vachaipiwa ivo navana vavo vanovatevera.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Nguva iyo ndakataura nemi, ndikati, ‘Handigoni kukutakurai ndiri ndoga;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakakuwanzai; tarirai, nhasi mava senyenyedzi dzokudenga pakuwanda kwenyu." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu ngaakuwedzerei rune chiuru chamazana pamakasvika zvino, amuropafadze sezvaakakupikirai." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ini ndoga ndingatakura seiko kurema kwenyu, nomutoro wenyu, nokurwa kwenyu?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Muzvitsaurirei varume vakachenjera, vakangwara, vanozikanwa, kumarudzi enyu, ndivaite vakuru venyu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Mukandipindura, mukati, ‘Chinhu icho chamataura chakanaka kuti tichiite.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ipapo ndakatora vakuru vamarudzi enyu, varume vakanga vakachenjera, vakanga vachizikanwa, ndikavaita vakuru venyu, vave vakuru vezviuru, navakuru vamazana, navakuru vamakumi mashanu, navakuru vevane gumi, navatariri kumarudzi enyu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Nenguva iyo ndikaraira vatongi venyu, ndikati, ‘Teererai mhosva dziri pakati pehama dzenyu, mururamisire pakati pomunhu nehama yake, nomutorwa ugere naye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Musatsaura vanhu pakutonga kwenyu; munofanira kuteerera muduku nomukuru nomutoo mumwe; musatya munhu; nokuti kutonga ndokwa Mwari; asi kana kune mhaka yamusingagoni, muuye nayo kwandiri kuti ndiinzwe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Nenguva iyo ndakakurairai zvose zvamunofanira kuita. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Zvino takasimuka paHorebhu, tikafamba murenje iro rose guru rinotyisa, ramakaona panzira yokumakomo aVaAmori, sezvatakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wedu; tikasvika paKadheshi–bhania." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ndikati kwamuri, ‘Masvika panyika yamakomo yaVaAmori, yatinopiwa naJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Tarirai, Jehovha, Mwari wenyu wakaisa nyika iyo pamberi penyu; kwirai, muitore, sezvamakaudzwa naJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu; musatya kana kuvhunduka.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Ipapo imi makaswedera mose kwandiri, mukati, ‘Ngatitume varume vatitungamirire, vatishorere nyika, vagouya kuzotiudza nzira yatinofanira kukwira nayo, namaguta atichandosvika kwaari.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Shoko iro rakandifadza; ndikatsaura varume vane gumi navaviri pakati penyu, murume mumwe kurudzi rumwe norumwe." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Ivo vakaenda vakakwira mugomo, vakasvika mumupata weEshikori, vakaishora." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Vakatora mimwe michero yenyika mumaoko avo, vakaburukira kwatiri nayo, vakadzoka neshoko kwatiri, vakati, ‘Inyika yakanaka, yatinopiwa naJehovha Mwari wedu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Asi makaramba kukwira, mukamukira kuraira kwaJehovha Mwari wenyu;" 
Deuteronomy1:27 mukanyunyuta mumatende enyu, mukati, ‘Jehovha wakativenga, saka wakatibudisa munyika yeIjipiti, kuti atiise mumaoko aVaAmori, kuti atiparadze." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Zvino tichaendepiko? Hama dzedu dzanyawusa mwoyo yedu,’ dzichiti, ‘Vanhu avo vanotikunda nokukura nokureba; maguta makuru, akakombwa namasvingo anosvika kudenga; uye, takaonako vana vaAnaki.’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Ipapo ini ndakati kwamuri, ‘Musavhunduka henyu, kana kuvatya." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Jehovha Mwari wenyu unokutungamirirai, iye uchakurwirai, sezvaakakuitirai zvose paIjipiti pamberi penyu," 
Deuteronomy1:31 nomurenje pamakaona muberekero wamakaberekwa nawo naJehovha Mwari wenyu, somunhu unobereka mwana wake; panzira dzenyu dzose dzamakafamba nadzo, kudzimara muchisvika panzvimbo iyi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Asi pachinhu ichi hamuna kutenda Jehovha Mwari wenyu; 
Deuteronomy1:33 iye wakakutungamirirai panzira, kuti akutsvakirei pamungadzika matende enyu, nomoto usiku, kuti akuratidzei nzira yamunofanira kufamba nayo, uye negore masikati." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Zvino Jehovha akanzwa izwi ramashoko enyu, akatsamwa, akapika, achiti," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Zvirokwazvo, hakungavi nomumwe wavanhu ava, vorudzi urwu rwakaipa, uchaona nyika yakanaka, yandakapika ndichiti ndichaipa madzibaba enyu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 asi Karebhu, mwanakomana waJefune, ndiye uchaiona; ndichamupa iye navana vake nyika yaakatsika, nokuti iye wakatevera Jehovha nomwoyo wose.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Jehovha akanditsamwira neniwo nokuda kwenyu akati, ‘Newewo haungapindi ikoko." 
Deuteronomy1:38 “‘Joshua mwanakomana waNuni, umire pamberi pako, ndiye uchapinda ikoko; umusimbise, nokuti ndiye uchagarisa VaIsiraeri nhaka yavo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:38 “‘Joshua mwanakomana waNuni, umire pamberi pako, ndiye uchapinda ikoko; umusimbise, nokuti ndiye uchagarisa VaIsiraeri nhaka yavo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Vana venyu vaduku, vamakati vachatapwa, navana venyu vasingazivi nhasi zvakanaka nezvakaipa, ndivo vachapinda ikoko; ndichavapa iyo, ive yavo." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Asi kana murimi, dzokai mufambe murenje nenzira yokuGungwa Dzvuku." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Zvino imi mukapindura, mukati kwandiri, ‘Takatadzira Jehovha, tichakwira hedu tindorwa, zvose sezvatakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wedu.’ Mukashonga mumwe nomumwe nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, mukada kukwira mugomo." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Uti kwavari: Musakwira kana kurwa, nokuti ini handizi pakati penyu; kuti murege kukundwa pamberi pavavengi venyu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Naizvozvo ndakataura nemi, asi makaramba kunditeerera; asi makamukira murairo waJehovha, mukaita manyawi, mukakwira mugomo." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Zvino VaAmori vakanga vagere mugomo iro, vakabuda kuzorwa nemi, vakakudzingai, sezvinoita nyuchi, vakakuparadzai kusvikira paHoma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Ipapo makadzoka, mukachema pamberi paJehovha, asi Jehovha haana kuteerera izwi renyu, kana kurerekera nzeve dzake." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Naizvozvo makagara paKadheshi mazuva mazhinji, nguva yamakagarapo." 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Zvino takadzoka, tikafamba tichipinda murenje nenzira inoenda kuGungwa Dzvuku, sezvandakaudzwa naJehovha, tikapota–pota gomo reSeiri mazuva mazhinji." 
Deuteronomy2:2 “Zvino Jehovha akataura neni, akati," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Mapota–pota gomo iri nguva yaringana; dzokai muende nechokumusoro.’ 
Deuteronomy2:4 Raira vanhu, uti, ‘Munofanira kupfuura nomunyika yehama dzenyu, vana vaEsau, vagere Seiri; ivo vachakutyai, saka chenjerai." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Musavavamba, nokuti handingakupiyi nyika yavo, kunyangwe pangatsikwa norutsoka; nokuti ndakapa Esau gomo reSeiri, rive rake." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Munofanira kutenga zvokudya kwavari nemari, mudye, nemvura munofanira kuitengawo kwavari, munwe." 
Deuteronomy2:7 “ ‘Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako wakakuropafadza pamabasa ose amaoko ako; iye anoziva kufamba kwako murenje iri guru. Jehovha Mwari wako wakava newe makore aya makumi mana; hauna kushaiwa chinhu.’ 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Naizvozvo takapfuura hama dzedu, vana vaEsau, vagere Seiri, tikasiya nzira yokuMupata, inobva Erati napaEzionigebheri. “Takadzoka, tikapfuura nenzira yokurenje rokwaMoabhu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Usarwa navaMoabhu, kana kuvavamba pakurwa; nokuti handingakupi nyika yavo, ive yako; nokuti ndakapa Ari vana vaRoti, ive yavo.’" 
Deuteronomy2:10 “(Kare vaEmi vakanga vageremo, vaiva vanhu vakuru, vazhinji, varefu, savaAnaki;" 
Deuteronomy2:11 vanonzi vorudzi rwavaRefaimu, savaAnaki, asi vaMoabhu vanovaidza vaEmi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 NavaHoriwo vakanga vagere Seiri kare; asi vana vaEsau vakavatevera, vakavaparadza pamberi pavo, vakagara panzvimbo yavo; sezvakaita VaIsiraeri nenyika yavo yavakapiwa naJehovha ive yavo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Zvino simukai, muyambuke rukova Zeredhi. Tikayambuka rukova Zeredhi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Zvino mazuva okubva kwedu paKadheshi–bhania kusvikira tayambuka rukova Zeredhi, aiva makore makumi matatu namasere; kusvikira rudzi rwose rwavarume vehondo vaparadzwa pakati pemisasa, sezvavakanga vapikirwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Uye ruoko rwaJehovhawo rwairamba ruchirwa navo, kuti vaparadzwe pakati pemisasa kusvikira vapera." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Zvino varume vose vehondo vakati vapera nokufa pakati pavanhu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Jehovha akataura neni, akati," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Nhasi unofanira kupfuura napaAri, pamuganhu waMoabhu;" 
Deuteronomy2:19 kana woswedera pakatarisana navana vaAmoni, usarwa navo, kana kuvavamba; nokuti handingakupi nyika yavana vaAmoni, ive yako; nokuti ndakaipa vana vaRoti, ive yavo.’" 
Deuteronomy2:20 “Naiyowo yainzi inyika yavaRefaimu; vaRefaimu vakanga vageremo kare; asi vaAmoni vaivaidza vaZamuzumi; 
Deuteronomy2:21 vaiva vanhu vakuru, vazhinji, varefu savaAnaki; asi Jehovha akavaparadza pamberi pavo, vakavatevera, vakagara panzvimbo yavo;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 sezvaakaita navana vaEsau, vanogara Seiri, nguva yaakaparadza vaHori pamberi pavo, ivo vakavatevera, vakagara panzvimbo yavo kusvikira nhasi;" 
Deuteronomy2:23 vaAvhi, vakanga vagere mumisha kusvikira Gaza, vakaparadzwa navaKafitori, vakabva Kafitori, vakagara panzvimbo yavo." 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Simukai, mufambe, muyambuke rwizi Arinoni; tarirai, ndakaisa mumaoko enyu Sihoni muAmori, mambo weHeshibhoni, nenyika yake; tangai kuitora, muvambe kurwa naye." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Nhasi dzichatanga kuvhundusa nokutyisa ndudzi dziri pasi pedenga rose pamusoro penyu, ivo vachanzwa guhu pamusoro penyu, vachabvunda nokutya kwazvo pamusoro penyu." 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Zvino ndakatuma nhume tiri murenje reKedhemoti, kuna Sihoni, mambo weHeshibhoni, namashoko orugare, ndichiti," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Nditendere kupfuura nomunyika yako, ndichafamba nenzira huru, handingatsaukiri kurudyi kana kuruboshwe." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Munganditengesera zvokudya nemari, ndidye; mungandipa mvura ndichiripa nemari, ndinwe, asi nditenderei henyu kupfuura namakumbo;" 
Deuteronomy2:29 sezvandakaitirwa navana vaEsau vagere Seiri, navaMoabhu, vagere Ari; kusvikira ndayambuka Jodhani, ndikapinda munyika yatinopiwa naJehovha Mwari wedu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Asi Sihoni, mambo weHeshibhoni, wakaramba kutitendera kupfuura nokwaari, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako wakaomesa mweya wake, akarambidza mwoyo wake, kuti amuise iye muruoko rwako, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Tarira, ndatanga kuisa Sihoni nenyika yake kwauri; tanga kutora, kuti nyika ive yako.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Ipapo Sihoni akauya, iye navanhu vake vose kuzorwa nesu paJahazi." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Jehovha Mwari wedu akamuisa mumaoko edu, tikamukunda, iye navana vake, navanhu vake vose." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Nenguva iyo tikakunda maguta ake ose, tikaparadza chose maguta ose aiva navanhu, pamwechete navakadzi navana vaduku, hatina kusiya kunyangwe nomumwe." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Asi zvipfuwo zvoga takazvitora zvive zvedu zvatakatapa, pamwechete nezvatakapamba pamaguta atakakunda." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kubva paAroeri pamucheto worwizi Arinoni, nokuguta riri parwizi, kusvikira Giriadhi, kwakanga kusina guta rakatikurira; Jehovha Mwari wedu wakaaisa ose pamaoko edu;" 
Deuteronomy2:37 asi hamuna kuswedera kunyika yavana vaAmoni; kurutivi rwose rworwizi Jabhoki, namaguta enyika yamakomo, napose patakanga tadziviswa naJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Zvino takadzoka, tikakwira nenzira inoenda Bhashani; Ogi, mambo weBhashani, akabuda, iye navanhu vake vose, kuzorwa nesu paEdhirei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Usamutya, nokuti ndakamuisa paruoko rwako, iye navanhu vake vose, nenyika yake; unofanira kuita naye sezvawakaitira Sihoni, mambo waVaAmori, wakanga agere Heshibhoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Naizvozvo Jehovha Mwari wedu wakaisa mumaoko edu naiye Ogiwo, mambo weBhashani, navanhu vake vose; tikamukunda kusvikira asina munhu waakasiyirwa." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Nenguva iyo tikakunda maguta ake ose; kwakanga kusina guta rimwe ratisina kumutorera, maguta ana makumi matanhatu, nenyika yose yeArigobhu, noushe hwaOgi muBhashani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Iwo akanga ari maguta akapoteredzwa ose namasvingo marefu, namasuwo, namazariro, kunze kwemisha mizhinji zhinji yakanga isina masvingo." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Tikaaparadza chose, sezvatakaitira Sihoni, mambo weHeshibhoni, tikaparadza chose maguta ose akanga ana vanhu, pamwechete navakadzi navana vaduku." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Asi zvipfuwo zvose, nezvakapambwa pamaguta awo, izvo takazvitapa isu." 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Nenguva iyo takatorera madzimambo maviri aVaAmori, vakanga vagere mhiri kwaJodhani, nyika yavo kubva parwizi Arinoni, kusvikira pagomo reHerimoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Herimoni rinotumidzwa Sirioni navaSidhoni, asi VaAmori vanoritumidza Seniri;)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 maguta ose ebani, neGiriadhi rose, neBhashani rose, kusvikira paSareka neEdhirei, iwo maguta oushe hwaOgi muBhashani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 “(Nokuti Ogi, mambo weBhashani, ndiye woga wakanga asara kuna vakanga vasara vavaRefaimu; mubhedha wake wakanga uri wamatare; ko hauzi paRabha ravana vaAmoni here? Kureba kwawo kwakanga kuchisvika pamakubhiti mapfumbamwe, noupamhi hwawo pamakubhiti mana, kana zvichienzaniswa nekubhiti romunhu.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Nyika iyi takaitora nenguva iyo, ikava yedu; ndikapa vaRubheni navaGadhi nyika inobva paAroeri, parwizi Arinoni, nehafu yenyika yamakomo yeGireadhi, namaguta ayo;" 
Deuteronomy3:13 ndikapa hafu yorudzi rwaManase pakanga pasara paGiriadhi, neBhashani rose, ushe hwaOgi, nenyika yose yeArigobhu, ndiro Bhashani rose.” (Ndiyo inonzi nyika yavaRefaimu." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jairi mwanakomana waManase, akatora nyika yose yeArigobhu, kusvikira pamuganhu wavaGeshuri navaMaakati, akaitumidza, iro Bhashani rose, zita rake, Havhoti–jairi, kusvikira nhasi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Ndikapa Makiri Giriadhi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Asi vaRubheni navaGadhi ndakavapa kubva paGiriadhi kusvikira parwizi Arinoni, uye pakati pomupata nenyika yawo, kusvikira parwizi Jabhoki, ndiyo nyika yavana vaAmoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Uye noMupata, neJodhani, nenyika inobva paKinereti, kusvikira kugungwa roMupata, ndiro Gungwa roMunyu, pajinga pegomo rePisiga, kumabvazuva." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Nenguva iyo ndakakurairai, ndikati, ‘Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakakupai nyika iyo kuti ive yenyu; zvino munofanira kuyambuka pamberi pehama dzenyu, vana VaIsiraeri, makashonga nhumbi dzokurwa, imi varume vose mhare." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Asi vakadzi venyu, navana venyu vaduku, nezvipfuwo zvenyu (ndinoziva kuti mune zvipfuwo zvizhinji), izvo zvinofanira kusara mumaguta andakakupai;" 
Deuteronomy3:20 kusvikira Jehovha apa hama dzenyu zororo semi, kuti naivo vave nenyika yavanopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu mhiri kwaJodhani; ipapo mungadzokera mumwe nomumwe kunhaka yake, yandakakupai.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Nenguva iyo ndikarairawo Joshua, ndikati, ‘Meso ako akaona zvose zvakaitirwa madzimambo awa maviri naJehovha Mwari wenyu; saizvozvo Jehovha uchaitira ushe hwose kwamunoyambuka." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Nenguva iyo ndikarairawo Joshua, ndikati, ‘Meso ako akaona zvose zvakaitirwa madzimambo awa maviri naJehovha Mwari wenyu; saizvozvo Jehovha uchaitira ushe hwose kwamunoyambuka." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Hamufaniri kuvatya, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu ndiye unokurwirai.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Nenguva iyo ndikanyengetera kuna Jehovha, ndikati," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Imi Jehovha Mwari, makatanga kuratidza muranda wenyu ukuru hwenyu, noruoko rwenyu rune simba; nokuti ndoupiko mwari kudenga kana panyika ungaita zvakafanana namabasa enyu, nesimba renyu?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Donditenderai henyu kuyambuka, ndione nyika yakanaka iri mhiri kwaJodhani, negomo rakanaka, neRebhanoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Asi Jehovha akanditsamwira nokuda kwenyu, akasandinzwa; Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Zvaringana! Chirega kuzotaurazve neni pamusoro peshoko iro.’" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Kwira pamusoro–soro pePisiga, utarire kumavirazuva, nokumusoro, nezasi nokumabvazuva, uone nameso ako; nokuti haungayambuki Jodhani urwu." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Asi raira Joshua, umutse mwoyo wake nokumusimbisa, nokuti iye uchayambuka pamberi pavanhu ava, iye uchavagarisa nhaka yenyika yauchaona." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Asi raira Joshua, umutse mwoyo wake nokumusimbisa, nokuti iye uchayambuka pamberi pavanhu ava, iye uchavagarisa nhaka yenyika yauchaona." 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Zvino tikagara pamupata wakatarisana neBheti–peori.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Zvino imi vana VaIsiraeri, tererai zvakatemwa nezvakatongwa, zvandinokudzidzisai, kuti muzviite; kuti murarame, mupinde mutore nyika, yamunopiwa naJehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Musawedzera kana kutapudza pashoko randinokurairai, kuti muchengete mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, yandinokurairai." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Meso enyu akaona zvakaitwa naJehovha nokuda kwezvakaitwa paBhaari–peori; nokuti varume vose vakatevera Bhaari–peori, Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakavaparadza pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Asi imi, makanamatira Jehovha Mwari wenyu, imi mose muri vapenyu kusvikira nhasi." 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Tarirai, ndakakudzidzisai zvakatemwa nezvakatongwa, sezvandakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wangu, kuti muite saizvozvo panyika yamunopinda, kuti ive yenyu." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Naizvozvo muchengete izvozvo, muzviite; nokuti ndiko kuchenjera kwenyu nokungwara kwenyu pamberi pavanhu vachanzwa zvose izvi zvakatemwa, vachiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo, rudzi urwu rukuru ndivanhu vakachenjera vakangwara.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Nokuti rudzi rukuru ruripiko, runa mwari uri pedyo navo, saJehovha Mwari wedu nguva ipi neipi yatinodana kwaari?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Rudzi rukuru ruripiko, rune zvakatemwa nezvakatongwa zvakarurama somurairo uyu wose, wandinoisa pamberi penyu nhasi?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Asi zvichenjererei, mushingaire kuchengeta mweya yenyu, kuti murege kukanganwa zvinhu zvamakona nameso enyu, zvirege kuzobva pamwoyo yenyu mazuva ose oupenyu hwenyu; asi munofanira kuzvizivisa vana venyu navana vavana venyu;" 
Deuteronomy4:10 musi wamakanga mumire pamberi paJehovha Mwari wenyu paHorebhu, musi Jehovha waakati kwandiri, ‘Ndiunganidzire vanhu, ndivaudze mashoko angu, kuti vadzidze kunditya mazuva ose avachagara panyika, vagodzidzisa vana vavowo.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Imi mukaswedera, mukamira pajinga pegomo; gomo rikapfuta nomoto kusvikira pakati pedenga, pamwechete nerima, negore, nokusviba kukuru." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Zvino Jehovha akataura nemi ari mukati momoto; mukanzwa izwi ramashoko, asi hamuna kuona kuti wakadini; makanzwa izwi roga." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Ipapo wakadudzira sungano yake kwamuri, yaakakurairai, kuti muiite, iye mirairo ine gumi; akainyora pamahwendefa maviri amabwe." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Nenguva iyo Jehovha akandiraira, kuti ndikudzidzisei zvakatemwa nezvakatongwa, kuti mundozviita panyika iyo, kwamunoenda, kuzoiita yenyu." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Naizvozvo zvichenjererei zvikuru, nokuti hamuna kuona kuti wakanga akadini, musi Jehovha waakataura nemi paHorebhu ari pakati pomoto." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Kuti murege kuzvisvibisa, muchizviitira chifananidzo chakavezwa, chakafanana nechinhu chipi nechipi, kana mufananidzo womurume kana womukadzi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 kana mufananidzo wemhuka ipi neipi iri panyika, kana mufananidzo weshiri ipi neipi ina mapapiro, inobhururuka mudenga," 
Deuteronomy4:18 kana mufananidzo wechinhu chipi nechipi chinokambaira pasi, kana mufananidzo wehove ipi neipi iri mumvura pasi penyika;" 
Deuteronomy4:19 kuti murege kusimudzira meso enyu kudenga, zvino kana muchiona zuva nomwedzi nenyenyedzi, hondo yose yokudenga, mukatsautswa mukanamata kwazviri nokuzvishumira, izvo zvakagoverwa ndudzi dzose dziri pasi pedenga naJehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Asi Jehovha akakutorai imi, akakubudisai muchoto chamatare, paIjipiti, kuti muve vanhu venhaka yake, sezvamuri nhasi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Jehovha akanditsamwirawo nokuda kwenyu, akapika kuti ini handingayambuki Jodhani, ndipinde munyika iyo yakanaka, yamunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu, kuti ive yenyu." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Asi ini ndinofanira kufira munyika ino, handifaniri kuyambuka Jodhani asi imi muchayambuka henyu, mukapiwa nyika iyo yakanaka." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Muzvichenjerere, kuti murege kukanganwa sungano yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, yaakaita nemi, mukazviitira chifananidzo chakavezwa chomufananidzo wechinhu chipi nechipi, chawakadziviswa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako, moto unoparadza, naMwari ane godo." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Zvino kana iwe wabereka vana navazukuru, mukagara nguva huru panyika, mukazvishatsa, mukaita chifananidzo chakavezwa nomufananidzo wechinhu chipi nechipi, mukaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako, mukamutsamwisa;" 
Deuteronomy4:26 ini ndinodana denga napasi zvikupupurirei nhasi, kuti muchakurumidza kuparadzwa chose panyika yamunoyambukira Jodhani kuti muende kwairi kuiita yenyu; hamungaitimo mazuva mazhinji, asi muchaparadzwa chose." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Jehovha uchakuparadzirai pakati pendudzi, muchasara muri vashoma pakati pendudzi, kwamuchandoiswa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Apo muchashumira vamwari, vakaitwa namaoko avanhu, vamatanda navamabwe, vasingaoni, kana kunzwa, kana kudya, kana kunhuwidza." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Asi kana mukazotsvaka Jehovha Mwari wako, ipapo, uchamuwana, kana ukamutsvaka nomwoyo wako wose nomweya wako wose." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Zvino kana uri munjodzi, zvinhu izvi zvose zvakuwira, pamazuva okupedzisira uchadzokera kuna Jehovha Mwari wako, ukateerera izwi rake." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako ndiMwari une nyasha; haangakusiyi, kana kukuparadza, kana kukanganwa sungano yamadzibaba ako, yaakavapikira." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Nokuti bvunzai henyu zvino pamazuva akapfuura, imi musati mavapo, kubva pazuva rokusikwa kwavanhu panyika naMwari, kubva panorumwe rutivi rwedenga kusvikira kuno rumwe, kana kwaimbovapo chinhu chikuru chakadai, kunyangwe kumbonzwika chakadai?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Ko kuna vanhu, vakambonzwa izwi raMwari richitaura riri mukati momoto, sezvamakanzwa imi, vakararama here?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Kana Mwari akatongoidza kundozvitsaurira rudzi pakati porumwe rudzi, nemiidzo, nezviratidzo, nezvinoshamisa, nehondo, nechanza chine simba, noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, nezvinotyisa kwazvo, sezvamakona zvamakaitirwa zvose naJehovha paIjipiti here?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Imi makaratidzwa izvozvo, kuti muzive kuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari; hakuno mumwe kunze kwake." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Wakakunzwisai izwi rake ari kudenga, kuti akudzidzisei; panyika wakakuonesa moto wake mukuru; iwe wakanzwa mashoko ake ari mukati momoto." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Wakada madzibaba ako, naizvozvo akazvitsaurira vana vavo vakavatevera, akakubudisa muIjipiti, iye anewe nesimba rake guru;" 
Deuteronomy4:38 kuti adzinge pamberi pako ndudzi dzinokupfuura noukuru nesimba, akupinze iwe, akupe nyika yavo ive nhaka yako, sezvazviri nhasi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Naizvozvo uzive nhasi, uzvichengete mumwoyo mako, kuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari kudenga kumusoro napanyika pasi; hakuna mumwe." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Unofanira kuchengeta zvaakatema, nemirairo yake, yandinokuraira nhasi, kuti ufare iwe navana vako vanokutevera, kuti uwedzere mazuva ako panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako nokusingaperi.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Zvino Mosesi akatsaura maguta matatu mhiri kwaJodhani kumabvazuva; 
Deuteronomy4:42 kuti muurayi agone kutizirako, iye wakauraya wokwake, asina kuita maune, asina kumuvenga kare; kuti kana achinge atizira kune rimwe ramaguta iwayo, ararame;" 
Deuteronomy4:43 aiti: Bhezeru murenje, kunyika yamapani, yavaRubheni, neRamoti-giriyadhi, yavaGadhi, neGorani paBhashani, yavaManase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Zvino ndiwo murairo wakaiswa naMosesi pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Ndizvo zvakapupurwa, zvakatemwa, nezvakatongwa, zvakataurwa naMosesi kuvana VaIsiraeri, pakubuda kwavo Ijipiti;" 
Deuteronomy4:46 vari kumabvazuva kwaJodhani, pamupata wakatarisana neBheti–peori, munyika yaSihoni, mambo waVaAmori, wakanga agere Heshibhoni, iye wakakundwa naMosesi navana VaIsiraeri, pakubuda kwavo Ijipiti;" 
Deuteronomy4:47 vakatora nyika yake, nenyika yaOgi, mambo weBhashani, ikava yavo; iwo madzimambo maviri aVaAmori, vakanga vari mhiri kwaJodhani, kumabvazuva;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 kubva paAroeri, kumapeto kwopata weArinoni, kusvikira pagomo reSioni (ndiro Herimoni)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 noMupata wose uri mhiri kwaJodhani kumabvazuva, kusvikira pagungwa romupata, pajinga pePisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Zvino Mosesi akadana VaIsiraeri vose, akati kwavari, “Inzwai VaIsiraeri, zvakatemwa nezvakatongwa, zvandinotaura nhasi muchizvinzwa, kuti muzvidzidze nokuzvichengeta mugozviita." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Jehovha Mwari wedu wakaita sungano nesu paHorebhu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Jehovha haana kuita sungano iyi namadzibaba edu, asi nesu, isu tose tiri vapenyu nhasi pano." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Jehovha akataura nemi, zviso zvakatarisana, ari mukati momoto," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (nenguva iyo ini ndakanga ndimire pakati paJehovha nemi, kuti ndikuzivisei shoko raJehovha; nokuti imi makanga muchitya nokuda kwomoto, mukasakwira mugomo) akati:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, wakakubudisa munyika yeIjipiti, muimba youranda.’" 
Deuteronomy5:7 “Usava navamwe vamwari kunze kwangu. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “Usazviitira mufananidzo wakavezwa, kana uri mufananidzo wechinhu chiri kudenga kumusoro, kana wechiri panyika pasi, kana wechiri mumvura pasi penyika." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Usapfugamira izvozvo, kana kuzvishumira; nokuti ini Jehovha Mwari wako, ndiri Mwari une godo; ndinorova vana nokuda kwezvivi zvamadzibaba avo, kusvikira kurudzi rwechitatu norwechina rwavanondivenga;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 ndichiitira nyasha vane zviuru zvamazana vanondida, vanochengeta mirairo yangu." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “Usareva zita raJehovha Mwari wako pasina; nokuti Jehovha haangaregi kumupa mhosva unoreva zita rake pasina. 
Deuteronomy5:12 “Chengeta zuva reSabata, rive dzvene, sezvawakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ubate basa mazuva matanhatu, uite mabasa ako ose." 
Deuteronomy5:14 Asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata raJehovha Mwari wako; usatongobata mabasa naro, iwe, kana mwanakomana wako, kana mwanasikana wako, kana muranda wako, kana murandakadzi wako, kana mombe yako, kana mbongoro yako, kana chimwe chezvipfuwo zvako, kana mweni wako uri mukati mamasuwo ako; kuti muranda wako nomurandakadzi wako vazorore sewe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Unofanira kurangarira kuti newewo waiva muranda panyika yeIjipiti, Jehovha Mwari wako akakubudisa nechanza chine simba noruoko rwakatambanudzwa; naizvozvo Jehovha Mwari wako wakakuraira kuti uchengete zuva reSabata."
