Deuteronomy5:16 “Kudza baba vako namai vako, sezvawakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wako; kuti mazuva ako ave mazhinji, ufare panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “Usauraya. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “Uye usaita upombwe. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “Uye usaba. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “Uye usapupurira wokwako nhema. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “Uye usachiva mukadzi wowokwako; uye usachochora imba yowokwako, kana munda wake, kana muranda wake, kana murandakadzi wake, kana mombe yake, kana mbongoro yake, kana chimwe chinhu chowokwako.”" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Jehovha akataura mashoko aya ose pagomo kuungano yenyu yose, ari mukati momoto negore, nokusviba kukuru, nezwi guru; haana kuwedzera mamwe. Akaanyora pamahwendefa maviri amabwe, akandipa iwo." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Zvino imi makati muchinzwa izwi richibva mukati merima, negomo richipfuta nomoto, mukaswedera kwandiri, vakuru vose vamarudzi enyu, navakuru venyu," 
Deuteronomy5:24 mukati, ‘Tarirai, Jehovha Mwari wedu watiratidza kubwinya kwake noukuru hwake, tikanzwa izwi rake richibva mumoto; taona hedu nhasi kuti Mwari ungataura nomunhu, akararama hake." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Naizvozvo zvino tichafireiko? Nokuti moto uyu mukuru uchatiparadza; kana tikaramba tichinzwa izwi raJehovha Mwari wedu tichafa. 
Deuteronomy5:26 Nokuti ndianiko pakati pavanhu vose wakanzwa izwi raMwari mupenyu achitaura ari mumoto, sesu, akararama here?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Swedera hako iwe, unzwe zvose zvicharehwa naJehovha Mwari wedu, ugozotiudza zvose zvauchaudzwa iwe naJehovha Mwari wedu; tichazvinzwa, nokuzviita.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 Zvino Jehovha akanzwa izwi ramashoko enyu, nguva yamakataura neni; Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Ndanzwa izwi ramashoko avanhu ava, avakataura newe; zvose zvavakareva vakataura havo zvakanaka." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Dai vaiva nemwoyo yakadai, vakanditya nokuchengeta mirairo yangu nguva dzose, kuti zvive zvakanaka navo, ivo navana vavo, nokusingaperi!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Enda, undoti kwavari, “Dzokerai kumatende enyu.”" 
Deuteronomy5:31 Asi iwe, mira pano kwandiri, ndikuudze murairo wose, nezvakatemwa, nezvakatongwa, zvaunofanira kuvadzidzisa, kuti vazviite panyika yandinovapa, kuti ive yavo.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Naizvozvo chenjerai, kuti muite sezvamakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu; musatsaukira kurutivi rworudyi kana rworuboshwe." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Munofanira kufamba nenzira yose yamakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu, kuti murarame, zvive zvakanaka nemi, namazuva enyu ave mazhinji panyika iyo, ichava yenyu." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Zvino ndiwo mirairo, nezvakatemwa, nezvakatongwa, zvandakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu kuti ndikudzidzisei, kuti muzviite kunyika kwamunoenda kuti ive yenyu;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 kuti utye Jehovha Mwari wako, uchengete zvose zvaakatema nemirairo yake, yandinokuraira, iwe, nomwanakomana wako, nomwanakomana womwanakomana wako, mazuva ose oupenyu hwako, kuti mazuva ako ave mazhinji." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Naizvozvo chinzwa Isiraeri, uchenjere kuti uzviite; kuti zvive zvakanaka newe, muwande kwazvo, sezvamakapikirwa naJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba ako, panyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Chinzwa Isiraeri, Jehovha Mwari wedu ndiJehovha mumwechete." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Ude Jehovha Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose, nesimba rako rose." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Zvino mashoko awa andinokuraira nhasi, anofanira kuva mumwoyo mako;" 
Deuteronomy6:7 unofanira kushingaira kuadzidzisa vana vako, nokuataura kana ugere mumba mako, kana uchifamba munzira, kana uchivata pasi, kana uchimuka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Unofanira kuasungira paruoko rwako, chive chiratidzo; uye anofanira kuva rundanyara pakati pameso ako." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Unofanira kuanyora pamagwatidziro emikova yeimba yako, napamasuwo ako." 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari wako achinge akupinza munyika, yaakapikira madzibaba ako, Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho, kuti uchakupa iyo, namaguta makuru akanaka, ausina kuvaka iwe," 
Deuteronomy6:11 nedzimba dzizere nezvinhu zvose zvakanaka, dzausina kuzadza iwe, namakangwa akacherwa, ausina kuchera iwe, neminda yemizambiringa nemiorivhi, yausina kusima iwe; iwe ukadya ukaguta," 
Deuteronomy6:12 zvino chenjera kuti urege kukanganwa Jehovha, wakakubudisa panyika yeIjipiti, paimba youranda." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Unofanira kutya Jehovha Mwari wako, nokumushumira, nokupika nezita rake." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Regai kutevera vamwe vamwari, vamwari vendudzi dzinokupoteredzai;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako, ari pakati pako, ndiMwari ane godo; kuti Jehovha Mwari wako arege kukutsamwira, akuparadze panyika pose." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Musaidza Jehovha Mwari wenyu, sezvamakamuidza paMasa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Munofanira kushingaira kuchengeta mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, nezvipupuriro zvake, nezvaakatema, zvaakakuraira." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Uye unofanira kuita zvakarurama nezvakanaka pamberi paJehovha, kuti zvive zvakanaka newe, upinde munyika yakanaka ive yako, iyo yakapikirwa madzibaba ako naJehovha," 
Deuteronomy6:19 kuti iye uchadzinga vavengi vako vose pamberi pako, sezvakataurwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Zvino kana mwanakomana wako akakubvunza pashure, achiti, ‘Ko izvi zvipupuriro, nezvakatemwa, nezvakatongwa, zvamakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wedu, zvinodiniko?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Unofanira kuti kumwanakomana wako, ‘Isu takanga tiri varanda vaFarao, Jehovha akatibudisa paIjipiti nechanza chine simba;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 Jehovha akaita zviratidzo nezvinoshamisa kwazvo, zvakaipa, muIjipiti, nokuna Farao, nokuimba yake yose, tichizviona;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 akatibudisapo, kuti atipinze pano, atipe nyika yaakapikira madzibaba edu." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Jehovha akaraira kuti tiite izvi zvose zvaakatema, titye Jehovha Mwari wedu, kuti tiitirwe zvakanaka nguva dzose, atichengete tive vapenyu, sezvatakaita nhasi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Zvichava zvakarurama kwatiri, kana tichichenjerera kuti tiite murairo wose pamberi paJehovha Mwari wedu, sezvatakarairwa naye.’" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari akupinza munyika maunoenda, kuiita yako, akadzinga ndudzi zhinji pamberi pako, dzinoti: VaHeti, naVaGirigashi, naVaAmori, naVaKenani, naVaPerezi, naVaHivhi, naVaJebhusi, ndudzi nomwe dzinokukunda noukuru nesimba;" 
Deuteronomy7:2 kana Jehovha Mwari wako akavaisa mumaoko ako, ukavakunda, iwe unofanira kuvaparadza chose; haufaniri kuita sungano navo, kana kuvanzwira nyasha;" 
Deuteronomy7:3 usawanana navo, usapa mwanakomana wake mwanasikana wako, kana kutorera mwanakomana wako mwanasikana wake." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Nokuti uchatsausa mwanakomana wako arege kunditevera, kuti ashumire vamwe vamwari; naizvozvo Jehovha achakutsamwirai kwazvo, akakurumidza kukuparadza." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Asi ndizvo zvamunofanira kuvaitira: Munofanira kuputsa atari dzavo, nokuputsanya shongwe dzavo, nokutema matanda avo avanonamata nawo, nokupisa mifananidzo yavo yakavezwa." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Nokuti uri rudzi rutsvene kuna Jehovha Mwari wako; Jehovha Mwari wako wakakutsaura kuti uve rudzi rwake chairwo pakati pendudzi dzose dziri panyika dzose. 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Jehovha haana kukudai, kana kukutsaurira, nokuti makanga makapfuura dzimwe ndudzi nokuwanda; nokuti imi makanga muri vashoma kundudzi dzose." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Asi nokuti Jehovha unokudai, uye nokuti wakanga achida kusimbisa kupika kwaakapikira madzibaba enyu, nokuda kwaizvozvo Jehovha akakubudisai neruoko rune simba, akakudzikinurai paimba youranda paruoko rwaFarao, mambo weIjipiti." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Naizvozvo uzive kuti Jehovha Mwari wako, ndiye Mwari, Mwari wakatendeka, anosimbisa sungano yake nenyasha dzake kuna vanomuda, vanochengeta mirairo yake kusvikira kumarudzi ane chiuru chamazana;" 
Deuteronomy7:10 anotsiva vanomuvenga mumwe nomumwe, kuti avaparadze; haanganonokeri munhu anomuvenga, asi achamutsiva iye amene." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Naizvozvo unofanira kuchengeta murairo, nezvaakatema, nezvaakatonga, zvandinokuraira nhasi, kuti uzviite." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Zvino kana muchiterera izvi zvakatongwa, mukazvichengeta nokuzviita, Jehovha Mwari wako achakusimbisira sungano yake nenyasha dzake sezvaakapikira madzibaba ako;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 iye achakuda, nokukuropafadza, nokukuwanza; acharopafadzawo zvibereko zvomuviri wako, nezvibereko zvevhu rako, zviyo zvako, newaini yako, namafuta ako, nezvakaberekwa nemombe dzako, namakwayana amakwai ako, panyika yaakapikira madzibaba ako, kuti achakupa iyo." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Ucharopafadzwa iwe kupfuura dzimwe ndudzi dzose; hapangavi pakati penyu murume kana mukadzi asingabereki, kana pakati pezvipfuwo zvenyu." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Jehovha uchabvisa kwamuri zvirwere zvose; haangatumiri kwamuri matenda akaipa eIjipiti aunoziva, asi uchaatuma kuvanhu vose vanokuvenga." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Iwe uchaparadza ndudzi dzose dzichaiswa mumaoko ako naJehovha Mwari wako; usadzinzwira nyasha; usashumira vamwari vavo, nokuti vachava musungo kwauri." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Zvino kana ukati mumwoyo mako, ‘Ndudzi idzi dzinotipfuura nokuwanda, ndingadzitorera seiko nyika yadzo?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Haufaniri kuvatya; unofanira kurangarira zvakanaka zvakaitirwa Farao navaIjipiti vose naJehovha Mwari wako; 
Deuteronomy7:19 nemiidzo mikuru yamakaona nameso enyu, nezviratidzo, nezvinoshamisa, neruoko rune simba, noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, zvawakabudiswa nazvo naJehovha Mwari wako; ndizvo zvichaitira Jehovha Mwari wako vanhu vose vaunotya." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Uye Jehovha Mwari wako uchatuma mago pakati pavo, kusvikira avo vakanga vasara, vakavanda, vaparadzwa pamberi pako." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Usavatya, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako ari pakati pako, Mwari mukuru unotyisa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Jehovha Mwari wako uchadzinga ndudzi idzo pamberi pako, rumwe–rumwe; haufaniri kuvaparadza vose kamwe, kuti zvikara zvesango zvirege kukuwandira." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Asi Jehovha Mwari wako uchavaisa mumaoko ako, nokuvanyonganisa, nokunyonganisa kukuru, kusvikira vaparadzwa chose." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Uchaisawo madzimambo avo mumaoko ako, kuti urozve mazita avo pasi pedenga; hapano munhu ungagona kumira pamberi pako, kusvikira wavaparadza." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Munofanira kupisa mifananidzo yavo yakavezwa yavamwari vavo; haufaniri kuchochora sirivha kana ndarama iri pavari, kana kuitora, kuti urege kuteyiwa nazvo; nokuti zvinonyangadza pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako;" 
Deuteronomy7:26 usapinza chinonyangadza mumba mako, kuti iwe urege kuva chinhu chakayeriswa saicho; unofanira kuchisema chose, nokuchivenga chose, nokuti chinhu chakayeriswa." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Murairo wose wandinokuraira nhasi munofanira kuchenjera kuti muuite, kuti mugorarama, nokuwanda, nokupinda munyika yakapikirwa madzibaba enyu naJehovha, muiite yenyu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Unofanira kurangarira nzira yose yawakafambiswa nayo naJehovha Mwari wako murenje makore awa makumi mana, kuti akuninipise, nokukuidza, kuti azive zvaiva mumwoyo mako, kana wakanga uchida kuchengeta mirairo yake, kana kwete." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Akakuninipisa, akakuziyisa nenzara, akakugutsa nemana yawakanga usingazivi, kunyangwe madzibaba ako akanga asingaziviwo; kuti akuzivise kuti munhu haararami nezvokudya zvoga, asi kuti munhu unorarama nezvose zvinobuda mumuromo waJehovha." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Nguo dzako hadzina kukusakarira, netsoka dzako hadzina kuzvimba makore awa makumi mana." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Funga mumwoyo mako, kuti Jehovha Mwari wako unokuranga somunhu unoranga mwanakomana wake." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Unofanira kuchengeta mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ufambe nenzira dzake nokumutya." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako unokupinza munyika yakanaka, nyika ine hova dzemvura, namatsime, namadziva akadzika, anobuda pamipata napamakomo;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 nyika ine zviyo, nebhari, nemizambiringa, nemionde, nemitamba; nyika yemiorivhi ina mafuta, nouchi;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 nyika yauchadya chingwa, usingashaiwi, kwausingatongoshaiwi chinhu; nyika ina mabwe emhangura, napamakomo ayo uchachera ndarira." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Uchadya ukaguta, ukavonga Jehovha Mwari wako nokuda kwenyika yakanaka yaakakupa." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Chenjera kuti urege kukanganwa Jehovha Mwari wako, ukasachengeta mirairo yake, nezvaakatonga, nezvaakatema, zvandinokuraira nhasi;" 
Deuteronomy8:12 kuti kana wadya ukaguta, ukavaka dzimba dzakanaka, ukagara madziri," 
Deuteronomy8:13 nemombe dzako namakwai ako akawanda, nesirivha yako nendarama yako ikawanda, nezvose zvaunazvo zvikawanda," 
Deuteronomy8:14 mwoyo wako ukazvikudza, ukakanganwa Jehovha Mwari wako, wakakubudisa munyika yeIjipiti paimba youranda;" 
Deuteronomy8:15 iye wakakufambisa murenje guru rinotyisa, makanga mune nyoka dzinopenga nezvinyavada, nevhu rakaoma risina mvura; iye wakakubudisira mvura padombo romusarasara;" 
Deuteronomy8:16 wakakugutsa murenje nemana, yakanga isina kuzikanwa namadzibaba ako, kuti akuninipise akuidze, kuti akuitire zvakanaka pakupedzisira;" 
Deuteronomy8:17 kuti urege kuzoti mumwoyo mako, ‘Simba rangu nokugona kworuoko rwangu ndizvo zvakandiwanisa pfuma iyi.’" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Asi unofanira kurangarira Jehovha Mwari wako, nokuti ndiye unokupa simba rokupfuma; kuti asimbise sungano yake, yaakapikira madzibaba ako, sezvaanoita nhasi." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Zvino kana ukakanganwa Jehovha Mwari wako, ukatevera vamwe vamwari, ukavashumira, ukanamata kwavari, ndinokupupurirai nhasi kuti muchaparadzwa zvirokwazvo." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Imi muchaparadzwa sendudzi dzinoparadzwa naJehovha pamberi penyu; nokuti makaramba kuteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wenyu. 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Inzwa, iwe Isiraeri, nhasi unofanira kuyambuka Jodhani, kuti upinde nyika kundopiwa ndudzi dzinokupfuura paukuru nesimba, dzive dzako, namaguta makuru ana masvingo anosvika kudenga," 
Deuteronomy9:2 navanhu vakuru varefu, vana vaAnaki, vaunoziva, vawakanzwa zvichinzi, ‘Ndianiko ungamira pamberi pavana vaAnaki?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Naizvozvo uzive nhasi kuti Jehovha Mwari wako ndiye unokutungamirira somoto unoparadza; iye uchavaparadza, iye uchavakunda pamberi pako; naizvozvo iwe uchavadzinga, nokuvaparadza nokukurumidza, sezvawakaudzwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari wako avadzinga pamberi pako, usataura mumwoyo mako, uchiti, ‘Jehovha wakandipinza munyika ino ive yangu, nokuda kwokururama kwangu; nokuti Jehovha unodzinga ndudzi idzi nokuda kwokuipa kwavo.’" 
Deuteronomy9:5 Haupindi munyika yavo, kuti ive yako, nokuda kwokururama kwako, kana nokuda kwokururama kwomwoyo wako; asi Jehovha Mwari wako unodzinga ndudzi idzi pamberi pako nokuda kwokuipa kwavo, uye kuti asimbise shoko rakapikirwa madzibaba ako naJehovha, kuna Abhurahamu, nokuna Isaka, nokuna Jakobho." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Naizvozvo uzive kuti Jehovha Mwari wako haakupi nyika iyi yakanaka ive yako, nokuda kwokururama kwako; nokuti uri rudzi rune mitsipa mikukutu." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Rangarira, usakanganwa, kuti wakatsamwisa Jehovha Mwari wako sei murenje; kubva pazuva rawakabuda naro munyika yeIjipiti kudzimara masvika kunzvimbo iyi, makaramba muchimukira Jehovha." 
Deuteronomy9:8 NapaHorebhu makatsamwisa Jehovha, Jehovha akakutsamwirai, akada kukuparadzai." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Nguva yandakakwira pagomo kundogamuchira mahwendefa amabwe, iwo mahwendefa esungano, yaakaita iye Jehovha nemi, ndakagara mugomo mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana; ndakanga ndisingadyi zvokudya, kana kunwa mvura." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Zvino Jehovha akandipa mahwendefa maviri amabwe, akanga akanyorwa nomunwe waMwari; pamusoro pavo pakanga pakanyorwa mashoko ose akanga ataurwa kwamuri naJehovha pagomo, ari mukati momoto nomusi weungano." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Zvino mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana zvakati zvapera, Jehovha akandipa mahwendefa maviri amabwe, iwo mahwendefa esungano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Simuka, kurumidza kuburuka pano, nokuti vanhu vako vawakabudisa muIjipiti, vazvitadzira; vakurumidza kutsauka panzira yandakavaraira; vazviitira mufananidzo wakaumbwa.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Uye Jehovha akataura neni, akati, ‘Ndaona rudzi urwu, tarira, rudzi rune mitsipa mikukutu;" 
Deuteronomy9:14 ndirege, ndivaparadze, ndidzime zita ravo pasi pedenga, ndikuite iwe rudzi runovapfuura nesimba noukuru.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Naizvozvo ndakadzoka, ndikaburuka pagomo, gomo rikapfuta nomoto; zvino mahwendefa maviri esungano akanga ari mumaoko angu maviri." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ndikatarira, ndikaona kuti makanga matadzira Jehovha Mwari wenyu; makanga mazviitira mhuru yakaumbwa; makanga makurumidza kutsauka panzira yamakanga marairwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ndikabata mahwendefa maviri, ndikaarashira pasi muchizviona." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ndikawira pasi pamberi paJehovha, sapakutanga, mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana; ndakanga ndisingadyi zvokudya, kana kunwa mvura, nokuda kwezvivi zvenyu zvose zvamakanga matadza, muchiita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, muchimutsamwisa." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Nokuti ndakatya hasha nokutsamwa kukuru, kwamakatsamwirwa nako naJehovha, nokuti wakanga achida kukuparadzai. Asi Jehovha akandinzwawo nenguva iyo." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Jehovha akanga ane shunguwo kwazvo naAroni, akada kumuparadza, ndikanyengeterera Aroni nenguva iyo." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Ndikatora zvivi zvenyu, iyo mhuru iya yamakanga maumba, ndikaipisa nomoto, ndikaipwanya, nokuikuya kwazvo, kusvikira yatsetseka seguruva; ndikakandira guruva rayo murukova rwakanga ruchibva mugomo." 
Deuteronomy9:22 NapaTabherawo, napaMasa, napaKibhiroti–hatava makatsamwisa Jehovha." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Nenguva yamakatumwa naJehovha kuti mubve paKadheshi–bhania, achiti, ‘Kwirai, mutore nyika, yandakakupai, ive yenyu,’ makamukira murairo waJehovha Mwari wenyu, mukasamutenda, nokusaterera izwi rake." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Makaramba muchimukira Jehovha kubva pazuva randakatanga kukuzivai. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Zvino ndikawira pasi pamberi paJehovha mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana, ndiyo nguva yandakawira pasi; nokuti Jehovha akati, ‘Ndichakuparadzai.’" 
Deuteronomy9:26 Zvino ndikanyengetera kuna Jehovha, ndikati, ‘Haiwa, Jehovha Mwari, musaparadza henyu vanhu venyu nenhaka yenyu, vamakadzikinura noukuru hwenyu, vamakabudisa muIjipiti neruoko rune simba." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Rangarirai varanda venyu, Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho; musatarira kusindimara kwavanhu ava, kana kuipa kwavo, kana zvivi zvavo;" 
Deuteronomy9:28 kuti nyika kwamakatibudisa,’ irege kuzoti, ‘Jehovha akavabudisa akavaurayira murenje, nokuti wakanga asingagoni kuvapinza munyika yaakanga avapikira, uye nokuti wakanga achivavenga.’" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Kunyangwe zvakadaro rudzi rwenyu nenhaka yenyu, rwamakabudisa nesimba renyu guru, noruoko rwenyu rwakatambanudzwa." 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Nenguva iyo Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Uzvivezere mahwendefa maviri amabwe, akafanana nookutanga, ukwire kwandiri kugomo, ugozviitira areka yamatanda." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Ini ndichanyora pamahwendefa mashoko aya akanga ari pamahwendefa okutanga, awakaputsa, ugoaisa muareka.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Naizvozvo ndikaita areka yamatanda omuakeshia, ndikaveza mahwendefa maviri amabwe, akanga akaita sookutanga, ndikakwira mugomo ndakabata mahwendefa maviri muruoko rwangu." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Akanyora pamahwendefa zvakafanana norunyoro rwokutanga, aya mashoko ane gumi, amakaudzwa naJehovha pagomo, ari pakati pomoto, nezuva reungano; Jehovha akandipa iwo." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Zvino ndikadzoka, ndikaburuka pagomo, ndikaisa mahwendefa muareka yandakanga ndaita; ndipo paachiri zvino, sezvandakarairwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy10:6 “(Vana VaIsiraeri vakasimuka paBheeroti Bhenejaakani, vakaenda Mosera; ndipo pakafira Aroni, napaakavigwa; Eriazari, mwanakomana wake, akabata upristi panzvimbo yake." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Vakasimukapo, vakaenda Gudhogodha; vakasimuka paGudhogodha vakasvika Jotibhata, panyika yakanga ine hova dzemvura." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Nguva iyo Jehovha akatsaura rudzi rwavaRevhi, kuti vatakure areka yesungano yaJehovha, nokumira pamberi paJehovha vachimushumira, nokuropafadza vanhu nezita rake, kusvikira nhasi." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Naizvozvo vaRevhi havano mugove kana nhaka pakati pehama dzavo; Jehovha ndiye nhaka yavo, sezvavakaudzwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Ini ndikagara mugomo mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana, sapakutanga; Jehovha akandinzwa nenguva iyowo; Jehovha akasakuparadza." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Simuka, utungamirire vanhu, vapinde, vatore nyika, yandakapikira madzibaba avo, kuti ndichavapa iyo.’" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Zvino, Isiraeri, Jehovha Mwari wako unotsvakeiko kwauri, asi kuti utye Jehovha Mwari wako, ufambe munzira dzake dzose, nokumuda, nomwoyo wako wose uye nomweya wako wose," 
Deuteronomy10:13 nokuchengeta mirairo yaJehovha, nezvaakatema, zvandinokuraira nhasi kuti ufare zvakanaka." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Tarira, denga nedenga ramatenga, nenyika nezvose zviri mukati mayo, ndezvaJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Asi Jehovha akafarira madzibaba ako, akavada, akatsaura vana vavo vanovatevera, iyemi, kupfuura ndudzi dzose, sezvaunoona nhasi." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Naizvozvo dzingisai mwoyo yenyu, murege kuva nemitsipa mikukutu." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu ndiMwari wavamwari, naShe wamadzishe, Mwari mukuru, unotyisa, usingatsauri vanhu, kana kugamuchira mubairo." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Iye unoruramisira nherera nechirikadzi, unoda mutorwa, achimupa zvokudya nenguo." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Naizvozvo munofanira kuda mutorwa, nokuti imi makanga muri vatorwa panyika yeIjipiti." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Unofanira kutya Jehovha Mwari wako; unofanira kumushumira iye, nokumunamatira, nokupika nezita rake." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ndiye waunofanira kurumbidza, ndiye Mwari wako, wakakuitira zvinhu izvi zvikuru zvinotyisa, zvawakaona nameso ako." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Madzibaba ako akaburukira Ijipiti vari vanhu vana makumi manomwe; zvino Jehovha Mwari wako wakakuwanza senyenyedzi dzokudenga. 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Naizvozvo unofanira kuda Jehovha Mwari wako, nokuchengeta nguva dzose murairo wake, nezvaakatema, nezvaakatonga, nezvaakaraira." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Zivai nhasi nokuti handitauri navana venyu vasina kuziva, vasina kuona kuranga kwaJehovha Mwari wenyu ukuru hwake, neruoko rwake rune simba, noruoko rwake rwakatambanudzwa," 
Deuteronomy11:3 nezviratidzo zvake, namabasa ake, aakaitira Farao, mambo weIjipiti, pakati peIjipiti nenyika yake yose;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 nezvaakaitira hondo yeIjipiti, namabhiza avo, nengoro dzavo; kuti wakavafukidza nemvura yeGungwa Dzvuku, nguva yavakakutevererai, Jehovha akavaparadza kusvikira nhasi;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 nezvaakakuitirai murenje, kudzamara makasvika panzvimbo ino;" 
Deuteronomy11:6 nezvaakaitira Dhatani naAbhiramu, vanakomana vaEriabhu, mwanakomana waRubheni; namashamisire akaita nyika muromo wayo, ikavamedza, ivo navedzimba dzavo, namatende avo, nezvipenyu zvavo zvose zvakanga zvichivatevera, pakati paVaIsiraeri vose." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Asi meso enyu akaona mabasa ose makuru aJehovha aakaita. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Naizvozvo munofanira kuchengeta murairo wose wandinokurairai nhasi, kuti musimbe, mupinde, mutore nyika iyo kwamunoyambuka kundoiita yenyu;" 
Deuteronomy11:9 kuti mazuva enyu awedzerwe panyika, yakapikirwa madzibaba enyu naJehovha, kuti uchaipa ivo navana vavo, nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Nokuti nyika kwaunoenda kundoiita yako, haina kufanana nenyika yeIjipiti, kwamakabuda, kwawaidyara mbeu dzako, uchidzidiridza namakumbo ako, somunda wemiriwo," 
Deuteronomy11:11 asi nyika kwamunoyambuka, kundoiita yenyu, inyika yamakomo nemipata, inonwa mvura yokudenga;" 
Deuteronomy11:12 inyika inochengetwa naJehovha Mwari wako; meso aJehovha Mwari wako anoramba achiitarira, kubva pakutanga kwegore kusvikira pakupedzisira kwegore." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Zvino kana mukaterera zvakanaka mirairo yangu, yandinokurairai nhasi, mukada Jehovha Mwari wenyu nokumushumira nomwoyo wenyu wose uye nomweya wenyu wose," 
Deuteronomy11:14 ndichapa nyika yenyu mvura panguva yayo, mvura yokutanga nemvura yokuteverera, kuti ugone kukohwa zviyo zvako, newaini yako, namafuta ako." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Ndichameresa uswa hwemombe dzako pamafuro ako, udye, ugute." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Chenjerai kuti mwoyo yenyu irege kunyengerwa, murege kutsauka, mukashumira vamwe vamwari, nokunamata kwavari;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 kuti Jehovha arege kukutsamwirai, akapfiga kudenga, kuti mvura irege kunaya nenyika irege kubereka zvibereko zvayo; imi mukakurumidza kuparadzwa panyika yakanaka yamunopiwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Naizvozvo munofanira kuchengeta mashoko angu aya mumwoyo yenyu nomumweya yenyu; munofanira kuasungira pamaoko enyu, chive chiratidzo, uye anofanira kuva rundanyara pakati pameso enyu." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Uye munofanira kuadzidzisa vana venyu, muchitaurirana pamusoro pawo, kana iwe ugere paimba yako, kana uchifamba panzira, kana uchivata pasi, uye kana uchimuka;" 
Deuteronomy11:20 unofanira kuanyora pamagwatidziro emikova yeimba yako, napamasuwo ako;" 
Deuteronomy11:21 kuti mazuva enyu awedzerwe, namazuva avana venyu, panyika yakapikirwa madzibaba enyu naJehovha kuti uchavapa iyo, aite samazuva okudenga pamusoro penyika." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Nokuti kana mukachengeta zvakanaka murairo uyu wose wandinokurairai, kuti muuite; mukada Jehovha Mwari wenyu, nokufamba nenzira dzake dzose, nokumunamatira;" 
Deuteronomy11:23 Jehovha uchadzinga ndudzi idzi dzose pamberi penyu, imi muchabata ndudzi dzinokupfuurai noukuru nesimba, dzive dzenyu." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Nzvimbo ipi neipi inotsikwa netsoka dzenyu ichava yenyu, nenyika yenyu ichabva parenje, neRebhanoni, kubva parwizi, rwizi Yufuretesi, kusvikira kugungwa rokumavirazuva." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Hakuna munhu ungagona kumira pamberi penyu; Jehovha Mwari wenyu uchatyisa nokuvhundusa nyika yose pamusoro penyu, nyika iyo yamuchazotsika pamusoro payo, sezvaakataura kwamuri." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Tarirai, nhasi ndinoisa pamberi penyu kuropafadzwa nokutukwa;" 
Deuteronomy11:27 kuropafadzwa, kana mukaterera mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, yandinokurairai nhasi;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 nokutukwa, kana musingatereri mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, asi muchitsauka panzira yandinokuraira nhasi, mukatevera vamwe vamwari vamusina kuziva." 
Deuteronomy11:29 “Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari wako akupinza panyika, kwamunoenda, kundoiita yako, unofanira kuisa kuropafadzwa pagomo reGerizimu, nokutukwa pagomo reEbharu." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Ko makomo awo haazi mhiri kwaJodhani, mberi kwenzira yokumavirira ezuva, munyika yaVaKenani, vagere paMupata, pakatarisana neGirigari, pamioku yeMore here?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Nokuti munofanira kuyambuka Jodhani, mupinde kundotora nyika yamunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu; ichava yenyu, mugaremo." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Chenjerai kuti muite zvakatemwa nezvakatongwa zvose, zvandinoisa pamberi penyu nhasi." 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Ndizvo zvakatemwa, nezvakatongwa, zvamunofanira kuchenjera kuti muzviite panyika yawakapiwa naJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba ako, kuti ive yako, mazuva ose amunogara panyika." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Munofanira kuparadza chose nzvimbo dzose, apo, ndudzi dzose dzamunopiwa kuti dzive dzenyu, padzaishumira vamwari vadzo, pamakomo marefu, napazvikomo, napasi pemiti mitema yose;" 
Deuteronomy12:3 munofanira kuputsa atari dzavo, nokuputsanya shongwe dzavo, nokupisa matanda avo okunamata nawo; mutemewo mifananidzo yavo yakavezwa; kuti muparadze zita razvo panzvimbo iyo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Regai kuitira Jehovha Mwari wenyu saizvozvo. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Asi munofanira kushanyira panzvimbo yakatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu pakati pamarudzi enyu ose, kuti aise zita rakepo, paanogara, ndipo pamunofanira kushanyirapo, nokuendapo;" 
Deuteronomy12:6 munofanira kuuyapo nezvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa, nezvibairo zvenyu, nezvegumi zvenyu, nezvipiriso zvakatsaurwa namaoko enyu, nezvipikiso zvenyu, nezvipo zvokuda kwenyu, navana vematangwe emombe dzenyu nedzamakwai enyu;" 
Deuteronomy12:7 ndipo pamunofanira kudya pamberi paJehovha Mwari wenyu, muchifarira zvose zvamunobata namaoko enyu, imi, nemhuri dzenyu, sezvamakaropafadzwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Hamufaniri kuita sezvatinoita pano nhasi, mumwe nomumwe sezvaanoona kuti ndizvo zvakanaka;" 
Deuteronomy12:9 nokuti muchigere kusvika pazororo napanhaka, yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Asi kana mayambuka Jodhani, mogara munyika yamunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu, ive nhaka yenyu, kana iye achikupai zororo pavavengi venyu vose vanokukombai, mogara makachengetwa," 
Deuteronomy12:11 zvino kunzvimbo yakatsaurwa naJehovha, kuti aise zita rakepo, ndiko kwamunofanira kuuya nezvose zvandinokurairai, zvinoti: zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa, nezvibairo zvenyu, nezvegumi zvenyu, nezvipiriso zvakatsaurwa namaoko enyu, nezvipikiso zvenyu zvakaisvonaka zvamunopikira Jehovha;" 
Deuteronomy12:12 mufare pamberi paJehovha Mwari wenyu, imi navanakomana venyu, navanasikana venyu, navaranda venyu, navarandakadzi venyu, nomuRevhi uri mukati mamasuwo enyu, nokuti iye haana mugove kana nhaka pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Chenjera kuti urege kuuya nezvipiriso zvako zvinopiswa panzvimbo ipi neipi yaunoona," 
Deuteronomy12:14 asi panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha pano rumwe rwamarudzi ako, ndipo paunofanira kuuya nezvipo zvako zvinopiswa, ndipo paunofanira kuita zvose zvandinokuraira." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Asi ungabaya hako nokudya hako nyama mukati mamasuwo ako ose, sezvinoda mwoyo wako, uye sezvawakaropafadzwa naJehovha Mwari wako; usina kunaka nowakanaka vose vangaidya, sezvinoitwa nenyama yemhara nenondo." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Asi hamufaniri kudya ropa; unofanira kuriteurira pasi semvura. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Usadya mukati mamasuwo ako zvegumi zvezviyo zvako, kana zvewaini yako, kana zvamafuta ako, kana vana vematangwe emombe dzako, kana dzamakwai ako, kana chipikiso chipi nechipi chaunopika nacho, kana zvipo zvokuda kwako, kana chipiriso chinotsaurwa noruoko rwako;" 
Deuteronomy12:18 asi unofanira kuzvidya pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako, iwe, navanakomana vako navanasikana vako, navaranda vako navarandakadzi vako, nomuRevhi uri mukati mamasuwo ako; unofanira kufara pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako pazvose zvaunobata namaoko ako." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Chenjera kuti urege kukanganwa muRevhi nguva yose yaunogara munyika yako. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari wako akurisa nyika yako, sezvaakakupikira, iwe ukati, ‘Ndichadya nyama,’ nokuti mwoyo wako unoda kudya nyama, ungadya hako nyama, sezvinoda mwoyo wako." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Kana nzvimbo yakatsaurwa naJehovha, kuti aise zita rakepo, iri kure newe, unofanira kubaya zvimwe zvemombe dzako, kana zvamakwai ako, zvawakapiwa naJehovha, sezvandakakuraira, ugozvidya mukati mamasuwo ako, sezvinoda mwoyo wako." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Unofanira kuzvidya sezvinodyiwa nyama yemhara neyenondo; usina kunaka nowakanaka vose vanofanira kuzvidya pamwechete. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Asi chenjera kwazvo kuti urege kudya ropa, nokuti ropa ndihwo upenyu; usadya upenyu pamwechete nenyama." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Usaridya, asi unofanira kuriteurira pasi semvura." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Usaridya, kuti zvive zvakanaka newe, iwe, navana vako vanokutevera, kana uchiita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Asi zvinhu zvako zvitsvene, nezvipikiso zvako, unofanira kuzvitora nokuenda nazvo kunzvimbo yakatsaurwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Zvino unofanira kugadzira zvipiriso zvako zvinopiswa, nyama neropa, paatari yaJehovha Mwari wako; ropa rezvibairo zvako rinofanira kuteurirwa paatari yaJehovha Mwari wako, asi iwe unofanira kudya nyama." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Teerera unzwe zvakanaka mashoko awa andinokuraira, kuti zvive zvakanaka newe, iwe, navana vako vanokutevera nokusingaperi, kana uchiita zvakanaka nezvakarurama pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari wako achiparadza pamberi pako ndudzi idzo, dzaunoenda kwadziri kundodziita dzako, ukadziita dzako, ukagara munyika yadzo;" 
Deuteronomy12:30 uchenjere kuti urege kunyengerwa kuzodzitevera, idzo dzamboparadzwa pamberi pako; kuti urege kubvunza vamwari vavo, uchiti, ‘Ndudzi idzi dzinoshumira vamwari vadzo seiko? Neni ndichaitawo saizvozvo.’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Usaitira Jehovha Mwari wako saizvozvo; nokuti ivo vakaitira vamwari vavo zvose zvinonyangadza Jehovha, nezvaanovenga; nokuti kunyangwe vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo vanovapisira vamwari vavo pamoto." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Chinhu chipi nechipi chandinokurairai, chenjerai kuti muzviite; musawedzera kwazviri, kana kutapudza kwazviri." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Zvino kana muporofita kana muroti akamuka pakati pako, akakuratidza chiratidzo kana chinoshamisa," 
Deuteronomy13:2 icho chiratidzo kana chinoshamisa chikaitika, chaakataura kwauri, achiti, ‘Ngatitevere vamwe vamwari, vawakanga usingazivi, tivashumire;’" 
Deuteronomy13:3 usateerera mashoko omuporofita uyo kana muroti uyo, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu unokuidzai, kuti azive kana muchida Jehovha Mwari wenyu nomwoyo wenyu wose uye nomweya wenyu wose." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Munofanira kutevera Jehovha Mwari wenyu nokumutya, nokuchengeta mirairo yake, nokuteerera izwi rake, nokumushumira, nokumunamatira." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Asi muporofita uyo kana muroti uyo vanofanira kuurayiwa; nokuti wakataura mashoko anomukira Jehovha Mwari wenyu, iye wakakubudisai panyika yeIjipiti, nokukudzikinurai muimba youranda, akakutsautsa panzira yawakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ufambemo. Naizvozvo unofanira kubvisa zvakaipa pakati pako." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Kana munun'una wako, kana mwanakomana wamai vako, kana mwanakomana wako, kana mwanasikana wako, kana mukadzi unodikanwa newe, kana shamwari yako yaunoda kwazvo, vakakutsausa pakavanda, vachiti, ‘Hendei tindoshumira vamwe vamwari, vawakanga usingazivi, iwe, kana madzibaba ako;" 
Deuteronomy13:7 vari vamwari vendudzi dzakakupoteredzai, dziri pedyo newe, kana kure newe, kubva pano rumwe rutivi rwenyika kusvikira kuno rumwe rutivi rwenyika’;" 
Deuteronomy13:8 haufaniri kumutenda, kana kumuteerera; ziso rako rirege kumunzwira tsitsi, kana kumurega, kana kumuvanza;" 
Deuteronomy13:9 asi unofanira kumuuraya zvirokwazvo; ruoko rwako ngarutange kumuuraya, pashure maoko avamwe vanhu vose." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Unofanira kumutaka namabwe, afe, nokuti wakatsvaka kukutsausa ubve kuna Jehovha Mwari wako, iye wakakubudisa panyika yeIjipiti paimba youranda." 
Deuteronomy13:11 VaIsiraeri vose vazvinzwe, vatye, varege kuzoita zvakaipa zvakadai pakati pako." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Kana ukanzwa vachikuudza mune rimwe ramaguta ako aunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ugaremo, vachiti," 
Deuteronomy13:13 ‘Vana nyakuti vakaisvoipa varipo, vakabuda pakati pako,’ vakatsautsa vagere muguta ravo, vachiti, ‘Hendei tindoshumira vamwe vamwari, vamakanga musingazivi’;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 zvino unofanira kuferefeta, nokutsvakisisa, nokubvunzisisa kwazvo; zvino kana ukaona kuti ndezvamazvokwadi, kuti ndizvo, kuti chinhu chinonyangadza chakadai chakaitwa pakati pako;" 
Deuteronomy13:15 zvirokwazvo unofanira kuparadza vanhu vagere muguta iro nomunondo unopinza, nokuriparadza chose, iro nezvose zviri mukati maro, nezvipfuwo zvaro, nomunondo unopinza." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Zvakapambwa zvose unofanira kuzviunganidzira pakati penzira huru yaro, nokupisira Jehovha Mwari wako guta nezvakapambwa zvaro zvose–zvose; zvinofanira kuva murwi nokusingaperi; harifaniri kuvakwazve." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Chinhu chimwe chezvakayeriswa ngachirege kunamatira pamaoko ako, kuti Jehovha azvidzore pakutsamwa kwake kukuru, akunzwire nyasha, ave netsitsi newe, akuwanze, sezvaakapikira madzibaba ako;" 
Deuteronomy13:18 kana ukaterera izwi raJehovha Mwari wako, ukachengeta mirairo yake yose, yandinokuraira nhasi, uchiita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Imi muri vana vaJehovha Mwari wenyu; musazvitema, kana kuzviveura pakati pameso pamusoro pavakafa." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Nokuti uri rudzi rutsvene kuna Jehovha Mwari wako; Jehovha wakakutsaura pakati pendudzi dzose dzavanhu vari panyika, kuti uve rudzi rwake chairwo." 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Usadya chinhu chipi nechipi chinonyangadza. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Mhuka dzamungadya ndidzo: Mombe, negwai, nembudzi;" 
Deuteronomy14:5 nenondo, nemhara, nemhembwe, netsoma, nemharapara, nenyati, nengururu." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Mhuka ipi neipi ina mahwanda akaparadzana, ine tsoka dzakaparadzana, inodzeya, ndidzo dzamungadya henyu." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Asi idzi dzinodzeya, kana dzina mahwanda akaparadzana, regai kudzidya: kamera, netsuro, nembira; nokuti dzinodzeya, asi hadzina mahwanda akaparadzana, hadzina kunaka kwamuri;" 
Deuteronomy14:8 nenguruve; nokuti ina mahwanda akaparadzana, asi haidzeyi; haina kunaka kwamuri; musadya nyama yadzo, uye musabata zvitunha zvadzo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Ndizvo zvamungadya kune zvose zviri mumvura: zvose zvine zvimbi namakwande mungazvidya; 
Deuteronomy14:10 asi zvose zvisina zvimbi namakwande, musazvidya izvo, hazvina kunaka kwamuri." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Mungadya shiri dzose dzakanaka. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Asi dzamusingafaniri kudya ndidzo: gora guru, negondo guru, nenyamudzura;" 
Deuteronomy14:13 norukodzi, nenjerere, noruvangu namarudzi arwo;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 namarudzi ose amakunguo; 
Deuteronomy14:15 nemhou, nezizi, neshiri yegungwa, namarudzi ose oruvangu;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 nezizi duku, nezizi guru, nejichidza," 
Deuteronomy14:17 nehukurwizi, negora, nekanyurura–hove;" 
Deuteronomy14:18 nezimudo, nekondo, namarudzi ayo, nemhupupu, nechiremwaremwa." 
Deuteronomy14:19 “Zvose zvina mapapiro zvinokambaira zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka kwamuri; hazvifaniri kudyiwa. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Asi shiri dzose dzakanaka mungadzidya henyu. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Musadya chinhu chakangofa choga; ungachipa mweni uri mukati mamasuwo ako, iye achidye, kana ungachitengesa kumutorwa; nokuti iwe uri rudzi rutsvene kuna Jehovha Mwari wako. Usabika mbudzana mumukaka wamai vayo." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Utsaure zvakanaka zvegumi zvezvibereko zvose zvembeu dzako, dzinobva mumunda mako gore rimwe nerimwe." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Unofanira kudya pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako, panzvimbo yaachatsaura kugarisa zita rakepo, zvegumi zvezviyo zvako, nezvewaini yako, nezvamafuta ako, nezvavana vematangwe emombe dzako nedzamakwai ako, kuti udzidze kutya Jehovha Mwari wako nguva dzose." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Kana nzira iri kuresa, ukasagona kuzvisvitsako, nokuti nzvimbo iyo yawakatsaurirwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti aise zita rakepo, iri kure newe, kana Jehovha Mwari wako akakuropafadza," 
Deuteronomy14:25 unofanira kuzvitengesa nemari, ndokubata mari mumaoko ako, ugoenda kunzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako," 
Deuteronomy14:26 ndokutenga nemari iyo zvose zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wako, kana mombe, kana makwai, kana waini, kana zvinodhaka, kana zvose zvinoreva mwoyo wako kwauri, udyirepo pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako, ufare, iwe nemhuri yako." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Uye muRevhi uri mukati mamasuwo ako, usamukanganwa, nokuti haana mugove kana nhaka newe." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Nguva dzose kana makore matatu apera, unofanira kuuya nezvegumi zvose zvezvibereko zvako zvegore iro, ugozvichengeta mukati mamasuwo ako." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Zvino muRevhi, zvaasina mugove kana nhaka newe, nomweni, nenherera, nechirikadzi, vari mumasuwo ako, vanofanira kuuya kuzodya, vagute; kuti Jehovha Mwari wako akuropafadze pamabasa ose aunoita namaoko ako." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Nguva dzose kana makore manomwe apera munofanira kuva nesununguro. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Nzira yesununguro ndiyoyi: Mumwe nomumwe wakapa chikwereti, unofanira kusunungura icho chaakapa hama yake; ngaarege kuchireva kuno wokwake kana hama yake; nokuti sununguro yaJehovha yaparidzwa." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Ungazvireva kumutorwa; asi zvose zvako zviri paruoko rwehama yako, unofanira kuzvisunungura." 
Deuteronomy15:4 “Asi usava navarombo pakati pako (nokuti zvirokwazvo, Jehovha uchakuropafadza panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive nhaka yako)," 
Deuteronomy15:5 kana uchingoshingaira kwoga kuteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wako, kuti uchenjere kuita murairo uyu wose, wandinokuraira nhasi." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako uchakuropafadza, sezvaakakupikira; iwe uchapa dzimwe ndudzi zhinji chikwereti, asi iwe usatora chikwereti; iwe uchabata ndudzi zhinji, asi idzo hadzingakubati iwe." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Kana kuno murombo kwauri, mumwe wehama dzako, mukati mamasuwo api naapi panyika yako, yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, usatsungira hama yako murombo, kana kumupfumbatirira ruoko rwako;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 asi umutambanudzire ruoko rwako kwazvo, umubatsire nechikwereti zvinoringana pakushaiwa kwake, sezvaanokumbira." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Chenjera kuti urege kufunga zvakaipa mumwoyo mako, uchiti, ‘Gore rechinomwe, iro gore resununguro, riri pedyo;’ iwe ukava nomufungo wakaipa kuhama yako, ukasamupa chinhu; iye akachema kuna Jehovha Mwari wako pamusoro pako, chikava chivi kwauri." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Unofanira kumupa zvakanaka, mwoyo wako haufaniri kuva neshungu, kana uchimupa; nokuti nokuda kwechinhu ichi Jehovha Mwari wako uchakuropafadza pamabasa ako ose, napazvose zvaunobata namaoko ako." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Nokuti varombo havangatongoperi panyika; naizvozvo ndinokuraira ndichiti, ‘Utambanudzire ruoko rwako zvakanaka kuhama yako, kuna iye unoshaiwa, nokuna varombo vako panyika yako.’" 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Kana hama yako murume muHebheru kana mukadzi muHebheru achinge atengeswa kwauri, akakubatira makore matanhatu, iwe unofnaira kumurega negore rechinomwe aende hake." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Zvino kana uchimurega kuti aende hake, usamuendisa asine chinhu." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Unofanira kumugoverera zvakanaka pamakwai ako, napaburiro rako, napachisviniro chako chewaini; sezvawakaropafadzwa naJehovha Mwari wako, unofanira kumupa saizvozvo." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Unofanira kurangarira iwe kuti wakanga uri muranda munyika yeIjipiti, Jehovha Mwari wako akakudzikinura; naizvozvo ndinokuraira chinhu ichi nhasi." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Asi kana akati kwauri, ‘Handidi hangu kubva kwamuri,’ nokuti unokuda iwe naveimba yako, nokuti unofara hake newe," 
Deuteronomy15:17 ipapo unofanira kutora runji ndokuurura nzeve yake narwo pamukova, iye agova muranda wako nokusingaperi. Uye murandakadzi wako unofanira kumuitirawo saizvozvo." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Hazvifaniri kuita sokukusvibisa mwoyo wako kana uchimurega kuti aende hake; nokuti wakakubatira makore matanhatu, achifanirwa nomubairo wavaranda vaviri; Jehovha Mwari wako uchakuropafadza pane zvose zvaunoita." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Mikono yose yavana vematangwe emombe dzako nedzamakwai ako, unofanira kutsaurira Jehovha Mwari wako; haufaniri kubata basa nomwana wematangwe emombe dzako, kana kuveura vana vematangwe amakwai ako." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Unofanira kuzvidya pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako gore rimwe nerimwe panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha, iwe nemhuri yako." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Kana chakaremara, zvimwe chinokuremara kwokukamhina, kana upofu, kana kuremara kwakaipa kupi nokupi, haufaniri kuchibayira Jehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Unofanira kuchidya mukati mamasuwo ako; wakanaka nousina kunaka vose vanofanira kuchidya, sezvavanodya mhara nenondo." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Asi urege kudya ropa racho, unofanira kuriteurira pasi semvura." 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Rangarira mwedzi weAbhibhi, udye Pasika yaJehovha Mwari wako nawo; nokuti nomwedzi weAbhibhi Jehovha Mwari wako wakakubudisa panyika yeIjipiti usiku." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Unofanira kubayira Jehovha Mwari wako Pasika yamakwai nemombe panzvimbo inotsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti agarise zita rakepo." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Usadya chingwa chakaviriswa pamwechete nayo; unofanira kuita mazuva manomwe uchidya chingwa chisina kuviriswa pamwechete nayo, ndicho chingwa chokutambudzika; nokuti wakabuda panyika yeIjipiti nokukurumidza; kuti urangarire zuva rawakabuda naro panyika yeIjipiti mazuva ose oupenyu hwako." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Mazuva manomwe mbiriso haifaniri kutongoonekwa panyika yako yose; uye nyama yamunobayira pazuva rokutanga madekwana, haifaniri kutongosara usiku hwose kusvikira mangwana." 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Haufaniri kubayira Pasika mukati merimwe ramasuwo ako, aunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako;" 
Deuteronomy16:6 asi panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti agarise zita rakepo, ndipo paunofanira kubayira Pasika madekwana, kana zuva rovira, panguva yawakabuda nayo Ijipiti." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Unofanira kuibika, nokuidya panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako, fume mangwana unofanira kudzokera kumatende ako." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Unofanira kudya chingwa chisina kuviriswa mazuva matanhatu; pazuva rechinomwe unofanira kuita ungano huru kuna Jehovha Mwari wako; usabata mabasa naro. 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Unofanira kuverenga mavhiki manomwe; kubva panguva yaunotanga kukohwa zviyo zvigere kukohiwa, unofanira kuverenga mavhiki manomwe." 
Deuteronomy16:10 Zvino uitire Jehovha Mwari wako mutambo wamavhiki, uchiuya muruoko rwako nechipo chokuda kwako, uchipa sezvawakaropafadzwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Unofanira kufara pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako, iwe nomwanakomana wako, nomwanasikana wako, nomuranda wako, nomurandakadzi wako, nomuRevhi uri mukati mamasuwo ako, nomweni, nenherera, nechirikadzi, vagere pakati pako, panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti agarise zita rakepo." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Unofanira kurangarira kuti iwe wakanga uri muranda muIjipiti; unofanira kuchengeta nokuita izvi zvakatemwa. 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Unofanira kutamba mutambo wamatumba mazuva manomwe, kana wapedza kuunganidza zvose zvapaburiro rako nechisviniro chako chewaini." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Unofanira kufara pamutambo wako, iwe, nomwanakomana wako, nomwanasikana wako, nomuranda wako, nomurandakadzi wako, nomuRevhi, nomweni, nenherera, nechirikadzi, vari mukati mamasuwo ako." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Unofanira kutambira Jehovha Mwari wako mutambo mazuva manomwe panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha; nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako uchakuropafadza pazvibereko zvose zveminda yako, napamabasa ose amaoko ako, kuti ufare kwazvo." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Varume venyu vose vanofanira kuuya pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako katatu pagore panzvimbo yaachatsaura, pamutambo wechingwa chisina kuviriswa, napamutambo wamavhiki, napamutambo wamatumba; havafaniri kuuya pamberi paJehovha vasina chinhu." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Mumwe nomumwe ngaauye nechipo mumaoko ake, sezvaanogona, sezvawakaropafadzwa naJehovha Mwari wako, sezvaakakupa." 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Unofanira kuzvitsaurira vatongi navakuru mukati mamasuwo ako, aunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, namarudzi ako; ivo vanofanira kutonga vanhu nokutonga kwakarurama." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Usakanganisa pakutonga kwako, usatsaura vanhu, usagamuchira fufuro, nokuti fufuro inopofumadza meso avakangwara, nokuminamisa mashoko avakarurama." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Tevera zvakarurama kwazvo chete, kuti urarame, ugare nhaka yenyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Usazvisimira matanda okunamata nawo, emiti ipi neipi, parutivi rweatari yaJehovha Mwari wako, yaunofanira kuzviitira." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Uye usazvimisira shongwe, inovengwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Usabaira Jehovha Mwari wako mombe kana gwai rakaremara, kana rine chakaipa chipi nechipi; nokuti izvo zvinonyangadza Jehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Kana pakati pako mukati merimwe ramasuwo ako, aunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, murume kana mukadzi akawanikwa, unoita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako, achidarika sungano yake," 
Deuteronomy17:3 akandoshumira vamwe vamwari, akanamata kwavari, kana kuzuva kana kumwedzi, kana kune chimwe chehondo dzokudenga, chandisina kukuraira;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 iwe ukaudzwa izvozvo, ukazvinzwa, ipapo unofanira kubvunzisisa kwazvo; zvino kana ukaona kuti ndizvo, ndezvamazvokwadi, kuti chinhu chinonyangadza chakadai chaitwa pakati paIsiraeri;" 
Deuteronomy17:5 ipapo unofanira kubudisa murume nomukadzi, ugovataka namabwe, vafe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Nokupupura kwezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu iye unofanira kufa, ngaauraiwe; nokupupura kwechapupu chimwe ngaarege kuurayiwa." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Maoko ezvapupu ndiwo anofanira kutanga kumuuraya; pashure maoko avanhu vose. Saizvozvo unofanira kubvisa zvakaipa pakati pako. 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Kana mhaka ikamuka yamusingagoni kutonga, kana yokuurayana, kana yokukwirirana, kana yokukuvadzana, dziri mhaka dzenharo pakati pamasuwo ako; ipapo unofanira kusimuka nokukwira kunzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako;" 
Deuteronomy17:9 uende kuvapristi vaRevhi, nokumutongi uchavapo pamazuva iwayo, ubvunze; ivo vachakuzivisa kutonga kwakafanira." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Zvino unofanira kuita sezvavanokutongera panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha; uchenjere kuti uite sezvavanokudzidzisa; 
Deuteronomy17:11 unofanira kuita nomurairo wavanokuraira, uye nokutonga kwavanokuudza; haufaniri kutsauka kana kurudyi kana kuruboshwe, pakutonga kwavachakuratidza." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Munhu unoita nokuzvikudza, asingadi kuteerera mupristi unomirapo pakushumira Jehovha Mwari wako, kana mutongi, munhu uyo anofanira kufa; iwe unofanira kubvisa zvakaipa pakati paIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Vanhu vose vachazvinzwa, vachatya, vakasazoita zvokuzvikudza." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Zvino kana ukasvika panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, ikava yako, ukagaramo, ukati, ‘Ndichazvigadzira mambo, sezvinoita ndudzi dzose, dzinondipoteredza’;" 
Deuteronomy17:15 zvirokwazvo unofanira kuzvigadzira hako mambo uchatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako; unofanira kugadza mumwe kuhama dzako, kuti ave mambo wako; haufaniri kugadza mutorwa, isati iri hama yako." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Asi ngaarege kuzviwanzira mabhiza, kana kudzosera vanhu Ijipiti, kuti azviwanzire mabhiza; nokuti Jehovha akati kwauri, ‘Usadzokazve kubva zvino nenzira iyo.’" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Uye ngaarege kuzviwanzira vakadzi, kuti mwoyo wake urege kutsauka; uye ngaarege kuzviwanzira zvikuru sirivha nendarama." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Zvino kana iye ogara pachigaro chake choushe, anofanira kunyora murairo uyu mubhuku yake, achitora mashoko ari kuvapristi vaRevhi;" 
Deuteronomy17:19 inofanira kugara naye, kuti aravemo mazuva ose oupenyu hwake; kuti adzidze kutya Jehovha Mwari wake, nokuchengeta mashoko ose omurairo uyu nezvakatemwa izvi, kuti azviite;" 
Deuteronomy17:20 kuti mwoyo wake urege kuzvikudza pamusoro pehama dzake, arege kutsauka pamurairo, uyu, kana kurudyi, kana kuruboshwe; kuti awedzere mazuva ake paushe hwake, iye, navana vake, pakati paIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Vapristi vaRevhi, norudzi rwose rwaRevhi, havafaniri kuva nomugove kana nhaka pamwechete naIsiraeri; vanofanira kudya zvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinopiswa nenhaka yake." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Havafaniri kuva nenhaka pakati pehama dzavo; Jehovha ndiye nhaka yavo, sezvaakataura kwavari." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Zvino ndizvo zvinofanira kupiwa vapristi navanhu, naivo vanouya nechibayiro, kana iri nzombe kana gwai; vanofanira kupa mupristi bandauko, neshaya mbiri, nesusu." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Zvitsva zvezviyo zvako, nezvewaini yako, nezvamafuta ako, nemvere dzokutanga dzamakwai ako, ndizvo zvaunofanira kuvapa." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako wakamutsaura iye pakati pamarudzi ako ose, kuti amire achishumira nezita raJehovha, iye, navanakomana vake nokusingaperi." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Zvino kana muRevhi akabva kwaagere kune rimwe ramasuwo ako muIsiraeri mose, kwaagere, akauya nomwoyo wake kunzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha," 
Deuteronomy18:7 iye anofanira kubata basa nezita raJehovha Mwari wake, sezvinoita hama dzake dzose vaRevhi dzinomirapo pamberi paJehovha." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Vanofanira kupiwa migove yakaenzana yezvokudya, kunze kwezvaakawana pakutengesa nhaka yamadzibaba ake." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Zvino kana wasvika munyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, usadzidza kutevera zvinonyangadza zvendudzi idzo." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Pakati pako hapafaniri kuwanikwa munhu unopinza mwanakomana wake kana mwanasikana wake mumoto, kana unouka, kana unotenda mashura, kana unoita mazango, kana muroyi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 kana n'anga, kana unobvunza masvikiro, kana muuki, kana unobvunza vakafa." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Nokuti vose vanoita zvinhu izvi vanonyangadza Jehovha; nokuda kwezvinonyangadza izvi Jehovha Mwari wako unovadzinga pamberi pako. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Unofanira kuva wakarurama pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy18:14 “Nokuti ndudzi idzi dzamunopiwa dzive dzenyu, dzinoteerera vanotenda mashura navanouka; asi iwe Jehovha Mwari wako haana kukutendera kuita izvozvo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Jehovha Mwari wako uchakumutsira muporofita, unobva pakati pako, pahama dzako, wakafanana neni; unofanira kumuteerera iye;" 
Deuteronomy18:16 sezvawakakumbira kuna Jehovha Mwari wako paHorebhu nomusi weungano uchiti, ‘Ndirege hangu kuzonzwazve izwi raJehovha Mwari wangu, uye ndirege hangu kuzoonazve moto uyu mukuru, ndirege kufa.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Zvose zvavakareva, vakataura havo zvakanaka." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndichavamutsira muporofita, unobva pakati pehama dzavo, wakafanana newe; ndichaisa mashoko angu mumuromo make, iye uchavaudza zvose zvandinomuraira." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Zvino munhu upi noupi usingatereri mashoko angu, aachataura muzita rangu, ndichamubvunza pamusoro paizvozvo." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Asi muporofita unotaura shoko muzita rangu achizvikudza, riri shoko randisina kumuraira kuti aritaure, kana zvimwe unotaura muzita ravamwe vamwari, muporofita uyo anofanira kufa.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Zvino kana iwe ukati mumwoyo mako, ‘Ko tichaziva seiko shoko risina kutaurwa naJehovha?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Kana muporofita achinge ataura muzita raJehovha, chinhu icho chikasaitika, chikasavapo, ndicho chinhu chisina kutaurwa naJehovha; muporofita wakaritaura achizvikudza, haufaniri kumutya." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari wako achiparadza ndudzi dzaunopiwa nyika yadzo naJehovha Mwari wako, iwe ukapinda panzvimbo yavo, ukagara mumaguta avo nomudzimba dzavo;" 
Deuteronomy19:2 unofanira kuzvitsaurira maguta matatu munyika yako, yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive yako." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Unofanira kuzvigadzirira nzira, nokuganhura nyika yako, yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive nhaka yako, uchiita migove mitatu, kuti munhu upi noupi wakauraya agone kutizirako." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Zvino ndiwo murairo womuurayi unotizirako akazorarama: Munhu upi noupi unouraya wokwake, nokusaziva, asina kumuvenga kare;" 
Deuteronomy19:5 somunhu unoti kana achienda nowokwake kudondo kundotema huni, akasimudza ruoko rwake kuti ateme muti nedemo ndokuvhomoka pamupinyi, ndokutema wokwake akafa; iye unofanira kutizira kune rimwe ramaguta awa, ararame." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Kuti mutsivi weropa arege kuteverera muurayi, mwoyo wake uchine shungu, akamubata nokuti kure, akamurova akafa; izvo wakanga asina kufanirwa norufu, nokuti wakanga asina kumuvenga kare." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Saka ndinokuraira, ndichiti, ‘Unofanira kuzvitsaurira maguta matatu.’" 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari wako achizokurisa nyika yako, sezvaakapikira madzibaba ako, akakupa nyika yose yaakapikira madzibaba ako, kuti uchavapa iyo;" 
Deuteronomy19:9 kana ukachengeta murairo uyu wose nokuuita, uyu wandinokuraira nhasi, kuti ude Jehovha Mwari wako, nokufamba munzira dzake, nguva dzose; ipapo unofanira kuzowedzerazve mamwe maguta matatu kuna awa matatu;" 
Deuteronomy19:10 kuti ropa romunhu usine mhosva rirege kuteurwa panyika yako, yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive yako; kuti nokudaro ropa rirege kuva pamusoro pako." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Asi kana munhu upi noupi akavenga wokwake, akamuvandira, akamumukira, ndokumurova akafa, kana iye akatizira kune rimwe ramaguta aya;" 
Deuteronomy19:12 ipapo vakuru veguta rake vanofanira kutuma munhu kundomutorako, vagomuisa mumaoko omutsivi weropa, afe." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Haufaniri kumunzwira tsitsi, asi iwe unofanira kubvisa ropa romunhu usine mhosva pakati paIsiraeri, kuti zvive zvakanaka newe." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Usashandura miganhu yowokwako, yakatarwa navekare, panhaka yako yauchazopiwa, panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive yako." 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Chapupu chimwe hachifaniri kupupurira munhu pachinhu chakaipa chipi nechipi, kana chivi chipi nechipi, chiri chivi chipi nechipi chaakatadza; shoko rinofanira kusimbiswa nezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Kana chapupu chisina kururama chikapupurira munhu upi noupi kuti wakatadza; 
Deuteronomy19:17 ipapo varume vaviri vose vane nharo vanofanira kumira pamberi paJehovha, pamberi pavapristi navatongi vachavapo namazuva iwayo;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 zvino vatongi vanofanira kuferefeta kwazvo; kana vakaona kuti chapupu icho chapupu chenhema, chakapupurira hama yacho nhema," 
Deuteronomy19:19 munofanira kumuitira iye sezvaakafunga kuitira hama yake; nokudaro iwe unofanira kubvisa chakaipa pakati pako. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Vakasara vanofanira kuzvinzwawo, vatye, varege kuzoita chakaipa chakadai pakati pako." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Haufaniri kumunzwira tsitsi; upenyu hunofanira kutsiwa noupenyu, ziso neziso, zino nezino, ruoko noruoko, rutsoka norutsoka." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Kana ukabuda kundorwa navavengi vako, ukaona mabhiza, nengoro navanhu vakawanda kupfuura iwe, usavatya; nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako unewe, iye wakakubudisa panyika yeIjipiti." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Zvino kana moswedera pakurwa, mupristi anofanira kuuya kuzotaura navanhu," 
Deuteronomy20:3 achiti kwavari, ‘Inzwai imi Isiraeri, nhasi moswedera pakurwa navavengi venyu, mwoyo yenyu ngairege kupera simba; regai kutya kana kudedera, kana kuvhunduka pamberi pavo;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu ndiye unoenda nemi, kukurwirai pavavengi venyu, kukuponesai.’" 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Navakuru vanofanira kutaura navanhu, vachiti, ‘Pano munhu here wakavaka imba itsva, uchigere kutanga kuigara? Ngaadzokere kumba kwake; kuti arege kufa pakurwa, mumwe akatanga kuigara." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Uye, pano munhu here wakarima munda wemizambiringa, uchigere kudya michero yawo? Ngaadzokere kumba kwake; kuti arege kufa pakurwa, mumwe akadya michero yawo." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Uye, pano munhu here wakanyenga musikana, uchigere kumuwana? Ngaadzokere kumba kwake; kuti arege kufa pakurwa, mumwe akamuwana.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Uye vakuru vanofanira kutaurawo kuvanhu, vachiti, ‘Pano munhu here unotya, uno mwoyo uno vhunduka? Ngaadzokere kumba kwake; kuti mwoyo yehama dzake irege kunyauka somwoyo wake.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Zvino kana vakuru vapedza kutaura navanhu, vanofanira kugadza vatariri vehondo vangatungamirira vanhu." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Kana woswedera pedyo neguta kuti urwe naro, unofanira kuriparidzira rugare." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Zvino kana ivo vachikupindura norugare, vakakuzarurira masuwo avo, ipapo vanhu vose vanowanikwa mukati maro vanofanira kukuteerera mutero nokukubatira." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Kana vasingadi kuyanana newe, asi kurwa newe, iwe unofanira kurikomba;" 
Deuteronomy20:13 kana Jehovha Mwari wako akariisa mumaoko ako, unofanira kuparadza varume vose varimo nomunondo unopinza;" 
Deuteronomy20:14 asi vakadzi, nepwere, nemombe, nezvose zviri muguta, zvose zvingapambwa, unofanira kuzvitapa izvo; iwe uchadya zvakapambwa kuvavengi vako, zvaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Unofanira kuita saizvozvo namaguta ose ari kure kwazvo newe, asati ari maguta endudzi idzi." 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Asi kana ari maguta avanhu ava, vaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti vave nhaka yako, haufaniri kurega chinhu chimwe chinofema chiri chipenyu;" 
Deuteronomy20:17 asi unofanira kuvaparadza chose, ivo VaHeti, naVaAmori, naKenani, naVaPerezi, naVaHivhi, naVaJebhusi; sezvawakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wako;" 
Deuteronomy20:18 kuti varege kukudzidzisai kuita zvose zvavo zvinonyangadza, zvavakaitira vamwari vavo; imi mukatadzira Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Kana ukakomba guta nguva refu, uchirwa naro, kuti urikunde, haufaniri kuparadza miti yaro, uchiitema nesanhu; ungaidya, haufaniri kuitema; nokuti muti womusango munhu here, kuti ukombwe newe?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Asi miti yaunoziva kuti miti isingadyiwi, unofanira kuiparadza uchiitema; guta rinorwa newe unofanira kurivakira mhanda kusvikira rakundwa." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Kana panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive yako, pakawanikwa munhu akaurayiwa akatandavara kusango, kusingazikanwi kuti wamuuraya ndiani," 
Deuteronomy21:2 ipapo vakuru vako navatongi vako vanofanira kundoyera chinhambo kusvika kumaguta akapoteredza munhu wakaurayiwa; 
Deuteronomy21:3 zvino guta riri pedyo nomunhu wakaurayiwa, vakuru veguta iro vanofanira kutora tsiru remombe, risina kumbobatwa naro, risina kumbokweva pajoko," 
Deuteronomy21:4 vakuru veguta iro vagoenda netsiru kumupata uno rukova rune mvura inoyerera, asina kumborimwa kana kudyarwa, ndokuvhuna mutsipa wetsiru imomo mumupata;" 
Deuteronomy21:5 vapristi vana vaRevhi vanofanira kuswedera, nokuti ndivo vakatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti vamushumire, nokuropafadza vanhu nezita raJehovha; nokuti chirevo chenharo dzose nokukuvadza kwose zvinofanira kutemwa navo;" 
Deuteronomy21:6 zvino vakuru vose veguta iro riri pedyo nomunhu wakaurayiwa vanofanira kushamba maoko avo pamusoro petsiru rakavhuniwa mutsipa waro pamupata," 
Deuteronomy21:7 vagopindura, vachiti, ‘Maoko edu haana kuteura ropa iro, nameso edu haana kuriona." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Imi Jehovha kanganwirai henyu vanhu venyu VaIsiraeri, vamakadzikinura; musatendera kuti ropa risine mhosva rigare pakati pavanhu venyu VaIsiraeri.’ Ipapo vachakanganwirwa ropa iro." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Saizvozvo unofanira kubvisa ropa risine mhosva pakati pako, kana waita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Kana uchindorwa navavengi vako, Jehovha Mwari wako akavaisa mumaoko ako, ukavatapa," 
Deuteronomy21:11 ukaona pakati pavatapwa mukadzi wakanaka, ukamuda, ukada kumuwana ave mukadzi wako," 
Deuteronomy21:12 unofanira kuenda naye kumba kwako; zvino iye unofanira kuveura musoro wake, nokugura nzara dzake," 
Deuteronomy21:13 nokurasha nguo dzake dzokutapwa, ndokugara mumba mako achichema baba vake namai vake mwedzi wose; pashure paizvozvo iwe ungapinda kwaari, iwe uve murume wake, iye ave mukadzi wako." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Zvino kana iwe usingafari naye, unofanira kumurega kuti aende hake kwaanoda; asi haufaniri kutongomutengesa nemari; haufaniri kumuitira sezvinoitirwa muranda, nokuti wakatanga wamunyadzisa." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Kana murume achinge ana vakadzi vaviri, mumwe unodikanwa, nomumwe unovengwa, vakamuberekera vana, unodikanwa nounovengwa vose vari vaviri; zvino kana mwanakomana wedangwe ari waiye unovengwa," 
Deuteronomy21:16 musi waanogarisa vanakomana vake nhaka yake, haafaniri kupa mwanakomana wounodikanwa udangwe, achidarika mwanakomana wounovengwa, iye ari mwanakomana wedangwe chaiye;" 
Deuteronomy21:17 asi anofanira kutenda mwanakomana wounovengwa, kuti ndiye wedangwe, amupe migove miviri yezvose zvaanazvo; nokuti ndiye wokutanga wesimba rake; ndiye anofanirwa noudangwe." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Kana munhu ano mwanakomana wakasindimara usinganzwi, asingadi kuteerera izwi rababa vake kana izwi ramai vake, usinganzwi kana vachimuranga;" 
Deuteronomy21:19 baba vake namai vake vanofanira kumubata ndokuenda naye kuvakuru veguta rake, nokusuwo renzvimbo yake," 
Deuteronomy21:20 vagoti kuvakuru veguta rake, ‘Mwanakomana wedu uyu wakasindimara, unotimukira, haadi kuteerera izwi redu; unopedza pfuma, nokunwa doro.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Zvino varume vose veguta vanofanira kumutaka namabwe, kuti afe; saizvozvo unofanira kubvisa chakaipa pakati pako; VaIsiraeri vose vazvinzwe, vatye." 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Kana munhu achinge atadza chivi chinofanirwa norufu, akaurayiwa, ukamusungirira pamuti;" 
Deuteronomy21:23 chitunha chake hachifaniri kuvata pamuti usiku hwose, asi unofanira kumuviga nomusi iwoyo, nokuti munhu wakasungirirwa wakatukwa naMwari; kuti urege kusvibisa nyika yako yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive yako." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Haufaniri kuona nzombe yehama yako, kana gwai rake, zvichirashika, ukazvinyenyeredza; zvirokwazvo unofanira kuzvidzosera kuhama yako." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Kana hama yako iri kure newe, zvimwe usingachizivi, unofanira kuenda nacho kumusha kwako, chigare kwauri kusvikira hama yako ichichitsvaka, ugochidzosera kwaari." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Unofanira kuita saizvozvowo nembongoro yake; unofanira kuita saizvozvowo nenguo yake; unofanira kuita saizvozvowo nezvinhu zvose zvehama yako zvakarasika, chaakanga arasikirwa nacho, chikawanikwa newe; haufaniri kuzvinyenyeredza." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Haufaniri kuona mbongoro, kana nzombe, zvehama yako zvawira pasi panzira, ukazvinyenyeredza; unofanira kumubatsira zvirokwazvo kuzvimutsa." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Mukadzi haafaniri kufuka nguo dzomurume, nomurume haafaniri kufuka nguo dzomukadzi; nokuti ani naani unoita izvozvo unonyangadza Jehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Kana ukawana dendere reshiri panzira, pamuti upi noupi, kana pasi, rina vana kana mazai, mai ichivhuvhatira vana kana mazai, haufaniri kutora mai navana;" 
Deuteronomy22:7 unofanira kurega mai, asi vana ungatora hako; kuti zvive zvakanaka newe, uwedzerwe mazuva ako." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Kana ukavaka imba itsva, unofanira kuisa rumhanda padenga rako, kuti urege kuuyisa mhosva yeropa pamusoro peimba yako, kana mumwe munhu akawapo." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Haufaniri kudyara mbeu dzamarudzi maviri pamunda wako wemizambiringa, kuti zvibereko zvose zvirege kutsaurirwa nzvimbo tsvene, idzo mbeu dzawadyara, nezvibereko zvomunda wemizambiringa." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Usarima nenzombe nembongoro zvakasungwa pamwechete. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Usafuka nguo dzakarukwa nezvinhu zvakavhenganiswa, mvere pamwechete nomucheka." 
Deuteronomy22:12 Unofanira kuzviitira masa pamiromo mina yenguo yako yaunozvifukidza nayo. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Kana munhu akawana mukadzi, akapinda kwaari, akazomuvenga," 
Deuteronomy22:14 akamupomera zvinonyadza, nokutaura zvakaipa pamusoro pake, achiti, ‘Ndakawana mukadzi uyu, asi ndakati ndichiswedera kwaari, handina kuwana zviratidzo zvoumhandara hwake kwaari’;" 
Deuteronomy22:15 zvino baba vomusikana namai vake vanofanira kuenda nezviratidzo zvoumhandara hwake kuvakuru veguta pasuwo; 
Deuteronomy22:16 zvino baba vomusikana vanofanira kuti kuvakuru, ‘Ndakapa murume uyu mwanasikana wangu, kuti ave mukadzi wake, asi zvino womuvenga;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 tarirai, wamupomera zvinhu zvinonyadza,’ achiti, ‘Handina kuwana zviratidzo zvoumhandara kumwanasikana wako; asi hezvi zviratidzo zvoumhandara hwomwanasikana wangu.’ Zvino vanofanira kuwarira nguo pamberi pavakuru veguta." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Ipapo vakuru veguta iro vanofanira kubata murume uyo, vamurove;" 
Deuteronomy22:19 nokumuripisa mashekeri esirivha ane zana, vagoapa baba vomusikana, nokuti wakataura zvakaipa pamusoro pomusikana waIsiraeri; zvino iye anofanira kuva mukadzi wake, haangamurashi mazuva ake ose." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Asi kana riri shoko rezvokwadi, kuti zviratidzo zvoumhandara zvakashaikwa kumusikana," 
Deuteronomy22:21 vanofanira kubudisira musikana kumukova weimba yababa vake, varume veguta rake vagomutaka namabwe, afe; nokuti wakaita sebenzi pakati paIsiraeri, pakupata kwake paimba yababa vake; saizvozvo unofanira kubvisa zvakaipa pakati pako." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Kana murume akawanikwa achivata nomukadzi wakawanikwa nomurume wake, ivavo vose vanofanira kuurayiwa, murume wakavata nomukadzi naiye mukadziwo; saizvozvo iwe unofanira kubvisa zvakaipa pakati paIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Kana kuno musikana, ichiri mhandara, wakapfimba nomurume, mumwe murume akamuwana muguta, akavata naye;" 
Deuteronomy22:24 ipapo munofanira kuvabudisa vose vari vaviri pasuwo reguta, mugovataka namabwe, vafe, musikana nokuti haana kuridza mhere, ari muguta hake, uye murume, nokuti wanyadzisa mukadzi wowokwake; saizvozvo iwe unofanira kubvisa zvakaipa pakati pako." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Asi kana murume akawana musikana uyo wakapfimbwa ari kusango, murume akaita simba naye, akavata naye, iye murume wakavata naye anofanira kufa, iye oga;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 asi musikana haufaniri kumuita chinhu; musikana haana kuita chivi chinofanirwa norufu; nokuti shoko iri rakafanana neromurume wakamukira wokwake akamuuraya; 
Deuteronomy22:27 nokuti wakamuwana kusango, musikana wakapfimbwa akaridza mhere, asi kwakanga kusino munhu wokumurwira." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Kana murume akawana musikana, ichiri mhandara, ugere kupfimbwa, akaita simba naye, akavata naye, vakaonekwa;" 
Deuteronomy22:29 ipapo murume wakavata naye anofanira kupa baba vake mashekeri ana makumi mashanu esirivha, zvino iye unofanira kuva mukadzi wake, nokuti wamunyadzisa; haafaniri kuzomurasha paupenyu hwake hwose." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Murume haafaniri kutora mukadzi wababa vake, haafaniri kufukura nhere yababa vake." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Munhu wakakuvadzwa manhu ake kana chirema chake haafaniri kupinda paungano yaJehovha. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Mwana woupombwe haafaniri kupinda paungano yaJehovha; kunyangwe kusvikira parudzi rwegumi vana vake havafaniri kupinda paungano yaJehovha. 
Deuteronomy23:3 “MuAmoni nomuMoabhu havafaniri kupinda paungano yaJehovha; kunyangwe kusvikira parudzi rwegumi mumwe wokwavo haafaniri kupinda paungano yaJehovha nokusingaperi; 
Deuteronomy23:4 nokuti havana kundokuchingurai nezvokudya nemvura panzira, nguva yamakabuda Ijipiti; uye nokuti vakatsvaka kuripira Bharamu, mwanakomana waBheori, wePetori, paMesopotamia, kuti akutuke." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Asi Jehovha Mwari wako wakanga asingadi kuteerera Bharamu, asi Jehovha Mwari wako wakashandura kutuka akakuropafadza, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako wakakuda." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Haufaniri kuvatsvakira rugare kana mufaro, mazuva ako ose nokusingaperi." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Haufaniri kusema muEdhomu, nokuti ihama yako; haufaniri kusema muIjipiti, nokuti wakanga uri mutorwa iwe panyika yake." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Vana vavo vavanoberekerwa parudzi rwechitatu, vangapinda paungano yaJehovha." 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Kana uchindorwa navavengi vako, unofanira kuzvichengeta pazvinhu zvose zvakaipa." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Kana kuno mumwe pakati penyu asina kunaka nokuda kwezvakamuwira usiku, unofanira kubuda kunze kwemisasa, ngaarege kupinda pamisasa;" 
Deuteronomy23:11 zvino kana ava madekwana, unofanira kuzvishambidza nemvura; kana zuva ravira ungapinda hake pamisasa." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Iwe unofanira kuva nenzvimbo kunze kwemisasa kwaungaenda. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Unofanira kuva nechirayawo pakati penhumbi dzako dzokurwa nadzo; zvino kana woenda kunze, unofanira kuchera nacho, ndokuzofusira zvinobva kwauri;" 
Deuteronomy23:14 nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako unofamba pakati pemisasa yako, kuti akurwire, nokuisa vavengi vako mumaoko ako; naizvozvo misasa yako inofanira kuva mitsvene, kuti arege kuona chinhu chakaipa pakati penyu, akufuratire." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Usadzosera muranda kuna tenzi wake, akatizira kwauri, achibva kuna tenzi wake;" 
Deuteronomy23:16 anofanira kugara newe, pakati pako, paanotsaura hake pakati perimwe ramasuwo ako paanofarira; haufaniri kumumanikidza." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Hapafaniri kuva nechifeve pakati pavanasikana VaIsiraeri; uye hapafaniri kuva nemhombwe pakati pavanakomana VaIsiraeri. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Haufaniri kuuya nomubairo wechifeve, kana mutengo wembwa, muimba yaJehovha Mwari wako, kuti upike nawo; nokuti izvo zviviri zvose zvinonyangadza Jehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Usapa hama yako chikwereti, uchireva mhindu, iri mhindu yemari, kana yezvokudya, kana yechinhu chipi nechipi chinopiwa chichireva mhindu." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Mutorwa ungamupa chikwereti, uchireva mhindu; asi haufaniri kupa hama yako chikwereti, uchireva mhindu; kuti Jehovha Mwari wako akuropafadze pazvose zvaunobata namaoko ako, panyika yaunoenda kuti ive yenyu." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Kana ukapikira Jehovha Mwari wako mhiko, usanonoka kuiripa; nokuti zvirokwazvo, Jehovha Mwari wako uchaibvunza kwauri; zvingava zvivi kwauri." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Asi kana ukarega hako kupika, hazvingavi zvivi kwauri." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Uchenjere kuti uite sezvawakataura; sezvawapikira Jehovha Mwari wako, chiri chipo chokuda kwako, chawakapikira nomuromo wako." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Kana ukapinda mumunda wemizambiringa wowokwako, ungadya mazambiringa sezvaunoda, ugute; asi haufaniri kuisa mamwe mumudziyo wako." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Kana ukapinda muzviyo zvowokwako zvigere kukohiwa, ungavhuna hako hura noruoko rwako; asi haufaniri kucheka zviyo zvowokwako nejeko." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Kana murume akatora mukadzi, akamuwana, zvino akasafara naye, nokuti wawana chinhu chisina kufanira kwaari, unofanira kumunyorera rugwaro rwokumuramba, ndokuruisa muruoko rwake, ndokumubvisa mumba make." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Zvino kana abuda mumba make, ungandowanikwa nomumwe murume." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Kana murume uyuzve akamuvenga, akamunyorera rugwaro rwokumuramba, akamupa irwo muruoko rwake, akamubvisa mumba make, kunyangwe murume uyu akazofa, iye wakazomuwana," 
Deuteronomy24:4 murume wake wokutanga, wakadeya kumubvisa, haangamuwanizve, zvaakasvibiswa; nokuti izvo zvinonyangadza Jehovha; haufaniri kutadzisa nyika, yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive nhaka yako." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Kana munhu achangowana mukadzi, haafaniri kuenda kuhondo, kana kubatiswa rimwe basa; anofanira kugara kumusha gore rimwe akasununguka, kuti afadze mukadzi wake waakawana." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Munhu haafaniri kutora guyo kana huyo, kuti ruve rubatso; nokuti unotora rubatso rwoupenyu hwomunhu." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Kana munhu akwanikwa achiba mumwe wehama dzake kuvana VaIsiraeri, akamuita muranda wake, kana kumutengesa, uyo mubi anofanira kufa; saizvozvo unofanira kubvisa chakaipa pakati pako." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Chenjera pachirwere chamaperembudzi kuti uchengete nokuita zvakanaka zvamunodzidziswa navapristi vaRevhi; sezvandakavaraira, ndizvo zvamunofanira kuita." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Rangarira zvakaitirwa Miriami naJehovha Mwari wako panzira, muchibuda Ijipiti." 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Kana ukaposwa nowokwako chinhu chipi nechipi, haufaniri kupinda mumba make kundotora rubatso rwake." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Unofanira kumira kunze, kuti munhu wakaposwa newe akubudisire kunze rubatso rwake." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Kana achinge ari murombo haufaniri kundovata norubatso rwake. 
Deuteronomy24:13 Unofanira kumudzosera rubatso kana zuva rovira, kuti avate nenguo yake, akuropafadze; ucharuramiswa pamusoro paizvozvo naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Usamanikidza muranda unokubatira, ari murombo unoshaiwa, kana ari mumwe wehama dzako, kana wavatorwa vako vari munyika yako, mukati mamasuwo ako." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Unofanira kumupa mubairo wake zuva rimwe nerimwe, zuva ngarirege kuvira asati apiwa; nokuti murombo, nomwoyo wake unoutarira; kuti arege kuzochema kuna Jehovha pamusoro pako, zvikava zvivi kwauri." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Madzibaba haafaniri kuurayiwa pamusoro pavana vavo, navana havafaniri kuurayiwa pamusoro pamadzibaba avo; munhu mumwe nomumwe anofanira kuurayirwa zvivi zvake." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Usatongera mutorwa kana nherera zvisina kururama; uye haufaniri kutora nguo yechirikadzi kuita rubatso nayo. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Asi unofanira kurangarira kuti wakanga uri muranda muIjipiti, Jehovha Mwari wako akakudzikinura ipapo; naizvozvo ndinokuraira kuita chinhu ichi." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Kana ukakohwa zviyo zvako mumunda mako, ukakanganwa chisote mumunda, haufaniri kudzokera kundochitora; chinofanira kuva chomutorwa, nenherera, nechirikadzi, kuti Jehovha Mwari wako akuropafadze pamabasa ose amaoko ako." 
Deuteronomy24:20 “Kana uchizunza muti wako womuorivhi, usatsvakisisa pamatavizve; zvinofanira kuva zvomutorwa nenherera, nechirikadzi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Kana uchiunganidza mazambiringa omunda wako wemizambiringa, haufaniri kutsvakisisazve; anofanira kuva omutorwa, nenherera, nechirikadzi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Unofanira kurangarira kuti wakanga uri muranda panyika yeIjipiti; naizvozvo ndinokuraira chinhu ichi. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Kana vanhu vakaita nharo, vakauya kutongerwa, vatongi vakavatongera, vanofanira kururamisira wakarurama, nokupa mhosva munhu wakatadza." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Zvino kana wakatadza achifanirwa nokurohwa, mutongi anofanira kumutsivamisa pasi, agorohwa pamberi pake zvakaenzana nokutadza kwake." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Anofanira kumurova kana makumi mana, haafaniri kupfuudza; kuti, kana akapfuudza, akamurova kupfuura ipapo kazhinji, hama yako irege kuzvidzwa pamberi pako." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Usasunga muromo wenzombe inopura zviyo. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Kana vana vomunhu mumwe vagere pamwechete, mumwe wavo akafa asina mwanakomana, mukadzi wowakafa haafaniri kuwanikwa nomutorwa kunze kwehama; munun'una womurume wake anofanira kupinda kwaari, ave mukadzi wake, amuitire sezvinofanira kuita munun'una womurume." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Zvino mwana wedangwe waachabereka, ndiye anofanira kupinda panzvimbo yomukoma wake wakafa, kuti zita rake rirege kudzima pakati paIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kana munhu asingadi kuwana mukadzi womukoma wake, mukadzi womukoma wake anofanira kukwira kusuwo ravakuru, agoti, ‘Munun'una womurume wangu unoramba kumutsira mukoma wake zita muna Isiraeri, haadi kundiitira sezvinofanira kuita munun'una womurume.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Zvino vakuru veguta rake vanofanira kumudana, vataure naye; kana akaramba, achiti, ‘Handidi hangu kumuwana’;" 
Deuteronomy25:9 mukadzi womukoma wake anofanira kuuya kwaari pamberi pavakuru, ndokubvisa shangu yake parutsoka rwake, ndokumupfira mate pameso, agopindura achiti, ‘Ndizvo zvinofanira kuitirwa munhu usingavaki imba yomukoma wake.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Zita rake muna Isiraeri rinofanira kunzi, ‘Imba yomunhu wakabviswa shangu yake.’" 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Kana varume vakarwa, mukadzi womumwe akaswedera kurwira murume wake paruoko rwaiye anomurova, akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akamubata pamberi," 
Deuteronomy25:12 iwe unofanira kugura ruoko rwake, haufaniri kumunzwira tsitsi." 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Haufaniri kuva nezviyereso zvisina kuenzana muhombodo yako, chikuru nechiduku." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Haufaniri kuva nezviyero zvisina kuenzana mumba mako, chikuru nechiduku." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Unofanira kuva nechiyereso chakakwana, chakarurama; kuti mazuva ako ave mazhinji panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Nokuti vose vanoita zvinhu zvakadai, ivo vose vanoita zvisina kururama, vanonyangadza Jehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Rangarira zvawakaitirwa naAmareki panzira, pakubuda kwenyu Ijipiti;" 
Deuteronomy25:18 kuti wakakuwira panzira, akaparadza vanhu vako vakanga vari shure, vose vakanga vasine simba, panguva yamakanga maziya nokuneta; iye wakanga asingatyi Mwari." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Zvino kana Jehovha Mwari wako akupa zororo pavavengi vako vose, vanokupoteredza panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, ive nhaka yako, unofanira kubvisa pasi pokudenga zvose zvinorangaridza Amareki; usakakanganwa." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Zvino kana wapinda panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ive nhaka yako, ikava yako, ukagaramo;" 
Deuteronomy26:2 unofanira kutora zvitsva zvezvibereko zvose zvenyika, zvaunowana panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, ndokuzviisa mudengu, ndokuenda nazvo kunzvimbo ichatsaurwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti agarisepo zita rake." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Zvino uende kumupristi uchavapo pamazuva iwayo, uti kwaari, ‘Ndinoreva pachena nhasi pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ndasvika panyika yakapikirwa madzibaba edu naJehovha, kuti uchatipa iyo.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Ipapo mupristi anofanira kutora dengu paruoko rwako, ndokurigadza pamberi peatari yaJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Iwe ugopupura, uchiti pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako, ‘Baba vangu vakanga vari muArameya, mufambi wakanga oda kuparara, akaburukira Ijipiti, akagarapo, ana vanhu vashoma havo; vakaitwapo rudzi rukuru, rune simba, runa vanhu vazhinji." 
Deuteronomy26:6 VaIjipiti vakatiitira zvakaipa, nokutitambudza, vakatibatisa mabasa anorema." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Ipapo takadana kuna Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba edu, Jehovha akanzwa izwi redu, akaona kutambudzika kwedu;" 
Deuteronomy26:8 Jehovha akatibudisa muIjipiti neruoko rune simba, noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, nezvinotyisa, nezviratidzo, nezvishamiso;" 
Deuteronomy26:9 akatisvitsa panzvimbo ino, akatipa nyika ino, nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Zvino tarira, ndauya nezvitsva zvezvibereko zvenyika yamakandipa, imi Jehovha.’ Ipapo unofanira kuzviisa pasi pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako; ndokunamata pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Unofanira kufarira zvose zvakanaka, zvaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, iwe, naveimba yako, nomuRevhi, nomutorwa uri pakati pako." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Zvino kana wapedza kutsaura zvegumi zvezvibereko zvako zvose negore rechitatu, nokuti ndiro gore rokutsaura zvegumi, unofanira kuzvipa muRevhi, nomutorwa, nenherera, nechirikadzi, kuti vadye mukati mamasuwo ako, vagute." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Ipapo iwe unofanira kutaura pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako, uchiti, ‘Ndabvisa mumba mangu zvinhu zvakatsaurwa, ndikazvipa muRevhi, nomutorwa, nenherera, nechirikadzi, zvose sezvamakandiraira; handina kudarika mumwe wemirairo yenyu, kana kuikanganwa."
