Deuteronomy26:14 Handina kuzvidya pakuchema kwangu, kana kuviga zvimwe zvazvo, ndisina kunaka, kana kupa vakafa zvimwe zvazvo; ndakateerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wangu, ndikaita zvose zvamakandiraira." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Dotarirai muri paugaro hwenyu hutsvene, pakudenga, muropafadze vanhu venyu Isiraeri, nenyika yamakatipa, sezvamakapikira madzibaba edu, nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Nhasi Jehovha Mwari wako unokuraira kuti uite izvi zvakatemwa nezvakatongwa; naizvozvo unofanira kuzvichengeta nokuzviita nomwoyo wako wose nomweya wako wose. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Wapikira Jehovha nhasi kuti ave Mwari wako, newe kuti unofanira kufamba munzira dzake, nokuchengeta zvaakatema, nemirairo yake, nezvaakatonga, uye kuti uchaterera izwi rake." 
Deuteronomy26:18 NaJehovha akakupikira iwe kuti uchava rudzi rwake chairwo, sezvaakakupikira, uye kuti uchachengeta mirairo yake yose;" 
Deuteronomy26:19 kuti akukurise kwazvo kupfuura ndudzi dzose dzaakaita, pakurumbidzwa, napamukurumbira, napakukudzwa; kuti uve rudzi rutsvene kuna Jehovha Mwari wako, sezvaakataura.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Zvino Mosesi navakuru VaIsiraeri vakaraira vanhu, vakati, chengetai mirairo yose yandinokurairai nhasi." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Zvino nomusi wamunoyambuka Jodhani muchipinda munyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, unofanira kuzvimisira mabwe makuru nokuachenesa nesuko;" 
Deuteronomy27:3 ugonyora pamusoro pawo mashoko ose omurairo uyu, kana wayambuka; kuti upinde munyika yawakapiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, sezvawakapikirwa naJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba ako." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Zvino kana mayambuka Jodhani, munofanira kumisa mabwe iwayo, sezvandinokurairai nhasi, pagomo reEbhari, nokuachenesa nesuko." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Ipapo unofanira kuvakirapo Jehovha Mwari wako atari, atari yamabwe; haufaniri kusimudzira nhumbi yedare pamusoro payo." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Unofanira kuvaka atari yaJehovha Mwari wako namabwe asina kuvezwa, ugobayirapo Jehovha Mwari wako zvipiriso zvinopiswa." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Unofanira kubayirapo zvipiriso zvokuyananisa, nokudyapo; unofanira kufara pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Unofanira kunyora pamusoro pamabwe awo mashoko ose omurairo uyu, zvionekwe kwazvo." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Zvino Mosesi navapristi navaRevhi vakataura naVaIsiraeri vose, vakati, “Iwe Isiraeri, nyarara, unzwe; nhasi waitwa rudzi rwaJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Naizvozvo unofanira kuteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wako, uite mirairo yake nezvaakatema, zvandinokuraira nhasi.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Mosesi akaraira vanhu nomusi uyo, akati," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Ndivo vanofanira kundomira pamusoro pegomo reGerizimu, kuti varopafadze vanhu, kana mayambuka Jodhani: Simioni, naRevhi, naJudha, naIsakari; naJosefa, naBhenjamini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Uye ndivo vanofanira kundomira pagomo reEbhari, kuti vavatuke: Rubheni, naGadhi, naAsheri, naZebhuruni, naDhani, naNafutari.”" 
Deuteronomy27:14 Zvino vaRevhi vanofanira kupindura vachiti kuvarume vose VaIsiraeri nezwi guru: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “Ngaatukwe munhu unoita mufananidzo wakavezwa, kana wakaumbwa, unonyangadza Jehovha, riri basa ramaoko emhizha, achiumisa pakavanda. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kupindura, vachiti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:16 “Ngaatukwe munhu unozvidza baba vake kana mai vake. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:17 “Ngaatukwe munhu unoshandura muganhu wehama yake. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:18 “Ngaatukwe munhu unotsausa bofu panzira. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:19 “Ngaatukwe munhu unotongera mutorwa nenherera nechirikadzi zvisakarurama. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:20 “Ngaatukwe munhu unovata nomukadzi wababa vake, nokuti wafukura nhere yababa vake. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:21 “Ngaatukwe munhu unovata nemhuka ipi neipi. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:22 “Ngaatukwe munhu unovata nehanzvadzi yake, kana nomwanasikana wababa vake, kana nomwanasikana wamai vake. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:23 “Ngaatukwe munhu unovata namai vomukadzi wake. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:24 “Ngaatukwe munhu unorova wokwake pakavanda. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:25 “Ngaatukwe munhu unogamuchira fufuro kuti auraye mumwe usine mhosva. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy27:26 “Ngaatukwe munhu asingasimbisi mashoko omurairo uyu, nokuaita. “Zvino vanhu vose vanofanira kuti, Ameni." 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Zvino kana uchiteerera zvakanaka izwi raJehovha Mwari wako, nokuchenjera kuita mirairo yake yose, yandinokuraira nhasi, Jehovha Mwari wako uchakukurisa kupfuura ndudzi dzose dziri panyika." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Kuropafadzwa uku kwose kuchaitika kwauri, uchatevererwa nako, kana uchiteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Ucharopafadzwa muguta, ucharopafadzwa mumunda." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Zvibereko zvomuviri wako, nezvibereko zvevhu rako, nezvibereko zvemombe dzako, nezvibereko zvemhou dzako, namakwayana amakwai ako, zvicharopafadzwa." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Dengu rako, nomudziyo wako wokukanyira chingwa, zvicharopafadzwa." 
Deuteronomy28:6 Ucharopafadzwa kana uchipinda, ucharopafadzwa kana uchibuda." 
Deuteronomy28:7 Jehovha uchakukundisa vavengi vako, vanokumukira, pamberi pako; vachauya kuzorwa newe nenzira imwe, vachatiza pamberi pako nenzira nomwe." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Jehovha ucharaira kuti uropafadzwe pamatura ako, napazvose zvaunobata namaoko ako; uchakuropafadza panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Jehovha uchakusimbisa, kuti uve rudzi rwake rutsvene, sezvaakakupikira; kana uchichengeta mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wako, nokufamba munzira dzake." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Vanhu vose venyika vachaona kuti iwe wakatumidzwa nezita raJehovha; vachakutya. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Jehovha uchakuwanzira mufaro pazvibereko zvomuviri wako, napazvibereko zvemombe dzako, napazvibereko zvevhu rako, panyika yakapikirwa madzibaba ako naJehovha, kuti uchakupa iyo." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Jehovha uchakuzarurira pfuma yake yakanaka yokudenga, akupe mvura yenyika yako nenguva yayo; nokuropafadza mabasa ose amaoko ako; iwe uchapa ndudzi zhinji chikwereti." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Jehovha uchakuita musoro, haangakuiti muswe; uchava kumusoro bedzi, haungavi pasi; kana uchiteerera mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wako, yandinokuraira nhasi, uchishingaira kuiita;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 usingatsauki pane rimwe ramashoko andinokuraira, kurudyi kana kuruboshwe, uchitevera vamwe vamwari kuti uvashumire." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Asi kana uchiramba kuteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wako kuti uchenjere kuita mirairo yake yose, nezvaakatema, zvandinokuraira nhasi; kutukwa uku kwose kuchaitika kwauri, uchatevererwa nako." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Uchatukwa muguta, uchatukwa mumunda." 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Dengu rako richatukwa, nomudziyo wako wokukanyira chingwa." 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Zvibereko zvomuviri wako zvichatukwa, nezvibereko zvevhu rako, nezvibereko zvemhou dzako, namakwayana amakwai ako." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Uchatukwa kana uchipinda, uchatukwa kana uchibuda." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Jehovha uchatuma pamusoro pako kutukwa, nokunyonganiswa, nokurangwa, pazvose zvaunobata namaoko ako, kusvikira waparadzwa, uye kusvikira wakurumidza kupera, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvaunoita, zvawakandisiya nazvo." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Jehovha uchakunamatidza denda, kusvikira akupedza kunyika kwaunoenda, kuti ive yako." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Jehovha uchakurova norukosoro, nefivhiri, nokupisa kwomuviri, nokuvaviswa kwazvo, uye nokushaiwa mvura, nenyunje, nokuvhuvha; izvo zvichakuteverera kusvikira waparadzwa." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Denga rako riri pamusoro pako richaita sendarira, nenyika iri pasi pako sedare." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Jehovha uchashandura mvura yenyika yako ive bukuta neguruva; zvichaburukira pamusoro pako zvichibva kudenga, kusvikira waparadzwa." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Jehovha uchatendera kuti ukundwe navavengi vako; uchabuda kundorwa navo nenzira imwe, uchatiza pamberi pavo nenzira nomwe; uchava chinhu chinotyisa pakati poushe hwose hwenyika." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Zvitunha zvako zvichava zvokudya zveshiri dzose dzokudenga nezvikara zvenyika, kusina munhu unozvidzinga." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Jehovha uchakurova namamota eIjipiti, namaronda, nemhezi, nokufunuka, zvicharamba kupora." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Jehovha uchakurova nokupenga, noupofu, uye nokukanganiswa kwomwoyo;" 
Deuteronomy28:29 uchatsvangadzira masikati, sebofu rinotsvangadzira murima, haungafari panzira dzako; ucharemedzwa nokubirwa nguva dzose, hakungavi nomunhu unokurwira." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Uchapfimba mukadzi, asi mumwe murume uchavata naye; uchavaka dzimba, asi haungagarimo; ucharima munda wemizambiringa, asi haungadyi michero yayo." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Mombe yako ichabayiwa uchizviona, asi haungaidyi; mbongoro yako ichatorwa nesimba uchizviona, asi haingadzoserwi kwauri; makwai ako achapiwa vavengi vako, haungawani unokurwira." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Vanakomana vako navanasikana vako vachapiwa rumwe rudzi; meso ako achatarira, ukaneta kuvashuva zuva rose; asi uchashaiwa simba paruoko rwako." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Zvibereko zvevhu rako, nezvamabasa ako, zvichadyiwa norudzi rwausingazivi; uchangoremedzwa nokutambudzwa nguva dzose." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Uchapengeswa nezvauchaona nameso ako. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Jehovha uchakurova pamabvi ako, napamakumbo ako, namamota anorwadza, acharamba kupora, kubva parutsoka kusvikira pamusoro pomusoro wako." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Jehovha uchakuisa iwe namambo wako wauchazvitsaurira kurudzi rwawakanga usingazivi iwe namadzibaba ako; zvino uchandoshumirapo vamwe vamwari vamatanda namabwe. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Iwe uchaitwa chishamiso, netsumo, nechiseko, pakati pavanhu vose kwauchandoiswa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Uchatakurira mbeu zhinji kumunda, asi uchaunganidza zvishoma; nokuti zvichapedzwa nemhashu." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Ucharima minda yemizambiringa nokuigadzira, asi haunganwi waini yayo, kana kutanha mazambiringa; nokuti achadyiwa namakonye." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Uchava nemiti yemiorivhi panyika yako yose, asi haungazori mafuta ayo, nokuti miorivhi yako ichazuka." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Uchabereka vanakomana navanasikana, asi havangavi vako, nokuti vachatapwa." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Miti yako yose nezvibereko zvevhu rako zvichadyiwa nemhashu. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Mutorwa ugere pakati pako ucharamba achikwirira kupfuura iwe; iwe ucharamba uchiderera. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Iye uchakupa chikwereti, asi iwe haungamupi chikwereti; iye uchava musoro, iwe uchava muswe." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Kutukwa uku kwose kuchaitika kwauri, nokukutevera, nokukubata, kusvikira waparadzwa; nokuti hauna kuteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wako, nokuchengeta mirairo yake nezvaakatema, zvaakakuraira." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Zvichava pamusoro pako napamusoro pavana vako, zvive zviratidzo nezvishamiso nokusingaperi;" 
Deuteronomy28:47 nokuti hauna kushumira Jehovha Mwari wako nomufaro, nomwoyo unofara, nokuda kwokuwanda kwezvose." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Naizvozvo uchafanira kubatira vavengi vako, vauchatumirwa naJehovha kuti urwe navo, uchinzwa nzara nenyota, uchishaiwa zvokufuka nezvose izvi; iye uchaisa joko redare pamutsipa wako, kusvikira akuparadza." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Jehovha achauyisa rudzi runobva kure kuzorwa newe, runobva kumagumisiro enyika, segondo rinobhururuka, rudzi rwausinganzwisisi rurimi rwarwo;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 rudzi rune hasha, rusingarangariri vatana, kana kunzwira majaya tsitsi." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Vachadya zvibereko zvemombe dzako, nezvibereko zvevhu rako, kusvikira waparadzwa; havangakusiyiri zviyo, kana waini, kana mafuta, kana zvakaberekwa nemhou dzako, kana makwayana amakwai ako, kusvikira waparadzwa navo." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Vachakukomba pamasuwo ako ose, kusvikira masvingo ako marefu ane simba aya ose, awakatenda munyika yako yose; vachakukomba pamasuwo ako ose panyika yako yose, yawakapiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Uchadya zvibereko zvomuviri wako, nyama yavanakomana vako navanasikana vako, vawakapiwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kana wokombwa nokumanikidzwa navavengi vako." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Murume uno undere nouno unengwe kwazvo pakati pako uchava nomufungo wakaipa kuhama yake, nokumukadzi wake waanoda, nokuvana vake vaanenge asarirwa navo;" 
Deuteronomy28:55 haangapi mumwe wavo nyama yavana vake vaachadya, nokuti iye haangavi nechaakasarirwa nacho, kana wokombwa nokumanikidzwa navavengi vako pamasuwo ako ose." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Mukadzi uno undere nouno unengwe pakati pako, wakanga asingadi kutsika pasi norutsoka rwake nokuda kwounengwe hwake noundere hwake, uchava nomufungo wakaipa kumurume wake waanoda, namwanakomana wake, nomwanasikana wake;" 
Deuteronomy28:57 nokumwana wake muduku, waachangobereka, nokuvana vake vaachazobereka; nokuti uchadya pakavanda nokuda kwokushaiwa zvinhu zvose, kana wokombwa nokumanikidzwa navavengi vako pamasuwo ako." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Kana usingachenjeri kuita mashoko ose omurairo uyu, akanyorwa mubhuku iyi, kuti utye zita iri rinobwinya nerinotyisa, rinoti: JEHOVHA MWARI WAKO;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 Jehovha uchakurova iwe navana vako namatambudziko anoshamisa, matambudziko makuru, asingakurumidzi kupera, namatenda akaipa, asingakurumidzi kupera." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Uchauyisazve pamusoro pako zvirwere zvose zveIjipiti, zvawakanga uchitya, kuti zvikunamatire." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Namatenda ose, namatambudziko ose, asina kunyorwa mubhuku yomurairo uyu, ndiwo achauyiswa naJehovha pamusoro pako, kusvikira waparadzwa." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Muchasara mava vashoma, kunyangwe makanga muri vazhinji senyenyedzi dzokudenga; nokuti hauna kuteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Zvino Jehovha sezvaakanga achikufarirai achida kukuitirai zvakanaka, nokukuwanzai, saizvozvo Jehovha uchafara pamusoro penyu kukupedzai nokukuparadzai; muchadzurwa kunyika kwaunoenda, kuti ive yako." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Jehovha uchakukandira pakati pendudzi dzose, kubva pamugumo mumwe wenyika kusvikira kuno mumwe mugumo; ipapo uchandoshumira vamwe vamwari vawakanga usingazivi, iwe namadzibaba ako, vamwari vamatanda navamabwe." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Pakati pendudzi idzo haungawani zororo, netsoka dzako hadzingawani pokuzorora; asi Jehovha uchakupa ipapo mwoyo unowonda;" 
Deuteronomy28:66 upenyu hwako hucharembera pamberi pako, uchatya usiku namasikati, haungazivi kana uchararama;" 
Deuteronomy28:67 mangwanani uchati, ‘Dai aiva madekwana!’ Madekwana uchati, ‘Dai aiva mangwanani!’ Nokudya kwomwoyo wako, zvauchaona nameso ako." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Jehovha uchakuisazve Ijipiti nezvikepe nenzira yandakati kwauri, ‘Hauchazoionizve;’ ipapo muchandozvitengesa kuvavengi venyu, kuti muve varanda navarandakadzi, asi hakungavi nomunhu uchakutengai.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Ndiwo mashoko esungano yakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha, kuti aiite navana VaIsiraeri panyika yaMoabhu, kunze kwesungano yaakaita navo paHorebhu." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Zvino Mosesi akadana VaIsiraeri vose, akati kwavari, “Makaona zvose zvakaitwa naJehovha pamberi penyu panyika yeIjipiti kuna Farao navaranda vake vose, nokunyika yake yose;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 miidzo iya mikuru yamakaona nameso enyu, nezviratidzo, nezvishamiso zviya zvikuru." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Asi Jehovha haana kukupai mwoyo inoziva, nameso anoona, nenzeve dzinonzwa kusvikira nhasi." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ndakakutungamirirai murenje makore ana makumi mana; nguo dzenyu hadzina kukusakarirai, neshangu dzako hadzina kusakara patsoka dzenyu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Hamuna kudya chingwa, kana kunwa waini nezvinodhaka; kuti muzive kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Zvino makati muchisvika panzvimbo ino, Sihoni, mambo weHeshibhoni, naOgi, mambo weBhashani, vakauya kuzorwa nesu, tikavakunda;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 tikatora nyika yavo, tikaipa vaRubheni navaGadhi nehafu yorudzi rwaManase, kuti ive nhaka yavo." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Naizvozvo chengetai mashoko esungano iyi, muiite, kuti mufare pazvose zvamunoita." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Mumire nhasi mose pamberi paJehovha Mwari, vatungamiriri venyu, namarudzi enyu, navakuru venyu, navatariri venyu, ivo varume vose VaIsiraeri," 
Deuteronomy29:11 nepwere dzenyu, navakadzi venyu, navatorwa vako vari pakati pemisasa yako, kubva pavatemi vehuni dzako kusvikira kuvacheri vemvura yako;" 
Deuteronomy29:12 kuti upinde pasungano yaJehovha Mwari wako, napakupika kwake kwaanokupikira nhasi iye Jehovha Mwari wako;" 
Deuteronomy29:13 kuti akusimbise nhasi uve rudzi rwake, iye ave Mwari wako, sezvaakataura kwauri, uye sezvaakapikira madzibaba ako, Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Handiiti sungano iyi nokupika uku nemi moga; 
Deuteronomy29:15 asi naivo vamire pano nesu nhasi pamberi paJehovha Mwari wedu uye navasipo nesu nhasi. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “(Nokuti munoziva kugara kwedu panyika yeIjipiti, nokufamba kwedu pakati pendudzi, dzamakapfuura pakati padzo;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 mukaona zvinonyangadza zvavo, nezvifananidzo zvavo zvamatanda nezvamabwe, nesirivha nendarama, zvakanga zviri pakati pavo;)" 
Deuteronomy29:18 kuti pakati penyu parege kuva nomurume, kana mukadzi, kana mhuri, kana rudzi, vano mwoyo unotsauka kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu nhasi, kuti vandoshumira vamwari vendudzi idzo; kuti pakati penyu parege kuva nomudzi unobereka zvinouraya negavakava;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 zvino kana achinzwa mashoko okupika uku, azvirumbidze pamwoyo wake, achiti, ‘Ndichava norugare, kunyangwe ndichifamba hangu noukukutu hwomwoyo wangu, kuti zvakanyorova nezvakaoma zviparadzwe pamwechete’;" 
Deuteronomy29:20 Jehovha haangamukanganwiri, asi nenguva iyo kutsamwa kwaJehovha neshungu dzake zvichapfungairira munhu uyo, nokutukwa kwose kwakanyorwa mubhuku iyi kuchamunamatira; Jehovha uchadzima zita rake pasi pokudenga." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Jehovha uchamutsaurira zvakaipa zvose pakati pamarudzi ose aIsiraeri, kuti atukwe nokutuka kwose kwesungano yakanyorwa muBhuku iri roMurairo." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Zvino rudzi runotevera, ivo vana venyu vachamuka pashure penyu, navatorwa vanobva kunyika iri kure, kana vachiona matambudziko enyika iyo, namatenda aicharwadziswa nawo naJehovha;" 
Deuteronomy29:23 uye kuti nyika yose isuferi, nomunyu, nokutsva, kuti haidyarwi, haimedzi, uye kuti uswa hahumerimo, sapakuparadzwa kweSodhoma neGomora, neAdhama neZebhoimu, aya maguta akaparadzwa naJehovha pakutsamwa kwake neshungu dzake;" 
Deuteronomy29:24 uye ndudzi dzose dzichati, ‘Jehovha wakaitira nyika iyo saizvozvo neiko? Kupisa kwokutsamwa uku kukuru kunoti kudiniko?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Zvino vanhu vachati, ‘Nokuti vakasiya sungano yaJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo, yaakaita navo nguva yaakavabudisa panyika yeIjipiti;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 vakashumira vamwe vamwari, vakanamata kwavari, vamwari vavakanga vasingazivi, vavasina kupiwa naye’;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 naizvozvo kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira nyika iyi, kuti aituke nokutuka kwose kwakanyorwa muBhuku iri." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Jehovha akavadzipura panyika yavo nokutsamwa kwake neshungu dzake nehasha dzake huru, akavarashira kune imwe nyika, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Zvinhu zvakavanzwa ndezvaJehovha Mwari wedu; asi zvinhu zvakaratidzwa pachena ndezvedu, isu navana vedu nokusingaperi, kuti tiite mashoko ose omurairo uyu." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Zvino kana zvinhu izvi zvose zvichikuwira, iko kuropafadzwa nokutukwa, kwandakaisa pamberi pako, ukazvirangarira pakati pendudzi dzose, pawakadzingirwa naJehovha Mwari wako," 
Deuteronomy30:2 ukadzokera kuna Jehovha Mwari wako, ukateerera izwi rake, sezvandinokuraira zvose nhasi, iwe navana vako, nomwoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 ipapo Jehovha Mwari wako uchashandura kutapwa kwako, nokukunzwira tsitsi, nokukuunganidzazve pandudzi dzose, kwaakakurashanyira kwadziri, iye Jehovha Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Kunyangwe vamwe venyu vakanga vadzingirwa kumagumisiro okudenga, Jehovha Mwari wako uchakuunganidzapo, uchandokutorapo;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 Jehovha Mwari wako uchakuuyisa munyika, yakanga iri yamadzibaba ako, kuti ive yako; uchakuitira zvakanaka, nokukuwanza kupfuura madzibaba ako." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Jehovha Mwari wako uchadzingisa mwoyo wako, nemwoyo yavana vako, kuti ude Jehovha Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose, kuti urarame." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Jehovha Mwari wako uchatuka vavengi vako nokutuka uku kwose, navose vanokuvenga vanokutambudza." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Zvino iwe uchadzoka nokuteerera izwi raJehovha, nokuita mirairo yake yose, yandinokuraira nhasi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Jehovha Mwari wako uchawanza zvinobatwa namaoko ako, nezvibereko zvomuviri wako, nezvibereko zvemombe dzako, nezvibereko zvevhu rako, kuti zvifare; nokuti Jehovha uchakufarirazve zvakanaka, sezvaakafarira madzibaba ako;" 
Deuteronomy30:10 kana uchiteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wako, nokuchengeta mirairo yake nezvaakatema, zvakanyorwa muBhuku iri roMurairo; kana ukadzokera kuna Jehovha Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose nomweya wako wose." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Nokuti murairo uyu wandinokuraira nhasi haungakuremeri zvikuru, uye hauzi kure." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Hauzi kudenga, kuti uti, ‘Ndianiko uchatikwirira kudenga, kundotitorera iwo, nokutinzwisa iwo, kuti tiuite?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Hauzi mhiri kwegungwa, kuti uti, ‘Ndianiko uchatiyambukira mhiri kwegungwa, andotitorera iwo, nokutinzwisa iwo, tiuite?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Asi shoko riri pedyo kwazvo newe, mumuromo mako, nomumwoyo mako, kuti uriite." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Tarira ndaisa pamberi pako nhasi upenyu nezvakanaka, norufu nezvakaipa." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Zvandinokuraira nhasi ndizvo, kuti ude Jehovha Mwari wako, nokufamba munzira dzake, nokuchengeta mirairo yake nezvaakatema nezvaakatonga, kuti urarame, uwande, uye kuti Jehovha Mwari wako akuropafadze kunyika kwaunoenda kwairi, kuti ive yako." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Asi kana mwoyo wako ukatsauka, ukaramba kuteerera, ukatsauswa kunamata vamwe vamwari nokuvashumira," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndinokuudzai nhasi, kuti muchaparadzwa zvirokwazvo; hamungavi namazuva mazhinji kunyika kwaunoyambukira nhasi, kuti ive yako." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ndinodana kudenga napasi kukupupurirai nhasi, kuti ndaisa pamberi pako upenyu norufu, kuropafadzwa nokutukwa; naizvozvo tsaura upenyu, kuti urarame, iwe navana vako;" 
Deuteronomy30:20 kuti ude Jehovha Mwari wako, nokuteerera izwi rake, nokumunamatira; nokuti ndihwo upenyu hwako, nokuwanzwa kwamazuva ako; kuti ugare munyika yakapikira Jehovha madzibaba ako, Abhurahamu naIsaka naJakobho, kuti uchavapa iyo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Zvino Mosesi akaenda kundotaura mashoko awa kuVaIsiraeri vose," 
Deuteronomy31:2 akati kwavari, “Ndava namakore ane zana namakumi maviri nhasi, handichagoni kubuda nokupinda; zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Iwe haungayambuki Jodhani urwu.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Jehovha Mwari wako ndiye uchakutungamirira pakuyambuka; iye uchaparadza ndudzi idzi dzose pamberi pako, dzichava dzako; Joshua ndiye uchakutungamirira pakuyambuka, sezvakataurwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Jehovha Mwari wako ndiye uchakutungamirira pakuyambuka; iye uchaparadza ndudzi idzi dzose pamberi pako, dzichava dzako; Joshua ndiye uchakutungamirira pakuyambuka, sezvakataurwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Jehovha uchavaitira ivo sezvaakaitira Sihoni naOgi, madzimambo aVaAmori, nenyika yavo, vaakaparadza." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Jehovha uchavaisa mumaoko enyu, nemi munofanira kuvaitira zvose sezvandakakurairai." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Simbai, mutsunge mwoyo, musatya kana kuvhunduswa navo; nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako ndiye unoenda newe, haangakuregi, haangakusiyi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Zvino Mosesi akadana Joshua, akati kwaari pamberi paVaIsiraeri vose, “Simba, utsunge mwoyo, nokuti iwe uchaenda navanhu ava panyika yakapikirwa madzibaba avo naJehovha, kuti uchavapa iyo; iwe uchavagarisa nhaka iyo." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Zvino Mosesi akadana Joshua, akati kwaari pamberi paVaIsiraeri vose, “Simba, utsunge mwoyo, nokuti iwe uchaenda navanhu ava panyika yakapikirwa madzibaba avo naJehovha, kuti uchavapa iyo; iwe uchavagarisa nhaka iyo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Jehovha ndiye unokutungamirira, iye uchava newe, haangakuregi, haangakusiyi; usatya kana kuvhunduswa.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Zvino Mosesi akanyora murairo uyu, akaupa vapristi navana vaRevhi, vaitakura areka yesungano yaJehovha, navakuru vose VaIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Mosesi akavaraira, akati, “Nguva dzose pakupera kwamakore manomwe, panguva yakatarwa pagore resununguro, pamutambo wemisasa," 
Deuteronomy31:11 kana VaIsiraeri vose vauya kuzviratidza pamberi paJehovha Mwari wako panzvimbo ichatsaurwa naye, unofanira kurava murairo uyu pamberi paVaIsiraeri vose, vaunzwe." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Unganidza vanhu, varume navakadzi, nepwere, navatorwa vako vari pakati pamasuwo ako, kuti vanzwe, vadzidze, vatye Jehovha Mwari wenyu, vachenjere kuita mashoko ose omurairo uyu;" 
Deuteronomy31:13 uye kuti vana vavo vakanga vasingazivi vanzwe, vadzidze kutya Jehovha Mwari wenyu, nguva yose yamuchazogara panyika yamunoyambuka Jodhani kwairi, kuti ive yenyu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tarira, mazuva okufa kwako aswedera; dana Joshua mundomira mutende rokusangana, kuti ndimuraire iye.” Mosesi naJoshua vakandomira mutende rokusangana." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tarira, mazuva okufa kwako aswedera; dana Joshua mundomira mutende rokusangana, kuti ndimuraire iye.” Mosesi naJoshua vakandomira mutende rokusangana." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Jehovha akazviratidza muTende mushongwe yegore, shongwe yegore ikamira pamusoro pomukova weTende." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mosesi, “Tarira, iwe uchavata namadzibaba ako; zvino vanhu ava vachasimuka nokupata vachitevera vamwari vavatorwa venyika, kwavanondogara pakati pavo; vachandisiya, nokuputsa sungano yandakaita navo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Zvino kutsamwa kwangu kuchavamukira nenguva iyo, ndichavasiya nokuvavanzira chiso changu, vachaparadzwa, nezvakaipa zvizhinji nenhamo zhinji zvichavawira; naizvozvo nenguva iyo vachati, ‘Ko zvinhu zvakaipa izvi hazvina kutiwira nokuti Mwari wedu haazi pakati pedu here?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Nenguva iyo ndichavanza chiso changu nokuda kwezvakaipa zvose zvavakaita pakutsaukira kwavo kuna vamwe vamwari. 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Naizvozvo zvino munofanira kuzvinyorera rwiyo urwu rundipupurire kuvana VaIsiraeri. 
Deuteronomy31:20 Nokuti kana ndivapinza panyika yandakapikira madzibaba avo, iyo inoyerera mukaka nouchi, ivo vakadya, vakaguta, vakakora, ipapo vachatsaukira kuna vamwe vamwari nokuvashumira, vakandizvidza ini, nokuputsa sungano yangu." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Zvino kana zvakaipa zvizhinji nenhamo zhinji zvikavawira, rwiyo urwu ruchava chapupu kupupura pamberi pavo; nokuti harungakanganikwi pamiromo yavana vavo, nokuti ndinoziva ndangariro dzavanoruka nhasi, ndichigere kuvapinza panyika yandakavapikira.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Naizvozvo Mosesi wakanyora rwiyo urwu nomusi iwoyo, akarudzidzisa vana VaIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Akaraira Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, akati, “Simba, utsunge mwoyo, nokuti iwe uchapinza vana VaIsiraeri panyika yandakavapikira; neni ndichava newe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:23 Akaraira Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, akati, “Simba, utsunge mwoyo, nokuti iwe uchapinza vana VaIsiraeri panyika yandakavapikira; neni ndichava newe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Zvino Mosesi wakati apedza kunyora mashoko omurairo uyu mubhuku, kusvikira apera," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Mosesi akaraira vaRevhi, vaitakura areka yesungano yaJehovha, akati," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Torai Bhuku iri roMurairo, muiise parutivi rweareka yesungano yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, kuti ikupupurirepo." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Nokuti ndinoziva kusanzwa nokusateerera kwenyu; tarirai, ini ndichiri mupenyu pakati penyu nhasi, makamukira Jehovha; hamuchanyanyisi here kana ndafa?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Unganidzai kwandiri vakuru vose vamarudzi enyu, navatariri venyu, kuti vanzwe ndichitaura mashoko awa nokudana denga napasi zvivapupurire." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Nokuti ndinoziva kuti kana ndafa muchazvisvibisa kwazvo, nokutsauka panzira yandakakurairai; zvakaipa zvichakuwirai pamazuva okupedzisira, nokuti makaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, muchimutsamwisa namabasa amaoko enyu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Zvino Mosesi akataura mashoko orwiyo urwu, kusvikira apera, ungano yose ichizvinzwa." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Inzwa iwe denga, ndichataura; Nenyika ngainzwe mashoko omuromo wangu;" 
Deuteronomy32:2 Kudzidzisa kwangu kuchadonha semvura, Kutaura kwangu kuchayerera sedova, Seguti pabumhudza nyoro, Sokupfunha kwemvura pauswa;" 
Deuteronomy32:3 Nokuti ndichaparidza zita raJehovha; Rumbidzai ukuru hwaMwari wedu. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Iye ndiro dombo, basa rake rakakwana; Nokuti nzira dzake dzose dzakarurama. Ndiye Mwari akatendeka, usinganyengeri, Wakarurama, ndewezvokwadi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Vakamuitira zvakashata, havazi vana vake, ndiko kuremara kwavo; Ivo rudzi rwakatsauka, rwakakombama." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Munoripira Jehovha saizvozvo here, Nhai, imi mapenzi asina kungwara? Ko haazi baba vako vakakubereka here? Ndiye wakakuita, nokukusimbisa." 
Deuteronomy32:7 Rangarira mazuva ekare, Funga makore amarudzi mazhinji; Bvunza baba vako, ndivo vachakuratidza; Navatana vako, ndivo vachakuudza." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Wokudenga–denga nguva yaakapa ndudzi nhaka yadzo, Nguva yaakaparadzanisa vana vavanhu, Wakatema miganhu yendudzi Achirangarira kuwanda kwavana VaIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Nokuti mugove waJehovha ndivo vanhu vake; Jakobho ndiyo nhaka yake yakayerwa. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Wakamuwana munyika yesango, Murenje risina chinhu, rinotyisa; Wakamukomberedza, nokumutarira, Nokumuchengeta semboni yeziso rake;" 
Deuteronomy32:11 Segondo rinomutsa vana varo, Richiengerera pamusoro pavana varo, Richitambanudza mapapiro aro, richivagamuchira, Richivabereka pamapapiro aro;" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Saizvozvo Jehovha, iye oga, wakamutungamirira, Kwakanga kusina mwari wokumwe kwaari." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Wakamutasvisa panzvimbo dzakakwirira dzenyika, Wakadya michero yeminda; Wakamusvutidza uchi hunobva padombo, Namafuta anobva padombo romusarasara," 
Deuteronomy32:14 Nomukaka wakafa wemhou, nomukaka wamakwai, Pamwechete namafuta amakwayana, Namakondohwe orudzi rwapaBhashani, nembudzi, Namafuta etsvo dzekoroni; Iwe wakanwa waini yeropa ramazambiringa." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Asi Jeshuruni wakazokora, ndokupfura, Iwe wakakora, wakava mukobvu, ukava namafuta, Zvino iye akarasha Mwari akamuita, Akazvidza dombo rakamuchengeta." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Vakamugodoresa navamwari vokumwe, Vakamutsamwisa nezvinonyangadza;" 
Deuteronomy32:17 Vakabayira mweya yakaipa, yakanga isi Mwari, Vatsva vakanga vachangomuka, Zvakanga zvisingatyiwi namadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Dombo, rakakubereka, haurirangariri, Wakakanganwa Mwari akakupona." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Jehovha akazviona, akavarasha, Nokuti wakatsamwiswa navanakomana vake navanasikana vake." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Akati, “Ndichavavanzira chiso changu, Ndinoda kuona kuguma kwavo, kuti kwakadiniko; Nokuti ivo rudzi rwakatsauka kwazvo. Vana vasina kutendeka chose." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Vakamutsa godo rangu nechinhu chisati chiri Mwari; Vakanditsamwisa nezvinhu zvavo zvisina maturo; Neniwo ndichavagodoresa navasati vari vanhu; Ndichavatsamwisa norudzi runopenga. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Nokuti moto wakabatidzwa pakutsamwa kwangu, Unopisa kusvikira pasi kugomba ravakafa, Unoparadza nyika nezvibereko zvayo, Unotungidza nheyo dzamakomo." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndichatutira njodzi pamusoro pavo, Ndichapedza miseve yangu ndichivapfura." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Vachaonda nenzara, nokuparadzwa nokupisa kukuru, Nokuparadzwa kwakaisvoipa; Ndichatuma meno ezvikara kwavari, Pamwechete nomuti unouraya wezvinokambaira muguruva." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Munondo uchavatorera kunze, Nokutyisa mudzimba dzomukati; Zvichaparadza jaya nemhandara, Mwana unomwa pamwechete navarume, vachena vhudzi.”" 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ndakati, ndichavafuridzira kure, Ndichagumisa kurangarirwa kwavo pakati pavanhu;" 
Deuteronomy32:27 Dai ndisina kutya kutsamwa kwavavengi, Kuti vavengi vavo vasanzwisisa, Vakati, “Ruoko rwedu ndirwo rwakakunda, Haazi Jehovha akaita izvozvo zvose.”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Nokuti ivo rudzi rusina mano, Hakuna kunzwisisa pakati pavo." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Dai vakanga vakachenjera, vangadai vakazvinzwisisa, Vangadai vakaona kuguma kwavo!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Munhu mumwe ungadzinga seiko vanhu vane chiuru chezana, Navanhu vaviri vangatizisa seiko vanhu vane zviuru zvine gumi, Kana dombo ravo risina kuvatengesa, NaJehovha asina kuvaisa mumaoko avo?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Nokuti dombo ravo harina kufanana nedombo redu, Kunyangwe vavengi vedu vomene vachitonga." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Nokuti muzambiringa wavo wakabva pamuzambiringa weSodhoma, Napaminda yeGomora; Mazambiringa avo mazambiringa enduru, Masumbu awo anovava;" 
Deuteronomy32:33 Waini yavo uturu hwenyoka, Nouturu hunouraya kwazvo hwemhungu." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Ko izvi hazvina kuunganidza kwandiri here? Hazvina kufunhurwa pakati pepfuma yangu here? 
Deuteronomy32:35 Kutsiva ndokwangu, nokutsividza, Panguva yokutedzemuka kwetsoka dzavo; Nokuti zuva renjodzi yavo riri pedyo, Nezvinhu zvichavawira zvichakurumidza kuuya." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Nokuti Jehovha uchachenura vanhu vake, Nokunzwira varanda vake tsitsi, Kana achiona kuti simba ravo raenda, Uye kuti vapera vose," 
Deuteronomy32:37 Zvino iye uchati, “Vamwari vavo varipiko, Nedombo ravakanga vachivimba naro?”" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Ivo vaidya mafuta ezvibairo zvavo, Vainwa waini yezvipiriso zvavo zvinodururwa. Ngavasimuke, vakubatsirei, Ngavave utiziro hwenyu." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Tarirai zvino, muone kuti ndini iye, Hakuno mumwe mwari pamwechete neni; Ini ndinouraya, ini ndinoraramisa; Ini ndakakuvadza, ini ndinoporesa; Hakuna ungarwirwa paruoko rwangu." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Nokuti ndinosimudzira ruoko rwangu kudenga, Ndichiti, “Zvirokwazvo, noupenyu hwangu husingaperi," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Kana ndarodza munondo wangu unobwinya, Noruoko rwangu rukabata kutonga, Ndichatsiva vavengi vangu, Nokutsividza vanondivenga." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ndichanyudza miseve yangu muropa, Munondo wangu uchadya nyama; Neropa ravakaurayiwa neravakatapwa, Neremisoro yavatungamiri vavavengi." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Farai, imi ndudzi, pamwechete navanhu vake, Nokuti uchatsiva ropa ravaranda vake, Nokutsividza vavengi vake, Nokudzikinura nyika yake navanhu vake.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Zvino Mosesi akauya ndokutaura mashoko ose orwiyo urwu vanhu vachizvinzwa, iye naHoshea, mwanakomana waNuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Mosesi akapedza kutaura mashoko awa ose kuVaIsiraeri vose; 
Deuteronomy32:46 akati kwavari, “Tererai nemwoyo yenyu mashoko ose andinokupupurirai nhasi, kuti muraire vana venyu, vagochenjera kuita mashoko ose omurairo uyu." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Nokuti hachizi chinhu chisina maturo kwamuri, asi ndihwo upenyu hwenyu; nechinhu ichi muchawedzera mazuva enyu panyika, yamunoyambuka Jodhani kwairi, kuti ive yenyu.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMosesi nomusi iwoyo, akati," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Kwira pagomo iri reAbharimu, kugomo reNebho, riri panyika yaMoabhu, rakatarisana neJeriko, uone nyika yeKenani, yandinopa vana VaIsiraeri, ive yavo;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 ufire pagomo raunokwira, ugosanganiswa navanhu vako; sezvakafa Aroni, mukuru wako, pagomo reHori, akasanganiswa navanhu vake;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 nokuti makaita nomutoo usina kutendeka kwandiri pakati pavana VaIsiraeri pamvura yeMeribha paKadheshi murenje reZini; nokuti hamuna kunditsaura pakati pavana VaIsiraeri. 
Deuteronomy32:52 Nokuti uchaona hako nyika pamberi pako, asi haungapindipo panyika yandinopa vana VaIsiraeri.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Zvino ndiko kuropafadza kwaMosesi, munhu waMwari, kwaakaropafadza nako vana VaIsiraeri, asati afa." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Akati, “Jehovha wakabva Sinai, Akavabudira achibva Seiri; Akapenya ari pagomo reParani, Akauya achibva pazviuru zvine gumi zvavatsvene; Paruoko rwake rworudyi pakanga pano murairo womoto kwavari." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Zvirokwazvo unoda ndudzi; Vatsvene vake vose vari paruoko rwenyu; Vakagara pasi patsoka dzenyu; Mumwe nomumwe uchagamuchira mashoko enyu. 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mosesi wakatiraira murairo, Ndiyo nhaka yeungano yaJakobho." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Wakanga ari mambo paJeshuruni, Pakuungana kwavakuru vavanhu, Marudzi ose aVaIsiraeri pamwechete." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Rubheni ngaararame, arege kufa, Asi vanhu vake ngavave vashoma havo." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Kuropafadzwa kwaJudha ndiko”: Akati, “Inzwai Jehovha izwi raJudha, Mumusvitse kuvanhu vake; Wakavarwira namaoko ake; Imi muchamubatsira kurwa navavengi vake.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Pamusoro paRevhi wakati, “Tumimu yenyu neUrimi yenyu ndezvaunodikanwa nemi, Iye wamakaidza paMasa, Wamakarwa naye pamvura yeMeribha”;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 Iye wakati pamusoro pababa vake namai vake, “Handina kumuona; Nehama dzake haana kudzirangarira, Kana kuziva vana vake, Nokuti vakaita shoko renyu, Nokuchengeta sungano yenyu." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Vachadzidzisa Jakobho zvamakatonga, NaIsiraeri murairo wenyu; Vachaisa zvinonhuwira pamberi penyu, Nezvipiriso zvinopiswa zvakakwana paatari dzenyu." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Jehovha, ropafadzai simba rake, Gamuchirai basa ramaoko ake; Gurai zviuno zvavanomumukira, Nezvavanomuvenga, kuti varege kusimukazve.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Pamusoro paBhenjamini wakati, “Mudikanwa waJehovha uchagara kwaari akachengetwa; Unomufukidza zuva rose, Unogara pakati pamafudzi ake.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Pamusoro paJosefa wakati, “Nyika yake ngairopafadzwe naJehovha; Ipiwe zvinhu zvakanakisa zvokudenga, nedova, Nemvura inogara makadzika;" 
Deuteronomy33:14 Nezvinhu zvakanakisa zvezvibereko zvezuva, Nezvinhu zvakanakisa zvinomedzwa nomwedzi;" 
Deuteronomy33:15 Nezvinhu zvakanaka zvamakomo ekare, Nezvinhu zvakanakisa zvezvikomo zvisingaperi," 
Deuteronomy33:16 Nezvinhu zvakanakisa zvenyika nokuzara kwayo, Nomwoyo wakanaka waiye wakanga agere mugwenzi; Kuropafadzwa ngakuuye pamusoro paJosefa, Napamusoro pomusoro waiye wakatsaurwa pakati pehama dzake." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Mwana wematangwe emombe dzake, ndihwo umambo hwake; Nyanga dzake inyanga dzenyati; Nadzo uchabaya ndudzi dzose dzavo, namagumisiro enyika; Ndivo vane zviuru zvamazana zvine gumi zvaEfuremu, Ndivo vane zviuru zvaManase.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Pamusoro paZebhuruni wakati, “Chifara, Zebhuruni, pakubuda kwako, Newe Isakari, pamatende ako." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Vachadanira vanhu kumakomo; Ipapo vachauya nezvibairo zvokururama; Nokuti vachanwa pfuma zhinji yamakungwa, Nepfuma zhinji yakavanzwa nejecha.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Pamusoro paGadhi wakati, “Unokurisa Gadhi ngaaropafadzwe; Iye unogara seshumbakadzi, Unobvambura ruoko, kunyangwe nomusoro." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Wakazvitsaurira mugove wokutanga; Nokuti ndipapo pakachengetwa mugove womubati; Wakauya navakuru vavanhu; Wakaita zvakarurama zvaJehovha, Nezvaakatonga pamusoro paIsiraeri.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Pamusoro paDhani wakati, “Dhani ndiye mwana weshumba, Unokwakuka achibva Bhashani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Pamusoro paNafutari wakati, “Iwe Nafutari, wakaguta nyasha, Uzere nokuropafadzwa naJehovha; Tora mavirazuva nenyasi zvive zvako.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Pamusoro paAshuru wakati, “Ashuru ngaaropafadzwe apiwe vana; Ngaadikanwe nehama dzake, Ngaanyike rutsoka rwake mumafuta." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Zvipfigiso zvako zvichava zvamatare nendarira; Nesimba rako richaenzana namazuva ako. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Iwe Jeshuruni, hakuna wakafanana naMwari, Iye unotasva denga kuti akubatsire, Napamusoro pamakore noukuru hwake." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Mwari usingaperi ndihwo ugaro hwako, Pasi pako kuna maoko asingaperi; Iye wakadzinga vavengi pamberi pako,” Akati, “Paradzai." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Isiraeri unogara akachengetwa, Tsime raJakobho riri roga, Panyika yezviyo newaini; Denga rake rose rinonisa dova." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Isiraeri, iwe wakaropafadzwa; Ndiani wakatodzana newe, rudzi rwakachengetwa naJehovha? Ndiye nhoo inokubatsira, Nomunondo waunokudzwa nawo! Vavengi vako vachazviisa pasi pako, Newe uchatsika panzvimbo dzavo dzakakwirira.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Zvino Mosesi wakabva pamapani okwaMoabhu, akakwira kugomo reNebho, pamusoro pePisiga, pakatarisana neJeriko. Jehovha akamuratidza nyika yose yeGiriadhi, kusvikira Dhani;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 neNafutari yose, nenyika yaEfuremu naManase, nenyika yose yaJudha, kusvikira pagungwa rokumavirazuva;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 nenyika yezasi, neBani romupata weJeriko, guta remichindwe, kusvikira Zoari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Zvino Jehovha akati kwaari, “Ndiyo nyika yandakapikira Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho, ndichiti, ‘Ndichaipa vana vako; ndikakuonesa iyo nameso ako, asi haungapindimo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Ipapo Mosesi muranda waJehovha akafirapo panyika yaMoabhu, sezvakataurwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Akamuviga pamupata panyika yaMoabhu, pakatarisana neBheti–peori; asi hapana munhu unoziva rinda rake kusvikira nhasi." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Zvino Mosesi wakanga ana makore ane zana namakumi maviri pakufa kwake; meso ake akanga achigere kuonera madzerere, nesimba rake rakanga richigere kuderera." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Vana VaIsiraeri vakachema Mosesi pamapani okwaMoabhu mazuva ana makumi matatu; naizvozvo mazuva avakachema pakuchema Mosesi akapera. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Zvino Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, wakanga azere nomweya wokuchenjera; nokuti Mosesi wakanga aisa maoko ake pamusoro pake; vana VaIsiraeri vakamuteerera, vakaita sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Zvino Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, wakanga azere nomweya wokuchenjera; nokuti Mosesi wakanga aisa maoko ake pamusoro pake; vana VaIsiraeri vakamuteerera, vakaita sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Hakuna kuzomukazve muporofita pakati paIsiraeri wakafanana naMosesi, wakanga achizikanwa naJehovha, zviso zvakatarisana;" 
Deuteronomy34:11 pazviratidzo zvose nezvishamiso, paakatumwa naJehovha kundozviita panyika yeIjipiti, kuna Farao, nokuvaranda vake vose, nokunyika yake yose;" 
Deuteronomy34:12 napazvose zvakaitwa noruoko rwake rune simba, napakutyisa kukuru kwose, kwakaitwa naMosesi VaIsiraeri vose vachizviona." 
Joshua1:1 Zvino Mosesi, muranda waJehovha, wakati afa, Jehovha akataura naJoshua, mwanakomana waNuni, muranda waMosesi, akati," 
Joshua1:2 “Mosesi, muranda wangu wafa; zvino simuka iwe uyambuke Jodhani urwu, iwe navanhu ava vose, muende kunyika yandinovapa ivo vana VaIsiraeri." 
Joshua1:3 Nzvimbo imwe neimwe ichatsikwa netsoka dzenyu ndakakupai iyo, sezvandakataura naMosesi." 
Joshua1:4 Kubva murenje reRebhanoni iri, kusvikira parwizi rukuru, irwo rwizi Yufuretesi, nenyika yose yaVaHeti, kusvikira kugungwa guru, kurutivi rwamavirazuva, ndiyo nyika yenyu." 
Joshua1:5 Hakuna munhu uchagona kumira pamberi pako mazuva ose oupenyu hwako; ndichava newe sezvandaisiva naMosesi; handingakuregi kana kukusiya. 
Joshua1:6 Simba, utsunge mwoyo, nokuti uchagarisa vanhu ava nhaka yandakapikira madzibaba avo, kuti ndichavapa iyo, ive yavo." 
Joshua1:7 Asi usimbe nokutsunga mwoyo kwazvo, kuti uchenjere kuita murairo wose wandakaraira Mosesi muranda wangu; usatsauka kwauri, kana kurudyi kana kuruboshwe, kuti uve nomufaro pose paunoenda," 
Joshua1:8 Bhuku iyi roMurairo harifaniri kubva pamuromo wako, asi unofanira kurirangarira masikati nousiku, kuti uchenjere kuita zvose zvakanyorwamo; nokuti nokudaro uchazviwanira mufaro panzira yako nokubata nokuchenjera." 
Joshua1:9 Ko handina kukuraira here? Simba, utsunge mwoyo; usatya kana kuvhunduswa, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wako unewe kwose kwaunoenda.”" 
Joshua1:10 Ipapo Joshua akaraira vatariri vavanhu, akati," 
Joshua1:11 “Pindai napakati pemisasa, muraire vanhu, muti, ‘Zvigadzirirei mbuva, nokuti mazuva matatu achigere kupera muchafanira kuyambuka Jodhani urwu, kuti mupinde panyika iyo yamunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu, ive yenyu.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Joshua akataura navaRubheni navaGadhi, nokuhafu yorudzi rwaManase, akati," 
Joshua1:13 “Rangarirai shoko ramakarairwa naMosesi, muranda waJehovha, achiti, ‘Jehovha Mwari wenyu uchakupai zororo, nokukupai nyika iyi.’" 
Joshua1:14 Vakadzi venyu nepwere dzenyu nezvipfuwo zvenyu zvichasara panyika yamakapiwa naMosesi nechouno mhiri kwaJodhani, asi imi varume vose vane simba noumhare munofanira kuyambuka pamberi pehama dzenyu makashonga nhumbi dzokurwa, muvabatsire;" 
Joshua1:15 kusvikira Jehovha apa hama dzenyu zororo semi, nenyika yavanopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu ive yavo; ipapo mungadzokera kunyika yenyu, yamakapiwa naMosesi, muranda waJehovha, iri nechouno mhiri kwaJodhani kumabvazuva, kuti ive yenyu.”" 
Joshua1:16 Vakapindura Joshua, vakati, “Zvose zvamunotiraira, tichazviita, pose pamunotituma tichaendapo." 
Joshua1:17 Sezvataiteerera Mosesi pazvose, saizvozvo tichakuteererai nemiwo; Jehovha Mwari wenyu ngaave nemi, sezvaaiva naMosesi." 
Joshua1:18 Ani naani unomukira murairo wenyu, asingadi kuteerera mashoko enyu pazvose zvamunoraira, iye uchaurayiwa; asi simbai mutsunge mwoyo.”" 
Joshua2:1 Zvino Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, wakatuma varume vaviri pakavanda, vachibva Shitimi, kuti vanosora, vachiti, “Endai mundotarira nyika neJeriko.” Vakaenda, vakapinda muimba yechifeve, chainzi Rahabhu, vakavatapo." 
Joshua2:2 Zvino mambo weJeriko akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Tarirai, varume vevana VaIsiraeri vakapinda muno usiku huno kuzoshora nyika.”" 
Joshua2:3 Zvino mambo weJeriko akatuma shoko kuna Rahabhu, akati, “Budisa varume vakasvika kwauri, vapinda mumba mako, nokuti vauya kuzosora nyika yose.”" 
Joshua2:4 Mukadzi akatora varume avo vaviri, akavavanza, akati, “Hongu, varume vakasvika havo kwandiri, asi ndakanga ndisingazivi kuti vaibvepi." 
Joshua2:5 Zvino nenguva yokupfigwa kwesuwo, kwasviba, varume vakabudazve; kwavakazoenda ivo varume, ini handikuzivi; kurumidzai kuvatevera, nokuti mungandovabata.”" 
Joshua2:6 Asi wakanga avakwidza pamusoro pedenga, akavavanza pasi poutanda hwamasosoori, hwakanga hwakarongwa naye padenga." 
Joshua2:7 Varume vakavateverera nenzira inoenda Jodhani, kusvikira kumazambuko; zvino vakavatevera vakati vabuda, suwo rikazarirwa." 
Joshua2:8 Zvino vachigere kuvata, Rahabhu ndokukwira kwavari pamusoro pedenga," 
Joshua2:9 akati kuvarume, “Ndinoziva kuti Jehovha akakupai nyika, tinokutyai kwazvo, vanhu vose vagere munyika vavhunduka pamberi penyu." 
Joshua2:10 Nokuti takanzwa kuti Jehovha akapwisa mvura yeGungwa Dzvuku pamberi penyu, nguva yokubuda kwenyu Ijipiti, nezvamakaitira madzimambo maviri aVaAmori, vakanga vari mhiri kwaJodhani, ivo Sihoni naOgi, vamakaparadza chose." 
Joshua2:11 Zvino pakarepo takati tichinzwa izvozvo mwoyo yedu ikavhunduka, hakuna munhu uchinokutsunga pamwoyo pake nokuda kwenyu, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu, ndiye Mwari kudenga kumusoro napanyika pasi." 
Joshua2:12 Naizvozvo zvino ndipikirei henyu naJehovha, kuti zvandakakuitirai zvakanaka, nemiwo muchaitira imba yababa vangu zvakanaka; mundipeiwo chiratidzo chakasimba," 
Joshua2:13 kuti muchararamisa baba vangu namai vangu nehanzvadzi dzangu navanun'una vangu, nezvose zvavanazvo, nokurwira upenyu hwedu parufu.”" 
Joshua2:14 Ipapo varume vakati kwaari, “Isu ngatife panzvimbo yenyu, kana musingabudisi pachena basa redu iri; kana Jehovha achitipa nyika iyi, tichakuitira zvakanaka nezvokwadi.”" 
Joshua2:15 Ipapo akavaburusira pasi nebote napahwindo, nokuti imba yake yakanga iri pamusoro porusvingo rweguta, naiye wakanga agere pamusoro porusvingo." 
Joshua2:16 Akati kwavari, “Tizirai henyu kumakomo, kuti vateveri verege kusangana nemi, muvandepo mazuva matatu, kusvikira vateveri vadzoka; pashure mungaenda henyu.”" 
Joshua2:17 Zvino varume vakati kwaari, “Hatingasungwi nemhiko yako iyi yawakatipikisa." 
Joshua2:18 Tarira, nguva yatinopinda panyika ino, unofanira kusungira bote iri dzvuku rakakoswa pahwindo pawakatiburusira pasi napo; unofanirawo kuunganidza mumba mako baba vako, namai vako, nehanzvadzi dzako, navose veimba yababa vako." 
Joshua2:19 Zvino ani naani unobuda kunze kwemikova yeimba yako, ropa rake richava pamusoro pomusoro wake, asi isu hatingavi nemhosva; ani naani unewe mumba mako, ropa rake richava pamusoro pemisoro yedu, kana akaitirwa zvakaipa noruoko rwomunhu." 
Joshua2:20 Asi kana ukabudisa pachena basa redu iri, isu hatingasungwi nemhiko yako yawakatipikisa.”" 
Joshua2:21 Iye akati, “Ngazviitwe sezvamakataura;” akavaendesa, vakabva, iye ndokusungira bote dzvuku pahwindo." 
Joshua2:22 Ivo vakaenda, vakasvika kumakomo, vakagarapo mazuva matatu, kusvikira vateveri vadzoka; vateveri vakavatsvaka panzira iyo yose, asi havana kuvawana." 
Joshua2:23 Zvino varume avo vaviri vakadzoka, vakaburuka pamakomo, vakayambuka, vakasvikazve kuna Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni; vakamuudza zvose zvavakanga vaitirwa." 
Joshua2:24 Vakati kuna Joshua, “Zvirokwazvo, Jehovha wakaisa nyika yose mumaoko edu; uye vanhu vose vagere panyika iyo vavhunduka pamberi pedu.”" 
Joshua3:1 Zvino Joshua akamuka mangwanani, vakabva Shitimi, vakasvika paJodhani, iye navana VaIsiraeri vose; vakavatapo vasati vayambuka." 
Joshua3:2 Mazuva matatu akati apera, vatariri vakapinda napakati pemisasa," 
Joshua3:3 vakaraira vanhu, vachiti, “Kana muchiona areka yesungano yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, navapristi vaRevhi voitakura, munofanira kusimuka pamugere, nokuitevera." 
Joshua3:4 Asi munofanira kusiya nzvimbo pakati penyu naiyo, inosvika makubhiti anenge zviuru zviviri; regai kuswedera kwairi, kuti muzive nzira yamunofanira kuenda nayo; nokuti mugere kumbofamba nenzira iyi.”" 
Joshua3:5 Zvino Joshua akati kuvanhu, “Zvinatsei, nokuti mangwana Jehovha uchaita zvinoshamisa pakati penyu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Joshua akataura navapristi, akati, “Simudzai areka yesungano, mutungamirire vanhu pakuyambuka.” Ivo vakasimudza areka yesungano, vakatungamirira vanhu." 
Joshua3:7 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Nhasi ndichatanga kukukudza pamberi paVaIsiraeri vose, vazive kuti ndichava newe, sezvandaisiva naMosesi." 
Joshua3:8 Iwe unofanira kuraira vapristi kuti vatakure areka yesungano, uchiti, ‘Kana masvika parutivi rwemvura yaJodhani, munofanira kumira muJodhani.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Zvino Joshua akati kuvana VaIsiraeri, “Uyai pano, munzwe mashoko aJehovha Mwari wenyu.”" 
Joshua3:10 Joshua akati, “Muchaziva nechinhu ichi kuti Mwari mupenyu uri pakati penyu, uye kuti uchadzinga zvirokwazvo pamberi penyu VaKenani, naVaHeti, naVaHivhi, naVaPerezi, naVaGirigashi, naVaAmori, naVaJebhusi." 
Joshua3:11 Tarirai, areka yesungano yaishe wenyika yose inokutungamirirai pakuyambuka Jodhani." 
Joshua3:12 Naizvozvo zvino muzvitorerei varume vane gumi navaviri pamarudzi ose aVaIsiraeri, mumwe mumwe parudzi rumwe norumwe." 
Joshua3:13 Zvino kana tsoka dzavapristi vanotakura areka yaJehovha, Ishe wenyika yose dzichitsika mumvura yaJodhani, mvura yaJodhani ichagurwa, iyo mvura inobva kumusoro; ichamira, ikaita murwi mukuru.”" 
Joshua3:14 Zvino vanhu vakati vachibva pamatende avo, kuti vayambuke Jodhani, vapristi vaitakura areka vakatungamirira vanhu;" 
Joshua3:15 zvino vakanga vakatakura areka vakati vachisvika paJodhani, netsoka dzavapristi vakanga vakatakura areka dzichinyikwa pamucheto wemvura, (nokuti Jodhani runofashamira nhivi dzarwo dzose nguva yose yokukohwa,)" 
Joshua3:16 mvura yakanga ichibva kumusoro ikamira, ikaita murwi mukuru, kusvikira kure-kure paAdhama, guta riri kurutivi rweZaretani; neyakanga ichiyerera kugungwa reArabha, ndiro Gungwa roMunyu, yakagurwa chose; vanhu vakayambuka pakatarisana neJeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Vapristi vakanga vakatakura areka yesungano yaJehovha vakaramba vamire pasi pakaoma pakati paJodhani; VaIsiraeri vose vakayambuka pavhu rakaoma kusvikira rudzi rwose rwapedza kuyambuka Jodhani. 
Joshua4:1 Zvino rudzi rwose rwakati rwapedza kuyambuka Jodhani, Jehovha akataura naJoshua, akati," 
Joshua4:2 “Uzvitorere varume vane gumi navaviri kuvanhu, mumwe mumwe parudzi rumwe norumwe;" 
Joshua4:3 ugovaraira, uchiti, ‘Pano pakati paJodhani, pakaramba pamire tsoka dzavapristi muzvitorere mabwe ane gumi namaviri, muyambuke munoaisa pavato, pamuchanorara usiku huno.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Ipapo Joshua akadana varume avo vane gumi navaviri, vaakanga agadza pakati pavana VaIsiraeri, mumwe mumwe parudzi rumwe norumwe," 
Joshua4:5 Joshua akati kwavari, “Tungamirirai areka yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, muyambuke kusvikira pakati paJodhani, mumwe nomumwe wenyu anonge ibwe ariise pafudzi rake, aenzane namarudzi avana VaIsiraeri." 
Joshua4:6 Kuti chinhu ichi chive chiratidzo pakati penyu, kuti kana vana venyu vachizobvunza pashure, vachiti, ‘Mabwe aya anoti kudiniko?’" 
Joshua4:7 Imi muti kwavari, ‘Nokuti mvura yaJodhani yakagurwa pamberi peareka yesungano yaJehovha; nguva yayakayambuka Jodhani, mvura yaJodhani yakagurwa; mabwe awa achava chirangaridzo pakati pavana VaIsiraeri nokusingaperi.’ ”" 
Joshua4:8 Vana VaIsiraeri vakaita sezvavakarairwa naJoshua, vakanonga mabwe ane gumi namaviri pakati paJodhani, sezvakataura Jehovha kuna Joshua, akaenzana namarudzi avana VaIsiraeri, vakayambuka nawo, vakaatakura, kusvikira pavakandovata, vakaaisapo." 
Joshua4:9 Zvino Joshua akamisa mabwe ane gumi namaviri mukati maJodhani, pakanga pamire tsoka dzavapristi vaitakura areka yesungano; aripo kusvikira nhasi." 
Joshua4:10 Nokuti vapristi vakanga vakatakura areka vakamira mukati maJodhani kusvikira zvose zvapera zvakanga zvarairwa Joshua naJehovha, kuti azviudze vanhu, zvose zvakanga zvarairwa Joshua naMosesi; vanhu vakakurumidza kuyambuka." 
Joshua4:11 Zvino vanhu vose vakati vapedza kuyambuka, areka yaJehovha ikayambukawo, navapristi pamberi pavanhu." 
Joshua4:12 Navana vaRubheni, navana vaGadhi, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase, vakayambuka pamberi pavanhu, vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa, sezvavakaudzwa naMosesi." 
Joshua4:13 Vanenge vane zviuru zvina makumi mana, vakanga vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa, ndivo vakayambuka pamberi paJehovha, vakaenda kumapani eJeriko kundorwa." 
Joshua4:14 Nomusi uyo Jehovha akakudza Joshua pamberi paVaIsiraeri vose; vakamutya sezvavaitya Mosesi mazuva ose oupenyu hwake. 
Joshua4:15 Zvino Jehovha akataura naJoshua, akati," 
Joshua4:16 “Raira vapristi vanotakura areka yechipupuriro, kuti vakwire vabude mukati maJodhani.”" 
Joshua4:17 Naizvozvo Joshua akaraira vapristi, akati, “Kwirai, mubude mukati maJodhani.”" 
Joshua4:18 Zvino vapristi vakanga vakatakura areka yesungano yaJehovha vakati vakwira vabuda mukati maJodhani, netsoka dzavapristi dzasimudzwa dzasvika pasi pakaoma, mvura yaJodhani ikadzokera panzvimbo yayo, ikadarika nhivi dzarwo dzose sakare." 
Joshua4:19 Vanhu vakakwira vakabuda paJodhani pazuva regumi romwedzi wokutanga, vakadzika matende avo muGirigari, pamuganhu wamabvazuva eJeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Joshua akamisa aya mabwe ane gumi namaviri avakanonga muJodhani paGirigari. 
Joshua4:21 Akataura navana VaIsiraeri, akati, “Kana vana venyu vachizobvunza madzibaba avo panguva inouya, vachiti, ‘Mabwe awa anoti kudiniko?’" 
Joshua4:22 Imi munofanira kuzivisa vana venyu, muchiti, ‘Isiraeri vakayambuka Jodhani urwu vachitsika pasi pakaoma.’" 
Joshua4:23 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari akapwisa mvura yaJodhani pamberi penyu, kusvikira mayambuka, sezvaakaita iye Jehovha Mwari wenyu paGungwa Dzvuku, raakapwisa pamberi pedu, kusvikira tayambuka;" 
Joshua4:24 kuti ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzizive kuti ruoko rwaJehovha ndirwo rune simba; kuti vatye Jehovha Mwari wenyu nokusingaperi. 
Joshua5:1 “Zvino madzimambo ose aVaAmori, akanga agere mhiri kwaJodhani kumavirazuva, namadzimambo ose aVaKenani, akanga agere pagungwa, akati achinzwa kuti Jehovha akapwisa mvura yaJodhani pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri, kusvikira tayambuka, mwoyo yavo ikavhunduka, vakasazova nomweya mukati mavo, nokuda kwavana VaIsiraeri.”" 
Joshua5:2 Nenguva iyo Jehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Uzviitire mapanga amabwe anopinza, udzingisezve vana VaIsiraeri.”" 
Joshua5:3 Joshua akazviitira mapanga amabwe anopinza, akadzingisa vana VaIsiraeri pachikomo chezvikanda zvapamberi." 
Joshua5:4 Joshua akavadzingisa nemhaka iyi, nokuti vanhurume vose vakanga vabuda Ijipiti, ivo varume vehondo, vakanga vafira panzira murenje pakubuda kwavo Ijipiti." 
Joshua5:5 Nokuti vanhu vose vakabuda Ijipiti vakanga vadzingiswa; asi vanhu vose vakanga vaponerwa murenje panzira pakubuda kwavo Ijipiti, vakanga vasina kudzingiswa." 
Joshua5:6 Nokuti vana VaIsiraeri vakafamba makore ana makumi mana murenje, kusvikira rudzi rwose, ivo varume vehondo vakanga vabuda Ijipiti, vaparadzwa, nokuti havana kuteerera izwi raJehovha; Jehovha akapika kwavari kuti haangavaonesi nyika, yaakanga apikira madzibaba avo, kuti uchatipa iyo, iri nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi." 
Joshua5:7 Zvino vana vavo vaakanga amutsa panzvimbo yavo, ndivo vakadzingiswa naJoshua; nokuti vakanga vasina kudzingiswa, zvavakanga vasina kudzingiswa panzira." 
Joshua5:8 Zvino vakati vapedza kudzingisa rudzi rwose, vakagara pavakanga vari pamisasa kusvikira vapora." 
Joshua5:9 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Nhasi ndabvisa kwamuri kuzvidzwa kwamakazvidzwa nako naVaIjipiti.” Naizvozvo nzvimbo iyo yakanzi Girigari, kusvikira nhasi." 
Joshua5:10 Vana VaIsiraeri vakavaka misasa yavo paGirigari, vakadya Pasika pazuva regumi namana romwedzi madekwana, pamapani eJeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Nomusi uyo, uri musi wakatevera Pasika, vakadya zvibereko zvenyika iyo, zvingwa zvisina kuviriswa pamwechete nehura dzakakangwa nomusi iwoyo." 
Joshua5:12 Mana ikaguma nomusi wakatevera uyo wakadya nawo zvibereko zvenyika iyo; vana VaIsiraeri havana kuzova nemanazve, asi vakadya zvibereko zvenyika yeKenani gore irero." 
Joshua5:13 Zvino Joshua wakati ari Jeriko akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, akaona murume amire pakatarisana naye, akabata munondo wake wakavhomorwa muruoko rwake; Joshua akenda kwaari, akati kwaari, “Uri mumwe wedu here, kana wavavengi vedu?”" 
Joshua5:14 Iye akati, “Kwete, asi ndauya ini mukuru wehondo yaJehovha.” Ipapo Joshua akawira pasi nechiso chake, akanamata kwaari, akati kwaari, “Ishe wangu unoreveiko kumuranda wake?”" 
Joshua5:15 Mukuru wehondo yaJehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Bvisa shangu yako parutsoka rwako, nokuti paumire patsvene;” Joshua akaita saizvozvo." 
Joshua6:1 (Zvino guta reJeriko rakanga rapfigwa kwazvo nokuda kwavana VaIsiraeri; kwakanga kusina munhu waibuda kana kupinda.) 
Joshua6:2 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Tarira, ndakapa mumaoko ako Jeriko, namambo waro, navarume varo vane simba noumhare." 
Joshua6:3 Munofanira kukomba guta, imi varume vose vehondo, mupoteredze guta kamwechete. Unofanira kuita saizvozvo mazuva matanhatu." 
Joshua6:4 Vapristi vanomwe vanofanira kufamba pamberi peareka vakabata hwamanda nomwe dzenyanga dzamakondohwe; nomusi wechinomwe munofanira kupoteredza guta kanomwe, vapristi vachiridza hwamanda." 
Joshua6:5 Zvino kana voridzisa norunyanga rwegondohwe, kana imi muchinzwa kurira kwehwamanda, ipapo vanhu vose vanofanira kudanidzira nokudanidzira kukuru; ipapo rusvingo rweguta ruchakoromoka chose, navanhu vanofanira kupinda, mumwe nomumwe ipapo pakaruramana naye.”" 
Joshua6:6 Zvino Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, akadana vapristi, akati kwavari, “Simudzai areka yesungano, vapristi vanomwe vafambe vakabata hwamanda nomwe dzenyanga dzamakondohwe pamberi peareka yaJehovha.”" 
Joshua6:7 Akati kuvanhu, “Pfuurai, mupoteredze guta, varume vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa vatungamirire areka yaJehovha.”" 
Joshua6:8 Zvino Joshua wakati ataura navanhu, vapristi vanomwe vakatungamira vakabata hwamanda nomwe dzenyanga dzamakondohwe, vakaridza hwamanda, areka yesungano yaJehovha ikavatevera." 
Joshua6:9 Varume vakanga vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa vakatungamirira vapristi vakanga vachiridza hwamanda, navarindi veshure vakatevera areka, vapristi vakafamba vachingoridza hwamanda." 
Joshua6:10 Zvino Joshua akaraira vanhu, akati, “Regai kudanidzira, namazwi enyu ngaarege kunzwika, kana shoko rimwe ngarirege kubuda pamiromo yenyu, kusvikira pamusi wandinokurairai kuti mudanidzire; ipapo munofanira kudanidzira.”" 
Joshua6:11 Naizvozvo wakaraira kuti areka yaJehovha ipoteredze guta, iripoteredze kamwechete; vanhu vakapindazve mumisasa, vakavatamo." 
Joshua6:12 Joshua akamuka mangwanani, vapristi vakasimudza areka yaJehovha." 
Joshua6:13 Navapristi vanomwe vakanga vakabata hwamanda nomwe dzenyanga dzamakondohwe pamberi peareka yaJehovha, vakaramba vachifamba vachingoridza hwamanda; navarume vakanga vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa vakavatungamirira; navarindi veshure vakatevera areka yaJehovha, vapristi vakafamba vachingoridza hwamanda." 
Joshua6:14 Nomusi wechipiri vakapoteredza guta kamwechete, vakadzokera kumisasa; vakaita saizvozvo mazuva matanhatu." 
Joshua6:15 Nomusi wechinomwe vakafumira mangwanani, vakapoteredza guta nomutoo iwoyo kanomwe; nomusi iwoyo bedzi vakapoteredza guta kanomwe." 
Joshua6:16 Zvino panguva yechinomwe, vapristi vakati vachiridza hwamanda, Joshua akati kuvanhu, “Danidzirai, nokuti Jehovha wakupai guta." 
Joshua6:17 Asi guta rinofanira kuyeriswa kuna Jehovha, iro nezvose zviri mukati maro; asi Rahabhu bedzi, chifeve chiya, ngaaregwe ari mupenyu, iye navose vari mumba make, nokuti wakavanza nhume dzatakatuma." 
Joshua6:18 Asi imi, chenjerai pazvinhu zvinoyera, kuti murege kutora chinhu chinoyera, mambochiyeresa; naizvozvo mungatukisa misasa yaIsiraeri mukaipinza mudambudziko." 
Joshua6:19 Asi sirivha yose, nendarama, nemidziyo yendarira, neyamatare zvitsvene kuna Jehovha; zvinofanira kuiswa muchivigiro chepfuma chaJehovha.”" 
Joshua6:20 Naizvozvo vanhu vakadanidzira, navapristi vakaridza hwamanda; zvino vanhu vakati vachinzwa kurira kwehwamanda, vanhu vakadanidzira nokudanidzira kukuru, rusvingo ndokukoromoka chose, vanhu vakakwira vachipinda muguta, mumwe nomumwe pakaruramana naye, vakakunda guta." 
Joshua6:21 Vakaparadza chose nomunondo unopinza zvose zvakanga zviri muguta, varume navakadzi, vaduku navakuru, nenzombe, namakwai, nembongoro." 
Joshua6:22 Joshua akati kuvarume vaviri vakanga vandosora nyika, “Pindai muimba yechifeve, mubudise mukadzi nezvose zvaanazvo, sezvamakapika kwaari.”" 
Joshua6:23 Zvino majaya iwayo, vashori, vakapinda, vakabudisa Rahabhu, nababa vake, namai vake, nehanzvadzi dzake, nezvose zvaakanga anazvo, vakabudisawo hama dzake dzose, vakavaisa kunze kwemisasa yaIsiraeri." 
Joshua6:24 Ipapo vakapisa guta nomoto, nezvose zvakanga zviri mukati maro; asi sirivha, nendarama, nemidziyo yendarira, neyamatare, vakazviisa muchivigiro chepfuma cheimba yaJehovha." 
Joshua6:25 Asi Joshua wakarega Rahabhu, chifeve chiya, ari mupenyu, iye naveimba yababa vake, nezvose zvaakanga anazvo; iye akagara pakati paIsiraeri kusvikira nhasi; nokuti wakanga avanza nhume dzakatumwa naJoshua kundoshora Jeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Nenguva iyo Joshua akavapikisa, achiti, “Munhu unozomuka akavaka guta iri reJeriko ngaatukwe; ucharashikirwa nedangwe rake kana achiteya nheyo dzaro, uye ucharashikirwa norugotwe rwake kana achimutsa masuwo aro.”" 
Joshua6:27 Naizvozvo Jehovha akanga ana Joshua; mukurumbira wake ukanzwika panyika yose. 
Joshua7:1 Asi vana VaIsiraeri vakadarika pachinhu chakayereswa; nokuti Akani, mwanakomana waKarimi, mwanakomana waZabhedhi, mwanakomana waZera, worudzi rwaJudha, wakatora chinhu chezvakayereswa; kutsamwa kwaJehovha kukamukira vana VaIsiraeri." 
Joshua7:2 Joshua akatuma varume vabve Jeriko vaende Ai, guta riri parutivi rweBheti–avheni, kumabvazuva eBhetieri, akataura navo, akati, “Kwirai, mundoshora nyika.” Varume vakakwira, vakandoshora Ai," 
Joshua7:3 Vakadzokera kuna Joshua, vakati kwaari, “Vanhu vose ngavarege kukwira; varume vanenge zviuru zviviri kana zvitatu ngavaende kundorwa neAi, asi vanhu vose ngavarege havo kutambudzwa kuendako, nokuti vashoma havo.”" 
Joshua7:4 Naizvozvo varume vanenge zviuru zviviri kana zvitatu vakaendako, ivo vakatiza pamberi pavarume veAi." 
Joshua7:5 Varume veAi vakauraya varume vanenge makumi matatu navatanhatu vavo, vakavateverera kubva pamberi pesuwo kusvikira Shebharimi, vachivauraya pakuburuka kwavo; ipapo mwoyo yavanhu yakanyauka, ikaita semvura." 
Joshua7:6 Zvino Joshua akabvarura nguo dzake, akawira pasi nechiso chake pamberi peareka yaJehovha kusvikira madekwana, iye navakuru vaVaIsiraeri, vakaisa guruva pamisoro yavo." 
Joshua7:7 Joshua akati, “Haiwa! Ishe Mwari, makayambusireiko vanhu ava paJodhani, kuti mutiise mumaoko aVaAmori, vatiparadze? Dai takatenda hedu kugara mhiri kwaJodhani!" 
Joshua7:8 Haiwa, Ishe, ndichati kudiniko, VaIsiraeri zvavakafuratira vavengi vavo!" 
Joshua7:9 Nokuti VaKenani navose vagere munyika ino vachazvinzwa, vachatikomba, nokudzima zita redu panyika; zvino zita renyu guru muchariiteiko?”" 
Joshua7:10 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Simuka, wawireiko kudai pachiso chako?" 
Joshua7:11 VaIsiraeri vatadza, vadarika sungano yangu yandakavaraira; vatora chinhu chakayeriswa, babavo, nokunyengera, nokuchiviga pakati penhumbi dzavo." 
Joshua7:12 Naizvozvo vana VaIsiraeri havangagoni kukunda vavengi vavo, vanofuratira vavengi vavo, nokuti vava vanhu vakatukwa; handichazovi nemi, kana musingaparadzi chinhu chakayereswa pakati penyu." 
Joshua7:13 Simuka, utsaure vanhu, uti, ‘Zvitsaurirei mangwana, nokuti zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri: Kune chinhu chakayeriswa pakati penyu, Isiraeri; hamungakundi vavengi venyu, kusvikira mabvisa chinhu chakayeriswa pakati penyu.’" 
Joshua7:14 Naizvozvo mangwana munofanira kuswedera namarudzi enyu; zvino rudzi runobatwa naJehovha, runofanira kuswedera nedzimba dzarwo, neimba inobatwa naJehovha, inofanira kuswedera nemhuri dzayo, nemhuri inobatwa naJehovha, inofanira kuswedera murume mumwe nomumwe." 
Joshua7:15 Zvino uyo unobatwa ane chinhu chakayereswa, anofanira kupiswa nomoto, iye nezvose zvaanazvo; nokuti wakadarika sungano yaJehovha, uye nokuti wakaita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo pakati paIsiraeri.”" 
Joshua7:16 Naizvozvo Joshua wakamuka mangwanani, akaswededza VaIsiraeri namarudzi avo; rudzi rwaJudha ndokubatwa;" 
Joshua7:17 zvino akaswededza dzimba dzaJudha, imba yaZera ikabatwa; zvino akaswededza murume mumwe nomumwe weimba yavaZera, Zabhedhi akabatwa;" 
Joshua7:18 zvino akaswededza mhuri yake, murume mumwe nomumwe, Akani mwanakomana waKarimi, mwanakomana waZabhedhi, mwanakomana waZera, worudzi rwaJudha akabatwa." 
Joshua7:19 Zvino Joshua akati kuna Akani, “Mwana wangu, chikudza Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, uzvireurure kwaari; ndiudze zvino zvawakaita, usandivanzira izvo.”" 
Joshua7:20 Ipapo Akani akapindura Joshua, akati, “Zvirokwazvo, ndakatadzira Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, ndakaita zvokuti nezvokuti;" 
Joshua7:21 ndakaona pakati pezvakapambwa nguo yakanaka, inobva Bhabhironi, nesirivha yakasvika mashekeri ana mazana maviri, nechikamu chendarama chakasvika mashekeri ana makumi mashanu pakuyerwa kwacho; ipapo ndakazvichochora, ndikazvitora; tarirai, zvakavigwa pasi mutende rangu, sirivha iri pasi pazvo.”" 
Joshua7:22 Naizvozvo Joshua akatuma nhume, ivo vakamhanyira kutende rake, vakandowana zvakavigwa mutende rake, sirivha iri pasi pazvo." 
Joshua7:23 Vakazvibvisa mutende, vakazviisa kuna Joshua, nokuvana VaIsiraeri vose, vakazviisa pasi pamberi paJehovha." 
Joshua7:24 Ipapo Joshua naVaIsiraeri vose vakanga vanaye vakatora Akani, mwanakomana waZera, nesirivha, nenguo, nembongoro dzake, namakwai ake, netende rake, nezvose zvaakanga anazvo, vakakwira navo kumupata weAkori." 
Joshua7:25 Zvino Joshua akati, “Wakatipinzireiko padambudziko? Jehovha uchakupinza padambudziko nhasi.” Ipapo VaIsiraeri vose vakamutaka namabwe, vakavapisa nomoto, nokuvataka namabwe." 
Joshua7:26 Vakaunganidza pamusoro pake mabwe akaita murwi mukuru uripo kusvikira nhasi; Jehovha akazvidzora pakutsamwa kwake kukuru. Naizvozvo zita renzvimbo iyo rakanzi Mupata weAkori kusvikira nhasi. 
Joshua8:1 Zvino Jehovha wakati kuna Joshua, “Usatya, kana kuvhunduswa; tora vanhu vose vehondo, musimuke, mukwire Ai; tarira ndaisa muruoko rwako mambo weAi navanhu vake, neguta rake, nenyika yake." 
Joshua8:2 Unofanira kuitira Ai sezvawakaitira Jeriko namambo waro; asi munofanira kutapa zvingatapwa zvaro, nemombe dzaro, zvive zvenyu; uzvigadzirire vangavandira guta necheseri kwaro.”" 
Joshua8:3 Naizvozvo Joshua akasimuka, navarume vose vehondo, kuti vakwire Ai; Joshua akatsaura varume vane zviuru zvina makumi matatu, varume vane simba noumhare, akavatuma usiku." 
Joshua8:4 Akavaraira, akati, “Tarirai, munofanira kundovandira guta necheseri kwaro; musaenda kure neguta, asi mugare makazvigadzira mose;" 
Joshua8:5 zvino ini navanhu vose vandinavo, tichaswedera kuguta; zvino kana vachibuda kuzorwa nesu, sapakutanga, isu tichatiza pamberi pavo;" 
Joshua8:6 ipapo vachabuda, vachititevera, kusvikira tavanyengera kure neguta; nokuti vachati, ‘Vanotiza pamberi pedu sapakutanga;’ nesu tichatiza pamberi pavo;" 
Joshua8:7 ipapo imi munofanira kusimuka pamakanga makavandira, mundokunda guta, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu uchariisa mumaoko enyu." 
Joshua8:8 Zvino kana makunda guta, munofanira kuripisa nomoto; munofanira kuita sezvakarehwa naJehovha; tarirai, ndakurairai.”" 
Joshua8:9 Zvino Joshua akavatuma, vakaenda kundovanda, vakagara pakati peBhetieri neAi, kurutivi rwamavirazuva rweAi; asi Joshua wakavata pakati pavanhu usiku uhwo." 
Joshua8:10 Zvino Joshua akamuka mangwanani, akaunganidza vanhu, akakwira iye navakuru VaIsiraeri, vakatungamirira vanhu kuenda Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Navarume vose vehondo vaakanga anavo, vakakwira, vakaswedera pamberi peguta, vakadzika matende avo kurutivi rwokumusoro rweAi. Zvino kwakanga kuno mupata pakati pake neAi." 
Joshua8:12 Akatsaura varume vanenge zviuru zvishanu, akavaraira kuvanda pakati peBhetieri neAi, kurutivi rwamavirazuva rweguta." 
Joshua8:13 Naizvozvo vakaraira vanhu, iyo hondo yose yaiva kurutivi rwokumusoro rweguta, navaivanda kurutivi rwamavirazuva rweguta; asi Joshua wakaenda usiku uhwo pakati pomupata." 
Joshua8:14 Zvino mambo weAi wakati aona izvozvo, vakakurumidza kumuka mangwanani, varume veguta vakabuda kundorwa naIsiraeri, iye navanhu vake vose, panzvimbo yakanga yatarwa, paMupata; asi haana kuziva kuti kwakanga kuna vavandiri necheseri kweguta." 
Joshua8:15 Zvino Joshua naVaIsiraeri vose vakaita savakundwa navo, vakatiza nenzira yerenje." 
Joshua8:16 Ipapo vanhu vose vakanga vari muguta vakakokwa kundovatevera; vakatevera Joshua, vakanyengerwa kure neguta." 
Joshua8:17 Kwakanga kusina munhu wakasara paAi neBhetieri, asina kubuda kundotevera Isiraeri; vakasiya guta rakashama, vakatevera Isiraeri." 
Joshua8:18 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Tambanudzira pfumo riri muruoko rwako kurutivi rweAi, nokuti ndichariisa muruoko rwako.” Joshua akatambanudzira pfumo rakanga riri muruoko rwake kurutivi rweguta;" 
Joshua8:19 ipapo vavandiri vakakurumidza kusimuka pavakanga vagere, vakamhanya pakarepo pakutambanudza kwake ruoko rwake, vakapinda muguta, vakarikunda; vakakurumidza kupisa guta." 
Joshua8:20 Zvino varume veAi vakati vachicheuka, onei utsi hweguta huchikwira kudenga, vakashaiwa kwavangatizira kupi nokupi; navanhu vakanga vatizira kurenje vakadzoka kuzorwa navaivatevera." 
Joshua8:21 Zvino Joshua naVaIsiraeri vose vakati vaona kuti vavandiri vakunda guta, uye kuti utsi hweguta hwokwira kudenga, vakadzokazve kuzouraya varume veAi." 
Joshua8:22 Navamwe vakabuda muguta kuzorwa navo; naizvozvo vakanga vari pakati paVaIsiraeri, vamwe nechouno vamwe nechokoko; vakavauraya, kusvikira vasina kurega mumwe wavo ari mupenyu, kana wakatiza." 
Joshua8:23 Vakabata mambo weAi, achiri mupenyu, vakamuisa kuna Joshua." 
Joshua8:24 Zvino VaIsiraeri vakati vapedza kuuraya nomunondo unopinza vanhu vose veAi kusango, kurenje kwavakanga vavateverera, kusvikira vapera, VaIsiraeri vakadzokera Ai, vakariparadza nomunondo unopinza." 
Joshua8:25 Vose vakaurayiwa nomusi iwoyo, varume navakadzi, vakanga vane zviuru zvine gumi nezviviri, ivo varume vose veAi," 
Joshua8:26 nokuti Joshua haana kudzosa ruoko rwake, rwaakanga akatambanudza pfumo, kusvikira aparadza chose vanhu veAi." 
Joshua8:27 Asi mombe nezvingatapwa zveguta iro VaIsiraeri vakazvitapa kuti zvive zvavo, zvakarehwa neshoko raJehovha, raakaraira Joshua." 
Joshua8:28 Naizvozvo Joshua akapisa Ai, akariita murwi ungavapo nokusingaperi, nedongo kusvikira nhasi." 
Joshua8:29 Akasungirira mambo weAi pamuti kusvikira madekwana; asi pakuvira kwezuva Joshua akavaraira, vakaturura chitunha chake pamuti, vakachikanda panopindwa napo pasuwo reguta, vakatutira pamusoro pacho murwi mukuru wamabwe; aripo kusvikira nhasi." 
Joshua8:30 Zvino Joshua wakavakira Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri atari pagomo reEbharu," 
Joshua8:31 sezvakanga zvarairwa vana VaIsiraeri naMosesi, muranda waJehovha, sezvakanyorwa muBhuku yoMurairo waMosesi; yakanga iri atari yamabwe asina kuvezwa; hakuna munhu wakanga asimudzira demo pamusoro pawo; vakabayirapo Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa, nokubayirawo zvipiriso zvokuyananisa." 
Joshua8:32 Akanyorazve ipapo pamabwe murairo waMosesi, waakanyora pamberi paVaIsiraeri." 
Joshua8:33 VaIsiraeri vose navakuru vavo navatariri vavo, navatongi vavo vakamira paareka nechouno necheseri, pamberi pavapristi vaRevhi, vaisitakura areka yesungano yaJehovha, pamwechete navatorwa navakanga vaberekerwa munyika; hafu yavo pamberi pegomo reGerizimu, nehafu yavo pamberi pegomo reEbharu; sezvakanga zvarairwa naMosesi, muranda waJehovha, kuti vatange kuropafadza vana VaIsiraeri." 
Joshua8:34 Pashure akarava mashoko ose omurairo, okuropafadza nookutuka, sezvazvakanyorwa zvose muBhuku yoMurairo." 
Joshua8:35 Kwakanga kusine shoko rimwe, pazvose zvakanga zvarairwa naMosesi, risina kurahwa naJoshua pamberi peungano yose yaVaIsiraeri, navakadzi navana, navatorwa vakanga vagere pakati pavo." 
Joshua9:1 Zvino madzimambo ose akanga agere mhiri kwaJodhani, panyika yamakomo nenyika yamapani, napamhenderekedzo dzose dzegungwa guru pamberi peRebhanoni, VaHeti, naVaAmori, naVaKenani, navaPerezi, naVaHivhi, naVaJebhusi, vakati vachinzwa izvozvo," 
Joshua9:2 vakaungana nomwoyo mumwe kundorwa naJoshua naVaIsiraeri. 
Joshua9:3 Asi vanhu veGibheoni vakati vachinzwa zvakanga zvaitirwa Jeriko neAi naJoshua," 
Joshua9:4 vakatsvaka mano, vakaenda senhume, vakaenda nehomo dzakasakara pamusoro pembongoro dzavo, nehombodo dzewaini dzakasakara, dzakanga dzakaparuka, nokusonanidzwazve;" 
Joshua9:5 neshangu dzakasakara, dzaiva nezviremo patsoka dzavo, nenguo dzakasakara; zvingwa zvavo zvose zvembuva yavo zvakanga zvakaoma nokuvhuvha." 
Joshua9:6 Vakaenda kuna Joshua kumisasa paGirigari, vakati kwaari nokuvarume VaIsiraeri, “Tinobva kunyika iri kure; naizvozvo itai sungano nesu zvino.”" 
Joshua9:7 Varume VaIsiraeri vakati kuVaHivhi, “Zvimwe mugere pakati pedu; tingaita sungano nemi seiko?”" 
Joshua9:8 Ivo vakati, “Tiri varanda venyu.” Joshua akati kwavari, “Ndimi aniko? Munobvepi?”" 
Joshua9:9 Vakati, “Varanda venyu vabva kunyika iri kure–kure, nokuda kwezita raJehovha Mwari wenyu, nokuti takanzwa mukurumbira wake nezvose zvaakaita Ijipiti." 
Joshua9:10 Uye zvose zvaakaitira madzimambo maviri aVaAmori, akanga ari mhiri kwaJodhani, naSihoni mambo weHeshibhoni, naOgi mambo weBhashani, wakanga ari paAshitaroti." 
Joshua9:11 Vakuru vedu navanhu vose venyika yedu vakataura nesu, vakati, ‘Torai mbuva yenzira mumaoko enyu, mundosangana navo,’ muti kwavari, ‘Tiri varanda venyu; zvino itai sungano nesu." 
Joshua9:12 Zvingwa izvo zvembuva yedu takazvitora zvichakapisa mudzimba dzedu musi watakabuda, tichiuya kwamuri; asi zvino tarirai, zvaoma, zvavhuvha." 
Joshua9:13 Nehombodo idzi dzewaini, dzatakazadza, dzakanga dziri itsva; tarirai, dzaparuka; nenguo dzedu idzi, neshangu dzedu zvasakara nemhaka yorwendo rurefu–refu.’ ”" 
Joshua9:14 Ipapo varume vakatora zvimwe zvembuva yavo, vasingabvunzi muromo waJehovha." 
Joshua9:15 Joshua akayanana navo, akaita sungano navo, kuti vachavarega vari vapenyu; machinda eungano akapika kwavari." 
Joshua9:16 Zvino mazuva matatu akati apera, vaita sungano navo, vakanzwa kuti vagere pedyo navo napakati pavo." 
Joshua9:17 VaIsiraeri vakafamba, vakasvika pamaguta avo nezuva retatu. Maguta avo aiva Gibheoni, neKefira, neBheroti, naKiriati–jearimi." 
Joshua9:18 Vana VaIsiraeri havana kuvaparadza, nokuti machinda eungano akanga apika kwavari naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri. Ungano yose ikapopotera machinda." 
Joshua9:19 Asi machinda ose akati kuungano yose, “Takapika kwavari naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, naizvozvo zvino hatigoni kuvaitira chinhu." 
Joshua9:20 Tichavaitira chinhu ichi, tichavarega vari vapenyu, kuti tirege kuwirwa nokutsamwa kwaMwari nokuda kwokupika, kwatakapika kwavari.”" 
Joshua9:21 Zvino machinda akati kwavari, “Ngavararame havo. Vakava vatemi vehuni navateki vemvura veungano yose, sezvavakaudzwa namachinda.”" 
Joshua9:22 Zvino Joshua akavadana, akataura navo, akati, “Matinyengedzerereiko, muchiti, ‘Takabva kure–kure nemi, zvamugere pakati pedu?’" 
Joshua9:23 Naizvozvo zvino muri vanhu vakatukwa, muchangosiva varanda navatemi vehuni navateki vemvura veimba yaMwari wangu.”" 
Joshua9:24 Vakapindura Joshua, vakati, “Nokuti varanda venyu vakanga vaudzwa zvirokwazvo kuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakanga araira muranda wake Mosesi, kuti akupei nyika yose, nokuparadza vose vagere panyika ino pamberi penyu; naizvozvo takatya kwazvo nokuda kwenyu kuti tichaurayiwa, tikaita chinhu ichi." 
Joshua9:25 Zvino tarirai, tiri pamaoko enyu, itai nesu sezvamunoti ndizvo zvakanaka nezvakarurama.”" 
Joshua9:26 Akavaitira saizvozvo, akavarwira pamaoko avana VaIsiraeri, ivo vakasavauraya." 
Joshua9:27 Musi iwoyo Joshua akavaita vatemi vehuni navateki vemvura yeungano neyeatari yaJehovha, kusvikira nhasi panzvimbo yaizotsaurwa naye." 
Joshua10:1 Zvino Adhoni–zedheki, mambo weJerusaremu, wakati achinzwa kuti Joshua wakakunda Ai, akariparadza chose, uye kuti wakaitira Ai namambo waro sezvaakaitira Jeriko namambo waro, uye kuti vanhu veGibheoni vakanga vayanana naVaIsiraeri, vakagara pakati pavo;" 
Joshua10:2 vakatya kwazvo, nokuti Gibheoni rakanga riri guta guru, rakanga rakaita somumwe wemizinda yamambo; uye nokuti rakanga riri guru kupfuura Ai, navarume varo vose vakanga vane simba." 
Joshua10:3 Naizvozvo Adhoni–zedheki, mambo weJerusaremu, akatuma nhume kuna Hohami, mambo weHebhuroni, nokuna Pirami, mambo weJarimuti, nokuna Jafia, mambo weRakishi, nokuna Dhebhiri, mambo weEgironi, akati," 
Joshua10:4 “Kwirai kwandiri, mundibatsire, tirwe navaGibheoni, nokuti vakayanana naJoshua navana VaIsiraeri.”" 
Joshua10:5 Naizvozvo madzimambo mashanu aVaAmori, vaiti mambo weJerusaremu, namambo weHebhuroni, namambo weJarimuti, namambo weRakishi, namambo weEgironi vakaungana, vakaenda ivo nehondo dzavo dzose, vakavaka misasa yavo pamberi peGibheoni, vakarwa naro." 
Joshua10:6 Ipapo varume veGibheoni vakatuma nhume kuna Joshua kumisasa yakanga iri paGirigari, vakati, “Musaregerera henyu varanda venyu; kurumidzai mukwire kwatiri, mutirwire nokutibatsira, nokuti madzimambo ose aVaAmori vagere munyika yamakomo vakatiunganira kuzorwa nesu.”" 
Joshua10:7 Ipapo Joshua akakwira achibva Girigari, iye navanhu vose vehondo vaakanga anavo, navarume vose vaiva nesimba noumhare." 
Joshua10:8 Jehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Usavatya, nokuti ndavaisa mumaoko ako; hakuna munhu uchagona kumira pamberi pako.”" 
Joshua10:9 Naizvozvo Joshua akavarwira pakarepo; akafamba usiku hwose achibva Girigari. 
Joshua10:10 Zvino Jehovha akavavhundusa pamberi paIsiraeri, akavauraya nokuuraya kukuru paGibheoni, akavadzingirira nenzira yaikwira Bheti–horoni, akavaparadza kusvikira Azeka, nokusvikira Makedha." 
Joshua10:11 Zvino vakati vachitiza pamberi paVaIsiraeri, vari pamatenusirwa anoburukira Bheti–horoni, Jehovha akakanda pamusoro pavo mabwe makuru akanga achibva kudenga, kusvikira Azeka, vakafa; ivo, vakafa nechimvuramabwe, vakanga vari vazhinji kuna vakaurayiwa neminondo navana VaIsiraeri." 
Joshua10:12 Zvino Joshua akataura naJehovha nomusi Jehovha waakaisa VaAmori mumaoko avana VaIsiraeri, akati pamberi paVaIsiraeri, “Iwe zuva mira pamusoro peGibheoni, Newe mwedzi pamupata weAijaroni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Zuva rikamira, nomwedzi ukarambirapo, Kusvikira rudzi rwatsiva vavengi varwo. Izvi hazvina kunyorwa here muBhuku yaJashari? Zuva rikaramba rimire pakati pedenga, rikasakurumidza kuvira nguva yakaita sezuva rose." 
Joshua10:14 Hakuna kumbova nezuva rakadaro kubva pakutanga kana shure kwaro, kuti Jehovha akateerera izwi romunhu; nokuti Jehovha akarwira VaIsiraeri." 
Joshua10:15 Joshua akadzokera naVaIsiraeri vose kumisasa paGirigari. 
Joshua10:16 Madzimambo awo mashanu akatiza, vakandovanda mubako paMakedha." 
Joshua10:17 Joshua akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Madzimambo iwayo mashanu akawanikwa, akavanda mubako paMakedha.”" 
Joshua10:18 Zvino Joshua akati, “Kungurutsai mabwe makuru pamuromo webako, nokuisa varume ipapo kuvarinda." 
Joshua10:19 Asi imi musamira henyu; teverai vavengi venyu, mundovauraya veshure vavo; musavatendera kupinda mumaguta avo, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakavaisa mumaoko enyu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Zvino Joshua navana VaIsiraeri vakati vapedza kuvauraya nokuuraya kukuru, kusvikira vaparadzwa, navakanga vasara kwavari vapinda mumaguta akavakirwa masvingo;" 
Joshua10:21 vanhu vose vakadzokera kumisasa kuna Joshua paMakedha norugare; hakuna munhu wakasimudzira mumwe wavana VaIsiraeri rurimi rwake.
