Joshua10:22 Zvino Joshua akati, “Zarurai muromo webako, mubudise madzimambo mashanu iwayo mubako muuye nawo kwandiri.”" 
Joshua10:23 Ivo vakaita saizvozvo, vakabudisa madzimambo iwayo mashanu mubako vakauya navo kwaari, vaiti mambo weJerusaremu, namambo weHebhuroni, namambo weJarimuti, namambo weRakishi, namambo weEgironi." 
Joshua10:24 Zvino vakati vabudisa madzimambo iwayo vakauya navo kuna Joshua, Joshua akadana varume vose VaIsiraeri, akati kuvakuru nehondo vakanga vanaye, “Swederai, muise tsoka dzenyu pamitsipa yavo.”" 
Joshua10:25 Zvino Joshua akati kwavari, “Musatya, kana kuvhunduswa; simbai mutsunge mwoyo, nokuti Jehovha uchaita saizvozvo navavengi venyu vose, vamunorwa navo.”" 
Joshua10:26 Pashure Joshua akavabaya, akavauraya, ndokuvasungirira pamiti kusvikira madekwana." 
Joshua10:27 Nenguva yokuvira kwezuva Joshua akaraira vanhu, vakavaturura pamiti, vakavakandira mubako mavakanga vakavanda, vakaisa mabwe makuru pamuromo webako; aripo kusvikira zuva rino ranhasi." 
Joshua10:28 Joshua akakunda Makedha nomusi iwoyo, akariparadza neminondo inopinza, namambo waro; akavaparadza chose navanhu vose vakanga varimo; haana kusiya kunyangwe nomumwe; akaitira mambo weMakedha sezvaakaitira mambo weJeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Zvino Joshua akabva Makedha, iye naVaIsiraeri vose vaakanga anavo, vakaenda Ribhina vakarwa neRibhina;" 
Joshua10:30 Jehovha akariisawo namambo waro mumaoko aIsiraeri; akariparadza neminondo inopinza, navanhu vose vakanga varimo; haana kusiyamo kunyangwe nomumwe; akaitira mambo waro sezvaakaitira mambo weJeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Zvino Joshua akabva Ribhina, iye naVaIsiraeri vose vaakanga anavo, vakaenda Rakishi, vakavaka misasa yavo pedyo naro, vakarwa naro;" 
Joshua10:32 Jehovha akaisa Rakishi mumaoko aVaIsiraeri, akarikunda nezuva repiri, akariparadza neminondo inopinza, navanhu vose vakanga varimo, sezvose zvaakaitira Ribhina." 
Joshua10:33 Zvino Horamu, mambo weGezeru, wakakwira kuzobatsira Rakishi; Joshua akamuuraya navanhu vake, kusvikira asina kumusiyira kunyangwe nomunhu mumwe." 
Joshua10:34 Zvino Joshua akabva Rakishi, iye naVaIsiraeri vose vaakanga anavo, vakaenda Egironi; vakavaka misasa yavo pedyo naro, vakarwa naro;" 
Joshua10:35 vakarikunda nomusi iwoyo, vakariparadza neminondo inopinza; vakaparadza chose nomusi iwoyo vanhu vose vakanga varimo, sezvose zvaakaitira Rakishi." 
Joshua10:36 Zvino Joshua akabva Egironi, iye naVaIsiraeri vose vaakanga anavo, vakaenda Hebhuroni, vakarwa naro;" 
Joshua10:37 vakarikunda, nokuriparadza neminondo inopinza, namambo waro, namaguta aro ose, navanhu vose vakanga varimo; haana kusiya kunyangwe nomumwe, sezvose zvaakaitira Egironi; asi wakariparadza chose navanhu vose vakanga varimo." 
Joshua10:38 Zvino Joshua akadzokera Dhebhiri, naVaIsiraeri vose vaakanga anavo; vakarwa naro;" 
Joshua10:39 akarikunda, namambo waro, namaguta aro ose; vakavauraya neminondo inopinza, nokuparadza chose vanhu vose vakanga varimo; haana kusiya kunyangwe nomumwe; sezvaakaitira Hebhuroni, ndizvo zvaakaitira Dhebhiriwo, namambo waro; sezvaakaitirawo Ribhina namambo waro." 
Joshua10:40 Saizvozvo Joshua wakaparadza nyika yose, nyika yamakomo neyenyasi, neyamapani, neyemitenusirwa, namadzimambo adzo ose, haana kusiya kunyangwe nomumwe; asi wakaparadza zvose zvipenyu, sezvakaraira Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Joshua10:41 Joshua akavaparadza kubva Kadheshi–bhania kusvikira Gaza, nenyika yose yeGosheni kusvikira Gibheoni." 
Joshua10:42 Madzimambo iwayo ose nenyika dzawo akakundwa naJoshua nenguva imwe, nokuti Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri wakarwira Isiraeri." 
Joshua10:43 Ipapo Joshua akadzokera kumisasa paGirigari, iye naVaIsiraeri vose vaakanga anavo." 
Joshua11:1 Zvino Jabhini, mambo weHazoru wakati achizvinzwa, akatuma nhume kuna Jobhabhu, mambo weMadhoni, nokuna mambo weShimuroni, nokuna mambo weAkishafi," 
Joshua11:1 Zvino Jabhini, mambo weHazoru wakati achizvinzwa, akatuma nhume kuna Jobhabhu, mambo weMadhoni, nokuna mambo weShimuroni, nokuna mambo weAkishafi," 
Joshua11:2 nokuna madzimambo akanga ari kurutivi rwokumusoro, panyika yezvikomo, nomumupata kurutivi rwenyasi rweKineroti, nomumapani, nokuzvikomo zvapaDhoru, kurutivi rwamavirazuva," 
Joshua11:3 nokuVaKenani kurutivi rwamabvazuva nokumavirira, naVaAmori, naVaHeti, navaPerezi, naVaJebhusi, panyika yamakomo, naVaHivhi vakanga vagere mujinga meHorimoni, panyika yeMizipa." 
Joshua11:4 Vakabuda, ivo nehondo dzavo dzose dzavakanga vanadzo, vari vazhinji, sejecha riri pamhenderekedzo yegungwa nokuwanda, namabhiza nengoro zhinji zhinji." 
Joshua11:5 Madzimambo awa ose akaungana, vakauya pamwechete kuvaka misasa yavo pamvura yeMeromi, kuzorwa naVaIsiraeri." 
Joshua11:6 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Joshua, “Usavatya, nokuti mangwana nenguva ino ndichavaisa vose mumaoko ako, vauraiwe pamberi paVaIsiraeri; unofanira kugura marunda amakumbo amabhiza avo, nokupisa ngoro dzavo nomoto.”" 
Joshua11:7 Zvino Joshua akauya pakarepo, iye navanhu vose vehondo vaakanga anavo, kuti arwe navo pamvura yeMeromu, akavavamba." 
Joshua11:8 Jehovha akavaisa mumaoko aVaIsiraeri, vakavaparadza nokuvadzinga kusvikira paguta guru Zidhoni, nokusvikira Misirefoti–maimi, nokusvikira kumupata weMizipe kumabvazuva; vakavauraya kusvikira vasina kusiya kunyangwe nomumwechete." 
Joshua11:9 Joshua akavaitira sezvakanga arairwa naJehovha; akagura marunda amakumbo amabhiza avo, nokupisa ngoro dzavo nomoto." 
Joshua11:10 Nenguva iyo Joshua akadzoka, akakunda Hazoru, akauraya mambo waro nomunondo; nokuti pakutanga Hazoru waiva muzinda woushe ihwo hwose." 
Joshua11:11 Vakauraya vanhu vose vakanga varimo neminondo inopinza, vakavaparadza chose; hakuna chinhu chimwe chinofema chakasara; vakapisa Hazoru nomoto." 
Joshua11:12 Joshua akakundawo maguta ose amadzimambo iwayo, namadzimambo awo ose, akavauraya neminondo inopinza, akavaparadza chose; sezvakanga zvarairwa naMosesi muranda waJehovha." 
Joshua11:13 Asi maguta akanga ari pazvikomo zvavo, VaIsiraeri havana kuapisa kunyangwe nerimwechete, asi Hazoru chete; Joshua wakapisa irero." 
Joshua11:14 Vana VaIsiraeri vakatapa zvose zvavakapamba zvamaguta iwayo, nemombe; asi vakauraya varume vose neminondo inopinza, kusvikira vavaparadza; havana kusiya kunyangwe nechinhu chimwechete chinofema." 
Joshua11:15 Sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi muranda wake naJehovha, ndizvo Mosesi zvaakaraira Joshua; Joshua akaita saizvozvo, haana kusiya chinhu chimwechete pazvose zvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Joshua11:16 Saizvozvo Joshua akakunda nyika iyo yose, iyo nyika yamakomo, nenyika yose yezasi, nenyika yose yeGosheni, nebani, noMupata, nenyika yamakomo yaIsiraeri, nebani rayo;" 
Joshua11:17 kubva pagomo reHaraki, rinokwira Seiri, kusvikira paBhaari–gadhi pamupata weRebhanoni, mujinga megomo reHerimoni; akakunda madzimambo aro ose, akavaparadza nokuvauraya." 
Joshua11:18 Joshua akarwa namadzimambo iwayo ose mazuva mazhinji. 
Joshua11:19 Hakuna guta rakayanana naVaIsiraeri, asi VaHivhi vakanga vagere Gibheoni; vakakunda zvose pakurwa." 
Joshua11:20 Nokuti Jehovha ndiye wakaomesa mwoyo yavo, kuti varwe naVaIsiraeri, kuti avaparadze chose, varege kunzwirwa tsitsi; asi avaparadze, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
Joshua11:21 Nenguva iyo Joshua akaenda akaparadza vaAnaki panyika yamakomo, paHebhuroni, napaDhebhiri, napaAnabhi, napanyika yose yamakomo yaJudha, napanyika yose yamakomo yaIsiraeri; Joshua akavaparadza chose pamwechete namaguta avo." 
Joshua11:22 Hakuna kuva Anaki wakasara panyika yavana VaIsiraeri; asi paGaza, napaGadhi, napaAshidhodhi ndipo pakasara vamwe." 
Joshua11:23 Joshua akakunda saizvozvo nyika yose sezvose zvakaudzwa Mosesi naJehovha; Joshua akaipa vana VaIsiraeri, kuti ive nhaka yavo, sezvavakanga vakamurwa namarudzi avo. Nyika ikazorora pakurwa." 
Joshua12:1 Ndiwo madzimambo enyika akakundwa navana VaIsiraeri, vavakatorera nyika yavo mhiri kwaJodhani kumabvazuva, kubva pamupata weArinoni kusvikira pagomo reHerimoni, nerenje rose riri kumabvazuva:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihoni, mambo waVaAmori, wakanga agere Heshibhoni, waibata ushe kubva paAroeri, parutivi rwomupata weArinoni, neguta raiva pakati pomupata, nehafu yeGiriadhi, kusvikira kurwizi Jabhoki, waiva muganhu wavana vaAmoni;" 
Joshua12:3 nerenje kusvikira paGungwa reKineroti kumabvazuva, nokusvikira paGungwa rerenje, iro Gungwa Romunyu, kumabvazuva nenzira inoenda Bheti–jeshimoti nokurutivi rwezasi pajinga pePisiga;" 
Joshua12:4 nenyika yaOgi, mambo weBhashani, wakanga asara pavaRegaimu, vakanga vagere paAshitaroti neEdhirei," 
Joshua12:5 waibata ushe pagomo reHerimoni, napaSareka, napaBhashani rose, kusvikira kumuganhu wavaGeshuri, navaMaakati, nehafu yeGiriadhi; ndiyo nyika yaSihoni, mambo weHeshibhoni." 
Joshua12:6 Mosesi muranda waJehovha, navana VaIsiraeri vakavakunda; Mosesi muranda waJehovha akaipa Rubheni, navaGadhi, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase, kuti ive yavo." 
Joshua12:7 Ndiwo madzimambo enyika iyo akakundwa naJoshua navana VaIsiraeri mhiri kwaJodhani kumavirazuva, kubva paBhaari–gadhi mumupata weRebhanoni, kusvikira pagomo reHaraki rinokwira richienda Seiri; Joshua akaipa marudzi aVaIsiraeri sezvavakanga vakamurirwa, kuti ive yavo." 
Joshua12:8 Panyika yamakomo, nomumapani, nomuArabha, napamitenusirwa, nomurenje, nezasi; ndiyo yaiva nyika yaVaHeti, neyaVaAmori, neyaVaKenani, neyaVaPerezi, neyaVaHivhi, neyaVaJebhusi," 
Joshua12:9 mambo weJeriko ndiye mumwe; namambo weAi, pedyo neBhetieri, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:10 namambo weJerusaremu, mumwe; namambo weHebhuroni, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:11 namambo weJarimuti, mumwe; namambo weRakishi, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:12 namambo weEgironi, mumwe; namambo weGezeri mumwe;" 
Joshua12:13 namambo weDhebhiri, mumwe; namambo Gedheri, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:14 namambo weHoma, mumwe; namambo weAradhi, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:15 namambo weRibhina, mumwe, namambo weAdhuramu, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:16 namambo weMakedha, mumwe; namambo weBhetieri, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:17 namambo weTapua, mumwe; namambo weHeferi, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:18 namambo weAfeki, mumwe; namambo weRasharoni, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:19 namambo weMadhoni, mumwe; namambo weHazori, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:20 namambo weShimuroni–meroni, mumwe namambo weAkishafi, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:21 namambo weTaanaki, mumwe; namambo weMegidho, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:22 namambo weKedheshi, mumwe; namambo weJokineamu paKarimeri, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:23 namambo weDhoru panyika yamakomo yaDhoru, mumwe; namambo weGoimi paGirigari, mumwe;" 
Joshua12:24 namambo weTiriza, mumwe; madzimambo ose akanga ana makumi matatu nomumwe." 
Joshua13:1 Zvino Joshua wakanga akwegura, ava namakore mazhinji; Jehovha akati kwaari, “Wakwegura, wava namakore mazhinji, dzichiriko nyika zhinji dzinofanira kuva dzenyu." 
Joshua13:2 Nyika yasara ndiyo: Nyika dzose dzavaFirisitia, navaGeshuri vose;" 
Joshua13:3 kubva paShihori kurutivi rweIjipiti, kusvikira kumuganhu weEkironi kumusoro, wainzi ndowaVaKenani; madzishe mashanu avaFirisitia, vaiti: WeGaza, noweAshidhodhi, noweAshikeroni, noweGiti, noweEkironi, navaAvhimi," 
Joshua13:4 kurutivi rweZasi, nyika yose yaVaKenani, neMeara, waiva wavaZidhoni, kusvikira paAfeki, kusvikira kumuganhu waVaAmori;" 
Joshua13:5 nenyika yavaGebhari, neRebhanoni rose kumabvazuva, kubva paBhaari–gadhi panjinga pegomo reHemoni, kusvikira pavanopinda paHamati;" 
Joshua13:6 vanhu vose vagere panyika yamakomo, kubva paRebhanoni kusvikira paMisirefoti–maimi, navaZidhoni vose, ivavo ndichavadzinga pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri; asi iwe unofanira kuipa vana VaIsiraeri, ive nhaka yavo, sezvandakakuraira." 
Joshua13:7 Zvino unofanira kugovera nyika iyi pakati pamarudzi mapfumbamwe nehafu yorudzi rwaManase, ive nhaka yavo.”" 
Joshua13:8 VaRubheni navaGadhi vakapiwa nhaka yavo pamwechete naye, iyo yavakanga vapiwa naMosesi mhiri kwaJodhani kumabvazuva, sezvavakapiwa naMosesi, muranda waJehovha;" 
Joshua13:9 kubva paAroeri, parutivi rwomupata weArinoni, neguta raiva pakati pomupata, nebani rose reMedhebha kusvikira paDhibhoni;" 
Joshua13:10 namaguta ose aSihoni, mambo waVaAmori, wakanga achibata ushe paHeshibhoni, kusvikira kumuganhu wavana vaAmoni;" 
Joshua13:11 neGireadhi, nenyika yavaGeshuri navaMaakati, negomo rose reHemoni, neBhashani rose kusvikira paSareka," 
Joshua13:12 noushe hwose hwaOgi paBhashani, wakanga achibata ushe paAshitaroti neEdhirei (ndiye wakanga asara pavaRefaimu); nokuti ndivo vakanga vakundwa naMosesi vakadzingwa naye." 
Joshua13:13 Kunyangwe zvakadaro vana VaIsiraeri havana kudzinga vaGeshuri kana vaMaakati; asi vaGeshuri navaMaakati vagere pakati paVaIsiraeri kusvikira nhasi. 
Joshua13:14 Asi rudzi rwavaRevhi bedzi haana kurupa nhaka; zvipiriso zvaJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, zvaipiswa, ndizvo zvaiva nhaka yavo, sezvaakataura naye." 
Joshua13:15 Joshua akapa rudzi rwavana vaRubheni mugove wavo nedzimba dzavo. 
Joshua13:16 Nyika yavo yakabva paAroeri, parutivi rwomupata weArinoni, neguta raiva pakati pomupata, nebani rose paMedhebha;" 
Joshua13:17 Heshibhoni namaguta aro ose ari pabani; Dhibhoni, neBhamoti–bhaari, neBheti–bhaari–meoni;" 
Joshua13:18 neJahazi, neKedhemoti, neMefahati;" 
Joshua13:19 neKiriataimi, neSibhima, neZereti–shahari mugomo romupata;" 
Joshua13:20 neBheti–peori, nemitenusirwa yePisiga, neBheti–jeshimoti;" 
Joshua13:21 namaguta ose ebani, noushe hwose hwaSihoni, mambo waVaAmori, wakanga achibata ushe paHeshibhoni, wakanga akundwa naMosesi pamwechete navakuru veMidhiani, neEvhi, neRekemi, neZuri, neHuri, neRebha, namachinda aSihoni, akanga agere munyika iyo." 
Joshua13:22 Bharamu, mwanakomana waBheori, muuuki, naiyewo wakaurayiwa nomunondo navana VaIsiraeri pakati pavamwe vakaurayiwa navo." 
Joshua13:23 Muganhu wavana vaRubheni rwakanga ruri Jodhani nenyika yarwo. Ndiyo yaiva nhaka yavana vaRubheni nemhuri dzavo, iwo maguta nemisha yawo." 
Joshua13:24 Mosesi akapa rudzi rwavaGadhi, ivo vana vaGadhi, mugove wavo nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua13:25 Nyika yavo raiva Jazeri, namaguta ose eGiriadhi, nehafu yenyika yavana vaAmoni, kusvikira paAroeri, pamberi peRabha;" 
Joshua13:26 nokubva paHeshibhoni, kusvikira paRamati–mizipe, neBhetonimu; nokubva paMahanaimu, kusvikira pamuganhu weDhebhiri;" 
Joshua13:27 nomumupata Bheti–harami, neBheti–nemura, neSukoti, neZafoni, noumwe ushe hwakanga hwasara hwaSihoni, mambo weHeshibhoni, neJodhani nenyika yarwo, kusvikira pamagumisiro egungwa reKineroti, mhiri kwaJodhani, kumabvazuva." 
Joshua13:28 Ndiyo nhaka yavana vaGadhi nemhuri dzavo iwo maguta nemisha yawo. 
Joshua13:29 Mosesi akapa hafu yorudzi rwaManase nhaka yavo; ndiyo yaiva nhaka yehafu yorudzi rwavana vaManase nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua13:30 Nyika yavo yakabva paMahanaimu, neBhashani rose, noushe hwaOgi, mambo weBhashani, nemisha yose yeJairi, yaiva paBhashani, maguta makumi matanhatu;" 
Joshua13:31 nehafu yeGiriadhi, neAshitaroti, neEdhirei, maguta oushe hwaOgi paBhashani, ndiyo yaiva yavana vaMakiri, mwanakomana waManase, yehafu yavana vaMakiri nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua13:32 Ndidzo nhaka dzakagoverwa naMosesi pamapani aMoabhu, mhiri kwaJodhani paJeriko kumabvazuva." 
Joshua13:33 Asi rudzi rwavaRevhi haruna kupiwa nhaka naMosesi; Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, iye amene, ndiyo nhaka yavo, sezvavakaudzwa naye." 
Joshua14:1 Ndidzo nhaka dzakagamuchirwa navana VaIsiraeri panyika yeKenani, dzavakagoverwa nomupristi Eriazari, naJoshua mwanakomana waNuni, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba amarudzi avana VaIsiraeri." 
Joshua14:2 Vakagoverwa nhaka yavo nemijenya, sezvavakarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMosesi, nhaka yamarudzi mapfumbamwe nehafu." 
Joshua14:3 Nokuti Mosesi wakanga apa marudzi maviri nehafu nhaka yavo mhiri kwaJodhani; asi vaRevhi haana kuvapa nhaka pakati pavo. 
Joshua14:4 Nokuti vana vaJosefa vakanga vana marudzi maviri; rwaManase norwaEfuremu; havana kupa vaRevhi mugove munyika iyo, asi maguta mavangagara, namafuro awo emombe dzavo nepfuma yavo." 
Joshua14:5 Vana VaIsiraeri vakaita sezvakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha, vakakamura nyika." 
Joshua14:6 Zvino vana vaJudha vakaswedera kuna Joshua paGirigari, Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune, muKenizi, akati kwaari, “Unoziva shoko rakataurwa naJehovha kuna Mosesi munhu waMwari, pamusoro pangu napamusoro pako, paKadheshi–bhania." 
Joshua14:7 Ini ndakanga ndasvika makore ana makumi mana nguva yandakatumwa naMosesi muranda waJehovha paKadheshi–bhania kundoshora nyika, ndikadzoka neshoko kwaari sezvandakafunga ini." 
Joshua14:8 Asi hama dzangu dzakanga dzakwira neni dzakaodza mwoyo yavanhu; asi ini ndakatevera Jehovha Mwari wangu nomwoyo wose. 
Joshua14:9 Mosesi akapika nomusi uyo, akati, ‘Zvirokwazvo, nyika yakatsikwa norutsoka rwako, ichava nhaka yako neyavana vako nokusingaperi, nokuti wakatevera Jehovha Mwari wangu nomwoyo wako wose.’" 
Joshua14:10 Zvino tarira, Jehovha wakandichengeta ndiri mupenyu, sezvaakataura, makore ano ana makumi mana namashanu kubva panguva Jehovha yaakataura shoko iri kuna Mosesi, VaIsiraeri vachafamba murenje; zvino, tarira, nhasi ndava namakore ana makumi masere namashanu." 
Joshua14:11 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, nanhasi ndichine simba sezvandakanga ndakaita nomusi wandakatumwa naMosesi; sezvarakanga rakaita musi iwoyo, ndizvo zvakaita simba rangu nanhasi, kana rokurwa kana kubuda kana kupinda." 
Joshua14:12 Naizvozvo zvino chindipa nyika, nyika iyi yamakomo, yakarehwa naJehovha musi iwoyo; nokuti nomusi iwoyo wakanzwa iwe kuti vaAnaki vakanga varipo namaguta makuru ana masvingo; zvimwe Jehovha uchava neni, ndikagona kuvadzinga, sezvakataurwa naJehovha.”" 
Joshua14:13 Ipapo Joshua akamuropafadza, akapa Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune Hebhuroni, ive nhaka yake." 
Joshua14:14 Naizvozvo Hebhuroni rakazova nhaka yaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune, muKenizi, kusvikira nhasi; nokuti wakanga atevera Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri nomwoyo wake wose." 
Joshua14:15 Zita reHebhuroni pakutanga rakanga riri Kiriati–aribha; iye Aribha wakanga ari munhu mukuru pakati pavaAnaki vose. Ipapo nyika ikazorora pakurwa. 
Joshua15:1 Mugove worudzi rwavana vaJudha nemhuri dzavo wakasvikira pamuganhu waEdhomu, iko kurenje reZini kurutivi rwezasi, kusvikira zasi kwazvo." 
Joshua15:2 Muganhu wavo wezasi wakabva pamuganhu weGungwa roMunyu, kubva apo pakapinda nyika mugungwa, panotarira kurutivi rwezasi;" 
Joshua15:3 ndokupfuura zasi kwegomo reAkirabhimi, ndokupfuura nokurutivi rweZini, ndokukwira nechenyasi kweKadheshi–bhania, ndokupfuura napaHezironi, ndokukwira napaAdhari, ndokudzoka napaKarika;" 
Joshua15:4 ndokupfuura kusvikira paAzimoni, ndokubuda naparukova rweIjipiti; muganhu uyu ndokuguma pagungwa; ndiwo unofanira kuva muganhu wezasi." 
Joshua15:5 Muganhu wokumabvazuva wakatanga paGungwa Romunyu kusvikira pamuganhu waJodhani. Muganhu worutivi rwokumusoro wakatanga apo panopinda nyika mugungwa kusvikira pamugumo waJodhani," 
Joshua15:6 ndokukwira kuBheti–hogira, ndokupfuura nokumusoro kweBheti–arabha; muganhu ndokukwira kubwe raBhohani, mwanakomana waRubheni;" 
Joshua15:7 muganhu ndokukwira nokuDhebhiri, uchibva pamupata weAkori, ndokudaro uchienda kumusoro wakatarisana neGirigari, pakatarisanazve negomo reAdhumimi, riri kurutivi rwezasi rworwizi; muganhu ndokupfuura napamvura yeEni–shemeshi, ndokuguma paEni–rogeri;" 
Joshua15:8 muganhu ndokukwira napamupata womwanakomana waHinomu, kusvikira kurutivi rwaVaJebhusi zasi (ndiro Jerusaremu); muganhu ndokukwira kusvikira pamusoro wegomo riri pamberi pomupata weHinomu kumavirazuva, uri pamugumo kwazvo womupata weRefaimu, kurutivi rwokumusoro." 
Joshua15:9 Muganhu ndokutarwa kubva pamusoro pegomo kusvikira kutsime remvura yeNefitoa, ndokuguma pamaguta pagomo reEfuroni; zvino muganhu ndokutarwa kusvikira Bhara (ndiro Kiriati–jearimi)." 
Joshua15:10 Muganhu ndokudzoka uchibva paBhara nokumavirazuva kusvikira pagomo reSeiri, ndokupfuura nokurutivi rwegomo reJearimi nechokumusoro (ndiro Kesaroni), ndokuburukira kusvikira paBheti–shemeshi, ndokupfuura napaTimuna;" 
Joshua15:11 muganhu ndokupfuura kurutivi rweEkironi, kumusoro; muganhu ndokutarwa kusvikira paShikeroni, ndokupfuura napagomo reBhara, ndokupfuura paJabhuneeri; muganhu ndokuguma pagungwa." 
Joshua15:12 Muganhu wokumavirazuva wakasvika kugungwa guru nenyika yarwo. Ndiwo muganhu wavana vaJudha kunhivi dzose nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua15:13 Asi wakapa Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune mugove pakati pavana vaJudha; sezvakarairwa Joshua naJehovha, akamupa Kiriati–abha; Abha wakanga ari baba vaAnaki (ndiro Hebhuroni)." 
Joshua15:14 Karebhu akadzingapo vanakomana vatatu vaAnaki, vaiti: Sheshai, naAhimani, naTamai, vanakomana vaAnaki." 
Joshua15:15 Akabvapo, akandorwa navaigara Dhebhiri; zita reDhebhiri kare raiva Kiriati–seferi." 
Joshua15:16 Karebhu akati, “Munhu unorwa neKiriati–seferi, akarikunda, ndichamupa mukunda wangu Akisa, ave mukadzi wake.”" 
Joshua15:17 Ipapo Otinieri, mwanakomana waKenazi, munun'una waKarebhu, akarikunda; iye akamupa mukunda wake Akisa, akava mukadzi wake." 
Joshua15:18 Zvino iye wakati achisvika kwaari, akamukurudzira kuti akumbire munda kuna baba vake; zvino iye akaburuka pambongoro yake, Karebhu akati kwaari, “Unoreveiko?”" 
Joshua15:19 Akati, “Ndipei chipo; zvamakandiisa kunyika yezasi, ndipeiwo matsime emvura.” Akamupa matsime okumusoro namatsime ezasi." 
Joshua15:20 Ndiyo nhaka yorudzi rwavana vaJudha nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua15:21 Maguta okumudzivo orudzi rwavana vaJudha kumuganhu waEdhomu zasi akanga ari Kabhezeeri, neEdheri, neJaguri;" 
Joshua15:22 neKina, neDhimona, neAdhadha," 
Joshua15:23 neKedheshi, neHazoru, neItanani;" 
Joshua15:24 neZifi, neTeremi, neBheroti;" 
Joshua15:25 neHazoru–hadhata, neKerioti–hezironi (ndiro Hazoru);" 
Joshua15:26 neAmamu, neShema, neMoradha;" 
Joshua15:27 neHazari–gadha, neHeshimoni, neBheti–pereti;" 
Joshua15:28 neHazari–shuari, neBheeri–shebha, neBhiziotia;" 
Joshua15:29 neBhaara, neIyimi, neEzemi;" 
Joshua15:30 neEritoradhi, neKesiri, neHoma;" 
Joshua15:31 neZikiragi, neMadhamana, neSanisana;" 
Joshua15:32 neRebhaoti, neShirimi, neAini, neRimoni; maguta iwayo ose aiva namakumi maviri namapfumbamwe, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:33 Pabani pakanga pane Eshitaori, neZora, neAshina;" 
Joshua15:34 neZanoa, neEniganimi, neTapua, neEnami;" 
Joshua15:35 neJarimuti, neAdhuramu neSoko, neAzeka;" 
Joshua15:36 neSharaimi, neAdhitaimu, neGedhera, neGedherotaimi; maguta ane gumi namana, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:37 Zenani, neHadhasha, neMigadhari–gadhi;" 
Joshua15:38 neDhirani, neMizipe, neJokiteeri;" 
Joshua15:39 neRakishi, neBhosikati, neEgironi;" 
Joshua15:40 neKabhoni, neRamani, neKiterishi;" 
Joshua15:41 neGedheroti, neBheti–dhagoni, neNaama, neMakedha; maguta ane gumi namatanhatu, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:42 Ribhina, neEteri, neAshani;" 
Joshua15:43 neIfuta, neShina, neNezibhi;" 
Joshua15:44 neKeira, neAkizibhi, neMaresha; maguta ana mapfumbamwe, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:45 Ekironi, nemisha yaro, nemisha miduku yaro;" 
Joshua15:46 kubva paEkironi kusvikira pagungwa, maguta ose akanga ari parutivi rweAshidhodhi, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:47 Ashidhodhi, nemisha yaro, nemisha miduku yaro; neGaza, nemisha yaro, nemisha miduku yaro, kusvikira kurukova rweIjipiti, napagungwa guru nenyika yaro." 
Joshua15:48 Nokunyika yamakomo, Shamiri, neJatiri, neSoko;" 
Joshua15:49 neDhana, neKiriati–sana (ndiro Dhebhiri);" 
Joshua15:50 neAnabhi, neEshitemo, neAnimi;" 
Joshua15:51 neGosheni, neHoroni, neGiro; maguta ane gumi nerimwe, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:52 Arabhu, neDhuma, neEshani;" 
Joshua15:53 neJanimi, neBheti–tapua, neAfeka;" 
Joshua15:54 neHumuta, neKiriati–abha (ndiro Hebhuroni), neZiori; maguta mapfumbamwe, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:55 Maoni, neKameri, neZifi, neJuta;" 
Joshua15:56 neJezireeri, neJokidheami, neZanoa;" 
Joshua15:57 neKaini, neGibhia, neTimuna; maguta ane gumi, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:58 Harikuri, neBheti–zuri, neGedhori;" 
Joshua15:59 neMaarati, neBheti–anoti, neEritekoni; maguta matanhatu, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriati–bhaari (ndiro Kiriati–jearimi), neRabha; maguta maviri, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:61 Murenje pakanga pane Bheti–abha, neMidhini, neSekaka;" 
Joshua15:62 neNibhishani, neGuta roMunyu, neEni–gedhi; maguta matanhatu, pamwechete nemisha yawo." 
Joshua15:63 Asi vana vaJudha vakanga vasingagoni kudzinga VaJebhusi vakanga vagere Jerusaremu; asi VaJebhusi vakagara Jerusaremu pamwechete navana vaJudha kusvikira nhasi. 
Joshua16:1 Mugove wavana vaJosefa wakatanga paJodhani paJeriko, pamvura yeJeriko kumabvazuva kurenje, uchitanga paJeriko, ndokukwira napanyika yamakomo uchienda Bheti–eri;" 
Joshua16:2 ndokubva Bheti–eri kusvikira paRuzi, ndokupfuura napamuganhu waVaArikiti kusvikira paAtaroti;" 
Joshua16:3 ndokuburukira kumavirazuva kumuganhu wavaJafereti, kusvikira Gezeru, ndokuguma pagungwa." 
Joshua16:4 Vana vaJosefa, Manase naEfuremu, vakatora nhaka yavo." 
Joshua16:5 Muganhu wavana vaEfuremu nemhuri dzavo ndiwo: Muganhu wenhaka yavo kumabvazuva wakanga uri Ataroti–adhari, kusvikira paBheti–horoni kumusoro;" 
Joshua16:6 zvino muganhu ndokuenda kumavirazuva paMikimetati kumusoro; zvino muganhu ndokudzoka kumabvazuva kusvikira paTanati–shiro, ndokupfuura ipapo kurutivi rwamabvazuva eJanoa;" 
Joshua16:7 ndokubva paJanoa, ndokuburukira Ataroti, neNaara, ndokusvika paJeriko, ndokuguma paJodhani." 
Joshua16:8 Kubva paTapua muganhu wakaenda kumavirazuva, kusvikira parukova Kana, ndokuguma pagungwa. Ndiyo nhaka yorudzi rwavana vaEfuremu nemhuri dzavo;" 
Joshua16:9 pamwechete namaguta akanga akakamurirwa vana vaEfuremu pakati penhaka yavana vaManase, maguta ose nemisha yawo." 
Joshua16:10 Havana kudzinga VaKenani vakanga vagere Gezeru; asi VaKenani vakagara pakati pavaEfuremu kusvikira nhasi; vakava vabati vechibharo. 
Joshua17:1 Ndiwo mugove worudzi rwaManase; nokuti iye wakanga ari mwana wedangwe waJosefa. Kana ari Makiri, mwana wedangwe waManase, baba vaGiriadhi, iye wakapiwa Giriadhi neBhashani, nokuti wakanga ari murwi." 
Joshua17:2 Vamwe vana vaManase vakapiwa mugove nemhuri dzavo: Vana vaAbhiezeri, navana vaHereki, navana vaAsirieri, navana vaShekemu, navana vaHeferi, navana vaShemidha, ndivo vakanga vari vana vavakomana vaManase, mwanakomana waJosefa, nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua17:3 Asi Zerofeadhi, mwanakomana waHeferi, mwanakomana waGiriadhi, mwanakomana waMakiri, mwanakomana waManase, wakanga asina vanakomana, asi vanasikana bedzi; mazita avanasikana vake akanga ari Mara, naNowa, naHogira, naMirika, naTiriza." 
Joshua17:4 Ivo vakaswedera kumupristi Eriazari, nokuna Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, nokumachinda, vakati, “Jehovha wakaraira Mosesi kuti atipe nhaka pakati pehama dzedu;” naizvozvo akavapa nhaka pakati pavanun'una vababa vavo, sezvakanga zvarairwa naJehovha." 
Joshua17:5 Manase akapiwa migove ine gumi, kunze kweGiriadhi neBhashani mhiri kwaJodhani;" 
Joshua17:6 nokuti vanasikana vaManase vakanga vane nhaka pakati pavanakomana vake; nyika yeGiriadhi yakanga iri yavamwe vanakomana vaManase. 
Joshua17:7 Muganhu waManase wakabva kwaAshuru, ndokusvika paMikimetati, pamberi peShekemu; zvino muganhu ndokuenda kuruoko rworudyi, kusvikira kuvanhu vakanga vagere Eni–tapua." 
Joshua17:8 Nyika yeTapua yakanga iri yaManase; asi Tapua pamuganhu waManase rakanga riri guta ravana vaEfuremu. 
Joshua17:9 Zvino muganhu ndokuburuka kurukova Kana, nechezasi kworukova; maguta iwayo akanga ari aEfuremu, pakati pamaguta aManase; muganhu waManase wakanga uri nechokumusoro kworukova, ndokuguma pagungwa." 
Joshua17:10 Kurutivi rwezasi nyika yakanga iri yaEfuremu; kurutivi rwokumusoro yakanga iri yaManase; gungwa waiva muganhu wake; miganhu ikasvika kwaAshuru kumusoro, nokwaIsakari kumabvazuva." 
Joshua17:11 Pakati paIsakari naAshuru Manase wakanga ane Bheti–sheani nemisha yaro, neJibhireami nemisha yaro, navanhu vakanga vagere Dhoru nemisha yaro, navanhu vakanga vagere Endoru nemisha yaro, navakanga vagere Taanaki nemisha yaro, navakanga vagere Megidho nemisha yaro, ari makomo matatu." 
Joshua17:12 Asi vana vaManase vakanga vasingagoni kudzinga vanhu vakanga vagere mumaguta iwayo; asi VaKenani vakaramba vachida kugara panyika iyo. 
Joshua17:13 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakati vava nesimba, vakaita VaKenani vabati vechibharo, havana kuvadzinga chose." 
Joshua17:14 Zvino vana vaJosefa vakataura naJoshua, vakati, “Makatipireiko mugove mumwechete nechikamu chimwechete, kuti ive nhaka yedu, zvatiri vanhu vazhinji, nokuti Jehovha akatiropafadza kusvikira zvino?”" 
Joshua17:15 Joshua akati kwavari, “Kana muri vanhu vazhinji, endai henyu kudondo, mundozvitemera nzvimbo ipapo panyika yavaPerezi neyavaRefaimu; zvamusingakwaniri panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu.”" 
Joshua17:16 Vana vaJosefa vakati, “Nyika yamakomo haingatikwaniri; uye VaKenani vose vanogara munyika yomupata vane ngoro dzamatare, ivo vose vari paBheti–sheani nemisha yaro, navari mumupata weJezireeri.”" 
Joshua17:17 Zvino Joshua akataura naveimba yaJosefa, ivo vaEfuremu navaManase, akati, “Imi muri vanhu vazhinji, mune simba guru, hamungavi nomugove mumwechete;" 
Joshua17:18 asi nyika yamakomo ichava yenyu; nokuti kunyangwe riri dondo, muchafanira kuritema, mabudiro aro ose agova enyu; nokuti munofanira kudzinga VaKenani, kunyangwe vane ngoro dzamatare, uye kunyangwe vane simba.”" 
Joshua18:1 Zvino ungano yose yavana VaIsiraeri yakaungana paShiro, ikadzikapo tende rokusangana; nyika yakanga yakundwa navo." 
Joshua18:2 Asi pakati pavana VaIsiraeri kwakanga kwasara marudzi manomwe akanga achigere kukamurirwa nhaka yawo. 
Joshua18:3 Zvino Joshua akati kuvana VaIsiraeri, “Muchanonoka kusvikira rinhiko kupinda nokutora nyika, yamakapiwa naJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu?" 
Joshua18:4 Zvitsaurirei varume vatatu kurudzi rumwe norumwe, ini ndivatume, vasimuke vafambe nenyika, vagorondedzera nhaka yavo; ipapo vauye kwandiri." 
Joshua18:5 Vanofanira kuiganhura vachiita migove minomwe; vaJudha vanofanira kugara panyika yavo kurutivi rwezasi, uye veimba yaJosefa vanofanira kugara panyika yavo kurutivi rwokumusoro." 
Joshua18:6 Zvino munofanira kurondedzera nyika, muchiita migove minomwe, mugouya nerondedzero kwandiri, ndikukandirei mijenya pano pamberi paJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Joshua18:7 Nokuti vaRevhi havana mugove pakati penyu; nokuti upristi hwaJehovha ndiyo nhaka yavo; zvino vaGadhi navaRubheni, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase vakapiwa nhaka yavo mhiri kwaJodhani kumabvazuva, yavakanga vapiwa naMosesi muranda waJehovha.”" 
Joshua18:8 Zvino varume avo vakasimuka, vakaenda; Joshua akaraira ivavo vakaenda kundorondedzera nyika, akati, “Endai, mufambe nenyika, muirondedzere, mugodzokera kwandiri, ndikukandirei mijenya pano pamberi paJehovha paShiro.”" 
Joshua18:9 Varume vakaenda, vakafamba nenyika, vakarondedzera mubhuku nyika namaguta ayo, vachiita migove mina, vakasvika kuna Joshua pamisasa paShiro." 
Joshua18:10 Zvino Joshua akavakandira mijenya paShiro pamberi paJehovha; ipapo Joshua akagovera vana VaIsiraeri nyika sezvavakanga vakamurirwa. 
Joshua18:11 Rudzi rwavana vaBhenjamini vakagoverwa mugove wavo nemhuri dzavo; nyika yomugove wavo yakanga iri pakati pavana vaJudha navana vaJosefa. 
Joshua18:12 Muganhu wavo kurutivi rwokumusoro wakabva paJodhani; zvino muganhu ndokukwira kurutivi rweJeriko nechokumusoro, ndokukwira nenyika yamakomo kumavirazuva, ndokuguma murenje reBheti–avheni." 
Joshua18:13 Muganhu ndokubvapo, ndokupfuura napaRuzi, kurutivi rwezasi rweRuzi (ndiro Bhetieri); zvino muganhu ndokuburukira Ataroti–adhari, pedyo negomo riri zasi kweBheti–horoni rezasi." 
Joshua18:14 Muganhu ndokutarwa, uchibva pagomo riri pamberi peBheti–horoni zasi, ndokuguma paKiriati–bhaari (ndiro Kiriati–jearimi), guta ravana vaJudha; ndirwo rwaiva rutivi rwamavirazuva." 
Joshua18:15 Rutivi rwezasi rwakabva pamugumo weKiriati–jearimi, muganhu ndokuramba uchienda kumavirazuva, ndokubudira kutsime remvura yeNefitoa;" 
Joshua18:16 zvino muganhu ndokuburukira kumugumo wegomo riri pamberi pomupata womwanakomana waHinomu, mumupata weRefaimu kumusoro; ndokuburukira kumupata waHinomu, kurutivi rwaVaJebhusi zasi, ndokuburukira Eni–rogeri;" 
Joshua18:17 zvino ndokutarwa kurutivi rwokumusoro, kubva paEni–shemeshi kusvikira paGeriroti, rakatarisana nejinga reAdhumimi; ndokuburukira kubwe raBhohani, mwanakomana waRubheni;" 
Joshua18:18 zvino ndokupfuurira kurutivi rwakatarisana neArabha, kumusoro, ndokuburukira kuArabha;" 
Joshua18:19 muganhu ndokupfuura nokurutivi rweBheti–hogira kumusoro, ndokuguma kumusoro apo pakapinda nyika muGungwa Romunyu, kumugumo wezasi waJodhani; ndiwo waiva muganhu wezasi." 
Joshua18:20 Jodhani ndirwo rwakanga ruri muganhu wayo kumabvazuva. Ndiyo yakanga iri nhaka yavana vaBhenjamini, nemiganhu yayo kunhivi dzose, nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua18:21 Maguta orudzi rwavana vaBhenjamini, nemhuri dzavo, akanga ari Jeriko, neBheti–hogira, neEmeki–kezizi," 
Joshua18:22 neBheti–arabha, neZemaraimi, neBhetieri," 
Joshua18:23 neAvhimu, nePara, neOfura," 
Joshua18:24 neKefari–amoni, neOfini, neGebha; maguta ane gumi namaviri nemisha yawo;" 
Joshua18:25 neGibheoni, neRama, neBheroti," 
Joshua18:26 neMizipe, neKefira, neMoza," 
Joshua18:27 neRekemi, neIripeeri, neTarara," 
Joshua18:28 neZera, neErefi, neJebhusi (ndiro Jerusaremu), neGibhiati, neKiriati; maguta ane gumi namana nemisha yawo; ndiyo yakanga iri nhaka yavana vaBhenjamini nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua19:1 Mugove wechipiri wakapiwa Simioni, irwo rudzi rwavana vaSimioni nemhuri dzavo; nhaka yavo yakanga iri pakati penhaka yavana vaJudha." 
Joshua19:2 Panhaka yavo vakanga vane Bheeri–shebha, kana Shebha, neMoradha," 
Joshua19:3 neHazari–shuari, neBhara, neEzemi," 
Joshua19:4 neEritoradhi, neBheturi, neHoma," 
Joshua19:5 neZikiragi, neBheti–marikabhoti, neHazari–susa," 
Joshua19:6 neBheti–rebhaoti, neSharuheni; maguta ane gumi namatatu nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:7 Aini, neRimoni, neEteri, neAshani; maguta mana nemisha yawo;" 
Joshua19:8 nemisha yose yakapoteredza maguta iwayo kusvikira paBhaarati–bheeri, raiva Rama rezasi. Ndiyo yakanga iri nhaka yorudzi rwavana vaSimioni nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua19:9 Nhaka yavana vaSimioni yakanga yatorwa pamugove wavana vaJudha, nokuti mugove wavana vaJudha wakanga uri mukurusa; naizvozvo vana vaSimioni vakapiwa nhaka pakati penhaka yavo." 
Joshua19:10 Mugove wechitatu wakapiwa vana vaZebhuruni, nemhuri dzavo; muganhu wenhaka yavo wakasvika paSaridhi." 
Joshua19:11 Muganhu wavo wakakwira kumavirazuva, kusvikira paMarara, ndokusvikira paDhabhesheti, ndokusvikira kurukova rwaiva pamberi peJokineamu;" 
Joshua19:12 kubva paSaridhi wakadzokera kumabvazuva, kunobuda zuva, kusvikira kumuganhu weKisiroti–tabhori, ndokubudira kuDhabherati, ndokukwira Jafia;" 
Joshua19:13 kubva ipapo wakapfuura kumabvazuva uchienda Gati–heferi, kusvikira paEti–kazini, ndokuguma paRimoni, rinosvika paNea;" 
Joshua19:14 zvino muganhu ndokudzoka kurutivi rwokumusoro, ndokuenda Hanatoni, ndokuguma pamupata weIfitaeri;" 
Joshua19:15 neKatati, neNaharari, neShimuroni, neIdhara, neBhetirehemu; maguta ane gumi namaviri nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:16 Ndiyo yakanga iri nhaka yavana vaZebhuruni, nemhuri dzavo, maguta iwayo nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:17 Mugove wechina wakapiwa Isakari, ivo vana vaIsakari, nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua19:18 Muganhu wavo wakasvika paJezireeri, neKesuroti, neShunemi," 
Joshua19:19 neHafaraimi, neShioni, neAnaharoti," 
Joshua19:20 neRabhiti, neKishioni, neEbhesi," 
Joshua19:21 neRemeti, neEni–ganimi, neEni–hadha, neBheti–pazezi;" 
Joshua19:22 muganhu ukasvika paTabhori, neShahazuma, neBheti–shemeshi; muganhu ndokugumira paJodhani; maguta ane gumi namatanhatu nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:23 Ndiyo yakanga iri nhaka yorudzi rwavana vaIsakari nemhuri dzavo, maguta nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:24 Mugove wechishanu wakapiwa rudzi rwavana vaAshuru nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua19:25 Muganhu wavo wakanga uri: Herikati, neHari, neBheteni, neAkishafi," 
Joshua19:26 neAramereki, neAmadhi, neMishari, ndokusvikira paKarimeri kumavirazuva, nokuShihori–ribhinati;" 
Joshua19:27 ndokudzokera kumabvazuva kuBheti–dhagoni ndokusvikira kwaZebhuruni, nokumupata weIfitaeri kumusoro, kusvikira paBheti–emeki, neNeyeri, nokubudira paKabhuri kuruboshwe," 
Joshua19:28 neEbhuroni, neRehobhi, neHamoni, neKana, kusvikira paZidhoni guru;" 
Joshua19:29 zvino muganhu ndokudzokera kuRama, nokuguta reTaya rakakombwa norusvingo; muganhu ndokudzokera Hosa, ndokuguma pagungwa panyika yeAkizibhi;" 
Joshua19:30 uye Uma, neAfeki, neRehobhu; maguta makumi maviri namaviri nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:31 Ndiyo yakanga iri nhaka yorudzi rwavana vaAshuru, nemhuri dzavo maguta iwaya nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:32 Mugove wechitanhatu wakapiwa vana vaNafutari, ivo vana vaNafutari nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua19:33 Muganhu wavo wakabva paHerefi, kubva pamuoki weZaananimi, neAdhami–nekebhi, neJabhuneeri, kusvikira paRakumi, ndokuguma paJodhani;" 
Joshua19:34 ipapo muganhu wakadzoka kumabvazuva, ndokuenda Azinoti–tabhori; ndokubvapo, ndokuenda Hukoki; ndokusvika kwaZebhuruni kurutivi rwezasi, ndokusvika kwaAshuru kumavirazuva, ndokusvika kwaJudha paJodhani kumabvazuva." 
Joshua19:35 Maguta akanga akakombwa namasvingo akanga ari Zidhimu, neZera, neHamati, neRakati, neKinereti," 
Joshua19:36 neAdhama, neRama, neHazoru," 
Joshua19:37 neKedheshi, neEdhirei, neEni–harori," 
Joshua19:38 neIroni, neMigadhari–eri, neHoremu, neBheti–anati, neBheti–shemeshi; maguta ane gumi namapfumbamwe, nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:39 Ndiyo yakanga iri nhaka yorudzi rwavana vaNafutari nemhuri dzavo, maguta iwaya nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:40 Mugove wechinomwe wakapiwa rudzi rwavana vaDhani nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua19:41 Muganhu wenhaka yavo wakanga uri Zora, neEshitaori, neIri–shemeshi;" 
Joshua19:42 neShaarabhini, neAjaroni, neItira," 
Joshua19:43 neEroni, neTimuna, neEkironi," 
Joshua19:44 neEriteke, neGibhetoni, neBhaarati," 
Joshua19:45 neJehudhi, neBheni–bheraki, neGati–rimoni," 
Joshua19:46 neMe–jarikoni, neRakoni, nenyika yakatarisana neJopa." 
Joshua19:47 Asi nyika yavana vaDhani yakanga iri dukusa; naizvozvo vana vaDhani vakandorwa neReshemi, vakarikunda, vakariparadza neminondo inopinza, vakapiwa guta iro, vakagaramo; vakatumidza Reshemi zita rinonzi Dhani, zita rababa vavo Dhani." 
Joshua19:48 Ndiyo yakanga iri nhaka yorudzi rwavana vaDhani nemhuri dzavo, namaguta iwaya nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:49 Naizvozvo vakapedza kugovera nyika, yakanga iri nhaka yavo nemiganhu yayo; vana VaIsiraeri vakapa Joshua mwanakomana waNuni nhaka yake pakati pavo;" 
Joshua19:50 sezvavakanga varairwa naJehovha, vakamupa guta raakakumbira, Timunati–sera, panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu; akavaka guta iro, akagaramo." 
Joshua19:51 Ndidzo nhaka dzakagoverwa nemijenya paShiro pamberi paJehovha, pamukova wetende rokusangana, nomupristi Eriazari, naJoshua mwanakomana waNuni, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba amarudzi avana VaIsiraeri, kuti dzive nhaka dzavo. Naizvozvo vakapedza kugovera nyika." 
Joshua20:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naJoshua, akati," 
Joshua20:2 “Taura navana VaIsiraeri, uti, ‘Muzvitsaurire maguta outiziro, andakakuudzai nomuromo waMosesi;" 
Joshua20:3 kuti munhu wakauraya mumwe nokusaziva kana asina kuita maune, atizirepo;’ achava kwamuri utiziro pamutsivi weropa." 
Joshua20:4 Anofanira kutizira kune rimwe ramaguta iwayo, agondomira panopindwa napo pasuwo reguta, agoreva mhosva yake panzeve dzavakuru veguta iro; ipapo vanofanira kumugamuchira pakati pavo muguta, vamupe pokugara, agogara pakati pavo." 
Joshua20:5 Zvino kana mutsivi weropa achinge amutevera, haafaniri kuisa muurayi paruoko rwake, nokuti wakauraya wokwake asingaiti maune, asina kumuvenga kare." 
Joshua20:6 Zvino iye anofanira kugara muguta iro, kusvikira amira pamberi peungano atongwe, kusvikira pakufa kwoMupristi Mukuru uchavapo namazuva iwayo; ipapo muurayi anofanira kudzoka, aende kuguta rake nokumba kwake, kuguta kwaakanga atiza.”" 
Joshua20:7 Ipapo vakatsaura Kedheshi muGareriya panyika yamakomo yaNafutari, neShemi, panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, neKiriati–abha (ndiro Hebhuroni) panyika yamakomo yaJudha." 
Joshua20:8 Nemhiri kwaJodhani paJeriko kumabvazuva vakatsaura Bhezeru murenje pabani kurudzi rwaRubheni, neRamoti-giriyadhi kurudzi rwaGadhi, neGorani muBhashani kurudzi rwaManase." 
Joshua20:9 Ndiwo maguta akatsaurirwa vana VaIsiraeri, vose navatorwa vaigara pakati pavo, kuti ani naani unouraya munhu nokusaziva atizireko, arege kufa noruoko rwomutsivi weropa, kusvikira amira pamberi peungano." 
Joshua21:1 Zvino vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba avaRevhi vakaswedera kumupristi Eriazari, nokuna Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, nokuvakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba amarudzi avana VaIsiraeri," 
Joshua21:2 vakataura navo paShiro panyika yeKenani, vakati, “Jehovha wakaraira nomuromo waMosesi, kuti tipiwe maguta matingagara, namafuro awo emombe dzedu.”" 
Joshua21:3 Vana VaIsiraeri vakapa vaRevhi panhaka dzavo maguta awa namafuro awo, sezvavakanga varairwa naJehovha." 
Joshua21:4 Mhuri dzavaKohati dzikagoverwa nemijenya; vana vomupristi Aroni vaiva vavaRevhi vakagoverwa nemijenya maguta ane gumi namatatu pakati porudzi rwaJudha, norwaSimioni, norwaBhenjamini." 
Joshua21:5 Asi vamwe vevana vaKohati vakagoverwa nemijenya maguta ane gumi pakati pemhuri dzorudzi rwaEfuremu, norudzi rwaDhani, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase." 
Joshua21:6 Vana vaGerishoni vakagoverwa nemijenya maguta ane gumi namatatu pamhuri dzorudzi rwaIsakari, norudzi rwaAshuru, norudzi rwaNafutari, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase muBhashani." 
Joshua21:7 Vana vaMerari nemhuri dzavo vakapiwa maguta ane gumi namaviri pakati porudzi rwaRubheni, norudzi rwaGadhi, norudzi rwaZebhuruni." 
Joshua21:8 Vana VaIsiraeri vakapa vaRevhi maguta iwayo namafuro awo nemijenya, sezvakanga zvarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMosesi." 
Joshua21:9 Vakavapa maguta iwayo, akarehwa mazita awo pano, pakati porudzi rwavana vaJudha, norudzi rwavana vaSimioni." 
Joshua21:10 Akava avana vaAroni, vemhuri dzavaKohati, vaiva vana vaRevhi, nokuti ndivo vakatanga kugoverwa nemijenya." 
Joshua21:11 Vakavapa Kiriati–abha, iye Abha wakanga ari baba vaAnaki (ndiro Hebhuroni), panyika yamakomo yaJudha, namafuro aro akanga akaripoteredza." 
Joshua21:12 Asi minda yeguta, nemisha yaro, vakazvipa Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune, zvive zvake." 
Joshua21:13 Vakapa vana vomupristi Aroni Hebhuroni namafuro aro, rakanga riri guta routiziro romuurayi, uye Ribhina namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:14 neJatiri namafuro aro, neEshitemoa namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:15 neHoroni namafuro aro, neDhebhiri namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:16 neAini namafuro aro, neJuta namafuro aro, neBheti–shemeshi namafuro aro; maguta mapfumbamwe pakati pamarudzi iwayo maviri." 
Joshua21:17 Napakati porudzi rwaBhenjamini Gibheoni namafuro aro, neGebha namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:18 neAnatoti namafuro aro, neArinoni namafuro aro; maguta mana." 
Joshua21:19 Maguta ose avana vaAroni mupristi akanga ari maguta ane gumi namatanhatu namafuro awo. 
Joshua21:20 Mhuri dzavana vaKohati, ivo vaRevhi vakanga vasara vevana vaKohati, vakapiwa maguta avo nemijenya pakati porudzi rwaEfuremu." 
Joshua21:21 Vakavapa Shekemu namafuro aro panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, raiva guta routiziro romuurayi, neGezeru namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:22 neKibhizaimi namafuro aro, neBheti–horoni namafuro aro; maguta mana." 
Joshua21:23 Napakati porudzi rwaDhani, Eriteki namafuro aro, neGebhitoni namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:24 neAijaroni namafuro aro, neGatirimoni namafuro aro; maguta mana." 
Joshua21:25 Napakati pehafu yorudzi rwaManase, Taanaki namafuro aro, neGatirimoni namafuro aro; maguta maviri." 
Joshua21:26 Maguta ose emhuri dzavakanga vasara vevana vaKohati aiva gumi namafuro awo. 
Joshua21:27 Vana vaGerishoni, vemhuri dzavaRevhi, vakavapa Gorani namafuro aro, raiva guta routiziro romuurayi, pakati pehafu yorudzi rwaManase, neBhesheitera namafuro aro; maguta maviri." 
Joshua21:28 Napakati porudzi rwaIsakari, Kishioni namafuro aro, neDhabherati namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:29 neJarimuti namafuro aro, neEni–ganimi namafuro aro; maguta mana." 
Joshua21:30 Napakati porudzi rwaAshuru, Mishari namafuro aro, neAbhidhoni namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:31 neHerikati namafuro aro, neRehobhu namafuro aro; maguta mana." 
Joshua21:32 Napakati porudzi rwaNafutari, Kedheshi muGareriya namafuro aro, raiva guta routiziro romuurayi, neHamoti–dhori namafuro aro, neKaritani namafuro aro; maguta matatu." 
Joshua21:33 Maguta ose avaGerishoni, nemhuri dzavo, akanga ari maguta ane gumi namatatu namafuro awo." 
Joshua21:34 Mhuri dzavana vaMerari, ivo vakanga vasara kuvaRevhi, vakavapa pakati porudzi rwaZebhuruni, Jokineamu namafuro aro, neKatira namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:35 neDhimuna namafuro aro, neNaharari namafuro aro; maguta mana." 
Joshua21:36 Napakati porudzi rwaRubheni, Bhezeru namafuro aro, neJahazi namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:37 neKedhemoti namafuro aro, neMofaati namafuro aro; maguta mana." 
Joshua21:38 Napakati porudzi rwaGadhi, Ramoti-gireyadhi namafuro aro, raiva guta routiziro romuurayi, neMahanaimu namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:39 neHeshibhoni namafuro aro, neJazeri namafuro aro; iwo ose maguta mana." 
Joshua21:40 Maguta awa ose akanga ari avana vaMerari, nemhuri dzavo, ivo vakanga vasara vemhuri dzavaRevhi; mugove wavo wakanga uri maguta ane gumi namaviri." 
Joshua21:41 Maguta ose avaRevhi pakati penhaka yavana VaIsiraeri aiva maguta ana makumi mana namasere namafuro awo. 
Joshua21:42 Maguta awa ose akanga ana mafuro awo, guta rimwe nerimwe; ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita maguta iwayo ose." 
Joshua21:43 Saizvozvo Jehovha akapa VaIsiraeri nyika yose yaakanga apika, kuti uchaipa madzibaba avo; ikava yavo, vakagaramo." 
Joshua21:44 Jehovha akavazorodza kumativi ose, pose paakanga apikira madzibaba avo; hakuna munhu kuvavengi vavo vose wakamira pamberi pavo; asi Jehovha akaisa vavengi vavo vose pamaoko avo." 
Joshua21:45 Hakuna chinhu chimwe chezvinhu zvakanaka zvakanga zvataurwa naJehovha kuimba yaIsiraeri chakakona; zvose zvakaitika. 
Joshua22:1 Zvino Joshua akadana vaRubheni navaGadhi nehafu yorudzi rwaManase," 
Joshua22:2 akati kwavari, “Makaita zvose zvamakarairwa naMosesi muranda waJehovha, nokuteererawo izwi rangu pazvose zvandakakurairai;" 
Joshua22:3 hamuna kusiya hama dzenyu mazuva awa mazhinji kusvikira nhasi, asi makaita chirevo chamakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua22:4 Zvino Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakazorodza hama yenyu, sezvaakataura kwavari; naizvozvo zvino dzokai, muende kumatende enyu, kunyika yenyu yamakapiwa naMosesi muranda waJehovha, mhiri kwaJodhani." 
Joshua22:5 Asi chenjerai kwazvo kuti muite mirau nemirairo yamakarairwa naMosesi muranda waJehovha, kuti mude Jehovha Mwari wenyu, nokufamba munzira dzake dzose, nokuchengeta mirairo yake, nokumunamatira, nokumushumira nemwoyo yenyu yose uye nemweya yenyu yose.”" 
Joshua22:6 Zvino Joshua akavaropafadza, akavaendesa; vakaenda kumatende avo." 
Joshua22:7 Zvino Mosesi wakanga apa imwe hafu yorudzi rwaManase nhaka yavo muBhashani; asi imwe hafu yorudzi yakapiwa nhaka yayo naJoshua, pamwechete nehama dzavo, mhiri kwaJodhani kumavirazuva. Zvino Joshua akavaropafadzawo pakuvaendisa kwake kumatende avo." 
Joshua22:8 Akataura navo, akati, “Dzokerai kumatende enyu mune pfuma zhinji nemombe zhinji kwazvo, nesirivha, nendarama nendarira, namatare, nenguo zhinji, mugovane nehama dzenyu zvamakapamba kuvavengi venyu.”" 
Joshua22:9 Zvino vana vaRubheni navana vaGadhi, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase vakadzoka, vakaparadzana navana VaIsiraeri paShiro munyika yeKenani, vakaenda kunyika yeGiriadhi, kunyika yavakanga vapiwa kuti ive yavo, sezvakanga zvataurwa nomurairo waJehovha nomuromo waMosesi." 
Joshua22:10 Zvino vakati vasvika panyika yapaJodhani, munyika yeKenani, vana vaRubheni navana vaGadhi nehafu yorudzi rwaManase vakavaka atari paJodhani, atari huru kana ichionekwa." 
Joshua22:11 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakanzwa, zvichinzi, “Tarirai, vana vaRubheni navana vaGadhi nehafu yorudzi rwaManase vavaka atari pakatarisana neKenani, panyika yapaJodhani, kurutivi rwavana VaIsiraeri.”" 
Joshua22:12 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakati vachinzwa izvozvo, ungano yose yavana VaIsiraeri vakaungana paShiro, kuti vaende kundorwa navo." 
Joshua22:13 Ipapo vana VaIsiraeri vakatuma Finiasi, mwanakomana womupristi Eriazari, kuvana vaRubheni, nokuvana vaGadhi nokuhafu yorudzi rwaManase, panyika yeGiriadhi," 
Joshua22:14 iye namachinda ane gumi naye, muchinda mumwe weimba imwe neimwe yamadzibaba pakati pamarudzi aVaIsiraeri; mumwe nomumwe wavo wakanga ari mukuru wedzimba dzamadzibaba avo pakati pezviuru zvaVaIsiraeri." 
Joshua22:15 Ivo vakasvika kuvana vaRubheni, nokuvana vaGadhi, nokuhafu yorudzi rwaManase, kunyika yeGiriadhi, vakataura navo, vakati," 
Joshua22:16 “Zvanzi neungano yaJehovha, ‘Kudarika uku kwamakadarikira Mwari waIsiraeri nako kwakadiniko, nokuti munotsauka nhasi pakutevera Jehovha, zvamakazvivakira atari, kuti mumukire Jehovha nhasi?’" 
Joshua22:17 Ko zvakaipa zvePeori zvigere kutiringana here, izvo zvatichigere kuzvinatsa pazviri kusvikira zuva ranhasi, kunyangwe chirwere chakawira ungano yaJehovha," 
Joshua22:18 zvamunoda kutsauka nhasi pakutevera Jehovha? Zvino zvamakamukira Jehovha nhasi, mangwana uchatsamwira ungano yose yaIsiraeri." 
Joshua22:19 Asi kana nyika yenyu isakanaka, yambukirai kunyika yaJehovha, pagere tabhenakeri yaJehovha, kuti mupiwe nhaka pakati pedu; asi regai kumukira Jehovha, kana kutimukira isu, pakuzvivakira imwe atari parutivi rweatari yaJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Joshua22:20 Ko Akani, mwanakomana waZera, haana kudarika pachinhu chakayereswa, kutsamwa kukawira ungano yose yaIsiraeri here? Munhu uyo akasafa ari oga pakutadza kwake.”" 
Joshua22:21 Ipapo vana vaRubheni, navana vaGadhi, nehafu yorudzi rwaManase vakapindura, vakati kuvakuru vezviuru vaVaIsiraeri," 
Joshua22:22 “Mwari, iye Mwari Jehovha, Mwari, iye Mwari Jehovha, iye unoziva, naIsiraeri vachaziva; kana takamukira Jehovha, kana kumudarikira, (musatiponesa nhasi,)" 
Joshua22:23 zvatakazvivakira atari, kuti titsauke tirege kutevera Jehovha; kana takazviita kuti tibayire pamusoro payo zvipiriso zvinopiswa, kana zvipiriso zvoupfu, kana kubayirapo zvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, Jehovha amene ngaabvunzisise pamusoro pazvo;" 
Joshua22:24 azive kana tisina kuita chinhu ichi nokuchenjera uye nokufunga, tichiti, ‘Zvimwe panguva inouya vana venyu vachataura navana vedu,’ vachiti, ‘Imi mune mhaka yeiko naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri?’" 
Joshua22:25 Nokuti Jehovha akaita Jodhani muganhu pakati pedu nemi, imi vana vaRubheni navana vaGadhi; hamuna mugove kuna Jehovha; naizvozvo vana venyu vangaregesa vana vedu kutya Jehovha." 
Joshua22:26 Saka takati, ‘Ngatizvigadzire, tizvivakire atari, isati iri yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, kana yokubayirapo;" 
Joshua22:27 asi chive chapupu pakati pedu nemi, napakati pavana vedu vanotitevera, kuti tichaita basa raJehovha pamberi pake nezvipiriso zvedu zvinopiswa, nezvibairo zvedu, nezvipiriso zvedu zvokuyananisa,’ kuti vana venyu varege kuzoti kuvana vedu panguva inouya, ‘Hamuna mugove kuna Jehovha.’" 
Joshua22:28 Naizvozvo takati, ‘Kana vachizodaro kwatiri kana kuvana vedu panguva inouya,’ isu tichati, ‘Tarirai muone mufananidzo weatari yaJehovha, yakaitwa namadzibaba edu, isati iri yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, kana yokubayirapo; asi chapupu pakati pedu nemi.’" 
Joshua22:29 Mwari atibatsire, tirege kumukira Jehovha, nokutsauka nhasi pakutevera Jehovha, tichavaka atari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa neyezvipiriso zvoupfu, kana yokubayirapo, parutivi rweatari yaJehovha, Mwari wedu, iri pamberi petabhenakeri yake.”" 
Joshua22:30 Zvino Finiasi mupristi, namachinda eungano, ivo vakuru vezviuru zvaVaIsiraeri, vakanga vanaye, vakati vanzwa mashoko akataurwa navana vaRubheni, navana vaGadhi, navana vaManase, vakafara nazvo." 
Joshua22:31 Finiasi, mwanakomana waEriazari mupristi, akati kuvana vaRubheni, nokuvana vaGadhi, nokuvana vaManase, “Nhasi tinoziva kuti Jehovha ari pakati pedu, nokuti hamuna kudarikira Jehovha pachinhu ichi; makarwira vana VaIsiraeri zvino paruoko rwaJehovha.”" 
Joshua22:32 Ipapo Finihasi, mwanakomana waEriazari mupristi, namachinda vakabva kuvana vaRubheni navana vaGadhi, panyika yeGiriadhi, vakadzokera kunyika yeKenani, kuvana VaIsiraeri, vakavadzosera shoko iro." 
Joshua22:33 Zvino shoko iro rakafadza vana VaIsiraeri, vana VaIsiraeri vakakudza Mwari; havana kuzotaura kuti vachandorwa navo, kuti vaparadze nyika makanga mugere vana vaRubheni navana vaGadhi." 
Joshua22:34 Zvino vana vaRubheni navana vaGadhi vakatumidza atari iyo: Ndicho chapupu pakati pedu, kuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari." 
Joshua23:1 Zvino mazuva mazhinji akati apfuura, Jehovha azorodza VaIsiraeri pavavengi vavo vose vakanga vakavapoteredza, naJoshua akwegura, ava namakore mazhinji," 
Joshua23:2 Joshua akadana VaIsiraeri vose, vakuru vavo navatungamiriri vavo, navatongi vavo, navatariri vavo, akati kwavari, “Ndakwegura, ndava namakore mazhinji." 
Joshua23:3 Imi makaona zvose zvakaitirwa ndudzi idzi dzose naJehovha Mwari wenyu nokuda kwenyu; nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu ndiye wakakurwirai. 
Joshua23:4 Tarirai, ndakakupai ndudzi idzi dzasara, ive nhaka yamarudzi enyu, kubva paJodhani, pamwechete nendudzi dzose dzandakaparadza, kusvikira kugungwa guru kumavirazuva." 
Joshua23:5 Jehovha Mwari wenyu amene uchadzibudisa pamberi penyu, nokudzidzinga murege kudziona, kuti mupiwe nyika yadzo, sezvamakaudzwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua23:6 Naizvozvo simbai kwazvo kuti muchengete nokuita zvose zvakanyorwa muBhuku yoMurairo waMosesi, murege kutsauka kwazviri kana kurudyi kana kuruboshwe;" 
Joshua23:7 kuti murege kuvhengana nendudzi idzo dzakasara pakati penyu, kana kureva mazita avamwari vavo, kana kupikisa navo, kana kuvashumira, kana kuvapfugamira;" 
Joshua23:8 asi namatirai Jehovha Mwari wenyu, sezvamakaita kusvikira nhasi." 
Joshua23:9 Nokuti Jehovha akadzinga pamberi penyu ndudzi huru dzaiva nesimba; asi kana murimi, hakuna munhu wakamira pamberi penyu kusvikira nhasi." 
Joshua23:10 Munhu mumwe kwamuri uchadzinga vanhu vane chiuru chezana, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu ndiye unokurwirai, sezvakakuudzai." 
Joshua23:11 Naizvozvo chenjerai kuti mude Jehovha Mwari wenyu. 
Joshua23:12 Nokuti kana mukatongodzokera, mukanamatira vakasara vendudzi idzi, idzo dzakasara pakati penyu, mukawanana navo, mukapinda kwavari, naivo vakapinda kwamuri;" 
Joshua23:13 muzive zvirokwazvo, kuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu haangadzingi ndudzi idzi pamberi penyu; asi vachava musungo neriva kwamuri, netyava kunhivi dzenyu, neminzwa pameso enyu, kusvikira mapera panyika iyo yakanaka yamakapiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua23:14 “Tarirai, nhasi ini ndoenda nenzira yenyika yose; zvino imi munoziva mumwoyo yenyu yose nomumweya yenyu yose, kuti hapana chinhu chimwe pazvose zvakanaka zvakataurwa pamusoro penyu naJehovha Mwari wenyu, chakakona." 
Joshua23:15 Zvino sezvamakaitirwa izvo zvinhu zvose zvakanaka, zvakataurwa pamusoro penyu naJehovha Mwari wenyu, saizvozvo Jehovha uchakuitirai zvose zvakaipa, kusvikira akuparadzai panyika yakanaka, yamakapiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua23:16 Kana mukadarika sungano yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, yaakakurairai, mukandoshumira vamwe vamwari, mukapfugama pamberi pavo, ipapo kutsamwa kwaJehovha kuchakumukirai, mukakurumidza kupera, nokubviswa panyika iyo yakanaka, yamakapiwa naye.”" 
Joshua24:1 Zvino Joshua akaunganidza marudzi ose aVaIsiraeri paShekemu, akadana vakuru VaIsiraeri, navatungamiriri vavo, navatongi vavo, navatariri vavo; vakazviisa pamberi paMwari." 
Joshua24:2 Joshua akati kuvanhu vose, “Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Madzibaba enyu aigara kare mhiri kweRwizi, iye Tera, baba vaAbhurahamu, naNahori, achishumira vamwe vamwari.’" 
Joshua24:3 Ini ndikatora baba venyu Abhurahamu mhiri kweRwizi, ndikamufambisa panyika yose yeKenani, ndikawanza vana vake, ndikamupa Isaka." 
Joshua24:4 Ndikapa Isaka Jakobho naEsau; ndikapa Esau gomo reSeiri, rive rake; Jakobho navana vake vakaburukira Ijipiti." 
Joshua24:5 Ndikatuma Mosesi naAroni, ndikatambudza Ijipiti, nezvandakaita pakati payo; pashure ndikakubudisai." 
Joshua24:6 Ndikabudisa madzibaba enyu paIjipiti, mukasvika pagungwa; vaIjipiti vakatevera madzibaba enyu vane ngoro uye navanhu vakatasva mabhiza kusvikira paGungwa Dzvuku." 
Joshua24:7 Zvino nguva yavakachema kuna Jehovha, akaisa rima pakati penyu navaIjipiti, akauyisa gungwa pamusoro pavo, akavafukidza; meso enyu akaona zvandakaita paIjipiti, mukagara murenje mazuva mazhinji." 
Joshua24:8 Ndikakusvitsai kunyika yaVaAmori, vakanga vagere mhiri kwaJodhani; ivo vakarwa nemi ndikavaisa mumaoko enyu, nyika yavo ikava yenyu, ndikavaparadza pamberi penyu." 
Joshua24:9 Zvino Bharaki mwanakomana waZipori, mambo waMoabhu, akasimuka, akarwa naIsiraeri, akatuma nhume kundodana Bharamu, mwanakomana waBheori, kuti amutuke." 
Joshua24:10 Asi ini ndakaramba kunzwa Bharamu, naizvozvo wakaramba achingokuropafadzai; naizvozvo ndakakurwirai paruoko rwake." 
Joshua24:11 Zvino makayambuka Jodhani, mukasvika paJeriko; varume veJeriko vakarwa nemi, vaiti: VaAmori, navaPerezi, naVaKenani, naVaHeti, naVaGirigashi, naVaHivhi, naVaJebhusi; ndikavaisa mumaoko enyu." 
Joshua24:12 Ndikatuma pamberi penyu mago, akavadzinga pamberi penyu, iwo madzimambo maviri aVaAmori; havana kudzingwa neminondo yenyu kana nouta hwenyu." 
Joshua24:13 Ndikakupai nyika yamusina kurima, namaguta amusina kuvaka, mamugere zvino; munodya minda yemizambiringa neyemiorivhi yamusina kusima." 
Joshua24:14 “Naizvozvo ityai Jehovha, zvino, mumushumire nomwoyo wose nezvokwadi; rashai vamwari vaishumira namadzibaba enyu mhiri kweRwizi nemuIjipiti, imi mushumire Jehovha." 
Joshua24:15 Kana kuchiti zvakaipa kushumira Jehovha, zvisarudzirei nhasi wamunoda kushumira, kana vamwari vaishumirwa namadzibaba enyu mhiri kweRwizi, kana vamwari vaVaAmori vamugere munyika yavo; asi kana ndirini naveimba yangu tichashumira Jehovha.”" 
Joshua24:16 Ipapo vanhu vakapindura vakati, “Mwari atibatsire, kuti tirege kurasha Jehovha tichishumira vamwe vamwari." 
Joshua24:17 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wedu, ndiye wakatibudisa panyika yeIjipiti, isu namadzibaba edu, paimba youranda; ndiye wakaita zviratidzo zvikuru tichizviona, akatichengeta panzira yose yatakafamba nayo, napakati pendudzi dzose dzatakapfuura nokwadziri." 
Joshua24:18 Jehovha ndiye wakadzinga ndudzi dzose pamberi pedu, ivo VaAmori vakanga vagere munyika ino; naizvozvo nesuwo tichashumira Jehovha, nokuti ndiye Mwari wedu.”" 
Joshua24:19 Zvino Joshua akati kuvanhu, “Hamungagoni kushumira Jehovha, nokuti ndiMwari mutsvene, ndiMwari une godo, haangakukanganwiriyi kudarika kwenyu nezvivi zvenyu." 
Joshua24:20 Kana mukarasha Jehovha, mukashumira vamwari vavatorwa, iye uchakushandukirai nokukuitirai zvakaipa, nokukuparadzai, ambokuitirai zvakanaka.”" 
Joshua24:21 Ipapo vanhu vakati kuna Joshua, “Kwete, asi tichashumira Jehovha.”" 
Joshua24:22 Joshua akati kuvanhu, “Munozvipupurira kuti makatsaura Jehovha kuti mumushumire. Ivo vakati, ‘Tiri zvapupu hedu.’" 
Joshua24:23 “Naizvozvo zvino rashai vamwari vavatorwa vari pakati penyu murerekere mwoyo yenyu kuna Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri.” 
Joshua24:24 Vanhu vakati kuna Joshua, “Jehovha Mwari wedu ndiye watichashumira, tichateerera izwi rake.”" 
Joshua24:25 Naizvozvo Joshua akaita sungano navanhu musi iwoyo, akavasimbisira mutemo nomurairo." 
Joshua24:26 Joshua akanyora mashoko iwayo muBhuku roMurairo waMwari, akatora ibwe guru, akarimisa pasi pomuouki, wakanga uri paimba tsvene yaJehovha." 
Joshua24:27 Joshua akati kuvanhu vose, “Tarirai, ibwe iri richakupupurirai, nokuti rakanzwa mashoko ose atakataura naJehovha; naizvozvo richakupupurirai, kuti murege kuzoramba Mwari wenyu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Naizvozvo Joshua akaendisa vanhu, mumwe nomumwe akaenda kunhaka yake." 
Joshua24:29 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo Joshua mwanakomana waNuni, muranda waJehovha, wakafa, ava namakore ane zana negumi." 
Joshua24:30 Vakamuviga panyika yanhaka yake paTimunati–sera, panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, nechokumusoro kwegomo reGaashi." 
Joshua24:31 VaIsiraeri vakashumira Jehovha mazuva ose aJoshua, namazuva ose avakuru vakanga vachiri vapenyu Joshua atofa, ivo vakanga vakaziva mabasa ose akanga aitirwa VaIsiraeri naJehovha." 
Joshua24:32 Mapfupa aJosefa, akanga auya navana VaIsiraeri pakubuda kwavo Ijipiti, vakaaviga paShekemu, panzvimbo yenyika yakanga yatengwa naJakobho kuvana vaHamori, baba vaShekemu, nezana remari; ikazova nhaka yavana vaJosefa." 
Joshua24:33 Zvino Eriazari, mwanakomana waAroni, akafa, vakamuviga muchikomo chomwanakomana wake Finiasi, chaakanga apiwa munyika yamakomo yaEfuremu." 
Judges1:1 Zvino Joshua wakati afa, vana VaIsiraeri vakabvunza Jehovha, vakati, “Ndianiko kwatiri anofanira kutanga kundorwa naVaKenani?”" 
Judges1:1 Zvino Joshua wakati afa, vana VaIsiraeri vakabvunza Jehovha, vakati, “Ndianiko kwatiri anofanira kutanga kundorwa naVaKenani?”" 
Judges1:2 Jehovha akati, “Judha ndiye unofanira kuenda; tarirai ndakaisa nyika iyi mumaoko ake.”" 
Judges1:3 Zvino Judha akati kuna Simioni mukuru wake, “Hendei tose kumugove wangu, tirwe naVaKenani, neni ndigoenda newe kumugove wako.” Ipapo Simioni akaenda naye." 
Judges1:4 Zvino Judha akaenda, Jehovha akaisa VaKenani navaPerizi mumaoko ake, vakauraya muBhezeki varume vavo vane zviuru zvine gumi." 
Judges1:5 Vakawana Adhoni–bhezeki muBhezeki, vakarwa naye, vakauraya VaKenani navaPerizi." 
Judges1:6 Asi Adhoni–bhezeki wakatiza; vakamutevera, vakamubata, ndokumugura magunwe ake namagunwe amakumbo ake." 
Judges1:7 Ipapo Adhoni–bhezeki akati, “Madzimambo ana makumi manomwe, akanga akagurwa magunwe awo namagunwe amakumbo awo, ainonga zvokudya zvawo pasi petafura yangu; sezvandakaita ini, Mwari wakanditsivawo.” Vakaenda naye Jerusaremu, akafirapo." 
Judges1:8 Zvino vana vaJudha vakandorwa neJerusaremu, vakarikunda, vakavauraya neminondo inopinza, vakapisa guta nomoto." 
Judges1:9 Pashure vana vaJudha vakaburuka vakandorwa naVaKenani, vakanga vagere panyika yamakomo, nezasi nokumapani." 
Judges1:10 Zvino vaJudha vakandorwa naVaKenani vakanga vagere Hebhuroni (zvino zita reHebhuroni kare raiva Kiriati–abha); vakaparadza Sheshai, naAhimani, naTarimani." 
Judges1:11 Vakabvapo, vakandorwa navanhu vakanga vagere Dhebhiri. (Zvino zita reDhebhiri kare raiva Kiriati–seferi)." 
Judges1:12 Karebhu akati, “Munhu unorwa neKiriati–seferi, akarikunda, ndichamupa mukunda wangu Akisa, ave mukadzi wake.”" 
Judges1:13 Ipapo Otinieri, mwanakomana waKenazi, munun'una waKarebhu, akarikunda; iye akamupa mukunda wake Akisa, akava mukadzi wake." 
Judges1:14 Zvino iye wakati achisvika kwaari, akamukurudzira kuti akumbire munda kuna baba vake; zvino iye akaburuka pambongoro yake, Karebhu akati kwaari, “Unoreveiko?”" 
Judges1:15 Akati, “Ndipei chipo; zvamakandiisa kunyika yezasi, ndipeiwo matsime emvura.” Akamupa matsime okumusoro namatsime ezasi." 
Judges1:16 Zvino vana vomuKeni, mukarabwa waMosesi, vakabuda paguta remichindwe, vakakwira pamwechete navana vaJudha kurenje raJudha, riri zasi kweAradhi; vakandogara navanhu voko." 
Judges1:17 Judha akaenda naSimioni mukuru wake, vakakunda VaKenani vakanga vagere Zefati; vakariparadza chose. Guta iro rikazotumidzwa Homa." 
Judges1:18 VaJudha ndokukundawo Gaza nenyika yaro neAshikeroni nenyika yaro, neEkironi nenyika yaro." 
Judges1:19 Jehovha akava naJudha akadzinga vanhu vakanga vagere panyika yamakomo; asi wakanga asingagoni kudzinga vakanga vagere mumupata, nokuti ivo vakanga vane ngoro dzamatare." 
Judges1:20 Vakapa Karebi Hebhuroni sezvakanga zvataurwa naMosesi, akadzingapo vana vaAnaki vatatu." 
Judges1:21 Asi vana vaBhenjamini havana kudzinga VaJebhusi vakanga vagere Jerusaremu; asi VaJebhusi vakagara Jerusaremu pamwechete navana vaBhenjamini kusvikira nhasi. 
Judges1:22 Veimba yaJosefa naivo vakakwira vakandorwa neBheti–eri, Jehovha akava navo." 
Judges1:23 Veimba yaJosefa vakandoshora Bheti–eri. (Zvino zita reguta iri pakutanga raiva Ruzi.) 
Judges1:24 Nharirire dzikaona munhu achibuda muguta, dzikati kwaari, “Dotiratidza hako pano paguta, tigokuitira zvakanaka.”" 
Judges1:25 Akavaratidza panopindwa napo paguta, vakakunda guta neminondo inopinza; asi vakatendera munhu uyo nemhuri yake yose kuenda hake." 
Judges1:26 Zvino munhu uyo akaenda kunyika yavaHeti, akandovaka guta rake, akaritumidza zita rinonzi Ruzi; ndiro zita raro kusvikira nhasi." 
Judges1:27 Manase haana kudzinga vanhu vakanga vagere Bheti–sheani, nemisha yaro, kana veTaanaki, nemisha yaro, kana vakanga vagere Dhori, nemisha yaro; kana vakanga vagere Ibhireami, nemisha yaro, kana vakanga vagere Megidho, nemisha yaro; asi VaKenani vakaramba vachida kugara panyika iyo." 
Judges1:28 Zvino VaIsiraeri vakati vasimba, vakabatisa VaKenani basa rechibharo, havana kuvadzinga chose." 
Judges1:29 Efuremu haana kudzinga VaKenani vakanga vagere Gezeri; asi VaKenani vakagara Gezeri pakati pavo. 
Judges1:30 Zebhuruni haana kudzinga vanhu vakanga vagere Kitironi, kana vakanga vagere Naharori; asi VaKenani vakagara pakati pavo, vakava vabati vechibharo." 
Judges1:31 Ashuru haana kudzinga vanhu vakanga vagere Ako, kana vakanga vagere Zidhoni, kana Akirabhi, kana Akisibhi, kana Heribha, kana Afiki, kana Rehobi;" 
Judges1:32 asi vaAshuru vakagara pakati paVaKenani, vakanga vagere munyika iyo; nokuti havana kuvadzinga." 
Judges1:33 Nafutari haana kudzinga vanhu vakanga vagere Bheti–shemeshi, kana vakanga vagere Bheti–anati; asi vakagara pakati paVaKenani, vakanga vagere panyika iyo; asi vakanga vagere Bheti–shemeshi neBheti–anati vakava vabati vechibharo." 
Judges1:34 VaAmori vakasundira vana vaDhani kunyika yamakomo, nokuti havana kuvatendera kuburukira kumupata;" 
Judges1:35 asi VaAmori vakaramba vachida kugara mugomo reHeresi, muAjaroni nomuShaaribhimu; kunyangwe zvakadaro ruoko rwaveimba yaJosefa rwakakunda, vakava vabati vechibharo." 
Judges1:36 Muganhu waVaAmori wakabva pamukwidzwa weAkirabhimu, kubva padombo, uchikwira." 
Judges2:1 Zvino mutumwa waJehovha akabva Girigari, akaenda Bhokimi, akati, “Ndakakubudisa muIjipiti, ndikakusvitsai panyika yandakapikira madzibaba enyu, ndikati, ‘Handingatongoputsi sungano yangu nemi nokusingaperi;" 
Judges2:2 nemi hamufaniri kuita sungano navanhu vagere panyika ino; munofanira kuputsa atari dzavo. Asi hamuna kuteerera izwi rangu; makaitireiko izvozvo?’ 
Judges2:3 Saka ini ndakatiwo, ‘Handingavadzingi pamberi penyu; asi vachava seminzwa kunhivi dzenyu, navamwari vavo vachava zvisungo kwamuri.’ ”" 
Judges2:4 Zvino mutumwa waJehovha akati ataura namashoko iwayo kuvana VaIsiraeri vose, vanhu vose vakachema kwazvo." 
Judges2:5 Ipapo vakatumidza nzvimbo iyo zita rinonzi Bhokimi, vakabayirapo Jehovha." 
Judges2:6 Zvino Joshua wakati aendisa vanhu, vana VaIsiraeri vakaenda mumwe nomumwe kunhaka yake, kuti vagare panyika yavo." 
Judges2:6 Zvino Joshua wakati aendisa vanhu, vana VaIsiraeri vakaenda mumwe nomumwe kunhaka yake, kuti vagare panyika yavo." 
Judges2:7 Vanhu vakashumira Jehovha mazuva ose aJoshua, namazuva ose avakuru vakanga vachiri vapenyu Joshua atofa, ivo vakanga vaona mabasa makuru akanga aitirwa VaIsiraeri naJehovha." 
Judges2:7 Vanhu vakashumira Jehovha mazuva ose aJoshua, namazuva ose avakuru vakanga vachiri vapenyu Joshua atofa, ivo vakanga vaona mabasa makuru akanga aitirwa VaIsiraeri naJehovha." 
Judges2:8 Zvino Joshua mwanakomana waNuni, muranda waJehovha akafa, ava namakore ane zana negumi." 
Judges2:8 Zvino Joshua mwanakomana waNuni, muranda waJehovha akafa, ava namakore ane zana negumi." 
Judges2:9 Vakamuviga panyika yenhaka yake paTiminati–heresi, panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, nechokumusoro kwegomo reGaashi." 
Judges2:10 Zvino vorudzi urwo rwose vakasanganiswa namadzibaba avo, rumwe rudzi rukamuka shure kwavo rwakanga rusingazivi Jehovha, kana basa raakaitira VaIsiraeri." 
Judges2:11 Vana VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, vakashumira Bhaari;" 
Judges2:12 vakarasha Jehovha mwari wamadzibaba avo, wakanga avabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, vakatevera vamwe vamwari vavanhu vakanga vakavapoteredza, vakavapfugamira, vakatsamwisa Jehovha." 
Judges2:13 Vakarasha Jehovha, vakashumira Bhaari neAshitaroti." 
Judges2:14 Kutsamwa kwaJehovha kukamukira VaIsiraeri, akavaisa mumaoko avaparadzi vakavaparadza, akavatengesa mumaoko avavengi vavo vakanga vakavapoteredza; naizvozvo vakanga vasingagoni kumira pamberi pavavengi vavo." 
Judges2:15 Pose–pose pavaienda, ruoko rwaJehovha rwairwa navo nokuvaitira zvakaipa, sezvakanga zvataurwa naJehovha, uye sezvavakanga vapikirwa naJehovha; vakatambudzika kwazvo." 
Judges2:16 Zvino Jehovha akamutsa vatongi, vaivarwira mumaoko avaivaparadza." 
Judges2:17 Kunyangwe zvakadaro havana kuteerera vatongi vavo, nokuti vakapata vachitevera vamwe vamwari, vakavapfugamira; vakakurumidza kutsauka panzira yaifamba madzibaba avo, vaiteerera mirairo yaJehovha; asi ivo havana kuita saizvozvo." 
Judges2:18 Zvino Jehovha waiti kana achinge achivamutsira mutongi, Jehovha waiva nomutongi uyo, ndokuvarwira pamaoko avavengi vavo mazuva ose omutongi uyo; nokuti Jehovha akazvidemba pamusoro pokugomba kwavo nokuda kwavaivamanikidza nokuvanetsa." 
Judges2:19 Asi kana mutongi afa, vakadzokazve, vakaita zvakaipa kupfuura madzibaba avo, pakutevera vamwe vamwari, nokuvashumira, nokuvapfugamira; havana kurega mabasa avo kana mufambiro wemwoyo yavo mikukutu." 
Judges2:20 Ipapo kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira VaIsiraeri, akati, “Rudzi urwu zvarwakadarika sungano yangu, yandakaita namadzibaba avo, vakasateerera izwi rangu," 
Judges2:21 neniwo handichazodzingi pamberi pavo rudzi rumwe rwendudzi dzakasiyiwa naJoshua pakufa kwake; 
Judges2:21 neniwo handichazodzingi pamberi pavo rudzi rumwe rwendudzi dzakasiyiwa naJoshua pakufa kwake; 
Judges2:22 kuti ndiidze VaIsiraeri nadzo, kana vachida kuchengeta nzira yaJehovha, kana vachida kufambamo, sezvayaichengetwa namadzibaba avo, kana vasingadi.”" 
Judges2:23 Naizvozvo Jehovha akasiya ndudzi idzo, akasakurumidza kudzidzinga; uye haana kudziisa muruoko rwaJoshua." 
Judges2:23 Naizvozvo Jehovha akasiya ndudzi idzo, akasakurumidza kudzidzinga; uye haana kudziisa muruoko rwaJoshua." 
Judges3:1 Zvino ndidzo ndudzi dzakasiyiwa naJehovha, kuti aidze VaIsiraeri nadzo, ivo VaIsiraeri vose vakanga vasina kuziva hondo dzose dzapaKenani;" 
Judges3:2 nemhaka iyo bedzi kuti marudzi avana VaIsiraeri azive, kuti avadzidzise kurwa, ivo vasina kumboziva izvozvo pakutanga;" 
Judges3:3 vaiti: Madzishe mashanu avaFirisitia, navaKenani vose, navaZidhoni, naVaHivhi, vakanga vagere mugomo reRebhanoni, kubva pagomo reBhaari–herimoni, kusvikira pavanopinda paHamati." 
Judges3:4 Ivo vakasiyiwapo, kuti VaIsiraeri vaidzwe navo, kuti kuzikanwe kana vachida kuteerera mirairo yaJehovha yaakanga araira madzibaba avo naMosesi." 
Judges3:5 Vana VaIsiraeri vakagara pakati paVaKenani, naVaHeti, naVaAmori, navaPerizi, naVaHivhi, navaJebhusi." 
Judges3:6 Ivo vakawana vakunda vavo, kuti vave vakadzi vavo, vakapa vanakomana vavo vakunda vavo, vakashumira vamwari vavo." 
Judges3:7 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, vakakanganwa Jehovha Mwari wavo, vakashumira vaBhaari namatanda okunamata nawo." 
Judges3:8 Saka kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira VaIsiraeri, akavatengesa muruoko rwaKushani–rishataimu, mambo weMesopotamia; vana VaIsiraeri vakashumira Kushani–rishataimi makore masere." 
Judges3:9 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakati vachichema kuna Jehovha, Jehovha akamutsira vana VaIsiraeri muponesi, wakavaponesa, iye Otinieri, mwanakomana waKenazi, munun'una waKarebhu." 
Judges3:10 Mweya waJehovha akauya pamusoro pake, akatonga VaIsiraeri, akandorwa, Jehovha akaisa Kushani–rishataimi, mambo weMesopotamia, muruoko rwake; ruoko rwake rukakunda Kushani–rishataimi." 
Judges3:11 Ipapo nyika yakazorora makore ana makumi mana. Otinieri, mwanakomana waKenazi, akafa." 
Judges3:12 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakaitazve zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, Jehovha akasimbisa Egironi, mambo waMoabhu, kuti arwe naVaIsiraeri, nokuti vakanga vaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha." 
Judges3:13 Akaunganidza kwaari vana vaAmoni navaAmareki, akandokunda VaIsiraeri, vakavatorera guta remichindwe." 
Judges3:14 Vana VaIsiraeri vakashumira Egironi, mambo waMoabhu, makore ane gumi namasere." 
Judges3:15 Asi vana VaIsiraeri vakati vachichema kuna Jehovha, Jehovha akavamutsira muponesi, iye Ehudhi, mwanakomana waGera, muBhenjamini, munhu waiva neziboshwe; vana VaIsiraeri vakatumira Egironi, mambo waMoabhu, chipo naye." 
Judges3:16 Zvino Ehudhi wakazviitira munondo wakanga wakarodzwa kunhivi dzose, wakanga wakasvika kubhiti rimwe pakureba kwavo; akausungira pasi penguo dzake pachidya chorudyi." 
Judges3:17 Ipapo akandopa Egironi, mambo waMoabhu, chipo; Egironi wakanga ari munhu wakakora kwazvo." 
Judges3:18 Zvino wakati apedza kumupa chipo, akaendisa vanhu vakanga vakatakura chipo." 
Judges3:19 Asi iye amene wakadzoka pamifananidzo yakavezwa yamabwe paGirigari, akati, “Ndine shoko rakavanzika nemi mambo.” Iye akati, “Nyararai.” Ipapo vose vakanga vamire naye vakabva kwaari." 
Judges3:20 Zvino Ehudhi akaswedera kwaari; iye wakanga agere ari oga mumba yake inotonhorera; Ehudhi akati, “Ndine shoko kwamuri rinobva kuna Mwari.” Iye ndokusimuka pachigaro chake." 
Judges3:21 Ipapo Ehudhi akatambanudza ruoko rwake rworuboshwe, akavhomora munondo pachidya chake chorudyi, akamubaya nawo nomudumbu rake;" 
Judges3:22 chibato chikapindawo chichitevera chese, mafuta akadzivira pamusoro pechese, nokuti haana kuvhomora munondo mudumbu rake, mafuta akabuda." 
Judges3:23 Zvino Ehudhi akabuda pabiravira, akapfiga mikova yeimba yokumusoro shure kwake, akaikiya." 
Judges3:24 Wakati abuda, varanda vake vakasvika, vakawana mikova yeimba yokumusoro yakapfigwa; vakati, “Zvimwe unofukidza makumbo ake paimba yake inotonhorera.”" 
Judges3:25 Zvino vakamira kusvikira vapera mano, asi haana kuzarura mikova yeimba yokumusoro; ipapo vakatora kiyi, vakazarura mukova, vakawana ishe wavo akawira pasi, afa." 
Judges3:26 Asi ivo vachanonoka, Ehudhi akapukunyuka, akapfuura mifananidzo yakavezwa yamabwe, akapukunyukira Seira." 
Judges3:27 Wakati asvikapo, akaridza hwamanda panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, vana VaIsiraeri vakaburuka naye panyika yamakomo, iye akavatungamirira." 
Judges3:28 Akati kwavari, “Nditeverei, nokuti Jehovha akaisa vaMoabhu, vavengi venyu, mumaoko enyu.” Vakaburuka vachimutevera, vakandogarira mazambuko aJodhani paiyambukira vaMoabhu, vakasatendera munhu mumwe kuyambuka." 
Judges3:29 Nenguva iyo vakauraya varume vaMoabhu vanenge zviuru zvine gumi, vose vari varume vane simba novoumhare, hakuna munhu mumwe wakapukunyuka." 
Judges3:30 Naizvozvo vaMoabhu vakakundwa musi iwoyo noruoko rwaVaIsiraeri, nyika ikazorora makore ana makumi masere." 
Judges3:31 Shure kwake kwakanga kuna Shamugari, mwanakomana waAnati, wakauraya kuvaFirisitia vana mazana matanhatu norutanda rwokubaya mombe narwo; iye akaponesawo VaIsiraeri." 
Judges4:1 Zvino shure kwokufa kwaEhudhi vana VaIsiraeri vakaitazve zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha. 
Judges4:2 Jehovha akavatengesa muruoko rwaJabhini, mambo weKenani, wakanga achibata ushe paHazori; mukuru wehondo yake wakanga ari Sisera, wakanga agere paHarosheti ravahedheni." 
Judges4:3 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakachema kuna Jehovha, nokuti wakanga ane ngoro dzamatare dzina mazana mapfumbamwe, akamanikidza vana VaIsiraeri kwazvo makore ana makumi maviri." 
Judges4:4 Nenguva iyo Dhebhora, muporofitakadzi, mukadzi waRapidhoti, wakanga achitonga VaIsiraeri." 
Judges4:5 Iye waigara pasi pomuchindwe waDhebhora, pakati peRama neBheti–eri, panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu; vana VaIsiraeri vaisienda kwaari kuzotongerwa mhaka dzavo." 
Judges4:6 Iye akatuma nhume kundodana Bharaki, mwanakomana waAbhinoami, paKedheshi–nafutari, akati kwaari, “Jehovha Mwari waVaIsiraeri haana kukuraira here, achiti, ‘Enda uswedere kugomo reTabhori, uende navarume vane zviuru zvine gumi vavana vaNafutari navana vaZebhuruni?" 
Judges4:7 Neni ndichatumira kwauri kurukova Kishoni, Sisera mukuru wehondo yaJabhini, nengoro dzake navanhu vake vazhinji, ndivaise muruoko rwako.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Bharaki akati kwaari, “Kana imi mukaenda neni, ini ndichaenda, asi kana imi musingaendi neni, ini handingaendi.”" 
Judges4:9 Iye akati, “Zvirokwazvo ndichaenda newe, asi iwe haungakudzwi parwendo urwu rwaunofamba, nokuti Jehovha uchatengesa Sisera muruoko rwomukadzi.” Dhebhora akasimuka, akaenda Kedheshi naBharaki." 
Judges4:10 Bharaki akakoka Zebhuruni naNafutari paKedheshi, akakwira ana varume vane zviuru zvine gumi vakanga vachimutevera; naDhebhora wakaendawo naye." 
Judges4:11 Zvino Hebheri muKeni, wakanga aparadzana navaKeni, ivo vana vaHobhabhi, mukarahwa waMosesi, akadzika tende rake kusvikira pamuouki paZaananimu, paKedheshi." 
Judges4:12 Zvino vakaudza Sisera kuti Bharaki, mwanakomana waAbhinoami, wakwira mugomo reTabhori." 
Judges4:13 Sisera akaunganidza ngoro dzake dzose, idzo ngoro dzamatare, dzina mazana mapfumbamwe, navanhu vose vaakanga anavo, kubva paHarosheti ravahedheni kusvikira parukova Kishoni." 
Judges4:14 Zvino Dhebhora akati kuna Bharaki, “Simuka, nokuti iri ndiro zuva raJehovha, raachaisa naro Sisera muruoko rwako; Jehovha haana kukutungamirira here?” Ipapo Bharaki akaburuka pagomo reTabhori, varume vane zviuru zvine gumi vachimutevera." 
Judges4:15 Zvino Jehovha akavhundusa Sisera nengoro dzake dzose, nehondo yake yose, neminondo inopinza pamberi paBharaki; Sisera akaburuka pangoro yake, akatiza namakumbo." 
Judges4:16 Asi Bharaki wakatevera ngoro nehondo kusvikira paHarosheti ravahedheni, hondo yose yaSisera ikaurayiwa neminondo inopinza, hakuna kusara kunyangwe nomumwechete." 
Judges4:17 Asi Sisera wakatiza namakumbo kutende raJaeri, mukadzi waHebheri, muKeni, nokuti kwakanga kuno rugare pakati paJabhini, mambo weHazori, neimba yaHebheri muKeni." 
Judges4:18 Jaeri akabuda kundosangana naSisera, akati kwaari, “Tsaukai, ishe wangu, tsaukirai henyu kwandiri, regai kutya.” Ipapo akatsaukira kwaari mutende, akamufukidza nejira." 
Judges4:19 Iye akati kwaari, “Ndipewo zvimvura, ndinwe, nokuti ndine nyota.” Akadziura dende romukaka, akamupa, akanwa, akamufukidza." 
Judges4:20 Akati kwaari, “Mira pamukova wetende, zvino kana ani naani akauya akakubvunza, achiti, ‘Pano pano munhu here?’ Uti, ‘Kwete.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Ipapo Jaeri, mukadzi waHebheri, akatora mbambo yetende, akatorawo nyundo paruoko rwake, akanatsoswedera kwaari, akarovera mbambo napachavovo chake, ikabuda neseri, ikabayira pasi, nokuti wakanga abatwa kwazvo nehope, aneta; akafa." 
Judges4:22 Zvino tarira, Bharaki wakati achitevera Sisera, Jaeri akabuda akandosangana naye, akati kwaari, “Uyai, ndikuratidzei munhu wamunotsvaka.” Iye akapinda kwaari akaona Sisera akatandavara pasi, afa, mbambo ichiri pachavovo chake." 
Judges4:23 Naizvozvo nomusi iwoyo Jehovha akakunda Jabhini, mambo weKenani, pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri." 
Judges4:24 Vana VaIsiraeri vakaramba vachingokunda Jabhini, mambo weKenani, kusvikira vaparadza Jabhini, mambo weKenani." 
Judges5:1 Zvino Dhebhora naBharaki, mwanakomana waAbhinoami, vakaimba nomusi iwoyo, vakati," 
Judges5:2 “Kudzai Jehovha, Nokuti vatungamiriri vakatungamirira VaIsiraeri, Nokuti vanhu vakauya nokuda kwavo." 
Judges5:3 Inzwai, imi madzimambo, teererai, imi machinda; Ini, iyeni, ndichaimbira Jehovha; Ndicharumbidza Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri nenziyo." 
Judges5:4 Jehovha, pakubuda kwenyu paSeiri, Pakufamba kwenyu muchibva kusango reEdhomu, Nyika yakadedera, uye denga rakadonha, Zvirokwazvo makore akadonha mvura." 
Judges5:5 Makomo akayerera pamberi paJehovha, Nairo Sinai pamberi paJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Judges5:6 Pamazuva aShamugara, mwanakomana waAnati, Pamazuva aJaeri, nzira huru dzakanga dzisingafambwi, Vafambi vaifamba nenzira dzinopota–pota." 
Judges5:7 Misha yakanga isina vanhu munaIsiraeri, yakanga isina vanhu, Kusvikira ini Dhebhora ndichisimuka, Ndichisimuka ini, mai pakati paIsiraeri." 
Judges5:8 Vakazvitsaurira vamwari vatsva; Kurwa kukavapo pamasuwo. Kwakanga kuchionekwa here nhovo kana pfumo Pakati paVaIsiraeri vane zviuru zvina makumi mana here? 
Judges5:9 Mwoyo wangu unorumbidza vabati VaIsiraeri, Avo vakauya nokuda kwavo pakati pavanhu; Kudzai Jehovha!" 
Judges5:10 Paridzai izvozvo, imi makatasva mbongoro chena, Imi, mugere pamhasa dzinokosha, Nemi, munofamba nenzira." 
Judges5:11 Kure namazwi avanopfura nouta, pavanoteka mvura, Ndipo pavacharumbidza mabasa akarurama aJehovha, Mabasa akarurama oushe hwake muna Isiraeri. Ipapo vanhu vaJehovha vakaburukira kumasuwo." 
Judges5:12 Muka, muka, Dhebhora; Muka, muka, iwe uimbe rwiyo! Simuka Bharaki, utape vatapwa vako, iwe mwanakomana waAbhinoami." 
Judges5:13 Ipapo vakanga vakasara vavakuru navanhu vakaburuka, Jehovha akaburuka nokuda kwangu kuzorwa navane simba." 
Judges5:14 Kuna Efuremu ndokwakabva vano mudzi wavo paAmareki, Vachikutevera iwe Bhenjamini pakati pavanhu vako. PaMakiri ndipo pakaburukira varairi, Nokuna Zebhuruni avo vakabata tsvimbo yokukunda." 
Judges5:15 Machinda aIsakari akanga ana Dhebhora; SaIsakari, ndizvo zvakanga zvakaitawo Bharaki; Vakamhanyira kumupata vachitevera tsoka dzake. Pahova dzaRubheni Pakanga pane mirangariro mikuru yomwoyo."
