Ruth1:1 Zvino namazuva okutonga kwavatongi nzara yakanga iripo panyika. Mumwe murume weBhetirehemu–judha akandogara panyika yaMoabhu, iye nomukadzi wake navanakomana vake vaviri." 
Ruth1:2 Zita romurume rakanga riri Erimereki, nezita romukadzi wake Naomi; mazita avanakomana vake vaviri aiva Maroni naKirioni, vaEfurata veBhetirehemu–judha. Ivo vakasvika panyika yaMoabhu, vakagarako." 
Ruth1:3 Zvino Erimereki murume waNaomi, akafa, iye akasiyiwa navanakomana vake vaviri." 
Ruth1:4 Ivo vakazviwanira vakadzi kuvaMoabhu; zita romumwe raiva Oripa, nezita romumwe Rute; vakagarako makore anenge gumi." 
Ruth1:5 Maroni naKirioni vakafawo, vose vari vaviri, mukadzi akasiyiwa asina vanakomana vake vaviri nomurume wake." 
Ruth1:6 Ipapo akasimuka navakadzi vavana vake, achida kubva kunyika yaMoabhu; nokuti wakanga anzwa achiri panyika yaMoabhu, kuti Jehovha akarangarira vanhu vake, akavapa zvokudya." 
Ruth1:7 Akabva kwaakanga ari navakadzi vavana vake vaviri, vakafamba nenzira inodzokera kunyika yaJudha." 
Ruth1:8 Zvino Naomi akati kuvakadzi vavana vake vaviri, “Endai, dzokerai mumwe nomumwe kumba kwamai vake; Jehovha ngaakuitirei zvakanaka, sezvamakaitira vakafa neniwo." 
Ruth1:9 Jehovha ngaakuzorodzei, mumwe nomumwe mumba momurume wake.” Akavatsvoda, ivo vakachema kwazvo." 
Ruth1:10 Vakati kwaari, “Kwete, tichaenda nemi kana modzokera kuvanhu venyu.”" 
Ruth1:11 Naomi akati, “Dzokai, vana vangu, muchaendereiko neni? Ini ndichina vamwe vanakomana mumuviri wangu vangazova varume venyu here?" 
Ruth1:12 Dzokai, vana vangu, endai henyu, nokuti ini ndachembera, handingawanikwi nomurumezve. Kunyangwe ndikati; ndichine tariro kuti ndingabereka vanakomana, kana ndaiva nomurume usiku hwuno," 
Ruth1:13 mungavamirira kusvikira vakura here? Mungaramba kuwanikwa navamwe varume naizvozvo here? Kwete, vana vangu, nokuti ndine shungu kwazvo nokuda kwenyu, nokuti ruoko rwaJehovha runorwa neni.”" 
Ruth1:14 Ipapo vakachemazve kwazvo, Oripa akatsvoda vamwene vake, asi Rute wakavanamatira." 
Ruth1:15 Akati, “Tarira, vakoma vako vadzokera kuvanhu vako, nokune vamwari vake; dzoka newewo, utevere vakoma vako.”" 
Ruth1:16 Rute akati, “Musandirwaririra kuti ndikusiyei, ndirege kukuteverai; nokuti pamunoenda neni ndichaendapowo; pamunovata, neni ndichavatapowo; navanhu venyu vachava vanhu vangu, naMwari wenyu achava Mwari wangu;" 
Ruth1:17 pamunondofira, ndipo pandichandofira neniwo, ndipo pandichavigwawo; Jehovha ngaandirove, arambe achidaro, kana imi neni tikaparadzaniswa nechinhu, asi norufu bedzi.”" 
Ruth1:18 Zvino wakati achiona kuti watsungirira kwazvo kuenda naye, akarega kuzotaura naye." 
Ruth1:19 Naizvozvo ivavo vaviri vakafamba kusvikira paBhetirehemu. Zvino vakati vachisvika paBhetirehemu, guta rose rikashamiswa pamusoro pavo; vakadzi vakati, “Uyu ndiye Naomi here?”" 
Ruth1:20 Akati kwavari, “Regai kundidaidza kuti Naomi, asi mundidaidza kuti Mara, nokuti waMasimbaose wakandiitira zvinovava kwazvo." 
Ruth1:21 Ndakabuda ndizere, Jehovha akandidzoserazve kumusha ndisina chinhu; munondiidzireiko Naomi, Jehovha zvaakandipupurira mhosva, waMasimbaose zvaakandimanikidza?”" 
Ruth1:22 Naizvozvo Naomi akadzoka naRute muMoabhu, mukadzi womwana wake, vachibva kunyika yaMoabhu; vakasvika paBhetirehemu vanhu votanga kukohwa bhari." 
Ruth2:1 Zvino Naomi wakanga ane hama yomurume wake, murume wakanga ane simba nepfuma, weimba yaErimereki, wainzi Bhoazi." 
Ruth2:2 Rute muMoabhu akati kuna Naomi, “Nditenderei ndiende kumunda, ndindounganidza hura dzezviyo shure kwaiye unondinzwira nyasha.” Akati kwaari, “Enda hako, mwana wangu.”" 
Ruth2:3 Iye akaenda, akandounganidza pamunda achitevera vacheki; akava neropa rakanaka kuti wakasvika pamunda waBhoazi wemba yaErimereki." 
Ruth2:4 Zvino wonei, Bhoazi wakabva Bhetirehemu, akati kuvacheki, “Jehovha ave nemi.” Ivo vakapindura, vakati kwaari, “Jehovha akuropafadzeiwo.”" 
Ruth2:5 Bhoazi akati kumuranda wake wakanga ari mutariri wavacheki, “Musikana uyu ndowaaniko?”" 
Ruth2:6 Muranda, wakanga ari mutariri wavacheki, akapindura akati, “Ndiye musikana muMoabhu, wakadzoka naNaomi vachibva kunyika yaMoabhu," 
Ruth2:7 iye akati, ‘Nditendereiwo ndiunganidze, ndinonge shure kwavacheki pakati pezvisote,’ naizvozvo akauya, akaswerapo kubva mangwanani kusvikira zvino, asi wakagara mumba nguva duku.”" 
Ruth2:8 Ipapo Bhoazi akati kuna Rute, “Chinzwa hako, mwanasikana wangu. Usandounganidza kuno mumwe munda, uye usabva pano, asi urambire pano kuvasikana vangu." 
Ruth2:9 Meso ako ngaarambe achitarira munda wavanocheka, newe uvatevere; ndakaraira majaya angu kuti varege kukutambudza. Kana ukanzwa nyota, enda hako kumidziyo, unwe mvura yakatekwa namajaya.”" 
Ruth2:10 Ipapo akawira pasi nechiso chake, akakotamira pasi, akati kwaari, “Ndanzwirwa nyasha nemi neiko, kuti muve nehanya neni, zvandiri mutorwa hangu?”" 
Ruth2:11 Bhoazi akapindura akati kwaari, “Ndakaziviswa zvose zvawakaitira vamwene vako kubva pakufa kwomurume wako, kuti wakasiya baba vako namai vako nenyika kwawakaberekerwa, ukauya kuvanhu vawakanga usingazivi kare." 
Ruth2:12 Jehovha ngaakuripire sezvawakabata, upiwe mubairo wakakwana naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, wawakauya kuzovanda pasi pamapapiro ake.”" 
Ruth2:13 Iye akati, “Ndinzwirwe hangu nyasha nemi, ishe wangu, nokuti makandinyaradza, mukataura zvakanaka nomurandakadzi wenyu, kunyangwe ndisina kufanana nomumwe wavarandakadzi venyu.”" 
Ruth2:14 Nenguva yokudya Bhoazi akati kwaari, “Uya pano, udye chingwa, usevere musuva wako muvhiniga.” Iye akagara navacheki, ivo vakamugamuchidza zviyo zvakakangwa, akadya, akaguta, akasiya zvimwe." 
Ruth2:15 Zvino wakati asimuka kuzounganidza zviyo, Bhoazi akaraira majaya ake, akati, “Ngaaunganidze hake kunyangwe napakati pezvisote, musamudzivisa." 
Ruth2:16 Mumuvhomorerewo dzimwe hura patsama, mudzisiye, aunganidze hake, musamutuka.”" 
Ruth2:17 Naizvozvo akaunganidza pamunda kusvikira madekwana; akandopura zvaakaunganidza, zvikavavarira kusvika efa imwe yebhari." 
Ruth2:18 Akazvisimudza, ndokupinda muguta; vamwene vake vakaona zvaakanga aunganidza; akabudisawo zvakanga zvasara aguta hake, akavapawo." 
Ruth2:19 Ipapo vamwene vake vakati kwaari, “Wandounganidzepiko nhasi? Wandobata basa kupiko? Iye wakava nehanya newe ngaaropafadzwe.” Akaudza vamwene vake kuti wakandobata basa kuna ani, akati, “Zita romurume wandakandobata kwaari nhasi ndiBhoazi.”" 
Ruth2:20 Naomi akati kumukadzi womwana wake, “Ngaaropafadzwe naJehovha, iye asina kubvisa ngoni dzake kuvapenyu navakafa.” Naomi akati kwaari, “Murume uyu ihama yedu yomumba, mumwe wavadzikinuri vedu.”" 
Ruth2:21 Rute muMoabhu akati, “Hongu, wakati kwandiri, ‘Unofanira kurambira kumajaya angu, kusvikira vapedza kucheka zvose zvangu.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 Naomi akati kuna Rute, mukadzi womwana wake, “Zvakanaka mwana wangu, kuti uende navasikana vake, urege kuonekwa kune mumwe munda.”" 
Ruth2:23 Naizvozvo akarambira kuvasikana vaBhoazi, akaunganidza kusvikira pakupera kwokuchekwa kwebhari nokuchekwa kwezviyo; akagara navamwene vake." 
Ruth3:1 Zvino Naomi, vamwene vake, akati kwaari, “Mwanasikana wangu, handifaniri kukutsvakira zororo, kuti ufare here?" 
Ruth3:2 Zvino Bhoazi, kwawakanga uri kuvasikana vake, haizi hama yedu here? Tarira iye ucharudza bhari madekwana ano paburiro." 
Ruth3:3 Zvino chizvishambidza, uzore mafuta, ufuke nguo dzako, ndokuburukira kuburiro, asi usazviratidza kumurume uyo, kusvikira apedza kudya nokunwa." 
Ruth3:4 Zvino kana iye achindovata, iwe unofanira kucherechedza paanondovata, ugoenda wondofukura tsoka dzake, wovatapo pasi; iye achakuudza zvauchafanira kuita.”" 
Ruth3:5 Akati kwaari, “Zvose zvamunondiudza ndichazviita.”" 
Ruth3:6 Ipapo akaburukira kuburiro, akandoita zvose zvaakanga arairwa navamwene vake." 
Ruth3:7 Zvino Bhoazi wakati apedza kudya nokunwa, mwoyo wake ukafara, akandovata pamucheto womurwi wezviyo; ipapo iye akanyatsosvika, akafukura tsoka dzake, ndokuvata pasi." 
Ruth3:8 Pakati pousiku murume akavhunduka, akapinduka, onei mukadzi avete patsoka dzake." 
Ruth3:9 Akati, “Ndiwe aniko?” Akapindura akati, “Ndini Rute, murandakadzi wenyu; fukidzai murandakadzi wenyu nenguo yenyu, nokuti muri hama yomumba.”" 
Ruth3:10 Ipapo iye akati, “Uropafadzwe naJehovha, mwanasikana wangu, nokuti pakupedzisira wakaita nokunaka kupfuura pakutanga; nokuti hauna kutevera majaya, kunyangwe aiva varombo kana vapfumi." 
Ruth3:11 Zvino mwanasikana wangu, usatya hako; ndichakuitira zvose sezvaunotaura; nokuti vose veguta rangu vanoziva kuti uri mukadzi wakanaka kwazvo." 
Ruth3:12 Zvino zvirokwazvo kuti ini ndiri hama yomumba, asi kune imwe hama iri pedyo kupfuura ini." 
Ruth3:13 Vata hako usiku hwuno; zvino mangwana, kana iye achida kukuitira zvinofanira kuitwa nehama, ndizvo hazvo; ngaaite zvinofanira kuitwa nehama; asi kana asingadi kukuitira zvinofanira kuitwa nehama, ini ndichakuitira zvinofanira kuitwa nehama, ndinopika naJehovha mupenyu; chivata hako kusvikira mangwana.”" 
Ruth3:14 Iye akavata patsoka dzake kusvikira mangwanani, akamuka vanhu vachigere kunatsoona. Nokuti wakati, “Ngazvirege kuzikanwa, kuti mukadzi wakauya paburiro.”" 
Ruth3:15 Akati, “Uya nenguo yawakafuka, uibate,” akaibata, iye akayera zviyero zvitanhatu zvebhari, akamutakudza akapinda muguta." 
Ruth3:16 Zvino wakati achisvika kuna vamwene vake, ivo vakati, “Zvazodiniko mwana wangu?” Akavaudza zvose zvaakanga aitirwa nomurume uya." 
Ruth3:17 Akati, “Iye wandipa zviyero izvi zvitanhatu zvebhari, nokuti wakati, ‘Usaenda kuna vamwene vako usina chinhu.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Zvino vakati, “Chigara hako, mwana wangu, kusvikira waona mugumo weshoko iri, nokuti murume uyu haangazorori kusvikira apedza shoko iri nhasi.”" 
Ruth4:1 Zvino Bhoazi wakakwira kusuwo, akagara pasi; hama yomumba yakanga yarehwa naBhoazi, ndokupfuura napo; akati kwaari, “Nhaiwe, tsaukira kuno, ugare pasi.” Iye akatsauka, akagara pasi." 
Ruth4:2 Akatora varume gumi kuvakuru veguta, akati, “Garai pasi pano.” Ivo vakagara pasi." 
Ruth4:3 Zvino akati kuhama yomumba, “Naomi, uya wakadzoka achibva kunyika yaMoabhu, unoda kutengesa mugove wenyika waiva womunun'una wedu Erimereki;" 
Ruth4:4 ndakati ndichakuudza izvozvo, ndichiti, ‘Chiutenga pamberi pavanhu vagere pano, napamberi pavakuru vavanhu vangu. Kana uchida kuudzikinura, undiudze, chiudzikinura hako, asi kana usingadi kuudzikinura, ndiudze, ndizive, nokuti hakuna ungaudzikinura asi iwe; unokutevera ndini.’ ” Akati, “Ndichaudzikinura ini.”" 
Ruth4:5 Zvino Bhoazi akati, “Zuva iro raunotenga munda uyo kuna Naomi, unofanira kuutengawo kuna Rute muMoabhu, mukadzi wowakafa, kuti umutse zita rowakafa panhaka yake.”" 
Ruth4:6 Hama iyo yomumba ikati, “Handigoni kuzvidzikinurira uyo, kuti ndirege kutadzira nhaka yangu, chitora hako iwe simba rangu rokudzikinura, nokuti ini handigoni kuudzikinura.”" 
Ruth4:7 Zvino iyi ndiyo tsika yakanga iripo kare pakati paVaIsiraeri kana vachidzikinura nokutsinhanha, kuti zvose zvisimbiswe. Munhu waibvisa shangu yake, ndokuipa hama yake, ndiwo waiva mutoo wokupupura nawo paVaIsiraeri." 
Ruth4:8 Zvino hama iyo yomumba ikati kuna Bhoazi, “Chizvitengera hako uyo.” Akabvisa shangu yake." 
Ruth4:9 Zvino Bhoazi akati kuvakuru nokuvanhu vose, “Imi muri zvapupu nhasi, kuti ndatenga kuna Naomi zvose zvaiva zvaErimereki, nezvose zvaiva zvaKirioni nezvaMaroni." 
Ruth4:10 Ndatengawo Rute muMoabhu, mukadzi waMaroni, kuti ave mukadzi wangu, kuti ndimutse zita rowakafa panhaka yake, zita rowakafa rirege kurova pakati pehama dzake napasuwo renzvimbo yake; imi muri zvapupu nhasi.”" 
Ruth4:11 Zvino vanhu vose vakanga vari pasuwo navakuru vakati, “Tiri zvapupu hedu. Jehovha ngaaite mukadzi uyu wauya kumba kwako saRacheri uye saRea, ivo vaviri vakavaka imba yaIsiraeri; newewo uve nesimba paEfurata, ukurumbire paBhetirehemu;" 
Ruth4:12 imba yako ive seimba yaPerezi, wakaberekerwa Judha naTamari, navana vauchapiwa naJehovha kumukadzi uyu uchiri muduku.”" 
Ruth4:13 Ipapo Bhoazi akawana Rute, akava mukadzi wake, akapinda kwaari, Jehovha akamutoresa mimba, akapona mwanakomana." 
Ruth4:14 Zvino vakadzi vakati kuna Naomi, “Jehovha ngaakudzwe, asina kukushaisa hama yomumba nhasi, zita rake rikurumbire pakati paIsiraeri." 
Ruth4:15 Uchava kwauri muraramisi woupenyu, nomuriritiri wouchembere hwako; nokuti mukadzi womwana wako uyu, unokuda, unopfuura vanakomana vanomwe kwauri, ndiye wakamubereka.”" 
Ruth4:16 Zvino Naomi akatora mwana, akamuradzika pamakumbo ake, akava mureri wake." 
Ruth4:17 Vakadzi vakanga vagere naye vakamutumidza zita, vachiti, “Naomi wakaponerwa mwanakomana;” vakamutumidza zita rinonzi Obhedhi; ndiye wakazova baba vaJese, baba vaDhavhidhi." 
Ruth4:18 Zvino ndiwo marudzi aPerezi: Perezi wakabereka Hezironi; 
Ruth4:19 Hezironi akabereka Rami, Rami akabereka Aminadhabhi;" 
Ruth4:20 Aminadhabhi akabereka Nashoni, Nashoni akabereka Sarimoni;" 
Ruth4:21 Sarimoni akabereka Bhoazi, Bhoazi akabereka Obhedhi;" 
Ruth4:22 Obhedhi akabereka Jese, Jese akabereka Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel1:1 Zvino kwakanga kuno mumwe murume weRamataimisofimi, wenyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, wainzi Erikana, mwanakomana weJehoramu, mwanakomana waErihu, mwanakomana waTohu, mwanakomana waZufi muEfurata." 
1Samuel1:2 Iye wakanga ana vakadzi vaviri, zita romumwe rainzi Hana, uye zita romumwe rainzi Penina; Penina wakanga ana vana, asi Hana wakanga asina vana." 
1Samuel1:3 Zvino murume uyu waisikwira gore rimwe nerimwe achibva kuguta rake kundonamata nokubayira Jehovha wehondo paShiro. Vanakomana vaviri vaEri, Hofini naFiniasi, vakanga varipo vari vapristi vaJehovha" 
1Samuel1:4 Zvino zuva rokubayira kwake rakati rasvika, Erikana akapa mukadzi wake Penina, navanakomana vake vose navanasikana vake migove yavo;" 
1Samuel1:5 asi Hana wakamupa migove miviri; nokuti wakanga achida Hana, asi Jehovha akanga azarira chizvaro chake." 
1Samuel1:6 Zvino muvengi wake Penina akamunetsa kwazvo, kuti azvidye mwoyo, nokuti Jehovha akazarira chizvaro chake." 
1Samuel1:7 Akaita saizvozvo gore rimwe nerimwe, kana achikwira kuimba yaJehovha; akamunetsa saizvozvo, saka wakachema, akaramba kudya." 
1Samuel1:8 Zvino murume wake Erikana akati kwaari, “Hana, unochemeiko? Unorambireiko kudya? Mwoyo wako une shungu nei? Ko ini handikupfuuriri vanakomana vane gumi here?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Saka Hana wakasimuka, vapedza kudya paShiro, uye vapedza kunwa. Zvino Eri mupristi wakanga agere pachigaro chake pamukova wetemberi yaJehovha." 
1Samuel1:10 Zvino Hana wakanga ane shungu kwazvo, akanyengetera kuna Jehovha, akachema kwazvo." 
1Samuel1:11 Akapika mhiko, akati, “Jehovha wehondo, kana mukava nehanya kwazvo nokutambudzika kwomurandakadzi wenyu, mukandirangarira, mukasakanganwa murandakadzi wenyu, asi mukapa murandakadzi wenyu mwana womukomana, ipapo ndichamupa Jehovha mazuva ose oupenyu hwake, musoro wake haungaveurwi nechisvo.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Zvino wakati achiramba achinyengetera pamberi paJehovha, Eri akacherechedza muromo wake." 
1Samuel1:13 Nokuti Hana wakanga achitaura nechomumwoyo make, miromo yake yoga yakanga ichimenyenyedzwa, asi izwi rake rakanga risinganzwiki; saka Eri wakati wabatwa newaini." 
1Samuel1:14 Eri akati kwaari, “Ucharamba wakabatwa kusvikira rinhiko? Rasha waini yako.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Hana akapindura akati, “Kwete, ishe wangu, ndiri mukadzi ane shungu pamweya, handina kunwa waini, kana zvinodhaka, asi ndadurura mweya wangu pamberi paJehovha." 
1Samuel1:16 “Musati murandakadzi wenyu mwanasikana wakaisvoipa, nokuti kusvikira zvino ndakanga ndichitaura nokuda kwokuchema kwangu kukuru nokutambudzika kwangu.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Ipapo Eri akamupindura, akati, “Enda hako norugare; Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakupe chawakakumbira kwaari.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Iye akati, “Murandakadzi wenyu ngaanzwirwe tsitsi nemi.” Naizvozvo mukadzi akaenda hake, akazodya, chiso chake chikashanduka." 
1Samuel1:19 Zvino vakamuka mangwanani, vakanamata kuna Jehovha, vakadzokera ndokusvika kumba kwavo paRama; Erikana akaziva mukadzi wake Hana, Jehovha akamurangarira." 
1Samuel1:20 Nguva yakati yapfuura, Hana akava nemimba, akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Samueri, achiti, “Nokuti ndakamukumbira kuna Jehovha.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Zvino murume Erikana navose veimba yake vakakwira kuna Jehovha kundobayira chibayiro chegore rimwe nerimwe, nokumupa sezvaakapika." 
1Samuel1:22 Asi Hana haana kukwira, nokuti wakati kumurume wake, “Handingakwiri kusvikira mwana arumurwa, ipapo ndichaenda naye, kuti asvike pamberi paJehovha, agarepo nokusingaperi.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Erikana murume wake akati kwaari, “Ita sezvaunofunga; chimbogara hako kusvikira wamurumura; asi Jehovha ngaasimbise shoko rake.” Naizvozvo mukadzi akambogara hake, akayamwisa mwanakomana wake, kusvikira amurumura." 
1Samuel1:24 Wakati amurumura, akakwira naye ane nzombe nhatu, neefa imwe youpfu, nedende rewaini, akandomuisa mumba maJehovha paShiro. Asi mwana wakanga achiri muduku." 
1Samuel1:25 Zvino vakabaya nzombe, vakaisa mwana kuna Eri." 
1Samuel1:26 Hana akati, “Ishe wangu, nomweya wenyu mupenyu, ishe wangu, ndini mukadzi wakadeya kumira pano pamberi penyu, ndichinyengetera kuna Jehovha." 
1Samuel1:27 Ndakakumbira mwana uyu, Jehovha akandipa chandakakumbira kwaari;" 
1Samuel1:28 saka neni ndamupa Jehovha; mazuva ose okurarama kwake wakapiwa Jehovha.” Akanamata kuna Jehovha ipapo. 
1Samuel2:1 Hana akanyengetera, akati, “Mwoyo wangu unofarira Jehovha, Runyanga rwangu rwakakwiridzwa muna Jehovha; Muromo wangu wakashamira vavengi vangu; Nokuti ndinofarira ruponeso rwenyu." 
1Samuel2:2 Hakuna mutsvene wakafanana naJehovha; Nokuti hakuna mumwe kunze kwenyu. Uye hakuna dombo rakafanana naMwari wedu. 
1Samuel2:3 Musaramba muchitaura muchizvikudza zvikuru, Manyawi ngaarege kubuda pamiromo yenyu, Nokuti Jehovha ndiMwari unoziva, Mabasa avanhu anoyerwa naye." 
1Samuel2:4 Uta hwavanhu vane simba vakavhunika, Vakanga vachigumburwa vakasungwa zvino nesimba." 
1Samuel2:5 Vakanga vakaguta vakandobatira zvokudya zvavo, Vakanga vane nzara vozorora. Wakanga asingabereki wakabereka vanomwe; Asi iye wakanga ana vana vazhinji voshaiwa simba." 
1Samuel2:6 Jehovha ndiye unouraya, nokuraramisawo; Ndiye unoburusira kuhwiro, nokukwidzawo." 
1Samuel2:7 Jehovha ndiye unopa urombo, ndiye unofumisawo. Ndiye unodukupisa, nokukwiridzawo." 
1Samuel2:8 Ndiye unosimudza varombo paguruva, Unosimudza rombe, achimubvisa padurunhuru; Kuti avagarise pamwechete namachinda, Avagarise nhaka yechigaro choushe chinobwinya. Nokuti mbiru dzenyika ndedzaJehovha, Iye wakateya nyika pamusoro padzo." 
1Samuel2:9 Uchachengeta tsoka dzavatsvene vake, Asi vakaipa vachanyaradzwa murima; Nokuti hakuna munhu achakunda nesimba rake." 
1Samuel2:10 Vanorwa naJehovha vachapwanyiwa; Uchavatinhirira ari kudenga; Jehovha uchatonga migumo yenyika; Uchapa mambo wake simba, Nokukwiridza runyanga rwomuzodzwa wake.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Zvino Erikana akaenda kumba kwake paRama. Mwana akabatira Jehovha pamberi pomupristi Eri. 
1Samuel2:12 Zvino vanakomana vaEri vakanga vari vanhu vakaisvoipa; havana kurangarira Jehovha. 
1Samuel2:13 Tsika yavapristi pamberi pavanhu yakanga iri iyi, Kana ani nani akauya nechibayiro, muranda womupristi waiuya ane chibayiso chenyama china meno matatu muruoko rwake, kana nyama ichibikwa;" 
1Samuel2:14 zvino ndokubaya nacho mugango, kana muhadyana, kana mugate, kana muhari; zvose zvaibudiswa nechibayiso chenyama zvaitorwa nomupristi. Ndizvo zvavaiitira VaIsiraeri vose vaiuya paShiro." 
1Samuel2:15 Zvino kunyangwe vasati vapisa mafuta, muranda womupristi waiuya, ndokuti kumunhu wakanga achibayira, “Ndipe nyama yokugochera mupristi; nokuti haangagamuchiri kwauri nyama yakabikwa, asi mbishi.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Zvino kana munhu uyo akati kwaari, “Ngavatange kupisa mafuta, ugotora hako zvose zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wako,” ipapo iye ndokuti, “Kwete, chindipa iyo zvino; kana usingadi, ndichatora nesimba.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Zvivi zvamajaya zvakanga zviri zvikuru pamberi paJehovha, nokuti vanhu vakazvidza chipiriso chaJehovha." 
1Samuel2:18 Asi Samueri waibata pamberi paJehovha, achiri mwana wake, akasungwa chiuno neefodhi yomucheka." 
1Samuel2:19 Namai vakewo vakamuitira nguo duku, vakauya nayo kwaari gore rimwe nerimwe, kana ouya nomurume wake kuzobayira chibayiro chegore rimwe nerimwe." 
1Samuel2:20 Eri akaropafadza Erikana nomukadzi wake, akati, “Jehovha ngaakupe vana kumukadzi uyu panzvimbo yaiye wamakapa Jehovha.” Vakaenda kumusha kwavo." 
1Samuel2:21 Zvino Jehovha akashanyira Hana, akava nemimba, akazobereka vanakomana vatatu navanasikana vaviri. Iye mwana Samueri akazokura pamberi paJehovha." 
1Samuel2:22 Zvino Eri wakanga akwegura kwazvo; akanzwa zvose zvakanga zvichiitirwa VaIsiraeri vose navanakomana vake, namavatire avaiita navakadzi vaibata basa pamukova rokusangana." 
1Samuel2:23 Akati kwavari, “Munoitireiko zvinhu zvakadai? Nokuti ndinongosinzwa kuvanhu vose ava zvakaipa zvamunoita." 
1Samuel2:24 Kwete, vana vangu; nokuti mashoko andinonzwa haana kunaka; munodarikisa vanhu vaJehovha." 
1Samuel2:25 Kana munhu mumwe akatadzira mumwe, mutongi uchamutonga mhosva yake, asi kana munhu akatadzira Jehovha, ndianiko uchamureverera?” Kunyangwe zvakadaro, havana kuteerera izwi rababa vavo, nokuti Jehovha akanga achida kuvauraya." 
1Samuel2:26 Iye mwana Samueri akaramba achikura, akadikanwa naJehovha uye navanhuwo." 
1Samuel2:27 Zvino mumwe murume waMwari akauya kuna Eri, akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Handina kuzviratidza here kuimba yababa vako, vachiri Ijipiti vakasungwa neimba yaFarao here?" 
1Samuel2:28 Handina kumutsaura here pakati pamarudzi aIsiraeri, kuti ave mupristi wangu, akwire kuatari yangu kupisa zvinonhuwira, nokufuka efodi pamberi pangu here? Handina kupa imba yababa vako zvipiriso zvose zvevana VaIsiraeri zvinopiswa here?" 
1Samuel2:29 Zvino munopfunhurireiko chibayiro changu nechipiriso changu, zvandakaraira mumba mangu, mukakudza vanakomana venyu kukundeni, mukazvikodza nezvipiriso zvakanakisa zvavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri here?’" 
1Samuel2:30 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha waIsiraeri, ‘Ndakati nomwoyo wose kuti imba yako, neimba yababa vako, vafambe pamberi pangu nokusingaperi,’ asi zvino zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Handingadaro, nokuti vanondikudza ndichavakudzawo, vanondizvidza ndichavashorawo." 
1Samuel2:31 Tarira, mazuva achasvika, andichagura nawo ruoko rwako, noruoko rweveimba yababa vako, kusvikira pasisina mutana paimba yako." 
1Samuel2:32 Uchaona kutambudzika kweimba yangu, pakati pepfuma yose ichapiwa Isiraeri naMwari; hapangazovi nomutana paimba yako nokusingaperi." 
1Samuel2:33 Munhu weimba yako wandicharega kubvisa paatari yangu, iye uchapedza meso ako, nokuchemedza mwoyo wako; vana vose veimba yako vachafa vachiri varume vane simba ravo." 
1Samuel2:34 Zvino hechi chiratidzo chandinokupa, chichaitika kuvanakomana vako vaviri Hofini naFiniasi, vachafa vose vari vaviri nomusi mumwechete." 
1Samuel2:35 Neni ndichazvimutsira mupristi wakatendeka, uchaita zviri pamwoyo wangu nomurangariro wangu; ndichamuvakira imba yakasimba, uchafamba pamberi pomuzodzwa wangu nokusingaperi." 
1Samuel2:36 Zvino mumwe nomumwe unenge asara paimba yako, uchauya kuzomupfugamira, achikumbira chimari chesirivha nebundu rechingwa,’ achiti, ‘Dondipaiwo rimwe basa ravapristi, ndidyewo chimedu chechingwa.’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 Zvino mwana Samueri waibatsira Jehovha pamberi paEri. Asi shoko raJehovha rakanga richinzwika kashoma pamazuva iwayo; Jehovha wakanga asingazviratidzi pachena. 
1Samuel3:2 Zvino nenguva iyo Eri wakati avata pasi panzvimbo yake, (Meso ake zvino akanga oonera madzerere, asingagoni kuona kwazvo,)" 
1Samuel3:3 mwenje waMwari usati wadzimwa, naSamueri akanga avata pasi patemberi yaJehovha, pakanga pane areka yaMwari;" 
1Samuel3:4 Jehovha akadana Samueri. Iye akati, “Ndiripano hangu.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Akamhanyira kuna Eri, akati, “Ndiripano hangu, nokuti mandidana.” Eri akati, “Handina kukudana, chivata hakozve.” Iye akandovatazve." 
1Samuel3:6 Ipapo Jehovha akapamhazve kudana, akati, “Samueri!” Samueri akamuka, akaenda kuna Eri, akati, “Ndiri pano hangu, nokuti mandidana.” Akapindura akati, “Handina kukudana, mwana wangu; chivata hakozve.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Asi Samueri wakanga achigere kuziva Jehovha, uye shoko raJehovha rakanga richigere kumuziviswa." 
1Samuel3:8 Zvino Jehovha akapamhazve kudana Samueri rwechitatu. Iye akamuka, akaenda kuna Eri, akati, “Ndiri pano hangu, nokuti mandidana.” Ipapo Eri akaziva kuti ndiJehovha akadana mwana." 
1Samuel3:9 Saka Eri akati kuna Samueri, “Chindovata hako; zvino kana iye okudana, uti, ‘Taurai Jehovha, nokuti muranda wenyu unonzwa.’ ” Naizvozvo Samueri akaenda, akandovata panzvimbo yake." 
1Samuel3:10 Ipapo Jehovha akauya, akamira, akadana sapanguva dzimwe dzokutanga, akati, “Samueri, Samueri!” Samueri akati, “Taurai henyu, nokuti muranda wenyu unonzwa.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Jehovha akati kuna Samueri, “Tarira, ndichaita chinhu pakati paIsiraeri, nzeve dzomumwe nomumwe unochinzwa dzichawunga." 
1Samuel3:12 Nomusi uyo ndichaitira Eri zvose zvandakataura pamusoro paimba yake, kubva pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzisira." 
1Samuel3:13 Nokuti ndakamuudza kuti ndichatongesa imba yake nokusingaperi pamusoro pezvakaipa zvaakanga achiziva hake; nokuti vanakomana vake vakanga vachizvigadzirira kutukwa, asi iye haana kuvadzivisa." 
1Samuel3:14 “Saka ndakapika pamusoro peimba yaEri, kuti zvakaipa zveimba yaEri hazvingayananiswi nezvibairo kana nezvipiriso nokusingaperi.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Zvino Samueri akavata kusvikira mangwana, akazarura mikova yeimba yaJehovha. Asi Samueri wakatya kuzivisa Eri zvaakanga aratidzwa." 
1Samuel3:16 Zvino Eri akadana Samueri akati, “Samueri, mwana wangu.” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano hangu.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Akati, “Chiiko chawakaudzwa naJehovha? Usandivanzira hako chinhu icho; Mwari ngaakurove, arambe achidaro, kana ukandivanzira chinhu chimwe pazvinhu zvose zvaakakuudza.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Ipapo Samueri akamurondedzera zvose–zvose, haana kumuvanzira chinhu chimwe. Eri akati, “NdiJehovha, ngaaite hake sezvaanoda.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Samueri akakura; Jehovha akava naye, haana kutendera kuti rimwe ramashoko ake riwire pasi." 
1Samuel3:20 VaIsiraeri vose kubva paDhani kusvikira paBheerishebha, vakaziva kuti Samueri wakanga asimbiswa kuva muporofita waJehovha." 
1Samuel3:21 Zvino Jehovha akazviratidzazve paShiro, nokuti Jehovha akazviratidza kuna Samueri paShiro neshoko raJehovha." 
1Samuel4:1 Shoko raSamueri rakasvika kuVaIsiraeri vose. Zvino VaIsiraeri vakaenda kundorwa navaFirisitia, vakavaka misasa yavo pedyo neEbheniezeri; vaFirisitia vakavaka misasa yavo paAfeki." 
1Samuel4:2 VaFirisitia vakazvigadzira kurwa naVaIsiraeri; zvino vakati vorwa, VaIsiraeri vakakundwa navaFirisitia, vakauraya pakati pavakanga vakagadzirirwa kurwa varume vanenge zviuru zvina." 
1Samuel4:3 Zvino vanhu vakati vasvika kumisasa, vakuru VaIsiraeri vakati, “Jehovha wakatirovereiko nhasi pamberi pavaFirisitia? Handei, titore areka yesungano yaJehovha paShiro, iuye pakati pedu itirwire pamaoko avavengi vedu.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Naizvozvo vanhu vakatuma nhume Shiro kundotorapo areka yesungano yaJehovha wehondo, ugere pamusoro pamakerubhi; vanakomana vaviri vaEri, Hofini naFiniasi, vakanga varipo paareka yesungano yaMwari." 
1Samuel4:5 Zvino areka yesungano yaJehovha yakati yasvika pamisasa, VaIsiraeri vose vakapururudza nokupururudza kukuru, nyika ikaita mawungira." 
1Samuel4:6 VaFirisitia vakati vachinzwa izwi rokupururudza, vakati, “Izwi iro rokupururudza, riri kumisasa yaVaHebheru rinoti kudiniko?” Vakanzwa kuti areka yaJehovha yasvika kumisasa." 
1Samuel4:7 VaFirisitia vakatya, nokuti vakati, “Mwari wasvika kumisasa.” Vakati, “Tine nhamo! Nokuti chinhu chakadai hachina kumbovapo." 
1Samuel4:8 Tine nhamo! Ndianiko uchatirwira pamaoko avamwari ava vane simba? Ndivo vamwari vakadeya kurova vaIjipiti namatambudziko amarudzi mazhinji murenje. 
1Samuel4:9 Simbai, muite savarume, imi vaFirisitia, kuti murege kuva varanda vaVaHebheru, sezvavakanga vakaita kwamuri; itai savarume, murwe.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Zvino vaFirisitia vakarwa, VaIsiraeri vakakundwa, vakatiza, mumwe nomumwe kutende rake, kukavapo kuurayiwa kukuru, nokuti kuVaIsiraeri kwakafa vane zviuru zvina makumi matatu vaifamba namakumbo." 
1Samuel4:11 Areka yaMwari ikatorwa, uye vanakomana vaviri vaEri, Hofini naFiniasi, vakaurayiwa." 
1Samuel4:12 Zvino mumwe murume wavaBhenjamini akabva kuhondo, akamhanya, akasvika paShiro nomusi iwoyo, ane nguo dzakabvarurwa neguruva pamusoro wake." 
1Samuel4:13 Pakusvika kwake, Eri wakanga agere pachigaro chake kurutivi rwenzira, akataririra, nokuti mwoyo wake wakanga uchibvunda pamusoro peareka yaMwari. Murume wakati asvika muguta, akavaudza izvozvo, vanhu vose veguta vakachema." 
1Samuel4:14 Zvino Eri wakati achinzwa izwi rokuchema, akati, “Izwi rebopoto iri rinoti kudiniko?” Murume akakurumidza, akandoudza Eri." 
1Samuel4:15 Zvino Eri wakanga ava namakore ana makumi mapfumbamwe namasere, meso ake akanga ava norutara, asichagoni kuona kwazvo." 
1Samuel4:16 Murume akati kuna Eri, “Ndini ndakabva kuhondo, ndatiza nhasi kuhondo.” Akati, “Kwaitweiko, mwana wangu?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Zvino murume wakanga auya neshoko akapindura, akati, “VaIsiraeri vatiza pamberi pavaFirisitia; vanhu vazhinji vaurayiwa; uye vanakomana venyu vaviri, Hofini naFiniasi, vafawo; uye areka yaMwari yatorwa.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Zvino wakati achireva areka yaMwari, Eri akawa pachigaro negotsi kurutivi rwesuwo, akavhunika mutsipa, akafa; nokuti wakanga ava mutana, ano muviri mukobvu. Wakanga atonga VaIsiraeri makore makumi mana." 
1Samuel4:19 Zvino mukadzi womwanakomana wake Finiasi, wakanga ava nemimba, oda kupona mwana; akati achinzwa kuti areka yaMwari yatorwa, uye kuti baba vomurume wake, nomurume wakewo, vafa vose, akapfugama, akapona mwana, nokuti wakasvikirwa nokurwadziwa kwake." 
1Samuel4:20 Nenguva yokufa kwake vakanga vamirepo naye vakati, “Usatya hako, nokuti wapona mwana womukomana. Asi haana kupindura, kana kurangarira izvozvo.”" 
1Samuel4:21 Akatumidza mwana zita rinonzi Ikabhodhi, achiti, “Kukudzwa kwabviswa kuna Isiraeri; nokuti areka yaMwari yakanga yatorwa, uye nokuda kwababa vomurume wake, nomurume wake.”" 
1Samuel4:22 Akati, “Kukudzwa kwabviswa kuna Isiraeri; nokuti areka yaMwari yatorwa.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Zvino vaFirisitia vakatora areka yaMwari, vakabva nayo Ebheniezeri, vakaiisa Ashidhodhi," 
1Samuel5:2 VaFirisitia vakatora areka yaMwari vakaiisa mumba maDhagoni, vakaigadzika kurutivi rwaDhagoni." 
1Samuel5:3 Zvino veAshidhodhi vakati vachimuka mangwanani, onei Dhagoni wawira pasi nechiso pamberi peareka yaJehovha. Vakatora Dhagoni, vakamugadzikazve panzvimbo yake." 
1Samuel5:4 Zvino vakati vachimuka mangwanani, onei Dhagoni wawira pasi nechiso pamberi peareka yaJehovha; nomusoro waDhagoni nezvanza zvamaoko ake ose maviri zvakanga zvavhunika, zviri pachikumbaridzo chomukova; Dhagoni wakanga asarirwa nomuviri woga." 
1Samuel5:5 Saka vapristi vaDhagoni, navose vanopinda mumba maDhagoni, havatsiki pachikumbaridzo chaDhagoni paAshidhodhi kusvikira nhasi." 
1Samuel5:6 Asi ruoko rwaJehovha rwakatambudza veAshidhodhi, akavaparadza nokuvarova namamota, ivo veAshidhodhi nenyika yavo." 
1Samuel5:7 Zvino varume veAshidhodhi vakati vachiona kuti ndizvo zvavanoitirwa, vakati, “Areka yaMwari waIsiraeri ngairege kugara pakati pedu; nokuti ruoko rwake runotitambudza isu namwari wedu Dhagoni.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Naizvozvo vakatuma nhume kundounganidza kwavari madzishe ose avaFirisitia, vakati, “Tichaita seiko neareka yaMwari waIsiraeri?” Vakapindura, vakati, “Areka yaMwari waIsiraeri ngaiiswe Gati.” Vakaisa areka yaMwari ikoko." 
1Samuel5:9 Vakati vaiisako, ruoko rwaJehovha rukavhundusa guta nokuvhundusa kukuru; akarova varume veguta, vaduku navakuru, vakapomerwa mamota." 
1Samuel5:10 Naizvozvo ivo vakatumira areka yaMwari Ekironi. Zvino areka yaMwari yakati yasvika Ekironi, veEkironi vakachema kwazvo, vakati, “Vauya neareka yaMwari waIsiraeri kwatiri, kuzotiuraya, isu navanhu vedu.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Naizvozvo vakatuma nhume kundounganidza madzishe ose avaFirisitia, vakati, “Tumai areka yaMwari waIsiraeri, ibve, idzoserwe kunzvimbo yayo, kuti irege kutiuraya, isu navanhu vedu;” nokuti guta rose rakanga ravhunduswa nokuvhunduswa kworufu; ruoko rwaJehovha rwakavatambudza zvikuru ipapo." 
1Samuel5:12 Varume, vasina kufa, vakarohwa namamota, kuchema kweguta kukakwira kudenga." 
1Samuel6:1 Zvino areka yaJehovha yakagara munyika yavaFirisitia mwedzi minomwe. 
1Samuel6:2 VaFirisitia vakadana vapristi navavuki, vakati, “Tichaita seiko neareka yaJehovha? Tizivisei mutowo watingaidzosera nawo kunzvimbo yayo.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Vakati, “Kana muchidzosera areka yaMwari waIsiraeri, musaituma isine chinhu; asi munofanira kumutumira chipiriso chemhosva; ipapo muchapora, mugoziva kuti ruoko rwake runoregereiko kubviswa kwamuri.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Zvino vakati, “Chipiriso chemhosva chatinofanira kumuripira nacho ndecheiko?” Vakati, “Mamota mashanu endarama, namakonzo mashanu endarama, zvakaenzana namadzishe avaFirisitia; nokuti makanga marohwa nedambudziko rimwe, imi mose namadzishe enyu." 
1Samuel6:5 Naizvozvo munofanira kuita mufananidzo wamamota enyu, nomufananidzo wamakonzo enyu anotadzira nyika, mukudze Mwari waIsiraeri; zvimwe ucharerutsa ruoko rwake pamusoro penyu, napamusoro pavamwari venyu, napamusoro penyika yenyu." 
1Samuel6:6 Muchawomesereiko mwoyo sezvakaita VaIjipiti naFarao vakawomesa mwoyo yavo? Nguva yaakaita zvishamiso pakati pavo, havana kurega vanhu here, vakaenda?" 
1Samuel6:7 Naizvozvo zvino torai mugadzire ngoro itsva, nemhou mbiri dzinomwisa dzisina kumboiswa joko, musunge mhou pangoro, asi muraurire mhuru dzadzo kumusha;" 
1Samuel6:8 zvino mutore areka yaJehovha, mugoiisa pangoro; nezvishongo zvendarama, zvamunomuripira nazvo kuti chive chipiriso chemhosva, mudziise mubhokisi parutivi rwayo, mugoituma iende." 
1Samuel6:9 “Zvino tarirai, kana ikakwira nenzira yenyika yayo kuBheti-shemeshi, ndiye wakatiitira njodzi huru iyi; asi kana isingadaro, tichaziva kuti haruzi ruoko rwake rwakatirova, chinhu hacho chatiwira.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Zvino varume vakaita saizvozvo; vakatora mhou mbiri dzakanga dzichimwisa, vakadzisunga pangoro, vakapfigira mhuru dzadzo kumusha;" 
1Samuel6:11 vakaisa areka yaJehovha pamusoro pengoro, nebhokisi rakanga rina makonzo endarama, nemifananidzo yamamota avo." 
1Samuel6:12 Zvino mhou dzikarurama nenzira inoenda Bheti-shemeshi, dzikafamba nenzira huru, dzikaenda dzichingokuma; hadzina kutsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe; madzishe avaFirisitia akadzitevera kusvikira kumuganho weBheti-shemeshi." 
1Samuel6:13 Zvino vanhu veBheti-shemeshi vakanga vachicheka zviyo zvavo pamupata, vakatarira, vakaona areka, vakafara vachiiona." 
1Samuel6:14 Ngoro ikasvika pamunda waJoshua muBheti-shemeshi, ikamira pakanga pane bwe guru; ipapo vakapamura matanda engoro, vakabayira mhou vakadziita chipiriso chinopiriswa Jehovha." 
1Samuel6:14 Ngoro ikasvika pamunda waJoshua muBheti-shemeshi, ikamira pakanga pane bwe guru; ipapo vakapamura matanda engoro, vakabayira mhou vakadziita chipiriso chinopiriswa Jehovha." 
1Samuel6:15 Zvino vaRevhi vakaburutsa areka yaJehovha, nebhokisi rakanga riri pairi, makanga mune zvishongo zvendarama, vakazviisa pabwe guru, varume veBheti-shemeshi vakauya nezvipiriso zvinopiswa vakabayira Jehovha zvibairo nomusi uyo." 
1Samuel6:16 Zvino madzishe mashanu avaFirisitia akati aona izvozvo, akadzokera Ekironi nomusi iwoyo." 
1Samuel6:17 Zvino ndiwo mamota endarama akaripwa namadzishe avaFirisitia, kuti chive chipiriso chemhosva kuna Jehovha; rimwe raiva reAshidhodhi, rimwe reGaza, rimwe reAshikeroni, rimwe reGati, rimwe reEkironi;" 
1Samuel6:18 namakonzo endarama akanga akaenzana namaguta ose avaFirisitia, akanga ari amadzishe mashanu, aiva maguta akapoteredzwa namasvingo nemisha miduku yokuruwa. Uye ibwe guru ravakagadzika areka yaJehovha pamusoro paro, richiripo pamunda waJoshua muBheti-shemeshi kusvikira nhasi." 
1Samuel6:18 namakonzo endarama akanga akaenzana namaguta ose avaFirisitia, akanga ari amadzishe mashanu, aiva maguta akapoteredzwa namasvingo nemisha miduku yokuruwa. Uye ibwe guru ravakagadzika areka yaJehovha pamusoro paro, richiripo pamunda waJoshua muBheti-shemeshi kusvikira nhasi." 
1Samuel6:19 Zvino Jehovha akauraya vamwe vavarume veBheti-shemeshi, nokuti vakanga vatarira mukati meareka yaJehovha; akauraya varume vane zviuru zvina makumi mashanu namakumi manomwe pakati pavanhu avo; vanhu vakachema, nokuti Jehovha akanga auraya vanhu nokuuraya kukuru." 
1Samuel6:20 Zvino varume veBheti-shemeshi vakati, “Ndianiko unogona kumira pamberi paJehovha, Mwari uyu Mutsvene? Uchakwira kuna ani, kana achibva kwatiri?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Ipapo vakatuma nhume kuna vakanga vagere Kiriatijearimi, vakati, “VaFirisitia vadzosa areka yaJehovha; burukai imi, muzoiisa kwenyu.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Ipapo varume veKiriatijearimi vakauya, vakatora areka yaJehovha, vakaiisa kumba kwaAbhinadhabhu pagomo; vakatsaura Ereazari mwanakomana wake, kuti achengete areka yaJehovha." 
1Samuel7:2 Kubva pamusi wokusvika kweareka paKiriatijearimi, yakagarapo nguva refu, nokuti akanga ari makore makumi maviri; imba yose yaIsiraeri ikachema kuna Jehovha." 
1Samuel7:3 Samueri akataura neimba yose yaIsiraeri, akati, “Kana muchida kudzokera kuna Jehovha nomwoyo wenyu wose, bvisai vamwari vatorwa neAshitaroti pakati penyu, mugadzirire Jehovha mwoyo yenyu, mumushumire iye oga; ipapo iye uchakusunungurai pamaoko avaFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Vana VaIsiraeri vakabvisa vaBhaari neAshitaroti, vakashumira Jehovha oga." 
1Samuel7:5 Zvino Samueri akati, “Unganidzai VaIsiraeri vose paMizipa, ini ndikunyengetererei kuna Jehovha.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Vakaunganidzana paMizipa, vakachera mvura, vakaidururira pamberi paJehovha, vakazvinyima zvokudya nomusi iwoyo, vakati ipapo, “Takatadzira Jehovha.” Samueri akatonga vana VaIsiraeri paMizipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Zvino vaFirisitia vakati vachinzwa kuti vana VaIsiraeri vakanga vaungana paMizipa, madzishe avaFirisitia akakwira kundorwa naVaIsiraeri. Vana VaIsiraeri vachinzwa vakatya vaFirisitia." 
1Samuel7:8 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakati kuna Samueri, “Musarega henyu kuramba muchichema kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu nokuda kwedu, kuti atirwire pamaoko avaFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Samueri akatora gwayana rinomwa, akagadzirira Jehovha naro chipiriso chinopiswa chose. Samueri akachema kuna Jehovha nokuda kwaVaIsiraeri; Jehovha akamunzwa." 
1Samuel7:10 Samueri wakati achapisira Jehovha chipiriso chinopiswa, vaFirisitia vakaswedera kuzorwa naVaIsiraeri; asi Jehovha akatinhira nokutinhira kukuru pamusoro pavaFirisitia nomusi iwoyo, akavavhundusa, vakakundwa naVaIsiraeri." 
1Samuel7:11 Varume VaIsiraeri vakabuda Mizipa, vakatevera vaFirisitia, vakavaparadza kusvikira panyasi peBhetikari." 
1Samuel7:12 Zvino Samueri akatora ibwe, akarimisa pakati peMizipa neSheni, akaritumidza zita raro Ebheniezeri, achiti, “Jehovha wakatibatsira kusvikira pano.”" 
1Samuel7:13 VaFirisitia vakakundwa saizvozvo; havana kuzouyazve munyika yaVaIsiraeri; ruoko rwaJehovha rukarwa navaFirisitia mazuva ose aSamueri. 
1Samuel7:14 Namaguta akanga atorerwa VaIsiraeri navaFirisitia akadzoserwazve kuVaIsiraeri, kubva paEkironi kusvikira paGati, nenyika yavo yakasunungurwa naVaIsiraeri pamaoko avaFirisitia; rugare rukavapo pakati paVaIsiraeri navaAmori." 
1Samuel7:15 Samueri akatonga VaIsiraeri mazuva ose oupenyu hwake. 
1Samuel7:16 Waipota gore rimwe nerimwe napaBhetieri, neGirigari, neMizipa, akatonga VaIsiraeri panzvimbo idzo dzose." 
1Samuel7:17 Akasidzokera Rama, nokuti ndipo paakanga agere; akatonga VaIsiraeri ipapo, akavakira Jehovha atari ipapo." 
1Samuel8:1 Zvino Samueri wakati akwegura akagadza vanakomana vake kuti vave vatongi pakati paIsiraeri. 
1Samuel8:2 Zita romwana wake wodangwe rakanga riri Jowero, nezita rowechipiri Abhija; ivo vaiva vatongi paBheerishebha." 
1Samuel8:3 Asi vanakomana vake havana kufamba nenzira dzake, asi vakatsaukira kupfuma yakaipa, vakagamuchira fufuro, nokusaruramisa pakutonga." 
1Samuel8:4 Zvino vakuru VaIsiraeri vose vakaungana, vakauya kuna Samueri paRama," 
1Samuel8:5 vakati kwaari, “Tarirai, imi makwegura, asi vanakomana venyu havafambi nenzira dzenyu, zvino tigadzirirei mambo ungatitonga, sezvinoitwa kundudzi dzose.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Asi shoko iro harina kufadza Samueri, iro rokuti, “Tipei mambo ungatitonga.” Samueri akanyengetera kuna Jehovha." 
1Samuel8:7 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Samueri, “Teerera hako zvose zvinotaura vanhu kwauri, nokuti havana kukuramba iwe, asi vakandiramba ini, kuti ndirege kuva mambo wavo." 
1Samuel8:8 “Zvose zvavakaita kubva zuva randakavakwidza ndichivabudisa paIjipiti kusvikira nhasi, vachindirasha nokushumira vamwe vamwari, ndizvo zvavanokuitira iwewo." 
1Samuel8:9 Zvino terera hako mazwi avo; asi uvapupurire kwazvo, uvazivise tsika dzamambo, uchavabata.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Zvino Samueri akaudza vanhu vakanga vachikumbira mambo kwaari mashoko ose aJehovha. 
1Samuel8:11 Akati, “Tsika dzamambo, uchakubatai, ndidzo, uchatora vanakomana venyu akavaisa pangoro dzake." 
1Samuel8:12 Uchazvitsaurira vamwe vave vakuru vezviuru, navakuru vamakumi mashanu; ucharaira vamwe kumurimira minda yake, nokukohwa michero yake, nokumuitira nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, nenhumbi dzengoro dzake." 
1Samuel8:13 “Uchatora vanasikana venyu, vave vavenganisi vezvinonhuwira, navabiki vezvokudya, navabiki vechingwa." 
1Samuel8:14 Uchatora minda yenyu neminda yenyu yemizambiringa, neminda yenyu yemiorivhi yakaisvonaka kukunda mimwe, achipa varanda vake." 
1Samuel8:15 Uchatora zvegumi zvembeu dzenyu nemazambiringa enyu, achipa varanda vake navabatiri vake." 
1Samuel8:16 “Uchatora varanda venyu navarandakadzi venyu, namajaya enyu akaisvonaka kukunda vamwe vose, nembongoro dzenyu, achibatisa mabasa ake nazvo." 
1Samuel8:17 “Uchatora zvegumi zvamapoka enyu amakwai; nemi muchava varanda vake. 
1Samuel8:18 “Nezuva iro muchachema kwazvo nokuda kwamambo wenyu wamunenge mazvitsaurira; asi Jehovha haangakupinduriyi nezuva iro.” 
1Samuel8:19 Asi vanhu vakaramba kuteerera izwi raSamueri, vakati, “Kwete, tinoda hedu mambo ungatibata," 
1Samuel8:20 kuti isuwo tifanane nedzimwe ndudzi; mambo wedu atitonge, atitungamirire, nokurwa pahondo dzedu.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Samueri akanzwa mashoko ose avanhu, akaarondedzera panzeve dzaJehovha." 
1Samuel8:22 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Samueri, “Terera hako mazwi avo, uvagadzirire mambo.” Samueri akati kuvarume VaIsiraeri, “Endai henyu, mumwe nomumwe kuguta rake.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Zvino kwakanga kuno murume waBhenjamini, wainzi Kishi, mwanakomana waAbhieri, mwanakomana waZerori, mwanakomana waBhekorati, mwanakomana waAfia, mwanakomana womuBhenjamini, munhu waiva nesimba roumhare." 
1Samuel9:2 Uyu munhu wakanga ano mwanakomana wainzi Sauro, jaya rakanaka; kwakanga kusina mumwe munhu pakati pavana VaIsiraeri wakanga akamukunda pakunaka; kubva pamafudzi ake kusvika kumusoro wake wakanga akapfuura vanhu vose pakureba." 
1Samuel9:3 Zvino mbongoro dzaKishi, baba vaSauro, dzakanga dzarasika. Ipapo Kishi akati kuna Sauro, mwanakomana wake, “Enda nomumwe wavaranda, mundotsvaka mbongoro.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Iye akapfuura nokunyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, akapfuurawo nokunyika yamakomo yeSharisha, asi havana kudziwana; zvino vakapfuurazve nokunyika yeSharimi, asi naipapo dzakanga dzisipo; ipapo akapfuura nokunyika yavaBhenjamini, asi havana kudziwana." 
1Samuel9:5 Zvino vakati vachisvika kunyika yeZufi, Sauro akati kumuranda wake, wakanga anaye, “Ngatidzoke hedu; baba vangu zvimwe vangarega kufunga mbongoro, vakafunganya pamusoro pedu.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Iye akati kwaari, “Tarirai, muguta rino muno munhu waMwari, munhu unokudzwa kwazvo; zvose zvaanotaura zvinoitika; hendei zvino ikoko, zvimwe ungatiudza nzira yatingafamba nayo.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Zvino Sauro akati kumuranda wake, “Asi tarira, kana tikaenda, tichandovigirei munhu uyo? Nokuti zvingwa zvakanga zviri mumidziyo yedu zvapera; hapana chipo chatingavigira munhu waMwari; tineiko?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Ipapo muranda akapindurazve, akati kuna Sauro, “Tarirai, ndine chechina cheshekeri resirivha muruoko rwangu; ndichachipa munhu waMwari, atiudze nzira yedu.”" 
1Samuel9:9 (Kare pakati paVaIsiraeri kana munhu ondobvunza Mwari, waiti, “Handei kumuwoni;” nokuti unonzi Muporofita zvino wainzi Muwoni kare.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Ipapo Sauro akati kumuranda wake, “Ishoko rakanaka, hendei.” Naizvozvo vakaenda kuguta kwakanga kuno munhu waMwari." 
1Samuel9:11 Zvino vakati vachikwira kuguta, vakasongana navasikana vakanga vabuda kundoteka mvura, vakati kwavari, “Muwoni ari pano here?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Vakapindura, vakati, “Aripo; tarirai, hoyo pamberi penyu; kurumidzai henyu zvino, nokuti wasvika muguta nhasi; nokuti vanhu vanobayira nhasi padunhu rakakwirira." 
1Samuel9:13 Kana mangoti mapinda muguta, muchamuwana pakarepo achigere kukwira kudunhu rakakwirira kundodyapo; nokuti vanhu havangadyi, iye asati asvika, nokuti ndiye unoropafadza chibayiro; pashure ivo vakakokwa vachadya. Naizvozvo chikwirai zvino, nokuti muchamuwana nenguva ino.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Ipapo vakakwira kuguta. Vakati vosvika muguta, vakaona Samueri obuda, akasangana navo okwira kudunhu rakakwirira." 
1Samuel9:15 Zvino Jehovha akanga azivisa Samueri zuva rakatangira kusvika kwaSauro, akati," 
1Samuel9:16 “Mangwana nenguva ino ndichatuma kwauri munhu unobva kunyika yaBhenjamini; unofanira kumuzodza, kuti ave mutungamiriri wavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri, aponese vanhu vangu mumaoko avaFirisitia; nokuti ndakatarira vanhu vangu, nokuti kuchema kwavo kwakasvika kwandiri.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Zvino Samueri wakati achiona Sauro; Jehovha akati kwaari, “Ndiye munhu wandakakuudza ndichiti, ndiye uchabata vanhu vangu.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Ipapo Sauro akaswedera kuna Samueri pasuwo, akati, “Ndiudzeiwo kuti imba yoMuwoni iripi?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samueri akapindura Sauro, akati, “Ndini Muwoni; nditungamirirei mukwire kudunhu rakakwirira, nokuti munofanira kudya neni nhasi; mangwana ndichakutendera kuenda, ndigokuudzawo zvose zviri pamwoyo wako." 
1Samuel9:20 Asi kana dziri mbongoro dzako dzakanga dzarashika mazuva matatu, usadzifunga hako, nokuti dzatowanikwa hadzo. Asi zvose zvinodikanwa naIsiraeri hazvizi kwauri here? Hazvizi kwauri nokuna vose veimba yababa vako here?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Sauro akapindura, akati, “Ko handizi muBhenjamini, worudzi ruduku kumarudzi ose aIsiraeri here? Uye mhuri yangu haizi duku kumhuri dzose dzorudzi rwaBhenjamini here? Munotaurireiko kudaro kwandiri?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Samueri akatora Sauro nomuranda wake, akapinda navo mumba mokudyira, akavagarisa pavakakudzwa kupfuura vamwe vakakokwa, vaiva vanhu vanenge makumi matatu." 
1Samuel9:23 Zvino Samueri akati kumubiki, “Uya nomugove wandakakupa ndichiti, ‘Chiuchengeta uri woga.’ ”" 
1Samuel9:24 Mubiki akatora chidzva nezvose zvakanga zviri pachiri, akazvigadza pamberi paSauro. Samueri akati, “Tarira, ndicho chakanga chakachengetwa; uzvigadze pamberi pako, udye, nokuti zvakakuchengeterwa iwe kusvikira nguva yakafanira, nokuti ndakati, Ndakokera vanhu.” Naizvozvo Sauro akadya naSamueri musi iwoyo." 
1Samuel9:25 Zvino vakati vaburuka padunhu rakakwirira, vakapinda muguta, akataurirana naSauro padenga reimba." 
1Samuel9:26 Vakamuka mangwanani, mambakwedza, Samueri akadana Sauro padenga reimba, akati, “Muka, ndikuendise.” Ipapo Sauro akamuka, vakabuda iye naSamueri vari vaviri." 
1Samuel9:27 Zvino vakati voburuka pamugumo weguta, Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Raira muranda atungamire mberi kwedu (iye akatungamira hake); asi iwe chimbomira hako, ndikuzivise shoko raMwari.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Zvino Samueri akatora chinu chamafuta, akadurura pamusoro wake, akamutsvoda, akati, “Jehovha haana kukuzodza here kuti uve mutungamiriri wavanhu venhaka yake?" 
1Samuel10:2 “Kana ukabva kwandiri nhasi uchandowana varume vaviri parinda raRacheri, pamuganho waBhenjamini, paZeriza; ivo vachati kwauri, ‘Mbongoro dzawakanga uchitsvaka dzawanikwa; zvino, baba vako havachine hanya nembongoro, asi vofunganya pamusoro pako,’ vachiti ‘Ndichaita seiko pamusoro pomwanakomana wangu?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Zvino uchabvapo ukapfuura mberi, ukasvika pamuouki weTabhoru; ipapo uchasangana navarume vatatu vanokwira kuna Mwari paBhetieri, mumwe akatakura mbudzana nhatu, mumwe akatakura mapundu matatu ezvingwa, uye mumwe akatakura dende rewaini;" 
1Samuel10:4 ivo vachakukwazisa, ndokukupa mapundu maviri ezvingwa; ugamuchire izvozvo pamaoko avo." 
1Samuel10:5 Pashure uchasvika pagomo raMwari pane boka ravarwi ravaFirisitia; zvino kana uchisvika paguta, uchasangana neboka ravaporofita vanoburuka padunhu rakakwirira vakatungamirirwa nemitengeranwa, nengoma, nenyere, nembira, vachingoporofita." 
1Samuel10:6 “Ipapo Mweya waJehovha uchauya pamusoro pako nesimba, ukaporofita pamwechete navo, ukashanduka ukava mumwe munhu." 
1Samuel10:7 Zvino kana zviratidzo izvi zvikaonekwa newe, uite chinhu chipi nechipi chaunoratidzwa kuti uchiite, nokuti Mwari anewe." 
1Samuel10:8 Zvino unditungamirire Girigari; tarira, ini ndichaburukira kwauri, kuti ndibayire zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; unofanira kundimirira mazuva manomwe, kusvikira ndauya kwauri, ndikuratidze zvaunofanira kuita.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Zvino wakati atendeuka, obva kuna Samueri, Mwari akamupa mumwe mwoyo; zviratidzo izvo zvose zvikaitika nomusi iwoyo." 
1Samuel10:10 Vakati vachisvika pagomo, boka ravaporofita rikasangana naye; Mweya waMwari wakauya pamusoro pake nesimba, akaporofita pakati pavo." 
1Samuel10:11 Zvino vose vaimuziva kare vakati vachiona izvozvo, kuti woporofita pamwechete navo, vanhu vakataurirana, vakati, “Chiiko chawira mwanakomana waKishi? Sauro wava pakati pavaporofitawo here?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Zvino mumwe wapo akapindura, akati, “Baba vavo ndianiko?” Naizvozvo yakazova shumo kuti, “Ko Sauro wava pakati pavaporofita here?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Akati apedza kuporofita, akasvika padunhu rakakwirira." 
1Samuel10:14 Babamunini vaSauro vakati kwaari, nokumuranda wake, “Makanga maendepiko?” Akati, “Kundotsvaka mbongoro, asi takati tichiona kuti hadziwanikwi, tikaenda kuna Samueri.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Babamunini vaSauro vakati, “Dondiudzawo zvamakaudzwa naSamueri.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Ipapo Sauro akati kuna babamunini vake, “Wakatiudza pachena, kuti mbongoro dzatowanikwa hadzo.” Asi haana kumuudza shoko roushe rakanga rataurwa naSamueri." 
1Samuel10:17 Zvino Samueri akakoka vanhu kuna Jehovha paMizipa," 
1Samuel10:18 akati kuvana VaIsiraeri, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Ndakabudisa vana VaIsiraeri muIjipiti, ndikakurwirai pamaoko aVaIjipiti, napamaoko amadzimambo ose aikuremedzai;" 
1Samuel10:19 asi nhasi maramba Mwari wenyu, iye unokuponesai amene panjodzi dzenyu dzose nenhamo dzenyu,’ mukati kwaari, ‘Kwete, asi tigadzire mambo ungatibata.’ Naizvozvo zvino unganai pamberi paJehovha namarudzi enyu uye nezviuru zvenyu.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Naizvozvo Samueri akaswededza marudzi ose aIsiraeri, rudzi rwaBhenjamini rukabatwa." 
1Samuel10:21 Akaswededza rudzi rwaBhenjamini, nedzimba dzarwo, imba yaMatiri ikabatwa; ipapo Sauro mwanakomana waKishi akabatwa; asi vakati vomutsvaka, akashaikwa." 
1Samuel10:22 Naizvozvo vakabvunzazve Jehovha, vakati, “Iye munhu ari pano here?” Jehovha akapindura, akati, “Tarirai; wavanda pakati penhumbi.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Ipapo vakamhanya vakamutorapo; zvino wakati amira pakati pavanhu, akapfuura vanhu vose pakureba kubva pamafudzi ake kusvika kumusoro wake." 
1Samuel10:24 Samueri akati kuvanhu vose, “Munoona wakatsaurwa naJehovha, kuti hakuna wakafanana naye pakati pavanhu vose here?” Vanhu vose vakadanidzira vachiti, “Mambo ngaararame.”" 
1Samuel10:25 Zvino Samueri akaudza vanhu tsika dzoushe, akadzinyora mubhuku, akazvichengeta pamberi paJehovha. Samueri akaendisa vanhu vose mumwe nomumwe kumba kwake." 
1Samuel10:26 NaSaurowo wakaenda kumba kwake paGibhia, uye varume vose voumhare vakanga vabayiwa mwoyo yavo naMwari vakaendawo naye." 
1Samuel10:27 Asi vamwe vakaisvoipa vakati, “Munhu uyu ungatiponesa seiko?” Vakamushora, vakasamuvigira zvipo. Asi iye wakaramba anyerere hake." 
1Samuel11:1 Zvino Nahashi muAmoni wakakwira akavaka misasa yake paJabheshi-gireyadhi kuzorwa naro; zvino varume vose veJabheshi vakati kuna Nahashi, “Itai sungano nesu tikushumirei.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Nahashi muAmoni akati kwavari, “Ndichatenda kuita sungano nemi kana meso enyu ose orudyi achitumburwa, kuti ndinyadze VaIsiraeri vose nazvo.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Vakuru veJabheshi vakati kwaari, “Titenderei mazuva manomwe, titume nhume kunyika yose yaIsiraeri; zvino kana pasina ungatiponesa, tichabuda kwauri.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Zvino nhume dzikasvika paGibhia, kwaSauro, dzikataura mashoko iwayo kuvanhu; vanhu vose vakachema kwazvo." 
1Samuel11:5 Zvino Sauro wakabva kumunda achitinha mombe dzake; Sauro akati, “Vanhu vanonzweiko zvavanochema kudai?” Akaudzwa mashoko avarume veJabheshi." 
1Samuel11:6 Ipapo Mweya waMwari wakauya pamusoro paSauro nesimba, achinzwa mashoko iwayo, kutsamwa kwake kukamutswa kwazvo." 
1Samuel11:7 Akatora nzombe mbiri, akadziguranya ndokutuma nhindi idzo kunyika yose yaIsiraeri namaoko enhume, akati, “Ani nani unoramba kubuda nokutevera Sauro naSamueri, uchaitirwa nzombe dzake saizvozvo.” Zvino kutya, kwakabva kuna Jehovha, kwakabata vanhu, vakabuda vose–vose." 
1Samuel11:8 Iye akavaverenga paBhezeki; vana VaIsiraeri vakasvika zviuru zvina mazana matatu, navarume vaJudha zviuru zvina makumi matatu." 
1Samuel11:9 Vakati kunhume dzakauya, “Udzai varume veJabheshi-gireyadhi, muti, ‘Mangwana kana zuva ropisa, mucharwirwa.’ ” Nhume dzikaenda, dzikaudza varume veJabheshi, ivo vakafara." 
1Samuel11:10 Naizvozvo varume veJabheshi vakati, “Mangwana tichabuda kwamuri, mutiitire henyu sezvamunoda.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Fume mangwana Sauro akagadzira vanhu, akavaita mapoka matatu, vakapinda pakati pemisasa nenguva yamangwanani vakauraya vaAmoni kusvikira zuva ropisa; zvino vakasara vakaparadzirwa, hakuna kusara vaviri pamwechete." 
1Samuel11:12 Zvino vanhu vakati kuna Samueri, “Ndianiko wakati, ‘Sauro ungatibata ushe here?’ ” Hendei, tivauraye." 
1Samuel11:13 Sauro akati, “Ngakurege kuurayiwa munhu mumwe nhasi, nokuti Jehovha akarwira Isiraeri.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Zvino Samueri akati kuvanhu, “Hendei Girigari, tinovandudza ushe ipapo.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Vanhu vose vakaenda Girigari, vakagadza Sauro ave mambo wavo pamberi paJehovha paGirigari, vakabayirapo zvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa pamberi paJehovha; Sauro navarume vose VaIsiraeri vakafara kwazvo ipapo." 
1Samuel12:1 Zvino Samueri akati kuVaIsiraeri vose, “Tarirai, ndakateerera mazwi enyu pazvinhu zvose zvamakataura kwandiri, ndikakugadzirirai mambo." 
1Samuel12:2 Zvino tarirai, mambo wenyu unofamba pamberi penyu; ini ndakwegura, ndachena vhudzi; tarirai, vanakomana vangu vari pakati penyu; ini ndakafamba pamberi penyu kubva pauduku hwangu kusvikira nhasi." 
1Samuel12:3 Ndiri pano; chindipupurirai pamberi paJehovha napamberi pomuzodzwa wake, Ndianiko wandakatorera nzombe yake? Ndianiko wandakatorera mbongoro yake? Ndianiko wandakanyengera? Ndianiko wandakatambudza? Ndianiko wandakagamuchira fufuro kwaari, kuti ndipofumadze meso angu nazvo? Ndizive kuti ndikudzoserei izvozvo.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Ivo vakati, “Hamuna kutinyengera, kana kutitambudza; hamuna kugamuchira chinhu kumunhu upi noupi.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Akati kwavari, “Jehovha unokupupurirai, naiye muzodzwa wake unopupura nhasi kuti hamuna kuwana mhosva kwandiri.” Vakati, “Ndiye chapupu.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Zvino Samueri akati kuvanhu, “Jehovha ndiye wakanga agadza Mosesi naAroni, nokubudisa madzibaba enyu panyika yeIjipiti." 
1Samuel12:7 “Naizvozvo zvino chirambai mumire, kuti nditaurirane nemi pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pezvose zvakarurama zvamakaitirwa naJehovha, imi namadzibaba enyu." 
1Samuel12:8 “Nguva yakaenda Jakobho Ijipiti, madzibaba enyu akachema kuna Jehovha, Jehovha akatuma Mosesi naAroni, vakabudisa madzibaba enyu Ijipiti, vakavagarisa pano." 
1Samuel12:9 Asi vakakanganwa Jehovha Mwari wavo, iye akavatengesa kuna Sisera, mukuru wehondo yaHazori, nokuna vaFirisitia, nokuna mambo wavaMoabhu, vakarwa navo." 
1Samuel12:10 Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha, vakati, ‘Takatadza, nokuti takasiya Jehovha, tikashumira vaBhaari neAshitaroti; asi zvino tirwirei henyu pamaoko avavengi vedu, tikushumirei.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Ipapo Jehovha akatuma Jerubhaari, naBhedhani, naJefuta, naSamueri, akakurwirai pamaoko avavengi venyu kunhivi dzose, mukagara zvakanaka." 
1Samuel12:12 Zvino makati moona Nahashi, mambo wavana vaAmoni, achiuya kuzorwa nemi, mukati kwandiri, ‘Kwete, tinofanira kubatwa nesuwo namambo, kunyangwe Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakanga ari mambo wenyu.’" 
1Samuel12:13 “Naizvozvo zvino, hoyo mambo wamakatsaura, wamakakumbira; tarirai Jehovha akakugadzirirai mambo." 
1Samuel12:14 Kana mukatya Jehovha, mukamushumira, mukateerera izwi rake, mukasaramba murairo waJehovha, mukatevera Jehovha Mwari wenyu, imi naiye mambo anokutongai, muchafara henyu;" 
1Samuel12:15 asi kana musingateereri izwi raJehovha, mukaramba murairo waJehovha, ruoko rwaJehovha rucharwa nemi, sezvarwakarwa namadzibaba enyu." 
1Samuel12:16 “Naizvozvo zvino rambai mumire, muwone chinhu ichi chikuru chichaitwa naJehovha pamberi pameso enyu." 
1Samuel12:17 Hakuzi kuchekwa kwezviyo nhasi here? Ndichadana kuna Jehovha, kuti atume kutinhira nemvura, imi muzive muwone kuti makatadza kwazvo pamberi paJehovha, zvamakazvikumbirira mambo.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Naizvozvo Samueri akadana kuna Jehovha, Jehovha akatuma kutinhira nemvura nomusi iwoyo; vanhu vose vakatya Jehovha naSamueri kwazvo." 
1Samuel12:19 Ipapo vanhu vose vakati kuna Samueri, “Nyengetererai henyu varanda venyu kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu, tirege kufa, nokuti takawedzera pazvivi zvedu zvose chinhu ichi chakaipa, kuti takazvikumbirira mambo.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samueri akati kuvanhu, “Musatya henyu; makaita henyu zvakaipa izvi zvose, asi regai kutsauka pakutevera Jehovha, asi shumirai Jehovha nemwoyo yenyu yose;" 
1Samuel12:21 musatsauka, nokuti kana mukadaro, muchatevera zvinhu zvisina maturo, zvisingabatsiri kana kurwira, nokuti hazvina maturo." 
1Samuel12:22 Nokuti Jehovha haangasiyi vanhu vake nokuda kwezita rake guru, nokuti Jehovha akafara nazvo kukuitai imi vanhu vake." 
1Samuel12:23 Kana ndirini, Mwari ngaandibatsire ndirege kutadzira Jehovha pakurega kukunyengetererai imi, asi ndichakudzidzisai nzira yakanaka yakarurama." 
1Samuel12:24 Asi ityai Jehovha, mumushumire nezvokwadi nemwoyo yenyu yose, nokuti rangarirai zvinhu zvikuru zvaakakuitirai." 
1Samuel12:25 “Asi kana mukaramba muchiita zvakaipa, muchaparadzwa, imi namambo wenyu.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Sauro wakanga ana makore ana makumi matatu pakutanga kwake kutonga ushe, akabata VaIsiraeri makore maviri." 
1Samuel13:2 Sauro akazvitsaurira varume VaIsiraeri vane zviuru zvitatu; zviuru zviviri zvavo zvaigara kuna Sauro paMikimashi pagomo reBhetieri, nechiuru chimwe chaigara naJonatani paGibhia kwaBhenjamini; vamwe vanhu vose akavadzosera, mumwe nomumwe kutende rake." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonatani akaparadza boka ravarwi vavaFirisitia vaigara Gebha; vaFirisitia vakazvinzwa. Zvino Sauro akaridza hwamanda panyika yose, akati, “VaHebheru ngavanzwe.”" 
1Samuel13:4 VaIsiraeri vose vakanzwa kuti Sauro waparadza boka ravarwi vavaFirisitia, uye kuti VaIsiraeri vovengwa navaFirisitia. Vanhu vose vakaunganidzwa kuti vaende Girigari naSauro." 
1Samuel13:5 Zvino vaFirisitia vakaungana kuzorwa naVaIsiraeri, vane ngoro dzine zviuru zvina makumi matatu, navatasvi vane zviuru zvitanhatu, navanhu vakanga vakafanana nejecha regungwa pakuwanda kwavo; vakakwira vakandodzika matende avo paMikimashi, kumabvazuva kweBhetiavheni." 
1Samuel13:6 Zvino varume VaIsiraeri vakati vachiona kuti vava panjodzi (nokuti vanhu vakanga vomanikidzwa), vanhu vakavanda mumapako, nomumatenhere, napakati pamatombo, nomunhare, nomumakomba." 
1Samuel13:7 Uye vamwe vaVaHebheru vakanga vayambuka Jodhani kunyika yaGadi neyaGiriadhi; asi Sauro wakanga achiri Girigari, vanhu vose vakamutevera vachibvunda." 
1Samuel13:8 Akamira mazuva manomwe akanga atarwa naSamueri; asi Samueri haana kusvika paGirigari, vanhu vakatanga kupararira vachimusiya." 
1Samuel13:9 Zvino Sauro akati, “Uyai kwandiri nechipiriso chinopiswa nezvipiriso zvokuyananisa.” Akapisa chipiriso chinopiswa." 
1Samuel13:10 Zvino wakati achangopedza kupisa chipiriso chinopiswa, Samueri akasvika; Sauro akabuda kundosangana naye, kuti amukwazise." 
1Samuel13:11 Samueri akati, “Waiteiko?” Sauro akati, “Ndakaona kuti vanhu vopararira, vachindisiya, uye kuti imi hamuna kusvika namazuva akanga atarwa, uye kuti vaFirisitia vakanga vaungana paMikimashi," 
1Samuel13:12 saka ndikati, ‘Zvino vaFirisitia vachaburuka kuzondivamba paGirigari ini ndichigere kukumbira Jehovha kundibatsira;’ naizvozvo ndakazvigombedzera ndikapisira chipiriso chinopiswa, ndisingadi hangu.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Waita sebenzi; hauna kuchengeta murairo waJehovha Mwari wako, waakanga akuraira; nokuti zvino Jehovha akanga achida kusimbisa ushe hwako pakati paVaIsiraeri nokusingaperi." 
1Samuel13:14 “Asi zvino ushe hwako hahungagari; Jehovha wakazvitsvakira munhu unofadza mwoyo wake, Jehovha akamugadza ave mutungamiriri wavanhu vake, nokuti iwe hauna kuchengeta zvawakanga warairwa naJehovha.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Samueri akasimuka, akabva Girigari akaenda Gibhiya kwaBhenjamini. Sauro akaverenga vanhu vaakanga anavo, vakasvika varume vanenge mazana matanhatu." 
1Samuel13:16 Sauro naJonatani mwanakomana wake, navanhu vavakanga vanavo, vakagara paGeba kwaBhenjamini; asi vaFirisitia vakanga vavaka misasa yavo paMikimashi." 
1Samuel13:17 Zvino vaparadzi vakabuda kumisasa yavaFirisitia, vakaita mapoka matatu; boka rimwe rakabuda nenzira inoenda Ofira kunyika yaShauri," 
1Samuel13:18 rimwe boka rikabuda nenzira inoenda Bhetihoroni; nerimwe boka rikabuda nenzira yakaenda kumuganho unotarira kumupata weZebhoimu, kurutivi rwerenje." 
1Samuel13:19 Zvino kwakanga kusino mupfuri munyika yose yaIsiraeri, nokuti vaFirisitia vakati, “VaHebheru ngavarege kuzvipfurira minondo namapfumo." 
1Samuel13:20 Asi VaIsiraeri vose vaifanira kuburukira kuvaFirisitia, mumwe nomumwe kana achida kurodzerwa muromo wegeja rake, nebadza rake, nesanhu rake, nembezo yake;" 
1Samuel13:21 nguva imwe neimwe kana mbezo dzavo, namapadza avo, neforogo dzavo, namasanhu avo zvokomara; uye kugadzirirwa zvokubaya mombe nazvo.”" 
1Samuel13:22 Naizvozvo panguva yokurwa kwakanga kusino munondo, kana pfumo muruoko rwomunhu mumwe wavanhu vakanga vanaSauro naJonatani; asi Sauro naJonatani mwanakomana wake vakanga vanazvo." 
1Samuel13:23 Zvino boka ravarwi vavaFirisitia rakabuda kumupata weMikimashi. 
1Samuel14:1 Zvino rimwe zuva Jonatani mwanakomana waSauro akati kujaya raibata nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, “Hendei tiyambukire kuboka ravarwi vavaFirisitia vari mhiri uko.” Asi haana kuudza baba vake." 
1Samuel14:2 Sauro wakanga agere pamugumo weGibhia, pasi pomutamba wakanga uri paMigironi; wakanga ana varume vanenge mazana matanhatu naye." 
1Samuel14:3 Ahija, mwanakomana waAhitubi, mukuru waIkabhodhi, mwanakomana waFiniasi, mwanakomana waEri, wakanga ari mupristi waJehovha paShiro, akafuka efodhi. Vanhu vakanga vasingazivi kuti Jonatani waenda." 
1Samuel14:4 Zvino pakati pemipata, Jonatani paakanga achida kuyambukira napo mhiri kuboka ravarwi vavaFirisitia, pakanga pane shongwe yebwe kurutivi rimwe, neshongwe yebwezve kuno rumwe rutivi; zita reimwe rakanga riri Bhozezi, nezita reimwe Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Shongwe imwe yakanga imire kurutivi rwokumusoro pamberi paMikimashi, neimwe kurutivi rwezasi pamberi peGeba." 
1Samuel14:6 Zvino Jonatani akati kujaya raibata nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, “Hendei tiyambukire kuboka ravarwi ravasina kudzingiswa ava; zvimwe Jehovha uchatibatsira, nokuti hakuna chinhu chingadzivisa Jehovha kuponesa, kunyangwe navazhinji kana navashoma.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Ipapo mubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo akati kwaari, “Itai zvose zvamunofunga; endai henyu, ini ndinemi pamunoda kuita napo.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Ipapo Jonatani akati, “Tarira, tichayambukira kuvarume avo, tindozviratidza kwavari." 
1Samuel14:9 Kana vakati kwatiri, ‘Mirai kusvikira tasvika kwamuri,’ ticharamba timire kwatiri, hatingakwiri kwavari." 
1Samuel14:10 “Asi kana vakati, ‘Kwirai kuno kwatiri, tichakwira, nokuti Mwari wavaisa mumaoko edu;’ ndicho chichava chiratidzo kwatiri.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Zvino vose vari vaviri vakazviratidza kuboka ravarwi vavaFirisitia. VaFirisitia vakati, “Tarira, VaHebheru vobuda mumakomba mavakanga vakavanda.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Varume veboka ravarwi vakapindura Jonatani nomubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, vakati, “Kwirai kuno kwatiri, tikuratidzei chinhu.” Jonatani akati kumubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, “Kwira unditevere, nokuti Jehovha wavaisa mumaoko aVaIsiraeri.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Jonatani akakwira namaoko ake namakumbo ake, mubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo achimutevera; ivo vakakundwa naJonatani, nomubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo akamutevera achiuraya." 
1Samuel14:14 Zvino pakuuraya uku kwokutanga, Jonatani nomubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo vakauraya varume vanenge makumi maviri pahafu yendima yomunda." 
1Samuel14:15 Vanhu, vakanga vari pamisasa, napaminda, navanhu vose vakabvunda; neboka ravarwi, navaparadzi, naivo vakabvunda; nenyikawo yakadengenyeka; naizvozvo kwakanga kunokubvunda kukuru." 
1Samuel14:16 Zvino nharirire dzaSauro paGibhia kwaBhenjamini vakatarira, vakaona boka guru ravanhu richinyangarika, richipararira." 
1Samuel14:17 Ipapo Sauro akati kuvanhu vaakanga anavo, “Verengai zvino, muwone kuti ndianiko usisipo kwatiri.” Zvino vakati vaverenga, vakaona kuti Jonatani nomubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo havapo." 
1Samuel14:18 Sauro akati kuna Ahija, “Uya pano neareka yaMwari.” Nokuti areka yaMwari yakanga iripo pakati pavana VaIsiraeri nenguva iyo." 
1Samuel14:19 Zvino Sauro wakati achataurirana nomupristi, bopoto rakanga riri pamisasa yavaFirisitia rikaramba richinyanya. Sauro akati kumupristi, “Dzosa ruoko rwako.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Sauro navanhu vose vaakanga anavo vakaungana, vakarwa, vakawana munondo womumwe nomuwe uchirwa neshamwari yake, kukava nokutambudzika kukuru." 
1Samuel14:21 NaVaHebheru, vaibatsira vaFirisitia kare, vakanga vakwira navo kumisasa vaibva kunhivi dzose, naivo vakavashandukira, vakabatsira VaIsiraeri vakanga vana Sauro naJonatani." 
1Samuel14:22 Zvino varume vose VaIsiraeri, vakanga vakawanda kunyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, vakati vachinzwa kuti vaFirisitia votiza naivo vakavatevera kuzorwa navo." 
1Samuel14:23 Naizvozvo Jehovha akaponesa VaIsiraeri nomusi uyo; kurwa kukapfuura napaBhetiavheni. 
1Samuel14:24 Zvino varume VaIsiraeri vakaziya nomusi uyo, asi Sauro wakapikira vanhu, akati, “Ani nani unodya zvokudya kusvikira madekwana, kusvikira ndatsivira vavengi vangu, ngaatukwe.” Naizvozvo hakuna munhu wakaravira zvokudya." 
1Samuel14:25 Zvino vanhu vose vakasvika padondo, vakawana uchi huripo pasi." 
1Samuel14:26 Vanhu vakati vasvika padondo, vakawana uchi hoyerera pasi, asi hakuna munhu wakaisa ruoko rwake kumuromo wake, nokuti vanhu vakatya kupika kwaSauro." 
1Samuel14:27 Asi Jonatani wakanga asina kunzwa baba vake vachiraira vanhu nokupika kwavo; naizvozvo akatambanudza muromo wetsvimbo yake, yakanga iri muruoko rwake, akainyika muzinga rouchi, akaisa ruoko rwake kumuromo wake, meso ake akasvinudzwa." 
1Samuel14:28 Ipapo mumwe wavanhu akapindura akati, “Baba vako vakaraira vanhu kwazvo nokupika vachiti, ‘Ani nani unodya zvokudya nhasi ngaatukwe.’ ” Asi vanhu vakanga vaziya." 
1Samuel14:29 Zvino Jonatani akati, “Baba vangu vanetsa nyika. Chionai henyu, meso angu asvinudzwa seiko, nokuti ndaravira uchi uhwu;" 
1Samuel14:30 ndoda kana vanhu vakanga vatenderwa kudya zvavakanga vapamba kuvavengi vavo! Asi zvino havana kuuraya vaFirisitia vazhinji.” 
1Samuel14:31 Nomusi uyo vakauraya vaFirisitia kubva paMikimashi kusvikira paiAjaroni; vanhu vakaziya kwazvo. 
1Samuel14:32 Vanhu vakamhanyira zvakapambwa, vakatora makwai nemombe, nemhuru, vakazviurayira pasi, vanhu vakazvidya pamwechete neropa razvo." 
1Samuel14:33 Zvino vakaudza Sauro, vakati, “Tarirai, vanhu vanotadzira Jehovha, nokuti vanodya pamwechete neropa.” Akati, “Makaita nokusatendeka; ndikungurusirei pano ibwe guru nhasi.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Zvino Sauro akati, “Pararirai pakati pavanhu, muti kwavari, ‘Mumwe nomumwe ngaauye kwandiri nenzombe yake, mumwe nomumwe negwai rake, azviurayire pano, adye murege kutadzira Jehovha muchidya pamwechete neropa.’ ” Zvino vanhu vose vakauya usiku uhwo mumwe nomumwe nenzombe yake, vakadziurayirapo." 
1Samuel14:35 Sauro akavakira Jehovha atari; iyo atari ndiyo yokutanga yaakavakira Jehovha. 
1Samuel14:36 Zvino Sauro akati, “Ngatiburuke, titevere vaFirisitia usiku, tivapambare kusvikira kwoedza, tirege kusiya munhu mumwe kwavari.” Ivo vakati, “Itai henyu sezvamunoda.” Ipapo mupristi akati “Ngatiswedere kuna Mwari pano.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Sauro akabvunza Mwari, akati, “Ndoburuka, nditevere vaFirisitia here? Muchavaisa mumaoko aVaIsiraeri here?” Asi haana kumupindura musi iwoyo." 
1Samuel14:38 Sauro akati, “Swederai pano, imi vakuru vose vavanhu, muzive nokuona kuti chivi ichi chakaitwa nhasi ndecheiko?" 
1Samuel14:39 “Nokuti naJehovha mupenyu, iye unoponesa Isiraeri, kunyangwe zviri kuna Jonatani mwanakomana wangu, achafanira kufa zvirokwazvo.” Asi kwakanga kusino munhu pakati pavanhu vose wakamupindura." 
1Samuel14:40 Zvino akati kuVaIsiraeri vose, “Imi mirai kurutivi rumwe, neni naJonatani mwanakomana wangu tichamira kuno rumwe rutivi.” Vanhu vakati kuna Sauro, “Itai henyu sezvamunoda.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Zvino Sauro akati kuna Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, “Ratidzai zvakarurama.” Zvino Jonatani naSauro vakabatwa nemijenya, asi vanhu vakapukunyuka havo." 
1Samuel14:42 Zvino Sauro akati kuVaIsiraeri vose, “Kandai mijenya pakati pangu naJonatani mwanakomana wangu.” Jonatani akabatwa." 
1Samuel14:43 Zvino Sauro akati kuna Jonatani, “Ndiudze chawaita.” Jonatani akamuudza, akati, “Ndakaravira hangu zviuchi nomuromo wetsvimbo yandakanga ndakabata muruoko rwangu; zvino ndinofanira kufa hangu.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Sauro akati, “Mwari ngaandirove, arambe achidaro, nokuti zvirokwazvo unofanira kufa, Jonatani.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Zvino vanhu vakati kuna Sauro, “Jonatani ungafa seiko, iye wakaponesa VaIsiraeri nokuponesa kukuru uku? Haisva! NaJehovha mupenyu, ruvhudzi rumwe rwomusoro wake harungawiri pasi, nokuti wakabata pamwechete naMwari nhasi.” Naizvozvo vanhu vakadzikinura Jonatani, akasafa." 
1Samuel14:46 Zvino Sauro akarega kutevera vaFirisitia, vaFirisitia vakaenda kunyika yavo." 
1Samuel14:47 Zvino Sauro wakati agadzwa ushe hwaIsiraeri, akarwa navavengi vake vose kunhivi dzose, navaMoabhu, navana vaAmoni, navaEdhomu, namadzimambo eZoba, navaFirisitia; pose paakaenda wakakunda." 
1Samuel14:48 Akarwa noumhare, akakunda vaAmareki, akarwira VaIsiraeri pamaoko avaivapambara." 
1Samuel14:49 Zvino vanakomana vaSauro vaiva Jonatani, naIshivi, naMarikishua, namazita avanasikana vake vaviri aiti, Zita rowedangwe Merabhi, nezita romuduku Mikari." 
1Samuel14:50 Zita romukadzi waSauro raiva Ahinoamu, mwanasikana waAhimaazi, nezita romutungamiriri wehondo yake raiva Abhineri, mwanakomana waNeri, babamunini vaSauro." 
1Samuel14:51 Kishi ndiye waiva baba vaSauro; naNeri, baba vaAbhineri, waiva mwanakomana waAbhieri." 
1Samuel14:52 Pamazuva ose aSauro vakanga vachirwa zvikuru navaFirisitia; zvino Sauro wakati kana achiona murume ane simba kana murume uno umhare, waimugarisa naye." 
1Samuel15:1 Zvino Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Jehovha wakandituma kuti ndikuzodze, uve mambo wavanhu vake ivo VaIsiraeri; naizvozvo zvino chinzwa mashoko aJehovha." 
1Samuel15:2 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Ndakacherechedza zvakaitirwa Isiraeri navaAmareki, kuti wakavadzivirira panzira nguva yokubva kwavo Ijipiti." 
1Samuel15:3 Zvino chienda undokunda vaAmareki, uparadze chose zvose zvavainazvo, usavarega; asi uuraye varume navakadzi vose, navacheche navanomwa, nemombe namakwai, namakamera nembongoro.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Sauro akadana vanhu, akavaverenga paTeraimi, vakasvika zviuru zvina mazana maviri zvavaifamba namakumbo, navarume vavaJudha vane zviuru zvine gumi." 
1Samuel15:5 Sauro akasvika paguta ravaAmareki, akavavandira pamupata." 
1Samuel15:6 Sauro akati kuvaKeni, “Endai mubve, muburuke mubve pakati pavaAmareki, ndirege kukuparadzai pamwechete navo; nokuti imi makava nomwoyo munyoro navana vose VaIsiraeri, panguva yokubuda kwavo Ijipiti.” Naizvozvo vaKeni vakabva pakati pavaAmareki." 
1Samuel15:7 Ipapo Sauro akaparadza vaAmareki, kubva paHavira kusvikira paShuru, pakatarisana neIjipiti." 
1Samuel15:8 Akabata Agagi, mambo wavaAmareki achiri mupenyu, akaparadza vanhu vose chose neminondo inopinza." 
1Samuel15:9 Asi Sauro navanhu vakarega Agagi, namakwai akaisvonaka, nedzimwe mombe, nezvimwe zvakakora, namakwayana, nezvose zvakanga zvakanaka, vakaramba kuzviparadza chose; asi zvose zvavakazvidza, zvakanga zvisino kunaka, ndizvo zvavakaparadza chose." 
1Samuel15:10 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Samueri, rikati," 
1Samuel15:11 “Ndinozvidemba zvandakagadza Sauro ave mambo, nokuti wadzoka, haachanditeveri, haana kuita sezvandakamuraira.” Samueri akava neshungu, akachema kuna Jehovha usiku hwose." 
1Samuel15:12 Zvino Samueri akamuka mangwanani kundosangana naSauro. Samueri akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Sauro wakasvika Karimeri, akazvimisira shongwe, zvino watsauka, wapfuura, waburukira Girigari.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Samueri akasvika kuna Sauro, Sauro akati kwaari, “Jehovha ngaakuropafadze; ndaita sezvandakarairirwa naJehovha.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Samueri akati, “Ko kuchema uku kwamakwai munzeve dzangu nokukuma kwemombe kwandinonzwa kunoti kudiniko?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Sauro akati, “Vabva nazvo kuvaAmareki, nokuti vanhu havana kuuraya makwai akaisvonaka nenzombe, kuti vabayire Jehovha Mwari wenyu; asi zvimwe zvose takazviparadza chose.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Ipapo Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Nyarara, ndikuzivise zvandakaudzwa naJehovha usiku uhwu. Akati kwaari, ‘Taurai henyu.’" 
1Samuel15:17 Samueri akati, ‘Kunyangwe wakanga uri muduku pakufunga kwako, hauna kuitwa mukuru wamarudzi aVaIsiraeri here? Jehovha wakakuzodza, kuti uve mambo waIsiraeri;" 
1Samuel15:18 Jehovha akakutuma parwendo,’ akati, ‘Enda, uparadze chose vatadzi, ivo vaAmareki, urwe navo kusvikira vapera.’" 
1Samuel15:19 “Zvino wakaregereiko kuteerera izwi raJehovha, asi wakamhanyira zvakapambwa, ukaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Sauro akati kuna Samueri, “Zvirokwazvo ndakateerera izwi raJehovha, ndikaenda nenzira yandakanga ndatumwa naJehovha, ndikauya naAgagi mambo wavaAmareki, ndikaparadza vaAmareki chose." 
1Samuel15:21 “Asi vanhu, ndivo vakatora zvakapambwa, iwo makwai nenzombe, nezvakanaka pazvinhu zvakanga zvatsaurwa, kuti vabayire Jehovha Mwari wenyu paGirigari.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Samueri akati, “Ko Jehovha ungafarira zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvibairo, sezvaanofarira kuteerera izwi raJehovha here? Tarira, kuteerera kunokunda zvibairo, nokunzwa kunokunda mafuta amakondohwe." 
1Samuel15:23 Nokuti kumukira Jehovha kwakafanana nechivi chokuuka, uye kusindimara kwakafanana nokunamata kuzvifananidzo neterafimi. Zvawakaramba shoko raJehovha, naiye wakakurambawo kuti urege kuva mambo.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Ipapo Sauro akati kuna Samueri “Ndakatadza, nokuti ndakadarika murairo waJehovha, uye namashoko enyu, nokuti ndakatya vanhu, ndikateerera mazwi avo." 
1Samuel15:25 Zvino ndinokumbira kuti mundikanganwirewo zvivi zvangu, mudzoke neni, ndinamate kuna Jehovha.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Handingadzoki newe, nokuti wakaramba shoko raJehovha, naJehovha wakuramba newewo kuti urege kuva mambo waIsiraeri.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Zvino Samueri wakati achitendeuka, achida kubva, Sauro akabata mupendero wenguo yake, iyo ikabvaruka." 
1Samuel15:28 Samueri akati kwaari, “Jehovha wakabvarura ushe hwaIsiraeri kwauri nhasi, akahupa mumwe wokwako unokukunda nokunaka." 
1Samuel15:29 Uyewo Mutendiwa waIsiraeri haangarevi nhema, kana kuzvidemba; nokuti haazi munhu ungazvidemba.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Ipapo iye akati, “Ndakatadza hangu, asi ndikudzei henyu pamberi pavakuru vangu, napamberi paIsiraeri, mudzoke neni, ndinamate kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Naizvozvo Samueri akadzoka, akaenda naSauro, Sauro akanamata kuna Jehovha." 
1Samuel15:32 Zvino Samueri akati, “Uyai kwandiri naAgagi mambo wavaAmareki.” Agagi akauya kwaari, akafara. Agagi akati, “Zvirokwazvo kuvava kworufu kwapfuura.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Samueri akati, “Munondo wako sezvawakashaisa vakadzi vana, saizvozvo mai vako vachashaiwa vana pakati pavakadzi.” Samueri akaguranya Agagi pamberi paJehovha paGirigari." 
1Samuel15:34 Zvino Samueri akaenda Rama, naSaurowo akakwira kumba kwake paGibhia kwaSauro." 
1Samuel15:35 Samueri akasazouyazve kuona Sauro kusvikira pazuva rokufa kwake; asi Samueri wakachema Sauro, naJehovhawo azvidemba nokuti wakanga aita Sauro mambo waIsiraeri." 
1Samuel16:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Samueri, “Uchachema Sauro kusvikira rinhiko, zvandakamuramba ini, kuti arege kuva mambo waIsiraeri? Zadza gonamombe rako namafuta, uende, ndikutume kuna Jese muBhetirehemu; nokuti ndakazvitsvakira mambo pakati pavana vake.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Samueri akati, “Ndingaenda seiko? Kana Sauro akazvinzwa, uchandiuraya.” Jehovha akati, “Enda netsiru, uti, ‘Ndauya kuzobayira Jehovha.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Zvino udane Jese auye kuchibayiro, ini ndichakuzivisa zvaunofanira kuita, ugondizodzera wandichakuratidza.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samueri akaita zvakataurwa naJehovha, akaenda Bhetirehemu. Vakuru veguta vakandosangana naye, vachibvunda, vakati, “Mauya norugare here?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Akati, “Hongu, norugare; ndauya kuzobayira Jehovha, muzvinatsei, muende neni kundobayira.” Ipapo akanatsa Jese navanakomana vake, akavadana kuchibayiro." 
1Samuel16:6 Zvino vakati vasvika, akatarira Eriabhu, akati, “Zvirokwazvo, muzodzwa waJehovha uri pamberi pake.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Asi Jehovha akati kuna Samueri, “Usatarira chiso chake, kana mumhu wake, nokuti ndamuramba; nokuti Jehovha haawoni somunhu, nokuti munhu unotarira zviri kunze, asi Jehovha unotarira zviri pamwoyo.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Zvino Jese akadana Abhinadhabhu, akamupfuudza pamberi paSamueri. Akati, “Kunyangwe nouyu Jehovha haana kumutsaura.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Zvino Jese akapfuudza Shama. Akati, “Nouyu Jehovha haana kumutsaura.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Jese akapfuudza vanomwe vevanakomana vake pamberi paSamueri. Samueri akati kuna Jese, “Jehovha haana kutsaura ava.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Zvino Samueri akati kuna Jese, “Vana vako vari pano vose here?” Akati, “Muduku kuna vose ndiye wasara; tarirai unotarisa makwai.” Samueri akati kuna Jese, “Tuma munhu amutore, nokuti hatingagari pakudya kusvika iye auya pano.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Akatuma munhu, akapinda naye. Zvino wakanga ari mutsvuku, akanaka kumeso, ano muviri wakanaka. Jehovha akati, “Simuka, umuzodze, nokuti ndiye.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Ipapo Samueri akatora gonamombe ramafuta, akamuzodza pakati pehama dzake. Mweya waJehovha akauya pamusoro paDhavhidhi nesimba, kubva pazuva iro zvichienda mberi. Zvino Samueri akasimuka, akaenda Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Zvino Mweya waJehovha akanga wabva kuna Sauro, mweya wakaipa wakanga watumwa naJehovha, ukamuvhundusa." 
1Samuel16:15 Varanda vaSauro vakati kwaari, “Tarirai zvino, mweya wakaipa, wakatumwa naMwari, unokuvhundusai.”" 
1Samuel16:16 Zvino tenzi wedu ngaatiraire isu varanda venyu vari pamberi penyu, kuti titsvake munhu anoziva kuridza mbira kwazvo; zvino kana mweya wakaipa, unotumwa naMwari, uchiuya pamusoro penyu, iye aridze noruoko rwake, mupore." 
1Samuel16:17 Sauro akati kuvaranda vake, “Chinditsvakirai munhu unogona kuridza zvakanaka, muuye naye kwandiri.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Zvino mumwe wamajaya akapindura, akati, “Tarirai, ndakaona mwanakomana waJese muBhetirehemu unoziva kuridza kwazvo, munhu ane simba noumhare, murwi, wakachenjera pakutaura, munhu wakanaka, uye Jehovha anaye.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Naizvozvo Sauro akatuma nhume kuna Jese, akati, “Nditumire mwanakomana wako Dhavhidhi, ari kumakwai.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Jese akatora mbongoro, akaitakudza chingwa, nedende rewaini, nembudzana, akazvituma kuna Sauro nomwanakomana wake Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel16:21 Dhavhidhi akasvika kuna Sauro, akamira pamberi pake, iye akamuda kwazvo, akava mubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa." 
1Samuel16:22 Sauro akatuma shoko kuna Jese, akati, “Tendera hako Dhavhidhi amire pamberi pangu, nokuti ndinomufarira kwazvo.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Zvino nguva dzose kana mweya wakaipa, wakatumwa naMwari, uchiuya pamusoro paSauro, Dhavhidhi ndokutora mbira, nokuridza noruoko rwake; Sauro akanyaradzwa, akapora, mweya wakaipa ndokubva kwaari." 
1Samuel17:1 Zvino vaFirisitia vakakoka hondo dzavo kuzorwa, vakaungana paSoko raiva raJudha, vakavaka misasa yavo pakati peSoko naAzeka paEfesidamimi." 
1Samuel17:2 Sauro navarume VaIsiraeri vakaunganawo, vakavaka misasa yavo pamupata weEra, vakagadzira hondo kuzorwa navaFirisitia." 
1Samuel17:3 VaFirisitia vakanga vamire pagomo kuno rumwe rutivi, naVaIsiraeri vakanga vamire pagomo kuno rumwe rutivi; mupata wakanga uri pakati pavo."
