1Samuel17:4 Zvino kumisasa yavaFirisitia kwakabuda mhare, yainzi Goriati weGati; kureba kwake kwakanga kuna makubhiti matanhatu uye sapanosvika minwe." 
1Samuel17:5 Wakanga ane ngowani yendarira pamusoro wake, uye wakanga akafuka nguo dzokurwa dzamabape endarira, nguo dzokurwa dzamabape endarira dzakasvika mashekeri ane zviuru zvishanu zvendarira pakurema kwadzo." 
1Samuel17:6 Wakanga ane zvidzitiro zvamakumbo zvendarira, nemharu yendarira pakati pamafudzi ake." 
1Samuel17:7 Rwiriko rwepfumo rake rwakanga rwakafanana nedanda romuruki; nechese yepfumo rake yakasvika mashekeri ana mazana matanhatu amatare pakurema kwayo; uye mubati wenhowo yake waifamba mberi kwake. 
1Samuel17:8 Akamira, akadanidzira kuhondo dzaVaIsiraeri, akati kwavari, “Mabudireiko muchigadzira hondo yenyu? Ini handizi muFirisitia, nemi varanda vaSauro here? Imi muzvitsaurire murume, aburukire kuno kwandiri." 
1Samuel17:9 Kana akagona kurwa neni, akandiuraya, isu tichava varanda venyu; asi kana ini ndikamukunda, ndikamuuraya, imi muchava varanda vedu, muchatibatira.”" 
1Samuel17:10 MuFirisitia akati, “Nhasi ndinoshora hondo dzaVaIsiraeri; ndipei munhu, tirwe.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Zvino Sauro naVaIsiraeri vose vakati vachinzwa mashoko aya omuFirisitia, vakavhunduka, vakatya kwazvo." 
1Samuel17:12 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakanga ari mwanakomana womuEfurata weBhetirehemujudha, wainzi Jese; iye wakanga ana vanakomana vasere, asi munhu uyu wakanga ava mutana pamazuva aSauro, akwegura pakati pavarume." 
1Samuel17:13 Vanakomana vatatu vakuru vaJese vakanga vaenda naSauro kundorwa; zvino mazita avana vake vatatu, vakanga vaenda kundorwa, akanga ari, Eriabhu wedangwe, tevere Abhinadhabhu, wechitatu Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Dhavhidhi wakanga ari muduku kuna vose; vakuru vatatu vakanga vaenda naSauro. 
1Samuel17:15 Zvino Dhavhidhi waisienda kuna Sauro, achidzoka kuzofudza makwai ababa vake paBhetirehemu." 
1Samuel17:16 MuFirisitia waiswedera mangwana namadeko, akamirapo mazuva ana makumi mana." 
1Samuel17:17 Zvino Jese akati kuna Dhavhidhi mwanakomana wake, “Chindopa vakuru vako imwe yezviyo izvi zvakakangwa, nezvingwa zvine gumi, ukurumidze kuzviisa kumisasa kuvakuru vako;" 
1Samuel17:18 asi mapundu aya omukaka wakafa ane gumi uise kumukuru wechiuru chavo, ugotarira kuti vakuru vako vakadiniko, ndokutora kwavari chokuwonerapo.”" 
1Samuel17:19 Zvino Sauro, naivo navarume vose VaIsiraeri vakanga vari pamupata weEra vachirwa navaFirisitia." 
1Samuel17:20 Dhavhidhi akamuka mangwanani, akasiya makwai ake kumufudzi, akatora nhumbi, akaenda kwaakanga arairwa naJese; akasvika pakanga pakarundwa ngoro, varwi vobuda vachiridza mhere kundorwa." 
1Samuel17:21 VaIsiraeri navaFirisitia vakazvigadzira kurwa, hondo dzakatarisana." 
1Samuel17:22 Dhavhidhi akasiya nhumbi dzake pamaoko omutariri wenhumbi, akamhanyira kuhondo, akasvika akakwazisa vakuru vake." 
1Samuel17:23 Zvino wakati achataura navo, iya mhare ikabuda kuhondo yavaFirisitia, iye muFirisitia weGati, wainzi Goriati, akataura mashoko aaisitaura, Dhavhidhi akaanzwa." 
1Samuel17:24 Zvino varume vose VaIsiraeri vakati vachiona murume uyu, vakamutiza, vakatya kwazvo." 
1Samuel17:25 Varume VaIsiraeri vakati, “Maona here murume uyo, wakwira? Zvirokwazvo wakwira kuzoshora Isiraeri; munhu unomuuraya, mambo uchamufumisa nefuma zhinji, nokumupawo mwanasikana wake, nokusunungura imba yababa vake muna Isiraeri.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Zvino Dhavhidhi akataura navarume vakanga vamire naye, akati, “Munhu, unouraya muFirisitia uyu, akabvisa kushorwa kwaVaIsiraeri uchapiweiko? Nokuti muFirisitia uyu usino kudzingiswa ndianiko, unoshora hondo dzaMwari mupenyu?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Vanhu vakamupindura saizvozvo, vakati, “Munhu, unomuuraya, uchapiwa chokuti nechokuti.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Zvino Eriabhu mukoma wake mukuru akanzwa achitaura navarume avo, Eriabhu akatsamwira Dhavhidhi, akati, “Waburukireiko pano iwe? Makwai aya mashoma waasiya naniko murenje? Ndinoziva manyawi ako, nokuipa kwomwoyo wako; nokuti waburuka kuzoona hondo.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Dhavhidhi akati, “Zvino ndadiniko hangu? Handina kungobvunza hangu here?”" 
1Samuel17:30 Akatendeukirazve kuno mumwe, akataurazve saizvozvo; vanhu vakamupindurazve saizvozvo." 
1Samuel17:31 Zvino vakati vanzwa mashoko akataurwa naDhavhidhi, vakaarondedzera kuna Sauro; akatuma munhu kuzomudana." 
1Samuel17:32 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Ngakurege kuva nomunhu unopera mwoyo nokuda kwake; muranda wenyu uchaenda kundorwa nomuFirisitia uyo.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Haungagoni kundorwa nomuFirisitia uyo, nokuti uchiri mukomana, asi iye murume murwi kubva pauduku hwake.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Muranda wenyu waifudza makwai ababa vake; zvino kana shumba ikasvika, kana bheya, kuzotora gwayana paboka," 
1Samuel17:35 ndaibuda, ndikaitevera, ndikaiuraya, ndikaiwira pamuromo wayo; kana ichinge ikandimukira, ndaibata ndebvu dzayo, ndokuibaya nokuiuraya.”" 
1Samuel17:36 Muranda wenyu akazviuraya zvose, kunyangwe shumba kunyangwe bheya; muFirisitia uyu usinokudzingiswa uchafanana nechimwe chazvo, nokuti wakashora hondo dzaMwari mupenyu." 
1Samuel17:37 Dhavhidhi akati, “Jehovha wakandirwira pagumbo reshumba negumbo rebere, iye uchandirwirawo paruoko rwomuFirisitia uyu.” Ipapo Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Enda hako, Jehovha uchava newe.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Sauro akafukidza Dhavhidhi nguo dzake, akadzika ngowani yendarira pamusoro wake, akamufukidza nguo dzokurwa dzamabape endarira." 
1Samuel17:39 Zvino Dhavhidhi akasungira munondo wake pamusoro penguo dzake, akaidza kufamba; nokuti wakanga asina kumboidza izvozvo. Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Handigoni kufamba nadzo, nokuti handina kumbodziidza.” Dhavhidhi akadzibvisa." 
1Samuel17:40 Akabata tsvimbo muruoko rwake, akazvitsaurira hurungudo shanu parukova, akadziisa muhombodo yake yomufudzi, yaakanga anayo, imo munhava yake; chifuramabwe chake chakanga chiri muruoko rwake; akaswedera kumuFirisitia." 
1Samuel17:41 MuFirisitia akauya, akaswedera kuna Dhavhidhi; munhu wakanga akabata nhovo yake akamutungamirira." 
1Samuel17:42 Zvino muFirisitia wakati achitarira, akaona Dhavhidhi, akamuzvidza; nokuti wakanga achiri mukomana hake, mutsvuku, ane chiso chakanaka." 
1Samuel17:43 MuFirisitia akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Ndiri imbwa kanhi, zvaunouya kwandiri netsvimbo?” MuFirisitia akatuka Dhavhidhi navamwari vake." 
1Samuel17:44 MuFirisitia akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Uya kuno kwandiri, ndipe shiri dzokudenga nezvikara zvebundo nyama yako.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati kumuFirisitia, “Iwe unouya kwandiri nomunondo, nepfumo, nemharu; asi ini ndinouya kwauri nezita raJehovha wehondo, Mwari wehondo dzaVaIsiraeri, vaunoshora." 
1Samuel17:46 Nhasi Jehovha uchakuisa muruoko rwangu; ndichakuuraya, ndichakugura musoro wako, ndichapa shiri dzokudenga nezvikara zvenyika zvitunha zvehondo dzavaFirisitia nhasi, kuti nyika yose izive kuti Mwari uripo pakati paIsiraeri.”" 
1Samuel17:47 Zvino kuti ungano iyo yose izive, kuti Jehovha haaponesi nomunondo kana nepfumo, nokuti kurwa ndokwaJehovha, iye uchakuisa mumaoko edu." 
1Samuel17:48 Zvino muFirisitia wakati achisimuka, achiuya kuzosangana naDhavhidhi, Dhavhidhi akakurumidza, akamhanyira kuhondo kuzosangana nomuFirisitia." 
1Samuel17:49 Dhavhidhi akapinza ruoko rwake muhombodo yake, akabvisamo ibwe, akariposhera, akarova muFirisitia pahuma yake; ibwe rikanyura muhuma yake, iye akawira pasi nechiso." 
1Samuel17:50 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akakunda muFirisitia nechifuramabwe nebwe, akakunda muFirisitia, akamuuraya; asi kwakanga kusino munondo muruoko rwaDhavhidhi." 
1Samuel17:51 Zvino Dhavhidhi akamhanya, akamira pamusoro pomuFirisitia, akatora munondo wake, akauvhomora pamuhara wawo, akamuuraya, akamugura musoro wake nawo. Zvino vaFirisitia vakati vachiona kuti mhare yavo yafa, vakatiza." 
1Samuel17:52 Zvino varume VaIsiraeri navaJudha vakasimuka, vakadanidzira, vakatevera vaFirisitia kusvikira paGati napamusuwo eEkironi. Vakanga vakuvadzwa vavaFirisitia vakawira pasi panzira inoenda Shaaraimi, kusvikira paGati napaEkironi." 
1Samuel17:53 Ipapo vana VaIsiraeri vakadzoka pakudzingirira vaFirisitia, vakapambara misasa yavo." 
1Samuel17:54 Dhavhidhi akatora musoro womuFirisitia, akauisa Jerusaremu, asi nguo dzake dzokurwa nadzo wakadziisa mutende rake." 
1Samuel17:55 Zvino Sauro wakati achiona Dhavhidhi achibuda kundorwa nomuFirisitia, akati kuna Abhineri, mukuru wehondo, “Abhineri, mukomana uyo mwanakomana waaniko?” Abhineri akati, “Nomweya wenyu mupenyu, mambo handizivi.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Mambo akati, “Bvunza zvakanaka kuti mukomana uyu mwanakomana waaniko.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Zvino pakudzoka kwaDhavhidhi pakuuraya muFirisitia Abhineri akamutora akamuisa pamberi paSauro, achakabata musoro womuFirisitia muruoko rwake." 
1Samuel17:58 Sauro akati kwaari, “Ndiwe mwanakomana waaniko, iwe jaya?” Dhavhidhi akapindura, akati, “Ndiri mwanakomana womuranda wenyu Jese muBhetirehemu.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Zvino wakati apedza kutaura naSauro, mwoyo waJonatani ukanamatira mwoyo waDhavhidhi, Jonatani akamuda sezvaakanga achida mwoyo wake." 
1Samuel18:2 Sauro akamutora zuva iro, akasada kumutendera kudzokera kumusha kwake, kumba kwababa vake." 
1Samuel18:3 Zvino Jonatani akaita sungano naDhavhidhi, nokuti wakanga achimuda sezvaakanga achida mwoyo wake." 
1Samuel18:4 Jonatani akabvisa nguo yaakanga akafuka, akaipa Dhavhidhi, nezvisimiro zvake, kunyangwe nomunondo wake, nouta hwake, nebhandi rake." 
1Samuel18:5 Dhavhidhi akasienda kwose kwaaitumwa naSauro, akabata mabasa ose nokungwara; Sauro akamuita mukuru wavarume vehondo; zvikafadza vanhu vose uye navaranda vaSaurowo." 
1Samuel18:6 Zvino vakati vachisvika pakudzoka kwaDhavhidhi pakuuraya muFirisitia, vakadzi vakabuda kumaguta ose aVaIsiraeri vachiimba, vachitamba, kuzosangana namambo Sauro nengoma, nokufara uye nezvimwe zvokuridza." 
1Samuel18:7 Vakadzi vakaimba vachibvumirana pakuridza kwavo, vakati, “Sauro wakauraya zviuru zvamazana ake, Asi Dhavhidhi makumi ezviuru zvamazana ake.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Sauro akatsamwa kwazvo, shoko iri rikasamufadza, akati, “Vakapa Dhavhidhi makumi ezviuru zvamazana, asi ini vakandipa zviuru zvoga; chaanoshaiwa zvino chiiko, asi ushe hwoga?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Zvino kubva pazuva iro namazuva ose Sauro akachenjerera Dhavhidhi. 
1Samuel18:10 Zvino fume mangwana mweya wakaipa, wakanga watumwa naMwari, ukauya pamusoro paSauro nesimba, iye akataura nokupenga mukati meimba yake; Dhavhidhi akaridza noruoko rwake sezvaaita zuva rimwe nerimwe; Sauro wakanga akabata pfumo muruoko rwake." 
1Samuel18:11 Sauro akaposha pfumo, nokuti wakati, “Ndichabayira Dhavhidhi pamadziro.” Dhavhidhi akanzvenga kaviri pamberi pake." 
1Samuel18:12 Sauro akatya Dhavhidhi, nokuti Jehovha akanga abva kuna Sauro." 
1Samuel18:13 Naizvozvo Sauro akamutamisa abve kwaari, akamuita mukuru wechiuru, akabuda nokupinda pakati pavanhu." 
1Samuel18:14 Dhavhidhi akafamba nokungwara pazvose zvaakaita, Jehovha akava naye." 
1Samuel18:15 Zvino Sauro wakati achiona kuti unofamba nokungwara kukuru, akamutya kwazvo." 
1Samuel18:16 Asi VaIsiraeri vose navaJudha vose vakada Dhavhidhi, nokuti waibuda nokupinda pakati pavo." 
1Samuel18:17 Zvino Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Tarira, mukunda wangu mukuru Merabhi, ndichakupa iye ave mukadzi wako; asi iwe uve mhare yangu, urwe hondo dzaJehovha.” Nokuti Sauro wakati, “Ruoko rwangu ngarurege kumuuraya, asi maoko avaFirisitia ngaamuuraye.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Ini ndini aniko, noupenyu hwangu chiiko, kana imba yababa vangu pakati paIsiraeri, kuti ndive mukwambo wamambo?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Asi nguva iyo Merabhi mukunda waSauro yaaifanira kupiwa Dhavhidhi, iye akapiwa Adhirieri muMehorati, ave mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel18:20 Zvino Mikari mukunda waSauro, wakanga achida Dhavhidhi; vakaudza Sauro, akafara nazvo." 
1Samuel18:21 Ipapo Sauro akati, “Ndichamupa iye, ave musungo kwaari, uye kuti vaFirisitia varwe naye.” Naizvozvo Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Nhasi uchava mukwambo wangu rwechipiri.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Ipapo Sauro akaraira varanda vake, akati, “Tauriranai naDhavhidhi pakavanda, muti, ‘Tarira, mambo unokufarira, navaranda vake vose vanokuda;’ naizvozvo zvino chiva mukwambo wamambo.”" 
1Samuel18:23 Varanda vaSauro vakataura mashoko iwayo munzeve dzaDhavhidhi. Dhavhidhi akati, “Imi munoti zvitete here kuva mukwambo wamambo, zvandiri murombo hangu usingakudzwi?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Varanda vaSauro vakamuudza vakati, “Dhavhidhi wataura mashoko okuti." 
1Samuel18:25 Sauro akati, ‘Muti kuna Dhavhidhi, Mambo haatsvaki kuroorerwa, asi zvikanda zvapamberi zvine zana zvavaFirisitia, kuti mambo atsive vavengi vake.’ ” Asi Sauro wakafunga kuurayisa Dhavhidhi navaFirisitia." 
1Samuel18:26 Zvino varanda vake vakati vachiudza Dhavhidhi mashoko iwayo Dhavhidhi akafara kuva mukwambo wamambo. Zvino mazuva asati apera," 
1Samuel18:27 Dhavhidhi akasimuka, akaenda iye navanhu vake, akauraya varume vana mazana maviri avaFirisitia; Dhavhidhi akauya nezvikanda zvavo zvapamberi, akazvipa zviri zvose kuna mambo, kuti ave mukwambo wamambo. Ipapo Sauro akamupa Mikari mukunda wake, ave mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel18:28 Naizvozvo Sauro akaziva nokuona kuti Jehovha anaDhavhidhi; Mikari mukunda waSauro akamuda. 
1Samuel18:29 Sauro akanyanya kutya Dhavhidhi; Sauro akaramba achivenga Dhavhidhi. 
1Samuel18:30 Zvino machinda avaFirisitia akabuda; nguva dzose kana vobuda, Dhavhidhi akakunda vamwe varanda vose vaSauro pakungwara; naizvozvo zita rake rikakurumbira kwazvo." 
1Samuel19:1 Zvino Sauro akataura naJonatani mwanakomana wake, navaranda vake vose, kuti vauraye Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel19:2 Asi Jonatani mwanakomana waSauro, wakanga achifarira Dhavhidhi kwazvo. Naizvozvo Jonatani akaudza Dhavhidhi, akati, “Sauro, baba vangu, vanotsvaka kukuuraya; naizvozvo zvino, chenjera kwazvo mangwana, ugare pakavanda, uvande;" 
1Samuel19:3 ini ndichabuda, ndichandomira kuna baba vangu mumunda, mauri, nditaurirane nababa vangu pamusoro pako; kana ndichinge ndikaona chinhu, ndichakuudza.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Ipapo Jonatani akareverera Dhavhidhi zvakanaka kuna Sauro baba vake, akati kwavari, “Mambo ngaarege kutadzira Dhavhidhi muranda wake, nokuti iye haana kukutadzirai imi, asi wakakuitirai zvakanaka kwazvo;" 
1Samuel19:5 nokuti wakabata upenyu hwake mumaoko ake, akauraya muFirisitia; Jehovha akakundisa VaIsiraeri nokukunda kukuru; imi makazviona, mukafara; naizvozvo muchatadzireiko ropa risine mhosva, mukauraya Dhavhidhi asine mhaka hake?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Sauro akateerera izwi raJonatani, Sauro akapika akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, haangaurawi!”" 
1Samuel19:7 Zvino Jonatani akadana Dhavhidhi, Jonatani akamuzivisa zvinhu izvo zvose. Jonatani akaenda naDhavhidhi kuna Sauro, akagara pamberi pake sapakutanga." 
1Samuel19:8 Zvino kurwa kukavapozve, Dhavhidhi akabuda kundorwa navaFirisitia, akavauraya nokuuraya kukuru, vakatiza pamberi pake." 
1Samuel19:9 Mweya wakaipa, wakanga watumwa naJehovha, ukauya pamusoro paSauro, agere mumba make ane pfumo rake muruoko rwake; Dhavhidhi akaridza noruoko rwake." 
1Samuel19:10 Sauro akaidza kubayira Dhavhidhi pamadziro nepfumo; Dhavhidhi akatiza, akapukunyuka usiku uhwo." 
1Samuel19:11 Ipapo Sauro akatuma nhume kumba kwaDhavhidhi kumurinda nokumuuraya mangwanani; Mikari mukadzi waDhavhidhi, akamuudza akati, “Kana ukasaponesa upenyu hwako usiku hwuno, uchaurayiwa mangwana.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Naizvozvo Mikari akaburutsa Dhavhidhi pasi napawindo; akaenda, akatiza, akapukunyuka." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikari akatora terafimi, akairadzika panhoo, akaisa mutsamiro wemvere dzembudzi pamusoro wayo, akaifukidza nejira." 
1Samuel19:14 Zvino Sauro wakati achituma nhume kuzobata Dhavhidhi, iye akati, “Unorwara.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Ipapo Sauro akatuma nhume kuzotarira Dhavhidhi akati, “Uyai naye kwandiri ari panhoo, ndimuuraye.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Zvino nhume dzakati dzichipinda, dzikaona terafimi iri panhoo nomutsamiro wemvere dzembudzi pamusoro wayo." 
1Samuel19:17 Sauro akati kuna Mikari, “Wandinyengereiko kudai, ukarega muvengi wangu achienda, akapukunyuka?” Mikari akapindura Sauro achiti, Iye wakati kwandiri, “Ndirege, ndiende; ndichakuurayireiko?”" 
1Samuel19:18 Dhavhidhi akatiza, akapukunyuka, akasvika kuna Samueri paRama, akamuudza zvose zvaakanga aitirwa naSauro. Iye naSamueri vakandogara Naioti." 
1Samuel19:19 Zvino Sauro wakaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Tarirai, Dhavhidhi uri Naioti paRama.”" 
1Samuel19:20 Sauro akatuma nhume kundobata Dhavhidhi; asi idzo dzakati dzichiona boka ravaporofita vachiporofita, naSamueri amire ari mutungamiriri wavo, Mweya waMwari akauya pamusoro penhume dzaSauro, naidzo dzikaporofitawo." 
1Samuel19:21 Zvino Sauro wakati achiudzwa izvozvo, akatumazve dzimwe nhume, naidzo dzikaporofitawo. Ipapo Sauro akatumazve nhume rwechitatu, naidzo dzikaporofitawo." 
1Samuel19:22 Zvino naiye akaendawo Rama, akasvika patsime guru riri paSeku, akabvunza akati, “VanaSamueri naDhavhidhi varipiko?” Mumwe akati, “Tarirai, vari Naioti paRama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Iye akaendako Naioti paRama, Mweya waMwari akauya pamusoro pakewo, akafamba achiporofita kudzimara asvika Naioti paRama." 
1Samuel19:24 Akabvisawo nguo dzake, akaporofita pamberi paSamueri, akavata pasi, asakafuka, zuva iro rose nousiku uhwo hwose. Naizvozvo vanoti, “Sauro uri pakati pavaporofitawo here?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakatiza paNaioti paRama, akaenda akati kuna Jonatani, “Ndadiniko? Kutadza kwangu ndokwei? Chivi changu pamberi pababa vako ndechipi, zvavanotsvaka kundiuraya?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Iye akati kwaari, “Haisva, usadaro, haungafi; tarira baba vangu havangaiti chinhu chikuru kana chiduku, vasingandizivisi icho; zvino baba vangu vangandivanzirireiko chinhu ichi? Hazvizi izvo.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akapikazve akati, “Baba vako vanoziva kwazvo kuti ini ndakawana nyasha kwauri; naizvozvo vakati, ‘Jonatani ngaarege kuzviziva, zvimwe ungazvidya mwoyo;’ asi zvirokwazvo, naJehovha mupenyu, nomweya wako mupenyu, kune nhambwe imwechete pakati pangu norufu.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Ipapo Jonatani akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Zvose zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wako, ndichakuitira izvozvo.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Jonatani, “Tarira, mangwana mwedzi wogara, ndichafanira kundogara pakudya namambo; asi nditendere, ndiende kundovanda mumunda kusvikira madekwana ezuva rechitatu." 
1Samuel20:6 Kana baba vako vakandishaiwa, uti kwavari, ‘Dhavhidhi wakakumbira zvikuru kwandiri, kuti amhanyire Bhetirehemu, kuguta rake; nokuti ikoko kunoitwa chibayiro chegore rimwe nerimwe chavose veimba yake.’" 
1Samuel20:7 “Kana vakati, ‘Zvakanaka hazvo!’ Muranda wako uchava norugare; asi kana vakatsamwa, uzive kuti vagara vandifungira zvakaipa." 
1Samuel20:8 Naizvozvo chiitira hako muranda wako zvakanaka; nokuti wakaita sungano nomuranda wako pamberi paJehovha, asi kana zvakaipa zviriko kwandiri, undiuraye iwe, nokuti uchandiisireiko kuna baba vako?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Jonatani akati, “Usadaro, nokuti dai ndaiziva kuti baba vangu vagara vafunga kukuitira zvakaipa, handizaikuudza here?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Jonatani, “Ndianiko uchandiudza kana baba vako vachinge vakupindura nehasha?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Jonatani akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Hendei kusango.” Ivo vakaenda vari vaviri kusango." 
1Samuel20:12 Zvino Jonatani akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaave chapupu; kana ndabvunzisisa baba vangu nenguva ino mangwana, kana kuswera mangwana, kana ndikaona kuti vano mwoyo wakanaka kuna Dhavhidhi, handingakutumiri shoko, ndikakuzivisa here?" 
1Samuel20:13 “Jehovha ngaarove Jonatani, arambe achidaro, kana baba vangu vachinge vachida kukuitira zvakaipa, ini ndikasakuzivisa izvozvo, ndikakuendisa norugare; Jehovha ngaave newe, sezvaaiva nababa vangu." 
1Samuel20:14 Newewo undiitire tsitsi dzaJehovha ndichiri mupenyu, ndirege kufa," 
1Samuel20:15 uye usabvisa tsitsi dzako kuna veimba yangu nokusingaperi, kunyangwe kana Jehovha abvisa vavengi vaDhavhidhi, mumwe nomumwe panyika yose.”" 
1Samuel20:16 Naizvozvo Jonatani akaita sungano neimba yaDhavhidhi, akati, “Jehovha ngaazvitsvake kumaoko avavengi vaDhavhidhi.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Naizvozvo akapikisa Dhavhidhizve norudo rwake kwaari, nokuti wakanga achimuda sezvaakada mwoyo wake." 
1Samuel20:18 Zvino Jonatani akati kwaari, “Mangwana mwedzi wogara; iwe uchashaikwa, nokuti chigaro chako chichashaiwa munhu." 
1Samuel20:19 Kana wagara mazuva matatu, unofanira kukurumidza kuburukira kunzvimbo iya pawakavanda musi watakataurirana pamusoro peshoko riya, ugogara pabwe rinonzi Ezeri." 
1Samuel20:20 Zvino ini ndichaposha miseve mitatu kurutivi rwaro, ndichiita sendinoposhera chinhu chakatimikwa." 
1Samuel20:21 Ipapo, tarira, ndichatuma mukomana, ndichiti, ‘Enda undotsvaka miseve.’ Kana ndikati kumukomana, ‘Tarira miseve iri nechokuno kwako, uya nayo,’ ipapo ungauya hako, nokuti kuno rugare kwauri, hakuna mhosva, naJehovha mupenyu." 
1Samuel20:22 Asi kana ndikati kumukomana, ‘Tarira, miseve iri mberi kwako,’ ipapo uende hako, nokuti Jehovha wakuendisa." 
1Samuel20:23 Kana riri shoko ratakataurirana pamusoro paro iwe neni, tarira Jehovha uri pakati pako neni nokusingaperi.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akandovanda musango; zvino mwedzi wakati wagara, mambo akagara pakudya kuti adye." 
1Samuel20:25 Mambo akagara pachigaro chake, sapanguva dzose, pachigaro chaiva pamadziro; Jonatani akasimuka, Abhineri akagara parutivi rwaSauro; asi chigaro chaDhavhidhi chakashaiwa munhu." 
1Samuel20:26 Asi Sauro haana kutaura chinhu musi iwoyo; nokuti wakati, zvimwe wawirwa nechinhu, zvimwe haana kunaka, zvirokwazvo haana kunaka." 
1Samuel20:27 Zvino pazuva rakatevera kugara kwomwedzi, pazuva rechipiri, chigaro chaDhavhidhi chakashaiwazve munhu; ipapo Sauro akati kuna Jonatani mwanakomana wake, “Mwanakomana waJese wakaregereiko kuuya kuzodya zuro kana nhasi?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonatani akapindura Sauro akati, “Dhavhidhi wakakumbira zvikuru kwandiri kuti aende Bhetirehemu," 
1Samuel20:29 akati, ‘Nditenderewo ndiende, nokuti veimba yedu vanobayira muguta; mukuru wangu wakandiraira kuti ndivepo; zvino kana uchifara nazvo, nditendere hako ndiende kundoshanyira hama dzangu.’ Naizvozvo haana kuuya patafura yamambo.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Ipapo Sauro akatsamwira Jonatani, akati kwaari, “Iwe mwanakomana womukadzi usinganzwi, wakapanduka, handizivi kanhi kuti wakatsaura mwanakomana waJese unyadzwe iwe, namai vako vanyadzwewo?" 
1Samuel20:31 “Nokuti iwe haungasimbiswi noushe hwako, kana mwanakomana waJese achiri mupenyu panyika. Naizvozvo zvino chituma munhu auye naye kwandiri, nokuti zvirokwazvo unofanira kufa.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Jonatani akapindura Sauro baba vake, akati kwavari, “Ko unofanira kuurayirwei? Waiteiko?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Ipapo Sauro akaposha pfumo rake kwaari, achida kumubaya. Naizvozvo Jonatani wakaziva kuti baba vake vakagara vafunga kuuraya Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel20:34 Naizvozvo Jonatani akasimuka patafura, atsamwa kwazvo, akasadya zvokudya nomusi wechipiri womwedzi; nokuti wakanga ane shungu pamwoyo pamusoro paDhavhidhi, nokuti wakanga anyadzwa nababa vake." 
1Samuel20:35 Zvino fume mangwana Jonatani akaenda kusango nenguva yakanga yatarwa naDhavhidhi, ano mukomana muduku." 
1Samuel20:36 Akati kumukomana wake, “Mhanya utsvake miseve yandinoposha.” Ipapo mukomana wakati achimhanya, iye akaposha museve mberi kwake." 
1Samuel20:37 Zvino mukomana wakati achisvika pakanga paposhwa museve naJonatani. Jonatani akadanidzira kumukomana, akati, “Ko museve hauzi mberi kwako here?”" 
1Samuel20:38 Jonatani akadanidzirazve kumukomana akati, “Kasira, kurumidza, usamira.” Mukomana waJonatani akanonga miseve, akauya nayo kuna tenzi wake." 
1Samuel20:39 Asi mukomana haana kuziva chinhu; asi Jonatani naDhavhidhi voga ndivo vakaziva shoko iro. 
1Samuel20:40 Zvino Jonatani akapa mukomana nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, akati kwaari, “Enda nadzo undodziisa kuguta.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Mukomana wakati aenda, Dhavhidhi akasimuka kurutivi rwezasi, akawira pasi nechiso chake, akakotama katatu, vakatsvodana, vakachema vose, kusvikira Dhavhidhi anyanya kwazvo." 
1Samuel20:42 Jonatani akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Enda hako norugare, nokuti takapika tose nezita raJehovha tichiti, ‘Jehovha uchava pakati pangu newe, napakati pavana vangu navako nokusingaperi.’ ” Akasimuka, akaenda, naJonatani akapinda muguta." 
1Samuel21:1 Zvino Dhavhidhi akasvika Nobhi kuna Ahimereki mupristi; Ahimereki akasangana naDhavhidhi achidedera; akati kwaari, “Uri woga neiko, usino mumwe newe?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Ahimereki mupristi, “Mambo wakandiraira basa, akati kwandiri, ‘Ngakurege kuva nomunhu unoziva chinhu chebasa randinokutuma naro, nerandinokuraira.’ Majaya ndakaaraira kusangana neni pane imwe nzvimbo." 
1Samuel21:3 Naizvozvo zvino, muneiko pano? Ndipei zvingwa zvishanu muruoko rwangu, kunyangwe zvipi nezvipi zviripo.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Mupristi akapindura Dhavhidhi, akati, “Hapana chingwa chinosidyiwa muruoko rwangu, asi chingwa chitsvene ndicho chiripo; kwoga kana majaya akazvidzora kuvakadzi.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Dhavhidhi akapindura mupristi, akati kwaari, “Zvirokwazvo, vakadzi vakadziviswa kwatiri sapanguva dzose kana ndichifamba rwendo; nhumbi dzamajaya dzakanga dziri tsvene, kunyangwe rwaiva rwendo rwamazuva ose harwo, ndoda nhasi nhumbi dzavo dzichava tsvene.”" 
1Samuel21:6 Naizvozvo mupristi akamupa chingwa chitsvene, nokuti kwakanga kusina chingwapo, asi chingwa chokuratidza, chakanga chabviswa pamberi paJehovha, kuti chingwa chinopisa chiiswepo pazuva rokubviswa kwacho." 
1Samuel21:7 Zvino mumwe muranda waSauro wakanga aripo nomusi iwoyo, anonoswa pamberi paJehovha, wainzi Dhoegi, muEdhomu, mutariri wavafudzi vaSauro." 
1Samuel21:8 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Ahimereki, “Hapana pfumo kana munondo kwamuri here? Nokuti handina kuuya nomunondo wangu, kana nhumbi dzangu dzokurwa nadzo, nokuti basa ramambo raifanira kukurumidzirwa.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Mupristi akati, “Munondo waGoriati muFirisitia, wawakauraya pamupata weEra, uri pano, wakaputirwa mumucheka mberi kweefodhi; kana uchida kuutora, chitora hako, nokuti hakuna mumwe asi iwoyo.” Dhavhidhi akati, “Hakuna nomumwe wakafanana nawo, ndipe hoyo.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Dhavhidhi akasimuka akatiza iwoyo nokutya Sauro, akaenda kuna Akishi, mambo weGati." 
1Samuel21:11 Zvino varanda vaAkishi vakati kwaari, “Ko uyu haazi Dhavhidhi mambo wenyika here? Haazi iye wavakaimbira vachibvumirana pakutamba kwavo, vachiti, ‘Sauro wakauraya zviuru zvamazana ake, Asi Dhavhidhi makumi ezviuru zvamazana ake?’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Dhavhidhi akarangarira mashoko iwayo mumwoyo make, akatya kwazvo Akishi mambo weGati." 
1Samuel21:13 Akashandura mugarire wake pamberi pavo, akazviita sebenzi pakati pavo, akakwara–kwara pamagonhi esuwo, akarega mate ake achisiririka pandebvu dzake." 
1Samuel21:14 Zvino Akishi akati kuvaranda vake, “Tarirai, munhu uyu ibenzi; mauyireiko naye kuno kwandiri?" 
1Samuel21:15 Ini ndinoshaiwa mapenzi kanhi, zvamauya nomunhu uyu kuzoratidza upenzi hwake pamberi pangu? Munhu wakadai ungapinda mumba mangu here?”" 
1Samuel22:1 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi wakabvapo akatizira kubako reAdhurami; zvino hama dzake navose veimba yababa vake vakati vachinzwa, vakaburukirako kwavari." 
1Samuel22:2 Zvino vose vakanga vari panjodzi, navose vakanga vane mhosva, navose vakanga vane shungu vakaungana kwaari, akava mutangamiriri wavo; kwakanga kuna varume vanenge mazana mana naye." 
1Samuel22:3 Zvino Dhavhidhi akabvapo akaenda Mizipa kuMoabhu; akati kuna mambo waMoabhu, “Baba vangu namai vangu ndinokumbira kuti vauye vagare nemi, kusvikira ndaziva chandichaitirwa naMwari.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Akavaisa kuna mambo waMoabhu, vakagara naye nguva yose yokugara kwaDhavhidhi munhare." 
1Samuel22:5 Zvino muporofita Gadhi akati kuna Dhavhidhi: “Usaramba ugere munhare, asi ibva undogara panyika yaJudha.” Ipapo Dhavhidhi akabva akasvika kudondo reHereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Zvino Sauro wakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi wawanikwa, iye navarume vaiva naye; Sauro wakanga agere Gibhiya, munyasi momuti womutamarisiki paRama, akabata pfumo rake muruoko rwake, navaranda vake vose vakanga vamire naye." 
1Samuel22:7 Zvino Sauro wakati kuvaranda vake vakanga vamire naye, “Inzwai zvino, imi vaBhenjamini! Mwanakomana waJese uchakupai mose minda neminda yemizambiringa here? Uchakuitai mose vakuru vezviuru navakuru vamazana here?" 
1Samuel22:8 Zvamandirangana mose, zvakusina mumwe unondizivisa kana mwanakomana wangu akaita sungano nomwanakomana waJese, zvakusina mumwe wenyu unondinzwira tsitsi, kana unondizivisa kuti mwanakomana wangu wakamutsa muranda wangu kuti andimukire, andivandire, sezvaanoita nhasi here?”" 
1Samuel22:9 Ipapo Dhoegi muEdhomu, wakanga amire navaranda vaSauro, akapindura akati, “Ndakaona mwanakomana waJese achisvika Nobhi, kuna Ahimereki mwanakomana waAitubi." 
1Samuel22:10 Iye akamubvunzira kuna Jehovha, akamupa mbuva, akamupawo munondo waGoriati muFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Ipapo mambo akatuma nhume kundodana Ahimereki mupristi, mwanakomana waAhitubi, neveimba yake yose, ivo vapristi vaiva paNobhi; vakauya vose kuna mambo." 
1Samuel22:12 Zvino Sauro akati; “Zvino chinzwa, iwe mwanakomana waAhitubi.” Iye akapindura, akati, “Ndiri pano, ishe wangu.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Sauro akati kwaari; “Mandiranganeiko, iwe nomwanakomana waJese, zvawakamupa, chingwa, nomunondo, nokumubvunzira kuna Mwari, kuti andimukire, andivandire sezvaanoita nhasi?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ipapo Ahimereki akapindura mambo akati, “Ndianiko pakati pavaranda venyu vose wakatendeka saDhavhidhi, mukwambo wamambo, unosirangana nemi, unokudzwa mumba menyu?" 
1Samuel22:15 Ndiko nhasi kwandatanga kumubvunzira kuna Mwari here? Haisva! Mambo ngaarege hake kusundira muranda wake mhosva, kunyangwe vose veimba yababa vangu; nokuti muranda wenyu haazivi izvozvo zvose, kunyangwe zviduku kana zvikuru.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Ipapo mambo akati, “Zvirokwazvo, uchafa Ahimereki, iwe navose veimba yababa vako.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Mambo akati kuvanyai vakanga vamire naye, “Tendeukai, muuraye vapristi vaJehovha, nokuti maoko avo anobatsira Dhavhidhi, nokuti vakanga vachiziva kuti watiza, asi havana kundizivisa.” Asi varanda vamambo vakaramba kutambanudzira maoko avo kuuraya vapristi vaJehovha." 
1Samuel22:18 Ipapo mambo akati kuna Dhoegi, “Tendeuka iwe, uuraye vapristi.” Dhoegi muEdhomu, akatendeuka, akauraya vapristi, akaparadza nomusi iwoyo vanhu vana makumi masere navashanu vakanga vakafuka efodhi yomucheka." 
1Samuel22:19 Akaparadzawo Nobhi, guta ravapristi, neminondo inopinza, varume navakadzi vose, navana navakanga vachimwa, nemombe, nembongoro, namakwai; zvose zvakaparadzwa neminondo inopinza." 
1Samuel22:20 Asi mumwe wavanakomana vaAhimereki mwanakomana waAhitubi, wainzi Abhiatari, wakapukunyuka, akatiza, akatevera Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel22:21 Abhiatari akaudza Dhavhidhi kuti Sauro wauraya vapristi vaJehovha. 
1Samuel22:22 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhiatari, “Musi uya wandakaona Dhoegi muEdhomu aripo, ndakaziva kuti zvirokwazvo uchandoudza Sauro; ndini ndakaurayisa vanhu vose veimba yababa vako." 
1Samuel22:23 “Gara hako neni, usatya; nokuti unotsvaka kundiuraya ini, ndiye unotsvaka kukuuraya iwewo; nokuti kana ukagara neni uchachengetwa.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Zvino vanhu vakaudza Dhavhidhi vakati, “Tarirai, vaFirisitia vanorwa neKeira, vachipambara zviri pamapuriro.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akabvunza Jehovha akati, “Ndoenda, ndinoparadza vaFirisitia avo here?” Jehovha akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Enda undoparadza vaFirisitia, uponese Keira.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Varume vaDhavhidhi vakati kwaari, “Tarirai, isu tinotya tichiri pano paJudha, ndoda kana tikaenda Keira kundorwa nehondo dzavaFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel23:4 Zvino Dhavhidhi akabvunzazve Jehovha, Jehovha akamupindura akati, “Simuka, uburukire Keira, nokuti ndichaisa vaFirisitia muruoko rwako.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakaenda Keira, vakandorwa navaFirisitia, vakavatorera mombe dzavo, vakavauraya nokuuraya kukuru. Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akaponesa vanhu vakanga vagere Keira." 
1Samuel23:6 Zvino Abhiatari mwanakomana waAhimereki pakutizira kwake kuna Dhavhidhi paKeira, wakaenda akabata efodhi paruoko rwake." 
1Samuel23:7 Sauro akaudzwa kuti Dhavhidhi wasvika Keira. Sauro akati, “Mwari wamuisa muruoko rwangu, wazaririrwamo zvaapinda muguta rina masuwo ezvipfigiso.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Sauro akadana vanhu vose kundorwa, akaburukira Keira, akakomba Dhavhidhi navanhu vake." 
1Samuel23:9 Asi Dhavhidhi wakaziva kuti Sauro wakafunga kumuitira zvakaipa, akati kuna Abhiatari mupristi, “Uya pano neefodhi.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Zvino Dhavhidhi akati, “Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, muranda wenyu wakanzwa zvirokwazvo kuti Sauro unoda kuuya Keira, kuzoparadza guta nokuda kwangu." 
1Samuel23:11 Ko varume veKeira vachandiisa mumaoko ake here? Ko Sauro uchaburuka here, sezvakanzwa muranda wenyu? Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ndinokumbira muzivise henyu muranda wenyu.” Jehovha akati, “Uchaburuka.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Dhavhidhi akati, “Ko varume veKeira vachandiisa navanhu vangu muruoko rwaSauro here?” Jehovha akati, “Vachakuisa.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Ipapo Dhavhidhi navanhu vake, vanenge mazana matanhatu, vakasimuka, vakabva Keira, vakafamba–famba havo. Sauro akaudzwa kuti Dhavhidhi wapukunyuka paKeira, akarega hake kuendako." 
1Samuel23:14 Dhavhidhi akagara murenje munhare, akaramba agere panyika yamakomo murenje reZifi. Sauro akamutsvaka mazuva ose, Mwari haana kumuisa muruoko rwake." 
1Samuel23:15 Zvino Dhavhidhi akaona kuti Sauro wakanga abuda kuzotsvaka kumuuraya, Dhavhidhi akagara murenje reZifi mudondo." 
1Samuel23:16 Ipapo Jonatani mwanakomana waSauro, akasimuka, akaenda kuna Dhavhidhi mudondo, akamusimbisa muna Mwari." 
1Samuel23:17 Akati kwaari, “Usatya, nokuti ruoko rwababa vangu Sauro harungakuwani, uchava mambo waIsiraeri, neni ndichava muduku kwauri; nababa vangu Sauro vanozviziva.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Ivo vaviri vakaita sungano pamberi paJehovha; Dhavhidhi akagara mudondo, Jonatani akadzokera kumba kwake." 
1Samuel23:19 Zvino vaZifi vakakwira kuna Sauro paGibhia vakati, “Ko Dhavhidhi haazi akahwanda kwatiri, panhare mudondo, mugomo reHakira riri kurutivi rwezasi rwerenje here?”" 
1Samuel23:20 Naizvozvo zvino, mambo burukai, sezvinoda mwoyo wenyu; kana tirisu ndiro basa redu kuti timuise pamaoko amambo." 
1Samuel23:21 Ipapo Sauro akati, “Imi muropafadzwe naJehovha, nokuti makandinzwira tsitsi." 
1Samuel23:22 Chiendai henyu, mucherekedze kwazvo, muzive nokuona kwaari, kwaanogara, uye kuti ndianiko wakamuonako; nokuti ndaudzwa kuti una mano kwazvo." 
1Samuel23:23 Naizvozvo tarisisai, muzive zvakanaka nzvimbo dzake dzose dzaanovanda kwadziri, mugodzokerazve kwandiri, zvirokwazvo, ndiende nemi; zvino kana achinge ari munyika iyo, ndichandomutsvakisisa pakati pezviuru zvavaJudha." 
1Samuel23:24 Ipapo vakasimuka, vakaenda Zifi pamberi paSauro, asi Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakanga vari murenje reMaoni paArabha kurutivi rwezasi rwerenje.”" 
1Samuel23:25 Zvino Sauro navanhu vake vakaenda kundomutsvaka. Dhavhidhi akaudzwa izvozvo; naizvozvo akaburukira kudombo, akandogara murenje reMaoni. Zvino Sauro wakati achinzwa, akatevera Dhavhidhi kurenje reMaoni." 
1Samuel23:26 Sauro akaenda nechokuno kwegomo, Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakaenda necheseri kwegomo; Dhavhidhi akakurumidza kubva, nokutya Sauro; nokuti Sauro navanhu vake vakanga vakomba Dhavhidhi navanhu vake, kuti vavabate." 
1Samuel23:27 Asi nhume yakasvika kuna Sauro, ikati, “Kurumidzai, muuye, nokuti vaFirisitia vopambara nyika.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Naizvozvo Sauro akadzoka pakutevera Dhavhidhi, akandorwa navaFirisitia. Naizvozvo vakapatumidza zita rokuti Serahamarekoti." 
1Samuel23:29 Dhavhidhi akakwira, akabvapo, akandogara munhare dzapaEnigedhi." 
1Samuel24:1 Zvino Sauro wakati adzoka pakutevera vaFirisitia, akaudzwa zvichinzi, “Tarirai, Dhavhidhi uri murenje reEnigedhi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Ipapo Sauro akatora varume vane zviuru zvitatu vakanga vatsaurwa kuVaIsiraeri vose, akandotsvaka Dhavhidhi navanhu vake pamatombo engururu." 
1Samuel24:3 Akasvika pamatanga amakwai panzira pakanga pane bako, Sauro akapindamo kuti afukidze tsoka dzake. Zvino Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakanga vagere mukati–kati mebako." 
1Samuel24:4 Vanhu vaDhavhidhi vakati kwaari, “Iri ndiro zuva ramakaudzwa naJehovha, achiti, ‘Tarira, ndichaisa muvengi wako muruoko rwako, umuitire sezvaunoda.’ ” Ipapo Dhavhidhi akasimuka, akagura mupendero wenguo yaSauro iye asingazivi." 
1Samuel24:5 Asi pashure hana yaDhavhidhi yakamutambudza, nemhaka yokuti wakanga agura nguo yaSauro." 
1Samuel24:6 Akati kuvanhu vake, “Jehovha ngaandidzivise, ndirege kuitira ishe wangu, muzodzwa waJehovha, chinhu chakadai, nditambanudzire ruoko rwangu kwaari, nokuti ndiye muzodzwa waJehovha.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akadzivisa vanhu vake namashoko iwayo, akasavatendera kumukira Sauro. Sauro akasimuka, akabuda mubako, akaenda hake." 
1Samuel24:8 NaDhavhidhi wakasimukawo, akabuda mubako, akadanidzira kuna Sauro akati, “Ishe wangu, mambo!” Zvino Sauro wakati achicheuka, Dhavhidhi akakotamira pasi nechiso, akapfugama." 
1Samuel24:9 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Munoteerereiko mashoko avanhu, vanoti, ‘Tarira, Dhavhidhi unotsvaka kukukuvadzai?’" 
1Samuel24:10 Tarirai, zuva rino meso enyu aona kuti Jehovha wakuisai nhasi mumaoko angu mubako; vamwe vakati ndikuurayei, asi ndakakuregai ndikati, ‘Handingatambanudzi ruoko rwangu kuna ishe wangu, nokuti ndiye muzodzwa waJehovha.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Zvino baba vangu, tarirai, hoyo mupendero wenguo yenyu, muruoko rwangu; nokuti zvandakagura mupendero wenguo yenyu, ndikasakuurayai, muzive, muwone, kuti hakuna chakaipa kana kudarika kwandiri; handina kukutadzirai, kunyangwe makandivhima kuti munditorere upenyu hwangu." 
1Samuel24:12 “Jehovha ngaatonge pakati pangu nemi, Jehovha ngaanditsive kwamuri; asi ruoko rwangu harungarwi nemi." 
1Samuel24:13 “Sezvinoreva tsumo yavekare, ‘Kune wakaipa kunobuda zvakaipa; asi ruoko rwangu harungarwi nemi.’" 
1Samuel24:14 Ko mambo waIsiraeri wakabuda achitsvaka aniko? Munodzingana naniko? Imbwa yakafa, rutata harwo." 
1Samuel24:15 Naizvozvo Jehovha ngaave mutongi, ngaatonge pakati pangu nemi, awone, andireverere pamhosva yangu, andirwire paruoko rwenyu.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Dhavhidhi wakati apedza kutaura mashoko iwayo kuna Sauro, Sauro akati, “Izwi rako here, mwana wangu; Dhavhidhi?” Sauro akachema kwazvo." 
1Samuel24:17 Akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Iwe unondikunda pakururama, nokuti iwe wakandiitira zvakanaka, asi ini ndakakuitira zvakaipa." 
1Samuel24:18 Warondedzera nhasi pawakandiitira zvakanaka, nokuti hauna kundiuraya, kunyangwe Jehovha akandiisa muruoko rwako." 
1Samuel24:19 Nokuti kana munhu achinge awana muvengi wake, ungamurege akaenda hake here? Naizvozvo Jehovha ngaakuripire zvakanaka nokuda kwezvawakandiitira nhasi." 
1Samuel24:20 Zvino tarira, ndinoziva kuti iwe uchazova mambo zvirokwazvo, uye kuti ushe hwaIsiraeri huchasimbiswa muruoko rwako." 
1Samuel24:21 “Naizvozvo pika zvino kwandiri naJehovha kuti haungaparadzi vana vangu vanonditevera, uye kuti haungaparadzi zita rangu mumba mababa vangu.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akapika kuna Sauro. Sauro akaenda kumusha kwake, asi Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakaenda kunhare yavo." 
1Samuel25:1 Zvino Samueri wakafa; VaIsiraeri vose vakaungana, vakamuchema, vakamuviga mumba make paRama. Dhavhidhi akasimuka, akaburukira kurenje rePerani." 
1Samuel25:2 Zvino paMaoni pakanga pano munhu, waiva nepfuma yake paKameri; munhu uyu wakanga ari mukuru kwazvo, wakanga ana makwai ane zviuru zvitatu, nembudzi dzine chiuru chimwe; iye wakanga achiveura makwai ake paKameri." 
1Samuel25:3 Zita romunhu uyu raiva Nabhari, uye zita romukadzi wake Abhigairi; mukadzi wakanga akangwara, uye wakanga akanaka kumeso; asi murume wakanga ano mwoyo mukukutu, akaipa pamugarire wake; waive weimba yaKarebhi." 
1Samuel25:4 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakanzwa kurenje kuti Nabhari wakanga achiveura makwai ake. 
1Samuel25:5 Dhavhidhi akatuma majaya ane gumi, Dhavhidhi akati kumajaya, “Kwirai Kameri, muende kuna Nabhari, mundomukwazisa nezita rangu." 
1Samuel25:6 Mugoti kuna iye agere pakati pepfuma yake, ‘Rugare ngaruve nemi, rugare ngaruve neimba yenyu, uye rugare ngaruve pazvinhu zvose zvamunazvo." 
1Samuel25:7 Zvino ndakanzwa kuti muna vaveuri; vafudzi venyu vaiva nesu zvino, asi hatina kuvatambudza, uye havana kurashikirwa nechinhu nguva yose yavakagara paKameri." 
1Samuel25:8 Bvunzai majaya enyu, vakuudzei; zvino majaya ngaanzwirwe tsitsi nemi, nokuti tinouya nezuva rakanaka; ipai henyu varanda venyu nomwanakomana wenyu Dhavhidhi chinhu chipi nechipi chamunacho.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Zvino majaya aDhavhidhi akati asvika, akaudza Nabhari mashoko iwayo ose nezita raDhavhidhi, vakanyarara havo." 
1Samuel25:10 Ipapo Nabhari akapindura varanda vaDhavhidhi akati, “Dhavhidhi ndianiko? Mazuva ano varanda vazhinji vanotiza vatenzi vavo." 
1Samuel25:11 Ndingatora zvingwa zvangu, nemvura yangu, nenyama yangu yandakaurayira vaveuri vangu, ndizvipe varume vandisingazivi kuti vanobve kupiko here?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Naizvozvo majaya aDhavhidhi akapinduka hawo, akadzoka, akandomuudza mashoko iwayo ose." 
1Samuel25:13 Dhavhidhi akati kuvanhu vake, “Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaasunge munondo wake;” mumwe nomumwe akasunga munondo wake; naiye Dhavhidhiwo akasunga munondo wake; varume vanenge mazana mana vakatevera Dhavhidhi, vana mazana maviri vakasara panhumbi." 
1Samuel25:14 Asi mumwe wamajaya wakandoudza Abhigairi, mukadzi waNabhari, akati, “Tarirai, Dhavhidhi wakanga atuma nhume, ari kurenje, kundokwazisa tenzi wedu; ivo vakavatuka kwazvo." 
1Samuel25:15 Asi varume avo vaitiitira zvakanaka, hatina kutambudzwa navo; hatina kurashikirwa nechinhu mazuva ose atakafambidzana navo kusango." 
1Samuel25:16 Vakanga vakaita sorusvingo kwatiri usiku namasikati mazuva ose ataigara navo tichifudza makwai. 
1Samuel25:17 “Naizvozvo zvino chizivai mufunge zvamungaita, nokuti tenzi wedu navose veimba yake vagara vafungirwa zvakaipa; nokuti munhu wakaisvoipa wakadaro, kuti hakuna munhu ungagona kutaura naye.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Ipapo Abhigairi akakurumidza kutora zvingwa zvina mazana maviri, namatende maviri ewaini, namakwai mashanu akanga agadzirwa, nezviyero zvishanu zvezviyo zvakakangwa, namasumbu amazambiringa akawoma ane zana, namapundu amawonde ana mazana maviri, akazviisa pamusoro pembongoro." 
1Samuel25:19 Akati kumajaya ake, “Nditungamirirei, tarirai, ndinokuteverai.” Asi haana kuudza murume wake Nabhari." 
1Samuel25:20 Zvino wakati achifamba akatasva mbongoro yake, akaburukira pamupata pegomo, Dhavhidhi navarume vake vakaburukirawo kwaari; iye akasangana navo." 
1Samuel25:21 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakanga ati, “Zvirokwazvo, ndaichengeta hangu zvinhu zvose zvomunhu uyu mhandu murenje, hakuna chinhu chimwe chake chakarasika; akanditsiva nezvakaipa pane zvakanaka." 
1Samuel25:22 Mwari ngaarove vavengi vaDhavhidhi, arambe achidaro, kana ndikarega kunyangwe mwanakomana mumwechete kuna vose vaanavo ari mupenyu kusvikira mangwana.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Zvino Abhigairi wakati achiona Dhavhidhi, akakurumidza kuburuka pambongoro yake, akawira pasi nechiso chake pamberi paDhavhidhi, akakotamira pasi." 
1Samuel25:24 Akawira patsoka dzake, akati, “Mhosva ngaive kwandiri, ishe wangu, ndinokumbira kuti murandakadzi wenyu ataure nemi, munzwe mashoko omurandakadzi wenyu." 
1Samuel25:25 Ndinokumbira kuti ishe wangu arege hake kurangarira munhu uyu wakaisvoipa, iye Nabhari; nokuti sezita rake ndizvo zvaakaitawo iye, zita rake ndiNabhari, naiye ibenzi; asi ini murandakadzi wenyu, handina kuona majaya ashe wangu amakatuma." 
1Samuel25:26 Naizvozvo zvino, ishe wangu, naJehovha mupenyu, uye nomweya wenyu mupenyu, zvaari Jehovha akakudzivisai kuteura ropa nokuzvitsiva noruoko rwenyu, naizvozvo zvino vavengi venyu navanotsvaka kuitira ishe wangu zvakaipa, ngavave saNabhari." 
1Samuel25:27 Zvino, ishe wangu, chipo ichi chamakavigirwa nomurandakadzi wenyu, ngachipiwe hacho majaya anotevera ishe wangu." 
1Samuel25:28 Kanganwirai henyu kudarika kwomurandakadzi wenyu, nokuti zvirokwazvo Jehovha uchaitira ishe wangu imba yakasimba, nokuti ishe wangu unorwa hondo dzaJehovha; zvakaipa hazvingawanikwi kwamuri mazuva enyu ose." 
1Samuel25:29 Kunyangwe munhu akasimuka kukudzingirirai, nokutsvaka kukuurayai, mweya washe wangu ucharamba wakasungirwa pachisote chavapenyu vari kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu; asi mweya yavavengi venyu uchaiposhera kure, ichiita seinobva muchikanda chechifuramabwe." 
1Samuel25:30 Zvino kana Jehovha azoitira ishe wangu zvose zvakanaka zvaakanga ataura pamusoro penyu, akakugadzai mukava mambo waIsiraeri," 
1Samuel25:31 murege kuzvidemba pamusoro pechinhu ichi, uye ishe wangu arege kuzvidya mwoyo, nokuti makateura ropa risine mhosva, kana nokuti ishe wangu wakazvitsiva; zvino kana Jehovha achinge aitira ishe wangu zvakanaka, murangarirewo murandakadzi wenyu.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhigairi, “Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakudzwe, iye wakakutuma nhasi kuzosangana neni;" 
1Samuel25:33 nokungwara kwako ngakukudzwe, newewo ukudzwe, nokuti wakandidzivirira nhasi kuti ndirege kuteura ropa, nokuzvitsiva noruoko rwangu." 
1Samuel25:34 Zvirokwazvo, naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri mupenyu, iye wakandidzivirira kuti ndirege kukuitira zvakaipa, dai usina kukurumidza kuuya kuzosangana neni, Nabhari zvirokwazvo haazaisarirwa mangwana kana kwoedza nomwana mumwe womukomana.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akagamuchira paruoko rwake zvaakanga amuvigira, akati kwaari, “Kwira hako norugare kumba kwako; tarira ndateerera izwi rako, ndakunzwira tsitsi.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abhigairi akasvika kuna Nabhari, akamuwana ari kumutambo mumba make, wakanga wakafanana nomutambo wamambo; mwoyo waNabhari wakanga wakafara mukati make, nokuti wakanga abatwa kwazvo; naizvozvo haana kumuudza chinhu, kunyangwe chiduku kana chikuru, kusvikira mangwana kwoedza." 
1Samuel25:37 Zvino fume mangwana, waini yakati yabva kuna Nabhari, mukadzi wake akamurondedzera mashoko iwayo, mwoyo wake ukafa mukati make, akaita sebwe." 
1Samuel25:38 Mazuva anenge gumi akati apera, Jehovha akarova Nabhari, akafa." 
1Samuel25:39 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakati anzwa kuti Nabhari wafa, akati, “Jehovha ngaakudzwe wakanditsiva pakuzvidzwa kwangu naNabhari, akadzivirira muranda wake kuti arege kuita zvakaipa; zvakaipa zvaNabhari Jehovha akazvidzosera pamusoro wake.” Ipapo Dhavhidhi akatuma nhume kuna Abhigairi kukumbira kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel25:40 Zvino varanda vaDhavhidhi vakati vachisvika kuna Abhigairi paKameri, vakataura naye vakati, “Dhavhidhi wakatitumira kwauri kuzokutora uve mukadzi wake.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Ipapo akasimuka, akakotamira pasi nechiso chake, akati, “Tarirai murandakadzi wenyu, ndiri murandakadzi unoshambidza tsoka dzashe wangu.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Abhigairi akakurumidza, akasimuka, akatasva mbongoro, akaenda navanasikana vake vashanu; akatevera nhume dzaDhavhidhi, akava mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel25:43 Dhavhidhi akawanawo Ahinoamu muJezereeri, ivo vose vaviri vakava vakadzi vake." 
1Samuel25:44 Zvino Sauro wakanga akapa Pariti, mwanakomana waRaishi, waiva weGarimi, mukunda wake Mikari, mukadzi waDhavhidhi." 
1Samuel26:1 Zvino vaZifi vakauya kuna Sauro paGibhia, vakati, “Ko Dhavhidhi haazi kunovanda pachikomo cheHakira, chiri pamberi perenje here?”" 
1Samuel26:2 Ipapo Sauro akasimuka, akaburukira kurenje reZifi, ana varume vane zviuru zvitatu, vakanga vakatsaurwa kuVaIsiraeri, kuti atsvake Dhavhidhi murenje reZifi." 
1Samuel26:3 Sauro akavaka misasa yake pachikomo cheHakira, chiri pamberi parenje, kurutivi rwenzira. Asi Dhavhidhi wakanga agere murenje, akaona Sauro achimutevera murenje." 
1Samuel26:4 Zvino Dhavhidhi akatuma vashori, akanzwa kuti Sauro wasvika zvirokwazvo." 
1Samuel26:5 Dhavhidhi akasimuka, akasvika pakanga pakavaka Sauro misasa yake, Dhavhidhi akaona pakanga pavete Sauro, ana Abhineri mwanakomana waNeri, mukuru wehondo yake; Sauro wakanga avete pakati pengoro dzakanga dzakarongedzwa, asi vanhu vakanga vavaka misasa yavo vakamupoteredza." 
1Samuel26:6 Zvino Dhavhidhi akapindura, akati kuna Ahimereki muHiti, nokuna Abhishai mwanakomana waZeruya, munun'una waJoabhu, akati, “Ndianiko uchaburuka neni kuna Sauro kumisasa?” Abhishai akati, “Ini ndichaburuka nemi.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi naAbhishai vakasvika kuvanhu usiku, vakawana Sauro avete pakati pengoro dzakanga dzarongedzwa, pfumo rake rakabayirwa pasi kumusoro kwake; Abhineri navamwe vanhu vakanga vavete vakamupoteredza." 
1Samuel26:8 Zvino Abhishai akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Nhasi Mwari wakaisa muvengi wako pamaoko ako; naizvozvo nditendere ndimubayire pasi nepfumo kamwechete, handingamubayi rwechipiri.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhishai, “Usamuuraya, nokuti ndianiko ungagona kutambanudzira ruoko rwake kumuzodzwa waJehovha, akasava nemhosva?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Dhavhidhi akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, Jehovha ndiye uchamuuraya, zvimwe zuva rake rokufa richasvika, zvimwe uchaburukira kundorwa akaparadzwapo." 
1Samuel26:11 Jehovha ngaandidzivise, ndirege kutambanudzira ruoko rwangu kumuzodzwa waJehovha; asi zvino tora hako pfumo riri kumusoro kwake, nechirongo chemvura, tiende.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akatora pfumo nechirongo chemvura, zvakanga zviri pamusoro waSauro, vakaenda; hakuna munhu wakazviona, kana kuzviziva, hakuna wakapepuka, nokuti vakanga vavete vose, nokuti vakanga vakabatwa nehope kwazvo, dzakanga dzatumwa naMwari." 
1Samuel26:13 Zvino Dhavhidhi akayambukira mhiri, akamira pamusoro pegomo ari kure; asi pakati pavo pakanga pane nhambo huru." 
1Samuel26:14 Dhavhidhi akashevedzera kuvanhu nokuna Abhineri mwanakomana waNeri, akati, “Nhai Abhineri, haudaviri here?” Ipapo Abhineri akadavira, akati, “Ndiwe aniko unoshevedzera kuna mambo.”" 
1Samuel26:15 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhineri, “Ko iwe hauzi murume wemhare here? Ndianiko wakafanana newe kuVaIsiraeri? Wakaregereiko kurinda ishe wako mambo? Nokuti mumwe munhu wakanga apinda kuzoparadza mambo, ishe wako." 
1Samuel26:16 “Ichi chinhu chawaita hachina kunaka. NaJehovha mupenyu, maifanira kufa, nokuti hamuna kurinda ishe wenyu, muzodzwa waJehovha. Zvino chitarira, pfumo ramambo nechirongo chemvura chakanga chiri kumusoro kwake zviripiko?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Sauro akaziva izwi raDhavhidhi, akati, “Ndiro izwi rako here, mwanangu Dhavhidhi?” Dhavhidhi akati, “Izwi rangu, ishe wangu, mambo.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Akati, “Ko Ishe wangu unoteverereiko muranda wake? Nokuti ndakaiteiko? Zvakaipa zviri mandiri ndezveiko?" 
1Samuel26:19 Naizvozvo zvino ishe wangu mambo chidonzwai mashoko omuranda wenyu. Kana ari Jehovha akakukurudzirai kurwa neni, ngaapiwe chipiriso; asi kana vari vana vavanhu, ngavave vakatukwa pamberi paJehovha, nokuti vandidzinga nhasi, kuti ndirege kugara panhaka yaJehovha, vachiti, ‘Enda, undoshumira vamwe vamwari.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Naizvozvo zvino ropa rangu ngarirege kuwira pasi kure naJehovha, nokuti mambo waIsiraeri wabuda kuzotsvaka rutata rumwe, somunhu unovhima hware mumakomo.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Ipapo Sauro akati, “Ndatadza, dzoka hako, mwanangu Dhavhidhi, nokuti handichazokuitiri zvakaipa, nokuti upenyu hwangu hwakanga huchikosha pameso pako nhasi; tarira, ndaita sebenzi, ndatadza kwazvo.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akapindura akati, “Tarirai pfumo ramambo! Mumwe wamajaya ngaayambukire kuno aritore." 
1Samuel26:23 Jehovha unoripira munhu mumwe nomumwe kururama kwake nokutendeka kwake; nokuti Jehovha akakuisai nhasi kwandiri, asi ndakaramba kutambanudzira ruoko rwangu kumuzodzwa waJehovha." 
1Samuel26:24 Zvino tarirai, upenyu hwenyu sezvandakahukudza nhasi, saizvozvowo upenyu hwangu ngahukudzwe naJehovha, iye andirwire pakutambudzika kwangu kwose.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Ipapo Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Wakaropafadzwa iwe mwanangu Dhavhidhi; uchava nesimba, uye uchakunda kwazvo.” Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akaenda hake, naSauro akadzokera kumusha kwake." 
1Samuel27:1 Zvino Dhavhidhi akati mumwoyo make, “Mumwe musi ndichaparadzwa hangu noruoko rwaSauro; zviri nani kwazvo kwandiri kuti nditizire kunyika yavaFirisitia; Sauro uchazoora mwoyo pamusoro pangu, akarega kunditsvaka panyika yose yaIsiraeri; saizvozvo ndichapukunyuka paruoko rwake.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Dhavhidhi akasimuka, akayambuka, iye navarume vana mazana matanhatu vaakanga anavo, akaenda kuna Akishi, mwanakomana waMaoki, mambo weGati." 
1Samuel27:3 Dhavhidhi akagara naAkishi paGati, iye navanhu vake, munhu mumwe nomumwe ane mhuri yake, iye Dhavhidhi ana vakadzi vake vaviri, Ahinoamu muJezereeri, naAbhigairi muKameri, waiva mukadzi waNabhari." 
1Samuel27:4 Sauro akaudzwa kuti Dhavhidhi watizira Gati, akasazomutsvakazve." 
1Samuel27:5 Zvino Dhavhidhi akati kuna Akishi, “Zvino kana ndakanzwirwa tsitsi nemi, ngandipiwe hangu pokugara pane rimwe guta renyika ino, ndigarepo, nokuti muranda uchagarireiko pamuzinda pamwechete nemi?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Naizvozvo Akishi akamupa Zikiragi nomusi iwoyo; naizvozvo Zikiragi nderamadzimambo aJudha kusvikira nhasi. 
1Samuel27:7 Zvino mazuva akagara Dhavhidhi panyika yavaFirisitia akasvika gore rose nemwedzi mina. 
1Samuel27:8 Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakakwira vakandopambara vaGeshuri navaGirizi, navaAmareki; nokuti marudzi iwayo ndiwo akanga agere panyika iyo kare, kana munhu achienda Shuru kusvikira panyika yeIjipiti." 
1Samuel27:9 Dhavhidhi akakunda nyika iyo, haana kurega murume kana mukadzi ari mupenyu, akatapa makwai, nemombe, nembongoro, namakamera, nenguo; akadzoka, akasvika kuna Akishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akishi akati, “Mandopambara kupiko nhasi?” Dhavhidhi akati, “Kurutivi rwezasi rwavaJudha, nokurutivi rwezasi rwavaJerameeri, nokurutivi rwezasi rwavaKeni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Dhavhidhi haana kurega murume kana mukadzi ari mupenyu, kuti auye navo paGati, achiti, “Ngavarege kutiudzisira, vachiti, ‘Dhavhidhi wakaita zvokuti nezvokuti, ndiyo tsika yake nguva yose achigere munyika yavaFirisitia.’ ”" 
1Samuel27:12 Akishi akatenda Dhavhidhi achiti, “Wazvivengesa kwazvo navanhu vake Isiraeri; naizvozvo uchava muranda wangu nokusingaperi.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Zvino namazuva iwayo vaFirisitia vakaunganidza hondo dzavo kuzorwa naVaIsiraeri. Akishi akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Ziva kwazvo kuti unofanira kuenda neni nehondo, iwe navanhu vako.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Akishi, “Naizvozvo muchaziva muranda wenyu zvaanogona kuita.” Akishi akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Naizvozvo ndichakuita muchengeti womusoro wangu nokusingaperi.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Samueri zvino wakanga afa; VaIsiraeri vakanga vamuchema, vamuviga paRama, imo muguta rake; Sauro akanga abvisa panyika masvikiro navauki." 
1Samuel28:4 Zvino vaFirisitia vakaungana, vakavaka misasa yavo paShunemi; Sauro akaunganidza VaIsiraeri vose, ivo vakavaka misasa yavo paGiribhoa." 
1Samuel28:5 Zvino Sauro wakati achiona hondo dzavaFirisitia, akatya, mwoyo wake ukadedera kwazvo." 
1Samuel28:6 Sauro akabvunza Jehovha, asi Jehovha haana kumupindura, kunyangwe pakurota, kana neUrimi, kana navaporofita." 
1Samuel28:7 Ipapo Sauro akati kuvaranda vake, “Nditsvakirei mukadzi unosvikirwa, ndiende kwaari ndindomubvunza iye.” Varanda vake vakati kwaari, “Tarirai, kuno mukadzi unosvikirwa paEndoru.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Sauro akazvishandura, akafuka dzimwe nguo, akaenda, iye navamwe varume vaviri, vakasvika kumukadzi usiku; akati, “Ndiukirewo nomweya unokusvikira, undikwidzire wandichakuudza.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Mukadzi akati kwaari, “Tarira, unoziva zvakaitwa naSauro, kuti wakaparadza masvikiro navauki panyika, unoteyireiko upenyu hwangu, ndiurawe?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Sauro akapika kwaari naJehovha, akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, iwe haungavi nemhosva pachinhu ichi.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Zvino mukadzi akati, “Ndokukwidzira aniko?” Akati, “Ndikwidzire Samueri.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Mukadzi wakati achiona Samueri, akadanidzira nezwi guru. Mukadzi akataura naSauro, akati, “Mandinyengerereiko? Nokuti ndimi Sauro?”" 
1Samuel28:13 Mambo akati kwaari, “Usatya hako, asi unowoneiko?” Mukadzi akati kuna Sauro, “Ndinoona mudzimu unokwira achibuda panyika.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Akati kwaari, “Wakadiniko?” Akati, “Kunomutana unokwira, akafuka nguo.” Sauro akaziva kuti ndiye Samueri, akakotamira pasi nechiso chake, akanamata kwaari." 
1Samuel28:15 Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Wanditambudzireiko uchindikwidza?” Sauro akapindura akati, “Ndinotambudzika kwazvo; nokuti vaFirisitia vanorwa neni, naMwari wabva kwandiri, haachatongondipinduri, kunyangwe navaporofita, kana nokurota; naizvozvo ndakudanai imi, kuti mundizivise zvandinofanira kuita.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samueri akati, “Unondibvunzireiko ini, Jehovha zvaakabva kwauri, akava muvengi wako?" 
1Samuel28:17 Jehovha akazviitira izvo zvaakataura neni; Jehovha akabvarura ushe pamaoko ako, akahupa mumwe wokwako, iye Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel28:18 Nokuti hauna kuteerera izwi raJehovha, hauna kuitira vaAmareki nokutsamwa kwake kukuru; naizvozvo Jehovha akakuitira chinhu ichi nhasi." 
1Samuel28:19 Zvino Jehovha uchaisa VaIsiraeri pamwechete newe mumaoko avaFirisitia; mangwana iwe navanakomana vako muchava neni; Jehovha uchaisa hondo yaVaIsiraeri mumaoko avaFirisitia.” 
1Samuel28:20 Ipapo Sauro akawira pasi pakarepo, akatsivama, akatya kwazvo pamusoro pamashoko aSamueri; kwakanga kusina simba maari, nokuti wakanga asina kudya zvokudya zuva iro rose, kunyangwe nousiku hwose." 
1Samuel28:21 Zvino mukadzi akauya kuna Sauro, akaona kuti unotambudzika kwazvo, akati kwaari, “Tarirai, murandakadzi wenyu wakateerera izwi renyu, ndikasarangarira upenyu hwangu, asi ndakateerera mashoko enyu amakandiudza." 
1Samuel28:22 Naizvozvo zvino, chiteereraiwo izwi romurandakadzi wenyu, ndiise chimedu chechingwa pamberi penyu, mudye, muve nesimba kana moenda henyu.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Asi iye wakaramba, akati, “Handidi hangu kudya.” Asi varanda vake vakamukurudzira pamwechete nomukadzi, akazoteerera mazwi avo. Naizvozvo akasimuka pasi, akagara panhoo." 
1Samuel28:24 Zvino mukadzi wakanga ane mhuru yakakodzwa mumba; akakurumidza akaibaya, akatora upfu, akahukanya, akabika nahwo chingwa chisina kuviriswa;" 
1Samuel28:25 akazviisa pamberi paSauro napamberi pavaranda vake; vakadya. Ipapo vakasimuka, vakaenda usiku ihwohwo." 
1Samuel29:1 Zvino vaFirisitia vakaunganidza hondo dzavo dzose paAfeki, asi VaIsiraeri vakavaka misasa yavo patsime raiva paJezereeri." 
1Samuel29:2 Madzishe avaFirisitia akapfuura akaita mazana–nemazana zviuru–nezviuru, naDhavhidhi navanhu vake vakapfuurawo vachitevera Akishi." 
1Samuel29:3 Ipapo machinda avaFirisitia akati, “Ko VaHebheru ava vanoiteiko pano?” Akishi akati kumachinda avaFirisitia, “Ko uyu haazi Dhavhidhi, muranda waSauro, mambo waIsiraeri, ugere neni mazuva ano kana makore ano here? Handina kuwana mhosva kwaari, chinguva chaakatizira kwandiri kusvikira nhasi.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Asi machinda avaFirisitia akamutsamwira, machinda avaFirisitia vakati kwaari, “Dzosa munhu uyu, adzokere uko kwake kwawakamuisa iwe, asi ngaarege kuburuka kundorwa nesu, kuti arege kutipandukira akava muvengi wedu pakurwa. Nokuti munhu uyu ungandoyananisa ishe wake neiko? Hatiti nemisoro yavanhu ava here?" 
1Samuel29:5 “Ko uyu haazi Dhavhidhi uya wavakaimbira vachibvumirana pakutamba kwavo, vachiti, ‘Sauro wakauraya zviuru zvamazana, Asi Dhavhidhi makumi ezviuru zvamazana?’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Ipapo Akishi akadana Dhavhidhi, akati kwaari, “NaJehovha mupenyu, iwe wakanga uri munhu wakarurama, nokubuda kwako nokupinda kwako pahondo kwakanga kuchindifadza ini, nokuti handina kuwana zvakaipa kwauri kubva pazuva rawakasvika kwandiri kusvikira zuva ranhasi; asi madzishe haakufariri." 
1Samuel29:7 Naizvozvo zvino chidzoka hako, uende norugare, kuti urege kuzoita chisingafadzi madzishe avaFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Akishi, “Ndadiniko? Makawaneiko kumuranda wenyu chinguva chandakagara nemi kusvikira nhasi, kuti ndirege kundorwa navavengi vashe wangu mambo?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi akapindura, akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Ndinoziva kuti unondifadza ini, somutumwa waMwari; asi machinda avaFirisitia akati, ‘Ngaarege kukwira nesu kundorwa.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Naizvozvo zvino chimuka hako achiri mangwanani pamwechete navaranda vashe wako vakauya newe; zvino kana mamuka mangwanani, mogona kuona, muende henyu.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akamuka mangwanani, iye navanhu vake, vakaenda mangwanani, vakadzokera kunyika yavaFirisitia. VaFirisitia vakakwira vakaenda Jezereeri." 
1Samuel30:1 Zvino Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakati vachisvika paZikiragi nezuva retatu, vakawana kuti vaAmareki vakanga vandopambara kurutivi rwezasi, neZikiragiwo, vakakunda Zikiragi nokuripisa nomoto;" 
1Samuel30:2 vakatapa vakadzi navose vakanga varimo, vaduku navakuru; vakanga vasina kuuraya munhu, asi vakavatapa, vakaenda havo." 
1Samuel30:3 Zvino Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakati vachisvika paguta vakariwana rapiswa nomoto, navakadzi vavo, navanakomana vavo, navanasikana vavo vatapwa." 
1Samuel30:4 Dhavhidhi navanhu vakanga vanaye vakachema kwazvo, kusvikira vasisina simba rokuchema." 
1Samuel30:5 Navakadzi vaviri vaDhavhidhi vakanga vatapwawo, vanaAhinoamu muJezereeri naAbhigairi waiva mukadzi waNabhari muKarimeri." 
1Samuel30:6 Dhavhidhi akatambudzika zvikuru, nokuti vanhu vakanga voda kumutaka namabwe, nokuti mwoyo yavanhu vose yakanga ine shungu, mumwe nomumwe pamusoro pavanakomana vake, navanasikana vake; asi Dhavhidhi wakatsvaka simba rake kuna Jehovha Mwari wake." 
1Samuel30:7 Zvino Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhihatari mupristi, mwanakomana waAhimereki, “Douya hako pano neefodhi.” Abhihatari akaenda neefodhi kuna Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel30:8 Dhavhidhi akabvunza Jehovha, akati, “Kana ndikatevera boka iro, ndingavabata here?” Akamupindura akati, “Tevera hako, nokuti uchavabata kwazvo, uye ucharwira zvose.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akaenda, iye navarume vana mazana matanhatu vaakanga anavo, vakasvika parukova Bhesoru, pakasara vamwe vaakasiya." 
1Samuel30:10 Asi Dhavhidhi wakateverera, iye navanhu vana mazana mana, nokuti vana mazana maviri vakanga vasara shure, nokuti vakanga vaneta kwazvo, vasingagoni kuyambuka rukova Bhesoru." 
1Samuel30:11 Vakawana muIjipiti kusango, vakauya naye kuna Dhavhidhi, vakamupa zvokudya, akadya, vakamupawo mvura yokunwa;" 
1Samuel30:12 vakamupawo chimedu chebundu ramawonde namasumbu maviri amadzambiringa akawomeswa; zvino wakati adya, mweya wake ukararamazve mukati make, nokuti wakanga asina kudya zvokudya, kana kunwa mvura, mazuva matatu nousiku hutatu." 
1Samuel30:13 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Uri waaniko? Unobvepiko?” Iye akati, “Ndiri jaya rakabva Ijipiti, muranda womunhu wavaAmareki; tenzi wangu wakandisiya, nokuti mazuva matatu akapfuura ndakarwara." 
1Samuel30:14 Takanga tandopambara kurutivi rwezasi rwavaKereti, nokunyika yaJudha, nokurutivi rwezasi rwaKarebhi, tikapisawo Zikiragi nomoto.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Ungandiburutsira kuboka iro here?” Iye akati, “Ndipikirei naMwari kuti hamungandiurayi, kana kundiisa mumaoko atenzi wangu. Ipapo ndingakuburutsirai kuboka iro.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Zvino wakati amuburutsirako vakavawana vakapararira pasi pose, vachidya nokunwa, nokutamba pakati pezvizhinji zvavakanga vapamba, zvavakanga vatora kunyika yavaFirisitia nokunyika yavaJudha." 
1Samuel30:17 Dhavhidhi akarwa navo kubva parubvunzavaeni kusvikira usiku hwezuva repiri; kwakanga kusina munhu wakapukunyuka, asi majaya ana mazana mana, akanga akatasva makamera, ndiwo akatiza." 
1Samuel30:18 Dhavhidhi akarwira zvose zvakanga zvatorwa navaAmareki; Dhavhidhi akarwirawo vakadzi vake vaviri. 
1Samuel30:19 Vakanga vasina kurashikirwa nechinhu, kunyangwe chiduku kana chikuru, kana vanakomana, kana vanasikana, kana nhumbi; kana chinhu chipi nechipi chavakanga vatora; Dhavhidhi wakazvidzosa zvose." 
1Samuel30:20 Dhavhidhi akatorawo makwai nemombe dzose, vakazvitinha pamberi pezvimwe zvipfuwo, vakati, “Ndizvo zvakapambwa naDhavhidhi.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Zvino Dhavhidhi akasvika kuvarume vana mazana maviri, vaya vakanga vasingagoni kutevera Dhavhidhi nokuneta kwavo, vavakanga vasiya kurukova Besori; ivo vakandosangana naDhavhidhi, nokusanganawo navanhu vakanga vanaye; zvino Dhavhidhi wakati aswedera kwavari, akavakwazisa." 
1Samuel30:22 Ipapo vanhu vose vakashata, navanhu vakaisvoipa, vakanga vaenda naDhavhidhi, vakapindura vakati, “Zvavasina kuenda nesu, hatingavapi chinhu chimwe chezvakapambwa zvatakandorwira, asi mumwe nomumwe ngaapiwe mukadzi wake navana vake, vavaperekedze, vaende navo.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati, “Hamungaiti kudaro, hama dzangu, nezvatakapiwa naJehovha, iye wakatichengeta, akaisa boka rakanga rauya kuzorwa nesu pamaoko edu." 
1Samuel30:24 Ndianiko ungakuteererai pashoko rakadai? Nokuti mugove wowakaenda kundorwa, uchafanana nomugove wowakasara panhumbi; migove yavo inofanira kufanana.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Zvino kubva pazuva iro iye akatema kuti uve mutemo nomurairo kuVaIsiraeri kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
1Samuel30:26 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakati asvika Zikiragi, akatuma zvimwe zvakanga zvapambwa kuvakuru vavaJudha, idzo hama dzake akati, “Hecho chipo chenyu chezvakapambwa kuvavengi vaJehovha;" 
1Samuel30:27 kuna vakanga vari Bhetieri, nokuna vakanga vari Ramoti kurutivi rwezasi, nokuna vakanga vari Jatiri," 
1Samuel30:28 nokuna vakanga vari Aroeri, nokuna vakanga vari Sifimoti, nokuna vakanga vari Eshitemoa;" 
1Samuel30:29 nokuna vakanga vari Rakari, nokuna vakanga vari kumaguta avaJerameeri, nokuna vakanga vari pamaguta avaKeni," 
1Samuel30:30 nokuna vakanga vari Horima, nokuna vakanga vari Korashani, nokuna vakanga vari Ataki," 
1Samuel30:31 nokuna vakanga vari Hebhuroni, nokuna vose vakanga vari panzvimbo dzaifamba Dhavhidhi amene navanhu vake.”" 
1Samuel31:1 Zvino vaFirisitia vakarwa naVaIsiraeri; varume VaIsiraeri vakatiza pamberi pavaFirisitia, vakawira pasi vaurayiwa pagomo reGiribhoa." 
1Samuel31:2 VaFirisitia vakateverera Sauro navanakomana vake kwazvo, vaFirisitia vakauraya Jonatani, naAbhinadhabhi, naMarikishua, vanakomana vaSauro." 
1Samuel31:3 Sauro akakurirwa kwazvo pakurwa; vapfuri vouta vakamubata, akatambudzika kwazvo nokuda kwavapfuri vouta." 
1Samuel31:4 Ipapo Sauro akati kunowaibata nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, “Vhomora munondo wako, undibaye nawo, kuti ava vasina kudzingiswa varege kusvika vandibaye, nokundidadira.” Asi mubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo wakaramba, nokuti wakanga achitya kwazvo. Naizvozvo Sauro akatora munondo wake, akazviwisira pauri." 
1Samuel31:5 Zvino mubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo wakati achiona kuti Sauro wafa, naiye akazviwisira pamunondo wakewo, akafa pamwechete naye." 
1Samuel31:6 Naizvozvo Sauro akafa, pamwechete navanakomana vake vatatu, nomubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, navanhu vake vose nomusi iwoyo." 
1Samuel31:7 Zvino vanhu VaIsiraeri, vakanga vari mhiri kwomupata, navakanga vachiona kuti vanhu VaIsiraeri vatiza, uye kuti Sauro navanakomana vake vakanga vafawo, vakabva pamaguta, vakatiza; vaFirisitia vakasvika, vakagaramo." 
1Samuel31:8 Zvino fume mangwana vaFirisitia vakati vachiuya kuzosunungura vakaurayiwa, vakawana Sauro navanakomana vake vatatu vafa pagomo reGiribhoa." 
1Samuel31:9 Vakagura musoro wake, nokusunungura nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo, vakatuma nhume kumativi ose enyika yavaFirisitia, kundozivisa mashoko iwayo kuimba yezvifananidzo zvavo, nokuvanhu." 
1Samuel31:10 Vakaisa nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo muimba yaAshitaroti, vakasungira chitunha chake pamadziro eBhetishani." 
1Samuel31:11 Zvino vakanga vagere Jabheshi-gireyadhi vakati vachinzwa zvakanga zvaitirwa Sauro navaFirisitia," 
1Samuel31:12 mhare dzose dzikasimuka, dzikafamba usiku hwose, dzikatora chitunha chaSauro nezvitunha zvavanakomana vake pamadziro eBhetishani, vakaenda Jabheshi vakazvipisapo." 
1Samuel31:13 Vakatora mapfupa avo, vakaaviga pasi pomuti womutamarisiki paJabheshi, vakazvinyima zvokudya mazuva manomwe." 
2Samuel1:1 Zvino Sauro wakati afa, Dhavhidhi akadzoka pakuuraya vaAmareki, Dhavhidhi akagara mazuva maviri paZikiragi;" 
2Samuel1:2 zvino nezuva retatu mumwe munhu wakasvika achibva kumisasa kuna Sauro, nguo dzake dzakabvaruka, uye ane ivhu pamusoro wake; akati achisvika kuna Dhavhidhi, akazviwisira pasi, akanamata kwaari." 
2Samuel1:3 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Wabvepiko?” Akati kwaari, “Ndapukunyuka ndichibva kumisasa yaIsiraeri.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Kwakaitweiko? Ndiudze hako.” Akapindura, akati, “Vanhu vatiza pakurwa, vanhu vazhinji vawira pasi vafa, uye Sauro nomwanakomana wake Jonatani vafawo.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati kujaya rakamuudza izvozvo, “Unoziva sei kuti Sauro naJonatani mwanakomana wake vafawo.”" 
2Samuel1:6 Jaya rikamuudza rikati, “Ndakanga ndichifamba hangu pagomo reGiribhoa, ndikaona Sauro achisendamira papfumo rake, ndikaonawo ngoro navatasvi vachimutevera kwazvo." 
2Samuel1:7 Zvino iye wakati achicheuka, akandiona, akandidana. Ndikapindura ndikati, ‘Ndiri pano hangu.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Akati kwandiri, ‘Ndiwe aniko?’ Ndikamupindura ndikati, ‘Ndiri muAmareki.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Akati kwandiri, ‘Mira kuno kwandiri, undiuraye, nokuti ndabatwa nedzungu kwazvo, nokuti upenyu hwangu huchiri mandiri chose.’" 
2Samuel1:10 “Naizvozvo ndikamira kwaari, ndikamuuraya, nokuti ndakanga ndichiziva kwazvo kuti haangararami, kana achinge awira pasi; ndikatora korona yakanga iri pamusoro wake, norundarira rwaiva paruoko rwake, ndikauya nazvo pano kunashe wangu.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akabata nguo dzake, akadzibvarura, navarume vose vaiva naye vakaitawo saizvozvo." 
2Samuel1:12 Vakachema, nokuungudza, nokuzvinyima zvokudya kusvikira madeko pamusoro paSauro naJonatani mwanakomana wake, napamusoro pavanhu vaJehovha, napamusoro peimba yaIsiraeri, nokuti vakanga vaurayiwa nomunondo." 
2Samuel1:13 Dhavhidhi akati kujaya rakanga ramuudza izvozvo, “Uri wepiko?” Iye akapindura akati, “Ndiri mwanakomana womutorwa, muAmareki.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Hauna kutya neiko kutambanudza ruoko rwako kuti uparadze muzodzwa waJehovha?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akadana rimwe jaya akati, “Swedera, umuuraye.” Iye akamubaya, akafa." 
2Samuel1:16 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Ropa rako ngarive pamusoro wako, nokuti muromo wako wakupupurira, zvawakati, ‘Ndakauraya muzodzwa waJehovha.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Dhavhidhi akachema Sauro naJonatani mwanakomana wake nokuchema uku. 
2Samuel1:18 Akavaraira kuti vadzidzise vana vaJudha rwiyo urwu rwokuchema; tarirai, rwakanyorwa muBhuku raJashari." 
2Samuel1:19 “Haiwa Isiraeri! Kubwinya kwako kwaurayiwa pamatunhu ako akakwirira! Haiwa! Vane simba vakawira pasi sei! 
2Samuel1:20 Musazvireva paGati, Musazviparidza panzira dzeAshikeroni; Kuti vakunda vavaFirisitia varege kufara, Kuti vakunda vavasina kudzingiswa varege kupembera." 
2Samuel1:21 “Imi makomo eGirobhoa, Ngakurege kuva nedova kana mvura pamusoro penyu, kana minda yezvipo; Nokuti ndipo pakangorashwa nhoo dzemhare, Nhoo yaSauro, seisina kuzodzwa mafuta." 
2Samuel1:22 Uta hwaJonatani hahuna kudzoka. Husina ropa ravakaurayiwa. Nomunondo waSauro hauna kudzoka usina mafuta avane simba. 
2Samuel1:23 “Sauro naJonatani vakanga vakadikanwa, vakanaka, paupenyu hwavo; Napakufa kwavo havana kuparadzaniswa; Vaikurumidza kupfuura makondo, Vaiva nesimba kupfuura shumba." 
2Samuel1:24 “Imi vakunda VaIsiraeri, chemai Sauro, Iye waikufukidzai nomucheka mutsvuku wakanaka, Waiisa zvishongo zvendarama pazvisimiro zvenyu." 
2Samuel1:25 “Haiwa! Vane simba vakawira pasi sei pakurwa! Jonatani wakaurayiwa pamatunhu akakwirira. 
2Samuel1:26 “Ndinotambudzika kwazvo pamusoro pako, munun'una wangu Jonatani; Wakanga uchindifadza kwazvo; Rudo rwako kwandiri rwaishamisa, Rwaipfuura rudo rwavakadzi." 
2Samuel1:27 “Haiwa! Vane simba vakawira pasi sei! Nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo dzakaparadzwa sei!” 
2Samuel2:1 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo Dhavhidhi wakabvunza Jehovha akati, “Ndokwira kune rimwe guta raJudha here?” Jehovha akati, “Kwira.” Dhavhidhi akati, “Ndokwira kune ripi?” Iye akati, “Hebhuroni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akakwirako, navakadzi vake vaviriwo, vanaAhinoami muJezereri, naAbhigairi, mukadzi waNabhari muKameri." 
2Samuel2:3 Dhavhidhi akakwirawo navanhu vake vaiva naye, mumwe nomumwe neimba yake, vakandogara pamaguta eHebhuroni." 
2Samuel2:4 Varume vaJudha vakauya vakazodza Dhavhidhi, kuti ave mambo wemba yaJudha. Vakaudza Dhavhidhi vachiti, “Varume veJabheshi-gireyadhi ndivo vakaviga Sauro.”" 
2Samuel2:5 Dhavhidhi akatuma nhume kuvarume vaJabheshi-gireyadhi, akati kwavari, “Muropafadzwe naJehovha, zvamakaitira ishe wenyu Sauro chinhu ichi chakanaka, mukamuviga." 
2Samuel2:6 Zvino Jehovha ngaakuitireiwo zvakanaka nezvokwadi; neniwo ndichakuitirai zvakanaka, zvamakaita izvozvi." 
2Samuel2:7 Naizvozvo zvino, maoko enyu ngaave nesimba, muve noumhare; nokuti Sauro ishe wenyu wakafa, zvino veimba yaJudha vakandizodza, kuti ndive mambo wavo.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Zvino Abhineri, mwanakomana waNeri, mukuru wehondo yaSauro, wakanga atora Ishibhosheti, mwanakomana waSauro, akamuisa Mahanaimu;" 
2Samuel2:9 akamuita mambo weGiriadhi, nowavaAshuri, noweJezereri, nowaEfuremu, nowaBhenjamini, nowaVaIsiraeri vose." 
2Samuel2:10 (Ishibhosheti, mwanakomana waSauro, wakanga ava namakore makumi mana nguva yokutanga kwake kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri, akabata ushe makore maviri). Asi veimba yaJudha vakatevera Dhavhidhi." 
2Samuel2:11 Nguva yakabata Dhavhidhi ushe hweimba yaJudha paHebhuroni aiva makore manomwe nemwedzi mitanhatu. 
2Samuel2:12 Zvino Abhineri, mwanakomana waNeri, navaranda vaIshibhosheti, mwanakomana waSauro, vakabva Mahanaimu, vakaenda Gibheoni." 
2Samuel2:13 NaJoabhu, mwanakomana waZeruya, navaranda vaDhavhidhi vakabudawo, vakasangana navo padziva reGibheoni; vakagara pasi, vamwe nechokuno kwedziva, vamwe nechemhiri kwedziva." 
2Samuel2:14 Abhineri akati kuna Joabhu, “Majaya ngaasimuke, atambe pamberi pedu.” Joabhu akati, “Ngavasimuke havo.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Ipapo vakasimuka, vakaenda namapoka; gumi navaviri kurutivi rwaBhenjamini naIshibhosheti, mwanakomana waSauro, uye gumi navaviri vavaranda vaDhavhidhi." 
2Samuel2:16 Mumwe nomumwe akabata musoro wowakatarisana naye, vakabayana neminondo kunhivi dzavo, naizvozvo vakawira pasi pamwechete; naizvozvo nzvimbo iyo yakanzi Herikatiharuzimi, iri paGibheoni." 
2Samuel2:17 Kurwa kukanyanya kwazvo zuva iro; Abhineri navarume VaIsiraeri vakakundwa navaranda vaDhavhidhi. 
2Samuel2:18 Vanakomana vatatu vaZeruya vakanga varipo, vana Joabhu, naAbhishai, naAshaheri; Ashaheri waigona kumhanya sechengu." 
2Samuel2:19 Ashaheri akateverera Abhineri; zvino pakumhanya kwake haana kutsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe pakuteverera Abhineri. 
2Samuel2:20 Abhineri akacheuka, akati, “Ndiwe Ashaheri here?” Akapindura, akati, “Ndini.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abhineri akati kwaari, “Tsaukira hako kurudyi kana kuruboshe, ubate hako rimwe ramajaya, utore nhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo.” Asi Ashaheri wakaramba kutsauka pakumuteverera." 
2Samuel2:22 Abhineri akatizve kuna Ashaheri, “Tsauka hako pakunditeverera; ndichakuurayireiko? Ndingazondoonana sei naJoabhu mukuru wako?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Asi wakaramba kutsauka; naizvozvo Abhineri wakamubaya nomudumbu nechireya chepfumo, pfumo rikabuda neseri kwake; akawira pasi ipapo, akafirapo; zvino vanhu vose vakati vachisvika pakanga pawira Ashaheri pasi pakufa kwake, vakamira." 
2Samuel2:24 Asi Joabhu naAbhishai vakateverera Abhineri, zuva rikavira pakusvika kwavo pachikomo cheAma, vaiva pamberi peGiya panzira yerenje inoenda Gibheoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Zvino vana vaBhenjamini vakaungana kuzotevera Abhineri, vakaita boka rimwe, vakamira pamusoro pechikomo," 
2Samuel2:26 Abhineri akashevedzera kuna Joabhu akati, “Ko munondo ucharamba uchingoparadza nokusingaperi here? Hauzivi kuti zvichavava pakupedzisira here? Uchanonoka kusvikira rinhiko kuraira vanhu kuti vadzoke pakuteverera hama dzavo?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Joabhu akati, “NaMwari mupenyu, dai usina kutaura, zvirokwazvo vanhu vangadai varega mangwana kuteverera mumwe nomumwe hama yake.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Naizvozvo Joabhu akaridza hwamanda, vanhu vose vakamira, vakarega kuzoteverera Isiraeri, vakasazorwazve." 
2Samuel2:29 Abhineri navanhu vake vakagura neArabha usiku uhwo hwose, vakayambuka Jodhani, vakagura neBhitironi yose, vakasvika Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Ipapo Joabhu akadzoka pakuteverera Abhineri; zvino wakati aunganidza vanhu vose, varume vane gumi navapfumbamwe naAshaheri vakashaikwa kuvaranda vaDhavhidhi." 
2Samuel2:31 Asi varanda vaDhavhidhi vakanga vauraya varume vana mazana matatu namakumi matatu vavaBhenjamini navarume vaAbhineri. 
2Samuel2:32 Vakasimudza Ashaheri, vakandomuviga muhwiro hwababa vake, hwaiva paBhetirehemu. Joabhu navanhu vake vakafamba usiku hwose, utonga hwukatsvuka pakusvika kwavo paHebhuroni." 
2Samuel3:1 Zvino kwakanga kunokurwa nguva huru pakati peimba yaSauro neimba yaDhavhidhi; Dhavhidhi akaramba achiwedzerwa simba, asi imba yaSauro yakaramba ichitorerwa simba." 
2Samuel3:2 Dhavhidhi akaberekerwa vanakomana paHebhuroni; dangwe rake raiva Amoni, mwanakomana waAhinoami muJezereri;" 
2Samuel3:3 wechipiri waiva Kireabhi, mwanakomana waAbhigairi, waiva mukadzi waNabhari muKameri; wechitatu waiva Abhusaromu, mwanakomana waMaaka, mukunda waTarimai, mambo weGeshuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 wechina waiva Adhonia, mwanakomana waHagiti; wechishanu waiva Shefatia, mwanakomana waAbhitari," 
2Samuel3:5 wechitanhatu waiva Itireami, mwanakomana waEgira mukadzi waDhavhidhi. Ndivo vakaberekerwa Dhavhidhi paHebhuroni." 
2Samuel3:6 Zvino kurwa kwakati kuripo pakati peimba yaSauro neimba yaDhavhidhi, Abhineri akazvisimbisa paimba yaSauro." 
2Samuel3:7 Zvino Sauro wakanga ano murongo, wainzi Rizipa, mukunda waAya; Ishibhosheti akati kuna Abhineri, “Wapindireiko kumurongo wababa vangu?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Ipapo Abhineri akatsamwa kwazvo namashoko aIshibhosheti, akati, “Ndiri musoro wembwa yokwaJudha here? Iko nhasi ndinoitira imba yaSauro, baba vako, navanun'una vake, nehama dzake zvakanaka, newe handina kukuisa paruoko rwaDhavhidhi; kunyangwe zvakadaro, unondipomera mhaka nhasi pamusoro pomukadzi uyu." 
2Samuel3:9 Mwari ngaarove Abhineri, arambe achidaro, kana ndisingaitiri Dhavhidhi sezvakapika Jehovha kwaari;" 
2Samuel3:10 achiti uchatamisa ushe paimba yaSauro, amutse chigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi pakati paIsiraeri naJudha, kubva paDhani kusvikira paBheerishebha.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Akasagona kupindura Abhineri kunyangwe shoko rimwe, nokuti wakanga achimutya." 
2Samuel3:12 Zvino Abhineri akatuma nhume kuna Dhavhidhi kwaakanga ari, akati, “Nyika iyi ndeyaniko? Akati, ‘Ita sungano neni, ruoko rwangu ruve newe, ndiuyise VaIsiraeri vose kwauri.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:13 Akati, “Zvakanaka, ndichaita sungano newe, asi ndinokuudza chinhu chimwe, kuti haungaoni chiso changu, kana usingauyi naMikari, mukunda waSauro, kana uchiuya kuzoona chiso changu.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Dhavhidhi akatuma nhume kuna Ishibhosheti, mwanakomana waSauro, akati, “Ndipe Mikari mukadzi wangu, wandakapfimba nezvikanda zvapamberi zvavaFirisitia zvine zana.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Ipapo Ishibhosheti akatuma nhume kunomutora kumurume wake Paritieri, mwanakomana waRaishi." 
2Samuel3:16 Murume wake akamutevera achingochema, kusvikira paBhahurimu. Ipapo Abhineri akati kwaari, “Enda udzoke;” iye akadzoka hake." 
2Samuel3:17 Abhineri akarangana navakuru VaIsiraeri akati, “Kare makanga muchitsvaka Dhavhidhi kuti ave mambo wenyu.”" 
2Samuel3:18 Naizvozvo zvino chiitai henyu kudaro, nokuti Jehovha akataura pamusoro paDhavhidhi, akati, “Noruoko rwomuranda wangu Dhavhidhi ndichaponesa vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri pamaoko avaFirisitia, napamaoko avavengi vavo vose.”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abhineri akataurawo navaBhenjamini, Abhineri akaenda akataurawo naDhavhidhi, zvose zvakanga zvichifadza Isiraeri neimba yose yaBhenjamini." 
2Samuel3:20 Naizvozvo Abhineri akasvika kuna Dhavhidhi paHebhuroni, ana varume vana makumi maviri. Dhavhidhi akaitira Abhineri navanhu vakanga vanaye mutambo." 
2Samuel3:21 Abhineri akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Ndichasimuka, ndikaenda kundounganidzira ishe wangu mambo VaIsiraeri vose, kuti vaite sungano nemi, mubate ushe pose pamunoda napo nomwoyo wenyu.” Dhavhidhi akaendisa Abhineri, akaenda norugare." 
2Samuel3:22 Zvino varanda vaDhavhidhi naJoabhu vakadzoka pakundopambara, vakauya nezvakapambwa zvizhinji; asi Abhineri wakanga asipo kuna Dhavhidhi paHebhuroni, nokuti wakanga amuendisa, akaenda hake norugare." 
2Samuel3:23 Zvino Joabhu nehondo yose yakanga inaye vakati vasvika, Joabhu akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Abhineri, mwanakomana waNeri, wakasvika kuna mambo, akaendiswa hake norugare.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Ipapo Joabhu akaenda kuna mambo, akati, “Maiteiko? Tarirai, Abhineri wakanga asvika kwamuri, mamuregereiko achienda, zvino waenda chose?" 
2Samuel3:25 “Munoziva Abhineri mwanakomana waNeri, kuti wakanga auya kuzokunyengerai, azive kubuda kwenyu nokupinda kwenyu, nokuziva zvose zvamunoita.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Joabhu akati abuda kuna Dhavhidhi, akatuma nhume dzitevere Abhineri, idzo dzikamudzora patsime reSira; asi Dhavhidhi wakanga asingazvizivi." 
2Samuel3:27 Zvino Abhineri wakati adzoswa Hebhuroni, Joabhu akaenda naye vari voga pakati peSuo, kuti ataurirane naye vari voga, akamubayapo nomudumbu, akafa, nokuda kweropa romunun'una wake Ashaheri."
