1Kings10:26 Soromoni akaunganidza ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza; wakanga ane ngoro dzine chiuru chimwe namazana mana, navatasvi vamabhiza vane zviuru zvine gumi nezviviri, vaakaisa kumaguta engoro, nokuna mambo paJerusaremu." 
1Kings10:27 Mambo akaunganidza sirivha paJerusaremu, ikawanda ikaita samabwe, nemisidhari ikaita semiwonde yaiva pamapani." 
1Kings10:28 Mabhiza aSoromoni aaiva nawo aibva, Ijipiti; vatengesi vamambo vaindoatorako, vachiita mapoka–mapoka, boka rimwe nerimwe rinomutengo waro." 
1Kings10:29 Ngoro imwe neimwe yaibva Ijipiti, yaitengwa namashekeri esirivha ana mazana matanhatu, uye bhiza rimwe nerimwe namashekeri ane zana namakumi mashanu; saizvozvowo madzimambo ose avaHiti, namadzimambo aVaSiria, aivigirwa izvozvo navo." 
1Kings11:1 Zvino mambo Soromoni wakanga achida vakadzi vazhinji vatorwa pamwechete nomukunda waFarao, vakadzi vavaMoabhu, navaAmoni, navaEdhomu, navaZidhoni, navaHiti;" 
1Kings11:2 vaiva vendudzi dzakanga dzanzi naJehovha kuvana VaIsiraeri, “Musaenda pakati pavo, naivo ngavarege kupinda pakati penyu; nokuti zvirokwazvo, vachatsautsa mwoyo yenyu mukazotevera vamwari vavo;” zvino Soromoni wakanamatira ivavo achivada." 
1Kings11:3 Wakanga ana vakadzi vana mazana manomwe, vakunda vamadzimambo, navarongo vana mazana matatu; vakadzi vake vakatsautsa mwoyo wake." 
1Kings11:4 Nokuti Soromoni wakati akwegura, vakadzi vake vakatsautsa mwoyo wake kuti atevere vamwe vamwari; mwoyo wake hauna kuzova wakarurama kwazvo kuna Jehovha Mwari wake, sezvakanga zvakaita mwoyo waDhavhidhi baba vake." 
1Kings11:5 Nokuti Soromoni wakatevera Ashitoreti, mwarikadzi wavaZidhoni, naMirikomi mwari unonyangadza wavana vaAmoni." 
1Kings11:6 Naizvozvo Soromoni wakaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, haana kutevera Jehovha kwazvo, sezvakaita Dhavhidhi baba vake." 
1Kings11:7 Zvino Soromoni akavakira Kemoshi, mwari unonyangadza waMoabhu, dunhu rakakwirira pagomo riri pamberi peJerusaremu; naMoreki, mwari unonyangadza wavana vaAmoni." 
1Kings11:8 Saizvozvo akaitirawo vakadzi vake vose vatorwa, vaipisira vamwari vavo zvinonhuwira nokuvabayira." 
1Kings11:9 Zvino Jehovha akatsamwira Soromoni, nokuti mwoyo wake wakatsauka kuna Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, iye wakanga azviratidza kaviri kwaari," 
1Kings11:10 akamuraira pamusoro pechinhu ichi, kuti arege kutevera vamwe vamwari; asi haana kuita zvaakanga arairwa naMwari." 
1Kings11:11 Naizvozvo Jehovha akati kuna Soromoni, “Zvawaita izvozvi, ukasachengeta sungano yangu nemitemo yangu, yandakakuraira, zvirokwazvo ndichabvarura ushe hwako, ndihubvise kwauri, ndihupe muranda wako." 
1Kings11:12 Kunyangwe zvakadaro handingazviiti pamazuva ako nokuda kwaDhavhidhi baba vako; asi ndichahubvarura, ndikahubvisa paruoko rwomwanakomana wako." 
1Kings11:13 Kunyangwe zvakadaro handingahwubvaruri ndikahubvisa hwose asi ndichapa mwanakomana wako rudzi rumwe nokuda kwaDhavhidhi muranda wangu, uye nokuda kweJerusaremu, iro guta randakatsaura.”" 
1Kings11:14 Zvino Jehovha akamutsira Soromoni Hadhadhi muEdhomu, kuti arwe naye; iye wakanga ari worudzi rwamambo paEdhomu." 
1Kings11:15 Nokuti panguva iya Dhavhidhi ari paEdhomu, Joabhu mukuru wehondo wakati akwira kundoviga vakanga vaurayiwa, apedza kuuraya varume vose paEdhomu;" 
1Kings11:16 (nokuti Joabhu naVaIsiraeri vose vakagarapo mwedzi mitanhatu, kusvikira vaparadza varume vose paEdhomu;)" 
1Kings11:17 Hadhadhi akatiza, akaenda Ijipiti, iye navamwe vaEdhomu pakati pavaranda vababa vake, iye Hadhadhi achiri mwana muduku." 
1Kings11:18 Ivo vakasimuka, vakabva Midhiani, vakasvika Parani; vakatora vamwe varume veParani, vakaenda Ijipiti kuna Farao mambo weIjipiti; iye akamupa imba, akaraira kuti apiwe zvokudya, akamupawo nyika pokugara." 
1Kings11:19 Hadhadhi akazofarirwa kwazvo naFarao; naizvozvo akamupa muramu wake, munun'una wavahosi vake Tapenesi, ave mukadzi wake." 
1Kings11:20 Munun'una waTapenesi akamuberekera mwanakomana wake Genubhati, wakarumurwa naTapenesi mumba maFarao; Genubhati akagara mumba maFarao, pakati pavanakomana vaFarao." 
1Kings11:21 Zvino Hadhadhi wakati achinzwa muIjipiti, kuti Dhavhidhi wavata namadzibaba ake, uye kuti Joabhu mukuru wehondo wafa, Hadhadhi akati kuna Farao, “Regai ndiende hangu kunyika yangu.”" 
1Kings11:22 Farao akati kwaari, “Washaiweiko kwandiri, zvaunoda kudzokera kunyika yako?” Akapindura, akati, “Handina kushaiwa chinhu; kunyangwe zvakadaro ndiregei henyu ndiende.”" 
1Kings11:23 Zvino Jehovha akamumutsirazve mumwe kuzorwa naye, Rezonhi mwanakomana waEriadha, wakanga atiza kuna she wake Hadhadhezeri mambo weZobha;" 
1Kings11:24 akaunganidzira vanhu kwaari, akava mukuru wehondo panguva Dhavhidhi yaakauraya veZobha; vakaenda Dhamasikosi, vakagarapo, vakabata ushe paDhamasikosi." 
1Kings11:25 Iye akarwa naIsiraeri mazuva ose aSoromoni, zvimwe zvakashata zvakaitwa naHadhadhi zvisingaverengwi iye akavenga VaIsiraeri, akabata ushe paSiria." 
1Kings11:26 Jerobhoamuwo, mwanakomana waNebhati, muEfuremu weZeredha, muranda waSoromoni, zita ramai vake rainzi Zerua, yaiva chirikadzi, wakamukirawo mambo." 
1Kings11:27 Iye wakamukira mambo nemhaka yokuti Soromoni wakanga avaka Miro, akagadzira pakanga pakaputsika paguta raDhavhidhi baba vake." 
1Kings11:28 Zvino murume uyu Jerobhoamu wakanga ari murume wesimba noumhare, Soromoni akaona kuti jaya iro raibata kwazvo, akamuita mutariri wamabasa ose eimba yaJosefa." 
1Kings11:29 Zvino panguva iyo Jerobhoamu wakati achibuda Jerusaremu, muporofita Ahija muShiro akasangana naye panzira; zvino Ahija wakanga akafuka nguo itsva; ivo vakanga vari vaviri voga kusango." 
1Kings11:30 Ahija akabata nguo itsva yaakafuka, akaibvarura akaita mapande ane gumi namaviri." 
1Kings11:31 Akati kuna Jerobhoamu, “Chizvitorera mapande ane gumi, nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tarira, ndinobvarura ushe, ndihwubvise kuna Soromoni, ndikupe marudzi ane gumi." 
1Kings11:32 (Asi iye uchava norudzi rumwe nokuda kwaDhavhidhi muranda wangu, uye nokuda kweJerusaremu, guta randakatsaura kumarudzi ose aIsiraeri;)" 
1Kings11:33 nokuti vakandirasha, vakanamata kuna Ashitoreti mwarikadzi wavaZidhoni, naKemoshi mwari wavaMoabhu, naMirikomi mwari wavana vaAmoni; havana kufamba panzira dzangu, nokuita zvakarurama pamberi pangu, nokuchengeta mitemo yangu nezvandakatonga, sezvakaita Dhavhidhi baba vake." 
1Kings11:34 Kunyangwe zvakadaro handingabvisi ushe hwose paruoko rwake, asi ndichamuita muchinda mazuva ose oupenyu hwake nokuda kwaDhavhidhi muranda wangu, wandakatsaura; nokuti wakachengeta mirairo yangu nezvandakatema." 
1Kings11:35 Asi ndichabvisa umambo kumwanakomana wake, ndihupe iwe, iwo marudzi ane gumi." 
1Kings11:36 Asi mwanakomana wake ndichamupa rudzi rumwe, kuti Dhavhidhi muranda wangu ave nomwenje nguva dzose pamberi pangu paJerusaremu, iro guta randakazvitsaurira, ndiise zita rangupo." 
1Kings11:37 Ndichakutora iwe, ugobata ushe sezvinoda mwoyo wako, ugova mambo waIsiraeri." 
1Kings11:38 Kana ukateerera zvose zvandinokuraira, ukafamba munzira dzangu, ukaita zvakarurama pamberi pangu, ukachengeta zvandatema nemirairo yangu, sezvakaita Dhavhidhi muranda wangu, ini ndichava newe, ndichakuvakira imba yakasimba, sezvandakavakira Dhavhidhi, ndigokupa Isiraeri." 
1Kings11:39 Nokuti nemhaka iyi ndichatambudza vana vaDhavhidhi, asi handingazviiti nokusingaperi.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Naizvozvo Soromoni akatsvaka kuuraya Jerobhoamu; asi Jerobhoamu wakasimuka, akatizira Ijipiti kuna Shishaki mambo weIjipiti, akagarapo paIjipiti kusvikira pakufa kwaSoromoni." 
1Kings11:41 Zvino mamwe mashoko aSoromoni, nezvose zvaakaita, nokungwara kwake, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku ramabasa aSoromoni?" 
1Kings11:42 Zvino nguva yakabata Soromoni VaIsiraeri vose paJerusaremu aiva makore makumi mana. 
1Kings11:43 Ipapo Soromoni akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi baba vake, Rehobhoamu mwanakomana wake akazomutevera pakubata ushe." 
1Kings12:1 Zvino Rehobhoamu wakaenda Shekemu, nokuti VaIsiraeri vose vakanga vaungana naShekemu kuzomuita mambo." 
1Kings12:2 Zvino Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, wakati achizvinzwa, (nokuti wakanga achiri Ijipiti kwaakanga atizira nokuda kwaSoromoni, Jerobhoamu akagara Ijipiti," 
1Kings12:3 vakatuma nhume kundomudana;) Jerobhoamu neungano yose yaVaIsiraeri vakasvika vakataura naRehobhoamu, vakati," 
1Kings12:4 “Baba venyu vakatitakudza joko rinogozha; naizvozvo zvino imi chirerutsai basa rababa venyu rakanga richigozha; nejoko ravo rinorema ravakaisa pamusoro pedu, tigokushumirai.”" 
1Kings12:5 Iye akati kwavari, “Chimboendai henyu, mugare mazuva matatu, mugodzokera kwandiri.” Vanhu vakaenda." 
1Kings12:6 Ipapo mambo Rehobhoamu akarangana navakuru, vaimira pamberi paSoromoni baba vake, vachiri vapenyu akati, “Mungandipa zano reiko, randingapindura vanhu ava naro?”" 
1Kings12:7 Ivo vakataura kwaari vakati, “Kana mukatenda kuva muranda wavanhu ava nhasi, mukavashumira, mukavapindura nokutaura mashoko akanaka kwavari, ipapo vachava varanda venyu nokusingaperi.”" 
1Kings12:8 Asi iye wakaramba zano ravakuru ravakanga vamupa, akarangana namajaya ezero rake, aimira pamberi pake." 
1Kings12:9 Akati kwavari, “Imi mungandipa zano reiko, ratingapindura naro vanhu ava vakataura neni, vachiti, ‘Rerusai joko rakaiswa pamusoro pedu nababa venyu?’ ”" 
1Kings12:10 Zvino majaya ezero rake akataura kwaari achiti, “Iti kuvanhu ava vakataura newe vachiti, ‘Baba venyu vakatitakudza joko rinogozha, asi imi chitirerusirai iro,’ utaure kwavari uti, ‘Munwe wangu muduku mukobvu kupfuura chiuno chababa vangu.’" 
1Kings12:11 Zvino, baba vangu zvavakakutakudzai joko rinorema, ini ndichawedzera pajoko renyu; baba vangu vaikurovai neshamhu; asi ini ndichakurovai nezvinyavada.”" 
1Kings12:12 Naizvozvo Jerobhoamu navanhu vose vakasvika kuRehobhoamu nomusi wetatu, sezvavakanga varairwa namambo, achiti, “Dzokeraizve kwandiri nomusi wetatu.”" 
1Kings12:13 Mambo akapindura vanhu nehasha, akarasha zano ravakuru, ravakanga vamupa;" 
1Kings12:14 akataura kwavari sezvaakanga apiwa zano namajaya, akati, “Baba vangu vakakutakudzai joko rinorema, asi ini ndichawedzera pajoko renyu; baba vangu vaikurovai neshamhu, asi ini ndichakurovai nezvinyavada.”" 
1Kings12:15 Naizvozvo mambo haana kuteerera vanhu; nokuti chinhu icho chakanga chabva kuna Jehovha, kuti Jehovha asimbise shoko rake, raakataura naAhija muShiro kuna Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati." 
1Kings12:16 Zvino VaIsiraeri vose vakati vachiona kuti mambo haana kuvateerera, vanhu vakapindura mambo vakati, “Tino mugove weiko kuna Dhavhidhi? Uye hatine nhaka kumwanakomana waJese; endai kumatende enyu, VaIsiraeri; iwe Dhavhidhi, chitarira hako imba yako.” Naizvozvo VaIsiraeri vakaenda kumatende avo." 
1Kings12:17 Asi kana vari vana VaIsiraeri, vakanga vagere mumaguta aJudha, Rehobhoamu wakanga ari mambo wavo." 
1Kings12:18 Zvino mambo Rehobhoamu akatuma Adhoramu mutariri wavanhu vechibharo, VaIsiraeri vose vakamutaka namabwe, akafa. Ipapo mambo Rehobhoamu akakurumidza kukwira ngoro yake, akatizira Jerusaremu." 
1Kings12:19 Saizvozvo VaIsiraeri vakamukira imba yaDhavhidhi kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
1Kings12:20 Zvino VaIsiraeri vose vakati vachinzwa kuti Jerobhoamu wadzoka, vakatuma nhume kuzomudanira kuungano, vakamuita mambo waVaIsiraeri vose; hakuna wakatevera imba yaDhavhidhi, asi rudzi rwaJudha bedzi." 
1Kings12:21 Zvino Rehobhoamu wakati achisvika Jerusaremu, akaunganidza vose veimba yaJudha, novorudzi rwaBhenjamini, varume vakatsaurwa vaiva nezviuru zvine zana namakumi masere, vaigona kurwa, kuzorwa neimba yaIsiraeri, kuti vadzoserezve ushe kuna Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni." 
1Kings12:22 Asi shoko raMwari rakasvika kuna Shemaya munhu waMwari richiti," 
1Kings12:23 Taura naRehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, mambo wavaJudha, nokuimba yose yaJudha neyaBhenjamini, nokuna vamwe vanhu, uti," 
1Kings12:24 “Zvanzi naJehovha, Hamufaniri kukwira kundorwa nehama dzenyu ivo vana VaIsiraeri; mumwe nomumwe ngaadzokere kumba kwake, nokuti chinhu ichi chinobva kwandiri.” Naizvozvo vakateerera shoko raJehovha, vakadzoka, vakaenda havo, sezvavakaudzwa naJehovha." 
1Kings12:25 Ipapo Jerobhoamu wakavaka Shekemu panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, akagaramo; akabvapo, akandovaka Penueri." 
1Kings12:26 Jerobhoamu akati mumwoyo mwake, “Zvino ushe huchadzokerazve kuimba yaDhavhidhi." 
1Kings12:27 Kana vanhu ava vakakwira kundobayira zvibairo zvavo mumba maJehovha paJerusaremu, ipapo mwoyo yavanhu ava ichadzokera kunashe wavo, iye Rehobhoamu mambo waJudha; vachindiuraya, vakadzokera kuna Rehobhoamu mambo waJudha.”" 
1Kings12:28 Naizvozvo mambo akarangana navakuru, akaumba mhuru mbiri dzendarama, akati kwavari, “Kukwira Jerusaremu kwava kure; tarirai, VaIsiraeri, vamwari venyu vakakubudisai panyika yeIjipiti.”" 
1Kings12:29 Akagadza imwe paBhetieri, imwe akaiisa paDhani." 
1Kings12:30 Chinhu ichi chikava chivi, nokuti vanhu vakandonamata kwadziri idzo mbiri, kusvikira paDhani." 
1Kings12:31 Akavakawo dzimba pamatunhu wakakwirira, akatora vamwe pakati pavanhu akavaita vapristi, vasati vari vavana vaRevhi." 
1Kings12:32 Zvino Jerobhoamu akaraira mutambo pamwedzi worusere, nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi, wakanga wakafanana nomutambo waiva kuvaJudha; akabayira paatari; akaitawo saizvozvo paBhetieri, akabayira mhuru dzaakaumba; akagadzawo paBhetieri vapristi vamatunhu akakwirira aakaita." 
1Kings12:33 Akandobayira paatari yaakavaka paBhetieri nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi worusere, iwo mwedzi waakafunga hake mumwoyo make; akaraira vana VaIsiraeri mutambo, akandobayira paatari, akapisa zvinonhuwira." 
1Kings13:1 Zvino tarira, mumwe munhu waMwari akanga arairwa neshoko raJehovha, wakabva kwaJudha, akasvika Bhetieri; Jerobhoamu wakanga amire paatari achipisa zvinonhuwira." 
1Kings13:2 Iye akadanidzira kuatari, neshoko raJehovha, akati, “Iwe atari, atari, zvanzi naJehovha, Tarirai, imba yaDhavhidhi ichaponerwa mwanakomana, uchanzi Josiya; iye uchabaya pamusoro pako vapristi vamatunhu akakwirira, vanopisira zvinonhuwira pamusoro pako, uye vachapisa mapfupa avanhu pamusoro pako.”" 
1Kings13:3 Akavapa chiratidzo nezuva iro, akati, “Ndicho chiratidzo chakataurwa naJehovha, Tarirai, atari ichapamuka, namadota ari pamusoro payo acharashirwa pasi.”" 
1Kings13:4 Zvino mambo wakati achinzwa shoko romunhu waMwari, raakadanidzira kuatari paBhetieri Jerobhoamu akasimudza ruoko rwake paatari, akatendeka narwo, akati, “Mubatei!” Ipapo ruoko rwake rwaakanga amutendeka narwo rwakawoma, akasagona kurudzosazve." 
1Kings13:5 Aritariwo yakapamuka, namadota akarashirwa pasi paatari, chiratidzo chakanga chapiwa nomunhu waMwari chikaitika, icho chakanga charairwa naJehovha." 
1Kings13:6 Ipapo mambo akapindura, akati kumunhu waMwari, “Kumbira hako kuna Jehovha Mwari wako andinzwire nyasha, undinyengeterere, kuti ndiporeserwezve ruoko rwangu.” Munhu waMwari akanyengetera kuna Jehovha, mambo akaporeserwazve ruoko rwake, rukaita sakare." 
1Kings13:7 Ipapo mambo akati kumunhu waMwari, “Enda neni kumba kwangu, uzvisimbisepo, ini ndikupewo mubairo.”" 
1Kings13:8 Asi munhu waMwari wakati kuna mambo, “Kunyangwe mukandiganhurira imba yenyu napakati, handingapindi kwamuri, kunyangwe kudya zvokudya, kana kunwa pano;" 
1Kings13:9 nokuti Jehovha akandiraira neshoko rake, akati, ‘Usadya zvokudya, kana kunwa mvura, kana kudzoka nenzira yawaenda nayo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:10 Naizvozvo akadzoka neimwe nzira, haana kudzoka nenzira yaakanga aenda nayo Bhetieri." 
1Kings13:11 Zvino paBhetieri pakanga pagere muporofita mutana; mwanakomana wake akandomuudza mabasa ose akaitwa nomunhu waMwari paBhetieri pazuva iro; namashoko aakataura kuna mambo, naiwo vakaudzawo baba vavo." 
1Kings13:12 Ipapo baba vavo vakati kwavari, “Waenda nenzira ipiko?” Zvino vana vake vakanga vaona nzira yaendwa nayo nomunhu waMwari wokwaJudha." 
1Kings13:13 Akati kuvanakomana vake, “Ndisungirei chityaro pambongoro;” ivo vakamusungira chityaro pambongoro, akaitasva." 
1Kings13:14 Akatevera munhu waMwari, akamuwana agere pasi pomuti womuoki, ndokuti kwaari, “Ndiwe munhu waMwari wakabva kwaJudha here?” Akati, “Ndini.”" 
1Kings13:15 Ipapo akati kwaari, “Hendei kumba kwangu, undodya zvokudya.”" 
1Kings13:16 Iye akati, “Handingagoni kudzoka nemi kana kupinda kwamuri, handingadyi zvokudya, kana kunwa mvura nemi pano;" 
1Kings13:17 nokuti ndakarairwa neshoko raJehovha, akati, ‘Usadya zvokudya, kana kunwa mvurapo kana kudzoka nenzira yawaenda nayo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:18 Ipapo akati kwaari, “Neniwo ndiri muporofita sewe; zvino mutumwa wakandiudza shoko raJehovha, akati, ‘Dzoka naye kumba kwako, adye zvokudya nokunwa mvura.’ ” Akareva nhema kwaari." 
1Kings13:19 Naizvozvo akadzoka naye, akandodya zvokudya mumba make nokunwa mvura." 
1Kings13:20 Zvino vakati vagere patafura, shoko raJehovha rikasvika kumuporofita wakamudzosa," 
1Kings13:21 akadanidzira kumunhu waMwari, wakanga abva kwaJudha, akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvausina kuteerera muromo waJehovha, ukasachengeta murairo wawakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wako," 
1Kings13:22 ukadzoka, ukadya zvokudya, ukanwa mvura’ ipapo paakati kwauri, ‘Usadya zvokudya nokunwa mvura, naizvozvo chitunha chako hachingasviki muhwiro hwamadzibaba ako.’ ”" 
1Kings13:23 Zvino wakati adya zvokudya, nokunwa, akasungirira chityaro pambongoro, iye muporofita waakadzosa." 
1Kings13:24 Zvino wakati aenda, shumba ikasangana naye munzira, ikamuuraya, chitunha chake chikakandirwa munzira, mbongoro ikamira nacho, uye shumbawo ikamira pachitunha." 
1Kings13:25 Zvino wonei, vanhu vakapfuura napo, vakaona chitunha chakakandirwa munzira, uye shumba imire pachitunha; vakaenda, vakandozviudza vanhu muguta, makanga mugere muporofita mutana." 
1Kings13:26 Zvino muporofita, wakamudzosa panzira, wakati achizvinzwa, akati, “Ndiye munhu waMwari usina kuteerera muromo waJehovha; naizvozvo Jehovha akamukweverera pashumba, ikamubvambura, ikamuuraya, sezvakarehwa neshoko raJehovha raakataura kwaari.”" 
1Kings13:27 Akati kuvanakomana vake, “Ndisungirirei chityaro pambongoro,” vakaisungira chityaro." 
1Kings13:28 Akaenda, akandowana chitunha chake chakakandirwa munzira, uye mbongoro neshumba zvimire pachitunha; shumba yakanga isina kudya chitunha kana kubvambura mbongoro." 
1Kings13:29 Ipapo muporofita akasimudza chitunha chomunhu waMwari, akachiisa pamusoro pembongoro, akadzoka nacho; akasvika kuguta romuporofita mutana, akamuchema nokumuviga." 
1Kings13:30 Akaisa chitunha chake muhwiro hwake; vakamuchema, achiti, “Haiwa, munun'una wangu!”" 
1Kings13:31 Zvino wakati amuviga, akataura navanakomana vake, akati, “Kana ndafa, mundivige muhwiro makavigwa munhu waMwari; muise mapfupa angu kurutivi rwamapfupa ake;" 
1Kings13:32 nokuti izvo zvaakataura, paakadanidzira achirairwa naJehovha, kuatari paBhetieri, nokudzimba dzose dzamatunhu akakwirira, ari pamaguta eSamaria, zvichaitika zvirokwazvo.”" 
1Kings13:33 Pashure pechinhu ichi Jerobhoamu haana kutendeuka panzira yake yakaipa, asi wakatsaurazve vamwe pakati pavanhu vose, akavaita vapristi pamatunhu akakwirira; Ani naani waaida, waimugadza, akavaita vapristi pamatunhu akakwirira." 
1Kings13:34 Chinhu ichi chikava chivi paimba yaJerobhoamu, kuti iparadzwe nokupedzwa panyika." 
1Kings14:1 Zvino nenguva iyo Abhija mwanakomana waJerobhoamu akarwara. 
1Kings14:2 Jerobhoamu akati kumukadzi wake, “Simuka hako, ushandure nguo dzako, kuti urege kuzikanwa kuti ndiwe mukadzi waJerobhoamu, ugoenda Shiro; tarira, muporofita Ahija uripo, iye wakadeya kutaura pamusoro pangu, kuti ndizova mambo wavanhu ava." 
1Kings14:3 Uende nezvingwa zvine gumi, nezvingwa zviduku, nechidende chouchi, uzviise kwaari; iye uchakuudza zvichaitirwa mwana.”" 
1Kings14:4 Mukadzi waJerobhoamu akaita saizvozvo, akasimuka, akaenda Shiro, akasvika paimba yaAhija. Zvino Ahija wakanga asingagoni kuona, nokuti meso ake akanga owonera madzerere nemhaka yokukwegura kwake." 
1Kings14:5 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Ahija, “Tarira, mukadzi waJerobhoamu unouya kuzokubvunza pamusoro pomwanakomana wake, nokuti unorwara; unofanira kutaura zvokuti nezvokuti kwaari, nokuti kana achipinda, uchazviita somumwe mukadzi.”" 
1Kings14:6 Zvino Ahija wakati achinzwa kufamba kwetsoka dzake, achipinda pamukova, akati, “Chipinda hako, iwe mukadzi waJerobhoamu, unozviitireiko somumwe? Nokuti ndatumwa kwauri namashoko anorwadza mwoyo." 
1Kings14:7 Enda, uudze Jerobhoamu, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri: Ndakakukudza pakati pavanhu, ndikakuita mutungamiriri wavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri," 
1Kings14:8 ndikabvarura ushe, ndikahubvisa paimba yaDhavhidhi, ndikahupa iwe; asi iwe hauna kuva saDhavhidhi muranda wangu, waichengeta mirairo yangu, akanditevera nomwoyo wake wose, achiita zvakanaka zvoga pameso angu;" 
1Kings14:9 asi iwe wakaita zvakaipa kupfuura vose vakakutangira, ukandozviitira vamwe vamwari nemifananidzo yakaumbwa, kuti unditsamwise; ukandirashira shure kwomusana wako." 
1Kings14:10 Naizvozvo, tarira, ndichaitira imba yaJerobhoamu zvakaipa; ndichaparadza kuna Jerobhoamu vana vakomana vose, vaduku navakuru kuVaIsiraeri, nditsvaire chose imba yaJerobhoamu, somunhu unotsvaira marara kusvikira abva ose." 
1Kings14:11 Ani naani weimba yaJerobhoamu unofira paguta uchadyiwa nembwa; unofira kusango uchadyiwa neshiri dzokudenga; nokuti Jehovha akataura saizvozvo.’ 
1Kings14:12 “Naizvozvo iwe, simuka uende kumba kwako; kana tsoka dzako dzichipinda paguta, mwana uchafa." 
1Kings14:13 VaIsiraeri vose vachamuchema, vakamuviga; nokuti ndiye oga waJerobhoamu uchasvika pahwiro, nokuti maari makawanikwa chinhu chakanaka chakafadza Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, paimba yaJerobhoamu." 
1Kings14:14 Jehovha uchazvimutsirawo mambo kuVaIsiraeri, uchaparadza imba yaJerobhoamu nomusi uyo. Nomusi uyo here? Zvotoitwa zvino." 
1Kings14:15 Nokuti Jehovha ucharova Isiraeri, sorutsanga runozununguswa mumvura; uchadzura Isiraeri panyika ino yakanaka, yaakapa madzibaba avo, nokuvaparadzira mhiri kweRwizi; nokuti vakazviitira matanda okunamata nawo vakatsamwisa Jehovha." 
1Kings14:16 Uchaisa Isiraeri kuvavengi nokuda kwezvivi zvaJerobhoamu, zvaakaita iye, nezvaakatadzisa Isiraeriwo nazvo.”" 
1Kings14:17 Zvino mukadzi waJerobhoamu akasimuka, akaenda, akasvika Tiriza; wakati achisvika pachikumbaridzo cheimba, mwana akafa." 
1Kings14:18 VaIsiraeri vose vakamuviga, vakamuchema, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha nomuromo womuranda wake muporofita Ahija." 
1Kings14:19 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJerobhoamu, kurwa kwake, nokubata kwake ushe, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri." 
1Kings14:20 Mazuva okubata ushe kwaJerobhoamu akanga ari makore makumi maviri namaviri; akavata namadzibaba ake, Nadhabhi mwanakomana wake, akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings14:21 Zvino Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, wakabata ushe hwaJudha. Rehobhoamu wakanga ana makore makumi mana nerimwe pakutanga kwake kubata ushe, akabata ushe makore ane gumi namanomwe paJerusaremu, iro guta rakanga ratsaurwa naJehovha pakati pamarudzi ose aIsiraeri, kuti aise zita rakepo. Zita ramai vake rakanga riri Naama muAmoni." 
1Kings14:22 VaJudha vakaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, vakamutsa shungu dzake nezvivi zvavo zvavakanga vachiita, vakapfuura zvose zvakaitwa namadzibaba avo." 
1Kings14:23 Nokuti naivo vakazvivakira matunhu akakwirira, neshongwe, namatanda okunamata nawo pazvikomo zvose zvakakwirira, napasi pemiti yose mitema." 
1Kings14:24 Vasodhomi vakanga varipowo panyika; ivo vakaita nemitowo yokunyangadza kwose kwendudzi dzakanga dzadzingwa naJehovha pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri. 
1Kings14:25 Zvino pagore rechishanu ramambo Rehobhoamu, Shishaki mambo weIjipiti akakwira kuzorwa naJerusaremu;" 
1Kings14:26 akatora pfuma yeimba yaJehovha, nepfuma yeimba yamambo; akazvitora zvose, akatorawo nhoo duku dzose dzendarama dzakanga dzaitwa naSoromoni." 
1Kings14:27 Ipapo mambo Rehobhoamu akaita panzvimbo yadzo nhoo duku dzendarira, akadziisa pamaoko avakuru vavarindi, vairinda mukova weimba yamambo." 
1Kings14:28 Zvino nguva dzose kana mambo achipinda mumba maJehovha, varindi vaidzibata, ndokudzidzoserazve mumba mavarindi." 
1Kings14:29 Mamwe mabasa aRehobhoamu, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aJudha." 
1Kings14:30 Asi kurwa kwaivapo nguva dzose pakati paRehobhoamu naJerobhoamu. 
1Kings14:31 Rehobhoamu akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa kuna madzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Naama muAmoni. Abhija mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings15:1 Zvino negore regumi namasere ramambo Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, Abhija wakatanga kubata ushe hwaJudha." 
1Kings15:2 Akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore matatu; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Maaka, mukunda waAbhusaromu." 
1Kings15:3 Iye akafamba pazvivi zvose zvababa vake, zvavakamutangira kuita; mwoyo wake wakanga usina kururama kwazvo kuna Jehovha Mwari wake, somwoyo waDhavhidhi baba vake." 
1Kings15:4 Kunyangwe zvakadaro nokuda kwaDhavhidhi, Jehovha Mwari wake akamupa mwenje paJerusaremu, akamumutsira mwanakomana wake shure kwake, asimbise Jerusaremu;" 
1Kings15:5 nokuti Dhavhidhi waiita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, haana kutsauka pachinhu chimwe chaakamuraira mazuva ose oupenyu hwake, asi pamhaka yaUriya muHiti bedzi." 
1Kings15:6 Kurwa kwakanga kuripo pakati paRehobhoamu naJerobhoamu mazuva ose oupenyu hwake. 
1Kings15:7 Zvino mamwe mabasa aAbhija, nezvose zvaakaita hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku ramakoronike amadzimambo aJudha? Kurwa kwakanga kuripo pakati paAbhija naJerobhoamu." 
1Kings15:8 Abhija akavata namadzibaba ake, vakamuviga muguta raDhavhidhi; Asa mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings15:9 Negore ramakumi maviri raJerobhoamu mambo waIsiraeri, Asa wakatanga kubata ushe paJudha." 
1Kings15:10 Akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi mana nerimwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Maaka mukunda waAbhusaromu. 
1Kings15:11 Asa akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, sezvakaita Dhavhidhi baba vake." 
1Kings15:12 Akabvisa vasodhomi panyika, akabvisawo zvifananidzo zvose zvakaitwa namadzibaba ake." 
1Kings15:13 Akabvisawo Maaka mai vake pauhosi hwavo, nokuti vakanga vaitira matanda okunamata nawo chifananidzo chinonyangadza; Asa akaparadza chifananidzo chavo, akachipisa parukova Kidhironi." 
1Kings15:14 Asi matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa; kunyangwe zvakadaro mwoyo waAsa wakanga wakarurama kwazvo kuna Jehovha mazuva ake ose. 
1Kings15:15 Akaisa mumba maJehovha nhumbi dzakanga dzatsaurwa nababa vake, nenhumbi dzaakanga atsaura iye amene, sirivha, nendarama, nemidziyo." 
1Kings15:16 Zvino kurwa kwakanga kuripo pakati paAsa naBhaasha mambo waIsiraeri mazuva avo ose. 
1Kings15:17 Bhaasha mambo waIsiraeri akakwira kundorwa naJudha, akavaka Rama, kuti arege kutendera munhu kubuda kana kupinda kuna Asa mambo waJudha." 
1Kings15:18 Ipapo Asa akatora sirivha yose nendarama zvakanga zvasara papfuma yeimba yaJehovha, napapfuma yeimba yamambo, akazvipa mumaoko avaranda vake, mambo Asa akazvitumira kuna Bhenihadhadhi mwanakomana waTabhirimoni, mwanakomana waHezioni, mambo weSiria wakanga agere Dhamasikosi, akati," 
1Kings15:19 “Sungano iripo pakati pangu nemi, pakati pababa vangu nababa venyu; tarirai ndinokutumirai chipo chesirivha nendarama, endai muputse sungano yenyu naBhaasha mambo waIsiraeri, abve kwandiri.”" 
1Kings15:20 Bhenihadhadhi akateerera mambo Asa, akatuma vakuru vehondo dzake kundorwa namaguta aIsiraeri, akakunda Ijoni, neDhani, neAbheribhetimaaka, neKineroti rose, nenyika yose yaNafitari." 
1Kings15:21 Zvino Bhaasha wakati achizvinzwa, akarega kuvaka Rama, akandogara Tiriza." 
1Kings15:22 Ipapo mambo Asa akakoka vaJudha vose, hakuna wakadarikwa, vakandotora mabwe eRama, namatanda aro, zvaakanga achivaka nazvo iye Bhaasha; mambo Asa akavaka nazvo Ghebha rokwaBhenjamini neMizipa." 
1Kings15:23 Zvino mamwe mabasa ose aAsa, nesimba rake rose, nezvose zvaakaita, namaguta aakavaka, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzibaba aJudha? Asi panguva yokukwegura kwake wakanga achinzwa makumbo." 
1Kings15:24 Asa akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa kuna madzibaba ake paguta raDhavhidhi baba vake; Josafati mwanakomana wake, akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings15:25 Zvino Nadhabhi mwanakomana waJerobhoamu, wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri negore rechipiri raAsa mambo waJudha, akabata ushe hwaIsiraeri makore maviri." 
1Kings15:26 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, akafamba nenzira yababa vake, nomuzvivi zvake zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo." 
1Kings15:27 Ipapo Bhaasha mwanakomana waAhija, weimba yaIsakari, akamumukira; Bhaasha akamuuraya paGibhetoni raiva ravaFirisitia; nokuti Nadhabhi naVaIsiraeri vose vakanga vakomba Gibhetoni." 
1Kings15:28 Bhaasha akamuuraya negore retatu raAsa mambo waJudha, akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings15:29 Zvino wakati achangogara ushe, akauraya vose veimba yaJerobhoamu; haana kusiyira Jerobhoamu mumwe wakanga achafema, kusvikira amuparadza, sezvazvakarehwa naJehovha nomuromo womuranda wake Ahija muShiro;" 
1Kings15:30 nokuda kwezvivi zvaJerobhoamu, zvaakaita iye, nezvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo, nokuda kwokutambudza kwaakatambudza Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri nako." 
1Kings15:31 Zvino mamwe mabasa aNadhabhi, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri?" 
1Kings15:32 Kurwa kwakanga kuripo nguva dzose pakati paAsa naBhaasha mambo waIsiraeri. 
1Kings15:33 Negore rechitatu raAsa mambo waJudha, Bhaasha mwanakomana waAhija, wakatanga kubata ushe hwaVaIsiraeri vose paTiriza, akabata makore makumi maviri namana." 
1Kings15:34 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, akafamba nenzira yaJerobhoamu, nomuzvivi zvake, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo." 
1Kings16:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jehu mwanakomana waHanani, pamusoro paBhaasha, richiti," 
1Kings16:2 “Ndakakukudza ndikakubvisa paguruva, ndikakuita mutungamiriri wavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri; asi wakafamba nenzira yaJerobhoamu, wakatadzisa vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri, vakamutsa shungu dzangu nezvivi zvavo." 
1Kings16:3 Tarira, ndichabvisa Bhaasha neimba yake chose; ndichaita imba yako sezvandakaita imba yaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati." 
1Kings16:4 “Ani nani weimba yaBhaasha unofira muguta, uchadyiwa nembwa; ani nani unofira kusango, uchadyiwa neshiri dzokudenga.”" 
1Kings16:5 Mamwe mabasa aBhaasha, nezvaakaita, nesimba rake, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri?" 
1Kings16:6 Bhaasha akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa paTiriza, Era mwanakomana wake, akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings16:7 Shoko raJehovha rikauyawo nomuromo womuporofita Jehu mwanakomana waHanani, pamusoro paBhaasha, napamusoro peimba yake, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvose zvaakaita pamberi paJehovha, akamutsa shungu dzake pamusoro pamabasa amaoko ake, akanga akafanana neeimba yaJerobhoamu, uye nokuti wakanga amuparadza." 
1Kings16:8 Negore ramakumi maviri namatanhatu raAsa mambo waJudha, Era mwanakomana waBhaasha, wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri paTiriza, akabata makore maviri." 
1Kings16:9 Ipapo muranda wake Zimiri, mukuru wehafu yengoro dzake, akamumukira; zvino iye wakanga ari paTiriza, achinwa achibatwa mumba maAriza mutariri weimba yake paTiriza." 
1Kings16:10 Zimiri akapinda, akamubaya, akamuuraya negore ramakumi maviri namanomwe raAsa mambo waJudha, akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings16:11 Zvino pakutanga kwake kubata ushe, achangogara pachigaro chake choushe, akauraya vose veimba yaBhaasha; haana kumusiyira mwana mumwe womukomana, kana mumwe wehama dzake, kana mumwe weshamwari dzake." 
1Kings16:12 Naizvozvo Zimiri wakaparadza imba yose yaBhaasha, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha, shoko iro raakataura pamusoro paBhaasha nomuporofita Jehu," 
1Kings16:13 nokuda kwezvivi zvose zvaBhaasha, nezvivi zvaEra mwanakomana wake, zvavakaita, nezvavakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo, vakamutsa shungu dzaJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, nezvinhu zvavo zvisina maturo." 
1Kings16:14 Mamwe mabasa aEra, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri?" 
1Kings16:15 Negore ramakumi maviri namanomwe raAsa mambo waJudha, Zimiri akabata ushe paTiriza mazuva manomwe. Zvino vanhu vakanga vari kumisasa, vachida kurwa navaGibhetoni raiva ravaFirisitia." 
1Kings16:16 Zvino vanhu, vakanga vari kumisasa, vakanzwa, zvichinzi, “Zimiri wamukira mambo akamuuraya; naizvozvo VaIsiraeri vose, vakanga vari kumisasa, vakagadza Omiri, mukuru wehondo, ave mambo waIsiraeri zuva iro.”" 
1Kings16:17 Ipapo Omiri akabva paGibhetoni, akaenda naVaIsiraeri vose kuzokomba Tiriza." 
1Kings16:18 Zvino Zimiri wakati achiona kuti guta rakundwa, akapinda munhare paimba yamambo, akapisira imba yamambo pamusoro pake, akafa;" 
1Kings16:19 nokuda kwezvivi zvake pakuita kwake zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, achifamba nenzira yaJerobhoamu, nomuzvivi zvake zvaakaita, achitadzisa Isiraeri nazvo." 
1Kings16:20 Mamwe mabasa aZimiri, nokumukira kwake mambo, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri?" 
1Kings16:21 Zvino vanhu VaIsiraeri vakaparadzana, vakaita mapoka maviri; vamwe vakatevera Tibhini mwanakomana waGinati, vachida kumuita mambo wavo, asi vamwe vakatevera Omiri." 
1Kings16:22 Asi vanhu, vakatevera Omiri, vakakunda vanhu vakatevera Tibhini mwanakomana waGinati; naizvozvo Tibhini akafa, Omiri akabata ushe." 
1Kings16:23 Negore ramakumi matatu nerimwe raAsa mambo waJudha, Omiri akatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri, akabata makore ane gumi namaviri; akabata ushe paTiriza makore matanhatu." 
1Kings16:24 Akatenga gomo reSamaria kuna Shemeri namatarenda maviri esirivha, akavaka pagomo, akatumidza zita reguta raakavaka Samaria, achitevedzera zita raShemeri, mwene wegomo." 
1Kings16:25 Asi Omiri wakaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, akapfuura vose vakamutangira pakuita zvakaipa." 
1Kings16:26 Nokuti wakafamba nenzira yose yaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, nomuzvivi zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo, vakamutsa shungu dzaJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri nezvinhu zvavo zvakanga zvisina maturo." 
1Kings16:27 Mamwe mabasa aOmiri, aakaita, nesimba rakaonekwa kwaari, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri?" 
1Kings16:28 Naizvozvo Omiri akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa paSamaria, Ahabhi mwanakomana wake, akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings16:29 Negore ramakumi matatu namasere raAsa mambo waJudha, Ahabhi mwanakomana waOmiri wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri; Ahabhi mwanakomana waOmiri akabata ushe hwaIsiraeri paSamaria makore makumi maviri namaviri." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabhi mwanakomana waOmiri akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, akakunda vose vakamutangira." 
1Kings16:31 Chakanga chiri chinhu chiduku hacho kwaari kufamba muzvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, asi wakawana Jezebheri mukunda waEtibhaari, mambo wavaZidhoni, akandoshumira Bhaari, akanamata kwaari." 
1Kings16:32 Akavakira Bhaari atari muimba yaBhaari, yaakavaka paSamaria." 
1Kings16:33 Ahabhi akaitawo matanda okunamata nawo, Ahabhi akawedzera kumutsa shungu dzaJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, kupfuura madzimambo ose akamutangira." 
1Kings16:34 Pamazuva ake Hieri muBhetieri akavaka Jeriko; akafirwa nedangwe rake, Abhiramu, nguva yakaronga nheyo dzaro, uye akafirwa nomwanakomana wake worugotwe, Segubhi, panguva yaakamisa musuwo; sezvazvakarehwa naJehovha nomuromo waJoshua mwanakomana waNuni." 
1Kings16:34 Pamazuva ake Hieri muBhetieri akavaka Jeriko; akafirwa nedangwe rake, Abhiramu, nguva yakaronga nheyo dzaro, uye akafirwa nomwanakomana wake worugotwe, Segubhi, panguva yaakamisa musuwo; sezvazvakarehwa naJehovha nomuromo waJoshua mwanakomana waNuni." 
1Kings17:1 Zvino Eriya muTishibhi, waigara Giriadhi, wakati kuna Ahabhi, “NaJehovha mupenyu, Mwari waIsiraeri, iye wandimire pamberi pake, hapangavi nedova kana mvura makore ano, asi kana ndareva ini.”" 
1Kings17:2 Zvino shoko raJehovha rikasvika kwaari richiti," 
1Kings17:3 “Chibva pano, uende kurutivi rwamabvazuva, undovanda parukova Keriti, ruri pamberi paJodhani." 
1Kings17:4 Unofanira kunwa mvura yorukova, uye ndakaraira makunguo kukupa zvokudya ipapo.”" 
1Kings17:5 Naizvozvo akaenda, akaita sezvaakaudzwa naJehovha; wakandogara parukova Keriti ruri pamberi paJodhani." 
1Kings17:6 Makunguo akamuvigira chingwa nenyama mangwanani, nechingwa nenyama madekwana; akanwa mvura yorukova." 
1Kings17:7 Zvino nguva yakati yapfuura rukova rukapwa, nokuti mvura yakanga isinganayi panyika." 
1Kings17:8 Zvino shoko raJehovha rikasvika kwaari, richiti," 
1Kings17:9 “Simuka, uende Zarefati panyika yeZidhoni, ugarepo; tarira, ndaraira chirikadzi igerepo, kuti ikupe zvokudya.”" 
1Kings17:10 Naizvozvo akasimuka, akaenda Zarefati; wakati asvika pasuwo reguta, akaona chirikadzi yakanga igerepo, ichiunganidza tutsotso; akamudana, akati, “Nditorerewo mvura shomanene mumukombe, ndinwe.”" 
1Kings17:11 Zvino wakati achienda kuzoitora, akamudana, akati, “Dondivigirawo chimedu chechingwa muruoko rwako.”" 
1Kings17:12 Iye akati, “NaJehovha Mwari wenyu mupenyu, handina chingwa, asi tsama imwe youpfu mudende, namafuta mashomanene muchinu; tarirai, ndakanga ndichiunganidza tutsotso tuviri, ndichiti ndoenda ndizvigadzirire ini nomwanakomana wangu, tidye, tife hedu.”" 
1Kings17:13 Ipapo Eriya akati kwaari, “Usatya hako, enda undoita chingwa chiduku, undivigire icho, ugozviitira iwe nomwanakomana wako pashure." 
1Kings17:14 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Upfu huri mudende haungaperi, namafuta ari muchinu haangashaikwi, kusvikira pazuva Jehovha raachanaisa naro mvura panyika.’ ”" 
1Kings17:15 Iye akaenda, akandoita sezvakataura Eriya; iye mukadzi, naiye Eriya, neimba yake, vakadya mazuva mazhinji." 
1Kings17:16 Upfu hwakanga huri mudende hauna kupera, namafuta akanga ari muchinu haana kushaikwa, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha nomuromo waEriya." 
1Kings17:17 Zvino pashure paizvozvo mwanakomana womukadzi, mwene weimba, akarwara; kurwara kwake kukanyanya kwazvo, kusvikira apererwa nomweya." 
1Kings17:18 Mukadzi akati kuna Eriya, “Ndineiko nemi, imi munhu waMwari? Makapinda mumba mangu kuti zvivi zvangu zvirangarirwe, uye kuti mwanakomana wangu aurawe here?”" 
1Kings17:19 Akati kwaari, “Ndipe mwanakomana wako.” Akamutora pachipfuva chomukadzi, akamutakurira kuimba yokumusoro, kwaaigara, akamuradzika panhoo yake," 
1Kings17:20 akadanidzira kuna Jehovha, akati, “Jehovha Mwari wangu, makaitireiko chirikadzi yandigere nayo chakaipa chakadai, zvamauraya mwanakomana wake?”" 
1Kings17:21 Akatsiyama pamusoro pomwana katatu, akadanidzira kuna Jehovha, akati, “Jehovha Mwari wangu, ndinokumbira, mweya womwana uyu ngaudzokerezve kwaari.”" 
1Kings17:22 Jehovha akanzwa izwi raEriya, mweya womwana ukadzokerazve kwaari, akararamazve." 
1Kings17:23 Ipapo Eriya akatora mwana, akaburuka naye paimba yokumosoro, akamuisa mumba, akamupa mai vake. Eriya akati, “Tarira, mwana wako mupenyu.”" 
1Kings17:24 Mukadzi akati kuna Eriya, “Zvino ndinoziva kuti muri munhu waMwari, uye kuti shoko raJehovha, riri mumuromo menyu, nderazvokwadi.”" 
1Kings18:1 Zvino mazuva mazhinji akati apfuura, shoko raJehovha rikasvika kuna Eriya negore rechitatu, richiti, “Enda undozviratidza kuna Ahabhi; ndigotuma mvura panyika.”" 
1Kings18:2 Ipapo Eria akandozviratidza kuna Ahabhi. Zvino nzara yakanga yanyanya kwazvo paSamaria. 
1Kings18:3 Ahabhi akadana Obhadhia, iye wakanga ari mutariri weimba yake. (Zvino Obhadhiya wakanga achitya Jehovha kwazvo;" 
1Kings18:4 nokuti nenguva iyo Jezebheri yaakaparadza nayo navaporofita vaJehovha, Obhadhiya wakatora vaporofita vane zana, akavavanza makumi mashanu namakumi mashanuzve mubako, akavapa chingwa nemvura.)" 
1Kings18:5 Zvino Ahabhi akati kuna Obhadhiya, “Famba nenyika, kumatsime emvura, nokuhova dzose; zvimwe tingawana bundo, tiraramise mabhiza namahesera, tirege kurashikirwa nezvipfuwo zvose.”" 
1Kings18:6 Naizvozvo vakagovana nyika, kuti vafambe nayo; Ahabhi akaenda ari oga kuno rumwe rutivi, Obhadhiya akaendawo ari oga kuno rumwe rutivi." 
1Kings18:7 Zvino Obhadhiya wakati ari panzira, Eriya akasangana naye; akamuziva, akawira pasi nechiso chake, akati, “Ndimi here, ishe wangu Eriya?”" 
1Kings18:8 Iye akamupindura, akati, “Ndini; enda unoudza ishe wako, uti, ‘Tarirai, Eriya ari pano.’ ”" 
1Kings18:9 Iye akati, “Ndatadzeiko, zvamoda kuisa muranda wenyu mumaoko aAhabhi, andiuraye?" 
1Kings18:10 NaJehovha Mwari wenyu mupenyu, hapano rudzi kana ushe kwaasina kutuma iye ishe wangu kukutsvakai; kana vakati, ‘Haapo pano, waipikisa ushe uhwo kana rudzi urwo, kuti havana kukuwanai.’" 
1Kings18:11 Zvino moti, ‘Enda undoudza ishe wako,’ uti, ‘Eriya ari pano.’" 
1Kings18:12 Zvimwe ndichangobva kwamuri, Mweya waJehovha ndokukuisai kwandisingazivi; zvino kana ndikandoudza Ahabhi, akakushayai, uchandiuraya; asi ini muranda wenyu ndinotya Jehovha kubva pauduku hwangu." 
1Kings18:13 Ishe wangu hamuna kuudzwa here zvandakaita panguva iya Jezebheri yaakauraya nayo vaporofita vaJehovha kuti ndakavanza vaporofita vaJehovha, vane zana, makumi mashanu namakumi mashanu mubako, ndikavapa zvingwa nemvura?" 
1Kings18:14 Zvino moti, ‘Chindoudza ishe wako,’ uti, ‘Eriya ari pano.’ ” Iye uchandiuraya." 
1Kings18:15 Eriya akati, “NaJehovha wehondo mupenyu, iye wandimire pamberi pake, ndichazviratidza kwaari nhasi zvirokwazvo.”" 
1Kings18:16 Naizvozvo Obhadhia akaenda kuna Ahabhi, akamuudza Ahabhi akandosangana naEriya." 
1Kings18:17 Zvino Ahabhi wakati achiona Eriya, Ahabhi akati kwaari, “Ndiwe here, iwe mutambudzi waIsiraeri?”" 
1Kings18:18 Iye akati, “Ini handina kutambudza Isiraeri; asi ndiwe neimba yababa vako, nokuti makasiya mirairo yaJehovha, mukatevera vaBhaari." 
1Kings18:19 Naizvozvo zvino chituma vanhu uunganidze VaIsiraeri vose pagomo reKarimeri, navaporofita vaBhaari vana mazana mana vanodya patafura yaIzebheri.”" 
1Kings18:20 Naizvozvo Ahabhi akatuma vanhu kuvana VaIsiraeri vose, akaunganidza vaporofita pagomo reKarimeri." 
1Kings18:21 Zvino Eriya akaswedera kuvanhu vose, akati, “Mucharamba muchifunga mifungo miviri kusvikira rinhiko? Kana Jehovha ari Mwari, mumutevere, kana ari Bhaari, mumutevere iye.” Asi vanhu havana kupindura shoko rimwe." 
1Kings18:22 Ipapo Eriya akati kuvanhu, “Ini, iyeni ndoga, ndini ndasara kuvaporofita vaJehovha, asi vaporofita vaBhaari vanosvika varume vana mazana mana namakumi mashanu.”" 
1Kings18:23 Naizvozvo ngavatipe nzombe mbiri, ivo vazvitsaurire nzombe imwe, vaiguranye, vaiise pamusoro pehuni, asi varege kuisa moto pasi payo; neniwo ndichagadzira imwe nzombe, ndichiisa pamusoro pehuni, asi ndisingaisi moto pasi payo." 
1Kings18:24 Zvino imi mudane zita ramwari wenyu, ini ndidanewo zita raJehovha; Mwari unopindura nomoto, iye ngaave Mwari. Vanhu vose vakapindura, vakati, “Zvarehwa zvakanaka.”" 
1Kings18:25 Ipapo Eria akati kuvaporofita vaBhaari, “Chizvitsaurirai nzombe imwe, mutange kuigadzira, nokuti muri vazhinji; mudane zita ramwari wenyu, asi murege kuisa moto pasi payo.”" 
1Kings18:26 Ivo vakatora nzombe yavakanga vapiwa, vakaigadzira, vakadana zita raBhaari kubva mangwanani kusvikira masikati makuru, vachiti, “Bhaari, tinzwei!” Asi kwakanga kusine zwi kana unopindura. Vakapoteredza atari yakanga yavakwa vachipembera." 
1Kings18:27 Zvino panguva yamasikati makuru Eriya akavaseka, akati, “Danidzirai kwazvo; nokuti mwari, zvimwe ari pakufunga, zvimwe waenda kumwe, zvimwe wafamba rwendo, kana zvimwe uvete hake, anofanira kumutswa.”" 
1Kings18:28 Ipapo vakadanidzira kwazvo, vakazvicheka netsika dzavo neminondo namapfumo, kusvikira ropa richidzutuka kwavari." 
1Kings18:29 Masikati makuru akati apfuura, vakaporofita kusvikira panguva yokubayira chipo chamadekwana; asi kwakanga kusina zwi kana unopindura, kana wakanga achiteerera." 
1Kings18:30 Ipapo Eriya akati kuvanhu vose, “Swederai kwandiri;” vanhu vose vakaswedera kwaari. Zvino wakagadzira atari yaJehovha yakanga yaputswa." 
1Kings18:31 Eriya akatora mabwe ane gumi namaviri akaenzana namarudzi avana vaJakobho, iye, wakanga audzwa naJehovha, zvichinzi, “Zita rako richanzi Isiraeri.”" 
1Kings18:32 Akavaka atari namabwe iwayo nezita raJehovha, akachera goronga rakakomba atari rakanga rakaenzana napangadzvarwa zviyero zviviri zvezviyo." 
1Kings18:33 Akaronga huni, akaguranya nzombe, akaiisa pamusoro pehuni, akati, “Chizadzai zvirongo zvina nemvura, muidire pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa, napamusoro pehuni.”" 
1Kings18:34 Akati, “Itai izvozvo rwechipiri,” vakazviita rwechipiri. Akati, “Itai izvozvo rwechitatu;” vakazviita rwechitatu." 
1Kings18:35 Mvura ikayerera, ikapoteredza atari; akazadza negorongawo nemvura." 
1Kings18:36 Nenguva yokubayira chipo chamadekwana, muporofita Eriya akaswedera, akati, “Imi Jehovha, Mwari waAbhurahamu, nowaIsaka, nowaIsiraeri, ngazvizivikanwe nhasi kuti ndimi Mwari pakati paIsiraeri, uye kuti ini ndiri muranda wenyu, uye kuti ndakaita izvi zvose ndarairwa nemi." 
1Kings18:37 Ndinzwei Jehovha, ndinzwei, kuti vanhu ava vazive kuti imi Jehovha ndimi Mwari, uye kuti ndimi makadzosazve mwoyo yavo.”" 
1Kings18:38 Ipapo moto waJehovha akaburuka, ukapedza chipiriso chinopiswa, nehuni, namabwe, neguruva, ukananzva mvura yakanga iri mugoronga." 
1Kings18:39 Vanhu vose vakati vachizviona, vakawira pasi nezviso zvavo, vakati, “Jehovha ndiye Mwari, Jehovha ndiye Mwari!”" 
1Kings18:40 Eriya akati kwavari, “Batai vaporofita vaBhaari, varege kupukunyuka kunyangwe nomumwe wavo.” Vakavabata. Eriya akaburuka navo kurukova Kishoni, akavaurayirapo." 
1Kings18:41 Eriya akati kuna Ahabhi, “Chirongedzai, mudye, munwe, nokuti kuno kuunga kwemvura zhinji.”" 
1Kings18:42 Naizvozvo Ahabhi akarongedza kundodya nokunwa. Eriya akakwira pamusoro pegomo reKarimeri, akagwadamira pasi, akaisa chiso chake pakati pamabvi ake;" 
1Kings18:43 akati kumuranda wake, “Chikwira zvino, utarire kurutivi rwegungwa.” Akakwira akatarira, akati, “Hakuna chinhu.” Akati, “Endazve, kanomwe.”" 
1Kings18:44 Zvino panguva yechinomwe akati, “Tarirai, kune gore duku, rinokwira richibva mugungwa, rakafanana nechanza chomunhu.” Akati, “Enda, undoti kuna Ahabhi, ‘Sungai ngoro yenyu, muburuke, kuti murege kudzivirirwa nemvura.’ ”" 
1Kings18:45 Zvino nguva duku yakati yapfuura, denga rikasviba namakore nemhepo, mvura zhinji ikanaya. Ahabhi akaenda nengoro, akasvika Jezereri." 
1Kings18:46 Ruoko rwaJehovha rukasimbisa Eriya; akazvisunga chiuno chake, akamhanya pamberi paAhabhi kusvikira pasuwo reJezereri." 
1Kings19:1 Zvino Ahabhi wakaudza Jezebheri zvose zvakanga zvaitwa naEriya, zvokuuraya kwake vaporofita vose nomunondo." 
1Kings19:2 Ipapo Jezebheri akatuma nhume kuna Eriya, akati, “Vamwari ngavandirove, ngavarambe vachidaro, kana ini ndikasafananidza upenyu hwako noupenyu hwomumwe wavo mangwana nenguva ino.”" 
1Kings19:3 Zvino wakati achiona izvozvo, akasimuka, akatiza, kuti arege kuurayiwa, akasvika paBheerishebha raiva raJudha, akasiya muranda wake ipapo." 
1Kings19:4 Asi iye wakafamba rwendo rwezuva rimwe kurenje, akandogara pasi pomurara, akakumbira kuti afe hake; akati, “Zvaringana hazvo; zvino Jehovha, chitorai henyu upenyu hwangu, nokuti handipfuuri madzibaba angu pakururama.”" 
1Kings19:5 Akavata pasi, akavata hope pasi pomurara. Zvino mutumwa akamugunzva, akati kwaari, “Simuka, udye.”" 
1Kings19:6 Akatarira, akaona pedyo nomusoro wake chingwa chiduku chakanga chagochwa pamazimbe, nechirongo chemvura. Akadya, akanwa, akavata pasizve." 
1Kings19:7 Mutumwa waJehovha akasvikazve rwechipiri, akamugunzva, akati, “Simuka, udye, nokuti uchakundwa norwendo.”" 
1Kings19:8 Akasimuka, akadya, akanwa, akafamba asimbiswa nezvokudya izvo, mazuva makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana kusvikira paHorebhu, pagomo raMwari." 
1Kings19:9 Akapindapo mubako, akagarapo. Zvino shoko raJehovha rikasvika kwaari, rikati, “Unobateiko pano Eriya?”" 
1Kings19:10 Iye akati, “Ndakanga ndichishingairira Jehovha Mwari wehondo kwazvo, nokuti vana VaIsiraeri vakarasha sungano yenyu, vakaputsa atari dzenyu, nokuuraya vaporofita venyu nomunondo; ini ndoga, ndasara hangu; zvino votsvaka kundiuraya.”" 
1Kings19:11 Iye akati, “Enda, undomira pagomo pamberi paJehovha.” Zvino Jehovha akapfuurapo, mhepo huru ine simba ikapamura makomo, ikaputsanya mabwe pamberi paJehovha; asi Jehovha akanga asiri mumhepo. Mhepo yakati yapfuura, kudengenyeka kwenyika kukavapo; asi Jehovha akanga asiri mukudengenyeka kwenyika." 
1Kings19:12 Kudengenyeka kwenyika kwakati kwapfuura, moto ukatevera; asi Jehovha akanga asiri mumoto; moto wakati wapfuura, kufefetera kwokudzikama kukavapo." 
1Kings19:13 Zvino Eriya wakati achizvinzwa, akafukidza chiso chake nenguo yake, akabuda, akandomira pamuromo webako. Ipapo izwi rikasvika kwaari, rikati, “Unobateiko pano, Eriya?”" 
1Kings19:14 Iye akati, “Ndakanga ndichishingaira Jehovha Mwari wehondo kwazvo; nokuti vana VaIsiraeri vakarasha sungano yenyu, vakaputsa atari dzenyu, vakauraya vaporofita venyu nomunondo; ini, ini ndoga, ndasara hangu; zvino votsvaka kundiuraya.”" 
1Kings19:15 Zvino Jehovha akati kwaari, “Dzoka nenzira yako yokurenje reDhamasikosi; kana wasvikapo, uzodze Hazaeri, ave mambo weSiria," 
1Kings19:16 naJehu mwanakomana waNimishi umuzodze ave mambo waIsiraeri, naErisha mwanakomana waShafati weAbherimehora, umuzodze ave muporofita panzvimbo yako." 
1Kings19:17 Nokuti unopukunyuka pamunondo waHazaeri, uchaurayiwa naJehu; unopukunyuka pamunondo waJehu, uchaurayiwa naErisha." 
1Kings19:18 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndichasiya pakati paIsiraeri zviuru zvinomwe zvavanhu vasina kupfugamira Bhaari namabvi avo, vasina kumutsvoda nemiromo yavo.”" 
1Kings19:19 Naizvozvo akabvapo, akandowana Erisha mwanakomana waShafati, wakanga achirima nenzombe dzakasungwa pamajoko ane gumi namaviri, iye ari pajoko regumi namaviri; Eriya akapfuura nokwaari, akakanda nguo yake pamusoro pake." 
1Kings19:20 Iye akasiya nzombe, akamhanya achitevera Eriya, akati, “Nditenderei henyu ndimbondotsvoda baba vangu namai vangu, ndigokuteverai.” Iye akati kwaari, “Chidzoka hako, nokuti ndakuiteiko?”" 
1Kings19:21 Akadzoka pakumutevera, akatora nzombe dzejoko iro, akadzibaya, akagocha nyama yadzo achiita nhumbi dzadzo huni, ndokupa vanhu, ivo vakadya. Zvino wakasimuka, akatevera Eriya, akamubatira." 
1Kings20:1 Zvino Bhenihadhadhi, mambo weSiria, wakakoka hondo dzake dzose; iye waiva namadzimambo ana makumi matatu ana maviri, namabhiza, nengoro pamwechete naye; akaenda, akakomba Samaria, akarwa naro." 
1Kings20:2 Akatuma nhume kuna Ahabhi, mambo waIsiraeri, mukati meguta, akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naBhenihadhadhi" 
1Kings20:3 ‘Sirivha yako nendarama yako ndezvangu, navakadzi vako navana vako vakanaka ndavangu.’ ”" 
1Kings20:4 Mambo waIsiraeri akapindura, akati, “Ndizvo hazvo zvamareva, ishe wangu mambo; ndiri wenyu, nezvose zvandinazvo.”" 
1Kings20:5 Nhume dzikadzoka, dzikati, “Zvanzi naBhenihadhadhi, ‘Ndakatuma shoko kwauri,’ ndikati, ‘Unofanira kundipa sirivha yako nendarama yako, navakadzi vako navana vako;" 
1Kings20:6 asi ndichatuma varanda vangu kwauri mangwana nenguva ino; ivo vachanzvera imba yako, nedzimba dzavaranda vako; zvino, zvose zvinofadza meso ako vachazvitora namaoko avo, ndokuenda nazvo.’ ”" 
1Kings20:7 Ipapo mambo waIsiraeri wakadana vakuru vose venyika, akati, “Cherechedzai, muwone, kuti munhu uyu unotsvaka kutiitira zvakaipa; nokuti wakatuma shoko kwandiri, achiti uchatora vakadzi vangu navana vangu, nesirivha yangu nendarama yangu, ndikasamurambira chinhu.”" 
1Kings20:8 Ipapo vakuru vose navanhu vose vakati kwaari, “Regai kumuterera, kana kumutenda.”" 
1Kings20:9 Naizvozvo akati kunhume dzaBhenihadhadhi, “Udzai ishe wangu mambo, muti, ‘Zvose zvakazivisa muranda wenyu pakutanga, ndichazviita; asi chinhu ichi handingagoni kuchiita.’ ” Nhume dzikaenda, dzikadzokera kwaari nemhinduro." 
1Kings20:10 Ipapo Bhenihadhadhi akatuma shoko kwaari akati, “Vamwari ngavandirove, varambe vachidaro, kana guruva reSamaria rikagona kuringana kuti vanhu vose vanonditevera vatsamure tsama namaoko avo.”" 
1Kings20:11 Mambo waIsiraeri akapindura, akati, “Muudzei muti, ‘Unoshonga nhumbi dzake dzokurwa ngaarege kuzvirumbidza saiye wodzibvisa.’ ”" 
1Kings20:12 Zvino iye wakati achinzwa shoko iro ari pakunwa, iye namadzimambo, pamisasa, akati kuvaranda vake, “Rongedzai!” Ivo vakarongedza kundorwa neguta." 
1Kings20:13 Zvino mumwe muporofita akaswedera kuna Ahabhi mambo waIsiraeri, akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Waona vanhu ava vazhinji here? Tarira, ndichavapa mumaoko ako nhasi, ugoziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’ ”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabhi akati, “Naniko?” Iye akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Namajaya amachinda amativi enyika.’ ” Iye akati, “Ndianiko unofanira kuvamba kurwa?” Akapindura akati, “Iwe!”" 
1Kings20:15 Ipapo akaverenga majaya amachinda amativi enyika, vakasvika mazana maviri namakumi matatu namaviri; zvino akaverenga vanhu vose, ivo vana VaIsiraeri vose, vakasvika zviuru zvinomwe." 
1Kings20:16 Vakasimuka masikati makuru. Zvino Bhenihadhadhi wakanga ari pakunwa pamisasa, akabatwa, iye namadzimambo, iwo madzimambo makumi matatu namaviri akanga achimubatsira." 
1Kings20:17 Zvino majaya amachinda amativi enyika akatanga kutungamira Bhehadhadhi akatuma nhume, vakamuudza, vachiti, “Kuna varume vanobuda Samaria.”" 
1Kings20:18 Iye akati, “Kunyangwe vabuda vachitsvaka rugare, muvabate vari vapenyu, kunyangwe vabuda vachitsvaka kurwa, muvabate vari vapenyu.”" 
1Kings20:19 Naizvozvo vakabuda muguta, iwo majaya amachinda amativi enyika nehondo yakavatevera." 
1Kings20:20 Mumwe nomumwe akauraya munhu wake, VaSiria vakatiza, VaIsiraeri vakavateverera; naBhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria akatiza, akatasva bhiza ana vamwe vakanga vakatasva mabhiza." 
1Kings20:21 Ipapo mambo waIsiraeri akabuda, akaparadza mabhiza nengoro, akauraya VaSiria vazhinji zhinji." 
1Kings20:22 Zvino muporofita akaswedera kuna mambo waIsiraeri, akati kwaari, “Enda undozvisimbisa, uchenjere, ufunge zvakanaka zvaunofanira kuita; nokuti kana gore rapera mambo weSiria uchauya kuzorwa newe.”" 
1Kings20:23 Zvino varanda vamambo weSiria vakati kwaari, “Mwari wavo ndimwari wamakomo, nemhaka iyo vakatikunda; asi ngatirwe navo pabani, ipapo zvirokwazvo tichavakunda." 
1Kings20:24 Naizvozvo itai chinhu ichi, Mubvise madzimambo, mumwe nomumwe panzvimbo yake, mugoisa vatariri vehondo panzvimbo yavo;" 
1Kings20:25 mugozviunganidzira hondo yakafanana nehondo yamakarashikirwa nayo, bhiza panzvimbo yebhiza, nengoro panzvimbo yengoro, tirwe navo pabani; zvirokwazvo tichavakunda.” Iye akateerera izwi ravo, akaita saizvozvo." 
1Kings20:26 Pakupera kwegore Bhenihadhadhi akaunganidza VaSiria, akaenda Afeki kundorwa naVaIsiraeri." 
1Kings20:27 Vana VaIsiraeri vakaunganidzwawo, vakapiwa mbuva, vakandorwa navo; vana VaIsiraeri vakadzika matende avo pakatarisana navo, vakafanana namapoka maduku maviri embudzi, asi VaSiria vakanga vakazadza nyika." 
1Kings20:28 Zvino munhu waMwari akaswedera, akataura kuna mambo waIsiraeri, akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘VaSiria zvavakati, Jehovha ndimwari wamakomo, asi haazi mwari wamapani, naizvozvo ndichapa vanhu avo vose mumaoko ako, vazive kuti ini ndiri Jehovha.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Zvino vakagara pamisasa vakatarisana mazuva manomwe. Nomusi wechinomwe vakasangana vakarwa, vana VaIsiraeri vakauraya VaSiria vaifamba namakumbo vane zviuru zvine zana nomusi mumwe." 
1Kings20:30 Asi vamwe vakatizira muguta reAfeki, rusvingo ndokuwira pamusoro pavarume vane zviuru zvina makumi maviri nezvinomwe vakanga vasara. NaBhehadhadhi akatizawo, akasvika muguta, akapinda mukamuri yomukati." 
1Kings20:31 Ipapo varanda vake vakati kwaari, “Tarirai zvino, takanzwa kuti madzimambo eimba yaIsiraeri madzimambo ane nyasha; zvino ngatisunge magumbu pazviuno zvedu namakavi pamisoro yedu, tibudire kuna mambo waIsiraeri; zvimwe uchakuregai muri vapenyu.”" 
1Kings20:32 Naizvozvo vakasunga magumbu pazviuno zvavo, namakavi pamisoro yavo, vakaenda kuna mambo waIsiraeri, vakati, “Zvanzi nomuranda wenyu Bhenihadhadhi, ‘Ndinokumbira kuti murege kundiuraya henyu.’ ” Akati, “Uchiri mupenyu here? Iye ihama yangu.”" 
1Kings20:33 Zvino varume avo vakacherechedza kwazvo, vakakurumidza kugamuchira shoko iro kwaari, vakati, “Hoyo, Bhenihadhadhi hama yenyu.” Ipapo iye akati, “Endai, mumutore.” Bhenihadhadhi akabudira kwaari, akamukwidza pangoro." 
1Kings20:34 Zvino Bhenihadhadhi akati kwaari, “Ndichadzosa maguta akatorerwa baba vako nababa vangu; ungazviitira migwagwa muDhamasikosi, sezvakaita baba vangu paSamaria.” Ahabhi akati, “Ini ndichakutendera kuenda nokuda kwesungano iyi.” Naizvozvo akaita sungano naye, akamutendera kuenda." 
1Kings20:35 Zvino mumwe murume wavana vavaporofita akati kushamwari yake arairwa naJehovha, “Ndirove hako.” Murume akaramba kumurova." 
1Kings20:36 Ipapo akati kwaari, “Zvausina kuteerera izwi raJehovha, tarira, uchaurayiwa neshumba kana uchangobva kwandiri.” Zvino wakati achangobva kwaari, shumba ikamuwana, ikamuuraya." 
1Kings20:37 Zvino akawanazve mumwe murume, akati, “Ndirove hako.” Murume uyo akamurova, akamukuvadza kwazvo." 
1Kings20:38 Naizvozvo muporofita akabva, akandomirira mambo panzira, akazvishandura nomucheka waakanga asunga kumeso kwake." 
1Kings20:39 Zvino mambo wakati achipfuura, akadanidzira kuna mambo, akati, “Muranda wenyu wakanga apinda pakati pokurwa, ndikaona munhu achitsauka, akauya kwandiri nomumwe murume, akati, ‘Rinda munhu uyu; kana akatongoshaikwa, upenyu hwake huchatsiwa noupenyu hwako; kana izvo zvikakona, uchafanira kuripa netarenda resirivha.’ ”" 
1Kings20:40 Zvino muranda wenyu wakati achibata–bata hake pano napapo, iye akanyangarika. Mambo waIsiraeri akati kwaari, “Ndizvo zvauchatongerwa, wazvitonga umene.”" 
1Kings20:41 Akakurumidza kubvisa mucheka kumeso kwake, mambo waIsiraeri akamuziva kuti ndomumwe wavaporofita." 
1Kings20:42 Iye akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvawatendera munhu kupukunyuka pamaoko ako, iye wakanga atukwa neni kuti aparadzwe, naizvozvo upenyu hwake hwuchatsiwa noupenyu hwako, uye vanhu vake vachatsiwa navanhu vako.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Mambo waIsiraeri akaenda kumba kwake awora mwoyo ane shungu, ndokusvika paSamaria." 
1Kings21:1 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo Nabhoti muJezereri wakanga anomunda wemizambiringa, waiva paJezereri pedyo neimba youshe yaAhabhi mambo weSamaria." 
1Kings21:2 Zvino Ahabhi akataura naNabhoti, akati, “Ndipe munda wako wemizambiringa, ndiuite munda wemiriwo, nokuti uri pedyo neimba yangu; ini ndigokupa mumwe munda wemizambiringa unokunda uyu; zvimwe, kana uchida, ndingakupa mari yakaringana mutengo wawo.”" 
1Kings21:3 Ipapo Nabhoti akati kuna Ahabhi, “Jehovha ngaandidzivise, ndirege kukupai nhaka yamadzibaba angu.”" 
1Kings21:4 Ipapo Ahabhi akapinda mumba make, awora mwoyo, ane shungu, nokuda kweshoko raakanga audzwa naNabhoti muJezereri; nokuti iye wakanga ati, “Handingakupiyi nhaka yamadzibaba angu.” Akavata panhoo yake, akatendeudza chiso chake, akaramba kudya." 
1Kings21:5 Zvino Jezebheri mukadzi wake akaenda kwaari, akati, “Mwoyo wenyu une shungu neiko, zvamusingadi kudya?”" 
1Kings21:6 Iye akati kwaari, “Nokuti ndakataura naNabhoti muJezereri, ndikati kwaari, ‘Ndipe munda wako wemizambiringa, ndiutenge nemari; asi kana uchida hako, ndichakupa mumwe munda wemizambiringa panzvimbo yawo,’ iye akapindura, akati, ‘Handingakupiyi munda wangu wemizambiringa.’ ”" 
1Kings21:7 Zvino Jezebheri makadzi wake akati kwaari, “Ko hamuzimi munobata ushe pakati paIsiraeri here? Mukai, mudye, mwoyo wenyu ufare, nokuti ini ndichakupai munda wemizambiringa waNabhoti muJezereri.”" 
1Kings21:8 Naizvozvo akanyora tsamba nezita raAhabhi, akadzisimbisa nechisimbiso chake, akatuma tsamba idzo kuvakuru, nokumachinda, vaiva muguta rake, vakanga vagere naNabhoti." 
1Kings21:9 Akanyora patsamba idzo, achiti, “Tarirai musi wokuzvinyima zvokudya nawo, mukudze Nabhoti pakati pavanhu." 
1Kings21:10 Mugoraira vanhu vaviri vakaisvoipa vamire pamberi pake, vamupupurire, vachiti, ‘Iwe wakatuka Mwari namambo.’ Ipapo muende naye kunze kweguta, mumutake namabwe, afe.”" 
1Kings21:11 Ipapo varume veguta rake, ivo vakuru namachinda, vakanga vagere muguta rake, vakaita sezvakarairwa naJezebheri, sezvakanyorwa patsamba dzavakanga vatumirwa naye." 
1Kings21:12 Vakatara zuva rokuzvinyima zvokudya, vakakudza Nabhoti pakati pavanhu." 
1Kings21:13 Zvino varume vaviri vakaisvoipa vakapinda, vakandogara pamberi pake; varume ava vakaisvoipa vakamupupurira, iye Nabhoti, pamberi pavanhu, vakati, “Nabhoti wakatuka Mwari namambo.” Zvino vakabuda naye paguta, vakamutaka namabwe, akafa." 
1Kings21:14 Ipapo vakatuma shoko kuna Jezebheri, vakati, “Nabhoti watakwa namabwe, wafa.”" 
1Kings21:15 Zvino Jezebheri wakati achinzwa kuti Nabhoti watakwa namabwe, wafa, Jezebheri akati kuna Ahabhi, “Simukai, mundozvitorera munda wemizambiringa waNabhoti muJezereri, uyo waakadeya kuramba kukupai, nguva yamakada kumupa mari, nokuti Nabhoti haachiri mupenyu, asi wafa.”" 
1Kings21:16 Zvino Ahabhi wakati achinzwa kuti Nabhoti wafa, akasimuka, akaburuka kumunda wemizambiringa waNabhoti muJezereri, kundozvitorera iwo." 
1Kings21:17 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Eriya muTishibhi, richiti," 
1Kings21:18 “Simuka, buruka undosangana naAhabhi mambo waIsiraeri, unogara Samaria; uchamuwana ari mumunda wemizambiringa waNabhoti, kwaaburukira kundozvitorera iwo." 
1Kings21:19 “Umuudze, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Wauraya, zvino watorawo here?’ Zvino umuudzewo, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Apo pakananzva imbwa ropa raNabhoti, ndipo padzichananzva ropa rakowo.’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahabhi akati kuna Eriya, “Wandiwana, iwe muvengi wangu here?” Akapindura, akati, “Ndakuwana; nokuti wazvitengesa kuti uite zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha." 
1Kings21:21 Tarira, ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro pako, ndichakutsvaira chose, ubve, ndichaparadza vanakomana vose vaAhabhi, vaduku navakuru kuVaIsiraeri." 
1Kings21:22 Imba yako ndichaiita seimba yaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, neimba yaBhaasha mwanakomana waAhija, nemhaka yokuti wakanditsamwisa iwe, ukatadzisa Isiraeri." 
1Kings21:23 Uye Jehovha akataura pamusoro paIzebheri, akati, ‘Imbwa dzichadya Jezebheri parusvingo rweJezereri.’" 
1Kings21:24 Ani naani waAhabhi, unofira muguta, uchadyiwa nembwa, Ani naani, unofira kusango, uchadyiwa neshiri dzekudenga.”" 
1Kings21:25 (Asi hakuna munhu wakafanana naAhabhi, wakazvitengesa kuti aite zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, achikurudzirwa naJezebheri mukadzi wake." 
1Kings21:26 Akaita zvakanyangadza kwazvo, nokuti wakatevera zvifananidzo netsika dzose dzavaAmori, ivo vakanga vadzingwa naJehovha pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri)." 
1Kings21:27 Zvino Ahabhi wakati achinzwa mashoko iwayo, akabvarura nguo dzake, akasimira magumbu pamuviri wake, akazvinyima zvokudya, akavata pasi namagumbu, akanatsofamba." 
1Kings21:28 Zvino shoko raJehovha rikasvika kuna Eriya muTishibhi, richiti," 
1Kings21:29 “Unoona here kuti Ahabhi unozvininipisa pamberi pangu? Zvaanozvininipisa pamberi pangu, handingauyisi zvakaipa izvo pamazuva ake; asi pamazuva omwanakomana wake ndichauyisa zvakaipa izvo pamusoro peimba yake.”" 
1Kings22:1 Zvino vakagara makore matatu kusina kurwa pakati pavaSiria naVaIsiraeri. 
1Kings22:2 Zvino negore rechitatu Jehoshafati mambo waJudha wakaburukira kuna mambo waIsiraeri. 
1Kings22:3 Ipapo mambo waIsiraeri akati kuvaranda vake, “Munoziva here kuti Ramoti-giriiyadhi nderedu? Asi isu tigere hedu tinyerere, tisingaritori kuna mambo weSiria.”" 
1Kings22:4 Akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Uchaenda neni kundorwa neRamoti-giriyadhi here?” Jehoshafati akati kuna mambo waIsiraeri, “Ini ndakaita sewe, navanhu vangu savanhu vako, namabhiza angu samabhiza ako.”" 
1Kings22:5 Jehoshafati akati kuna mambo waIsiraeri, “Dombobvunza hako shoko raJehovha nhasi.”" 
1Kings22:6 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akaunganidza vaporofita, vanenge varume vaiva namazana mana, akati kwavari, “Ndiende kundorwa neRamot-igiriyadhi here, kana ndirege?” Ivo vakati, “Endai, nokuti Ishe uchariisa mumaoko amambo.”" 
1Kings22:7 Asi Jehoshafati akati, “Hakuchina mumwe muporofita waJehovha pano here, timubvunze?”" 
1Kings22:8 Mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Mumwe murume uchiriko, Mikaya mwanakomana waImira, watingabvunza kuda kwaJehovha naye, asi ini ndinomuvenga, nokuti haaporofiti zvakanaka pamusoro pangu, asi zvakaipa.” Jehoshafati akati, “Mambo ngaarege kudaro.”" 
1Kings22:9 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akadana muranda, akati, “Kurumidza undotora Mikaya mwanakomana waImira.”" 
1Kings22:10 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vakanga vagere mumwe nomumwe pachigaro chake choushe, vakafuka nguo dzavo dzoushe padare pasuwo reSamaria; vaporofita vose vakaporofita pamberi pavo." 
1Kings22:11 Zedhekiya mwanakomana waKenaani akazviitira nyanga dzamatare, akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Nedzidzi muchatunga VaSiria, kusvikira vapera.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 Navamwe vaporofita vose vakaporofita saizvozvo, vakati, “Endai Ramoti-giriyadhi, muchakunda, nokuti Jehovha uchariisa muruoko rwamambo.”" 
1Kings22:13 Zvino nhume yakanga yandodana Mikaya yakataura kwaari, ikati, “Tarirai, mashoko avaporofita anobvumirana achitaura zvakanaka kuna mambo; zvino ndinokumbira kuti shoko renyu rive seshoko romumwe wavo, mutaurewo zvakanaka.”" 
1Kings22:14 Ipapo Mikaya akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, izvo zvinorehwa naJehovha kwandiri, ndizvo zvandichataura.”" 
1Kings22:15 Zvino wakati achisvika kuna mambo, mambo akati kwaari, “Mikaya, tiende kundorwa neRamoti-giriyadhi here, kana tirege?” Akapindura, akati, “Endai henyu, muchakunda, nokuti Jehovha uchariisa muruoko rwamambo.”" 
1Kings22:16 Mambo akati kwaari, “Ndinofanira kukupikisa kangani here kuti undiudze zvokwadi yoga nezita raJehovha?”" 
1Kings22:17 Iye akati, “Ndaona VaIsiraeri vose vakapararira pamakomo samakwai asina mufudzi, Jehovha akati, ‘Ava havana tenzi, mumwe nomumwe ngaadzokere kumusha kwake norugare.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Handina kukuudza here? Kuti haangaporofiti zvakanaka pamusoro pangu, asi zvakaipa?”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaya akati, “Zvino chinzwai shoko raJehovha, ‘Ndakaona Jehovha agere pachigaro chake choushe, nehondo dzose dzokudenga dzimire naye kurudyi rwake nokuruboshwe rwake.’ ”" 
1Kings22:20 Ipapo Jehovha akati, “Ndianiko uchandonyengera Ahabhi, aende, andourayiwa paRamoti-giriyadhi?” Zvino mumwe akati zvokuti, nomumwezve akati zvokuti." 
1Kings22:21 Zvino mweya ukabuda, ukamira pamberi paJehovha, ukati, “Ini ndichandomunyengera.”" 
1Kings22:22 Jehovha akati kwauri, “Neiko?” Iwo ukati, “Ndichaenda, ndichava mweya wenhema mumiromo yavaporofita vake vose.” Iye akati, “Iwe ndiwe uchamunyengera, uchakundawo; enda hako, undoita saizvozvo.”" 
1Kings22:23 Naizvozvo zvino, tarirai Jehovha akaisa mweya wenhema mumiromo yavaporofita venyu ava vose, asi Jehovha akataura zvakaipa pamusoro penyu." 
1Kings22:24 Ipapo Zedhekiya mwanakomana waKenaani akaswedera, akarova Mikaya padama rake, akati, “Mweya waJehovha akaenda nepiko uchibva kwandiri kundotaura newe?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaya akati, “Uchazviona musi uyo wauchandovanda mukamuri yomukati.”" 
1Kings22:26 Ipapo mambo waIsiraeri akati, “Batai Mikaya, mumuise kuna Amoni mubati weguta, nokuna Joashi mwanakomana wamambo," 
1Kings22:27 muti, ‘Zvanzi namambo, pinzai munhu uyu mutorongo, mumupe zvokudya zvokutambudzika, nemvura yokutambudzika, kusvikira ndichidzoka norugare.’ ”" 
1Kings22:28 Ipapo Mikaya akati, “Kana mukadzoka norugare, Jehovha haana kutaura neni.” Akati, “Inzwai, imi vanhu, imi mose.”" 
1Kings22:29 Naizvozvo mambo waIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vakaenda Ramoti-giriyadhi. 
1Kings22:30 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Ini ndichazvishandura, ndigondorwa; asi iwe chifuka nguo dzako dzoushe.” Mambo waIsiraeri akazvishandura, akandorwa." 
1Kings22:31 Zvino mambo weSiria wakanga araira vatariri vengoro dzake, vana makumi matatu navaviri, akati, “Regai kurwa navaduku kana navakuru, asi namambo waIsiraeri oga.”" 
1Kings22:32 Zvino vatariri vengoro vakati vachiona Jehoshafati, vakati, “Zvirokwazvo ndiye mambo waIsiraeri.” Vakatsaukira kundorwa naye; zvino Jehoshafati akaridza mhere." 
1Kings22:33 Ipapo vatariri vengoro vakati vachiona kuti haazi mambo waIsiraeri, vakadzoka pakumutevera." 
1Kings22:34 Zvino mumwe murume akahwembura uta hwake asingashumbi, hake, akafura mambo waIsiraeri pakati pezvisungo zvenguo dzake dzokurwa nadzo; ipapo mambo akati kumufambisi wengoro yake, “Dzoka, undiise kunze kwehondo, nokuti ndakuvadzwa kwazvo.”" 
1Kings22:35 Kurwa kukanyanya kwazvo nomusi uyo; mambo akatsigirwa mungoro yake pakurwa naVaSiria, akafa madekwana; ropa rikabuda pavanga rikayerera mukati mengoro." 
1Kings22:36 Zvino zuva rakati rovira mhere ikanzwika pahondo yose, ichiti, “Mumwe nomumwe ngaadzokere kuguta rake, mumwe nomumwe kunyika yake.”" 
1Kings22:37 Naizvozvo mambo akafa, akaiswa Samaria, vakaviga mambo paSamaria." 
1Kings22:38 Vakasuka ngoro padziva reSamaria, imbwa dzikananzva ropa rake; (ndipo paishamba zvifeve); sezvakanga zvarehwa neshoko raJehovha." 
1Kings22:39 Zvino mamwe mabasa aAhabhi, nezvose zvaakaita, neimba yenyanga dzenzou yaakavaka, namaguta ose aakavaka, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri?" 
1Kings22:40 Naizvozvo Ahabhi akavata namadzibaba ake, Ahazia mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings22:41 Zvino Jehoshafati mwanakomana waAsa, wakatanga kubata ushe hwaJudha negore rechina raAhabhi mambo waIsiraeri." 
1Kings22:42 Jehoshafati wakanga ava namakore makumi matatu namashanu pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata makore makumi maviri namashanu paJerusaremu. Zita ramai vake rakanga riri Azubha, mukunda waShirihi." 
1Kings22:43 Akafamba panzira dzose dzababa vake Asa; haana kutsauka padziri, asi wakaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha; kunyangwe zvakadaro matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa, vanhu vakaramba vachingobayira nokupisira zvinonhuwira pamatunhu akakwirira." 
1Kings22:44 Jehoshafati akayanana namambo waIsiraeri. 
1Kings22:45 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJehoshafati, nesimba rakaonekwa kwaari, nokurwa kwake, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aJudha?" 
1Kings22:46 Vasodhomiwo vakanga vasiyiwa pamazuva aAsa baba vake, akavabvisawo panyika." 
1Kings22:47 Asi paEdhomu pakanga pasina mambo mumwe wakanga achibata panzvimbo yamambo. 
1Kings22:48 Jehoshafati akavaka zvikepe zveTashishi kuenda Ofiri kuzotora ndarama; asi hazvina kuenda, nokuti zvikepe zvakaputsika paEzionigebheri." 
1Kings22:49 Zvino Ahazia mwanakomana waAhabhi akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Varanda vangu ngavaende navaranda vako nezvikepe.” Asi Jehoshafati wakaramba." 
1Kings22:50 Jehoshafati akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa kuna madzibaba ake paguta raDhavhidhi baba vake, Jehorami mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
1Kings22:51 Ahazia mwanakomana waAhabhi, akatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri paSamaria pagore regumi namanomwe raJehoshafati mambo waJudha, akabata ushe hwaIsiraeri makore maviri." 
1Kings22:52 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, akafamba nenzira yababa vake, uye nenzira yamai vake, uye nenzira yaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, wakatadzisa Isiraeri." 
1Kings22:53 Nokuti wakashumira Bhaari, akanamata kwaari, akatsamwisa Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, sezvakaita baba vake pazvose." 
2Kings1:1 Zvino vaMoabhu vakamukira VaIsiraeri, shure kwokufa kwaAhabhi." 
2Kings1:2 Zvino Ahazia wakanga awira pasi napahwindo rekamuri yake yokumusoro, yaiva paSamaria, akarwara akatuma nhume, akati kwavari, “Endai mundobvunza Bhaarizebhubhi, mwari weEkironi, kana ndichapora pakurwara uku.”" 
2Kings1:3 Asi mutumwa waJehovha akati kuna Eriya muTishibhi, “Simuka undosangana nenhume dzamambo weSamaria, uti kwavari, ‘Asi hapana Mwari here pakati paIsiraeri, zvamondobvunza Bhaarizebhubhi, mwari weEkironi?’" 
2Kings1:4 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Haungaburukizve pamubhedha wawakwira, asi zvirokwazvo uchafa.’ ” Eriya akabva." 
2Kings1:5 Ipapo nhume dzakadzokera kwaari, iye akati kwavari, “Madzokereiko?”" 
2Kings1:6 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Mumwe murume wakauya akasangana nesu, akati kwatiri, ‘Endai, dzokerai kuna mambo wakakutumai,’ muti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, asi hapana Mwari here pakati peIsiraeri, zvawotuma vanhu kundobvunza Bhaarizebhubhi mwari weEkironi? Naizvozvo haungaburukizve pamubhedha wawakwira, asi zvirokwazvo uchafa.’" 
2Kings1:7 “Akati kwavari, ‘Murume, wakauya akasangana nemi, akakuudzai mashoko awo, wakanga akadiniko?’ ”" 
2Kings1:8 Vakamupindura vakati, “Wakanga ari murume wakafuka nguo yemvere, akazvisunga chiuno chake nebhanire reganda.” Iye akati, “Ndiye Eriya muTishibhi.”" 
2Kings1:9 Ipapo mambo akatuma kwaari mukuru wavarume vana makumi mashanu, ana vanhu vake vana makumi mashanu. Iye akakwira kwaari, akamuwana agere pamusoro pegomo. Akati kwaari, “Nhai munhu waMwari, zvanzi namambo, ‘Burukai.’ ”" 
2Kings1:10 Eriya akapindura, akati kumukuru wavana makumi mashanu, “Kana ndiri munhu waMwari, moto ngauburuke kudenga, ukuparadze iwe navanhu vako vana makumi mashanu.” Ipapo moto ukaburuka kudenga, ukamuparadza iye navanhu vake vana makumi mashanu." 
2Kings1:11 Akatumazve kwaari mumwe mukuru wavana makumi mashanu. Iye akapindura, akati kwaari, “Nhai munhu waMwari, zvanzi namambo, ‘Kurumidzai muburuke.’ ”" 
2Kings1:12 Eriya akapindura, akati kwavari, “Kana ndiri munhu waMwari, moto ngauburuke kudenga, ukuparadze iwe navanhu vako vana makumi mashanu.” Ipapo moto waMwari ukaburuka kudenga, ukamuparadza iye navanhu vake vana makumi mashanu." 
2Kings1:13 Akatumazve mumwe mukuru wavana makumi mashanu; wechitatu, ana vanhu vake vana makumi mashanu. Zvino iye mukuru wavana makumi mashanu, wechitatu, akakwira, akapfugama namabvi ake pamberi paEriya, akakumbira, akati kwaari, “Haiwa, munhu waMwari, upenyu hwangu nohwovaranda venyu ava vana makumi mashanu, ngachive chinhu chinokosha pamberi penyu." 
2Kings1:14 Tarirai, moto wakaburuka kudenga, ukapisa vakuru vaviri vavana makumi mashanu vokutanga navanhu vavo vana makumi mashanu; naizvozvo upenyu hwangu zvino ngachive chinhu chinokosha pamberi penyu.”" 
2Kings1:15 Ipapo mutumwa waJehovha akati kuna Eriya, “Buruka naye, usamutya hako.” Akasimuka, akaenda naye kuna mambo." 
2Kings1:16 Akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvawakatuma nhume kundobvunza Bhaarizebhubhi, mwari weEkironi, asi hapana Mwari here pakati peIsiraeri, waungabvunza shoko rake? Naizvozvo haungaburukizve pamubhedha wawakwira, asi zvirokwazvo uchafa.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Naizvozvo akafa seshoko raJehovha rakanga rarehwa naEriya. Jehoramu akamutevera paushe, akatanga kubata ushe pagore rechipiri reJehoramu mwanakomana waJehoshafati mambo waJudha; nokuti iye wakanga asina mwana." 
2Kings1:18 Mamwe mabasa aAhazia aakabata, haana kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri?" 
2Kings2:1 Zvino nguva yakati yasvika Jehovha yaakada kukwidza Eriya nayo kudenga nechinyamupupuri, Eriya akaenda naErisha vachibva Girigari." 
2Kings2:2 Eriya akati kuna Erisha, “Iwe chigara pano, nokuti Jehovha akandituma Bhetieri.” Erisha akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, uye nomweya wenyu mupenyu, handingakusiyi.” Naizvozvo vakaburukira Bhetieri." 
2Kings2:3 Zvino vanakomana vavaporofita vaiva paBhetieri, vakasvika kuna Erisha, vakati kwaari, “Munoziva here kuti Jehovha uchakubvisirai tenzi wenyu nhasi?” Iye akati, “Hongu, ndinoziva; nyararai henyu.”" 
2Kings2:4 Eriya akati kwaari, “Erisha, iwe chigara pano, nokuti Jehovha akandituma Jeriko.” Iye akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, uye nomweya wenyu mupenyu, handingakusiyiyi.” Naizvozvo vakasvika Jeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Zvino vanakomana vavaporofita, vaiva paJeriko, vakaswedera kuna Erisha, vakati kwaari, “Munoziva here kuti Jehovha uchakubvisirai tenzi wenyu nhasi?” Iye akapindura, akati, “Hongu, ndinoziva; nyararai henyu.”" 
2Kings2:6 Eriya akati kwaari, “Iwe chigara pano, nokuti Jehovha akandituma kwaJodhani.” Iye akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, uye nomweya wenyu mupenyu, handingakusiyiyi.” Ivo vari vaviri vakapfuura havo." 
2Kings2:7 Zvino varume vana makumi mashanu vavanakomana vavaporofita vakaenda vakandomira pakatarisana navo vari kure; ivo vari vaviri vakamira paJodhani. 
2Kings2:8 Ipapo Eriya akatora nguo yake, akaipeta, akarova mvura, ikaparadzaniswa napakati, naizvozvo ivo vaviri vakayambuka pakawoma." 
2Kings2:9 Zvino vakati vayambuka, Eriya akati kuna Erisha, “Kumbira chandingakuitira, ndichigere kubviswa kwauri.” Erisha akati, “Ndipei migove miviri yomweya wenyu.”" 
2Kings2:10 Akati, “Wakumbira chinhu chinogozha; asi kana ukandiona ndichibviswa kwauri, uchaitirwa izvozvo; asi kana usingandiwoni, haungaitirwi izvozvo.”" 
2Kings2:11 Zvino vakati vachifamba, vachingotaurirana havo, ngoro yomoto namabhiza omoto zvikasvika, zvikavaparadzanisa ivo vaviri; Eriya akakwira kudenga nechinyamupupuri." 
2Kings2:12 Erisha akazviona, akadanidzira, achiti, “Baba vangu, baba vangu, ngoro yeIsiraeri navatasvi vayo vamabhiza!” Akasazomuonazve; akabata nguo dzake akadzibvarura napakati." 
2Kings2:13 Akanonga jasi raEriya rakanga rawa kwaari, akadzoka akamira pamhenderekedzo yaJodhani;" 
2Kings2:14 akatora jasi raEriya rakanga rawa kwaari, akarova mvura, akati, “Jehovha Mwari waEriya uripiko?” Zvino wakati arova mvura, ikaparadzaniswawo napakati, Erisha akayambuka." 
2Kings2:15 Zvino vanakomana vavaporofita vakanga vari paJeriko pakatarisana naye, vakati vachimuona, vakati, “Mweya waEriya wogara pamusoro paErisha.” Vakandosangana naye, vakakotamira pasi pamberi pake." 
2Kings2:16 Vakati kwaari, “Tarirai, isu varanda venyu, tina varume vana makumi mashanu vane simba; ivo ngavaende havo kundotsvaka tenzi wenyu, zvimwe Mweya waJehovha wamukwidza, ukamukandira pane rimwe gomo, kana muno mumwe mupata.” Iye akati, “Regai henyu kuvatuma.”" 
2Kings2:17 Asi ivo vakati vamugombedzera, kusvikira anyara, akati, “Tumai henyu.” Naizvozvo vakatuma varume vana makumi mashanu, vakatsvaka mazuva matatu, asi havana kumuwana." 
2Kings2:18 Vakadzokerazve kwaari achiri paJeriko, iye akati kwavari, “Handina kukuudzai here, ndikati ‘Regai kuenda.’ ”" 
2Kings2:19 Zvino varume veguta vakati kuna Erisha, “Tarirai, henyu, nzvimbo yeguta yakanaka hayo, sezvamunoona, ishe wedu, asi mvura yakaipa, nenyika haibereki zvakanaka.”" 
2Kings2:20 Iye akati, “Ndivigire ndiro itsva, mugoisa munyumo.” Vakamuvigira iyo." 
2Kings2:21 Akaenda kuchitubu chemvura, akadira munyu imomo, akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndarapa mvura iyi, hapachazobvipo rufu, kana kusabereka.’ ”" 
2Kings2:22 Naizvozvo mvura ikarapwa kusvikira, nhasi sezvakataura, iye Erisha." 
2Kings2:23 Zvino wakabvapo, akaenda Bhetieri; akati achikwira nenzira, zvikomana zvikabuda muguta, zvikamuseka, zvikati kwaari, “Iwe nyamanza, kwira, iwe nyamanza, kwira!”" 
2Kings2:24 Iye akacheuka, akavaona, akavatuka nezita raJehovha. Ipapo mabheya maviri akabuda mudondo, akaparadza vana vana makumi mana navaviri vavo." 
2Kings2:25 Akabvapo, akaenda kugomo reKarimeri, akabvapo, akadzokera Samaria." 
2Kings3:1 Zvino Jehoramu mwanakomana waAhabhi wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri paSamaria negore regumi namasere raJehoshafati mambo waJudha, akabata ushe makore ane gumi namaviri." 
2Kings3:2 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, asi haana kuita sababa vake kana samai vake; nokuti wakabvisa shongwe yaBhaari yakanga yaitwa nababa vake." 
2Kings3:3 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, wakanamatira zvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo, haana kutsauka kwazviri." 
2Kings3:4 Zvino Mesha mambo waMoabhu wakanga ari mwene wamakwai, waipa mambo waIsiraeri makushe amakwayana ane zviuru zvine zana, naamakondohwe ane zviuru zvine zana." 
2Kings3:5 Asi Ahabhi wakati afa, mambo waMoabhu akamukira mambo waIsiraeri." 
2Kings3:6 Mambo Jehoramu akabuda paSamaria nenguva iyo, akaunganidza VaIsiraeri vose." 
2Kings3:7 Akatuma shoko kuna Jehoshafati mambo waJudha, achiti, “Mambo waMoabhu wandimukira, uchaenda neni kundorwa naMoabhu here?” Iye akati, “Ndichaenda; ini ndakaita sewe, navanhu vangu savanhu vako, namabhiza angu samabhiza ako.”" 
2Kings3:8 Iye akati, “Tichaenda nenzira ipiko?” Akati, “Nenzira yokurenje raEdhomu.”" 
2Kings3:9 Naizvozvo mambo waIsiraeri akaenda, namambo waJudha, namambo waEdhomu, vakapota vakafamba mazuva manomwe, vakashaiwa mvura yokunwisa hondo nezvipfuwo zvavakanga vanazvo." 
2Kings3:10 Ipapo mambo waIsiraeri akati, “Haiwa! Jehovha wakadana madzimambo awa matatu, kuti avaise mumaoko avaMoabhu.”" 
2Kings3:11 Zvino Jehoshafati akati, “Hapana muporofita waJehovha pano, tibvunze Jehovha naye here?” Mumwe wavaranda vamambo weIsiraeri akapindura, akati, “Erisha mwanakomana waShafati ari pano, iye wakadeya kusururidza mvura pamaoko aEriya.”" 
2Kings3:12 Jehoshafati akati, “Shoko raJehovha riri kwaari.” Zvino mambo weIsiraeri, naJehoshafati, namambo waEdhomu vakaenda kwaari." 
2Kings3:13 Erisha akati kuna mambo weIsiraeri, “Ndineiko nemi? Endai kuvaporofita vababa venyu nokuvaporofita vamai venyu.” Mambo weIsiraeri akati kwaari, “Kwete, nokuti Jehovha ndiye wakadana madzimambo awa matatu, kuti avaise mumaoko avaMoabhu.”" 
2Kings3:14 Erisha akati, “NaJehovha wehondo mupenyu, iye wandimire pamberi pake, zvirokwazvo dai ndisaiva nehanya naJehoshafati mambo waJudha ari pano, handizaitarira kwamuri, kana kukuonai imi." 
2Kings3:15 Asi zvino uyai kwandiri nomuridzi wembira.” Zvino muridzi wembira wakati achiridza, ruoko rwaJehovha rukauya pamusoro pake."
