2Kings3:16 Akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Cherai makoronga mazhinji pamupata uyu.’" 
2Kings3:17 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Hamungawoni mhepo, hamungawoni mvura; kunyangwe zvakadaro mupata uyu uchazadzwa nemvura; imi muchanwa, imi nezvipfuwo zvenyu, nezvinotakura nhumbi dzenyu.’" 
2Kings3:18 Chinhu ichi chiduku hacho pamberi paJehovha; asi iye uchaisawo vaMoabhu mumaoko enyu. 
2Kings3:19 Muchaparadza guta rimwe nerimwe rakasimbiswa, neguta rimwe nerimwe rakatsaurwa, muchatema muti mumwe nomumwe wakanaka, nokudzivira matsime ose emvura, nokushatsa namabwe munda mumwe nomumwe wakanaka.”" 
2Kings3:20 Zvino fume mangwana, nenguva yokubayira chipo, mvura ikaonekwa ichibva nenzira yaEdhomu, nyika ikazadzwa nemvura." 
2Kings3:21 Zvino vaMoabhu vose vakati vachinzwa kuti madzimambo akanga asvika kuzorwa navo, vakaungana, vose vakanga vachigona kupfeka nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo, navakavapfuura pamakore, vakandomira pamuganhu." 
2Kings3:22 Vakamuka mangwanani, vakaona zuva richipenya pamvura, vaMoabhu vakaona mvura vari kure yakatsvuka seropa." 
2Kings3:23 Vakati, “Iropa; zvirokwazvo madzimambo aparadzwa, vaurayana; naizvozvo zvino, vaMoabhu, endai mundopamba.”" 
2Kings3:24 Zvino vakati vachisvika pamisasa yaVaIsiraeri, VaIsiraeri vakasimuka, vakaparadza vaMoabhu, vakatiza pamberi pavo; vakapinda munyika yavo vachiparadza vaMoabhu." 
2Kings3:25 Vakaputsa maguta, mumwe nomumwe akakanda ibwe rake pamunda mumwe nomumwe wakanaka, ikazara; vakadzivira matsime ose emvura, vakatema miti yose yakanaka, kusvikira vasiya mabwe oga paKirihareseti; vaposheri vamabwe vakarikomba, vakariparadza." 
2Kings3:26 Zvino mambo waMoabhu wakati achiona kuti wakundwa pakurwa, akatora varume vana mazana manomwe vaigona kurwa nomunondo, akaidza kupasanura kuna mambo waEdhomu; asi vakanga vasingagoni." 
2Kings3:27 Ipapo akatora mwanakomana wake wedangwe, waifanira kumutevera paushe, akamubayira chive chipiriso chinopiswa pamusoro porusvingo. Ipapo VaIsiraeri vakatsamwa kwazvo, vakabva kwaari, vakadzokera kunyika yavo." 
2Kings4:1 Zvino mumwe mukadzi wavakadzi vavanakomana vavaporofita wakachema kuna Erisha, akati, “Muranda wenyu, murume wangu, wafa; munoziva kuti muranda wenyu wakanga achitya Jehovha; zvino uyo, waakanga atora chikwereti kwaari, wauya kuzotora vana vangu vaviri kuzova varanda vake.”" 
2Kings4:2 Erisha akati kwaari, “Ndingakubatsira seiko? Ndiudze. Uneiko mumba mako?” Iye akati, “Murandakadzi wenyu haane chinhu mumba, asi hari ina mafuta.”" 
2Kings4:3 Ipapo akati, “Enda undokwereta kuna vose vaugere navo midziyo isina chiro; usakwereta mishoma." 
2Kings4:4 “Zvino upinde, iwe navana vako, upfige mukova, udire mumidziyo iyo yose, uchigadzika yose yazara kurutivi.”" 
2Kings4:5 Naizvozvo akabva kwaari, akapfiga mukova, iye navana vake vari mukati; ivo vakamusvitsa midziyo, akadira." 
2Kings4:6 Midziyo yakati yazara, akati kumwanakomana wake, “Ndipezve mumwe mudziyo.” Iye akati kwaari, “Hapachina mumwe mudziyo; mafuta akagumawo.”" 
2Kings4:7 Ipapo akandoudza munhu waMwari, iye akati, “Chienda undotengesa mafuta, uripe chikwereti chako, urarame nezvakasara, iwe navanakomana vako.”" 
2Kings4:8 Zvino mumwe musi Erisha akapfuura napaShunemi, pakanga pagere mukadzi wakakurumbira, iye akamugombedzera kudya zvokudya. Zvino nguva dzose kana achipfuura napo, waitsaukirako kuzodya zvokudya." 
2Kings4:9 Akati kumurume wake, “Tarirai zvino, ndinoona kuti uyu murume, unosipfuura nokwatiri, munhu mutsvene waMwari." 
2Kings4:10 Ngativake kamuri duku pamusoro porusvingo, timuisiremo mubhedha, netafura, nechigaro, nechigadziko chomwenje; zvino kana achinge achiuya kwatiri, agotsaukiramo.”" 
2Kings4:11 Zvino mumwe musi akasvikapo, akatsaukira kukamuri iyo duku, akandovatamo." 
2Kings4:12 Akati kuna Gehazi muranda wake, “Dana mukadzi uyu muShunemi.” Wakati amudana, iye akamira pamberi pake." 
2Kings4:13 Akati kwaari, “Chitaura kwaari zvino, uti ‘Tarirai, makatichengeta zvikuru kwazvo, zvino tingakuitireiwo? Munoda kuti tikureverei kuna mambo, kana kumukuru wehondo here?’ ” Iye akapindura, akati, “Ndigere hangu zvakanaka pakati pavanhu vangu.”" 
2Kings4:14 Akati, “Zvino tingamuitireiko?” Gehazi akapindura, akati, “Zvirokwazvo haana mwanakomana, nomurume wake wakwegura.”" 
2Kings4:15 Iye akati, “Mudane.” Wakati amudana, iye akamira pamukova." 
2Kings4:16 Akati, “Nenguva ino kana gore rapera, uchafungatira mwana.” Iye akati, “Kwete, ishe wangu, munhu waMwari, regai kureva nhema kumurandakadzi wenyu.”" 
2Kings4:17 Mukadzi akava nemimba, akapona mwanakomana nenguva iyo pakupera kwegore, sezvakanga zvataura Erisha kwaari." 
2Kings4:18 Zvino mwana wakati akura, akaenda mumwe musi kuna baba vake kuvakohwi." 
2Kings4:19 Akati kuna baba vake, “Musoro wangu, musoro wangu!” Ivo vakati kumuranda, “Mubereke uende naye kuna mai vake.”" 
2Kings4:20 Iye akamutora, akamuisa kuna mai vake, akagara pamabvi avo kusvikira masikati makuru, akafa." 
2Kings4:21 Ivo vakakwira, vakandomuradzika pamubhedha womunhu waMwari, vakamupfigiramo, vakabuda." 
2Kings4:22 Akadana murume wake, akati, “Nditumirewo mumwe muranda nembongoro imwe, ndimhanyire kumunhu waMwari, ndigodzokazve.”" 
2Kings4:23 Iye akati, “Unoda kuendereiko kwaari nhasi? Hakuzi kugara kwomwedzi, kana Sabata.” Iye akati, “Hazvine mhosva.”" 
2Kings4:24 Zvino akaisa chityaro pambongoro, akati kumuranda wake, “Uifambise, ipfuurire mberi; rega kundinonotsa pakufamba, asi kana ndikakuudza.”" 
2Kings4:25 Naizvozvo akaenda, akasvika kumunhu waMwari pagomo reKarimeri. Munhu waMwari wakati achimuona achiri kure, akati kuna Gehazi muranda wake, “Tarira hoyo mukadzi muShunemi." 
2Kings4:26 Mhanya hako zvino undosangana naye, uti kwaari, ‘Makafara here? Murume wenyu wakafara here? Nomwana wakafara here?’ ” Iye akapindura, akati, “Haiwa, takafara hedu!”" 
2Kings4:27 Zvino wakati asvika kumunhu waMwari pagomo, akabata tsoka dzake. Gehazi akaswedera achida kumusundira kure; asi munhu waMwari akati, “Murege hake, nokuti mweya wake une shungu mukati make. Asi Jehovha akandivanzira izvozvo, haana kundiudza.”" 
2Kings4:28 Ipapo iye akati, “Ko ndakakumbira mwanakomana kuna ishe wangu here? Ko handina kuti, regai kundinyengedzera here?”" 
2Kings4:29 Ipapo akati kuna Gehazi, “Chizvisunga chiuno, uende; kana ukasangana nomunhu, rega kumukwazisa; kana mumwe akakukwazisa, usamudavira; ugondoisa tsvimbo yangu pamusoro pechiso chomwana.”" 
2Kings4:30 Zvino mai vomwana vakati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, uye nomweya wenyu mupenyu, handingakusiyiyi.” Akasimuka, akamutevera." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi akavatungamirira, akandoisa tsvimbo pachiso chomwana, asi kwakanga kusino kutaura kana kunzwa. Naizvozvo akadzoka kuzosangana naye, akati kwaari, “Mwana haana kupepuka.”" 
2Kings4:32 Erisha wakati apinda mumba akawana mwana akafa, akaradzikwa pamubhedha wake." 
2Kings4:33 Naizvozvo akapinda, akapfiga mukova, iye ari mukati nomwana, ivo vaviri, akanyengetera kuna Jehovha." 
2Kings4:34 Akakwira, akatsivama pamusoro pomwana, akaisa muromo wake pamuromo wake, nameso ake pameso ake, namaoko ake pamaoko ake; akatsivama pamusoro pake, nyama yomwana ikadziya." 
2Kings4:35 Zvino akadzoka, akafamba–famba mumba kamwe, akakwirazve, akatsivama pamusoro pake; mwana akahotsira kanomwe, mwana ndokusvinudza meso ake." 
2Kings4:36 Ipapo akadana Gehazi, akati, “Dana mukadzi muShunemi.” Akamudana. Iye wakati apinda kwaari, Erisha akati, “Simudza mwanakomana wako.”" 
2Kings4:37 Zvino iye akapinda, akazviwisira patsoka dzake, akakotamira pasi; akasimudza mwanakomana wake, akabuda." 
2Kings4:38 Zvino Erisha akaendazve Girigari; nzara yakanga iripo panyika; vanakomana vavaporofita vakanga vagere pamberi pake, akati kumuranda wake, “Gadza hari huru, ubikire vanakomana vavaporofita zvokudya.”" 
2Kings4:39 Zvino mumwe akaenda kusango kundotanha miriwo, akawana muti unotanda, akatanhapo magaka, akazadza nguo yake nawo, akasvika akaachekera muhari yezvokudya, nokuti vakanga vasingaazivi." 
2Kings4:40 Zvino vakapakurira vanhu kuti vadye. Ivo vakati vodya zvokudya, vakadanidzira, vakati, “Munhu waMwari, rufu ruri muhari.” Vakasagona kuzvidya." 
2Kings4:41 Asi iye akati, “Uyai noupfu.” Akahudira muhari, akati, “Chipakurai henyu, vanhu vadye.” Zvino kwakanga kusine chinhu chakaipa muhari." 
2Kings4:42 Zvino mumwe murume wakasvika, achibva Bhaarisharisha, akavigira munhu waMwari zvokudya zvezvitsva, zvingwa zvebhari zvina makumi maviri, nehura itsva dzezviyo muhomwe yake. Akati, “Ipai vanhu, vadye.”" 
2Kings4:43 Muranda wake akati, “Ndingaisa izvi pamberi pavanhu vane zana seiko?” Asi iye akati, “Ipai vanhu, vadye, nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Vachadya, vakasiya zvimwe.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Naizvozvo akazviisa pamberi pavo, vakadya, vakasiya zvimwe, sezvakataura shoko raJehovha." 
2Kings5:1 Zvino Naamani, mukuru wehondo dzamambo weSiria, waiva munhu mukuru kuna tenzi wake, nomunhu waikudzwa; nokuti Jehovha wakanga akundisa VaSiria naye; uye waiva munhu wesimba noumhare, asi wakanga ana maperembudzi." 
2Kings5:2 Zvino VaSiria vakanga vandorwa vakaita mapoka–poka, vakadzoka nomusikana muduku wavakanga vatapa panyika yeIsiraeri; iye wakanga achibatira mukadzi waNaamani basa." 
2Kings5:3 Akati kuna tenzikadzi wake, “Dai ishe wangu aiva kumuporofita ari paSamaria, ungadai akavaporesa maperembudzi ake.”" 
2Kings5:4 Zvino mumwe akapinda, akandoudza ishe wake, akati, “Musikana wenyika yeIsiraeri wakataura chokuti nechokuti.”" 
2Kings5:5 Mambo weSiria akati, “Enda, ndinoda kutuma tsamba kuna mambo weIsiraeri.” Akabva akaenda namatarenda ane gumi esirivha, namashekeri ane zviuru zvitanhatu zvendarama, nenguo dzakanaka dzine gumi." 
2Kings5:6 Akaenda netsamba kuna mambo weIsiraeri, yakanga ichiti, “Zvino kana tsamba iyi ichisvika kwamuri, muzive kuti ndatuma Naamani muranda wangu kwamuri, kuti mumuporese maperembudzi ake.”" 
2Kings5:7 Zvino mambo weIsiraeri wakati arava tsamba iyo, akabvarura nguo dzake, akati, “Asi ndini Mwari kanhi? Ndinoziva kuuraya nokuraramisa kanhi, munhu uyu zvaatuma shoko kwandiri, kuti ndiporese munhu maperembudzi ake? Asi fungai, muwone, kuti unotsvaka kurwa neni.”" 
2Kings5:8 Zvino Erisha munhu waMwari, wakati achinzwa kuti mambo weIsiraeri wabvarura nguo dzake, akatuma shoko kuna mambo, akati, “Mabvarurireiko nguo dzenyu? Ngaauye hake zvino kwandiri, azive kuti muporofita aripo pakati paIsiraeri.”" 
2Kings5:9 Naizvozvo Naamani akaenda namabhiza ake nengoro dzake, akandomira pamukova weimba yaErisha." 
2Kings5:10 Erisha akatuma nhume kwaari, akati, “Enda, undoshamba kanomwe muna Jodhani, nyama yako idzokerezve kwauri, uve wakanaka.”" 
2Kings5:11 Asi Naamani wakatsamwa, akabva, akati, “Tarirai, ndanga ndichiti, zvirokwazvo uchabuda kwandiri, akamira, akadana zita raJehovha Mwari wake, nokupuruzirapo noruoko rwake, agoporesa maperembudzi." 
2Kings5:12 Ko Abana neFaripari, idzo nzizi dzeDhamasikosi, hadzina kunaka kukunda mvura yose iri pakati peIsiraeri here? Handingashambi madziri, ndikava wakanaka here?” Naizvozvo akaenda, akabva atsamwa kwazvo." 
2Kings5:13 Zvino varanda vake vakaswedera, vakataura naye, vakati, “Nhai, baba vedu, dai muporofita akakurairai kuita chinhu chikuru, hamuchizviita here? Ndoda zvaakati kwamuri, ‘Shamba, uve wakanaka?’ ”" 
2Kings5:14 Ipapo akaburuka, akandonyura muna Jodhani kanomwe, sezvakanga zvataura munhu waMwari; nyama yake ikadzoka, ikafanana nenyama yomwana muduku, akava wakanaka." 
2Kings5:15 Zvino akadzokera kumunhu waMwari, iye neboka rake rose, akasvika, akamira pamberi pake, akati, “Tarirai, zvino ndoziva kuti hapana Mwari pasi pose, asi pakati peIsiraeri; naizvozvo zvino, gamuchirai henyu chipo kumuranda wenyu.”" 
2Kings5:16 Asi iye akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, iye wandimire pamberi pake, handingagamuchiri chinhu.” Akamugombedzera, kuti agamuchire, asi wakaramba." 
2Kings5:17 Zvino Naamani akati, “Kana musingadi henyu, muranda wenyu ngaapiwe hake mitoro yevhu ingatakurwa namahesera maviri; nokuti kubva zvino muranda wenyu haangabayiri vamwe vamwari chipiriso chinopiswa kana chimwe chibayiro asi Jehovha oga." 
2Kings5:18 Asi Jehovha ngaakanganwire hake muranda wake pachinhu ichi, kana tenzi wangu achipinda mumba maRimoni kuzonamatapo, akasendamira paruoko rwangu, ini ndikapfugama mumba maRimoni; kana ndikapfugama mumba maRimoni Jehovha ngaakaganwire muranda wake pachinhu ichi.”" 
2Kings5:19 Akati kwaari, “Enda hako nomufaro.” Naizvozvo akabva kwaari, akafamba chinhambo chiduku." 
2Kings5:20 Asi Gehazi muranda waErisha, munhu waMwari, akati, “Tarirai, tenzi wangu wakarega Naamani uyu muSiria, zvaasina kugamuchira kwaari chaakanga auya nacho; asi naJehovha mupenyu, ndichamhanya, ndikamutevera, nditore chinhu kwaari.”" 
2Kings5:21 Naizvozvo Gehazi akatevera Naamani. Zvino Naamani wakati achiona munhu achimhanya achimutevera, akaburuka pangoro kuti asangane naye, akati, “Makafara henyu mose here?”" 
2Kings5:22 Iye akati, “Takafara hedu tose. Tenzi wangu wakandituma, achiti, ‘Tarirai, zvino–zvino majaya maviri, vanakomana vavaporofita, vakasvika kwandiri, vachibva kunyika yamakomo yaEfuremu; dondipaiwo tarenda rimwe resirivha, nenguo mbiri dzakanaka.’ ”" 
2Kings5:23 Naamani akati, “Ndinokumbira kuti utore hako matarenda maviri.” Akamugombedzera, akasungira matarenda maviri esirivha muhomwe mbiri, pamwechete nenguo mbiri dzakanaka, akazvitakudza varanda vake vaviri, vakazvitakurira pamberi pake." 
2Kings5:24 Zvino wakati asvika pachikomo, akazvitora pamaoko avo, akazviviga mumba, akadzosa vanhu, vakaenda havo." 
2Kings5:25 Ipapo akapinda, akamira pamberi patenzi wake. Erisha akati kwaari, “Wabvepiko, Gehazi?” Iye akati, “Muranda wenyu wakanga achingova pano hake.”" 
2Kings5:26 Iye akati kwaari, “Mwoyo wangu hauna kuenda newe here nguva iya murume achidzoka pangoro kuzosangana newe? Ko ndiyo nguva yokugamuchira mari, nokugamuchira nguo, neminda yemiorivhi, neminda yemizambiringa, namakwai nenzombe, navaranda navarandakadzi here." 
2Kings5:27 Naizvozvo maperembudzi aNaamani achakunamatira iwe navana vako nokusingaperi.” Ipapo akabuda pamberi pake ava namaperembudzi, akati mbembe sechando." 
2Kings6:1 Zvino vanakomana vavaporofita vakati kuna Erisha, “Tarirai zvino, apa patigere pamberi penyu pakamanikana, hapatiringani." 
2Kings6:2 Titenderei henyu tiende kwaJodhani, mumwe nomumwe atore dandapo, tizvivakirepo patingagara.” Iye akapindura, akati, “Endai henyu.”" 
2Kings6:3 Zvino mumwe akati, “Tinokumbira kuti imi mutende kuendawo navaranda venyu.” Akapindura akati, “Ndichaenda.”" 
2Kings6:4 Naizvozvo akaenda navo. Vakati vasvika kwaJodhani, vakatema matanda." 
2Kings6:5 Asi mumwe wakati achitema danda, demo ndokuwira mumvura; akadanidzira, achiti, “Haiwa! Tenzi wangu! Nokuti rakanga rakumbirwa.”" 
2Kings6:6 Munhu waMwari akati, “Yawirepiko?” Akamuratidza payakanga yawira. Erisha akatema rutanda, akarukandirako, akapapamadza demo." 
2Kings6:7 Akati, “Chiritora hako.” Iye akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akaritora." 
2Kings6:8 Zvino mambo weSiria wakarwa naVaIsiraeri; akarangana navaranda vake, akati, “Matende angu anofanira kudzikwa pokuti nopokuti.”" 
2Kings6:9 Zvino munhu waMwari ndokutuma shoko kuna mambo weIsiraeri, akati, “Chenjerai, murege kupfuura nopokuti, nokuti VaSiria voburukira ipapo.”" 
2Kings6:10 Ipapo mambo weIsiraeri akatuma vanhu ikoko kwaakaudzwa nokunyeverwa nomunhu waMwari, akazvingwarirapo asingadaro kamwe nakaviri bedzi." 
2Kings6:11 Naizvozvo mwoyo wamambo weSiria wakakanganisika kwazvo pamusoro pechinhu ichi; akadana varanda vake, akati kwavari, “Hamungandiratidzi here, kuti ndianiko pakati patiri unonzwana namambo weIsiraeri?”" 
2Kings6:12 Mumwe wavaranda vake akati, “Kwete, ishe wangu mambo, asi Erisha muporofita, ari pakati peIsiraeri, ndiye unoudza mambo weIsiraeri mashoko amunotaura muimba yenyu yomukati.”" 
2Kings6:13 Akati, “Endai mundotarira kwaari, nditume vanhu kuzomutora.” Akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Uri paDhotani.”" 
2Kings6:14 Naizvozvo akatumirako mabhiza, nengoro, nehondo huru; vakafamba usiku, vakakomba guta." 
2Kings6:15 Zvino muranda womunhu waMwari wakati amuka mangwanani, akabuda, ndokuona hondo namabhiza nengoro zvakakomba guta. Muranda wake akati kwaari, “Haiwa! Tenzi wangu, tichadiniko?”" 
2Kings6:16 Iye akapindura, akati, “Usatya hako, nokuti vari kwatiri vanopfuura vari kwavari pakuwanda.”" 
2Kings6:17 Zvino Erisha akanyengetera, akati, “Jehovha, svinudzai henyu meso ake, awone.” Ipapo Jehovha akasvinudza meso ejaya, akaona gomo rizere namabhiza, nengoro dzomoto zvakanga zvakakomba Erisha." 
2Kings6:18 Zvino vakati vachiburukira kwaari, Erisha akanyengetera kuna Jehovha, akati, “Dorovai vanhu ava noupofu.” Jehovha akavarova noupofu, sezvakanga zvarehwa naErisha." 
2Kings6:19 Erisha akati kwavari, “Haizi iyo nzira, uye guta iri harizi iro; nditeverei ini, ndikuisei kumunhu wamunotsvaka.” Akaenda navo Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Vakati vasvika Samaria, Erisha akati, “Jehovha, svinudzai meso avanhu ava, vawone.” Jehovha akasvinudza meso avo, vakaona kuti vava mukati meSamaria." 
2Kings6:21 Zvino mambo weIsiraeri wakati achivaona, akati kuna Erisha, “Baba vangu, ndovauraya here? Ndovauraya here?”" 
2Kings6:22 Iye akapindura, akati, “Usavauraya; ko ungavauraya vawakatapa nomunondo wako nouta hwako here? Gadzika chingwa nemvura pamberi pavo, vadye, vanwe, vaende kuna tenzi wavo.”" 
2Kings6:23 Iye akavagadzirira zvokudya zvizhinji; zvino vakati vadya nokunwa, akavaendisa, vakadzokera kuna tenzi wavo. Zvino hondo dzavaSiria hadzina kuzopindazve munyika yeIsiraeri." 
2Kings6:24 Shure kwaizvozvo, Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria akaunganidza hondo yake yose, akandokomba Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Nzara huru ikavapo paSamaria; nokuti vakarikomba kusvikira musoro wembongoro uchitengeswa namashekeri esirivha ana makumi masere, nechitswanda chiduku chamatoto enjiva chichitengeswa namashekeri esirivha mashanu." 
2Kings6:26 Zvino mambo weIsiraeri wakati achipfuura napamusoro porusvingo, mumwe mukadzi akadanidzira kwaari, akati, “Ndibatsireiwo ishe wangu mambo!”" 
2Kings6:27 Iye akati, “Kana Jehovha asingakubatsiri, ini ndingakubatsira neiko? Nezvinobva paburiro kana pachisviniro chewaini kanhi?”" 
2Kings6:28 Mambo akati kwaari, “Chiiko chinokunetsa?” Akapindura, akati, “Mukadzi uyu wakati kwandiri, ‘Uya nomwanakomana wako, timudye nhasi, mangwana tigodya mwanakomana wangu.’" 
2Kings6:29 Naizvozvo takabika mwanakomana wangu, tikamudya; fume mangwana ndikati kwaari, ‘Uya nomwanakomana wako, timudye, iye ndokuvanza mwanakomana wake.’ ”" 
2Kings6:30 Ipapo mambo wakati achinzwa mashoko omukadzi, akabvarura nguo dzake; (zvino wakanga achifamba naparusvingo;) vanhu vakatarira, vakaona kuti wakafuka magumbu mukati pamuviri wake." 
2Kings6:31 Ipapo akati, “Mwari ngaandirove, arambe achidaro, kana musoro waErisha mwanakomana waShafati ukaramba uri pamusoro pake nhasi.”" 
2Kings6:32 Asi Erisha wakanga agere mumba make, vakuru vagerewo naye; mambo akatuma munhu kuzomutungamirira; asi nhume ichigere kusvika kwaari, akati kuvakuru, “Munoona here kuti mwana uyu womuurayi watuma munhu kuzobvisa musoro wangu? Tarirai, kana nhume ichisvika, mupfige mukova, mumutsigirire mukova; kutsika kwetsoka dzatenzi wake hakunzwiki shure kwake here?”" 
2Kings6:33 Zvino wakati achitaurirana navo, nhume ikaburukira kwaari; iye akati, “Tarirai, chakaipa ichi chinobva kuna Jehovha; ndichamirireiko Jehovha?”" 
2Kings7:1 Erisha akati, “Inzwai shoko raJehovha, Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Mangwana nenguva ino, chiyero chimwe choupfu hwakatsetseka chichatengeswa neshekeri rimwe, nezviyero zviviri zvebhari neshekeri rimwe pasuwo reSamaria.’ ”" 
2Kings7:2 Zvino mukuru uyo, mambo waakanga akasendama paruoko rwake, akapindura munhu waMwari, akati, “Tarirai, kunyangwe Jehovha akaita mahwindo kudenga, chinhu ichi chingaitika here?” Erisha akati, “Tarira, uchazviona nameso ako, asi haungazvidyi.”" 
2Kings7:3 Zvino kwakanga kuna varume vana vaiva namaperembudzi kunze kwesuwo; ivo vakataurirana, vakati, “Tinogarireiko pano kusvikira tafa?" 
2Kings7:4 Kana tikati, ‘Tichapinda muguta, nzara huru iri muguta, tichandofiramo; kana tikagara pano, tichafawo. Naizvozvo zvino hendei tiende hedu kuhondo dzaVaSiria; kana vakatirega tiri vapenyu, tararama hedu; kana vakatiuraya, tafa hedu.’ ”" 
2Kings7:5 Ipapo vakasimuka mambakwedza, vakaenda kumisasa yaVaSiria; vakati vasvika kumisasa yokumudzivo yavaSamaria, vakawana kusino munhu." 
2Kings7:6 Nokuti Jehovha akanga anzwisa hondo yaVaSiria kutinhira kwengoro, nokutinhira kwamabhiza, kuri kutinhira kwehondo huru; vakataurirana, vakati, “Tarirai, mambo weIsiraeri wakakoka madzimambo avaHiti namadzimambo aVaIjipiti kuzorwa nesu.”" 
2Kings7:7 Naizvozvo vakamuka mambakwedza, vakasiya matende avo, namabhiza avo, namahesera avo, musasa wose wakangodaro, vakatiza kuti vararame." 
2Kings7:8 Zvino vaya vaiva namaperembudzi vakati vachisvika kumisasa yokumidzivo, vakapinda patende rimwe, vakadya nokunwa, vakatoramo sirivha nendarama nenguo, vakandozviviga; vakadzokazve, vakapinda mune rimwe tende, vakatora zvakanga zvirimowo, vakandozviviga." 
2Kings7:9 Ipapo vakataurirana, vakati, “Hatiiti zvakanaka; nhasi izuva reshoko rakanaka, asi isu tinongonyarara hedu; kana tikanonoka kusvikira kwaedza, tichavingwa nokurohwa; naizvozvo hendei zvino, tindoudza imba yamambo.”" 
2Kings7:10 Naizvozvo vakaenda vakadanidzira kuvatariri vesuwo reguta, vakavaudza, vakati kwaari, “Takasvika kumisasa yaVaSiria, tikawana kusisina munhupo, kunyangwe izwi romunhu, asi mabhiza akasungirwa, namahesera akasungirwa, namatende akangodaro.”" 
2Kings7:11 Ipapo vatariri vesuwo vakadanidzira, vakaudza vomumba mamambo mukati." 
2Kings7:12 Mambo akamuka pakati pousiku, akati kuvaranda vake, “Ndichakuudzai zvataitirwa naVaSiria. Vanoziva kuti tine nzara; naizvozvo vakabuda pamisasa vakandovanda kusango, vachiti, ‘Kana vakabuda muguta, tichavabata vari vapenyu, isu tigopinda muguta.’ ”" 
2Kings7:13 Ipapo mumwe muranda wake akapindura, akati, “Vamwe ngavatore mabhiza mashanu kuna akasara, akasiyiwa muguta, (tarirai, vakafanana navamwe VaIsiraeri vazhinji vakasara imomo; tarirai vakafananawo navamwe VaIsiraeri vazhinji vatoparadzwa havo;) tivatume, tione.”" 
2Kings7:14 Naizvozvo vakatora ngoro mbiri namabhiza adzo, mambo akatuma vanhu kuzotevera hondo yaVaSiria, akati, “Endai, mundoona.”" 
2Kings7:15 Ivo vakaenda, vakavatevera kusvikira kwaJodhani, vakawana nzira yose izere nenguo, nenhumbi, dzakanga dzarashwa naVaSiria nokumhanya kwavo. Nhume dzikadzoka, dzikaudza mambo." 
2Kings7:16 Ipapo vanhu vakabuda, vakapamba misasa yaVaSiria. Naizvozvo chiyero choupfu hwakatsetseka chakatengeswa neshekeri rimwe, nezviyero zviviri zvebhari neshekeri rimwe, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
2Kings7:17 Mambo akagadza mukuru uya, waakanga akasendama paruoko rwake, kuti arindire suwo; vanhu vakamutsikirira musuwo, akafa sezvakanga zvarehwa nomunhu waMwari, wakataura shoko iro musi wakaburukira mambo kwaari." 
2Kings7:18 Zvikaitika sezvakanga zvataurwa nomunhu waMwari kuna mambo, zvaakati, “Mangwana nenguva ino zviyero zviviri zvebhari zvichatengeswa neshekeri, nechiyero chimwe choupfu hwakatsetseka neshekeri pasuwo reSamaria;" 
2Kings7:19 mukuru uyo akapindura munhu waMwari, akati, ‘Zvino tarira, kunyangwe Jehovha akaita mahwindo kudenga, chinhu ichi chakadai chingaitwa here?’ Iye akati ‘Tarira, uchazviona nameso ako, asi haungazvidyi.’" 
2Kings7:20 Ndizvo zvaakazoitirwa; nokuti vanhu vakamutsikirira musuwo, akafa.”" 
2Kings8:1 Zvino Erisha wakataura nomukadzi uya waakanga amutsira mwanakomana wake, akati, “Simuka uende, iwe neimba yako, undogara kwaunogona kugara hako; nokuti Jehovha akaraira nzara; ichava panyika makore manomwe.”" 
2Kings8:2 Zvino mukadzi akasimuka, akaita sezvaakaudzwa nomunhu waMwari, akaenda neveimba yake, akandogara panyika yavaFirisitia makore manomwe." 
2Kings8:3 Zvino makore iwayo akati apera, mukadzi ndokudzoka kunyika yavaFirisitia; akaenda kuna mambo kundochema pamusoro peimba yake nomunda wake." 
2Kings8:4 Zvino mambo wakanga achitaurirana naGehazi muranda womunhu waMwari, mambo akati, “Dondirondedzerawo zvinhu zvose zvikuru, zvakaitwa naErisha.”" 
2Kings8:5 Zvino wakati achaudza mambo kuti wakamutsa wakafa, iye mukadzi wakanga amutsirwa mwanakomana wake, akachema kuna mambo pamusoro peimba yake nomunda wake. Ipapo Gehazi akati, “Ishe wangu mambo, ndiyeyu mukadzi, noyuyu ndiye mwanakomana wake, wakamutswa naErisha.”" 
2Kings8:6 Mambo wakati abvunza mukadzi, iye akamuudza. Naizvozvo mambo wakaraira mumwe mukuru pamusoro pake, akati, “Mudzosere zvose zvaiva zvake, nemichero yomunda, kubva pazuva raakabva naro panyika kusvikira zvino.”" 
2Kings8:7 Zvino Erisha wakasvika Dhamasikosi; Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria wakanga achirwara, akaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Munhu waMwari wasvika pano.”" 
2Kings8:8 Ipapo mambo akati kuna Hazaeri, “Tora chipo muruoko rwako, undosangana nomunhu waMwari, ubvunze Jehovha naye, uti, ‘Ndichapora pakurwara uku here?’ ”" 
2Kings8:9 Naizvozvo Hazaeri akandosangana naye, akaenda nechipo chezvose zvakanga zvakanaka paDhamasikosi, mutoro wakaringana makamera ana makumi mana, akasvika akamira pamberi pake, akati, “Mwanakomana wenyu Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria, wakandituma kwamuri, achiti, ‘Ndichapora here pakurwara uku?’ ”" 
2Kings8:10 Erisha akati kwaari, “Enda, undoti kwaari, ‘Zvirokwazvo haangapori; asi Jehovha akandiratidza kuti zvirokwazvo iye uchafa.’ ”" 
2Kings8:11 Akaramba akamunanganidza kusvikira anyara; munhu waMwari akachema. 
2Kings8:12 Ipapo Hazaeri akati, “Munochemeiko, ishe wangu?” Akapindura, akati, “Nokuti ndinoziva zvakaipa zvauchaitira vana veIsiraeri; uchapisa nhare dzavo, uchauraya majaya avo nomunondo, uchapwanya pwere dzavo, uchatumbura vakadzi vavo vane mimba.”" 
2Kings8:13 Hazaeri akati, “Ko muranda wenyu chiiko, iyo imbwa hayo, kuti ndiite chinhu ichi chikuru chakadai?” Erisha akapindura, akati, “Jehovha wakandizivisa, kuti iwe uchava mambo weSiria.”" 
2Kings8:14 Ipapo akabva kuna Erisha, akaenda kuna tenzi wake; iye akati kwaari, “Erisha wati kudiniko kwauri?” Akapindura, akati, “Wakandiudza kuti zvirokwazvo muchapora henyu.”" 
2Kings8:15 Zvino fume mangwana akatora jira, akarinyika mumvura, ndokumufumbira chiso, naizvozvo akafa; Hazaeri akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings8:16 Zvino negore rechishanu raJoramu mwanakomana waAhabhi, mambo weIsiraeri, Jehoshafati ari mambo waJudha, Jehoramu mwanakomana waJehoshafati mambo waJudha, akatanga kubata ushe." 
2Kings8:17 Iye akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore makumi matatu namaviri; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore masere. 
2Kings8:18 Akafamba nenzira yamadzimambo aIsiraeri, sezvakaita imba yaAhabhi; nokuti mukunda waAhabhi waiva mukadzi wake; akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha." 
2Kings8:19 Kunyangwe zvakadaro Jehovha akanga asingadi kuparadza Judha, nokuda kwaDhavhidhi muranda wake, nokuti wakanga amupikira, kuti uchamupa mwenje wavana vake nguva dzose." 
2Kings8:20 Zvino namazuva ake vaEdhomu vakamukira vaJudha, vakazvigadzira mambo." 
2Kings8:21 Ipapo Joramu akaenda Zairi, ane ngoro dzake dzose; akamuka usiku, akaparadza vaEdhomu vakanga vakamukomba navakuru vengoro; vanhu vakatizira kumatende avo." 
2Kings8:22 Naizvozvo vaEdhomu vakamukira vaJudha, kusvikira zuva ranhasi. Ipapo Ribhina akavamukirawo nenguva iyo." 
2Kings8:23 Mamwe mabasa aJoramu, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings8:24 Joramu akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa kuna madzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi; Ahazia mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings8:25 Negore regumi namaviri raJoramu mwanakomana waAhabhi mambo waIsiraeri, Ahazia mwanakomana waJehoramu mambo waJudha, akatanga kubata ushe." 
2Kings8:26 Ahazia wakanga ana makore ana makumi maviri namaviri pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu gore rimwe. Zita ramai vake rakanga riri Ataria, mukunda waOmiri mambo weIsiraeri." 
2Kings8:27 Iye wakafamba nenzira yeimba yaAhabhi, akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakaitwa neimba yaAhabhi; nokuti wakanga ari mukuwasha weimba yaAhabhi." 
2Kings8:28 Akaenda naJoramu mwanakomana waAhabhi kundorwa naHazaeri mambo weSiria paRamoti-gireyadhi; VaSiria vakakuvadza Joramu. 
2Kings8:29 Mambo Joramu akadzokera Jezereri kuti arapwe mavanga ake aakatemwa naVaSiria paRama, nguva yaakarwa naHazaeri mambo weSiria. Ipapo Ahazia mwanakomana waJehoramu mambo waJudha akaenda kundoona Joramu mwanakomana waAhabhi paJezereri, nokuti wakanga achirwara." 
2Kings9:1 Zvino muporofita Erisha wakadana mumwe wavanakomana vavaporofita, akati kwaari, “Chizvisunga chiuno chako, utore chinu ichi chamafuta muruoko rwako uende Ramoti-gireyadhi." 
2Kings9:2 Zvino kana wasvikapo, utsvakepo Jehu mwanakomana waJehoshafati mwanakomana waNimishi; upinde mumba, ugomuraira asimuke pakati pehama dzake, apinde muimba yomukati." 
2Kings9:3 Ipapo utore chinu chamafuta, ugoadira pamusoro wake, uchiti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, ndakuzodza, kuti uve mambo weIsiraeri. Ipapo uzarure mukova, utize, usanonoka.’ ”" 
2Kings9:4 Naizvozvo jaya, muranda womuporofita, rakaenda Ramoti-gireyadhi." 
2Kings9:5 Wakati asvikapo, akawana vakuru vehondo vagere pasi; akati, “Ndine shoko nemi, imi mukuru.” Jehu akati, “Kunani, kwatiri tose?” Iye akati, “Kunemi, imi mukuru.”" 
2Kings9:6 Ipapo akasimuka, akapinda mumba; akadira mafuta pamusoro wake, akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Ndakuzodza uve mambo wavanhu vaJehovha, ivo VaIsiraeri.’" 
2Kings9:7 “Uchaparadza imba yatenzi wako Ahabhi, kuti nditsive ropa ravaranda vose vaJehovha kuna Jezebheri." 
2Kings9:8 Nokuti vose veimba yaAhabhi vachaparadzwa, ndichaparadza kuna Ahabhi vana vavakomana vose, vakuru navaduku pakati peIsiraeri." 
2Kings9:9 “Ndichaita imba yaAhabhi seimba yaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, uye seimba yaBhaasha mwanakomana waAhija." 
2Kings9:10 Imbwa dzichadya Izebheri panyika yeJezereri, hakuna uchamuviga.” Ipapo akazarura mukova, ndokutiza." 
2Kings9:11 Zvino Jehu akabuda kuvaranda vashe wake, mumwe akati kwaari, “Kuno mufaro here? Benzi iri rakavingeiko kwauri?” Iye akati kwavari, “Munoziva henyu munhu uyu, nokutaura kwake.”" 
2Kings9:12 Ivo vakati, “Inhema! Tiudze.” Iye akati, “Wandiudza zvokuti nezvokuti,” akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndakakuzodza uve mambo weIsiraeri.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Ipapo vakakurumidza, mumwe nomumwe akatora nguo yake, akaiisa pasi pake pamusoro pezvikwiriso, vakaridza hwamanda, vakati, “Jehu ndimambo!”" 
2Kings9:14 Naizvozvo Jehu mwanakomana waJehoshafati, mwanakomana waNimishi, akamukira Joramu. (Zvino Joramu wakanga achidzivirira Ramoti-gireyadhi, iye naVaIsiraeri vose, nokuda kwaHazaeri mambo weSiria." 
2Kings9:15 Asi mambo Joramu wakanga adzokera Jezereri kuzorapwa mavanga ake, aakanga atemwa naVaSiria, nguva yaakarwa naHazaeri mambo weSiria). Ipapo Jehu akati, “Kana muchitenda nazvo, ngakurege kuva nomunhu unotiza muguta, kundoudza izvozvo paJezereri.”" 
2Kings9:16 Naizvozvo Jehu akafamba nengoro, akaenda Jezereri, nokuti Joramu wakanga avetepo. Zvino Ahazia mambo waJudha wakanga aendako kuzoona Joramu." 
2Kings9:17 Zvino nharirire yakanga imire pamusoro peshongwe yeJezereri, ikaona boka raJehu richiuya, ikati, “Ndinoona boka ravanhu.” Joramu akati, “Danai mutasvi webhiza, mumutume andosangana navo, ati, ‘Kunorugare here?’ ”" 
2Kings9:18 Naizvozvo mumwe akakwira bhiza, akandosangana naye, akati, “Zvanzi namambo, ‘Kuno rugare here?’ ” Jehu akati, “Uneiko norugare? Enda shure kwangu.” Ipapo nharirire yakataura, ikati, “Nhume yakasvika kwavari, asi haidzokizve.”" 
2Kings9:19 Zvino akatuma wechipiri, wakanga akatasva bhiza, iye akasvika kwaari, akati, “Zvanzi namambo, ‘Kuno rugare here?’ ” Jehu akapindura, akati, “Uneiko norugare? Enda shure kwangu.”" 
2Kings9:20 Zvino nharirire yakataura, ikati, “Wakasvika hake kwavari, asi haadzokizve; uye kufambisa kwakafanana nokufambisa kwaJehu mwanakomana waNimishi, nokuti unofambisa zvinotyisa.”" 
2Kings9:21 Ipapo Joramu akati, “Sungai ngoro!” Vakasunga ngoro yake. Ipapo Joramu mambo weIsiraeri, naAhazia mambo waJudha vakabuda kundosangana naJehu, mumwe nomumwe nengoro yake, vakamuwana pamunda waNabhoti muJezereri." 
2Kings9:22 Zvino Joramu wakati achiona Jehu, akati, “Kuno rugare here, nhai Jehu?” Iye akapindura, akati, “Rugare rwei! Kana upfeve hwamai vako Izebheri nouruoyi hwavo huchiripo huzhinji hwakadai!”" 
2Kings9:23 Ipapo Joramu akadzosa ngoro yake, akatiza, akati kuna Ahazia, “Tanyengerwa Ahazia!”" 
2Kings9:24 Ipapo Jehu akahwembura uta hwake nesimba rose, akapfura Joramu pakati pamafudzi ake, museve ndokubuda napamwoyo wake, akawira mungoro yake." 
2Kings9:25 Zvino Jehu akati kuna Bhidhikari, mukuru wake wehondo, “Musimudze, umurashire pamunda waNabhoti muJezereri; nokuti urangarire kuti Jehovha akataura izvi pamusoro pake, musi watakatasva mabhiza isu vaviri tichitevera Ahabhi baba vake." 
2Kings9:26 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvirokwazvo, ndakaona zuro ropa raNabhoti, neropa ravanakomana vake; ini ndichakutsiva pamunda,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Naizvozvo zvino, mutore umukandire pamunda, sezvakataurwa naJehovha.”" 
2Kings9:27 Asi Ahazia mambo waJudha, wakati achizviona, akatiza nenzira yakapfuura napaimba yomunda, Jehu akamutevera, akati, “Muuraye naiyewo mungoro.” Vakamubaya pajinga pegomo reGuri riri paIbhureami. Akatizira Megidho, akafirapo." 
2Kings9:28 Varanda vake vakamutakurira Jerusaremu nengoro, vakamuviga pahwiro hwake kuna madzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi." 
2Kings9:29 Ahazia akatanga kubata ushe hwaJudha pagore regumi nerimwe raJoramu mwanakomana waAhabhi. 
2Kings9:30 Zvino Jehu wakati achisvika paJezereri, Jezebheri akazvinzwa; akazodza kumeso kwake, nokushongedza musoro wake, akatarira napahwindo." 
2Kings9:31 Zvino Jehu akati achipinda napasuwo, akati, “Kuno rugare here, nhai iwe Zimiri, muurayi watenzi wako?”" 
2Kings9:32 Iye akatarira kumusoro kuhwindo, akati, “Ndianiko unonzwana neni? Ndianiko?” Ipapo varanda vaviri kana vatatu vakatarira kwaari napahwindo." 
2Kings9:33 Akati, “Musundire pasi.” Naizvozvo vakamusundira pasi, rimwe ropa rake rikachambwadzira pamadziro napamabhiza, akamutsika namakumbo ake." 
2Kings9:34 Zvino wakati apinda, akadya nokunwa, akati, “Zvino chiendai mundotarira mukadzi uyo akatukwa, mumuvige, nokuti mukunda wamambo.”" 
2Kings9:35 Vakaenda kundomuviga, asi havana kuwana chinhu, asi dehenya rake, netsoka, nezvanza zvamaoko ake." 
2Kings9:36 Naizvozvo vakadzoka vakamuudza. Iye akati, “Ndiro shoko raJehovha, raakataura nomuranda wake Eriya muTishibhi, zvaakati, ‘Imbwa dzichadya nyama yaJezebheri panyika yeJezereri;" 
2Kings9:37 uye chitunha chaJezebheri chichava somupfudze pamusoro pomunda panyika yeJezereri; naizvozvo havangati, uyu ndiye Jezebheri.’ ”" 
2Kings10:1 Zvino Ahabhi wakanga ana vanakomana vana makumi manomwe paSamaria. Jehu akanyora tsamba, akadzitumira Samaria kuvabati veJezereri, ivo vakuru, nokuvareri vavana vaAhabhi, akati," 
2Kings10:2 “Zvino kana tsamba iyi ichisvika kwamuri, vanakomana vatenzi wangu zvavariko kwamuri, nengoro namabhiza zviriko kwamuri, neguta rakakombwa norusvingo, nenhumbi dzokurwa nadzo;" 
2Kings10:3 chizvitsaurirai mwanakomana watenzi wenyu wakaisvonaka wakakwana kukunda vamwe, mumugadze pachigaro choushe chababa vake, murwire imba yatenzi wenyu.”" 
2Kings10:4 Asi ivo vakanga vachitya kwazvo, vakati, “Madzimambo maviri akanga asingagoni kumukunda, zvino isu tichamukunda seiko?”" 
2Kings10:5 Zvino mutariri weimba nomutariri weguta, navakuru, navareri vavana vakatuma shoko kuna Jehu, vachiti, “Tiri varanda venyu, tichaita zvose zvamunotiraira; hatingagadzi mumwe mambo; itai henyu sezvamunoda.”" 
2Kings10:6 Ipapo wakanyora tsamba rwechipiri kwavari, akati, “Kana mukanzwana neni, kana mukaterera izwi rangu, uyai kwandiri Jezereri mangwana nenguva ino nemisoro yavarume, ivo vanakomana vatenzi wenyu.” Zvino vanakomana vamambo, ivo vanhu vana makumi manomwe, vaiva kuvakuru veguta, vaivarera." 
2Kings10:7 Zvino tsamba iyo yakati ichisvika kwavari, vakabata vanakomana vamambo, vakavauraya, ivo vanhu vana makumi manomwe, vakaisa misoro yavo mumatengu, ndokuitumira kwaari Jezereri." 
2Kings10:8 Nhume ikasvika, ikamuudza, ikati, “Vauya nemisoro yavanakomana vamambo.” Iye akati, “Itai mirwi miviri nayo, muiise pavanopinda napo pasuwo, kusvikira mangwana.”" 
2Kings10:9 Fume mangwana akabuda, akandomirapo, akati kuvanhu vose, “Imi hamuna mhosva henyu; tarirai, ndini ndamukira tenzi wangu, ndikamuuraya; asi ndianiko auraya ava vose?" 
2Kings10:10 Zvino muzive kuti hakuna shoko rimwe raJehovha richawira pasi, rakataurwa naJehovha pamusoro peimba yaAhabhi; nokuti Jehovha wakaita zvaakataura nomuranda wake Eriya.”" 
2Kings10:11 Naizvozvo Jehu akauraya vose vakanga vasara veimba yaAhabhi paJezereri, navanhu vake vakuru vose, neshamwari dzake, navapristi vake, kusvikira asina kumusiyira nomumwe." 
2Kings10:12 Zvino akasimuka, akabva, akaenda Samaria. Wakati asvika paimba yavafudzi panzira, pavaiveura makwai," 
2Kings10:13 Jehu akasangana navanun'una vaAhazi mambo waJudha, akati, “Ndimi aniko?” Ivo vakapindura, vakati, “Tiri vanun'una vaAhazia, toburuka kundokwazisa vana vamambo navana vavahosi.”" 
2Kings10:14 Iye akati, “Vabatei vari vapenyu.” Vakavabata vari vapenyu, vakavauraya padziva reimba pavaiveura makwai, varume vaiva vana makumi mana navaviri; haana kusiya mumwe wavo." 
2Kings10:15 Zvino wakati abvapo, akasangana naJehonadhabhi mwanakomana waRekabhu, wanga achiuya kuzosangana naye; akamukwazisa, akati kwaari, “Mwoyo wako wakarurama here, sokururama kwomwoyo wangu kwauri?” Jehonadhabhi akapindura, akati, “Wakarurama hawo. Kana zvakadaro, ndibate ruoko rwangu.” Iye akabata ruoko rwake, ndokumukwidza mungoro maakanga ari." 
2Kings10:16 Akati, “Hendei, undoona kushingaira kwandinoshingairira Jehovha nako.” Naizvozvo vakamufambisa mungoro yake." 
2Kings10:17 Wakati asvika Samaria, akauraya vose vakanga vasara vaAhabhi muSamaria, kusvikira amuparadza, neshoko raJehovha rakanga rarehwa naEriya." 
2Kings10:18 Ipapo Jehu akaunganidza vanhu vose, akati kwavari, “Ahabhi wakashumira Bhaari zvishoma, asi Jehu uchamushumira kwazvo." 
2Kings10:19 Naizvozvo zvino chidanai vaporofita vose vaBhaari, navose vanonamata kwaari, navapristi vake vose, vauye kwandiri; ngakurege kushaikwa kunyangwe nomumwe; nokuti ndinoda kubayira Bhaari chibayiro chikuru; Ani naani unoshaikwa haangararami.” Asi Jehu wakaita izvozvo namano, achida kuuraya vanamati vaBhaari." 
2Kings10:20 Zvino Jehu akati, “Tsaurirai Bhaari zuva romutambo mukuru.” Vakaparidza izvozvo." 
2Kings10:21 Zvino Jehu akatuma nhume pakati peIsiraeri pose, vose vanamati vaBhaari vakauya; hakuna munhu wakasara, akasauya. Vakapinda mumba maBhaari, imba yaBhaari ikazara, kusvika kumadziro nokumadziro." 
2Kings10:22 Akati kumutariri wenguo, “Vigira vanamati vaBhaari vose nguo.” Iye akavavigira nguo." 
2Kings10:23 Ipapo Jehu akapinda mumba maBhaari, ana Jehonadhabhi mwanakomana waRekabhi, akati kuvanamati vaBhaari, “Tsvakai, mutarire kwazvo kuti pano pakati penyu parege kuva nomuranda mumwe waJehovha, asi vanamati vaBhaari bedzi.”" 
2Kings10:24 Vakapinda kundobayira zvibairo nezvipiriso zvinopiswa. Zvino Jehu wakanga araira varume vana makumi masere panze, achiti, “Kana mumwe wavarume vandinoisa pamaoko enyu akapukunyuka, munhu unomurega akapukunyuka, uchamufira.”" 
2Kings10:25 Zvino wakati apedza kubayira chipiriso chinopiswa Jehu akati kuvarindi nokuvakuru, “Pindai, muvauraye; musatendera mumwe kubuda.” Ivo vakavauraya neminondo inopinza; varindi navakuru vakavarashira kunze, vakaenda kuguta reimba yaBhaari." 
2Kings10:26 Ipapo vakabudisa mbiru dzaiva mumba maBhaari, vakadzipisa." 
2Kings10:27 Vakaputsawo mbiru yaBhaari, vakaputsawo imba yaBhaari, vakaiita imba yembudzi kusvikira nhasi." 
2Kings10:28 Naizvozvo Jehu wakaparadza Bhaari pakati peIsiraeri. 
2Kings10:29 Asi Jehu haana kurega kutevera zvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo, zvemhuru dzendarama dzaiva paBhetieri, nedzaiva paDhani." 
2Kings10:30 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Jehu, “Zvawakaita zvakanaka ukaita zvakarurama pamberi pangu, ukaitira imba yaAhabhi zvose zvakanga zviri mumwoyo mangu, zvino vana vako vorudzi rwechina vachagara pachigaro choushe hwaIsiraeri.”" 
2Kings10:31 Asi Jehu haana kurangarira kufamba nomwoyo wose nomurairo waJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri; haana kurega zvivi zvaJerobhoamu zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo. 
2Kings10:32 Pamazuva iwayo Jehovha akatanga kutapudza Isiraeri; Hazaeri akavakunda panyika yose yeIsiraeri; 
2Kings10:33 kubva kuna Jodhani zvichienda mabvazuva, nenyika yose yaGiriadhi, neyavaGadhi, neyavaRubheni, neyavaManase, kubva paAroeri pamupata weArinoni, ndiro Giriadhi neBhashani." 
2Kings10:34 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJehu, nezvose zvaakaita, nesimba rake rose, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri?" 
2Kings10:35 Jehu akavata namadzibaba ake, vakamuviga paSamaria, Jehoahazi mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings10:36 Nguva yakabata Jehu ushe hwaIsiraeri paSamaria aiva makore ana makumi maviri namasere. 
2Kings11:1 Zvino Ataria mai vaAhazia, wakati achiona kuti mwanakomana wake wafa, akasimuka, akaparadza vose vorudzi rwamambo." 
2Kings11:2 Asi Jehoshebha mukunda wamambo Joramu, hanzvadzi yaAhazia, wakatora Joashi mwanakomana waAhazia, akamuba pakati pavanakomana vamambo vaiurayiwa, iye nomureri wake, mumba mokuvata; vakamuvanza pana Ataria, naizvozvo haana kuurayiwa." 
2Kings11:3 Akagara naye akavanzwa mumba maJehovha makore matanhatu; Ataria akabata ushe panyika. 
2Kings11:4 Zvino negore rechinomwe Jehoyadha akatuma vanhu vakatora vakuru vamazana vavaKari navarindi vamambo, akauya navo kwaari mumba maJehovha, akaita sungano navo, akavapikisa mumba maJehovha, akavaratidza mwanakomana wamambo." 
2Kings11:5 Akavaraira, akati, “Munofanira kuita kudai, Imi munopinda neSabata, chetatu chenyu munofanira kuva varindi veimba yamambo;" 
2Kings11:6 chimwe chetatu munofanira kumira pasuwo rinonzi Suri; chimwe chetatuzve vanofanira kumira pasuwo riri shure kwavarindi vamambo; saizvozvo munofanira kurinda imba, nokuidzivirira." 
2Kings11:7 Mapoka enyu maviri, imi mose munobuda neSabata, munofanira kurinda imba yaJehovha muchikomba mambo." 
2Kings11:8 Mukombe mambo, mumwe nomumwe akabata nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo muruoko rwake; Ani naani unopinda pakati pemisara, unofanira kuurayiwa; mugare namambo kana achibuda uye kana achipinda.”" 
2Kings11:9 Vakuru vamazana vakaita zvose zvavakarairwa nomupristi Jehoyadha; mumwe nomumwe akatora vanhu vake, ivo vaifanira kupinda neSabata, naivo vaifanira kubuda neSabata, vakasvika kumupristi Jehoyadha." 
2Kings11:10 Mupristi akapa vakuru vamazana mapfumo nenhowo zvaiva zvamambo Dhavhidhi, zvakanga zviri mumba maJehovha." 
2Kings11:11 Zvino varindi vamambo vakamira mumwe nomumwe akabata nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo muruoko rwake, kubva kurutivi rworudyi rweimba kusvikira kurutivi rworuboshwe rweimba, napaatari neimba, vakakomba mambo." 
2Kings11:12 Ipapo akabudisa mwanakomana wamambo, akamudzika korona, akamupa chipupuriro, vakamuita mambo, vakamuzodza; ndokuridza nhondo, vachiti, “Mambo ngaararame!”" 
2Kings11:13 Zvino Ataria wakati achinzwa mhere–mhere yavarindi vamambo navanhu, akapinda kuvanhu mumba maJehovha." 
2Kings11:14 Akatarira, ndokuona mambo amire pambiru, netsika yavo, navakuru navakanga vane hwamanda vamire kuna mambo; vanhu vose venyika vakafara, vakaridza hwamanda. Ipapo Ataria akabvarura nguo dzake, akadanidzira, achiti, “Ndamukirwa, ndamukirwa!”" 
2Kings11:15 Zvino mupristi Jehoyadha akaraira vakuru vamazana, vairaira hondo, akati kwavari, “Mubudisei pakati pemisara yavanhu; Ani naani unomutevera iye, munofanira kumuuraya nomunondo; nokuti mupristi wakati, ‘Ngaarege kuurayiwa mukati meimba yaJehovha.’ ”" 
2Kings11:16 Naizvozvo vakamudzivirira nzira, akaenda nenzira yaipinda mabhiza nayo kumba kwamambo, ndokuurayirwapo." 
2Kings11:17 Zvino Jehoyadha akaita sungano pakati paJehovha namambo navanhu, kuti vave vanhu vaJehovha; uyewo pakati pamambo navanhu." 
2Kings11:18 Vanhu vose venyika vakaenda kumba kwaBhaari, vakaiputsa; vakaputsa kwazvo atari dzake nemifananidzo yake, vakauraya Matani mupristi waBhaari pamberi peatari. Mupristi akagadza vatariri paimba yaJehovha." 
2Kings11:19 Akatora vakuru vamazana, navaKari, navarindi vamambo, navanhu vose venyika, vakaburusa mambo paimba yaJehovha, vakaenda kumba kwamambo nenzira yesuwo ravarindi vamambo. Iye akagara pachigaro choushe chamadzimambo." 
2Kings11:20 Naizvozvo vanhu vose venyika vakafara, guta rikanyarara; vakauraya Ataria nomunondo paimba yamambo." 
2Kings11:21 Jehoashi wakatanga kubata ushe ana makore manomwe. 
2Kings12:1 Zvino negore rechinomwe raJehu, Jehoashi wakatanga kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi mana; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Zibhia weBheerishebha." 
2Kings12:2 Jehoashi akaita zvakanaka pamberi paJehovha mazuva ake ose, aakadzidziswa nawo nomupristi Jehoyadha." 
2Kings12:3 Kunyangwe zvakadaro matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa; vanhu vakaramba vachibayira zvibairo nokupisa zvinonhuwira pamatunhu akakwirira. 
2Kings12:4 Zvino Jehoashi akati kuvapristi, “Mari yose yezvinhu zvakatsaurwa, inoiswa mumba maJehovha, mari yavanhu vakaverengwa, nemari yavose sezvavakatarirwa mumwe nomumwe, nemari yose, inoiswa mumba maJehovha nomumwe nomumwe nomwoyo wake," 
2Kings12:5 vapristi ngavatore mari iyo, mumwe nomumwe kumuzikanwi wake, vagadzire zvakaputsika patemberi pose pose pavanowana pakaputsika.”" 
2Kings12:6 Asi negore ramakumi maviri namatatu ramambo Jehoashi vapristi vakanga vachigere kugadzira zvakaputsika paimba. 
2Kings12:7 Zvino mambo Jehoashi akadana mupristi Jehoyadha navamwe vapristi, akati kwavari, “Munoregereiko kugadzira zvakaputsika paimba? Naizvozvo zvino chiregai kutora mari kuvazikanwi venyu, asi muibudisire zvakaputsika patemberi.”" 
2Kings12:8 Vapristi vakatenda kusatora mari kuvanhu, kunyangwe kugadzira zvakaputsika patemberi." 
2Kings12:9 Asi mupristi Jehoyadha wakatora bhokisi, akabvowora buri pachifunhiro charo, akarigadzika kurutivi rweatari, kurudyi rwomunhu, kana achipinda paimba yaJehovha." 
2Kings12:10 Zvino vakati kana vaona kuti mari zhinji yavamo mubhokisi, munyori wamambo nomupristi mukuru ndokuuya, ndokuisa muhomwe, vachiverenga mari yakawanikwa mumba maJehovha." 
2Kings12:11 Vakaisa mari yakayerwa mumaoko avaibata basa iro, vaitarira temberi yaJehovha; zvino vairipira nayo vavezi navavaki vaibata patemberi yaJehovha," 
2Kings12:12 navaironga navaiveza mabwe, vakatenga matanda namabwe akavezwa okugadzirisa nawo zvakaputsika patemberi yaJehovha, nokuripira zvose zvaidikanwa kuzogadzirisa nazvo temberi." 
2Kings12:13 Asi havana kuitira temberi yaJehovha mikombe yesirivha, nembato dzemwenje, nembiya, nehwamanda, nemidziyo yendarama, nemidziyo yesirivha, nemari yakaiswa temberi yaJehovha," 
2Kings12:14 nokuti vakaiisa kuna vaibata basa, kuti vagadzirise temberi yaJehovha nayo." 
2Kings12:15 Uye havana kuzobvunza vanhu avo, vavaipa mari mumaoko avo, kuzoripira vaibata basa; nokuti ivo vaibata vakatendeka." 
2Kings12:16 Asi mari yezvipiriso zvemhosva, nemari yezvipiriso zvezvivi, hazvina kuiswa mumba maJehovha; yakapiwa vapristi." 
2Kings12:17 Zvino Hazaeri mambo weSiria wakaenda kunorwa neGati, akarikunda, Hazaeri akazvipira kuenda Jerusaremu." 
2Kings12:18 Asi Jehoashi mambo waJudha, wakatora zvinhu zvose zvakatsaurwa, zvakanga zvatsaurwa namadzibaba ake, Jehoshafati, naJehoramu, naAhazia, madzimambo aJudha, nezvinhu zvake zvose zvakatsaurwa, nendarama yose yakawanikwa papfuma yeimba yaJehovha neimba yamambo, akazvituma kuna Hazaeri mambo weSiria; iye akabva Jerusaremu." 
2Kings12:19 Mamwe mabasa aJoashi, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings12:20 Zvino varanda vake vakasimuka, vakarangana, vakauraya Joashi paimba yaMiro, panzira inoburukira Sira." 
2Kings12:21 Nokuti Jozakari mwanakomana waShimiati, naJehozabhadhi mwanakomana waShomeri, varanda vake, vakamubaya, akafa; vakamuviga kumadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi; Amaziya mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings13:1 Zvino negore ramakumi maviri namatatu raJoashi mwanakomana waAhazia, mambo waJudha, Jehoahazi mwanakomana waJehu wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri paSamaria, akaubata makore ane gumi namanomwe." 
2Kings13:2 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, akatevera zvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo; haana kutsauka kwazviri." 
2Kings13:3 Zvino Jehovha akatsamwira Isiraeri, akavaisa murowoko rwaHazaeri mambo weSiria, nomuruoko rwaBhenihadhadhi mwanakomana waHazaeri mazuva ose." 
2Kings13:4 Ipapo Jehoahazi akanyengetera kuna Jehovha, Jehovha akamunzwa; nokuti wakaona kutambudzwa kweIsiraeri kwavakatambudzwa nako namambo weSiria." 
2Kings13:5 (Asi Jehovha akapa Isiraeri muponesi, vakasununguka pamaoko avaSiria; vana VaIsiraeri vakagara mumatende avo sakare." 
2Kings13:6 Kunyangwe zvakadaro havana kutsauka pazvivi zveimba yaJerobhoamu, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo, asi vakaramba vachifamba mazviri; uye matanda okunamata nawo akaramba aripo paSamaria.)" 
2Kings13:7 Nokuti haana kusiyira Jehoahazi vanhu, asi vatasvi vamabhiza vana makumi mashanu, nengoro dzine gumi, navanhu vaifamba namakumbo vane zviuru zvine gumi; nokuti mambo weSiria wakavaparadza, akavaita seguruva rinotsikwa pasi." 
2Kings13:8 Mamwe mabasa aJehoahazi, nezvose zvaakaita, nesimba rake, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo eIsiraeri?" 
2Kings13:9 Jehoahazi akavata namadzibaba ake, vakamuviga paSamaria; Joashi mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings13:10 Negore ramakumi matatu namanomwe raJoashi mambo waJudha, Jehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri paSamaria, akaubata makore ane gumi namatanhatu." 
2Kings13:11 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha; haana kutsauka pazvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo; asi wakaramba achifamba mazviri." 
2Kings13:12 Mamwe mabasa aJoashi, nezvose zvaakaita, nesimba rake raakarwa naro naAmaziya mambo waJudha, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo eIsiraeri?" 
2Kings13:13 Joashi akavata namadzibaba ake, Jerobhoamu akagara pachigaro chake choushe; Joashi akavigwa paSamaria kuna madzimambo eIsiraeri." 
2Kings13:14 Zvino Erisha wakarwara nokurwara kwaakazofa nako, Joashi mambo weIsiraeri akaenda kwaari, akachema pamusoro pake, akati, “Baba vangu, baba vangu, ngoro yeIsiraeri navatasvi vamabhiza ayo!”" 
2Kings13:15 Erisha akati kwaari, “Tora uta nemiseve;” akatora uta nemiseve." 
2Kings13:16 Akati kuna mambo waIsiraeri, “Isa ruoko rwako pauta;” iye akaisa ruoko rwake pauta. Erisha akaisa maoko ake pamusoro pamaoko ake." 
2Kings13:17 Akati, “Zarura hwindo rinotarira mabvazuva;” iye akarizarura. Zvino Erisha akati, “Fura!” Iye akafura. Akati, “Ndiwo museve waJehovha unokunda, ndiwo museve unokunda vaSiria; nokuti imi muchakunda vaSiria paAfeki, kusvikira mavaparadza.”" 
2Kings13:18 Akati, “Tora miseve;” iye akatora. Akati kuna mambo weIsiraeri, “Rova pasi!” Iye akarova pasi katatu, akarega." 
2Kings13:19 Ipapo munhu waMwari akamutsamwira, akati, “Waifanira kurova kashanu kana katanhatu, ipapo waikunda vaSiria kusvikira wavaparadza chose; asi zvino uchakunda vaSiria katatu bedzi.”" 
2Kings13:20 Erisha akafa, vakamuviga. Zvino hondo dzavaMoabhu dzikapinda munyika pakutanga kwegore." 
2Kings13:21 Zvino mumwe musi vakati vachiviga munhu, vakaona hondo yavaMoabhu, vakakandira munhu muhwiro hwaErisha, zvino munhu uyo wakati achigunzva mapfupa aErisha, akararamazve, akamira namakumbo ake." 
2Kings13:22 Zvino Hazaeri mambo weSiria akatambudza VaIsiraeri mazuva ose aJehoahazi. 
2Kings13:23 Asi Jehovha akavanzwira tsitsi, akava nenyasha navo, akavawo nehanya navo, nokuda kwesungano yake naAbhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho; akasada kuvaparadza, kana kuvarashira kure naye panguva iyo." 
2Kings13:24 Zvino Hazaeri mambo weSiria akafa, Bhenihadhadhi mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings13:25 Ipapo Jehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi akatorerazve Bhenihadhadhi mwanakomana waHazaeri, maguta aakanga atorera baba vake Jehoahazi pakurwa. Joashi akamukunda katatu, akatorazve maguta eIsiraeri." 
2Kings14:1 Negore rechipiri raJoashi mwanakomana waJoahazi mambo weIsiraeri, Amaziya mwanakomana waJoashi mambo waJudha, akatanga kubata ushe." 
2Kings14:2 Akatanga kubata ushe ana makore makumi maviri namashanu; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi maviri namapfumbamwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Jehoadhini weJerusaremu. 
2Kings14:3 Akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, asi haana kufanana nababa vake Dhavhidhi; akaita zvose zvakaita baba vake Joashi." 
2Kings14:4 Asi matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa, asi vanhu vakaramba vachibayira nokupisa zvinonhuwira pamatunhu akakwirira." 
2Kings14:5 Zvino ushe hwakati huchangosimbiswa naye, akauraya varanda vake vakanga vauraya mambo baba vake." 
2Kings14:6 Asi haana kuuraya vana vavaurayi, sezvazvakanyorwa muBhuku yoMurairo waMosesi, sezvakaraira Jehovha, achiti, “Madzibaba ngaarege kuurayiwa nokuda kwavana, kana vana ngavarege kuurayiwa nokuda kwamadzibaba; asi munhu mumwe nomumwe ngaafire zvivi zvake.”" 
2Kings14:7 Akauraya vane zviuru zvine gumi zvavaEdhomu pamupata womunyu, akakundawo Sera pakurwa, akaritumidza zita rinonzi Joketeeri, kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
2Kings14:8 Zvino Amaziya akatuma nhume kuna Jehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi mwanakomana waJehu, mambo weIsiraeri, akati, “Uya tionane.”" 
2Kings14:9 Jehoashi mambo weIsiraeri akatuma shoko kuna Amaziya mambo waJudha, akati, “Rukato rwakanga ruri paRebhanoni rwakatuma shoko kumusidhari wakanga uri paRebhanoni, rukati, ‘Ipa mwanakomana wangu mukunda wako, ave mukadzi wake;’ zvino imwe mhuka yakanga iri paRebhanoni ikapfuurapo, ikatsika–tsika rukato." 
2Kings14:10 Iwe wakunda vaEdhomu, zvino mwoyo wako wozvikudza; chikudza hako, ugare kumusha; nokuti unotsvakireiko njodzi, uwiremo, iwe naJudha pamwechete newe?”" 
2Kings14:11 Asi Amaziya wakaramba kunzwa. Naizvozvo Jehoashi mambo weIsiraeri akaenda; iye naAmaziya mambo waJudha vakaonana paBhetishemeshi raiva raJudha. 
2Kings14:12 VaJudha vakakundwa naVaIsiraeri, mumwe nomumwe akatizira kutende rake." 
2Kings14:13 Jehoashi mambo weIsiraeri akasunga Amaziya mambo waJudha, mwanakomana waJehoashi, mwanakomana waAhazia, paBhetishemeshi, akasvika Jerusaremu, akaputsa rusvingo rweJerusaremu, kubva pasuwo raEfuremu kusvikira pasuwo rapakona, makubhiti ana mazana mana." 
2Kings14:14 Akatora ndarama yose nesirivha, nemidziyo yose yakawanikwa mumba maJehovha, napapfuma yomumba mamambo, navanhu kuzova rubatso, akadzokera Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJehoashi aakaita, nesimba rake, nokurwa kwake naAmaziya mambo waJudha, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo eIsiraeri?" 
2Kings14:16 Jehoashi akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa paSamaria kuna madzimambo eIsiraeri; Jerobhoamu akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings14:17 Amaziya mwanakomana waJoashi mambo waJudha wakaramba ari mupenyu makore ane gumi namashanu, shure kwokufa kwaJehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi mambo weIsiraeri." 
2Kings14:18 Zvino mamwe mabasa aAmaziya haana kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aJudha? 
2Kings14:19 Zvino vakarangana kumuuraya paJerusaremu, akatizira Rakishi; asi vakatuma vanhu Rakishi vachimutevera, vakamuurayirapo." 
2Kings14:20 Vakauya naye pamabhiza, akavigwa kuna madzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi." 
2Kings14:21 Zvino vanhu vose vaJudha vakatora Azaria, wakanga ana makore ane gumi namatanhatu, vakamuita mambo panzvimbo yababa vake Amaziya." 
2Kings14:22 Akavaka Erati, akaridzosera kuna Judha, mambo avata namadzibaba ake." 
2Kings14:23 Negore regumi namashanu raAmaziya mwanakomana waJoashi mambo waJudha, Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waJoashi, mambo weIsiraeri, akatanga kubata ushe paSamaria, akaubata makore ana makumi mana nerimwe." 
2Kings14:24 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha; haana kutsauka pazvivi zvose zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo." 
2Kings14:25 Akakundazve nyika yeIsiraeri, kubva pavanopinda paHamati kusvikira pagungwa reArabha, sezvakarehwa neshoko raJehovha, Mwari weIsiraeri, raakataura nomuromo womuranda wake Jona, mwanakomana waAmitai, muporofita weGatiheferi." 
2Kings14:26 Nokuti Jehovha akaona kutambudzika kwaIsiraeri, kuti kwakanga kwakanyanya kwazvo; nokuti kwakanga kusina vakuru navaduku, kwakanga kusina mubetseri waIsiraeri." 
2Kings14:27 Asi Jehovha haana kutaura kuti uchadzima zita reIsiraeri pasi pedenga, asi wakavaponesa noruoko rwaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waJoashi." 
2Kings14:28 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJerobhoamu, nezvose zvaakaita, nesimba rake, nokurwa kwake, nokudzosera kwake Dhamasikosi neHamati kuna Isiraeri, aiva maguta aJudha, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo eIsiraeri?" 
2Kings14:29 Jerobhoamu akavata namadzibaba ake, madzimambo eIsiraeri; Zekariya mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings15:1 Negore ramakumi maviri namanomwe raJerobhoamu mambo waIsiraeri, Azaria mwanakomana waAmaziya mambo waJudha wakatanga kubata ushe." 
2Kings15:2 Wakanga ana makore ane gumi namatanhatu pakutanga kwake kubata ushe, akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore ana makumi mashanu namaviri; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Jekoria weJerusaremu." 
2Kings15:3 Akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, sezvakaita baba vake Amaziya pazvose." 
2Kings15:4 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa; vanhu vakaramba vachibayira nokupisa zvinonhuwira pamatunhu akakwirira." 
2Kings15:5 Jehovha akarova mambo, akava namaperembudzi kusvikira zuva rokufa kwake, akagara ari oga muimba. Jotamu mwanakomana wamambo akava mutariri weimba, akatongawo mhosva dzavanhu venyika." 
2Kings15:6 Zvino mamwe mabasa aAzaria, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings15:7 Azaria akavata namadzibaba ake, vakamuviga kuna madzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi; Jotamu mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings15:8 Negore ramakumi matatu namasere raAzaria mambo waJudha, Zekariya mwanakomana waJerobhoamu wakava mambo waIsiraeri paSamaria mwedzi mitanhatu." 
2Kings15:9 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakaita madzibaba ake; haana kutsauka pazvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo." 
2Kings15:10 Sharumi mwanakomana waJabheshi akamumukira, akamubaya pamberi pavanhu, akamuuraya, iye akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings15:11 Zvino mamwe mabasa aZekariya, tarirai akanyorwa mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri." 
2Kings15:12 Ndiro shoko raJehovha raakataura kuna Jehu, achiti, “Vanakomana vako vachagara pachigaro choushe hwaIsiraeri kusvikira parudzi rwechina.” Zvikaitwa saizvozvo." 
2Kings15:13 Sharumi mwanakomana waJabheshi wakatanga kubata ushe negore ramakumi matatu namapfumbamwe raUziya mambo waJudha; akabata ushe paSamaria mwedzi mumwe. 
2Kings15:14 Zvino Menahemi mwanakomana waGadhi akabva Tiriza, akasvika Samaria, akabaya Sharumi mwanakomana waJabheshi paSamaria, akamuuraya, akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings15:15 Zvino mamwe mabasa aSharumi, nokumukira kwake, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamakoronike amadzibaba aIsiraeri." 
2Kings15:16 Zvino Menahemi akaparadza Tifisa, navose vakanga vari mukati maro, nenyika yaro, kubva paTiriza; akariparadza, nokuti vakaramba kumuzarurira; akatumbura vakadzi vose vakanga vane mimba, vaiva mukati maro." 
2Kings15:17 Negore ramakumi matatu namapfumbamwe raAzaria mambo waJudha, Menahemi mwanakomana waGadhi, wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri, akaubata makore ane gumi paSamaria." 
2Kings15:18 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha; mazuva ake ose haana kutsauka pazvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo." 
2Kings15:19 Zvino Puri mambo weAsiriya akauya kuzorwa nenyika; Menahemi akapa Puri matarenda ane chiuru chimwe chesirivha, kuti amubatsire kusimbisa ushe hwake." 
2Kings15:20 Menahemi akateresa Isiraeri, mumwe nomumwe wakanga ane simba, akafuma, akabudisa mashekeri ana makumi mashanu esirivha, kuti zvipiwe mambo weAsiria; naizvozvo mambo weAsiria akadzokera hake, akasagara panyika." 
2Kings15:21 Zvino mamwe mabasa aMenahemi, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo eIsiraeri?" 
2Kings15:22 Menahemi akavata namadzibaba ake, Pekahia mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings15:23 Negore ramakumi mashanu raAzaria mambo weJudha, Pekahia mwanakomana waMenehemi wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri paSamaria, akaubata makore maviri." 
2Kings15:24 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha; haana kutsauka pazvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo." 
2Kings15:25 Zvino Peka mwanakomana waRemaria, mukuru wake wehondo akamumukira, akamuuraya paSamaria, munhare yeimba yamambo, iye naArigobhi naArie navanhu vana makumi mashanu vaGireadhi vaakanga anavo; akamuuraya, akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings15:26 Zvino mamwe mabasa aPekahia, nezvose zvaakaita, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aIsiraeri." 
2Kings15:27 Negore ramakumi mashanu namaviri raAzaria mambo waJudha, Peka, mwanakomana waRemaria, akatanga kubata ushe hweIsiraeri paSamaria, akaubata makore makumi maviri." 
2Kings15:28 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha; haana kutsauka pazvivi zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, zvaakatadzisa Isiraeri nazvo." 
2Kings15:29 Namazuva aPeka mambo waIsiraeri, Tigirati-pireza mambo weAsiria akasvika, akakunda Ijoni, neAbheribhetimaaka, neJanoa, neKadheshi, neHazoru, neGiriadhi, neGarireya, iyo nyika yose yeNafutari; akavatapa, akaenda navo Asiria." 
2Kings15:30 Zvino Hoshea mwanakomana waEra akaita ndanga pamusoro paPeka mwanakomana waRemaria, akamubaya, akamuuraya, ndokumutevera paushe, negore ramakumi maviri raJotamu mwanakomana waUziya." 
2Kings15:31 Zvino mamwe mabasa aPeka, nezvose zvaakaita, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo eIsiraeri." 
2Kings15:32 Negore rechipiri raPeka mwanakomana waRemaria mambo weIsiraeri, Jotamu mwanakomana waUziya mambo waJudha, wakatanga kubata ushe." 
2Kings15:33 Wakanga asvika makore ana makumi maviri namashanu pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore ane gumi namatanhatu; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Jerusha mukunda waZadhoki. 
2Kings15:34 Akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, akaita zvose zvakaitwa nababa vake Uziya." 
2Kings15:35 Kunyangwe zvakadaro matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa; vanhu vakaramba vachibayira nokupisa zvinonhuwira pamatunhu akakwirira. Ndiye wakavaka suwo rokumusoro reimba yaJehovha. 
2Kings15:36 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJotamu, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings15:37 Namazuva iwayo Jehovha akatanga kutuma Rezini mambo weSiria naPeka mwanakomana waRemaria kuzorwa naJudha. 
2Kings15:38 Jotamu akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa kuna madzibaba ake muguta rababa vake Dhavhidhi; Ahazi mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings16:1 Negore regumi namanomwe raPeka mwanakomana waRemaria, Ahazi mwanakomana waJotamu mambo waJudha wakatanga kubata ushe." 
2Kings16:2 Ahazi akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore makumi maviri; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore ane gumi namatanhatu. Asi haana kuita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha Mwari wake, sababa vake Dhavhidhi." 
2Kings16:3 Nokuti wakafamba nenzira yamadzibaba aIsiraeri, akapinzawo mwanakomana wake mumoto netsika dzezvinonyangadza zvavahedheni, vakanga vadzingwa naJehovha pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri." 
2Kings16:4 Akabayira nokupisa zvinonhuwira napasi pemiti yose mitema. 
2Kings16:5 Ipapo Rezini mambo weSiria, naPeka mwanakomana waRemaria, mambo weIsiraeri, vakasvika Jerusaremu kuzorwa naye; vakakomba Ahazi, asi vakanga vasingagoni kumukunda." 
2Kings16:6 Nenguva iyo Rezini mambo weSiria akadzoserazve Siria Erati, akadzinga vaJudha paErati; vakaenda Erati, vakagarapo kusvikira nhasi." 
2Kings16:7 Zvino Ahazi akatuma nhume kuna Tigiratipireseri mambo weAsiria, akati, “Ndiri muranda wenyu nomwanakomana wenyu; uyai mundirwire muruoko rwamambo weSiria, nomuruoko rwamambo weIsiraeri, vanondimukira.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ipapo Ahazi akatora sirivha nendarama zvakawanikwa mumba maJehovha, napapfuma yeimba yamambo, akazvituma kuna mambo weAsiria, chive chipo." 
2Kings16:9 Mambo weAsiria akamunzwa, mambo weAsiria akandorwa neDhamasikosi, akarikunda, akatapa vanhu, akavaisa Kiri, akauraya Rezini." 
2Kings16:10 Zvino mambo Ahazi akaenda Dhamasikosi kundosangana naTigiratipireseri mambo weAsiria, akaona atari yakanga iri paDhamasikosi; mambo Ahazi akatuma mufananidzo weatari kuna Uriya mupristi, nomuvakirwo wayo, nomuitirwe wayo wose." 
2Kings16:11 Mupristi Uriya akavaka atari yakafanana nezvose zvakanga zvatumwa namambo Ahazi achiri Dhamasikosi, mupristi Uriya akaiita saizvozvo mambo Ahazi achigere kudzoka Dhamasikosi." 
2Kings16:12 Zvino mambo wakati adzoka Dhamasikosi, mambo akaona atari, mambo akaswedera paatari, kuzobayira pamusoro payo." 
2Kings16:13 Akapisira pamusoro peatari chipiriso chake chinopiswa, nechipiriso chake choupfu, akadururapo chipiriso chake chinodururwa, akasasirapo ropa rezvipiriso zvake zvokuyananisa." 
2Kings16:14 Uye atari yendarira, yaiva pamberi paJehovha, wakaibvisa pamukova weimba, pakati peatari yake neimba yaJehovha, akaiisa kurutivi rwokumusoro rweatari yake." 
2Kings16:15 Zvino mambo Ahazi akaraira mupristi Uriya, akati, “Chipisira chipiriso choupfu chamangwanani paatari huru, nechipiriso chamadekwana, nechipiriso chamambo chinopiswa, nechipiriso chake choupfu, nechipiriso chavanhu vose venyika, nechipiriso chavo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvavo zvinodururwa; uye usasire pamusoro payo, neropa rose rechipiriso chinopiswa, neropa rose rezvibairo; asi atari yendarira ndiyo yandichabvunza Mwari nayo.”" 
2Kings16:16 Naizvozvo mupristi Uriya akaita zvose zvaakanga arairwa namambo Ahazi. 
2Kings16:17 Mambo Ahazi akagura ukomba hwezvingoro, akabvisa mudziyo wokushamba pamusoro pazvo, akabvisawo dziva pamusoro penzombe dzendarira dzakanga dziri pasi paro, akariisa pachigadziko chamabwe." 
2Kings16:18 Nenzira, yaiva nedenga, yakaitirwa imba yezororo, yavakanga vavaka temberi, nomukova wamambo nechokunze, wakazvishandura mukati metemberi yaJehovha, nokuda kwamambo weAsiria." 
2Kings16:19 Zvino mamwe mabasa aAhazi aakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku yamakoronike amadzibaba aJudha?" 
2Kings16:20 Ahazi akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi, Hezekiya mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Kings17:1 Zvino negore regumi namaviri raAhazi mambo waJudha, Hoshea mwanakomana waEra wakatanga kubata ushe hwaIsiraeri paSamaria, akahubata makore mapfumbamwe." 
2Kings17:2 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha; asi haana kufanana namadzimambo aIsiraeri akamutangira. 
2Kings17:3 Zvino Sharimaneza mambo weAsiria akasvika kuzorwa naye, Hoshea akava muranda wake, akamuterera mutero." 
2Kings17:4 Asi mambo weAsiria wakati achiona kuti Hoshea akarangana navamwe kumumukira, nokuti wakanga atuma nhume kuna Soromoni mambo weIjipiti, akarega kuteerera mambo weAsiria mutero sezvaaiita gore rimwe nerimwe, mambo weAsiria akamupfigira mutorongo akamusunga." 
2Kings17:5 Ipapo mambo weAsiria akafamba nenyika yose, akaenda Samaria, akarikomba makore matatu." 
2Kings17:6 Negore repfumbamwe raHoshea, mambo weAsiria akakunda Samaria, akatapa VaIsiraeri, akaenda navo Asiria, akavaisa paHara, napaHabhori, parwizi Gozani, napamaguta avaMedhi." 
2Kings17:7 Izvozvo zvakaitwa, nokuti vana veIsiraeri vakatadzira Jehovha Mwari wavo, iye wakanga avabudisa panyika yeIjipiti kwavakanga vakabatwa naFarao mambo weIjipiti, vakatya vamwe vamwari," 
2Kings17:8 vakafamba nemitemo yendudzi dzakanga dzadzingwa naJehovha pamberi pavana veIsiraeri, neyamadzimambo eIsiraeri yavakatema ivo." 
2Kings17:9 Vana veIsiraeri vakaita pakavanda zvisina kururama pamberi paJehovha Mwari wavo, vakazvivakira matunhu akakwirira mumaguta avo ose, kubva pachirindo chavarindi kusvikira pamaguta akakombwa." 
2Kings17:10 Vakazvimutsira shongwe namatanda okunamata nawo pamatunhu ose akakwirira, napasi pemiti yose mitema." 
2Kings17:11 Vakapisirapo zvinonhuwira pamatunhu ose akakwirira, sezvaiita ndudzi dzakanga dzabviswa pamberi pavo naJehovha; vakaita zvakashata zvakatsamwisa Jehovha;" 
2Kings17:12 vakashumira zvifananidzo, zvavakanga vanzi naJehovha, “Regai kuita chinhu ichi.”" 
2Kings17:13 Kunyangwe zvakadaro Jehovha akapupurira Isiraeri naJudha nemiromo yavaporofita vose navawoni vose, akati, “Dzokai panzira dzenyu dzakaipa, muchengete mirairo yangu nezvandakatema, sezvakarehwa nomurairo wangu wose wandakaraira madzibaba enyu, wandakatuma nemiromo yavaporofita varanda vangu.”" 
2Kings17:14 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, vakaramba kuteerera, vakawomesa mitsipa yavo, semitsipa yamadzibaba avo, vakanga vasingatendi Jehovha Mwari wavo." 
2Kings17:15 Vakaramba mitemo yake nesungano yake yaakaita namadzibaba avo, nezvipupuriro zvake zvaakavapupurira, vakatevera zvisina maturo, ivo vakava vasina maturo, vakatevera ndudzi dzakavapoteredza, ivo vavakanga varairwa naJehovha kuti varege kuita saivo." 
2Kings17:16 Vakasiya mirairo yose yaJehovha Mwari wavo, vakazviitira zvifananidzo zvakaumbwa, zvemhuru mbiri; vakaitawo matanda okunamata nawo, vakanamata hondo yose yokudenga, vakashumira Bhaari." 
2Kings17:17 Vakapinza vanakomana navakunda vavo mumoto, vakauka nokuita uroyi hwavo, vakazvitengesa kuti vaite zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, vakamutsamwisa." 
2Kings17:18 Naizvozvo Jehovha akatsamwira VaIsiraeri kwazvo, akavabvisa pachiso chake; hakuna vakasiyiwa, asi rudzi rwaJudha bedzi." 
2Kings17:19 Kunyangwe navaJudhawo havana kuchengeta mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wavo, asi vakafamba nemitooo yaVaIsiraeri, yavakatema." 
2Kings17:20 Jehovha akarasha vana veIsiraeri vose, akavatambudza, akavapa mumaoko avaparadzi, kusvikira avarashira kure nechiso chake." 
2Kings17:21 Nokuti wakabvarura VaIsiraeri paimba yaDhavhidhi; vakaita Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, mambo wavo, Jerobhoamu akatsautsa VaIsiraeri, vakarega kutevera Jehovha, akavatadzisa nechivi chikuru." 
2Kings17:22 Vana veIsiraeri vakafamba pazvivi zvose zvaJerobhoamu, zvaakaita; havana kutsauka kwazviri;" 
2Kings17:23 kusvikira Jehovha abvisa Isiraeri kure nechiso chake, sezvaakataura nemiromo yavaporofita, varanda vake vose. Naizvozvo VaIsiraeri vakatapwa panyika yavo, vakaiswa Asiria kusvikira nhasi." 
2Kings17:24 Zvino mambo weAsiria wakatora vanhu paBhabhironi, napaKuta, napaAva, napaHamati, napaSefarivhaimi, akavaisa mumaguta eSamaria panzvimbo yavana veIsiraeri; Samaria rikava ravo, vakagara mumaguta aro." 
2Kings17:25 Zvino pakutanga kwokugarapo kwavo havana kutya Jehovha, Jehovha akatuma shumba pakati pavo, dzikavauraya vamwe vavo." 
2Kings17:26 Naizvozvo vakaudza mambo weAsiria, vakati, “Ndudzi dzavanhu dzamakatapa, mukavaisa mumaguta eSamaria, hadzizivi tsika dzaMwari wenyika iyo; naizvozvo wakatuma shumba pakati pavo, dzinovauraya, nokuti havazivi tsika dzaMwari wenyika iyo.”" 
2Kings17:27 Ipapo mambo weAsiria akaraira, akati, “Isaiko mumwe wavapristi vamakatapapo; ngavaende kundogarako, avadzidzise tsika dzaMwari wenyika iyo.”" 
2Kings17:28 Naizvozvo mumwe wavapristi vavakatapa paSamaria, wakandogara paBhetieri, akavadzidzisa sezvavaifanira kutya Jehovha." 
2Kings17:29 Kunyangwe zvakadaro rudzi rumwe norumwe rwakazviitira vamwari varwo, vakavaisa mudzimba dzamatunhu akakwirira, dzakavakwa navaSamaria, rudzi rumwe norumwe pamaguta arwo, kwavaigara." 
2Kings17:30 Vanhu veBhabhironi vakavaka Sukotibhenoti, vanhu veKuti vakavaka Nerigari, vanhu veHamati vakavaka Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 vaAvhi vakavaka Nibhazi neTaritaki, vaSefarivhaimi vakapisa vana vavo mumoto kuna Adhiramereki naAnamereki, vamwari veSefarivhaimi." 
2Kings17:32 Naizvozvo vakatya Jehovha, vakazvitsaurira pakati pavo vapristi vamatunhu akakwirira, vaivabayirira mudzimba dzamatunhu akakwirira." 
2Kings17:33 Vakatya Jehovha, vakashumira vamwari vavo, vachitevera tsika dzendudzi kwavakanga vatapwako." 
2Kings17:34 Kusvikira zuva ranhasi vanotevera tsika dzakare; havatyi Jehovha, kana kuita sezvavanorairwa nemitemo yavo, kana zvirevo zvavo, kana murairo wavo, kana mirau yavo, yakanga yarairwa vana vaJakobho naJehovha, iye waakatumidza zita rinonzi Isiraeri;" 
2Kings17:35 Jehovha akaita sungano navo, akavaraira, akati, “Regai kutya vamwe vamwari, kana kuvapfugamira kana kuvashumira, kana kuvabayira;" 
2Kings17:36 asi Jehovha, wakakubudisai muIjipiti nesimba guru, noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, ndiye wamunofanira kutya, ndiye wamunofanira kupfugamira, ndiye wamunofanira kubayira." 
2Kings17:37 “Mitemo, nezvirevo, nomurairo, nomurau, zvaakakunyorerai, munofanira kuzvichengeta nokusingaperi, hamufaniri kutya vamwe vamwari;" 
2Kings17:38 uye hamufaniri kukanganwa sungano yandakaita nemi; uye hamufaniri kutya vamwe vamwari; 
2Kings17:39 asi munofanira kutya Jehovha Mwari wenyu; iye achakusunungurai pamaoko avavengi venyu vose.” 
2Kings17:40 Kunyangwe zvakadaro havana kuteerera, asi vakatevera tsika dzakare." 
2Kings17:41 Naizvozvo ndudzi idzi dzakatya Jehovha, dzikashumirawo zvifananidzo zvadzo zvakavezwa; navana vavo, navana vavana vavo, vanoita saizvozvo kusvikira nhasi, sezvakaita madzibaba avo." 
2Kings18:1 Zvino negore rechitatu raHoshea mwanakomana waEra mambo weIsiraeri, Hezekiya mwanakomana waAhazi mambo waJudha wakatanga ushe." 
2Kings18:2 Akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore ana makumi maviri namashanu; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi maviri namapfumbamwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Abhi mukunda waZekariya. 
2Kings18:3 Akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, sezvakaita baba vake Dhavhidhi." 
2Kings18:4 Akabvisa matunhu akakwirira, akaputsa shongwe, akaparadza matanda okunamata nawo; akaputsa–putsa nyoka yendarira yakanga yakaitwa naMosesi; nokuti kusvikira pamazuva iwayo vana veIsiraeri vaiipisira zvinonhuwira; akaitumidza Nehushitani." 
2Kings18:5 Akatenda kuna Jehovha Mwari weIsiraeri; naizvozvo hakuna wakanga akafanana naye pakati pamadzimambo ose aJudha, kuna vakamutevera, kana vakamutangira." 
2Kings18:6 Nokuti wakanamatira Jehovha, haana kutsauka pakumutevera; asi wakachengeta mirairo yake, yakarairwa Mosesi naJehovha." 
2Kings18:7 Jehovha akava naye; kwose kwaakaenda wakafambiswa zvakanaka; akamukira mambo weAsiria, akasamushumira." 
2Kings18:8 Akakunda vaFirisitia kusvikira paGaza nenyika yaro, kubva pachirindo chomurindi kusvikira pamaguta akakombwa norusvingo." 
2Kings18:9 Zvino negore rechina ramambo Hezekiya, riri gore rechinomwe raHoshea mwanakomana waEra mambo waIsiraeri, Sharimaneseri mambo weAsiria akandorwa neSamaria, akarikomba." 
2Kings18:10 Pakupera kwamakore matatu vakarikunda; Samaria rikakundwa negore retanhatu raHezekiya, riri gore repfumbamwe raHoshea mambo weIsiraeri." 
2Kings18:11 Mambo weAsiria akatapa VaIsiraeri, akaenda navo Asiria, akavaisa paHara, napaHabhori, parwizi Gozani, nomumaguta avaMedhi;" 
2Kings18:12 nokuti havana kuteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wavo, asi vakadarika sungano yake, izvo zvose zvavakanga varairwa naMosesi muranda waJehovha, vakaramba kunzwa, kana kuzviita." 
2Kings18:13 Zvino negore regumi namana ramambo Hezekiya, Sanheribhi mambo weAsiria akandorwa namaguta ose aJudha akakombwa namasvingo, akaakunda." 
2Kings18:14 Zvino Hezekiya mambo weJudha akatuma shoko kuna mambo weAsiria paRakishi, akati, “Ndatadza, dzokai henyu mubve kwandiri; zvose zvamunoreva kwandiri ndichazviripa.” Ipapo mambo weAsiria akaripisa Hezekiya mambo weJudha matarenda ana mazana matatu esirivha namatarenda ana makumi matatu endarama." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekiya akamupa sirivha yose yakanga iri mumba maJehovha, napapfuma yeimba yamambo." 
2Kings18:16 Nenguva iyo Hezekiya wakabvisa ndarama pamikova yeimba yaJehovha, napambiru dzakanga dzafukidzwa nayo naHezekiya mambo waJudha, akaipa mambo weAsiria." 
2Kings18:17 Zvino mambo weAsiria akatuma mukuru wehondo, nomukuru wamachinda, nomukuru wavatariri vabve Rakishi nehondo huru vaende kuna Hezekiya paJerusaremu. Ivo vakaenda, vakasvika Jerusaremu. Zvino vakati vasvika, vakamira pamugero wedziva rokumusoro, riri panzira huru inoenda kumunda womusuki." 
2Kings18:18 Zvino vakati vadana mambo, Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikia, waichengeta imba, naShebhana munyori, naJoa mwanakomana waAsafi sahwira, vakabudira kwavari." 
2Kings18:19 Zvino mukuru wavatariri akati kwavari, “Zvino imi muti kuna Hezekiya, ‘Zvanzi namambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria, chaunovimba nacho chinyi?’" 
2Kings18:20 Iwe unoti (asi mashoko omuromo hawo), mano nesimba zvokurwa nazvo zviripo hazvo. Zvino unovimba naniko, zvawandimukira ini?" 
2Kings18:21 Tarira zvino, unovimba nomudonzvo worutsanga urwu rwakapwanyika, Ijipiti, runoti kana munhu akasendama kwaruri, ruchapinda muruoko rwake, rukamubaya; ndizvo zvakaita Farao mambo weIjipiti kuna vose vanovimba naye." 
2Kings18:22 Asi kana ukati kwandiri, ‘Tinovimba naJehovha Mwari wedu,’ ko haazi iye wakabvisirwa matunhu akakwirira neatari dzake naHezekiya, akati kuna Judha naJerusaremu, ‘Munofanira kunamata pamberi peatari iri paJerusaremu, here?’" 
2Kings18:23 “Naizvozvo zvino, chipikiranai henyu natenzi wangu mambo weAsiria, ndikupe mabhiza ane zviuru zviviri, kana iwe ukagona kuisa vatasvi pamusoro pawo." 
2Kings18:24 “Ungagona seiko kukunda mukuru mumwe kuna vaduku vavaranda vatenzi vangu, kana ukavimba naIjipiti kuti upiwe ngoro namabhiza navo?" 
2Kings18:25 Ini ndauya kuzorwa nenzvimbo iyi kuti ndiiparadze ndisina Jehovha here? Ndiye Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Enda undorwa nenyika iyo, uiparadze.’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Ipapo Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikia, naShebhana, naJoa vakati kumukuru wavatariri, “Tinokumbira kuti mutaure henyu navaranda venyu norurimi rwechiAramaia, nokuti tinochinzwisisa; murege henyu kutaura nesu norurimi rwavaJudha, vanhu vose vari parusvingo vazvinzwe.”" 
2Kings18:27 Asi mukuru wavatariri wakati kwaari, “Tenzi wangu wakandituma kuna tenzi wako nokwauri here, kuti nditaure mashoko awa? Haana kundituma here kuvanhu vagere pamusoro porusvingo, kuti vadye ndove yavo nemvura yavo pamwechete nemi?”" 
2Kings18:28 Ipapo mukuru wavatariri akamira, akadanidzira nezwi guru norurimi rwavaJudha, akataura achiti, “Inzwai shoko ramambo mukuru, iye mambo weAsiria." 
2Kings18:29 Zvanzi namambo, ‘Hezekiya ngaarege kukunyengerai; nokuti haagoni kukurwirai pamaoko ake;’" 
2Kings18:30 Hezekiya ngaarege kukuvimbisai naJehovha, achiti ‘Jehovha uchatirwira zvirokwazvo, uye kuti guta iri haringaiswi mumaoko amambo weAsiria.’" 
2Kings18:31 Musateerera Hezekiya, nokuti zvanzi namambo weAsiria, ‘Yananai neni, mubudirei kwandiri, mudye mumwe nomumwe muzambiringa wake, mumwe nomumwe muwonde wake, mumwe nomumwe mvura yetsime rake;" 
2Kings18:32 kusvikira ini ndauya ndikutorei, ndikuisei kunyika yakafanana neyenyu, nyika ine zviyo newaini, nyika ine chingwa neminda yemizambiringa, nyika ine mafuta emiorivhi nouchi, murarame, murege kufa; regai kuteerera Hezekiya, kana achikugombedzerai’ achiti, ‘Jehovha uchatirwira.’" 
2Kings18:33 “Ko mumwe wavamwari vendudzi wakatomborwira nyika yake paruoko rwamambo weAsiria here? 
2Kings18:34 Vamwari veHamati neAripadhi varipi? Vamwari veSefarivhaimi, neHena, neIvha varipi vakarwira Samaria paruoko rwangu here?" 
2Kings18:35 Ndavapiko pakati pavamwari vose venyika vakarwira nyika yavo paruoko rwangu, zvamunoti Jehovha ucharwira Jerusaremu paruoko rwangu?”" 
2Kings18:36 Asi vanhu vakaramba vanyerere, havana kumupindura shoko rimwe, nokuti murairo wamambo wakanga uchiti, “Regai kumupindura.”" 
2Kings18:37 Zvino Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikia, waitarira imba, naShebha munyori, naJoa, mwanakomana waAsafi sahwira, vakaenda kuna Hezekiya, nguo dzavo dzabvarurwa, vakamuudza mashoko omukuru wavatariri." 
2Kings19:1 Zvino mambo Hezekiya wakati achizvinzwa, akabvarura nguo dzake, akafuka magumbu, akapinda mumba maJehovha." 
2Kings19:2 Akatuma Eriakimu waitarira imba, naShebhana munyori, navakuru vavapristi, vakafuka magumbu, kuno muporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi." 
2Kings19:3 Vakati kwaari, “Zvanzi naHezekiya, ‘Nhasi izuva rokutambudzika, nerokutukwa, nerokuzvidzwa; nokuti vana vakasvika pakuzvarwa, asi hakuna simba rokuzvara naro." 
2Kings19:4 Zvimwe Jehovha Mwari wenyu uchanzwa mashoko ose omukuru wavatariri, wakatumwa namambo weAsiria tenzi wake, kuzvidza Mwari mupenyu, agovatuka pamusoro pamashoko akanzwa Jehovha Mwari wenyu; naizvozvo nyengetererai vakasara.’ ”" 
2Kings19:5 Ipapo varanda vamambo Hezekiya vakasvika kuna Isaya. 
2Kings19:6 Isaya akati kwavari, “Udzai tenzi wenyu, muti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, usatya hako mashoko awakanzwa, andakamhurwa nawo navaranda vamambo weAsiria." 
2Kings19:7 Tarira, ndichaisa mweya wokutya mukati make, uchanzwa guhu, ndokudzokera kunyika yake; ndichamuurayisa nomunondo munyika yake.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Naizvozvo mukuru wavatariri wakadzoka, akawana mambo weAsiria achirwa neRibhina, nokuti wakanga anzwa kuti wabva paRakishi."
