2Chronicles2:2 Soromoni akaverenga varume vane zviuru zvina makumi manomwe kuzotakura mitoro, navarume vane zviuru zvina makumi masere kuzotema matanda pamakomo, navane zviuru zvitatu namazana matanhatu kuzova vatariri vavo." 
2Chronicles2:3 Soromoni akatuma shoko kuna Hurami mambo weTaya, akati, “Sezvamakaitira baba vangu Dhavhidhi, mukavatumira misidhari yokuzvivakira nayo imba yokugaramo, mundiitirewo saizvozvo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Tarirai, ndovakira zita raJehovha Mwari wangu imba, ndimutsaurire iyo, kuti ndipisire pamberi pake zvinonhuwira zvemiti yakanaka, nokuisapo zvingwa zvokuratidza zvenguva dzose nezvipiriso zvinopiswa mangwanani namadekwana, pamaSabata, napakugara kwomwedzi, napamitambo yakatarwa naJehovha Mwari wedu. Ndizvo zvakarairwa VaIsiraeri nokusingaperi." 
2Chronicles2:5 Imba yandinovaka ihuru; nokuti Mwari wedu mukuru kupfuura vamwari vose. 
2Chronicles2:6 Asi ndianiko anogona kumuvakira imba, denga nokudenga–denga zvarisingagoni kumuringana? Zvino ini ndini aniko, kuti ndimuvakire imba, asi kungopisa zvinonhuwira pamberi pake?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Naizvozvo zvino chinditumirai murume akangwara pakubata mabasa endarama, nesirivha, nendarira, namatare, nemicheka mishava, nemitsvuku, nemitema, uye anoziva kuveza zvose, abate pamwechete navarume vakangwara vandinavo paJudha napaJerusaremu, vakaiswapo nababa vangu Dhavhidhi." 
2Chronicles2:8 Nditumireiwo misidhari, nemisipiresi, namatanda emiarigumi yapaRibhanoni; nokuti ndinoziva kuti varanda venyu vane njere dzokutema matanda paRibhanoni; tarirai varanda vangu vachava navaranda venyu," 
2Chronicles2:9 kundigadzirira matanda akawanda; nokuti imba yandobva ndovaka ichava huru zvinoshamisa. 
2Chronicles2:10 Tarirai, ndichapa varanda venyu, ivo vanotema matanda, zviyero zvine zviuru zvamakumi maviri zvezviyo, nezviyero zvine zviuru zvamakumi maviri zvebhari, namabhati ane zviuru zvamakumi maviri ewaini, namabhati ane zviuru zvamakumi maviri amafuta.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Ipapo Hurami mambo weTaya akapindura mutsamba yaakatuma kuna Soromoni, akati, “Jehovha akada vanhu vake, saka akakuita mambo wavo.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Hurami akatiwo, “Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakudzwe, iye akasika denga napasi, akapa mambo Dhavhidhi mwanakomana akangwara, akapiwa kungwara nokuziva, kuvakira Jehovha imba neimba youshe hwake." 
2Chronicles2:13 Zvino ndatuma munhu akachenjera, akapiwa zivo, iye Hurami Abhi," 
2Chronicles2:14 mwanakomana womukadzi pakati pavakunda vaDhani, baba vake aiva munhu weTaya, anoziva kubata mabasa endarama, nesirivha, nendarira, namatare, namabwe, namatanda, nemicheka mishava, nemitema, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, nemicheka mitsvuku; uye kuveza kwose, nokufunga mano ose; iye ngaapiwe ugaro pakati pavarume venyu vakachenjera, navarume vakachenjera vashe wangu Dhavhidhi baba venyu." 
2Chronicles2:15 Naizvozvo zvino ishe wangu ngaatumire varanda vake zviyo, nebhari, namafuta newaini, sezvaakatura;" 
2Chronicles2:16 isu tichatema matanda paRebhanoni, sezvamunoda; tichaasvitsa kwamuri akabatanidzwa, aende Jopa negungwa; imi mugokwira nawo Jerusaremu.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Ipapo Soromoni akaverenga vatorwa vose vaiva panyika yaIsiraeri, sezvavakanga vaverengwa naDhavhidhi baba vake, vakasvika zviuru zvine zana namakumi mashanu nezvitatu namazana matanhatu." 
2Chronicles2:18 Akaira vane zviuru zvina makumi manomwe vave vatakuri vemitoro, navane zviuru zvina makumi masere vateme matanda pamakomo, uye vane zviuru zvitatu namazana matanhatu vave vatariri kuzoraira vanhu pakubata." 
2Chronicles3:1 Ipapo Soromoni akatanga kuvaka imba yaJehovha paJerusaremu pagomo reMoria, pakanga pazviratidza Jehovha kuna Dhavhidhi baba vake, akagadzira ipapo pakanga parairwa naDhavhidhi paburiro raOrinani muJebhusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Akatanga kuvaka pazuva repiri romwedzi wechipiri, negore rechina rokubata kwake ushe." 
2Chronicles3:3 Zvino ndidzo nheyo dzakavambwa naSoromoni pakuvaka imba yaMwari; kureba kwayo, kana vachienzanisa namakubhiti akare, makubhiti ana makumi matanhatu, noupamhi makubhiti makumi maviri." 
2Chronicles3:4 Biravira, raiva pamberi peimba, kureba kwaro kwakanga kwakafanana noupamhi hweimba, makubhiti makumi maviri, nokukwirira kwaro makubhiti ane zana namakumi maviri; akaifukidza nechomukati nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
2Chronicles3:5 Akafukidza imba huru namatanda omusipiresi, akafukidzwa nendarama yakaisvonaka, akavezera pamusoro pawo muchindwe namaketani." 
2Chronicles3:6 Akashongedza imba ukomba hwamabwe anokosha; ndarama yakanga iri ndarama yeParivhaimi. 
2Chronicles3:7 Akafukidzawo imba nendarama, namatanda ayo, nezvikumbaridzo zvayo, namadziro ayo, namagonhi ayo; akavezera makerubhi pamadziro." 
2Chronicles3:8 Akavakawo imba tsvene–tsvene; kureba kwayo kwakanga kwakafanana nohupamhi hweimba, makubhiti ana makumi maviri, noupamhi hwayo makubhiti ana makumi maviri; akaifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka yakasvika matarenta mazana matanhatu." 
2Chronicles3:9 Kurema kwembambo kwakasvika mashekeri endarama ana makumi mashanu. Akafukidza makamuri okumusoro nendarama. 
2Chronicles3:10 Paimba tsvene–tsvene akaita makerubhi maviri zviri zvifananidzo zvakavezwa; akaafukidza nendarama. 
2Chronicles3:11 Mapapiro amakerubhi akasvika makubhiti ana makumi maviri pakureba kwawo; bapiro rerimwe rakanga rina makubhiti mashanu, richisvika kumadziro eimba; nerimwe bapirowo rakanga rina makubhiti mashanu, richisvika kubapiro rerimwe kerubhi." 
2Chronicles3:12 Nebapiro rerimwe kerubhi rakanga rina makubhiti mashanu, richisvika kumadziro eimba; nerimwe bapirowo rakanga rina makubhiti mashanu, richibatana nebapiro rerimwe kerubhi." 
2Chronicles3:13 Mapapiro amakerubhi awa akanga akatambanudzwa, akasvika makubhiti makumi maviri; akanga amire namakumbo awo, zviso zvawo zvakaringira kumba." 
2Chronicles3:14 Akaitawo chidzitiro nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka–naka; akasonerapo makerubhi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Akaitawo pamberi peimba mbiru mbiri; kukwirira kwadzo kwakasvika makubhiti ana makumi matatu namashanu, nomusoro wakanga uri pamusoro peimwe neimwe wakasvika makubhiti mashanu." 
2Chronicles3:16 Akaitawo maketani panzvimbo tsvene, akaaisa pamisoro yembiru; akaita matamba ane zana, akaaisa pamaketani." 
2Chronicles3:17 Akamisa mbiru mbiri pamberi petemberi, imwe kurudyi, imwe kuruboshwe; yokurudyi akaitumidza zita rinonzi Jakini, neyokuruboshwe akaitumidza Bhoazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Akaitawo atari yendarira, kureba kwayo kwakanga kuna makubhiti ana makumi maviri, nokukwirira kwayo ane gumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Akaitawo dziva rendarira yakanyauswa, rakasvika makubhiti ane gumi paupamhi pamuromo, rakatenderera; nokukwirira kwaro kwakasvika makubhiti mashanu; uye pakuyera tambo yakasvika makubhiti ana makumi matatu yakaripoteredza." 
2Chronicles4:3 Pasi paro pakanga pane zvifananidzo zvenzombe dzakanga dzichirikomberedza, zvichiita gumi pakubhiti rimwe nerimwe, zvichipoteredza dziva. Nzombe dzakaita misara miviri, dzakaumbwa pamwechete naro pakuumbwa kwaro." 
2Chronicles4:4 Rakanga rimire pamusoro penzombe gumi nembiri, nhatu dzakanga dzakatarira kurutivi rwokumusoro, nhatu kurutivi rwamavirazuva, nhatu kurutivi rwezasi, nenhatu kurutivi rwamabvazuva; dziva rakanga rakagadzwa pamusoro padzo, idzo dzakafuratirana." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ukobvu hwaro hwakanga hwakaita soupamhi hwechanza, nomuromo waro wakanga wakafanana nomuromo wembiya, seruva rehapa; mukati makadirwa uye makaringana mabhati ane zviuru zvitatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Akaitawo midziyo yokusukira ine gumi, akaisa mishanu kurudyi nemishanu kuruboshwe, yokusukiramo; zvinhu zvezvipiriso, zvaipiswa, zvaisukirwamo; asi dziva rakanga riri ravapristi rokushambidziramo." 
2Chronicles4:7 Akaitawo zvigadziko zvemwenje zvine gumi zvendarama, sezvaakanga arairwa pamusoro pazvo; akazviisa patemberi, zvishanu kurudyi uye zvishanu kuruboshwe." 
2Chronicles4:8 Akaitawo tafura dzine gumi, akadziisa mutemberi, shanu kurudyi uye shanu kuruboshwe. Akaita midziyo yendarama ine zana." 
2Chronicles4:9 Uye akaitawo ruvazhe rwavapristi, noruvazhe rukuru, nemikova yoruvazhe, akafukidza mikova yarwo nendarira." 
2Chronicles4:10 Akaisa dziva kurutivi rworudyi rweimba kumabvazuva, kwakatarira zasi." 
2Chronicles4:11 Hurami akaita hari, nefoshoro, nembiya. Naizvozvo Hurami akapedza mabasa ose aakaitira Soromoni paimba yaJehovha;" 
2Chronicles4:12 zvaiti: mbiru mbiri, nembiya, nemisoro miviri, yakanga iri pamisoro yembiru; nemimbure miviri yokufukidza nayo mbiya mbiri dzemisoro miviri yakanga iri pamisoro yembiru;" 
2Chronicles4:13 namatamba ana mazana mana emimbure miviri, misara miviri yamatamba pamumbure mumwe nomumwe, kufukidza mbiya mbiri yemisoro yakanga iri pamusoro pembiru;" 
2Chronicles4:14 akaitawo zvingoro zvine gumi, nemidziyo yokushambidzira pamusoro pezvingoro;" 
2Chronicles4:15 nedziva rimwe, nenzombe gumi nembiri pasi pedziva." 
2Chronicles4:16 Nehariwo, nefoshoro, nezvikokowonho zvenyama, nenhumbi dzose dzayo, Hurami Abhi wakazviitira mambo Soromoni nendarira inobwinya, zvive zveimba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles4:17 Mambo akazviumba pabani raJodhani, pakati peSukoti neZeredha." 
2Chronicles4:18 Saizvozvo Soromoni akaita nhumbi dzose idzi dzakawanda kwazvo; nokuti kurema kwendarira kwakanga kusingayerwi. 
2Chronicles4:19 Soromoni akaita nhumbi dzose dzakanga dziri mumba maMwari, neatari yendarirawo netafura pakanga pane zvingwa zvokuratidza;" 
2Chronicles4:20 nezvigadziko zvemwenje nemwenje yazvo, kuti apfute pamberi penzvimbo tsvene, sezvavakanga varairwa, zviri zvendarama;" 
2Chronicles4:21 namaruva, nemwenje, nembato, zvendarama, iri pandarama yakanaka kwazvo;" 
2Chronicles4:22 nembato, nembiya, nezvirongo, nezvaenga zvomoto, zviri zvendarama yakaisvonaka; napavakapinda napo paimba, mikova yomukati yayo yenzvimbo tsvene–tsvene; nemikova yeimba, iyo temberi, yakanga iri yendarama." 
2Chronicles5:1 Saizvozvo mabasa ose akaitirwa imba yaJehovha naSoromoni akapera. Zvino Soromoni akapinza zvinhu zvakanga zvatsaurirwa Jehovha nababa vake Dhavhidhi, sirivha, nendarama, nenhumbi dzose, akadziisa muzvivigiro zveimba yaMwari." 
2Chronicles5:2 Zvino Soromoni akaunganidza vakuru VaIsiraeri, navakuru vose vamarudzi, iwo machinda edzimba dzamadzibaba avana VaIsiraeri, paJerusaremu, akakwidza areka yesungano yaJehovha ibve paguta raDhavhidhi, iro Zioni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Varume vose VaIsiraeri vakaungana kuna mambo pamutambo, wakanga uri pamwedzi wechinomwe." 
2Chronicles5:4 Vakuru vose VaIsiraeri vakasvika, vaRevhi vakasimudza areka." 
2Chronicles5:5 Vakakwira neareka, netende rokusangana, nenhumbi dzose tsvene dzakanga dziri muTende; vapristi vaRevhi vakakwira naizvozvo." 
2Chronicles5:6 Mambo Soromoni, neungano yose yaVaIsiraeri yakanga yaunganira kwaari, vakafamba pamberi peareka, vakabayira makwai nenzombe, zvakanga zvisingagoni kuverengwa nokuwanda kwazvo." 
2Chronicles5:7 Ipapo vapristi vakagadzika areka yesungano yaJehovha panzvimbo yayo, panzvimbo tsvene yeimba, panzvimbo tsvene–tsvene, ipo panyasi pamapapiro amakerubhi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Nokuti makerubhi akatambanudza mapapiro awo pamusoro penzvimbo yeareka, makerubhi akafukidza areka namatanda ayo nechokumusoro." 
2Chronicles5:9 Matanda akanga akareba; naizvozvo miromo yamatanda yakanga ichionekwa kana munhu ari paareka pamberi penzvimbo tsvene; asi akanga asingaonekwi nechokunze; ichipo kusvikira nhasi. 
2Chronicles5:10 Mukati meareka makanga musisina chiro, asi mahwendefa maviri akanga aiswamo naMosesi paHorebhu, nguva Jehovha yaakaita sungano navana VaIsiraeri pakubuda kwavo paIjipiti." 
2Chronicles5:11 Zvino vapristi vakati vabuda panzvimbo tsvene, (nokuti vapristi vose, vakanga varipo, vakanga vazvinatsa, vasingaiti hanya namapoka avo;" 
2Chronicles5:12 navaRevhi vosewo, vaiva vaimbi, vose vavo, vaiti, Asafi, naHemani, naJedhutuni, navanakomana vavo, navanun'una vavo, vakafuka micheka yakanaka kwazvo, vanamakandira, nemitengerangwa, nembira, vakamira kurutivi rwamabvazuva rweatari, uye pamwechete navo vapristi vane zana namakumi maviri, vachiridza hwamanda;)" 
2Chronicles5:13 zvino varidzi vehwamanda, navaimbi, vakati vachiita mawa, vachiita nenzwi rimwe vachirumbidza nokuvonga Jehovha; vakati vachiimbisa pamwechete nehwamanda, namakandira, nezvokuridzisa nazvo, vachirumbidza Jehovha, vachiti, “Nokuti akanaka; nokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;” ipapo imba yakazara negore, iyo imba yaJehovha;" 
2Chronicles5:14 naizvozvo vapristi vakanga vasingagoni kumira pabasa nokuda kwegore; nokuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakazadza imba yaMwari. 
2Chronicles6:1 Ipapo Soromoni akati, “Jehovha akati, ndinoda kugara mukati merima guru." 
2Chronicles6:2 Asi ndakakuvakirai imba pamungagara, nenzvimbo yamungagara nokusingaperi.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Zvino mambo akatendeudza chiso chake, akaropafadza ungano yose yaIsiraeri; ungano yose yaIsiraeri ikasimuka." 
2Chronicles6:4 Akati, “Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakudzwe, iye akataura nomuromo wake naDhavhidhi baba vangu, akazvizadzisa noruoko rwake, achiti," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kubva pazuva randakabudisa vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri paIjipiti, handina kutsaura guta rimwe pamarudzi ose aIsiraeri, pavangandivakira imba, kuti zita rangu rigarepo; uye handina kutsaura munhu mumwe ave mutungamiriri wavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri;" 
2Chronicles6:6 asi ndakatsaura Jerusaremu, kuti zita rangu rigarepo; uye ndakatsaura Dhavhidhi kuti abate vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 “Zvino Dhavhidhi baba vangu vakanga vachida kuvakira zita raJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri imba. 
2Chronicles6:8 Asi Jehovha akati kuna Dhavhidhi baba vangu, ‘Wakaita zvakanaka, zvawakanga uchida kuvakira zita rangu imba;" 
2Chronicles6:9 kunyangwe zvakadaro iwe haungavaki imba iyo; asi mwanakomana wako wauchabereka, ndiye achavakira zita rangu imba.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Zvino Jehovha akaita shoko rake raakataura, nokuti ini ndamuka panzvimbo yaDhavhidhi baba vangu, ndikagara pachigaro choushe chaIsiraeri, sezvakapika Jehovha, ndikavakira zita raJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri imba." 
2Chronicles6:11 Imomo ndakaisa areka, mune sungano yaJehovha, yaakaita navana VaIsiraeri.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Akamira pamberi peatari yaJehovha, pamberi peungano yose yaIsiraeri, akatambanudza maoko ake;" 
2Chronicles6:13 (nokuti Soromoni akanga aita nendarira pokumira pakakwirira, kureba kwapo kwakasvika makubhiti mashanu, noupamhi makubhiti mashanu, nokukwirira makubhiti matatu, akazviisa pakati poruvazhe; akamira pamusoro pazvo, akapfugama pamberi peungano yose yaIsiraeri, akatambanudzira maoko ake kudenga;)" 
2Chronicles6:14 akati, “Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, hakuna mumwe Mwari akafanana nemi kudenga kumusoro kana panyika pasi; munorangarira sungano nenyasha kuvaranda venyu, vanofamba pamberi penyu nomwoyo wavo wose." 
2Chronicles6:15 Imi makaitira muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu, sezvamakamupikira; mukataura nomuromo wenyu, mukazviita noruoko rwenyu, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
2Chronicles6:16 Naizvozvo zvino, Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, itirai muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu, sezvamakamupikira, muchiti, ‘Haungashaiwi munhu achagara pachigaro choushe chaIsiraeri pamberi pangu, kana vana vako vakangwarira kufamba kwavo, vakafamba pamberi pangu sezvawakafamba iwe pamberi pangu.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Naizvozvo zvino, Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, shoko renyu ngariitike, iro ramakataura kumuranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Ko mukati Mwari ungagara panyika here? Tarira, denga nokudenga–denga hazvingamuringani; ndoda imba ino yandakavaka!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, ivai nehanya nomunyengetero womuranda wenyu, nokukumbira kwake, Jehovha Mwari wangu, munzwe kudanidzira nokunyengetera kwomuranda wenyu, kwaanonyengetera pamberi penyu nhasi." 
2Chronicles6:20 “Meso enyu ngaarambe achirindira imba ino masikati nousiku, nzvimbo iyi yamakataura pamusoro payo, muchiti, muchagarisa zita renyupo; inzwai munyengetero womuranda wenyu waanozonyengetera akatarira kunzvimbo ino." 
2Chronicles6:21 “Munzwe kukumbira kwomuranda wenyu, nokwavanhu venyu VaIsiraeri, kana vachizonyengetera vakatarira kunzvimbo iyi; donzwai iko kudenga, kwamunogara; zvino kana mukanzwa, muvakanganwire henyu." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Kana munhu achinge atadzira waanogara naye, akapikiswa mhiko, akauya akapika pamberi peatari yenyu muimba ino;" 
2Chronicles6:23 inzwai iko kudenga, muite mururamisire varanda venyu, mupe akaipa mhosva, arohwe pamusoro pomufambiro wake; asi mururamisire akarurama, apiwe zvakafanira kururama kwake." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Kana vanhu venyu VaIsiraeri vachinge vakundwa navavengi vavo, nemhaka yokuti vakakutadzirai; kana vakadzokerazve kwamuri, vakatenda zita renyu, vakanyengetera kwamuri nokukumbira muimba ino;" 
2Chronicles6:25 inzwai iko kudenga, mukanganwire zvivi zvavanhu venyu VaIsiraeri, muvadzoserezve kunyika yamakavapa ivo madzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles6:26 Kana kudenga kuchinge kwazarirwa, mvura ikasanaya nemhaka yokuti vakakutadzirai; kana vakanyengetera vakatarira kunzvimbo ino, vakatenda zita renyu, vatendeuka pazvivi zvavo, nokuti munenge mavarova;" 
2Chronicles6:27 inzwai iko kudenga, mukanganwire zvivi zvavaranda venyu, nezvavanhu venyu VaIsiraeri, nokuti munovadzidzisa nzira yakanaka yavanofanira kufamba nayo; munise mvura panyika iyo yamakapa vanhu venyu kuti ive nhaka yavo." 
2Chronicles6:28 Kana nzara ikavapo panyika, kana denda rikavapo, kana nyunje nokuvhuvha zvikavapo, nemhashu nehonye; kana vavengi vavo vakavakomba panyika ina maguta avo; kana nyatwa kana chirwere chipi nechipi chikavapo." 
2Chronicles6:29 “Kana munhu upi noupi, kana vanhu venyu vose VaIsiraeri vakanyengetera kana kukumbira, mumwe nomumwe achiziva kutambudzika kuri pamwoyo wake kana kuchema kwake, akatambanudzira maoko ake kuimba ino;" 
2Chronicles6:30 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kwamunogara, mukanganwire muripire mumwe nomumwe zvakafanira mafambiro ake ose, iye wamunoziva mwoyo wake; (nokuti imi, imi moga, ndimi munoziva mwoyo yavana vavanhu vose;)" 
2Chronicles6:31 kuti vakutyei, vafambe munzira dzenyu, nguva yose yavanogara panyika yamakapa madzibaba edu." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Zvino kana ari mutorwa, asati ari wavanhu venyu VaIsiraeri, kana akabva kunyika iri kure nokuda kwezita renyu guru, noruoko rwenyu rune simba, noruoko rwenyu rwakatambanudzwa; kana akauya akanyengetera akatarira kuimba ino." 
2Chronicles6:33 “Inzwai henyu iko kudenga kwamunogara, muitire mutorwa zvose zvaanokumbira, kuti vanhu vose venyika vazive zita renyu, vakutyei, sezvinoita vanhu venyu VaIsiraeri, vazive kuti imba ino yandakavaka yakatumidzwa zita renyu." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Kana vanhu venyu vakandorwa navavengi vavo, vakaenda nenzira ipi neipi yamuchavatuma nayo, vakanyengetera kwamuri vakatarira kuguta rino ramakatsaura, nokuimba yandakavakira zita renyu;" 
2Chronicles6:35 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kunyengetera kwavo nokukumbira kwavo, muvaruramisire." 
2Chronicles6:36 Kana vakakutadzirai, (nokuti hakuna munhu asingatadzi), mukavatsamwira, mukavaisa kuvavengi vavo, vakatapwa kunyika yavavengi vavo, kana kure kana pedyo." 
2Chronicles6:37 “Kana vakazozvifunga panyika kwavakatapirwa, vakadzokazve, vakakumbira kwamuri panyika yokutapwa kwavo, vakati, ‘Tatadza, taita zvakaipa, taita zvisakarurama;’" 
2Chronicles6:38 kana vakadzokerazve kwamuri nomwoyo wavo wose, nomweya wose, panyika yokutapwa kwavo, kwavakatapirwa, vakanyengetera vakatarira kunyika yavo, yamakapa madzibaba avo, nokuguta ramakatsaura imi, nokuimba yandakavakira zita renyu;" 
2Chronicles6:39 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kwamunogara, kunyengetera kwavo nokukumbira kwavo, muvaruramisire; mukanganwire vanhu venyu vakakutadzirai." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Zvino Mwari wangu, meso enyu ngaasvinure, nenzeve dzenyu ngadziteerere zvakanaka munyengetero unonyengeterwa munzvimbo ino." 
2Chronicles6:41 Naizvozvo zvino simukai, Jehovha Mwari, mupinde munzvimbo yenyu yokuzorora, neareka yesimba renyu; vapristi venyu, Jehovha Mwari, ngavafukidzwe noruponeso, navatsvene venyu ngavafarire zvakanaka." 
2Chronicles6:42 Jehovha Mwari, musafuratira chiso chomuzodzwa wenyu; rangarirai mabasa akanaka aDhavhidhi muranda wenyu.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Zvino Soromoni akati apedza kunyengetera, moto ndokuburuka kudenga, ukapedza chipiriso chinopiswa nezvimwe zvibairo; kubwinya kwaJehovha kukazadza imba." 
2Chronicles7:2 Vapristi vakakoniwa kupinda muimba yaJehovha, nokuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakanga kwazadza imba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles7:3 Vana VaIsiraeri vose vakatarira moto uchiburuka kudenga nokubwinya kwaJehovha kuchigara pamusoro peimba; vakakotamira pasi nezviso zvavo pakarongwa namabwe, vakanamata nokuvonga Jehovha, vachiti, “Nokuti akanaka, nokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Ipapo mambo navanhu vose vakabayira zvibairo pamberi paJehovha. 
2Chronicles7:5 Mambo Soromoni akabayira chibayiro chenzombe dzine zviuru zvina makumi maviri nezviviri, namakwai ane zviuru zvine zana namakumi maviri. Saizvozvo mambo navanhu vose vakatsaurira Mwari imba iyo." 
2Chronicles7:6 Vapristi vakamirapo, sezvavakagoverwa mabasa avo; navaRevhiwo vane zvokuridzira Jehovha, zvakaitwa namambo Dhavhidhi, zvokuvonga Jehovha nazvo, nokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi, panguva iya Dhavhidhi yaakakudza Jehovha nazvo; vapristi vakaridza hwamanda pamberi pavo, VaIsiraeri vose vakamira." 
2Chronicles7:7 Soromoni akatsaurawo nzvimbo yapakati yoruvazhe rwakanga ruri pamberi peimba yaJehovha; nokuti ndipo paakabayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa, namafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; nokuti atari yendarira yakaitwa naSoromoni yakanga isingagoni kuringana chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu, namafuta." 
2Chronicles7:8 Naizvozvo Soromoni akatamba mutambo panguva iyo mazuva manomwe, naVaIsiraeri vose pamwechete naye, ikaita ungano huru–huru, kubva pavanopinda paHamati, kusvikira parukova rweIjipiti." 
2Chronicles7:9 Zvino pazuva rorusere vakatamba mutambo wokupedzisira; nokuti vakatsaura atari mazuva manomwe, vakaita mutambo mazuva manomwe." 
2Chronicles7:10 Zvino pazuva ramakumi maviri namatatu romwedzi wechinomwe akaendisa vanhu kumatende avo nemwoyo yakanga ichifara, ichifarira zvakanaka zvose zvakaitira Jehovha Dhavhidhi, naSoromoni, navanhu vake VaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles7:11 Saizvozvo Soromoni akapedza imba yaJehovha, neimba yamambo; zvose zvakanga zviri mumwoyo waSoromoni kuita muimba yaJehovha, nomumba make, wakazviita kwazvo." 
2Chronicles7:12 Ipapo Jehovha akazviratidza kuna Soromoni usiku, akati kwaari, “Ndanzwa kunyengetera kwako, ndazvitsaurira nzvimbo iyi, ive imba yokubayira zvibairo." 
2Chronicles7:13 Kana ndichinge ndadzivira kudenga, kuti mvura irege kunaya, kana zvimwe ndichinge ndaraira mhashu, kuti dzipedze nyika, kana zvimwe ndichinge ndatuma denda pakati pavanhu vangu;" 
2Chronicles7:14 kana vanhu vangu, vakatumidzwa nezita rangu, vakazvininipisa, vakanyengetera nokutsvaka chiso changu, nokurega nzira dzavo dzakaipa; ipapo ndichanzwa kudenga ndichavakanganwira zvivi zvavo, nokupodza nyika yavo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Zvino meso angu achasvinura, nzeve dzangu dzichateerera ndinzwe munyengetero unoitwa panzvimbo iyi." 
2Chronicles7:16 “Nokuti zvino ndatsaura imba ino nokuiita tsvene, zita rangu rivepo nokusingaperi; meso angu nomwoyo wangu zvichavapo nokusingaperi." 
2Chronicles7:17 “Kana uriwe, kana ukafamba pamberi pangu sababa vako, Dhavhidhi, ukaita zvose zvandakakuraira, ukachengeta zvandatema nezvandatonga," 
2Chronicles7:18 ipapo ini ndichasimbisa chigaro chako choushe, sezvandakapikira baba vako Dhavhidhi, ndichiti, ‘Haungashaiwi munhu achabata ushe hwaIsiraeri.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 Asi kana mukatsauka, mukasiya zvandatema nezvandaraira zvandakaisa pamberi penyu, mukandoshumira vamwe vamwari, mukavanamata;" 
2Chronicles7:20 ipapo ndichavadzura nemidzi panyika yangu yandakavapa, neimba iyi yandakatsaurira zita rangu, ndichairashira kure ndirege kuiona, ndiite shumo nechiseko pakati pavanhu vose." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Neimba iyi kunyangwe yakakwirira ikadai, vose vanopfuura nayo vachakanuka, vachiti, ‘Jehovha wakaitireiko kudai nenyika ino, uye neimba iyi?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Vachapindura, vachiti, ‘Nokuti vakasiya Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba avo, wakavabudisa panyika yeIjipiti, vakanamatira vamwe vamwari, vakavanamata, nokuvashumira; saka Jehovha akavapinza panjodzi idzi dzose.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Makore makumi maviri akati apera, Soromoni aakavaka nawo imba yaJehovha neimba yake," 
2Chronicles8:2 Soromoni akavaka maguta akanga apiwa Soromoni naHurami, akagarisa vana VaIsiraeri imomo." 
2Chronicles8:3 Soromoni akaenda Hamatizobha, akarikunda." 
2Chronicles8:4 Akavaka Tadhimoru murenje, namaguta ose amatura aakavaka paHamati." 
2Chronicles8:5 Akavakawo Bhetihoroni rokumusoro neBhetihoroni rezasi, ari maguta akakombwa namasvingo, ana masuwo, namazariro;" 
2Chronicles8:6 neBhaarati, namaguta ose engoro dzake, namaguta avatasvi vamabhiza ake, nezvose Soromoni zvaakanga achida kuzvivakira paJerusaremu, napaRebhanoni, napanyika yose yakabatwa naye." 
2Chronicles8:7 Kana vari vanhu vose vakanga vasara paVaHeti, naVaAmori, navaPerizi, naVaHivhi, naVaJebhusi, vakanga vasi vaVaIsiraeri;" 
2Chronicles8:8 pavana vavo vakanga vasara panyika shure kwavo, vasati vakaparadzwa naVaIsiraeri, pakati pavo Soromoni akaraira chibharo chavaranda kusvikira nhasi." 
2Chronicles8:9 Asi Soromoni haana kuita varanda pakati pavana VaIsiraeri, asi ivo vakanga vari varwi, navakuru vavatungamiriri vake vehondo, navarairi vengoro dzake, navatasvi vamabhiza ake." 
2Chronicles8:10 Ndivo vaiva vatariri vakuru vamambo Soromoni, vaiva namazana maviri namakumi mashanu, vairaira vanhu." 
2Chronicles8:11 Zvino Soromoni akandotora mukunda waFarao muguta raDhavhidhi, akamuisa kuimba yaakanga amuvakira; nokuti akati, “Mukadzi wangu haafaniri kugara muimba yaDhavhidhi mambo waIsiraeri, nokuti panzvimbo pasvika areka yaJehovha patsvene.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Zvino Soromoni akabayira Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa paatari yaJehovha, yaakanga avaka pamberi pebiravira," 
2Chronicles8:13 sezvavaifanira kuita zuva rimwe nerimwe, vakabayira sezvavakanga varairwa naMosesi, pamaSabata, napakugara kwomwedzi, napamitambo yakatarwa, katatu pagore, pamutambo wezvingwa zvisina mvuviro, napamutambo wamavhiki, napamutambo wamatumba." 
2Chronicles8:14 Akagadza, sezvaakarairwa naDhavhidhi baba vake, mapoka avapristi pamabasa avo, navaRevhi pamabasa avo, kuti varumbidze nokubata pamberi pavapristi, sezvavaifanira kuita zuva rimwe nerimwe; navatariri vemikova pamapoka avo pasuwo rimwe nerimwe; nokuti ndizvo zvakanga zvarairwa naDhavhidhi munhu waMwari." 
2Chronicles8:15 Havana kutsauka pamurairo wamambo kuvapristi navaRevhi pamusoro pezvinhu zvose napamusoro pepfuma. 
2Chronicles8:16 Zvino mabasa ose aSoromoni akapera kugadzirwa pazuva rokuvambwa kweimba kusvikira pakupera kwayo. Imba yaJehovha ikazopera chose. 
2Chronicles8:17 Ipapo Soromoni akaenda Ezionigebheri neEroti, pamhenderekedzo dzegungwa panyika yaEdhomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Hurami akamutumira navaranda vake zvikepe, navaranda vaiziva gungwa kwazvo vakaenda; Ofiri navaranda vaSoromoni, vakandotorapo ndarama yakasvika matarenta mazana mana namakumi mashanu, vakauya nayo kuna mambo Soromoni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Zvino mambokadzi weShebha akati anzwa mbiri yaSoromoni, akasvika Jerusaremu kuzoidza Soromoni nemibvunzo mikukutu, ana vanhu vazhinji, nengamera aitakura zvinonhuwira, nendarama zhinji–zhinji, nezvibwe zvinokosha; zvino akati asvika kuna Soromoni, akataurirana naye pamusoro pezvose zviri mumwoyo make." 
2Chronicles9:2 Soromoni, akapindura mibvunzo yake yose; hakuna chinhu chakanga chakavanzirwa Soromoni, chaakanga asingagoni kumuudza." 
2Chronicles9:3 Zvino mambokadzi weShebha akati aona kungwara kwaSoromoni, neimba yaakavaka," 
2Chronicles9:4 nezvokudya zviri patafura yake, nokugara kwavaranda vake, nokushumira kwavabatiri vake, nenguo dzavo, navadhiri vake, nenguo dzavo, nechikwiriso chake chaaikwira nacho kuimba yaJehovha, akapera mweya." 
2Chronicles9:5 Akati kuna mambo, “Guhu randakanzwa munyika yangu ramashoko enyu nokungwara kwenyu rakanga riri razvokwadi." 
2Chronicles9:6 “Asi handina kutenda mashoko avo, kusvikira ndauya, ndikaona nameso angu; asi tarirai handina kuudzwa kunyangwe hafu youkuru hwokungwara kwenyu; imi munokunda mbiri yandakanzwa." 
2Chronicles9:7 Varume venyu vano mufaro, navaranda venyu vano mufaro, vanomira pamberi penyu nguva dzose vachinzwa kungwara kwenyu." 
2Chronicles9:8 Jehovha Mwari wenyu ngaakudzwe, akafadzwa nemi, akakugadzai pachigaro chake choushe, muve mambo waJehovha Mwari wenyu; nokuti Mwari wenyu akada Isiraeri, kuti avasimbise nokusingaperi, saka akakuitai mambo wavo, kuti mutonge nokururamisa.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Akapa mambo matarenta ane zana namakumi maviri endarama, nezvinonhuwira zvizhinji kwazvo, nezvibwe zvinokosha; hakuna kumbovapo zvinonhuwira zvakawanda zvikadai, zvakafanana nezvakapiwa mambo Soromoni namambokadzi weShebha." 
2Chronicles9:10 Navarandawo vaHurami, navaranda vaSoromoni, ivo vaiuya nendarama vachibva Ofiri, vakauyawo nemiti yemiarigumi nezvibwe zvinokosha." 
2Chronicles9:11 Mambo akaita namatanda emiarigumi zvikwiriso zveimba yaJehovha, nezveimba yamambo, nembira nemitengerangwa zvavaimbi; zvakadai hazvina kumboonekwa panyika yaJudha." 
2Chronicles9:12 Mambo Soromoni akapa mambokadzi weShebha zvose zvaaida nezvaakakumbira; zvimwe zvaakauya nazvo kuna mambo zvisingaverengwi. Naizvozvo akadzoka, akaenda kunyika yake, iye navaranda vake." 
2Chronicles9:13 Zvino ndarama yakauyiswa kuna Soromoni gore rimwe nerimwe yakasvika matarenta ana mazana matanhatu namakumi matanhatu namatanhatu pakurema kwayo; 
2Chronicles9:14 vasingaverengi iyo yakauya navashambadziri navatengesi; namadzimambo ose eArabhia navabati venyika vakauya nendarama nesirivha kuna Soromoni. 
2Chronicles9:15 Mambo Soromoni akaita nhoo huru dzina mazana maviri nendarama yakapambadzirwa; nhoo imwe neimwe yakanga yakaitwa namashekeri ana mazana matatu endarama; 
2Chronicles9:16 akaitawo nhoo duku dzina mazana matatu dzendarama yakapambadzirwa; ndarama yakasvika mashekeri ana mazana matatu yakaiswa panhoo imwe neimwe; mambo akazviisa muimba yedondo reRebhanoni. 
2Chronicles9:17 Mambo akaitawo chigaro chikuru choushe chenyanga dzenzou, akachifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
2Chronicles9:18 Chigaro icho choushe chakanga chine zvikwiriso zvitanhatu, nechitsiko chendarama, zvakanga zvakabatanidzwa nechigaro choushe, nezvitsigiro kunhivi mbiri dzechigaro, neshumba mbiri dzakanga dzimire kunhivi dzezvitsigiro." 
2Chronicles9:19 Kwakanga kune shumba gumi nembiri dzimire pazvikwiriso zvitanhatu, mbiri–mbiri kunhivi dzechimwe nechimwe; hakuna kumboitwa chakadai kuno umwe ushe." 
2Chronicles9:20 Mikombe yose yokunwa nayo yamambo Soromoni yaiva yendarama, nemidziyo yose yeimba yedondo reRebhanoni yaiva yendarama yakaisvonaka; sirivha yakanga ichinzi haino murimo pamazuva aSoromoni." 
2Chronicles9:21 Nokuti mambo akanga ane zvikepe zvaienda Tashishi navaranda vaHurami; zvikepe zveTashishi zvaiuya kamwechete pamakore matatu zvine ndarama, nesirivha nenyanga dzenzou, netsoko namatendera." 
2Chronicles9:22 Naizvozvo mambo Soromoni akakunda madzimambo ose enyika pakupfuma nokuchenjera. 
2Chronicles9:23 Madzimambo ose enyika aiuya kushanyira Soromoni, kuzonzwa kungwara kwake, kwakanga kwaiswa naMwari mumwoyo make." 
2Chronicles9:24 Mumwe nomumwe aiuya nechipo chake chemidziyo yesirivha, nemidziyo yendarama, nehanzu, nenhumbi dzokurwa nadzo, nezvinonhuwira, namabhiza, namahesera, gore rimwe nerimwe." 
2Chronicles9:25 Soromoni akanga ane zvidyiro zvamabhiza nengoro, zvine zviuru zvina, navatasvi vamabhiza vane zviuru zvine gumi nezviviri, zvaakaisa pamaguta engoro, nokuna mambo paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles9:26 Akabata ushe hwamadzimambo ose, kubva paRwizi kusvikira panyika yavaFirisitia, nokumuganhu weIjipiti." 
2Chronicles9:27 Mambo akaunganidza sirivha paJerusaremu ikawanda ikaita samabwe, nemisidhari ikaita semionde yaiva pamapani." 
2Chronicles9:28 Vakandotorera Soromoni mabhiza paIjipiti, nokunyika dzose." 
2Chronicles9:29 Zvino mamwe mabasa aSoromoni, okutanga nookupedzisira, haana kunyorwa here paBhuku yoMuporofita Natani, napamashoko akaporofitwa naAhiya muShironi, napane zvakaonekwa nomuoni Idho pamusoro paJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Soromoni akabata ushe hwaVaIsiraeri vose paJerusaremu makore ana makumi mana. 
2Chronicles9:31 Ipapo Soromoni akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi baba vake, Rehobhoamu mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles10:1 Zvino Rehobhoamu akaenda Shekemi, nokuti VaIsiraeri vose vakanga vaungana paShekemi kuzomuita mambo." 
2Chronicles10:2 Zvino Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, akati achizvinzwa, (nokuti akanga achiri Ijipiti kwaakanga atizira nokuda kwaSoromoni,) Jerobhoamu ndokudzoka achibva Ijipiti." 
2Chronicles10:3 Vakatuma nhume kundomudana; Jerobhoamu naVaIsiraeri vose vakasvika vakataura naRehobhoamu, vakati," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Baba venyu vakatitakudza joko rinogozha; naizvozvo zvino imi chirerusai basa rababa venyu rakanga richigozha, nejoko ravo rinorema ravakaisa pamusoro pedu, tigokushumirai.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Iye akati kwavari, “Dzokeraizve kwandiri kana mazuva matatu apera.” Vanhu vakaenda." 
2Chronicles10:6 Ipapo mambo Rehobhoamu akarangana navakuru, vaimira pamberi paSoromoni baba vake, vachiri vapenyu, akati, “Mungandipa zano reiko, randingapindura vanhu ava naro?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ivo vakataura kwaari, vakati, “Kana mukaitira vanhu ava nomwoyo wakanaka, nokuvafadza, nokutaura mashoko akanaka kwavari, ipapo vachava varanda venyu nokusingaperi.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Asi iye wakaramba zano ravakuru, ravakamupa, akarangana namajaya ezero rake, akanga achimira pamberi pake." 
2Chronicles10:9 Akati kwavari, “Imi mungandipa zano reiko, ratingapindura naro vanhu ava vakataura neni, vachiti, ‘Rerusai joko rakaiswa pamusoro pedu nababa venyu?’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Zvino majaya ezero rake akataura kwaari, akati, “Iti kuvanhu ava vakataura newe, vachiti, ‘Baba venyu vakatitakudza joko rinogozha, asi imi chitirerusirai iro,’ utaure kwavari uti, ‘Munwe wangu muduku mukobvu kupfuura chiuno chababa vangu." 
2Chronicles10:11 Zvino, baba vangu zvavakakutakudzai joko rinorema, ini ndichawedzera pajoko renyu; baba vangu vaikurovai neshamhu, asi ini ndichakurovai nezvinyavada.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Naizvozvo Jerobhoami navanhu vose vakasvika kuna Rehobhoamu nezuva retatu, sezvavakanga varairwa namambo, achiti, “Dzokerai kwandirizve nezuva retatu.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Mambo akavapindura nehasha; mambo Rehobhoamu akarasha zano ravakuru," 
2Chronicles10:14 akataura kwavari sezvaakanga apiwa zano namajaya, akati, “Baba vangu vakakutakudzai joko rinorema, asi ini ndichawedzera pajoko renyu; baba vangu vaikurovai neshamhu, asi ini ndichakurovai nezvinyavada.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Naizvozvo mambo haana kuteerera vanhu; nokuti zvakanga zvabva kuna Mwari, kuti Jehovha asimbise shoko rake, raakataura naAhija muShiro kuna Jerobhoau mwanakomana waNebhati." 
2Chronicles10:16 Zvino VaIsiraeri vose vakati vachiona kuti mambo haana kuvateerera, vanhu vakapindura mambo, vakati, “Tino mugove weiko kuna Dhavhidhi? Uye hatine nhaka kumwanakomana weJese; endai henyu munhu mumwe nomumwe kutende rake, imi Isiraeri! Zvino Dhavhidhi, chitarira hako imba yako.” Naizvozvo VaIsiraeri vose vakaenda kumatende avo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Asi kana vari vana VaIsiraeri, vakanga vagere mumaguta aJudha, Rehobhoamu aiva mambo wavo." 
2Chronicles10:18 Zvino mambo Rehobhoamu akatuma Hadhorami mutariri wavanhu vechibharo, vana VaIsiraeri vakamutaka namabwe, akafa. Ipapo mambo Rehobhoamu akachimbidzika kukwira ngoro yake, akatizira Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Saizvozvo VaIsiraeri vakamukira imba yaDhavhidhi kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
2Chronicles11:1 Zvino Rehobhoamu akati achisvika Jerusaremu, akaunganidza veimba yaJudha naBhenjamini, varume vakatsaurwa vaiva nezviuru zvine zana namakumi masere, vaigona kurwa, kuti varwe naVaIsiraeri, kuti vadzosere ushezve kuna Rehobhoamu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Asi shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Shemaya munhu waMwari, richiti," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Taura naRehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, mambo waJudha, naVaIsiraeri vose paJudha naBhenjamini, uti," 
2Chronicles11:4 zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Hamufaniri kukwira kundorwa nehama dzenyu; mumwe nomumwe ngaadzokere kumba kwake, nokuti chinhu ichi chinobva kwandiri.’ ” Naizvozvo vakateerera mashoko aJehovha, vakadzoka pakundorwa naJerobhoamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehobhoamu akagara Jerusaremu, akavaka maguta enhare paJudha." 
2Chronicles11:6 Akavaka Bhetirehemu, neEtami, neTekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 neBhetizuri, neSoko, neAdhuramu," 
2Chronicles11:8 neGati, neMaresha, neZifi," 
2Chronicles11:9 neAdhoraimi, neRakishi, neAzeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 neZora, neAijaroni, neHebhuroni, akanga ari maguta akakombwa paJudha neBhenjamini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Akasimbisa nhare, akaisamo vakuru, nezvokudya zvakaunganidzwamo, namafuta, newaini." 
2Chronicles11:12 Muguta rimwe nerimwe akaisa nhoo namapfumo, akaasimbisa kwazvo kwazvo. Judha naBhenjamini vakanga vari vake." 
2Chronicles11:13 Navapristi navaRevhi, vaiva pakati paIsiraeri yose, vakaungana kwaari, vachibva panyika yavo yose." 
2Chronicles11:14 Nokuti vaRevhi vakabva pamafuro avo nepfuma yavo, vakaenda kwaJudha neJerusaremu; nokuti Jerobhoamu navanakomana vake vakavadzinga, kuti varege kubata basa roupristi pamberi paJehovha." 
2Chronicles11:15 Iye akazvitsaurira vapristi vapamatunhu akakwirira, navezvifananidzo zvenhongo dzembudzi, navemhuru dzaakaita." 
2Chronicles11:16 Zvino vose pakati pamarudzi ose aVaIsiraeri, vakanga vachitsvaka Jehovha nomwoyo wose, vakavatevera, vakaenda Jerusaremu kuzobayira Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Saizvozvo vakasimbisa ushe hwaJudha, vakasimbisa Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, makore matatu; nokuti vakafamba panzira yaDhavhidhi naSoromoni makore matatu." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehobhoamu akawana mukadzi, Maharati mukunda waJerimoti mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, nowaAbhihairi mukunda waEriabhi mwanakomana waJese." 
2Chronicles11:19 Iye akamuberekera vanakomana, vaiti: Jeushi, naShamaria, naZahami." 
2Chronicles11:20 Pashure akawanawo Maaka mukunda waAbhusaromu; iye akamuberekera Abhija, naAtai, naZiza, naSheromiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehobhoamu akada Maaka mukunda waAbhusaromu kupfuura vakadzi vake vose navarongo vake; (nokuti akawana vakadzi vane gumi navasere navarongo vana makumi matanhatu, akabereka vanakomana vana makumi maviri navasere navanasikana makumi matanhatu.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehobhoamu akagadza Abhija mwanakomana waMaaka ave mukuru nomuchinda pakati pavana vababa vake; nokuti akanga achida kumuita mambo. 
2Chronicles11:23 Akaita nokungwara, akaparadzira vanakomana vake vose panyika dzose dzaJudha naBhenjamini kumaguta ose enhare; akavapa zvokudya zvakawanda. Akavatsvakirawo vakadzi vazhinji." 
2Chronicles12:1 Zvino ushe hwaRehobhoamu hwakati hwasimbiswa, iye ava nesimba, akarasha murairo waJehovha, naVaIsiraeri vose pamwechete naye." 
2Chronicles12:2 Zvino pagore rechishanu ramambo Rehobhoamu, Shishaki mambo weIjipiti akasvika kuzorwa neJerusaremu, nokuti vakanga vatadzira Jehovha," 
2Chronicles12:3 ane ngoro dzine chiuru chimwe namazana maviri, navatasvi vamabhiza vane zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu, navanhu vakabva naye Ijipiti, vakanga vasingagoni kuverengwa, vaiti: vaRubhimi, navaSukimi, navaItiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 Akakunda maguta akakombwa aJudha, akasvika Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Zvino Shemaya muporofita akasvika kuna Rehobhoamu nokumachinda aJudha akanga akaungana paJerusaremu nemhaka yaShishaki, akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Mandirasha, saka ndakakuregeraiwo paruoko rwaShishaki.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Ipapo machinda aIsiraeri namambo vakazvininipisa, vakati, “Jehovha akarurama.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Zvino Jehovha akati achiona kuti vazvininipisa, shoko raJehovha rikasvika kuna Shemaya, richiti, “Vazvininipisa, handingavaparadzi, asi ndobva ndovarwira; kutsamwa kwangu hakungadururwi pamusoro peJerusaremu noruoko rwaShishaki." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kunyangwe zvakadaro vachava varanda vake; kuti vazive kuti zvakadini kundishumira ini nokushumira ushe hwenyika dzimwe.” 
2Chronicles12:9 Naizvozvo Shishaki mambo weIjipiti akandorwa neJerusaremu, akatora pfuma yeimba yaJehovha, nepfuma yeimba yamambo; akazvitora zvose; akatorawo nhoo duku dzose dzendarama dzakaitwa naSoromoni." 
2Chronicles12:10 Ipapo mambo Rehobhoamu akaita panzvimbo yazvo nhoo duku dzendarira, akadziisa pamaoko avakuru vavarindi, vairinda mukova weimba yamambo." 
2Chronicles12:11 Zvino nguva dzose kana mambo achipinda mumba maJehovha, varindi vaidzibata, ndokudzidzoserazve mumba mavarindi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Zvino akati azvininipisa, kutsamwa kwaJehovha kukabviswa kwaari, akasaparadzwa chose; uyezve, kuna Judha zvimwe zvakanaka zvakawanikwa." 
2Chronicles12:13 Nokudaro mambo Rehobhoamu akazvisimbisa paJerusaremu, akabata ushe; nokuti Rehobhoamu akanga ana makore makumi mana nerimwe pakutanga kwake kubata ushe, akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore ane gumi namanomwe, iro guta rakanga ratsaurwa naJehovha pamarudzi ose aIsiraeri, kuti aise zita rakemo; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Naama muAmoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Akaita zvakaipa, nokuti haana kushingaira kutsvaka Jehovha." 
2Chronicles12:15 Zvino mabasa aRehobhoamu, okutanga nookupedzisira, haana kunyorwa here mumashoko omuporofita Shemaya, noomuoni Idho, mazita amadziteteguru achiverengwawo? Zvino kurwa kwakanga kuripo pakati paRehobhoamu naJerobhoamu nguva dzose." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehobhoamu akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi; Abhija mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles13:1 Pagore regumi namasere ramambo Jerobhoami, Abhija akatanga kubata ushe hwaJudha." 
2Chronicles13:2 Akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore matatu; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Mikaya, mukunda waUrieri weGibhia. Kurwa kukavapo pakati paAbhija naJerobhoamu." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abhija akarwa ane hondo yavarwi dzaiva mhare, varume vakatsaurwa vane zviuru zvina mazana mana; Jerobhoamuwo akagadzira hondo kuzorwa naye, ana varume vakatsaurwa vane zviuru zvina mazana masere, vaiva varume vane simba noumhare." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abhija akamira pamusoro pegomo rainzi Zemaraimi, raiva panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, akati, “Ndinzwei, Jerobhoamu naVaIsiraeri vose!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Ko hamufaniri kuziva here kuti Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri akapa Dhavhidhi ushe hwaIsiraeri nokusingaperi, iye navanakomana vake nesungano yomunyu?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Asi Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, muranda waSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, akasimuka akamukira ishe wake." 
2Chronicles13:7 Kukaunganira kwaari vanhu vakaipa, vakaisvoipa, vakazvisimbisa kundorwa naRehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, iye Rehobhoamu achiri muduku ano mwoyo unotya, asingagoni kurwa navo." 
2Chronicles13:8 Zvino munoda kurwa noushe hwaJehovha uri mumaoko avanakomana vaDhavhidhi; zvamuri vanhu vazhinji, mune mhuru dzendarama dzakaitwa naJerobhoami kuti vave vamwari venyu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Hamuna kudzinga here vapristi vaJehovha, vanakomana vaAroni, navaRevhi, imi mukazvitsaurira vapristi netsika dzavanhu vedzimwe nyika? Naizvozvo Ani naani anouya kuzvitsaurira Mwari ane nzombe imwe namakondobwe manomwe, iye angava mupristi wavamwari vasati vari vamwari." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Asi kana tirisu, Jehovha ndiMwari wedu, hatina kumurasha; isu tina vapristi vanoshumira Jehovha, ivo vanakomana vaAroni, navaRevhi pamabasa avo." 
2Chronicles13:11 “Ndivo vanopisira Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvinonhuwira mangwanani ose namadekwana ose; nezvingwa zvokuratidza vanozvigadzira patafura yakaisvonaka; nechigadziko chendarama nemwenje yacho, kuvhenekera madekwana ose; nokuti tinochengeta zvatakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wedu; asi imi makamurasha." 
2Chronicles13:12 “Zvino tarirai, Mwari anesu achititungamirira, navapristi vake vane hwamanda dzokuridza nadzo, kuti vakuridzirei mhere imi. Nhandi vana VaIsiraeri, regai kurwa naJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu; nokuti hamungakundi.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Asi Jerobhoamu akaisa vavandiri kuti vavakombe necheshure kwavo; zvino ivo vakava pamberi paJudha, navavandiri vakanga vari shure kwavo." 
2Chronicles13:14 Zvino vaJudha vakati vachicheuka, vakaona kurwa mberi kwavo neshure kwavo; vakachema kuna Jehovha, vapristi vakaridza hwamanda." 
2Chronicles13:15 Ipapo vanhu vaJudha vakaridza mhere; vakati varidza mhere, Mwari akaparadza Jerobhoamu naVaIsiraeri vose pamberi paAbhija naJudha." 
2Chronicles13:16 Vana VaIsiraeri vakatiza pamberi paJudha, Mwari akavaisa mumaoko avo." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abhija navanhu vake vakavauraya nokuuraya kukuru; naizvozvo varume vakatsaurwa vane zviuru zvina mazana mashanu vakaurayiwa pakati paIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles13:18 Vana VaIsiraeri vakamanikidzwa saizvozvo nenguva iyo, vana vaJudha vakakunda, nokuti vakavimba naJehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abhija akateverera Jerobhoamu, akamutorera maguta, aiti: Bhetieri nemisha yaro, neJeshana nemisha yaro, neEfironi nemisha yaro." 
2Chronicles13:20 Jerobhoamu haana kuzova nesimbazve pamazuva aAbhija; Jehovha ndokumurova, akafa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Asi Abhija akazvisimbisa, akawana vakadzi vane gumi navana, akabereka vanakomana vana makumi maviri navaviri, navanasikana vane gumi navatanhatu." 
2Chronicles13:22 Zvino mamwe mabasa aAbhija, netsika dzake, namashoko ake, zvakanyorwa padudziro yomuporofita Idho." 
2Chronicles14:1 Zvino Abhija akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi; Asa mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe, pamazuva ake nyika yakanga ino rugare makore ane gumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa akaita zvakanaka nezvakarurama pamberi paJehovha Mwari wake. 
2Chronicles14:3 Nokuti akabvisa atari dzavamwari vatorwa, namatunhu akakwirira, akaputsa shongwe, nokutemawo matanda okunamata nawo;" 
2Chronicles14:4 akaraira vaJudha kuti vatsvake Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo, nokuchengeta murau nomurairo." 
2Chronicles14:5 Akabvisawo pamaguta ose avaJudha matunhu akakwirira nezvifananidzo zvezuva; ushe ukava norugare iye ari mambo. 
2Chronicles14:6 Akavaka maguta akakombwa paJudha; nokuti nyika yakanga ino rugare, akanga asina kurwa pamakore iwayo; nokuti Jehovha akanga amuzorodza." 
2Chronicles14:7 Nokuti akati kuvaJudha, “Ngativake maguta iwayo, tiapoteredze namasvingo, neshongwe, namasuwo, namazariro; nyika ichiri pamberi pedu, nokuti takatsvaka Jehovha Mwari wedu; takamutsvaka, akatizorodza pamativi ose.” Ipapo vakavaka, vakagara zvakanaka." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa akanga ane hondo yavaJudha, vane zviuru zvina mazana matatu, vakanga vakashonga nhoo huru namapfumo; neyavaBhenjamini vane zviuru zvina mazana maviri namakumi masere, vakanga vakashonga nhoo vaifura nouta; ava vose vaiva varume vane simba noumhare." 
2Chronicles14:9 Zvino Zera muItiopia akauya kuzorwa navo nehondo yavanhu vane zviuru zvezviuru, nengoro dzina mazana matatu; akasvika Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Ipapo Asa akabuda kuzorwa naye, vakagadzira kuzorwa pamupata weZefata paMaresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa akachema kuna Jehovha Mwari wake, akati, “Jehovha hakuna angabatsira asine simba kurwa noune simba, asi imi moga; tibatsirei Jehovha Mwari wedu; nokuti tinovimba nemi, tasvika kuzorwa navazhinji ava nezita renyu. Imi Jehovha, ndimi Mwari wedu; munhu ngaarege kukukundai imi.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Ipapo Jehovha akaparadza vaItiopia pamberi paAsa, napamberi pavaJudha, vaItiopia vakatiza." 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa navanhu vaakanga anavo vakavateverera kusvikira paGerari; vaItiopia vakaurayiwa vazhinji, vakakoniwa kuzosimbazve; nokuti vakaparadzwa pamberi paJehovha napamberi pehondo yake vaJudha vakaenda nezvizhinji kwazvo zvavakapamba." 
2Chronicles14:14 Vakaparadza maguta ose akapoteredza Gerari; nokuti vakavhunduswa naJehovha; vakapamba maguta ose, nokuti kwakanga kune zvingapambwa zvizhinji maari." 
2Chronicles14:15 Vakaparadzawo matende ezvipfuwo, vakatapa makwai mazhinji nengamera, ndokudzokera Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Zvino Mweya waMwari wakauya pamusoro paAzaria mwanakomana waOdhedhi; 
2Chronicles15:2 akabuda kundosangana naAsa, akati kwaari, “Nditeererei imi, Asa navaJudha navaBhenjamini mose; Jehovha anemi, kana imi munaye; kana mukamutsvaka achawanikwa nemi; asi kana mukamurasha, iye achakurashawo.”" 
2Chronicles15:3 Zvino nguva huru VaIsiraeri vakanga vasina Mwari wezvokwadi, kana mupristi anodzidzisa, kana murairo;" 
2Chronicles15:4 asi vakati vachitendeukira kuna Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri pakutambudzika kwavo, nokumutsvaka, iye akawanikwa navo." 
2Chronicles15:5 Zvino nenguva iyo vaibuda novaipinda vakanga vagere panyika idzo, vaiva pakutambudzika kukuru." 
2Chronicles15:6 Vaiparadzana, rumwe rudzi ruchiparadza rumwe, rimwe guta richiparadza rimwe; nokuti Mwari aivatambudza nenhamo dzose." 
2Chronicles15:7 Asi ivai nesimba, maoko enyu ngaarege kushaiwa simba; nokuti basa renyu richapiwa mubairo." 
2Chronicles15:8 Zvino Asa akati achinzwa mashoko awa, nezvakaporofitiwa nomuporofita Odhedhi, ndokutsunga mwoyo, akabvisa zvainyangadza panyika yose yaJudha naBhenjamini, napamaguta aakanga akunda panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu; akavandudza atari yaJehovha, yakanga iri pamberi pebiravira raJehovha." 
2Chronicles15:9 Ipapo akaunganidza vaJudha, navaBhenjamini vose, navatorwa vakanga vagere pakati pavo vaibva kuna Efuremu, naManase, naSimioni; nokuti vazhinji vaibva kuna Isiraeri vakauya kwaari, pakuona kwavo kuti Jehovha Mwari wake anaye." 
2Chronicles15:10 Naizvozvo vakaungana paJerusaremu nomwedzi wechitatu, negore regumi namashanu rokubata ushe kwaAsa." 
2Chronicles15:11 Vakabayira Jehovha zuva irero zvimwe zvavakanga vapamba vakauya nazvo, zvaiti: Nzombe dzina mazana manomwe, namakwai ane zviuru zvinomwe." 
2Chronicles15:12 Vakazvisunga kutsvaka Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo nemwoyo yavo yose uye nemweya yavo yose; 
2Chronicles15:13 uye kuti ani naani asingatsvaki Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri aurawe, kana ari muduku kana ari mukuru, kana mukadzi kana murume." 
2Chronicles15:14 Vakapika kuna Jehovha nezwi guru, nokupururudza, nehwamanda uye nemimanzu." 
2Chronicles15:15 VaJudha vose vakafara nokupika uku; nokuti vakanga vapika nemwoyo yavo yose, nokumutsvaka nokuda kwavo kwose; iye akawanikwa navo; Jehovha ndokuvapa zororo kumativi ose." 
2Chronicles15:16 Akabvisawo Maaka mai vamambo Asa, pauhosi hwavo; nokuti vakanga vaitira Ashera chifananidzo chinonyangadza; Asa akaparadza chifananidzo chavo, akachikuyakuya, ndokuchipisa parukova Kidhironi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Asi matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa pakati paIsiraeri; kunyangwe zvakadaro mwoyo waAsa wakanga wakarurama kwazvo mazuva ake ose. 
2Chronicles15:18 Akaisa mumba maMwari zvinhu zvakanga zvatsaurirwa Mwari nababa vake, nezvakanga zvatsaurwa naiye amene, sirivha, nendarama, nemidziyo." 
2Chronicles15:19 Kurwa hakuna kuzovapo kusvikira pagore ramakumi matatu namashanu rokubata ushe kwaAsa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Zvino negore ramakumi matatu namatanhatu rokubata ushe kwaAsa, Bhaasha mambo waIsiraeri akakwira kundorwa naJudha, akavaka Rama, kuti arege kutendera munhu kubuda kana kupinda kuna Asa mambo waJudha." 
2Chronicles16:2 Ipapo Asa akabudisa sirivha nendarama muzvivigiro zvepfuma yeimba yaJehovha neimba yamambo, akatuma shoko kuna Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria, akanga agere Dhamasikosi, akati," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Sungano iripo pakati pangu nemi, sezvayakavapo pakati pababa vangu nababa venyu; tarirai, ndinokutumirai sirivha nendarama; endai muputse sungano yenyu naBhaasha mambo waIsiraeri, abve kwandiri.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Bhenihadhadhi akateerera mambo Asa, akatuma vakuru vehondo dzake kundorwa namaguta aIsiraeri, akakunda Ijoni, neDhani, neAbherimaimi, namaguta ose amatura aNafutari." 
2Chronicles16:5 Zvino Bhaasha akati achizvinzwa, akarega kuvaka Rama, akarega basa rake." 
2Chronicles16:6 Ipapo mambo Asa akatora vaJudha vose; vakandobvisa mabwe eRama, namatanda aro zvaakanga avaka nazvo iye Bhaasha, akavaka nazvo Gebha neMizipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Zvino nenguva iyo muoni Hanani akasvika kuna Asa mambo waJudha, akati kwaari, “Zvawakavimba namambo weSiria, ukasavimba naJehovha Mwari wako, zvino hondo yamambo weSiria yapukunyuka paruoko rwako." 
2Chronicles16:8 “Ko vaItiopia navaRubhimi vakanga vasi hondo huru–huru, vane ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza vazhinji here? Kunyangwe zvakadaro, zvawakavimba naJehovha, iye akavaisa muruoko rwako." 
2Chronicles16:9 Nokuti meso aJehovha anotarira–tarira kumativi ose enyika yose, kuti aratidze simba rake kuna iye ano mwoyo wakarurama kwazvo kwaari. Pachinhu ichi waita sebenzi; nokuti kubva zvino uchavingwa nokurwa.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Ipapo Asa akatsamwira muoni, akamuisa mutorongo; nokuti akanga amutsamwira kwazvo nokuda kwechinhu ichi. Nenguva iyo Asa akatambudzawo vamwe vanhu." 
2Chronicles16:11 Zvino tarirai, mabasa aAsa, okutanga nookupedzisira, akanyorwa mubhuku yamadzimambo aJudha naaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles16:12 Asi pagore ramakumi matatu namapfumbamwe rokubata kwake ushe, Asa akazonzwa makumbo; urwere hwake hukanyanya kwazvo; kunyangwe zvakadaro, paurwere hwake haana kutsvaka Jehovha, asi n'anga." 
2Chronicles16:13 Asa akavata namadzibaba ake, akafa negore ramakumi mana nerimwe rokubata kwake ushe." 
2Chronicles16:14 Vakamuviga pamuhwiro hwake, hwaakanga azvivezera muguta raDhavhidhi, vakamuradzika panhoo dzizere nezvinonhuwira zvamarudzi mazhinji, zvakanga zvagadzirwa navaiti vezvinonhuwira vakangwara; vakamupisira zvizhinji zhinji." 
2Chronicles17:1 Zvino Jehoshafati mwanakomana wake akabata ushe pachigaro chake, akazvisimbisa kundorwa naVaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles17:2 Akaisa varwi mumaguta ose akakombwa aJudha, akaisawo mapoka avarwi panyika yaJudha, napamaguta aEfuremu, akanga akundwa naAsa baba vake." 
2Chronicles17:3 Jehovha akava naJehoshafati, nokuti akafamba munzira dzokutanga dzababa vake Dhavhidhi; haana kundobvunza vaBhaari;" 
2Chronicles17:4 asi akabvunza Mwari wababa vake, akafamba nemirairo yake asingateveri mabasa aIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles17:5 Saka Jehovha akasimbisa ushe paruoko rwake; vaJudha vose vakavigira Jehoshafati zvipo, akava nepfuma nokukudzwa zvizhinji." 
2Chronicles17:6 Mwoyo wake ukashingairira nzira dzaJehovha; uye akabvisawo matunhu akakwirira namatanda okunamata nawo pakati paJudha. 
2Chronicles17:7 Uye pagore rechitatu rokubata kwake ushe akatuma machinda ake, vanaBhenihairi, naObhadhiya, naZekariya, naNetaneri, naMikaya, kundodzidzisa mumaguta aJudha;" 
2Chronicles17:8 uye pamwechete navo vaRevhi, vana Shemaya, naNetania, naZebhadhia, naAshaheri, naShemiramoti, naJehonatani, naAdhoniya, naTobhiya, naTobhiadhoniya, vari vaRevhi; uye pamwechete navo Erishama naJehoramu, vapristi." 
2Chronicles17:9 Vakandodzidzisa pakati paJudha, vane Bhuku roMurairo waJehovha; vakafamba vachipota namaguta ose aJudha, vachidzidzisa pakati pavanhu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Ushe hwose hwenyika dzose dzakanga dzakapoteredza Judha, vakavhunduswa naJehovha, vakasarwa naJehoshafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Vamwe vaFirisitia vakavigira Jehoshafati zvipo, nesirivha yomutero; vaArabhiawo vakamuvigira makwai, makondohwe ane zviuru zvinomwe namazana manomwe, nenhongo dzembudzi dzine zviuru zvinomwe namazana manomwe." 
2Chronicles17:12 Jehoshafati akazova mukuru kwazvo, akavaka pakati paJudha nhare namaguta amatura." 
2Chronicles17:13 Waiva namabasa mazhinji mumaguta aJudha, navarwi, varume vane simba noumhare paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles17:14 Zvino ndiwo mazita avo nedzimba, dzamadzibaba avo: Pakati paJudha, vakuru vezviuru: Adhina mukuru, uye pamwechete naye varume vane simba noumhare vane zviuru zvina mazana matatu;" 
2Chronicles17:15 tevere Jehohanani mukuru, uye pamwechete naye varume vane zviuru zvina mazana maviri namakumi masere;" 
2Chronicles17:16 tevere Amasia mwanakomana waZikiri, wakazvipa kuna Jehovha nomwoyo wake wose; uye pamwechete naye varume vane simba noumhare vane zviuru zvina mazana maviri;" 
2Chronicles17:17 pakati pavaBhenjamini: Eriadha munhu ane simba noumhare, uye pamwechete naye varume vane zviuru zvina mazana maviri vakanga vakabata uta nenhoo;" 
2Chronicles17:18 tevere Jehozabhadhi, uye pamwechete naye varume vane zviuru zvine zana namakumi masere, vakanga vakazvigadzirira kurwa." 
2Chronicles17:19 Ndivo vaibatira mambo, vamwe vakanga vaiswa namambo mumaguta akakombwa panyika yose yaJudha vasingaverengwi." 
2Chronicles18:1 Zvino Jehoshafati akanga ane pfuma zhinji nokukudzwa kukuru; akawaniranawo naAhabhi. 
2Chronicles18:2 Zvino mamwe makore akati apfuura, iye akaburukira Samaria kuna Ahabhi. Ahabhi akamuurayira iye navanhu vaakanga anavo makwai nenzombe zhinji, akamukurudzira kuenda naye Ramoti-giriyadhi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ipapo Ahabhi mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati mambo waJudha, “Muchaenda neni Ramoti-giriyadhi here?” Iye akapindura, akati, “Ini ndakaita sewe, navanhu vangu savanhu vako; tichaenda newe kundorwa.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Jehoshafati akati kuna mambo waIsiraeri, “Dombobvunza hako shoko raJehovha nhasi.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akaunganidza vaporofita, varume vaiva namazana mana, akati kwavari, “Tiende kundorwa neRamoti-giriyadhi here, kana ndirege?” Ivo vakati, “Endai, nokuti Mwari achariisa mumaoko amambo.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Asi Jehoshafati akati, “Hakuchina mumwe muporofita waJehovha pano here, timubvunze?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Mumwe murume achiko, watingabvunza kuda kwaJehovha naye, asi ini ndinomuvenga, nokuti haatongoporofiti zvakanaka pamusoro pangu, asi mazuva ose zvakaipa; ndiye Mikaya mwanakomana waImira.” Jehoshafati akati, “Mambo ngaarege kudaro.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akadana muranda, akati, “Kurumidza undotora Mikaya mwanakomana waImira.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vakanga vagere mumwe nomumwe pachigaro chake choushe, vagere vakafuka nguo dzavo dzoushe padare pasuwo reSamaria; vaporofita vose vakaporofita pamberi pavo." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedhekiya mwanakomana waKenaani akazviitira nyanga dzamatare, akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Nedzidzi muchatunga VaSiria, kusvikira vapera.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Navamwe vaporofita vose vakaporofita saizvozvo, vakati, “Endai Ramoti-giriyadhi, muchakunda, nokuti Jehovha achariisa paruoko rwamambo.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Zvino nhume yakanga yandodana Mikaya yakataura kwaari, ikati, “Tarirai, mashoko avaporofita anobvumirana achitaura zvakanaka kuna mambo; zvino ndinokumbira kuti shoko renyu rive seshoko romumwe wavo, mutaurewo zvakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Ipapo Mikaya akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, izvo zvinorehwa naMwari wangu, ndizvo zvandichataura.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Zvino akati achisvika kuna mambo, mambo akati kwaari, “Mikaya, tiende kundorwa neRamoti-giriyadhi here, kana ndirege?” Iye akati, “Endai henyu, muchakunda; vachaiswa muruoko rwenyu.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Mambo akati kwaari, “Ndinofanira kukupikisa kangani here, kuti undiudze zvokwadi yoga nezita raJehovha?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Iye akati, “Ndakaona VaIsiraeri vose vakapararira pamakomo samakwai asina mufudzi; Jehovha akati, ‘Ava havana tenzi, mumwe nomumwe ngaadzokere kumusha kwake norugare.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Handina kukuudza here, kuti haangaporofiti zvakanaka pamusoro pangu, asi zvakaipa?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya akati, “Zvino chinzwai shoko raJehovha, Ndakaona Jehovha agere pachigaro chake choushe, nehondo dzose dzokudenga dzimire kurudyi rwake nokuruboshwe rwake." 
2Chronicles18:19 “Ipapo Jehovha akati, ‘Ndianiko achandonyengera Ahabhi, aende, andourayiwa paRamoti-giriyadhi?’ Zvino mumwe akataura achiti zvokuti, nomumwezve akati zvokuti." 
2Chronicles18:20 Zvino mweya ukabuda, ukamira pamberi paJehovha, ukati, ‘Ini ndichandomunyengera.’ Jehovha akati kwauri, ‘Neiko?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Iwo ukati, ‘Ndichaenda, ndichava mweya wenhema mumiromo yavaporofita vake vose.’ Iye akati, ‘Iwe ndiwe uchamunyengera, uchakundawo; enda hako, unoita saizvozvo.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 “Naizvozvo zvino, tarirai Jehovha akaisa mweya wenhema mumiromo yavaporofita venyu ava vose, asi Jehovha akataura zvakaipa pamusoro penyu.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Ipapo Zedhekiya mwanakomana waKenaani akaswedera, akarova Mikaya padama rake, akati, “Mweya waJehovha akaenda nepiko uchibva kwandiri kundotaura newe?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya akati, “Uchazviona musi uyo wauchandovanda nawo mukamuri yomukati.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Ipapo mambo waIsiraeri akati, “Batai Mikaya, mumuise kuna Amoni mubati weguta, nokuna Joashi mwanakomana wamambo," 
2Chronicles18:26 muti, ‘Zvanzi namambo, Pinzai munhu uyu mutorongo, mumupe zvokudya zvokutambudzika, nemvura yokutambudzika, kusvikira ndichidzoka norugare.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Ipapo Mikaya akati, “Kana mukatongodzoka norugare, Jehovha haana kutaura neni.” Akati, “Inzwai, imi vanhu, imi mose.”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Naizvozvo mambo waIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vakaenda Ramoti-giriyadhi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Ini ndichazvishandura, ndigondorwa; asi iwe chifuka nguo dzako dzoushe.” Mambo waIsiraeri akazvishandura, akandorwa." 
2Chronicles18:30 Zvino mambo weSiria akanga araira vatariri vengoro dzake, akati, “Regai kurwa navaduku kana navakuru, asi namambo waIsiraeri oga.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Zvino vatariri vengoro vakati vachiona Jehoshafati, vakati, “Ndiye mambo waIsiraeri.” Naizvozvo vakatsaukira kundorwa naye; asi Jehoshafati wakaridza mhere, Jehovha akamubatsira; Mwari akavakurudzira kumurega." 
2Chronicles18:32 Zvino vatariri vengoro vakati vachiona kuti haazi mambo waIsiraeri, vakadzoka pakumutevera." 
2Chronicles18:33 Zvino mumwe murume akawembura uta hwake asingashumbi hake, akafura mambo waIsiraeri pakati pezvisungo zvenguo dzake dzokurwa nadzo; ipapo mambo akati kumufambisi wengoro, “Dzoka, undiise kunze kwehondo, nokuti ndakuvadzwa kwazvo.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Kurwa kukanyanya kwazvo nomusi uyo; asi mambo waIsiraeri wakazvitsigira mungoro yake akarwa naVaSiria kusvikira madekwana; zvino panguva yokuvira kwezuva akafa. 
2Chronicles19:1 Zvino Jehoshafati mambo waJudha akadzokera norugare kumusha kwake paJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles19:2 Ipapo Jehu mwanakomana womuoni Hanani akaenda kundosangana naye, akati kuna mambo Jehoshafati, “Zvakanaka kubatsira vakaipa, nokuda vanovenga Jehovha here? Nokuda kwechinhu ichi Jehovha akutsamwirai." 
2Chronicles19:3 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, zvimwe zvinhu zvakanaka zvakawanikwa kwamuri, nokuti makabvisa Asheroti panyika, mukatsvaka Mwari nomwoyo wose.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehoshafati akagara paJerusaremu, akabudazve pakati pavanhu kubva paBheerishebha kusvikira kunyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, akavadzoserazve kuna Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Akagadza vatongi panyika pamaguta ose akakombwa aJudha, guta rimwe nerimwe;" 
2Chronicles19:6 akati kuvatongi, “Chenjerai zvamunoita; nokuti hamutongeri vanhu imi asi Jehovha; iye anemi pakutonga kwenyu." 
2Chronicles19:7 Naizvozvo zvino kutya Jehovha ngakuve nemi; chenjerai, muzviite, nokuti kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu hakuna zvakaipa, kana kutsaura vanhu, kana kugamuchira fufuro.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Jehoshafati akaisawo paJerusaremu vamwe vaRevhi navapristi, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba aIsiraeri, kuzotonga zvinhu zvaJehovha nemhaka dzenharo. Ipapo vakadzokera Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles19:9 Akavaraira, achiti, “Ndizvo zvamunofanira kuita muchitya Jehovha, makatendeka, mune mwoyo yakarurama." 
2Chronicles19:10 Zvino kana mhaka yenharo ikasvika kwamuri ichibva kuhama dzenyu dzigere pamaguta avo, kana riri shoko rokuurayana, kana nomurau kana murairo, kana zvakatemwa kana zvakatongwa, munofanira kuvanyevera kuti varege kupara mhaka pana Jehovha, kuti murege kutsamwirwa imi nehama dzenyu; itai izvozvo, mugorega kuva nemhosva." 
2Chronicles19:11 Zvino tarirai, Amaria mupristi mukuru achakurairai pamashoko ose aJehovha; naZebhadhia mwanakomana waIshimaeri, mutariri weimba yaJudha, pamashoko ose amambo; navaRevhi vachava vatariri venyu. Itai nesimba, Jehovha ave navakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Shure kwaizvozvo vana vaMoabhu, navana vaAmoni, navamwe vavaAmoni pamwechete navo, vakasvika kuzorwa naJehoshafati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Ipapo vamwe vakasvika, vakaudza Jehoshafati, vachiti, “Vanhu vazhinji vanouya, vachibva Siria mhiri kwegungwa, kuzorwa nemi; tarirai, vari paHazazonitamari,” (ndiro Enigedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Ipapo Jehoshafati akatya, akashingaira kundobvunza Jehovha; akatara zuva rokuzvinyima zvokudya panyika yose yavaJudha." 
2Chronicles20:4 VaJudha vakaungana kuzotsvaka rubatsiro kuna Jehovha; vakabva kumaguta ose aJudha kuzotsvaka Jehovha. 
2Chronicles20:5 Jehoshafati akasimuka paungano yavaJudha navanhu veJerusaremu, mumba maJehovha, pamberi poruvazhe rutsva;" 
2Chronicles20:6 akati, “Haiwa, Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba edu, imi hamuzi Mwari ari kudenga here? Imi hamuzi mubati woushe hwose hwendudzi here? Paruoko rwenyu pane simba noushe, naizvozvo hapano munhu angakudzivisai." 
2Chronicles20:7 “Imi Mwari wedu, hamuna kudzinga here vaigara panyika ino pamberi pavanhu venyu VaIsiraeri, mukaipa vana vaAbhurahamu shamwari yenyu nokusingaperi?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Vakagaramo, vakakuvakiraimo imba tsvene yezita renyu, vachiti," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Kana tikawirwa nezvakaipa, kana munondo wokutonga, kana denda, kana nzara, tichamira pamberi peimba ino napamberi penyu, (nokuti zita renyu riri muimba ino), tigochema kwamuri tiri pakutambudzika kwedu; ipapo muchatinzwa nokutirwira.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 “Zvino tarirai vana vaAmoni navaMoabhu navapagomo reSeiri, vamusina kutendera VaIsiraeri kupinda pakati pavo nguva yavakabva panyika yeIjipiti, asi vakavarega, vakasavaparadza;" 
2Chronicles20:11 tarirai votitsiva, vachiuya kuzotidzinga panyika yenyu, yamakatipa ive nhaka yedu." 
2Chronicles20:12 “Haiwa, Mwari wedu, hamungavatongi here? Nokuti hatine simba rokurwa navazhinji ava vanouya kuzorwa nesu; hatizivi chatingaita, asi meso edu akatarira kwamuri.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Ipapo vaJudha vose vakamira pamberi paJehovha, pamwechete nepwere dzavo, navakadzi vavo, navana vavo." 
2Chronicles20:14 Mweya waJehovha ukauya pamusoro paJahazieri, mwanakomana waZekariya, mwanakomana waBhenaya, mwanakomana waJeieri, mwanakomana waMatanya, muRevhi, wavanakomana vaAsafi, pakati peungano;" 
2Chronicles20:15 iye akati, “Teererai, imi vaJudha mose, nemi mugere paJerusaremu, nemi mambo Jehoshafati; zvanzi naJehovha kwamuri, ‘Musatya, kana kuvhunduka nokuda kwavanhu ava vazhinji; nokuti kurwa hakuzi kwenyu, asi ndokwaMwari." 
2Chronicles20:16 Burukai mangwana mundorwa navo; tarirai vanokwira napamukwidza weZizi; muchavawana pakuguma kwomupata, pamberi perenje reJerueri." 
2Chronicles20:17 Imi hamungafaniri henyu kurwapo; zvigadzireipo, murambe mumire henyu, muone kurwirwa kwenyu naJehovha, imi vaJudha naveJerusaremu; musatya kana kuvhunduswa; budai mangwana mundorwa navo, nokuti Jehovha anemi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Ipapo Jehoshafati akakotamisa musoro wake, chiso chakatarira pasi; vaJudha vose navakanga vagere Jerusaremu vakawira pasi pamberi paJehovha, vakanamata Jehovha." 
2Chronicles20:19 NavaRevhi vavana vavaKohati, navana vavaKora, vakasimuka vakarumbidza Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri nezwi guru kwazvo." 
2Chronicles20:20 Vakamuka mangwanani, ndokubudira kurenje reTekoa; zvino vakati vachibuda, Jehoshafati akamira, akati, “Chindinzwai imi vaJudha nemi mugere Jerusaremu; tendai Jehovha Mwari wenyu, mugosimbiswa; tendai vaporofita vake, mugokunda.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Zvino akati arangana navanhu, akagadza vaifanira kuimbira Jehovha, nokumurumbidza nenguo tsvene, vakafamba pamberi pehondo, achiti, “Vongai Jehovha, nokuti nyasha dzake hadziperi.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Zvino vakati vachitanga kuimba nokurumbidza, Jehovha akaisa vavandiri kuzorwa navana vaAmoni, navaMoabhu, navapagomo reSeiri, ivo vakanga vauya kuzorwa navaJudha; vakakundwa." 
2Chronicles20:23 Nokuti vana vaAmoni navaMoabhu vakamukira vakanga vagere pagomo reSeiri kuti vavauraye nokuvaparadza chose; zvino vakati vapedza avo vakanga vagere paSeiri, mumwe nomumwe ndokubatsira pakuurayana." 
2Chronicles20:24 Zvino vaJudha vakati vachisvika kurusvingo rwenharirire rwokurenje, vakatarira vanhu vazhinji, ndokuona zvava zvitunha zvawira pasi, kwakanga kusina akapukunyuka." 
2Chronicles20:25 Zvino Jehoshafati navanhu vake vakati vachisvika kuzotora zvavakanga vapamba, vakawana pakati pavo pfuma zhinji, nezvipfeko, nezvinhu zvinokosha, vakazvitorera izvo, asi vakakoniwa kuzvitakura zvose nokuwanda kwazvo; vakaita mazuva matatu vachitora mhambara, nokuda kwokuwanda kwazvo." 
2Chronicles20:26 Zvino pazuva rechina vakaungana pamupata weBheraka; nokuti vakandokudza Jehovha ipapo; naizvozvo zita renzvimbo iyo rakatumidzwa Mupata weBheraka kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
2Chronicles20:27 Ipapo vanhu vose vaJudha naveJerusaremu vakadzoka, Jehoshafati akavatungamirira, vakadzokera Jerusaremu nomufaro; nokuti Jehovha akanga avafadza pamusoro pavavengi vavo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Vakasvika Jerusaremu nemitengerangwa, nembira, nehwamanda, kusvikira paimba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles20:29 Ipapo ushe hwose hwenyika iyo hwakatya Mwari kwazvo, pakunzwa kwavo kuti Jehovha akarwa navavengi VaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles20:30 Zvino ushe hwaJehoshafati hwakava norugare; nokuti Mwari wake akamuzorodza pamativi ose. 
2Chronicles20:31 Jehoshafati akabata ushe hwaJudha; akanga asvika makore makumi matatu namashanu pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi maviri namashanu; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Azubha, mukunda waShirihi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Akafamba nenzira yababa vake Asa; haana kutsauka pairi, akaramba achiita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha." 
2Chronicles20:33 Kunyangwe zvakadaro matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa, navanhu vakanga vachigere kutevera Mwari wamadzibaba avo nomwoyo wose." 
2Chronicles20:34 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJehoshafati, okutanga nookupedzisira, tarirai akanyorwa pamashoko aJehu, mwanakomana waHanani, akaiswa mubhuku yamadzimambo aIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles20:35 Shure kwaizvozvi Jehoshafati mambo waJudha wakasungana naAhazia mambo waIsiraeri; iye aifamba nenzira yakaipa kwazvo; 
2Chronicles20:36 akasungana naye pakuvaka zvikepe zvaienda Tashishi; vakavaka zvikepe paEzionigebheri. 
2Chronicles20:37 Ipapo Eriezeri mwanakomana waDhodhavanhu weMaresha akaporofita pamusoro paJehoshafati, akati, “Zvawasungana naAhazia, Jehovha waparadza mabasa ako.” Zvikepe zvikaputsika, zvikakoniwa kuenda Tashishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Zvino Jehoshafati akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi; Jehoramu mwanakomana wake akamutevera pahushe." 
2Chronicles21:2 Iye akanga ana vanun'una, vaiva vanakomana vaJehoshafati, vaiti: Azaria, naJehieri, naZekariya, naAzaria, naMikaeri, naShefatia; ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaJehoshafati mambo waIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles21:3 Baba vavo vakavapa zvipo zvikuru zvesirivha, nendarama, nezvinhu zvinokosha, pamwechete namaguta akakombwa paJudha; asi ushe wakahupa Jehoramu, nokuti iye akanga ari wedangwe." 
2Chronicles21:4 Zvino Jehoramu akati apinda paushe hwababa vake, ndokuzvisimbisa, akauraya vanun'una vake vose nomunondo, navamwewo vamachinda aIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoramu akanga asvika makore makumi matatu namaviri pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore masere. 
2Chronicles21:6 Akafamba nenzira yamadzimambo aIsiraeri, sezvakaita imba yaAhabhi; nokuti mukunda waAhabhi akanga ari mukadzi wake; akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha." 
2Chronicles21:7 Kunyangwe zvakadaro Jehovha akanga asingadi kuparadza imba yaDhavhidhi, nokuda kwesungano yaakanga aita naDhavhidhi, uye nokuti akanga amupikira kuti achamupa mwenje iye navana vake nguva dzose." 
2Chronicles21:8 Zvino namazuva ake vaEdhomu vakamukira vaJudha, vakazviitira mambo wavo." 
2Chronicles21:9 Ipapo Jehoramu akaenda navakuru vake, ane ngoro dzake dzose naye; akamuka usiku, akaparadza vaEdhomu vakanga vakamukomba navakuru vengoro." 
2Chronicles21:10 Naizvozvo vaEdhomu vakamukira vaJudha, kusvikira zuva ranhasi. Ipapo veRibhinawo vakamumukira nenguva iyo; nokuti akanga arasha Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles21:11 Akaitawo matunhu akakwirira pamakomo aJudha, akapatisa vagere Jerusaremu, nokutsausa vaJudha." 
2Chronicles21:12 Ipapo tsamba yakabva kumuporofita Eriya, ikasvika kwaari, ichiti, “Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari wababa vako Dhavhidhi, ‘Zvausina kufamba nenzira dzababa vako Jehoshafati, kana nenzira dzaAsa mambo waJudha;" 
2Chronicles21:13 asi wakafamba nenzira dzamadzimambo aIsiraeri, ukapatisa Judha navagere Jerusaremu, sezvakaita imba yaAhabhi, ukaurayawo vanun'una vako veimba yababa vako, vakanga vakanaka kupfuura iwe;" 
2Chronicles21:14 zvino tarira, Jehovha acharova vanhu vako, navana vako, navakadzi vako, nezvinhu zvako zvose, nenjodzi yakaipa;" 
2Chronicles21:15 iwe uchava nechirwere chakaipa chomuura kusvikira ura hwako huchibuda kunze nemhaka yechirwere icho zuva rimwe nerimwe.’ ” 
2Chronicles21:16 Zvino Jehovha akakurudzira mweya yavaFirisitia neyavaArabhia, vakanga vari kurutivi rwavaItiopia, kuzorwa naJehoramu;" 
2Chronicles21:17 vakandorwa navaJudha, vakapinda nyika yavo nesimba, ndokutora nhumbi dzose dzavakawana mumba mamambo, navanakomana vake, navakadzi vake; naizvozvo haana kusarirwa nomwanakomana, kunyangwe nomumwe asi Jehoahazi, muduku wavanakomana vake vose." 
2Chronicles21:18 Shure kwaizvozvo zvose Jehovha akamurova muura hwake nechirwere chisingagoni kurapwa. 
2Chronicles21:19 Zvino makore maviri akati apera, ura hwake hukabuda kunze nemhaka yourwere, akafa nezvirwere zvakaipa; vanhu vake vakasamupisira, sezvavakapisira madzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles21:20 Akanga asvika makore makumi matatu namaviri pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore masere; akaenda hake asingadikanwi, vakamuviga paguta raDhavhidhi, asi havana kumuviga pamarinda amadzimambo." 
2Chronicles22:1 Zvino vagere Jerusaremu vakaita Ahazia, mwanakomana wake muduku, mambo panzvimbo yake, nokuti boka ravanhu, vakauya navaArabhia, vakanga vauraya vakuru vake vose. Naizvozvo Ahazia mwanakomana waJehoramu mambo waJudha, akabata ushe." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazia akanga asvika makore makumi mana namaviri pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu gore rimwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Ataria, mukunda waOmiri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Naiye akafamba nenzira dzeimba yaAhabhi; nokuti mai vake vaiva murairi wake pakuita zvakaipa. 
2Chronicles22:4 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha sezvakaitwa naveimba yaAhabhi; nokuti baba vake vakati vafa, ndivo vaiva varairi vake, vakamuisa pakuparadzwa." 
2Chronicles22:5 Akafambawo sezvavakamuraira, akaenda naJehoramu mwanakomana waAhabhi mambo waIsiraeri, kundorwa naHazaeri mambo weSiria paRamoti-giriyadhi; VaSiria vakakuvadza Jehoramu." 
2Chronicles22:6 Akadzokera Jezireeri kuzorapwa mavanga aakatemwa paRama, nguva yaakarwa naHazaeri mambo weSiria. Ipapo Azaria mwanakomana waJehoramu mambo waJudha, akaenda kundoona Jehoramu mwanakomana waAhabhi paJezireeri, nokuti akanga achirwara." 
2Chronicles22:7 Zvino kuparadzwa kwaAhazia kwakabva kuna Mwari, zvaakaenda kuna Joramu; nokuti akati asvikapo, akaenda naJehoramu kundorwa naJehu mwanakomana waNishi, akanga azodzwa naJehovha kuti aparadze imba yaAhabhi." 
2Chronicles22:8 Zvino Jehu akati achiitira imba yaAhabhi zvakanga zvatongwa naJehovha, akawana machinda aJudha navanakomana vavanun'una vaAhazia vachibatira Ahazia, ndokuvauraya." 
2Chronicles22:9 Akatsvaka Ahaziawo; vakamubata, (nokuti akanga avanda paSamaria), vakamuisa kuna Jehu vakamuuraya; vakamuviga vakati, “Mwanakomana waJehoshafati, akatsvaka Jehovha nomwoyo wake wose.” Asi kwakanga kusina mumwe weimba yaAhazia akanga ane simba rokubata ushe." 
2Chronicles22:10 Zvino Ataria mai vaAhazia, vakati vachiona kuti mwanakomana wavo afa, vakasimuka, vakaparadza vose vorudzi rwamambo veimba yaJudha." 
2Chronicles22:11 Asi Jehoshabheati mukunda wamambo wakatora Joashi mwanakomana waAhazia, akamuba pakati pavanakomana vamambo vaiurayiwa, akamuisa iye nomureri wake mumba mokuvata. Naizvozvo Jehoshabheati mukunda wamambo Jehoramu, mukadzi waJehoyadha mupristi, (nokuti waiva hanzvadzi yaAhazia), akamuvanza pana Ataria, naizvozvo havana kumuuraya." 
2Chronicles22:12 Akagara navo akavanzwa mumba maMwari makore matanhatu; Ataria vakabata ushe panyika. 
2Chronicles23:1 Zvino negore rechinomwe Jehoyadha akazvisimbisa, akaita sungano navakuru vamazana, vaiti: Azaria mwanakomana waJerohami, naIshimaeri mwanakomana waJehohanani, naAzaria mwanakomana waObhedhi, naMaaseya mwanakomana waAdhaya, naErishafati mwanakomana waZikiri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Vakapota nenyika yaJudha, vakakokera vaRevhi vapamaguta ose aJudha, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba aIsiraeri, vakasvika Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles23:3 Ungano yose ikaita sungano namambo mumba maMwari. Iye akati kwavari, “Tarirai, mwanakomana wamambo achabata ushe, sezvakarehwa naJehovha pamusoro pavanakomana vaDhavhidhi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Munofanira kuita kudai, Imi munopinda neSabata, chetatu chenyu chavapristi navaRevhi, munofanira kuva varindi vemikova;" 
2Chronicles23:5 chimwe chetatu chinofanira kuva paimba yamambo, nechimwe chetatu pasuwo renheyo; navanhu vose vanofanira kuva pavazhe dzeimba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles23:6 Asi ngakurege kuva nomunhu mumwe anopinda mumba maJehovha, asi vapristi navaRevhi vanobatamo; ivo ngavapinde nokuti vatsvene; asi vanhu vose vanofanira kurinda imba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles23:7 VaRevhi vanofanira kukomba mambo, mumwe nomumwe akabata nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo muruoko rwake; Ani naani anopinda paimba, anofanira kuurayiwa; mugare namambo kana achipinda uye kana achibuda.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Naizvozvo vaRevhi navaJudha vose vakaita zvose zvavakarairwa nomupristi Jehoyadha; mumwe nomumwe akatora vanhu vake, ivo vaifanira kupinda neSabata naivo vaifanira kubuda neSabata; nokuti mupristi Jehoyadha haana kutendera mapoka kuenda." 
2Chronicles23:9 Mupristi Jehoyadha akapa vakuru vamazana mapfumo, nenhoo, nenhoo duku, zvaiva zvamambo Dhavhidhi, zvakanga zviri mumba maMwari." 
2Chronicles23:10 Akarongedza vanhu vose, mumwe nomumwe akabata nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo muruoko rwake, kubva kurutivi rworudyi rweimba kusvikira kurutivi rworuboshwe rweimba, napaatari neimba, vakakomba mambo." 
2Chronicles23:11 Ipapo vakabudisa mwanakomana wamambo, vakamudzika korona, vakamupa chipupuriro, vakamuita mambo; Jehoyadha navanakomana vake vakamuzodza; vakati, “Mambo ngaararame!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Zvino Ataria vakati vachinzwa mhere–mhere yavanhu vakanga vachimhanya nokurumbidza mambo, vakapinda kuvanhu mumba maJehovha;" 
2Chronicles23:13 akatarira, akaona mambo amire pambiru yake pavaipinda napo, navakuru navane hwamanda vamire kuna mambo; vanhu vose venyika vakafara, vakaridza hwamanda; vaimbiwo vakaridza zvokuridza nazvo, vakaraira vairumbidza nokuimba kwavo. Ipapo Ataria vakabvarura nguo dzavo, vakati, “Ndamukirwa, ndamukirwa!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Mupristi Jehoyadha akabudisa vakuru vamazana vairaira hondo, akati kwavari, “Mubudisei pakati pemisara yavanhu; ani naani anomutevera iye, ngaaurawe nomunondo; nokuti mupristi wakati, ‘Regai kumuuraya mumba maJehovha.’ ”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Naizvozvo vakamudziurira nzira, vakaenda nenzira yaipinda mabhiza nayo kumba kwamambo, vakamuurayirapo." 
2Chronicles23:16 Ipapo Jehoyadha akaita sungano, iye navanhu vose namambo, kuti vave vanhu vaJehovha." 
2Chronicles23:17 Vanhu vose vakaenda kumba kwaBhaari, vakaiputsa; vakaputsanya atari dzake nemifananidzo yake, vakauraya Matani mupristi waBhaari pamberi peatari." 
2Chronicles23:18 Jehoyadha akaraira mabasa eimba yaJehovha kuti atarirwe navapristi vaRevhi, vakanga varongedzwa naDhavhidhi mumba maJehovha, kuti vapisire Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa, sezvakanyorwa pamurairo waMosesi, nomufaro nokuimba, sezvakanga zvarairwa naDhavhidhi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Akagadzawo vatariri pamusuwo eimba yaJehovha, kuti parege kupinda munhu wakasvibiswa nechinhu chipi nechipi." 
2Chronicles23:20 Akaenda ana vakuru vamazana, navaikudzwa, navabati vavanhu, navanhu vose venyika, vakaburusa mambo paimba yaJehovha, vakapinda mumba mamambo napasuwo rokumusoro, vakagadza mambo pachigaro choushe." 
2Chronicles23:21 Naizvozvo vanhu vose venyika vakafara, guta rikanyarara; asi Ataria vakanga vamuuraya nomunondo." 
2Chronicles24:1 Joashi akanga asvika makore manomwe pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi mana; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Zibhia weBheerishebha. 
2Chronicles24:2 Joashi akaita zvakanaka pamberi paJehovha mazuva ose omupristi Jehoyadha. 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoyadha akamutsvakira vakadzi vaviri; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana. 
2Chronicles24:4 Zvino shure kwaizvozvi Joashi akarangarira kuvandudza imba yaJehovha.
