2Chronicles24:5 Akakokera vapristi navaRevhi, akati kwavari, “Budirai kumaguta aJudha, muunganidze kuVaIsiraeri vose mari yokugadzirisa nayo imba yaMwari wenyu gore rimwe nerimwe; uye mubva machimbidzikira chinhu ichi!” Asi vaRevhi havana kuchimbidzika." 
2Chronicles24:6 Zvino mambo akadana mukuru Jehoyadha, akati kwaari, “Makaregereiko kuraira vaRevhi kundounganidza mutero waMosesi muranda waJehovha paJudha napaJerusaremu napaungano yaIsiraeri, zviiswe patende rechipupuriro?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Nokuti vanakomana vaAtaria, mukadzi uya wakaipa, vakanga vaputsa imba yaMwari; nezvinhu zvose zveimba yaJehovha, zvakanga zvakatsaurirwa Mwari, vakazvipa vaBhaari." 
2Chronicles24:8 Naizvozvo mambo akaraira, vakaveza bhokisi, vakariisa kunze kwesuwo reimba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles24:9 Zvino vakatuma shoko pakati paJudha neJerusaremu, kuti vanhu vavigire Jehovha mutero wakarairwa VaIsiraeri murenje naMosesi muranda waMwari." 
2Chronicles24:10 Machinda ose navanhu vose vakafara, vakauya nazvo, vakazvikanda mubhokisi, kusvikira vapedza." 
2Chronicles24:11 Zvino nguva dzose kana bhokisi richiiswa paimba yamambo namaoko avaRevhi, kana vakaona kuti mari zhinji yavamo, munyori wamambo nomutariri womupristi mukuru vakauya vakadurura zviri mubhokisi, vakaritora ndokuridzoserazve panzvimbo yaro. Vakaita kudaro zuva rimwe nerimwe, vakaunganidza mari zhinji." 
2Chronicles24:12 Zvino mambo naJehoyadha vakaipa vaibata mabasa paimba yaJehovha; vakaripira vavezi vamabwe namatanda, kuti vavandudze imba yaJehovha, navapfuri vamatare nendarira, kuti vagadzire imba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles24:13 Naizvozvo vabati vakabata, basa rikapedzwa navo; vakagadzira imba yaMwari sezvayakanga yakaita kare, vakaisimbisa." 
2Chronicles24:14 Zvino vakati vapedza, vakauya nemari yakasara kuna mambo naJehoyadha, vakaita nayo midziyo yeimba yaJehovha, iri midziyo yokubata nayo, nokubayira nayo, nezvirongo nemidziyo yendarama nesirivha. Vaibayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa mumba maJehovha mazuva ose aJehoyadha." 
2Chronicles24:15 Asi Jehoyadha akazokwegura, akava namazuva mazhinji ndokufa; akanga ana makore ane zana namakumi matatu pakufa kwake." 
2Chronicles24:16 Vakamuviga paguta raDhavhidhi pakati pamadzimambo; nokuti akanga aitira Mwari neimba yake zvakanaka pakati paIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles24:17 Zvino Jehoyadha akati afa, machinda aJudha akasvika, akanamata mambo. Ipapo mambo akavateerera." 
2Chronicles24:18 Vakasiya imba yaJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo, vakashumira matanda okunamata nawo nezvifananidzo; Mwari akatsamwira Judha neJerusaremu pamusoro pemhaka iyi." 
2Chronicles24:19 Kunyangwe zvakadaro akavatumira vaporofita kuzovadzoserazve kuna Jehovha; ivo vakavapupurira, asi vakaramba kunzwa." 
2Chronicles24:20 Ipapo Mweya waMwari wakauya pamusoro paZekariya, mwanakomana womupristi Jehoyadha, akamira pakakwirira pamberi pavanhu, akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naMwari, ‘Munodarikireiko mirairo yaJehovha, muchiramba kufara? Zvamasiya Jehovha, naiye wakausiyawo.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Ipapo vakarangana, vakamutaka namabwe paruvazhe rweimba yaJehovha, varairwa namambo." 
2Chronicles24:22 Nokudaro mambo Joashi haana kurangarira zvakanaka zvaakanga aitirwa naJehoyadha baba vake, asi akauraya mwanakomana wake. Zvino wakati achifa, akati, “Jehovha ngaatarire chinhu ichi, achitsive.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Zvino gore rakati ropera, hondo yaVaSiria ikasvika kuzorwa naye; vakasvika paJudha napaJerusaremu vakaparadza machinda ose avanhu pakati pavanhu, vakatuma zvose zvavakapamba kuna mambo weDhamasikosi." 
2Chronicles24:24 Nokuti hondo yaVaSiria yakauya neboka duku ravanhu; Jehovha akaisa pfumo guru–guru mumaoko avo, nokuti vakanga vasiya Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo. Nokudaro vakaitira Joashi zvakanga zvatongwa naMwari." 
2Chronicles24:25 Zvino vakati vabva kwaari (nokuti vakamusiya achirwara kwazvo), varanda vake vakarangana pamusoro pake nemhaka yeropa ravanakomana vomupristi Jehoyadha, vakamuurayira panhoo yake, akafa; vakamuviga muguta raDhavhidhi, asi havana kumuviga kumarinda amadzimambo." 
2Chronicles24:26 Vakarangana pamusoro pake ndivava: Zabhadhi mwanakomana waShimiati, mukadzi muAmoni, neJehozabhadhi mwanakomana waShimiriti mukadzi muMoabhu." 
2Chronicles24:27 Zvino kana zviri zvavanakomana vake, namashoko makuru avaporofita akarehwa pamusoro pake, nokumutswa kweimba yaMwari, tarirai zvakanyorwa padudziro yebhuku yamadzimambo. Amaziya mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziya akanga ana makore makumi maviri namashanu pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi maviri namapfumbamwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Jehoadhani weJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles25:2 Iye akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, asi haana kuita nomwoyo wose." 
2Chronicles25:3 Zvino akati asimba paushe hwake, akauraya varanda vake vakauraya mambo baba vake." 
2Chronicles25:4 Asi haana kuuraya vana vavo, asi akaita sezvakanyorwa pamurairo paBhuku raMosesi, sezvakarairwa naJehovha, achiti, “Madzibaba haafaniri kufira vana vavo, navana havafaniri kufira madzibaba avo; asi munhu mumwe nomumwe anofanira kufira zvivi zvake.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Amaziya akaunganidzawo vaJudha, akagadza pamusoro pavo vatariri vezviuru navatariri vamazana nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, ivo vaJudha vose navaBhenjamini; akavaverenga, vose vamakore ana makumi maviri navakapfuura, akavawana vari varume vane zviuru zvina mazana matatu vakatsaurwa, vaigona kurwa, vaigona kurwa nepfumo nenhoo." 
2Chronicles25:6 Akaripirawo varume vane simba noumahare vane zviuru zvine zana vaVaIsiraeri, akavapa matarenta ane zana esirivha." 
2Chronicles25:7 Asi mumwe munhu waMwari akauya kwaari, akati, “Haiwa, mambo, hondo yaVaIsiraeri ngairege kuenda nemi, nokuti Jehovha haapo pana Isiraeri, pavana vaEfuremu vose." 
2Chronicles25:8 Asi endai imi moga, shingai murwe nesimba; Mwari angakukundisai navavengi here? Nokuti Mwari ane simba rokubatsira nerokukundisa.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Ipapo Amaziya akati kumunhu waMwari, “Zvino tichaita seiko pamusoro pamatarenta ane zana andakapa pfumo raVaIsiraeri?” Munhu waMwari akapindura, akati, “Jehovha anogona kukupai zvinopfuura izvozvo kwazvo.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Ipapo Amaziya akavaraura, iro pfumo rakanga rauya kwaari richibva kwaEfuremu, kuti vadzokerezve kumusha; nemhaka iyo vakatsamwira Judha kwazvo, vakadzokera kumusha vatsamwa kwazvo." 
2Chronicles25:11 Zvino Amaziya akatsunga mwoyo, akatungamirira vanhu vake, akaenda kuMupata woMunyu, akauraya vana vaSeiri vane zviuru zvine gumi." 
2Chronicles25:12 Vana vaJudha vakatapa vane zviuru zvine gumi vari vapenyu, vakaenda navo pamusoro pedombo, vakavakandira pasi padombo, vakavhunikanya vose." 
2Chronicles25:13 Asi varume vehondo vakanga vadzoswa naAmaziya, kuti varege kundorwa naye, vakandowira maguta aJudha, kubva paSamaria kusvikira paBhetihoroni, vakauraya vanhu vane zviuru zvitatu kwavari, vakapambara zvizhinji." 
2Chronicles25:14 Zvino Amaziya akati achidzoka pakuuraya vaEdhomu, akauya navamwari vavana vaSeiri, akavaita vamwari vake, akavapfugamira, nokuvapisira zvinonhuwira." 
2Chronicles25:15 Saka Jehovha akatsamwira Amaziya, akatuma muporofita kwaari; iye akati kwaari, “Wakabvunzireiko vamwari vavanhu vakakoniwa kurwira vanhu vavo pamaoko ako?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Zvino wakati achataura naye, mambo akati kwaari, “Takakuita gurukota ramambo here? Nyarara, uchaurayirweiko?” Ipapo muporofita akanyarara, asi akati, “Ndinoziva kuti Mwari anofunga kukuparadza, nokuti wakaita izvozvi, ukasaterera zvandakakuraira.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Ipapo Amaziya mambo waJudha akatsvaka zano, akatuma kuna Joashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi, mwanakomana waJehu, mambo waIsiraeri, akati, “Uya tirwe.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Joashi mambo waIsiraeri akatuma shoko kuna Amaziya mambo waJudha, akati, “Rukato rwakanga ruri paRebhanoni rwakatuma shoko kumusidhari wakanga uri paRebhanoni, rukati, ‘Ipa mwanakomana wangu mukunda wako ave mukadzi wake;’ zvino imwe mhuka yakanga iri paRebhanoni ikapfuurapo, ikatsika–tsika rukato." 
2Chronicles25:19 “Iwe unoti, ‘Tarira wakunda Edhomu; zvino mwoyo wako wava namanyawi, wozvikudza; gara hako zvino kumusha kwako; nokuti uchatsvakireiko njodzi, uwiremo, iwe naJudha pamwechete newe?’ ”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Asi Amaziya akaramba kunzwa; nokuti zvakanga zvichibva kuna Mwari, kuti avaise mumaoko avavengi vavo; nokuti vakanga vatevera vamwari vaEdhomu." 
2Chronicles25:21 Naizvozvo Joashi mambo waIsiraeri akaenda; iye naAmaziya mambo waJudha vakarwa paBhetishemeshi riri paJudha. 
2Chronicles25:22 Judha vakakundwa naIsiraeri, mumwe nomumwe akatizira kutende rake." 
2Chronicles25:23 Joashi mambo waIsiraeri akasunga Amaziya mambo waJudha, mwanakomana waJoashi, mwanakomana waJehoahazi, paBhetishemeshi, akaenda naye Jerusaremu, akaputsa rusvingo rweJerusaremu, kubva pasuwo raEfuremu kusvikira pasuwo rapakona, makubhiti ana mazana mana." 
2Chronicles25:24 Akatora ndarama yose nesirivha, nemidziyo yose yakawanikwa mumba maMwari kuna ObhedhiEdhomu, nepfuma yomumba mamambo, navanhu kuzova rubatso, akadzokera Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Zvino Amaziya mwanakomana waJoashi mambo waJudha wakagara ari mupenyu makore ane gumi namashanu shure kwokufa kwaJoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi mambo waIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles25:26 Zvino mamwe mabasa aAmaziya, okutanga nookupedzisira, tarirai, haana kunyorwa here mubhuku yamadzimambo aJudha naIsiraeri?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Zvino kubva panguva yakarega Amaziya kutevera Jehovha, vakamurangana, vakamumukira paJerusaremu; iye ndokutizira Rakishi; asi vakatuma vanhu Rakishi vachimutevera, vakamuurayirapo." 
2Chronicles25:28 Vakauya naye pamabhiza, vakamuviga kumadzibaba ake muguta raJudha." 
2Chronicles26:1 Zvino vanhu vose vaJudha vakatora Uziya, akanga ana makore gumi namatanhatu, vakamuita mambo panzvimbo yababa vake Amaziya." 
2Chronicles26:2 Iye akavaka Eroti, akaridzosera kuna Judha, mambo avata namadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya akanga ana makore gumi namatanhatu pakutanga kwake kubata ushe, akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi mashanu namaviri; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Jekiria weJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles26:4 Iye akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, sezvose sezvakaita baba vake Amaziya." 
2Chronicles26:5 Akashingaira kutsvaka Mwari namazuva aZekariya, akanga ane njere pakuziva zvaMwari; zvino pamazuva aakatsvaka Jehovha, Mwari akamukundisa." 
2Chronicles26:6 Akandorwa navaFirisitia, akaputsa rusvingo rweGati, norusvingo rweJabhine, norusvingo rweAshidhodhi; akavaka maguta panyika yeAshidhodhi napakati pavaFirisitia." 
2Chronicles26:7 Mwari akamubatsira pakurwa navaFirisitia, navaArabhia, vakanga vagere Guribhaari, nevaMeunimi." 
2Chronicles26:8 VaAmoni vakavigira Uziya zvipo; mbiri yake ikapararira kusvikira pavanopinda napo muIjipiti; nokuti akasimba kwazvo. 
2Chronicles26:9 Uziya akavakawo shongwe paJerusaremu pasuwo rekona, napasuwo romupata, napakudzoka kworusvingo, akadzisimbisa." 
2Chronicles26:10 Akavakawo shongwe murenje, akacherawo matsime mazhinji, nokuti akanga ane zvipfuwo zvizhinji; napamapaniwo, napanyika yokumakomo; uye akanga ana varimi navasimi vamazambiringa pamakomo napaminda yakaworera, nokuti aida minda." 
2Chronicles26:11 Uyewo Uziya akanga ane hondo yavarwi, vaindorwa vachiita mapoka, sezvavakaverengwa naJeieri munyori, naMaaseya murairi, vakatungamirirwa naHanania mumwe wavakuru vamambo." 
2Chronicles26:12 Vose vakaverengwa kuvakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba, ivo varume vaiva nesimba noumhare, vakasvika zviuru zviviri namazana matanhatu." 
2Chronicles26:13 Ivo vairaira hondo yakanga yakadzidziswa, vanhu vane zviuru zvina mazana matatu nezvinomwe namazana mashanu, vaigona kurwa nesimba guru, kuzobatsira mambo kurwa navavengi vavo." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uziya akavagadzirira, ivo vose vehondo, nhoo, namapfumo, nengoani, nenguo dzamatare, nouta, namabwe okupfura nawo." 
2Chronicles26:15 Akaitawo paJerusaremu michini, yakaitwa navanhu vakangwara, ikaiswa pashongwe napamakona amasvingo, kuzoposhera nayo miseve namabwe makuru. Mbiri yake ikapararira; nokuti akabatsirwa zvinoshamisa, kusvikira asimba." 
2Chronicles26:16 Asi akati asimba, mwoyo wake ukazvikudza, akazoita zvakashata, akatadzira Jehovha Mwari wake; nokuti akapinda patemberi yaJehovha kundopisa zvinonhuwira paatari yezvinonhuwira." 
2Chronicles26:17 Ipapo mupristi Azaria akamutevera akapinda ana vapristi vaJehovha vana makumi masere, vaiva varume voumhare." 
2Chronicles26:18 Ivo vakadzivisa mambo Uziya, vakati kwaari, “Nhandi Uziya, hazvifaniri kuti imi mupisire Jehovha zvinonhuwira, asi vapristi vanakomana vaAroni, vakatsaurwa kupisa zvinonhuwira; budai panzvimbo tsvene, nokuti madarika; hamungakudzwi naJehovha Mwari nokuda kwechinhu ichi.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Ipapo Uziya akatsamwa kwazvo; zvino iye akanga akabata hariyana yezvinonhuwira kuti apise zvinonhuwira; zvino akati achakatsamwira vapristi, maperembudzi akabuda pahuma yake pamberi pavapristi muimba yaJehovha, kurutivi rweatari yezvinonhuwira." 
2Chronicles26:20 Zvino Azaria mupristi mukuru navapristi vose vakatarira kwaari, vakaona kuti wava namaperembudzi pahuma yake, vakachimbidzika kumubudisapo; kunyangwe naiye akachimbidzika kubuda, nokuti Jehovha akanga amurova." 
2Chronicles26:21 Zvino mambo Uziya akava namaperembudzi kusvikira pazuva rokufa kwake, akagara ari oga muimba, ana maperembudzi; nokuti akadziviswa kupinda paimba yaJehovha; Jotamu mwanakomana wake akava mutariri weimba yamambo, akatongawo mhosva dzavanhu venyika." 
2Chronicles26:22 Zvino mamwe mabasa aUziya, okutanga nookupedzisira, akanyorwa nomuporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Naizvozvo Uziya akavata namadzibaba ake, vakamuviga kumadzibaba ake mumunda wamarinda aiva amadzimambo; nokuti vakati, “Ana maperembudzi;” Jotamu mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jotamu akatanga kubata ushe asvika makore makumi maviri namashanu; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore ane gumi namatanhatu; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Jerusha mukunda waZadhoki. 
2Chronicles27:2 Akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, akaita zvose zvakaitwa nababa vake Uziya; asi haana kupinda mutemberi yaJehovha. Vanhu vakaramba vachiita zvakashata." 
2Chronicles27:3 Akavaka suwo rokumusoro reimba yaJehovha, akavakawo zvizhinji pamusoro porusvingo rweOferi." 
2Chronicles27:4 Wakavakawo maguta panyika yamakomo yaJudha, uye akavaka nhare neshongwe mumatondo." 
2Chronicles27:5 Akarwawo namambo wavana vaAmoni, akavakunda. Negore iro vana vaAmoni vakamupa matarenta esirivha ane zana, nezviyero zvezviyo zvine zviuru zvine gumi, nezviyero zvebhari zvine zviuru zvine gumi. Vana vaAmoni vakamupa zvizhinji zvakadai pagore rechipiri, negore rechitatuwo." 
2Chronicles27:6 Naizvozvo Jotamu akasimba, nokuti akagadzira nzira dzake pamberi paJehovha Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles27:7 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJotamu, nokurwa kwake kwose netsika dzake, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamadzimambo aIsiraeri naaJudha." 
2Chronicles27:8 Akatanga kubata ushe asvika makore makumi maviri namashanu; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore gumi namatanhatu. 
2Chronicles27:9 Jotamu akavata namadzibaba ake; vakamuviga muguta raDhavhidhi; Ahazi mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe. 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi akanga ana makore makumi maviri pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore gumi namatanhatu; asi haana kuita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, sababa vake Dhavhidhi;" 
2Chronicles28:2 asi wakafamba nenzira dzamadzibaba aIsiraeri, akaitira vaBhaariwo zvifananidzo zvendarira yakanyauswa." 
2Chronicles28:3 Uye akapisawo zvinonhuwira pamupata womwanakomana waHinomu, akapisa vana vake mumoto, sezvainyangadza zvavahedheni, vakanga vadzingwa naJehovha pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles28:4 Akabayira nokupisa zvinonhuwira pamatunhu akakwirira, napazvikomo, napasi pemiti yose mitema." 
2Chronicles28:5 Saka Jehovha Mwari wake akamuisa muruoko rwamambo weSiria; vakamukunda, vakaenda navanhu vake vazhinji vakatapwa, vakandovaisa Dhamasikosi. Naiye amene akaiswa muruoko rwamambo waIsiraeri, akamukunda, akauraya vazhinji zhinji." 
2Chronicles28:6 Nokuti Peka mwanakomana waRemaria akauraya paJudha vanhu vane zviuru zvine zana namakumi maviri pazuva rimwe; vose vari varume voumhare; nokuti vakanga vasiya Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo. 
2Chronicles28:7 Zikiri murume waEfuremu, akanga ane simba, akauraya Maaseya mwanakomana wamambo, naAzirikami mutariri weimba, naErikana mukuru kutevera mambo." 
2Chronicles28:8 Vana VaIsiraeri vakatapa pakati pehama dzavo vanhu vane zviuru zvina mazana maviri, vakadzi, vanakomana, navanasikana, vakapambawo zvizhinji kwavari; vakandoisa Samaria izvo zvakapambwa." 
2Chronicles28:9 Asi kwakanga kuno muporofita waJehovha, wainzi Obhedhi; iye akaenda kundosangana nehondo yakanga youya Samaria, akati kwavari, “Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu akanga atsamwira vaJudha, saka akavaisa mumaoko enyu, makavauraya nehasha dzakasvikira kudenga." 
2Chronicles28:10 Zvino munoti muchamanikidza vana vaJudha naveJerusaremu, vave vatapwa venyu varanda navarandakadzi; ko imi hamuna mhosvawo mumene pamberi paJehovha Mwari wenyu here?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Naizvozvo zvino chindinzwai, mudzose vatapwa vamakatapa pakati pehama dzenyu; nokuti Jehovha akutsamwirai kwazvo.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Ipapo vamwe vakuru vavana vaEfuremu, vaiti: Azaria mwanakomana waJohanani, naBherekia mwanakomana waMeshiremoti, naJehizikia mwanakomana waSharumi, naAmasa mwanakomana waHadhirai, vakadzivisa avo vabva pakurwa," 
2Chronicles28:13 vakati kwavari, “Hamungapindi pano navatapwa, nokuti munovhavhaira kuita chinhu chichatiparisa mhaka pana Jehovha, mugowedzera pazvivi zvedu nemhosva yedu; nokuti mhosva yedu ihuru, VaIsiraeri vatsamwirwa kwazvo naJehovha.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Ipapo varwi vakasiya vatapwa nezvakapambwa kumachinda neungano yose. 
2Chronicles28:15 Zvino ava varume varehwa mazita avo, vakasimuka, vakatora vatapwa, vakafukidza vose vakanga vakashama pakati pavo nezvakapambwa, vakavapfekedza nokuvaisa shangu, ndokuvapa zvokudya nezvokunwa, vakavazodza, vakatasvisa vose vakanga vasine simba pambongoro, vakavaisa Jeriko, guta remichindwe, kuhama dzavo; ipapo vakadzokera Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Panguva iyo mambo Ahazi akatuma shoko kumadzibaba aAsiria, kuti vamubatsire." 
2Chronicles28:17 Nokuti vaEdhomu vakanga vasvikazve, vakakunda vaJudha vakatapa vatapwa." 
2Chronicles28:18 NavaFirisitiawo vakanga vavamba maguta amapani, naaiva kurutivi rwezasi rwaJudha, vakakunda Bhetishemeshi, neAijaroni, neGedheroti, neSoko, nemisha yawo, neTimina, nemisha yaro, neGimizo nemisha yaro; vakagarapo." 
2Chronicles28:19 Nokuti Jehovha akaninipisa vaJudha nokuda kwaAhazi mambo waIsiraeri; nokuti akanga aita zvakaipa paJudha, akatadzira Jehovha kwazvo." 
2Chronicles28:20 Zvino Tirigati-pireza mambo weAsiria akauya kuzorwa naye, akamumanikidza, asi haana kumukunda." 
2Chronicles28:21 Nokuti Ahazi akatora mugove wepfuma paimba yaJehovha, napaimba yamambo, neyamachinda, akazvipa mambo weAsiria; asi hazvina kumubatsira." 
2Chronicles28:22 Asi panguva yokutambudzika kwake, akanyanya kutadzira Jehovha, iye mambo Ahazi." 
2Chronicles28:23 Nokuti akabayira vamwari veDhamasikosi, vakanga vamukunda, akati, “Vamwari vamadzimambo aSiria zvavanovabatsira, ini ndichavabayirawo, kuti vandibatsirewo.” Asi ivo vakamuparadza iye naVaIsiraeri vose pamwechete naye." 
2Chronicles28:24 Zvino Ahazi akaunganidza midziyo yeimba yaMwari akaputsanya midziyo yeimba yaMwari, akapfiga mikova yeimba yaJehovha; akazviitira atari pose pose paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Akaitawo matunhu akakwirira paguta rimwe nerimwe raJudha kuzopisira vamwe vamwari zvinonhuwira ipapo, akatsamwisa Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles28:26 Zvino mamwe mabasa ake, netsika dzake dzose, dzokutanga nedzokupedzisira, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamadzimambo aJudha naIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles28:27 Ahazi akavata namadzibaba ake, vakamuviga muguta, imo muJerusaremu; nokuti havana kumuisa pamarinda amadzimambo aIsiraeri; Hezekiya mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya wakatanga kubata ushe asvika makore makumi maviri namashanu; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi maviri namapfumbamwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Abhija mukunda waZekariya. 
2Chronicles29:2 Akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha sezvose zvakaita baba vake Dhavhidhi. 
2Chronicles29:3 Pagore rokutanga rokubata kwake ushe, nomwedzi wokutanga, akazarura mikova yeimba yaJehovha, akaigadzira." 
2Chronicles29:4 Akapinza vapristi navaRevhi, akavaunganidza padare pamabvazuva," 
2Chronicles29:5 akati kwavari, “Chindinzwai, imi vaRevhi; chizvinatsai zvino, munatsewo imba yaJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu; mutakurire kunze tsvina yose iri munzvimbo tsvene." 
2Chronicles29:6 Nokuti madzibaba edu akadarika, vakaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha Mwari wedu, vakamusiya, vakarega kutarira kuugaro hwaJehovha, ndokumufuratira." 
2Chronicles29:7 Vakapfigawo mikova yebiravira, nokudzima mwenje; havana kupisira zvinonhuwira, kana kubayira Mwari waIsiraeri zvipiriso zvinopiswa panzvimbo tsvene." 
2Chronicles29:8 Saka Jehovha akatsamwira vaJudha neJerusaremu, akavaita chityiso nechishamiso, chinoridzirwa muridzo, sezvamunoona nameso enyu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Nokuti tarirai, madzibaba edu akaparadzwa nomunondo; vanakomana vedu navanasikana vedu navakadzi vedu vakatapwa nokuda kwaizvozvi." 
2Chronicles29:10 “Zvino mwoyo wangu unoda kuita sungano naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, kuti kutsamwa kwake kukuru kubviswe kwatiri." 
2Chronicles29:11 “Vanakomana vangu, regai kuva vanhu vasine hanya zvino, nokuti Jehovha akakutsaurai kuti mumire pamberi pake, mumubatirei, nokuva vabatiri vake, nokumupisira zvinonhuwira.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Ipapo vaRevhi vakasimuka, Mahati mwanakomana waAmasai, naJoeri mwanakomana waAzaria pakati pavanakomana vavaKohati, napakati pavanakomana vaMerari, Kishi mwanakomana waAbhidhi, naAzaria mwanakomana waJeharereri; napakati pavaGerishoni, Joa mwanakomana waZimima, naEdheni mwanakomana waJoa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 napakati pavanakomana vaErizafani, Shimiri naJeueri; napakati pavanakomana vaAsafi, Zekariya naMatania;" 
2Chronicles29:14 napakati pavanakomana vaHemani, Jehueri naShimei; napakati pavanakomana vaJedhutuni, Shemaya naUzieri." 
2Chronicles29:15 Ivo vakaunganidza hama dzavo, vakazvinatsa, vakapinda sezvavakarairwa namambo namashoko aJehovha, kuti vanatse imba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles29:16 Vapristi vakapinda mukati meimba yaJehovha, kuti vainatse, vakabudisa marara ose avakawana mutemberi yaJehovha kuruvazhe rweimba yaJehovha. VaRevhi vakaatora, ndokuatakurira kunze kurukova Kidhironi." 
2Chronicles29:17 Vakatanga kunatsa nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wokutanga, vakasvika pabiravira raJehovha nezuva rorusere romwedzi; vakanatsa imba yaJehovha namazuva masere; vakapedzisa nezuva regumi namatanhatu romwedzi wokutanga." 
2Chronicles29:18 Ipapo vakapinda kuna mambo Hezekiya mukati meimba yamambo, vakati, “Tanatsa imba yose yaJehovha, neatari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, netafura yezvingwa zvokuratidza, nenhumbi dzayo dzose." 
2Chronicles29:19 Uye nhumbi dzose dzakarashwa namambo Ahazi pakudarika kwake nguva yaakabata ushe, tadzigadzira nokudzinatsa; tarirai, dziri pamberi peatari yaJehovha.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Zvino mambo Hezekiya akamuka mangwanani, akaunganidza machinda eguta, akaenda kumba kwaJehovha." 
2Chronicles29:21 Vakauya nenzombe nomwe, namakondobwe manomwe, namakwaiana manomwe, nenhongo dzembudzi nomwe, chive chipiriso chezvivi choushe neimba tsvene navaJudha. Akaraira vapristi ivo vanakomana vaAroni, kuti vazvibayire paatari yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles29:22 Ipapo vakauraya nzombe, vapristi vakachinga ropa, ndokurisasa paatari; vakauraya makondobwe, vakasasa ropa paatari; vakaurayawo makwayana, vakasasa ropa paatari." 
2Chronicles29:23 Vakaswededzawo nhongo dzembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi pamberi pamambo neungano, vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro padzo;" 
2Chronicles29:24 vapristi vakadziuraya, vakaita chipiriso chezvivi neropa radzo paatari, kuti vayananisire VaIsiraeri vose; nokuti mambo akaraira kuti VaIsiraeri vose vapisirwe chipiriso chinopiswa nechipiriso chezvivi." 
2Chronicles29:25 Akaisa vaRevhi mumba maJehovha, vana makandira, nemitengerangwa, nembira, sezvavakarairwa naDhavhidhi, uye nomuoni wamambo Gadhi, uye nomuporofita Natania; nokuti akanga ari Jehovha akaraira navaporofita vake." 
2Chronicles29:26 VaRevhi vakamira nezvokuridza zvaDhavhidhi, navapristi vane hwamanda." 
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekiya akaraira kuti vabayire chipiriso chinopiswa paatari. Zvino chipiriso chinopiswa chakati chichitanga kupiswa, rwiyo rwaJehovha ndokutangawo, uye hwamanda pamwechete nezvokuridza zvaDhavhidhi mambo waIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles29:28 Ungano yose ndokunamata, vaimbi vakaimba, navaridzi vehwamanda vakaridza; izvozvi zvose zvikaramba zvichiitwa kusvikira chipiriso chinopiswa chapera." 
2Chronicles29:29 Zvino vakati vapedza kupisira, mambo navose vakanga varipo naye vakakotamira pasi, vakanamata." 
2Chronicles29:30 Mambo Hezekiya namachinda vakarairawo vaRevhi kuimbira Jehovha vachimukudza namashoko aDhavhidhi nomuoni Asafi. Vakaimba nziyo dzokukudza nomufaro, vakakotamisa misoro yavo vakanamata." 
2Chronicles29:31 Ipapo Hezekiya akapindura, akati, “Zvino zvamazvitsaurira Jehovha, swederai muuye nezvibairo nezvipiriso zvokuvonga nazvo mumba maJehovha.” Ungano ndokuuya nezvibairo nezvipiriso zvokuvonga; vose, vakanga vanomwoyo unoda, vakauya nezvipiriso zvinopiswa." 
2Chronicles29:32 Zvipiriso zvinopiswa, zvakauyiswa neungano, zvakasvika nzombe dzina makumi manomwe namakondobwe ane zana, namakwayana ana mazana maviri pakuwanda kwazvo; izvi zvose chakanga chiri chipiriso chokupisira Jehovha." 
2Chronicles29:33 Zvinhu zvakatsaurirwa Jehovha zvakasvika nzombe dzina mazana matanhatu, namakwai ane zviuru zvitatu." 
2Chronicles29:34 Asi vapristi vakanga vasingaringani, vakakoniwa kuvhiya zvipiriso zvose zvinopiswa; saka vaRevhi hama dzavo, vakavabatsira, kusvikira basa rapera, uye kusvikira vapristi vazvinatsa; nokuti mwoyo yavaRevhi yakanga yakarurama pakuzvinatsa kupfuura vapristi." 
2Chronicles29:35 Zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvakanga zvakawandawo kwazvo, namafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, nezvipiriso zvaidururwa zvechipiriso chimwe nechimwe chaipiswa. Naizvozvo basa reimba yaJehovha rakagadzirwa." 
2Chronicles29:36 Ipapo Hezekiya akafara, navanhu vose, nokuda kwezvose zvakanga zvagadzirirwa vanhu naMwari; nokuti chinhu ichi chakaitwa nokuchimbidzika." 
2Chronicles30:1 Zvino Hezekiya akatuma nhume kuVaIsiraeri nokuvaJudha vose, akanyorawo tsamba kuvaEfuremu navaManase, kuti vauye kuimba yaJehovha paJerusaremu, kuzoitira Jehovha Mwari waVaIsiraeri Pasika." 
2Chronicles30:2 Nokuti mambo namachinda ake, neungano yose paJerusaremu vakanga varangana kuita Pasika nomwedzi wechipiri." 
2Chronicles30:3 Nokuti vakanga vasingagoni kuiita nenguva iyo, nokuti vapristi, vakanatswa, vakanga vasingaringani, navanhuwo vakanga vasina kuungana paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles30:4 Zvino chinhu ichi chakanga chakarurama pamberi pamambo neungano yose. 
2Chronicles30:5 Naizvozvo vakasimbisa chirevo, vakazivisa pakati paIsiraeri pose, kubva paBheerishebha kusvikira paDhani, kuti vanhu vauye kuzoitira Jehovha Mwari waVaIsiraeri Pasika paJerusaremu; nokuti vakanga vasina kuiita nguva huru, sezvakanga zvakanyorwa." 
2Chronicles30:6 Ipapo nhume dzakamhanya dzikaenda netsamba dzamambo namachinda ake pakati paVaIsiraeri vose navaJudha, sezvavakanga varairwa namambo, vakati, “Imi vana VaIsiraeri, dzokeraizve kuna Jehovha Mwari waAbhurahamu, naIsaka, naIsiraeri, kuti iye adzokerezve kuna vakasara pakati penyu, vakapukunyuka, pamaoko amadzimambo eAsiria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Regai kuva samadzibaba enyu, nehama dzenyu, vakadarika mirairo yaJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu, iye akazovaita chishamiso sezvamunoona." 
2Chronicles30:8 Regai kuva nemitsipa mikukutu, sezvakanga zvakaita madzibaba enyu; batai ruoko rwaJehovha, mupinde paimba yake tsvene, yaakanatsa nokusingaperi, mushumire Jehovha Mwari wenyu, kuti kutsamwa kwake kubviswe kwamuri." 
2Chronicles30:9 Nokuti kana imi mukadzokera kuna Jehovha, hama dzenyu navana venyu vachanzwirwa tsitsi navatapi vavo, vagodzokerazve kunyika ino; nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu ane ngoni nenyasha; haangafuratidzi chiso chake kwamuri, kana mukadzokera kwaari.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Naizvozvo nhume dzakamhanya dzikapota pamaguta ose panyika yose yaEfuremu naManase, kusvikira paZebhuruni; asi vakavaseka, nokuvadadira." 
2Chronicles30:11 Asi vamwe vavaAsheri navaManase navaZebhuruni, vakazvininipisa, vakaenda Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles30:12 NapaJudhawo ruoko rwaMwari rwakavapa mwoyo mumwe, kuti vateerere murairo wamambo namachinda neshoko raJehovha." 
2Chronicles30:13 Ipapo vanhu vazhinji vakaungana paJerusaremu, kuzoita mutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa nomwedzi wechipiri, ikaita ungano huru kwazvo." 
2Chronicles30:14 Vakasimuka, ndokubvisa atari dzaiva paJerusaremu, vakabvisawo atari dzose dzezvinonhuwira, vakadzikandira murukova Kidhironi." 
2Chronicles30:15 Ipapo vakauraya gwayana rePasika pazuva regumi namana romwedzi wechipiri; vapristi navaRevhi vakanyara, vakazvinatsa, vakauya nezvipiriso zvinopiswa mumba maJehovha." 
2Chronicles30:16 Vakamira panzvimbo yavo sezvavakarairwa nomurairo waMosesi, iye munhu waMwari; vapristi vakasasa ropa ravakatora pamaoko avaRevhi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Nokuti vazhinji vaivapo paungano vakanga vasina kuzvinatsa; saka vaRevhi vaiva nebasa rokuurayira vose, vakanga vasina kunatswa, makwayana ePasika yavo, kuti vavanatsire Jehovha." 
2Chronicles30:18 Nokuti vanhu vazhinji zhinji vaEfuremu navaManase, navaIsakari navaZebhuruni, vakanga vasina kuzvinatsa; kunyangwe zvakadaro vakadya Pasika nomutowo wakapesana nowakanyorwa. Nokuti Hezekiya akanga avanyengeterera, achiti, “Jehovha wakanaka ngaakanganwire mumwe nomumwe," 
2Chronicles30:19 unoshingaira nomwoyo wake kutsvaka Mwari, Jehovha, Mwari wababa vake, kunyangwe asina kunatswa nomutowo wokunatswa kwenzvimbo tsvene.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Jehovha akanzwa Hezekiya, akaporesa vanhu." 
2Chronicles30:21 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri, vaiva paJerusaremu, vakaita mutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa nomufaro mukuru mazuva manomwe; vaRevhi navapristi vakarumbidza Jehovha zuva rimwe nerimwe, vachiridzira Jehovha nezvokuridzisa zvainzwika kure." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiya akataura nounyoro navaRevhi vose vaigona kubatira Jehovha zvakanaka. Naizvozvo vakadya pamutambo mazuva manomwe, vakabayira zvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, vachizvireurura kuna Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles30:23 Zvino ungano yose yakarangana kuita mamwe mazuva manomwezve; vakaita mazuva manomwezve nomufaro. 
2Chronicles30:24 Nokuti Hezekiya mambo waJudha akapa ungano nzombe dzine chiuru chimwe, namakwai ane zviuru zvinomwe, kuti vabayire nazvo; namachindawo akapa ungano nzombe dzine chiuru chimwe, namakwai ane zviuru zvine gumi; vapristi vazhinji zhinji vakazvinatsa." 
2Chronicles30:25 Ipapo ungano yose yaJudha, pamwechete navapristi navaRevhi, neungano yose yakabva pakati paIsiraeri, navatorwa vakabva panyika yaIsiraeri, navakanga vagere paJudha, vakafara vose." 
2Chronicles30:26 Naizvozvo mufaro mukuru ukavapo paJerusaremu; nokuti kubva panguva yaSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mambo waIsiraeri, hakuna kuita zvakadaro paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles30:27 Ipapo vapristi vaRevhi vakasimuka, vakaropafadza, vanhu; mazwi avo akanzwika, nokunyengetera kwavo kukasvika kuugaro hwake utsvene iko kudenga." 
2Chronicles31:1 Zvino izvo zvose zvakati zvapera, VaIsiraeri vose vakanga varipo, vakabuda kumaguta aJudha, vakaputsa shongwe, nokutema matanda okunamata nawo, vakaputsa matunhu akakwirira neatari kwaJudha nokwaBhenjamini kwose, nokwaEfuremu nokwaManase, kusvikira vazviparadza zvose. Ipapo vana VaIsiraeri vose vakadzokera kumaguta avo, mumwe nomumwe kuzvinhu zvake." 
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekiya akaraira mapoka avapristi navaRevhi pamapoka avo, munhu mumwe nomumwe pabasa rake vapristi navaRevhi vose, vakabayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, kushumira nokuvonga, nokurumbidza mumasuwo emisasa yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles31:3 Akarairawo mugove wepfuma yamambo wezvipiriso zvinopiswa, zvaiti: Wezvipiriso zvinopiswa mangwanani namadekwana, nezvipiriso zvinopiswa pamaSabata, napakugara kwomwedzi, napamitambo yakatarwa, sezvazvakanyorwa pamurairo waJehovha." 
2Chronicles31:4 Akarairawo vanhu veJerusaremu kupa vapristi navaRevhi mugove wavo, kuti ivo vasimbe pamurairo waJehovha." 
2Chronicles31:5 Zvino vakati vachangonzwa murairo uyu, vana VaIsiraeri vakapa zvakawanda zvezvitsva, zvezviyo newaini, namafuta, nouchi, nemichero yose yeminda; uye chegumi chezvinhu zvose vakauya nazvo zviri zvizhinji." 
2Chronicles31:6 Navana VaIsiraeri navaJudha vakanga vagere pamaguta aJudha vakauyawo nezvegumi zvenzombe namakwai, nezvegumi zvezvinhu zvakatsaurwa zvakanga zvatsaurirwa Jehovha Mwari wavo, vakazviita mirwi." 
2Chronicles31:7 Vakatanga kuita mirwi pamwedzi wechitatu, vakapedza nomwedzi wechinomwe." 
2Chronicles31:8 Zvino Hezekiya namachinda, vakati vasvika nokuona mirwi, vakavonga Jehovha navanhu vake VaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles31:9 Ipapo Hezekiya akabvunza vapristi navaRevhi pamusoro pemirwi. 
2Chronicles31:10 Azaria Mupristi Mukuru weimba yaZadhoki akamupindura, akati, “Kubva nguva yavakatanga kuisa zvipo muimba yaJehovha, takadya, tikaguta, tikasarirwa nezvizhinji, nokuti Jehovha akaropafadza vanhu vake; zvasara ndizvo zvizhinji izvi.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Ipapo Hezekiya akaraira kuti vagadzire makamuri mumba maJehovha; vakaagadzira. 
2Chronicles31:12 Vakapinza zvipo, nomutowo wakatendeka, nezvegumi, nezvinhu zvakatsaurirwa Jehovha; Konania muRevhi akaitwa mutariri wazvo, uye Shimei munun'una wake akanga ari wechipiri." 
2Chronicles31:13 NaJehieri, naAzazia, naNahati, naAsaheri, naJerimoti, naJozabhadhi, naErieri, naIsimakia, naMahati, naBhenaya, vaiva vatariri pasi paKonania naShimei munun'una wake, vakanga vagadzwa namambo Hezekiya naAzaria mutariri weimba yaMwari." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kore mwanakomana waImina muRevhi, mutariri wesuwo rokumabvazuva, akanga ari mutariri wenhendo dzaingopiwa Mwari nokuzvidira, kuti agovere zvipo zvaJehovha nezvinhu zvitsvene kwazvo." 
2Chronicles31:15 Pasi pake pakanga pana Edheni, naMiniamini, naJeshua, naShemaya, naAmaria, naShekania, mumaguta avapristi, pamabasa avo akatarwa, kuti vape hama dzavo namapoka, vakuru navaduku vose;" 
2Chronicles31:16 vasingaverengi varume vakanga vakanyorwa mazita avo, kubva pamakore matatu navanopfuura, Ani naani aipinda mumba maJehovha, kuzoita mabasa akadikanwa zuva rimwe nerimwe, pamabasa avo avakanga vapiwa namapoka avo;" 
2Chronicles31:17 navakanga vaverengwa pamazita avapristi nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, navaRevhi vamakore makumi maviri navakapfuura, pamabasa avo namapoka avo;" 
2Chronicles31:18 navakaverengwa namazita epwere dzavo dzose, navakadzi vavo, navanakomana vavo, navanasikana vavo, paungano yose; nokuti vakanga vazvinatsa noutsvene pamabasa avo akatarwa;" 
2Chronicles31:19 navanakomana vaAroni vapristi vakanga vari kuminda yoruwa rwamaguta avo, paguta rimwe nerimwe kwaiva navarume vakanga vakanyorwa mazita avo, kuti vape varume vose pakati pavapristi migove yavo, navose vakaverengwa mazita avo pakati pavaRevhi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Ndizvo zvakaita Hezekiya kwaJudha kwose; akaita zvakanaka nezvakarurama nezvakatendeka pamberi paJehovha Mwari wake. 
2Chronicles31:21 Pabasa rimwe nerimwe raakatanga pakushumira paimba yaMwari, napamurairo, napamirau, napakutsvaka Mwari wake, wakazviita nomwoyo wake wose, akakunda." 
2Chronicles32:1 Shure kwezvinhu izvi, nokutendeka uku, Shenakeribhu mambo weAsiria akasvika akapinda kwaJudha, akadzika matende kuzorwa namaguta akakombwa namasvingo, achifunga kuzvikundira iwo." 
2Chronicles32:2 Zvino Hezekiya akati achiona kuti Shenakeribhu asvika, uye kuti akanga achivavarira kurwa neJerusaremu," 
2Chronicles32:3 akarangana namachinda ake navarume vake vane simba, kuti vadzivire mvura yamatsime akanga ari kunze kweguta; ivo vakamubatsira." 
2Chronicles32:4 Naizvozvo vanhu vazhinji vakaungana, vakadzivira matsime ose norukova rwakanga ruchiyerera napakati penyika iyo, vachiti, “Madzimambo eAsiria achasvikireiko, akawana mvura zhinji?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Iye akatsunga mwoyo, akavaka rusvingo rwose rwanga rwakoromoka, akaruvaka kusvikira pashongwe, norumwe rusvingo rwokunzewo, akasimbisa Miro paguta raDhavhidhi, akapfura nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo nenhoo zhinji." 
2Chronicles32:6 Akagadzawo vakuru vehondo pamusoro pavanhu, akavaunganidza kwaari padare pasuwo reguta, akataura nounyoro navo achiti," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Ivai nesimba, mutsunge mwoyo, regai kutya kana kuvhunduka pamberi pamambo weAsiria, kana pamberi pavazhinji vose vaanavo; nokuti anesu mukuru kune waanaye iye;" 
2Chronicles32:8 iye unoruoko rwenyama, asi anesu ndiJehovha Mwari wedu, kuzotibatsira nokurwa navavengi vedu.” Vanhu vakavimba namashoko aHezekiya mambo waJudha." 
2Chronicles32:9 Shure kwaizvozvi Shenakeribhu mambo weAsiria akatuma varanda vake Jerusaremu, (zvino iye akanga ari pamberi peRakishi, ane hondo yake yose) kuna vose vakanga vari Jerusaremu, akati," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Zvanzi naShenakeribhu mambo weAsiria, ‘Chiiko chamunovimba nacho, zvamunorambira paJerusaremu makakombwa?’" 
2Chronicles32:11 Ko Hezekiya haazi anokukurudzirai, kuti mugozofa nenzara nenyota here, zvaanoti, ‘Jehovha Mwari wedu achatirwira paruoko rwamambo weAsiria?’" 
2Chronicles32:12 Haazi iye Hezekiya akabvisa matunhu ake akakwirira neatari dzake, akaraira Judha neJerusaremu, achiti, ‘Munofanira kunamata pamberi peatari imwe, uye munofanira kupisa zvinonhuwira ipapo here?’" 
2Chronicles32:13 Hamuzivi here zvatakaitira vanhu vose venyika ino, ini namadzibaba angu? Ko vamwari vendudzi dzenyika idzo vakatongogona kurwira nyika yavo paruoko rwangu here?" 
2Chronicles32:14 “Ndianiko pakati pavamwari vose vendudzi idzo dzakaparadzwa chose namadzibaba angu, wakatongogona kurwira vanhu vake paruoko rwangu here? Zvino Mwari wenyu achagona kukurwirai paruoko rwangu here?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Zvino naizvozvo Hezekiya ngaarege kukunyengerai, kana kukukurudzirai nomutowo uyu; regai henyu kumutenda, nokuti hakuna mwari worudzi rupi norupi, kana ushe, wakagona kurwira vanhu vake paruoko rwangu naparuoko rwamadzibaba angu; zvikuru sei Mwari wenyu hangakoniwi kukurwirai paruoko rwangu here?”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Varanda vake vakawedzera kushora Jehovha Mwari nomuranda wake Hezekiya. 
2Chronicles32:17 Akanyorawo tsamba yokudadira nayo Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, nokumushora, achiti, “Vamwari vendudzi dzenyika idzo sezvavasina kurwira vanhu vavo paruoko rwangu, saizvozvowo Mwari waHezekiya haangarwiri vanhu vake paruoko rwangu.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Vakadanidzira nezwi guru norurimi rwavaJudha kuvanhu veJerusaremu vakanga vari pamusoro porusvingo, kuvatyisa, nokuvavhundusa, kuti vagokunda guta." 
2Chronicles32:19 Vakataura pamusoro paMwari weJerusaremu, vachimuenzanisa navamwari vavanhu venyika, vakaitwa namaoko avanhu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Zvino mambo Hezekiya nomuporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi, vakanyengetera nokuda kwechinhu ichi, vakachemera kudenga." 
2Chronicles32:21 Ipapo Jehovha akatuma mutumwa akaparadza vose vakanga vane simba noumhare, navatungamiriri, navakuru pamisasa yamambo weAsiria. Saka iye akadzokera kunyika yake achinyara. Zvino akati achipinda mumba mamwari wake, avo vakanga vabuda pachiuno chake vakamuurayirapo nomunondo." 
2Chronicles32:22 Saizvozvo Jehovha akarwira Hezekiya navakanga vagere Jerusaremu paruoko rwaShenakeribhu mambo weAsiria napamaoko avose, akavachengeta pamativi ose." 
2Chronicles32:23 Vazhinji vakauya nezvipo kuna Jehovha paJerusaremu, nezvinhu zvinokosha kuna Hezekiya mambo waJudha; naizvozvo kubva panguva iyo akakudzwa pamberi pendudzi dzose." 
2Chronicles32:24 Zvino namazuva iwayo Hezekiya akarwara, kusvikira pakufa; akanyengetera kuna Jehovha, iye akataura naye, akamupa chiratidzo." 
2Chronicles32:25 Asi chinhu icho chakanaka chaakaitirwa, Hezekiya haana kuchiripira zvakanaka, nokuti mwoyo wake akazvikudza, Jehovha akamutsamwira iye, naJudha neJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Asi Hezekiya akazozvininipisa pamusoro pokuzvikudza kwomwoyo wake, iye navakanga vagere Jerusaremu, saka kutsamwa kwaJehovha hakuna kuvavinga pamazuva aHezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiya akanga ane pfuma zhinji nokukudzwa, akazviitira zvivigiro zvepfuma yesirivha, neyendarama, neyezvibwe zvinokosha, neyezvinonhuwira, neyenhoo, neyemidziyo yose yakanaka yamarudzi ose;" 
2Chronicles32:28 namatura ezviyo yakawanda, nedzimba dzewaini, namafuta; namatanga ezvipfuwo zvamarudzi ose, nezvirugu zvamakwai." 
2Chronicles32:29 Wakazviwanirawo maguta, nepfuma yamakwai nemombe zhinji; nokuti Mwari akanga amupa pfuma zhinji kwazvo." 
2Chronicles32:30 Ndiye Hezekiyawo akadzivira tsime rokumusoro remvura yeGihoni, akaifambisa ikarurama kurutivi rwamavirazuva rweguta raDhavhidhi. Hezekiya akakunda pamabasa ake ose." 
2Chronicles32:31 Asi pashoko renhume dzamachinda eBhabhironi, akatuma kwaari kuzomubvunza pamusoro pechishamiso chakanga chaitwa panyika, Mwari akamusiya kuti amuedze, kuti azive zvose zviri mumwoyo make." 
2Chronicles32:32 Zvino mamwe mabasa aHezekiya, nezvakanaka zvaakabata, tarirai, zvakanyorwa pane zvakaonekwa nomuporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi, mubhuku yamadzimambo aJudha naIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekiya akavata namadzibaba ake, vakamuviga kumukwidzwa unoenda kumarinda avanakomana vaDhavhidhi; vaJudha vose navakanga vagere Jerusaremu vakamukudza pakufa kwake. Mwanakomana wake Manase akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore ane gumi namaviri; akabata ushe makore makumi mashanu namashanu paJerusaremu; 
2Chronicles33:2 akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, akatevera zvinonyangadza zvavahedheni vakanga vadzingwa naJehovha pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles33:3 Nokuti akavakazve matunhu akakwirira, akanga aputswa nababa vake Hezekiya; akamutsira vaBhaari atari, akaisapowo matanda okunamata nawo; akanamata kuhondo dzose dzokudenga, akadzishumira." 
2Chronicles33:4 Akavaka atari mumba maJehovha, kunyangwe Jehovha akati, “PaJerusaremu ndipo pachagara zita rangu nokusingaperi.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Akavakira hondo dzose dzokudenga atari muvazhe mbiri dzeimba yaJehovha. 
2Chronicles33:6 Akapinzawo vana vake mumoto pamupata womwanakomana waHinomu; akatenda mashura, akaita mazango, akabata uroyi, akagadza masvikiro navauki; akaita zvakaipa zvizhinji pamberi paJehovha, ndokumutsamwisa nazvo." 
2Chronicles33:7 Akaisa mufananidzo wakavezwa wechifananidzo chamwari, chaakanga aveza, mumba maMwari, imo makanga manzi naMwari kuna Dhavhidhi nokuna Soromoni mwanakomana wake, “Ndichaisa zita rangu nokusingaperi paimba ino napaJerusaremu, randakatsaura pakati pamarudzi ose aIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles33:8 Uye handichabvisi tsoka dzaIsiraeri panyika yandakaratidza madzibaba enyu; kana vachichenjera bedzi kuita zvose zvandakavaraira, murairo wose, nezvakatemwa, nezvakarairwa naMosesi.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manase akatsausa vaJudha navakanga vagere Jerusaremu, vakaita zvakaipa kupfuura zvakaitwa nendudzi dzakaparadzwa naJehovha pamberi pavana VaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles33:10 Jehovha akataura naManase navanhu vake; asi havana kuteerera. 
2Chronicles33:11 Saka Jehovha akauyisa vakuru vehondo yamambo weAsiria kuzorwa navo, ivo vakabata Manase nezvikokoonho, vakamusunga namaketani, vakaenda naye Bhabhironi." 
2Chronicles33:12 Zvino akati ari pakutambudzika kwake, akachema kuna Jehovha Mwari wake, akazvininipisa kwazvo pamberi paJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba ake;" 
2Chronicles33:13 akanyengetera kwaari; akamuteerera, akanzwa kukumbira kwake, ndokumudzosera Jerusaremu paushe hwake. Ipapo Manase akaziva kuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari." 
2Chronicles33:14 Shure kwaizvozvi wakavaka rusvingo nechokunze kweguta raDhavhidhi, kurutivi rwamavirazuva rweGihoni, mumupata, ipo pavanopinda napo pasuwo rehove; akakomberedza Oferi, akavaka rusvingo rwakakwirira kwazvo; akagadzawo vakuru vano umhare pamaguta ose akakombwa paJudha." 
2Chronicles33:15 Akabvisa vamwari vatorwa, nechifananidzo mumba maJehovha, neatari dzose dzaakanga avaka mugomo reimba yaJehovha, napaJerusaremu, ndokuzvirashira kunze kweguta." 
2Chronicles33:16 Akavakazve atari yaJehovha, akabayirapo zvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, nezvokuvonga, akaraira vaJudha kuti vashumire Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles33:17 Kunyangwe zvakadaro vanhu vakaramba vachibayira pamatunhu akakwirira, asi vakabayira Jehovha Mwari wavo bedzi." 
2Chronicles33:18 Zvino mamwe mabasa aManase, nomunyengetero wake kuna Mwari wake, namashoko avaoni vakataura kwaari nezita raJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamabasa amadzimambo aIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles33:19 Munyengetero wakewo, nokunzwika kwomunyengetero wake, nezvivi zvake, zvose, nokudarika kwake, nenzvimbo paakavaka matunhu akakwirira napaakaisa matanda okunamata nawo nemifananidzo yakavezwa, achigere kuzvininipisa, tarirai zvakanyorwa pakurondedzera kwaHozai." 
2Chronicles33:20 Ipapo Manase akavata namadzibaba ake, vakamuviga mumba make, Amoni mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore makumi maviri namaviri akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore maviri. 
2Chronicles33:22 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakaita Manase baba vake; Amoni akabayira mifananidzo yose yakavezwa, yakanga yaitwa naManase baba vake, akazvishumira." 
2Chronicles33:23 Haana kuzvininipisa pamberi paJehovha, sokuzvininipisa kwaManase baba vake; asi Amoni uyu akaramba achingowedzera kudarika kwake." 
2Chronicles33:24 Varanda vake vakarangana vakamumukira, vakamuuraya mumba make." 
2Chronicles33:25 Asi vanhu venyika iyo vakazouuraya vose vakanga varangana vakamukira mambo Amoni; vanhu venyika iyo vakaita mwanakomana wake Josiya mambo panzvimbo yake. 
2Chronicles34:1 Josiya akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore masere; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi matatu nerimwe. 
2Chronicles34:2 Akaita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha, akafamba nenzira yababa vake Dhavhidhi, haana kutsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe." 
2Chronicles34:3 Nokuti pagore rorusere rokubata kwake ushe, achiri muduku, akatanga kutsvaka Mwari waDhavhidhi baba vake; zvino pagore regumi namaviri akatanga kunatsa Judha neJerusaremu, achibvisa matunhu akakwirira, namatanda okunamata nawo nemifananidzo yakavezwa, nemifananidzo yakaumbwa." 
2Chronicles34:4 Vakakoromora atari dzavaBhaari, iye aripo; akatema mifananidzo yezuva yakanga yakaitwa pamusoro padzo; akaputsanya matanda okunamata nawo, nemifananidzo yakavezwa, nemifananidzo yakaumbwa, akazvikuya zvikaita guruva, akarisasa pamarinda avaizvibayira." 
2Chronicles34:5 Akapisa mapfupa avapristi paatari dzavo, akanatsa Judha neJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles34:6 Akaitawo saizvozvo pamaguta aManase naEfuremu naSimioni, kusvikira paNafutari, pamatongo awo." 
2Chronicles34:7 Akaputsa atari, akakuya matanda okunamata nawo nemifananidzo yakavezwa zvikaita guruva, akatema mifananidzo yose yezuva panyika yose yaIsiraeri, ndokudzokera Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Zvino pagore regumi namasere rokubata kwake ushe, akati anatsa nyika neimba, ndokutuma Shafani mwanakomana waAzaria, naMaaseya, mubati weguta, naJoa mwanakomana waJohazi, gurukota, kundogadzira imba yaJehovha Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles34:9 Vakasvika kuna Hirikia Mupristi Mukuru, vakamupa mari yakanga yaiswa mumba yaMwari, yakanga yaunganidzwa navaRevhi, vatariri vemikova, pakati paManase paEfuremu, navose vakasara vaVaIsiraeri navaJudha vose, navaBhenjamini, navakanga vagere Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Vakaipa pamaoko avabati vakanga vachitarira imba yaJehovha, vakairipa kuzovandudza nokugadzirisa imba;" 
2Chronicles34:11 vakaipa vavezi navavaki, kuti vatenge mabwe akavezwa namatanda okubatanidza, nokuita mapango edzimba dzakanga dzaparadzwa namadzimambo aJudha." 
2Chronicles34:12 Vanhu avo vakabata basa nokutendeka; vatariri vavo vaiva Jahati naObhadhiya, vaRevhi vavanakomana vaMerari, naZekariya, naMeshurami, vavanakomana vaKohati, kuzoraira basa; navamwe vaRevhi, vose vaiziva kuridza zvinoridzwa." 
2Chronicles34:13 Ivo vaitarirawo vatakuri vemitoro, vakarairawo vose vaibata mabasa amarudzi ose; pakati pavaRevhi pakanga pana vanyori, navatariri, navarindi vemikova." 
2Chronicles34:14 Zvino vakati vachibudisa mari yakanga yaiswa mumba maJehovha, mupristi Hirikia ndokuwana Bhuku roMurairo waJehovha, wakanga wapiwa naMosesi." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hirikia akapindura, akati kuna Shafani munyori, “Ndawana Bhuku yoMurairo mumba maJehovha.” Hirikia ndokupa bhuku iro kuna Shafani." 
2Chronicles34:16 Zvino Shafani akaenda nebhuku kuna mambo, uye akendawo neshoko kuna mambo, akati, “Zvose zvakarairwa varanda venyu, vanozviita.”" 
2Chronicles34:17 Vadurura mari yakawanikwa mumba maJehovha, vakaiisa mumaoko avatariri, nomumaoko avabati vebasa." 
2Chronicles34:18 Zvino Shafani munyori akaudza mambo, akati, “Mupristi Hirikia andipa bhuku.” Ipapo Shafani akaravamo pamberi pamambo." 
2Chronicles34:19 Zvino mambo akati achinzwa mashoko omurairo, akabvarura nguo dzake." 
2Chronicles34:20 Mambo akaraira Hirikia naAhikami mwanakomana waShafani, naAbhidhoni mwanakomana waMika, naShafani munyori, naAsaya muranda wamambo, akati," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Endai mundondibvunzira Jehovha, ini navakasara VaIsiraeri navaJudha pamusoro pamashoko ebhuku rakawanikwa; nokuti kutsamwa kwaJehovha, kwadururwa pamusoro pedu, kukuru, nokuti madzibaba edu haana kuchengeta shoko raJehovha, kuti vaite zvose zvakanyorwa muBhuku iri.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Ipapo Hirikia navakanga varairwa namambo vakaenda kuna Huridha muporofitakadzi, mukadzi waSharumi mwanakomana waTokihati, mwanakomana waHazira, muchengeti wenguo, (zvino iye akanga agere Jerusaremu kurutivi rutsva rweguta;) vakataura naye saizvozvo." 
2Chronicles34:23 Iye akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Udzai munhu akakutumai kwandiri,’ muti," 
2Chronicles34:24 ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, tarirai, ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro penzvimbo iyi, napamusoro pavagerepo, iko kutuka kwose kwakanyorwa mubhuku iro ravakarava pamberi pamambo waJudha.’" 
2Chronicles34:25 “Nokuti vakandirasha, vakapisira vamwe vamwari zvinonhuwira, vakanditsamwisa namabasa ose amaoko avo; naizvozvo kutsamwa kwangu kwadururwa pamusoro penzvimbo iyi, hakungadzimwi." 
2Chronicles34:26 “Asi muti kuna mambo waJudha, akakutumai kuzobvunza Jehovha, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, kana ari mashoko wakanzwa," 
2Chronicles34:27 mwoyo wako zvawakanga uri munyoro, ukazvininipisa pamberi paMwari, nguva yawakanzwa mashoko ake pamusoro penzvimbo iyi, napamusoro pavageremo, ukazvininipisa pamberi pangu, ukabvarura nguo dzako, ukachema pamberi pangu,’ zvino zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ini ndakunzwawo.’" 
2Chronicles34:28 “Tarira, ndichakuisa kumadzibaba ako, uchavigwa muhwiro nomufaro; meso ako haangaoni zvakaipa zvose zvandichauyisa pamusoro penzvimbo iyi, navanhu vageremo.” Vakadzoka neshoko kuna mambo." 
2Chronicles34:29 Ipapo mambo akatuma vanhu vakaunganidza vakuru vose vaJudha naveJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles34:30 Mambo akakwira kumba kwaJehovha, ana varume vose vaJudha, navose vakanga vagere Jerusaremu, navapristi, navaRevhi, navanhu vose, vakuru navaduku; akavaravira mashoko ose ebhuku yesungano yakanga yawanikwa mumba maJehovha." 
2Chronicles34:31 Mambo akamira panzvimbo yake, akaita sungano pamberi paJehovha, akazvisunga kutevera Jehovha, nokuchengeta mirairo yake, nezvipupuriro zvake, nezvaakatema, nomwoyo wake wose nomweya wake wose, kuti aite mashoko esungano akanyorwa muBhuku iri." 
2Chronicles34:32 Akaraira vose vakanga vari Jerusaremu naBhenjamini kuabvumira. Vagere Jerusaremu vakaita sezvakarehwa pasungano yaMwari, iye Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles34:33 Josiya akabvisa zvakanga zvichinyangadza zvose panyika dzose dzaiva VaIsiraeri, akaraira vose vakanga vari pakati paIsiraeri kushumira Mwari, kushumira iye Jehovha Mwari wavo. Mazuva ake ose havana kutsauka pakutevera Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Zvino Josiya akaitira Jehovha Pasika paJerusaremu; vakauraya gwayana rePasika nezuva regumi namana romwedzi wokutanga. 
2Chronicles35:2 Akagadza vapristi pamabasa avo, akavatsungisa pabasa reimba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles35:3 Akati kuna vaRevhi vaidzidzisa VaIsiraeri vose, vakanga vari vatsvene kuna Jehovha, “Isai areka tsvene muimba yakavakwa naSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi mambo waIsiraeri; hamuchazovi nomutoro pamafudzi enyu; zvino, shumirai Jehovha Mwari wenyu, navanhu vake Isiraeri." 
2Chronicles35:4 Zvigadzirei, nedzimba dzamadzibaba enyu namapoka enyu, sezvakanyorwa naDhavhidhi mambo waIsiraeri, nezvakanyorwa naSoromoni mwanakomana wake." 
2Chronicles35:5 Mumire panzvimbo tsvene, sezvamakagoverwa nedzimba dzamadzibaba ehama dzenyu ivo vana vavanhu; imba imwe neimwe yamadzibaba avaRevhi ipiwe mugove wayo." 
2Chronicles35:6 Muuraye gwayana rePasika, muzvinatse, mugadzirire hama dzenyu; kuti muite sezvakarehwa neshoko raJehovha nomuromo waMosesi.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Ipapo Josiya akapa vana vavanhu zvimwe zvipfuwo, mwakwayana nembudzana, zvose kuti zvive zvipiriso zvePasika, ivo vose vakanga varipo, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matatu, uye nzombe dzine zviuru zvitatu; izvi zvose zvakabva papfuma yamambo." 
2Chronicles35:8 Namachinda ake akapawo nomwoyo wose kuna vanhu, navapristi, navaRevhi. Hirikia, naZekariya, naJehieri, vabati veimba yaMwari, vakapa vapristi zvipfuo zviduku zvine zviuru zviviri namazana matanhatu, nenzombe dzina mazana matatu, kuti zvive zvipiriso zvePasika." 
2Chronicles35:9 NaKonania, naShemaya, naNetaneri, hama dzake, naHashabhia, naJeyieri, naJozabhadhi, vakuru vavaRevhi, vakapa vaRevhi zvipfuo zviduku zvine zviuru zvishanu, nenzombe dzina mazana mashanu, kuti zvive zvipiriso zvePasika." 
2Chronicles35:10 Basa rikagadzirwa saizvozvo, navapristi vakamira panzvimbo yavo, navaRevhi pamapoka avo, sezvavakanga varairwa namambo." 
2Chronicles35:11 Ipapo vakauraya makwayana ePasika, vapristi ndokusasa ropa ravakapiwa navo, vaRevhi vakaavhiya." 
2Chronicles35:12 Vakabvisa zvipiriso zvinopiswa, kuti vazvipe nemigove yedzimba dzamadzibaba avana vavanhu, kuti vazvibayire Jehovha, sezvakanyorwa mubhuku yaMosesi. Vakaita saizvozvo nenzombewo." 
2Chronicles35:13 Vakagocha Pasika pamoto, sezvakanga zvarairwa; vakabika zvipiriso zvitsvene muhari, nomumakate, nomumakango, vakachimbidzika kuzviisa kuvana vose vavanhu." 
2Chronicles35:14 Pashure vakazvigadzirira ivo navapristi; nokuti vapristi vanakomana vaAroni vakanga vachibayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa namafuta azvo kusvikira usiku; saka vaRevhi vakazvigadzirira ivo navapristi, ivo vanakomana vaAroni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Navaimbi ivo vanakomana vaAsafi, vakanga vari panzvimbo yavo, sezvavakanga varairwa naDhavhidhi, naAsafi, naHemani, naJedhutuni muoni wamambo; navarindi vakanga vari pamasuwo ose, ivo havana kufanira kubva pamabasa avo, nokuti hama dzavo vaRevhi dzakavagadzirira." 
2Chronicles35:16 Basa rose raJehovha rikagadzirwa saizvozvo pazuva iro, rokuita Pasika, nokubayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa paatari yaJehovha, sezvakanga zvarairwa namambo Josiya." 
2Chronicles35:17 Zvino vana VaIsiraeri vakanga varipo vakaita Pasika nenguva iyo, nomutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa mazuva manomwe." 
2Chronicles35:18 Pasika yakadai haina kumboitwa pakati paIsiraeri kubva pamazuva omuporofita Samueri; hakuna kumbova mumwe wamadzimambo aIsiraeri akaita Pasika yakanga yakafanana neyakaitwa naJosiya, navapristi, navaRevhi, navaJudha naVaIsiraeri vagere Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Pasika iyo yakaitwa negore regumi namasere rokubata ushe kwaJosiya. 
2Chronicles35:20 Shure kwaizvozvo zvose, Josiya agadzira temberi, Neko mambo weIjipiti akandorwa naKarikemishi paYufuretesi; Josiya akandorwa naye." 
2Chronicles35:21 Asi iye akatuma nhume kwaari, achiti, “Ndineiko newe, iwe mambo waJudha? Handina kuuya kuzorwa newe nhasi, asi neimba yandinosirwa nayo; Mwari akandiraira kuti ndichimbidzike; zvino iwe chirega hako kunetsa Mwari aneni, kuti arege kukuparadza.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Kunyangwe zvakadaro Josiya akaramba kumurega, asi akazvishandura kuti arwe naye; haana kuteerera mashoko aNeko, akabva pamuromo waMwari, akaenda kundorwa naye pamupata waMegidho." 
2Chronicles35:23 Zvino vapfuri vouta vakapfura mambo Josiya; mambo akati kuvaranda vake, “Ndibvisei, nokuti ndakuvadzwa kwazvo.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Ipapo varanda vake vakamubvisa pangoro yake, vakamuisa pangoro yake yechipiri yaakanga anayo, vakamuisa Jerusaremu; akafa, akavigwa mumahwiro amadzibaba ake. VaJudha vose neJerusaremu vakachema Josiya." 
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremiya akaita rwiyo rwokuchema Josiya; navaimbi vose varume navaimbi vakadzi vakareva zvaJosiya panziyo dzavo dzokuchema kusvikira nhasi; vakazviita tsika pakati paIsiraeri; tarirai zvakanyorwa panziyo dzokuchema. 
2Chronicles35:26 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJosiya, nezvakanaka zvaakaita, zvakanzwana nezvakanyorwa mumurairo waJehovha," 
2Chronicles35:27 nezvaakaita, zvokutanga nezvokupedzisira, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamadzimambo aIsiraeri naJudha." 
2Chronicles36:1 Ipapo vanhu venyika iyo vakatora Jehoahazi mwanakomana waJosiya, vakamuita mambo panzvimbo yababa vake paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles36:2 Joahazi akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore makumi maviri namatatu, akabata ushe paJerusaremu mwedzi mitatu." 
2Chronicles36:3 Mambo weIjipiti akamubvisa paushe paJerusaremu, akaripisa nyika matarenta esirivha ane zana, netarenta rimwe rendarama." 
2Chronicles36:4 Mambo weIjipiti akagadza Eriakimi munun'una wake ave mambo waJudha neJerusaremu, akashandura zita rake, rikazova Jehoyakimu. Neko akatora munun'una wake Joahazi, akaenda naye Ijipiti." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoyakimu akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore gumi nerimwe, akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles36:6 Zvino Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi akasvika kuzorwa naye, akamusunga nengetani, kundomuisa Bhabhironi." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebhukadhineza akaendawo nedzimwe nhumbi dzeimba yaJehovha akadziisa Bhabhironi. 
2Chronicles36:8 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJehoyakimu, nezvinonyangadza zvake zvaakaita, nezvakawanikwa maari, tarirai zvakanyorwa mubhuku yamadzimambo aIsiraeri naJudha; Jehoyakini mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoyakini akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore masere, akabata ushe paJerusaremu mwedzi mitatu namazuva ane gumi; akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha." 
2Chronicles36:10 Zvino gore rikati rapera mambo Nebhukadhineza akatuma nhume vakamuisa Bhabhironi, pamwechete nenhumbi dzinokosha dzeimba yaJehovha, akaita munun'una wake Zedhekiya mambo waJudha neJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedhekiya akatanga kubata ushe ava namakore makumi maviri nerimwe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore gumi nerimwe. 
2Chronicles36:12 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha Mwari wake; haana kuzvininipisa pamberi pomuporofita Jeremiya, aitaura mashoko aibva pamurumo waJehovha." 
2Chronicles36:13 Akamukirawo mambo Nebhukadhineza, akanga amupikisa naMwari; asi akawomesa mutsipa wake, nokuomesa mwoyo wake, akarega kutendeukira kuna Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles36:14 Uye vakuru vose vapristi navanhu vakadarika zvikuru kwazvo, vakatevera zvinonyangadza zvose zvavahedheni, vakasvibisa imba yaJehovha yaakanga atsaura paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles36:15 Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo akatuma mashoko kwavari nenhume dzake, achifumira mangwanani achituma; nokuti akanga ane tsitsi navanhu vake uye nenzvimbo yake;" 
2Chronicles36:16 asi vakaseka nhume dzaMwari, vakazvidza mashoko ake, vakadadira vaporofita vake, kusvikira Jehovha atsamwira vanhu vake, kusvikira vasichagoni kurapwa." 
2Chronicles36:17 Saka wakauyisa mambo wavaKaradhia kwavari akauraya majaya avo nomunondo paimba yavo tsvene; haana kunzwira tsitsi kunyangwe jaya, kana musikana, kana mutana, kana akachena vhudzi; akavaisa vose muruoko rwake." 
2Chronicles36:18 Nhumbi dzosewo dzeimba yaMwari, huru neduku, nepfuma yeimba yaJehovha, nepfuma yamambo neyamachinda ake, akazviisa zvose Bhabhironi." 
2Chronicles36:19 Vakapisa imba yaMwari, vakaputsa rusvingo rweJerusaremu, vakapisa dzimba dzose dzoushe dzaro nomoto, vakaparadza nhumbi dzose dzinokosha dzaro." 
2Chronicles36:20 Avo vakanga vapukunyuka pamunondo, akaenda navo Bhabhironi; vakandova varanda vake navanakomana vake kusvikira ushe uchibatwa navaPezhia;" 
2Chronicles36:21 kuti shoko raJehovha, rakanga rarehwa nomuromo waJeremiya, riitike; kusvikira nyika yafarira maSabata ayo, nokuti panguva yose yokuparadzwa kwayo yakachengeta maSabata, ikasvitsa makore ana makumi manomwe." 
2Chronicles36:22 Zvino negore rokutanga raKoreshi mambo wePezhia, kuti shoko raJehovha rakanga rarehwa nomuromo waJeremiya riitike, Jehovha akamutsa mweya waKoreshi mambo wePezhia, akaparidza paushe hwake hwose, akazvinyorawo, achiti," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Zvanzi naKoreshi mambo wePezhia, ‘Jehovha Mwari wokudenga akandipa ushe hwose hwenyika, akandiraira kuti ndimuvakire imba paJerusaremu riri paJudha. “ ‘Ani naani aripo pakati penyu wavanhu vake, Jehovha Mwari wake ngaave naye, ngaakwire hake ko.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 Zvino negore rokutanga raKoreshi mambo waPezhia, kuti shoko raJehovha rakarehwa nomuromo waJeremiya riitike, Jehovha akamutsa mweya waKoreshi mambo wePezhia, akaparidza paushe hwake hwose, akazvinyorawo, akati," 
Ezra1:2 “Zvanzi naKoreshi mambo wePezhia, Jehovha Mwari wokudenga akandipa ushe hwose hwenyika, akandiraira kuti ndimuvakire imba paJerusaremu riri paJudha." 
Ezra1:3 “Zvino ani naani aripo pakati penyu wavanhu vake, Jehovha Mwari wake ngaave naye, ngaakwire hake Jerusaremu riri paJudha, kundovaka imba yaJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, (ndiye Mwari), anogara Jerusaremu." 
Ezra1:4 Ani naani akasara, papi napapi paanogara, varume vokwake ngavamubatsire nesirivha, nendarama, nenhumbi, nemombe, uye nezvipo zvavanopa nokuzvidira, kuzovaka imba yaMwari iri paJerusaremu.”" 
Ezra1:5 Ipapo vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba aJudha naBhenjamini vakazvigadzira, navapristi, navaRevhi, ivo vose vakanga vamutswa mweya yavo naMwari, kundovaka imba yaJehovha yakanga iri paJerusaremu." 
Ezra1:6 Uye vose vakanga vakavapoteredza vakasimbisa maoko avo nemidziyo yesirivha, nendarama, nenhumbi, nemombe, nezvinhu zvinokosha, pamwechete nezvose zvavakapa nomwoyo wavo." 
Ezra1:7 Naiye mambo Koreshiwo akabudisa midziyo yeimba yaJehovha, yakanga yatorwa paJerusaremu naNebhukadhineza ikaiswa naye paimba yavamwari vake;" 
Ezra1:8 Koreshi, mambo wePezhia akaraira Mitiredhati muchengeti wepfuma kubudisa iyeyo, akaiverenga achiipa Sheshibhazari, muchinda waJudha." 
Ezra1:9 Kuwanda kwayo ndikoku: Ndiro dzendarama dzina makumi matatu, nendiro dzesirivha dzine chiuru chimwe, namapanga ana makumi maviri namapfumbamwe;" 
Ezra1:10 nembiya dzendarama dzina makumi matatu, nembiya dzesirivha dzorumwe rudzi dzina mazana mana negumi, nemimwe midziyo ine chiuru chimwe." 
Ezra1:11 Midziyo yose yendarama neyesirivha yakanga ine zviuru zvishanu namazana mana. Izvo zvose Sheshibhazari akaenda nazvo panguva yokubva kwavatapwa Bhabhironi vachienda Jerusaremu. 
Ezra2:1 Zvino ava ndivo vana vorutivi rwenyika yaJudha vakadzoka pakutapwa, pakati pavakanga vakatapwa, vakatapwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi vakaiswa Bhabhironi, vakazodzokera Jerusaremu nokwaJudha, mumwe nomumwe kuguta rake;" 
Ezra2:2 ivo vakauya naZerubhabheri, naJeshua, naNehemiya, naSeraya, naReeraya, naModhekai, naBhirishani, naMisipari, naBhigivhai, naRehumi, naBhaana." 
Ezra2:3 Kuwanda kwavarume vavanhu VaIsiraeri ndiko: Vana vaParoshi, zviuru zviviri nezana namakumi manomwe navaviri." 
Ezra2:4 Vana vaShefatia, mazana matatu namakumi manomwe navaviri." 
Ezra2:5 Vana vaAra, mazana manomwe namakumi manomwe navashanu." 
Ezra2:6 Vana vaPahatimoabhi, vevana vaJeshua naJoabhu, zviuru zviviri namazana masere negumi navaviri." 
Ezra2:7 Vana vaErami, chiuru chimwe namazana maviri namakumi mashanu navana." 
Ezra2:8 Vana vaZetu, mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi mana navashanu." 
Ezra2:9 Vana vaZakai, mazana manomwe namakumi matanhatu." 
Ezra2:10 Vana vaBhani, mazana matanhatu namakumi maviri navaviri." 
Ezra2:11 Vana vaBhebhai, mazana matanhatu namakumi maviri navatatu." 
Ezra2:12 Vana vaAzagadhi, chiuru chimwe namazana maviri namakumi maviri navaviri." 
Ezra2:13 Vana vaAdhonikami, mazana matanhatu namakumi matanhatu navatanhatu." 
Ezra2:14 Vana vaBhigivhai, zviuru zviviri namakumi mashanu navatanhatu." 
Ezra2:15 Vana vaAdhini, mazana mana namakumi mashanu navana." 
Ezra2:16 Vana vaAteri, waHezekiya, makumi mapfumbamwe navasere." 
Ezra2:17 Vana vaBhezai, mazana matatu namakumi maviri navatatu." 
Ezra2:18 Vana vaJora, zana negumi navaviri." 
Ezra2:19 Vana vaHashumi, mazana maviri namakumi maviri navatatu." 
Ezra2:20 Vana veGibhari, makumi mapfumbamwe navashanu." 
Ezra2:21 Vana VeBhetirehemu, zana namakumi maviri navatatu." 
Ezra2:22 Varume veNetofa, makumi mashanu navatanhatu." 
Ezra2:23 Varume veAnatoti, zana namakumi maviri navasere." 
Ezra2:24 Vana veAzimavheti, makumi mana navaviri." 
Ezra2:25 Vana veKiriatirimi, neKefira, neBheeroti, mazana manomwe namakumi mana navatatu." 
Ezra2:26 Vana veRama neGhebha, mazana matanhatu namakumi maviri nomumwe." 
Ezra2:27 Varume veMikimashi, zana namakumi maviri navaviri." 
Ezra2:28 Varume veBhetieri neAi, mazana maviri namakumi maviri navatatu." 
Ezra2:29 Varume veNebho, makumi mashanu navaviri." 
Ezra2:30 Vana veMagibhishi, zana namakumi mashanu navatanhatu." 
Ezra2:31 Vana vaErami wechipiri, chiuru chimwe namazana maviri namakumi mashanu navana." 
Ezra2:32 Vana vaHarimi, mazana matatu namakumi maviri." 
Ezra2:33 Vana veRodhi, neHadhidhi, neOno, mazana manomwe namakumi maviri navashanu." 
Ezra2:34 Vana veJeriko, mazana matatu namakumi mana navashanu." 
Ezra2:35 Vana veSena, zviuru zvitatu namazana matanhatu namakumi matatu." 
Ezra2:36 Vapristi vakanga vari: Vana vaJadhaya, weimba yaJeshua, mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi manomwe navatatu." 
Ezra2:37 Vana veImeri, chiuru chimwe namakumi mashanu navaviri." 
Ezra2:38 Vana vaPashuri, chiuru chimwe namazana maviri namakumi mana navanomwe." 
Ezra2:39 Vana vaHarimi, chiuru chimwe negumi navanomwe." 
Ezra2:40 VaRevhi vakanga vari: Vana vaJeshua, naKadhimieri, vevana vaHodhavhia, makumi manomwe navana." 
Ezra2:41 Vaimbi vakanga vari: Vana vaAsafi, zana namakumi maviri navasere." 
Ezra2:42 Vana vavarindi vemikova vakanga vari: Vana vaSharumi, navana vaAteri navana vaTarimoni, navana vaAkubhi, navana vaHatita, navana vaShobhai, vose zana namakumi matatu navapfumbamwe." 
Ezra2:43 VaNetinimi vakanga vari: Vana vaZhiha, navana vaHasufa, navana vaTabhaoti;" 
Ezra2:44 navana vaKerosi navana vaShiaha, navana vaPadhoni;" 
Ezra2:45 navana vaRebhana, navana vaHagabha, navana vaAkubhi;" 
Ezra2:46 navana vaHagabhi, navana vaShamirai, navana vaHanani;" 
Ezra2:47 navana vaGidheri, navana vaGahari, navana vaReaya;" 
Ezra2:48 navana vaRezini, navana vaNekodha, navana vaGazami;" 
Ezra2:49 navana vaUza, navana vaPasea, navana vaBhesai;" 
Ezra2:50 navana vaAsina, navana vaMeunimi, navana vaNefisimi;" 
Ezra2:51 navana vaBhakibhuki, navana vaHakufa, navana vaHarihuri;" 
Ezra2:52 navana vaBhaziruti, navana vaMehidha, navana vaHarishaa;" 
Ezra2:53 navana vaBharikosi, navana vaSisera, navana vaTema;" 
Ezra2:54 navana vaNezia, navana vaHatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Vana vavaranda vaSoromoni vakanga vari: Vana vaSotai, navana vaHasofereti, navana vaPerudha;" 
Ezra2:56 navana vaJaara, navana vaDharikoni, navana vaGidheri;" 
Ezra2:57 navana vaShefatia, navana vaHatiri, navana vaPokeretihazebhaimi, navana vaAmi." 
Ezra2:58 VaNetinimi vose navana vavaranda vaSoromoni vaiva mazana matatu namakumi mapfumbamwe navaviri. 
Ezra2:59 Ndizvo vakakwira vachibva Terimera, neTeriharisha, neKerubhi, neAdhani, neImeri; asi vakanga vasingagoni kududza dzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namarudzi avo, kana vakanga vari VaIsiraeri." 
Ezra2:60 Vana vaDheraya, navana vaTobhia, navana vaNekodha, mazana matanhatu namakumi mashanu navaviri." 
Ezra2:61 Navana vavapristi vakanga vari: Vana vaHabhaya, navana vaHakozi, navana vaBharizirai, akanga awana mukadzi wavakunda vaBharizirai muGiriadhi, akazotumidzwa zita rokwavo." 
Ezra2:62 Ava vakatsvaka mazita avo pakati pamazita amadzitateguru, asi akashaikwa; saka vakanzi vakasvibiswa, vakabviswa paupristi." 
Ezra2:63 Ipapo mubati akavaudza kuti varege kudya zvinhu zvitsvene–tsvene, kusvikira kwamuka mupristi ane Urimi neTumimi." 
Ezra2:64 Ungano yose yakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nezviviri namazana matatu namakumi matanhatu," 
Ezra2:65 vasingaverengi varanda vavo navarandakadzi vavo, vakasvika zviuru zvinomwe namazana matatu namakumi matatu navanomwe; vakanga vana vaimbi varume navakadzi vana mazana maviri." 
Ezra2:66 Vakanga vana mabhiza ana mazana manomwe namakumi matatu namatanhatu; mahesera avo akanga ana mazana maviri namakumi mana namashanu; 
Ezra2:67 ngamera dzavo, mazana mana namakumi matatu namashanu, nembongoro dzavo zviuru zvitanhatu namazana manomwe namakumi maviri." 
Ezra2:68 Vamwe vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, pakusvika kwavo paimba yaJehovha paJerusaremu, vakavigira nomwoyo wavo zvipo zvavo, kuti vamutse imba yaMwari paugaro hwayo." 
Ezra2:69 Vakapa sezvavakagona mari yokubata basa nayo madhariki endarama ane zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu nechimwe, nepondo dzesirivha dzine zviuru zvishanu, nenguo dzavapristi dzine zana." 
Ezra2:70 Zvino vapristi navaRevhi, navamwe vanhu, navaimbi navarindi vemikova, navaNetinimi, vakagara pamaguta avo, naVaIsiraeri vose pamaguta avo." 
Ezra3:1 Zvino mwedzi wechinomwe wakati wasvika, vana VaIsiraeri vava mumaguta avo, vanhu vakaungana pamwechete nomwoyo mumwe paJerusaremu." 
Ezra3:2 Ipapo Jeshua mwanakomana waJozadhaki, mwanakomana waShearitieri, nehama dzake, vakasimuka, vakavaka atari yaMwari waIsiraeri, kuti vabayirepo zvipiriso zvinopiswa, sezvakanyorwa pamurairo waMosesi munhu waMwari." 
Ezra3:3 Vakagadzika atari panzvimbo yayo, nokuti vakatya vanhu venyika idzo; vakabayira Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa pamusoro payo, izvo zvipiriso zvaipiswa mangwanani namadekwana." 
Ezra3:4 Vakaitawo mutambo wamatumba, sezvakanga zvanyorwa; vakauya nezvipiriso zvaipiswa zuva rimwe nerimwe sezvakataurwa, sezvavakarairwa, zvakadikanwa pazuva rimwe nerimwe." 
Ezra3:5 Uye pashure chipiriso chaipiswa nguva dzose, nezvipiriso zvapakugara kwemwedzi, nezvemitambo yose yakatarwa yaJehovha yakanga yakatsaurwa, nenhendo dzakavigirwa Jehovha nokuzvidira naani nani." 
Ezra3:6 Vakatanga kubayira Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wechinomwe; asi nheyo dzetemberi yaJehovha dzakanga dzichigere kuteyiwa. 
Ezra3:7 Vakapawo vavezi vamabwe namatanda mari, uye veZidhoni naveTaya zvokudya nezvokunwa namafuta, kuti vatore miti yemisidhari paRebhanoni, vaiise Jopa pagungwa, sezvavakanga vatenderwa naKoreshi mambo wePezhia." 
Ezra3:8 Zvino negore rechipiri rokusvika kwavo paimba yaMwari paJerusaremu, nomwedzi wechipiri, Zerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, naJeshua mwanakomana waJozadhaki, nedzimwe hama dzavo vapristi navaRevhi, navose vakanga vadzokera Jerusaremu pakutapwa kwavo, vakatanga basa ravo; vakagadza vaRevhi vamakore makumi maviri navakapfuura, kuti vave vatariri vebasa paimba yaJehovha." 
Ezra3:9 Ipapo Jeshua navanakomana vake nehama dzake, naKadhimieri navanakomana vake, vanakomana vaJudha, vakamira nomwoyo mumwe vachitarira vaibata paimba yaMwari; navanakomana vaHenadhadhi, navanakomana vavo nehama dzavo, vaRevhi." 
Ezra3:10 Zvino vavaki vakati vachiteya nheyo dzetemberi yaJehovha, vapristi vakamirapo vakafuka nguo dzavo, vakabata hwamanda, navaRevhi, ivo vanakomana vaAsafi, vakabata makandira, kuti varumbidze Jehovha sezvakanga zvarairwa naDhavhidhi mambo waIsiraeri." 
Ezra3:11 Vakatengezana vachiimba, vachirumbidza nokuvonga Jehovha, vachiti, “Nokuti akanaka, nokuti nyasha dzake hadziperi kuna Isiraeri.” Vanhu vose vakapururudza nokupururudza kukuru pakurumbidza kwavo Jehovha; nokuti nheyo dzeimba yaJehovha dzakanga dzateyiwa." 
Ezra3:12 Asi vazhinji vavapristi navaRevhi, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba, vaya vatana vakanga vaona imba yokutanga, vakachema kwazvo vachiona nheyo dzeimba iyi dzichiteyiwa; vazhinji vakapururudza nomufaro;" 
Ezra3:13 naizvozvo vanhu vakanga vasingagoni kutsaura izwi rokupururudza romufaro nezwi rokuchema kwavanhu; nokuti vanhu vakapururudza nokupururudza kukuru, izwi rikanzwika kure kwazvo." 
Ezra4:1 Zvino vadzivisi vavaJudha navaBhenjamini vakati vachinzwa kuti vatapwa vavakira Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri temberi; 
Ezra4:2 vakaswedera kuna Zerubhabheri, nokuvakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba, vakati kwavari, “Ngativake nemi, nokuti tinotsvaka Mwari wenyu, semiwo; tinomubayira kubva pamazuva aEsahadhoni mambo waAsiria, wakatisvitsa pano.”" 
Ezra4:3 Asi Zerubhabheri, naJeshua, navamwe vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba aIsiraeri vakati kwavari, “Imi hamungatongobatsirani nesu pakuvakira Mwari wedu imba; asi isu toga tichavakira Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, sezvatakarairwa namambo Koreshi mambo wePezhia.”" 
Ezra4:4 Ipapo vanhu venyika iyo vakashaisa maoko avanhu vaJudha simba, vakavatambudza pakuvaka;" 
Ezra4:5 vakaripira vanhu vokuvaraira, kuti vakanganise zvavakanga vachida kuita, mazuva ose aKoreshi mambo wePezhia, kusvikira Dhariusi mambo wePezhia achizobata ushe." 
Ezra4:6 Zvino Atakizesesi akati obata ushe, vakanyora tsamba yokukwirira vakanga vagere kwaJudha neJerusaremu." 
Ezra4:7 Zvino pamazuva aAtakizesesi, Bhishirami, naMitiredhati, naTabheeri nedzimwe shamwari dzake, vakanyorera Atakizesesi mambo wePezhia; iyo tsamba yakanga yakanyorwa namabhii echiAramia, nokududzirwawo nechiAramia." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumi mukuru naShimishai munyori vakanyorera mambo Atakuzesesi tsamba yokukwirira veJerusaremu yaiti," 
Ezra4:9 “Rehumi mukuru, naShimishai munyori, namamwe makurukota avo, ivo vaDhinai, navaAfarisatiki, navaTariperi, navaAfarisi, navaArikevhi, navaBhabhironi, navaShushaniki, navaDhehai, navaErami," 
Ezra4:10 nedzimwe ndudzi dzakauya naOsinapari mukuru wakakurumbira, dzikaiswa paguta reSamaria, napanamamwe mativi enyika mhiri kwerwizi, namamwe mashoko akadai.”" 
Ezra4:11 Ndiwo mashoko etsamba yavakatuma kuna mambo Atakizesesi, “Varanda venyu, ivo varume vari mhiri kwerwizi, namamwe, mashoko akadai." 
Ezra4:12 “Mambo ngaaziviswe kuti vaJudha, vakabva kwenyu vakasvika kuno kwatiri paJerusaremu, vovaka guta rokumukira mambo, rakaipa; vapedza masvingo, nokugadzira nheyo." 
Ezra4:13 Zvino mambo ngaaziviswe, kuti kana guta iri rikavakwa, namasvingo aro akapera, havangabudisi mutero, kana zvipo, kana muripo wenzira, pashure madzimambo achatadzirwa." 
Ezra4:14 Zvino isu, zvatinodya munyu unobva paimba yamambo, uye zvatisingafaniri kuona mambo achininipiswa, tatuma tsamba kuzozivisa mambo;" 
Ezra4:15 kuti vanzvere pabhuku yenhau yamadzibaba enyu; muchaona mubhuku yenhau, kuti guta iri raimukira mambo, raitadzira madzimambo nenyika, uye kuti mukati maro vairamba vachimukira madzimambo kubva kare nakare. Guta iri rakaparadzwa nemhaka iyo." 
Ezra4:16 Tinozivisa mambo kuti kana guta iri rikavakwazve, namasvingo akapera, nemhaka iyo hamungazovi nomugove mhiri kwerwizi.”" 
Ezra4:17 Ipapo mambo akatuma mhinduro kuna Rehumi mukuru, naShimishai munyori, nedzimwe shamwari dzavo dzaigara Samaria napamwe mhiri kwerwizi, achiti, “Rugare ngaruve nemi, namamwe mashoko akadai." 
Ezra4:18 Tsamba yamakatitumira, ndairavirwa zvakanaka." 
Ezra4:19 Ndikaraira, vakanzvera vakaona kuti guta iri raimukira madzimambo kubva kare nakare, uye kuti mukati maro maiva nokumukira mambo nokurangana zvakaipa." 
Ezra4:20 Uye madzimambo ane simba aivapo paJerusaremu, aibata ushe ose pamhiri porwizi; ivo vaibudisirwa mutero, nezvipo, nomuripo wenzira." 
Ezra4:21 “Zvino temai chirevo chokuti vanhu avo varege basa ravo, guta iri rirege kuvakwa, kusvikira ini ndatema chirevo." 
Ezra4:22 “Chenjerai, musanonoka pachinhu ichi; chakaipa chichakurireiko, kuzotadzira madzimambo?”" 
Ezra4:23 Zvino mashoko etsamba yamambo Atakizesewi akati aravirwa Rehumi, naShimishai munyori, namakurukota avo, vakakurumidza kuenda Jerusaremu kuvaJudha, vakavadzivisa nokumanikidza nesimba." 
Ezra4:24 Ipapo basa reimba yaMwari paJerusaremu rakaregwa; rikaregwa kusvikira pagore rechipiri rokubata ushe kwaDhariusi mambo wePezhia. 
Ezra5:1 Zvino vaporofita, vaiti muporofita Hagai, naZekariya mwanakomana waIdho, vakaporofitera vaJudha vakanga vari paJudha neJerusaremu; vakaporofitera nezita raMwari waIsiraeri." 
Ezra5:2 Ipapo Zerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, naJeshua mwanakomana waJozadhaki, vakasimuka, vakatanga kuvaka imba yaMwari paJerusaremu; vaporofita vaMwari, vakanga vanavo, vachivabatsira." 
Ezra5:3 Zvino panguva iyo Tatenai, mubati wenyika mhiri kwerwizi, naShetaribhozenai, namakurukota avo vakasvika kwavari, vakati kwavari, “Makarairwa nani kuvaka imba iyi, nokupedza rusvingo urwu here?”" 
Ezra5:4 Ipapo vakataurawo navo, vakati, “Mazita avarume vanovaka imba iyi ndivanaani?”" 
Ezra5:5 Asi ziso raMwari wavo rakanga rakatarira vakuru vavaJudha, vakakoniwa kuvaregesa basa, kusvikira mhaka yaiswa kuna Dhariasi nemhinduro pamusoro payo ichizodzoka netsamba." 
Ezra5:6 Ndiwo mashoko etsamba yakatumirwa mambo Dhariasi naTatenai mubati mhiri kwerwizi, naShetaribhozenai, nemakurukota ake vaAfarishaki, vakanga vari mhiri kwerwizi;" 
Ezra5:7 vakamutumira tsamba makanga makanyorwa kudai, “Kuna mambo Dhariasi, rugare rwose ngaruve nemi." 
Ezra5:8 “Mambo ngaaziviswe kuti takaenda kurutivi rwenyika yaJudha, kuimba yaMwari mukuru, inovakwa namabwe makuru, uye matanda anoiswa mumasvingo; basa iri rinoshingairirwa, rinopfuurira mberi zvakanaka pamaoko avo." 
Ezra5:9 Zvino takabvunza vakuru ivavo, tikati kwavari, ‘Ndianiko wakakurairai kuvaka imba iyi nokupedza rusvingo urwu?’" 
Ezra5:10 Takavabvunzawo mazita avo, kuti tikuzivisei, tinyore mazita avarume vanovatungamirira." 
Ezra5:11 “Vakapindura vachiti, ‘Isu tiri varanda vaMwari wokudenga napasi, tinovaka imba yakadeya kuvakwa makore mazhinji akapfuura, yakavakwa nomumwe mambo mukuru waIsiraeri, ikapera.’" 
Ezra5:12 “Asi madzibaba edu akati atsamwisa Mwari wokudenga, iye akavaisa mumaoko aNebhukadhenezari mambo weBhabhironi, muKaradhia; iye akaparadza imba ino, akatapa vanhu, ndokuenda navo Bhabhironi." 
Ezra5:13 Asi negore rokutanga raKoreshi mambo weBhabhironi, mambo Koreshi akaraira, kuti imba ino yaMwari ivakwe." 
Ezra5:14 Nemidziyo yendarama neyesirivha yeimba yaMwari, yakanga yatorwa naNebhukadhineza patemberi yaiva Jerusaremu, ikaiswa mutemberi yeBhabhironi, mambo Koreshi akabvisa izvozvo mutemberi yeBhabhironi, zvikapiwa mumwe wainzi Sheshibhazari, waakanga aita mubati;" 
Ezra5:15 akati kwaari, ‘Tora midziyo iyi, undoiisa mutemberi iri Jerusaremu, imba yaMwari ivakwe panzvimbo yayo." 
Ezra5:16 Ipapo uyu Sheshibhazari wakauya, akateya nheyo dzeimba yaMwari iri Jerusaremu; zvino kubva panguva iyo kusvikira zvino yakaramba ichivakwa, nazvino ichigere kupera.’" 
Ezra5:17 “Naizvozvo zvino, kana mambo achifara nazvo, ngavanzvere muimba yepfuma yamambo iri Bhabhironi, vawone kana zviri izvo, kana mambo Koreshi akaraira kuti imba ino yaMwari ivakwe Jerusaremu, mambo agotizivisa kuda kwake pamusoro pemhaka iyi.”" 
Ezra6:1 Ipapo mambo Dhariasi akaraira, vakanzvera paimba yamabhuku, pavaichengeta pfuma paBhabhironi." 
Ezra6:2 Vakawana paEkibhatana, paimba yamambo, yakanga iri parutivi rwenyika yeMidhia, rugwaro rwechimononorwa makanga makanyorwa kudai kuti varangarire," 
Ezra6:3 “Pagore rokutanga ramambo Koreshi, mambo Koreshi akaraira, achiti, ‘Kana iri imba yaMwari paJerusaremu, imba ngaivakwe, pave pavangabayira zvibairo, nenheyo dzayo dziteyiwe nesimba; kukwirira kwayo kusvike makubhiti ana makumi matanhatu, nokufara kwayo makubhiti ana makumi matanhatu;" 
Ezra6:4 ngaive nemisara mitatu yamabwe makuru, nomusara mumwe wamatanda matsva; mari yokuvaka nayo ngaitorwe paimba yamambo." 
Ezra6:5 Nemidziyo yendarama nesirivha yeimba yaMwari, yakadeya kutorwa naNebhukadhineza patemberi paJerusaremu, ikaiswa naye Bhabhironi, ngaidzoswe, iiswezve patemberi iri Jerusaremu, chimwe nechimwe panzvimbo yacho, mugozviisa muimba yaMwari.’" 
Ezra6:6 “Naizvozvo zvino imi Tatenai mubati wenyika mhiri kwerwizi, naShetaribhozenai, namakurukota avaAfarisaki, imi muri mhiri kwerwizi, chibvai ipapo;" 
Ezra6:7 varegei pabasa reimba yaMwari; mubati wavaJudha navakuru vavaJudha ngavavake imba iyi yaMwari panzvimbo yayo. 
Ezra6:8 Uye ndinoraira zvamunofanira kuitira vakuru ava vavaJudha, kuti imba iyi yaMwari ivakwe, mari yokuvaka nayo ngaitorwe papfuma yamambo, pamutero unoripwa mhiri kwerwizi, ikurumidze kupiwa varume avo, kuti varege kudziviswa."
