Psalms22:1 Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, mandisiyireiko? Munomirireiko kure pakundibatsira, napamashoko okugomba kwangu?" 
Psalms22:2 Mwari wangu, ndinodana masikati, asi hamupinduri; Nousiku, asi handiwani zororo." 
Psalms22:3 Asi imi muri mutsvene, Imi mugere parumbidzo dzaIsiraeri." 
Psalms22:4 Madzibaba edu akavimba nemi; Vakavimba, imi mukavarwira." 
Psalms22:5 Vakachema kwamuri, vakarwirwa; Vakavimba nemi, vakasanyadziswa." 
Psalms22:6 Asi ini ndiri honye, handizi munhu; Ndiri chinhu chinozvidzwa navanhu, chinoshorwa navanhu vose." 
Psalms22:7 Vose, vanondiona vanondiseka; Vanoshamisa muromo, vanodzungudza misoro, vachiti," 
Psalms22:8 “Chizviisai kuna Jehovha; iye ngaamurwire; Ngamurwire, zvaanomufarira iye.”" 
Psalms22:9 Asi ndimi makandibudisa pachizvaro; Makandivimbisa nemi ndichiri pamazamu amai vangu. 
Psalms22:10 Ndakaiswa kwamuri kubva pachizvaro; Imi muri Mwari wangu kubva padumbu ramai vangu. 
Psalms22:11 Regai kuva kure neni; nokuti njodzi iri pedyo; Nokuti hapana angabatsira. 
Psalms22:12 Hondo zhinji dzakandikomba; Hondo dzine simba dzaBhashani dzakandipoteredza. 
Psalms22:13 Dzinondishamisira miromo yadzo, Seshumba inoparadza ichiomba." 
Psalms22:14 Ndakadururwa semvura, Mapfupa angu ose akasvodogoka; Mwoyo wangu wakafanana nenamo; Wakanyauka mukati moura hwangu." 
Psalms22:15 Simba rangu rakaoma sechaenga; Rurimi rwangu rwakanamatira pashana dzangu; Makandiisa paguruva rorufu. 
Psalms22:16 Nokuti imbwa dzakandikomberedza; Ungano yavanoita zvakaipa yakandipoteredza; Vakaboora maoko angu namakumbo angu; 
Psalms22:17 Ndingaverenga mapfupa angu ose; Vanonditarira nokundinanganidza; 
Psalms22:18 Vanogovana nguo dzangu pakati pavo, Vanokanda mijenya pamusoro pehanzu yangu." 
Psalms22:19 Asi imi Jehovha, regai kuva kure neni; Imi simba rangu, kurumidzai kundibatsira." 
Psalms22:20 Rwirai mweya wangu pamunondo; Mudikanwa wangu pasimba rembwa. 
Psalms22:21 Ndiponesei pamuromo weshumba; Zvirokwazvo, makandipindura ndiri pakati penyanga dzenyati." 
Psalms22:22 Ndichadudzira zita renyu kuhama dzangu; Ndichakurumbidzai pakati peungano. 
Psalms22:23 Imi munotya Jehovha, murumbidzei; Imi mose vana vaJakobho, mukudzei; Mumutye, imi mose vana VaIsiraeri." 
Psalms22:24 Nokuti haana kuzvidza kana kusema dambudziko raanotambudzwa; Kana kumuvanzira chiso chake; Asi panguva yaakachema kwaari akamunzwa. 
Psalms22:25 Kurumbidza kwangu paungano huru kunobva kwamuri; Ndicharipa mhiko dzangu pamberi pavanomutya. 
Psalms22:26 Vanyoro vachadya vakaguta; Vanotsvaka Jehovha ndivo vachamurumbidza; Mwoyo yenyu ngairarame nokusingaperi. 
Psalms22:27 Migumo yose yenyika icharangarira nokudzokera kuna Jehovha; Marudzi ose avahedheni achanamata kwamuri. 
Psalms22:28 Nokuti ushe ndohwaJehovha; Ndiye mubati wavahedheni. 
Psalms22:29 Vakuru vose venyika vachadya nokunamata; Vose vanoburukira kuguruva vachapfugama pamberi pake, Naiye asingagoni kuraramisa mweya wake." 
Psalms22:30 Vana vake vachanamata kwaari; Rudzi runotevera ruchaudzwa zvaJehovha. 
Psalms22:31 Vachauya vachidudzira kururama kwake Kuvanhu vachazozvarwa, kuti ndiye wakazviita." 
Psalms23:1 Jehovha ndiye mufudzi wangu; Hapana chandingashaiwa. 
Psalms23:2 Anondivatisa pasi pamafuro manyoro; Anondisesedza pamvura inozorodza. 
Psalms23:3 Anoponesa mweya wangu; Anondifambisa panzira dzokururama nokuda kwezita rake. 
Psalms23:4 Zvirokwazvo, kunyangwe ndikafamba mumupata womumvuri worufu, Handingatongotyi zvakaipa; nokuti imi muneni; Tsvimbo yenyu nomudonzvo wenyu zvinondinyaradza." 
Psalms23:5 Munondigadzirira chokudya pamberi pavadzivisi vangu; Makazodza musoro wangu namafuta; mukombe wangu unopfachuka. 
Psalms23:6 Zvirokwazvo unyoro nenyasha zvichanditevera mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu; Ini ndichagara mumba maJehovha mazuva namazuva. 
Psalms24:1 Nyika ndeyaJehovha, nokuzara kwayo; Nyika yose navageremo." 
Psalms24:2 Nokuti wakaiteya pamusoro pamakungwa, Nokuisimbisa pamusoro penzizi." 
Psalms24:3 Ndiani angakwira mugomo raJehovha? Ndiani ungamira panzvimbo yake tsvene? 
Psalms24:4 Uyo ana maoko akachena, nomwoyo wakanaka kwazvo; Asingasimudziri mwoyo wake kune zvisina maturo, Neasina kupika nhema." 
Psalms24:5 Iye achapiwa mukomborero naJehovha, Nokururamiswa naMwari muponesi wake." 
Psalms24:6 Urwu ndirwo rudzi rwavanomutsvaka, Vanotsvaka chiso chenyu, imi Mwari waJakobho." 
Psalms24:7 Simudzai misoro yenyu, imi masuwo; Musimudzwe imi, magonhi akare–kare; Kuti Mambo wokubwinya apinde." 
Psalms24:8 Ndianiko iye Mambo wokubwinya? Ndiye Jehovha ane simba noumhare, Iye Jehovha anoumhare pakurwa." 
Psalms24:9 Simudzai misoro yenyu, imi masuwo; Muisimudze, imi magonhi akare–kare; Kuti Mambo wokubwinya apinde." 
Psalms24:10 Ndianiko uyu Mambo wokubwinya? Jehovha wehondo, Ndiye Mambo wokubwinya." 
Psalms25:1 Jehovha, ndinosimudzira mwoyo wangu kwamuri." 
Psalms25:2 Mwari wangu, ndinovimba nemi, Ngandirege kunyadziswa; Vavengi vangu ngavarege kundikunda." 
Psalms25:3 Zvirokwazvo, hapana munhu anokumirirai anganyadziswa; Vachanyadziswa ndivo vanonyengera pasina chinhu." 
Psalms25:4 Ndiratidzei nzira dzenyu, Jehovha; Ndidzidzisei nzira dzenyu." 
Psalms25:5 Ndiperekedzei muzvokwadi yenyu, mundidzidzise; Nokuti ndimi Mwari muponesi wangu; Ndinokutarirai zuva rose." 
Psalms25:6 Rangarirai, Jehovha, nyasha yenyu huru nounyoro hwenyu; Nokuti zvaivapo kare nakare." 
Psalms25:7 Regai kurangarira zvivi zvohuduku hwangu, nokudarika kwangu; Mundirangarire nounyoro hwenyu, Nokuda kwokunaka kwenyu, Jehovha." 
Psalms25:8 Jehovha akanaka, akarurama; Saka acharaira vatadzi panzira." 
Psalms25:9 Achaperekedza vanyoro mune zvakarurama; Achadzidzisa vanyoro nzira yake. 
Psalms25:10 Nzira dzose dzaJehovha ndedzounyoro nezvokwadi Kunavanochengeta sungano yake nezvipupuriro zvake. 
Psalms25:11 Nokuda kwezita renyu, Jehovha, Kanganwirai zvakaipa zvangu, nokuti zvikuru." 
Psalms25:12 Munhu ndoupiko anotya Jehovha? Ndiye waachadzidzisa nzira yaanofanira kusanangura. 
Psalms25:13 Mweya wake uchagara zvakanaka; Uye vana vake vachagara nhaka yenyika. 
Psalms25:14 Zvakavanzwa zvaJehovha ndezvavanomutya; Achavaratidza sungano yake. 
Psalms25:15 Meso angu anoramba achitarira kuna Jehovha; Nokuti anobvisa tsoka dzangu pamumbure. 
Psalms25:16 Ringirai kwandiri, mundinzwire nyasha; Nokuti ndiri ndoga, ndinotambudzika." 
Psalms25:17 Matambudziko omwoyo wangu awanda kwazvo; Haiwa, ndibudisei panjodzi dzangu." 
Psalms25:18 Tarirai kutambudzika kwangu nokurwadziwa kwangu; Mundikanganwire zvivi zvangu zvose. 
Psalms25:19 Tarirai vavengi vangu, nokuti vazhinji; Vanondivenga nehasha dzembengo." 
Psalms25:20 Chengetai mweya wangu mundirwire; Ndirege kunyadziswa, nokuti ndinovimba nemi." 
Psalms25:21 Kusanyengera nokururama ngazvindichengete, Nokuti ndinokumirirai." 
Psalms25:22 Dzikinurai Isiraeri, imi Mwari, Panjodzi dzake dzose." 
Psalms26:1 Ndichenurei Jehovha, nokuti ndakafamba nokusanyengera kwangu; Ndakavimbawo naJehovha ndisinganyunyuti." 
Psalms26:2 Ndinzverei Jehovha, ndiidzei, Natsai itsvo dzangu nomwoyo wangu." 
Psalms26:3 Nokuti unyoro hwenyu huri pamberi pameso angu, Ndakafamba muzvokwadi yenyu." 
Psalms26:4 Handina kugara navanhu venhema, Handingafambidzani navanyengeri." 
Psalms26:5 Ndinovenga ungano yavanoita zvakaipa, Handingagari navatadzi." 
Psalms26:6 Ndichashambidza maoko angu ndisina mhosva; Ndigopoteredza atari yenyu saizvozvo, Jehovha." 
Psalms26:7 Kuti ndiparidze nezwi rokuvonga, Ndiudze vanhu zvamabasa enyu ose anoshamisa." 
Psalms26:8 Jehovha, ndinoda hugaro hweimba yenyu, Nenzvimbo panogara kubwinya kwenyu." 
Psalms26:9 Regai kusanganisa mweya wangu pamwechete navatadzi, Noupenyu hwangu navateuri veropa;" 
Psalms26:10 Vakabata zvakashata pamaoko avo, Ruoko rwavo rworudyi ruzere nefufuro." 
Psalms26:11 Asi kana ndirini ndichafamba nokusanyengera kwangu; Ndidzikinurei, mundinzwire tsitsi." 
Psalms26:12 Rutsoka rwangu rumire pakati chechetere; Ndicharumbidza Jehovha paungano. 
Psalms27:1 Jehovha ndiye chiedza changu noMuponesi wangu; ndingagotya aniko? Jehovha ndiye simba roupenyu hwangu; ndingagovhunduswa naniko? 
Psalms27:2 Vaiti vezvakaipa vakati vachiuya kwandiri kuzodya nyama yangu, Ivo vadzivisi vangu navavengi vangu, vakagumburwa vakawa." 
Psalms27:3 Kunyangwe hondo ikandikomba, Mwoyo wangu haungatyi; Kunyangwe ndikavingwa nokurwa, Nenguva iyo ndichavimba naJehovha." 
Psalms27:4 Chinhu chimwechete ndakakumbira kuna Jehovha, ndicho chandichatsvaka; Kuti ndigare mumba maJehovha misi yose youpenyu hwangu, Kuti ndione kunaka kwaJehovha, nokurangarira mutemberi yake." 
Psalms27:5 Nokuti nomusi wenjodzi anondiviga mudumba rake, Uchandivanza pakavanda patende rake; Uchandikwiridza padombo." 
Psalms27:6 Zvino musoro wangu uchasimudzirwa kumusoro kwavavengi vangu vanondikomba; Ndichamubayira zvibairo zvomufaro patende rake. Ndichaimba, zvirokwazvo ndichaimbira Jehovha nziyo dzokumurumbidza." 
Psalms27:7 Inzwai Jehovha, kana ndichidana nezwi rangu; Ndinzwirei tsitsi, mundipindure." 
Psalms27:8 Panguva yamakati, “Tsvakai chiso changu;” mwoyo wakati kwamuri, “Chiso chenyu, Jehovha, ndichachitsvaka.”" 
Psalms27:9 Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu; Musadzinga muranda wenyu pakutsamwa kwenyu; Makanga muri mubatsiri wangu; Regai kundirasha, kana kundisiya, imi Mwari muponesi wangu." 
Psalms27:10 Nokuti baba vangu namai vangu vakandirasha, Asi Jehovha achandigamuchira." 
Psalms27:11 Ndidzidzisei nzira yenyu Jehovha; Mundifambise panzira yakati chechetere, Nokuda kwavanondivandira." 
Psalms27:12 Musandisundira pakuda kwavadzivisi vangu; Nokuti zvapupu zvenhema zvakandimukira, navanofemereka hasha." 
Psalms27:13 Ndingadai ndakafa hangu, kana ndisina kutenda kuti ndichaona kunaka kwaJehovha. Panyika yavapenyu." 
Psalms27:14 Rindira Jehovha; Iva nesimba, nomwoyo wako utsunge; Ndinoti, rindira Jehovha." 
Psalms28:1 Ndichadana kwamuri, Jehovha; Dombo rangu, regai kundinyararira; Zvimwe, kana mukandinyararira, Ndingafanana navanoburukira kugomba." 
Psalms28:2 Inzwai izwi remikumbiro yangu, kana ndichichema kwamuri, Kana ndichisimudzira maoko angu kunzvimbo yomukati yeimba yenyu tsvene." 
Psalms28:3 Musandibvuta pamwechete navakaipa, Navanoita zvakashata; Ivo vanotaura rugare kuna vavanogara navo, Asi zvakashata zviri mumwoyo mavo." 
Psalms28:4 Muvape zvakaenzana nebasa ravo, uye zvakaenzana nezvakaipa zvavakaita, Muvape zvakaenzana nokubata kwamaoko avo; Muvaitire sezvakavafanira." 
Psalms28:5 Zvavasina kurangarira mabasa aJehovha, Nezvaakabata namaoko ake, Iye achavaputsa, akasavavakazve." 
Psalms28:6 Jehovha ngaavongwe, Nokuti akanzwa izwi rokukumbira kwangu." 
Psalms28:7 Jehovha ndiye simba rangu nenhoo yangu; Mwoyo wangu wakavimba naye, ndikabatsirwa; Saka mwoyo wangu unofara kwazvo, Ndichamurumbidza norwiyo rwangu." 
Psalms28:8 Jehovha ndiye simba ravo, Ndiye nhare yokuponesa kumuzodziwa wake." 
Psalms28:9 Ponesai vanhu venyu, muropafadze nhaka yenyu; Muvafudzewo, muvatakure nokusingaperi." 
Psalms29:1 Ipai, Jehovha, imi vanakomana vaMwari, Ipai Jehovha kudzo nesimba." 
Psalms29:2 Ipai Jehovha kudzo yakafanirwa nezita rake; Namatai kuna Jehovha nenguo tsvene. 
Psalms29:3 Izwi raJehovha riri pamusoro pemvura zhinji; Mwari wokubwinya unotinhira, Iye Jehovha ari pamusoro pemvura zhinji zhinji," 
Psalms29:4 Izwi raJehovha rine simba; Izwi raJehovha rizere noumambo. 
Psalms29:5 Izwi raJehovha rinovhuna misidhari; Zvirokwazvo, Jehovha anovhunanya misidhari yeRebhanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Anoipemberesa semhuru; Iro Rebhanoni neSirioni semhuru yenyati. 
Psalms29:7 Izwi raJehovha rinopamura mirazvo yomoto. 
Psalms29:8 Izwi raJehovha rinodederesa renje; Jehovha anodederesa renje reKadheshi. 
Psalms29:9 Izwi raJehovha rinoberekesa nondo, Rinosvuura miti yamatondo; Nomutemberi yake zvose zvinoti, “Kubwinya.”" 
Psalms29:10 Jehovha akagara pachigaro chohushe paboporodzi remvura; Zvirokwazvo, Jehovha anogara ari mambo nokusingaperi." 
Psalms29:11 Jehovha achapa vanhu vake simba; Jehovha acharopafadza vanhu vake norugare. 
Psalms30:1 Ndichakukudzai zvikuru, Jehovha; nokuti makandisimudza, Hamuna kutendera vavengi vangu kufara nokuda kwangu." 
Psalms30:2 Jehovha, Mwari wangu, Ndakachema kwamuri, imi mukandiponesa." 
Psalms30:3 Jehovha, makabudisa mweya wangu paSheori; Makachengeta upenyu hwangu, kuti ndirege kuburukira kugomba." 
Psalms30:4 Imbirai Jehovha nziyo dzokurumbidza, imi vatsvene vake, Muvonge kana muchirangarira zita rake dzvene." 
Psalms30:5 Nokuti kutsamwa kwake kuripo chinguva chiduku; Asi ngoni dzake ndedzoupenyu hwose. Kuchema kungavapo madekwana, Asi mufaro unosvika mangwanani." 
Psalms30:6 Kana ndirini, ndakati pakufara kwangu, “Handingatongozununguswi.”" 
Psalms30:7 Imi Jehovha, nengoni dzenyu makamisa gomo rangu nesimba; Makavanza chiso chenyu; ini ndikatambudzika." 
Psalms30:8 Ndakachema kwamuri, Jehovha; Uye ndakakumbira kuna Jehovha;" 
Psalms30:9 “Ropa rangu ringandibatsireiko, kana ndichaburukira kugomba? Guruva ringakurumbidzai here? Ringadudzira zvokwadi yenyu here?" 
Psalms30:10 Inzwai Jehovha, mundinzwirewo tsitsi; Jehovha, ivai mubatsiri wangu.”" 
Psalms30:11 Makashandura kuchema kwangu kukava kutamba; Makasunungura gumbo rangu, mukasunga chiuno changu nomufaro;" 
Psalms30:12 Kuti mweya wangu ukuimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza, urege kunyarara. Jehovha Mwari wangu, ndichakuvongai nokusingaperi." 
Psalms31:1 Jehovha, ndinovimba nemi; ngandirege kutongonyadziswa; Ndirwirei pakururama kwenyu." 
Psalms31:2 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri; kurumidzai kundirwira; Ivai dombo rangu rakasimba, neimba yenhare yokundiponesa." 
Psalms31:3 Nokuti ndimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu; Naizvozvo nditungamirirei mundifambise nokuda kwezita renyu. 
Psalms31:4 Ndibvutei pamumbure wavakandidzikira pakavanda; Nokuti ndimi nhare yangu. 
Psalms31:5 Ndinoisa mweya wangu muruoko rwenyu; Makandidzikinura Jehovha, imi Mwari wazvokwadi." 
Psalms31:6 Ndinovenga vanokudza zvenhema zvisina maturo; Asi ndichavimba naJehovha. 
Psalms31:7 Ndichafara nokufarisisa netsitsi dzenyu; Nokuti makaona kutambudzika kwangu; Makaziva kumanikidzwa kwomweya wangu; 
Psalms31:8 Hamuna kundiisa muruoko rwomuvengi; Makamisa tsoka dzangu panzvimbo yakafarikana. 
Psalms31:9 Ndinzwirei tsitsi Jehovha, nokuti ndiri panjodzi; Ziso rangu rapera nokuchema, zvirokwazvo, nomweya wangu nomuviri wanguo." 
Psalms31:10 Nokuti upenyu hwangu hwapera nokuchema, namakore angu nokugomera; Simba rangu rapera nokuda kwokutadza kwangu, uye mapfupa angu asakara." 
Psalms31:11 Ndava chinhu chinozvidzwa nemhaka yavadzivisi vangu vose, Zvirokwazvo, zvikuru kuna vandinogara navo, nechinotyisa kuvazikani vangu; Vakandiona kunze vakanditiza." 
Psalms31:12 Ndakanganikwa sowakafa asati achafungwa; Ndava somudziyo wakaputsika. 
Psalms31:13 Ndakanzwa vazhinji vachindipomera, Zvinotyisa kumativi ose; Pakurangana kwavo pamusoro pangu Vakafunga mano kuti vanditorere upenyu hwangu." 
Psalms31:14 Asi ndakavimba nemi Jehovha; Ndakati, “Ndimi Mwari wangu.”" 
Psalms31:15 Nguva dzangu dziri muruoko rwenyu; Ndirwirei paruoko rwavavengi vangu, nokuna vanonditambudza." 
Psalms31:16 Vhenekesai chiso chenyu pamusoro pomuranda wenyu; Ndiponesei nounyoro hwenyu. 
Psalms31:17 Ngandirege kunyadziswa, Jehovha; nokuti ndakadana kwamuri; Vakaipa ngavanyadziswe, ngavanyarare paSheori." 
Psalms31:18 Miromo inoreva nhema ngainyarare; Iyo inotaura namanyawi kuna vakarurama, Ichizvikudza nokuvazvidza." 
Psalms31:19 Haiwa, zvakanaka zvenyu zvamakachengetera vanokutyai zvakakura sei, Zvamakaitira vanovimba nemi, pamberi pavanakomana vavanhu!" 
Psalms31:20 Muchavavanza pakavanda pamberi penyu, vabve pamano avanhu; Muchavachengeta pakavanda patende vabve panharo dzendimi." 
Psalms31:21 Jehovha ngaavongwe, Nokuti akandiratidza unyoro hwake hunoshamisa paguta rakasimba." 
Psalms31:22 Kana ndirini, ndakati pakukaruka kwangu, “Ndabviswa pamberi penyu;” Kunyangwe zvakadaro, makanzwa izwi rokukumbira kwangu pakuchema kwangu kwamuri." 
Psalms31:23 Idai Jehovha, imi vatsvene vake mose; Jehovha anochengeta vakatendeka, Anotsiva zvikuru munhu anozvikudza." 
Psalms31:24 Ivai nesimba, uye mwoyo yenyu itsunge, Imi mose munorindira Jehovha." 
Psalms32:1 Akakomborerwa akakanganwirwa kudarika kwake, akafukidzirwa zvivi zvake." 
Psalms32:2 Akakomborerwa munhu asingaverengerwi zvakaipa naJehovha; asina kunyengera pamweya wake. 
Psalms32:3 Panguva yandakaramba ndinyerere, mapfupa angu akasakara Nokuuura kwangu zuva rose." 
Psalms32:4 Nokuti ruoko rwenyu rwakanga ruchirema pamusoro pangu masikati nousiku; Unyoro hwangu hwakashandurwa hukava kuoma kwechirimo. 
Psalms32:5 Ndakakuzivisai chivi changu, handina kuvanza chakaipa changu; Ndakati, “Ndichazvireurura kudarika kwangu kuna Jehovha;” Imi mukandikanganwira kuipa kwechivi changu." 
Psalms32:6 Saka vose vanotya Mwari ngavanyengetere kwamuri panguva yamungawanikwa; Zvirokwazvo kana mvura zhinji ichikukura, haingasviki kwaari." 
Psalms32:7 Ndimi chivando changu; muchandichengeta ndirege kuwira pakutambudzika. Muchandikomberedza nenziyo dzokurwirwa. 
Psalms32:8 Ndichakudzidzisa nokukuraira nzira yaunofanira kufamba nayo; Ndichakupa njere neziso rangu, riri pamusoro pako." 
Psalms32:9 Regai kuva sebhiza, kana sehesera, zvisinganzwisisi; Zvinofanira kufambiswa norwauro netomu pamakashu azvo, Hazvingazodi kuswedera kwauri." 
Psalms32:10 Akaipa achava nenjodzi zhinji; Asi anovimba naJehovha achakombwa netsitsi. 
Psalms32:11 Farai muna Jehovha, mufarisise, imi makarurama; Pururudzai nomufaro, imi mose makarurama pamwoyo." 
Psalms33:1 Farisai muna Jehovha, imi vakarurama; Kurumbidza kwakafanira vakarurama." 
Psalms33:2 Vongai Jehovha nembira; Muimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza nomutengeranwa une hungiso dzine gumi. 
Psalms33:3 Muimbirei rwiyo rutsva; Ridzai zvakanaka nokuridza kukuru. 
Psalms33:4 Nokuti shoko raJehovha rakarurama, Anoita zvose nokutendeka." 
Psalms33:5 Iye anoda kururama noruenzaniso; Nyika izere nounyoro hwaJehovha. 
Psalms33:6 Kudenga–denga kwakaitwa neshoko raJehovha, Uye hondo dzose dzoko nokufema kwomuromo wake." 
Psalms33:7 Anounganidza mvura zhinji yegungwa pamwechete somurwi; Anochengeta mvura zhinji dzakadzika mumatura. 
Psalms33:8 Nyika yose ngaitye Jehovha; Vose vagere panyika ngavadedere pamberi pake. 
Psalms33:9 Nokuti iye akataura, zvikaitika; Akaraira, zvikamira zvikasimba." 
Psalms33:10 Jehovha anoparadza zano ravahedheni; Mifungo yendudzi dzavanhu anoishaisa simba. 
Psalms33:11 Zano raJehovha rakasimba nokusingaperi, Nendangariro dzomwoyo wake kusvikira kundudzi dzose." 
Psalms33:12 Rwakakomborerwa rudzi rwakaita Jehovha Mwari warwo; Rudzi rwaakatsaura kuva nhaka yake. 
Psalms33:13 Jehovha anotarira ari kudenga; Anoona vanakomana vose vavanhu; 
Psalms33:14 Anotarira ari ipapo paagere Achiona vanhu vose vagere panyika. 
Psalms33:15 Iye anoumba mwoyo yavo vose, Anocherechedza mabasa avo ose" 
Psalms33:16 Hapana mambo anoponeswa nokuwanda kwehondo; Mhare hairwirwi nesimba guru. 
Psalms33:17 Bhiza haribatsiri pakukunda; Harigoni kurwira nesimba raro guru. 
Psalms33:18 Tarirai, ziso raJehovha rinotarira vanomutya, Ivo, vanorindira tsitsi dzake;" 
Psalms33:19 Kurwira mweya wavo parufu, Nokuvararamisa panguva yenzara." 
Psalms33:20 Mweya yedu yakarindira Jehovha; Ndiye mubatsiri wedu nenhoo yedu. 
Psalms33:21 Nokuti mwoyo yedu ichafara kwazvo maari, Zvatakavimba nezita rake dzvene." 
Psalms33:22 Tsitsi dzenyu ngadzive nesu, Jehovha, Sezvatakakurindirai." 
Psalms34:1 Ndicharumbidza Jehovha nguva dzose; Rumbidzo yake ichagara mumuromo mangu. 
Psalms34:2 Mweya wangu uchazvirumbidza muna Jehovha; Vanyoro vachazvinzwa, vakafara." 
Psalms34:3 Kudzai Jehovha pamwechete neni, Ngatikudzise zita rake pamwechete." 
Psalms34:4 Ndakatsvaka Jehovha, akandipindura, Akandisunungura pakutya kwangu kwose." 
Psalms34:5 Vakatarira kwaari, vakapenyeswa nomufaro; Zviso zvavo hazvingatongonyadziswi." 
Psalms34:6 Murombo uyu akachema, Jehovha akamunzwa, Akamuponesa panjodzi dzake dzose." 
Psalms34:7 Mutumwa waJehovha anokomberedza vanomutya, Nokuvarwira." 
Psalms34:8 Ravirai henyu, muone kuti Jehovha akanaka; Akakomborerwa munhu anovimba naye." 
Psalms34:9 Ityai Jehovha, imi vatsvene vake; Nokuti vanomutya havana chavanoshaiwa." 
Psalms34:10 Vana veshumba vanoshaiwa, vanofa nenzara; Asi vanotsvaka Jehovha havana chinhu chakanaka chavangashaiwa." 
Psalms34:11 Uyai imi vana, munditeerere; Ndichakudzidzisai kutya Jehovha." 
Psalms34:12 Ndoupi munhu anoda upenyu, Anoda mazuva mazhinji, kuti aone zvakanaka?" 
Psalms34:13 Dzora rurimi rwako pakutaura zvakaipa, Nemiromo yako, urege kutaura zvinonyengera." 
Psalms34:14 Ibva pane zvakaipa uite zvakanaka; Tsvaka rugare, urutevere." 
Psalms34:15 Meso aJehovha anotarira vakarurama, Uye nzeve dzake dzinonzwa kuchema kwavo." 
Psalms34:16 Chiso chaJehovha chinovenga vanoita zvakaipa, Kuti abvise chiyeudziro chavo panyika." 
Psalms34:17 Vakarurama vakadana, Jehovha akanzwa, Akavarwira panjodzi dzavo dzose." 
Psalms34:18 Jehovha ari pedyo navane mwoyo yakaputsika, Anoponesa vane mweya yakapwanyika." 
Psalms34:19 Akarurama ana matambudziko mazhinji; Asi Jehovha anomurwira abude paari ose. 
Psalms34:20 Anochengeta mapfupa ake ose; Hakuna nerimwe rawo rinovhuniwa. 
Psalms34:21 Zvakaipa zvichauraya akaipa; Uye vanovenga vakarurama vachapiwa mhosva. 
Psalms34:22 Jehovha anodzikinura mweya yavaranda vake; Hapana nomumwe kuna vanovimba naye achapiwa mhosva. 
Psalms35:1 Jehovha, kakavadzanai navanokakavadzana neni; Irwai navanorwa neni." 
Psalms35:2 Torai nhoo huru neduku, Musimuke kundibatsira." 
Psalms35:3 Vhomoraiwo pfumo, mudzivire nzira yavanonditeverera, Itiyi kumweya wangu, “Ndini muponesi wako.”" 
Psalms35:4 Vanotsvaka mweya wangu ngavanyadziswe, vazvidzwe; Vanofunga kundiitira zvakaipa ngavadzoserwe shure vakanganiswe." 
Psalms35:5 Ngavafanane nehundi inopupuruswa nemhepo, Mutumwa waJehovha achivasundira." 
Psalms35:6 Nzira yavo ngaive nerima, itedze, Mutumwa waJehovha achivateverera." 
Psalms35:7 Nokuti ndisina mhosva vakandivanzira mimbure yavo muhunza, Ndisina mhosva vakacherera mweya wangu hunza." 
Psalms35:8 Kuparadzwa ngakumuwire akangofara; Uye mumbure wake waakavanza ngaumubate amene; Ngaawiremo aparadzwe. 
Psalms35:9 Mweya wangu uchafarira Jehovha Uchafarira kuponesa kwake. 
Psalms35:10 Mapfupa angu ose achati, “Jehovha ndianiko akafanana nemi, Imi munorwira murombo pana iye akamukurira nesimba, Iye murombo nomushaiwi panoanomupamba?”" 
Psalms35:11 Zvapupu zvisina kururama zvinosimuka; Zvinondibvunza zvinhu zvandisingazivi. 
Psalms35:12 Zvakanaka zvangu vanozvitsiva nezvakaipa, Vachibira mweya wangu." 
Psalms35:13 Asi kana ndirini, pakurwara kwavo ndakafuka masaga; Ndakatambudza mweya wangu ndichizvinyima zvokudya; Munyengetero wangu ukadzokera kuchipfuva changu." 
Psalms35:14 Ndakaita seyaiva shamwari yangu kana hama yangu; Ndakakotama ndichichema, somunhu anochema mai vake." 
Psalms35:15 Asi pakugumburwa kwangu vakafara, vakaungana pamwechete; Vanhu vakashata kwazvo vakaungana kuzorwa neni, navandakanga ndisingazivi; Vakandibvambura, vasingaregi;" 
Psalms35:16 Savadadiri vakaipa pamitambo Vakandirumanyira meno avo. 
Psalms35:17 Jehovha, muchatarira izvozvo kusvikira rinhiko? Rwirai mweya wangu pakuparadza kwavo, Mudikanwa wangu pashumba." 
Psalms35:18 Ndichakuvongai paungano huru; Ndichakurumbidzai pakati pavanhu vazhinji. 
Psalms35:19 Vanondivenga ndisina mhosva ngavarege kufara pamusoro pangu; Uye vanondivenga ndisina mhosva ngavarege kubwaira neziso. 
Psalms35:20 Nokuti havatauri rugare; Asi vanofungira avo vanyerere panyika mashoko okunyengera. 
Psalms35:21 Zvirokwazvo, vakandishamisira miromo yavo; Vakati, “Hekani, hekani! Meso edu akazviona.”" 
Psalms35:22 Makazviona, Jehovha; regai kunyarara; Ishe, regai kugara kure neni." 
Psalms35:23 Zvimutsei, mukai mundiruramisire; Mutambe mhaka yangu, Mwari wangu naShe wangu." 
Psalms35:24 Nditongerei, Jehovha Mwari wangu, nokururama kwenyu; Ngavarege kufara pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms35:25 Ngavarege kuti mumwoyo mavo, “Hekani, ndizvo zvatanga tichida;” Ngavarege kuti, “Tamumedza.”" 
Psalms35:26 Ngavanyadziswe, vazvidzwe pamwechete, ivo vanofarira kutambudzika kwangu; Ngavafukidzwe nokunyara nokuzvidzwa, ivo vanozvikudza pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms35:27 Ngavadanidzire nomufaro, vafare, ivo vanoda kururamiswa kwemhaka yangu; Ngavarambe vachiti, “Jehovha ngaakudzwe, Iye, anofarira kufara kwomuranda wake.”" 
Psalms35:28 Ipapo rurimi rwangu ruchataura zvokururama kwenyu, Nezvokurumbidzwa kwenyu zuva rose." 
Psalms36:1 Kudarika kwoakaipa kunoreva mumwoyo mangu, kuchiti, “Hakuna kutya Mwari pamberi pameso ake.”" 
Psalms36:2 Nokuti anozvibata kumeso kwake, Achiti zvakaipa zvake hazvingazikanwi zvikavengwa." 
Psalms36:3 Mashoko omuromo wake ndizvo zvakaipa nokunyengera; Akarega kuzova akachenjera nokuita zvakanaka. 
Psalms36:4 Anofunga zvakaipa panhoo dzake; Anofamba nenzira isina kunaka; Haasemi zvakaipa. 
Psalms36:5 Unyoro hwenyu, Jehovha, hwakasvika kudenga–denga; Kutendeka kwenyu kunosvikira kumakore;" 
Psalms36:6 Kururama kwenyu kwakafanana namakomo aMwari; Kutonga kwenyu kwakadzika zvikuru; Jehovha, munochengeta vanhu nemhuka." 
Psalms36:7 Unyoro hwenyu, Mwari, hwakanaka–naka sei! Vana vavanhu vanondovanda pasi pomumvuri wamapapiro enyu." 
Psalms36:8 Vachagutswa kwazvo nezvakakora zveimba yenyu; Muchavanwisa parwizi rwezvinofadza zvenyu; 
Psalms36:9 Nokuti kwamuri ndiko kune tsime roupenyu; Muchiedza chenyu ndimo matinoona chiedza. 
Psalms36:10 Rambai muchiitira vanokuzivai unyoro hwenyu; Nokururama kwenyu kuna vano mwoyo yakarurama. 
Psalms36:11 Rutsoka rwoanozvikudza ngarurege kusvikira kwandiri, Ruoko rwoakaipa ngarurege kundidzinga." 
Psalms36:12 Apo ndopakawira pasi vaiti vezvakaipa, Vakawisirwa pasi, havangagoni kumukazve." 
Psalms37:1 Usava neshungu nokuda kwavanoita zvakaipa, Usagodora vanoita zvisina kururama." 
Psalms37:2 Nokuti vachakurumidza kudzurwa souswa, Vachaoma semuriwo mutema." 
Psalms37:3 Vimba naJehovha, uite zvakanaka; Gara panyika, ushingairire kutendeka." 
Psalms37:4 Farikana kwazvo kuna Jehovha; Iye agokupa zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wako. 
Psalms37:5 Isa nzira yako kuna Jehovha; Vimbawo naye, iye achazviita." 
Psalms37:6 Iye achabudisa kururama kwako sechiedza, Nokururamisirwa kwako samasikati." 
Psalms37:7 Nyarara pamberi paJehovha, umurindire unyerere; Usava neshungu pamusoro poanofara panzira yake, Pamusoro pomunhu anoita mano akaipa aakafunga." 
Psalms37:8 Rega kutsamwa, urashe hasha; Usava neshungu, zvinongotadzisa munhu." 
Psalms37:9 Nokuti vanoita zvakaipa vachagurwa; Asi vanorindira Jehovha vachagara nhaka yenyika. 
Psalms37:10 Kwasara chinguva chiduku, akaipa haachazovipo; Zvirokwazvo, iwe uchacherechedza zvakanaka paaigara, asi haachazovipo." 
Psalms37:11 Asi vanyoro ndivo vachagara nhaka yenyika; Ndivo vachafarikana kwazvo norugare rukuru. 
Psalms37:12 Akaipa anofungira akarurama mano akaipa, Anomurumanyira meno ake." 
Psalms37:13 Ishe achamuseka; Nokuti anoona kuti zuva rake rinouya. 
Psalms37:14 Vakaipa vakavhomora munondo, vakawembura uta hwavo; Kuti vawisire pasi varombo navanoshaiwa, Kuti vauraya vakarurama panzira;" 
Psalms37:15 Munondo wavo uchapinda pamwoyo yavo imene, Uye uta hwavo huchavhuniwa." 
Psalms37:16 Zvishoma, zvakanaka, zvowakarurama zvinopfuura Zvakawanda zvavakaipa vazhinji." 
Psalms37:17 Nokuti maoko avakaipa achavhuniwa; Asi Jehovha anotsigira vakarurama. 
Psalms37:18 Jehovha anoziva mazuva avane mwoyo yakarurama; Nhaka yavo ndeyokusingaperi. 
Psalms37:19 Havanganyadziswi nenguva yokuipa; Pamisi yenzara vachagutiswa. 
Psalms37:20 Asi vakaipa vachaparara, Uye vavengi vaJehovha vachafanana nokunaka kwamafuro; Vacharova; vacharova soutsi." 
Psalms37:21 Akaipa anokwereta, asingaripizve; Asi akarurama ane ngoni, anopa." 
Psalms37:22 Nokuti vanokomborerwa naye vachagara nhaka yenyika; Asi vanotukwa naye vachaparadzwa. 
Psalms37:23 Mufambiro womunhu unosimbiswa naJehovha; Unofarikana munzira yake. 
Psalms37:24 Kunyangwe akawa, haangawiswi chose; Nokuti Jehovha anomutsigira noruoko rwake." 
Psalms37:25 Ndakanga ndiri muduku, zvino ndakwegura; Kunyangwe zvakadaro handina kutongoona akarurama achisiyiwa, Kana vana vake vachipemha zvokudya." 
Psalms37:26 Zuva rose anoramba ane ngoni, achiposa; Vana vake vanokomborerwa." 
Psalms37:27 Ibva pane zvakaipa, uite zvakanaka; Ugare zvakanaka nokusingaperi." 
Psalms37:28 Nokuti Jehovha anoda zvakarurama, Haasiyi vatsvene vake; Vanochengetwa nokusingaperi; Asi vana vowakaipa vachaparadzwa." 
Psalms37:29 Vakarurama vachagara nhaka yenyika, Vachagaramo nokusingaperi." 
Psalms37:30 Muromo wowakarurama unotaura zvenjere, Rurimi rwake runotaura zvakarurama." 
Psalms37:31 Murairo waMwari wake uri mumwoyo make; Pakutsika kwake haangatongotedzemuki. 
Psalms37:32 Akaipa anovandira akarurama, Achitsvaka kumuuraya." 
Psalms37:33 Jehovha haangamuregeri muruoko rwake, Kana kumupa mhosva kana atongwa." 
Psalms37:34 Rindira Jehovha, urambire panzira yake, Iye achakukudza kuti ugare nhaka yenyika; Kana vakaipa vachiparadzwa iwe uchazviona." 
Psalms37:35 Ndakaona akaipa ane simba guru, Achitandavara somuti munyoro panyika yawo." 
Psalms37:36 Zvino mumwe akapfuurazve, wanei haachipo; Ndakamutsvaka, asi akanga asichawanikwi." 
Psalms37:37 Cherechedzai munhu akakwana, mutarire akarurama; Nokuti kuguma kwomunhu uyo rugare." 
Psalms37:38 Kana vari vadariki, vachaparadzwa pamwechete; Pakuguma kwavo vakaipa vachaparadzwa." 
Psalms37:39 Asi kuponeswa kwavakarurama kunobva kuna Jehovha; Ndiye nhare yavo panguva yokutambudzika. 
Psalms37:40 Jehovha anovabatsira, nokuvarwira; Anovarwira kuna vakaipa, nokuvaponesa, Nokuti vakandovanda maari." 
Psalms38:1 Haiwa Jehovha, regai kundiraira pakutsamwa kwenyu; Musandiranga nokusafara kwenyu kukuru." 
Psalms38:2 Nokuti miseve yenyu yandibaya, Ruoko rwenyu runonditsikirira kwazvo." 
Psalms38:3 Hakuchina hukukutu panyama yangu nokuda kwehasha dzenyu; Uye hapachina mufaro pamapfupa angu nokuda kwechivi changu. 
Psalms38:4 Nokuti zvakaipa zvangu zvafukidza musoro wangu; Zvinondiremera somutoro unorema. 
Psalms38:5 Maronda angu anonhuwa, akaora, Nokuda kwohupenzi hwangu." 
Psalms38:6 Ndakakombamiswa, ndakakotamiswa kwazvo, Ndinofamba ndichichema zuva rose." 
Psalms38:7 Nokuti chiuno changu chinopisa zvikuru; Hakuchina hukukutu panyama yangu. 
Psalms38:8 Ndakati rukutu, ndavhunika kwazvo; Ndakagomera nokuda kwokutambudzika kwomwoyo wangu." 
Psalms38:9 Ishe, zvose zvinoda mwoyo wangu zviri pamberi penyu; Hamuna kuvanzirwa kugomba kwangu." 
Psalms38:10 Mwoyo wangu unopfura, ndapererwa nesimba rangu; Kana chiri chiedza chameso angu, naicho chabva kwandiri." 
Psalms38:11 Vanondida, neshamwari dzangu, vanomira kure nokuda kwechirwere changu; Uye hama dzangu dzimire kure." 
Psalms38:12 Vanotsvaka upenyu hwangu vanonditeyira misungo; Uye vanotsvaka kundikuvadza vanotaura zvokuparadzwa kwangu, Asi vanofunga kundinyengera zuva rose." 
Psalms38:13 Asi ini ndakafanana nematsi, handinzwi; Ndakafanana nembeveve isingashamisi muromo wayo." 
Psalms38:14 Zvirokwazvo, ndakafanana nomunhu asinganzwi, Asina mhinduro pamuromo wake." 
Psalms38:15 Nokuti ndimi, Jehovha, wandinotarira; Imi muchapindura, Jehovha Mwari wangu." 
Psalms38:16 Nokuti ndakati, “Ngaavarege kufara pamusoro pangu; Kana rutsoka rwangu ruchitedzemuka, vanozvikudza pamusoro pangu.”" 
Psalms38:17 Nokuti ndinovavarira kugumburwa, Uye njodzi yangu iri pamberi pangu nguva dzose." 
Psalms38:18 Nokuti ndichazvireurura zvakaipa zvangu; Ndichachema zvivi zvangu. 
Psalms38:19 Asi vavengi vangu vakasvinuka, vane simba; Uye vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vawanda." 
Psalms38:20 Naivowo vanotsiva zvakaipa nezvakanaka, Ndivo vadzivisi vangu, nokuti ndinotevera chinhu chakanaka." 
Psalms38:21 Regai kundisiya, Jehovha; Mwari wangu, regai kuva kure neni." 
Psalms38:22 Kurumidzai kundibatsira, Ishe, imi muponesi wangu." 
Psalms39:1 Ndakati, “Ndichachenjerera nzira dzangu, Kuti ndirege kutadza norurimi rwangu; Ndichachengeta muromo wangu netomu, Kana wakaipa ari pamberi pangu.”" 
Psalms39:2 Ndakanga ndiri mbeveve ndisingatauri, Ndakanyarara hangu, ndiri kure nezvakanaka. Kuchema kwangu kukamutswa." 
Psalms39:3 Mwoyo wangu wakanga uchipisa mukati mangu; Ndakati ndichifunga, moto ukapfuta; Ipapo ndakataura norurimi rwangu, ndikati," 
Psalms39:4 “Jehovha, ndizivisei mugumo wangu, Uye mwero wamazuva angu, kuti akadini; Ndizivisei kuti ndinongopfuura hangu.”" 
Psalms39:5 Tarirai, makaita mazuva angu sohupamhi hwechanza; Uye nguva yokurarama kwangu sechinhu chisipo pamberi penyu; Zvirokwazvo, munhu mumwe nomumwe kunyangwe akasimba kwazvo, mweya bedzi." 
Psalms39:6 Zvirokwazvo, munhu mumwe nomumwe anofamba–famba somumvuri; Zvirokwazvo, vanoita hope pasina; Anounganidza pfuma, asi haazivi kuti ndiani achaidya." 
Psalms39:7 Zvino Ishe, ndakarindireiko? Tariro yangu iri kwamuri." 
Psalms39:8 Ndirwirei pakudarika kwangu kwose; Regai kundiita munhu anosekwa namapenzi. 
Psalms39:9 Ndakanga ndiri mbeveve, handina kushamisa muromo wangu; Nokuti ndimi makazviita." 
Psalms39:10 Bvisai shamhu yenyu kwandiri; Ndapera nokurohwa noruoko rwenyu. 
Psalms39:11 Kana muchiraira munhu muchimuranga pamusoro pezvakaipa, Munopedza kunaka kwake sechiunduzi; Zvirokwazvo munhu mumwe nomumwe mweya hake." 
Psalms39:12 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, Jehovha, rerekerai nzeve yenyu munzwe kuchema kwangu; Musanyarara muchiona misodzi yangu; Nokuti ndiri mweni kwamuri, Mutorwa, sezvakanga zvakaita madzibaba angu ose." 
Psalms39:13 Regai kunditarira, kuti ndimbonaya hangu, Ndisati ndabva pano, ndikasazovapo." 
Psalms40:1 Ndakarindira–rindira Jehovha; Akarerekera kwandiri, akanzwa kuchema kwangu." 
Psalms40:2 Akandibudisawo pagomba rokuparadzwa, nomudziva ramatope; Akamisa tsoka dzangu padombo, akasimbisa kufamba kwangu." 
Psalms40:3 Akaisa rwiyo rutsva mumuromo mangu, rwokurumbidza Mwari wedu narwo; Vazhinji vachazviona, vachitya, Vachavimba naJehovha." 
Psalms40:4 Akakomborerwa anoita Jehovha chivando chake. Asina hanya navanozvikudza, navanotsaukira kunhema." 
Psalms40:5 Jehovha Mwari wangu, mabasa enyu, anoshamisa, amakaita, mazhinji, Nemifungo yenyu kwatiri; Hapana angaenzaniswa nemi. Kana ndikada kuzvidudzira nokuzvireva, Hazvingaverengwi nokuwanda kwazvo." 
Psalms40:6 Imi hamufadzwi nezvibairo nezvipiriso; Makandidziurira nzeve dzangu; Zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvezvivi hamuna kuzvireva. 
Psalms40:7 Ipapo ndakati, “Tarirai, ndauya; Parugwaro rwechimononorwa ndakazvirairwa," 
Psalms40:8 Ndinofara kwazvo kuita kuda kwenyu, Mwari wangu; Zvirokwazvo murairo wenyu uri mumwoyo mangu.”" 
Psalms40:9 Ndakaparidza mashoko omufaro paungano huru; Tarirai, handingadzori miromo yangu, Jehovha, munozviziva." 
Psalms40:10 Handina kuvanza kururama kwenyu mumwoyo mangu; Ndakadudzira kutendeka kwenyu nokuponesa kwenyu; Handina kuvanzira ungano huru unyoro hwenyu nezvokwadi yenyu. 
Psalms40:11 Jehovha, imi hamungandinyimi ngoni dzenyu; Unyoro hwenyu nezvokwadi yenyu zvichandichengeta nguva dzose." 
Psalms40:12 Nokuti madambudzo asingaverengwi akandikomberedza, Zvakaipa zvangu zvakandibata, naizvozvo handigoni kutarira kumusoro; Zvakawanda kupfuura vhudzi romusoro wangu, ndapera mwoyo." 
Psalms40:13 Jehovha, ngazvikufadzei kundirwira; Kurumidzai kundibatsira, Jehovha." 
Psalms40:14 Ngavanyadziswe, ngavazvidzwe pamwechete. Ivo vanotsvaka mweya wangu kuti vauparadze; Ngavadzoserwe shure, vashorwe Ivo vanofarira kundikuvadza." 
Psalms40:15 Ngavavhunduswe nokuda kwenyadzi dzavo Ivo vanoti kwandiri, “Hekani, hekani waro!”" 
Psalms40:16 Vose vanokutsvakai ngavafarise vave nomufaro mamuri; Vanoda kuponesa kwenyu ngavarambe vachiti, “Jehovha ngaakudzwe!”" 
Psalms40:17 Asi ini ndiri murombo nomushaiwi; Kunyangwe zvakadaro Ishe anondifunga; Imi muri mubatsiri wangu nomurwiri wangu; Regai kunonoka, Mwari wangu." 
Psalms41:1 Akakomborerwa ane hanya navarombo; Jehovha achamurwira nomusi wezvakaipa. 
Psalms41:2 Jehovha achamuchengeta nokumuraramisa, achakomborerwa panyika; Hamungamuisi pakuda kwavavengi vake." 
Psalms41:3 Jehovha achamutsigira panhoo yourwere; Munoshandura nhoo dzake dzose pakurwa kwake. 
Psalms41:4 Ini ndakati, “Jehovha, ndinzwirei tsitsi; Poresai mweya wangu; nokuti ndakakutadzirai.”" 
Psalms41:5 Vavengi vangu vanotaura zvakaipa pamusoro pangu, vachiti, “Uchagofa rinhiko, zita rake rirove?”" 
Psalms41:6 Kana mumwe achiuya kuzondiona, anotaura zvisina maturo; Mwoyo wake unozviunganidzira zvakaipa; Kana obuda kumwe, anozviparidza." 
Psalms41:7 Vose, vanondivenga, vanoita zeve–zeve pamwechete pamusoro pangu; Vanorangana kundikuvadza." 
Psalms41:8 Chinhu chakaipa chakamunamatira ndizvo zvavanotaura; Zvino zvaavata pasi, haachazomukizve." 
Psalms41:9 Haiwa, kunyangwe shamwari yangu chaiyo, wandaivimba naye, aidya zvokudya zvangu, Naiye andisimudzira chichitsinho chake." 
Psalms41:10 Asi imi Jehovha, ndinzwirei tsitsi, mundisimudzei, Kuti ndivatsive." 
Psalms41:11 Ndinoziviswa nechinhu ichi kuti munofadzwa neni, Nokuti muvengi wangu haandikundi." 
Psalms41:12 Kana ndirini munonditsigira pakururama kwangu, Munondiisa pamberi penyu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms41:13 Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ngaavongwe, Kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi Ameni, zvirokwazvo Ameni." 
Psalms42:1 Senondo inotakwairira hova dzemvura, Saizvozvo mweya wangu unokutakwairirai imi Mwari." 
Psalms42:2 Mweya wangu une nyota kuna Mwari, iye Mwari mupenyu, Ndichasvika rinhiko ndionekwe naMwari?" 
Psalms42:3 Misodzi yangu zvakanga zviri zvokudya zvangu masikati nousiku, Pakutaura kwavo zuva rose kwandiri vachiti, “Mwari wako aripiko?”" 
Psalms42:4 Ndinorangarira zvinhu izvi, ndichidurura mweya wangu mukati mangu, Zvokuti ndaienda navazhinji, ndichivatungamirira kuimba yaMwari Nezwi rokufara nokurumbidza, tiri vazhinji vaitamba mutambo." 
Psalms42:5 Unoshuwireiko, mweya wangu? Unoshaiwa rugare neiko mukati mangu? Tarira kuna Mwari; nokuti ndichazomurumbidza hangu, Nokuda kwokuponesa kwechiso chake." 
Psalms42:6 Haiwa Mwari, mweya wangu unoshuwa mukati mangu; Naizvozvo ndinokurangarirai ndiri panyika yaJodhani, Napamakomo eHerimoni, nechikomo cheMizari." 
Psalms42:7 Pakadzika panodana pakadzika pakutinhira kwamapopopo enyu; Mafungu enyu namapoporodzi enyu akapfuura napamusoro pangu. 
Psalms42:8 Asi Jehovha acharaira unyoro hwake panguva yamasikati, Usiku rwiyo rwake ruchava neni, Uye munyengetero kuna Mwari woupenyu hwangu." 
Psalms42:9 Ndichati kuna Mwari, dombo rangu, “Makandikanganwireiko? Ndinofambireiko ndichichema nemhaka yokumanikidza kwomuvengi wangu?”" 
Psalms42:10 Zvakafanana nomunondo pamapfupa angu, kana vadzivisi vangu vachindizvidza; Kana vachiramba vachiti kwandiri, “Mwari wako aripiko?”" 
Psalms42:11 Unoshuwireiko, mweya wangu? Unoshaiwa rugare neiko mukati mangu? Tarira kuna Mwari; nokuti ndichazomurumbidza hangu, Iye muponesi wechiso changu, naMwari wangu." 
Psalms43:1 Ndichenurei Mwari, mundireverere pamhosva yangu parudzi rusina tsitsi; Ndirwirei pamunhu anonyengera asina kururama." 
Psalms43:2 Nokuti ndimi Mwari simba rangu; mandirasireiko? Ndinofambireiko ndichichema nokuda kwokumanikidza kwomuvengi? 
Psalms43:3 Tumai chiedza chenyu nezvokwadi yenyu; zvinditungamirire; Zvindisvitse kugomo renyu dzvene, Nokutabhenakeri dzenyu." 
Psalms43:4 Ipapo ndichasvika kuatari yaMwari, Kuna Mwari, iye mufaro wangu mukuru; Ndichakurumbidzai nembira, imi Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Psalms43:5 Unoshuwireiko, mweya wangu? Unoshaiwa rugare neiko mukati mangu? Tarira kuna Mwari; nokuti ndichazomurumbidza hangu, Iye muponesi wechiso changu, naMwari wangu." 
Psalms44:1 Mwari, takanzwa nenzeve dzedu, madzibaba edu akatiudza, Basa ramakabata pamisi yavo, napamisi yekare." 
Psalms44:2 Makadzinga vahedheni noruoko rwenyu, mukavasima ivo; Makatambudza ndudzi dzavanhu mukavaparadzira ivo." 
Psalms44:3 Nokuti havana kuzviwanira nyika nomunondo wavo, Ruoko rwavo haruna kuvaponesa; Asi chanza chenyu chorudyi, noruoko rwenyu, nechiedza chechiso chenyu, Nokuti maivafarira." 
Psalms44:4 Ndimi Mambo wangu, imi Mwari; Rairai kuti Jakobho akunde." 
Psalms44:5 Nemi tichawisira pasi vadzivisi vedu; Nezita renyu tichatsika pasi vanotimukira. 
Psalms44:6 Nokuti handingavimbi nouta hwangu, Nomunondo wangu haungandiponesi." 
Psalms44:7 Asi imi makatiponesa pavadzivisi vedu, Mukanyadzisa vanotivenga." 
Psalms44:8 Takazvirumbidza zuva rose muna Mwari, Tichavonga zita renyu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms44:9 Asi zvino makatirasha henyu, mukatinyadzisa; Hamuchafambi nehondo dzedu." 
Psalms44:10 Munotitizisa pamberi pavadzivisi; Vanotivenga vanopamba zvinhu zvedu. 
Psalms44:11 Makatiisa samakwai akatarirwa kubayiwa; Makatiparadzira pakati pavahedheni. 
Psalms44:12 Munotengesa vanhu venyu musina chamunopiwa, Hamuna kuwedzera pfuma yenyu nomutengo wavo." 
Psalms44:13 Munotiita vanhu vanosekwa navatinogara navo, Vanhu vanozvidzwa nokusekwa navakatikomberedza." 
Psalms44:14 Munotiita shumo pakati pavahedheni, Vanhu vanotidzungudzira misoro." 
Psalms44:15 Zuva rose kuzvidzwa kwangu kuri pamberi pangu, Kunyara kwechiso changu kwakandifukidza." 
Psalms44:16 Nokuda kwezwi romutuki nomuzvidzi; Nokuda kwomuvengi nomutsivi. 
Psalms44:17 Izvi zvose zvakatiwira; kunyangwe zvakadaro hatina kukukanganwai, Hatina kunyengedzera pasungano yenyu." 
Psalms44:18 Mwoyo yedu haina kudzokera shure, Kutsika kwedu hakuna kutsauka panzira yenyu;" 
Psalms44:19 Kunyangwe makatipwanya–pwanya panzvimbo yamakava, Mukatifukidza nomumvuri worufu." 
Psalms44:20 Kana tichinge takanganwa zita raMwari wedu, Kana kutambanudzira maoko edu kumwari wavamwe;" 
Psalms44:21 Ko Mwari haanganzveri izvozvo here? Nokuti iye anoziva zvakavanzika zvomwoyo. 
Psalms44:22 Zvirokwazvo, nokuda kwenyu tinourayiwa zuva rose; Tinonzi tiri makwai akatarirwa kubayiwa." 
Psalms44:23 Mukai, munovatireiko, Ishe? Mukai, musatirasha nokusingaperi." 
Psalms44:24 Munovanzireiko chiso chenyu, Muchikanganwa kutambudzika kwedu nokumanikidzwa kwedu?" 
Psalms44:25 Nokuti mweya wedu wakotamira kuguruva; Dumbu redu rinonamatira pavhu. 
Psalms44:26 Simukai mutibatsire, Mutidzikinure nokuda kwounyoro hwenyu." 
Psalms45:1 Mwoyo wangu unotutuma namashoko akanaka; Ndinotaura zvinhu zvandakaita zvinoreva mambo; Rurimi rwangu ipeni yomunyori anokurumidza kunyora. 
Psalms45:2 Imi makanaka–naka kupfuura vana vavanhu; Nyasha yakadururirwa pamiromo yenyu; Saka Mwari wakakuropafadzai nokusingaperi. 
Psalms45:3 Sungai munondo wenyu pachiuno chenyu, imi wamasimba, Ukuru hwenyu noumambo hwenyu." 
Psalms45:4 Fambai noumambo hwenyu muchikunda, Nokuda kwezvokwadi nounyoro nokururama; Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ngarukudzidzisei zvinotyisa." 
Psalms45:5 Miseve yenyu inopinza; Vanhu vanokundwa nemi; Inobaya pamwoyo yavavengi vamambo. 
Psalms45:6 Chigaro chenyu choushe, imi Mwari, chiripo nokusingaperi–peri; Tsvimbo youshe hwenyu itsvimbo yakarurama." 
Psalms45:7 Makada kururama, mukavenga kusarurama; Naizvozvo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakakuzodzai Namafuta okufara kupfuura shamwari dzenyu." 
Psalms45:8 Nguo dzenyu dzose dzinonhuwira nemura nearosi neakashia; Madimbwa akakufadzai achiridzwa mudzimba dzamambo dzenyanga dzenzou. 
Psalms45:9 Vakunda vamadzimambo vari pakati pavanhukadzi venyu vanokudzwa; Paruoko rwenyu rworudyi vahosi vamire vakashonga ndarama yeOfiri. 
Psalms45:10 Teerera mukunda, rangarira, urereke nzeve yako; Kanganwawo vanhu vako, neimba yababa vako;" 
Psalms45:11 Ipapo mambo achada kunaka kwako; Nokuti ndiye Ishe wako; unamate kwaari iwe. 
Psalms45:12 Uye mukunda weTiro achavapo nechipo; Vapfumi pakati pavanhu vachakumbira ngoni dzako. 
Psalms45:13 Mukunda wamambo akanaka kwazvo–kwazvo mukati meimba yamambo; Nguo dzake dzakarukwa nendarama. 
Psalms45:14 Uchaperekwa kuna mambo nenguo dzakarukwa dzina mavara; Mhandara, shamwari dzake dzinomutevera, Vachaiswa kwamuri." 
Psalms45:15 Vachaperekwa nomufaro nokufarisisa; Vachapinda mumba mamambo. 
Psalms45:16 Panzvimbo yamadzibaba ako vana vako vachavapo, Vauchaita machinda panyika yose." 
Psalms45:17 Ndichayeudzira zita renyu kusvikira kumarudzi ose; Naizvozvo ndudzi dzavanhu dzichakuvongai nokusingaperi–peri. 
Psalms46:1 Mwari ndiye utiziro hwedu nesimba redu, Ndiye mubatsiri ari pedyo–pedyo panguva dzokumanikidzwa." 
Psalms46:2 Saka hatingatyi, kunyangwe nyika ikashanduka, Uye kunyangwe makomo akabviswa akaiswa mukati mamakungwa;" 
Psalms46:3 Kunyangwe mvura zhinji yawo ikatinhira nokumutswa, Kunyangwe makomo akadedera nokupupuma kwawo." 
Psalms46:4 Rwizi ruripo, rune hova dzinofadza guta raMwari, Iyo nzvimbo tsvene yetabhenakeri dzoWokumusorosoro." 
Psalms46:5 Mwari ari mukati maro; haringazununguswi; Mwari acharibatsira kana utonga hwotsvuka. 
Psalms46:6 Vahedheni vakaita bope, hushe hwakazununguswa; Akataura nenzwi rake, nyika ikanyauka." 
Psalms46:7 Jehovha wehondo anesu; Mwari waJakobho inhare yedu. 
Psalms46:8 Uyai muone mabasa aJehovha, Zvishamiso zvaakaita panyika." 
Psalms46:9 Anogumisa kurwa kusvikira pakuguma kwenyika; Anovhuna uta, nokuvhuna–vhuna pfumo; Anopisa ngoro dzokurwa nomoto." 
Psalms46:10 “Nyararai, muzive kuti ndini Mwari; Ndichava mukuru pakati pavahedheni, ndichava mukuru panyika.”" 
Psalms46:11 Jehovha wehondo anesu; Mwari waJakobho inhare yedu. 
Psalms47:1 Uchirai, imi vanhu vose! Pururudzai kuna Mwari nezwi romufaro mukuru!" 
Psalms47:2 Nokuti Jehovha wokumusoro–soro anotyisa; Ndiye Mambo mukuru panyika yose. 
Psalms47:3 Ndiye anotikundisa ndudzi dzavanhu, Nendudzi pasi petsoka dzedu." 
Psalms47:4 Ndiye anotitsaurira nhaka yedu, Iyo pfuma yaJakobho waanoda." 
Psalms47:5 Mwari akwira nokudanidzira, Jehovha nokurira kwehwamanda." 
Psalms47:6 Imbirai Mwari nziyo dzokurumbidza, muimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza; Imbirai Mambo wedu nziyo dzokurumbidza, muimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms47:7 Nokuti Mwari ndiye Mambo wapasi pose; Muimbirei rwiyo rwakanaka rwokumurumbidza. 
Psalms47:8 Mwari anobata ushe hwavahedheni; Mwari agere pachigaro chake chitsvene choushe. 
Psalms47:9 Machinda avanhu aungana pamwechete navanhu vaMwari waAbhurahamu; Nokuti nhoo dzapasi pose ndedzaMwari; Ndiye mukuru–kuru kwazvo. 
Psalms48:1 Jehovha mukuru, anofanira kurumbidzwa kwazvo, Muguta raMwari wedu, mugomo rake dzvene." 
Psalms48:2 Rakanaka pakukwirira kwaro, mufaro wapasi pose, Ndizvo zvakaita gomo reZioni, pamativi okumusoro, Ndizvo zvakaita guta raMambo mukuru." 
Psalms48:3 Padzimba dzaro dzamambo Mwari wakazviratidza kuti ndiye nhare. 
Psalms48:4 Nokuti tarirai, madzimambo akaungana, Akapfuura pamwechete." 
Psalms48:5 Vakariona, vakashamiswa; Vakavhunduka, vakakurumidza kutiza." 
Psalms48:6 Vakabatwapo nokudedera; Nokurwadziwa, somukadzi anopona." 
Psalms48:7 Munoputsa zvikepe zveTashishi, Nemhepo, inobva mabvazuva." 
Psalms48:8 Sezvatakanzwa, ndizvo zvatakaona Paguta raJehovha wehondo, iro guta raMwari wedu; Mwari acharisimbisa nokusingaperi." 
Psalms48:9 Takafunga unyoro hwenyu, Mwari, Mukati metemberi yenyu." 
Psalms48:10 Sezvakaita zita renyu, Mwari, Ndizvo zvakaitawo kurumbidzwa kwenyu kusvikira kumigumo yapasi pose; Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruzere nokururama." 
Psalms48:11 Gomo reZioni ngarifare, Vakunda vaJudha ngavafare kwazvo, Nokuda kwezvamakatonga." 
Psalms48:12 Poteredzai Zioni, mupote naro, Muverenge shongwe dzaro." 
Psalms48:13 Cherechedzai zvakanaka nhare dzaro, Fambai pakati pedzimba dzaro dzamambo; Kuti muzoudza vazukuru venyu vanotevera." 
Psalms48:14 Nokuti Mwari ndiye Mwari wedu nokusingaperi–peri; Iye achava muperekedzi wedu kusvikira pakufa. 
Psalms49:1 Inzwai chinhu ichi, imi vanhu vose; Teererai, imi mose mugere panyika;" 
Psalms49:2 Imi vaduku navanokudzwa, Vapfumi navarombo pamwechete." 
Psalms49:3 Muromo wangu uchataura uchenjeri; Uye kufunga kwomwoyo wangu kuchava nenjere. 
Psalms49:4 Ndicharerekera nzeve yangu inzwe mufananidzo; Ndichadudza shoko rangu rakavanzika nembira. 
Psalms49:5 Ndichatya neiko pamisi yezvakaipa, Kana zvakaipa, zvavanoda kundidzinga, zvichindikomba?" 
Psalms49:6 Ivo, vanovimba nepfuma yavo, Vanozvikudza pamusoro pokuwanda kwepfuma yavo;" 
Psalms49:7 Hapana angatongodzikinura hama yake, Kana kupa Mwari rudzikinuro pamusoro pake;" 
Psalms49:8 (Nokuti rudzikinuro rwemweya yawo runokosha, Runofanira kuregwa nokusingaperi;)" 
Psalms49:9 Kuti arambe ari mupenyu misi yose, Arege kuona kuora." 
Psalms49:10 Nokuti anoona kuti vachenjeri vanofa, Benzi neasina njere vanopera pamwechete, Vachisiyira vamwe pfuma yavo." 
Psalms49:11 Vanofunga pamwoyo pavo kuti dzimba dzavo dzichagara nokusingaperi, Nougaro hwavo kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose; Nyika dzavo vanodzitumidza mazita avo." 
Psalms49:12 Asi munhu haagari achikudzwa, Akafanana nemhuka dzinopera." 
Psalms49:13 Iyi ndiyo nzira yamapenzi; Kunyangwe zvakadaro vanhu vanovatevera vachitenda zvavanotaura. 
Psalms49:14 Vakatarirwa Sheori samakwai; Rufu ruchava mufudzi wavo; Vakarurama vachabata ushe pamusoro pavo mangwanani; Kunaka kwavo kuchangoparadzwa neSheori, kuti kurege kuva nougaro." 
Psalms49:15 Asi Mwari achadzikinura mweya wangu pasimba reSheori; Nokuti iye achandigamuchira. 
Psalms49:16 Usatya hako iwe kana mumwe munhu achifumiswa, Kana pfuma yeimba yake ichiwedzerwa;" 
Psalms49:17 Nokuti kana achifa hapana chaachaenda nacho; Mukurumbira wake haungaburuki uchimutevera. 
Psalms49:18 Kunyangwe paupenyu hwake waikorokotedza mweya wake, (Kunyangwe vanhu vaikurumbidza kana uchizviitira zvakanaka)," 
Psalms49:19 Achaenda iye kurudzi rwamadzibaba ake; Ivo havangatongooni chiedza nokusingaperi. 
Psalms49:20 Munhu, anokudzwa, asina njere, Akafanana nemhuka dzinopera." 
Psalms50:1 Mwari, iye Mwari, Jehovha, ndiye akataura, Akadana pasi pose kubva pakubuda kwezuva kusvikira pakuvira kwaro." 
Psalms50:2 Mwari akapenya Ari paZioni, iro rakanaka–naka kwazvo." 
Psalms50:3 Mwari wedu anouya, haangarambi anyerere; Moto unoparadza pamberi pake, Dutu guru rinomukomberedza." 
Psalms50:4 Anodana denga kumusoro, Napasi, kuti atongere vanhu vake;" 
Psalms50:5 Unganidzirai vatsvene vangu kwandiri; Ivo vakaita sungano neni nezvibairo. 
Psalms50:6 Kudenga–denga kunodudzira kururama kwake; Nokuti Mwari ndiye mutongi amene. 
Psalms50:7 “Inzwai vanhu vangu, ndichataura; Imi Isiraeri, ndichakupupurirai, Ndini Mwari, iye Mwari wenyu." 
Psalms50:8 Handingakutukiyi pamusoro pezvibairo zvenyu; Zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa zviri pamberi pangu nguva dzose. 
Psalms50:9 Handingatori nzombe paimba yako, Kana nhongo dzembudzi pazvirugu zvako." 
Psalms50:10 Nokuti mhuka dzose, dziri kudondo, ndedzangu, Nemombe pamakomo ane chiuru chamazana." 
Psalms50:11 Ndinoziva shiri dzose dzomumakomo; Mhuka dzose, dziri musango, ndedzangu." 
Psalms50:12 Kana ndaiva nenzara, handizaikuudza iwe; Nokuti nyika ndeyangu, nezvaizere nazvo." 
Psalms50:13 Ko ndingadya nyama yehando, Kana kunwa ropa rembudzi here?" 
Psalms50:14 Bairai Mwari zvibairo zvokuvonga; Uripire Wokumusorosoro mhiko dzako; 
Psalms50:15 Udane kwandiri pazuva rokutambudzika; Ini ndichakurwira, iwe ugondirumbidza.”" 
Psalms50:16 Asi kune akaipa Jehovha anoti, “Iwe ungadudzira seiko zvandakatema, Nokureva sungano yangu nomuromo wako?" 
Psalms50:17 Zvaunovenga kurairwa, Nokurasha mashoko angu shure kwako." 
Psalms50:18 Wakati uchiona mbavha, ukafarirana nayo, Unoshamwaridzana nemhombwe." 
Psalms50:19 Unotendera muromo wako kureva zvakaipa, Rurimi rwako runotaura nhema." 
Psalms50:20 Unogara uchipomera hama yako; Unoita makuhwa pamusoro pomwanakomana wamai vako. 
Psalms50:21 Zvinhu izvi wakazviita, ndikaramba ndinyerere; Wakafunga kuti ini ndakafanana newe chose; Asi ndichakuraira, ndichirongedzera zvinhu izvi pameso ako." 
Psalms50:22 Zvino fungai chinhu ichi, imi vokukanganwa Mwari, Ndirege kukubvamburai, mukashaiwa murwiri," 
Psalms50:23 Munhu, anobayira chibayiro chokuvonga, unondikudza; Uye anogadzira nzira yake zvakanaka Ndichamuratidza kuponesa kwaMwari.”" 
Psalms51:1 Ndinzwirei tsitsi, Mwari nokuda kwounyoro hwenyu; Dzimai kudarika kwangu nokuda kwengoni dzenyu zhinji." 
Psalms51:2 Ndisukei zvakaipa zvangu chose, Ndinatsei chivi changu." 
Psalms51:3 Nokuti ndinoziva kudarika kwangu; Chivi changu chinogara chiri pamberi pangu. 
Psalms51:4 Ndakakutadzirai imi, iyemi moga, Ndakaita chinhu chakaipa pamberi penyu; Kuti munzi makarurama pakutaura kwenyu, Muve asina mhosva pakutonga kwenyu." 
Psalms51:5 Tarirai, ndakaberekerwa muzvakaipa; Mai vangu vakandigamuchira muzvivi." 
Psalms51:6 Tarirai, munoda zvokwadi pamwoyo; Munoda kundidzidzisa uchenjeri mukati makavanda." 
Psalms51:7 Ndinatsei nehisopi, ndive akanaka, Ndishambidzei, ndichene kupfuura mazaya echando." 
Psalms51:8 Ndinzwisei mufaro ndive nomwoyo muchena; Kuti mapfupa amakavhuna afare. 
Psalms51:9 Vanzirai zvivi zvangu chiso chenyu, Dzimai zvakaipa zvangu zvose." 
Psalms51:10 Sikai mukati mangu mwoyo wakachena, Mwari; Vandudzai mukati mangu mweya wakarurama." 
Psalms51:11 Regai kundirasha pamberi penyu; Musabvisa mweya wenyu mutsvene kwandiri. 
Psalms51:12 Dzoseraizve kwandiri mufaro wokuponesa kwenyu; Nditsigirei nomweya, unoda." 
Psalms51:13 Ipapo ndichadzidzisa vadariki nzira dzenyu; Uye vatadzi vachatendeukira kwamuri. 
Psalms51:14 Ndirwirei pamhosva yeropa, Mwari, imi Mwari muponesi wangu; Ipapo rurimi rwangu ruchaimbira kururama kwenyu kwazvo." 
Psalms51:15 Ishe, zarurai miromo yangu; Ipapo muromo wangu uchaparidza kurumbidzwa kwenyu." 
Psalms51:16 Nokuti imi hamufariri zvibairo; ndingadai ndaikupai izvo; Hamufadzwi nechipiriso chinopiswa. 
Psalms51:17 Zvibairo zvaMwari mweya wakaputsika; Mwoyo wakaputsika nowakapwanyika, imi Mwari hamungaushori." 
Psalms51:18 Itirai Zioni zvakanaka nokuda kwenyu; Vakai masvingo eJerusaremu. 
Psalms51:19 Ipapo muchafarira zvibairo zvakarurama, nechipiriso chinopiswa nechipiriso chinopiswa chose; Ipapo vachabayira nzombe paatari yenyu." 
Psalms52:1 Unozvirumbidzireiko nezvakashata, iwe mhare? Tsitsi dzaMwari dziripo misi yose." 
Psalms52:2 Rurimi rwako runofunga kutaura zvakaipa; Rwakafanana nechisvo chinopinza, ruchiita zvinonyengera." 
Psalms52:3 Unoda zvakaipa kupfuura zvakanaka; Nokureva nhema kupfuura kutaura zvakarurama. 
Psalms52:4 Unoda mashoko ose okuparadza, Iwe rurimi runonyengera." 
Psalms52:5 Mwari achakuparadzawo saizvozvo nokusingaperi, Achakubata akakubvisa patende rako, Nokukudzura panyika yavapenyu." 
Psalms52:6 Vakarurama vachazviona vakatya, Vachamuseka, vachiti," 
Psalms52:7 “Tarirai, hoyu munhu asina kuita Mwari nhare yake, Asi akavimba nokuwanda kwepfuma yake, Akazvisimbisa pazvakaipa zvake.”" 
Psalms52:8 Asi kana ndirini, ndakafanana nomuorivhi munyoro mumba yaMwari; Ndinovimba netsitsi dzaMwari nokusingaperi–peri." 
Psalms52:9 Ndichakuvongai nokusingaperi, nokuti ndimi makazviita; Ndichamirira zita renyu pamberi pavatsvene venyu nokuti rakanaka." 
Psalms53:1 Benzi rakati mumwoyo maro, “Mwari hakuna.” Vakaora, vakaita zvakaipa zvinonyangadza; Hakuna anoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms53:2 Mwari, ari kudenga, wakatarira pasi kuvana vavanhu, Kuti aone kana akachenjera aripo, Anotsvaka Mwari." 
Psalms53:3 Mumwe nomumwe wavo akadzokera shure; vakasvibiswa pamwechete; Hakuna anoita zvakanaka, kunyangwe nomumwe." 
Psalms53:4 “Ko vaiti vezvakaipa havana zivo here? Ivo vanodya vanhu vangu sechingwa, Vasingadani kuna Mwari.”" 
Psalms53:5 Vaitya kwazvo ipapo, pakanga pasina chinotyisa; Nokuti Mwari akaparadza mapfupa aiye akanga akakukomba; Iwe wakavanyadzisa, nokuti Mwari akavarasha." 
Psalms53:6 Dai kuponeswa kwaIsiraeri kwaibva paZioni! Kana Mwari achidzosa vanhu vake pakutapwa, Ipapo Jakobho achafara kwazvo naIsiraeri achafara." 
Psalms54:1 Ndirwirei Mwari, nezita renyu, Nditongerei nesimba renyu." 
Psalms54:2 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, Mwari; Rerekerai nzeve yenyu munzwe mashoko omuromo wangu." 
Psalms54:3 Nokuti vatorwa vakandimukira, Vamanikidzi vakatsvaka mweya wangu. Havana kuisa Mwari pamberi pavo." 
Psalms54:4 Tarirai, Mwari ndiye mubatsiri wangu. Ishe ari pakati pavanotsigira mweya wangu." 
Psalms54:5 Achatsiva zvakaipa kuvavengi vangu; Muvaparadze nokutendeka kwenyu. 
Psalms54:6 Ndichakubayirai nechipiriso chokungopa nokuzvidira; Ndichavonga zita renyu, Jehovha, nokuti rakanaka." 
Psalms54:7 Nokuti akandirwira pakutambudzika kwose; Ziso rangu rakaona kukundwa kwavavengi vangu. 
Psalms55:1 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunyengetero wangu, Mwari; Regai kuzvivanza pakukumbira kwangu." 
Psalms55:2 Nditeererei, mundipindure; Ndinoshaiwa zororo mukuchema kwangu, ndichiuura;" 
Psalms55:3 Nokuda kwezwi romuvengi, Nokuda kwokumanikidza kwoakaipa; Nokuti vanondipomera zvakaipa, Vanonditambudza nokutsamwa kwavo." 
Psalms55:4 Mwoyo wangu unorwadziwa kwazvo mukati mangu; Garudzo rorufu rakandiwira," 
Psalms55:5 Kutya nokubvunda zvakandiwira. Kutya kukuru kwakandifukidza. 
Psalms55:6 Ini ndakati, “Haiwa, dai ndaiva namapapiro senjiva! Ndaibhururuka, ndikandozorora." 
Psalms55:7 Tarirai, ndingadai ndaitizira kure, Ndaindogara kurenje." 
Psalms55:8 Ndaikurumidza kundovanda, Nditize mhepo inovhuvhuta nedutu guru.”" 
Psalms55:9 Paradzai, Ishe mukanganise marimi avo; Nokuti ndakaona kumanikidza nokurwa muguta." 
Psalms55:10 Masikati nousiku vanoripoteredza pamasvingo aro; Zvakaipawo nezvakashata zviri mukati maro. 
Psalms55:11 Kushata kuri pakati paro; Kumanikidza nokunyengera hazvibvi panzira dzaro. 
Psalms55:12 Nokuti akanga asi muvengi akandishora; Ipapo ndaigona kutsunga; Akanga asi iye aindivenga akazvikudza kwandiri; Ipapo ndaimuvanda. 
Psalms55:13 Asi wakanga uriwe, munhu wakaenzana neni, Shamwari yangu, nomuzikani wangu." 
Psalms55:14 Taisirangana zvakanaka, Taifamba mumba maMwari pamwechete navanhu vazhinji." 
Psalms55:15 Rufu ngaruvawire kamwe–kamwe, Ngavaburikire kuSheori vari vapenyu; Nokuti kushata kuri paugaro hwavo, imo mukati mavo." 
Psalms55:16 Kana ndirini, ndichadana kuna Mwari; Jehovha achandiponesa." 
Psalms55:17 Madekwana namangwanani namasikati ndichachema ndichiuura; Iye achanzwa izwi rangu. 
Psalms55:18 Wakadzikinura mweya wangu norugare, kukasava nomumwe akaswedera kwandiri; Nokuti vakanga vachirwa neni, vaiva vazhinji." 
Psalms55:19 Mwari achanzwa, achavapindura, Iye aripo kare nakare, Nokuti havashanduki, Havatyi Mwari." 
Psalms55:20 Wakatambanudzira maoko ake kuna vaiva norugare naye; Wakashora sungano yake. 
Psalms55:21 Mashoko omuromo wake akatedza samafuta, Asi kurwa kwakanga kuri pamwoyo pake; Mashoko ake akanga ari manyoro kupfuura mafuta, Kunyangwe zvakadaro yaiva minondo yakavhomorwa." 
Psalms55:22 Kandira mutoro wako pamusoro paJehovha, iye achakusimbisa; Haangatongotenderi akarurama kuti azununguswe." 
Psalms55:23 Asi imi Mwari muchavaburusira kugomba rokuparadzwa; Vanhu vanokarira ropa navanonyengera havangapedzi hafu yamazuva avo; Asi ini ndichavimba nemi. 
Psalms56:1 Ndinzwirei tsitsi, Mwari; nokuti vanhu vanotsvaka kundimedza; Zuva rose vanorwa neni vachindimanikidza." 
Psalms56:2 Vavengi vangu vanoda kundimedza zuva rose; Nokuti vanorwa neni vachizvikudza vazhinji. 
Psalms56:3 Panguva yandinotya, Ndichavimba nemi." 
Psalms56:4 MunaMwari ndicharumbidza shoko rake; Ndakavimba naMwari, handingatyi; Nyama ingandiiteiko?" 
Psalms56:5 Zuva rose vanoshandura mashoko angu; Mifungo yavo yose inondifungira zvakaipa. 
Psalms56:6 Vanoungana, vanovanda, Vanocherechedza makwara angu, Kana vachivandira mweya wangu." 
Psalms56:7 Vachapukunyuka nenzira yezvakaipa here? Paradzai vanhu nokutsamwa kwenyu, Mwari." 
Psalms56:8 Imi munoverenga madzungairiro angu; Isai misodzi yangu mumudziyo yenyu; Haizi murugwaro rwenyu here? 
Psalms56:9 Ipapo vavengi vangu vachadzokera shure nomusi wandinodana; Ndinoziva chinhu ichi, kuti Mwari ari kurutivi rwangu." 
Psalms56:10 MunaMwari ndicharumbidza shoko rake; MunaJehovha ndicharumbidza shoko rake. 
Psalms56:11 Ndakavimba naMwari, handingatyi; Vanhu vangandiiteiko?" 
Psalms56:12 Ndinosungwa nezvandakakupikirai Mwari; Ndichakuvigirai zvipiriso zvokuvonga nazvo. 
Psalms56:13 Nokuti makarwira mweya wangu parufu; Namakumbo angu pakugumburwa. Kuti ndifambe pamberi paMwari Muchiedza choupenyu. 
Psalms57:1 Ndinzwirei tsitsi, Mwari, ndinzwirei tsitsi; Nokuti mweya wangu unotizira kwamuri; Zvirokwazvo, ndichatizira kumumvuri wamapapiro enyu, Kusvikira njodzi dzapfuura." 
Psalms57:2 Ndichadanidzira kuna Mwari Wokumusorosoro; Kuna Mwari anondiitira zvose. 
Psalms57:3 Achatuma mubatsiri ari kudenga, andiponese, Kana iye, anovavarira kundimedza, achindishora; Mwari achatuma tsitsi dzake nezvokwadi yake." 
Psalms57:4 Mweya wangu uri pakati peshumba; Ndinovata pasi pakati pavanopfuta somoto, Ivo vanakomana vavanhu, vana meno anenge mapfumo nemiseve, Uye rurimi rwavo munondo unopinza." 
Psalms57:5 Imi mukudzwe Mwari, pamusoro pokudenga–denga; Kurumbidzwa kwenyu ngakuve kumusoro kwapasi pose." 
Psalms57:6 Vakateyira tsoka dzangu mumbure; Mweya wangu wakakotamiswa; Vakachera hunza pamberi pangu; Vawira mukati mayo vamene. 
Psalms57:7 Mwoyo wangu wakasimba, Mwari, mwoyo wangu wakasimba; Ndichaimba, zvirokwazvo, ndichaimba nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms57:8 Muka iwe mwoyo wangu, muka iwe mutengeranwa nembira; Ini ndimene ndichamuka mangwanani." 
Psalms57:9 Ndichakuvongai, Ishe, pakati pendudzi dzavanhu; Ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza pakati pavahedheni." 
Psalms57:10 Nokuti ngoni dzenyu ihuru kusvikira kudenga–denga, Zvokwadi yenyu inosvikira kudenga rose." 
Psalms57:11 Imi mukudzwe Mwari, kumusoro kwokudenga–denga; Kurumbidzwa kwenyu ngakuve kumusoro kwapasi pose." 
Psalms58:1 Munototaura zvakarurama here, imi vane simba, Munotongera vanakomana vavanhu zvakarurama here?" 
Psalms58:2 Zvirokwazvo, mumwoyo menyu munoita zvakaipa; Munoyerera vanhu pasi pose kumanikidza kwamaoko enyu." 
Psalms58:3 Vakaipa vakava vatorwa kubva padumbu ramai; Vanotsauka vachangozvarwa, vachireva nhema." 
Psalms58:4 Uturu hwavo hwakafanana nouturu hwenyoka; Vakafanana nechiva chisinganzwi, chinodzivira nzeve yacho;" 
Psalms58:5 Chisingateereri izwi ren'anga, Kunyangwe achiimba nouchenjeri hukuru." 
Psalms58:6 Mwari vhunai meno avo mumuromo mavo; Jehovha gurai meno makuru avana veshumba. 
Psalms58:7 Ngavapwe semvura inoyerera; Kana achishumba nemiseve yake, ngaive seyakagurika." 
Psalms58:8 Ngavafanane nehozhwa inonyakatika ichipera; Segambamwedzi romukadzi risina kuona zuva. 
Psalms58:9 Hari dzenyu dzisati dzanzwa moto neweminzwa, Iye achadzibvisa nachamupupuri nyama igere, nomoto pamwechete." 
Psalms58:10 Akarurama achafara kana achiona kutsiva; Achashambidza tsoka dzake muropa ravakaipa. 
Psalms58:11 Naizvozvo vanhu vachiti, “Zvirokwazvo mubairo woakarurama uripo; Zvirokwazvo Mwari aripo, anotonga pasi pose.”" 
Psalms59:1 Ndirwirei pavavengi vangu, Mwari wangu; Ndiisei pakakwirira kure navanondimukira." 
Psalms59:2 Ndirwirei pavaiti vezvakaipa, Ndiponesei pavanhu veropa." 
Psalms59:3 Nokuti tarirai, vanovandira mweya wangu; Vane simba vakaungana kuzorwa neni; Hakuzi nokuda kwokudarika kwangu kana kwezvivi zvangu, Jehovha." 
Psalms59:4 Vanomhanya nokuzvigadzira, ini ndisina mhosva hangu; Mukai mundibatsire, muone." 
Psalms59:5 Iyemi Jehovha, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, Mukai mushanyire vahedheni vose; Musanzwira tsitsi mudariki upi noupi akaipa." 
Psalms59:6 Vanodzoka madekwana, vanoudza sembwa, Vanopota neguta." 
Psalms59:7 Tarirai, vanodzvova nemiromo yavo; Minondo iri pamiromo yavo; Nokuti vanoti, “Ndianiko anganzwa?”" 
Psalms59:8 Asi imi Jehovha muchavaseka; Muchadadira vahedheni vose. 
Psalms59:9 Imi simba rangu, ndichakumirirai; Nokuti Mwari ndiye nhare yangu yakakwirira." 
Psalms59:10 Mwari wangu achandichingura netsitsi dzake; Mwari achandionesa kukundwa kwavavengi vangu. 
Psalms59:11 Musavauraya, kuti vanhu vangu varege kukanganwa; Muvaparadzire nesimba renyu, muvawisire pasi, Ishe nhoo yedu." 
Psalms59:12 Nokuda kwechivi chomuromo wavo, namashoko emiromo yavo, Ngavabatwe pakuzvikudza kwavo, Uye nokuda kwokutuka nenhema dzavanotaura." 
Psalms59:13 Vapedzei nehasha, vapedzei, varege kuzovapo; Ngavazive kuti Mwari anobata ushe pakati paJakobho, Kusvikira kumigumo yenyika." 
Psalms59:14 Panguva yamadekwana ngavadzoke, ngavaudze sembwa, Ngavapote–pote neguta." 
Psalms59:15 Vachadzungaira vachitsvaka zvokudya, Vachagara usiku hwose kana vasingaguti." 
Psalms59:16 Asi ini ndichaimba ndichireva simba renyu; Zvirokwazvo ndicharumbidza tsitsi dzenyu mangwanani; Nokuti makanga muri nhare yangu yakakwirira, Noutiziro hwangu pazuva rokutambudzika kwangu." 
Psalms59:17 Ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza, imi simba rangu; Nokuti Mwari ndiye nhare yangu yakakwirira, iye Mwari anondinzwira tsitsi." 
Psalms60:1 Mwari, makatirasha, makatiparadza; Makanga makatsamwa; Haiwa, tidzorei." 
Psalms60:2 Makabvundisa nyika; makaitsemura; Gadzirai mitswe yayo; nokuti inozununguka. 
Psalms60:3 Makaratidza vanhu venyu zvinhu zvinorema; Makatinwisa waini inobata. 
Psalms60:4 Makapa vanokutyai mureza, Kuti uratidzwe nokuda kwezvokwadi." 
Psalms60:5 Kuti vadikanwi venyu varwirwe, Tiponesei noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, mutipindure." 
Psalms60:6 Mwari akataura pautsvene hwake, achiti, “Ndichafara kwazvo; Ndichaganhura Shekemu, ndichayera mupata weSukoti." 
Psalms60:7 Gireadhi ndeyangu Manase ndeyangu; Efuremuwo inhawiro yomusoro wangu; Judha ndiyo tsvimbo yangu youshe. 
Psalms60:8 Moabhu ndiwo mudziyo wangu wokushambidzira; Pamusoro peEdhomu ndipo pandichakandira shangu yangu; Iwe Firisitia, pururudza nokuda kwangu.”" 
Psalms60:9 Ndianiko achandiisa muguta rakasimba? Ndianiko achandiperekedza ndiende Edhomu? 
Psalms60:10 Hamuna kutirasha here, Mwari? Hamubudi Mwari, nehondo dzedu." 
Psalms60:11 Tibatsirei pamudzivisi wedu; Nokuti kubatsira kwavanhu hakuna maturo. 
Psalms60:12 Muna Mwari tichaita noumhare; Nokuti ndiye achatsika vadzivisi vedu pasi. 
Psalms61:1 Inzwai kuchema kwangu, Mwari, Teererai munyengetero wangu." 
Psalms61:2 Ndichadana kwamuri ndiri pamugumo wapasi, kana mwoyo wangu waziya; Ndiperekedzerei kudombo randisingasvikiri." 
Psalms61:3 Nokuti imi makanga muri utiziro hwangu, Neshongwe yangu yakasimba kwandingatiza muvengi wangu." 
Psalms61:4 Ndichagara patende renyu nokusingaperi; Ndichavanda munyasi mamapapiro enyu. 
Psalms61:5 Nokuti imi Mwari makanzwa mhiko dzangu; Makadzosa nhaka yavanotya zita renyu. 
Psalms61:6 Muchawedzera mazuva oupenyu hwamambo; Makore ake achaenzana naamarudzi mazhinji. 
Psalms61:7 Achagara pamberi paMwari nokusingaperi; Mumugadzirire unyoro nezvokwadi, kuti zvimuchengete." 
Psalms61:8 Naizvozvo ndichaimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokurumbidza nokusingaperi, Kuti ndiite mhiko dzangu zuva rimwe nerimwe." 
Psalms62:1 Zvirokwazvo, mweya wangu unongorindira Mwari; Kwaari ndiko kunobva kuponeswa kwangu." 
Psalms62:2 Ndiye oga dombo rangu nomuponesi wangu; Ndiye shongwe yangu yakakwirira; handingazununguswi zvikuru. 
Psalms62:3 Muchavavarira munhu kusvikira rinhiko, Kuti mumuuraye imi mose, Sorusvingo runoda kuwa, noruzhowa runotseyama?" 
Psalms62:4 Vanongorangana kuti vamusundire pasi abve paukuru hwake; Vanofarira nhema; Vanoropafadza nomuromo wavo, asi vanotuka mumwoyo mavo." 
Psalms62:5 Mweya wangu, rindira Mwari zvirokwazvo; Nokuti ndinomutarira iye." 
Psalms62:6 Ndiye oga dombo rangu noruponeso rwangu; Ndiye shongwe yangu yakakwirira; handingazununguswi. 
Psalms62:7 Kuna Mwari ndiko kuno kuponeswa kwangu nokukudzwa kwangu; Dombo resimba rangu noutiziro hwangu zviri kuna Mwari. 
Psalms62:8 Vimbai naye nguva dzose, imi vanhu; Dururai mwoyo yenyu pamberi pake; Mwari ndiye utiziro hwedu." 
Psalms62:9 Zvirokwazvo vanhu vasingakudzwi mweya chete, uye vanhu vanokudzwa inhema; Pakuyerwa havaremi; Vose pamwechete vakareruka kupfuura mweya." 
Psalms62:10 Regai kuvimba nokumanikidza, Regai kuzvikudza pamusoro pokupambara; Kana pfuma ichiwanda, regai kuinamatira nomwoyo." 
Psalms62:11 Mwari akataura kamwechete, Ndakazvinzwa kaviri; Kuti simba nderaMwari;" 
Psalms62:12 Netsitsiwo ndedzenyu, Ishe; Nokuti munoitira munhu mumwe nomumwe sezvaakabata." 
Psalms63:1 Mwari, imi muri Mwari wangu; ndichakutsvakai mangwanani; Mweya wangu une nyota kwamuri, nyama yangu inokushuvai, Panyika yakaoma, inonzwisa nyota, isina mvura." 
Psalms63:2 Naizvozvo ndakatarira kwamuri panzvimbo tsvene, Kuti ndione simba renyu nokubwinya kwenyu." 
Psalms63:3 Nokuti unyoro hwenyu hunokunda upenyu; Miromo yangu ichakurumbidzai. 
Psalms63:4 Naizvozvo ndichakuvongai ndichiri mupenyu; Ndichasimudza maoko angu nezita renyu. 
Psalms63:5 Mweya wangu uchaguta nezvinenge mongo namafuta; Muromo wangu uchakurumbidzai nemiromo inofara kwazvo; 
Psalms63:6 Kana ndichikurangarirai panhoo yangu, Ndichikufungai panguva dzousiku." 
Psalms63:7 Nokuti makanga muri mubatsiri wangu, Pamumvuri wamapapiro enyu ndipo pandichafara kwazvo." 
Psalms63:8 Mweya wangu unokunamatirai nesimba rose; Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runonditsigira. 
Psalms63:9 Asi avo, vanotsvaka kuparadza mweya wangu, Vachapinda munzvimbo dzapasi dzenyika." 
Psalms63:10 Vachaiswa pasimba romunondo; Vachava mugove wamakava. 
Psalms63:11 Asi mambo achafara muna Mwari; Mumwe nomumwe anopika naye achafara kwazvo; Nokuti muromo wavanoreva nhema uchadzivirwa. 
Psalms64:1 Inzwai izwi rangu, Mwari, pakuchema kwangu; Chengetai upenyu hwangu ndirege kutyiswa nomuvengi." 
Psalms64:2 Ndivanzei pakurangana kwakavanda kwavanoita zvakaipa; Pabope ravanobata zvakaipa; 
Psalms64:3 Ivo vakarodza rurimi rwavo somunondo, Vakashumba miseve yavo, iwo mashoko anovava;" 
Psalms64:4 Kuti vafure akarurama, vakavanda ivo; Kamwe–kamwe vanomufura, vasingatyi." 
Psalms64:5 Vanotsungirira pazano rakaipa; Vanorangana kuteya misungo pakavanda; Vanoti, “Ndianiko angazviona?”" 
Psalms64:6 Vanofungisa zvakaipa; Vanoti, “Tapedza kufungisa zano guru;” Kufunga kwomukati kwomumwe nomumwe, nomwoyo, zvakadzika." 
Psalms64:7 Asi Mwari achavapfura, Vachakuvadzwa kamwe–kamwe nomuseve." 
Psalms64:8 Naizvozvo vachagumbuswa, ndimi dzavo dzichivapupurira zvakaipa; Vose vanovaona vachadzungudza musoro." 
Psalms64:9 Vanhu vose vachatya; Vachaparidza basa raMwari, Vachicherechedza zvakanaka zvaanoita." 
Psalms64:10 Vakarurama vachafara muna Jehovha, vachavimba naye; Vose vane mwoyo yakarurama vachafara kwazvo." 
Psalms65:1 Imi Mwari munofanira kurumbidzwa paZioni; Imi munofanira kuitirwa mhiko. 
Psalms65:2 Imi vokunzwa munyengetero, Vanhu vose vanofanira kuuya kwamuri." 
Psalms65:3 Mashoko akaipa ondikunda; Kana kuri kudarika kwedu muchakudzima imi. 
Psalms65:4 Akaropafadzwa munhu wamunosanangura, wamunoswededza kwamuri, Kuti agare pavazhe dzenyu; Isu tichagutiswa nounaki hweimba yenyu, Iyo nzvimbo tsvene yetemberi yenyu." 
Psalms65:5 Mukururama kwenyu munotipindura nezvinhu zvinotyisa, Imi Mwari muponesi wedu; Imi chivimbo chamativi ose apasi, Navari kure pagungwa;" 
Psalms65:6 Iye, anoteya makomo nesimba rake; Iye, akasungwa chiuno nesimba;" 
Psalms65:7 Iye, unonyaradza kutinhira kwamakungwa, iko kutinhira kwamafungo awo, Nokupopota kwavanhu." 
Psalms65:8 Naivo vagere kumigumo vanotya zviratidzo zvenyu; Munofadza mabudiro amangwanani noousiku. 
Psalms65:9 Munoshanyira pasi, munopadiridza, Munopafumisa kwazvo; Rwizi rwaMwari ruzere nemvura; Munovagadzirira zviyo, kana magadzira pasi saizvozvo." 
Psalms65:10 Munozadza mihoronga yapo kwazvo; Munoenzanisa mipanje yapo; Munopanyorovesa nemvura inopfunha; Munoropafadza zvinomera zvapo. 
Psalms65:11 Munoshongedza mwaka nekorona younaki hwenyu; Makwara enyu anodonha mafuta. 
Psalms65:12 Anodonha pamafuro erenje; Zvikomo zvinozvisunga nomufaro. 
Psalms65:13 Mafuro akafukidzwa namapoka ezvipfuwo; Uye mipatawo yakafukidzwa nezviyo; Zvinopururudza, zvichiimbawo." 
Psalms66:1 Pururudzai kuna Mwari, imi nyika dzose;" 
Psalms66:2 Imbirai mukurumbira wezita rake; Rumbidzai kudzo yake. 
Psalms66:3 Itiyi kuna Mwari, “Mabasa enyu anotyisa sei! Vavengi venyu vachazviisa pasi penyu nemhaka youkuru hwesimba renyu." 
Psalms66:4 Pasi pose pachanamata kwamuri, Pachakuimbirai; Vachaimbira zita renyu.”" 
Psalms66:5 Uyai, muone mabasa aMwari; Anotyisa pane zvaanoitira vana vavanhu." 
Psalms66:6 Akashandura gungwa rikava nyika yakaoma; Vakayambuka rwizi netsoka; Ipapo takafara maari. 
Psalms66:7 Anobata ushe nokusingaperi nesimba rake; Meso ake anocherechedza ndudzi; Vanomumukira ngavarege kuzvikudza. 
Psalms66:8 Vongai Mwari, imi vanhu, Izwi rokumurumbidza ngarinzwike;" 
Psalms66:9 Iye anopa mweya upenyu, Asingatenderi tsoka dzedu kuti dzitedzemuke." 
Psalms66:10 Nokuti imi Mwari makatiidza; Makatiidza sezvinoidzwa sirivha. 
Psalms66:11 Makatipinza pamumbure; Makatitakudza mutoro unorema pazviuno zvedu. 
Psalms66:12 Makafambisa vanhu pamusoro pemisoro yedu; Takapinda nomumoto nemvura; Asi makatibudisa kunzvimbo ine zvakawanda. 
Psalms66:13 Ndichapinda mumba menyu nezvipiriso zvinopiswa, Ndichakuitirai mhiko dzangu," 
Psalms66:14 Dzakarehwa nemiromo yangu, Dzakataurwa nomuromo wangu pakutambudzika kwangu." 
Psalms66:15 Ndichakubairai zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvezvakakora, Nezvinonhuwira zvamakondohwe; Ndichabayira nzombe pamwechete nembudzi." 
Psalms66:16 Uyai munzwe, imi mose munotya Mwari, Ndichakududzirai zvaakaitira mweya wangu." 
Psalms66:17 Ndakachema kwaari nomuromo wangu, Akarumbidzwa zvikuru norurimi rwangu." 
Psalms66:18 Kana ndikarangarira zvakaipa mumwoyo mangu, Ishe haangandinzwi;" 
Psalms66:19 Asi zvirokwazvo Mwari akanzwa; Akateerera izwi rokunyengetera kwangu. 
Psalms66:20 Mwari ngaavongwe, Iye asina kuramba munyengetero wangu, kana kubvisa tsitsi yake kwandiri." 
Psalms67:1 Mwari ngaatinzwire tsitsi, atiropafadze, Ngaativhenekere nechiso chake;" 
Psalms67:2 Kuti nzira yenyu izikanwe pasi, Nokuponesa kwenyu pakati pendudzi dzose." 
Psalms67:3 Vanhu ngavakuvongei, Mwari; Vanhu vose ngavakuvongei." 
Psalms67:4 Ndudzi ngadzifare, ngadziimbe nomufaro; Nokuti muchatonga vanhu nokururama, Muchafambisa ndudzi pasi." 
Psalms67:5 Vanhu ngavakuvongei Mwari; Vanhu vose ngavakuvongei. 
Psalms67:6 Pasi pakabereka zvibereko zvapo; Mwari, iye Mwari wedu, achatiropafadza." 
Psalms67:7 Mwari achatiropafadza; Nemigumo yose yapasi ichamutya. 
Psalms68:1 Mwari ngaasimuke, vavengi vake ngavaparadzirwe; Vanomuvenga ngavatize pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:2 Muvadzinge, sokudzingwa kwoutsi; Sokunyauka kwenamo pamoto, Saizvozvo vakaipa ngavapere pamberi paMwari." 
Psalms68:3 Asi vakarurama ngavafare; ngavafare kwazvo pamberi paMwari; Ngavafare nokufara kukuru. 
Psalms68:4 Imbirai Mwari, imbirai zita rake nziyo dzokurumbidza; Mumugadzirire mugwagwa wakanaka, iye anofamba nengoro napamarenje; Zita rake ndiJehovha; farai kwazvo pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:5 Baba venherera, nomutongi wemhosva dzechirikadzi, Ndiye Mwari paugaro hwake hutsvene." 
Psalms68:6 Vakanga vari voga, Mwari anovagarisa pamhuri; Anobudisira vasungwa kumufaro; Asi vanomumukira vanogara panyika yakaoma." 
Psalms68:7 Mwari, panguva yamakatungamirira vanhu venyu, Panguva yokufamba kwenyu murenje;" 
Psalms68:8 Pasi pakabvunda, Kudenga–denga kwakadonha pamberi paMwari; Nairo Sinai rakabvunda pamberi paMwari, iye Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Psalms68:9 Imi Mwari makanaisa mvura zhinji, Makasimbisa nhaka yenyu panguva yokuneta kwayo." 
Psalms68:10 Ungano yenyu yakagaramo; Imi Mwari makagadzirira varombo zvakanaka zvenyu. 
Psalms68:11 Ishe akataura shoko, Vakadzi vakaparidza shoko vaiva vazhinji zhinji." 
Psalms68:12 Madzimambo ehondo anotiza, Mukadzi akasara kumusha ndiye anogovera zvakapambwa." 
Psalms68:13 Kana imi movata pasi pakati pamatanga amakwai, Zvakafanana namapapiro enjiva akafukidzwa nesirivha, Neminhenga yakafukidzwa nendarama tsvuku." 
Psalms68:14 Panguva iyo waMasimbaose yaakaparadza madzimambomo, Zvakafanana nokuwa kwechando paZarimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Gomo reBhashani igomo raMwari; Gomo reBhashani igomo refu–refu. 
Psalms68:16 Imi makomo marefu, munogodorerei Iro gomo rakadikanwa naMwari kuti agare mariri? Jehovha achagara mariri nokusingaperi." 
Psalms68:17 Ngoro dzaMwari dzinosvika zviuru zvina makumi maviri, zviuru zvezviuru zvamazana; Ishe ari pakati padzo, sezvaakaita paSinai, panzvimbo tsvene." 
Psalms68:18 Makakwira kumusoro, mukatapa vatapwa venyu; Makagamuchira zvipo pakati pavanhu Zvirokwazvo pakati pavakakumukiraiwo, kuti Jehovha Mwari agare navo." 
Psalms68:19 Ishe ngaavongwe, iye anotakura mitoro yedu zuva rimwe nerimwe, Iye Mwari muponesi wedu." 
Psalms68:20 Mwari ndiye Mwari anotirwira; Jehovha Ishe ndiye ane nzira dzokubuda murufu. 
Psalms68:21 Asi Mwari achatema misoro yavavengi vake, Paganda romusoro rine vhudzi romunhu anorambira pakutadza kwake." 
Psalms68:22 Ishe akati, “Ndichavadzosa paBhashani, Ndichavadzosazve pagungwa rakadzika;" 
Psalms68:23 Kuti unyike rutsoka rwako muropa, Kuti ndimi dzembwa dzako dzive nomugove wadzo pavavengi vako.”" 
Psalms68:24 Vakaona mafambiro enyu, Mwari, Mafambiro aMwari wangu, Mambo wangu, achipinda panzvimbo tsvene." 
Psalms68:25 Vaimbi vakatungamira, varidzi vemitengeranwa vakatevera, Pakati pavasikana vakanga vachiridza makandira." 
Psalms68:26 Rumbidzai Mwari paungano, Iye Ishe, iyemi vetsime raIsiraeri." 
Psalms68:27 Bhenjamini muduku, mubati wavo, aripo, Namachinda aJudha navazhinji vavo, Namachinda aZebhuruni, namachinda aNafutari." 
Psalms68:28 Mwari wako akaraira simba rake; Simbisai, Mwari, izvo zvamakatiitira." 
Psalms68:29 Nokuda kwetemberi yenyu paJerusaremu Madzimambo achakuvigirai zvipo. 
Psalms68:30 Tukai chikara chetsanga, Hando zhinji, nemhuru dzendudzi dzavanhu, Vazviwisire pasi petsoka nemari yesirivha; Muparadzire vanhu vanofarira kurwa." 
Psalms68:31 Machinda achabuda Ijipiti; Itiopia ichakurumidza kutambanudza maoko ayo kuna Mwari. 
Psalms68:32 Imbirai Mwari, imi ushe hwapasi; Imbirai Ishe nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms68:33 Iye anotasva padenga rokudenga–denga, iro rakare nakare; Inzwai, anobudisa izwi rake, izwi rine simba." 
Psalms68:34 Ipai Mwari simba; Ukuru hwake huri pamusoro paIsiraeri, Simba rake riri mumakore." 
Psalms68:35 Imi Mwari munotyisa panzvimbo dzenyu tsvene; Mwari waIsiraeri ndiye anopa vanhu vake simba noushe. Mwari ngaavongwe. 
Psalms69:1 Ndiponesei, Mwari, Nokuti mvura zhinji yasvikira pamweya wangu." 
Psalms69:2 Ndinonyura munhope yakadzika, pasina pokumira; Ndakasvika pamvura zhinji yakadzika, pandinofukidzwa nenzizi." 
Psalms69:3 Ndaneta nokuchema kwangu; huro dzangu dzaoma; Meso angu anovava nokurindira Mwari wangu. 
Psalms69:4 Vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vazhinji kupfuura vhudzi romusoro wangu; Avo vanoda kundiparadza vane simba, kunyangwe vachindivenga ndisina mhosva; Ndakafanira kudzosera zvandinenge ndisina kutora." 
Psalms69:5 Mwari munoziva upenzi hwangu; Mhosva dzangu hadzina kukuvanzirwai. 
Psalms69:6 Ishe Mwari wehondo, vanokurindirai ngavarege kunyadziswa nokuda kwangu; Mwari waIsiraeri, vanokutsvakai ngavarege kuzvidzwa nokuda kwangu." 
Psalms69:7 Nokuti ndakatenda kushorwa nokuda kwenyu; Kunyadza kwakafukidza chiso changu. 
Psalms69:8 Ndakava mutorwa kuhama dzangu, Nomubvakure kuvana vamai vangu." 
Psalms69:9 Nokuti kushingairira imba yenyu kwakandipedza; Nokushora, kwavanokushorai kwakawira pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms69:10 Panguva yokuchema kwangu nokutambudza mweya wangu ndichizvinyima, Ndakashorwa nokuda kwazvo." 
Psalms69:11 Panguva yandakafuka masaga ndikaaita nguo dzangu, Ndakava tsumo pakati pavo." 
Psalms69:12 Vanogara pasuwo vanondireva; Ndiri chiimbo chavakabatwa nedoro. 
Psalms69:13 Asi kana ndirini, munyengetero wangu uri kwamuri, Ishe, panguva yakafanira; Mwari, netsitsi dzenyu zhinji Ndipindurei nokuponesa kwenyu kwakatendeka." 
Psalms69:14 Ndirwirei munhope, ndirege kunyura; Ndirwirwe kuna vanondivenga, napamvura zhinji yakadzika." 
Psalms69:15 Boporodzi remvura rirege kundikunda, Mvura yakadzika irege kundimedza; Gomba rirege kuzarira muromo waro pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms69:16 Ndipindurei, Jehovha; nokuti unyoro hwenyu hwakanaka; Ringirai kwandiri nokuda kwetsitsi dzenyu zhinji." 
Psalms69:17 Regai kuvanzira muranda wenyu chiso chenyu; Nokuti ndiri pakutambudzika; kurumidzai kundipindura. 
Psalms69:18 Swederai kumweya wangu, muudzikinure; Ndidzikinurei nokuda kwavavengi vangu." 
Psalms69:19 Munoziva kushorwa kwangu, nokunyadzwa kwangu nokuzvidzwa kwangu; Vadzivisi vangu vose vari mberi kwangu." 
Psalms69:20 Kushora kwakaputsa mwoyo wangu; ndaremerwa kwazvo; Ndakatsvaka vangandinzwira nyasha, asi kwakanga kusina munhu; Ndakatsvaka vavaraidzi, asi handina kuwana nomumwe." 
Psalms69:21 Vakandipa nduru zvive zvokudya zvangu; Pakunzwa nyota kwangu vakandinwisa vhiniga. 
Psalms69:22 Tafura yavo ngaive musungo pamberi pavo; Neriva, kana vakagarika havo." 
Psalms69:23 Meso avo ngaapofomadzwe, varege kuona, Zviuno zvavo ngazvirambe zvichiguda–guda." 
Psalms69:24 Dururai kutsamwa kwenyu pamusoro pavo, Hasha dzenyu dzinopfuta, ngadzivabate." 
Psalms69:25 Ugaro hwavo ngahuparadzwe; Ngakurege kuva nomunhu anogara pamatende avo. 
Psalms69:26 Nokuti vanotambudza uyo wamakarova; Vanotaura zvokurwadziwa kwavaya vamakakuvadza. 
Psalms69:27 Wedzerai zvakaipa pazvakaipa zvavo; Ngavarege kupinda pakururama kwenyu. 
Psalms69:28 Ngavadzimwe parugwaro rwoupenyu, Varege kunyorwa pamwechete navakarurama." 
Psalms69:29 Asi ini ndiri murombo, ndinorwadziwa; Kuponesa kwenyu, Mwari, ngakundiise pakakwirira."
