Psalms69:30 Ndicharumbidza zita raMwari norwiyo, Ndichamukudza nokuvonga." 
Psalms69:31 Izvo zvichafadza Jehovha kupfuura nzombe, Kana hando ine nyanga namahwanda." 
Psalms69:32 Vanyoro vakazviona vakafara; Imi munotsvaka Mwari, mwoyo yenyu ngairarame." 
Psalms69:33 Nokuti Jehovha anonzwa vashaiwi, Haashori vasungwa vake." 
Psalms69:34 Kudenga napasi ngazvimurumbidze, Makungwa, nezvose zvinopfakanyikamo." 
Psalms69:35 Nokuti Mwari achaponesa Zioni, nokuvaka maguta aJudha; Vachagaramo, ive nhaka yavo." 
Psalms69:36 Ichava nhaka yavana vavaranda vake; Vanoda zita rake vachagaramo. 
Psalms70:1 Kurumidzai, Mwari, kundirwira; Kurumidzai kundibatsira, Jehovha." 
Psalms70:2 Ngavanyadziswe, ngavazvidzwe Ivo vanotsvaka mweya wangu; Ngavadzoserwe shure, vashoorwe Ivo vanofarira kundikuvadza." 
Psalms70:3 Ngavadzoserwe shure nokuda kwenyadzi dzavo Ivo vanoti, “Hekani, hekani! Waro!”" 
Psalms70:4 Vose vanokutsvakai ngavafarise vave nomufaro mamuri; Vanoda kuponesa kwenyu ngavarambe vachiti, “Mwari ngaakudzwe!”" 
Psalms70:5 Asi ini ndiri murombo nomushaiwi; Kurumidzai muuye kwandiri, Mwari; Imi muri mubatsiri wangu nomurwiri wangu; Regai kunonoka, Jehovha." 
Psalms71:1 Jehovha, ndinovimba nemi; Ngandirege kutongonyadziswa." 
Psalms71:2 Ndirwirei mukururama kwenyu, ndisunungurei; Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri, mundiponese." 
Psalms71:3 Ivai dombo rangu mandingagara, kwandingaramba ndichienda; Makaraira kuti ndiponeswe; Nokuti ndimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu." 
Psalms71:4 Ndisunungurei, Mwari wangu, paruoko rwowakaipa, Paruoko rwousina kururama nomunhu anomanikidza." 
Psalms71:5 Nokuti imi, Ishe Jehovha, muri tariro yangu; Ndimi wandinovimba naye kubva pauduku hwangu." 
Psalms71:6 Ndakatsigirwa nemi kubva pachizvaro; Ndimi makandibudisa padumbu ramai vangu; Ndichakurumbidzai. 
Psalms71:7 Ndiri chishamiso kuna vazhinji; Asi imi muri utiziro hwangu hwakasimba. 
Psalms71:8 Muromo wangu uchazadzwa nerumbidzo yenyu, Nekudzo yenyu zuva rose." 
Psalms71:9 Regai kundirasha panguva yokukwegura kwangu; Musandisiya kana ndapera simba. 
Psalms71:10 Nokuti vavengi vangu vanondireva; Vanogarira mweya wangu, vanorangana," 
Psalms71:11 Vachiti, “Mwari amusiya; Teverai, mumubate; nokuti hakuna ungamurwira.”" 
Psalms71:12 Mwari, regai kuva kure neni; Mwari wangu, kurumidzai kundibatsira." 
Psalms71:13 Avo vanodzivisa mweya wangu ngavanyadziswe vapere; Vanotsvaka kundikuvadza ngavafukidzwe nokushorwa nokuzvidzwa. 
Psalms71:14 Asi ini ndicharamba ndichitarira, Ndicharamba ndichiwedzera kukurumbidzai." 
Psalms71:15 Muromo wangu uchareva kururama kwenyu, Nokuponesa kwenyu zuva rose; Nokuti handizivi kuwanda kwazvo." 
Psalms71:16 Ndichauya namabasa ane simba aShe aJehovha; Ndichaparidza kururama kwenyu, iko kwenyu kwoga." 
Psalms71:17 Mwari, makandidzidzisa kubva paujaya hwangu; Kusvikira zvino ndadudzira mabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms71:18 Haiwa, kusvikira ndakwegura ndachena vhudzi, Mwari regai kundisiya; Kusvikira ndadudzira simba renyu kurudzi runouya, Nesimba renyu kunomumwe nomumwe anozouya." 
Psalms71:19 Kururama kwenyuwo, Mwari, kuri kumusoro–soro; Iyemi makaita zvinhu zvikuru, Mwari, ndianiko akafanana nemi?" 
Psalms71:20 Iyemi makatiratidza madambudzo mazhinji akaipa, Ndimi muchatiraramisazve, Nokutikwidzazve tibve pakudzika kwapasi." 
Psalms71:21 Wedzerai hukuru hwangu, Dzokaizve mundinyaradze." 
Psalms71:22 Ndichakurumbidzaiwo nemitengeranwa, Naiyo zvokwadi yenyu, Mwari wangu; Ndichakuimbirai imi nziyo dzokurumbidza nembira, Iyemi Mutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Psalms71:23 Miromo yangu ichafara kwazvo kana ndichikuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza; Nomweya wangu wamakadzikinura. 
Psalms71:24 Rurimi rwanguo ruchataura zuva rose zvokururama kwenyu; Nokuti vanotsvaka kundikuvadza vanyadziswa, vazvidzwa." 
Psalms72:1 Ipai mambo zvamakatonga, Mwari, Nokururama kwenyu kumwanakomana wamambo." 
Psalms72:2 Achatongera vanhu venyu nokururama, Navarombo venyu achavaruramisira." 
Psalms72:3 Makomo nezvikomo achavigira vanhu rugare, nokururama." 
Psalms72:4 Achatongera varombo vavanhu, Achaponesa vana vavashaiwi, Nokupwanya mumanikidzi." 
Psalms72:5 Vachakutyai kana zuva richipo, Uye kana mwedzi uchipo, kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms72:6 Achaburuka iye semvura pauswa hwakagurirwa; Semvura inonaya ichidiridza pasi. 
Psalms72:7 Nemisi yake akarurama achakura zvakanaka; Rugare rwakawanda ruchavapo, kusvikira mwedzi waguma." 
Psalms72:8 Achabata ushe kubva pagungwa kusvikira pagungwa, Nokubva paRwizi kusvikira kumigumo yapasi." 
Psalms72:9 Vagere pamarenje vachapfugama pamberi pake; Vavengi vake vachananzva guruva. 
Psalms72:10 Madzimambo eTashishi neezvivi achauya nezvipo; Madzimambo eShebha neSebha vachamuvigira zvipo; 
Psalms72:11 Zvirokwazvo, madzimambo ose achawira pasi pamberi pake; Ndudzi dzose dzichamushumira." 
Psalms72:12 Nokuti acharwira mushaiwi kana achidanidzira; Nomurombo asina mubatsiri. 
Psalms72:13 Achanzwira nyasha murombo nomushaiwi, Achaponesa mweya yavashaiwi." 
Psalms72:14 Achadzikinura mweya yavo pakutambudzika napakumanikidzwa; Ropa ravo richava chinhu chinokosha pamberi pake; 
Psalms72:15 Iye achararama, achapiwa ndarama yeShebha; Vanhu vacharamba vachimunyengeterera; Vachamuvonga zuva rose." 
Psalms72:16 Kuchava nezviyo zvizhinji pasi pamusoro pamakomo; Zvibereko zvazvo zvichavhunga seRebhanoni; Vanogara paguta vachakura souswa pasi. 
Psalms72:17 Zita rake richavapo nokusingaperi; Zita rake richagara riripo panguva yose yokuvapo kwezuva; Vanhu vacharopafadzwa maari; Ndudzi dzose dzichati, “Ano mufaro.”" 
Psalms72:18 Jehovha Mwari, iye Mwari waIsiraeri, ngaarumbidzwe, Iye oga anoita zvinoshamisa." 
Psalms72:19 Zita rake rinobwinya ngarirumbidzwe nokusingaperi; Pasi pose ngapazadzwe nokubwinya kwenyu. Ameni, Ameni." 
Psalms72:20 Minyengetero yaDhavhidhi mwanakomana waJese yapera. 
Psalms73:1 Zvirokwazvo Mwari anoitira Isiraeri zvakanaka, Ivo vane mwoyo yakachena." 
Psalms73:2 Asi kana ndirini, tsoka dzangu dzakanga dzotsauka; Makumbo angu akanga otedzemuka." 
Psalms73:3 Nokuti ndakanga ndichigodora vana manyawi, Pakuona kwangu kufara kwavakaipa." 
Psalms73:4 Nokuti havatambudziki pakufa kwavo; Asi muviri wavo une simba. 
Psalms73:5 Havana njodzi savamwe vanhu; Havatambudzwi savamwe vanhu. 
Psalms73:6 Saka kuzvikudza kwavo kwakafanana noruketani pamitsipa yavo; Kumanikidza kunovafukidza senguo. 
Psalms73:7 Meso avo anobuda nokukora; Zvavanofunga pamwoyo zvinofashamira; 
Psalms73:8 Vanoseka, vachireva pakuipa kwavo zvinomanikidza vamwe; Vanotaura vachizvikudza." 
Psalms73:9 Vakataurira kudenga nemiromo yavo, Ndimi dzavo dzinofamba–famba pasi." 
Psalms73:10 Saka vanhu vake vanodzokera ikoko; Vanosvinirwa mvura zhinji, mukombe uzere." 
Psalms73:11 Zvino vanoti, “Mwari angaziva seiko? Wokumusorosoro angava nokuziva here?”" 
Psalms73:12 Tarirai, ndizvo zvakaita vakaipa; Vanowedzera pfuma yavo vachingogara vasingatamburi." 
Psalms73:13 Zvirokwazvo ndakanatsa mwoyo wangu pasina, Nokushambidza maoko angu ndisina mhosva;" 
Psalms73:14 Nokuti ndakatambudzwa zuva rose, Ndakarangwa mangwanani ose." 
Psalms73:15 Kana ndaiti, ndichataura kudai; Tarirai, ndainyengera rudzi rwavana venyu." 
Psalms73:16 Zvino ndakaramba ndichifunga kuti ndizvinzwisise, Asi zvakandiremera kwazvo;" 
Psalms73:17 Kusvikira ndapinda panzvimbo tsvene yaMwari, Ndikatarira kuguma kwavo." 
Psalms73:18 Zvirokwazvo munovaisa panotedza; Munovawisira pasi kuti vaparadzwe. 
Psalms73:19 Haiwa, vanoparadzwa kamwe–kamwe! Vanopedzwa chose nezvinotyisa." 
Psalms73:20 Sezvakarotwa, kana munhu apepuka; Saizvozvo, Ishe, muchashora mufananidzo wavo, kana muchimuka." 
Psalms73:21 Nokuti mwoyo wangu wakachema, Ndakabayiwa patsvo dzangu." 
Psalms73:22 Ndakanga ndiri benzi, ndisingazivi chinhu; Ndakanga ndakafanana nemhuka pamberi penyu." 
Psalms73:23 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndinoramba ndinemi; Makabata ruoko rwangu rworudyi. 
Psalms73:24 Muchandiperekedza nezano renyu, Ndokuzondigamuchira pakubwinya." 
Psalms73:25 Ndianiko kudenga, kana musimi? Napasi hapana wandinoda kunze kwenyu." 
Psalms73:26 Nyama yangu nomwoyo wangu zvinopera; Asi Mwari ndiye dombo romwoyo wangu nomugove wangu nokusingaperi. 
Psalms73:27 Nokuti tarirai, vari kure nemi vachapera; Makaparadza vose vakakusiyai noupombwe hwavo." 
Psalms73:28 Kana ndirini, kuswedera pedyo naye ndizvo zvinondifadza; Ishe Mwari ndakamuita nhare yangu, Kuti ndiparidze mabasa enyu ose." 
Psalms74:1 Haiwa Mwari, makatirashireiko nokusingaperi? Hasha dzenyu dzinopfungairira makwai amafuro enyu nemhaka yeiko?" 
Psalms74:2 Rangarirai ungano yenyu yamakatenga kare, Yamakadzikinura kuti ruve rudzi rwenhaka yenyu; Gomo reZioni pamakanga mugere." 
Psalms74:3 Simudzai makumbo enyu muone zvakaparadzwa zvisingaperi, Izvo zvakaipa zvose zvakaitwa navavengi panzvimbo tsvene." 
Psalms74:4 Vadzivisi venyu vakanduruma pakati peungano yenyu; Vakamisa mireza yavo zvive zviratidzo. 
Psalms74:5 Vakafanana navanhu vakasimudza Masanhu mudondo remiti. 
Psalms74:6 Zvino zvose zvakavezwa zvayo Vanozviputsa nedimuro nenyundo. 
Psalms74:7 Vakapisa nzvimbo yenyu tsvene nomoto; Vakashatisa ugaro hwezita renyu vachihuputsira pasi. 
Psalms74:8 Vakati mumwoyo mavo, “Ngativaparadze pamwechete;” Vakapisa nzvimbo dzose pavanounganira Mwari munyika." 
Psalms74:9 Hatichaoni zviratidzo zvedu; Hapachina muporofita; Pakati pedu hapana munhu anoziva kuti zvichasvikira rinhi. 
Psalms74:10 Haiwa Mwari, mudzivisi, achashora kusvikira rinhiko? Muvengi acharamba achizvidza zita renyu nokusingaperi here?" 
Psalms74:11 Munodzosereiko ruoko rwenyu, irwo ruoko rwenyu rworudyi? Rutambanudzei pachipfuva chenyu, muvapedze." 
Psalms74:12 Kunyangwe zvakadaro Mwari ndiye Mambo wangu kubva kare, Iye anobata mabasa okuponesa pakati penyika." 
Psalms74:13 Makapamura gungwa nesimba renyu; Makaputsa misoro yezvikara zvegungwa mumvura. 
Psalms74:14 Makaputsanya misoro yengwena, Makaipa vanhu vagere murenje kuti ive nyama yavo." 
Psalms74:15 Makapamura tsime neboporodzi; Makapwisa nzizi huru. 
Psalms74:16 Masikati ndeenyu, nousiku ndohwenyuwo; Ndimi makagadzira chiedza nezuva." 
Psalms74:17 Ndimi makatara miganhu yose yapasi; Ndimi makaita zhizha nechando. 
Psalms74:18 Rangarirai chinhu ichi, kuti muvengi akakuzvidzai, Jehovha, Uye kuti rudzi rwamapenzi rwakamhura zita renyu." 
Psalms74:19 Regai henyu kuisa kuchikara mweya wenjiva yenyu; Musakanganwa upenyu hwavarombo venyu. 
Psalms74:20 Rangarirai sungano; Nokuti nzvimbo dzine rima dzapasi dzizere nougaro hwavamanikidzi. 
Psalms74:21 Haiwa, vanomanikidzwa ngavarege kudzoka vachinyara; Varombo navashaiwi ngavarumbidze zita renyu." 
Psalms74:22 Simukai Mwari, muzvireverere mhaka yenyu, Rangarirai kuzvidzwa kwenyu nebenzi zuva rose." 
Psalms74:23 Regai kukanganwa izwi ravadzivisi venyu; Bope ravanokumukira rinogara richikwira. 
Psalms75:1 Tinokuvongai, Mwari; Tinovonga, nokuti zita renyu riri pedyo; Vanhu vanoparidza mabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms75:2 “Kana ndichiwana nguva yakafanira, Ndichatonga zvakarurama." 
Psalms75:3 Pasi pose panyauka navose vagerepo; Ndini ndakamisa mbiru dzayo. 
Psalms75:4 Ndakati kuna vana manyawi, ‘Regai kuita namanyawi;’ Nokuna vakaipa, ‘Regai kusimudza runyanga.’" 
Psalms75:5 Regai kusimudza runyanga rwenyu kudenga; Regai kutaura nomutsipa mukukutu.” 
Psalms75:6 Nokuti kunyangwe kumabudazuva, kana kumavirira, Kana kurenje, hakuzi ikoko kunobva kukudzwa." 
Psalms75:7 Asi Mwari ndiye mutongi; Anoninipisa mumwe achikudza mumwe. 
Psalms75:8 Nokuti muruoko rwaJehovha muno mukombe, newaini inopupuma; Uzere nezvakavhenganiswa, zvino anodurura mauri; Zvirokwazvo, vakaipa vose venyika vachasvina masese awo, nokuanwa." 
Psalms75:9 Asi ini ndichaparidza nokusingaperi, Ndichaimbira Mwari waJakobho nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms75:10 Nyanga dzose dzavakaipa ndichadzigura; Asi nyanga dzavakarurama dzichasimudzwa. Kumutungamiriri wokuimba; nemitengeranwa. Pisarema raAsafi. Rwiyo. 
Psalms76:1 Mwari anozikanwa pakati paJudha; Zita rake iguru pakati paIsiraeri. 
Psalms76:2 PaSaremiwo ndipo pane tabhenakeri yake, NapaZioni ugaro hwake." 
Psalms76:3 Ndipo paakavhuna miseve youta; Nenhoo, nomunondo, nokurwa." 
Psalms76:4 Imi munokubwinya, makanaka kwazvo, Kupfuura makomo ezvakapambwa." 
Psalms76:5 Vakatsunga pamwoyo, vakapambwa, vakavata hope dzavo; Pakati pavarume vane simba hakuna akawana maoko ake." 
Psalms76:6 Pakutuka kwenyu, Mwari waJakobho, Ngoro nebhiza zvose zvinobatwa nehope dzorufu." 
Psalms76:7 Imi, iyemi, munofanira kutyiwa; Ndianiko angamira pamberi penyu kana matsamwa?" 
Psalms76:8 Makanzwisa vanhu kutonga kwenyu kuchibva kudenga; Pasi pakatya, pakanyarara," 
Psalms76:9 Panguva yokumuka kwaMwari kuzotonga, Kuti aponese vanyoro vose vapasi." 
Psalms76:10 Zvirokwazvo, kutsamwa kwavanhu kuchakurumbidzai; Munozvisunga chiuno nokutsamwa kwakasara." 
Psalms76:11 Pikai, muripire Jehovha Mwari wenyu; Vose vakamupoteredza ngavauye nezvipo kuna iye anofanira kutyiwa;" 
Psalms76:12 Iye achagura mweya yamachinda; Anotyisa kwazvo madzimambo apasi. 
Psalms77:1 Ndichadana kuna Mwari nezwi rangu; kuna iye Mwari nezwi rangu, acharerekera nzeve yake kwandiri." 
Psalms77:2 Pazuva rokutambudzika kwangu ndakatsvaka Ishe; Ruoko rwangu rwakanga rwakatambanudzwa usiku, ndisingaregi; Mweya wangu wakaramba kunyaradzwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ndinorangarira Mwari, ndokushaiwa mufaro; Ndinofungisisa, mweya wangu ndokuziya." 
Psalms77:4 Hamutenderi meso angu kutsinzina; Ndinotambudzika, handigoni kutaura." 
Psalms77:5 Ndakarangarira mazuva ekare, Makore enguva dzakare–kare." 
Psalms77:6 Ndinozviyeudzira kuimba kwangu pakati pousiku; Ndinotaurirana nomwoyo wangu; Mweya wangu wakanzvera kwazvo. 
Psalms77:7 “Ko Ishe angarasha nokusingaperi? Haachazonzwiri ngoni here? 
Psalms77:8 Ko tsitsi dzake dzaenda chose nokusingaperi? Chipikirwa chake chakakona nokusingaperi here? 
Psalms77:9 Ko Mwari akanganwa kuva nenyasha? Apfigira tsitsi dzake nyoro pakutsamwa kwake here?” 
Psalms77:10 Ipapo ndakati, “Ndihwo utera hwangu, Asi ndicharangarira makore oruoko rworudyi rwoWokumusorosoro.”" 
Psalms77:11 Ndichareva zvakaitwa naJehovha; Nokuti ndicharangarira zvishamiso zvenyu zvakare. 
Psalms77:12 Ndichafungisawo basa renyu rose, Nokurangarira zvamakaita." 
Psalms77:13 Nzira yenyu, Mwari, iri panzvimbo tsvene; Ndianiko mwari mukuru, akafanana naiye Mwari?" 
Psalms77:14 Ndimi Mwari anoita zvishamiso; Makaratidza simba renyu pakati pavanhu. 
Psalms77:15 Makadzikinura vanhu venyu noruoko rwenyu, Ivo vanakomana vaJakobho naJosefa." 
Psalms77:16 Mvura zhinji yakakuonai, Mwari; Mvura zhinji yakakuonai, ikatya; Pakadzika pakabvunda." 
Psalms77:17 Makore akadurura mvura; Denga rose rakabudisa izwi; Miseve yenyu yakafamba–famba kwose. 
Psalms77:18 Izwi rokutinhira kwenyu rakanga riri muchamupupuri; Mheni dzakavhenekera nyika; Pasi pakabvunda nokuzununguka. 
Psalms77:19 Kufamba kwenyu kwakanga kuri mugungwa, Nenzira dzenyu mumvura zhinji zhinji, Makwara enyu akanga asingazikanwi." 
Psalms77:20 Makafambisa vanhu venyu seboka ramakwai, Noruoko rwaMosesi norwaAmoni." 
Psalms78:1 Teererai murairo wangu, imi vanhu vangu; Rerekerai nzeve dzenyu munzwe mashoko omuromo wangu." 
Psalms78:2 Ndichashamisa muromo wangu nditaure nomufananidzo; Ndichaparidza mashoko akavanzika ekare," 
Psalms78:3 Zvatakanzwa nezvatakaziva, Nezvatakaudzwa namadzibaba edu." 
Psalms78:4 Hatingazvivanziri vana vavo, Asi tichaudza rudzi runotevera mabasa angarumbidzwa aJehovha, Nesimba rake, namabasa ake, anoshamisa, aakaita." 
Psalms78:5 Nokuti akamutsa chipupuriro pakati paJakobho, Akatema murairo pakati paIsiraeri, Akazviraira madzibaba edu, Kuti vazvizivise vana vavo;" 
Psalms78:6 Kuti rudzi runotevera ruzvizive, ivo vana vachazoberekwa; Ivo vasimuke vazviudze vana vavo;" 
Psalms78:7 Kuti tariro yavo ive kuna Mwari, Varege kukanganwa mabasa aMwari, Asi vachengete mirairo yake;" 
Psalms78:8 Varege kufanana namadzibaba avo, Rwakanga ruri rudzi rusingateereri, rwakamukira Mwari. Rudzi rwakaramba ruenzaniso mumwoyo yavo, Uye mweya yavo yakanga isina kutendeka kuna Mwari." 
Psalms78:9 Vana vaEfuraimu, kunyangwe vakanga vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa nouta, Vakadzokera shure pazuva rokurwa." 
Psalms78:10 Havana kuchengeta sungano yaMwari, Vakaramba kufamba nomurairo wake;" 
Psalms78:11 Vakakanganwa zvaakaita, Namabasa ake akashamisa, aakavaratidza." 
Psalms78:12 Wakaita zvinhu zvinoshamisa pamberi pamadzibaba avo, Panyika yeIjipiti, pasango reZoani." 
Psalms78:13 Wakapamura gungwa, akavayambusa; Akamisa mvura ikafanana nomurwi." 
Psalms78:14 Masikatiwo wakavafambisa negore, Nousiku hwose nechiedza chomoto." 
Psalms78:15 Wakapamura matombo murenje, Akavanwisa zvakanaka kwazvo sapamvura inobva pakadzika." 
Psalms78:16 Akabudisawo hova dzemvura padombo, Akayereresa mvura zhinji yakaita senzizi." 
Psalms78:17 Kunyangwe zvakadaro vakaramba vachimutadzira, Nokumukira Wokumusorosoro murenje." 
Psalms78:18 Vakaidza Mwari mumwoyo mavo Vachikumbira zvokudya zvavakanga vachidawo. 
Psalms78:19 Zvirokwazvo, vakapopotera Mwari; Vakati, “Mwari angatigadzirira chokudya murenje here?" 
Psalms78:20 Tarirai, akarova dombo, mvura zhinji ikadzutuka, Hova dzakayerera; Ko angapa chingwawo here? Ungavigira vanhu vake nyama here?”" 
Psalms78:21 Saka Jehovha akanzwa, akatsamwa; Moto ukaveserwa Jakobho, Kutsamwa kukamukira Isiraeri;" 
Psalms78:22 Nokuti havana kutenda Mwari, Havana kuvimba nokuponeswa kwake." 
Psalms78:23 Kunyangwe zvakadaro wakaraira denga rose kumusoro, Akazarura mikova yokudenga;" 
Psalms78:24 Akanaisa mana pamusoro pavo kuti vadye, Akapa zviyo zvokudenga." 
Psalms78:25 Vanhu vakadya chingwa chavatumwa; Akavatumira zvokudya kusvikira vaguta. 
Psalms78:26 Akabudisa mhepo yakabva mabvazuva, ikarira kudenga; Akafambisa mhepo yakabva nyasi nesimba rake." 
Psalms78:27 Akanisawo nyama pamusoro pavo ikaita seguruva, Neshiri, dzina mapapiro, dzikaita sejecha regungwa;" 
Psalms78:28 Akazviwisira pakati pemisasa yavo, Pose–pose pavakanga vagere." 
Psalms78:29 Ipapo vakadya, vakaguta kwazvo; Akavapa zvavakanga vachikarira." 
Psalms78:30 Vakanga vasati vanyaradza kukara kwavo, Zvokudya zvavo zvakanga zvichiri mumiromo yavo," 
Psalms78:31 Kutsamwa kwaMwari kukavamukira, Akauraya vakakoresa pakati pavo, Akaparadza majaya aIsiraeri." 
Psalms78:32 Kunyangwe zvakadaro vakaramba vachitadza, Vakasatenda mabasa ake aishamisa." 
Psalms78:33 Saka akapedza mazuva avo pane zvisina maturo, Namakore avo pane zvinotyisa." 
Psalms78:34 Zvino akati achivauraya, ipapo vakamubvunza; Vakadzoka, vakashingaira kutsvaka Mwari." 
Psalms78:35 Vakarangarira kuti Mwari ndiye dombo ravo, NaMwari Wokumusorosoro mudzikinuri wavo." 
Psalms78:36 Asi vakamubata kumeso nomuromo wavo, Vakamurevera nhema nendimi dzavo." 
Psalms78:37 Nokuti mwoyo yavo yakanga isina kururama kwaari, Uye vakanga vasina kutendeka pasungano yake." 
Psalms78:38 Asi iye, zvaakanga ane nyasha huru, akavakanganwira kuipa kwavo, akasavaparadza; Zvirokwazvo, kazhinji akadzora kutsamwa kwake, Akasamutsa hasha dzake dzose." 
Psalms78:39 Akarangarira kuti vakanga vari nyama bedzi; Nemhepo, inopfuura, isingadzokizve." 
Psalms78:40 Vakamumukira murenje kazhinji sei, Nokumunzwisa shungu mugwenga!" 
Psalms78:41 Vakapamhidzazve, vakaidza Mwari, Vakadzivisa Mutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Psalms78:42 Havana kurangarira ruoko rwake, Kana zuva raakavadzikinura pamudzivisi." 
Psalms78:43 Panguva yaakavaratidza zviratidzo zvake paIjipiti, Nezvishamiso zvake pasango reZoani;" 
Psalms78:44 Akashandura nzizi dzavo dzikava ropa, Nehova dzavo, vakakoniwa kunwa mvura yadzo." 
Psalms78:45 Akatuma pakati pavo mapupira enhunzi, dzakavaruma; Namatafi, akavaparadza." 
Psalms78:46 Zvibereko zvavo wakazvipa mhundururu, Zvavakabatira akazvipa mhashu." 
Psalms78:47 Akaparadza mizambiringa yavo nechimvuramabwe, Nemionde yavo nechando." 
Psalms78:48 Mombe dzavo akadziisawo pachimvuramabwe, Zvipfuwo zvavo akazviisa pamheni." 
Psalms78:49 Akatuma pakati pavo kutsamwa kwake kukuru, Nehasha neshungu nokutambudza, Rikaita boka ravatumwa vezvakaipa." 
Psalms78:50 Akagadzirira kutsamwa kwake nzira; Haana kubvisa mweya wavo parufu, Asi akaisa upenyu hwavo kumatenda;" 
Psalms78:51 Akarova matangwe ose paIjipiti, Ivo vokutanga vesimba ravo pamatende aHami;" 
Psalms78:52 Asi akabudisa vanhu vake samakwai, Akavaperekedza murenje seboka rezvipfuwo." 
Psalms78:53 Akavafambisa vakafara, vakasatya; Asi gungwa rakafukidza vavengi vavo." 
Psalms78:54 Akavasvitsa panyika yake tsvene, Pagomo iri, raakatenga noruoko rwake rworudyi." 
Psalms78:55 Akadzingawo ndudzi pamberi pavo, Akavaganhurira ivo kuti vave nhaka yavo, Akagarisa VaIsiraeri pamatende avo." 
Psalms78:56 Kunyangwe zvakadaro vakaidza Mwari Wokumusorosoro, vakamumukira, Vakasachengeta zvipupuriro zvake;" 
Psalms78:57 Asi vadzoka, vakaita zvinonyengera. Vakatsauka souta hunonyengera." 
Psalms78:58 Nokuti vakamutsa kutsamwa kwake namatunhu avo akakwirira, Vakamutsa godo rake nezvifananidzo zvavo zvakaveziwa." 
Psalms78:59 Zvino Mwari akati achizvinzwa, akatsamwa kwazvo, Akasema Isiraeri kwazvo–kwazvo." 
Psalms78:60 Akabva patabhenakeri yeShiro, Tende raakanga akaisa pakati pavanhu;" 
Psalms78:61 Akaisa simba rake mukutapwa, Nokubwinya kwake muruoko rwomudzivisi." 
Psalms78:62 Vanhu vake wakavaisawo kumunondo; Akatsamwira nhaka yake kwazvo. 
Psalms78:63 Moto wakapedza majaya avo; Vasikana vavo havana kuimbirwa pakuwanikwa kwavo. 
Psalms78:64 Vapristi vavo vakaurayiwa nomunondo; Chirikadzi dzavo hadzina kuchema. 
Psalms78:65 Ipapo Ishe akapepuka somunhu akanga avete, Semhare inoridza mhere nokuda kwewaini." 
Psalms78:66 Akarova vadzivisi vake, vakadzokera shure; Akavanyadzisa zvisingaperi." 
Psalms78:67 Akarambawo tende raJosefa, Akasanangura rudzi rwaEfuremu." 
Psalms78:68 Asi akasanangura rudzi rwaJudha, Negomo reZioni raakanga achida." 
Psalms78:69 Akavaka nzvimbo yake tsvene senhare dzakakwirira, Sapasi paakateya nokusingaperi." 
Psalms78:70 Akasanangurawo Dhavhidhi muranda wake, Akamubvisa pamatanga amakwai;" 
Psalms78:71 Akandomutora paaifudza matunzvi aimwisa, Kuti ave mufudzi wavanhu vake Jakobho, naIsiraeri nhaka yake." 
Psalms78:72 Naizvozvo akavafudza nokururama kwomwoyo wake; Akavaperekedza nouchenjeri hwamaoko ake. 
Psalms79:1 Haiwa Mwari, vahedheni vakapinda panhaka yenyu; Vakasvibisa temberi yenyu tsvene; Jerusaremu vakariita dongo." 
Psalms79:2 Zvitunha zvavaranda venyu vakazvipa shiri dzokudenga zvive zvokudya zvadzo. Uye nyama yavatsvene venyu vakaipa zvikara zvapasi. 
Psalms79:3 Vakateura ropa ravo pose pose paJerusaremu semvura; Vakashaiwa anovaviga. 
Psalms79:4 Tava chinhu chinoshorwa navatigere navo, Chinhu chinozvidzwa nechinosekwa navakatipoteredza." 
Psalms79:5 Haiwa Jehovha, mucharamba makatsamwa nokusingaperi kusvikira rinhiko? Godo renyu richapfuta somoto here?" 
Psalms79:6 Dururai hasha dzenyu pamusoro pavahedheni vasingakuziviyi, Napamusoro poushe huzhinji, husingadi zita renyu." 
Psalms79:7 Nokuti vakapedza Jakobho, Vakaparadza ugaro hwake." 
Psalms79:8 Musarangarira kutirova pamusoro pezvakaipa zvamadzibaba edu; Ngoni dzenyu nyoro ngadzikurumidze kusangana nesu; Nokuti taneta kwazvo. 
Psalms79:9 Tibatsirei, Mwari muponesi wedu, nokuda kwomukurumbira wezita renyu; Mutirwire, mudzime zvivi zvedu nokuda kwezita renyu." 
Psalms79:10 Vahedheni vacharevereiko, vachiti, “Mwari wavo aripiko?” Kutsihwa kweropa ravaranda venyu, rakateurwa, Ngakuzikanwe pakati pavahedheni pamberi pedu." 
Psalms79:11 Kugomera kwomusungwa ngakusvike kwamuri; Noukuru hwesimba renyu chengetai vana vorufu; 
Psalms79:12 Mutsivire vagere nesu kanomwe pachipfuva chavo. Kushora kwavakakushorai nako, imi Ishe." 
Psalms79:13 Naizvozvo isu vanhu venyu, namakwai amafuro enyu, Tichakuvongai nokusingaperi; Ticharatidza kurumbidzwa kwenyu kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms80:1 Tererai nenzeve, Mufudzi waIsiraeri, Iyemi munotungamirira Josefa seboka rezvipfuwo; Imi mugere pakati pamakerubhi, penyai!" 
Psalms80:2 Mutsai simba renyu pamberi paEfuremu naBhenjamini naManase, Muuye kuzotirwira." 
Psalms80:3 Tidzosereizve, Mwari; Penyesai chiso chenyu, isu tiponeswe." 
Psalms80:4 Jehovha, Mwari wehondo, Muchatsamwira munyengetero wavanhu venyu kusvikira rinhiko?" 
Psalms80:5 Makavadyisa zvokudya zvemisodzi, Nokuvanwisa misodzi yakawanda kwazvo." 
Psalms80:6 Makatiita chinhu chinoitirwa nharo navatigere navo; Vavengi vedu vanotiseka pakati pavo. 
Psalms80:7 Tidzosereizve, Mwari wehondo; Penyesai chiso chenyu, isu tiponeswe." 
Psalms80:8 Makandotora muzambiringa paIjipiti; Makadzinga vahedheni, mukausima." 
Psalms80:9 Makaugadzirira, Ukabata kwazvo, ukazadza nyika." 
Psalms80:10 Makomo akafukidzwa nomumvuri wawo, Nemisidhari yaMwari namatavi awo." 
Psalms80:11 Wakatandisa matavi awo kusvikira pagungwa, Namashizha awo kusvikira kuRwizi." 
Psalms80:12 Makaputsireiko mhanda dzawo, Kuti vose vanopfuura nenzira vautanhe?" 
Psalms80:13 Nguruve yomudondo inouparadza, Mhuka dzesango dzinoudya." 
Psalms80:14 Dodzokai henyu, Mwari wehondo, Tarirai muri kudenga, muone, muve nehanya nomudzambiringa uyu." 
Psalms80:15 Muchengete chakasimwa noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, Nomwanakomana, wamakazvirerera." 
Psalms80:16 Wapiswa nomoto, watemwa; Vanopera nokutuka kwechiso chenyu." 
Psalms80:17 Ruoko rwenyu ngaruve pamusoro pomunhu woruoko rwenyu rworudyi, Pamusoro poMwanakomana womunhu, wamakazvirerera." 
Psalms80:18 Ipapo hatingazobvi kwamuri; Tiraramisei isu, tigodana zita renyu." 
Psalms80:19 Tidzosereizve, Jehovha Mwari wehondo; Penyesai chiso chenyu, isu tiponeswe." 
Psalms81:1 Imbirai Mwari kwazvo, iye simba redu; Pururudzai kuna Mwari waJakobho." 
Psalms81:2 Vambai rwiyo, muridze ngoma, Nembira dzinonakidza nomutengeranwa." 
Psalms81:3 Ridzai hwamanda pakugara kwomwedzi, Napakuchena kwomwedzi, pamutambo wedu wakatarwa." 
Psalms81:4 Nokuti ndizvo zvakatemerwa Isiraeri, Zvakarairwa naMwari waJakobho." 
Psalms81:5 Wakazvitema muna Josefa kuti chive chipupuriro, Panguva yaakandorwa nenyika yeIjipiti; Pandakanzwa rurimi rwandakanga ndisingazivi." 
Psalms81:6 “Ndakabvisa mutoro pafudzi rake; Maoko ake akaregedza dengu. 
Psalms81:7 Iwe wakadana pakutambudzika, ndikakurwira; Ndakakupindura ndiri panovanda kutinhira; Ndakakuidza pamvura zhinji yeMeribha." 
Psalms81:8 Inzwai vanhu vangu, ndikupupurirei; Haiwa Isiraeri, dai waida hako kunditeerera!" 
Psalms81:9 Ngakurege kuvapo pakati penyu mwari wokumwe; Musanamata kuno mumwe mwari wavatorwa. 
Psalms81:10 Ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, Akakubudisa panyika yeIjipiti; Shamisa muromo wako kwazvo, ndigouzadza." 
Psalms81:11 Asi vanhu vangu havana kuteerera izwi rangu; Isiraeri wakandiramba chose. 
Psalms81:12 Saka ndakavaregera paukukutu hwemwoyo yavo, Kuti vafambe namano avo." 
Psalms81:13 Haiwa, dai vanhu vangu vainditeerera havo, Dai Isiraeri aifamba nenzira dzangu!" 
Psalms81:14 Ndingadai ndakakurumidza kukunda vavengi vavo, Nokurova vadzivisi vavo noruoko rwangu." 
Psalms81:15 Vanovenga Jehovha vaizviisa pasi pake; Asi nguva yavo yaivapo nokusingaperi. 
Psalms81:16 Angadai aivadyisawo zviyo zvakaisvonaka; Ndaikugutsa nohuchi hunobva padombo.” 
Psalms82:1 Mwari anomira paungano yaMwari; Anotonga pakati pavamwari. 
Psalms82:2 “Muchatonga zvisina kururama kusvikira rinhiko, Muchisanangura vanhu vakaipa?" 
Psalms82:3 Tongerai mhaka dzavarombo nenherera; Ruramisirai vanotambudzika navanoshaiwa chose. 
Psalms82:4 Sunungurai varombo navashaiwi Varwirei paruoko rwowakaipa.” 
Psalms82:5 Havazivi, havanzwisisi; Vanofamba–famba murima; Nheyo dzose dzapasi dzinozununguka." 
Psalms82:6 Ndakati, “Muri vamwari, Mose muri vanakomana voWokumusorosoro." 
Psalms82:7 Kunyangwe zvakadaro muchafa savanhu, Muchafa somumwe wamachinda.”" 
Psalms82:8 Simukai Mwari, mutongere pasi; Nokuti ndudzi dzose dzichava nhaka yenyu." 
Psalms83:1 Haiwa Jehovha, regai kuramba munyerere; Regai kuramba musingatauri, musanyarara Mwari." 
Psalms83:2 Nokuti tarirai, vavengi venyu vanoita bope; Vanokuvengai vakasimudza misoro yavo." 
Psalms83:3 Vanofunga mano kuti vanyengere vanhu venyu, Vanorangana pamusoro pavakavanzwa nemi." 
Psalms83:4 Vakati, “Uyai, tivaparadze, varege kuzova rudzi; Kuti zita raIsiraeri rirege kuzorangarirwa.”" 
Psalms83:5 Nokuti vakarangana nomwoyo mumwe; Vanoita sungano kuzorwa nemi. 
Psalms83:6 Matende aEdhomu navaIshimaeri; Moabhu navaHagari; 
Psalms83:7 Gebhari, naAmoni, naAmareki; Firisitia pamwechete navagere Taya;" 
Psalms83:8 Asiriawo wakasangana navo; Vakabatsira vana vaRoti. 
Psalms83:9 Muvaitire sezvamakaitira Midhiani; NaSisera, naJabhini, paRwizi Kishoni;" 
Psalms83:10 Ivo vakaparadzwa paEndori; Vakava mupfudze wapasi. 
Psalms83:11 Itai vakuru vavo saOrebhi naZeebhi; Zvirokwazvo, machinda avo ose saZebha naZarimuna;" 
Psalms83:12 Ivo vakati, “Ngatizvitorere Ugaro hwaMwari huve hwedu.”" 
Psalms83:13 Mwari wangu, muvaite seguruva rinondeyeswa nemhepo; Samakoto anodzingwa nemhepo." 
Psalms83:14 Somoto unopisa dondo, Somurazvo womoto unopisa makomo;" 
Psalms83:15 Muvateverere saizvozvo nedutu renyu remhepo, Muvavhunduse nechamupupuri chenyu." 
Psalms83:16 Fukidzai zviso zvavo nokunyadziswa; Kuti vatsvake zita renyu, Jehovha." 
Psalms83:17 Ngavanyadziswe, vavhunduswe nokusingaperi; Zvirokwazvo, ngavanyadziswe vafe;" 
Psalms83:18 Vazive kuti imi moga, imi mune zita rinonzi Jehovha, Ndimi Wokumusorosoro kumusoro kwapasi pose." 
Psalms84:1 Ugaro hwenyu hunodikanwa sei, Imi Jehovha wehondo!" 
Psalms84:2 Mweya wangu unoshuva, zvirokwazvo unopanga vazhe dzaJehovha; Mwoyo wangu nenyama yangu zvinodana kuna Mwari mupenyu." 
Psalms84:3 Zvirokwazvo, shiri yakazviwanira imba, Nyenganyenga yakazviwanira dendere, painoisa vana vayo, Ipo paatari dzenyu, Jehovha wehondo, Mambo wangu, naMwari wangu." 
Psalms84:4 Vakaropafadzwa vanogara mumba menyu; Vachagara vachikurumbidzai. 
Psalms84:5 Akaropafadzwa munhu ane simba rake mamuri; Ane migwagwa inoenda Zioni mumwoyo make. 
Psalms84:6 Kana vachipfuura nomumupata wakaoma, vanouita nzvimbo ina matsime; Zvirokwazvo, mvura yomunhuruka inoufukidza nemikomborero." 
Psalms84:7 Vanowedzera simba pasimba ravo, Mumwe nomumwe wavo anosvika pamberi paMwari paZioni." 
Psalms84:8 Haiwa, Jehovha wehondo, inzwa munyengetero wangu; Teererai nenzeve, Mwari waJakobho." 
Psalms84:9 Tarirai, Mwari, nhoo yedu, Muone chiso chomuzodzwa wenyu." 
Psalms84:10 Nokuti zuva rimwe pavazhe dzenyu rinokunda mamwe ane chiuru pakunaka. Ndinoti zviri nani kuti ndive murindi womukova mumba maMwari wangu, Pakuti ndigare pamatende avane zvakaipa." 
Psalms84:11 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari izuva nenhoo; Jehovha achapa nyasha nokukudzwa; Hapana chinhu chakanaka chaanganyima vanofamba nokururama. 
Psalms84:12 Jehovha wehondo, Akaropafadzwa munhu anovimba nemi." 
Psalms85:1 Jehovha, makafarira nyika yenyu; Makadzosa Jakobho pakutapwa." 
Psalms85:2 Makakanganwira kutadza kwavanhu venyu, Makafukidza zvivi zvavo zvose." 
Psalms85:3 Makabvisa kutsamwa kwenyu kwose; Makazvidzora pahasha dzenyu dzakanyanya. 
Psalms85:4 Tidzosei, Mwari muponesi wedu, Gumisai hasha dzenyu kwatiri." 
Psalms85:5 Ko mucharamba makatitsamwira nokusingaperi? Muchasvitsa kutsamwa kwenyu kumarudzi namarudzi here? 
Psalms85:6 Imi hamungatiraramisizve here, Kuti vanhu venyu vafare nemi?" 
Psalms85:7 Tiratidzei ngoni dzenyu, Jehovha, Mutipe ruponeso rwenyu." 
Psalms85:8 Ndichanzwa zvichataura Mwari Jehovha; Nokuti achataura rugare kuvanhu vake, nokuvatsvene vake; Asi ngavarege kudzokerazve kuupenzi." 
Psalms85:9 Zvirokwazvo kuponesa kwake kuri pedyo navanomutya; Kuti kubwinya kugare munyika yedu. 
Psalms85:10 Ngoni nezvokwadi zvakasangana; Kururama norugare zvakatsvodana. 
Psalms85:11 Zvokwadi zvinomera pasi; Kururama kwakatarira pasi kuri kudenga. 
Psalms85:12 Zvirokwazvo, Jehovha uchapa zvinhu zvakanaka; Nyika yedu ichabereka zvibereko zvayo." 
Psalms85:13 Kururama kuchamutungamirira; Kuchagadzirira tsoka dzake nzira. 
Psalms86:1 Rerekai nzeve dzenyu, Jehovha, ndipindurei; Nokuti ndiri murombo nomushaiwi." 
Psalms86:2 Chengetai mweya wangu; nokuti ndiri mudikanwi wenyu; Haiwa Mwari wangu, ponesai muranda wenyu anovimba nemi." 
Psalms86:3 Ndinzwirei ngoni, Ishe; Nokuti ndinodana kwamuri zuva rose." 
Psalms86:4 Fadzai mweya womuranda wenyu; Nokuti ndinosimudzira mweya wangu kwamuri Ishe wangu. 
Psalms86:5 Nokuti imi, Ishe makanaka, munofarira kukanganwira, Mune ngoni zhinji kuna vose vanodana kwamuri." 
Psalms86:6 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu, Jehovha kumunyengetero wangu; Teererai izwi rokukumbira kwangu." 
Psalms86:7 Pazuva rokutambudzika kwangu ndichadana kwamuri, Nokuti muchandipindura." 
Psalms86:8 Hapana akafanana nemi pakati pavamwari, Ishe, Uye hapana mabasa akafanana namabasa enyu." 
Psalms86:9 Ndudzi dzose dzamakaita dzichauya kuzonamata pamberi penyu, Ishe, Dzicharumbidza zita renyu." 
Psalms86:10 Nokuti imi muri mukuru, munoita zvinhu zvinoshamisa; Ndimi Mwari woga." 
Psalms86:11 Ndidzidzisei nzira yenyu, Jehovha, ndichafamba muzvokwadi yenyu, Batanidzai mwoyo wangu kuti nditye zita renyu." 
Psalms86:12 Ndichakurumbidzai, Ishe Mwari wangu, nomwoyo wangu wose, Ndicharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms86:13 Nokuti ngoni dzenyu ihuru kwandiri; Makarwira mweya wangu pagomba rakadzika–dzika. 
Psalms86:14 Mwari, vanozvikudza vakandimukira, Ungano yavanhu, vanomanikidza, vakatsvaka mweya wangu, Havana kukuisai pamberi pavo." 
Psalms86:15 Asi imi, Ishe muri Mwari une tsitsi nenyasha, Hamukurumidzi kutsamwa, mune ngoni zhinji nezvokwadi." 
Psalms86:16 Ringirai kwandiri, mundinzwire ngoni; Ipai muranda wenyu simba renyu, Muponese mwanakomana womurandakadzi wenyu." 
Psalms86:17 Ndiratidzei chiratidzo mundiitire zvakanaka; Kuti vanondivenga vazvione, vanyadziswe; Nokuti imi Jehovha, makandibatsira nokundinyaradza." 
Psalms87:1 Nheyo dzake dziri pamakomo matsvene. 
Psalms87:2 Jehovha anoda magedhi eZioni Kupfuura pose panogara Jakobho. 
Psalms87:3 Zvinhu zvakanakisa zvinotaurwa pamusoro pako, Iwe guta raMwari." 
Psalms87:4 Rahabhi neBhabhironi ndichati vari pakati pavanondiziva; “Tarirai, Firisitia, neTaya, neItiopia; Munhu uyu akazvarirwako.”" 
Psalms87:5 Zvirokwazvo, pamusoro peZioni vachati, “Uyu nouyo vakazvarirwamo; Naiye Wokumusorosoro amene acharisimbisa.”" 
Psalms87:6 Jehovha achaverenga, pakunyora kwake ndudzi, achiti, “Munhu uyu akazvarirwako.”" 
Psalms87:7 Vanoimba navanotamba, vachati, “Matsime angu ose ari mauri.”" 
Psalms88:1 Jehovha, Mwari muponesi wangu, Ndakachema masikati nousiku pamberi penyu;" 
Psalms88:2 Munyengetero wangu ngaupinde pamberi penyu; Rerekerai nzeve yenyu munzwe kuchema kwangu; 
Psalms88:3 Nokuti mweya wangu uzere namatambudziko, Upenyu hwangu hwoswedera kuSheori." 
Psalms88:4 Ndinoverengwa pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba; Ndakafanana nomunhu anoshaiwa mubatsiri; 
Psalms88:5 Ndakarashirwa pakati pavakafa, Savakaurayiwa vavete muhwiro, Vamusati mucharangarira; Vakagurwa paruoko rwenyu." 
Psalms88:6 Makandiisa mugomba rakadzika–dzika, Panzvimbo dzine rima, makadzika kwazvo." 
Psalms88:7 Hasha dzenyu dzinorema kwazvo pamusoro pangu, Makanditambudza na mafungu enyu ose." 
Psalms88:8 Makaisa vazikani vangu kure neni; Makandiita chinhu chinonyangadza kwavari; Ndakapfigirwa, handigoni kubuda." 
Psalms88:9 Ziso rangu ropera nemhaka yokutambudzika; Ndakadana kwamuri, Jehovha, zuva rimwe nerimwe, Ndakatambanudzira maoko angu kwamuri." 
Psalms88:10 Mungaitira vakafa zvinoshamisa here? Ko vakaparara vangamuka vakakurumbidzai here? 
Psalms88:11 Hunyoro hwenyu hungaparidzwa muhwiro here? Kana kutendeka kwenyu mukuparadza here? 
Psalms88:12 Zvishamiso zvenyu zvingazikanwa murima here? Nokururama kwenyu panyika yokukanganwa here? 
Psalms88:13 Asi ndakachema kwamuri, Jehovha, Munyengetero wangu uchasvika pamberi penyu mangwanani." 
Psalms88:14 Jehovha, munorashireiko mweya wangu? Munovanzireiko chiso chenyu kwandiri?" 
Psalms88:15 Kubva pauduku hwangu ndakanga ndichitambudzwa ndichirwisofa; Kana ndichityiswa nemi ndinoshaiwa mano. 
Psalms88:16 Kutsamwa kwenyu kukuru kwakapfuura napamusoro pangu; Kutyisa kwenyu kwakandiparadza. 
Psalms88:17 Zvakandikomberedza zuva rose semvura; Zvakandipoteredza pamwechete. 
Psalms88:18 Iye, anondida, neshamwari yangu, makavaisa kure neni, Nomuzikani wangu ari murima." 
Psalms89:1 Ndichaimba ndichireva ngoni dzaJehovha nokusingaperi; Ndichaparidza nomuromo wangu kutendeka kwenyu kumarudzi namarudzi. 
Psalms89:2 Nokuti ndakati, “Ngoni dzichavakwa nokusingaperi, Muchasimbisa kutendeka kwenyu mukudenga–denga mumene." 
Psalms89:3 Ndakaita sungano nomusanangurwa wangu, Ndakapika kumuranda wangu Dhavhidhi, ndichiti," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Ndichamisa vana vako nokusingaperi, Nokuvaka chigaro chako choushe kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi.’ ”" 
Psalms89:5 Kudenga–denga kucharumbidza zvishamiso zvenyu, Jehovha; Nokutendeka kwenyuwo paungano yavatsvene." 
Psalms89:6 Nokuti ndianiko mudenga rose angaenzaniswa naJehovha? Ndianiko pakati pavanakomana vaMwari akafanana naJehovha? 
Psalms89:7 Iye Mwari anotyiwa zvikuru paungano yavatsvene, Anofanira kutyiwa kupfuura vose vanomupoteredza." 
Psalms89:8 Haiwa, Jehovha, Mwari wehondo, Ndianiko ane simba, akafanana nemi, Jehovha? Kutendeka kwenyu kunokukomberedzai." 
Psalms89:9 Ndimi munobata kuzvikudza kwegungwa; Kana mafungu aro achisimuka, ndimi munoanyaradza." 
Psalms89:10 Makaputsanya Rahabhi, somunhu akaurayiwa; Makaparadzira vavengi venyu noruoko rwenyu rune simba." 
Psalms89:11 Kudenga–denga ndokwenyu, napasi ndopenyuwo; Nyika nezvose zvayo, ndimi makazviteya." 
Psalms89:12 Kumusoro nenyasi, ndimi makazvisika; Tabhori neHerimoni anofara nezita renyu." 
Psalms89:13 Munoruoko rune simba; Chanza chenyu chine simba, ruoko rwenyu rworudyi rwakasimudzwa." 
Psalms89:14 Kururama noruenzaniso ndidzo nheyo dzechigaro chenyu choushe; Ngoni nezvokwadi zvinokutungamirirai. 
Psalms89:15 Vakaropafadzwa vanhu vanoziva izwi romufaro; Vanofamba, Jehovha, muchiedza chechiso chenyu." 
Psalms89:16 Vanofara muzita renyu zuva rose; Vanosimudzwa nokururama kwenyu. 
Psalms89:17 Nokuti imi muri kubwinya kwesimba ravo; Runyanga rwedu ruchasimudzwa netsitsi dzenyu. 
Psalms89:18 Nokuti nhoo yedu ndeyaJehovha; Namambo wedu ndowoMutsvene waIsiraeri. 
Psalms89:19 Panguva iyo makataura navatsvene venyu pakuzviratidza kwenyu, Mukati, “Ndakabatsira mhare; Ndakasimudza mumwe wakasanangurwa pakati pavanhu." 
Psalms89:20 Ndakawana Dhavhidhi muranda wangu; Ndakamuzodza namafuta angu matsvene; 
Psalms89:21 Chanza changu chichasimbiswa naye; Ruoko rwanguo ruchamusimbisa. 
Psalms89:22 Muvengi haangamumanikidzi; Mwanakomana wezvakaipa haangamutambudzi. 
Psalms89:23 Ndichaparadza vadzivisi vake pamberi pake, Ndicharova vanomuvenga." 
Psalms89:24 Asi kutendeka kwangu nengoni dzangu zvichava naye; Runyanga rwake ruchasimudzwa nezita rangu. 
Psalms89:25 Ndichaisawo ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, Noruoko rwake rworudyi pamusoro penzizi." 
Psalms89:26 Iye achadana kwandiri, achiti, ‘Ndimi baba vangu, Mwari wangu, nedombo rokuponeswa kwangu.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ndichamuitawo dangwe rangu, Mukuru wamadzimambo apasi." 
Psalms89:28 Ndichamuchengetera ngoni dzangu nokusingaperi, Sungano yangu icharamba yakasimba kwaari." 
Psalms89:29 Vana vake ndichavagarisawo nokusingaperi, Chigaro chake choushe chichafanana namazuva okudenga." 
Psalms89:30 Kana vana vake vakasiya murairo wangu, Vakasafamba nezvandakatonga;" 
Psalms89:31 Kana vakazvidza zvandakatema, Vakasachengeta mirau yangu;" 
Psalms89:32 Ipapo ndichavaranga neshamhu pamusoro pokudarika kwavo, Uye nokurova pamusoro pokuipa kwavo." 
Psalms89:33 Asi handingamutoreri unyoro hwangu chose, Kana kutendera kutendeka kwangu kuitiswa nhema." 
Psalms89:34 Sungano yangu handingaizvidzi, Kana kushandura chinhu chakabuda pamuromo wangu." 
Psalms89:35 Ndakapika kamwechete noutsvene hwangu; Handingarevi nhema kuna Dhavhidhi; 
Psalms89:36 Vana vake vachavapo nokusingaperi, Chigaro chake choushe chichafanana nezuva pamberi pangu." 
Psalms89:37 Chichasimbiswa nokusingaperi somwedzi, Sechapupu chakatendeka chiri kudenga.”" 
Psalms89:38 Asi imi makarasha nokuramba, Makatsamwira muzodzwa wenyu." 
Psalms89:39 Makasema sungano yomuranda wenyu; Makazvidza korona yake mukaikandira pasi. 
Psalms89:40 Makaputsa madziro ake ose; Makaita nhare dzake matongo. 
Psalms89:41 Vose vanopfuura nenzira vanopamba nhumbi dzake; Wava chinhu chinosekwa navaanogara navo. 
Psalms89:42 Makasimudza ruoko rworudyi rwavadzivisi vake; Makafadza vavengi vake vose. 
Psalms89:43 Zvirokwazvo, munodzosa munondo wake unopinza, Hamuna kumusimbisa pakurwa." 
Psalms89:44 Makagumisa kubwinya kwake, Makawisira pasi chigaro chake choushe." 
Psalms89:45 Makatapudza mazuva ohujaya hwake; Makamufukidza nokunyara. 
Psalms89:46 Jehovha, muchazvivanza nokusingaperi kusvikira rinhiko? Kutsamwa kwenyu kuchapisa somoto kusvikira rinhiko?" 
Psalms89:47 Haiwa, rangarirai kuti nguva yangu ipfupi kwazvo; Kuti makasikira vana vavanhu vose zvinhu zvisina maturo kwazvo!" 
Psalms89:48 Ndoupiko munhu angararama akasaona kufa, Angarwira mweya wake pasimba reSheori here?" 
Psalms89:49 Ishe, unyoro hwenyu hwakare huripiko, Hwamakapika kuna Dhavhidhi nokutendeka kwenyu here?" 
Psalms89:50 Rangarirai, Ishe, kushorwa kwavaranda venyu; Kuti ndinotakura muchipfuva changu kushora kwavanhu vazhinji;" 
Psalms89:51 Uko kwakashora vavengi venyu nako, Jehovha, Kwavakashora nako makwara omuzodzwa wenyu." 
Psalms89:52 Jehovha ngaavongwe nokusingaperi. Ameni, zvirokwazvo, Ameni." 
Psalms90:1 Ishe, makanga muri ugaro hwedu Pamarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms90:2 Makomo asati azvarwa, Musati matongosika nyika nevhu, Kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi imi muri Mwari." 
Psalms90:3 Munodzosera munhu kuguruva; Muchiti, “Dzokai vana vavanhu.”" 
Psalms90:4 Nokuti kwamuri makore ane chiuru Akangofanana nezuva razuro kana rapfuura, Senguva yokurinda yousiku." 
Psalms90:5 Munovakukura semvura zhinji; vava sehope; Mangwanani vakaita souswa hunomera. 
Psalms90:6 Mangwanani hunotumbuka, hunomera; Madekwana hunodzurwa, ndokusvava." 
Psalms90:7 Nokuti tinopedzwa nokutsamwa kwenyu, Tinotambudzika nehasha dzenyu." 
Psalms90:8 Makaisa zvakaipa zvedu pamberi penyu, Zvivi zvedu zvakavanzika pachiedza chechiso chenyu." 
Psalms90:9 Nokuti mazuva edu ose anopfuura makatsamwa; Makore edu anopera sorungano. 
Psalms90:10 Mazuva amakore edu anosvika makore makumi manomwe, Kana tine simba makore makumi masere; Asi kunyangwe achikudzwa ndiko kutambudzika nenhamo bedzi. Nokuti gare–gare aenda, nesu tabhururuka taenda." 
Psalms90:11 Ndianiko anoziva simba rokutsamwa kwenyu, Nehasha dzenyu, kuti mutyiwe zvakafanira here?" 
Psalms90:12 Tidzidzisei kunatsoverenga mazuva edu, Kuti tizviwanire mwoyo wakachenjera." 
Psalms90:13 Dzokai Jehovha; kusvikira rinhiko? Muzvidembe pamusoro pavaranda venyu. 
Psalms90:14 Tigutsei mangwanani nengoni dzenyu; Kuti tifarise, tive nomufaro mazuva edu ose." 
Psalms90:15 Tifadzei zvinoenzana namazuva amakatitambudza, Namakore atakaona zvakaipa." 
Psalms90:16 Zvamakaita ngazvionekwe navaranda venyu, Nokubwinya kwenyu pamusoro pavana vavo." 
Psalms90:17 Kunaka kwaJehovha Mwari wedu ngakuve pamusoro pedu; Mutisimbisire basa ramaoko edu; Zvirokwazvo, basa ramaoko edu murisimbise." 
Psalms91:1 Uyo agere panzvimbo yokuvanda yoWokumusorosoro Acharambira pamumvuri wowaMasimbaose. 
Psalms91:2 Ndichati pamusoro paJehovha, “Ndiye utiziro hwangu nenhare yangu, Iye Mwari wangu, wandinovimba naye.”" 
Psalms91:3 Nokuti iye achakurwira parugombe rwomuteyi weshiri, Napachirwere chinouraya zvikuru." 
Psalms91:4 Iye achakufukidza nemhinenga yake, Uchatizira pasi pamapapiro ake; Zvokwadi yake inhoo huru neduku." 
Psalms91:5 Haungatyi chinhu chinovhundusa usiku, Kana museve unofurwa masikati;" 
Psalms91:6 Kana chirwere chinofamba murima, Kana kuparadza kunouraya masikati." 
Psalms91:7 Kurutivi rwako kuchawa vane gumi ramazana, Nezana ramazana paruoko rwako rworudyi; Asi hazvingaswederi kwauri." 
Psalms91:8 Uchangozvitarira hako nameso ako, Ukaona mubairo wavakaipa." 
Psalms91:9 Nokuti imi Jehovha, muri utiziro hwangu! Iwe wakaita Wokumusorosoro ugaro hwako." 
Psalms91:10 Hapana chakaipa chingakuwira, Uye hapana chirwere chichaswedera patende rako." 
Psalms91:11 Nokuti iye acharaira vatumwa vake pamusoro pako, Kuti vakuchengete panzira dzako dzose." 
Psalms91:12 Vachakusimudza pamaoko avo, Kuti urege kugumbusa rutsoka rwako pabwe." 
Psalms91:13 Uchatsika pamusoro peshumba nechiva; Mwana weshumba nenyoka uchazvitsikirira pasi. 
Psalms91:14 “Zvaakandida, ndichamurwira; Ndichamuisa pakakwirira, nokuti wakaziva zita rangu." 
Psalms91:15 Iye achadana kwandiri, ndichamupindura; Ini ndichava naye pakutambudzika; Ndichamurwira, nokumukudza." 
Psalms91:16 Ndichamugutsa noupenyu hurefu, Nokumuratidza ruponeso rwangu.”" 
Psalms92:1 Zvakanaka kuvonga Jehovha, Nokuimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokurumbidza, imi Wokumusorosoro;" 
Psalms92:2 Kuparidza unyoro hwenyu mangwanani, Nokutendeka kwenyu usiku hwose," 
Psalms92:3 Nechinoridzwa chine ungiso gumi, nomutengeranwa; Nezwi rakanaka pambira." 
Psalms92:4 Nokuti imi, Jehovha, makandifadza nezvamakaita; Ndichafara kwazvo namabasa amaoko enyu." 
Psalms92:5 Mabasa enyu akakura seiko, Jehovha! Mifungo yenyu yakadzika kwazvo." 
Psalms92:6 Asina njere haazvizivi; Benzi harinzwisisi izvozvi," 
Psalms92:7 Kana vakaipa vachimera souswa, Uye kana vaiti vose vezvakaipa vachikura; Zvinoitwa kuti vaparadzwe nokusingaperi." 
Psalms92:8 Asi imi Jehovha, muri kumusoro nokusingaperi." 
Psalms92:9 Nokuti tarirai, Jehovha, vavengi venyu, Nokuti tarirai, Jehovha, vavengi venyu vachaparara; Vaiti vose vezvakaipa vachaparadzirwa." 
Psalms92:10 Asi runyanga rwangu makarusimudza sorunyanga rwenyati; Ndakazodzwa namafuta matsva. 
Psalms92:11 Ziso rangu rakaona zvakaitirwa vavengi vangu, Nzeve dzangu dzakanzwa zvakaitirwa vaiti vezvakaipa, vakandimukira." 
Psalms92:12 Akarurama achamera somuchindwe; Achakura somusidhari yokuRebhanoni. 
Psalms92:13 Vakasimwa mumba maJehovha Vachakura muvazhe dzaMwari wedu. 
Psalms92:14 Vacharamba vachibereka zvibereko pakukwegura kwavo; Vachava vanyoro navatsva; 
Psalms92:15 Kuti vaparidze kuti Jehovha akarurama; Ndiye dombo rangu, hapana chinhu chisina kururama maari." 
Psalms93:1 Jehovha anobata ushe; akafuka umambo; Jehovha akafuka simba, akazvisunga chiuno naro; Nyikawo yakateyiwa, haingazununguswi." 
Psalms93:2 Chigaro chenyu choushe chakasimbiswa kubva kare; Imi muripo kubva pakusingaperi. 
Psalms93:3 Jehovha, nzizi dzakanzwisa. Nzizi dzakanzwisa mazwi adzo; Nzizi dzinonzwisa kutinhira kwadzo." 
Psalms93:4 Jehovha anokunda mazwi emvura zhinji, Namafungu ane simba egungwa, Jehovha, ari kumusoro, ndiye ane simba." 
Psalms93:5 Zvipupuriro zvenyu ndezvamazvokwadi kwazvo; Utsvene unofanira imba yenyu, Jehovha, nokusingaperi." 
Psalms94:1 Jehovha, imi Mwari mutsivi, Imi Mwari mutsivi, penyai." 
Psalms94:2 Zvisimudzei, imi Mutongi wenyika; Ipai vanozvikudza sezvavakafanira." 
Psalms94:3 Jehovha, vakaipa vachafara kwazvo kusvikira rinhiko, Vakaipa vachafara kwazvo kusvikira rinhi?" 
Psalms94:4 Vanongotaura havo, vanotaura vachizvikudza, Vaiti vose vezvakaipa vanoita manyawi." 
Psalms94:5 Vanopwanya vanhu venyu, Jehovha, Vachitambudza nhaka yenyu." 
Psalms94:6 Vanouraya chirikadzi nomweni, Nenherera vanodziuraya." 
Psalms94:7 Vachiti, “Jehovha haazvioni, Mwari waJakobho haazvirangariri.”" 
Psalms94:8 Rangarirai imi vasina njere pakati pavanhu; Nemi mapenzi, muchava vakachenjera rinhiko?" 
Psalms94:9 Iye, akasima nzeve, haanganzwi here? Iye, akaumba ziso, haangaoni here?" 
Psalms94:10 Iye, anoranga vahedheni, haangarairi here? Iye, anodzidzisa vanhu zivo?" 
Psalms94:11 Jehovha anoziva kufunga kwavanhu, Kuti hazvina maturo." 
Psalms94:12 Akaropafadzwa munhu, anorangwa nemi, Jehovha, Iye wamunodzidzisa pamurairo wenyu;" 
Psalms94:13 Kuti mumuzorodzei pamazuva okutambudzika, Kusvikira vakaipa vachererwa gomba." 
Psalms94:14 Nokuti Jehovha haangarashi vanhu vake, Uye haangasiyi nhaka yake." 
Psalms94:15 Nokuti kutonga kuchadzokera kukururama; Vose vane mwoyo yakarurama vachakutevera. 
Psalms94:16 Ndianiko achandirwira pavaiti vezvakaipa? Ndianiko achandibatsira pana vanoita zvakaipa? 
Psalms94:17 Dai Jehovha aisava mubatsiri wangu, Mweya wangu ungadai wakakurumidza kugara pakati mwii." 
Psalms94:18 Panguva yandakati, “Rutsoka rwangu rwotedzemuka;” Ngoni dzenyu, Jehovha, dzakanditsigira." 
Psalms94:19 Mundangariro dzangu zhinji mukati mangu Kunyaradza kwenyu kunofadza mweya wangu. 
Psalms94:20 Chigaro chezvakaipa chingashamwaridzana nemi here, Icho chinofunga kuita zvakashata nemitemo yacho?" 
Psalms94:21 Vanounganira upenyu hwowakarurama, Vachipa mhosva ropa risina mhosva." 
Psalms94:22 Asi Jehovha ndiye nhare yangu yakasimba; Mwari wangu idombo routiziro hwangu. 
Psalms94:23 Achadzosera pamusoro pavo kutadza kwavo, Achavaparadza pakati pokuita kwavo; Jehovha Mwari wedu achavaparadza." 
Psalms95:1 Uyai, tiimbire Jehovha; Ngatipururudzei dombo rokuponeswa kwedu." 
Psalms95:2 Ngatisvike pamberi pake tichivonga, Ngatimupururudzei namapisarema," 
Psalms95:3 Nokuti Jehovha ndiMwari mukuru, Mambo mukuru anokunda vamwari vose." 
Psalms95:4 Nzvimbo dzakadzika dzapasi dziri muruoko rwake; Misoro yamakomo ndeyakewo. 
Psalms95:5 Gungwa nderake, ndiye akariita; Maoko ake akaumba nyika yakaoma." 
Psalms95:6 Uyai, tinamate tikotamire pasi; Ngatipfugame pamberi paJehovha Muiti wedu." 
Psalms95:7 Nokuti ndiye Mwari wedu, Isu tiri vanhu vanofudzwa naye, namakwai oruoko rwake. Nhasi dai muchinzwa henyu izwi rake!" 
Psalms95:8 “Regai kuomesa mwoyo yenyu sapaMeribha, Sapazuva reMasa murenje;" 
Psalms95:9 Panguva yandakaidzwa namadzibaba enyu, Vakandiidza, vakaona zvandakaita." 
Psalms95:10 Ndakanga ndine shungu pamusoro porudzi urwo makore makumi mana, Ndikati, ‘Ndivanhu vakarasika pamwoyo yavo, Havana kuziva nzira dzangu;’" 
Psalms95:11 Saka ndakapika pakutsamwa kwangu, ndikati, ‘Havangazopindi pazororo rangu.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva; Imbirai Jehovha, pasi pose." 
Psalms96:2 Imbirai Jehovha, rumbidzai zita rake; Paridzai kuponesa kwake zuva rimwe nerimwe." 
Psalms96:3 Dudzirai kubwinya kwake pakati pavahedheni, Mabasa ake, anoshamisa pakati pendudzi dzose." 
Psalms96:4 Nokuti Jehovha mukuru, anofanira kurumbidzwa kwazvo; Anofanira kutyiwa kupfuura vamwari vose." 
Psalms96:5 Nokuti vamwari vose vendudzi zvifananidzo hazvo; Asi Jehovha akaita kudenga–denga. 
Psalms96:6 Kukudzwa noumambo zviri pamberi pake; Simba nokunaka zviri panzvimbo yake tsvene. 
Psalms96:7 Ipai Jehovha, imi mhuri dzavanhu, Ipai Jehovha kukudzwa nesimba." 
Psalms96:8 Ipai Jehovha kukudzwa kunofanira zita rake; Uyai nechipiriso, mupinde muvazhe dzake." 
Psalms96:9 Namatai kuna Jehovha nenguva tsvene; Pasi pose bvunda pamberi pake. 
Psalms96:10 Itiyi pakati pavahedheni, “Jehovha ndiye anobata hushe; Nyikawo yakasimbiswa, kuti irege kuzununguswa; Iye achatonga vanhu zvakarurama.”" 
Psalms96:11 Kudenga–denga ngakufare, kwazvo; Gungwa ngaritinhire, nezvose zviri mukati maro;" 
Psalms96:12 Sango ngarive nomufaro, nezvose zviri mukati maro; Ipapo miti yose yedondo ichaimba nomufaro;" 
Psalms96:13 Pamberi paJehovha, nokuti anouya; Nokuti anouya kuzotonga pasi; Achatonga nyika zvakarurama, Nendudzi nokutendeka kwake." 
Psalms97:1 Jehovha anobata ushe; nyika ngaifare kwazvo; Zvivi zvizhinji ngazvifare. 
Psalms97:2 Makore nerima zvinomukomberedza; Kururama nokururamisa ndidzo nheyo dzechigaro chake choushe. 
Psalms97:3 Moto unotungamira pamberi pake, Uchipisa vadzivisi vake pamativi ose." 
Psalms97:4 Mheni dzake dzakavheneka nyika yose; Pasi pakaona, ndokubvunda." 
Psalms97:5 Makomo akanyauka senamo pamberi paJehovha, Pamberi paShe wapasi pose." 
Psalms97:6 Kudenga–denga kunoparidza kururama kwake, Ndudzi dzose dzakaona kubwinya kwake." 
Psalms97:7 Vose, vanoshumira mifananidzo yakaveziwa, vanonyadziswa, Ivo vanozvirumbidza pamusoro pezvifananidzo; Namatai kwaari, imi vamwari vose." 
Psalms97:8 Zioni rakanzwa ndokufara, Navakunda vaJudha vakafara kwazvo; Nokuda kwezvamakatonga, imi Jehovha." 
Psalms97:9 Nokuti imi Jehovha, muri kumusoro–soro kwapasi pose; Makakwirira kupfuura vamwari vose." 
Psalms97:10 Vengai zvakaipa, imi munoda Jehovha; Iye anochengeta mweya yavatsvene vake; Unovarwira paruoko rwawakaipa." 
Psalms97:11 Chiedza chinodyarirwa wakarurama, Nomufaro vane mwoyo yakarurama." 
Psalms97:12 Farai muna Jehovha, imi vakarurama; Vongai pakurangarira utsvene hwake." 
Psalms98:1 Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva; Nokuti akaita zvinhu zvinoshamisa; Chanza chake chorudyi, noruoko rwake rutsvene, zvakamukundisa." 
Psalms98:2 Jehovha akazivisa kuponesa kwake; Akaratidza pachena kururama kwake pamberi pavahedheni. 
Psalms98:3 Akarangarira ngoni dzake nokutendeka kwake kuimba yaIsiraeri; Migumo yose yapasi yakaona kuponesa kwaMwari wedu. 
Psalms98:4 Pururudzai Jehovha, pasi pose; Danidzirai, muimbe nomufaro, imbai nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms98:5 Imbirai Jehovha nziyo dzokurumbidza nembira; Nembira, uye nezwi rokuimba." 
Psalms98:6 Nehwamanda, nezwi romumanzi Pururudzai pamberi paMambo, Jehovha." 
Psalms98:7 Gungwa ngaritinhire nezvose zviri mukati maro; Nenyika, navanogaramo." 
Psalms98:8 Nzizi ngadziuchire; Namakomo ngaaimbe pamwechete nomufaro; 
Psalms98:9 Pamberi paJehovha, nokuti anouya kuzotonga pasi, Achatonga nyika zvakarurama, Navanhu nokururama." 
Psalms99:1 Jehovha anobata ushe; vanhu ngavabvunde; Iye agere pakati pamakerubhi; nyika ngaizununguswe. 
Psalms99:2 Jehovha mukuru paZioni; Ari kumusoro–soro kwavanhu vose. 
Psalms99:3 Ngavarumbidze zita renyu guru rinotyisa; Ndiye Mutsvene. 
Psalms99:4 Simba ramambo rinodawo kururamisa; Imi munosimbisa kururama, Munotonga muchiruramisa pakati paJakobho." 
Psalms99:5 Kudzai Jehovha Mwari wedu, Munamate pachitsiko chetsoka dzake; Ndiye Mutsvene." 
Psalms99:6 Mosesi naAroni pakati pavapristi vake, NaSamueri pakati pavanodana zita rake; Vakadana kuna Jehovha, iye akavapindura." 
Psalms99:7 Akataura navo ari mushongwe yegore; Vakachengeta zvipupuriro zvake nomutemo waakavapa. 
Psalms99:8 Makavapindura, Jehovha Mwari wedu; Maiva Mwari aivakanganwira, Kunyangwe makatsiva zvavaiita." 
Psalms99:9 Kudzai Jehovha Mwari wedu, Namatai pagomo rake dzvene; Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wedu ndiye Mutsvene." 
Psalms100:1 Pururudzai Jehovha, imi nyika dzose." 
Psalms100:2 Shumirai Jehovha nomufaro; Uyai pamberi pake muchiimba. 
Psalms100:3 Zivai kuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari; Ndiye wakatiita, tiri vanhu vake; Tiri vanhu vake, namakwai anofudzwa naye." 
Psalms100:4 Pindai pamasuwo ake muchivonga, Napavazhe dzake muchirumbidza; Chimuvongai, murumbidze zita rake." 
Psalms100:5 Nokuti Jehovha akanaka; ngoni dzake dziripo nokusingaperi; Nokutendeka kwake kumarudzi namarudzi. 
Psalms101:1 Ndichaimba ndichireva ngoni nokururama; Ndimi Jehovha wandichaimbira nziyo dzokurumbidza. 
Psalms101:2 Ndichaita zvose nokugwara panzira yakarurama; Haiwa, muchauya kwandiri rinhiko? Ndichafamba mumba mangu nomwoyo wakarurama." 
Psalms101:3 Handingavavariri chinhu chakaipa; Ndinovenga zvinoitwa navanotsauka; Hazvingandinamatiri. 
Psalms101:4 Mwoyo wakatsauka ngaubve kwandiri; Handidi kuziva zvakaipa. 
Psalms101:5 Anoitira vokwake makuhwa, ndichamuparadza; Anotarira namanyawi, nouno mwoyo unozvikudza, handingavi nehanya naye." 
Psalms101:6 Meso angu achatarira vakatendeka panyika, kuti vagare neni; Munhu anofamba nenzira yakarurama, ndiye angava mushumiri wangu." 
Psalms101:7 Anonyengera haangagari mumba mangu; Anoreva nhema haangarambiri pamberi pangu. 
Psalms101:8 Mangwanani ose ndichaparadza vakaipa vose venyika; Kuti ndipedze vose vanoita zvakaipa paguta raJehovha. 
Psalms102:1 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, Jehovha, Kuchema kwangu ngakusvikire kwamuri." 
Psalms102:2 Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu pazuva rokutambudzika kwangu; Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri; Pazuva rokudana kwangu kurumidzai kundipindura. 
Psalms102:3 Nokuti mazuva angu anopera soutsi, Mapfupa angu anotsva sechitsa." 
Psalms102:4 Mwoyo wangu warohwa souswa, waoma; Nokuti ndinokanganwa kudya zvokudya zvangu." 
Psalms102:5 Nokuda kwezwi rokugomera kwangu Mapfupa angu anonamatira nyama yangu. 
Psalms102:6 Ndafanana nehukurwizi yomurenje; Ndava sezizi romumatongo. 
Psalms102:7 Handivati, ndafanana Neshiri iri yoga pamusoro pedenga reimba." 
Psalms102:8 Vavengi vangu vanondituka zuva rose; Avo vanondipengera vanonditukisa kwazvo. 
Psalms102:9 Nokuti ndakadya madota sezvokudya, Ndikavhenganisa zvokunwa zvangu nemisodzi." 
Psalms102:10 Nokuda kwehasha dzenyu nokutsamwa kwenyu; Nokuti makandisimudza mukandirasha. 
Psalms102:11 Mazuva angu akafanana nomumvuri wareba; Ndaoma souswa. 
Psalms102:12 Asi imi Jehovha, muchavapo nokusingaperi; Marudzi namarudzi achakurangarirai." 
Psalms102:13 Imi muchasimuka, mukanzwira Zioni ngoni; Nokuti nguva yavapo yokurinzwira tsitsi, zvirokwazvo, nguva, yakatarwa, yasvika." 
Psalms102:14 Nokuti varanda venyu vanofarira mabwe aro, Vanonzwira tsitsi guruva raro." 
Psalms102:15 Naizvozvo vahedheni vachatya zita raJehovha, Namadzimambo ose apasi kubwinya kwenyu;" 
Psalms102:16 Jehovha zvaakavaka Zioni, Akaonekwa nokubwinya kwake;" 
Psalms102:17 Akava nehanya nomunyengetero wavakakumurwa, Akasazvidza munyengetero wavo." 
Psalms102:18 Izvi zvichanyorerwa rudzi runozouya; Vanhu, vachazosikwa, vacharumbidza Jehovha." 
Psalms102:19 Nokuti wakatarira pasi ari panzvimbo yake tsvene yakakwirira; Jehovha akacherechedza nyika ari kudenga; 
Psalms102:20 Kuti anzwe kugomera kwomusungwa; Kuti asunungure vana vorufu; 
Psalms102:21 Kuti vanhu vaparidze zita raJehovha paZioni, Nokurumbidzwa kwake paJerusaremu;" 
Psalms102:22 Kana marudzi avanhu aungana, Noushe huzhinji, kuti vashumire Jehovha." 
Psalms102:23 Wakatapudza simba rangu panzira; Wakafupisa mazuva angu. 
Psalms102:24 Ndakati, “Mwari wangu, regai kundibvisa mazuva angu achigere kusvika; Makore enyu anosvika kumarudzi namarudzi.”" 
Psalms102:25 Makateya nyika kare–kare; Nedenga rose ibasa ramaoko enyu. 
Psalms102:26 Zvichaparara izvo, asi imi muchagara muripo; Zvirokwazvo, izvozvo zvose zvichasakara senguo; Muchazvishandura sechisimiro, zvikashanduka;" 
Psalms102:27 Asi imi hamushanduki, Makore enyu haangavi nomugumo." 
Psalms102:28 Vana vavaranda venyu vachagara varipo, Navana vavo vachasimbiswa pamberi penyu." 
Psalms103:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha, mweya wangu; Zvose zviri mukati mangu ngazvirumbidze zita rake dzvene." 
Psalms103:2 Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu, Urege kukanganwa mikomborero yake;" 
Psalms103:3 Iye, anokanganwira zvakaipa zvako zvose; Anoporesa kurwara kwako kwose;" 
Psalms103:4 Anodzikinura upenyu hwako pakuparadzwa; Anokuisa korona younyoro nengoni; 
Psalms103:5 Anogutisa mwoyo wako nezvakanaka; Kuti utsva hwako huvandudzwe segondo. 
Psalms103:6 Jehovha anoita zvinhu zvakarurama, Nokururamisira vose vanomanikidzwa." 
Psalms103:7 Akazivisa Mosesi nzira dzake, Navana VaIsiraeri zvaakaita." 
Psalms103:8 Jehovha ane tsitsi nenyasha, Haachimbidziki kutsamwa, ane ngoni zhinji." 
Psalms103:9 Haangarambi achirwa; Uye haangarambi akatsamwa nokusingaperi. 
Psalms103:10 Haana kutiitira sezvakafanira zvivi zvedu, Kana kutipa mubairo sezvakafanira zvakaipa zvedu." 
Psalms103:11 Nokuti sokukwirira kwokudenga kumusoro, Ndizvo zvakaita kukura kwengoni dzake kuna vanomutya." 
Psalms103:12 Sokuva kure kwamabvazuva namavirira, Saizvozvo akabvisa kudarika kwedu kwose kure nesu." 
Psalms103:13 Sokunzwira tsitsi kwababa vana vake, Saizvozvo Jehovha anonzwira tsitsi vanomutya." 
Psalms103:14 Nokuti iye anoziva chatakaitwa nacho, Anorangarira kuti tiri guruva." 
Psalms103:15 Kana ari munhu, mazuva ake akaita souswa; Seruva resango, iye anokura saizvozvo." 
Psalms103:16 Nokuti imhepo inopfuura pamusoro paro, onei raenda; Nenzvimbo yaro haicharizivi." 
Psalms103:17 Asi ngoni dzaJehovha dziripo nokusingaperi–peri kuna vanomutya, Nokururama kwake kuvana vavana vavo;" 
Psalms103:18 kuna ivo vanochengeta sungano yake, Nokuna vanorangarira zvaakaraira, kuti vazviite." 
Psalms103:19 Jehovha akasimbisa chigaro chake choushe kudenga–denga; Ushe hwake hunobata zvinhu zvose. 
Psalms103:20 Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi vatumwa vake; Imi mhare dzine simba, munoita zvaakataura, Muchiteerera izwi reshoko rake." 
Psalms103:21 Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi hondo dzake dzose; Imi vashumiri vake, vanoita zvinomufadza." 
Psalms103:22 Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi mabasa ake ose, Panzvimbo dzose dzoumambo hwake; Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu!" 
Psalms104:1 Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu! Jehovha Mwari wangu, muri mukuru kwazvo; Makafukidzwa nokukudzwa noumambo." 
Psalms104:2 Imi munozvifukidza nechiedza sechisimiro; Munotatamura kudenga–denga somucheka wetende; 
Psalms104:3 Ndiye anoteya matanda edzimba dzake mumvura; Anoita makore ngoro yake; Anofamba pamusoro pamapapiro emhepo; 
Psalms104:4 Anoita mhepo nhume dzake; Nomoto, unopfuta, vashumiri vake;" 
Psalms104:5 Akateya nheyo dzapasi; Kuti parege kuzununguswa nokusingaperi," 
Psalms104:6 Makapafukidza nemvura yakadzika sechisimiro; Mvura zhinji yakamira pamusoro pamakomo," 
Psalms104:7 Makati muchituka ikatiza; Izwi rokutinhira kwenyu rakati richinzwika, ikachimbidzika kuenda." 
Psalms104:8 Makomo akakwira, mipata yakaderera; Ikaenda kunzvimbo yamakaigadzirira," 
Psalms104:9 Makaitarira muganho, kuti irege kudarika; Kuti irege kudzoka kuzofukidza pasizve." 
Psalms104:10 Anotuma matsime mumipata; Mvura inoyerera napakati pamakomo; 
Psalms104:11 Anonwisa mhuka dzose dzesango; Mbizi dzinopedza nyota yadzo. 
Psalms104:12 Shiri dzokudenga dzinogara paari, Dzinorira pakati pamatavi." 
Psalms104:13 Anodiridza makomo ari padzimba dzake; Pasi panogutiswa nechibereko chamabasa enyu. 
Psalms104:14 Anomeresa uswa hwezvipfuwo, Nemiriwo, inobatsira vanhu; Kuti abudise zvokudya pasi;" 
Psalms104:15 Newaini inofadza mwoyo womunhu, Namafuta anobwinyisa chiso chake, Nechingwa chinosimbisa mwoyo womunhu." 
Psalms104:16 Miti yaJehovha inoguta; Iyo misidhari yeRebhanoni yaakasima; 
Psalms104:17 Apo panovaka shiri matendere adzo, Kana riri zimudo, miti yemisipiresi ndiyo imba yaro." 
Psalms104:18 Makomo marefu ndeetsoma; Matombo ndihwo utiziro hwembira. 
Psalms104:19 Akatara mwedzi kuti uratidze nguva; Zuva rinoziva nguva yokuvira kwaro. 
Psalms104:20 Munoita rima, usiku ndokuvapo; Panguva iyo mhuka dzose dzedondo dzinobuda." 
Psalms104:21 Vana veshumba vanoomba vachitsvaka zvavangauraya, Vanotsvaka zvokudya zvavo kuna Mwari." 
Psalms104:22 Kana zuva richibuda, dzinoenda hadzo, Dzichindovata mumapako adzo." 
Psalms104:23 Zvino munhu obudira kubasa rake. Nokumurimo wake kusvikira madekwana. 
Psalms104:24 Haiwa Jehovha, mabasa enyu mazhinji sei! Makaaita ose nenjere; Pasi pazere nepfuma yenyu." 
Psalms104:25 Hero gungwa, rakakura ibamhi, Mukati maro mune zvinhu zvinokambaira zvisingagoni kuverengwa, Zvipenyu zviduku nezvikuru." 
Psalms104:26 Hezvo zvikepe, zvinofamba; Heyo ngwena yamakaumba, kuti itambe mariri." 
Psalms104:27 Izvi zvose zvinokumirirai, Kuti muzvipe zvokudya zvazvo nenguva yakafanira." 
Psalms104:28 Zvamunozvipa imi, ndizvo zvazvinounganidza; Munotadzanura ruoko rwenyu, izvo ndokuguta nezvakanaka." 
Psalms104:29 Munovanza chiso chenyu, izvo ndokuvhunduswa; Munozvitorera mweya wazvo, izvo ndokufa, Zvichidzokera kuguruva razvo." 
Psalms104:30 Munotuma mweya wenyu, izvo ndokusikwa; Munovandudza chiso chevhu." 
Psalms104:31 Kubwinya kwaJehovha ngakugare nokusingaperi; Jehovha ngaafarire mabasa ake; 
Psalms104:32 Iye anotarira pasi, ipo ndokubvunda; Unonyangata makomo, iwo ndokubudisa utsi." 
Psalms104:33 Ndichaimbira Jehovha panguva yose youpenyu hwangu; Ndichaimbira Mwari wangu nziyo dzokurumbidza ndichiripo. 
Psalms104:34 Kurangarira kwangu ngakumufadze; Ndichafara kwazvo muna Jehovha. 
Psalms104:35 Vatadzi ngavaparadzwe pasi, Navakaipa ngavarege kuzovapo. Rumbidzai Jehovha, mweya wangu. Hareruya." 
Psalms105:1 Vongai Jehovha, mudane zita rake; Zivisai zvaakaita pakati pendudzi dzavanhu." 
Psalms105:2 Muimbirei, mumuimbire nziyo dzokukudza; Rondedzerai mabasa ake ose anoshamisa." 
Psalms105:3 Zvirumbidzei muzita rake dzvene; Mwoyo yavanotsvaka Jehovha ngaifare kwazvo. 
Psalms105:4 Tsvakai Jehovha nesimba rake; Tsvakai chiso chake nguva dzose. 
Psalms105:5 Rangarirai mabasa ake anoshamisa, aakaita; Zvishamiso zvake, nezvaakatonga nomuromo wake;" 
Psalms105:6 Imi vana vaAbhurahamu, muranda wake, Imi vanakomana vaJakobho, vasanangurwa vake." 
Psalms105:7 Ndiye Jehovha Mwari wedu; Zvaakatonga zviri pasi pose. 
Psalms105:8 Wakarangarira sungano yake nokusingaperi, Iro shoko raakaraira kumarudzi ane chiuru;" 
Psalms105:9 Iyo sungano yaakaita naAbhurahamu, Nemhiko yake kuna Isaka." 
Psalms105:10 Akazvisimbisira Jakobho, kuti uve mutemo, Kuna Isiraeri kuti ive sungano isingaperi;" 
Psalms105:11 Achiti, “Ndichakupa iwe nyika yeKenani, Uve mugove wenhaka yenyu;”" 
Psalms105:12 Panguva yavakanga vachiri varume vashoma pakuverengwa, Zvirokwazvo, vashoma kwazvo, navatorwa mairi;" 
Psalms105:13 Vakafamba–famba vachibva kuno rumwe rudzi vachienda kuno rumwe, Nokubva kunoumwe ushe vachienda kuna vamwe vanhu." 
Psalms105:14 Haana kutendera munhu kuvaitira zvakaipa; Zvirokwazvo, wakatuka madzimambo nokuda kwavo;" 
Psalms105:15 Achiti, “Musagunzva vazodzwa vangu, Navaporofita vangu musavaitira chakaipa.”" 
Psalms105:16 Akadana nzara kuti iuye panyika; Akavhuna mudonzvo wose wechingwa. 
Psalms105:17 Akatuma murume pamberi pavo; Josefa akatengeswa akava muranda; 
Psalms105:18 Vakakuvadza tsoka dzake nezvisungo zvesimbi, Akasungwa namaketani amatare;" 
Psalms105:19 Kusvikira panguva yakaitika shoko rake; Shoko raJehovha rakamuidza. 
Psalms105:20 Mambo akatuma nhume akamusunungura; Mubati wendudzi dzavanhu, akamuregedza." 
Psalms105:21 Akamuita ishe weimba yake, Nomubati wepfuma yake yose;" 
Psalms105:22 Kuti araire machinda ake nokuda kwake, Nokudzidzisa vakuru vake huchenjeri." 
Psalms105:23 Isiraeri akasvikawo Ijipiti; NaJakobho wakagara ari mutorwa panyika yaHamu. 
Psalms105:24 Akawanza vanhu vake kwazvo, Akavapa simba rakapfuura ravadzivisi vavo." 
Psalms105:25 Wakashandura mwoyo yavo kuti vavenge vanhu vake, Kuti vanyengere varanda vake." 
Psalms105:26 Akatuma Mosesi muranda wake, NaAroni waakanga asanangura." 
Psalms105:27 Ivo vakaratidza zviratidzo zvake pakati pavo, Nezvishamiso panyika yaHamu." 
Psalms105:28 Akatuma rima, akaisvibisa; Vakasamukira mashoko ake." 
Psalms105:29 Akashandura mvura yavo yose, ikaita ropa, Akauraya hove dzavo." 
Psalms105:30 Nyika yavo yakazara namatatya, Mudzimba dzamadzimambo avo." 
Psalms105:31 Akataura, mapupira enhunzi akasvika, Nenda panyika yavo yose." 
Psalms105:32 Akavapa chimvuramabwe panzvimbo yemvura, Uye moto wakapfuta munyika yavo." 
Psalms105:33 Wakarovawo mizambiringa yavo nemionde yavo; Akavhuna–vhunawo miti yenyika yavo. 
Psalms105:34 Akataura, mhashu dzikasvika, Namagwatakwata asingagoni kuverengwa." 
Psalms105:35 Zvikapedza miriwo yose munyika yavo, Nokupedza zvibereko zvevhu ravo." 
Psalms105:36 Akarovawo matangwe ose munyika yavo, Ivo vokutanga vesimba ravo rose." 
Psalms105:37 Akavabudisa vane sirivha nendarama; Kwakanga kusina nomumwe pakati pamarudzi avo wakashaiwa simba. 
Psalms105:38 Nyika yeIjipiti yakafara pakubva kwavo, Nokuti vakanga vabatwa nokutya nokuda kwavo." 
Psalms105:39 Wakatatanura gore rikava chifukidzo; Nomoto kuzovhenekera usiku. 
Psalms105:40 Vakakumbira, akauyisa zvihuta, Akavagutisa nechingwa chakabva kudenga." 
Psalms105:41 Akazarura dombo, mvura zhinji ikadzutuka; Ikayerera pakanga pakaoma sorwizi." 
Psalms105:42 Nokuti akarangarira shoko rake dzvene, NaAbhurahamu muranda wake." 
Psalms105:43 Akabudisa vanhu vake nomufaro, Navasanangurwa vake vachiimba." 
Psalms105:44 Akavapa nyika dzavahedheni; Vakazvitorera zvakanga zvabatwa nendudzi dzavanhu; 
Psalms105:45 Kuti vachengete zvaakatema, Nokuteerera mirairo yake. Hareruya." 
Psalms106:1 Hareruya. Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms106:2 Ndianiko angareva zvinhu zvine simba zvakaitwa naJehovha, Kana kududzira kurumbidza kwake kwose?" 
Psalms106:3 Vakaropafadzwa vanochengeta kururama, Naiye anoita zvakarurama nguva dzose." 
Psalms106:4 Ndirangarirei Jehovha, nounyoro hwamunahwo kuvanhu venyu; Ndishanyirei noruponeso rwenyu." 
Psalms106:5 Kuti ndione kukomborerwa kwavasanangurwa venyu, Kuti ndifare kwazvo nomufaro wavanhu venyu, Kuti ndirumbidze pamwechete nenhaka yenyu." 
Psalms106:6 Takatadza pamwechete namadzibaba edu, Takaita pamwechete namadzibaba edu, Takaita zvisina kururama, takaita zvakaipa." 
Psalms106:7 Madzibaba edu haana kunzwisisa zvishamiso zvenyu paIjipiti; Haana kurangarira ngoni dzenyu zhinji; Asi vakakumukirai pagungwa, ipo paGungwa Dzvuku." 
Psalms106:8 Kunyangwe zvakadaro akavaponesa nokuda kwezita rake, Kuti azivise simba rake guru." 
Psalms106:9 Akarairawo Gungwa Dzvuku, rikapwa, Akavafambisa pakadzika sapanenge pabani." 
Psalms106:10 Akavaponesa paruoko rwowaivavenga. Akavadzikinura paruoko rwomuvengi. 
Psalms106:11 Mvura zhinji yakafukidza vadzivisi vavo; Kwakanga kusina nomumwe wavo akasara. 
Psalms106:12 Ipapo vakatenda mashoko ake; Vakaimba vachimurumbidza. 
Psalms106:13 Vakachimbidzika kukanganwa mabasa ake; Havana kurindira zano rake. 
Psalms106:14 Asi vakachiva kwazvo–kwazvo murenje, Vakaidza Mwari mugwenga." 
Psalms106:15 Akavapa chavakakumbira; Asi akatuma kuonda mumweya yavo. 
Psalms106:16 Vakagodora Mosesi pamisasa, NaAroni, mutsvene waJehovha." 
Psalms106:17 Pasi pakashama pakamedza Dhatani, Pakafukidza boka raAbhirami." 
Psalms106:18 Moto ukapfuta pakati peboka ravo; Murazvo ukapisa vakaipa. 
Psalms106:19 Vakaita mhuru paHorebhi, Vakanamata mufananidzo wakaumbwa." 
Psalms106:20 Vakatsinhana saizvozvo kubwinya kwavo Nomufananidzo wemombe, inochera bundo." 
Psalms106:21 Vakakanganwa Mwari muponesi wavo, Wakaita zvinhu zvikuru muIjipiti;" 
Psalms106:22 Mabasa anoshamisa munyika yaHamu, Nezvinhu zvinotyisa paGungwa Dzvuku." 
Psalms106:23 Saka akati, “Ndinoda kuvaparadza; Dai Mosesi musanangurwa wake asina kumira pamberi pake ipo pakuputsika, Kuti adzore kutsamwa kwake, arege kuvaparadza.”" 
Psalms106:24 Zvirokwazvo, vakazvidza nyika inofadza, Havana kutenda shoko rake;" 
Psalms106:25 Asi vakanyunyuta mumatende avo, Vakasateerera izwi raJehovha." 
Psalms106:26 Saka wakavasimudzira ruoko rwake. Kuti avaparadze murenje; 
Psalms106:27 Uye kuti aparadze vana vavo pakati pavahedheni. Avaparadzire panyika dzose. 
Psalms106:28 Vakazvibatanidzawo naBhaaripeori, Vakadya zvakabayirwa vakafa." 
Psalms106:29 Naizvozvo vakamutsamwisa nezvavakaita; Denda ndokupinda pakati pavo. 
Psalms106:30 Ipapo Finiasi akasimuka, akaita zvakarurama; Denda ndokuguma." 
Psalms106:31 Izvozvo zvikanzi kwaari kururama, Kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi nokusingaperi." 
Psalms106:32 Vakamutsamwisawo pamvura zhinji yeMeribha, Naizvozvo Mosesi akaoneswa nhamo nokuda kwavo;" 
Psalms106:33 Nokuti vakamukira mweya wake, Iye akataura nehasha nemiromo yake." 
Psalms106:34 Havana kuparadza ndudzi dzavanhu, Sezvavakanga varairwa naJehovha;" 
Psalms106:35 Asi vakavhengana navahedheni, Vakadzidza mabasa avo;" 
Psalms106:36 Vakashumira zvifananidzo zvavo; Izvo zvikava musungo kwavari. 
Psalms106:37 Zvirokwazvo, vakabayira mweya yakaipa vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo," 
Psalms106:38 Vakateura ropa risina mhosva, iro ravanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo, Vakavabayira zvifananidzo zveKenani; Nyika ikasvibiswa neropa." 
Psalms106:39 Vakasvibiswa saizvozvo namabasa avo, Vakapata pane zvavakaita." 
Psalms106:40 Saka kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira vanhu vake, Akasema nhaka yake." 
Psalms106:41 Akavaisa muruoko rwavahedheni; Vakavavenga ndivo vaivabata. 
Psalms106:42 Vavengi vavo vakavamanikidzawo, Vakaiswa pasi poruoko rwavo." 
Psalms106:43 Akavarwira kazhinji, Asi vakamumukira pakurangana kwavo, Vakanyudzwa muzvakaipa zvavo." 
Psalms106:44 Kunyangwe zvakadaro akatarira kutambudzika kwavo, Panguva yaakanzwa kuchema kwavo;" 
Psalms106:45 Akarangarira sungano yake nokuda kwavo, Akazvidemba nokuda kwokuwanda kwengoni dzake." 
Psalms106:46 Akavanzwisawo tsitsi Navose vakanga vavatapa. 
Psalms106:47 Tiponesei, Jehovha Mwari wedu, Tiunganidzei, tibve pakati pavahedheni, Kuti tivonge zita renyu dzvene, Tifarisise pakukurumbidzai." 
Psalms106:48 Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakudzwe, Kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi. Vanhu vose ngavati, “Ameni.” Hareruya." 
Psalms107:1 “Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi.”" 
Psalms107:2 Vakadzikinurwa vaJehovha ngavadaro, Ivo vaakadzikinura muruoko rwomudzivisi;" 
Psalms107:3 Akavaunganidza panyika dzose, Kumabvazuva nokumavirira, Kumusoro nezasi." 
Psalms107:4 Vakafamba–famba murenje munzira yomugwenga; Havana kuwana muguta mavangagara. 
Psalms107:5 Vakafa nenzara nenyota, Mweya wavo ukaziya mukati mavo." 
Psalms107:6 Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo, Iye akavarwira panjodzi dzavo." 
Psalms107:7 Wakavafambisawo nenzira yakarurama, Kuti vasvike kuguta rokugara." 
Psalms107:8 Haiwa, dai vanhu vachirumbidza Jehovha nokuda kwokunaka kwake, Uye nokuda kwamabasa ake, anoshamisa, aakaitira vanakomana vavanhu!" 
Psalms107:9 Nokuti anogutisa mweya, une nyota, Uye mweya, une nzara, anouzadza nezvakanaka." 
Psalms107:10 Ndivo, vakanga vagere murima nomumvuri worufu, Vakanga vakasungwa mukutambudzika namatare," 
Psalms107:11 Nokuti vakamukira mashoko aMwari, Vakashora zano roWokumusorosoro;" 
Psalms107:12 Saka wakaninipisa mwoyo yavo nokutambura; Vakawira pasi, kukasava nomunhu anobatsira." 
Psalms107:13 Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha panhamo yavo, Akavaponesa pamatambudziko avo." 
Psalms107:14 Akavabudisa parima nomumvuri worufu, Akadamburanya zvisungo zvavo." 
Psalms107:15 Haiwa, dai vanhu vachirumbidza Jehovha nokuda kwokunaka kwake, Uye nokuda kwamabasa ake, anoshamisa, aakaitira vanakomana vavanhu!" 
Psalms107:16 Nokuti wakavhuna masuwo endarira, Nokuguranya mazariro amatare." 
Psalms107:17 Mapenzi anotambudzika nokuda kwokudarika kwavo, Uye nokuda kwazvakaipa zvavo." 
Psalms107:18 Mweya wavo unosema zvokudya zvose; Vanoswedera pedyo namasuwo orufu. 
Psalms107:19 Zvino vochema kuna Jehovha panhamo yavo, Iye anovaponesa pamatambudziko avo." 
Psalms107:20 Anotuma shoko rake, ndokuvaporesa, Nokuvarwira pakuparadzwa kwavo." 
Psalms107:21 Haiwa, dai vanhu vachirumbidza Jehovha nokuda kwokunaka kwake, Uye nokuda kwamabasa ake anoshamisa, aakaitira vanakomana vavanhu!" 
Psalms107:22 Ngavabayire zvibairo zvokuvonga, Nokududzira mabasa ake nokuimba." 
Psalms107:23 Avo, vanoburukira kugungwa muzvikepe, Vanoshambadzira kumvura zhinji;" 
Psalms107:24 Ndivo vanoona mabasa aJehovha, Nezvishamiso zvake pakadzika." 
Psalms107:25 Nokuti anoraira, ndokumutsa dutu guru, Rinomutsa mafungu aro." 
Psalms107:26 Vanosimudzirwa kudenga; ndokuburukirazve pakadzika; Mweya wavo unonyauka nokuda kwenhamo. 
Psalms107:27 Vanondeya–ndeya nokudzengedzeka somunhu akabatwa. Vapera mano. 
Psalms107:28 Zvino vochema kuna Jehovha panhamo yavo, Iye ndokuvabudisa pamatambudziko avo." 
Psalms107:29 Anonyaradza dutu remhepo, Mafungu aro ndokunyarara." 
Psalms107:30 Ipapo vanofara nokuti anyarara; Zvino iye ndokuvasvitsa pakadzikama pavaida kuvapo. 
Psalms107:31 Haiwa, dai vanhu vachirumbidza Jehovha nokuda kwokunaka kwake, Uye nokuda kwamabasa ake anoshamisa aakaitira vanakomana vavanhu!" 
Psalms107:32 Ngavamukudzisewo paungano yavanhu, Vamurumbidze pamakurukota avakuru." 
Psalms107:33 Anoshandura nzizi dzikaita renje, Namatsime emvura aite nyika yakaoma;" 
Psalms107:34 Nyika, inobereka zvakanaka, ive sango rebare, Nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavanogara mairi." 
Psalms107:35 Anoshandura renje riite dziva remvura, Nenyika yakaoma iite matsime emvura." 
Psalms107:36 Ndipapo paanogarisa vane nzara, Kuti vamutse guta rokugaramo;" 
Psalms107:37 Vadyare minda, vasime minda yemizambiringa, Vawane zvibereko zvizhinji." 
Psalms107:38 Akavaropafadzawo, vakawanda kwazvo; Akasatendera zvipfuwo zvavo kutapudzwa." 
Psalms107:39 Zvino vakatapudzika nokuva vashoma. Nemhaka yokumanikidzwa, nenhamo, nokuzvidya mwoyo." 
Psalms107:40 Anodurura kuzvidza pamusoro pamachinda, Achivadzungaidza murenje musina nzira." 
Psalms107:41 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, anogadza mushaiwi kumusoro kusina dambudziko, Achimumutsira mhuri samapoka amakwai." 
Psalms107:42 Akarurama achazviona, akafara; Uye zvakaipa zvose zvichadzivirwa muromo wazvo." 
Psalms107:43 Ani naani akachenjera achacherechedza zvinhu izvozvi, Vachafunga unyoro hwaJehovha." 
Psalms108:1 Mwoyo wangu wakasimba, Mwari; Ndichaimba, zvirokwazvo, ndichaimba nziyo dzokurumbidza, nomweya wangu wose." 
Psalms108:2 Muka iwe mutengeranwa nembira; Ini ndimene ndichamuka mangwanani. 
Psalms108:3 Ndichakuvongai Jehovha, pakati pendudzi dzavanhu; Ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza pakati pavahedheni." 
Psalms108:4 Nokuti ngoni dzenyu ihuru kumusoro kwokudenga–denga, Uye zvokwadi yenyu inosvikira kudenga rose." 
Psalms108:5 Imi mukudzwe Mwari, kumusoro kwokudenga–denga; Kurumbidzwa kwenyu ngakuve kumusoro kwapasi pose." 
Psalms108:6 Kuti vadikanwi venyu varwirwe, Tiponesei noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, mutipindure." 
Psalms108:7 Mwari akataura pautsvene hwake, achiti, “Ndichafara kwazvo; Ndichaganhura Shekemu, ndichayera mupata weSukoti." 
Psalms108:8 Giriadhi ndeyangu naManase ndeyangu; Efuremuwo inhaviro yomusoro wangu; Judha ndiyo tsvimbo yangu youshe. 
Psalms108:9 Moabhu ndiwo mudziyo wangu wokushambidzira; Pamusoro peEdhomu ndipo pandichakandira shangu yangu; Ndichapururudza nokuda kwaFirisitia.” 
Psalms108:10 Ndianiko achandiisa muguta rakakombwa namasvingo? Ndianiko achandiperekedza ndiende Edhomu? 
Psalms108:11 Hamuna kutirasha here, Mwari? Hamubudi Mwari, nehondo dzedu." 
Psalms108:12 Tibatsirei pamudzivisi wedu; Nokuti kubatsira kwavanhu hakuna maturo. 
Psalms108:13 MunaMwari tichaita noumhare; Nokuti ndiye achatsika vadzivisi vedu pasi. 
Psalms109:1 Regai kunyarara, Mwari wokurumbidza kwangu;" 
Psalms109:2 Nokuti vakandishamisira muromo wowakaipa, uye muromo unonyengedzera; Vakandireva norurimi rune nhema." 
Psalms109:3 Vakandikombawo namashoko embengo, Vakarwa neni pasina mhosva." 
Psalms109:4 Pakuvada kwangu vava vadzivisi vangu; Asi ini ndinonyengetera hangu. 
Psalms109:5 Vakanditsivira zvakaipa pane zvakanaka, zvandakavaitira, Nembengo pakuvada kwangu." 
Psalms109:6 Isai munhu akaipa ave ishe wake; Mudzivisi ngaamire paruoko rwake rworudyi. 
Psalms109:7 Kana achitongwa, ngaapiwe mhosva; Munyengetero wake ngaushandurwe zvivi." 
Psalms109:8 Mazuva ake ngaave mashoma; Mumwe ngaatore basa rake. 
Psalms109:9 Vana vake ngavave nherera, Uye mukadzi wake ngaave chirikadzi." 
Psalms109:10 Vana vake ngavave vadzungairi, navapemhi; Ngavatsvake zvokudya kure namatongo avo." 
Psalms109:11 Waakadyirwa chikwereti ngaatore zvose zvaanazvo; Vatorwa ngavapambe zvose zvaakabatira. 
Psalms109:12 Ngakushaikwe munhu anomunzwira ngoni; Ngakushaikwe munhu ane tsitsi nenherera dzake. 
Psalms109:13 Vana vake ngavarove; Zita ravo ngaridzimwe parudzi runotevera. 
Psalms109:14 Zvakaipa zvamadzibaba ake ngazvirangarirwe naJehovha; Zvivi zvamai vake ngazvirege kudzimwa. 
Psalms109:15 Ngazvirambe zviri pamberi paJehovha nguva dzose, Kuti aparadze kurangarirwa kwavo pasi." 
Psalms109:16 Nemhaka yokuti haana kurangarira kunzwira ngoni, Asi wakatambudza murombo nomushaiwi, Neanomwoyo wakaputsika, kuti avauraye." 
Psalms109:17 Zvirokwazvo, kutuka ndizvo zvaakada, zvikauyawo kwaari; Kukomborera haana kukufarira kukagara kure naye." 
Psalms109:18 Akazvifukidzawo nokutuka, zvikaita senguo yake, Zvikapinda mukati make semvura, Samafuta mumapfupa ake." 
Psalms109:19 Ngazvive kwaari sechisimiro chaanofukidza nacho, Segwarada raakazvisunga naro nguva dzose." 
Psalms109:20 Uyu ndiwo mubairo wavadzivisi vangu, unobva kuna Jehovha, vanotaurira mweya wangu zvakaipa." 
Psalms109:21 Asi imi Jehovha Ishe, ndiitirei zvakanaka nokuda kwezita renyu; Ngoni dzenyu zvadzakanaka, ndirwirei." 
Psalms109:22 Nokuti ndiri murombo nomushaiwi, Nomwoyo wangu wakakuvadzwa mukati mangu." 
Psalms109:23 Ndaenda somumvuri wareba; Ndapepereswa semhashu. 
Psalms109:24 Mabvi angu haachine simba nokuzvinyima zvokudya; Nyama yangu yaonda nokushaiwa mafuta. 
Psalms109:25 Ndavawo chinhu chinozvidzwa navo; Kana vachindiona vanodzungudza misoro yavo. 
Psalms109:26 Ndibatsirei, Jehovha, Mwari wangu; Ndiponesei nengoni dzenyu." 
Psalms109:27 Kuti vazive kuti ndirwo ruoko rwenyu; Kuti imi Jehovha, ndimi makazviita." 
Psalms109:28 Ngavatuke havo, asi imi ropafadzai; Kana vachisimuka, vachanyadziswa, asi muranda wenyu achafara kwazvo." 
Psalms109:29 Vadzivisi vangu ngavafukidzwe nokunyadziswa, Ngavazvifukidze nokunyara kwavo sejasi." 
Psalms109:30 Ndichavonga Jehovha kwazvo nomuromo wangu; Zvirokwazvo, ndichamurumbidza pakati pavazhinji." 
Psalms109:31 Nokuti iye achamira kuruoko rworudyi rwomushaiwi, Kuti amuponese pana vanotonga mweya wake."
