Psalms110:1 Jehovha akati kuna She wangu, “Gara kurudyi rwangu, Kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitsiko chetsoka dzako.”" 
Psalms110:2 Jehovha achatambanudza tsvimbo yesimba rako ribude paZioni, achiti, “Bata ushe pakati pavavengi vako.”" 
Psalms110:3 Vanhu vako vachazviisa nomwoyo wose pazuva rauchaunganidza hondo yako, Nenguva tsvene, pachizvaro chamangwanani, Ndipo pane dova rohujaya hwako." 
Psalms110:4 Jehovha akapika, haangazvidembi, achiti, “Iwe uri mupristi nokusingaperi. Unorudzi naMerikizedheki.”" 
Psalms110:5 Ishe parudyi rwako Achaparadza madzimambo pazuva rokutsamwa kwake. 
Psalms110:6 Iye achatonga pakati pavahedheni, Achazadza nyika nezvitunha; Achaparadza misoro panyika zhinji." 
Psalms110:7 Achanwa parukova panzira; Saka achasimudza musoro wake. 
Psalms111:1 Hareruya! Ndichavonga Jehovha nomwoyo wangu wose, Parangano yavakarurama, napaungano." 
Psalms111:2 Mabasa aJehovha makuru, Anocherechedzwa navose vanoafarira." 
Psalms111:3 Basa rake rinoratidza kukudzwa noumambo; Kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms111:4 Mabasa ake, anoshamisa, wakaaita chiyeudziro; Jehovha ane nyasha netsitsi." 
Psalms111:5 Akapa zvokudya vanomutya; Acharangarira sungano yake nokusingaperi. 
Psalms111:6 Akaratidza vanhu vake simba ramabasa ake, Zvaakavapa nhaka yavahedheni." 
Psalms111:7 Mabasa amaoko ake izvokwadi nokururamisira; Mirairo yake yose yakasimba. 
Psalms111:8 Yakasimbiswa nokusingaperi–peri, Yakaitwa nezvokwadi nokururama." 
Psalms111:9 Akatumira vanhu vake rudzikinuro; Akaraira sungano yake nokusingaperi; Zita rake idzvene rinotyisa. 
Psalms111:10 Kutya Jehovha ndiko kutanga kwouchenjeri; Vose vanozviita vanomurangariro wakanaka; Kurumbidzwa kwake kunogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms112:1 Hareruya! Akaropafadzwa munhu anotya Jehovha, Anofarira zvikuru mirairo yake." 
Psalms112:2 Vana vake vachava nesimba pasi; Rudzi rwowakarurama rucharopafadzwa. 
Psalms112:3 Pfuma nezvakawanda zviri mumba make; Kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms112:4 Akarurama anobudirwa nechiedza parima; Iye ane nyasha, netsitsi nokururama." 
Psalms112:5 Ane mufaro munhu uyo anoita nenyasha, anopa chikwereti; Acharuramisirwa mhaka yake pakutonga." 
Psalms112:6 Nokuti haangatongozununguswi; Akarurama acharamba achirangarirwa nokusingaperi. 
Psalms112:7 Haangatyi mashoko ezvinhu zvakaipa; Mwoyo wake wakasimba, uchavimba naJehovha." 
Psalms112:8 Mwoyo wake wakasimbiswa, haangatyi, Kusvikira aona kukundwa kwavadzivisi vake." 
Psalms112:9 Akaparadzira, akapa vashaiwi; Kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi; Runyanga rwake ruchakwiridzwa nokukudzwa." 
Psalms112:10 Akaipa achazviona, ndokufa neshungu; Achageda–geda meno ake, ndokunyauka; Kuda kwowakaipa kuchaparara." 
Psalms113:1 Hareruya! Rumbidzai, imi varanda vaJehovha, Rumbidzai zita raJehovha." 
Psalms113:2 Zita raJehovha ngarikudzwe Kubva panguva ino kusvikira pakusingaperi. 
Psalms113:3 Kubva pakubuda kwezuva kusvikira pakuvira kwaro Zita raJehovha rinofanira kurumbidzwa. 
Psalms113:4 Jehovha uri kumusoro kwavahedheni vose, Nokubwinya kwake kumusoro kwokudenga–denga." 
Psalms113:5 Ndianiko akafanana naJehovha Mwari wedu, Iye anogara kumusoro," 
Psalms113:6 Iye anozvidukupisa kuti aone Zviri kudenga napasi? 
Psalms113:7 Anosimudza murombo abve muguruva, Nomushaiwi anomumutsa abve padurunhuru;" 
Psalms113:8 Kuti amugarise pamwechete namachinda, Iwo machinda avanhu vake." 
Psalms113:9 Anogarisa mukadzi asingabereki mumba, Ave mai vanofara navana. Hareruya!" 
Psalms114:1 Pakubuda kwaIsiraeri muIjipiti, Imba yaJakobho ichibuda pakati pavanhu vakanga vanorumwe rurimi;" 
Psalms114:2 Judha akaitwa imba yake tsvene, NaIsiraeri ushe hwake." 
Psalms114:3 Gungwa rakazviona, rikatiza; Jodhani rwakadzokera shure." 
Psalms114:4 Makomo akapembera samakondobwe, Nezvikomo samakwayana." 
Psalms114:5 Unonzweiko iwe gungwa, zvaunotiza iwe? Newe Jodhani, zvaunodzokera shure?" 
Psalms114:6 Nemi makomo, zvamunopembera samakondobwe; Nemi zvikomo, samakwayana?" 
Psalms114:7 Bvunda iwe pasi, pamberi paShe, Pamberi paMwari waJakobho;" 
Psalms114:8 Iye akashandura dombo, rikava dziva remvura, Nomusarasara, rikava tsime remvura." 
Psalms115:1 Isu kwete, Jehovha, isu kwete, Asi zita renyu ngarikudzwe, Nokuda kwengoni dzenyu, uye nokuda kwokutendeka kwenyu." 
Psalms115:2 Vahedheni vachareverei, vachiti, “Ko Mwari wavo zvino uripi?”" 
Psalms115:3 Asi Mwari wedu ari kudenga–denga; Akaita zvose zvaakada. 
Psalms115:4 Zvifananidzo zvavo sirivha nendarama, Basa ramaoko avanhu." 
Psalms115:5 Zvinemiromo, asi hazvitauri; Nameso zvinawo, asi hazvioni;" 
Psalms115:6 Zvinenzeve, asi hazvinzwi; Nemhino zvinadzo, asi hazvinhuwidzi;" 
Psalms115:7 zvina maoko, asi hazvibati; Namakumbo zvinawo, asi hazvifambi; Hazvitauri napahuro pazvo." 
Psalms115:8 Ivo vanozviita vachafanana nazvo; Zvirokwazvo, navose vanovimba nazvo." 
Psalms115:9 Iwe Isiraeri, vimba naJehovha; Ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo." 
Psalms115:10 Iwe imba yaAroni, vimba naJehovha; Ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo." 
Psalms115:11 Imi munotya Jehovha, vimbai naJehovha; Ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo." 
Psalms115:12 Jehovha akatirangarira; iye achatiropafadza; Acharopafadza imba yaIsiraeri; Acharopafadza imba yaAroni. 
Psalms115:13 Acharopafadza vanotya Jehovha, Vaduku navakuru vose." 
Psalms115:14 Jehovha acharamba achikuwanzai, Imi navana venyu." 
Psalms115:15 Imi makaropafadzwa naJehovha, Iye akaita kudenga napasi." 
Psalms115:16 Kudenga–denga ndiko kudenga–denga kwaJehovha; Asi pasi akapa vanakomana vavanhu. 
Psalms115:17 Vakafa havarumbidzi Jehovha, Kunyangwe ani naani anoburukira kwakanyarara;" 
Psalms115:18 Asi isu hedu tichakudza Jehovha Kubva panguva ino kusvika pakusingaperi. Hareruya! 
Psalms116:1 Ndinoda Jehovha, nokuti anonzwa Izwi rangu nokukumbira kwangu." 
Psalms116:2 Zvaakarereka nzeve yake kwandiri, Ndichadana kwaari mazuva angu ose." 
Psalms116:3 Misungo yorufu yakandikomba, Kurwadziwa kweSheori kwakandibata; Ndakawana kutambudzika nokuchema." 
Psalms116:4 Ipapo ndakadana zita raJehovha; Haiwa Jehovha, ndinonyengetera kuti murwire mweya wangu." 
Psalms116:5 Jehovha ane nyasha, akarurama; Zvirokwazvo, Mwari wedu ane tsitsi." 
Psalms116:6 Jehovha anochengeta vasina mano; Ndakanga ndashaiwa simba, iye akandiponesa." 
Psalms116:7 Dzokera kuzororo rako, mweya wangu; Nokuti Jehovha akakuitira zvakanaka." 
Psalms116:8 Nokuti makarwira mweya wangu parufu; Nameso angu pamisodzi, Netsoka dzangu pakugumburwa." 
Psalms116:9 Ndichafamba pamberi paJehovha Panyika yavapenyu. 
Psalms116:10 Ndakatenda pakutaura kwangu, ndichiti, “Ndakamanikidzwa kwazvo;”" 
Psalms116:11 Ndakati pakuvhunduka kwangu, “Vanhu vose vanoreva nhema.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ndichavigireiko Jehovha Pamusoro pemikomborero yake yose kwandiri? 
Psalms116:13 Ndichasimudza mukombe wokuponeswa, Ndichidana zita raJehovha." 
Psalms116:14 Ndicharipira Jehovha mhiko dzangu, Ndichazviita pamberi pavanhu vake vose." 
Psalms116:15 Chinhu chinokosha pamberi paJehovha, Ndirwo rufu rwavatsvene vake." 
Psalms116:16 Haiwa Jehovha, zvirokwazvo ndiri muranda wenyu; Ndiri muranda wenyu, mwanakomana womurandakadzi wenyu; Makasunungura misungo yangu." 
Psalms116:17 Ndichakubairai zvibairo zvokuvonga, Ndichidana zita raJehovha." 
Psalms116:18 Ndicharipira Jehovha mhiko dzangu, Ndichazviita pamberi pavanhu vake vose;" 
Psalms116:19 Pavazhe dzeimba yaJehovha, Mukati mako, iwe Jerusaremu. Hareruya!" 
Psalms117:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi ndudzi dzose dzavanhu; Mukudzei, imi vanhu vose." 
Psalms117:2 Nokuti ngoni dzake kwatiri ihuru; Kutendeka kwaJehovha kunogara nokusingaperi. Hareruya! 
Psalms118:1 Vongai Jehovha; nokuti akanaka; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms118:2 Isiraeri zvino ngavati, “Ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi.”" 
Psalms118:3 Imba yaAroni zvino ngaiti, “Ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi.”" 
Psalms118:4 Avo vanotya Jehovha zvino ngavati, “Ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ndakadanidzira kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwangu, Jehovha paakandipindura, akandiisa pakafarikana." 
Psalms118:6 Jehovha ari kurutivi rwangu; handingatyi; Munhu angandiiteiko? 
Psalms118:7 Jehovha ari kurutivi rwangu pakati pavanondibatsira; Saka ndichaona kukundwa kwavanondivenga. 
Psalms118:8 Zviri nani kutizira kuna Jehovha Pakuvimba nomunhu. 
Psalms118:9 Zviri nani kutizira kuna Jehovha Pakuvimba namachinda. 
Psalms118:10 Vahedheni vose vakandikomba; Ndichavaparadza nezita raJehovha. 
Psalms118:11 Vakandikomba, zvirokwazvo, vakandikomba, Ndichavaparadza nezita raJehovha." 
Psalms118:12 Vakandikomba senyuchi; vakadzimwa somoto weminzwa; Ndichavaparadza nezita raJehovha. 
Psalms118:13 Kundisundidzira wakandisundidzira iwe kuti ndiwe; Asi Jehovha akandibatsira. 
Psalms118:14 Jehovha ndiye simba rangu norwiyo rwangu; Iye akava muponesi wangu. 
Psalms118:15 Izwi rokufara nerokuponeswa riri mumatende avakarurama; Ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha runokunda. 
Psalms118:16 Ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha rwakasimudzwa, Ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha runokunda." 
Psalms118:17 Handingafi, asi ndichararama, Ndichadudzira mabasa aJehovha." 
Psalms118:18 Kundiranga Jehovha akandiranga; Asi haana kundiisa pakufa. 
Psalms118:19 Ndizarurirei masuwo okururama; Ndichapinda navo, ndivonge Jehovha." 
Psalms118:20 Iri ndiro suwo raJehovha; Vakarurama vachipinda naro. 
Psalms118:21 Ndichakuvongai, nokuti makandipindura, Mukava muponesi wangu." 
Psalms118:22 Ibwe rakaraswa navavaki Ndiro rakazova musoro wekona. 
Psalms118:23 Ichi chinhu chakabva kuna Jehovha; Zvinoshamisa kana tichizviona. 
Psalms118:24 Rino izuva rakaitwa naJehovha; Ngatifare kwazvo tirifarire. 
Psalms118:25 Tiponesei zvino, Jehovha ndizvo zvatinonyengetera; Jehovha, tipei mufaro ndizvo zvatinonyengetera." 
Psalms118:26 Akaropafadzwa iye anouya nezita raJehovha; Takakuropafadzai tiri mumba maJehovha. 
Psalms118:27 Jehovha ndiye Mwari, ndiye akativhenekera; Sungirai chibayiro namabote ipo panyanga dzeatari pamene." 
Psalms118:28 Imi muri Mwari wangu, ndichakuvongai; Muri Mwari wangu, ndichakukudzai." 
Psalms118:29 Vongai Jehovha; nokuti akanaka; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms119:1 Vakaropafadzwa avo vane nzira yakarurama, Vanofamba mumurau waJehovha." 
Psalms119:2 Vakaropafadzwa vanochengeta zvipupuriro zvake, Vanomutsvaka nomwoyo wose." 
Psalms119:3 Zvirokwazvo, havaiti chinhu chisina kururama, Vanofamba munzira dzake." 
Psalms119:4 Makatiraira zvirevo zvenyu, Kuti tizvichengete zvakanaka." 
Psalms119:5 Haiwa, dai nzira dzangu dzakagadzirirwa Kuchengeta mitemo yenyu!" 
Psalms119:6 Ipapo handinganyadziswi, Kana ndichirangarira mirairo yenyu yose." 
Psalms119:7 Ndichakuvongai nomwoyo wakarurama, Kana ndichidzidza zvakatonga zvakarurama." 
Psalms119:8 Ndichachengeta mitemo yenyu; Haiwa, regai kundirasha chose." 
Psalms119:9 Jaya ringaramba richinatsa nzira yaro neiko? Kana richichenjerera sezvinoraira shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:10 Ndakakutsvakai nomwoyo wangu wose; Musanditendera kutsauka pamirairo yenyu. 
Psalms119:11 Shoko renyu ndakariviga mumwoyo wangu, Kuti ndirege kukutadzirai." 
Psalms119:12 Imi munofanira kukudzwa, Jehovha; Ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:13 Ndakadudzira nemiromo yangu Zvose zvamakatonga nomuromo wenyu. 
Psalms119:14 Ndakafara kwazvo munzira yezvipupuriro zvenyu, Sezvandinofarira pfuma yose." 
Psalms119:15 Ndichafungisisa zvirevo zvenyu, Nokurangarira nzira dzenyu." 
Psalms119:16 Ndichazvifadza nemitemo yenyu; Handingakanganwi shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:17 Itirai muranda wenyu zvakanaka, kuti ndirarame; Ipapo ndichachengeta shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:18 Ndisvinudzei meso angu, kuti ndione Zvinhu zvinoshamisa zviri pamurau wenyu." 
Psalms119:19 Nokuti ndiri mutorwa panyika; Regai kundivanzira mirairo yenyu. 
Psalms119:20 Mweya wangu wapera nokushuva Panguva dzose zvamakatonga. 
Psalms119:21 Makaraira vanozvikudza, Ngavatukwe vanotsauka pamirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:22 Bvisai kwandiri kushorwa nokuzvidzwa; Nokuti ndakachengeta zvipupuriro zvenyu. 
Psalms119:23 Machindawo akagara akandireva; Asi muranda wenyu akafungisisa mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:24 Zvipupuriro zvenyuwo zvinondifadza kwazvo, Ndizvo zvinondipa mano." 
Psalms119:25 Mweya wangu unonamatira guruva; Ndiponesei neshoko renyu. 
Psalms119:26 Ndakadudzira nzira dzangu, imi makandipindura; Ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:27 Ndidzidzisei ndinzwisise nzira yezvirevo zvenyu; Ipapo ndichafungisisa mabasa enyu anoshamisa. 
Psalms119:28 Mweya wangu unonyunguruka nokuremerwa; Ndisimbisei sezvinorehwa neshoko renyu. 
Psalms119:29 Bvisai kwandiri nzira yenhema; Nenyasha dzenyu mundipe murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:30 Ndakasanangura nzira yakatendeka; Ndakaisa zvamakatonga pamberi pangu. 
Psalms119:31 Ndinonamatira zvipupuriro zvenyu; Jehovha, regai kundinyadzisa." 
Psalms119:32 Ndichamhanya nenzira yemirairo yenyu, Kana munenge makurisa mwoyo wangu." 
Psalms119:33 Ndidzidzisei, Jehovha, nzira yemitemo yenyu; Ndigoichengeta kusvikira pakuguma." 
Psalms119:34 Ndipei njere, ndichengete murau wenyu; Zvirokwazvo, ndichauchengeta nomwoyo wangu wose." 
Psalms119:35 Ndifambisei munzira yemirairo yenyu; Nokuti ndinoifarira kwazvo. 
Psalms119:36 Kweverai mwoyo wangu kuzvipupuriro zvenyu, Urege kukweverwa mukuchiva." 
Psalms119:37 Dzorai meso angu ndirege kuona zvisina maturo, Mundiponese panzira dzenyu." 
Psalms119:38 Simbisai Shoko renyu kumuranda wenyu, Rakakwanira vanokutyai." 
Psalms119:39 Bvisai kushoorwa kwangu kwandinotya, Nokuti zvamakatonga zvakanaka." 
Psalms119:40 Tarirai, ndakashuva zvirevo zvenyu; Ndiponesei mukururama kwenyu." 
Psalms119:41 Ngoni dzenyu ngadziuyewo kwandiri, Jehovha, Iko kuponesa kwenyu, sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:42 Naizvozvo ndichagona kupindura anondishora; Nokuti ndinovimba neshoko renyu. 
Psalms119:43 Regai kubvisa shoko rezvokwadi chose pamuromo wangu; Nokuti ndakatarira zvamakatonga. 
Psalms119:44 Naizvozvo ndichasichengeta murau wenyu Nokusingaperi–peri. 
Psalms119:45 Ndichasifamba ndakasununguka, Nokuti ndakatsvaka zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:46 Ndichataurawo zvipupuriro zvenyu pamberi pamadzimambo, Ndisinganyadziswi." 
Psalms119:47 Ndichazvifadza kwazvo nemirairo yenyu, Yandinoda." 
Psalms119:48 Ndichasimudzirawo maoko angu kumirairo yenyu, yandinoda; Ndichafungisisa mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:49 Rangarirai shoko renyu kumuranda wenyu, Nokuti makandimutsira tariro." 
Psalms119:50 Ndizvo zvinondinyaradza pakutambudzika kwangu; Nokuti shoko renyu rakandiponesa. 
Psalms119:51 Vanozvikudza vakandiseka kwazvo; Kunyangwe zvakadaro handina kutsauka pamurau wenyu. 
Psalms119:52 Ndakarangarira zvamakatonga kare–kare, Jehovha, Ndikazvinyaradza." 
Psalms119:53 Kutsamwa kukuru kwakandibata, Nokuda kwavakaipa vanorasha murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:54 Mitemo yenyu yaiva nziyo dzangu Mumba muutorwa hwangu. 
Psalms119:55 Ndakarangarira zita renyu, Jehovha, usiku, Ndikachengeta murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:56 Ndizvo zvandakanga ndinazvo, Nokuti ndakachengeta zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:57 Jehovha ndiye mugove wangu; Ndakati, ndichachengeta mashoko enyu." 
Psalms119:58 Ndakakumbira chiso chenyu nomwoyo wangu wose; Ndinzwirei nyasha, sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:59 Ndakafunga nzira dzangu, Ndikadzorera tsoka dzangu kuzvipupuriro zvenyu." 
Psalms119:60 Ndakakurumidza, handina kunonoka Kuchengeta mirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:61 Mabote avakaipa akandimonera; Asi handina kukanganwa murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:62 Ndichamuka pakati pousiku kuti ndikuvongei Pamusoro pezvamakatonga zvakarurama. 
Psalms119:63 Ndiri shamwari yavose vanokutyai, Neyavanochengeta zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:64 Jehovha, pasi pazere nengoni dzenyu; Ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:65 Makaitira muranda wenyu zvakanaka, Jehovha, sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:66 Ndidzidzisei ungwaru hwakanaka nenjere; Nokuti ndakatenda mirairo yenyu. 
Psalms119:67 Ndakati ndichigere kutambudzika ndikarashika; Asi zvino ndinochengeta shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:68 Imi makanaka, uye munoita zvakanaka; Ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:69 Vanozvikudza vakandipomera nhema; Ndichachengeta zvirevo zvenyu nomwoyo wangu wose. 
Psalms119:70 Mwoyo wavo wakakora samafuta; Asi ini ndinofarira murau wenyu kwazvo. 
Psalms119:71 Zvakanga zvakanaka kuti nditambudzike; Kuti ndidzidze mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:72 Murau womuromo wenyu wakanaka kwandiri Kukunda zviuru zvamazana zvendarama nesirivha. 
Psalms119:73 Maoko enyu akandiita nokundisimbisa; Ndipei kunzwisisa, kuti ndidzidze mirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:74 Vanokutyai vachandiona ndokufara; Nokuti ndakatarira shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:75 Ndinoziva, Jehovha, kuti zvamakatonga zvakarurama, Uye kuti makanditambudza nokutendeka." 
Psalms119:76 Ndinokumbira kuti tsitsi dzenyu dzindinyaradze, Sezvamakareva kumuranda wenyu." 
Psalms119:77 Unyoro hwenyu ngauye kwandiri, kuti ndirarame; Nokuti murau wenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu mukuru." 
Psalms119:78 Vanozvikudza ngavanyadziswe; nokuti vakandiitira zvakaipa ndisina mhosva; Asi ndichafungisisa zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:79 Vanokutyai ngavadzokere kwandiri, Vagoziva zvipupuriro zvenyu." 
Psalms119:80 Mwoyo wangu ngaururame pamitemo yenyu; Kuti ndirege kunyadziswa. 
Psalms119:81 Mweya wangu unopanga kuponesa kwenyu; Asi ndinotarira shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:82 Meso angu anopera nokutsvaka shoko renyu, Ndichiti, “Muchandinyaradza rinhiko?”" 
Psalms119:83 Nokuti ndava sehombodo iri muutsi; Kunyangwe zvakadaro handikanganwi mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:84 Mazuva omuranda wenyu manganiko? Muchatonga rinhiko vanonditambudza? 
Psalms119:85 Vanozvikudza vakandicherera hunza, Ivo vasingatereri murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:86 Mirairo yenyu yose yakatendeka; Vanonditambudza ndisina mhosva; ndibatsirei imi. 
Psalms119:87 Vakanga voda kundiparadza pasi; Asi handina kusiya zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:88 Ndiponesei nokuda kwounyoro hwenyu; Naizvozvo ndichachengeta chipupuriro chomuromo wenyu. 
Psalms119:89 Shoko renyu rakasimba kudenga Nokusingaperi, Jehovha." 
Psalms119:90 Kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumarudzi namarudzi; Imi makasimbisa pasi, panoramba pagere." 
Psalms119:91 Zvinoramba zvigere nanhasi sezvamakatema; Nokuti zvinhu zvose varanda venyu. 
Psalms119:92 Dai murau wenyu asina kuva mufaro wangu mukuru, Ndingadai ndakaparara nedambudziko rangu." 
Psalms119:93 Handingatongokanganwi zvirevo zvenyu; Nokuti makandiponesa nazvo. 
Psalms119:94 Ndiri wenyu, ndiponesei; Nokuti ndakatsvaka zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:95 Vakaipa vakandigarira kuti vandiparadze; Asi ndichafunga zvipupuriro zvenyu. 
Psalms119:96 Ndakaona kuguma kwezvose zvakakwana, Asi murairo wenyu mupamhi kwazvo." 
Psalms119:97 Haiwa, ndinoda murau wenyu seiko! Ndicho chandinofungisisa zuva rose." 
Psalms119:98 Mirairo yenyu inondiita akachenjera kupfuura vavengi vangu; Nokuti inogara neni nokusingaperi. 
Psalms119:99 Ndine njere kupfuura vadzidzisi vangu vose; Nokuti zvipupuriro zvenyu ndizvo zvandinofungisisa. 
Psalms119:100 Ndinonzwisisa kupfuura vakakwegura, Nokuti ndakachengeta zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:101 Ndakadzora tsoka dzangu panzira dzose dzakaipa; Kuti ndichengete shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:102 Handina kutsauka pane zvamatonga; Nokuti makandidzidzisa. 
Psalms119:103 Mashoko enyu anonaka seiko mukanwa mangu! Zvirokwazvo, anokunda uchi mumuromo mangu!" 
Psalms119:104 Pazvirevo zvenyu ndinowana njere; Saka ndinovenga nzira dzose dzenhema. 
Psalms119:105 Shoko renyu ndiwo mwenje wetsoka dzangu, Nechiedza panzira yangu." 
Psalms119:106 Ndakapika, ndikazvisimbisa, Kuti ndichachengeta zvamakatonga zvakarurama." 
Psalms119:107 Ndinotambudzika kwazvo; Ndiponesei, Jehovha, neshoko renyu." 
Psalms119:108 Gamuchirai henyu Jehovha ndizvo zvandinokumbira zvipo zvomuromo wangu zvandinopa nomwoyo wangu, Mundidzidzise zvamakatonga." 
Psalms119:109 Mweya wangu unongosiva muruoko rwangu; Kunyangwe zvakadaro handikanganwi murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:110 Vakaipa vakanditeyera musungo; Kunyangwe zvakadaro handina kutsauka pazvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:111 Zvipupuriro zvenyu ndakazviita nhaka yangu nokusingaperi; Nokuti ndizvo zvinofadza mwoyo wangu. 
Psalms119:112 Ndakarerekera mwoyo wangu kuti uite mitemo yenyu, Nokusingaperi, kusvikira pakuguma." 
Psalms119:113 Ndinovenga vane mwoyo miviri; Asi ndinoda murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:114 Imi muri chivando changu nenhoo yangu; Ndinotarira shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:115 Ibvai kwandiri, imi munoita zvakaipa; Kuti ndichengete mirairo yaMwari wangu." 
Psalms119:116 Nditsigirei sezvinoreva shoko renyu, kuti ndirarame; Kuti ndirege kunyadziswa pakutarira kwangu." 
Psalms119:117 Nditsigirei, ndichengetwe, Ndigoramba ndichirangarira mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:118 Makazvidza vose vanotsauka pamitemo yenyu; Nokuti kunyengera kwavo inhema. 
Psalms119:119 Vakaipa vose vapasi munovagumisa sefuro; Saka ndinoda zvipupuriro zvenyu. 
Psalms119:120 Nyama yangu inobvunda nokukutyai; Ndinotya zvamakatonga. 
Psalms119:121 Ndakaita zvakatongwa nezvakarurama; Musandiisa kuvamanikidzi vangu. 
Psalms119:122 Ivai rubatso rwomuranda wenyu kuti ndiitirwe zvakanaka; Vanozvikudza ngavarege kundimanikidza. 
Psalms119:123 Meso angu apera nokutsvaka kuponesa kwenyu, Neshoko renyu rakarurama." 
Psalms119:124 Itirai muranda wenyu nounyoro hwenyu, Mundidzidzise mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:125 Ndiri muranda wenyu, ndipei njere; Kuti ndizive zvipupuriro zvenyu." 
Psalms119:126 Inguva yaJehovha yokubata nayo; Nokuti vakaputsa murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:127 Saka ndinoda mirairo yenyu Kupfuura ndarama, zvirokwazvo, kupfuura ndarama yakaisvonaka." 
Psalms119:128 Saka ndinoti, zvirevo zvenyu zvose pamusoro pezvose zvakarurama; Ndinovenga nzira dzose dzenhema." 
Psalms119:129 Zvipupuriro zvenyu zvinoshamisa; Saka mweya wangu unozvichengeta. 
Psalms119:130 Kuzarurwa kwamashoko enyu kunopa chiedza; Kunopa njere vasina mano. 
Psalms119:131 Ndakashamisa muromo wangu kwazvo, ndikatakwaira; Nokuti ndakashuva mirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:132 Ringirirai kwandiri, mundinzwire nyasha, Sezvamunoitira vanoda zita renyu." 
Psalms119:133 Simbisirai kutsika kwangu mushoko renyu; Zvakaipa ngazvirege kutonga vane simba pamusoro pangu. 
Psalms119:134 Ndidzikinurei pakumanikidza kwomunhu; Naizvozvo ndichachengeta zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:135 Chiso chenyu ngachivhenekere muranda wenyu; Mundidzidzise mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:136 Nzizi dzemvura dzinoyerera pameso angu, Nokuti havachengeti murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:137 Imi makarurama, Jehovha, Nezvamakatonga zvakaruramawo." 
Psalms119:138 Makaraira zvipupuriro zvenyu nokururama Uye nokutendeka kukuru. 
Psalms119:139 Kushingaira kwangu kwakandipedza, Nokuti vadzivisi vangu vakakangwana mashoko enyu." 
Psalms119:140 Shoko renyu rakaisvonatswa; Saka muranda wenyu anorida. 
Psalms119:141 Ndiri muduku, ndakazvidzwa; Asi handikanganwi zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:142 Kururama kwenyu ndiko kururama kusingaperi, Nomurau wenyu izvokwadi." 
Psalms119:143 Nhamo nokumanikidzwa zvakandibata; Asi mirairo yenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu mukuru. 
Psalms119:144 Zvipupuriro zvenyu zvakarurama nokusingaperi; Ndipei njere, ndigorarama." 
Psalms119:145 Ndakadana nomwoyo wangu wose; ndipindurei, Jehovha; Ndichachengeta mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:146 Ndakadana kwamuri; ndiponesei, Ndigochengeta zvipupuriro zvenyu." 
Psalms119:147 Ndakatangira mambakwedza ndikadana; Ndakatarira mashoko enyu. 
Psalms119:148 Meso angu akatangira nguva dzousiku, Kuti ndifungisise shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:149 Inzwai izwi rangu nokuda kwounyoro hwenyu; Ndiponesei Jehovha, sezvinoreva zvamakatonga." 
Psalms119:150 Vanotevera zvakaipa voswedera pedyo; Vari kure nomurau wenyu. 
Psalms119:151 Imi muri pedyo, Jehovha; Mirairo yenyu izvokwadi." 
Psalms119:152 Kubva kare ndakaziva nezvipupuriro zvenyu Kuti makazviteya nokusingaperi. 
Psalms119:153 Tarirai dambudziko rangu, mundirwire; Nokuti handikanganwi murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:154 Ndireverei mhosva yangu, mundidzikinure; Ndiponesei sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:155 Kuponeswa kuri kure navakaipa; Nokuti havatsvaki mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:156 Ngoni dzenyu izhinji, Jehovha; Ndiponesei sezvinoreva zvamakatonga." 
Psalms119:157 Vatambudzi vangu navadzivisi vangu vazhinji; Kunyangwe zvakadaro handina kutsauka pazvipupuriro zvenyu. 
Psalms119:158 Ndakaona vanyengedzeri, ndikavasema; Nokuti havana kuchengeta shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:159 Fungai kuti ndinoda zvirevo zvenyu; Ndiponesei, Jehovha, nokuda kwounyoro hwenyu." 
Psalms119:160 Unganidzo yeshoko renyu izvokwadi; Zvose zvamakatonga, zvakarurama, zvinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms119:161 Machinda akanditambudza ndisina mhosva; Asi mwoyo wangu unotya shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:162 Ndinofarira shoko renyu kwazvo, Somunhu awana zvizhinji zvakapambwa." 
Psalms119:163 Nhema ndinodzivenga nokudzisema; Asi murau wenyu ndinouda. 
Psalms119:164 Ndinokurumbidzai kanomwe pazuva, Nokuda kwezvakarurama zvamakatonga." 
Psalms119:165 Vanoda murau wenyu vane rugare rukuru; Hapana chinovagumbusa. 
Psalms119:166 Ndakatarira kuponesa kwenyu, Jehovha, Ndikaita mirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:167 Mweya wangu wakachengeta zvipupuriro zvenyu; Ndinozvida kwazvo. 
Psalms119:168 Ndakachengeta zvirevo zvenyu nezvipupuriro zvenyu; Nokuti nzira dzangu dzose dziri pamberi penyu. 
Psalms119:169 Kudana kwangu ngakusvike pamberi penyu, Jehovha; Ndipei njere sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:170 Kukumbira kwangu ngakusvike pamberi penyu; Ndirwirei sezvinoreva shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:171 Miromo yangu ngairumbidze; Nokuti munondidzidzisa mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:172 Rurimi rwangu ngaruimbe shoko renyu; Nokuti mirairo yenyu yose yakarurama. 
Psalms119:173 Ruoko rwenyu ngarundibatsire; Nokuti ndakasanangura zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:174 Ndakashuva kuponesa kwenyu, Jehovha; Murau wenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu mukuru." 
Psalms119:175 Mweya wangu ngaurarame, ugokurumbidzai; Nezvamakatonga ngazvindibatsire." 
Psalms119:176 Ndakadzungaira segwai rakarashika; tsvakai muranda wenyu; Nokuti handikanganwi mirairo yenyu.

Psalms120:3 Iwe uchapiweiko, chinyi chichawedzerwa kwauri, Iwe rurimi runonyengedzera?" 
Psalms120:4 Miseve inopinza yeanesimba, Namazimbe anopfuta omurara." 
Psalms120:5 Ndine ropa rakaipa zvandiri mutorwa paMesheki, Zvandigere pamatende eKedhari!" 
Psalms120:6 Mweya wangu wakagara nguva refu Neanovenga rugare. 
Psalms120:7 Ini ndinoda rugare; Asi kana ndichitaura, ivo vanotsvaka kurwa."

Psalms138:2 Ndichanamata ndakatarira kutemberi yenyu tsvene, Nokuvonga zita renyu nokuda kwounyoro hwenyu nokutendeka kwenyu; Nokuti makakurisa shoko renyu kupfuura zita renyu rose."

Psalms139:1 Jehovha, imi makandinzvera, nokundiziva." 
Psalms139:2 Munoziva kugara kwangu pasi nokusimuka kwangu, Munonzwisisa kufunga kwangu muri kure." 
Psalms139:3 Munocherechedza kufamba kwangu nokuvata kwangu pasi, Munoziva nzira dzangu dzose." 
Psalms139:4 Nokuti shoko risati ravapo parurimi rwangu, Tarirai, imi Jehovha, matoriziva rose." 
Psalms139:5 Makandikomberedza shure kwangu nemberi, Nokuisa ruoko rwenyu pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms139:6 Kuziva kwakadai kunondishamisa kwazvo; Zviri kumusoro, handigoni kusvikira kwazviri." 
Psalms139:7 Ndingaendepiko ndibve pamweya wenyu? Kana ndingatizirepiko ndibve pamberi penyu? 
Psalms139:8 Kana ndingakwira kudenga muripo; Kana ndikazviwarira nhoo paSheori, tarirai muripowo." 
Psalms139:9 Kana ndikabhururuka namapapiro amangwanani, Ndikandogara pamigumo yegungwa;" 
Psalms139:10 Naipapowo ruoko rwenyu ruchandifambisa, Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruchandifambisa," 
Psalms139:11 Kana ndikati, “Zvirokwazvo, rima richandifukidza,” Chiedza chinondikomberedza chichava sousiku;" 
Psalms139:12 Kunyangwe rima haringandivanzi kwamuri, Asi usiku hunopenya samasikati; Rima nechiedza zvakafanana." 
Psalms139:13 Nokuti imi makaumba itsvo dzangu; Makandiruka mudumbu ramai vangu. 
Psalms139:14 Ndichakuvongai; nokuti ndakaitwa nomutoo unotyisa unoshamisa; Mabasa enyu anoshamisa; Mweya wangu unozviziva kwazvo. 
Psalms139:15 Mapfupa angu akanga asina kuvanzwa kwamuri, Panguva yandakaitwa pakavanda, Pakuumbwa kwangu nenjere panzvimbo dzezasi dzapasi." 
Psalms139:16 Meso enyu akaona muviri wangu uchigere kukwaniswa, Zvose zvakanga zvakanyorwa murugwaro rwenyu, Zuva rimwe nerimwe rokuumbwa kwazvo, Kusati kwava nechimwe chazvo." 
Psalms139:17 Mirangariro yenyu, Mwari, inodikanwa sei nei! Yakakura sei pakuverengwa kwayo!" 
Psalms139:18 Kana ndikaiverenga, ingapfuura jecha pakuwanda; Kana ndichipepuka, ndichinemi." 
Psalms139:19 Dai muchiuraya henyu vakaipa, Mwari; Naizvozvo ibvai kwandiri, imi vanhu veropa." 
Psalms139:20 Nokuti vanokutaurirai zvakaipa, Vavengi venyu vanoreva zita renyu pasina." 
Psalms139:21 Ko ini handivengi avo vanokuvengai here, Jehovha? Handine shungu here navanokumukirai?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndinovavenga nembengo huru; Vava vavengi vangu. 
Psalms139:23 Ndinzverei, Mwari, muzive mwoyo wangu; Ndiidzei, muzive ndangariro dzangu;" 
Psalms139:24 Mutarire kana pane nzira yakaipa mandiri, Mundifambise munzira isingaperi." 
Psalms140:1 Ndirwirei Jehovha, pamunhu wakaipa; Ndichengetei pamunhu ane hasha;" 
Psalms140:2 Ivo, vanofunga zvakaipa mumwoyo yavo; Vanogara vachimutsa kurwa." 
Psalms140:3 Vakarodza rurimi rwavo senyoka; Uturu hwechiva huri pasi pemiromo yavo. 
Psalms140:4 Ndichengetei, Jehovha, pamaoko owakaipa; Ndichengetei pamunhu anomanikidza; Vanofunga mano okugumburisa tsoka dzangu." 
Psalms140:5 Vanozvikudza vakandivanzira musungo namabote; Vakadzika mumbure parutivi rwenzira, Vakanditeyera rugombe." 
Psalms140:6 Ndakati kuna Jehovha, “Ndimi Mwari wangu;” Teererai, Jehovha, munzwe izwi rokukumbira kwangu." 
Psalms140:7 Mwari Ishe, ndimi simba rokuponeswa kwangu, Makafukidza musoro wangu pazuva rokurwa." 
Psalms140:8 Jehovha, regai kupa wakaipa zvaanotsvaka; Musapfuudza zano rake rakaipa; kuti varege kuzvikudza." 
Psalms140:9 Kana uri musoro wavanondikomba, Zvakashata zvemiromo yavo imene ngazvivafukidze." 
Psalms140:10 Mazimbe omoto, anopfuta, ngaawire pamusoro pavo; Ngavakandirwe mumoto; Nomumakomba akadzika, kuti varege kumukazve." 
Psalms140:11 Munhu, ana makuhwa, haangasimbiswi pasi; Zvakaipa zvichavhima munhu anomanikidza kuti zvimuparadze." 
Psalms140:12 Ndinoziva kuti Jehovha achagadzira mhosva yavanotambudzika, Nokururamisira vashaiwi." 
Psalms140:13 Zvirokwazvo, vakarurama vachavonga zita renyu; Vanemwoyo yakarurama vachagara pamberi penyu." 
Psalms141:1 Jehovha, ndakadana kwamuri; kurumidzai kuuya kwandiri; Teererai izwi rangu kana ndichidana kwamuri." 
Psalms141:2 Munyengetero wangu ngauve pamberi penyu sezvinonhuwira; Nokusimudzwa kwamaoko angu sechipiriso chamadekwana. 
Psalms141:3 Jehovha, isai murindi pamberi pomuromo wangu; Chengetai mukova wemiromo yangu." 
Psalms141:4 Regai kurerekesa mwoyo wangu kuchinhu chakaipa, Kuti ndiite zvakaipa Pamwechete navanhu vanoita zvisina kururama." 
Psalms141:5 Akarurama ngaandirove netsitsi; Ngaandituke, ave mafuta pamusoro wangu; Musoro wangu haungaarambi; Nokuti ndicharamba ndichinyengetera pamusoro pokuipa kwavo." 
Psalms141:6 Vatongi vavo vakawisirwa kumawere edombo; Vachanzwa kuti mashoko angu akanaka. 
Psalms141:7 Sezvakaita pasi kana parimwa nokuparurwa, Saizvozvo mapfupa edu akaparadzirwa pamuromo weSheori." 
Psalms141:8 Nokuti meso angu anotarira kwamuri, Jehovha Ishe; Ndinovimba nemi; regai kudurura upenyu hwangu." 
Psalms141:9 Ndichengetei pamusungo wavakanditeyera, Naparugombe rwavanoita zvisina kururama." 
Psalms141:10 Vakaipa ngavabatwe nemimbure yavo vamene, Asi ini ndidarike hangu." 
Psalms142:1 Ndinodanidzira nezwi rangu kuna Jehovha; Nezwi rangu ndinonyengetera kuna Jehovha. 
Psalms142:2 Ndinodurura kuchema kwangu pamberi pake; Ndinomuzivisa kutambudzika kwangu. 
Psalms142:3 Panguva yokumanikidzwa kwomweya wangu mukati mangu, makaziva nzira yangu. Panzira yandinofamba nayo vakandivanzira musungo." 
Psalms142:4 Tarirai kurudyi rwangu, muone; nokuti hakuna munhu anondiziva; Ndashaiwa utiziro; hakuna munhu ane hanya nomweya wangu." 
Psalms142:5 Ndakadanidzira kwamuri, Jehovha; Ndakati, “Ndimi utiziro hwangu, Nomugove wangu panyika yavapenyu.”" 
Psalms142:6 Teererai kudanidzira kwangu; nokuti ndinoshaiwa simba kwazvo; Ndirwirei panavanonditambudza; nokuti vanondikurira nesimba. 
Psalms142:7 Budisai mweya wangu patorongo, kuti ndivonge zita renyu; Vakarurama vachandipoteredza; Nokuti muchandiitira zvakanaka kwazvo." 
Psalms143:1 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, Jehovha; teererai kukumbira kwangu; Ndipindurei nokutendeka kwenyu nokururama kwenyu." 
Psalms143:2 Regai kutonga muranda wenyu; Nokuti hapana munhu mumwe mupenyu angaruramiswa pamberi penyu. 
Psalms143:3 Nokuti muvengi akatambudza mweya wangu; Akatsikirira upenyu hwangu pasi; Akandigarisa panzvimbo dzine rima, savanhu vakanguva vafa." 
Psalms143:4 Saka mweya wangu wavhunduswa mukati mangu. Mwoyo wangu wavhundutswa mukati mangu. 
Psalms143:5 Ndinorangarira mazuva akare; Ndinofungisisa zvose zvamakaita; Ndinofunga basa ramaoko enyu. 
Psalms143:6 Ndinotambanudzira maoko angu kwamuri; Mweya wangu unokushuvai senyika yakaomerwa. 
Psalms143:7 Kurumidzai kupindura, Jehovha; mweya wangu waziya; Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu; Ndigosava savanoburukira kugomba." 
Psalms143:8 Ndinzwisei unyoro hwenyu mangwanani; Nokuti ndinovimba nemi; Ndizivisei nzira yandinofanira kufamba nayo; Nokuti ndinosimudzira mweya wangu kwamuri. 
Psalms143:9 Ndirwirei Jehovha, pana vavengi vangu; Ndinovanda nemi." 
Psalms143:10 Ndidzidzisei kuita kuda kwenyu; nokuti ndimi Mwari wangu; Mweya wenyu, wakanaka ngaundifambise munyika yakati chechetere." 
Psalms143:11 Ndiponesei Jehovha, nokuda kwezita renyu; Budisai mweya wangu pakumanikidzwa nokururama kwenyu." 
Psalms143:12 Pedzai vavengi vangu nounyoro hwenyu, Muparadze vose vanomanikidza mweya wangu; Nokuti ndiri muranda wenyu." 
Psalms144:1 Ngaarumbidzwe Jehovha, dombo rangu, Anodzidzisa maoko angu kurwa, Neminwe yangu kufura;" 
Psalms144:2 Unyoro hwangu, nenhare yangu, Shongwe yangu yakakwirira, nomurwiri wangu; Nhoo yangu, uye iye wandinovimba naye; Anoisa vanhu vangu pasi pangu." 
Psalms144:3 Jehovha, munhu chiiko, zvamune hanya naye? Kana Mwanakomana womunhu, zvamunomurangarira?" 
Psalms144:4 Munhu akafanana nomweya; Mazuva ake anenge mumvuri unopfuura. 
Psalms144:5 Kotamisa kudenga–denga kwenyu Jehovha, muburuke; Gunzvai makomo, apfungaire hutsi." 
Psalms144:6 Penyesai mheni, muvaparadze; Furai miseve yenyu, muvavhunduse." 
Psalms144:7 Tambanudzai ruoko rwenyu muri kumusoro; Ndisunungurei, mundirwire pamvura zhinji, Naparuoko rwavatorwa;" 
Psalms144:8 Avo vanotaura zvisina maturo nomuromo wavo, Uye ruoko rwavo rworudyi ndirwo ruoko rworudyi rwenhema." 
Psalms144:9 Mwari ndichakuimbirai rwiyo rutsva; Ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza nomutengeranwa une ungiso dzine gumi. 
Psalms144:10 Ndimi munopa madzimambo kuponeswa, Munorwira Dhavhidhi muranda wenyu pamunondo unokuvadza." 
Psalms144:11 Ndisunungurei, mundirwire paruoko rwavatorwa, Vanotaura zvisina maturo nomuromo wavo, Uye ruoko rwavo rworudyi ndirwo ruoko rworudyi rwenhema." 
Psalms144:12 Vanakomana vedu vachava semiti yakakura kwazvo pautsva hwayo; Uye vanasikana vedu samabwe ekona akavezwa sezvinovezerwa imba yamambo; 
Psalms144:13 Matura edu achazara nezviyo zvamarudzi ose; Namakwai edu achabereka zviuru negumi rezviuru kumafuro edu. 
Psalms144:14 Nzombe dzedu dzichatakudzwa zvizhinji; Hatingaputsirwi madziro, kana kubuda kundorwa, Hakungavi nemhere inoridzwa panzira dzomumusha medu;" 
Psalms144:15 Vanomufaro vanhu avo, vanoitirwa saizvozvo; Vanomufaro vanhu avo, Mwari wavo ari Jehovha." 
Psalms145:1 Ndichakukudzai kwazvo, Mwari wangu, imi Mambo; Ndicharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi–peri." 
Psalms145:2 Ndichakurumbidzai zuva rimwe nerimwe; Ndichakudza zita renyu nokusingaperi–peri. 
Psalms145:3 Jehovha mukuru, anofanira kurumbidzwa kwazvo; Ukuru hwake haunganzverwi." 
Psalms145:4 Rudzi rumwe rucharumbidza mabasa enyu kuno rumwe, Vachadudzira zvamakaita zvine simba." 
Psalms145:5 Ndichafungisisa kubwinya kwoumambo hwenyu hunokudzwa, Namabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms145:6 Vanhu vachataura vachireva simba ramabasa enyu anotyisa; Neni ndichadudzira ukuru hwenyu. 
Psalms145:7 Vachareva vachiyeudzira kunaka kwenyu kukuru, Nokuimbira kururama kwenyu." 
Psalms145:8 Jehovha ane nyasha, azere netsitsi, Haachimbidziki kutsamwa, ane ngoni zhinji." 
Psalms145:9 Jehovha ano mwoyo wakanaka kuna vose; Ngoni dzake dziri pamabasa ake ose. 
Psalms145:10 Mabasa enyu ose achakuvongai Jehovha; Navatsvene venyu vachakurumbidzai. 
Psalms145:11 Vachataura vachireva kubwinya kwoushe hwenyu, Nokuparidza simba renyu;" 
Psalms145:12 Kuti vazivise vanakomana vavanhu mabasa ake ane simba, Nokubwinya kwoumambo hwohushe hwake." 
Psalms145:13 Ushe hwenyu ndihwo ushe husingaperi, Noumambo hwenyu huchagara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms145:14 Jehovha anotsigira vose vanowa, Anosimudza vose vakakotamiswa pasi." 
Psalms145:15 Meso avose anotarira kwamuri; Munovapa zvokudya zvavo panguva yakafanira. 
Psalms145:16 Munotadzanura ruoko rwenyu, Ndokugutisa zvipenyu zvose." 
Psalms145:17 Jehovha akarurama panzira dzake dzose, Ane nyasha pazvose zvaanoita." 
Psalms145:18 Jehovha ari pedyo navose vanodana kwaari, Vose vanodana kwaari nezvokwadi." 
Psalms145:19 Achaitira vanomutya sezvavanoda; Achanzwawo kudanidzira kwavo; ndokuvaponesa. 
Psalms145:20 Jehovha anochengeta vose vanomuda; Asi vakaipa achavaparadza vose. 
Psalms145:21 Muromo wangu uchataura kurumbidzwa kwaJehovha; Vanhu vose ngavarumbidze zita rake dzvene nokusingaperi–peri. 
Psalms146:1 Hareruya! Rumbidzai Jehovha, iwe mweya wangu!" 
Psalms146:2 Ndicharumbidza Jehovha ndichiri mupenyu; Ndichaimbira Mwari wangu nziyo dzokurumbidza, ini ndichiripo." 
Psalms146:3 Regai kuvimba namachinda, Kana noMwanakomana womunhu, asingagoni kubatsira." 
Psalms146:4 Mweya wake unobuda, iye ndokudzokera pasi pake; Nezuva iro mano ake anopera." 
Psalms146:5 Ano mufaro munhu uyo kana Mwari waJakobho ari mubatsiri wake, Anotarira kuna Jehovha Mwari wake." 
Psalms146:6 Iye, akaita kudenga napasi, Negungwa, nezvose zviri mukati mazvo; Iye, anoramba akatendeka nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms146:7 Anoruramisira vanomanikidzwa; Anopa vane nzara zvokudya; Jehovha anosunungura vasungwa; 
Psalms146:8 Jehovha anosvinudza meso amapofu; Jehovha anosimudza vakakotamiswa pasi; Jehovha anoda vakarurama; 
Psalms146:9 Jehovha anochengeta vatorwa; Jehovha anotsigira nherera nechirikadzi; Asi nzira yavakaipa anoipesanisa. 
Psalms146:10 Jehovha achabata ushe nokusingaperi, Mwari wako, iwe Zioni, kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi. Hareruya!" 
Psalms147:1 Hareruya! Nokuti zvakanaka kuti Mwari wedu aimbirwe nziyo dzokurumbidza; Zvinofadza, uye kurumbidza kwakafanira." 
Psalms147:2 Jehovha anovaka Jerusaremu; Anounganidza vakadzingwa VaIsiraeri. 
Psalms147:3 Anoporesa vane mwoyo yakaputsika, Anosunga mavanga avo." 
Psalms147:4 Anotara kuwanda kwenyenyedzi; Anodzipa dzose mazita adzo. 
Psalms147:5 Ishe wedu mukuru, ane simba guru; Njere dzake hadziperi." 
Psalms147:6 Jehovha anobatsira vanyoro; Vakaipa anovawisira pasi. 
Psalms147:7 Imbirai Jehovha muchimuvonga, Imbirai Mwari wedu nziyo dzokurumbidza nembira;" 
Psalms147:8 Iye anofukidza denga namakore, Anogadzirira pasi mvura, Anomeresa uswa pamakomo." 
Psalms147:9 Anapa zvipfuwo zvokudya zvazvo, Navana vamakunguo, anochema." 
Psalms147:10 Haafadzwi nesimba rebhiza; Haafariri makumbo omurume. 
Psalms147:11 Jehovha anofara navanomutya, Navanotarira ngoni dzake." 
Psalms147:12 Rumbidza Jehovha, iwe Jerusaremu; Rumbidza Mwari wako, iwe Zioni." 
Psalms147:13 Nokuti wakasimbisa mazarira amasuwo ako; Akaropafadza vana vako mukati mako. 
Psalms147:14 Anoisa rugare panyika yako; Anokugutisa nezviyo zvakaisvonaka. 
Psalms147:15 Anotuma mirairo yake panyika; Shoko rake rinomhanya kwazvo. 
Psalms147:16 Anopa vanhu chando samakushe amakwai, Anoparadzira chando samadota." 
Psalms147:17 Anokanda chimvuramabwe chake sezvimedu; Ndianiko angamira pachando chake? 
Psalms147:18 Anotuma shoko rake, ndokuzvinyausa; Anovhuvhutisa mhepo yake mvura ndokuyerera." 
Psalms147:19 Anozivisa Jakobho shoko rake, NaIsiraeri mitemo yake nezvaakatonga." 
Psalms147:20 Haana kutongoitira rumwe rudzi saizvozvo; Kana zviri zvaakatonga, havana kuzviziva. Hareruya!" 
Psalms148:1 Hareruya! Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi muri kudenga; Murumbidzei panzvimbo dzokumusoro." 
Psalms148:2 Murumbidzei imi vatumwa vake vose; Murumbidzei imi hondo dzake dzose. 
Psalms148:3 Murumbidzei imi zuva nomwedzi; Murumbidzei imi nyenyedzi dzose dzinovhenekera. 
Psalms148:4 Murumbidzei imi kudenga kwokudenga–denga, Newe mvura zhinji, iri kumusoro kwokudenga–denga." 
Psalms148:5 Ngazvirumbidze zita raJehovha; Nokuti iye akaraira, zvikasikwa." 
Psalms148:6 Akazvisimbisawo nokusingaperi–peri; Akatema chirevo chisingafaniri kudarikwa. 
Psalms148:7 Rumbidzai Jehovha imi vapasi, Imi zvikara zvegungwa, nezviri makadzika;" 
Psalms148:8 Moto nechimvuramabwe, chando noutsi; Dutu guru, rinoita zvaakareva;" 
Psalms148:9 Makomo nezvikomo zvose; Miti inobereka nemisidhari yose; 
Psalms148:10 Mhuka, nezvipfuwo zvose; Zvinokambaira neshiri dzinobhururuka;" 
Psalms148:11 Madzimambo apasi nendudzi dzose dzavanhu; Machinda navatongi vose vapasi; 
Psalms148:12 Majaya nemhandara; Vatana navana; 
Psalms148:13 Ngavarumbidze zita raJehovha; Nokuti zita rake roga rakakurumbira; Umambo hwake huri kumusoro kwapasi nokudenga. 
Psalms148:14 Akasimudza runyanga rwavanhu vake, Kuti arumbidzwe navatsvene vake vose; Naivo vana VaIsiraeri, ivo vanhu vari pedyo naye. Hareruya!" 
Psalms149:1 Hareruya! Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva, Nokurumbidzwa kwake paungano yavatsvene." 
Psalms149:2 Isiraeri ngaafarire kwazvo musiki wake; Vana veZioni ngavave nomufaro naMambo wavo. 
Psalms149:3 Ngavarumbidze zita rake vachimutambira; Ngavamuimbire nziyo dzokurumbidza nengoma nembira. 
Psalms149:4 Nokuti Jehovha anofarira vanhu vake; Achashongedza vanyoro noruponeso; 
Psalms149:5 Vatsvene ngavafare kwazvo nokukudziwa; Ngavaimbe nomufaro panhoo dzavo. 
Psalms149:6 Kurumbidza kukuru kwaMwari ngakuve pahuro dzavo, Nomunondo unocheka kwose paruoko rwavo;" 
Psalms149:7 Kuti vatsive vahedheni; Varange ndudzi dzavanhu; 
Psalms149:8 Kuti vasunge madzimambo avo neketani, Navakuru vavo nezvisungo zvamatare." 
Psalms149:9 Kuti vavaitire zvavakatongerwa zvakanyorwa; Vatsvene vake vose vachakudzwa naizvozvi. Hareruya! 
Psalms150:1 Hareruya! Rumbidzai Jehovha panzvimbo yake tsvene; Murumbidzei mudenga rakaitwa nesimba rake," 
Psalms150:2 Murumbidzei nokuda kwezvaakaita nesimba rake; Murumbidzei zvakafanira ukuru–kuru hwake. 
Psalms150:3 Murumbidzei nemitengeranwa nembira. 
Psalms150:4 Murumbidzei nengoma nokutamba; Murumbidzei nohudimbwa nenyere. 
Psalms150:5 Murumbidzei namakandira anorira kwazvo; Murumbidzei namakandira anorira zvakanaka. 
Psalms150:6 Zvinhu zvose zvinofema, ngazvirumbidze Jehovha. Hareruya!" 
Proverbs1:1 Zvirevo zvaSoromoni, mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mambo waIsiraeri." 
Proverbs1:2 Kuti vanhu vazive uchenjeri nokurairirwa; Nokunzwisisa mashoko enjere; 
Proverbs1:3 Varairirwe nzira yokungwara, Neyokururama, nokururamisa, nokutendeka;" 
Proverbs1:4 Vasina mano vapiwe kungwara, Jaya ripiwe zivo nokuchenjera;" 
Proverbs1:5 Kuti wakachenjera anzwe, awedzere kudzidza; Nomunhu wenjere awane mano akanaka." 
Proverbs1:6 Vanzwisise chirevo nomufananidzo, Mashoko avakachenjera nezvirahwe zvavo." 
Proverbs1:7 Kutya Jehovha ndiko kuvamba kwezivo; Mapenzi anoshora uchenjeri nokurairirwa. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwanakomana wangu, inzwa kurairira kwababa vako; Usarasha kudzidzisa kwamai vako." 
Proverbs1:9 Nokuti zvichava chishongo chakanaka pamusoro wako, Nengetani pamutsipa pako." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwanakomana wangu, kana vatadzi vachikugombedzera, Usatenda iwe." 
Proverbs1:11 Kana vachiti, “Hendei tose, Ngatirindire ropa; Ngativandire vasina mhosva kunyangwe pasina mhaka." 
Proverbs1:12 Ngativamedze vari vapenyu seSheori, Vari vakukutu saivo vanoburukira kugomba." 
Proverbs1:13 Tichawana pfuma yamarudzi mazhinji; Tichazadza dzimba dzedu nezvatakapamba; 
Proverbs1:14 Iwe uchava mumwe wedu; Tose tichava nechikwama chimwechete.” 
Proverbs1:15 Mwanakomana wangu, usafamba navo nenzira yavo; Dzora rutsoka rwako panzira yavo;" 
Proverbs1:16 Nokuti tsoka dzavo dzinovangira zvakaipa; Vanokurumidza kudurura ropa. 
Proverbs1:17 Nokuti mumbure unodzikirwa pasina Shiri dzamarudzi ose dzichizviona. 
Proverbs1:18 Vanhu ava vanogarira ropa ravo vamene; Vanozvivandira upenyu hwavo. 
Proverbs1:19 Ndizvo zvakaitawo nzira dzavose vanokarira pfuma; Zvinotorera mwene wazvo upenyu hwake. 
Proverbs1:20 Uchenjeri unodanidzira panzira dzomumusha; unonzwisa izwi rahwo panzvimbo dzakafara; 
Proverbs1:21 Unodana panzvimbo panoungana vazhinji; Pavanopinda pamasuwo, Paguta, ndipo pahunotaura mashoko ahwo, huchiti," 
Proverbs1:22 “Nhai imi vasina mano, muchada kusava namano kusvikira rinhiko? Nemi vaseki kufarira kuseka kwenyu, Namapenzi kuvenga zivo?" 
Proverbs1:23 Dzokai kana muchinzwa kuraira kwangu, Tarirai ndichadurura mweya wangu pamusoro penyu; Ndichakuzivisai mashoko angu." 
Proverbs1:24 Zvandakadana, imi mukaramba; Ndikatambanudza ruoko rwangu, kukasava nomunhu akarangarira;" 
Proverbs1:25 Asi makazvidza mano angu ose, Mukaramba chose kuraira kwangu," 
Proverbs1:26 Naizvozvo neniwo ndichaseka kana mava munhamo yenyu; Ndichakudadirai, kana kutya kwenyu kuchisvika." 
Proverbs1:27 Kana kutya kwenyu kuchisvika sedutu guru, Nenhamo yenyu ichisvika sechamupupuri; Kana kutambudzika nokudumbirwa zvichikuwirai." 
Proverbs1:28 Nenguva iyo vachadana kwandiri, asi handingapinduri; Vachanditsvaka zvikuru, asi havangandiwani." 
Proverbs1:29 Zvavakavenga zivo, Vakasazvitsaurira kutya Jehovha," 
Proverbs1:30 Vakaramba mano angu ose, Vakashora kuraira kwangu kwose," 
Proverbs1:31 Naizvozvo vachadya zvibereko zvenzira yavo; Vachagutswa namano avo. 
Proverbs1:32 Nokuti kudzokera shure kwavasina mano kuchavauraya, Kusava nehanya kwamapenzi kuchavaparadza." 
Proverbs1:33 Asi ani naani anonditeerera achagara zvakasimba, Achagadzikana, asingatyi zvakaipa.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwanakomana wangu, kana ukagamuchira mashoko angu, Nokuchengeta mirairo yangu kwauri;" 
Proverbs2:2 Kuti urerekere nzeve yako iteerere uchenjeri, Nokurwadza mwoyo wako, kuti unzwisise;" 
Proverbs2:3 Kana ukachemera kunzwisisa, Ukadanidzira nezwi rako kuti uwane njere;" 
Proverbs2:4 Zvirokwazvo kana ukahutsvaka sesirivha, Ukahutsvakisisa sepfuma yakavanzwa;" 
Proverbs2:5 Ipapo uchanzwisisa kutya Jehovha, Nokuwana zivo yaMwari." 
Proverbs2:6 Nokuti Jehovha ndiye anopa uchenjeri; Mumuromo make munobuda zivo nenjere," 
Proverbs2:7 Unovigira vakarurama uchenjeri chaihwo; Ndiye nhoo yavanofamba muzvokwadi; 
Proverbs2:8 Nokuti anorinda makwara okururamisa, Nokuchengeta nzira yavatsvene vake." 
Proverbs2:9 Ipapo uchanzwisisa kururama noruenzaniso, Nokutendeka, idzo nzira dzose dzakanaka." 
Proverbs2:10 Nokuti uchenjeri huchapinda mumwoyo mako, Zivo ichafadza mweya wako;" 
Proverbs2:11 Kungwara kuchakurindira, Njere dzichakuchengeta;" 
Proverbs2:12 Zvikurwire panzira yezvakaipa, Napavanhu vanotaura zvisakarurama;" 
Proverbs2:13 Vanorasha makwara okururama, Kuti vafambe nenzira dzerima;" 
Proverbs2:14 Vanofarira kuita zvakaipa, Vanofadzwa nokunyengera kwezvakaipa." 
Proverbs2:15 Vane nzira dzakaminama, Vanotsauka pamakwara avo;" 
Proverbs2:16 Kuti zvikurwire kumukadzi wokumwe, Kumukadzi mutorwa, anobata kumeso namashoko ake." 
Proverbs2:17 Iye, anorasha shamwari yohumhandara hwake, Achikanganwa sungano yaMwari wake." 
Proverbs2:18 Nokuti imba yake inonyura kurufu, Nenzira dzake kuvakafa;" 
Proverbs2:19 Hakuna anopinda kwaari anozodzokazve; Havasviki panzira dzoupenyu; 
Proverbs2:20 Kuti ufambe nenzira yavakanaka, Uchengete makwara avakarurama." 
Proverbs2:21 Nokuti vakarurama vachagara panyika, Vakakwana vachafambirapo." 
Proverbs2:22 Asi vakaipa vachaparadzwa panyika; Vanoita nokunyengedzera vachadzurwapo. 
Proverbs3:1 Mwanakomana wangu, usakanganwa kudzidzisa kwangu; Asi mwoyo wako ngauchengete mirairo yangu;" 
Proverbs3:2 Nokuti zvichakuwedzera mazuva mazhinji, Namakore oupenyu, norugare." 
Proverbs3:3 Rudo nezvokwadi ngazvirege kukusiya; Uzvisungire pamutsipa wako; Uzvinyore pahwendefa romwoyo wako; 
Proverbs3:4 Nokudaro uchawana nyasha nenjere dzakanaka Pamberi paMwari navanhu. 
Proverbs3:5 Vimba naJehovha nomwoyo wako wose, Urege kusendama panjere dzako." 
Proverbs3:6 Umutende panzira dzako dzose, Agoruramisa makwara ako ose." 
Proverbs3:7 Usazviti ndakachenjera; Itya Jehovha, ubve pane zvakaipa;" 
Proverbs3:8 Zvichava mushonga womuviri wako, Nomongo wamapfupa ako." 
Proverbs3:9 Kudza Jehovha nezvaunazvo, Uye nezvitsva zvazvose zvawakawana;" 
Proverbs3:10 Ipapo matura ako achazadzwa nezvakawanda, Makate ako achapfachuka newaini itsva." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwanakomana wangu, usazvidza kuranga kwaJehovha; Usaneta nokuraira kwake." 
Proverbs3:12 Nokuti Jehovha anoraira mudikanwa wake; Sezvinoita baba mwanakomana wavo wavanofarira. 
Proverbs3:13 Munhu, awana uchenjeri, anomufaro, Naiye munhu, anowana njere." 
Proverbs3:14 Nokuti kuhuwana ihwo kunopfuura kuwana sirivha; Nokupfuma nahwo kunopfuura kupfuma nendarama. 
Proverbs3:15 Unokosha kupfuura korari; Hakuna pfuma yako ingaenzaniswa nahwo. 
Proverbs3:16 Mazuva mazhinji oupenyu ari muruoko rwahwo rworudyi; Muruoko rwahwo rworuboshwe mune pfuma nokukudzwa. 
Proverbs3:17 Nzira dzahwo inzira dzezvinofadza; Makwara ahwo ose ndoorugare. 
Proverbs3:18 Ndiwo muti woupenyu kuna vanohunamatira; Mumwe nomumwe anohubata anomufaro. 
Proverbs3:19 Jehovha akateya pasi nouchenjeri; Wakasimbisa kudenga–denga nenjere. 
Proverbs3:20 Mvura iri makadzika yakadzutuka nezivo yake; Denga rose rakadonha dova. 
Proverbs3:21 Mwanakomana wangu, ngazvirege kubva pameso ako; Chengeta uchenjeri chaihwo nokungwara." 
Proverbs3:22 Ipapo zvichava upenyu hwomweya wako; Noukomba pamutsipa wako. 
Proverbs3:23 Ipapo uchafamba nenzira yako wakasimba; Rutsoka rwako harungagumburwi. 
Proverbs3:24 Kana uchivata pasi haungatyi; Uye kana wavata pasi hope dzako dzichava dzakanaka. 
Proverbs3:25 Usatya hako chivhunduso chinokuwira kamwe–kamwe, Kunyangwe kuparadzwa kwavakaipa, kana kuchisvika;" 
Proverbs3:26 Nokuti Jehovha achava chivimbo chako; Achachengeta rutsoka rwako, kuti rurege kubatwa." 
Proverbs3:27 Munhu, akafanirwa, usaramba kumuitira zvakanaka Kana ruoko rwako ruchinge rune simba kuzviita." 
Proverbs3:28 Usati kune wokwako, “Enda, ugodzokazve, Mangwana ndichakupa;” Kana uchinge unazvopo." 
Proverbs3:29 Usafunga kuitira wokwako zvakaipa, Zvaanogara hake newe achikutenda." 
Proverbs3:30 Usarwa nomunhu pasina chipomerwa, Kana asina kukuitira zvakaipa." 
Proverbs3:31 Usagodora munhu anomanikidza; Usatevera kunyangwe nomumwe wemitoo yake. 
Proverbs3:32 Nokuti mutsauki inyangadzi kuna Jehovha; Asi ano hukama navakarurama. 
Proverbs3:33 Kutukwa naJehovha kuri mumba mowakaipa; Asi unoropafadza ugaro hwavakarurama. 
Proverbs3:34 Kana vari vadadi, anovadadira, Asi vanozvininipisa anovaitira nyasha." 
Proverbs3:35 Vakachenjera vachagara nhaka yokukudzwa; Asi mapenzi anozviwanira kunyadziswa. 
Proverbs4:1 Imi vanakomana, inzwai kurairira kwababa venyu; Teererai, muzive njere." 
Proverbs4:2 Nokuti ndinokupai dzidziso yakanaka; Regai kurasha murairo wangu. 
Proverbs4:3 Nokuti ini ndakanga ndiri mwanakomana kuna baba vangu, Mwana oga akadikanwa kwazvo, namai vangu;" 
Proverbs4:4 Ivo baba vakandidzidzisa, vakati kwandiri, “Mwoyo wako ngaunatsobata mashoko angu; Chengeta mirairo yangu, urarame." 
Proverbs4:5 Zviwanire uchenjeri, zviwanire njere; Regai kukanganwa kana kutsauka pamashoko omuromo wangu;" 
Proverbs4:6 Usaurasha, hugokuchengeta; Uude, hugokurinda." 
Proverbs4:7 Uchenjeri chinhu chikuru kune zvose; saka uzviwanire uchenjeri; Uzviwanire njere nezvose zvaunazvo. 
Proverbs4:8 Uhukudze, hugokukwiridza iwe; Huchakuvigira kukudzwa, kana uchihumbundikira." 
Proverbs4:9 Huchapa musoro wako chishongo chakanaka; Huchakuisira korona inobwinya.” 
Proverbs4:10 Chinzwa iwe mwanakomana wangu, ugamuchire zvandinoreva; Makore oupenyu hwako agova mazhinji." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndakakudzidzisa panzira youchenjeri; Ndakakufambisa pamakwara akarurama. 
Proverbs4:12 Kana uchifamba, tsoka dzako hadzingapinganidzwi; Kana uchimhanya, haungagumburwi." 
Proverbs4:13 Natsa kubata kurairirwa; usakuregedza; Ukuchengete, nokuti ndihwo upenyu hwako." 
Proverbs4:14 Usapinda pagwara ravakaipa, Usafamba nenzira yavakashata." 
Proverbs4:15 Uinzvenge, usapinda pairi; Tsauka pairi, upfuure hako." 
Proverbs4:16 Nokuti havavati, kana vasingaiti zvakashata; Vanotorerwa hope dzavo, kana vasingagumbusi vamwe." 
Proverbs4:17 Nokuti vanodya zvokudya zvezvakaipa, Nokunwa waini yokumanikidza." 
Proverbs4:18 Asi gwara ravakarurama rakaita sechiedza chamambakwedza, Chinoramba chichiwedzera kubwinya kusvikira pamasikati makuru." 
Proverbs4:19 Nzira yavakaipa yakaita serima; Havazivi chingavagumbusa. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwanakomana wangu, teerera mashoko angu; Rerekera nzeve yako kune zvandinoreva." 
Proverbs4:21 Urambe uchitarira, Uachengete mukati momwoyo mako." 
Proverbs4:22 Nokuti ndihwo upenyu kuna vanoawana, Noukukutu hwemuviri wavo vose." 
Proverbs4:23 Chengeta mwoyo wako kupfuura zvose zvinofanira kurindwa; Nokuti mukati mawo ndimo mune zvitubu zvoupenyu. 
Proverbs4:24 Bvisa kwauri nhema dzomuromo; Kutsauka kwemiromo ngakuve kure newe. 
Proverbs4:25 Meso ako ngaarurame pakutarira; Mafungiro ameso ako ngaatarire mberi kwako. 
Proverbs4:26 Gadzirira tsoka dzako gwara; Nzira dzako dzose dzive dzakasimba. 
Proverbs4:27 Usatsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe; Rutsoka rwako urubvise pane zvakaipa. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwanakomana wangu, teerera uchenjeri hwangu; Rerekera nzeve yako inzwe njere dzangu;" 
Proverbs5:2 Kuti ugare wakabata kungwara, Nemiromo yako ichengete zivo." 
Proverbs5:3 Nokuti miromo yomukadzi wokumwe inodonha huchi; Muromo wake unotedza kupfuura mafuta; 
Proverbs5:4 Asi pakupedzisira unovava segavakava; Unopinza somunondo une nhivi mbiri dzinocheka. 
Proverbs5:5 Tsoka dzake dzinoburukira kurufu; Nambwe dzake dzinovavarira kuhwiro; 
Proverbs5:6 Gwara roupenyu, rakati chechetere, haariwani, Nzira dzake dzinotsauka, iye asingazvizivi." 
Proverbs5:7 Saka imi, vanakomana vangu, nditeererei; Regai kutsauka pamashoko omuromo wangu." 
Proverbs5:8 Nzira yako ngaive kure naye, Usaswedera pamukova wemba yake." 
Proverbs5:9 Kuti urege kupa vamwe kunaka kwohujaya hwako, Namakore ako kuno ano mwoyo mukukutu;" 
Proverbs5:10 Kuti vatorwa varege kugutswa nepfuma yako, Nezvibereko zvokutambura kwako zviende kumba kwomweni." 
Proverbs5:11 Iwe ugochema pakupedzisira kwako, Kana nyama yako nomuviri wako zvaparadzwa," 
Proverbs5:12 Uchiti, “Ndakavengereiko kurairirwa, Mwoyo wangu wakashorerei kurairwa?" 
Proverbs5:13 Ndakaregereiko kuteerera izwi ravadzidzisi vangu, Nokusarerekera nzeve yangu kuna vaindiraira?" 
Proverbs5:14 Ndakanga ndapinda pane zvakaipa zvose, Pakati pechiunga neungano.”" 
Proverbs5:15 Inwa mvura padziva rako chairo, Nemvura inoyerera patsime rako chairo." 
Proverbs5:16 Ko matsime ako anofanira kuparadzirwa here, Nzizi dzemvura dziyerere munzira dzomumusha here?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ngazvive zvako zvoga, Zvisava zvavatorwa pamwechete newe." 
Proverbs5:18 Tsime rako ngariropafadzwe; Ufarire mukadzi wohujaya hwako. 
Proverbs5:19 Sehadzi yenondo yakanaka, nehadzi yengururu inofadza; Mazamu ake ngaakufadze nguva dzose; Ugare uchigutiswa norudo rwake." 
Proverbs5:20 Nokuti iwe, mwanakomana wangu, uchagutsirweiko nomukadzi wokumwe, Uchambundikireiko chipfuva chomweni?" 
Proverbs5:21 Nokuti nzira dzomunhu dziri pamberi paJehovha; Ndiye anoyera makwara ake ose. 
Proverbs5:22 Zvivi zvake zvichabata muiti wazvo, Achabatwa namabote ezvivi zvake." 
Proverbs5:23 Achafa nokushaiwa kurairirwa; Achatsauka noukuru hwoupenzi hwake. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwanakomana wangu, kana uchinge wakazviitira wokwako rubatso, Wazvisunga nokuda kwomutorwa noruoko rwako," 
Proverbs6:2 Wazviteya namashoko omuromo wako, Wabatwa namashoko omuromo wako," 
Proverbs6:3 Zvino ita kudai, mwanakomana wangu, uzvirwire, Zvawabatwa noruoko rwowokwako, Enda, undozvininipisa, ukumbire zvikuru kune wekwako." 
Proverbs6:4 Usatendera meso ako hope, Kana mafungiro ameso ako kutsimwaira;" 
Proverbs6:5 Uzvirwire semhara paruoko rwomuvhimi, Seshiri paruoko rwomuteyi." 
Proverbs6:6 Enda kumujuru, iwe simbe; Cherechedza nzira dzawo ugova wakachenjera!" 
Proverbs6:7 Kunyangwe iwo usina mutongi, Kana mutariri kana mubati," 
Proverbs6:8 Unogadzira zvokudya zvawo muzhizha, Nokuunganidza zvokudya zvawo mukukohwa." 
Proverbs6:9 Iwe simbe, uchavata pasi kusvikira rinhiko? Uchamuka rinhiko pahope dzako?" 
Proverbs6:10 Kumbovata zvishomanene, kumbotsimwaira zvishomanene, Kumbofungatira maoko zvishomanene, ndizorore;" 
Proverbs6:11 Saizvozvo urombo hwako huchasvika segororo, Nokushaiwa kwako somunhu wakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa." 
Proverbs6:12 Munhu asina maturo, munhu anoita zvakaipa, Ndiye anofamba nomuromo une nhema;" 
Proverbs6:13 Anobwaira nameso ake, anotendekera netsoka dzake, Anodudzira neminwe yake;" 
Proverbs6:14 Ane zvisakarurama pamwoyo pake, Anosifungira vamwe zvakaipa, Anokusha kupesana." 
Proverbs6:15 Saka njodzi yake ichamuwira kamwe–kamwe; Achavhuniwa pakarepo, kusina chingamubatsira." 
Proverbs6:16 Zvinhu zvitanhatu zviriko zvinovengwa naJehovha; Zvirokwazvo, tingati kune zvinomwe, zvinomunyangadza, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs6:17 Meso ounozvikudza, rurimi runoreva nhema, Maoko anodurura ropa risina mhaka;" 
Proverbs6:18 Mwoyo unofunga mano akaipa, Tsoka dzinokurumidza kuvangira zvakashata;" 
Proverbs6:19 Chapupu chinonyengera chinoreva nhema, Uye anokusha kupesana pakati pehama." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwanakomana wangu, chengeta murairo wababa vako; Usarasha kudzidzisa kwamai vako." 
Proverbs6:21 Uzvisungire nguva dzose pamwoyo wako; Uzvishonge pamutsipa wako. 
Proverbs6:22 Kana uchifamba, zvichakutungamirira; Kana uchivata pasi, zvichakurinda; Kana womuka, zvichataurirana newe." 
Proverbs6:23 Nokuti murairo ndiwo mwenje; murau ndicho chiedza; Kuraira kwokurairirwa inzira youpenyu; 
Proverbs6:24 Kuti uchengetwe pamukadzi wakaipa, Pakubata kumeso kworurimi rwomutorwa." 
Proverbs6:25 Usachiva kunaka kwake mumwoyo mako; Arege kukubata namafungiro ameso ake. 
Proverbs6:26 Nokuti nokuda kwechifeve munhu angasvikira pakudya chimedu bedzi chechingwa; Mukadzi womumwe munhu anovhima upenyu hunokosha. 
Proverbs6:27 Ko munhu ungaisa moto muchipfuva chake, Nguo dzake dzikasatsva here?" 
Proverbs6:28 Kana munhu angatsika mazimbe anopisa, Tsoka dzake dzikasapiswa here?" 
Proverbs6:29 Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anopinda kumukadzi wowokwake; Ani naani anomunyangata iye mukadzi haangaregwi kurohwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Vanhu havangazvidzi mubi kana achiba Kuti agute kana achinge ane nzara. 
Proverbs6:31 Asi kana akabatwa anofanira kudzosera zvava zvinomwe; Anofanira kuripa nepfuma yose yeimba yake. 
Proverbs6:32 Anoita upombwe nomukadzi, anoshaiwa njere; Anoda kuparadza upenyu hwake ndiye anoita izvozvo." 
Proverbs6:33 Uchangozviwanira mavanga nokusakudzwa; Kunyadziswa kwake hakungatongopisikwi. 
Proverbs6:34 Nokuti godo rinomutsa hasha dzomurume; Haanganzwiri tsitsi pazuva rokutsiva. 
Proverbs6:35 Haangavi nehanya nomuripo; Haangatendi, kunyangwe ukamuvigira zvipo zvizhinji." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwanakomana wangu, chengeta mashoko angu, Viga mirairo yangu kwauri." 
Proverbs7:2 Chengeta mirairo yangu, urarame; Nomurau wangu semboni yeziso rako." 
Proverbs7:3 Uzvisungire paminwe yako; Uzvinyore pahwendefa romwoyo wako. 
Proverbs7:4 Uti kuuchenjeri, “Ndiwe hanzvadzi yangu; Utumidze njere shamwari yako;”" 
Proverbs7:5 Kuti zvikuchengete pamukadzi wokumwe, Pamutorwa anobata kumeso namashoko ake." 
Proverbs7:6 Nokuti ndakatarira pahwindo yeimba yangu, Pahutanda hwehwindo yangu;" 
Proverbs7:7 Ndikatarira pakati pavasina mano, Ndikaona pakati pamajaya Rimwe jaya rakashaiwa njere;" 
Proverbs7:8 Richipfuura nenzira yomumusha pedyo nekona yeimba yomukadzi uyo, Richifamba nenzira kuimba yomukadzi;" 
Proverbs7:9 Nenguva yorubvunzavaeni, nenguva yamadeko ezuva, Pakati pousiku kwasviba." 
Proverbs7:10 Zvino tarira, mukadzi akasangana naye, Akanga akafuka sechifeve, anokunyengedzera pamwoyo." 
Proverbs7:11 Anopupira, achiita sezvaanoda; Tsoka dzake hadzigari mumba make;" 
Proverbs7:12 Imwe nguva ari munzira dzomumusha, imwe nguva pamatare; Anorindira pamakona ose." 
Proverbs7:13 Zvino iye akamubata, akamutsvoda; Akataura naye nechiso chisina kunyara, akati kwaari," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ndaifanira kuuya nezvibairo zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, Nhasi ndaripa mhiko dzangu." 
Proverbs7:15 Saka ndabuda kuzokuchingamidza, Nditsvake chiso chako zvikuru, zvino ndakuwana." 
Proverbs7:16 Ndakawarira machira anohukomba pamubhedha wangu, Nemicheka ina mavara inobva Ijipiti." 
Proverbs7:17 Ndakasasa zvinonhuwira pamubhedha wangu, Mura, negavakava, nesinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Uya tigute nokudana kusvikira mangwanani; Ngatizvifadze nokudana kukuru. 
Proverbs7:19 Nokuti murume haapo pamusha; Akafamba rwendo rukuru; 
Proverbs7:20 Akaenda nehombodo ine mari; Achadzoka pajenaguru.” 
Proverbs7:21 Nokutaura kwake kuzhinji kwakanaka anomutsausa, Anomugombedzera nokubata kumeso kwemiromo yake." 
Proverbs7:22 Anomutevera pakarepo, Senzombe inoenda kwainondobayiwa, Kana sebenzi rakasungwa rinoenda kundorangwa;" 
Proverbs7:23 Kusvikira museve wabaya chiropa chake; Seshiri inokurumidzira kurugombe, Asingazivi kuti zvinovinga upenyu hwake." 
Proverbs7:24 Zvino vanakomana vangu, nditeererei, Inzwai mashoko omuromo wangu." 
Proverbs7:25 Mwoyo wako ngaurege kutsaukira kunzira dzake; Usafamba–famba mumakwara ake. 
Proverbs7:26 Nokuti akawisira pasi vazhinji vakakuvadzwa; Zvirokwazvo, vakaurayiwa naye vazhinji kwazvo." 
Proverbs7:27 Imba yake inzira dzinoenda Sheori, Dzinoburukira kudzimba dzorufu." 
Proverbs8:1 Ko Uchenjeri hahudanidziri here? Nenjere hadzibudisi mazwi adzo here? 
Proverbs8:2 Pamusoro pemitunhu panzira, Pamharadzano dzenzira, ndipo pahumire;" 
Proverbs8:3 Parutivi rwamasuwo, panopindwa paguta, Pavanopinda pamikova, ndipo pahunodanidzira; huchiti," 
Proverbs8:4 “Ndinodanidzira kwamuri, imi varume, Izwi rangu rinodana vanakomana vavanhu." 
Proverbs8:5 Nzwisisai uchenjeri, imi vasina mano; Imi mapenzi, ivai nomwoyo une njere." 
Proverbs8:6 Inzwai, nokuti ndichataura zvinhu zvakaisvonaka; Nokuti miromo yangu ichashamira zvinhu zvakarurama." 
Proverbs8:7 Nokuti muromo wangu unobudisa zvokwadi; Chinhu chakaipa chinonyangadza pamiromo yangu. 
Proverbs8:8 Mashoko ose omuromo wangu akarurama; Hakuna chinhu chakakombama kana chisakarurama maari; 
Proverbs8:9 Zvose zviri pachena kuno ane njere; Zvakarurama kuna ivo vakawana zivo. 
Proverbs8:10 Gamuchirai kuraira kwangu, murege kugamuchira sirivha; Nezivo, kupfuura ndarama yakasarurwa." 
Proverbs8:11 Nokuti uchenjeri hwakanaka kupfuura korari; Zvose zvinodikanwa hazvingaenzaniswi nahwo. 
Proverbs8:12 Ini uchenjeri ndakaita kungwara imba yangu, Ndinowana zivo namano akarurama." 
Proverbs8:13 Kutya Jehovha ndiko kuvenga zvakaipa; Kuzvikudza namanyawi nenzira yakaipa, Nomuromo unonyengedzera, ndinozvivenga." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndine zano rakanaka nokubata kwakakwana; Ndini kuchenjera; ndine simba. 
Proverbs8:15 Madzimambo anobata ushe neni, Vabati vanotonga vanhu neni." 
Proverbs8:16 Madzishe anofambisa ushe neni, Navakuru, ivo vatongi vose vapasi." 
Proverbs8:17 Ndinoda vanondida; Vanonditsvaka nomwoyo wose vachandiwana. 
Proverbs8:18 Pfuma nokukudzwa zvineni, Zvinokosha zvakaisvonaka nokururama." 
Proverbs8:19 Zvibereko zvangu zvakanaka kupfuura ndarama, kunyangwe ndarama yakaisvonaka; Zvandinowana zvinopfuura sirivha yakasarurwa." 
Proverbs8:20 Ndinofamba nenzira yokururama, Mukati mamakwara okururamisa;" 
Proverbs8:21 Kuti ndigarise nhaka vanondida, Ndizadze zvivigiro zvepfuma yavo." 
Proverbs8:22 Jehovha akandiumba pakuvamba kwenzira yake, Kutangira mabasa ake akare." 
Proverbs8:23 Ini ndakamiswa kubva pakusingaperi, kubva pakutanga, Pasi pasati pasikwa." 
Proverbs8:24 Makungwa asati avapo, ini ndakaberekwa; Pasina matsime ane mvura zhinji." 
Proverbs8:25 Makomo asati anyudzwa, Zvikomo zvisipo, ini ndakaberekwa;" 
Proverbs8:26 Iye asati aumba pasi namapani, Kana guruva rokutanga renyika." 
Proverbs8:27 Panguva yaakagadzira kudenga–denga, ndakanga ndiripo; Pakuisa kwake denderedzwa pamusoro pamakungwa;" 
Proverbs8:28 Panguva yaakasimbisa denga rose kumusoro, Pakusimba kwamatsime amakungwa;" 
Proverbs8:29 Panguva yaakaitira gungwa miganhu yaro, Kuti mvura irege kudarika murairo wake, Pakutara kwake nheyo dzapasi;" 
Proverbs8:30 Nenguva iyo ndaiva naye, ndiri mhizha; Ndaimufadza zuva rimwe nerimwe, Ndichitamba pamberi pake nguva dzose," 
Proverbs8:31 Ndichitamba panyika yake, Ndichifadzwa navanakomana vavanhu." 
Proverbs8:32 Saka zvino vanakomana vangu, nditeererei; Nokuti vanochengeta nzira dzangu vakaropafadzwa." 
Proverbs8:33 Inzwai kurairira muve vakachenjera, Regai kukuramba." 
Proverbs8:34 Munhu, anondinzwa, akaropafadzwa, Anorinda zuva rimwe nerimwe pamasuwo angu, Anomira pazvivhivho zvemikova yangu." 
Proverbs8:35 Nokuti andiwana, awana upenyu, Achapiwa nyasha naJehovha." 
Proverbs8:36 Asi anondishaiwa, anotadzira mweya wake; Vose vanondivenga, vanoda rufu.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Uchenjeri hwakavaka imba yahwo; Hwakaveza mbiru dzahwo nomwe; 
Proverbs9:2 Hwakabaya zvipfuwo zvahwo; Hwakavenganisa waini yahwo; Hwakagadzirawo tafura yahwo. 
Proverbs9:3 Hwakatuma varandakadzi vahwo; hunodanidzira pamitunhu yeguta, huchiti," 
Proverbs9:4 “Asina mano ngaatsaukire muno;” Asina njere, hunoti kwaari," 
Proverbs9:5 “Uyai mudye chingwa changu, Munwe waini yandakavhenganisa." 
Proverbs9:6 Regai kusasvinuka murarame; Mufambe nenzira yenjere.” 
Proverbs9:7 Munhu, anoraira mudadiri anozvitsvakira kunyadziswa; Anotuka munhu wakaipa achasvibiswa." 
Proverbs9:8 Usaraira mudadiri, kuti arege kukuvenga; Raira munhu wakachenjera, iye achakuda." 
Proverbs9:9 Ipa wakachenjera dzidzo, ipapo iye achawedzerwa uchenjeri; Dzidzisa wakarurama, ipapo iye achawedzerwa zivo." 
Proverbs9:10 Kuvamba kwouchenjeri ndiko kutya Jehovha; Kuziva Mutsvene ndidzo njere. 
Proverbs9:11 Nokuti neni mazuva ako achaitwa mazhinji, Makore oupenyu hwako achawedzerwa." 
Proverbs9:12 Kana wakachenjera, iwe, wakazvichenjerera hako; Kana uri mudadiri, iwe woga uchava nemhosva yazvo." 
Proverbs9:13 Mukadzi benzi anopupira; Haana mano, haazivi chinhu." 
Proverbs9:14 Anogara pamukova wemba yake, Pachigaro pamitunhu yeguta."

Proverbs10:1 Zvirevo zvaSoromoni. Mwanakomana, akachenjera, anofadza baba; Asi mwanakomana benzi anosuwisa mai vake." 
Proverbs10:2 Pfuma yakawanikwa nezvakaipa haibatsiri chinhu; Asi kururama kunorwira parufu. 
Proverbs10:3 Jehovha haangatenderi mweya wowakarurama kuti unzwe nzara; Asi kupanga kwavakaipa unokusundira kure. 
Proverbs10:4 Anobata noruoko rusine hanya, achava murombo; Asi ruoko rweasina usimbe runopfumisa." 
Proverbs10:5 Anounganidza muzhezha, ndiye mwanakomana wakachenjera; Asi anovata hope mukukohwa, mwanakomana anonyadzisa." 
Proverbs10:6 Mikomborero iri pamusoro wowakarurama; Asi muromo wowakaipa unovanza kumanikidza. 
Proverbs10:7 Kuyeukwa kwowakarurama kunovigira kuropafadzwa, Asi zita rowakaipa richaora." 
Proverbs10:8 Ane mwoyo wakachenjera, achagamuchira mirairo; Asi ane miromo youpenzi achawisirwa pasi." 
Proverbs10:9 Anofamba zvakarurama, anofamba zvakasimba; Asi anominamisa nzira dzake, achazikanwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Anochonya neziso rake, anouyisa madambudzo; Asi ane miromo youpenzi, achawisirwa pasi." 
Proverbs10:11 Muromo wowakarurama itsime roupenyu; Asi muromo wowakaipa unovanza kumanikidza. 
Proverbs10:12 Mbengo dzinomutsa kukakavara; Asi rudo runofukidza kudarika kwose. 
Proverbs10:13 Pamiromo yeane njere panowanikwa uchenjeri; Asi shamhu yakafanira musana woanoshaiwa njere. 
Proverbs10:14 Vakachenjera vanozvichengetera zivo; Asi muromo webenzi uri pedyo nokuparadzwa. 
Proverbs10:15 Pfuma yomupfumi ndiro guta rake rakasimba; Zvinoparadza varombo ndihwo urombo hwavo. 
Proverbs10:16 Zvaakabatira zvinoisa wakarurama kuupenyu; Zvakawanikwa nowakaipa zvinoisa kuzvivi. 
Proverbs10:17 Anoteerera kurairirwa, ari panzira youpenyu; Asi anoramba kurairwa, anotsausa vamwe." 
Proverbs10:18 Anovanza kuvenga, ane miromo yenhema; Ana makuhwa, ibenzi." 
Proverbs10:19 Kudarika hakungakoni pamunhu ana mashoko mazhinji; Asi anodzora miromo yake, ano huchenjeri." 
Proverbs10:20 Rurimi rwowakarurama rwakafanana nesirivha yakasarurwa; Mwoyo wowakaipa haubatsiri chinhu. 
Proverbs10:21 Miromo yowakarurama inosimbisa vazhinji; Asi mapenzi anofa nokushaiwa zivo. 
Proverbs10:22 Kuropafadza kwaJehovha ndiko kunopfumisa; Kutambura pabasa hakuwedzeri chinhu. 
Proverbs10:23 Benzi rinoti kuita zvakaipa kutamba; Ndizvo zvinoitawo uchenjeri kuno ane njere. 
Proverbs10:24 Zvinotyiwa nowakaipa, ndizvo zvichamuwira; Asi wakarurama achapiwa zvaanoda." 
Proverbs10:25 Kana chamupupuri chapfuura, wakaipa haachipo; Asi wakarurama ane nheyo dzisingaperi." 
Proverbs10:26 Sezvinoita vhininga pameno, noutsi pameso, Ndizvo zvakaita simbe kuna vanomutuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Kutya Jehovha kunowedzera mazuva; Asi makore owakaipa achatapudzwa. 
Proverbs10:28 Tariro yavakarurama mufaro; Asi kutarira kwavakaipa kuchaparadzwa.

Proverbs10:30 Wakarurama haangatongozununguswi nokusingaperi; Asi vakaipa havangarambi vagere panyika. 
Proverbs10:31 Muromo wowakarurama unobudisa uchenjeri; Asi rurimi rune nhema ruchabviswa.

Proverbs11:3 Kusanyengedzera kwavakarurama kuchavatungamirira; Asi kusarurama kwavanonyengedzera kuchaparadza. 
Proverbs11:4 Pfuma haibatsiri chinhu nezuva rokutsamwa; Asi kururama kunorwira parufu. 
Proverbs11:5 Kururama kwowakakwana kucharuramisa nzira yake; Asi wakaipa uchawiswa nezvakaipa zvake. 
Proverbs11:6 Kururama kwavakarurama kuchavarwira; Asi vanonyengedzera vachabatwa nezvakashata zvavo.

Proverbs11:12 Anoninipisa wokwake anoshaiwa uchenjeri; Asi munhu ane njere anoramba anyerere. 
Proverbs11:13 Anofamba ana makuhwa, anobudisa zvakavanda; Asi ano mwoyo wakatendeka, anofukidza mhaka."

Proverbs11:16 Mukadzi muuya anokudzwa; Vakasimba vanochengeta pfuma dzavo. 
Proverbs11:17 Munhu ane ngoni, anoitira mweya wake zvakanaka; Asi asina tsitsi anotambudza nyama yake." 
Proverbs11:18 Wakaipa anopiwa mubairo wokunyengedzera; Asi anokusha kururama achawana mubairo wazvokwadi.

Proverbs11:23 Zvinodikanwa navakarurama zvakanaka bedzi; Asi vakaipa vanomirirwa nokutsamwa. 
Proverbs11:24 Mumwe ariko anoparadzira, achiwedzerwa; Uye ariko anonyima zvaakafanira kupa, asi zvinongomushaisa." 
Proverbs11:25 Chipavurire achakodzwa; Uye anodiridza achadiridzwawo.

Proverbs12:6 Mashoko avakaipa ndookuvandira ropa; Asi muromo wavakarurama uchavarwira.

Proverbs12:17 Munhu anoreva zvokwadi, anoparidza zvakarurama; Asi chapupu chenhema chinoparidza kunyengedzera."

Proverbs12:21 Akarurama haangatongowirwi nechakaipa; Asi vakaipa vachazadzwa nezvakashata.

Proverbs12:23 Munhu akachenjera anovanza zivo; Asi mwoyo yamapenzi inoparidza upenzi.

Proverbs14:1 Mukadzi mumwe nomumwe akachenjera anovaka imba yake; Asi benzi rinoiputsa namaoko aro. 
Proverbs14:2 Anofamba nokururama kwake, anotya Jehovha; Asi akatsauka panzira dzake, anomudzidza." 
Proverbs14:3 Mumuromo webenzi mune shamhu yamanyawi; Asi miromo yavakachenjera inovachengeta. 
Proverbs14:4 Kana pasina nzombe, chidyiro hachine chiro; Asi zvibereko zvizhinji zvinouya nesimba renzombe." 
Proverbs14:5 Chapupu, chakatendeka, hachirevi nhema; Asi chapupu chenhema chinobudisa mashoko enhema." 
Proverbs14:6 Mudadi anotsvaka uchenjeri, asi hahupo; Asi zivo haitani kuwanikwa navane njere." 
Proverbs14:7 Ibva pamberi pebenzi, Nokuti haungawani miromo yezivo kwaari."
