Proverbs14:10 Mwoyo mumwe nomumwe unoziva kutambudzika kwawo; Mweni haangagoverani nomufaro wawo. 
Proverbs14:11 Imba yowakaipa ichaparadzwa; Asi tende rowakarurama richafara zvakanaka. 
Proverbs14:12 Munhu anoona nzira achiti yakarurama; Asi kuguma kwayo inzira dzorufu. 
Proverbs14:13 Kunyangwe munhu angaseka hake, mwoyo ungava neshungu; Kuguma kwomufaro ndiko kuchema." 
Proverbs14:14 Ano mwoyo, anodzokera shure, achagutiswa nenzira dzake; Asi munhu akanaka achagutiswa nezvinobva maari." 
Proverbs14:15 Asina mano anotenda mashoko ose; Asi akangwara anongwarira mafambiro ake. 
Proverbs14:16 Akachenjera anotya zvakashata, achizvinzvenga; Asi benzi rina manyawi, richizvitenda." 
Proverbs14:17 Anokurumidza kutsamwa, achaita noupenzi; Uye munhu, anofunga mano akaipa, achavengwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Vasina mano vanogara nhaka yohupenzi; Asi vakangwara vachadzikwa korona yezivo. 
Proverbs14:19 Vakashata vanogwadama pamberi pavakanaka; Navakaipa pamasuwo avakarurama. 
Proverbs14:20 Murombo anovengwa kunyangwe nowokwake; Asi shamwari dzavapfumi izhinji. 
Proverbs14:21 Anoshora wokwake, anotadza; Asi ane tsitsi navarombo, ane mufaro." 
Proverbs14:22 Ko vanofunga zvakaipa havarashiki here? Asi nyasha nezvokwadi ndezvavanofunga zvakanaka. 
Proverbs14:23 Kubata kwose kune batsiro; Asi kungotaura nemiromo kunobereka kushaiwa. 
Proverbs14:24 Korona yavakachenjera ipfuma yavo; Asi upenzi hwamapenzi upenzi zvahwo. 
Proverbs14:25 Chapupu chakatendeka chinoponesa mweya yavanhu; Asi anoreva nhema anonyengedzera. 
Proverbs14:26 Pakutya Jehovha pane simbiso kwazvo; Vana vowakadai vachava noutiziro. 
Proverbs14:27 Kutya Jehovha itsime roupenyu; Kuti munhu apukunyuke pamisungo yorufu. 
Proverbs14:28 Ukuru hwamambo hunoonekwa pakuwanda kwavanhu; Asi kuparadzwa kwashe kuri pakushaiwa vanhu. 
Proverbs14:29 Ano mwoyo murefu ane njere kwazvo; Asi anokurumidza kutsamwa anowedzera upenzi. 
Proverbs14:30 Mwoyo wakagadzikana ndihwo upenyu hwomuviri; Asi godo rinoodza mapfupa. 
Proverbs14:31 Anomanikidza murombo, anozvidza Muiti wake; Asi ane tsitsi nomushaiwi, anomukudza." 
Proverbs14:32 Akaipa anowiswa pasi mukutadza kwake; Asi akarurama ane tariro pakufa kwake. 
Proverbs14:33 Uchenjeri hunogara pamwoyo weane njere; Asi zviri mukati mamapenzi zvinozikanwa. 
Proverbs14:34 Kururama kunokurisa rudzi; Asi zvivi zvinonyadzisa kurudzi rupi norupi. 
Proverbs14:35 Mambo anofarira muranda, anoita nokuchenjera; Asi anonyadzisa achatsamwirwa naye." 
Proverbs15:1 Mhinduro nyoro inodzora kutsamwa; Asi shoko rinorwadza mwoyo rinomutsa hasha. 
Proverbs15:2 Rurimi rwovakachenjera runobudisa zivo kwadzo; Asi muromo wamapenzi unodurura upenzi. 
Proverbs15:3 Meso aJehovha ari pose pose; Achicherechedza vakaipa navakanaka. 
Proverbs15:4 Rurimi runyoro muti woupenyu; Asi rune nhema runoputsa mweya. 
Proverbs15:5 Benzi rinoramba kurairira kwababa varo; Asi une hanya nokurairwa, ndiye ane njere." 
Proverbs15:6 Mumba mowakarurama mune pfuma zhinji; Asi kutambudzika kuri mune zvinowanikwa nowakaipa. 
Proverbs15:7 Miromo yavakachenjera inokusha zivo; Asi mwoyo wamapenzi haudaro. 
Proverbs15:8 Chibayiro chavakaipa chinonyangadza Jehovha; Asi munyengetero wowakarurama unomufadza. 
Proverbs15:9 Nzira yowakaipa inonyangadza Jehovha; Asi anoda munhu anotevera kururama. 
Proverbs15:10 Kurangwa kwakaipa kunovinga munhu anosiya nzira; Anovenga kurairwa achafa. 
Proverbs15:11 Sheori noKuparadza zviri pamberi paJehovha; Ndoda mwoyo yavana vavanhu. 
Proverbs15:12 Mudadi haadi kurairwa; Anoramba kuenda kuno wakachenjera. 
Proverbs15:13 Mwoyo, wakafara, unofadza chiso; Asi mweya unoputsa nomwoyo une shungu." 
Proverbs15:14 Mwoyo woane njere unotsvaka zivo; Asi muromo wamapenzi unogutiswa noupenzi. 
Proverbs15:15 Mazuva ose omunhu, uri pakutambudzika, akaipa; Asi ano mwoyo wakafara ano mutambo nguva dzose." 
Proverbs15:16 Zviri nani kuti munhu ave nezvishoma, achitya Jehovha, Pakuti ave nepfuma yakawanda, achinyunyuta." 
Proverbs15:17 Zviri nani kuti munhu ave nezvokudya zvemiriwo, rudo ruripo, Pakuti ave nenzombe yakakodzwa, pane mbengo." 
Proverbs15:18 Munhu, ane hasha, anomutsa kukakavara; Asi ano mwoyo murefu anonyaradza gakava." 
Proverbs15:19 Nzira yesimbe yakaita soruzhowa rweminzwa; Asi nzira yavakarurama yakagadzirwa. 
Proverbs15:20 Mwanakomana akachenjera anofadza baba; Asi benzi rinoshora mai varo. 
Proverbs15:21 Upenzi hunofadza munhu anoshaiwa uchenjeri; Asi munhu wenjere anofamba achirurama. 
Proverbs15:22 Pasingaranganwi mano anokona; Asi kuna varairi vazhinji ndokwaanosimbiswa. 
Proverbs15:23 Munhu anofadzwa nemhinduro yakarurama yomuromo wake; Uye shoko, rinotaurwa nenguva yakafanira, rakanaka sei!" 
Proverbs15:24 Nzira youpenyu yowakarurama inokwira kumusoro; Kuti apukunyuke paSheori pasi. 
Proverbs15:25 Jehovha achaparadza imba yavanozvikudza; Asi muganho wechirikadzi anousimbisa. 
Proverbs15:26 Mano akashata anonyangadza Jehovha; Asi mashoko akachena anomufadza. 
Proverbs15:27 Anokarira pfuma, anotambudza imba yake; Asi anovenga zvipo, achararama." 
Proverbs15:28 Mwoyo wowakarurama unombofunga chaangapindura; Asi muromo wowakaipa unodurura zvakaipa. 
Proverbs15:29 Jehovha ari kure navakaipa; Asi anonzwa munyengetero wavakarurama. 
Proverbs15:30 Meso anobwinya anofadza mwoyo; Mashoko akanaka, anobva kumwe, anokodza mapfupa." 
Proverbs15:31 Nzeve, inoteerera kuraira, kunoisa kuupenyu, Ichagara pakati pavakachenjera." 
Proverbs15:32 Anoramba kurairwa, anoshora mweya wake; Asi anoteerera kurairwa, anowana njere." 
Proverbs15:33 Kutya Jehovha kunodzidzisa uchenjeri; Uye kuzvininipisa kunotangira kukudzwa. 
Proverbs16:1 Kurangarira kwomwoyo ndokwomunhu; Asi mhinduro yorurimi inobva kuna Jehovha. 
Proverbs16:2 Nzira dzose dzomunhu anoti dzakanaka pakuona kwake; Asi Jehovha anoyera zvinangwa. 
Proverbs16:3 Isa mabasa ako ose kuna Jehovha, Zvawakarangarira zvigoitika." 
Proverbs16:4 Jehovha akaitira chinhu chimwe nechimwe basa racho; Zvirokwazvo kunyangwe nowakaipa akaitirwa zuva rezvakashata. 
Proverbs16:5 Mumwe nomumwe, ano mwoyo unozvikudza, anonyangadza Jehovha; Zvirokwazvo, haangakoni kurohwa." 
Proverbs16:6 Zvakaipa zvinodzikinurwa nenyasha nezvokwadi; Nokutya Jehovha vanhu vanobva pane zvakashata. 
Proverbs16:7 Kana nzira dzomunhu dzichifadza Jehovha, Anomuyananisira kunyangwe namapfumo ake." 
Proverbs16:8 Zviri nani kuva nezvishoma nokururama, Pakuva nepfuma zhinji nokusarurama." 
Proverbs16:9 Mwoyo womunhu anozvifungira nzira yake; Asi Jehovha anorairira kufamba kwake. 
Proverbs16:10 Miromo yamambo inotema zvirevo zvazvokwadi; Muromo wake haungaposhi pakutonga. 
Proverbs16:11 Chiyero nechienzaniso, chisinganyengeri, chinobva kuna Jehovha; Zviidzo zvose zvehombodo ibasa rake." 
Proverbs16:12 Zvinonyangadza kana madzimambo achiita zvakaipa; Nokuti chigaro choushe chinosimbiswa nokururama. 
Proverbs16:13 Madzimambo anofadzwa nemiromo yakarurama; Anotaura zvinhu zvakarurama anodikanwa naye. 
Proverbs16:14 Kutsamwa kwamambo kwakaita senhume dzorufu; Asi munhu akachenjera anokunyaradza. 
Proverbs16:15 Upenyu huri pakubwinya kwechiso chamambo; Kana achifara munhu zvakaita segore remvura yokupedzisira. 
Proverbs16:16 Kuwana uchenjeri kunokunda sei kuwana ndarama; zviri nani kutsaura kuwana njere pakuwana sirivha. 
Proverbs16:17 Mugwagwa, wakapfumba, wavakarurama ndiko kubva pane zvakaipa; Anochenjerera nzira yake anochengeta mweya wake." 
Proverbs16:18 Kuzvikudza kunotangira kuparadzwa; Uye mweya wamanyawi unotangira kuwa. 
Proverbs16:19 Zviri nani kuva nomweya unozvininipisa pakati pavarombo, Pakugovana zvakapambwa navanozvikudza." 
Proverbs16:20 Anoteerera Shoko, achawana zvakanaka; Anovimba naJehovha, ano mufaro." 
Proverbs16:21 Ano mwoyo wakachenjera achanzi akangwara; Uye miromo inotapira inowedzera dzidzo. 
Proverbs16:22 Njere itsime roupenyu kuno anadzo; Asi kurairira kwamapenzi hupenzi. 
Proverbs16:23 Mwoyo wowakachenjera unodzidzisa muromo wake, Uchiwedzera dzidzo pamiromo yake." 
Proverbs16:24 Mashoko, anofadza, akaita somusvi wohuchi, Zvinotapira kumweya zvichiporesa mapfupa." 
Proverbs16:25 Munhu anoona nzira achiti yakarurama; Asi kuguma kwayo inzira dzorufu. 
Proverbs16:26 Nzara yomubati inomubatira; Nokuti muromo wake unomukurumidzira. 
Proverbs16:27 Munhu, asina maturo, anofungira vamwe zvakaipa; Pamiromo yake pano moto unopisa." 
Proverbs16:28 Munhu akatsauka anokusha kukakavara; Mucheri anoparadzanisa shamwari dzinodana. 
Proverbs16:29 Munhu anomanikidza, anonyengedzera wokwake, Achimutungamirira panzira isina kunaka." 
Proverbs16:30 Munhu anotsinzina meso ake, anozviita kuti afunge zvakatsauka, Anorumana miromo yake, atoita zvakashata." 
Proverbs16:31 Vhudzi rachena ikorona yakaisvonaka, Inowanikwa panzira yokururama." 
Proverbs16:32 Ano mwoyo murefu anopfuura ane simba; Anodzora mweya wake, anopfuura anotapa musha." 
Proverbs16:33 Mijenya inokandirwa panguo dzechipfuva; Asi zvirevo zvose zvinotemwa nayo zvinobva kuna Jehovha. 
Proverbs17:1 Chimedurwa chakaoma chechingwa norugare, Chinopfuura imba izere nezvakabayiwa nokukakavara." 
Proverbs17:2 Muranda, anoita nouchenjeri, angaraira mwanakomana anonyadzisa, Achidya nhaka pamwechete navana." 
Proverbs17:3 Hari yokunyausa ndeyesirivha, nevhira nderendarama; Asi Jehovha anoidza mwoyo yavanhu." 
Proverbs17:4 Munhu, anoita zvakaipa, anoteerera miromo yakaipa; Murevi wenhema anorerekera nzeve yake kururimi rwakashata." 
Proverbs17:5 Ani naani anoseka murombo, anozvidza Muiti wake; Anofara pamusoro penjodzi yavamwe, haangakoni kurohwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Vazukuru ikorona yavatana; Kukudzwa kwavana ndiwo madzibaba avo. 
Proverbs17:7 Kutaura kwamanyawi hakufaniri benzi; Zvikuru kutaura kune nhema hakufaniri muchinda. 
Proverbs17:8 Fufuro yakaita sebwe rinokosha kana ichitarirwa nomwene wayo; Pose painoringira inofadza. 
Proverbs17:9 Munhu anofukidza kudarika kwomumwe, anotsvaka rudo; Asi anoramba achimutsa shoko, anoparadzanisa shamwari dzinodana." 
Proverbs17:10 Munhu ane njere anobayiwa nokutukwa Kupfuura benzi nokurohwa rune zana. 
Proverbs17:11 Munhu ano mwoyo wokumukira anongotsvaka zvakaipa; Asi achatumirwa nhume ino mwoyo mukukutu. 
Proverbs17:12 Zviri nani kuti munhu asangane nechikara chatorerwa vana, Pakuti asangane nebenzi paupenzi hwaro." 
Proverbs17:13 Ani naani anoripidzira zvakanaka nezvakaipa, Zvakaipa hazvingabvi paimba yake." 
Proverbs17:14 Kuvamba kwokukakavara kwakafanana nokudziurira mvura; Saka rega rukave, kurwa kusati kwasvika." 
Proverbs17:15 Anopembedza akaipa, noanopa wakarurama mhosva, Vose vari vaviri vanonyangadza Jehovha." 
Proverbs17:16 Mari iri muruoko rwebenzi neiko kuti ritenge uchenjeri, Zvarisina njere." 
Proverbs17:17 Shamwari inoda nguva dzose; Hama inoberekerwa kuti ibatsire pakutambudzika. 
Proverbs17:18 Munhu anoshaiwa njere, ndiye anozvisunga noruoko rwake, Achizviitira wokwake rubatso." 
Proverbs17:19 Anoda kukakavara, anoda kudarika; Anokurisa suwo rake, anotsvaka kuparadzwa." 
Proverbs17:20 Ano mwoyo usakarurama haawani zvakanaka; Ano rurimi rusakarurama anowira munjodzi. 
Proverbs17:21 Anobereka benzi achazonzwa shungu; Baba vebenzi havana mufaro. 
Proverbs17:22 Mwoyo wakafara unobatsira munhu kupora; Asi mweya wakaputsika unoomesa mapfupa. 
Proverbs17:23 Munhu akaipa anogamuchira fufuro inobva muchipfuva, Kuti aminamise nzira dzokururamisira." 
Proverbs17:24 Uchenjeri huri pamberi poane njere; Asi meso ebenzi ari pamigumo yenyika. 
Proverbs17:25 Mwanakomana benzi anochemedza baba vake, Anoitira mai vakamubereka zvinovava." 
Proverbs17:26 Uye, kuranga akarurama hakuzakanaka, Nokurova vakuru nokuda kwokururama kwavo." 
Proverbs17:27 Anozvidzora pamashoko ake, ane zivo; Uye ane mweya wakagadzikana, munhu wenjere." 
Proverbs17:28 Kunyangwe nebenzi, kana rinyerere, ringanzi rakachenjera; Anobumira muromo wake, achanzi akangwara."

Proverbs18:2 Benzi harifariri kunzwisisa, Asi kuti mwoyo waro ufukurwe." 
Proverbs18:3 Kana akaipa achisvika, kuzvidza kwasvikawo; Pamwechete nezvinonyadzisa, kushora kunouyawo." 
Proverbs18:4 Mashoko omuromo womunhu akaita semvura yakadzika; Sorukova runoyerera, setsime rouchenjeri." 
Proverbs18:5 Kutsaura akaipa hazvina kunaka; Kana kuramba akarurama pakutonga. 
Proverbs18:6 Miromo yebenzi inouyisa kukakavara; Muromo waro unodana kurohwa. 
Proverbs18:7 Muromo webenzi ndiko kuparadzwa kwaro; Miromo yaro musungo womweya waro. 
Proverbs18:8 Mashoko omucheri akaita sezvimedu zvinozipa, Zvinoburukira mukati–kati momuviri." 
Proverbs18:9 Naiye ane usimbe pakubata kwake, Munun'una womuparadzi."

Proverbs18:11 Pfuma yomupfumi ndiwo musha wake wakasimba, Uye sorusvingo rurefu pakufunga kwake."

Proverbs18:13 Anopindura asati anzwa, Zvichava kwaari upenzi nokunyadziswa." 
Proverbs18:14 Mweya womunhu unomusimbisa pakurwara kwake; Asi mweya wakaputsika ungamutswa nani? 
Proverbs18:15 Mwoyo wowakachenjera unowana zivo; Nzeve yowakachenjera inotsvaka zivo. 
Proverbs18:16 Chipo chomunhu chinomuwanira nzvimbo, Chinomuisa pamberi pavakuru." 
Proverbs18:17 Anotanga kutambirwa mhaka yake anenge akarurama; Asi wokwake anosvika womuferefeta. 
Proverbs18:18 Mijenya inogumisa kukakavara; Inotema chirevo pakati pavane simba. 
Proverbs18:19 Hama yatadzirwa inopfuura guta rakasimba; Kukakavara kwakafanana nezvipfigiso zveimba yamambo. 
Proverbs18:20 Dumbu romunhu rinogutiswa nezvibereko zvomuromo wake; Achagutiswa nezvakawanda zvemiromo yake. 
Proverbs18:21 Rurimi rune simba pamusoro porufu noupenyu; Vanoruda vachadya zvibereko zvarwo. 
Proverbs18:22 Awana mukadzi awana chinhu chakanaka, Avigirwa nyasha yaJehovha." 
Proverbs18:23 Murombo anokumbira achinyengetera; Asi mupfumi anopindura nehasha.

Proverbs19:1 Murombo, anofamba muzvokwadi yake, Anopfuura ane miromo isakarurama, iri benzi." 
Proverbs19:2 Uye, kushingaira kusine zivo hakuna kunaka; Anokurumidza namakumbo ake anorasha nzira." 
Proverbs19:3 Upenzi hwomunhu hunokanganisa nzira yake; Mwoyo wake unotsamwira Jehovha. 
Proverbs19:4 Pfuma inouyisa shamwari zhinji; Asi murombo anosiyiwa neshamwari yake. 
Proverbs19:5 Chapupu chenhema hachingakoni kurohwa; Anoreva nhema haangapukunyuki. 
Proverbs19:6 Vazhinji vachatsvaka nyasha yomunhu anopavhurira; Munhu mumwe nomumwe ishamwari yoanopa zvipo. 
Proverbs19:7 Hama dzose dzomurombo dzinomuvenga; Zvikuru shamwari dzake dzinoparadzana naye! Anovatevera namashoko, asi vaenda!" 
Proverbs19:8 Anowana huchenjeri, anoda upenyu hwake; Anochengeta njere, achawana zvakanaka." 
Proverbs19:9 Chapupu chenhema hachingakoni kurohwa; Anoreva nhema achaparadzwa. 
Proverbs19:10 Kugara pakati pezvakanaka hazvifaniri benzi; Ndoda sei kuti muranda ave ishe wamachinda. 
Proverbs19:11 Kungwara kwomunhu kunodzora kutsamwa kwake; Kukudzwa kwake ndiko kukanganwira kudarika kwomumwe. 
Proverbs19:12 Kutsamwa kwamambo kwakafanana nokuomba kweshumba; Asi nyasha dzake dzakaita sedova riri pauswa. 
Proverbs19:13 Mwanakomana benzi inhamo yababa vake; Uye kukakavara kwomukadzi kudonha kusingaperi kwemvura. 
Proverbs19:14 Dzimba nepfuma inhaka inobva kuna madzibaba; Asi mukadzi akangwara anobva kuna Jehovha. 
Proverbs19:15 Usimbe hunowisira munhu pahope huru; Munhu asingabati achafa nenzara. 
Proverbs19:16 Anochengeta murairo, anochengeta upenyu hwake; Asi asina hanya nenzira dzake achafa." 
Proverbs19:17 Anonzwira varombo tsitsi, anoposana naJehovha; Achamuripira basa rake rakanaka." 
Proverbs19:18 Ranga mwanakomana wako, nokuti tariro ichipo; Usatsvaka kumuuraya." 
Proverbs19:19 Munhu ane hasha zvikuru acharohwa; Nokuti kana uchimurwira, unongozvinyanyisa." 
Proverbs19:20 Teerera kana uchirairirwa, unzwe kana uchidzidziswa, Kuti pashure ugova wakachenjera." 
Proverbs19:21 Mumwoyo womunhu mune ndangariro zhinji; Asi kurairira kwaJehovha ndiko kuchamira. 
Proverbs19:22 Munhu anodikanwa nokuda kwounyoro hwake; Murombo ari nani pamurevi wenhema. 
Proverbs19:23 Kutya Jehovha kunoisa kuupenyu; Unako, uchavata zvakanaka, Haangavingiwi nezvakaipa." 
Proverbs19:24 Simbe inopinza ruoko rwayo mundiro, isingadi kutongorudzosera kumuromo wayozve." 
Proverbs19:25 Rova mudadi, ipapo asina mano achazvingwarira; Raira ane njere, ipapo achanzwisisa zivo." 
Proverbs19:26 Anoitira baba vake simba, nokudzinga mai vake, Mwanakomana unonyadzisa nokuita zvinonyadza." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwanakomana wangu, rega kuteerera kana uchidzidziswa, Kana uchida hako kutsauka pamashoko ezivo." 
Proverbs19:28 Chapupu chisina maturo chinodada nokururama; Muromo wavakaipa unomedza zvakaipa. 
Proverbs19:29 Kutongwa kwakagadzirirwa vadadi; Neshamhu misana yamapenzi. 
Proverbs20:1 Waini mudadi, doro mupopoti; Ani naani anobatwa nazvo, haana kuchenjera." 
Proverbs20:2 Kuvhundusa kwamambo kwakaita sokuomba kweshumba; Anomutsamwisa, anozvitadzira upenyu hwake." 
Proverbs20:3 Munhu anokudzwa kana achigara kure nokukakavara; Asi benzi rimwe nerimwe rinokakavara. 
Proverbs20:4 Simbe hairimi kana kune chando; Saka kana achitsvaka zvibereko pakucheka, hazvipo." 
Proverbs20:5 Mano mumwoyo womunhu angaita semvura yakadzika; Asi munhu wenjere achaichera. 
Proverbs20:6 Vanhu vazhinji vanowana munhu anovaitira chinhu chakanaka, Asi ndiani angawana munhu akatendeka?" 
Proverbs20:7 Munhu akarurama, anofamba muzvokwadi yake, Vana vake vanomutevera vacharopafadzwa." 
Proverbs20:8 Mambo, anogara pachigaro chokutonga, Anodzinga zvakaipa zvose nameso ake." 
Proverbs20:9 Ndiani angati, “Ndachenesa mwoyo wangu, Ndanatswa zvivi zvangu?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Zviidzo zvakasiyana, nezviyero zvakasiyana, Izvozvo zvose zvinonyangadza Jehovha." 
Proverbs20:11 Kunyangwe nomwanakomana anozvizivisa nezvaanoita, Kana basa rake rakanaka, kana rakarurama." 
Proverbs20:12 Nzeve, inonzwa, neziso, rinoona, Jehovha akazviita zvose." 
Proverbs20:13 Usada hope, kuti urege kuzova murombo; Svinudza meso ako, kuti ugogutiswa nezvokudya." 
Proverbs20:14 “Chakaipa, chakaipa!” Ndizvo zvinoreva mutengi; Asi kana woenda wozvirumbidza." 
Proverbs20:15 Ndarama iriko, nekorari zhinji; Asi miromo yezivo ndicho chinhu chinokosha kwazvo." 
Proverbs20:16 Mutorerei nguo yake, iye wakazviita rubatso kumutorwa; Ngaave rubatso rwavatorwa." 
Proverbs20:17 Munhu anoti zvokudya zvenhema zvakanaka, Asi pashure muromo wake uchazara nejecha." 
Proverbs20:18 Mano anobva pakurangana; Urwe pfumo wamborairirwa nohuchenjeri. 
Proverbs20:19 Anofamba ana makuhwa, anobudisa zvakavanda; Saka usashamwaridzana nomunhu anoshamisa miromo yake." 
Proverbs20:20 Anotuka baba vake kana mai vake, Mwenje wake uchadzimwa parima rakasviba." 
Proverbs20:21 Nhaka, yakawanikwa nokukurumidza pakutanga, Haingaropafadzwi pakupedzisira." 
Proverbs20:22 Usati, “Ndichatsiva zvakaipa;” Mirira Jehovha, iye achakuponesa." 
Proverbs20:23 Zviidzo, zvakasiyana, zvinonyangadza Jehovha; Nechiyero chinonyengedzera hachina kunaka." 
Proverbs20:24 Kufamba kwomunhu kunobva kuna Jehovha; Zvino munhu anganzwisisa seiko nzira yake? 
Proverbs20:25 Musungo kumunhu kupika achiti, “Chitsvene!” Asina kumborangarira, Ndokuzofungisisa ambopika." 
Proverbs20:26 Mambo akachenjera anozungura vakaipa, Achivapura nomupuro." 
Proverbs20:27 Mweya womunhu mwenje waJehovha; Anonzvera zvose zviri mukati–kati. 
Proverbs20:28 Rudo nokutendeka zvinochengeta mambo; Chigaro chake choushe chinotsigirwa norudo. 
Proverbs20:29 Majaya anokudzwa nokuda kwesimba rawo; Ukomba hwavatana ndiyo misoro yakachena. 
Proverbs20:30 Kurohwa kunokuvadza kunonatsa zvakaipa; Kurohwa kunopinda mukati–kati. 
Proverbs21:1 Mwoyo wamambo uri muruoko rwaJehovha sehova dzemvura; Anoufambisa sezvaanoda. 
Proverbs21:2 Nzira ipi neipi yomunhu anoti yakarurama pakuona kwake; Asi Jehovha anoyera mwoyo. 
Proverbs21:3 Kuita zvakarurama nokururamisira Zvinofadza Jehovha kupfuura chibayiro. 
Proverbs21:4 Kutarira kwamanyawi nomwoyo unozvikudza, Icho chiedza chavakaipa, zvivi." 
Proverbs21:5 Ndangariro dzavashingairi dzinouyisa zvizhinji; Asi ani naani anokurumidzisa anongovangira kushaiwa. 
Proverbs21:6 Kuunganidza pfuma norurimi runoreva nhema Imhute inodzingwa kwose–kwose navanotsvaka rufu. 
Proverbs21:7 Kumanikidza kwavakaipa kunovaparadza, Nokuti vanoramba kuita zvakarurama." 
Proverbs21:8 Nzira yomunhu ane mhosva yakaminama kwazvo; Asi kana ari akachena, kuita kwake kwakarurama." 
Proverbs21:9 Zviri nani kugara pakona redenga, Pakugara muimba imwe nomukadzi anokakavara." 
Proverbs21:10 Mweya wowakaipa unoda zvakaipa; Wokwake haawani nyasha kwaari. 
Proverbs21:11 Kana mudadi achirangwa, asina mano achava nouchenjeri; Kana wakachenjera achidzidziswa, anogamuchira zivo." 
Proverbs21:12 Akarurama anocherechedza imba yowakaipa; Anowisira vakaipa mukuparadzwa. 
Proverbs21:13 Anodzivira nzeve yake, kuti arege kunzwa kuchema kwomurombo, Iyewo achachema, asi haanganzwiki." 
Proverbs21:14 Chipo, chinopiwa pakavanda, chinonyaradza hasha, Nechipiwa, chiri muchipfuva, kutsamwa kukuru." 
Proverbs21:15 Kuita zvakarurama ndiwo mufaro kuno akarurama; Asi vaiti vezvakaipa vanoparadzwa nako. 
Proverbs21:16 Munhu, anotsauka panzira yenjere, achandozorora muungano yavakafa." 
Proverbs21:17 Anofarira zvinofadza, achava murombo; Anofarira waini namafuta haangapfumi." 
Proverbs21:18 Akaipa idzikunuro yowakarurama; Anoita nokunyengedzera anopinda panzvimbo yowakarurama. 
Proverbs21:19 Zviri nani kugara murenje, Pakugara nomukadzi anokakavara noanonetsa." 
Proverbs21:20 Mumba mowakachenjera mune pfuma inokosha namafuta, Asi benzi rinozvipedza." 
Proverbs21:21 Munhu, anotsvaka kururama nounyoro, Anowana upenyu, nokururama, nokukudzwa." 
Proverbs21:22 Munhu akachenjera anokwira muguta ravane simba, Achiwisira pasi nhare yavanovimba nayo." 
Proverbs21:23 Ani naani anochengeta muromo wake norurimi rwake, Anochengeta mweya wake pamatambudziko." 
Proverbs21:24 Munhu, anozvikudza ana manyawi, mudadi ndiro zita rake; Anoita namanyawi okuzvikudza kwake." 
Proverbs21:25 Kuda kwoane usimbe kunomuuraya; Nokuti maoko ake anoramba kubata basa. 
Proverbs21:26 Zuva rose anoramba achingochiva; Asi akarurama anopa asingarambi. 
Proverbs21:27 Chibayiro chowakaipa chinonyangadza; Ndoda kana achiuya nazvo kuyananisira zvakaipa. 
Proverbs21:28 Chapupu chenhema chichaparadzwa; Asi munhu unoteerera, acharamba achitaura." 
Proverbs21:29 Munhu akaipa ane chiso chisinganyari; Asi kana ari akarurama anogadzira nzira dzake. 
Proverbs21:30 Hakuna uchenjeri, kana njere, Hakuna mano angakunda Jehovha." 
Proverbs21:31 Bhiza rinogadzirirwa zuva rokurwa, Asi kukunda kunobva kuna Jehovha." 
Proverbs22:1 Zita rakanaka rinofanira kusarudzwa kupfuura pfuma zhinji; Uye kudikanwa kupfuura sirivha nendarama. 
Proverbs22:2 Vapfumi navarombo vanosangana pamwechete; Jehovha ndiye muiti wavo vose. 
Proverbs22:3 Munhu akangwara anoona zvakaipa, ndokuvanda; Asi vasina mano vanopfuura havo, ndokuwira munjodzi." 
Proverbs22:4 Mubairo wokuzvininipisa nokutya Jehovha Ipfuma nokukudzwa noupenyu. 
Proverbs22:5 Minzwa nemisungo zviri panzira yousakarurama; Asi anochengeta mweya wake achagara kure nazvo. 
Proverbs22:6 Rovedza mwana nzira yaanofanira kufamba nayo, Ipapo kunyangwe akwegura haangatsauki pairi." 
Proverbs22:7 Mupfumi anobata ushe pamusoro pomurombo; Anotora chikwereti, muranda, wowakamupa chikwereti." 
Proverbs22:8 Unodzvara zvakaipa, uchacheka dambudziko; Shamhu yokutsamwa kwake ichanyangarika." 
Proverbs22:9 Ane mwoyo munyoro acharopafadzwa; Nokuti anopa varombo zvokudya zvake. 
Proverbs22:10 Dzinga mudadi, kukakavara kugoendawo; Nenharo nokunyadzwa zvichaguma." 
Proverbs22:11 Anoda kuchena kwomwoyo, Novane miromo inofadza, mambo achava shamwari yake." 
Proverbs22:12 Meso aJehovha anochengeta ane zivo; Asi achakonesa mashoko omunhu anonyengedzera. 
Proverbs22:13 Simbe inoti, “Kune shumba kunze, Ndingaurayiwa pakati penzira dzomumusha.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Muromo wavakadzi vokumwe igomba rakadzika; Anotsamwirwa naJehovha achawiramo. 
Proverbs22:15 Upenzi hunonamatira mumwoyo womwana; Asi shamhu yokurairira ichahudzingira kure naye. 
Proverbs22:16 Anomanikidza murombo achida kuwedzera pfuma yake; neanopa zvipo kuvapfumi, vose vachawana urombo." 
Proverbs22:17 Rerekera nzeve yako, unzwe mashoko owakachenjera, Mwoyo wako urangarire zivo yangu." 
Proverbs22:18 Nokuti chinhu chakanaka, kana uchigara nazvo mukati mako, Ngazvigare pamwechete pamiromo yako." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndakakuzivisa, iyewe, izvozvo nhasi, Kuti uvimbe naJehovha." 
Proverbs22:20 Handina kukunyorera mashoko akaisvonaka here, Okurairira nezivo here?" 
Proverbs22:21 Kuti uziviswe kwazvo mashoko ezvokwadi, Kuti udzosere mashoko ezvokwadi kuna vanokutuma here?" 
Proverbs22:22 Usatorera murombo, nokuti murombo; Usamanikidza anotambudzika pasuwo;" 
Proverbs22:23 Nokuti Jehovha achavarwira pamhaka dzavo, Nokutadzira upenyu hwavanovatadzira." 
Proverbs22:24 Usashamwaridzana nomunhu anotsamwa; Usafambidzana nomunhu ane hasha; 
Proverbs22:25 Kuti urege kudzidza tsika dzake, Uteyire mweya wako musungo." 
Proverbs22:26 Usava mumwe wavanozvisunga noruoko, Kana vakazviita rubatso nokuda kwechikwereti." 
Proverbs22:27 Kana usina chaungaripa nacho, Achagokutorereiko nhoo dzako pasi pako?" 
Proverbs22:28 Usabvisa muganho wekare, Wakaiswapo namadzibaba ako." 
Proverbs22:29 Unoona munhu anoshingaira pabasa rake here? Achamira pamberi pamadzimambo; Haangamiri pamberi pavanhu vasingazikanwi. 
Proverbs23:1 Kana ukagara pakudya pamwechete nomubati, Cherechedza zvakanaka zviri pamberi pako;" 
Proverbs23:2 Uzvigure huro dzako, Kana uri munhu wamadyo" 
Proverbs23:3 Usapanga zvinozipa zvake, Nokuti zvokudya izvo zvinonyengedzera." 
Proverbs23:4 Usazvinetsa kuwana pfuma; Rega huchenjeri hwako. 
Proverbs23:5 Unoda kuzvitarira nameso ako? Zvaenda! Nokuti zvirokwazvo pfuma inozviitira mapapiro, Segondo rinobhururukira kudenga." 
Proverbs23:6 Usadya zvokudya zvomunhu ano ruchiva; Kana kupanga zvinozipa zvake. 
Proverbs23:7 Nokuti sezvaanofunga mumwoyo make, ndozvaakaita; Anoti kwauri, “Chidya, chinwa;” Asi mwoyo wake haune hanya newe." 
Proverbs23:8 Musuva wawadya, uchaurutsazve, Ukarashikirwa namashoko ako akanaka." 
Proverbs23:9 Usataura paunonzwika nebenzi; Nokuti richazvidza uchenjeri hwamashoko ako. 
Proverbs23:10 Usabvisa muganho wekare; Uye usapinda paminda yenherera; 
Proverbs23:11 Nokuti Mudzikinuri wavo ane simba; Iye uchavarwira pamhaka dzavo newe. 
Proverbs23:12 Mwoyo wako ushingaire kudzidziswa, Nenzeve dzako kunzwa mashoko ezivo." 
Proverbs23:13 Usarega kuranga mwana; Nokuti kunyangwe ukamurova neshamhu, haangafi." 
Proverbs23:14 Umurove neshamhu, Ugorwira mweya wake paSheori." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwanakomana wangu, kana mwoyo wako wochenjera, Nomwoyo wangu uchafarawo." 
Proverbs23:16 Zvirokwazvo, itsvo dzangu dzichafarisisa, Kana miromo yako ichitaura zvinhu zvakarurama." 
Proverbs23:17 Mwoyo wako ngaurege kugodora vatadzi; Asi utye Jehovha mazuva ose. 
Proverbs23:18 Nokuti zvirokwazvo mubairo uripo; Chawakatarira hachingaparadzwi. 
Proverbs23:19 Inzwa, iwe mwanakomana wangu, uchenjere, Ururamise mwoyo wako munzira." 
Proverbs23:20 Usava pakati pavanokarira waini, Pakati pavanokarira nyama." 
Proverbs23:21 Nokuti munwi neane madyo vachava varombo; Hope dzichapfekedza munhu mamvemve. 
Proverbs23:22 Teerera baba vako vakakubereka; Usazvidza mai vako kana vachembera. 
Proverbs23:23 Tenga zvokwadi, urege kuzoitengesazve; Uye tenga uchenjeri nedzidzo nenjere." 
Proverbs23:24 Baba vovakarurama vachafara kwazvo; Uye akabereka mwana akachenjera, achafadzwa naye." 
Proverbs23:25 Baba vako namai vako ngavafare, Mai vakakubereka ngavafare kwazvo." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwanakomana wangu, ndipe mwoyo wako; Meso ako ngaafarire nzira dzangu." 
Proverbs23:27 Nokuti chipfeve igoronga rakadzika; Nomukadzi wokumwe gomba rakamanikana. 
Proverbs23:28 Zvirokwazvo anovandira segororo; Anowedzera vanyengedzeri pakati pavanhu. 
Proverbs23:29 Ndiani anoti, “Haiwa!” Ndiani, anoti, “Maiwe! Ndiani anokukakavara? Ndiani anokuchema? Ndiani ano mavanga pasina mhaka? Ndiani ana meso akatsvuka?”" 
Proverbs23:30 Ndivo vanogarisa pawaini; Ivo vanondotsvaka waini yavhenganiswa. 
Proverbs23:31 Usatarira waini kana yakatsvuka, Kana ichivaima mumukombe, Kana ichitapira pakunwiwa." 
Proverbs23:32 Pakupedzisira inoruma senyoka, Inobaya semvumbi." 
Proverbs23:33 Meso ako achaona zvisingazikanwi, Mwoyo wako uchabudisa zvisakarurama." 
Proverbs23:34 Zvirokwazvo uchava somunhu avete pasi mukati megungwa, Kana soavete pamusoro pedanda rechikepe." 
Proverbs23:35 Uchati, “Vakandirova, asi handina kurwadziwa, Vakandirova, asi handina kuzvinzwa; Ndichapepuka rinhiko? Ipapo ndichandoitsvakazve.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Usagodora vanhu vakaipa; Usashuva kuva pakati pavo. 
Proverbs24:2 Nokuti mwoyo yavo inorangarira kuparadza; Nemiromo yavo inotaura zvakashata. 
Proverbs24:3 Imba inovakwa nouchenjeri; Inosimbiswa nenjere. 
Proverbs24:4 Nezivo dzimba dzomukati dzinozadzwa Nepfuma yose inokosha inofadza. 
Proverbs24:5 Munhu akachenjera ane simba; Zvirokwazvo, munhu wezivo anowedzera simba." 
Proverbs24:6 Nokuti anofanira kurwa pfumo amborairirwa nouchenjeri; Asi kuna varairiri vazhinji ndiko kune ruponeso. 
Proverbs24:7 Uchenjeri hahusvikirwi nebenzi; Harishamisi muromo waro padare. 
Proverbs24:8 Anorangarira kuita zvakaipa, Achanzi navanhu mwene wezvakashata." 
Proverbs24:9 Mufungo woupenzi zvivi; Mudadi anonyangadza vanhu. 
Proverbs24:10 Kana ukapera simba nezuva rokutambudzika, Simba rako ishoma." 
Proverbs24:11 Rwira vanoiswa kurufu; Novourayiwa usarega kuvadzosa. 
Proverbs24:12 Kana ukati, “Tarirai, hatina kuzviziva;” Ko iye anoidza mwoyo, haazvioni here? Naiye anochengeta mweya wako, haazvizivi here? Ko iye haangapi mumwe nomumwe zvakaenzana nebasa rake here?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwanakomana wangu, idya uchi, nokuti hwakanaka; Nomusvi unozipa pamukanwa wako." 
Proverbs24:14 Uchaona kuti ndizvo zvichaita uchenjeri kumweya wako; Kana wahuwana, mubairo uchavapo, Nezvakatarira hazvingaparadzwi." 
Proverbs24:15 Iwe munhu akaipa, usavandira panogara wakarurama; Usaparadza paanozorora." 
Proverbs24:16 Nokuti munhu akarurama angawa kanomwe, achisimukazve; Asi vakaipa vanowisirwa pasi nenjodzi." 
Proverbs24:17 Usafarisisa kana muvengi wako achiwa; Kana achiwisirwa pasi, mwoyo wako ngaurege kufara." 
Proverbs24:18 Kuti Jehovha arege kuzviona, zvisamufadza, Akazodzora kutsamwa kwake kwaari." 
Proverbs24:19 Usatsamwa nokuda kwavaiti vezvakaipa; Uye usagodora vakaipa. 
Proverbs24:20 Nokuti munhu akaipa haana mubairo; Mwenje wakaipa uchadzimwa. 
Proverbs24:21 Mwanakomana wangu, itya Jehovha namambo; Usafambidzana navanongosishanduka." 
Proverbs24:22 Nokuti nhamo yavo ichamuka pakarepo; Nokuguma kwamakore avo, ndiani achazviziva?" 
Proverbs24:23 Zvirevo izviwo zvakabva kuna vakachenjera, Kutsaura vanhu pakutonga hazvina kunaka." 
Proverbs24:24 Anoti kune wakaipa, “Akarurama,” Vanhu vachamutuka, nendudzi dzichamusema." 
Proverbs24:25 Asi vanomuraira, vachaitirwa zvakanaka; ropafadzo yakanaka ichauya pamusoro pavo." 
Proverbs24:26 Anopindura namashoko akarurama, Atsvoda nemiromo." 
Proverbs24:27 Gadzira basa rako kunze, Uzvigadzirire iro pamunda; Pashure ugovaka imba yako." 
Proverbs24:28 Usava chapupu chinopomera wokwako asina mhosva; Usanyengedzera nemiromo yako. 
Proverbs24:29 Usati, “Sezvaakandiitira, ndizvo zvandichamuitirawo; Ndicharipira munhu sezvaakaita iye.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Ndakapfuura napamunda wesimbe, Napamunda wemizambiringa womunhu anoshaiwa njere;" 
Proverbs24:31 Tarirai, akanga angomera minzwa chete; Munda wose wakanga wakafukidzwa norukato, Norusvingo rwawo rwamabwe rwakanga rwakoromoka." 
Proverbs24:32 Ipapo ndakacherechedza, ndikanatsofunga; Ndakaona, ndikadzidziswa." 
Proverbs24:33 Kumbovata zvishomanene, kumbotsimwaira zvishomanene, Kumbofungatira maoko zvishomanene, ndizorore;" 
Proverbs24:34 Saizvozvo urombo hwako huchasvika segororo, Nokushaiwa kwako somunhu akashonga nhumbi dzokurwa."

Proverbs25:3 Kukwirira kwedenga, nokudzika kwenyika, Nemwoyo yamadzimambo hazvibviri kunzverwa." 
Proverbs25:4 Bvisa marara pasirivha, Muwumbi agobudisirwa hari." 
Proverbs25:5 Bvisa akaipa pamberi pamambo, Chigaro chake choushe chisimbiswe nokururama." 
Proverbs25:6 Usava namanyawi pamberi pamambo; Usamira panzvimbo yavakuru. 
Proverbs25:7 Nokuti zviri nani kuti vati kwauri, “Kwira pano,” Pakuti uninipiswe pamberi pomuchinda. Wawaona nameso ako"

Proverbs25:10 Kuti mumwe anozvinzwa arege kukutuka, Gungwa rako rikasaguma."

Proverbs25:12 Murairi akachenjera panzeve inoteerera, Zvakafanana nechindori chenzeve chendarama noukomba hwendarama yakaisvonaka." 
Proverbs25:13 Nhume yakatendeka kuna vanoituma yakafanana nokutonhorera kwechando panguva yokucheka; nokuti anoponesa mweya yavatenzi vayo.

Proverbs25:16 Wawana uchi here? Chidya hunokuringana, Kuti urege kuzvimbirwa nahwo, ukahurutsa." 
Proverbs25:17 Rutsoka rwako ngarurege kuwanza kupinda paimba yowokwako; Arege kuzoneta newe, akakuvenga." 
Proverbs25:18 Munhu anopupurira wokwake nhema, Akafanana netsvimbo, nomunondo, nomuseve unopinza." 
Proverbs25:19 Kutenda munhu asina kutendeka panguva yenhamo, Kwakafanana nezino rakagurika norutsoka rwakashodoka." 
Proverbs25:20 Somunhu anobvisa nguo kana kuchitonhora, uye sevhiniga kana ichiiswa pasoda, Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anoimbira mwoyo unorwadza nziyo." 
Proverbs25:21 Kana muvengi wako ane nzara, umupe zvokudya adye; Kana ane nyota, umupe mvura anwe." 
Proverbs25:22 Nokuti uchatutira mazimbe omoto pamusoro wake, Uye Jehovha achakuripira." 
Proverbs25:23 Mhepo inobva kuchamhembe inouyisa mvura; Saizvozvo rurimi runa makuhwa runouyisa chiso chakatsamwa. 
Proverbs25:24 Zviri nani kugara pakona redenga, Pakugara muimba imwe nomukadzi unokakavara."

Proverbs25:26 Munhu akarurama, anozununguka pamberi pavakaipa, Akafanana netsime rakabvongodzwa nechitubhu chine tsvina." 
Proverbs25:27 Hazvina kunaka kudya uchi huzhinji; Asi kunzvera zvinorema ndiko kukudzwa. 
Proverbs25:28 Munhu asingadzori mweya wake, Akafanana neguta rakaputswa, risina rusvingo."

Proverbs26:2 Sezvinoita shiri pakupaparika kwayo, nenyenganyenga pakubhururuka kwayo, Saizvozvo kutuka pasina mhosva hakuitiki." 
Proverbs26:3 Tyava yakaitirwa bhiza, namatomu mbongoro, Neshamhu musana wamapenzi." 
Proverbs26:4 Usapindura benzi noupenzi hwaro, Kuti urege kufanana naro." 
Proverbs26:5 Pindura benzi noupenzi hwaro, Kuti rirege kuti rakachenjera." 
Proverbs26:6 Anotuma shoko noruoko rwebenzi, Unozvigura tsoka, nokunwa kutambudzika." 
Proverbs26:7 Makumbo echirema anongoremberera; Ndizvo zvakaita chirevo mumuromo webenzi. 
Proverbs26:8 Somunhu anosungira ibwe pachifuramabwe, Ndizvo zvakaita iye anokudza benzi." 
Proverbs26:9 Sezvinoita minzwa muruoko rwomukariri wedoro, Ndizvo zvakaita chirevo mumuromo webenzi." 
Proverbs26:10 Somufuri wemiseve, anofura zvose, Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anosevenzesa benzi neanosevenzesa vafambi." 
Proverbs26:11 Sembwa inodzokera kumarutsi ayo, Ndizvo zvakaita benzi rinopamhidza upenzi hwaro." 
Proverbs26:12 Unoona munhu anoti ndakachenjera here? Benzi riri nani kuna iye! 
Proverbs26:13 Simbe inoti, “Kune shumba panzira; Shumba iri munzira dzomumusha.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Gonhi rinotendereka pamahinji aro; Ndizvo zvinoita simbe panhoo dzayo. 
Proverbs26:15 Simbe inopinza ruoko rwayo mundiro, Ino usimbe kurudzoserazve kumuromo wayo." 
Proverbs26:16 Simbe inozviti ndakachenjera Kupfuura vanhu vanomwe vanogona kupindura nenjere. 
Proverbs26:17 Somunhu anobata imbwa nenzeve dzayo, ichingopfuura hayo, Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anozvipinza pagakava raasina mhosva naro." 
Proverbs26:18 Somupengo anokanda zvitsika, Nemiseve, nezvinouraya," 
Proverbs26:19 Ndizvo zvinoita munhu anonyengedzera wokwake, Achiti, “Ndinongoita zvangu jee!”" 
Proverbs26:20 Moto unodzima nokushaiwa huni; Uye kana kusina mucheri, gakava rinopera." 
Proverbs26:21 Sezvakaita mazimbe pazvitsika zvinopfuta, nehuni pamoto, Ndizvo zvakaita munhu wegakava pakupfutidza rukave." 
Proverbs26:22 Mashoko omucheri akaita sezvimedu zvinozipa, Zvinoburukira mukati–kati momuviri." 
Proverbs26:23 Miromo inopisa norudo pamwechete nomwoyo wakaipa, Zvakafanana nomudziyo wevhu wakanamirwa namarara anobva pasirivha." 
Proverbs26:24 Muvengi anonyengedzera nemiromo yake, Asi anovanza kunyengedzera mumwoyo make." 
Proverbs26:25 Kana achitaura zvinonaka, usamutenda; Nokuti mumwoyo make mune zvinonyangadza zvinomwe." 
Proverbs26:26 Kunyangwe kuvenga kwake kuchizvivanza nokunyengedzera, Kushata kwake kuchabudiswa pachena pamberi peungano." 
Proverbs26:27 Ani naani anochera gomba, achawiramo iye; Anokungurusa ibwe, richadzokera pamusoro pake." 
Proverbs26:28 Rurimi rwenhema runovenga akuvadzwa narwo; Nomuromo unobata kumeso unoparadza. 
Proverbs27:1 Usazvirumbidza pamusoro pezuva ramangwana; Nokuti hauzivi chaungavigirwa nezuva rimwe. 
Proverbs27:2 Mumwe ngaakurumbidze, urege kuva muromo wako; Ngaave mweni, irege kuva miromo yako." 
Proverbs27:3 Ibwe rinorema, uye jecha rinorema; Asi kutsamwa kwebenzi kunokurira zvose nokurema." 
Proverbs27:4 Hasha dzinokuvadza, uye kutsamwa kunokukura; Asi ndiani angamira pamberi pegodo." 
Proverbs27:5 Kurairwa pachena kunopfuura Rudo rwakavanzwa. 
Proverbs27:6 Mavanga anotemwa neshamwari angatendwa, Asi kutsoda kwomuvengi kunonyengedza." 
Proverbs27:7 Mweya wakaguta unotsika pasi musvi wouchi; Asi mweya une nzara unoti zvose zvinozipa kunyangwe zvichivava. 
Proverbs27:8 Seshiri inoburuka ichienda kure nedendere rayo, Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anofamba–famba kure napaanogara." 
Proverbs27:9 Mafuta nezvinonhuwira zvinofadza mwoyo; Ndizvo zvinoitawo kunaka kwoushamwari hwomunhu kunobva pakuyanana kwemweya. 
Proverbs27:10 Usasiya shamwari yako neshamwari yababa vako; Usaenda kumba kwomunun'una wako nezuva renhamo yako; Wokwako, ari pedyo, anopfuura munun'una uri kure." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwanakomana wangu, iva wakachenjera, ufadze mwoyo wangu; Kuti ndigone kupindura anondishora." 
Proverbs27:12 Munhu akangwara anoona zvakaipa, ndokuvanda; Asi vasina mano vanopfuura havo, ndokuwira munjodzi." 
Proverbs27:13 Munhu anozviita rubatso kumutorwa, umutorere nguo yake; Umuite rubatso iye akazviita rubatso kumukadzi wokumwe." 
Proverbs27:14 Anoropafadza shamwari yake nezwi guru, achifumira mangwanani, Achanzi wakatukwa pamusoro pazvo." 
Proverbs27:15 Kudonha kusingaperi pazuva remvura zhinji Nomukadzi anokakavara, zvakafanana." 
Proverbs27:16 Anoda kumudzivisa, anodzidzisa mhepo; Ruoko rwake rworudyi rwakabata mafuta." 
Proverbs27:17 Simbi inorodza simbi; Saizvozvo munhu anorodza chiso cheshamwari yake. 
Proverbs27:18 Ani naani anochengeta muonde, achadya zvibereko zvawo; Anochengeta tenzi wake, achakudzwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Chiso sezvachinotarisana nechiso mumvura, Saizvozvo mwoyo womunhu unotarisana nomunhu." 
Proverbs27:20 Sheori neAbhadhoni hazvitongoguti; Nameso omunhu haaguti. 
Proverbs27:21 Hari yokunyausa ndeyesirivha, nevhira nderendarama; Saizvozvo munhu anozikanwa nezvaanofarira." 
Proverbs27:22 Kunyangwe ukatswa benzi muduri nomutsi pakati pezviyo zvinotsiwa, Hupenzi hwaro hahungabvi kwariri." 
Proverbs27:23 Shingaira uzive kuti makwai ako akadini; Uchengete zvakanaka mapoka ako. 
Proverbs27:24 Nokuti pfuma haigari nokusingaperi; Ko korona inogara kusvikira kumarudzi ose here? 
Proverbs27:25 Uswa hunoenda, bumhudza ndokubuda, Nemiriwo yamakomo inovhunganidzwa." 
Proverbs27:26 Makwayana anokuvigira zvokufuka zvako, Uye mbudzi ndiwo mutengo weminda." 
Proverbs27:27 Mukaka wembudzi ucharingana zvokudya zvako, nezvokudya zveimba yako, Nokuraramisa varandasikana vako." 
Proverbs28:1 Akaipa anotiza kusina anodzingana naye; Asi vakarurama vanotsunga mwoyo seshumba. 
Proverbs28:2 Nemhaka yokudarika kwenyika, machinda ayo anowanda; Asi nomumwe, ane njere nezivo, icharamba iripo." 
Proverbs28:3 Munhu anoshaiwa amene, anomanikidza varombo, Akafanana nemvura inokukura, isingasiyi zvokudya." 
Proverbs28:4 Vanosiya murairo, vanorumbidza vakaipa; Asi vanochengeta murairo, vanoita nharo navo." 
Proverbs28:5 Vanhu vakashata havanzwisisi zvakarurama; Asi vanotsvaka Jehovha vanonzwisisa zvose. 
Proverbs28:6 Murombo, anofamba muzvokwadi yake, Anopfuura asakarurama anofamba nenzira mbiri, kunyangwe akapfuma." 
Proverbs28:7 Anochengeta murairo, mwanakomana akachenjera; Asi anofambidzana navanhu vana madyo, vanonyadzisa baba vake." 
Proverbs28:8 Anowedzera pfuma yake nemhindu kana nokuwedzera kusakarurama, Anounganidzira mumwe achava netsitsi navarombo." 
Proverbs28:9 Anoramba kunzwa murairo nenzeve yake, Kunyangwe nomunyengetero wake anonyangadza." 
Proverbs28:10 Ani naani anorashisa vakarurama vafambe nenzira yakaipa, Achawira amene mugomba rake; Asi vakarurama vachagara nhaka yezvakanaka." 
Proverbs28:11 Mupfumi anoti ndakachenjera; Asi murombo, ane njere, anomuferefeta." 
Proverbs28:12 Kana vakarurama vachikunda, mufaro mukuru uriko; Asi kana vakaipa vosimba, vanhu vovanda." 
Proverbs28:13 Anofukidza kudarika kwake, haangavi nomufaro; Asi anozvireurura, achizvirasha, achawana nyasha." 
Proverbs28:14 Munhu anogara achitya, ano mufaro; Asi anoomesa mwoyo wake, achawira munjodzi." 
Proverbs28:15 Seshumba inoomba, nebere rinopota–pota, Ndizvo zvakaita mubati akaipa anobata vanhu varombo." 
Proverbs28:16 Muchinda, anoshaiwa njere, anomanikidza vanhuwo zvikuru; Asi anovenga kuchiva, achawedzera mazuva ake." 
Proverbs28:17 Munhu, anoremedzwa neropa romumwe munhu, Achatizira kugomba; ngaarege kudziviswa nomunhu." 
Proverbs28:18 Ani naani anofamba zvakarurama, acharwirwa; Asi anofamba nenzira dzisakarurama, achawa pakarepo." 
Proverbs28:19 Anorima munda wake, achava nezvokudya zvizhinji; Asi unovangira zvisina maturo, uchava nourombo kwazvo." 
Proverbs28:20 Munhu akatendeka achava namaropafadzo mazhinji; Asi anoda kupfuma nokukurumidza, haangakoni kurohwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Kutsaura vanhu hakuna kunaka; Nokuti munhu angadarika nokuda kwechimedu chechingwa. 
Proverbs28:22 Munhu ano ruchiva, anovangira pfuma, Asingazivi kuti achawirwa nokushaiwa." 
Proverbs28:23 Anorairira munhu achazowana nyasha pashure, Kupfuura iye anobata kumeso norurimi rwake." 
Proverbs28:24 Anobira baba vake kana amai vake, achiti, “Hakuzi kudarika,” Uyu ishamwari yoanoparadza." 
Proverbs28:25 Ano mweya wokuchiva anomutsa kukakavara; Asi anovimba naJehovha, achasimbiswa." 
Proverbs28:26 Anotenda mwoyo wake, ibenzi; Asi anofamba nouchenjeri, acharwirwa." 
Proverbs28:27 Anopa varombo, haangazoshaiwi; Asi anotsinzina meso ake, achatukwa kazhinji." 
Proverbs28:28 Kana vakaipa vosimba, vanhu vovanda; Asi kana voparara, vakarurama vowanda." 
Proverbs29:1 Munhu akarairwa kazhinji, achiomesa mutsipa wake, Achaparadzwa pakarepo, kusina chingamubatsira." 
Proverbs29:2 Kana vakarurama vowanda, vanhu vanofara; Asi kana munhu wakaipa achibata ushe, vanhu vanogomera." 
Proverbs29:3 Ani naani anoda uchenjeri, anofadza baba vake; Asi anoshamwaridzana nezvipfeve, anorasha pfuma yake." 
Proverbs29:4 Mambo anosimbisa nyika yake noruenzaniso; Asi munhu wemitero, anoiparadza." 
Proverbs29:5 Munhu anobata wokwake kumeso, Anodzikira tsoka dzake mumbure." 
Proverbs29:6 Pakudarika kwomunhu akashata pano musungo; Asi wakarurama achaimba nokufara kwazvo. 
Proverbs29:7 Akarurama anoziva kururamisira mhaka dzavarombo; Asi akaipa haanzwisisi zivo. 
Proverbs29:8 Vadadi vanopisira guta; Asi vakachenjera vanodzora kutsamwa. 
Proverbs29:9 Kana munhu akarurama ane mhaka nebenzi, Iye achatsamwa nokuseka, asi hakungavi nezororo." 
Proverbs29:10 Vanhu veropa vanovenga akarurama; Asi vakarurama vanotsvaka kuraramisa mweya wake. 
Proverbs29:11 Benzi rinobudisa hasha dzaro dzose; Asi munhu akachenjera anodzidzora nokudzinyaradza. 
Proverbs29:12 Kana mubati achiteerera nhema, Varanda vake vose vachava vakaipa." 
Proverbs29:13 Murombo nomunhu anomanikidza vanosangana pamwechete; Jehovha anovhenekera meso avose. 
Proverbs29:14 Mambo, anoruramisira varombo nokutendeka, Chigaro chake chichasimbiswa nokusingaperi." 
Proverbs29:15 Shamhu nokuraira zvinouyisa huchenjeri; Asi mwana wangoregwa hake anonyadzisa mai vake. 
Proverbs29:16 Kana vakaipa vowanda, kudarika kuwandawo; Asi vakarurama vachaona kuwa kwavo." 
Proverbs29:17 Rairira mwanakomana wako, agokuzorodza; Zvirokwazvo achafadza mweya wako." 
Proverbs29:18 Kana Jehovha asingazviratidzi, vanhu vanoramba kudzorwa; Asi anochengeta murairo, ano mufaro." 
Proverbs29:19 Muranda angaramba kurairirwa namashoko bedzi; Nokuti, kunzwisisa anonzwisisa hake, asi haane hanya nazvo." 
Proverbs29:20 Unoona munhu unokurumidza kutsamwa? Benzi riri nani kuna iye. 
Proverbs29:21 Kana munhu achirera muranda wake zvakanaka kubva pahuduku hwake, Pakupedzisira achada kuva mwanakomana." 
Proverbs29:22 Munhu wakatsamwa anomutsa kukakavara; Munhu ane hasha anokudarika kuzhinji. 
Proverbs29:23 Kuzvikudza kwomunhu kuchamudukupisa; Asi ano mweya anozvininipisa, achakudzwa." 
Proverbs29:24 Ani naani anoshamwaridzana nembavha, anovenga mweya wake; Anonzwa kupikwa, asi haareururi chinhu." 
Proverbs29:25 Kutya munhu kunouyisa musungo; Asi ani naani anovimba naJehovha, achachengetwa." 
Proverbs29:26 Vazhinji vanotsvaka nyasha yomubati; Asi kururamisirwa kwomunhu kunobva kuna Jehovha. 
Proverbs29:27 Munhu asakarurama anonyangadza akarurama; Uye akarurama panzira dzake anonyangadza akaipa. 
Proverbs30:1 Mashoko aAguri, mwanakomana waJake; chirevo chake. Murume anoti kuna Itieri, kuna Itieri naUkari," 
Proverbs30:2 “Zvirokwazvo, ndiri benzi kupfuura vanhu vose; Handine njere dzomunhu." 
Proverbs30:3 Handina kudzidza uchenjeri, Uye handina zivo yoMutsvene." 
Proverbs30:4 Ndiani akakwira kudenga, akaburukazve? Ndiani akasungira mvura munguo yake? Ndiani akasungira migumo yose yenyika? Zita rake ndiani, nezita romwanakomana wake, kana uchiriziva?" 
Proverbs30:5 Shoko rimwe nerimwe raMwari rakanatswa; Ndiye nhoo yavose vanovanda maari. 
Proverbs30:6 Usawedzera pamashoko ake, Kuti arege kukupa mhosva, uwanikwe une nhema.”" 
Proverbs30:7 Zvinhu zviviri ndakakumbira kwamuri; Musandiramba izvo, ndisati ndafa." 
Proverbs30:8 Bvisai kure neni zvisina kutendeka nenhema; Regai kundipa urombo kana pfuma; Mundigutse nezvokudya zvakandifanira; 
Proverbs30:9 Ndirege kuti kana ndaguta, ndikurambei, ndichiti, “Jehovha ndianiko?” Kana zvimwe ndive murombo, ndibe, Ndimhure zita raMwari wangu." 
Proverbs30:10 Rega kuudzisira muranda kuna tenzi vake, Arege kukutuka, ukanzi une mhosva." 
Proverbs30:11 Rudzi ruriko runotuka baba varwo, Rusingaropafadzi mai varwo." 
Proverbs30:12 Rudzi ruriko runoti pakuona kwedu takachena kwazvo, Asi rusina kunatswa patsvina yarwo." 
Proverbs30:13 Rudzi ruriko, meso arwo ana manyawi sei! Mafungiro ameso avo akakwidzwa." 
Proverbs30:14 Rudzi ruriko, meno arwo akafanana neminondo, nameno eshaya dzarwo samapanga, Kuti rupedze varombo panyika, navanoshaiwa pakati pavanhu." 
Proverbs30:15 Chikweva ropa china vakunda vaviri, vanoti, “Ndipe! Ndipe!” Zvinhu zvitatu zviriko zvisingatongoguti, Zvina zvisingatongoti, “Zvaringana!”" 
Proverbs30:16 Sheori; nechizvaro chisingabereki; Pasi pasingaguti mvura; Nomoto, usingati, “Zvaringana!”" 
Proverbs30:17 Ziso rinoseka baba, Rinoshora kuteerera mai, Makunguo omupata acharinongora, Vana vegondo vacharidya." 
Proverbs30:18 Zvinhu zvitatu zviriko zvinondishamisa, Zvirokwazvo zvina, zvandisingazivi, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs30:19 Kufamba kwegondo mudenga; Kufamba kwenyoka paruware; Kufamba kwechikepe pakati pegungwa; Nokufamba kwomurume nomusikana. 
Proverbs30:20 Ndizvo zvakaita kufamba kwomukadzi woupombwe; Anodya, ndokupukuta muromo wake, Achiti, “Handina kuita chinhu chakaipa.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Nyika inodedera nokuda kwezvinhu zvitatu; Uye nokuda kwezvina zvaisingadi kuona; 
Proverbs30:22 Nokuda kwomuranda kana achizova mambo; Nokuda kwebenzi, kana raguta zvokudya;" 
Proverbs30:23 Nokuda kwomukadzi arambwa, kana azowanikwa; Uye mushandiri, kana azova mugari wenhaka yatenzi wake." 
Proverbs30:24 Zvinhu zvina zviriko panyika zviduku hazvo, Asi zvakachenjera kwazvo, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs30:25 Mujuru, rudzi rusine simba harwo; Kunyangwe zvakadaro anounganidza zvokudya zvawo muzhizha;" 
Proverbs30:26 Mbira, rudzi rusine simba harwo, Kunyangwe zvakadaro dzinoita imba yadzo mumatombo;" 
Proverbs30:27 Mhashu hadzina mambo, Kunyangwe zvakadaro dzinofamba zvakanaka dzichiita mapoka;" 
Proverbs30:28 Chipfira ungachibata namaoko ako, Kunyangwe zvakadaro chiri mudzimba dzamadzimambo." 
Proverbs30:29 Zvinhu zvitatu zviriko zvinokufamba kunokudzwa, Zvirokwazvo zvina zvinokufamba kunokudzwa, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs30:30 Shumba, mhare pakati pemhuka dzose, Isingatizi mhuka ipi neipi;" 
Proverbs30:31 Nemhuka ine zviuno zakasimba, nenhongo yembudzi; Namambo kana ana varwi vake." 
Proverbs30:32 Kana uchinge waita noupenzi, wazvikudza, Kana zvimwe warangarira zvakashata, Pfumbira muromo wako." 
Proverbs30:33 Nokuti mukaka warozva anobudisa mafuta, Nemhino dzadzvinyiwa dzinobudisa ropa, Saizvozvo hasha dzvavambwa dzinobudisa kukakavara." 
Proverbs31:1 Mashoko amambo Remueri; zvirevo zvaakadzidziswa namai vake. 
Proverbs31:2 “Nhai, mwanakomana wangu! Nhai, mwanakomana wemhiko dzangu!" 
Proverbs31:3 Rega kupa vakadzi simba rako, Nenzira dzako kune zvinoparadza madzimambo." 
Proverbs31:4 Iwe Remueri, hazvifaniri madzimambo, hazvifaniri madzimambo kunwa waini; Namachinda kuti, ‘Doro riripiko?’" 
Proverbs31:5 Varege kunwa, vachizokanganwa murairo, Varege kukanganisa kururamisira vamwe vanotambudzika." 
Proverbs31:6 Ipai anoda kuparara doro, Neano mwoyo unorwadza waini;" 
Proverbs31:7 Ngaanwe, akanganwe urombo hwake, Arege kucharangarira kutambudzika kwake." 
Proverbs31:8 Shamisira mbeveve muromo wako, Urwire mhaka dzavose vakadai vakasiyiwa." 
Proverbs31:9 Shamisa muromo wako, utonge zvakarurama, Ururamisire murombo neanoshaiwa.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Ndianiko angawana mukadzi anozviita zvakanaka? Nokuti mutengo wake unokunda kwazvo mutengo wamapera. 
Proverbs31:11 Mwoyo womurume wake unomutenda, Naiye haangashaiwi pfuma." 
Proverbs31:12 Unoitira murume wake zvakanaka, haamuitiri zvakaipa Mazuva ose oupenyu hwake." 
Proverbs31:13 Anotsvaka mvere noruchinda, Achibata namaoko ake nomufaro." 
Proverbs31:14 Akafanana nezvikepe zvavatengesi; Anondotora zvokudya zvake kure. 
Proverbs31:15 Anomuka huchiri usiku, Nokupa mhuri yake zvokudya, Navashandiri vake basa ravo." 
Proverbs31:16 Anorangarira munda, ndokuutenga; Anosima munda wemizambiringa nezvaakawana namaoko ake." 
Proverbs31:17 Anozvisunga chiuno nesimba, Nokusimbisa maoko ake." 
Proverbs31:18 Anoona kuti kushambadzira kwake kwabatsira; Mwenje wake haudzimi usiku. 
Proverbs31:19 Anotambanudzira ruoko rwake kune chokurukisa; Maoko ake anobata chinorukwa. 
Proverbs31:20 Anotambanudzira murombo ruoko rwake; Anotandavadzira anoshaiwa maoko ake. 
Proverbs31:21 Haatyi chando pamusoro peimba yake, Nokuti mhuri yake yose yakafuka nguo tsvuku." 
Proverbs31:22 Anozviitira mitsamiro inoukomba; Nguo yake mucheka wakaisvonaka nomutsvuku. 
Proverbs31:23 Murume wake anozikanwa pamasuwo eguta, Kana agere pakati pavakuru venyika." 
Proverbs31:24 Anoita zvokufuka zvomucheka achizvitengesa, Anovigira vatengesi zvisungo zvezviuno." 
Proverbs31:25 Simba nokukudzwa ndizvo zvokufuka zvake; Anoseka kana achifunga nguva inouya. 
Proverbs31:26 Anoshamisa muromo wake nouchenjeri; Rurimi rwake runodzidzisa nounyoro. 
Proverbs31:27 Anotarira zvakanaka kufamba kwemhuri yake, Asingadyi zvokudya zvousimbe." 
Proverbs31:28 Vana vake vanomuka, vachimuti, “Makaropafadzwa;” Nomurume wakewo anomurumbidza, achiti," 
Proverbs31:29 “Vakunda vazhinji vakaita zvakanaka, Asi iwe unovakunda vose.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Zvinofadza zvinonyengedzera, unaki hahuna maturo; Asi mukadzi anotya Jehovha, ndiye anofanira kurumbidzwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Chimupai zvakafanira zvaakabata namaoko ake; Mabasa ake ngaamurumbidze pamasuwo eguta. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Mashoko oMuparidzi, mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mambo paJerusaremu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Zvanzi noMuparidzi, hazvina maturo chose, hazvina maturo chose, zvose hazvina maturo chose!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Munhu angabatsirweiko nokutambudzika kwake kwose, kwaanotambudzika nako pasi pezuva?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Rudzi rumwe runoenda, rumwe rudzi runouya; asi pasi panongogarapo nokusingaperi." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Zuva rinobudawo, zuva rinovira, richikurumidzira kwarinozobudazve." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Mhepo inoenda zasi, yodzoka yoenda kumusoro; inoramba ichidzoka pakufamba kwayo; mhepo inodzokerazve pakupotereka kwayo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Nzizi dzose dzinodira mugungwa, kunyangwe zvakadaro gungwa harizari; kunzvimbo kunoenda nzizi, ndiko kwadzinodzokerazve." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zvinhu zvose zvizere nokuneta; hakuna munhu angazvitaura; ziso hariguti nokuona, nzeve haizari nokunzwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Chakanga chiripo, ndicho chichazovapo; chakamboitwa, ndicho chichazoitwa; hapane chinhu chitsva pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Chinhu chiriko here, chatingati, “Tarirai, chinhu ichi chitvsa?” Chakanga chichingovapo kare, panguva dzakatitangira." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Marudzi akapfuura haacharangarirwi; namarudzi achazotevera, haangatongorangarirwi navanozovatevera." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ini Muparidzi, ndakanga ndiri mambo waIsiraeri paJerusaremu." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndikarwadza mwoyo wangu kutsvaka nokunzvera nouchenjeri zvose zvinoitwa pasi pedenga; ibasa rinotambudza rakapiwa vanakomana vavanhu vaMwari, kuti vazvitambudze naro." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndakaona mabasa ose anoitwa pasi pezuva; tarirai, zvose hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Chakakombama hachibviri kururamiswa; chinoshaikwa hachibviri kuverengwa. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndakataurirana nomwoyo wangu, ndichiti, “Tarira ndazviwanira uchenjeri hukuru, kukunda vose vakanditangira paJerusaremu; zvirokwazvo mwoyo wangu wakaona uchenjeri huzhinji nezivo.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Asi ndakati ndichirwadza mwoyo wangu kuti ndizive uchenjeri nezivo, noupengo noupenzi, ndikaona kuti naizvozvowo ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Nokuti muuchenjeri huzhinji munokuchema kuzhinji; uye anowedzera zivo, anowedzera shungu." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndakati mumwoyo mangu, uya hako, ndichakuidza nomufaro; chifarira zvinhu zvakanaka! Asi tarira, naizvozvowo zvakanga zvisina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Kana kuri kuseka, ndakati, “Upengo!” Kana uri mufaro, ndakati, “Unobatsireiko?”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndakanzvera mwoyo wangu, ndione kuti ndingafadza nyama yangu sei newaini, mwoyo wangu uchindifambisa hawo nouchenjeri, uye kuti ndingaramba ndakabata upenzi, kusvikira ndaona kuti zvakanaka ndezvipi zvingaitwa navanakomana vavanhu pasi pedenga mazuva ose oupenyu hwavo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndakazviitira mabasa makuru; ndakazvivakira dzimba; ndakazvirimira minda yemizambiringa; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 ndakazviitira minda neminda yemiti, ndikasimamo miti inobereka michero yamarudzi ose;" 
Ecclesiastes2:6 ndakazviitira madziva emvura, kuti ndidiridze matondo pakanga pasimwa miti;" 
Ecclesiastes2:7 ndakatenga varanda navarandakadzi, ndikava navaranda vakaberekerwa mumba mangu; ndakanga ndine pfuma zhinji yemombe nemakwai, kupfuura vose vakanditangira paJerusaremu;" 
Ecclesiastes2:8 ndakazviunganidzirawo sirivha nendarama, nepfuma yamadzimambo neyenyika dzose; ndakazvitsvakira vaimbi varume navakadzi, nezvinofadza zvevanakomana vavanhu, navarongo vazhinji." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Saizvozvo ndakanga ndiri munhu mukuru, ndikaramba ndichikura kupfuura vose vakanditangira paJerusaremu; uye uchenjeri hwangu hwakagara neni." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Zvose zvakadikanwa nameso angu handina kuanyima izvozvo; handina kutongodzora mwoyo wangu pamufaro upi noupi; nokuti mwoyo wangu wakanga uchifara nokubata kwangu kwose; ndiwo wakanga uri mugove wangu wakabva pakubata kwangu kwose. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Zvino ndakacherechedza mabasa ose akanga aitwa namaoko angu, nokubata kwose kwandakatambura kubata tarira zvose zvakanga zvisina maturo, kwaiva kudzingana nemhepo bedzi, kwakanga kusine chinhu chinobatsira pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Zvino ndakatendeuka kuti ndicherekedze uchenjeri, noupengo, noupenzi, nokuti chinyi chingaitwa nomunhu unotevera mambo? Izvozvo zvakanguva zvaitwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ipapo ndakaona kuti, “Uchenjeri hwakanaka kupfuura upenzi, zvichiita sechiedza chakanaka kupfuura rima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Meso omunhu akachenjera ari mumusoro wake, asi benzi rinofamba murima;” kunyangwe zvakadaro ndakaona kuti vose vanowirwa nechinhu chimwechete." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ipapo ndakati mumwoyo mangu, “Sezvinoitirwa benzi, ndizvo zvandichaitirwa neniwo; ko ini ndaiva wakachenjera nei! Ndikati mumwoyo mangu, izvi zvose hazvina maturowo.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Nokuti munhu akachenjera akafanana nebenzi pakusarangarirwa nokusingaperi; nokuti zvinozokanganikwa zvose pamazuva anouya. Akachenjera haazinofa sebenzi here? 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Saka ndakavenga upenyu, nokuti basa rinoitwa pasi pezuva rakandinzwisa shungu; nokuti zvose hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Zvino ndakavenga kubata kwangu kwose kwandatambura kubata pasi pezuva, zvandinofanira kuzvisiyira munhu anonditevera." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Zvino ndiani angaziva kana iye achava akachenjera kana benzi? Kunyangwe zvakadaro achava nesimba pamusoro pokubata kwangu kwose kwandakatambura kubata, nezvandakaita nouchenjeri pasi pedenga. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Saka ndakatendeuka, kuti ndiodze hangu mwoyo wangu pamusoro pokubata kwangu kwose kwandakatambura kubata pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Nokuti munhu ariko akabata nouchenjeri nezivo noumhizha; kunyangwe zvakadaro anofanira kuzvisiyira mumwe, uve mugove wake, asina kutongozvitamburira. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, chinhu chakaipa kwazvo." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Nokuti munhu anowanei pamusoro pokubata kwake kwose, nokushingaira kwomwoyo wake, kwaanobata nako pasi pezuva?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Nokuti mazuva ake ose inhamo bedzi, nokutambudzika kwake kuchema; zvirokwazvo kunyangwe usiku mwoyo wake hauzorori. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Hakuna chinhu chinopfuura ichi, kuti munhu adye, anwe, afadze mweya wake nezvakanaka pakati pokubata kwake. Ndakaona kuti naizvozvi zvinobva kuruoko rwaMwari." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Nokuti ndiani angadya, ndiani angafarira chinhu kunze kwake?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nokuti munhu, anomufadza, anopiwa huchenjeri, nezivo, nomufaro; asi mutadzi anopiwa kutambudzika, kuti aunganidze nokututira, agozvipa mumwe anofadza Mwari. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Chinhu chimwe nechimwe chino musi wacho, uye shoko rimwe nerimwe pasi pedenga rine nguva yaro." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Nguva yokuberekwa, nenguva yokufa; nguva yokusima, nenguva yokudzura chakasimwa;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 nguva yokuuraya, nenguva yokuporesa; nguva yokuputsa, nenguva yokuvaka;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 nguva yokuchema, nenguva yokuseka; nguva yokuungudza, nenguva yokupembera;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 nguva yokurasha mabwe, nenguva yokuunganidza mabwe; nguva yokumbundikira, nenguva yokurega kumbundikira;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 nguva yokutsvaka, nenguva yokurega zvirashike; nguva yokuchengeta, nenguva yokurasha;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 nguva yokubvarura, nenguva yokusona; nguva yokunyarara, nenguva yokutaura;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 nguva yokuda, nenguva yokurwa, nenguva yorugare." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Ko iye anobata anobatsirwei nezvaanotamburira? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndakaona kutambudzika kwakapiwa vanakomana vavanhu naMwari, kuti vazvitambudze nazvo." 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Chinhu chimwe nechimwe akachiita chakanaka panguva yacho; akaisawo zvisingaperi mumwoyo mavo, kunyangwe zvakadaro munhu haangagoni kunzwisisa zvakabatwa naMwari kubva pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzisira." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndinoziva kuti hakuna chinhu chakanaka pakati pavo chingapfuura ichi, kuti vafare, uye kuti vaite zvakanaka upenyu hwavo hwose." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Uyewo, kuti chipo chaMwari kuti munhu mumwe nomumwe adye, anwe, afarire zvinhu zvakanaka pakubata kwake kwose." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndinoziva kuti zvose zvinoitwa naMwari, zvichagara nokusingaperi; hakuna chinhu chingawedzerwa, kana chingabviswa pazviri; Mwari akazviita izvozvo, kuti vanhu vamutye." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Zviripo zvino, zvakanguva zvavapo; uye izvo, zvichavapo, zvakanguva zvavapo; Mwari anotsvakazve zvakanga zvapfuura." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Uyezve, ndakaona pasi pezuva, kuti panzvimbo yokururamisira, zvakaipa zvakanga zviripo; uye panzvimbo yokururama, zvakaipa zvakanga zviripo." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndakati mumwoyo mwangu, “Mwari ndiye achatonga akarurama nowakaipa; nokuti nguva iripo yeshoko rimwe nerimwe nebasa rimwe nerimwe.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndakati mumwoyo mangu, “Izvi zvinoitwa nokuda kwavanakomana vavanhu, kuti Mwari avaidze, aone kuti ivo vamene vakangoita semhuka.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Nokuti zvinoitirwa vanakomana vavanhu ndizvo zvinoitirwawo mhuka; zvose zvinoitirwa chinhu chimwe. Mufiro womunhu, ndiwo mufiro wemhuka, zvose zvinokufema kumwe; munhu haana paanopfuura mhuka; nokuti zvose hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Zvose zvinoenda kunzvimbo imwe; zvose zvinobva pavhu, zvose zvinodzokerazve kuvhu." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ndiani ungaziva kana kufema kunopa upenyu kumunhu kunokuisa kumusoro, kana kufema kunopa upenyu kumhuka kuchiburukira pasi?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Saka ndakaona kuti hakuna chinhu chinopfuura ichi, kuti munhu afarire mabasa ake, nokuti ndiwo mugove wake; nokuti ndiani achamudzosazve kuti aone zvichamutevera." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Zvino ndakadzokazve, ndikaona kumanikidzwa kwose kunoitwa pasi pezuva; tarira, kwakanga kune misodzi yavanomanikidzwa, vachishaiwa munyaradzi; vamanikidzi vavo ndivo vakanga vane simba, asi ivo vakashaiwa munyaradzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Naizvozvo ndakati vakafa, vakanguva vafa, vanomufaro kupfuura vapenyu vachiri vapenyu." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Zvirokwazvo, ndakati agere kutongovapo, iye asina kuona basa rakaipa rinoitwa pasi pezuva ano mufaro kupfuura vapenyu." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Zvino ndakaona kubata kwose noumhizha hwose pakubata, kuti munhu anovengwa nowokwake pamusoro pazvo. Naizvozvo hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Benzi rinofungatira maoko aro, richidya nyama yaro." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Tsama imwe yorugare inopfuura nokunaka tsama mbiri dzokutambudzika nokudzingana nemhepo. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Zvino ndakadzoka, ndikaona zvisina maturo pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mumwe ariko anongogara ari oga, asina mumwe wake; zvirokwazvo, haana mwanakomana kana munun'una, kunyangwe zvakadaro kubata kwake hakuna mugumo, uye meso ake haaguti nepfuma. Anoti, “Zvino ndinobatira ani, ndichinyima mwoyo wangu zvinhu zvakanaka?” Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, zvirokwazvo ndiko kutambudzika kukuru." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Vaviri vanopfuura mumwe, nokuti vanomubairo wakanaka wokubata kwavo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Nokuti kana vakawira pasi, mumwe achasimudza shamwari yake; asi ari oga ane nhamo kana achiwira pasi, haano mumwe angamusimudza." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Uyezve, kana vaviri vachivata pamwechete, vachadziyirwa; asi mumwechete angadziyirwa sei?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Kana munhu akavamba mumwe, vaviri vangamudzivisa; tambo yakakoswa mutatu harungakurumidzi kudamburwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Jaya murombo, rakachenjera, rinopfuura mambo mutana benzi, asichazivi kutenda kana achirangwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Nokuti akabuda mutorongo kuzova mambo; zvirokwazvo, kunyangwe paushe hwake akaberekwa ari murombo." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndakaona vapenyu vose vanofamba pasi pezuva, vachitevera jaya, iye wechipiri, wakamuka panzvimbo yake." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Vanhu vose vakanga vasingaverengwi, ivo vose vakanga vakabatwa naye; kunyangwe zvakadaro, vanozotevera havangamufariri. Zvirokwazvo, naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Ngwarira rutsoka rwako kana uchienda kuimba yaMwari; nokuti kuswedera kuzonzwa kunopfuura kubayira chibayiro chamapenzi; nokuti havazivi kuti vanoita zvakaipa. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Usakurumidza nomuromo wako, mwoyo wako urege kukurumidza kutaura shoko pamberi paMwari; nokuti Mwari ari kudenga, iwe uri pasi; naizvozvo mashoko ako ngaave mashoma." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Nokuti kurota kunouya namabasa mazhinji, nezwi rebenzi namashoko mazhinji." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kana uchinge wapikira Mwari mhiko, usanonoka kuiripa; nokuti iye haafariri mapenzi; ripa zvaunopika." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Zviri nani kuti urege kupika, pakuti upike usingaripi." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Usatendera muromo wako kutadzisa nyama yako; usati pamberi pomutumwa waMwari, “Yakanga iri mhosho; Mwari achatsamwireiko izwi rako, akaparadza basa ramaoko ako?”" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Nokuti pakurota kuzhinji napamashoko mazhinji pane zvisina maturo zvizhinji; asi iwe utye Mwari. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kana uchiona murombo achimanikidzwa, noruenaniso nokururama zvichibviswa nesimba panyika, usashamiswa nazvo; nokuti mukuru kuvakuru vose anocherechedza; vamwe variko vakuru kwavari." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Nokuti nyika inobatsirwa zvikuru nechinhu ichi, mambo anofarira kurimiwa kweminda." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Anoda sirivha, haangagutswi nesirivha, naiye anoda zvakawanda, haangagutswi nezvakawanda; naizvozvo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Kana pfuma ichiwanda, vadyi vanowandawo; mwene wayo anobatsirwei, asi kungoona nameso ake." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Hope dzomunhu, unobata, dzakanaka, kana achidya zvishoma kana zvizhinji; asi kuguta kwomupfumi hakumutenderi kuvata." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kune chinhu chakaisvoipa, chandakaona pasi pezuva, pfuma inochengetwa nomwene wayo, ichimuonesa nhamo." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Pfuma iyo inopera nechinhu chakaipa chinomuwira; kana achinge abereka mwanakomana, haana chinhu muruoko rwake." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Sezvaakabuda mudumbu ramai vake, achadzokazve asina chinhu, sezvaakabuda; haana chaakatamburira, chaangatora, chaangaenda nacho muruoko rwake." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Nechinhu ichi chakaisvoipawo, kuti pazvose, sezvaakauya, saizvozvo achaendazve; zvino achawaneiko, zvaakatamburira mhepo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Mazuva ake osewo anodya murima, anotambudzika kwazvo; anourwere neshungu." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Tarirai, zvandakaona kuti zvakanaka, zvinofanira munhu, ndiko kuti adye, anwe, afarire zvinhu zvakanaka pakubata kwake kwose kwaanobata pasi pezuva, mazuva ose oupenyu hwake hwaakapiwa naMwari; nokuti ndiwo mugove wake." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Munhu mumwe nomumwewo, akapiwa naMwari pfuma nezvakawanda, akapiwawo simba kuti azvidye, nokutora icho chipo chinobva kuna Mwari." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Nokuti iye haangarangariri zvikuru mazuva oupenyu hwake, nokuti Mwari anopindura pamufaro womwoyo wake." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kune chinhu chakaipa chandakaona pasi pezuva, chinoremedza vanhu." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Munhu anopiwa naMwari pfuma nezvakawanda nokukudzwa, saizvozvo kuti mweya wake hautongoshaiwi chinhu chaanoda; asi Mwari haamupi simba rokudya izvozvo; asi mutorwa anozvidya; ichi hachina maturo, chirwere chakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Kana munhu akabereka vana vane zana, akararama makore mazhinji, mazuva amakore ake akava mazhinji, asi mweya wake asingagutswi nezvakanaka, uyezve akasavigwa zvakanaka, ndinoti mwana wakaberekwa nguva isati yasvika anopfuura iye;" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 nokuti anouya asina maturo, anoendazve murima, zita rake rinofukidzwa nerima;" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 uyezve, haana kuona zuva kana kuriziva; mwana akadai ane zororo kupfuura iye." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Zvirokwazvo, kunyangwe akararama makore ane zviuru zviviri zvamazana, asingafariri zvinhu zvakanaka, ko vose havaendi kunzvimbo imwe here?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Kubata kwose kwomunhu kunoitirwa muromo wake; kunyangwe zvakadaro kuda kwake zvokudya hakugutswi. 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Nokuti akachenjera anokurira benzi nei? Kana murombo anei, iye anoziva kufamba zvakanaka pamberi pavapenyu." 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kuona kwameso kunopfuura kutsvaka–tsvaka kwomweya. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Chinhu chipi nechipi, chakavapo, chakanguva chapiwa zita racho, zvakatarwa kuti munhu achava akadini, haangarwi noanomupfuura nesimba." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Nokuti mashoko mazhinji ariko, anowedzera zvisina maturo; munhu anobatsirwei nazvo?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Nokuti ndiani anoziva zvakafanira munhu paupenyu hwake, iwo mazuva ose oupenyu hwake husina maturo, anorarama somumvuri? Nokuti ndiani angaudza munhu zvichazomutevera pasi pezuva?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Mbiri yakanaka inopfuura chizoro chakanaka, nezuva rokufa kupfuura zuva rokuzvarwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Zviri nani kuenda kuimba yokuchema, pakuenda kuimba yomutambo; nokuti ndiwo mugumo wavanhu vose; munhu mupenyu achazvirangarira pamwoyo pake." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kuchema kunopfuura kuseka, nokuti mwoyo unofadzwa nokupunyaira kwechiso." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mwoyo yavakachenjera iri paimba yokuchema, asi mwoyo yamapenzi iri paimba yokufara." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Zviri nani kuti munhu anzwe kutuka kwavakachenjera, pakuti anzwe kuimba kwamapenzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Nokuti kuseka kwebenzi kwakafanana nokuputika kweminzwa pasi pehari; naizvozvowo hazvina maturo. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Zvirokwazvo kumanikidza kunoita muchenjeri benzi; uye fufuro inoparadza njere. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Kuguma kwechinhu kunopfuura kutanga kwacho; ano mwoyo murefu anopfuura ano mwoyo anozvikudza. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Usakurumidza pamweya wako kutsamwa, nokuti kutsamwa kunogara pachipfuva chamapenzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Usati, “Mazuva ekare anopfuura azvino nokunaka neiko?” Nokuti haungabvunzi saizvozvo nouchenjeri." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Uchenjeri hwakaenzana nenhaka; zvirokwazvo, hwaisvonaka kuna vanoona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Nokuti uchenjeri nemari zvinhu aginopa kudzivirira, asi kunakisa kwezivo ndiko kuti uchenjeri hunochengeta upenyu hwaiye anahwo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Cherechedza basa raMwari, nokuti ndiani angaruramisa chaakakombamisa iye?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Fara nezuva rokugara zvakanaka, rangarira nezuva rokutambudzika; Mwari ndiye akaita izvozvo zvose zviviri, kuti munhu arege kuziva zviri mberi kwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Izvozvi zvose ndakazviona pamazuva angu asina maturo. Akarurama ariko, anoparara pakati pokururama kwake, uyezve, munhu akaipa ariko, anorarama nguva huru pakati pezvakaipa zvake." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usava munhu akaisvorurama, usava akaisvochenjera; uchazviparadzireiko?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Usava munhu akaisvoipa, uye usava benzi; uchafireiko nguva yako isati yasvika?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Zvakanaka kuti ubatisise chinhu ichi, uye usabvisa ruoko rwako panechecho; nokuti anotya Mwari, achapukunyuka pana izvozvo zvose." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Uchenjeri hunosimbisa akachenjera kupfuura vabati vane gumi vari muguta. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Zvirokwazvo, hapana munhu akarurama panyika, anoita zvakanaka, asingatadzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Uyezve, usava nehanya namashoko ose anotaurwa, kuti urege kunzwa muranda wako achikutuka." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Nokuti kazhinji mwoyo wako unoziva kuti newewo wakatuka vamwe saizvozvo. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Izvozvi zvose ndakazviidza nouchenjeri; ndakati, “Ndichava akachenjera; asi zvakanga zviri kure neni.”" 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Izvo, zviripo, zviri kure, zvakadzika kwazvo, ndiani angazviziva?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndakatendeuka, mwoyo wangu ukada kuziva nokunzvera, nokutsvaka uchenjeri namano, ndizive kuti kuipa upenzi, noupenzi kupenga." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndikawana chinhu chinovava kukunda rufu, ndiye mukadzi ari musungo, mwoyo wake ari mambure, namaoko ake zvisungo; Ani naani anofadza Mwari, achapukunyuka kwaari; asi mutadzi achabatwa naye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Zvanzi noMuparidzi, “Tarirai, ndizvozvi zvandakawana, ndichiverenga chinhu chimwe nechimwe, kuti ndiwane shumo yazvo;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 zvinongoramba zvichitsvakwa nomweya wangu, asi ndigere kuzviwana, ndakawana murume mumwe pakati pechiuru chezana, asi handina kuwana mukadzi pakati pavazhinji vakadai." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Asi tarirai, chinhu chimwe ichi chete ndicho chandakawana, kuti Mwari akaita munhu akarurama, asi ivo vakatsvaka mano mazhinji.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndiani akafanana nomunhu akachenjera? Ndiani anoziva kududzira chinhu? Uchenjeri hwomunhu hunobwinyisa chiso chake; hasha dzechiso chake dzinoshandurwa. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ndinoti, “Chengeta murairo wamambo, uzviite nokuda kwezvawakapikira Mwari.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usakurumidza kubva pamberi pake; usatsungirira pachinhu chakaipa, nokuti anoita zvose zvaanoda." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Nokuti shoko ramambo rine simba; ndiani angati kwaari, “Munoiteiko?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Munhu anochengeta murairo, haangaoni chinhu chakaipa; mwoyo wowakachenjera unoziva nguva nokutongwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Nokuti chinhu chimwe nechimwe chine nguva yacho nokutongwa kwacho; nokuti kushata kwomunhu kunomuremedza; 
Ecclesiastes8:7 nokuti haazivi zvichazovapo; nokuti ndiani angamuzivisa kuti zvichava zvakadini? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Hakuna munhu ane simba pamusoro pemhepo, kuti adzivirire mhepo; uye haana simba pamusoro pezuva rorufu; hakuna kukanganwirwa pakurwa; saizvozvo zvakaipa hazvingarwiri iye anozviita." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Izvozvi zvose ndakazviona, ndikarangarira nomwoyo wangu mabasa ose anoitwa pasi pezuva, panguva kana mumwe munhu ane simba pamusoro pomumwe, achimuitira zvakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Saizvozvo ndakaona akaipa achivigwa, vanhu vakauya kuhwiro hwake; asi vakanga vaita zvakarurama vakabva panzvimbo tsvene, vakakanganikwa muguta; naizvozvo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Kutongwa zvakusingakurumidzi kuuya pamusoro pebasa rakaipa, mwoyo yavanakomana vavanhu inotsungirira kuita zvakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Kunyangwe mutadzi akaita zvakaipa rune zana, akava namazuva mazhinji, kunyangwe zvakadaro ndinoziva zvirokwazvo kuti vanotya Mwari, vanotya pamberi pake, vachagara zvakanaka;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 asi akaipa haangagari zvakanaka, haangavi namazuva mazhinji, zvaakafanana nomumvuri; nokuti haatyi pamberi paMwari." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Chinhu chisina maturo chiripo, chinoitwa panyika, ndicho kuti vakarurama variko vanoitirwa sezvinoitirwa mabasa avakaipa, uyezve vakaipa variko vanoitirwa sezvinoitirwa mabasa avakarurama; ndikati, “Naizvozvi hazvina maturo.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ipapo ndakarumbidza mufaro, nokuti munhu haane chinhu chinopfuura ichi, kuti adye, anwe, afare; kuti izvozvo zvigare naye pakubata kwake mazuva ose oupenyu hwake, hwaakapiwa naMwari pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Zvino ndakati ndichirangarira nomwoyo wangu kuti ndizive uchenjeri nokuona kubata kunoitwa panyika (nokuti vamwe variko vasingaoni hope nameso avo masikati nousiku)," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ndikaona mabasa ose aMwari, kuti munhu haanganzwisisi mabasa ose anoitwa pasi pezuva; nokuti kunyangwe munhu akatambura hake kuti azvinzvere, haanganzwisisi hake; zvirokwazvo, kunyangwe munhu, akachenjera, achiti, ndinozviziva, kunyangwe zvakadaro, haangagoni kuzvinzwisisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nokuti izvozvo zvose ndakazvirangarira nomwoyo wangu, kuti ndinzwisise izvozvi zvose, kuti vakarurama navakachenjera vari paruoko rwaMwari, pamwechete namabasa avo; kana kuri kuda kana kuvenga, munhu haazvizivi; zvose zviri mberi kwazvo." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Zvose zvinoenzanisirwa vose; chinhu chimwe chinoitirwa akarurama noakaipa, akanaka noakachena noane tsvina, anobayira noasingabayiri, akanaka nomutadzi, anopika noanotya kupika." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Chinhu ichi chakaipa pakati pezvose zvinoitwa pasi pezuva, kuti chinhu chimwe chiitirwe vose; zvirokwazvowo, mwoyo yavanakomana vavanhu izere nezvakaipa, uye upengo huri mumwoyo yavo vachiri vapenyu; shure kwaizvozvo vanoenda kuvakafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Nokuti kana munhu achiri pakati pavapenyu vose, achine chinhu chaangatarira; nokuti imbwa mhenyu inopfuura shumba yakafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Nokuti vapenyu vanoziva kuti vachazofa, asi vakafa havana chavanoziva, kunyangwe nomubairo havachina; nokuti havacharangarirwi." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Rudo rwavo, nokuvenga kwavo, negodo ravo, zvose zvanguva zvapera hazvo; havachino mugove nokusingaperi pazvose zvinoitwa pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Enda zvako, udye zvokudya zvako nomufaro, unwe waini yako nomwoyo wakafara; nokuti Mwari atofadzwa namabasa ako." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Nguo dzako dzigare dzakachena; nomusoro wako urege kushaiwa mafuta. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Gara nomufaro nomukadzi wako, waunoda, mazuva ako ose asina maturo, aakakupa pasi pezuva, mazuva ako ose asina maturo; nokuti ndiwo mugove wako paupenyu, uye pakubata kwako kwaunobata pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Zvose zvinowana ruoko rwako, kuti ruzviite, uzviite nesimba rako rose; nokuti hakuna basa, kana zano, kana zivo, kana uchenjeri paSheori kwaunoenda." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndakadzoka, ndikaona pasi pezuva, kuti anomhanyisa haazi iye anokunda, ane simba haazi iye anokunda pakurwa, akachenjera haazi iye ane zvokudya, vanhu vane njere havazi ivo vane pfuma, vanhu vanoumhizha havazi ivo vanofarirwa; asi vanowirwa vose nenguva nezvinoitika." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Nokuti nomunhuwo haazivi nguva yake; sehove, dzinobatwa murutava rwakaipa, kana shiri, dzinobatwa murugombe; saizvozvo vanakomana vavanhu vanoteyiwa nenguva yakaipa, kana yavawira kamwe–kamwe." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndakaonawo pasi pezuva uchenjeri hwakadai, ndikati ukuru." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kwakanga kune guta duku, maiva navarume vashoma; mumwe mambo mukuru akarimukira, akarikomba, akarivakira masvingo makuru okurwa nawo." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Zvino mukati maro makawanikwa murombo akanga akachenjera, iye akaponesa guta nouchenjeri hwake; asi hakuna munhu akarangarira munhu uyo murombo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ipapo ndakati, “Uchenjeri hunopfuura simba; kunyangwe zvakadaro uchenjeri hwomurombo hunoshorwa, namashoko ake haateererwi.”" 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mashoko avakachenjera, anonzwika kana kwakadzikama, anopfuura kudanidzira kwomunhu anobata ushe pakati pamapenzi." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Uchenjeri hunopfuura nhumbi dzokurwa; asi mutadzi mumwe anoparadza zvakanaka zvizhinji. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Nhunzi dzakafa dzinonhuwisa nokuodza chizoro chomuvenganisi wezvinonhuwira; saizvozvo upenzi hushoma hunorema kukunda uchenjeri nokukudzwa. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mwoyo womunhu akachenjera uri kurudyi rwake, asi mwoyo webenzi uri kuruboshwe rwake." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Zvirokwazvo, kana benzi richifamba panzira, rinoshaiwa njere; rinozivisa vose kuti ndiri benzi." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Kana kutsamwa kwomubati kukakumukira, usabva panzvimbo yako; nokuti unyoro hunonyaradza mhosva huru." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Chinhu chakaipa chiripo chandakaona pasi pezuva, kuri kutadza kunobva kuvabati." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Upenzi hunoiswa pakakwirira, asi vapfumi vanogara pakaderera." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndakaona varanda vakatasva mabhiza, namachinda achifamba pasi savaranda." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Anochera gomba, achawiramo amene; ani naani anokoromora rusvingo, nyoka ichamuruma." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ani naani anoputsa mabwe, angakuvadzwa nawo; uye anobanzura huni, ari panjodzi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Kana simbi yagomara, munhu akasairodza, anofanira kunyanya kubata nesimba; asi uchenjeri hunobatsira pakururamisa." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Kana nyoka ikaruma isati yarapwa namazango, n'anga haibatsiri." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mashoko anobva mumuromo woakachenjera, anofadza; asi miromo yebenzi inomumedza iye." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Kutanga kwamashoko omuromo waro upenzi; nokuguma kwokutaura kwaro upengo hwakashata. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Benzi rinowanzawo mashoko; asi munhu haazivi zvichavapo; ndiani angamuzivisa zvichazovapo shure kwake? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Kubata kwamapenzi kunonetsa mumwe nomumwe wavo; nokuti haatongozivi nzira yokuenda nayo kuguta. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Iwe nyika une nhamo, kana mambo wako ari mwana, kana machinda ako achiita mutambo mangwanani." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Unomufaro, iwe nyika, kana mambo wako ari mwanakomana wavakakudzwa, kana machinda ako achiita mutambo panguva yakafanira, kuti asimbiswe, asingaitiri kubatwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Nousimbe denga reimba rinosakara; nokuSabata kwamaoko imba inodonha. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Mutambo unoitirwa kuseka, uye waini inofadza upenyu; zvose zvingawanikwa nemari." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Usatuka mambo, kunyangwe pakufunga kwako; usatuka mupfumi paimba yako yokuvata; nokuti shiri yokudenga ingatakura izwi, uye izvo zvina mapapiro zvingazivisa shoko." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Kandira zvokudya zvako pamusoro pemvura, nokuti uchazviwanazve mazuva mazhinji apfuura." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Goverana navanomwe, kunyangwe navaserewo, nokuti hauzivi zvakaipa zvakadini zvingava panyika." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Kana makore azara nemvura, anoidururira panyika; uye kana muti ukawira pasi kurutivi rwezasi, kana rwokumusoro, ipo panowira muti ndipo pauchavata." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Anogara achicherechedza mhepo haangakushi; uye anotarira makore, haangacheki." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Sezvausingazivi mufambiro wemhepo, kana mukuriro amapfupa mudumbu romukadzi ane mimba, saizvozvowo hauzivi basa raMwari, anoita zvose." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kusha mbeu dzako mangwanani, usabvisa ruoko rwako madekwana; nokuti hauzivi kuti chichakura ndechipi, kana ichi kana icho, kana zvimwe zviviri zvose zvichafanana pakunaka." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Zvirokwazvo, chiedza chakanaka, uye meso anofara nokuona zuva."
