Ecclesiastes11:8 Zvirokwazvo, kana munhu akararama makore mazhinji, ngaafarire ose; asi ngaarangarire mazuva erima, kuti achava mazhinji; zvose zvinozouya hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Fara hako, iwe jaya, pauduku hwako, mwoyo wako ngaukufadze pamazuva ohujaya hwako; famba nenzira dzomwoyo wako, napakuona kwameso ako; asi uzive kuti Mwari uchazokutonga pamusoro paizvozvo zvose." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Dzinga zvinonetsa pamwoyo pako, ubvise zvakaipa panyama yako, nokuti uduku noujaya hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Rangarirawo Musiki wako pamazuva oujaya hwako, mazuva akaipa asati asvika, namakore asati avapo;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 zuva nechiedza, nomwedzi, nenyenyedzi zvisati zvasvibiswa, makore achidzoka kana mvura yapfuura;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 zuva iro, kana vatariri veimba vachidedera, varume vane simba vachikotama, vakuyi vachirega basa ravo, nokuti vava vashoma; navanotarira napamahwindo vasvibirwa;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 mikova ichizarirwa inobudira kunzira dzokumusha, nezwi rokukuya richidedera; kana achimuka nezwi reshiri, navaimbi vose vasinganzwiki zvakanaka." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Zvirokwazvo vachatya zvakakwirira, nezvinotyisa zvichanzi zviri panzira; muarimondi uchatumbuka maruva, nemhashu ichazvikwekweredza, uye kuda kwose kuchapera; nokuti munhu anoenda kumusha wake usingaperi, vachemi vachafamba–famba panzira dzomumusha;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 tambo yesirivha isati yadamburwa, mbiya yendarama isati yaputswa, chirongo chisati chaputswa patsime, nechichereso chinomonerwa chisati chavhunikira pachitubu," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 guruva risati radzokera kuvhu, sezvarakanga rakaita; uye mweya usati wadzokera kuna Mwari akaupa." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Zvanzi noMuparidzi, “Hazvina maturo chose, zvose hazvina maturo!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Zvino, Muparidzi zvaakanga ari munhu akachenjera, akapfuura achidzidzisa vanhu zivo; akarangarira, nokunzvera, nokurongedza zvirevo zvizhinji." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Muparidzi wakatsvaka kuti awane mashoko anofadza, uye zvakanyorwa nomwoyo wakarurama, ari mashoko ezvokwadi." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mashoko avakachenjera akafanana nezvibayiso; sembambo dzakaroverwa kwazvo, ndizvo zvakaita mashoko akaunganidzwa; akapiwa noMufudzi mumwechete." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Uyezve, mwanakomana wangu, unyeverwe; kuita bhuku zhinji hakuperi, uye kudzidza kuzhinji kunonetsa muviri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Zvino shoko guru pazvose zvatanzwa, heri, “Itya Mwari, uchengete mirairo yake; nokuti ndizvo zvakafanira vanhu vose." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Nokuti Mwari achatonga basa rimwe nerimwe, pamwechete nezvose zvakavanzika, kunyangwe zvakanaka, kunyangwe zvakaipa.”" 
SongOfSongs1:1 Rwiyo rukuru rwaSoromoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ngaanditsvode nokutsvoda kwomuromo wake; Nokuti rudo rwako rwakanaka kupfuura waini. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Zvizoro zvako zvinonhuwira zvakanaka; Zita rako rakaita samafuta akadururwa; Saka mhandara dzinokuda. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ndikwevere kwauri; tichakutevera tichimhanya; Mambo wakandiisa mudzimba dzake dzomukati; Tichafara nokukufarira zvikuru iwe; Ticharumbidza rudo rwako kupfuura waini; Zvakarurama zvavakakuda. 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ndakasviba, asi ndakanaka hangu, Imi vakunda veJerusaremu, Samatende eKedhari, Semicheka yakaremberedzwa yaSoromoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Musanditarira, zvandakasviba, Nokuti zuva rakandipisa. Vanakomana vamai vangu vakanditsamwira, Vakandiita murindi weminda yemizambiringa; Asi munda wangu wemizambiringa handina kuuchengeta." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndiudze iwe, unodikanwa nomweya wangu, Kuti unofudza boka rako kupi, Kuti unorizorodza kupi masikati; Nokuti ndichaitirei somunhu akafukidzwa kumeso Pakati pamapoka eshamwari dzako?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Kana usingazivi, iwe unopfuura vakadzi vose nokunaka, Tevera makwara amapoka, Ufudze makwayana ako kurutivi rwamatende avafudzi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ndakakuenzanisa iwe, mudiwa wangu, Nebhiza pangoro dzaFarao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Matama ako akanaka pakati pezvirukwa zvevhudzi; Mutsipa wako nezvibwe zvinokosha zvakatungirwa. 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tichakuitira zvirukwa zvendarama Nezvuma zvesirivha. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Nguva yose mambo agere patafura yake, Nado yangu yakabudisa kunhuwira kwayo." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Mudiwa wangu akaita kwandiri sehombodo yemura, Inogara pakati pamazamu angu." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Mudiwa wangu akaita kwandiri sesumbu ramaruva ehena, Paminda yemizambiringa paEngedhi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Tarira, akanaka, shamwari yangu; Tarira, akanaka; Meso ako akafanana neenjiva." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Tarira, akanaka, mudiwa wangu, zvirokwazvo, unofadza; Uvato hwedu ndipo pabumhudza." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Matanda eimba yedu ndeemisidhari; Mbariro dzayo ndedzemipaini. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndiri ruva rebundo rokuSharoni, Ndiri ruva rokumapani." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Seruva pakati peminzwa, Ndizvo zvakaita mudiwa wangu pakati pavakunda." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Semueporo pakati pemiti yokudondo, Ndizvo zvakaita mudiwa wangu pakati pavanakomana. Ndakagara mumumvuri wake nomufaro mukuru; Zvibereko zvake zvakanga zvichinaka pamukanwa wangu." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Akandiisa kuimba yomutambo; Mureza wake pamusoro pangu wakanga ruri rudo. 
SongOfSongs2:5 Nditsigirei namazambiringa akaomeswa, ndisimbisei namaeporo; Nokuti ndinorwara norudo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Ruoko rwake rworuboshwe rwuri pasi pomusoro wangu; Ruoko rwake rworudyi runondimbundikira. 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ndinokupikirai, imi vakunda veJerusaremu, Nemharapara nenondo dzokubundo, Kuti murege kupfutidza kana kumutsa rudo, Kusvikira irwo rwada pacharwo." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Inzwai izwi romudiwa wangu! Tarirai, wouya, Achikwakuka pamakomo, Achichirika pazvikomo." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Mudiwa wangu akafanana nemharapara kana nomwana wenondo; Tarirai, womira seri kworusvingo rwedu; Anotarira napamahwindo; Anodongorera napazvitanda zvamahwindo." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Mudiwa wangu akataura, akati kwandiri, “Simuka, mudiwa wangu, akanaka wangu, huya!”" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Nokuti, tarira, chando chaenda; Mvura yapera, yaenda;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 Maruva aonekwa panyika; Nguva yokurira kweshiri yasvika, Nekurira kwenjiva kunonzwika panyika yedu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Muonde woibvisa maonde awo mambishi, Uye mizambiringa yotunga maruva; Yobudisa kunhuwira kwawo; Simuka, mudiwa wangu, akanaka wangu huya!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Iwe njiva yangu, uri mumikaha yedombo, Pakadzitika pamawere; Ndione chiso chako, Ndinzwe izwi rako; Nokuti izwi rako rakanaka, chiso chako chakanaka." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Tibatirei makava, makava maduku, Anotadzira minda yemizambiringa; Nokuti minda yedu yemizambiringa yotunga maruva." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Mudiwa wangu ndowangu, neni ndiri wake; Anofudza makwai ake pakati pamaruva ebundo." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Kana zuva rotonhorera, nemimvuri yotiza, Tendeuka, mudiwa wangu, uve semharapara nomwana wenondo Pamusoro pamakomo eBhetieri." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Usiku, ndiri panhoo dzangu, Ndakamutsvaka anodikanwa nomweya wangu; Ndakamutsvaka, asi handina kumuwana." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndikati, ndichasimuka zvino, ndifambe–fambe neguta; Panzira dzomumusha, napamatare Ndipo pandichatsvaka anodikanwa nomweya wangu; Ndikamutsvaka, asi handina kumuwana." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Varindi, vanofamba–famba neguta, vakandiwana; Ndikati kwavari, “Matongoona anodikanwa nomweya wangu here?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ndakati ndangobva kwavari, ndakapfuura zvishoma, Ndikamuwana iye anodikanwa nomweya wangu; Ndikamubata, ndikaramba kumuregedza, Kusvikira ndamuisa mumba mamai vangu, Muimba yomukati yaiye wakandibereka." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ndinokupikirai, imi vakunda veJerusaremu, Nemharapara nenondo dzokubundo, Kuti murege kupfutidza kana kumutsa rudo, Kusvikira irwo rwada pacharwo." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ndianiko uyo anokwira achibva kurenje Seshongwe dzohutsi, Anonhuwira nemura nezvinonhuwira, Nezvakakuyiwa zvose zvomutengesi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Tarirai, ndicho chigaro chaSoromoni chinotakurwa; Mhare dzina makumi matanhatu dzakachikomberedza, Vanobva pamhare dzaVaIsiraeri." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Vose vanoziva kubata munondo, vakadzidza kurwa; Murume mumwe nomumwe ano munondo wake pahudyu yake, Nokuda kwezvinotyisa usiku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mambo Soromoni akazviitira chigaro chinotakurwa Chamatanda eRebhanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Akaita mbiru dzacho nesirivha, Musana wacho nendarama, pokugara kwacho nomucheka mutsvuku, Mukati macho makarongwa norudo Rwavakunda veJerusaremu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Budai, imi vakunda veZioni, muone mambo Soromoni, Ane korona yaakadzikwa namai vake Pazuva rokuwana kwake, Napazuva romufaro womwoyo wake." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Tarira, akanaka sei, mudiwa wangu; tarira, akanaka sei! Meso ako akafanana neenjiva pakutarira kwawo pakati pechifukidzo chako; Vhudzi rako rakafanana neboka rembudzi, Dzinoburukira mujinga megomo reGiriadhi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Meno ako akafanana neboka ramakwai achangoveurwa, Anobva pakushambwa; Rimwe nerimwe rawo rina vana vaviri, Hakuna rimwe risina mwana." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Miromo yako yakafanana netambo yakatsvuka; Kutaura kwako kwakanaka; Zvavovo zvako zvakafanana nebhande redamba Pakutarira kwako pakati pechifukidzo chako. 
SongOfSongs4:4 Mutsipa wako wakafanana nenhare yaDhavhidhi. Yakavakirwa nhumbi dzokurwa, Makaturikwa nhoo dzine chiuru chezana, Dzose dziri nhoo dzemhare." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mazamu ako maviri akafanana navana vemharapara, Vari vana vakaberekwa vari vaviri, Vanochera pakati pamaruva ebundo." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Kana zuva rotonhorera, mimvuri yotiza, Ndichaenda kugomo remura, Nokuchikomba chezvinonhuwira." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Akaisvonaka, iwe mudiwa wangu; Hakuna gwapa kwauri." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Hendei tose, iwe mwenga wangu, tibve paRebhanoni, Tibve paRebhanoni tose; Tarira uri pamusoro weAmana, Pamisoro yeSeniri neHerimoni, Panzvimbo dzeshumba, Pamakomo engwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Wanditorera mwoyo wangu, hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu; Wanditorera mwoyo wangu nokunditarira kamwe nameso ako, Nechishongo chimwe chomutsipa wako." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Rudo rwako rwakanaka sei, hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu! Rudo rwako runopfuura waini zvikuru sei! Nokunhuwira kwezvizoro zvako miti yose inonhuwira!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Miromo yako, mwenga wangu, inodonha musvi ouchi; Uchi nomukaka zviri pasi porurimi rwako; Kunhuwira kwenguo dzako kwakafanana nokunhuwira kweRebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu, munda wakakomberedzwa, Chitubu chakapoteredzwa, tsime rakafunhirwa." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Matavi ako munda wamatamba, une zvibereko zvakaisvonaka; Maruva ehena nenarido," 
SongOfSongs4:14 Narido nesafironi, Karamusi nesinamoni, nemiti yose inonhuwira, Mura negavakava, nezvose zvinoisvonhuwira." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Uri tsime reminda, Chitubu chemvura mhenyu, Nenzizi dzinoyerera dzichibva Rebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Muka, iwe mhepo yokumusoro; uya, iwe mhepo yezasi; Furidzira pamunda wangu, kuti zvinonhuwira zvawo zvibudire kunze. Mudiwa wangu ngaapinde mumunda make, Ngaadye zvibereko zvake zvakaisvonaka." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndapinda mumunda mangu, hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu; Ndaunganidza mura yangu nezvinonhuwira zvangu; Ndadya musvi wouchi hwangu nouchi hwangu; Ndanwa waini yangu nomukaka wangu. Idyai, shamwari dzangu; Inwai, zvirokwazvo, inwai zvikuru, vadiwa vangu." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndakanga ndivete, asi mwoyo wangu wakanga wakasvinura; Izwi romudiwa wangu, anogogodza, achiti, “Ndizarurire, hanzvadzi yangu, mudiwa wangu, njiva yangu, akakwana wangu; Nokuti musoro wangu uzere nedova, Vhudzi rangu namadonhedza ousiku.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndabvisa nguo yangu; ndingaifuka sei? Ndashambidza tsoka dzangu; ndingadzisvibisa sei? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Mudiwa wangu akapinza ruoko rwake napavhuri romukova, Mwoyo wangu ukamushuva." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndakasimuka, ndichiti ndizarurire mudiwa wangu; Maoko angu akadonha mura, Neminwe yangu mura inoyerera, Pazvibato zvechizarira." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndakazarurira mudiwa wangu; Asi mudiwa wangu akanga atendeuka, aenda. Mweya wangu akanga watorwa pakutaura kwake; Nakamutsvaka, asi handina kumuwana; Ndikamudana, asi haana kundipindura." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Varindi, vanofamba–famba neguta, vakandiwana; Vakandirova, vakandikuvadza; Vatariri vamasvingo vakanditorera jasi rangu." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ndinokupikirai, imi vakunda veJerusaremu, Kana mukawana mudiwa wangu, Mumuudze kuti ndinorwara norudo." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Ko mudiwa wako anopfuura vamwe vadiwa neiko, Nhai, iwe, unopfuura vakadzi vose nokunaka? Ko mudiwa wako unopfuura vamwe vadiwa neiko, Zvaunotipikira saizvozvo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Mudiwa wangu akachena nokutsvuka, Anozikanwa pakati pezana ramazana." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Musoro wake wakaita sendarama yakaisvonaka; Vhudzi rake rakapetana, idema segunguo." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Meso ake akaita seenjiva pahova dzemvura, Dzakashambwa nomukaka, sezvibwe zvakarongedzwa zvakanaka." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Matama ake akaita sendima yemiti inonhuwira, Samatutu emiriwo inonaka; Miromo yake yakaita samaruva anodonha mura inoyerera." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Maoko ake akaita samapango endarama, akaiswa bheriri; Muviri wake wakaita senyanga dzenzou, dzakafukidzwa nesafiro." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Makumbo ake akaita sembiru dzamabwe machena, dzakaiswa pazvigadziko zvendarama yakaisvonaka; Kuonekwa kwake kwose kwakafanana neRebhanoni, kwakaisvonaka semisidhari." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Muromo wake wakanaka kwazvo; Zvirokwazvo, wakaisvonaka kwazvo–kwazvo. Ndizvo zvakaita mudiwa wangu, ndizvo zvakaita shamwari yangu, Imi vakunda veJerusaremu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Mudiwa wako akaendepiko, Iwe, unopfuura vakadzi vose nokunaka? Mudiwa wako wakaringirepiko, Kuti timutsvake pamwechete newe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Mudiwa wangu wakadzira kumunda wake, Kundima dzemiti inonhuwira, Kufudza makwai ake muminda, nokutanha maruva." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ini ndiri womudiwa wangu; mudiwa wangu ndowangu; Anofudza makwai ake pakati pamaruva. 
SongOfSongs6:4 Wakanaka, mudiwa wangu saTiriza, Wakanaka seJerusaremu, Unotyisa sehondo ine mireza." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Usanditarira nameso ako, Nokuti andikunda. Vhudzi rako rakafanana neboka rembudzi, Dzinoburukira mujinga megomo reGiriadhi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Mazino ako akafanana neboka rehunzvi dzamakwai, Dzinobva pakushambwa; Rimwe nerimwe radzo rina vana vaviri, Hakuna rimwe risina mwana." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Zvavovo zvako zvakafanana nebhande redamba Pakutarira kwako pakati pechifukidzo chako. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Vahosi vana makumi matanhatu navarongo vana makumi masere variko, Nemhandara dzisingaperi." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Njiva yangu, akakwana wangu, ndiye mumwe oga; Ndiye mwana mumwe woga wamai vake; Ndiye musanangurwa wowakamubereka; Vakunda vakamuona, vakati akaropafadzwa; Navahosi navarongo, vakamurumbidza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ndianiko uyo anotarira samambakwedza, Akanaka somwedzi, Akachena sezuva, Anotyisa sehondo ine mireza?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndakaburukira kumunda wenzungu, Kuti ndione miti mitema mumupata, Kuti ndione kana mudzambiringa wotunga, kana matamba otunga maruva." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndisati ndazviziva, mweya wangu wakandiisa Pakati pengoro dzavanhu vangu vakarurama." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Dzoka, dzoka, Shuramiti; Dzoka, dzoka, kuti tikutarire. Munoda kutarira muShuramiti neiko, Sezvamunotarira kutamba kweMahanaimi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Tsoka dzako dzakanaka seiko mushangu, iwe mukunda womuchinda! Hudyu dzako, dzakatendereka, dzakaita sezvishongo, Basa ramaoko emhizha." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Guvhu rako rakaita somukombe wakatendereka, Musingashaikwi waini yakavhenganiswa; Chiuno chako chaita sedutu rezviyo Rakakomberedzwa namaruva." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Mazamu ako maviri akafanana navana vemharapara, Vana vakaberekwa vari vaviri." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Mutsipa wako wakaita seshongwe yorunyanga rwenzou; Meso ako samakuvi paHeshibhoni, Pasuwo reBhatirabhimi; Mhindo dzako dzakafanana neshongwe yeRebhanoni Yakatarisana neDhamasikosi." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Musoro wako pamusoro pako wakafanana neKarimeri; Nevhudzi romusoro wako nomucheka mutsvuku; Mambo akasungwa nevhudzi rakapetana. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Wakanaka sei, unogadza sei, Mudiwa, pakati pezvinofadza." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Chimiro hwako hwakafanana nomuchindwe, Namazamu ako namasumbu ezvibereko zvawo." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndakati, ndichakwira mumuchindwe, Ndibate matavi awo; Mazamu ako ngaave samasumbu emizambiringa, Nokunhuwira kwemhino dzako sokunhuwira kwamaeporo," 
SongOfSongs7:9 Nomuromo wako sewaini yakaisvonaka, Inotapira mudikanwa wangu pakunwiwa kwayo, Inoyerera pamiromo yavavete." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ndini womudiwa wangu; Kuda kwake kunondivinga. 
SongOfSongs7:11 Uya mudiwa wangu, ngatibudire kusango, Ngatigare mumisha." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngatifumire kuminda yemizambiringa; Tinoona kana muzambiringa watunga; Kana maruva akura, Kana matamba atunga maruva; Ndipapo pandichakupa rudo rwangu." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Mudiwadiwa anobudisa kunhuhwira. Pamikova yedu pane zvinonaka zvamarudzi ose, zvitsva nezvitsaru, Zvandakakuchengetera, iwe mudiwa wangu." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Aiwa, dai wakanga wakaita sehanzvadzi yangu, Akamwa mazamu amai vangu! Dai ndakuwana panze, ndingadai ndakutsvoda; Zvirokwazvo, hakuna aindishora." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ndaienda newe, ndikakuisa mumba mamai vangu, Ivo vandidzidzise; Ndaikupa waini yakavhenganiswa nezvinonhuwira kuti uinwe, Nomukumbi wamatamba angu." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Ruoko rwake rworuboshwe ngaruve pasi pomusoro wangu, Ruoko rwake rworudyi ngarundimbundikire." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndinokupikirai, imi vakunda veJerusaremu, Kuti murege kupfutidza kana kumutsa rudo, Kusvikira irwo rwada pacharwo." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ndianiko uyo anokwira achibva kurenje, Akasendamira pamudiwa wake? Pasi pomuaporo ndipo pandakakumutsa; Ndipo pakakutamburira mai vako, Ndipo pavakakutamburira, ivo vakakubereka." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ndishonge sechisimbiso pamwoyo pako, Sechisimbiso paruoko rwako; Nokuti rudo rune simba sorufu; Godo rinokuvadza seSheori; Kupisa kwaro ndiko kupisa kwomoto, Murazvo chaiwo waJehovha." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Mvura zhinji haigoni kudzima rudo; Nzizi hadzingarubitirisi; Kunyangwe munhu akapa pfuma yose yeimba yake kuti awane rudo, Angazvidzwa chose." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tine chinun'una, Chigere kuva namazamu; Tichadiniko nechinun'una chedu Nezuva raachakumbirwa?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Kana ari rusvingo, Tichavaka pamusoro pake kashongwe kesirivha; Kana ari mukova, Tichamukomberedza namapuranga emisidhari." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ini ndaiva rusvingo, mazamu angu akaita shongwe dzarwo; Panguva iyo ndakava pamberi pake somunhu akawana rugare." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Soromoni akanga ano munda wemizambiringa paBhaarihamoni; Akaisa munda uyo kuvatariri; Mumwe nomumwe aifanira kumuvigira masirivha ane gumi ramazana pamusoro pezvibereko zvawo. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Munda wangu wemizambiringa, iwo wangu, uri pamberi pangu; Iwe Soromoni, uchapiwa gumi ramazana, Navanochengeta zvibereko zvawo vachapiwa mazana maviri." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Iwe, unogara muminda, Shamwari dzako dzinoteerera izwi rako; Nditendere ini ndirinzwewo." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Kurumidza, mudiwa wangu, Uve semharapara kana mwana wenondo Pamusoro pamakomo ezvinonhuwira." 
Isaiah1:1 Zvakaonekwa naIsaya, mwanakomana waAmozi, zvaakaona pamusoro paJudha neJerusaremu, pamazuva aUziya, naJotamu, naAhazi, naHezekiya, madzimambo avaJudha." 
Isaiah1:2 Inzwa denga rose, teerera iwe nyika, nokuti Jehovha akataura, achiti, “Ndakarera nokukurisa vana, asi vakandimukira." 
Isaiah1:3 Nzombe inoziva muridzi wayo, nembongoro inoziva chidyiro chavatenzi vayo; asi VaIsiraeri havazivi, vanhu vangu havarangariri.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Haiwa, rudzi runotadza, vanhu vakaremerwa nezvakaipa, vana vavaiti vezvakaipa, vana vanoita zvakaora! Vakasiya Jehovha, vakashora Mutsvene waIsiraeri, vadzokera shure." 
Isaiah1:5 Munoda kugara muchiroverweiko, zvamunongoramba muchimukira Jehovha? Musoro wose unorwadza, nomwoyo wose waziya." 
Isaiah1:6 Kubvira parutsoka kusvikira kumusoro hapana pakukutu pauri; asi maronda, napakakuvara, namavanga matsva, haana kusvinwa, haana kuputirwa, kana kunyoreveswa namafuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Nyika yenyu yaparadzwa, maguta enyu apiswa nomoto, nyika yenyu yopedzwa navatorwa imi muripo, yaparadzwa, sezvinoparadza vatorwa." 
Isaiah1:8 Mukunda weZioni wasiyiwa sedumba mumunda wemizambiringa, sechirindo mumunda wamagaka, seguta rakakombwa nehondo." 
Isaiah1:9 Dai Jehovha wehondo asina kutisiyira vakasara vashoma–shoma, tingadai takafanana neSodhoma, takaita seGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi vabati veSodhoma; teererai murairo waMwari wedu, imi vanhu veGomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Zvibairo zvenyu zvizhinji zvinondibatsirei? Ndagutisa zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa zvamakondobwe, namafuta ezvipfuwo zvakakodzwa; handifadzwi neropa renzombe, kana ramakwayana, kana renhongo." 
Isaiah1:12 Kana muchiuya kuzondiona, ndianiko anoreva izvozvo pamaoko enyu, kuti mutsike mavazhe angu?" 
Isaiah1:13 Musazouyazve nezvipo zvisina maturo; zvinonhuwira zvinondinyangadza; nguva dzokugara kwomwedzi nedzamaSabata, nedzokukokera ungano, handizvidi; zvakaipa, kunyangwe neungano tsvene." 
Isaiah1:14 “Nguva dzenyu dzokugara kwomwedzi nemitambo yenyu zvinovengwa nomweya wangu; zvinondinetsa; ndaneta nokutambudzika nazvo. 
Isaiah1:15 “Kana muchitambanudza maoko enyu, ndichakuvanzirai chiso changu; zvirokwazvo, kana muchiwanza minyengetero, handinganzwi; maoko enyu azere neropa" 
Isaiah1:16 Shambai; muzvinatse; bvisai zvakaipa zvamabasa enyu pamberi pangu; regai kuramba muchiita zvakaipa; 
Isaiah1:17 dzidzai kuita zvakanaka; tsvakai kururamisira, batsirai vanomanikidzwa, ruramisirai nherera, mureverere chirikadzi.”" 
Isaiah1:18 “Chiuyai zvino, titaurirane, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; kunyangwe zvivi zvenyu zvikaita somucheka mutsvuku, zvichachena sechando; kunyangwe zviri zvishava somuti mushava, zvichaita samakushe amakwai." 
Isaiah1:19 “Kana muchida, muchiteerera, muchadya zvakanaka zvenyika;" 
Isaiah1:20 asi kana muchiramba, muchindimukira, muchaparadzwa nomunondo; nokuti muromo waJehovha akataura izvozvo.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Haiwa, guta rakatendeka rashanduka chifeve sei! Iro rakanga rizere noruenzaniso! Kururama kwaigara mariri, asi zvino mogara vaurayi." 
Isaiah1:22 Sirivha yako ava marara, waini yako yakavhenganiswa nemvura." 
Isaiah1:23 Machinda ako akamukira Jehovha, ishamwari dzembavha; mumwe nomumwe anoda fufuro, anovinga mibairo; havaruramisiri nherera, mhaka yechirikadzi haitambwi navo." 
Isaiah1:24 Saka zvanzi naShe, Jehovha wehondo, iye Wamasimba waVaIsiraeri, “Ndichapedza shungu dzangu pamusoro pavadzivisi vangu, ndichazvitsivira pamusoro pavavengi vangu;" 
Isaiah1:25 ndichatambanudza ruoko rwangu kwauri, ndinatse chose marara ako, ndichabvisa tini yako." 
Isaiah1:26 “Ndichadzosera vatongi vako vave sapakutanga, namakurukota ako sapakutanga; shure kwaizvozvo uchanzi Guta rokururama, musha wakatendeka.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Zioni richadzikinurwa nokururamiswa, navanodzoka mariri nokururama." 
Isaiah1:28 Asi vadariki navatadzi vachaparadzwa pamwechete, vanosiya Jehovha, vachapedzwa." 
Isaiah1:29 Nokuti vachanyadziswa pamusoro pemiti yemiouki yamaifarira, muchava nenyadzi pamusoro peminda yamakasanangura." 
Isaiah1:30 Nokuti muchava somouki wasvava mashizha, uye somunda usine mvura." 
Isaiah1:31 Ane simba achava setambo, nebasa rake sesasaradzi dzomoto; zvose zviviri zvichatsva pamwechete, hakuna angazvidzimura." 
Isaiah2:1 Shoko rakaonekwa naIsaya, mwanakomana waAmozi, pamusoro paJudha neJerusaremu." 
Isaiah2:2 Pamazuva okupedzisira zvichaitika kuti gomo reimba yaJehovha richasimbiswa pamusoro pamakomo, richakwiridzwa kupfuura zvikomo; marudzi ose achamhanyira kwariri." 
Isaiah2:3 Vanhu vazhinji vachaendako vachiti, “Uyai, ngatikwire kugomo raJehovha, kuimba yaMwari waJakobho; iye achatidzidzisa nzira dzake, tichafamba mumakwara ake;” nokuti murairo uchabva paZioni, shoko raJehovha richabva Jerusaremu." 
Isaiah2:4 Iye achatonga pakati pamarudzi, nokururamisira vanhu vazhinji; vachapfura minondo yavo vachiita miromo yegejo, namapfumo avo vachiaita mapanga okuchekerera miti; rumwe rudzi harungazosimudziri rumwe rudzi munondo, havangazodzidzi kurwa." 
Isaiah2:5 Iwe imba yaJakobho, uyai tifambe muchiedza chaJehovha." 
Isaiah2:6 Nokuti imi Jehovha makasiya vanhu venyu veimba yaJakobho, nokuti vazere netsika dzinobva mabvazuva, vanouka savaFirisitia, vanobatana maoko navana vavatorwa." 
Isaiah2:7 Nyika yavo izere nesirivha nendarama, pfuma yavo haiperi; nyika yavo izerewo namabhiza, nengoro dzavo dzokurwa hadziperi." 
Isaiah2:8 Nyika yavo izerewo nezvifananidzo; vanonamata zvakaitwa namaoko avo, izvo zvakaitwa neminwe yavo." 
Isaiah2:9 Vanhu vaduku vakakotamiswa, navakuru vakaninipiswa; saka musavakanganwira." 
Isaiah2:10 Pinda mudombo, uvande muguruva, nokuda kwaJehovha anotyisa, uye nokuda kwokubwinya kwoumambo hwake." 
Isaiah2:11 Kuzvikudza kwavanhu kuchaderedzwa, namanyawi avanhu achaninipiswa, Jehovha oga achakudzwa nezuva iro." 
Isaiah2:12 Nokuti Jehovha wehondo ane zuva rake pamusoro pavose vanodada navanozvikudza, navana manyawi; vachaderedzwa;" 
Isaiah2:13 napamusoro pemisidhari yose yeRebhanoni yakareba yakakwirira; napamusoro pamioku yose yeBhashani," 
Isaiah2:14 napamusoro pamakomo ose marefu, napamusoro pezvikomo zvose zvakakwirira," 
Isaiah2:15 napamusoro peshongwe dzose refu, napamusoro pamasvingo ose akasimbiswa," 
Isaiah2:16 napamusoro pezvikepe zvose zveTashishi, napamusoro pezvifananidzo zvose zvinofadza." 
Isaiah2:17 Ukuru hwavanhu huchakotamiswa, nokuzvikudza kwavanhu kuchaderedzwa; Jehovha oga achakudzwa nezuva iro." 
Isaiah2:18 Zvifananidzo zvichapera chose. 
Isaiah2:19 Vanhu vachapinda mumapako amatombo, nomumakomba muvhu, nokuda kwaJehovha anotyisa, uye nokuda kwokubwinya kwoumambo hwake, kana achisimuka kuzunungusa nyika nesimba." 
Isaiah2:20 Nezuva iro vanhu vacharasa zvifananidzo zvavo zvesirivha nezvifananidzo zvavo zvendarama, zvavakazviitira kuti vazvinamate, vachizviisa kunhuta nezviremwaremwa;" 
Isaiah2:21 vapinde mumapako amatombo, nomumikaha yamatombo makuru, nokuda kwaJehovha anotyisa, uye nokuda kwokubwinya kwoumambo hwake, kana achisimuka kuzunungusa nyika nesimba." 
Isaiah2:22 Regai munhu, anokufema mumhino dzake; nokuti anobatsireiko?" 
Isaiah3:1 Nokuti tarirai, Ishe, Jehovha wehondo anotorera Jerusaremu naJudha mutsigiro nomudonzvo, mutsigiro wose wezvokudya, nomutsigiro wose wemvura;" 
Isaiah3:2 munhu wemhare, nomunhu wehondo; mutongi, nomuporofita, nomuvuki, nomukuru;" 
Isaiah3:3 mukuru wamakumi mashanu, noanokudzwa, chipangamazano, nemhizha yakachenjera, nomuvuki anoziva." 
Isaiah3:4 Ndichavapa vanana ave machinda avo, vachabatwa navacheche." 
Isaiah3:5 Vanhu vachamanikidzwa, mumwe achimanikidza mumwe, nomumwe nomumwe nowokwake; mwana achava namanyawi kuna vakuru, nowakazvidzwa kuno anokudzwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Musi uyo munhu achabata munun'una wake mumba mababa vake, achiti, “Iwe une nguo, chiva mutongi wedu; kuparadzwa uku ngakugadzirwe noruoko rwako.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Zvino nezuva iro achadanidzira, achiti, “Handidi kuva chiremba, nokuti mumba mangu hamuna zvokudya nezvokufuka; musandiita mutongi wavanhu.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Nokuti Jerusaremu raparadzwa, Judha awa; nokuti marimi avo namabasa avo anopesana naJehovha, kutsamwisa meso ake anokubwinya." 
Isaiah3:9 Zvinoonekwa paziso ravo zvinovapupurira; zvivi zvavo vanozvibudisa pachena seSodhoma; havazvivanzi. Mweya yavo ine nhamo, nokuti vakazviitira zvakaipa." 
Isaiah3:10 Iti pamusoro powakarurama, kuti achava nomufaro; nokuti vachadya zvibereko zvamabasa avo." 
Isaiah3:11 Wakaipa ane nhamo! Iye haangavi nomufaro, nokuti achapiwa mubairo wamaoko ake." 
Isaiah3:12 Kana vari vanhu vangu, vana ndivo vamanikidzi vavo, vakadzi vanovabata ushe. Haiwa, vanhu vangu, vatungamiriri venyu vanokutadzisai, ndivo vanoparadza nzira dzamaifanira kufamba nadzo." 
Isaiah3:13 Jehovha asimuka kutamba mhaka; amire kuti atonge vanhu. 
Isaiah3:14 Jehovha achatonga vakuru vavanhu vake namachinda avo, achiti, “Ndimi mapedza munda wemizambiringa; zvakapambwa zvavarombo zviri mudzimba dzenyu.”" 
Isaiah3:15 Munoiteiko zvamunopwanya vanhu vangu, muchikuya zviso zvavarombo? Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe, Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah3:16 Uyezve Jehovha akati, “Vakunda veZioni zvavana manyawi, vachifamba nemitsipa yakati tasa, vachiita meso–meso, vachifamba vachinzenzeta, zviri pamakumbo avo zvichiti ngwerengwere," 
Isaiah3:17 naizvozvo Ishe acharova nhongonya dzemisoro yavakunda vaZioni negwenyu–kwenyu, Jehovha achafukura miviri yavo.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Nezuva iro Ishe achabvisa ukomba hwamakumbo avo, nezvizuva nezvimwedzi;" 
Isaiah3:19 nezvinoremberedzwa, noungetani hwamaoko, nezvifukidzo;" 
Isaiah3:20 nezvishongo zvomusoro, noungetani hwamakumbo, nezvisungo, nezvitende zvezvinonhuwira, namazango;" 
Isaiah3:21 nezvimhete, noukomba hwemhino;" 
Isaiah3:22 nenguo dzomutambo, nezvijasi, nezvijari, nezvikwama;" 
Isaiah3:23 nezviwoni–woni zvamaoko, nomucheka wakaisvonaka, nemicheka yomusoro, nezvifukidzo zvameso." 
Isaiah3:24 Zvino zvichaitika kuti panzvimbo yezvinonhuwira pachava nezvinonhuwa; panzvimbo yevhudzi rakarukwa zvakanaka, pachava nemhanza; panzvimbo yenguo yakaisvonaka, pachava nechisimiro chegudza; nokupiswa kwouranda panzvimbo yokunaka." 
Isaiah3:25 Varume venyu vachaparadzwa nomunondo, nemhare dzenyu pakurwa." 
Isaiah3:26 Masuwo aro achachema nokurira; richaitwa dongo ndokugara pasi. 
Isaiah4:1 Nezuva iro vakadzi vanomwe vachabata murume mumwe, vachiti, “Tichadya zvokudya zvedu, tichafuka zvokufuka zvedu; tinongoda kudanwa zita rako bedzi; bvisa kunyadzwa kwedu.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Nezuva iro bukira raJehovha richanaka nokubwinya, uye zvibereko zvenyika zvichava zvakaisvonaka nezvinorumbidzwa kuna vakapukunyuka VaIsiraeri." 
Isaiah4:3 Vakasiyiwa paZioni, navakasara paJerusaremu, ivo vachanzi vatsvene, ani naani akanyorwa pakati pavapenyu muJerusaremu;" 
Isaiah4:4 kana Ishe ashambidza tsvina yavakunda veZioni, anatsa ropa reJerusaremu achiribvisa mukati maro, nomweya wokutonga uye nomweya wokupisa." 
Isaiah4:5 Zvino Jehovha achasvika pamusoro peimba imwe neimwe pagomo reZioni, napamusoro peungano dzaro, gore noutsi masikati, nokupenya kwomoto unopfuta usiku; nokuti pachava nechitaviridzo pamusoro pokubwinya kwose." 
Isaiah4:6 Kuchavapo netende, richava mumvuri masikati kana zuva richipisa, noutiziro nechivando kana pane dutu nemvura." 
Isaiah5:1 Ngandiimbire mudiwa wangu rwiyo rwomudiwa wangu pamusoro pomunda wake wemizambiringa. Mudiwa wangu waiva nomunda wemizambiringa pachikomo chakaorera; 
Isaiah5:2 akautimba, akabvisa mabwe awo ose, akasimamo mizambiringa yakaisvonaka, akavaka shongwe mukati mawo, ndokucherawo chisviniro mukati mawo; zvino akatarira kuti ubereke mazambiringa, asi wakabereka mazambiringa ebundo." 
Isaiah5:3 Zvino imi mugere Jerusaremu navarume vaJudha, ndinokumbira kuti motonge pakati pangu nomunda wangu wemizambiringa." 
Isaiah5:4 Chiiko chaifanira kuitirwa munda wangu wemizambiringa chandisina kuuitira? Zvino ndichitarira kuti uchabereka mazambiringa, wakagoberekerei madzambiringa ebundo?" 
Isaiah5:5 Zvino ndichakuudzai zvandichaitira munda wangu wemizambiringa, Ndichabvisa ruzhowa rwawo, udyiwe; ndichaputsa rusvingo rwawo, utsikwe;" 
Isaiah5:6 ndichauparadza; haungawanhurwi, kana kurimwa; asi uchamera minzwa norukato; ndicharayira makore, kuti arege kunayisa mvura pamusoro pawo." 
Isaiah5:7 Nokuti munda wemizambiringa waJehovha wehondo ndiyo imba yaIsiraeri, varume vaJudha muti wake unomufadza; zvino akatsvaka kwavari kururamisira, asi tarira, akawana kumanikidza, akatsvaka kururama, asi tarira, akawana kuchema." 
Isaiah5:8 Vane nhamo vanowedzera dzimba nedzimba, vanobatanidza minda neminda, kusvikira pasina nzvimbo, kusvikira imi mogara muri moga panyika." 
Isaiah5:9 Jehovha wehondo anotaura munzeve dzangu, achiti, “Zvirokwazvo, dzimba zhinji dzichava matongo, dzimba huru nedzakanaka dzichashayiwa vanogaramo." 
Isaiah5:10 Nokuti maeka ane gumi emizambiringa achabereka bati rimwechete, nehomeri rembeu richabereka efa imwechete.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Vane nhamo vanomuka mangwanani kundotsvaka doro rinobata, vanoswerera kusvikira usiku, kusvikira vapengeswa naro." 
Isaiah5:12 Rudimbwa, nembira, nengoma, nenyere, newaini zviripo pamitambo yavo; asi havana hanya nebasa raJehovha, havarangariri zvakaitwa namaoko ake." 
Isaiah5:13 Saka vanhu vangu vakatapwa nokushayiwa zivo; vakakudzwa pakati pavo vanoziya nenzara, vazhinji vavo vanofa nenyota." 
Isaiah5:14 Saka Sheori rakawedzera kukara kwaro nokushamisa muromo waro zvikuru; vakakudzwa vavo, navazhinji vavo, navanozvikudza vavo, noanofara pakati pavo, vanoburukiramo." 
Isaiah5:15 Vanhu vaduku vakakotamiswa, navakuru vakaninipiswa, nameso avanozvikudza akaninipiswa." 
Isaiah5:16 Asi Jehovha wehondo achakudzwa pakutonga kwakarurama, naMwari iye Mutsvene achaonekwa ari mutsvene nokururama kwake." 
Isaiah5:17 Ipapo makwayana achafura saanenge ari pamafuro, awo vanodzungaira vachadya makura avapfumi." 
Isaiah5:18 Vane nhamo vanokweva zvakaipa netambo nhema, nezvivi sezvinenge namabote engoro;" 
Isaiah5:19 vanoti, “Ngaakurumidze, ngaachimbidzike nebasa rake, kuti tizvione; zvakafungwa noMutsvene waVaIsiraeri ngazviswedere, kuti tizvizive.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Vane nhamo vanoti zvakaipa ndizvo zvakanaka, uye zvakanaka kuti ndizvo zvakaipa, vanoisa rima panzvimbo yechiedza, nechiedza panzvimbo yerima; vanoisa zvinovava panzvimbo yezvinotapira, nezvinotapira panzvimbo yezvinovava." 
Isaiah5:21 Vane nhamo vanozviti takachenjera, vanoti pakufunga kwavo tine njere." 
Isaiah5:22 Vane nhamo vakaita mhare pakunwa waini, navarume vane simba pakuvhenganisa zvinodhaka;" 
Isaiah5:23 vanoti akaipa haane mhosva nokuda kwefufuro, vanotorera wakarurama kururama kwake." 
Isaiah5:24 Naizvozvo murazvo womoto sezvaunopedza hundi uye uswa hwakawoma sezvahunongoperera mumurazvo, saizvozvo mudzi wavo uchaora, ruva ravo richatorwa kumusoro seguruva; nokuti vakaramba murairo waJehovha wehondo, nokushora shoko roMutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah5:25 Saka kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira vanhu vake, akatambanudza ruoko rwake kwavari, akavarova; makomo anodedera, mitumbi yavo yafanana namarara pakati penzira dzomumusha. Kunyangwe zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah5:26 Achasimudzira marudzi anobva kure mureza, nokuvaridzira muridzo ivo vari kumigumo yenyika; tarirai, vachakurumidza kuuya vachichimbidzika." 
Isaiah5:27 Hapana achaneta kana kugumburwa pakati pavo; hakuna achakotsira kana kuvata; bhandi rezviuno zvavo haringasunungurwi, rukanda rweshangu dzavo harungadambuki." 
Isaiah5:28 Miseve yavo inopinza, uta hwavo hwose hwakakungwa; mazondo amabhiza avo achaita somusara, namavhiri engoro dzavo sechamupupuri;" 
Isaiah5:29 kuomba kwavo kuchaita sokwehadzi yeshumba, vachavonga savana veshumba; zvirokwazvo vachaomba, vachabata mhuka yavo, ndokuenda nayo, hapana angairwira." 
Isaiah5:30 Nezuva iro vachavaombera sokutinhira kwegungwa; kana munhu akatarira nyika, achaona rima nokutambudzika; chiedza chichasvibiswa namakore ayo." 
Isaiah6:1 Pagore rokufa kwamambo Uziya, ndakaona Ishe agere pachigaro choushe, chirefu chakakwirira, mipendero yenguo dzake ichizadza temberi." 
Isaiah6:2 Kumusoro kwake kwakanga kumire serafimi; imwe neimwe yakanga ina mapapiro matanhatu; namaviri yakafukidza chiso chayo, namaviri yakafukidza makumbo ayo, namaviri yakanga ichibhururuka nawo." 
Isaiah6:3 Imwe yakadanidzira kune imwe, ichiti, “Mutsvene, mutsvene, mutsvene, iye Jehovha wehondo; nyika yose izere nokubwinya kwake.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Nheyo dzezvikumbaridzo dzikazununguka nezwi rowakanga achidana, imba ikazadzwa noutsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Ipapo ndikati, “Ndine nhamo! Nokuti ndoparara, nokuti ndiri munhu wemiromo yakan'ora, ndigere pakati pavanhu vemiromo yakan'ora; nokuti meso angu akaona Mambo; Jehovha wehondo.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Ipapo imwe serafimi yakabhururukira kwandiri, yakabata zimbe rinopfuta muruoko rwayo, rayakanga yatora nembato paatari;" 
Isaiah6:7 ikagumura muromo wangu naro, ikati, “Tarira, zimbe iri ragumura miromo yako, zvakaipa zvako zvabviswa, zvivi zvako zvadzikinurwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Ipapo ndakanzwa nzwi raShe richiti, “Ndingatuma aniko? Ndiani angatiendera?” Ipapo ndakati, “Ndiri pano ini, nditumei.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Iye akati, “Enda, unondoudza vanhu ava, uti, ‘Rambai henyu muchinzwa, asi musanzwisisa, rambai henyu muchiona, asi musaonesesa.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Kodzai mwoyo yavanhu ava, remedzai nzeve dzavo, tsinzinisai meso avo, kuti varege kuona nameso avo, kana kunzwa nenzeve dzavo, kana kunzwisisa nemwoyo yavo, vadzoke vapodzwe.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Zvino ndakati, “Ishe kusvikira rinhiko?” Akapindura, akati, “Kusvikira maguta ava matongo, asina vanogaramo, nedzimba dzisina munhu, nenyika yaparadzwa chose," 
Isaiah6:12 kusvikira Jehovha abvisira vanhu kure, nenzvimbo, dzashanduka matongo, dzava zhinji panyika." 
Isaiah6:13 Kana kuchinge kwasara mukati mayo chegumi, naichowo chichadyiwazve; sezvakaita muterebhindi nomuoki wasiyirwa hunde kana watemwa, saizvozvo rudzi rutsvene ndiyo hunde yawo.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Zvino pamazuva aAhazi, mwanakomana waJotamu, mwanakomana waUziya, mambo waJudha, Rezini mambo weSiria, naPeka, mwanakomana waRemaria, mambo waIsiraeri, vakaenda kundorwa neJerusaremu, asi vakakoniwa kurikunda." 
Isaiah7:2 Zvino vakaudza imba yaDhavhidhi, vachiti, “VaSiria vava pakati pavaEfuremu.” Mwoyo wake nemwoyo yavanhu vake ikazununguswa sokuzununguswa kwemiti mudondo nemhepo." 
Isaiah7:3 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Isaya, “Enda zvino undosangana naAhazi, iwe naShearijashubhi, mwanakomana wako, panoguma rukoronga rwedziva rokumusoro, panzira huru inoenda kumunda womusuki wenguo;" 
Isaiah7:4 undoti kwaari, ‘Chenjera, unyarare hako; usatya, nomwoyo wako urege kupera nokuda kwamatsiga aya maviri anopfungaira, nokuda kwokutsamwa kukuru kwaRezini nokwaVaSiria, nokwomwanakomana waRemaria.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:5 Nokuti VaSiria navaEfuremu, nomwanakomanwa waRemaria vakarangana kukuitira zvakaipa, vachiti," 
Isaiah7:6 “Hendei tindorwa navaJudha, tivatyise, tivakunde, tigadze mambo pakati pavo, iye mwanakomana waTabheeri.”" 
Isaiah7:7 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Izvozvi hazvingamiri, uye hazvingaitiki." 
Isaiah7:8 Nokuti musoro weSiria ndiDhamasikosi, nomusoro weDhamasikosi ndiRezini; makore makumi matanhatu namashanu asati apera, vaEfuremu vachaputswa–putswa, kuti varege kuva rudzi;" 
Isaiah7:9 musoro wavaEfuremu ndiSamaria, nomusoro weSamaria ndimwanakomana waRemaria. Kana musingadi kutenda, zvirokwazvo hamungasimbiswi.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Zvino Jehovha akataurazve naAhazi, achiti," 
Isaiah7:11 “Kumbira chiratidzo kuna Jehovha Mwari wako; uchikumbire kunyangwe pasi pakadzika, kana kumusoro kwakakwirira.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Asi Ahazi akati, “Handingakumbiri, uye handingaedze Jehovha.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Akati, “Chinzwai zvino, imi imba yaDhavhidhi, chinhu chiduku kwamuri kuti munetse vanhu zvino modokunetsa Mwari wanguo here?" 
Isaiah7:14 Naizvozvo Ishe amene achakupai chiratidzo. Tarirai, mhandara ichava napamuviri, ichabereka mwanakomana, ichamutumidza Imanueri." 
Isaiah7:15 Achadya ruomba nouchi, panguva yaanoziva kuramba zvakaipa, nokusanangura zvakanaka." 
Isaiah7:16 Nokuti mwana asati aziva kuramba zvakaipa nokusanangura zvakanaka, nyika iyo yaunotya madzimambo ayo maviri, ichashanduka dongo." 
Isaiah7:17 “Jehovha achauyisa pamusoro pako, napamusoro pavanhu vako, napamusoro peimba yababa vako, mazuva asina kumbovapo, kubvira pazuva rakaparadzana vaEfuremu navaJudha ndiye mambo weAsiria.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Zvino nezuva iro Jehovha acharidzira muridzo nhunzi dziri pamigumo yenzizi dzeIjipiti, nenyuchi dziri panyika yeAsiria." 
Isaiah7:19 Dzichauya, dzichamhara dzose mumipata ina mawere, nomumikaha yamatombo, napamusoro peminzwa yose, napamusoro pamafuro ose." 
Isaiah7:20 Nezuva iro Ishe achaveura nechisvo chakakumbirwa mhiri kwoRwizi, iye mambo weAsiria, musoro nemvere dzamakumbo; chichabvisawo ndebvu." 
Isaiah7:21 Zvino nezuva iro munhu achapfuwa mhou imwe duku namakwai maviri; 
Isaiah7:22 zvino nokuda kwomukaka muzhinji wadzichamupa, achadya ruomba; nokuti mumwe nomumwe akasiyiwa panyika iyo achadya ruomba nouchi." 
Isaiah7:23 Zvino nezuva iro nzvimbo imwe neimwe paiva nemiti yemizambiringa ine chiuru chimwe, yaitengwa namasirivha ane chiuru chimwe, ichava norukato neminzwa." 
Isaiah7:24 Vachaendako nemiseve nouta, nokuti nyika yose ichamera rukato neminzwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Hakuna angasvika pazvikomo zvose zvairimwa namapadza nokutya rukato neminzwa; asi mombe dzichasundirwako, namakwai achatsikapo." 
Isaiah8:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Tora hwendefa guru, unyore pariri nepeni yavanhu, uti, ‘Chimbidzikai kutapa, zvakapambwa zvokurumidza.’ ”" 
Isaiah8:2 Ndichatora zvapupu zvakatendeka, zvinoti: Uriya mupristi, naZekariya mwanakomana waJebherekia." 
Isaiah8:3 Ipapo ndakaenda kumuporofitakadzi, iye akatora pamuviri, akabereka mwanakomana. Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Mutumidze zita rokuti, ‘Chimbidzikai kutapa, zvakapambwa zvokurumidza.’" 
Isaiah8:4 Nokuti mwana asati aziva kuti, baba vangu, kana mai vangu, pfuma yeDhamasikosi nezvakapambwa zveSamaria zvichaiswa pamberi pamambo weAsiria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Zvino Jehovha akataurazve kwandiri, achiti," 
Isaiah8:6 “Vanhu ava zvavakaramba mvura yeShiroa, inonatsa kuyerera, vachifarira Rezini nomwanakomana waRemaria;" 
Isaiah8:7 saka zvino, tarira, Ishe achauyisa pamusoro pavo mvura zhinji yoRwizi, ine simba yakawanda, iye mambo weAsiria nokubwinya kwake kwose; ruchabuda kuhova dzarwo dzose, nokudarika nhivi dzarwo dzose;" 
Isaiah8:8 ruchakukura kusvikira kwaJudha; ruchapa pfuma, ndokupfuura, ruchasvika pamutsipa; kutandavara kwamapapiro arwo kuchazadza kufara kwenyika yako yose, iwe Imanueri.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Itai bope, imi ndudzi, muputswe–putswe; nemi mose muri kunyika dziri kure, inzwai; zvisungei zviuno, muputswe–putswe, zvisungei zviuno, muputswe–putswe." 
Isaiah8:10 Ranganai henyu, asi zvichakona; taurai shoko, asi haringamiri; nokuti Mwari anesu." 
Isaiah8:11 Nokuti Jehovha akataura saizvozvo neni noruoko rune simba, akandirayira kuti ndirege kufamba nenzira yavanhu ava achiti," 
Isaiah8:12 Musati, “Irangano, pamusoro pezvose zvinonzi navanhu ava, irangano; uye musatya zvavanotya, kana kuvhunduka." 
Isaiah8:13 “Jehovha wehondo, ndiye wamunofanira kuti mutsvene; mumutye iye, mumuvhunduke iye." 
Isaiah8:14 Ipapo iye achava nzvimbo tsvene yenyu; asi achava ibwe rokugumbusa nedombo rokupinganidza kudzimba dzose mbiri dzaIsiraeri, ave rugombe nomusungo kuna vanogara Jerusaremu.”" 
Isaiah8:15 Vazhinji vavo vachagumburwa naro, vachawa, nokuputswa, nokuteyiwa, nokubatwa." 
Isaiah8:16 Sunga chipupuriro, namatidza murairo nechisimbiso pakati pavadzidzi vangu." 
Isaiah8:17 Ndichamirira Jehovha, anovanzira imba yaJakobho chiso chake, ndichamutsvaka." 
Isaiah8:18 Tarirai, ini navana vandakapiwa naJehovha, tiri zviratidzo nezvishamiso pakati paIsiraeri zvaJehovha wehondo, agere mugomo reZioni." 
Isaiah8:19 Zvino kana vachiti kwamuri, “Bvunzai masvikiro navavuki, vanorira nokuita zeve–zeve.” Ko vanhu havafaniri kubvunza Mwari wavo here? Ko vanofanira kubvunza vakafa pamusoro pavapenyu here?" 
Isaiah8:20 Dzokerai kumurairo nokuzvipupuriro! Kana vasingatauri sezvinoreva shoko iri, havangavi nechiedza chamangwanani." 
Isaiah8:21 Vachafamba nenyika vakamanikidzwa kwazvo, vane nzara; zvino kana vane nzara, vachava neshungu, vachatuka mambo wavo naMwari wavo, vachitarira kudenga." 
Isaiah8:22 Vachatarirawo pasi, asi tarirai, vachaona njodzi nerima, nokusviba kwokumanikidzwa; vachadzingirwa kurima guru." 
Isaiah9:1 Asi iye, aiva pakumanikidzwa, haangazovi nerima. Panguva yokutanga wakaninipisa nyika yeZebhuruni nenyika yeNafutari, asi panguva yazvino akaikudza, kurutivi rwegungwa, mhiri kwaJodhani, Gareriya ravahedheni." 
Isaiah9:2 Vanhu vaifamba murima vakaona chiedza chikuru; vaigara munyika yomumvuri worufu, vakapenyerwa chiedza." 
Isaiah9:3 Makawanza rudzi, makawedzera mufaro wavo; vanofara pamberi penyu, sokufara kwavanhu panguva yokukohwa, sokufara kwavanhu kana vachigoverana zvakapambwa." 
Isaiah9:4 Nokuti makavhuna joko raivaremedza, netsvimbo yairova mafudzi avo, neshamhu yavaivamanikidza, sapamazuva avaMidhiani." 
Isaiah9:5 Nokuti shangu imwe neimwe yomurwi, yakatsika nokutinhira, nenguo yakanyikwa muropa, zvichapiswa, zvichava sehuni dzomoto." 
Isaiah9:6 Nokuti takazvarirwa Mwana, takapiwa Mwanakomana; umambo huchava pafudzi rake; zita rake richanzi, “Anoshamisa, Chipangamazano, Mwari ane simba, Baba vokusingaperi, Muchinda worugare.”" 
Isaiah9:7 Kukura kwoumambo hwake nokworugare hazvina mugumo, agare pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi napaushe hwake, ahusimbise ahutsigire nokururamisira nokururama kubva zvino kusvikira panguva isingaperi. Kushingaira kwaJehovha wehondo kuchazviita." 
Isaiah9:8 Jehovha akatuma shoko kuna Jakobho, rakaburukira pamusoro paVaIsiraeri." 
Isaiah9:9 Vanhu vose vachaziva, ivo vaEfuremu navagere Samaria, ivo vanoti namanyawi avo nokuzvikudza kwemwoyo yavo." 
Isaiah9:10 “Zvitinha zvawa, asi tichavaka namabwe akavezwa; mionde yatemwa, asi tichaisa misidhari panzvimbo yayo.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Naizvozvo Jehovha achavamutsira vadzivisi vaRezini, achasanganisa vavengi vake;" 
Isaiah9:12 VaSiria pamberi, navaFirisitia mushure, vachapedza Isiraeri nomuromo wakashama. Kunyangwe zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah9:13 Asi vanhu havana kutendeukira kuna iye akavarova, havana kutsvaka Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah9:14 Saka Jehovha achagura VaIsiraeri musoro nomuswe, davi romuchindwe nenhokwe, nomusi mumwe." 
Isaiah9:15 Mukuru noanokudzwa ndiwo musoro; muporofita, anodzidzisa nhema, ndiwo muswe." 
Isaiah9:16 Nokuti vatungamiriri vavanhu ava vanovatsaukisa; vanotungamirirwa navo vanoparadzwa. 
Isaiah9:17 Naizvozvo Ishe haangafariri majaya avo, haangavi netsitsi nenherera nechirikadzi dzavo; nokuti mumwe nomumwe wavo mumhuri waMwari nomuiti wezvakaipa, muromo mumwe nomumwe unotaura zvohupenzi. Kunyangwe zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah9:18 Nokuti zvakaipa zvinopfuta somoto; unopedza rukato neminzwa; zvirokwazvo unopisa masango anotyisa, zvichikwira kudenga iri shongwe youtsi." 
Isaiah9:19 Nyika inotsva nokuda kwokutsamwa kwaJehovha wehondo; vanhu vakaita sehuni dzinoveswa; hakuna munhu une nyasha nehama yake. 
Isaiah9:20 Mumwe achabvuta kurudyi, asi achava nenzara; achadya kuruboshwe, asi havangaguti; mumwe nomumwe achadya nyama yoruoko rwake." 
Isaiah9:21 VaManase vachadya vaEfuremu, navaEfuremu vaManase; ivo pamwechete vachamukira vaJudha. Kunyangwe zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah10:1 Vane nhamo vanotema mitemo isina kururama, navanyori vanonyora zvisakarurama;" 
Isaiah10:2 kuti vadzivise varombo pakururamisirwa, nokutorera varombo vavanhu vangu zvavanofanira kuva nazvo, kuti vapambe chirikadzi, vatorere nherera zvinhu zvavo." 
Isaiah10:3 Asi muchaiteiko pazuva rokutongwa, nerokuparadzwa kuchabva kure? Muchatizira kuna ani kundobatsirwa? Pfuma yenyu muchaivigepiko?" 
Isaiah10:4 Vachangokotama havo pakati pavasungwa, vachawira pasi pakati pavakaurayiwa. Kunyangwe zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah10:5 Nhaiwe Asiria, shamhu yokutsamwa kwangu, wakabata muruoko rwake tsvimbo yeshungu dzangu!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ndichamutuma kundorwa norudzi runomhura Mwari, ndichamurayira kundorwa navanhu vandinotsamwira, kuti andotora zvakapambwa, andotora zvakatapwa, azvitsikire pasi sedope riri munzira dzomumusha." 
Isaiah10:7 Asi iye haafungi kuita izvozvo, nomwoyo wake haarangariri zvakadaro; asi iye anorangarira kuparadza nokupedza marudzi mazhinji." 
Isaiah10:8 Nokuti iye anoti, “Ko machinda angu ose haazi madzimambo here?" 
Isaiah10:9 Ko Karino harina kuitirwa zvakaitirwa Kakemishi here? NeHamati seApadhi here? NeSamaria seDhamasikosi here? 
Isaiah10:10 Ruoko rwangu sezvarwakasvikira ushe hwezvifananidzo, kunyangwe zvifananidzo zvavo zvakavezwa zvakanga zvichipfuura zvapaJerusaremu neSamaria," 
Isaiah10:11 handingaitiri Jerusaremu nezvifananidzo zvaro sezvandakaitira Samaria nezvifananidzo zvaro here?” 
Isaiah10:12 Saka zvino kana Ishe apedza basa rake rose pagomo reZioni napaJerusaremu, ndicharova zvibereko zvomwoyo unozvikudza wamambo weAsiria, namanyawi okuzvikudza kwake." 
Isaiah10:13 Nokuti akati, “Ndakazviita nesimba roruoko rwangu, uye nouchenjeri hwangu, nokuti ndine njere; ndakabvisa miganhu yavanhu, ndakapamba pfuma yavo; semhare ndakawisira pasi vaigara pazvigaro zvoushe;" 
Isaiah10:14 ruoko rwangu rwakawana pfuma yamarudzi avanhu sedendere; ndakaunganidza nyika yose, somunhu anounganidza mazai akasiyiwa; hapana akapfakanyisa bapiro, kana kushamisa muromo, kana kurira.”" 
Isaiah10:15 Ko sanhu ringazvirumbidza pamusoro poanotema naro here? Kana jeko ringazvikudza pamusoro paanobata naro here? Zvaifanana netsvimbo inozunungusa vanorova nayo, kana mudonzvo unosimudza chinhu chisati chiri huni." 
Isaiah10:16 Naizvozvo Ishe, Ishe wehondo, achatuma kuonda pakati pavakakora vake; pasi pokubwinya kwake pachabatidzwa chinopisa chakafanana nokupisa kwomoto." 
Isaiah10:17 Chiedza chaVaIsiraeri chichava moto, noMutsvene wake murazvo womoto; uchapisa nokupedza minzwa yake norukato rwake nezuva rimwe." 
Isaiah10:18 Uchapedza kubwinya kwedondo rake, nokwomunda wake wakaorera, mweya nomuviri kamwe, zvifanane nendonda inongoramba ichipera simba." 
Isaiah10:19 Miti yakasara yedondo rake ichava mishoma, inganyorwa nomwana." 
Isaiah10:20 Zvino nezuva iro vakasara VaIsiraeri, navanenge vapukunyuka paimba yaJakobho, havangazosendamiri kuno akavarova, asi vachasendamira kuna Jehovha, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, nezvokwadi." 
Isaiah10:21 Vakasara vachadzoka, ivo vakasara vaJakobho, kuna Mwari ane simba." 
Isaiah10:22 Nokuti kunyangwe vanhu venyu, imi Isiraeri, vakaita sejecha regungwa, vakasara vavo voga vachadzoka; nokuti vakatemerwa kuparadzwa kuzere nokururama." 
Isaiah10:23 Nokuti Ishe, Jehovha wehondo, achapedzisa kuparadza, kwakagara kwatemwa, panyika yose." 
Isaiah10:24 Saka zvanzi nashe, Jehovha wehondo, “Imi vanhu vangu vagere Zioni, musatya muAsiria, kunyangwe akakurovai neshamhu nokukusimudzirai tsvimbo yake, sezvaakaitira Ijipiti." 
Isaiah10:25 Nokuti kwasara chinguva chiduku, kutsamwa kwangu kuchapera, hasha dzangu dzichavaparadza." 
Isaiah10:26 “Jehovha wehondo achamusimudzira tyava, sapakurohwa kwavaMidhiani padombo reOrebhi; shamhu yake ichava pamusoro pegungwa, achaisimudza sezvaakaitira Ijipiti." 
Isaiah10:27 Zvino nezuva iro mutoro wake uchabviswa pamafudzi ako, nejoko rake pamutsipa wako, joko richaparadzwa nokuda kwamafuta.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Asvika paAiati, apfuura napaMigironi, achengeta nhumbi dzake paMikimashi;" 
Isaiah10:29 vakwira napamupata, vakavata paGebha usiku; Rama rinodedera, Gibhiya raSauro ratiza." 
Isaiah10:30 Danidzira nezwi rako, iwe mukunda weGarimi! Teerera, iwe Raishi! Iwe Anatoti wourombo!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madhimena wotiza, vagere Ghebhimi vorongedza kutiza." 
Isaiah10:32 Zuva ranhasi achazorora paNobhi; anozunungusira gomo romukunda weZioni, icho chikomo cheJerusaremu, ruoko rwake." 
Isaiah10:33 Tarirai, Ishe, Jehovha wehondo, achatema mashizha nokutyisa; akareba achatemwa, naakakwirira achawiswa pasi." 
Isaiah10:34 Achatema nedare masango anotyisa, Rebhanoni richawiswa noane simba." 
Isaiah11:1 Zvino pahunde yaJese pachabuda bukira, davi, rinobuda pamidzi yake, richabereka zvibereko." 
Isaiah11:2 Mweya waJehovha uchagara pamusoro pake, mweya wenjere nowokungwara, mweya wamano nesimba, mweya wokuziva nokutya Jehovha." 
Isaiah11:3 Mufaro wake uchava pakutya Jehovha; haangatongi nokungoona nameso bedzi, kana kupa mhosva nokungonzwa nenzeve dzake bedzi;" 
Isaiah11:4 asi achatongera varombo nokururama, achatambira vanyoro venyika mhaka dzavo zvakarurama; acharova nyika neshamhu yomuromo wake, achavauraya vakaipa nomweya wemiromo yake." 
Isaiah11:5 Kururama richava bhandi rechiuno chake, kutendeka richava bhandi rezvidza zvake." 
Isaiah11:6 Bere richagara negwayana, ingwe ichavata pasi nembudzana, nemhuru nomwana weshumba nechipfuwo chakakora pamwechete; uye mwana muduku achadzitungamirira." 
Isaiah11:7 Mhou nebheya zvichafura; vana vadzo vachavata pamwechete; shumba ichadya uswa senzombe. 
Isaiah11:8 Mwana anomwa, achatamba pamwena wenyoka, uye mwana akarumurwa achapinza ruoko rwake mubako remvumbi." 
Isaiah11:9 Hazvingakuvadzi kana kuparadza pagomo rangu rose dzvene, nokuti nyika yose ichazara nokuziva Jehovha, sezvinofukidza mvura pasi pegungwa." 
Isaiah11:10 Nezuva iro mudzi waJese, iwo umirepo somureza wavanhu, uchatsvakwa namarudzi avanhu; nzvimbo yake yokuzorora ichava nembiri." 
Isaiah11:11 Zvino nezuva iro Ishe achatambanudzazve ruoko rwake kechipiri kuti adzikinure vakasara vavanhu vake, ivo vanenge vasara, vari paAsiria, neIjipiti, nePatirosi, neKushi, neErami, neShinari, neHamati, nokuzvitsuwa zvegungwa." 
Isaiah11:12 Achasimudzira marudzi mureza, nokuunganidza vadzingwa VaIsiraeri, nokuunganidza vaJudha vakaparadzirwa kumativi mana enyika." 
Isaiah11:13 Ipapo godo ravaEfuremu richapera, navanomanikidza vaJudha vachaparadzwa; vaEfuremu havangagodori vaJudha, navaJudha havangamanikidzi vaEfuremu." 
Isaiah11:14 Asi vachabhururukira pamusoro pamafudzi avaFirisitia kumavirazuva, vachapambara pamwechete vana vamabvazuva; vachatambanudzira maoko avo kuvaEdhomu navaMoabhu, navana vaAmoni vachavateerera." 
Isaiah11:15 Jehovha achaparadza chose muromo wegungwa reIjipiti, achasimudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro poRwizi nemhepo yake inopisa, ndokururova ruite hova nomwe, ayambuse vanhu vakafuka shangu." 
Isaiah11:16 Vanhu vake vakasara, vakasara Asiria, vachava nenzira huru; sezvazvakaitirwa Isiraeri nezuva ravakabuda munyika yeIjipiti." 
Isaiah12:1 Nezuva iro uchati, “Ndinokuvongai Jehovha; makanga makanditsamwira, asi kutsamwa kwenyu kwakadzorwa, munondinyaradza." 
Isaiah12:2 Tarirai, Mwari ndiye ruponeso rwangu; ndichavimba naye, handingatyi; nokuti Jehovha, iye Jehovha, ndiye simba rangu norwiyo rwangu; iye wava ruponeso rwangu.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Saka muchachera mvura nomufaro pamatsime oruponeso. 
Isaiah12:4 Zvino nezuva iro muchati, “Vongai Jehovha, paridzai zita rake, zivisai mabasa ake pakati pavanhu, muudze vanhu kuti zita rake rinokudziwa." 
Isaiah12:5 “Imbirai Jehovha; nokuti akaita zvinhu zvakaisvonaka–naka; izvi ngazvizikanwe panyika yose. 
Isaiah12:6 Danidzira upururudze, iwe ugere paZioni; nokuti Mutsvene waIsiraeri mukuru pakati penyu.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Chirevo chaMwari pamusoro peBhabhironi, chakaonekwa naIsaya, mwanakomana waAmozi." 
Isaiah13:2 Simudzai mureza pagomo risina miti; danidzirai kwavari, ninirai noruoko, kuti vapinde pamasuwo avakuru." 
Isaiah13:3 Ndakaraira vatsvene vangu, ndakadana mhare dzangu nokuda kwokutsamwa kwangu, ivo varume vangu vanofara vachizvikudza." 
Isaiah13:4 Inzwai kutinhira pamakomo, kwakaita sokwavanhu vazhinji! Kutinhira kweungano dzoushe kwamarudzi akaungana pamwechete! Jehovha wehondo wogadzira hondo kundorwa." 
Isaiah13:5 Vanobva kunyika iri kure, kumugumo wedenga, iye Jehovha nenhumbi dzake dzokurwa dzeshungu dzake, kuti aparadze nyika yose." 
Isaiah13:6 Chemai, nokuti zuva raJehovha riri pedyo; rinosvika sokuparadza kunobva kuna waMasimbaose." 
Isaiah13:7 Saka maoko ose achashayiwa simba, nomwoyo mumwe nomumwe wavanhu uchanyauka;" 
Isaiah13:8 vachavhunduka; vachabatwa nokurwadziwa namatambudziko; vacharwadziwa somukadzi anosununguka; vachatarisana vachashamiswa; zviso zvavo zvichafanana nezviso zvomoto. 
Isaiah13:9 Tarirai, zuva raJehovha rinouya, rinotyisa, rine hasha nokutsamwa kukuru, kuti ashandure nyika riite dongo, nokuparadza vatadzi vayo vabvemo." 
Isaiah13:10 Nokuti nyenyedzi dzokudenga, namapoka adzo, hadzingaratidzi chiedza chadzo; zuva richasvibiswa pakubuda kwaro, uye mwedzi haungavhenekeri nechiedza chawo." 
Isaiah13:11 Ndicharova nyika nokuda kwokushata kwayo, navakaipa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo; ndichagumisa manyawi avanozvikudza, nokuwisira pasi kudada kwavanotyisa." 
Isaiah13:12 Vanhu ndichavaita vashoma kupfuura ndarama yakaisvonaka, iye munhu kupfuura ndarama tsvene yeOfiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Saka ndichadederesa denga, nyika ichazununguswa ibve panzvimbo yayo, nehasha dzaJehovha wehondo, napazuva rokutsamwa kwake kukuru." 
Isaiah13:14 Zvino semhara inovhimwa, uye sezvipfuwo zvisina unozviunganidza, saizvozvo munhu mumwe nomumwe achadzokera kurudzi rwake, mumwe nomumwe achatizira kunyika yake." 
Isaiah13:15 Mumwe nomumwe anowanikwa, achabayiwa; mumwe nomumwe anobatwa, achaurayiwa nomunondo." 
Isaiah13:16 Vacheche vavo vacharoverwa pasi pamberi pavo, dzimba dzavo dzichapambwa, vakadzi vavo vachachinyiwa." 
Isaiah13:17 Tarirai, ndichavamutsira vaMedhia, vasingarangariri sirivha, kunyangwe ndarama havaifariri." 
Isaiah13:18 Uta hwavo huchawisira pasi majaya avo, havangavi netsitsi nezvibereko zvechizvaro; ziso ravo haringadariki vana." 
Isaiah13:19 Zvino Bhabhironi, rine mbiri paushe hwose, raizvikudza vaKaradhia pamusoro pokunaka kwaro, richaita sapanguva yakaparadza Mwari Sodhoma neGomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Haringatongogarwi navanhu, hakuna vangatongogaramo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi; kunyangwe nomuArabhia haangadziki tende rakemo, navafudzi havangavatisi mapoka avopo." 
Isaiah13:21 Asi zvikara zvomusango zvichavatamo; dzimba dzavo dzichazara nezvinorira; mhou dzichagaramo, nemweya yakaipa ichatambapo." 
Isaiah13:22 Mapere acharira munhare dzavo, namakava mudzimba dzamadzimambo dzaifadza; nguva yaro yaswedera pedyo, mazuva aro haangawedzerwi." 
Isaiah14:1 Nokuti Jehovha achanzwira Jakobho tsitsi, achasanangura Isaraeri nokuvagadza munyika yavo; mutorwa achandogara navo, vachanamatira imba yaJakobho." 
Isaiah14:2 Marudzi achavatora, nokuvaisa kunzvimbo yavo; imba yaVaIsiraeri ichavabata panyika yaJehovha vave varanda navashandiri vavo; vachatapa ivo vaiva vatapi vavo, vachabata ivo vaivamanikidza." 
Isaiah14:3 Zvino nezuva iro kana Jehovha achikuzorodza pakuchema kwako napakutambudzika kwako, napakubata kwako kunorema kwawakabatiswa nako," 
Isaiah14:4 uchaimba rwiyo urwu pamusoro pamambo weBhabhironi, uchiti, “Haiwa mumanikidzi wapera sei! Kutambudzika kwapera sei!" 
Isaiah14:5 Jehovha avhuna mudonzvo wowakaipa, netsvimbo youshe yavabati." 
Isaiah14:6 “Iye airova marudzi avanhu nehasha nokurova kusingaperi, aibata ndudzi dzavanhu nokutambudza kusina kudzorwa nomunhu." 
Isaiah14:7 Nyika yose yozorora, yanyarara; vanofara nokuimba." 
Isaiah14:8 Zvirokwazvo miti yemisipiresi inofara nokuda kwako, nemisidhari yeRebhanoni, ichiti, ‘Chinguva chawaparadzwa, hapano mutemi anokwira kutitema.’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Sheori pasi rine nyongano pamusoro pako kuzosangana newe pakuuya kwako; rinokumutsira vakafa, ivo vose vaiva vakuru panyika; ramutsa madzimambo ose amarudzi avanhu pazvigaro zvavo zvoushe." 
Isaiah14:10 Ivo vose vachapindura, vachiti kwauri, ‘Newe wava usina simba sesu kanhi? Iwe wafanana nesu kanhi?’" 
Isaiah14:11 “Kuzvikudza kwako kwaderedzwa kusvikira paSheori, nokurira kwoudimbwa hwako; honye dziri pasi pako, nehonye dzinokufukidza." 
Isaiah14:12 “Haiwa, wawa seiko uchibva kudenga, iwe nyamasase, iwe mwanakomana wamambakwedza! Wakandwa seiko pasi, iwe wokuwisira marudzi pasi!" 
Isaiah14:13 Iwe wakati mumwoyo mako, ‘Ndichakwira kudenga, ndichakwiridza chigaro changu choushe kumusoro kwenyenyedzi dzaMwari; ndichagara pamusoro pegomo reungano, pamigumo yamativi okumusoro;" 
Isaiah14:14 ndichakwira kumusoro kwamakore, ndichazvienzanisa noWokumusoro–soro.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Kunyangwe zvakadaro uchaderedzwa kusvikira paSheori, kusvikira pakadzika pegomba." 
Isaiah14:16 “Vanokuona vachakucherechedza, vachakutarira, vachiti, ‘Ko uyu ndiye munhu aidederesa nyika, aizunungusa ushe;" 
Isaiah14:17 aishandura nyika ifanane nerenje, aiparadza maguta ayo, airamba kusunungura vasungwa vake vaende kumusha here?’" 
Isaiah14:18 “Madzimambo ose amarudzi, iwo ose, anovata achikudzwa, mumwe nomumwe paimba yake." 
Isaiah14:19 Asi iwe waraswa kure nohwiro hwako, sedavi rinonyangadza, wafukidzwa navakaurayiwa, vakabayiwa nomunondo, vanoburukira kumabwe egomba, somutumbi watsikwa netsoka." 
Isaiah14:20 Haungavigwi pamwechete navo, nokuti wakaparadza nyika yako, vakauraya vanhu vako; vana vavakaipa havangarehwi nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah14:21 Gadzirirai vana vake pavangaurayiwa nokuda kwokushata kwamadzibaba avo; varege kuzomuka, vagare nhaka yenyika, vazadze pasi pose namaguta.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Ndichavamukira, ndichatorera Bhabhironi zita navakasara, navana, navana vevana, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndichariita nzvimbo inogarwa nenhungu, uye madziva emvura; ndicharitsvaira nomutsvairo wokuparadza, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Jehovha wehondo akapika, achiti, “Zvirokwazvo, sezvandakafunga, ndizvo zvichaitika; sezvandakarangarira, zvichamira saizvozvo." 
Isaiah14:25 Kuti ndichavhuna muAsiria munyika yangu, ndichamutsika netsoka dzangu pamakomo angu; nenguva iyo joko rake richabva kwavari, nomutoro wake uchabva pamafudzi avo.”" 
Isaiah14:26 Ndicho chirevo chakatemerwa nyika yose; ndirwo ruoko rwakatambanudzwa pamusoro pamarudzi ose. 
Isaiah14:27 Nokuti Jehovha wehondo wakatema chirevo, ndiani angapindurazve? Ruoko rwake rwakatambanudzwa, ndiani angarudzosa." 
Isaiah14:28 Negore rokufa kwamambo Ahazi chirevo ichi chakarehwa. 
Isaiah14:29 “Iwe nyika yeFirisitia, iwe nyika yose, usafara zvako nokuti shamhu yakanga yakurova yavhunika; nokuti pamudzi wenyoka pachabuda mvumbi, chibereko chayo chichava nyoka yomoto inoburuka." 
Isaiah14:30 Matangwe avarombo achadya, navanoshayiwa vachavata pasi vakafara; ndichauraya mudzi wako nenzara, vakasara vako vachaurayiwa." 
Isaiah14:31 “Chema, iwe suwo; danidzira, iwe guta; wanyauka, iwe nyika yeFirisitia, iwe nyika yose; nokuti kurutivi rwokumusoro kunobva utsi, hapana anotiza pahondo dzake.”" 
Isaiah14:32 Zvino nhume dzorudzi urwu vachadzipindurei? Kuti, “Jehovha akavamba Zioni, vanotambudzika navanhu vake vachavandiramo.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Chirevo pamusoro paMoabhu. Nokuti usiku Ari reMoabhu rakaitwa dongo, rakaparadzwa; nokuti usiku Kiri reMoabhu rakaparadzwa nousiku humwe rikaitwa dongo." 
Isaiah15:2 Vakwira Bhayiti, neDhibhoni, kumatunhu akakwirira, kunochemapo; vaMoabhu vanochema pamusoro peNebho napaMedhebha; misoro yavo yose ine mhanza, ndebvu dzose dzakaveurwa." 
Isaiah15:3 Panzira dzomumisha yavo vakazvisunga namakudza, pamusoro pedzimba dzavo, napamatare avo, mumwe nomumwe anowungudza achichema zvikuru." 
Isaiah15:4 Heshibhoni rinodanidzira, neEreari; izwi ravo rinonzwika kusvikira paJahazi; saka varwi vaMoabhu vanodanidzira zvikuru; mweya yavo unodedera mukati mavo." 
Isaiah15:5 Mwoyo wangu unodanidzira pamusoro paMoabhu; vakuru vavo vanotizira Zoari, neEgiratisherishiya; nokuti vanokwira mukwidzwa waRuhiti vachichema; nokuti panzira inoenda Horonaimi vanochema nokuchema kwokuparadzwa." 
Isaiah15:6 Nokuti mvura yeNimirimi ichaparadzwa; nokuti uswa hwawoma, bumhudza rapera, hapachina chinomera chitema." 
Isaiah15:7 Saka zvizhinji zvavakawana, nezvavakachengeta, vachayambuka nazvo parukova rwemikonachando." 
Isaiah15:8 Nokuti kuchema kwapotereka kunyika yose yaMoabhu; kuungudza kwake kusvikira paEgiraimi, nokuungudza kwake kusvikira paBheerierimi." 
Isaiah15:9 Nokuti mvura yeDhimoni izere neropa; nokuti ndichawedzera kurova Dhimoni, ndichatuma shumba iparadze vakapukunyuka vaMoabhu, navakasara panyika." 
Isaiah16:1 Tumirai mubati wenyika makwayana, abve Sera aende kurenje, kugomo romukunda weZioni." 
Isaiah16:2 Nokuti seshiri dzinodzungaira, sedendere rakaparadzirwa, ndizvo zvichaita vakunda vaMoabhu pamazambuko aArinoni." 
Isaiah16:3 “Itai mano, ruramisira; mumvuri wako uuite sousiku pakati pamasikati makuru; vanza vadzingwa, usapandukira anotiza." 
Isaiah16:4 Vanhu vangu vakadzingwa ngavagare newe; kana ari Moabhu, uve kwaari paangavanda pamberi pomuparadzi; nokuti mutambudzi haachipo, kuparadza kwapera, vamanikidzi vabva panyika." 
Isaiah16:5 Chigaro choushe chichamiswa netsitsi; mumwe uchagara pamusoro pacho nechokwadi, mutende raDhavhidhi, achitonga, achitsvaka kururamisira vanhu, achikurumidza kuita zvakarurama.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Takanzwa zvokuzvikudza kwaMoabhu, kuti unozvikudza kwazvo; zvamanyawi ake, nokuzvikudza kwake, nehasha dzake; asi kuzvirumbidza kwake hakuna maturo." 
Isaiah16:7 Saka regai Moabhu achemere Moabhu, munhu wese ngacheme; chemai nokurwadzirwa makeke eKirihareseti, mamanikidzwa kwazvo." 
Isaiah16:8 Nokuti minda yeHeshibhoni yaoma, nomuzambiringa weSibhima; madzishe amarudzi avhuna matavi awo akanaka, akanga achisvikira Jazeri, akanga atandira kurenje; matavi awo akanga atandavara, ayambukira gungwa." 
Isaiah16:9 Saka ndichachema nokuchema kwaJazeri ndichichemera muzambiringa weSibhima; ndichakudiridza iwe Heshibhoni neEreare nemisodzi yangu; nokuti mhere yokurwa yawira pamusoro pezvibereko zvako zvezhizha napamusoro pokukohwa kwako. 
Isaiah16:10 Mufaro wabviswa, nokufara pamunda waibereka zvakanaka; paminda yemizambiringa hapachazovi nokuimba kana izwi romufaro; hapachazovi musviniri anosvinira madzambiringa pazvisviniro; ndagumisa kupururudza." 
Isaiah16:11 Naizvozvo mwoyo wangu unorira sembira pamusoro paMoabhu, nedumbu rangu pamusoro peKiriheresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Zvino kana Moabhu achizviratidza pamberi paJehovha, kana achizvinetsa padunhu rakakwirira, nokupinda panzvimbo yake tsvene kuzonyengetera, haangatongobatsirwi chinhu." 
Isaiah16:13 Ndirori shoko rakataurwa naJehovha pamusoro paMoabhu panguva yakare. 
Isaiah16:14 Asi zvino Jehovha akataura achiti, “Makore matatu asati apfuura, samakore omunhu anobatira mubairo, kukudzwa kwaMoabhu kuchazvidzwa, pamwechete navanhu vake vazhinji; vakasara vachava vashoma kwazvo, vasina simba.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Chirevo pamusoro peDhamasikosi. Tarirai, Dhamasikosi robviswa, rirege kuzova guta, richava dongo rakakoromoka." 
Isaiah17:2 Maguta eAroeri asiyiwa; achava mafuro ezvipfuwo, zvichavatapo pasi, zvisina anozvivhundusa." 
Isaiah17:3 Nhare ichabviswa pana Efuremu, noushe paDhamasikosi; vakasara veSiria vachava sembiri yavana VaIsiraeri, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah17:4 Zvino nezuva iro ukuru hwaJakobho huchaitwa hutende, uye kukora kwenyama yake kuchaonda." 
Isaiah17:5 Zvichafanana nenguva kana mucheki achiunganidza zviyo mumunda, achicheka hura noruoko rwake; zvirokwazvo zvichafanana nokuunganidza hura pamupata weRefaimi." 
Isaiah17:6 Kunyangwe zvakadaro mimwe michero ichasariramo, sezvinoitika kana muorivhi uchizuzwa, zvibereko zviviri kana zvitatu kumuromo wedavi rokumusoro–soro, zvina kana zvishanu pamatavi okunze omuti unobereka kwazvo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah17:7 Nezuva iro vanhu vachatarira Musiki wavo, meso avo achaona Mutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah17:8 Havangatariri atari, iro basa ramaoko avo; zvakaitwa neminwe yavo havangavi nehanya nazvo, kana iri miti yakatsaurwa kana mifananidzo yezuva." 
Isaiah17:9 Nezuva iro maguta avo akasimba achaita samatongo kumatondo napamisoro pamakomo, akasiyiwa nokuda kwavana VaIsiraeri; achava matongo." 
Isaiah17:10 Nokuti wakanganwa Mwari Muponesi wako, hauna kurangarira dombo routiziro hwako. Saka unozvisimira miti inofadza, unoisamo mizambiringa yakabva kumwe." 
Isaiah17:11 Nomusi wokusima kwako, unouvakira ruzhowa, fume mangwana unotumbusa mbeu dzako; asi kucheka kunotiza nezuva rokutambudzika nerokuchema kukuru." 
Isaiah17:12 Haiwa, kutinhira kwavanhu vazhinji, vanotinhira sokutinhira kwegungwa, nokuririma kwamarudzi avanhu anoririma sokuririma kwemvura zhinji!" 
Isaiah17:13 Marudzi acharirima sokuririma kwemvura zhinji; asi uchavatuka, vachatizira kure, vachadzingirirwa sehundi yamakomo pamberi pemhepo, seguruva rinopfungaira pamberi pedutu remhepo." 
Isaiah17:14 Nenguva yamadekwana, tarirai, kuchava nokutyisa; mangwanani kusati kwaedza, havasisipo. Ndiwo mugove wavanotipambara, nomubairo wavanotibira." 
Isaiah18:1 Haiwa, nyika inonzwika mutinhiro wemapapiro, iri mhiri kwenzizi dzeItiopia;" 
Isaiah18:2 inotuma nhume nenzira dzegungwa namagwa enhokwe pamusoro pemvura, ichiti, “Endai, imi nhume dzinokurumidza, kurudzi rwavanhu vakareba vakanaka kumeso, kuvanhu vanotyiwa kwose–kwose, rudzi rune simba, runotsika–tsika pasi, rune nyika inokamurwa nenzizi." 
Isaiah18:3 “Imi mose muri pasi pose, nemi mugere panyika, kana mureza uchisimudzwa pamakomo, tarirai; kana hwamanda ichiridzwa, inzwai!”" 
Isaiah18:4 Nokuti Jehovha akataura kwandiri kudai, “Ndichanyarara, ndichatarira ndiri paugaro hwangu, sokupisa kwezuva pamushana, seguti pakupisa kwenguva yokukohwa.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Nokuti kukohwa kusati kwasvika, kana maruva azuka, ruva rashanduka zambiringa roda kuibva, achagura matavi namapanga; namatavi anotandira achaabvisa nokuatema." 
Isaiah18:6 Ose pamwechete achasiyirwa magora ari pamakomo, nezvikara zvenyika; magora achagara pamusoro pavo chirimo chose, nezvikara zvenyika zvichapedza chando pamusoro pavo." 
Isaiah18:7 Nenguva iyo Jehovha wehondo achavigirwa zvipo norudzi rwavanhu vakareba vakanaka kumeso, vanhu vanotyiwa kwose–kwose, rudzi rune simba, runotsika–tsika pasi, rune nyika inokamurwa nenzizi, kunzvimbo yezita raJehovha wehondo, kugomo reZioni." 
Isaiah19:1 Chirevo pamusoro peIjipiti. Tarirai, Jehovha akatasva gore rinomhanya, oswedera Ijipiti; zvifananidzo zveIjipiti zvichadedera pamberi pake, nomwoyo weIjipiti uchanyauka mukati mawo." 
Isaiah19:2 Ndichamutsa mwoyo yaVaIjipiti vamukire VaIjipiti; mumwe nomumwe acharwa nehama yake, mumwe nomumwe nowakavakirana naye; guta richamukira guta, ushe huchamukira ushe." 
Isaiah19:3 Mweya weIjipiti uchapera mukati mawo; ndichaparadza kufunga kwawo; vachandobvunza zvifananidzo, navanamazango, navauki nen'anga." 
Isaiah19:4 Ndichaisa VaIjipiti muruoko rwamambo ane hasha; mambo ano mwoyo mukukutu achavabata ushe, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe, Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah19:5 Mvura ichapwa mugungwa, rwizi ruchaderera nokuoma." 
Isaiah19:6 Nzizi dzichanhuwa, hova dzeIjipiti dzichava shoma nokupwa; tsanga nenhokwe dzichaoma." 
Isaiah19:7 Mafuro kunhivi dzaNairi, pamhenderekedzo dzaNairi, neminda yose yakadyarwa yaNairi, zvichaoma, zvichatorwa nemhepo, hazvichazovipo." 
Isaiah19:8 Vabati vehove vachachema, vose vanokandira zviredzo maNairi vachaungudza, vanokanda hutava hwavo mumvura vachapera simba." 
Isaiah19:9 Uye vanobata neshinda yakanatswa, navanoruka micheka michena, vachanyadziswa." 
Isaiah19:10 Mbiru dzichaputswa–putswa; vose vanobatira mubairo vachava neshungu pamweya. 
Isaiah19:11 Machinda eZoani mapenzi kwazvo; mano amakota akaisvochenjera aFarao ashanduka upenzi; munoreva seiko kuna Farao, muchiti, “Ndini mwanakomana wavakachenjera, mwanakomana wamadzimambo akare?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Varipiko zvino ivo vanhu vako vakachenjera? Ngavakuudze zvino; ngavazivise zvakafungwa naJehovha wehondo pamusoro peIjipiti. 
Isaiah19:13 Machinda eZoani ava mapenzi, machinda eMemufusi akanyengerwa; vakarasisa Ijipiti nzira, ivo vaiva ibwe rekona ramarudzi avo." 
Isaiah19:14 Jehovha akadira mweya wokuramba mukati mavo; vakarasisa Ijipiti nzira pamabasa avo vose, somunhu akabatwa nedoro anodzedzereka pakurutsa kwake." 
Isaiah19:15 Saka Ijipiti haingazovi nebasa chose, ringaitwa nomusoro kana nomuswe, kana nedavi romuchindwe kana nenhokwe." 
Isaiah19:16 Nezuva iro VaIjipiti vachafanana navakadzi; vachadedera nokutya nokuda kwokusimudzwa kworuoko rwaJehovha wehondo; rwaanosimudza pamusoro pavo. 
Isaiah19:17 Nyika yaJudha ichava chityiso cheIjipiti; mumwe nomumwe anozviudzwa achatya nokuda kwomutemo waJehovha wehondo, waakatema pamusoro pavo." 
Isaiah19:18 Nezuva iro maguta mashanu achavapo panyika yeIjipiti, anotaura rurimi rweKenani, vachipika naJehovha wehondo; mumwe achaidzwa Guta rokuparadzwa." 
Isaiah19:19 Nezuva iro pakati penyika yeIjipiti pachava neatari kuna Jehovha, nembiru pamuganho waro kuna Jehovha." 
Isaiah19:20 Zvichava chiratidzo nechapupu chaJehovha wehondo panyika yeIjipiti; nokuti vachadanidzira kuna Jehovha nemhaka yavamanikidzi, achavatumira muponesi nomurwiri, iye achavaponesa." 
Isaiah19:21 Jehovha achazviratidza kuIjipiti, naVaIjipiti vachaziva Jehovha nezuva iro; zvirokwazvo vachamunamata nezvibairo nezvipo, vachapikira Jehovha mhiko, nokuzviita." 
Isaiah19:22 Jehovha acharova Ijipiti, achirova nokuporesazve; zvino vachadzokera kuna Jehovha, iye achanzwa kunyengetera kwavo achivaporesa." 
Isaiah19:23 Nezuva iro nzira huru ichavapo inobva Ijipiti ichienda Asiria; vaAsiria vachaenda Ijipiti, naVaIjipiti vachaenda Asiria; VaIjipiti vachanamata pamwechete navaAsiria." 
Isaiah19:24 Nezuva iro VaIsiraeri vachava rudzi rwechitatu vachitevera Ijipiti neAsiria, vachava ruropafadzo pakati penyika;" 
Isaiah19:25 nokuti Jehovha wehondo akavaropafadza, achiti, “VaIjipiti, vanhu vangu, navaAsiria, basa ramaoko angu, naVaIsiraeri, nhaka yangu, ngavaropafadzwe.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Negore rokusvika kwaTaritani paAshidhodhi, atumwa naSagoni mambo weAsiria, akarwa neAshidhodhi nokurikunda;" 
Isaiah20:2 nenguva iyo Jehovha akataura naIsaya mwanakomana waAmozi, achiti, “Enda, undosunungura gudza riri pazviuno zvako, ubvise shangu yako parutsoka rwako.” Iye akaita saizvozvo, akafamba asine nguo, asine shangu." 
Isaiah20:3 Zvino Jehovha akati, “Muranda wangu Isaya sezvaakafamba asine nguo asine shangu makore matatu akava chiratidzo nechishamiso pamusoro peIjipiti neItiopia;" 
Isaiah20:4 saizvozvo mambo weAsiria achaenda navatapwa veIjipiti navakadzingwa veItiopia, vaduku navakuru, vasina nguo vasina shangu, vakafukurwa zviuno, chive chinyadzo cheIjipiti." 
Isaiah20:5 Vachavhundutswa nokunyadziswa pamusoro peItiopia, chivimbo chavo, neIjipiti rumbidzo yavo." 
Isaiah20:6 “Vagere panyika iyi iri pamhenderekedzo yegungwa vachati nezuva iro, ‘Tarirai, ndizvo zvaita chivimbo chedu, kwataitizira tichitsvaka kurwirwa kuna mambo weAsiria; ko isu zvino tichapukunyuka sei?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Chirevo pamusoro perenje regungwa. Zvinobva kurenje, kunyika inotyisa, sezvamupupuri zvinopfuura kurutivi rweZasi." 
Isaiah21:2 Ndaratidzwa chiratidzo chinochemedza; munyengeri anoita nokunyengera, nomuparadzi anoparadza. Simuka iwe Erami, komba, iwe Medhia; ndagumisa kugomera kwavo kwose." 
Isaiah21:3 Saka zviuno zvangu zvizere nokurwadziwa; ndabatwa nokurwadziwa, sokurwadziwa kwomukadzi unosununguka; ndakotamiswa, saka handigoni kunzwa; ndavhunduswa, saka handigoni kuona." 
Isaiah21:4 Mwoyo wangu une dzungu, ndavhunduswa nezvinotyisa; rubvunzavaeni rwandaida rwasanduka chinhu chinondidederesa." 
Isaiah21:5 Vanogadzira tafura, vanoisa varindi, vanodya, vanonwa. Simukai, imi machinda, muzodze nhoo." 
Isaiah21:6 Nokuti hezvi zvandaudzwa naShe, “Enda, undoisa murindi; ngaareve zvaanoona;" 
Isaiah21:7 zvino kana achiona boka, navatasvi vamabhiza vakaita vaviri–vaviri, neboka rembongoro, neboka rengamera, ngaateerere zvakanaka–naka.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Iye akadanidzira seshumba, achiti, “Ishe, ndimire nguva dzose masikati pashongwe yokurinda, nousiku hwose ndimire panzvimbo yangu;" 
Isaiah21:9 zvino tarirai, kwouya boka ravanhu, vatasvi vamabhiza vakaita vaviri–vaviri.” Akapindura, akati, “Bhabhironi rawa, rawa; mifananidzo yake yose yakavezwa yavamwari vavo yaputsikirwa pasi.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Haiwa, vanhu vangu vakapurwa, zviyo zveburiro rangu, zvandakanzwa kuna Jehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ndizvo zvandakakuzivisai." 
Isaiah21:11 Chirevo pamusoro peDuma. Mumwe anondidana, ari paSeiri, achiti, “Nhai, murindi, inguva ipi yousiku?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Murindi ndokuti, “Mambakwedza osvika, nousikuwo. Kana muchida kubvunza, bvunzai; dzokai, uyai.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Chirevo pamusoro peArabhia. Musango reArabhia ndimo mamuchavata, imi mapoka avafambi veDhedhani." 
Isaiah21:14 Vigirai ane nyota mvura! Vagere panyika yeTema vakachingamidza vatizi nechingwa chavo. 
Isaiah21:15 Nokuti vakanga vachitiza minondo, minondo yakavhomorwa, nouta hwakakungwa, nokumanikidzwa kwokurwa." 
Isaiah21:16 Nokuti hezvi zvandakaudzwa naJehovha, “Gore risati rapera, samakore omunhu anobatira mubairo, mbiri yose yeKedhari ichapera." 
Isaiah21:17 “Vakasara veboka ravanofura nouta, ivo vanhu vane simba vevana veKedhari, vachava vashoma; nokuti Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, akazvitaura.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Chirevo pamusoro pomupata wezvakaonekwa. Unonzweiko, zvawakwira navanhu vako vose pamatenga edzimba?" 
Isaiah22:2 Haiwa, iwe, uzere nokupururudza, guta rine bope, musha uno mufaro; vakaurayiwa vako havana kuurayiwa nomunondo, havana kufira pakurwa." 
Isaiah22:3 Vabati vako vose vakatiza pamwechete, vakasungwa vasina uta; vose vako, vakawanikwa, vakasungwa pamwechete; vakatizira kure." 
Isaiah22:4 Naizvozvo ndakati, “Regai kunditarira, ndinoda kuchema kwazvo; musaramba muchiedza kundinyaradza pamusoro pokuparadzwa kwomukunda wavanhu vangu.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Nokuti izuva rokuvhundusa, nerokutsikira pasi, nerokukanganisa, zvinobva kuna She, Jehovha wehondo, pamupata wokuratidzwa; rokukoromorwa kwamasvingo, nerokudanidzira kumakomo." 
Isaiah22:6 Erami akabata goba, pamwechete namapoka avanhu navatasvi vamabhiza; Kiri akafudugura nhoo." 
Isaiah22:7 Ipapo mipata yenyu yakaisvonaka yakazara nengoro, navatasvi vamabhiza vakazvigadzirira kurwa pasuwo." 
Isaiah22:8 Vakabvisa chifukidziro chaJudha; nezuva iro mukatarira nhumbi dzokurwa mumba yomudondo. 
Isaiah22:9 Mukaona pakakoromoka paguta raDhavhidhi, kuti pakanga pari pazhinji; mukachingidzira mvura yedziva rezasi;" 
Isaiah22:10 mukaverenga dzimba dzeJerusaremu, mukakoromora dzimba kuti musimbise rusvingo;" 
Isaiah22:11 mukaitawo gungwa pakati pamasvingo maviri rokuchingidzira mvura yedziva rakare. Asi hamuna kutarira iye akazviita, makanga musina hanya naiye akazvifunga kare." 
Isaiah22:12 Zvino nezuva iro Ishe, Jehovha wehondo, akakudanirai kumisodzi, nokukuchema, nokukuveurwa mhanza, nokukufuka makudza;" 
Isaiah22:13 asi tarirai, makava nomufaro nokupembera, nokubayiwa kwemombe, nokushizhwa kwamakwai, nokudyiwa kwenyama nokunwiwa kwewaini, muchiti, “Ngatidye, ngatinwe, nokuti mangwana tinofa.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Asi Jehovha wehondo wakazvizivisa munzeve dzangu, akati, “Zvirokwazvo, hamungakanganwirwi zvakaipa izvi, kusvikira pakufa kwenyu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe, Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah22:15 Zvanzi naShe, Jehovha wehondo, “Enda kumuchengeti uyu wepfuma, kuna Shebhina, unotarira imba yamambo, uti," 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Unobateiko pano? Unaniko pano, zvawazvivezera hwiro pano? Somunhu anozvivezera hwiro pakakwirira, anozvicherera ugaro hwake padombo!’" 
Isaiah22:17 Tarira, Jehovha, achakurasira kure nesimba somurume; zvirokwazvo, achakupeta–peta." 
Isaiah22:18 “Zvirokwazvo achakupomba–pomba, ndokukukandira sehurungudo munyika yakapamhamha; ndipo pauchafira, ndipo pachava nengoro dzembiri yako, iwe munyadzi weimba yatenzi wako." 
Isaiah22:19 Ndichakudzinga pabasa rako, iye uchakukwevera pasi ubve panzvimbo yako." 
Isaiah22:20 “Zvino nezuva iro ndichadana muranda wangu Eriakimi, mwanakomana waHirikia;" 
Isaiah22:21 ndichamufukidza nguo yako, nokumusimbisa nebhandi rako, ndigoisa ushe hwako muruoko rwake; iye achava baba kuna vagere Jerusaremu, nokuimba yaJudha." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndichaisa kiyi yeimba yaDhavhidhi pafudzi rake; iye achazarura, hapana angazarira, iye achazarira, hapana angazarura." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndichamurovera pakasimba sembambo; achava chigaro chinokudzwa paimba yababa vake. 
Isaiah22:24 “Vachaturika paari kukudzwa kwose kwemba yababa vake, matavi namabukira, nemidziyo yose miduku, kubvira pamikombe kusvikira pamakate." 
Isaiah22:25 Nezuva iro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo, mbambo yakanga yaroverwa pakasimba, ichabva; ichatemwa, ndokuwira pasi; nomutoro wakanga wakaturikwa pairi, uchatemwa; nokuti Jehovha akataura izvozvo.”" 
Isaiah23:1 Chirevo pamusoro peTaya. Chemai, imi, zvikepe zveTashishi; nokuti raparadzwa, hapachine imba, kana pangapindwapo; vakaratidzwa izvozvo vari panyika yeSaipurasi." 
Isaiah23:2 Imi mugere pamhenderekedzo yegungwa, nyararai, iyemi maifumiswa navatengesi veSidhoni, vanofamba negungwa." 
Isaiah23:3 Pfuma yaro zvaiva zviyo zveShihori, zvibereko zveNairi, paitengeswa zvose zvamarudzi avanhu." 
Isaiah23:4 Nyara, iwe Sidhoni, nokuti gungwa rataura, nenhare yegungwa, richiti, “Handina kurwadziwa, handina kubereka, handina kurera majaya, kana kukurisa mhandara.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Kana shoko richisvika Ijipiti, vachava neshungu kwazvo pamusoro peshoko reTaya." 
Isaiah23:6 Yambukirai Tashishi; chemai imi mugere pamhenderekedzo yegungwa. 
Isaiah23:7 Gara ndiro guta renyu raifara, raivapo kubva kare nakare, raiiswa kure–kure netsoka dzaro, kundogarako?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ndianiko akafungira Taya izvozvo, iro raipavhurira korona, vatengesi varo vaiva machinda, navashambadziri varo vaiva vanokudzwa panyika?" 
Isaiah23:9 Jehovha wehondo ndiye akazvifunga, kuti amhure kuzvikudza kwezvose zvinokudzwa, nokuzvidza vose vanokudzwa panyika." 
Isaiah23:10 Pararira panyika yako seNairi, iwe mukunda weTashishi; hakuchine bhandi rinokusunga."
