Isaiah23:11 Akatambanudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, akazunungusa ushe; Jehovha akaraira pamusoro peKenani, kuti nhare dzayo dziparadzwe." 
Isaiah23:12 Akati, “Hauchazofari, iwe mukunda weSidhoni, mhandara yakamanikidzwa; simuka, uyambukire Saipurasi; naikoko haungawani zororo.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Tarirai nyika yavaKaradhia; rudzi urwo haruchipo; vaAsiria vakaiita nyika yezvikara zverenje; vakamisa shongwe dzavo, vakawisa dzimba dzoushe dzaivamo; vakaiita dongo." 
Isaiah23:14 Chemai, imi zvikepe zveTashishi; nokuti nhare yenyu yaparadzwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Zvino nenguva iyo Taya richakanganikwa makore makumi manomwe, zvakaenzana namakore amambo mumwechete; kana makore makumi manomwe apera, Taya richaitirwa sezvinoimbwa parwiyo rwechifeve, runoti," 
Isaiah23:16 “Iwe chifeve, wakanganikwa, tora mbira upote neguta; ridza zvakanaka, imba nziyo dzakanaka, kuti urangarirwe.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Zvino kana makore makumi manomwe apera, Jehovha achashanyira Taya, ipapo richadzokera kumubairo waro, ndokufeva noushe hwose hwenyika huri pasi pose." 
Isaiah23:18 Zvarakashambadzira, nomubairo waro, zvichava zvitsvene kuna Jehovha; hazvingachengetwi kana kuvigwa; nokuti zvarakashambadzira zvichava zvavanogara pamberi paJehovha, kuti vagute kwazvo, vafuke nguo dzakanaka." 
Isaiah24:1 Tarirai, Jehovha anobvisa zvose panyika nokuiparadza, nokuitsindikira, nokuparadzira vagere mairi." 
Isaiah24:2 Vanhu vachaitirwa zvinoitirwa mupristi, muranda zvinoitirwa tenzi wake, mushandiri zvinoitirwa vahosi vake, mutengi zvinoitirwa mutengesi, anopa chikwereti zvinoitirwa anokwereta, anoripa mhindu zvinoitirwa anoreva mhindu." 
Isaiah24:3 Nyika ichabvisirwa zvose zvayo, ichaparadzwa chose; nokuti Jehovha akataura shoko iro." 
Isaiah24:4 Nyika inochema nokuoma, pasi pose panopera simba nokuoma, vanhu vakakudzwa venyika vanopera simba." 
Isaiah24:5 Nyika yakasvibiswawo navagere mairi; nokuti vakadarika mirairo, vakakanganisa mitemo, nokuputsa sungano isingaperi." 
Isaiah24:6 Saka kutuka kwaMwari kwapedza nyika, navageremo vava nemhosva; saka vagere munyika vapiswa, vangosara vanhu vashoma." 
Isaiah24:7 Waini itsva inochema, muzambiringa wapera simba, vose vano mwoyo unofara vanogomera." 
Isaiah24:8 Kufara kwengoma kwonyarara, izwi ravanofara ropera, mufaro wembira wopera." 
Isaiah24:9 Havanganwi waini vachiimba; zvinodhaka zvichavava kuna vanozvinwa. 
Isaiah24:10 Guta, rava dongo, rakoromorwa; dzimba dzose dzakapfigwa, kuti kurege kuva nomunhu angapindamo." 
Isaiah24:11 Kuchema kunonzwika panzira dzomumusha nokuda kwewaini; mufaro wose wasviba, kufara kwenyika kwaenda." 
Isaiah24:12 Muguta masara mangova dongo, suwo raputswa nokuparadzwa." 
Isaiah24:13 Nokuti ndizvo zvazvichaita panyika pakati pamarudzi avanhu, zvichafanana nokuzuzwa kwomuorivhi, nezvakasara kana mazambiringa yakohwiwa." 
Isaiah24:14 Ivo vachadanidzira, vachapururudza; nokuda kwoumambo hwaJehovha vanodanidzira vari pagungwa." 
Isaiah24:15 Saka rumbidzai Jehovha kumabvazuva, iro zita raJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, pazvitsuwa zvegungwa." 
Isaiah24:16 Takanzwa nziyo dzichiimbwa kumigumo yenyika, dzichiti, “Vakarurama ngavakudzwe!” Asi ini ndakati, “Ndinoonda, ndinoonda, ndine nhamo! Vanyengeri vakaita nokunyengera; zvirokwazvo, vanyengeri vakaita nokunyengera kukuru.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Kutya, negomba, nomusungo zvichakuwira, iwe ugere panyika." 
Isaiah24:18 Zvino, anotiza bope rokutyisa, achawira mugomba; anokwira achibva mukati megomba, achabatwa nomusungo; nokuti mahwindo okumusoro azaruka, nenheyo dzenyika dzinodedera." 
Isaiah24:19 Nyika yaputswa–putswa chose, nyika yodedera chose, nyika yozununguswa chose." 
Isaiah24:20 Nyika ichadzedzereka somunhu akabatwa, ichadengenyeka sedumba; kudarika kwayo kuchairemedza kwazvo, ichawa, ikasasimukazve." 
Isaiah24:21 Zvino nezuva iro Jehovha acharova hondo yavakakudzwa vari kumusoro, namadzimambo enyika panyika." 
Isaiah24:22 Vachaunganidzwa pamwechete, sezvinounganidzwa vasungwa mugomba, vachapfigirwa mutorongo; zvino kana mazuva mazhinji apfuura vachashanyirwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Ipapo mwedzi uchanyadziswa, nezuva richanyara; nokuti Jehovha wehondo achabata ushe pagomo reZioni, napaJerusaremu; pamberi pavakuru vake pachava nokukudzwa." 
Isaiah25:1 Jehovha, ndimi Mwari wangu! Ndicharumbidza zita renyu; nokuti makaita zvinoshamisa, izvo zvamakafunga kare nokutendeka nezvokwadi." 
Isaiah25:2 Nokuti guta makariita dutu ramabwe, guta rakakombwa norusvingo makariita dongo, imba huru yavatorwa rirege kuva guta; haringatongovakwi." 
Isaiah25:3 Naizvozvo rudzi rukuru ruchakukudzai; guta ramarudzi avanhu vanotyisa richakutyai. 
Isaiah25:4 Nokuti imi maiva nhare yavarombo, nhare younoshaiwa pakutambudzika kwake, utiziro panguva yemvura zhinji, mumvuri pakupisa kwezuva, kana mhepo yavanotyisa ichiita semvura zhinji." 
Isaiah25:5 Muchaderedza bope ravatorwa, sezvinoita kupisa kwezuva panzvimbo yakaoma; rwiyo rwavanotyisa ruchaderedzwa, sezvinoitwa kupisa nomumvuri wegore." 
Isaiah25:6 Pagomo iri Jehovha wehondo achagadzirira marudzi ose avanhu mutambo wezvakakora, mutambo wewaini yakagara pamasese, wezvakakora zvizere nomongo, wewaini yakagara pamasese yakasvinwa zvakanaka." 
Isaiah25:7 Pagomo iri uchaparadza chifukidziro chinofukidzira vanhu vose, neketani rakatasanurwa pamusoro pamarudzi ose." 
Isaiah25:8 Akaparadza rufu nokusingaperi, Ishe Jehovha achapukuta misodzi pazviso zvose; achabvisa kuzvidzwa kwavanhu vake panyika yose; nokuti Jehovha akataura izvozvo." 
Isaiah25:9 Nezuva iro vachati, “Tarirai, uyu ndiye Mwari wedu; takanga takamumirira, iye achatiponesa; uye ndiye Jehovha, takanga takamumirira, tichafara, nokufarira ruponeso rwake.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Nokuti ruoko rwaJehovha ruchagara pagomo iri; Moabhu vachatsikwa pasi panzvimbo yavo, sezvinotsikwa mashanga mumvura iri mugomba romupfudze." 
Isaiah25:11 Achatambanudza maoko ake imomo, somunhu anotambanudza maoko ake kana achishambira; asi Jehovha achaderedza kuzvikudza kwake pamwechete nenjere dzamaoko ake." 
Isaiah25:12 Nhare yakakwirira yamasvingo enyu, wakaiwisira pasi, wakaideredza, wakaiputsira muvhu, imo muguruva." 
Isaiah26:1 Nezuva iro rwiyo urwu ruchaimbwa panyika yavaJudha: “Tine guta rakasimba; iye achaisapo masvingo nenhare ruve ruponeso. 
Isaiah26:2 Zarurai masuwo, kuti rudzi rwakarurama, runochengeta chokwadi, rupinde." 
Isaiah26:3 “Ano mwoyo wakasimba muchamuchengeta murugare rukuru, nokuti anovimba nemi." 
Isaiah26:4 Vimbai naJehovha nokusingaperi, iye Jehovha ndiye dombo nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah26:5 Nokuti akaderedza vagere pakakwirira, iro guta riri kumusoro; anorideredza, anorideredza kusvikira pavhu; anoriputsira pasi muguruva." 
Isaiah26:6 Richatsikwa netsoka, idzo tsoka dzavarombo, nokutsika kwavanoshaiwa.”" 
Isaiah26:7 Nzira yavakarurama yakarurama; imi munoruramisa nzira yavakarurama. 
Isaiah26:8 Zvirokwazvo, takakumirirai Jehovha, panzira yokutonga kwenyu; mweya yedu inoshuva zita renyu nechirangaridzo chenyu." 
Isaiah26:9 Ndakakushuvai nomweya wangu usiku; zvirokwazvo, ndichakutsvakai zvikuru nomweya wangu uri mukati mangu; nokuti kana kutonga kwenyu kuri panyika, vanhu vagere munyika vanodzidza zvakarurama." 
Isaiah26:10 Akaipa kunyangwe achinzwirwa tsitsi, haangadzidzi zvakarurama; achaita hake zvisakarurama panyika yakarurama, haangaoni umambo hwaJehovha." 
Isaiah26:11 Jehovha, ruoko rwenyu rwakasimudzwa, asi ivo havaoni; asi vachaona kushingaira kwenyu pamusoro pavanhu, vakanyadziswa; zvirokwazvo moto uchapedza vavengi venyu." 
Isaiah26:12 Jehovha, imi muchatigadzirira rugare; nokuti makatibatirawo mabasa edu ose." 
Isaiah26:13 Jehovha Mwari wedu, mamwe madzishe kunze kwenyu akanga akatibata; asi ticharumbidza zita renyu tichibatsirwa nemi moga." 
Isaiah26:14 Vakafa havangararamizve, vaparara, havazomukizve; saka makasvika kwavari, mukavaparadza, nokugumisa kurangarirwa kwavo kwose." 
Isaiah26:15 Mawanza rudzi, Jehovha, mawanza rudzi; makurumbira, makurisa miganhu yose yenyika." 
Isaiah26:16 Jehovha, vakakutsvakai panguva yokutambudzika; vakadurura munyengetero muchivaranga." 
Isaiah26:17 Mukadzi ane pamuviri, asvika pedyo pakusununguka, sezvaanorwadziwa achichema pakurwadziwa kwake, ndizvo zvatakanga takaita pamberi penyu, Jehovha." 
Isaiah26:18 Isu takanga tava nepamuviri, takanga tiri pakurwadziwa, takabereka zvinenge mhepo bedzi; hatina kuvigira nyika sununguro, uye vangagara panyika havana kuzvarwa." 
Isaiah26:19 Vakafa venyu vachararama, zvitunha zvavo zvichamuka. Mukai, muimbe, imi mugere muguruva; nokuti dova renyu rakaita sedova rechiedza; nyika ichabudisa vakafa." 
Isaiah26:20 Uyai vanhu vangu, pindai muimba yenyu yomukati, mupfige mikova yenyu shure kwenyu; muvande nguva duku, kusvikira kutsamwa kwapfuura." 
Isaiah26:21 Nokuti tarira, Jehovha anobuda panzvimbo yake kurova vagere panyika nokuda kwezvivi zvavo; nyikawo ichafukura ropa rayo, ikasazofukidzazve vakaurayiwa vayo." 
Isaiah27:1 Nezuva iro Jehovha acharova nomunondo wake mukukutu, mukuru, noune simba, reviatani, iyo nyoka inokurumidza, iyo, nyoka yakagonyana; achauraya chikara chiri mugungwa." 
Isaiah27:2 Nezuva iro vachaimba vachiti, “Munda wemizambiringa, chiumbira!" 
Isaiah27:3 Ini Jehovha ndini muchengeti wawo; ndichaudiridza nguva imwe neimwe; ndichauchengeta masikati nousiku, kuti urege kutadziwa nomunhu." 
Isaiah27:4 Ini handina hasha; dai rukato neminzwa zvairwa neni! Ndaizvivamba, ndaizvipisa pamwechete." 
Isaiah27:5 Kana asingadaro, ngaabate simba rangu, ayanane neni, ngaayanane neni.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Namazuva anouya Jakobho achamera midzi; Isiraeri achatunga maruva nokutumbuka; vachazadza nyika yose nezvibereko. 
Isaiah27:7 Ko akavarova iye sezvaakarova avo vakavarova here? Ko vakaurayiwa nokuurayiwa kwaivo vakaurayiwa navo here? 
Isaiah27:8 Pakuvadzinga kwenyu makarwa navo nechiyero chakafanira; wakavabvisa nemhepo yake ine simba nezuva remhepo yokumabvazuva. 
Isaiah27:9 Saka nenzira iyi zvakaipa zvaJakobho zvichadzikinurwa; izvi ndizvo zvibereko zvose zvokubviswa kwezvivi zvake, kana achiita mabwe ose eatari ave samabwe omunyaka akaputswa–putswa, kuti miti yakatsaurwa nemifananidzo yezuva zvirege kuzomiswa." 
Isaiah27:10 Nokuti guta, rakakombwa norusvingo, rasiyiwa riri roga, hwava hugaro hwasiyiwa riri dongo, serenje; ndipo pachava namafuro emhuru, ndipo paichavata pasi, ichidya mashizha apo." 
Isaiah27:11 Kana matavi apo aoma, achavhunwa; vakadzi vachauya vachiapisa; nokuti vanhu ava havana njere; saka akavaita haangavi netsitsi navo, akavaumba haangavi norudo navo." 
Isaiah27:12 Zvino nezuva iro Jehovha achapura zviyo kubvira pamvura yoRwizi kusvikira parukova rweIjipiti; imi muchaunganidzwa, muchiita mumwe–mumwe, imi vana VaIsiraeri." 
Isaiah27:13 Zvino nezuva iro hwamanda huru icharidzwa; vakanga voparara panyika yeAsiria, navakanga vadzingirwa kunyika yeIjipiti, vachauya; vachanamata Jehovha pagomo dzvene paJerusaremu." 
Isaiah28:1 Korona, inozvikudza, yavakabatwa vokwaEfuremu, ine nhamo, uye ruva, rinooma, rokunaka kwake kukuru, riri pamusoro womupata wakaworera wavakakundwa newaini." 
Isaiah28:2 Tarirai, Ishe ano mumwe ane simba anokurira; achawisira pasi noruoko rwake sedutu guru rine chimvuramabwe, sedutu rinoparadza, sokunaya kwemvura zhinji inokukura kwose." 
Isaiah28:3 Korona inozvikudza yavakabatwa vokwaEfuremu ichatsikwa pasi netsoka; 
Isaiah28:4 ruva, rinooma, rokunaka kwake kukuru, riri pamusoro womupata wakaworera richava sewonde rinotanga kuibva zhizha richigere kusvika; rinoti richatarirwa noariona, ndokuridya richiri muruoko rwake." 
Isaiah28:5 Nezuva iro Jehovha wehondo achava korona inobwinya noukomba hwakaisvonaka kuna vakasara vavanhu vake; 
Isaiah28:6 nomweya wokururamisa kune agere pakutonga, nesimba kuna vanodzosera vanorwa pasuwo." 
Isaiah28:7 Asi naivo vanodzungunyika newaini, vanodzedzereka nezvinodhaka; mupristi nomuporofita vanodzungunyika nezvinodhaka, vakamwedzwa newaini, vanodzedzereka nezvinodhaka; vanokanganiswa pakuona, vanogumburwa pakutonga." 
Isaiah28:8 Nokuti matafura avo azere namarutsi anosemesa, hapana pakanaka." 
Isaiah28:9 “Ndianiko waachadzidzisa ruzivo? Ndianiko waachadzidzisa kunzwisisa shoko? Ivo vakarumurwa pamukaka, vakabviswa pazamu here?" 
Isaiah28:10 Nokuti zvinongoti chirevo pamusoro pechirevo, chirevo pamusoro pechirevo, murairo pamusoro pomurairo, murairo pamusoro pomurairo, apa zvishoma, napapo zvishoma.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Zvirokwazvo achataura norudzi urwu navanhu vane miromo yorumwe rudzi, norurimi rwokumwe;" 
Isaiah28:12 akati kwavari, “Zororo riri pano, zorodzai vakaneta; pano ndipo panokutonhorera;” asi vakaramba kuteerera." 
Isaiah28:13 Saka shoko raJehovha richava kwavari, chirevo pamusoro pechirevo, chirevo pamusoro pechirevo, murairo pamusoro pomurairo, murairo pamusoro pomurairo, apa zvishoma, napapo zvishoma; kuti vaende, vawe nenhenda shure, vavhunike, vabatwe nomusungo, vatapwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Naizvozvo inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi vadadi, vanobata noushe vanhu ava vari paJerusaremu," 
Isaiah28:15 Imi zvamakati, “Takaita sungano norufu, takatenderana neSheori, kana shamhu, inokukura, ichipfuura, haingasviki kwatiri, nokuti nhema takadziita utiziro hwedu, takandovanda pasi pokunyengetera;”" 
Isaiah28:16 naizvozvo Ishe Jehovha anoti, “Tarirai, ndinoisa paZioni ibwe rive nheyo, riri ibwe rakaedzwa, rinokosha rekona kuita nheyo yakasimba; anotenda haakurumidzi." 
Isaiah28:17 Ruenzaniso ndicharwuita setambo yokuyeresa nayo, kururama kuri setambo yokuvakisa; chimvuramabwe chichakukura utiziro hwenhema, mvura ichafukidza nzvimbo yokuvanda.”" 
Isaiah28:18 Sungano yenyu yamakaita norufu ichadzimwa, nokutenderana kwenyu neSheori hakungamiri; kana shamhu, inokukura, ichipfuura, muchatsikwa pasi nayo." 
Isaiah28:19 Nguva imwe neimwe kana ichipfuura, ichakutorai; nokuti masikati nousiku, mangwanani namangwanani, ichapfuura; kuchanotyisa bedzi kunzwisisa mharidzo yakadaro." 
Isaiah28:20 Nokuti mubhedha uchava mupfupi, munhu haangagoni kutandavara pamusoro pawo, nejira richava duku, munhu haangagoni kuzvifukidza naro." 
Isaiah28:21 Nokuti Jehovha achasimuka sezvaakaita pagomo rePerazimi, achatsamwa sezvaakaita pamupata weGibheoni; kuti abate basa rake, iro basa rake rinoshamisa, nokuita izvo zvaanoita, zvinoshamisa." 
Isaiah28:22 Naizvozvo regai kuva vadadi, kuti zvisungo zvenyu zvirege kusimbiswa; nokuti ndakanzwa kuna Ishe Jehovha wehondo kuti nyika yose yakatemerwa kuparadzwa." 
Isaiah28:23 Rerekai nzeve dzenyu, munzwe izwi rangu; teererai, munzwe kutaura kwangu." 
Isaiah28:24 Ko murimi, anoda kudyara, unoswera achirima here? Anoswera achiparura munda nokuputsa mavhinga here?" 
Isaiah28:25 Kana achinge aenzanisa ivhu rawo, haakushi kumini nhema here, nokudyara kumini, nokuisa zviyo mumisara, nebhari pandima dzakatarwa, nesipereti kunhivi dzawo here?" 
Isaiah28:26 Nokuti Mwari wake anomuzivisa zvakanaka nokumudzidzisa. 
Isaiah28:27 Nokuti kumini nhema haipurwi nomupuro unopinza, negumbo rengoro harikunguruswi pamusoro pekumini; asi kumini nhema inopurwa netsvimbo, nekumini neshamhu." 
Isaiah28:28 Zviyo zvechingwa zvinokuyiwa, haangarambi achizvipura; kunyangwe gumbo rengoro yake namabhiza ake zvichizviparadzira, haangazvikuyi." 
Isaiah28:29 Naizvozvi zvinobva kuna Jehovha wehondo, anoshamisa nezvaanofunga, mukuru kwazvo pakubata kwake." 
Isaiah29:1 Arieri, Arieri, une nhamo, iwe guta maidzika Dhavhidhi matende ake! Wedzerai gore pagore, nguva dzemitambo ngadzisvike;" 
Isaiah29:2 ipapo ndichamanikidza Arieri, kuchema nokuungudza zvichavapo; richava kwandiri seArieri." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndichakukomba panhivi dzose, ndichakukomba navarwi vanorindira, ndichavaka masvingo okurwa newe." 
Isaiah29:4 Uchawiswa pasi, uchataura uri pasi muvhu; kutaura kwako kuchabva pasi muguruva; izwi rako richava seresvikiro rinobva pasi muvhu, kutaura kwako kuchaita zevezeve kuchibva muguruva." 
Isaiah29:5 Asi vavengi vako vazhinji vachava seguruva rakatsetseka, navanotyisa sehundi inopepereka; zvirokwazvo zvichaitwa kamwe–kamwe, pakarepo." 
Isaiah29:6 Uchashanyirwa naJehovha wehondo nokutinhira, nokudengenyeka kwenyika, nomubvumo mukuru, nechamupupuri, nedutu guru, nomurazvo womoto unopedza zvose." 
Isaiah29:7 Kuwanda kwamarudzi ose anorwa neArieri, ivo vose vanorwa naro nenhare yaro, vachaita sezvinorotwa, sezvinoonekwa usiku." 
Isaiah29:8 Zvichafanana nokurota kwomunhu ane nzara, achiti ndinodya; asi anopepuka, ndokuwana mweya wake usine chinhu; kana sokurota kwomunhu ane nyota, achiti ndinonwa; asi anopepuka, wanei aziya, mweya wake unopanga mvura; ndizvo zvichaita kuwanda kwamarudzi ose anorwa negomo reZioni." 
Isaiah29:9 Mirai mushame! Zvipofamadzei, muve mapofu! Vakabatwa, asi havana kubatwa newaini, vanodzedzereka, asi havadzedzereki nezvinodhaka." 
Isaiah29:10 Nokuti Jehovha akadurura pamusoro penyu mweya wokubatwa nehope kwazvo, akafumbira meso enyu, vaporofita; nemisoro yenyu, vaoni, wakavafukidza." 
Isaiah29:11 Kuona kwose kwava kwamuri samashoko orugwaro rwakanamirwa, runopiwa munhu anogona kurava, zvichinzi, “Dorava hako izvozvi;” iye ndokuti, “Handigoni, nokuti rwakanamirwa;”" 
Isaiah29:12 zvino rugwaro runopiwa asina kudzidza, zvichinzi, “Dorava hako izvozvi;” iye ndokuti, “Handina kudzidza.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Ishe akati, “Ava vanhu zvavanoswedera kwandiri, vachindikudza nomuromo wavo uye nemiromo yavo, asi mwoyo yavo vakaiisa kure neni, nokunditya kwavo zvawava murairo wavanhu wavakadzidziswa;" 
Isaiah29:14 naizvozvo tarirai, ndichapfuura ndichiita pakati pavanhu ava basa rinoshamisa, basa rinoshamisa nechishamiso; uchenjeri hwavakachenjera vavo huchapera, nenjere dzavanhu vavo vakangwara dzichavanzwa.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Vane nhamo vanotsvaka kuvanzira Jehovha mano avo pakadzika, mabasa avo ari murima, vachiti, “Ndiani anotiona, ndiani anotiziva?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Haiwa, kutadza kwenyu! Ko muumbi wehari akaenzana nevhu here, kuti chakaitwa chiti pamusoro pomuiti wacho, “Iye haana kundiita”; kana chakaumbwa chiti pamusoro pomuumbi wacho, “Iye haana njere?”" 
Isaiah29:17 Ko hakuna kusara chinguva chidukuduku here, Rebhanoni richashandurwa rive munda unobereka zvakanaka, nomunda unobereka zvakanaka uchanzi idondo?" 
Isaiah29:18 Zvino nezuva iro vamatsi vachanzwa mashoko orugwaro, meso amapofu achaona ari pakasviba napane rima." 
Isaiah29:19 Vanyoro vachawedzerawo mufaro wavo muna Jehovha, varombo pakati pavanhu vachafara kwazvo muMutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah29:20 Nokuti anotyisa aparadzwa, mudadi aguma, navose vanogarira zvakaipa vabviswa;" 
Isaiah29:21 ivo vanopomera munhu mhaka nokuda kweshoko, vanoteyira munhu musungo, anoraira vamwe pasuwo, vanoramba kururamisira wakarurama nemhaka dzamano–mano." 
Isaiah29:22 Saka zvanzi naJehovha, akadzikunura Abhurahamu, pamusoro peimba yaJakobho, Jakobho haanganyadziswi zvino, chiso chake zvino hachingacheneruki." 
Isaiah29:23 Asi kana achiona vana vake, iro basa ramaoko angu, pakati pake, vachati zita rangu idzvene; zvirokwazvo, vachati Mutsvene waJakobho mutsvene, vachatya Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah29:24 Vakarasika pamweyawo vachava nenjere, vanonyunyuta vachadzidziswa." 
Isaiah30:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Vane nhamo vana vanondimukira, vanofunga mano vasingandibvunzi, vanoita sungano zvisingabvi paMweya wangu, kuti vawedzere zvivi nezvivi;" 
Isaiah30:2 vanozvirongedza kuenda Ijipiti, vasina kundibvunza, kuti vazvisimbise nesimba raFarao, nokuvanda mumumvuri weIjipiti." 
Isaiah30:3 Naizvozvo simba raFarao richakunyadzisai, kuvanda kwenyu mumumvuri waFarao kuchava kukanganisa kwenyu." 
Isaiah30:4 Nokuti machinda avo ari paZoani, nhume dzake dzakasvika Hanesi." 
Isaiah30:5 “Vose vachanyadziswa pamusoro porudzi rwavanhu vasingagoni kuvapfumisa, vasingavabatsiri kana kuvapfumisa, asi kuvanyadzisa nokuvashovodza.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Chirevo pamusoro pezvikara zvenyika yezasi. “Panyika yokutambudzika neyokuchema, kunobva shumba hadzi negonho, nenyoka, nenyoka yomoto inobhururuka, ndipo pavanotakudza pfuma yavo pamusoro pamafudzi avana vembongoro, nezvinokosha zvavo panyundwa dzengamera, vachizviisa kuvanhu vasingavapfumisi." 
Isaiah30:7 Nokuti Ijipiti inobatsira pasina, zvisina maturo; saka ndakaitumidza zita rokuti, ‘Rahabhi anongogara zvake.’ ”" 
Isaiah30:8 Zvino chienda, uzvinyore pamberi pavo pahwendefa rebwe, uzvinyore mubhuku, zvivepo panguva inouya nokusingaperi–peri." 
Isaiah30:9 Nokuti ava rudzi runondimukira, vana vane nhema, vana vasingadi kunzwa murairo waJehovha;" 
Isaiah30:10 vanoti kuvaoni, “Musaona”; nokuvaporofita. Musatiporofitera zvinhu zvakarurama, tiudzei zvinofadza, tiporofitere zvinonyengera;" 
Isaiah30:11 ibvai panzira, tsaukai pagwara, bvisai Mutsvene waIsiraeri pamberi pedu." 
Isaiah30:12 Naizvozvo zvanzi noMutsvene waIsiraeri, “Zvamunozvidza shoko iri, muchivimba nokumanikidzwa nokunyengera, muchizvitenda izvo;" 
Isaiah30:13 naizvozvo kuipa uku kuchava kwamuri sapakakoromoka panoda kuwa, panotseyama parusvingo rwakareba, panowa kamwe–kamwe pakarepo." 
Isaiah30:14 Uchaiputsa sezvinoputswa mudziyo womuumbi, uchaiputsa–putsa asine nyasha, kusvikira pachishaikwa pakati pezvimedu zvayo chaenga chokundogoka moto nacho pachoto, kana kutekesa mvura nacho patsime.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, “Pakudzoka nokuzorora ndipo pano ruponeso rwenyu, pakunyarara napakutenda ndipo pachava nesimba renyu;” asi makaramba," 
Isaiah30:16 mukati, “Kwete, tichatiza takatasva mabhiza;” saka muchatiza zvenyu; uyezve, “Tichatasva mabhiza anomhanyisa;” saka vanodzingana nemi vachamhanyisa." 
Isaiah30:17 Vane chiuru vachatiza kana vachivambwa nomumwe; muchatiza kana muchivambwa navashanu; kusvikira masiyiwa sedanda pamusoro pegomo, somureza pamusoro pechikomo." 
Isaiah30:18 Naizvozvo Jehovha achambomira, kuti akunzwirei tsitsi; naizvozvo achakudzwa, kuti ave nenyasha nemi, nokuti Jehovha ndiMwari wokururamisira; vakaropafadzwa vose vanomumirira." 
Isaiah30:19 Nokuti vanhu vachagara paZioni paJerusaremu; hamungazochemi, zvirokwazvo achakunzwirai tsitsi, kana achinzwa kuchema kwenyu; kana achinzwa, achakupindurai." 
Isaiah30:20 Kunyangwe Ishe akakupai chingwa chenhamo nemvura yokutambudzika, kunyangwe zvakadaro vadzidzisi venyu havangavandi, asi meso enyu achaona vadzidzisi venyu;" 
Isaiah30:21 nzeve dzenyu dzichanzwa shoko shure kwenyu, richiti, “Heyi nzira, fambai nayo!” Kana muchida kutsaukira kurudyi, kana zvimwe muchida kutsaukira kuruboshwe." 
Isaiah30:22 Muchashatisa sirivha yakafukidza mifananidzo yenyu yakavezwa, nendarama yakanamirwa pamifananidzo yenyu yakaumbwa; uchairashira kure sechinhu chakashata; uchati kwachiri, “Ibva pano.”" 
Isaiah30:23 Achakupa mvura yokumeresa mbeu yako, yauchadyara muvhu; nezvokudya, zvinoberekwa nevhu, zvichava zvakakora zvizhinji. Nezuva iro mombe dzenyu dzichafura pamafuro makuru;" 
Isaiah30:24 nzombe navana vembongoro, zvinorima minda, zvichadya zvokudya zvakarungwa; zvakarutswa nemitsvairo nemisero." 
Isaiah30:25 Pamusoro pegomo rimwe nerimwe rakakwirira, pachava nenzizi nehova dzemvura, nezuva rokuurayiwa kukuru kana shongwe dzichiwa." 
Isaiah30:26 Uyezve, chiedza chomwedzi chichafanana nechiedza chezuva, chiedza chezuva chichawedzerwa kanomwe; sechiedza chamazuva manomwe, nezuva iro kana Jehovha achisunga pakakuvara pavanhu vake, nokuporesa vanga ravakarohwa." 
Isaiah30:27 Tarirai, zita raJehovha rinobva kure, richipisa nokutsamwa kwake, richibudisa utsi uzhinji; miromo yake izere nehasha, rurimi rwake rwakafanana nomoto unopedza zvose;" 
Isaiah30:28 mweya wake wakaita sorwizi runodira kunze, runosvikira pamutsipa, kuti asere marudzi avanhu nomusero wokuparadza; matomu anotsausa achava mumiromo yavanhu." 
Isaiah30:29 Muchaimba rwiyo, sezvinoitwa usiku kana mutambo mutsvene uchitambwa; muchava nokufara kwomwoyo, wakafanana nowomunhu anoenda achiridza nyere kugomo raJehovha, kudombo raIsiraeri." 
Isaiah30:30 Jehovha achanzwisa izwi rake roumambo, acharatidza kuburuka kworuoko rwake, nokutsamwa kwake kukuru, nomurazvo womoto unopedza zvose, nechamupupuri, nokunaya kukuru kwemvura, nechimvuramabwe." 
Isaiah30:31 Nokuti muAsiria achakanganiswa nezwi raJehovha; achamurova neshamhu. 
Isaiah30:32 Kurova kwose kwetsvimbo yakatumwa, yaacharohwa nayo naJehovha, kuchaitwa nokurira kwengoma nembira; acharwa navo nokurwa kuchazunungusa." 
Isaiah30:33 Nokuti Tofeti rakagara ragadzirwa; zvirokwazvo rakagadzirirwa mambo; wakaridzikisa nokurikurisa; dutu riripo moto nehuni zhinji; mweya waJehovha, wakafanana norwizi rwesariferi, uchazvipfutidza." 
Isaiah31:1 Vane nhamo vanoburukira Ijipiti kundotsvaka kubatsirwa, vanotenda mabhiza, vanovimba nengoro dzokurwa nokuti izhinji, uye navatasvi vamabhiza nokuti vane simba kwazvo, asi havatariri kuno Mutsvene waIsiraeri, kana kutsvaka Jehovha." 
Isaiah31:2 Kunyangwe zvakadaro naiye akachenjera, achauyisa nhamo, haangadzosi mashoko ake, asi achamukira imba yavanoita zvakaipa, navanobatsirana navanoita zvakaipa." 
Isaiah31:3 Zvino VaIjipiti vanhu, havazi Mwari, namabhiza avo inyama, haazi mweya; zvino kana Jehovha achitambanudza ruoko rwake, anobatsira achagumburwa noanobatsirwa achawira pasi, vose vachapera pamwechete." 
Isaiah31:4 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha kwandiri, “Zvakaita seshumba nomwana weshumba zvinoombera chayabata; kunyangwe vafudzi vazhinji vakakokerwa kuzorwa nayo, haingavhunduswi namazwi avo, haingavi nehanya nokupopota kwavo; saizvozvo Jehovha wehondo achaburukira pamusoro pegomo reZioni napamusoro pechikomo charo kuzorwa navo." 
Isaiah31:5 Seshiri dzinodzengerera, saizvozvo Jehovha achatavirira Jerusaremu; acharitavirira nokurirwira, acharidarika nokurisunungura.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Dzokerai kuna iye wamakamukira zvikuru, imi vana VaIsiraeri." 
Isaiah31:7 Nokuti nezuva iro mumwe nomumwe ucharasha zvifananidzo zvake zvesirivha nezvifananidzo zvake zvendarama, zvamakazviitira namaoko enyu, zvikava zvivi kwamuri." 
Isaiah31:8 Ipapo muAsiria achawa nomunondo usati uri womunhu; munondo usati uri wavanhu uchamudya; achatiza pamberi pomunondo, namajaya ake achabatirwa chibharo." 
Isaiah31:9 “Dombo rake richatiza nokutya, machinda ake achavhunduswa nomureza,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, anomoto wake paZioni, nechoto chake paJerusaremu." 
Isaiah32:1 Tarirai, mambo achabata ushe nokururama, machinda achabata achiruramisira." 
Isaiah32:2 Munhu mumwe nomumwe achava soutiziro pamhepo, sechivando pakunaya kukuru kwemvura, senzizi dzemvura panzvimbo yakaoma, somumvuri wedombo guru panyika yafa nenyota." 
Isaiah32:3 Meso avanoona haangatsinzini, nzeve dzavanonzwa dzichateerera." 
Isaiah32:4 Mwoyo yavanotaura vasingarangariri zvakanaka ichanzwisisa ruzivo, marimi avanokakamira achaziva kutaura zvakanaka." 
Isaiah32:5 Benzi harichazonzi munhu akakudzwa, munyengeri haanganzi mukomboreri." 
Isaiah32:6 Nokuti benzi rinotaura zvohupenzi, mwoyo waro unoita zvakaipa, zvaanoita zvinomhura Mwari, nokureva zvingarasha vanhu pamusoro paJehovha, zvaanorega kugutisa mweya wavane nzara, nokushaisa vane nyota chinonwiwa." 
Isaiah32:7 Mitoo yomunyengeri yakaipa; anofunga mano akaipa, kuti aparadze vanyoro namashoko enhema, kunyangwe anoshaiwa achitaura zvakanaka." 
Isaiah32:8 Asi akarurama anofunga zvinhu zvakarurama; anorambira panzira yezvakarurama. 
Isaiah32:9 Simukai, imi vakadzi vagere zvakanaka, munzwe izwi rangu; imi vakunda vasina hanya, teererai kutaura kwangu." 
Isaiah32:10 Nokuti kana kwapfuura gore namazuva, muchatambudzika, imi vasina hanya; nokuti kukohwiwa kwamazambiringa kuchakona, nguva yokuunganidza haingasviki." 
Isaiah32:11 Dederai, imi vakadzi vagere zvakanaka; tambudzikai, imi vasina hanya; zvifukurei, mubvise nguo dzenyu, muzvisunge zviuno namakudza." 
Isaiah32:12 Vachazvirova zvipfuva nokuda kweminda yaifadza, nomuzambiringa waibereka zvakanaka." 
Isaiah32:13 Panyika yavanhu vangu pachamera minzwa norukato; zvirokwazvo, pamusoro pedzimba dzose dzomufaro muguta romufaro." 
Isaiah32:14 Nokuti imba yamambo ichasiyiwa, guta rina vanhu vazhinji richaita dongo; chikomo nenhare zvichashanduka mapako nokusingaperi, panofara mbizi, namafuro ezvipfuwo;" 
Isaiah32:15 kusvikira mweya uchidururwa pamusoro pedu uchibva kumusoro, renje rikaita munda unobereka zvakanaka, nomunda unobereka zvakanaka uchinzi idondo." 
Isaiah32:16 Ipapo kururamisira kuchagara murenje, kururama kuchagara mumunda unobereka zvakanaka." 
Isaiah32:17 Basa rokururama richava rugare, zvibereko zvokururama zvichava kunyarara nokutenda nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah32:18 Vanhu vangu vachagara paugaro vane rugare, napadzimba dzakasimba, napanzvimbo dzokuzorora dzakadzikama." 
Isaiah32:19 Asi chimvuramabwe chichavapo kana dondo richiwa, neguta richaparadzwa chose." 
Isaiah32:20 Makaropafadzwa imi munokusha pose pane mvura, munosundira makumbo enzombe neembongoro." 
Isaiah33:1 Une nhamo, iwe unoparadza, asina kuparadzwa umene; iwe unoita nokunyengera, asi havana kukuitira nokunyengera, iwe! Kana wapedza kuparadza, newewo uchaparadzwa, kana wapedza kuita nokunyengera, vachakuitira nokunyengera newewo." 
Isaiah33:2 Jehovha mutinzwire tsitsi, takakumirirai; ivai ruoko rwedu mangwanani ose, noruponeso rwedu panguva yokutambudzika." 
Isaiah33:3 Marudzi avanhu akatiza achinzwa mubvumo, marudzi akaparadzirwa imi muchisimuka." 
Isaiah33:4 Zvakapambwa zvenyu zvichaparadzwa, sezvinoparadza gwatakwata; somumhanyire wemhashu, saizvozvo vanhu vachamhanyira kwazviri." 
Isaiah33:5 Jehovha akakudzwa, nokuti anogara kumusoro; akazadza Zioni nokururamisira nokururama." 
Isaiah33:6 Panguva dzako pachava nokugarika, nokuwanda kwokuponeswa, nouchenjeri nezivo; kutya Jehovha ndiyo pfuma yake." 
Isaiah33:7 Tarirai, mhare dzavo dzinodanidzira dziri kunze; nhume dzorugare dzinochema zvikuru." 
Isaiah33:8 Migwagwa mikuru yaparadzwa, vafambi havachipo; aputsa sungano, azvidza maguta, haane hanya nomunhu." 
Isaiah33:9 Nyika inochema, yaziya; Rebhanoni ranyadziswa, rooma; Sharoni rafanana nerenje; Bhashani neKarimeri azuka mashizha." 
Isaiah33:10 “Zvino ndichasimuka, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; zvino ndichazvisimudza, zvino ndichakudzwa." 
Isaiah33:11 “Imi muchava napamuviri pehundi, muchabereka mashanga; mweya wenyu moto uchakupedzai." 
Isaiah33:12 Marudzi avanhu achaita sokupiswa kwesuko, seminzwa yakatemwa, inopiswa nomoto." 
Isaiah33:13 “Inzwai, imi muri kure, zvandakaita; imi muri pedyo, muzive simba rangu.”" 
Isaiah33:14 Vatadzi vari paZioni vanotya, vasingadi Mwari, vabatwa nokudedera. “Ndianiko pakati pedu angagara nomoto unoparadza? Ndiani pakati pedu angagara nokupisa kusingaperi?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Ndiye anofamba nokururama, anotaura zvakarurama; iye anoshora pfuma yakawanikwa nokunyengera, anozuza maoko ake achiramba fufuro, anodzivira nzeve dzake, kuti arege kunzwa mashoko eropa, anotsinzina meso ake kuti arege kutarira zvakaipa;" 
Isaiah33:16 iye achagara pakakwirira, nhare dzamatombo dzichava utiziro hwake; zvokudya zvake achazvipiwa, mvura yake haingapwi." 
Isaiah33:17 Meso ako achaona mambo pakunaka kwake, achaona nyika yakakura kwazvo." 
Isaiah33:18 Mwoyo wako ucharangarira nguva yokutya, uchiti, “Aripiko iye aiverenga, aripiko aiyera mutero? Aripiko aiverenga shongwe?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Haungazooni vanhu vane hasha, vanhu vanorurimi runoshamisa, rwausingagoni kunzwa, rurimi rwokumwe rwausingagoni kunzwisisa." 
Isaiah33:20 Tarirai Zioni, iro guta remitambo yedu; meso ako achaona Jerusaremu hwava ugaro hwakadzikama, tende risingazovhomorwi, nebote raro rimwe risingazodamburwi." 
Isaiah33:21 Asi Jehovha achavapo nesu noumambo hwake, ichava nzvimbo ine nzizi nehova dzakafara, magwa anokwasviwa haangasvikipo, nezvikepe zvikuru hazvingapfuuripo." 
Isaiah33:22 Nokuti Jehovha ndiye mutongi wedu, Jehovha ndiye mutemi wemirairo yedu, Jehovha ndiye mambo wedu; iye achatiponesa." 
Isaiah33:23 Mabote ako akati dembu–tembu; haagoni kusimbisa muromo wapasi wedanda rechikepe chavo, haagoni kutasanura seiri; ipapo zvakatapwa nezvakapambwa zvizhinji zvinogoverwa; zvirema zvinotora zvakatapwa." 
Isaiah33:24 Hakuna ageremo, achati, “Ndinorwara; vanhu vageremo vachakanganwirwa zvakaipa zvavo.”" 
Isaiah34:1 Swederai, imi marudzi avanhu, munzwe, teererai imi vanhu; nyika ngainzwe, nezvose zvayo, pasi pose, nezvose zvinobudamo." 
Isaiah34:2 Nokuti Jehovha akatsamwira marudzi ose, ane hasha nehondo dzawo dzose; akavaparadza chose, akavaisa pakuurayiwa." 
Isaiah34:3 Vakaurayiwa vavo vacharaswa kunze, kunhuwa kwezvitunha zvavo kuchakwira, makomo achanyauswa neropa ravo." 
Isaiah34:4 Hondo dzose dzokudenga dzichanyakatika, denga rose richapetwa sorugwaro rwakapetwa; hondo dzaro dzose dzichaoma, sokuoma kwamashizha pamuzambiringa, uye seshizha rinooma pamuonde." 
Isaiah34:5 Nokuti munondo wangu wanwa ukaguta kudenga; tarirai uchaburukira pamusoro paEdhomu, napamusoro pavanhu vakatukwa neni, kuti vatongwe." 
Isaiah34:6 Munondo waJehovha uzere neropa, unobwinya namafuta, neropa ramakwayana nerembudzana, namafuta etsvo dzamakondohwe; nokuti Jehovha ane chibayiro chake paBhozira, nokubaya kukuru panyika yaEdhomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Nyati dzichawa pamwechete navo, nenzombe pamwechete nehandira; nyika yavo ichabatwa neropa, guruva ravo richazara namafuta." 
Isaiah34:8 Nokuti Jehovha ane zuva rokutsiva, negore rokutsiva zvakaitirwa Zioni." 
Isaiah34:9 Hova dzayo dzichashanduka namo, guruva rayo sariferi, nyika yayo ichaitwa namo inopfuta." 
Isaiah34:10 Haingadzimwi usiku namasikati; utsi hwayo huchakwira nokusingaperi; richava dongo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi; hakuna munhu angapfuura noko nokusingaperi. 
Isaiah34:11 Asi zvichava zvehukurwizi nenungu; zizi negunguo zvichagaramo; achatambanudzirapo tambo yokuparadza nechokururamisa chezvisina chinhu. 
Isaiah34:12 Vakuru vayo vachadanirwa kuushe, asi havangavipo; machinda ayo ose achava pasina." 
Isaiah34:13 Minzwa ichamera mudzimba dzamadzimambo ayo, hutumbambeva norukato munhare dzayo; huchava hugaro hwamakava, nenzvimbo yemhou." 
Isaiah34:14 Zvikara zvomusango zvichasangana namapere, mweya wakaipa uchadana shamwari yawo; zvirokwazvo, chikara chousiku chichagarapo norugare, chichiwanapo nzvimbo yokuzorora." 
Isaiah34:15 Rovambira ichaita dendere rayopo, nokukandira, nokuchechenya mazai ayo, nokuunganidza vana vayo mumumvuri wayo; zvirokwazvo, ndipo pachaunganira vhuvhangu, rumwe norumwe neshamwari yarwo." 
Isaiah34:16 Tsvakai mubhuku yaJehovha, murave; hapana chimwe chezvinhu izvi chichashaikwa, chichashaiwa shamwari yacho; nokuti muromo wangu wakarayira izvozvo, nomweya wake wakazviunganidza." 
Isaiah34:17 Iye wakazvikandira mijenya, ruoko rwake rwakazviganhurira nyika netambo; ichava yazvo nokusingaperi, vachagaramo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Isaiah35:1 Renje nenyika yakaoma zvichafara; sango richafara kwazvo, richatumbuka seruva." 
Isaiah35:2 Richatumbuka zhizhinji, nokufara kwazvo nomufaro nokuimba; richapiwa kunaka kukuru kweRebhanoni, noukomba hweKarimeri neSharoni; vachaona kunaka kukuru kwaJehovha, ihwo ukomba hwaMwari wedu." 
Isaiah35:3 Simbisai maoko asine simba, mutsigire mabvi anodedera." 
Isaiah35:4 Iti kuna vane mwoyo inotya, “Simbai, musatya! Tarirai, Mwari wenyu achauya nokutsiva, nokuripira kwaMwari; achauya achikuponesai.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Ipapo meso amapofu achasvinudzwa, nenzeve dzematsi dzichadziurwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Ipapo anokamhina achakwakuka senondo, rurimi rwembeveve ruchaimba; nokuti mvura zhinji ichadzutuka murenje, nehova dzemvura musango." 
Isaiah35:7 Jecha, rinopisa, richashanduka dziva, nevhu, rine nyota, zvitubu zvemvura; paugaro hwamakava, paaivata, pachava nouswa, netsanga nenhokwe." 
Isaiah35:8 Ipapo pachava nomugwagwa, nenzira, ichanzi, “Nzira youtsvene;” ine tsvina haangafambi nayo, asi ichava yavo; vanofamba nayo, kunyangwe ari mapenzi, havangarashiki." 
Isaiah35:9 Hapangavi neshumba, kunyangwe nechikara hachingafambipo; hazvingawanikwipo, asi vakadzikinurwa ndivo vachafambapo;" 
Isaiah35:10 vakasunungurwa vaJehovha vachadzoka, vachasvika Zioni vachiimba; mufaro usingaperi uchava pamisoro yavo; vachawana mufaro nomwoyo muchena, kuchema nokusuwa kuchatiza." 
Isaiah36:1 Zvino negore regumi namana ramambo Hezekiya, Sanheribhu mambo weAsiria, akandorwa namaguta ose aJudha akakombwa namasvingo, akaakunda." 
Isaiah36:2 Zvino mambo weAsiria akatuma mukuru wavatariri abve Rakishi aende Jerusaremu kuna mambo Hezekiya nehondo huru. Akamira pamugero wedziva rokumusoro pamugwagwa unoenda kumunda womusuki. 
Isaiah36:3 Ipapo Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikia, waichengeta imba yamambo, naShebhina munyori naJoa mwanakomana waAsafi, gurukota guru, vakabudira kwaari." 
Isaiah36:4 Mukuru wavatariri akati kwavari, “Zvino imi muti kuna Hezekiya, ‘Zvanzi namambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria, kuvimba uku kwaunovimba nako ndokwei?’" 
Isaiah36:5 Ini ndinoti, mano ako nesimba rokurwa naro mashoko zvawo asina maturo; zvino unovimba naniko, zvawandimukira ini?" 
Isaiah36:6 “Tarira, unovimba nomudonzvo worutsanga urwu rwakavhunika, Ijipiti, runoti kana munhu akasendama kwamuri, ruchapinda muruoko rwake, rukamubaya; ndizvo zvakaita Farao mambo weIjipiti kuna vose vanovimba naye." 
Isaiah36:7 “Asi kana ukati kwandiri, ‘Tinovimba naJehovha Mwari wedu,’ ko haazi iye akabvisirwa matunhu akakwirira namaatari ake naHezekiya, akati kuna Judha neJerusaremu, ‘Munofanira kunamata pamberi peatari iri here?’" 
Isaiah36:8 Naizvozvo zvino chipikiranai henyu natenzi wangu, mambo weAsiria, ndikupe mabhiza ane zviuru zviviri, kana iwe ukagona kuisa vatasvi pamusoro pawo." 
Isaiah36:9 Ungagona seiko kukunda mukuru mumwe kuvaduku vavaranda vatenzi wangu? Zvino wovimba neIjipiti kuti upiwe ngoro namabhiza navo? 
Isaiah36:10 Ini ndauya kuzorwa nenyika ino kuti ndiiparadze ndisina Jehovha kanhi? Ndiye Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Enda undorwa nenyika iyo, uiparadze.’ ”" 
Isaiah36:11 Ipapo Eriakimu, mwanakomana waHirikia, naShebhina, naJoa vakati kumukuru wavatariri, “Tinokumbira kuti mutaure henyu navaranda venyu norurimi rweChiAramia, nokuti tinochinzwisisa; murege henyu kutaura nesu norurimi rwavaJudha, vanhu vose vari parusvingo vazvinzwe.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Asi mukuru wavatariri akati kwaari, “Tenzi wangu akandituma kuna tenzi wako nokwauri here, kuti nditaure mashoko awa? Haana kundituma here kuvanhu vagere pamusoro porusvingo, kuti vadye tsvina yavo nemvura yavo pamwechete nemi?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Ipapo mukuru wavatariri akamira, akadanidzira nezwi guru norurimi rwavaJudha, akataura akati, “Inzwai mashoko amambo mukuru, iye mambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah36:14 Zvanzi namambo Hezekiya, ‘Ngaarege kukunyengerai; nokuti haangagoni kukurwirai;" 
Isaiah36:15 Hezekiya ngaarege kukuvimbisai naJehovha,’ achiti, ‘Jehovha achatirwira zvirokwazvo; guta iri haringapiwi mumaoko amambo weAsiria.’ ”" 
Isaiah36:16 Musateerera Hezekiya, nokuti zvanzi namambo weAsiria, “Yananai neni, mubudire kwandiri; mudye mumwe nomumwe muwonde wake, mumwe nomumwe mvura yetsime rake;" 
Isaiah36:17 kusvikira ini ndauya ndikutorei, ndikuisei kunyika yakafanana neyenyu, nyika ine zviyo newaini, nyika ine chingwa neminda yemizambiringa." 
Isaiah36:18 Chenjerai kuti Hezekiya arege kukugombedzerai, achiti, ‘Jehovha achatirwira. Ko mumwe wavamwari vamarudzi akagona kurwira nyika yake paruoko rwamambo weAsiria here?" 
Isaiah36:19 Vamwari veHamati neAripadhi varipi? Vamwari veSefarivaimi varipi? Vakarwira Samaria paruoko rwangu here? 
Isaiah36:20 Ndavapi pakati pavamwari vose venyika idzi vakarwira nyika yavo paruoko rwangu, zvamunoti Jehovha acharwira Jerusaremu paruoko rwangu?’ ”" 
Isaiah36:21 Asi vakaramba vanyerere, havana kumupindura shoko rimwe, nokuti murairo wamambo wakanga uchiti, “Regai kumupindura.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Zvino Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikia, aichengeta imba, naShebhina munyori, naJoa mwanakomana waAsafi, gurukota guru, vakaenda kuna Hezekiya, vakabvarura nguo dzavo, vakamuudza mashoko omukuru wavatariri." 
Isaiah37:1 Zvino mambo Hezekiya akati achizvinzwa, akabvarura nguo dzake, akafuka makudza, akapinda mumba maJehovha." 
Isaiah37:2 Akatuma Eriakimu aichengeta imba, naShebhina munyori, navakuru vavapristi, vakafuka makudza, kumuporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi." 
Isaiah37:3 Vakati kwaari, “Zvanzi naHezekiya, ‘Nhasi izuva rokutambudzika, nerokutukwa, nerokuzvidzwa; nokuti vana vakasvika pakuzvarwa, asi hakuna simba rokuzvara naro." 
Isaiah37:4 Zvimwe Mwari wenyu achanzwa mashoko ose omukuru wavatariri, akatumwa namambo weAsiria tenzi wake, kuzvidza Mwari mupenyu, agovatuka pamusoro pamashoko aakanzwa iye Jehovha Mwari wenyu; naizvozvo nyengetererai vakasara.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:5 Naizvozvo varanda vamambo Hezekiya vakasvika kuna Isaya. 
Isaiah37:6 Isaya akati kwavari, “Udzai tenzi wenyu, muti, zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Usatya hako mashoko awanzwa, andakamhurwa nawo navaranda vamambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah37:7 Tarira, ndichaisa mweya wokutya mukati make, achanzwa guhu, ndokudzokera kunyika yake; ndichamuurayisa nomunondo munyika yake.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Naizvozvo mukuru wavatariri akadzoka, akawana mambo weAsiria achirwa neRibhina, nokuti akanga anzwa kuti wabva Rakishi." 
Isaiah37:9 Zvino akanzwa pamusoro paTirihaka mambo weItiopia, zvichinzi, “Auya kuzorwa newe.” Zvino akati azvinzwa, akatuma nhume kuna Hezekiya, achiti," 
Isaiah37:10 “Endai mundoudza Hezekiya mambo waJudha, muti, ‘Mwari wako, waunovimba naye, ngaarege kukunyengera,’ achiti, ‘Jerusaremu haringapiwi muruoko rwamambo weAsiria.’" 
Isaiah37:11 Tarira, wakanzwa zvakaitirwa nyika dzose namadzimambo eAsiria, kuti vakadziparadza chose; zvino iwe ucharwirwa here?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ko vamwari vamamwe marudzi vakavarwira here, iwo akaparadzwa namadzibaba angu, vanoti, Gozani, naHarani, naRezefu, navana vaEdheni, vaiva paTerasari?" 
Isaiah37:13 “Mambo weHamati aripiko, namambo weAripadhi, namambo weguta reSafarivaimi, neHena, neIvha?”" 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekiya akagamuchira tsamba pamaoko enhume, akairava; Hezekiya akakwira kumba kwaJehovha, akaipetenura pamberi paJehovha." 
Isaiah37:15 Ipapo Hezekiya akanyengetera kuna Jehovha, achiti," 
Isaiah37:16 “Haiwa Jehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, iye ugere pamusoro pamakerubhimi! Ndimi Mwari, imi moga, woushe hwose hwenyika, ndimi makaita kudenga napasi." 
Isaiah37:17 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu, Jehovha, munzwe; svinudzai meso enyu, Jehovha, muone; inzwai mashoko ose aSenakeribhu, akatuma nhume kuzozvidza Mwari mupenyu." 
Isaiah37:18 Zvirokwazvo, Jehovha, madzimambo eAsiria akaparadza marudzi ose nenyika dzawo," 
Isaiah37:19 akakandira vamwari vavo mumoto; nokuti vakanga vasi vamwari, asi rakanga riri basa ramaoko avanhu, ari matanda namabwe; naizvozvo akavaparadza." 
Isaiah37:20 Naizvozvo zvino, Jehovha, Mwari wedu, tiponesei paruoko rwake, kuti ushe hwose hwenyika huzive kuti ndimi Jehovha, iyemi moga.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Ipapo Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi, akatuma shoko kuna Hezekiya, akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Zvawanyengetera kwandiri pamusoro paSenakeribhu mambo weAsiria,’" 
Isaiah37:22 heri shoko rakataurwa naJehovha, pamusoro pake, ‘Mhandara, mukunda weZioni, wakakushora nokukuseka; mukunda weJerusaremu wakakudzungudzira musoro wake.’" 
Isaiah37:23 Ndianiko wawakatuka nokuzvidza? Wakazvikudza kuna aniko nenzwi rako, meso ako akatarira aniko kudenga? NdiMutsvene waIsiraeri!" 
Isaiah37:24 “Watuka Jehovha navaranda vako, ukati, ‘Ndakwira kumakomo marefu nengoro dzangu zhinji, kunzvimbo dzomukati dzeRebhanoni; ndichatema misidhari mirefu iripo, nemipani yakatsaurwa iripo, ndichipa kusvikira kumusoro–soro kwaro, kudondo raro rinobereka zvakanaka;" 
Isaiah37:25 ndakachera ndikanwa mvura, ndichapwisa nzizi dzose dzeIjipiti nokutsika netsoka dzangu.’" 
Isaiah37:26 “Hauna kunzwa here kuti ndakazviita kare, kuti ndakazvirayira nenguva dzokutanga–tanga? Zvino ndakarayira zviitike, kuti iwe uve muparadzi wamaguta akakombwa namasvingo, ave matongo." 
Isaiah37:27 “Naizvozvo vakanga vageremo vakanga vane simba duku, vakavhundutswa nokunyadziswa; vakafanana nouswa hwebundo, nomuriwo mutema, nouswa huri pamusoro peimba, nomunda wezviyo zvigere kukura." 
Isaiah37:28 “Asi ndinoziva kugara kwako pasi, nokubuda kwako, nokupinda kwako, uye hasha dzako kwandiri." 
Isaiah37:29 Nokuda kwehasha dzako kwandiri, uye nokuti ndakanzwa, kuzvikudza kwako, ndichaisa rwauro rwangu mumhino dzako, netomu rangu mumiromo yako, ndikudzosere nenzira yawakauya nayo." 
Isaiah37:30 “Ichi ndicho chichava chiratidzo kwauri: nhaka muchadya zvinongomera zvoga, negore rechipiri muchadya zvinomerazve kwazviri; asi negore rechitatu munofanira kudyara, nokucheka, nokusima minda yemizambiringa, mudye michero yayo." 
Isaiah37:31 Zvino vakasara vakapukunyuka veimba yaJudha, vachaitazve midzi pasi, nokubereka michero kumusoro." 
Isaiah37:32 Nokuti vakasara vachabuda Jerusaremu, navakapukunyuka pagomo reZioni; kushingaira kwaJehovha kuchazviita." 
Isaiah37:33 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pamambo weAsiria, ‘Haangapindi muguta rino, kana kupotsera museve imomo, kana kusvika pamberi paro nenhoo, kana kututira gomo revhu kwariri.’" 
Isaiah37:34 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Nenzira yaakauya nayo, achadzokerazve nayo; haangapindi muguta rino." 
Isaiah37:35 Nokuti ndichadzivirira guta rino, ndiriponese nokuda kwangu ini, uye nokuda kwomuranda wangu Dhavhidhi.’" 
Isaiah37:36 “Zvino mutumwa waJehovha akabuda, akauraya vanhu vane zviuru zvine zana namakumi masere nezvishanu pamisasa yavaAsiria; zvino vanhu vakati vachimuka mangwanani, vakawana zvava zvitunha zvose." 
Isaiah37:37 Naizvozvo Sanakeribhu mambo weAsiria akabva, akaenda, akadzokera kwakare, akandogara Ninivha." 
Isaiah37:38 Zvino akati achinamata mumba maNisiroki, mwari wake, Adhiramereki naSharezeri vanakomana vake, vakamuuraya nomunondo, ivo vakatizira kunyika yeArarati. Esahadhoni akamutevera paushe.”" 
Isaiah38:1 Zvino namazuva iwayo Hezekiya akarwara, akasvikira pakufa. Muporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi akasvika kwaari, akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Chirayira nhaka yako, nokuti uchafa, haungararami.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:2 Ipapo Hezekiya akatendeukira kumadziro, akanyengetera kuna Jehovha," 
Isaiah38:3 akati, “Dorangarirai henyu, Jehovha, kuti ndakafamba pamberi penyu nechokwadi nomwoyo wose, ndikaita zvakanaka pamberi penyu.” Hezekiya akachema kwazvo." 
Isaiah38:4 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Isaya, richiti," 
Isaiah38:5 “Enda undoti kuna Hezekiya, zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wababa vako Dhavhidhi, ‘Ndanzwa kunyengetera kwako, ndaona misodzi yako; tarira, ndichawedzera pamazuva ako makore ane gumi namashanu." 
Isaiah38:6 Ndichakurwira iwe neguta rino paruoko rwamambo weAsiria; uye ndichadzivirira guta rino.’ 
Isaiah38:7 “Hechi chiratidzo chaJehovha kwauri, kuti Jehovha achaita chinhu ichi chaakataura." 
Isaiah38:8 Tarira, ndichadzosa mumvuri pamitaro, wakanga wakadzira nezuva pachikati chaAhazi, udzoke mitaro ine gumi.” Naizvozvo zuva rakadzoka mitaro ine gumi pachikati chaAhazi, pawakanga wadzikira." 
Isaiah38:9 Horwu runyoro rwaHezekiya mambo waJudha, panguva yaakanga arwara, akaporazve pakurwara kwake." 
Isaiah38:10 Ndakati, ndichapinda pamusuwo eSheori achiri masikati pamazuva angu; Ndatorerwa makore angu akanga asara." 
Isaiah38:11 Ndakati, handichazooni Jehovha, iye Jehovha, panyika yavapenyu; Handichazooni vanhu pamwechete navagere panyika." 
Isaiah38:12 Ugaro hwangu hwaputswa, hwabviswa kwandiri setende romufudzi; Ndapeta upenyu hwangu, somuruki, uchandigura pachirukiso; Muchandigumisa kubvira mangwanani kusvikira madekwana." 
Isaiah38:13 Ndakachema kusvikira kwaedza; unovhuna mapfupa angu ose seshumba; Muchandigumisa kubvira mangwanani kusvikira madekwana. 
Isaiah38:14 Ndakarira senyenganyenga kana kondo; Ndakachema senjiva; meso angu akapera nokutarira kumusoro; Haiwa Jehovha, ndakamanikidzwa, ivai mumiriri wangu imi." 
Isaiah38:15 Ndingatiiko? Ndiye akataura neni, ndiye akazviita; Ndichanatsa kufamba makore angu ose, nokuda kwokurwadziwa kwomwoyo wangu." 
Isaiah38:16 Ishe, vanhu vanorarama nezvinhu izvozvi; Upenyu hwose hwomweya wangu huri mazviri; Naizvozvo ndiporesei, mundiraramise." 
Isaiah38:17 Tarirai, kutambudzika kwangu kukuru kwakazondivigira rugare; Asi makarwira mweya wangu norudo pagomba rokuparadzwa; Nokuti makarasira zvivi zvangu zvose shure kwenyu." 
Isaiah38:18 Nokuti Sheori harigoni kukuvongai, rufu harugoni kukurumbidzai; Vanoburukira kugomba havangagoni kutarira zvokwadi yenyu." 
Isaiah38:19 Mupenyu, mupenyu, ndiye uchakuwongai, sezvandinoita nhasi; baba vachazivisa vana vavo zvokwadi yenyu." 
Isaiah38:20 Jehovha akazvigadzira kundiponesa; Naizvozvo tichaimba nziyo dzangu nemitengeranwa Mazuva ose oupenyu hwedu mumba maJehovha. 
Isaiah38:21 Zvino Isaya akanga ati, “Ngavatore bundu, ramawonde varinamire pamota, ipapo achapora.”" 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiyawo akanga ati, “Chiratidzo ndechipi kuti ndichakwira kuimba yaJehovha?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Zvino nenguva iyo Merodhakibharadhani mwanakomana waBharadhani, mambo weBhabhironi, akatuma tsamba nechipo kuna Hezekiya; nokuti akanga anzwa kuti airwara akaporazve." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiya akafara pamusoro pavo, akavaratidza imba yakanga ine zvinokosha zvake, sirivha, nendarama, nezvinonhuwira, namafuta anokosha, neimba yaiva nenhumbi dzake dzose dzokurwa nadzo, nezvose zvakanga zviri papfuma yake; kwakanga kusisina chinhu mumba make, kana muushe hwake hwose, chavasina kuratidzwa naHezekiya." 
Isaiah39:3 Zvino muporofita Isaya akasvika kuna mambo Hezekiya, akati kwaari, “Varume ava vakati kudiniko? Vakasvika kwauri vachibvepi?” Hezekiya akati, “Vakanga vabva kunyika iri kure, Bhabhironi vachiuya kwandiri.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Ipapo akati, “Vakaonei mumba mako?” Hezekiya akapindura, akati, “Vakaona zvose zviri mumba mangu; hakuna chinhu pakati pepfuma yangu chandisina kuvaratidza.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Ipapo Isaya akati kuna Hezekiya, “Inzwa shoko raJehovha wehondo," 
Isaiah39:6 ‘Tarira, mazuva achasvika, nenguva iyo zvose zviri mumba mako, nezvose zvakaunganidzwa namadzibaba ako kusvikira zuva ranhasi, zvichaiswa Bhabhironi; hakuna chinhu chichasiyiwa,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah39:7 Vamwe vanakomana vako, vachabva kwauri, vauchabereka, vachatapwa; vachava varanda mumba mamambo weBhabhironi.”" 
Isaiah39:8 Ipapo Hezekiya akati kuna Isaya, “Shoko raJehovha ramataura rakanaka haro.” Akatiwo, “Nokuti rugare nezvokwadi zvichavapo pamazuva angu.”" 
Isaiah40:1 “Nyaradzai, nyaradzai vanhu vangu,” ndizvo zvinoreva Mwari wenyu." 
Isaiah40:2 “Taurirai zvingavaraidza Jerusaremu, danidzirai kwavari kuti kurwa kwavo kwapera, kuti zvakaipa zvavo zvakanganwirwa, kuti vapiwa noruoko rwaJehovha kurohwa kwakaringana pamusoro pezvivi zvavo.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Izwi rounodanidzira, achiti, “Gadzirai murenje nzira yaJehovha, ruramisirai Mwari wedu mugwagwa musango." 
Isaiah40:4 “Mipata yose ichazadzwa, makomo ose nezvikomo zvose zvichaderedzwa; pana makoronga pachaenzaniswa; Pasakaenzana pachaitwa bani;" 
Isaiah40:5 kubwinya kwaJehovha kucharatidzwa, vanhu vose vachazviona pamwechete nokuti muromo waJehovha akataura izvozvo.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Izwi roanoti, “Danidzirai!” Mumwe akati, “Ndichadanidzireiko?” Vanhu vose uswa, kunaka kwazvo kwose kwakaita seruva rokusango." 
Isaiah40:7 Uswa hunowoma, ruva rinosvava, nokuti mweya waJehovha unofuridza pamusoro pazvo; zvirokwazvo vanhu uswa." 
Isaiah40:8 Huswa hunooma, ruva rinosvava; asi shoko raMwari wedu richagara nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah40:9 Nhai, iwe, unoparidzira Zioni mashoko akanaka, kwira pagomo refu; nhai, iwe, unoparidzira Jerusaremu mashoko akanaka, danidzira nesimba, danidzira, usatya; uti kumaguta aJudha, “Tarirai, Mwari wenyu!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Tarirai, Ishe Jehovha achauya somunhu ane simba, ruoko rwake ruchamubatira ushe; tarirai, mubairo wake anawo, zvaanoripirwa zviri pamberi pake." 
Isaiah40:11 Achafudza boka rake somufudzi, achaunganidza makwayana ake mumaoko ake, nokuatakura pachipfuva chake, achanatsokutungamirira nhunzvi dzinomwisa." 
Isaiah40:12 Ndianiko akayera mvura zhinji muchanza choruoko rwake, nokuyera denga napanosvika minwe, nokuenzanisa guruva rapasi nechiyero, nokuyera kurema kwamakomo nechiedzo, nezvikomo nechiyero?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ndianiko wakayera Mweya waJehovha, kana akamudzidzisa achimurayira namano?" 
Isaiah40:14 Akarangana nani, ndiyani akamurayira nokumudzidzisa nzira yokururamisira, nokumudzidzisa zivo, nokumuratidza nzira yenjere here?" 
Isaiah40:15 Tarirai, marudzi avanhu akaita sedonwe remvura muchirongo, anenge guruva shomanene pachiyero; tarirai, anosimudza zvivi sechinhu chiduku–duku." 
Isaiah40:16 Rebhanoni harine huni dzingaringana kuvesera, kunyangwe mhuka dzaro hadziringani kuitwa zvipiriso zvingapiswa." 
Isaiah40:17 Marudzi ose akaita pamberi pake sapasine chinhu; pakufunga kwake akaita saasipo, chinhu chisina maturo." 
Isaiah40:18 Zvino mungafananidza Mwari naniko? Kana mungamuenzanisa nomufananidzo upiko? 
Isaiah40:19 Kana uri mufananidzo, muwumbi wakaumba, mupfuri wendarama anounamira nendarama, ndokuupfurira ngetani dzesirivha." 
Isaiah40:20 Murombo anoshaiwa chipo chakadaro, anosanangura muti asingawori; anozvitsvaka mhizha yakachenjera ingamuvezera mufananidzo usingazununguki." 
Isaiah40:21 Hamuna kuziva here? Hamuna kunzwa here? Hamuna kuzviudzwa kubva pakutanga here? Hamuna kunzwisisa kubva pakuteyiwa kwenyika here? 
Isaiah40:22 Ndiye agere kumusoro kwenyika yakaurungana, vanhu vagerepo vakaita semhashu; ndiye anotatamura denga somucheka, nokuriwaridza setende kuti agaremo;" 
Isaiah40:23 ndiye anoderedza machinda kusvikira oita saasipo, vatongi venyika anovaita sechinhu chisina maturo." 
Isaiah40:24 Zvirokwazvo, havana kusimwa, zvirokwazvo, havana kudyarwa, zvirokwazvo, hunde yavo haina kubata pasi; zvino wofuridza pamusoro pavo, vooma, nechamupupuri chinovabvisa sehundi." 
Isaiah40:25 Ko zvino mungandifananidza nani, kuti ndienzane naye? Ndizvo zvinotaura Mutsvene." 
Isaiah40:26 Tarirai kumusoro nameso enyu, muone kuti ndiani akasika izvozvi, anobudisa hondo yazvo yakawanda; iye anozvidana zvose namazita azvo; nokuda kwoukuru hwesimba rake, uye zvaari mukuru pakusimba kwake, hakuna chimwe chinoshaikwa." 
Isaiah40:27 Unorevereiko, iwe Jakobho, unotaurireiko iwe Isiraeri, uchiti, “Nzira yangu haizikanwi naJehovha, Mwari wangu anondidarika asingandiruramisiri?" 
Isaiah40:28 Hauna kuziva here? Hauna kunzwa here? Mwari asingaperi, Jehovha, Musiki wamativi ose enyika, haaziyi, haaneti; njere dzake hadzingazikanwi.”" 
Isaiah40:29 Vanoziya anovapa simba; anoshaiwa simba anomuwedzera simba rake. 
Isaiah40:30 Kunyangwe navakomana vachaziya nokuneta, namajaya achawira pasi chose;" 
Isaiah40:31 asi vanomirira Jehovha vachawana simba idzva; vachabhururuka namapapiro samakondo, vachamhanya vasinganeti, vachafamba vasingaziyi." 
Isaiah41:1 Nyararai pamberi pangu, imi zvivi; vanhu ngavawane simba idzva, ngavaswedere, ipapo ngavataure; ngatiswedere pamwechete kutongerwa mhaka." 
Isaiah41:2 Ndianiko wakamutsa mumwe kumabvazuva, anokunda pose pose paanotsika? Ndianiko anomupa marudzi avanhu, achimubatisa madzimambo paushe hwake? Anovaisa pamunondo wake seguruva, napauta hwake sehundi inodzingwa nemhepo." 
Isaiah41:3 Anodzingana navo, ndokupfuura hake zvakanaka nenzira yaasina kumbotsika netsoka dzake." 
Isaiah41:4 Ndianiko akabata basa iro nokuzviita? Ndiye anodana marudzi kubvira pakutanga; ini Jehovha, wokutanga, nowokupedzisira." 
Isaiah41:5 Zviwi zvakaona, zvikatya; migumo yenyika inodedera, inoswedera, youya." 
Isaiah41:6 Mumwe nomumwe anobatsira wokwake; anoti kuhama yake, “Tsunga hako mwoyo.”" 
Isaiah41:7 Saizvozvo muvezi anosimbisa mupfuri wendarama, noanopfura nenyundo anosimbisa anorova panhera, achiti, “Pamusoro pokunamatidza. Zvakanaka; ndokuzvirovera nembambo kuti zvirege kuzununguka." 
Isaiah41:8 “Asi iwe Isiraeri, muranda wangu, Jakobho, wandakasanangura, vana vaAbhurahamu shamwari yangu," 
Isaiah41:9 iwe wandakatora kumigomo yenyika, ndikakudana kumakona ayo, ndikati kwauri, ‘Uri muranda wangu, ndakakusanangura, handina kukurasha.’" 
Isaiah41:10 Usatya, nokuti ndinewe; usavhunduka, nokuti ndiri Mwari wako; ndichakusimbisa, zvirokwazvo, ndichakubatsira; zvirokwazvo, ndichakutsigira noruoko rwangu rworudyi rune simba." 
Isaiah41:11 Tarira, vose vanokutsamwira, vachanyadziswa vave nenyadzi; vanokakavara newe vachava sechinhu chisipo, vachaparara." 
Isaiah41:12 “Uchavatsvaka, asi haungavawani, ivo vanokakavara newe; vanorwa newe vachava sechinhu chisipo, sechinhu chisina maturo." 
Isaiah41:13 Nokuti ini Jehovha, Mwari wako, ndichabata ruoko rwako rworudyi, ndichiti kwauri, ‘Usatya, ini ndichakubatsira.’" 
Isaiah41:14 Usatya, Jakobho iwe honye, nemi varume VaIsiraeri; ini ndichakubatsira, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, mudzikinuri wako ndiye Mutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah41:15 Tarira, ndakakuita mupuro mutsva, unopinza, una meno; uchapura makomo, nokuaputsa–putsa, uchaita zvikomo zvive sehundi." 
Isaiah41:16 Uchaaurutsa, achatorwa nemhepo, chamupupuri chichaaparadzira kwose; iwe uchafarira Jehovha, nokuzvirumbidza noMutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah41:17 “Varombo navanoshayiwa vanotsvaka mvura, asi haipo, marimi avo anooma nenyota; ini, Jehovha ndichavapindura, ini Mwari waIsiraeri, handingavarasi." 
Isaiah41:18 “Ndichazarura nzizi pamakomo asine miti, namatsime pakati pemipata; renje ndichariita dziva remvura, nenyika yakaoma zvitubu zvemvura." 
Isaiah41:19 Ndichasima parenje miti yemisidhari, nemiakasia, nemimirite, nemiorivhi; ndichaisa musango nemipani, nemifiri, iyo yose;" 
Isaiah41:20 kuti vanhu vaone, nokuziva, nokurangarira, nokunzwisisa, kuti ruoko rwaJehovha ndirwo rwakaita izvozvo, uye kuti Mutsvene waIsiraeri ndiye wakazvisika.”" 
Isaiah41:21 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Revai mhaka yenyu;” zvanzi namambo waJakobho, “Uyai namashoko enyu akasimba.”" 
Isaiah41:22 Ngavauye nawo, vatiudze zvichaitwa; tiudzei zvinhu zvakare, kuti ndezvei, kuti tizvirangarire, tizive kuguma kwazvo; kana mutizivise zvichazovapo." 
Isaiah41:23 Tiudzei zvinhu zvichazovapo pashure, tizive kuti muri vamwari; zvirokwazvo, itai zvakanaka, kana itai zvakaipa, kuti tishamiswe, tizvione tose pamwechete." 
Isaiah41:24 Tarirai imi hamuzi chinhu, nebasa renyu harizi chinhu; anokusanangurai anonyangadza." 
Isaiah41:25 Ndamutsa mumwe anobva kurutivi rwokumusoro, zvino wasvika; mumwe anobva kumabudazuva, anodana zita rangu; iye achatsika vabati samatope, somuumbi anokanya ivhu." 
Isaiah41:26 Ndianiko wakatiudza izvozvo kubvira pakutanga, kuti tizive? Napanguva yakare, kuti titi, “Zvirokwazvo?” Zvirokwazvo, hakuna anotiudza, zvirokwazvo, hakuna anotiratidza, zvirokwazvo, hakuna anonzwa mashoko enyu." 
Isaiah41:27 Ndini ndichatanga kuti kuZioni, “Tarirai, tarirai, havo; ndichatumira Jerusaremu nhume inouya namashoko akanaka.”" 
Isaiah41:28 Kana ndichitarira, hakuna munhu; pakati pavo hakuna chipangamazano, angapindura shoko, kana ndichivabvunza." 
Isaiah41:29 Tarirai, ava vose havana maturo, mabasa avo haana maturo, haazi chinhu; mifananidzo yavo yakaumbwa imhepo nezvisina maturo." 
Isaiah42:1 Tarirai muranda wangu wandinotsigira, musanangurwa wangu anofadza mweya wangu. Ndakaisa Mweya wangu pamusoro pake, achavigira marudzi kururamisirwa." 
Isaiah42:2 Haangadani, kana kudanidzira nezwi rake, kana kunzwisa izwi rake panzira dzomumusha." 
Isaiah42:3 Rutsanga rwakapwanyika haangaruvhuni, nomwenje unopfungaira haangaudzimi; achavigira vanhu kururamisirwa muchokwadi." 
Isaiah42:4 Iye haangapfungairi kana kupwanyiwa, kusvikira agadza kururama panyika; zvivi zvichamirira murairo wake." 
Isaiah42:5 Zvanzi naMwari Jehovha, iye akasika denga rose, akaritatamura, iye akatambanudza nyika nezvinobvamo, iye anopa vanhu varimo kufema, navanofambapo mweya wavo," 
Isaiah42:6 “Ini Jehovha ndakudana nokururama, ndichabata ruoko rwako, ndichakuchengeta, ndikuite sungano yavanhu, uye chiedza chamarudzi;" 
Isaiah42:7 usvinudze meso asingaoni, ubudise vasungwa patorongo, navagere murima paimba yokusungwa." 
Isaiah42:8 Ndini Jehovha, ndiro zita rangu; kukudzwa kwangu handingakupi mumwe, kana kurumbidzwa kwangu kumifananidzo yakavezwa." 
Isaiah42:9 Tarirai, zvinhu zvakare zvaitika, ndinoparidza zvinhu zvitsva; ndinokuudzai izvozvo zvisati zvabukira.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva, murumbidzei kubvira pamigumo yenyika; imi, munoburukira kugungwa, nezvose zviri mukati maro, zvivi navagere pazviri." 
Isaiah42:11 Renje namaguta aro ngazvidanidzire, nemisha inogarwa naKedhari; vagere mumatombo ngavaimbe, ngavadanidzire vari pamusoro pamakomo." 
Isaiah42:12 Ngavakudze Jehovha, vaparidzire zvivi kurumbidzwa kwake." 
Isaiah42:13 Jehovha achabuda semhare, achamutsa kushingaira somunhu wokurwa; achadana, zvirokwazvo, achadanidzira, acharwa navavengi vake nesimba." 
Isaiah42:14 Ndakanyarara nguva refu, ndakaramba ndinyerere, ndikazvidzora; zvino ndichachema somukadzi ari kusununguka, ndichafemedzeka nokutakwaira pamwechete." 
Isaiah42:15 Ndichaparadza makomo nezvikomo, nokuomesa zvose zvinomerapo; nzizi ndichadziita zvivi, namadziva ndichaapisa." 
Isaiah42:16 Mapofu ndichaafambisa nenzira yaasingazivi, pamakwara aasingazivi ndichatungamirira; rima ndichariita chiedza pamberi pavo, nezvakakombama ndichazviruramisa. Zvinhu izvi ndichazviita, handingavasiyi." 
Isaiah42:17 Vanovimba nemifananidzo yakavezwa, vanoti kumifananidzo yakaumbwa, “Imi muri vamwari vedu,” ivo vadzoserwa shure, vachanyadziswa kwazvo." 
Isaiah42:18 Inzwai, imi matsi; tarirai, imi mapofu, muwone." 
Isaiah42:19 Ndianiko bofu, haazi iye muranda wangu here? Ndiani matsi, senhume yangu yandinotuma? Ndiani bofu, saiye anodikanwa neni, nebofu somuranda waJehovha?" 
Isaiah42:20 Anowona zvinhu zvihinji, asi haacherekedzi; nzeve dzake dzakadziwuka, asi haanzwi." 
Isaiah42:21 Zvakafadza Jehovha, nokuda kwokururama kwake, kukudza murairo nokuurumbidza." 
Isaiah42:22 Asi ava ndavanhu vakatorerwa nokupambirwa; vose vakateyiwa mumakomba, vakavanzwa mudzimba dzokusungwa; vava chinhu chakatapwa, hakuna unovarwira, chinhu chakapambwa, hakuna anoti, “Dzosa!”" 
Isaiah42:23 Ndianiko pakati penyu acharerekera nzeve dzake kune chinhu ichi? Achaterera nokunzwa panguva inouya? 
Isaiah42:24 Ndianiko wakarega Jakobho apambwe, naIsiraeri awirwe namakororo? Haazi Jehovha here? Iye watakatadzira, wavakaramba kufamba nenzira dzake, wavakaramba kuteerera murairo wake." 
Isaiah42:25 Naizvozvo akadurura pamusoro pake kutsamwa kwake kukuru, nesimba rokurwa; zvikamupisira kumativi ose, asingazvizivi; zvikamupisa, asi akanaga asine hanya nazvo." 
Isaiah43:1 Asi zvino zvanzi naJehovha, akakusika, iwe Jakobho, akakuumba, iwe Isiraeri, “Usatya hako, nokuti ndini ndakakudzikinura; ndakakudana nezita rako, uri wangu." 
Isaiah43:2 “Kana uchipinda nomumvura zhinji, ndichava newe, kana nomunzizi, hadzingakunyudzi; kana uchifamba nomumoto, haungatsvi, nomurazvo haungakupisi." 
Isaiah43:3 Nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wako; ndakaisa Ijipiti ruve rudzikinuro rwako, Itiopia neShebha panzvimbo yako." 
Isaiah43:4 “Zvawakanga uchikosha pamberi pangu, uchikudzwa nokudikanwa neni, naizvozvo ndichaisa vanhu panzvimbo yako, namarudzi avanhu panzvimbo youpenyu hwako." 
Isaiah43:5 Usatya hako, nokuti ndinewe; ndichauyisa vana vako vabve kumabvazuva, nokukuunganidza ubve kumavirazuva;" 
Isaiah43:6 ndichati kurutivi rwokumusoro, varege; nokurutivi rwezasi, usavadzivisa; uyai navanakomana vangu vari kure, navakunda vangu vari kumigumo yenyika;" 
Isaiah43:7 mumwe nomumwe anodanwa nezita rangu, wandakasika kuti ndikudzwe, wandakaumba, zvirokwazvo, wandakaita.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Uyai namapofu, ana meso hawo, nematsi, dzine nzeve hadzo." 
Isaiah43:9 Marudzi ose ngaaunganidzwe pamwechete, navanhu vakokerwe; ndianiko pakati pavo angatiudza izvozvi, angatiratidza zvinhu zvakare? Ngavauye nezvapupu zvavo, varuramiswe; ngavanzwe, vati, “Ichokwadi.”" 
Isaiah43:10 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Ndimi zvapupu zvangu, nomuranda wangu, wandakasanangura; kuti muzive, mugonditenda, munzwisise kuti ndini iye; hakuna mumwe mwari wakanditangira pakuumbwa, shure kwangu hakungazovipo mumwe." 
Isaiah43:11 Ini, iyeni, ndiJehovha, kunze kwangu hakuna mumwe muponesi." 
Isaiah43:12 Ini ndakaparidza, ini ndakaponesa, ini ndakaratidza; kwakanga kusina mwari wokumwe pakati penyu; saka imi muri zvapupu zvangu, neni ndiri Mwari, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah43:13 Zvirokwazvo, kubva zuva ranhasi ndini iye; hakuna angwarwira munhu paruoko rwangu; ini ndichabata basa, ndiani angandidzivisa?”" 
Isaiah43:14 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mudzikinuri wenyu, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, “Ndakatuma vanhu Bhabhironi, nokuda kwenyu, ndichavaburitsa vose vachitiza, ivo vaKaradhia muzvikepe zvavo zvomufaro." 
Isaiah43:15 Ndini Jehovha, Mutsvene wenyu, Musiki waIsiraeri, Mambo wenyu.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, anoita nzira mugungwa, negwara pakati pemvura zhinji ine simba;" 
Isaiah43:17 anobudisa ngoro nebhiza, nehondo neane simba; vanovata pasi pamwechete, havangamukizve; havachapfuti, vadzimwa somwenje." 
Isaiah43:18 Musarangarira zvinhu zvakapfuura, musafunga zvinhu zvakare." 
Isaiah43:19 Tarirai, ndichaita chinhu chitsva; chobuda zvino; hamungachizivi here? Ndichaita nzira murenje, nenzizi musango." 
Isaiah43:20 Mhuka dzebundo dzichandikudza, makava nemhou; nokuti ndinobudisa mvura zhinji murenje, nenzizi musango, kuti ndipe vanhu vangu, ivo vakasanangurwa, vanwe," 
Isaiah43:21 ivo vanhu vandakazviumbira, kuti vaparidze kurumbidzwa kwangu." 
Isaiah43:22 Kunyangwe zvakadaro hauna kudana kwandiri, iwe Jakobho; asi wakaneta neni, iwe Isiraeri." 
Isaiah43:23 Hauna kundivigira makwai ako zvive zvipiriso zvingapiswa; hauna kundikudza nezvibairo zvako. Handina kukuremedza kuti uuye nezvipiriso zvoupfu, handina kukunetsa ndichiti uuye nezvinonhuwira." 
Isaiah43:24 Hauna kunditengera ipwa nemari, hauna kundigutisa namafuta ezvibairo zvako; asi wakandiremedza nezvivi zvako, wakandinetsa nezvakaipa zvako." 
Isaiah43:25 Ini, iyeni, ndini ndinodzima kudarika kwako nokuda kwangu, handicharangariri zvivi zvako." 
Isaiah43:26 Ndiyeudzire, ngatitaurirane; rondedzera, kuti ururamisirwe." 
Isaiah43:27 Teteguru vako vakatadza, navaporofita vako vakandidarikira." 
Isaiah43:28 Naizvozvo ndakamhura machinda matsvene; Jakobho ndakamuita chinhu chakatukwa, naIsiraeri chinhu chinosekwa." 
Isaiah44:1 “Asi zvino chinzwa, iwe Jakobho, muranda wangu, naIsiraeri wandakasanangura," 
Isaiah44:2 zvanzi naJehovha, akakuita, akakuumba kubvira pachizvaro, achakubatsira, ‘Usatya hako, iwe Jakobho, muranda wangu, newe Jeshuruni, wandakasanangura." 
Isaiah44:3 Nokuti ndichadira mvura pamusoro penyika ine nyota, nenzizi pamusoro pevhu rakaoma; ndichadira Mweya wangu pamusoro porudzi rwako, nokuropafadza kwangu pamusoro pavana vako;" 
Isaiah44:4 vachamera pakati pouswa, semikonachando pamvura inoyerera.’" 
Isaiah44:5 “Mumwe achati, ‘Ndiri waJehovha,’ mumwezve achazvitumidza nezita raJakobho, mumwezve achanyora noruoko rwake, achiti, ‘Ndiri waJehovha, nokutora zita raIsiraeri.’ ”" 
Isaiah44:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waVaIsiraeri, noMudzikinuri wavo, Jehovha wehondo, “Ndini wokutanga nowokupedzisira; kunze kwangu hakuna Mwari." 
Isaiah44:7 Ndianiko angadana seni, nokuzviparidza, nokuzvigadzirira izvo, kubva panguva yandakagadza vanhu vakare–kare? Zvinhu zvinouya, nezvinozoitika, ngavazviparidze izvo." 
Isaiah44:8 Musatya henyu, musavhunduka; handina kukuparidzirai izvozvo kare, nokukuratidzai here? Imi muri zvapupu zvangu. Kuno mumwe Mwari kunze kwangu here? Zvirokwazvo, hakuna rimwe dombo, ini handirizivi.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Vose vanoita mifananidzo yakavezwa havana maturo, zvinhu zvavanofarira hazvibatsiri; zvapupu zvavo hazvioni uye hazvizivi, kuti vanyadziswe." 
Isaiah44:10 Ndianiko akaita mwari, kana mufananidzo wakaumbwa, zvisingabatsiri chinhu?" 
Isaiah44:11 Tarirai, vose vanomunamatira vachanyadziswa; vakazviita, vanhu havo, ngavaunganidzwe pamwechete, ngavasimuke; vachatya, vachanyadziswa pamwechete." 
Isaiah44:12 Mupfuri anopfura sanhu, anobata namazimbe, nokuriita nenyundo, nokuripfura noruoko rune simba; zvirokwazvo ane nzara, simba rake rinopera, haanwi mvura, ndokuziya." 
Isaiah44:13 Muvezi anotambanudza tambo, anotara mufananidzo nepenzura, anounatsa nembezo, anoutara nechienzaniso, ndokuuveza zvakafanana nomunhu, zvakaenzana nomunhu akanaka, kuti ugare mumba." 
Isaiah44:14 Zvino anozvitemera misidhari, ndokutora misipiresi nemioki, achizvisanangurira mumwe pakati pemiti yomudondo; anosima mupaini, mvura inonaya ndokuukurisa." 
Isaiah44:15 Zvino dzava huni dzomunhu, anotora dzimwe ndokudziya nadzo; zvirokwazvo, anobatidza moto nadzo, ndokubika chingwa; zvirokwazvo, anoveza mwari, ndokumunamata; anoita mufanananidzo wakavezwa, ndokuupfugamira." 
Isaiah44:16 Rumwe rutivi rwawo anopisa nomoto, norumwe rutivi anogocha nyama, anoidya nyama, nokuguta zvirokwazvo, anozvidziyisa, ndokuti, “Haiwa, ndadziya, ndaona moto.”" 
Isaiah44:17 Nezvakasara anoita mwari, iwo mufananidzo wake wakavezwa; anoupfugamira, nokuunamata, nokunyengetera kwauri, achiti, “Ndirwirei, nokuti ndimi mwari wangu.”" 
Isaiah44:18 Havazivi, uye havarangariri, nokuti wakanamira meso avo, kuti varege kuona, nemwoyo yavo, kuti varege kunzwisisa." 
Isaiah44:19 Hakuna anorangarira, hakuna ruzivo kana njere dzinoti, “Ndapisa rumwe rutivi rwawo mumoto, zvirokwazvo, ndabika chingwa pamazimbe awo; ndagocha nyama ndikaidya; zvino ndingaita chinonyangadza nezvakasara zvawo here? Ndingapfugamira danda romuti here?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Anozvigutisa namadota; mwoyo wakanyengerwa wamutsausa, haagoni kusunungura mwoyo wake, kana kuti, “Hakuna nhema muruoko rwangu rworudyi here?”" 
Isaiah44:21 Funga zvinhu izvi, iwe Jakobho, naIsiraeri, nokuti ndiwe muranda wangu; ndakakuumba, uri muranda wangu; haiwa Isiraeri, haungakanganikwi neni." 
Isaiah44:22 Ndakadzima kudarika kwako, segore gobvu, nezvivi zvako segore; dzokera kwandiri, nokuti ndakakudzikinura." 
Isaiah44:23 Imba, iwe denga rose, nokuti Jehovha akaita izvozvo; danidzirai, mativi ezasi enyika; imbai zvikuru imi makomo, iwe dondo, nomuti mumwe nomumwe urimo; nokuti Jehovha akadzikinura Jakobho, achazvirumbidza muna Isiraeri." 
Isaiah44:24 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mudzikinuri wako, akakuumba kubva pachizvaro, “Ndini Jehovha, anoita zvinhu zvose, anotatamura denga rose iye oga, anotambanudza nyika (ndiani waiva neni?)" 
Isaiah44:25 Iye anoparadza zviratidzo zvavane nhema, anopengesa vauki, anodzosa vachenjeri, achishandura zivo yavo uye upenzi." 
Isaiah44:26 “Iye anosimbisa shoko romuranda wake, anoita zvakarayirirwa nenhume dzake; iye anoti pamusoro peJerusaremu, ‘Richagarwa navanhu,’ napamusoro pamaguta aJudha, ‘Achavakwa, ini ndichamutsa matongo awo;’" 
Isaiah44:27 iye anoti kumvura yakadzika, ‘Chipwa, uye ndichapwisa nzizi dzako;’" 
Isaiah44:28 iye anoti pamusoro paKoreshi, ‘Ndiye mufudzi wangu, achaita zvose zvinondifadza,’ kana achiti pamusoro peJerusaremu ‘Richavakwa,’ uye pamusoro petemberi, ‘Nheyo dzako dzichateyiwa.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:1 Zvanzi naJehovha kumuzodzwa wake, kuna Koreshi, wandakabata ruoko rwake rworudyi, kuti ndikunde marudzi avanhu pamberi pake, ndichisunungura zviuno zvamadzimambo, ndimuzarurire misuwo pamberi pake, namasuwo arege kuzarirwa." 
Isaiah45:2 “Ini ndichaenda pamberi pako, ndichienzanisa pasina kuenzana; ndichaputsa–putsa misuwo yendarira, nokugura–gura mipfigo yendarama;" 
Isaiah45:3 ndichakupa pfuma iri murima, noupfumi hwakavanzwa panzvimbo dzisingazikanwi, kuti uzive kuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, anokudana nezita rako." 
Isaiah45:4 Nokuda kwaJakobho muranda wangu, nokwaIsiraeri musanangurwa wangu, ndakakudana nezita rako, ndakakutumidza zita rakanaka, kunyangwe wakanga usingandizivi." 
Isaiah45:5 Ndini Jehovha, hakuna mumwe; kunze kwangu hakuna mumwe Mwari. Ndichakusunga chiuno kunyangwe asina kundiziva;" 
Isaiah45:6 kuti vazive kubva kumabvazuva nokumavirazuva, kuti hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu; ndini Jehovha, hakuna mumwe." 
Isaiah45:7 Ndini ndinoumba chiedza, nokusika rima; ndinoita rugare, nokusika njodzi; ndini Jehovha, anoita zvinhu izvi zvose." 
Isaiah45:8 “Iwe denga rose, donhedza zvichibva kumusoro, makore ngaadurure kururama; nyika ngaizaruke, kuti ibudise ruponeso, ibereke kururama pamwechete; ini Jehovha ndakazvisika." 
Isaiah45:9 “Ane nhamo anorwa noMuiti wake, icho chaenga pakati pezvaenga zvevhu! Ko munyakwe ungati kuno anouumba, ‘Unoiteiko?’ Kana basa rako ringati, ‘Haana maoko, here?’" 
Isaiah45:10 Ane nhamo anoti kuna baba, ‘Unoberekeiko?’ Kana kumukadzi, ‘Unozvareiko?’ ”" 
Isaiah45:11 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, noMuiti wavo, “Ndibvunzei pamusoro pezvichazoitwa; pamusoro pavanakomana vangu, napamusoro pebasa ramaoko angu, mundirayire." 
Isaiah45:12 Ndakaita nyika, nokusika vanhu pamusoro payo; ini namaoko angu, ndakatatanura denga rose; ndakarayira hondo yose yaro." 
Isaiah45:13 Ndakamumutsa nokururama, ndicharuramisa nzira dzake dzose; iye achavaka guta rangu, nokusunungura vatapwa vangu, asingatsvaki mutengo kana mubairo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah45:14 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Zvakabatirwa neIjipiti, nezvakashambadzirwa neItiopia, navaShabhea, ivo varume varefu, zvichauya kwauri, zvichava zvako; vachakutevera, vachauya vakasungwa namatare, vachapfugama pamberi pako, vachikunyengera, vachiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo Mwari uri pakati pako, hakuna mumwe, hakuna mumwe Mwari.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Zvirokwazvo, muri Mwari anovanda, imi Mwari waIsiraeri, Muponesi." 
Isaiah45:16 Ivo vose vachanyadziswa vave nenyadzi; vaiti vezvifananidzo vachanyadziswa pamwechete. 
Isaiah45:17 Asi VaIsiraeri vachaponeswa naJehovha noruponeso rusingaperi; hamunganyadziswi kana kuva nenyadzi kusvikira panguva dzisingaperi. 
Isaiah45:18 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha akasika denga rose, iye Mwari akaumba nyika nokuiita, akaisimbisa akasaisika kuti rive dongo, asi akaiumba kuti igarwe, zvanzi naye, “Ndini Jehovha, hakuna mumwe." 
Isaiah45:19 Handina kutaura pakavanda, panzvimbo yenyika yerima; handina kuti kurudzi rwaJakobho, ‘Nditsvakei pasina,’ ini Jehovha, ndinotaura zvakarurama, ndinoparidza zvechokwadi." 
Isaiah45:20 “Unganai, muuye; swederai pamwechete, imi makapukunyuka kumarudzi; vanotakura matanda iri mifananidzo yavo yakavezwa havana ruzivo, ivo vanonyengetera mwari asingagoni kuponesa." 
Isaiah45:21 Paridzai, muzvibudise; zvirokwazvo, ngavarangane pamwechete, vachiti, ‘Ndiani akazviratidza izvi kubvira panguva yekare–kare? Ndiani akazviparidza pakutanga?’ Handizini Jehovha here? Hakuna mumwe Mwari kunze kwangu, Mwari akarurama noMuponesi, hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu." 
Isaiah45:22 Tarirai kwandiri muponeswe, imi mativi ose enyika; nokuti ndini Mwari, hakuna mumwe." 
Isaiah45:23 Ndakapika neni ndimene, shoko rabuda mumuromo mangu nokururama, haringadzoki, kuti mabvi ose achandipfugamira, marimi ose achapika neni." 
Isaiah45:24 Zvanzi pamusoro pangu, ‘Kururama nesimba zviri muna Jehovha bedzi; vanhu vachauya kwaari, vose vakanga vamutsamwira vachanyadziswa." 
Isaiah45:25 Rudzi rwose rwaIsiraeri rucharuramisirwa muna Jehovha, nokuzvirumbidza maari.’ ”" 
Isaiah46:1 Bheri anowira pasi, Nebho anokotama; zvifananidzo zvavo zviri pamusoro pezvipfuwo nemombe, zvinhu zvamaitakura zvakaitwa mutoro, wakatakudzwa zvipfuwo zvaneta." 
Isaiah46:2 Vanokotama, vanowira pasi pamwechete, vakakoniwa kurwira mutoro, asi ivo vamene vakatapwa." 
Isaiah46:3 “Nditeererei, imi imba yaJakobho, navakasara veimba yaIsiraeri, vakatakurwa neni kubva pakuberekwa kwavo, vakasimudzwa kubva pachizvaro;" 
Isaiah46:4 kusvikira makwegura, ndini iye, ndichakutakurai kusvikira vhudzi renyu rachena; ini ndakakuitai, ndichakutakurai, zvirokwazvo ndichakusimudzai, nokukurwirai." 
Isaiah46:5 Muchandifananidza naniko, nokundienzanisa nani, nokunditi ndakaita sani, wandingafanana naye?" 
Isaiah46:6 Ivo vanodurura ndarama pahombodo, nokuyera sirivha nechiyero, vanoripira mupfuri wendarama, iye ndokuita mwari nayo; zvino vopfugama, nokunamata." 
Isaiah46:7 Vanochikwidza pamapfudzi, vanochitakura, ndokuchigadzika panzvimbo yacho, icho ndokumira; hachibvi panzvimbo yacho, zvirokwazvo, kunyangwe munhu akadana kwachiri, hachigoni kupindura, kana kumuponesa pakutambudzika kwake." 
Isaiah46:8 “Rangarirai chinhu ichi, muve varume, fungaizve chinhu ichi, imi vadariki." 
Isaiah46:9 Rangarirai zvinhu zvapfuura zvakare; nokuti ndini Mwari, hakuna mumwe, ndini Mwari, hakuna akafanana neni;" 
Isaiah46:10 iye anoparidza kubva pakutanga izvo zvichaitika pakupedzisira, nokubva panguva yekare–kare zvinhu zvichigere kuitwa, ndichiti, ‘Zvandakarayira zvichamira, ndichaita zvose zvandinoda;’" 
Isaiah46:11 ndinodana gondo ribve kumabvazuva, munhu wandakarayirira abve kunyika iri kure; zvirokwazvo, ndakataura, ndichazviuyisawo, ndakazvitema, ndichazviitawo." 
Isaiah46:12 Nditeererei, imi mune mwoyo mikukutu, imi muri kure nokururama;" 
Isaiah46:13 Ndichaswededza kururama kwangu, hakungavi kure, noruponeso rwangu harunganonoki; ndichaisa ruponeso paZioni, nokubwinya kwangu pakati paIsiraeri.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Buruka, ugare muguruva, iwe mhandara, mukunda weBhabhironi; gara pasi pasina chigaro choushe, iwe mukunda wavaKaradhia; nokuti hauchazonzi uno undere nechidikanwa." 
Isaiah47:2 Tora guyo nehuyo ukuye upfu; bvisa chifukidziro chechiso chako, bvisa nguo yako yakareba fukura gumbo rako, yambuka nzizi." 
Isaiah47:3 Kusafuka kwako kuchava pachena, kunyadzwa kwako kuchaonekwa; ndichazvitsiva, ndisingarangariri munhu." 
Isaiah47:4 Mudzikinuri wedu, zita rake rinonzi Jehovha wehondo, Mutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah47:5 Gara unyerere, upinde murima, iwe mukunda wavaKaradhia; nokuti hauchazonzi Vahosi hwoushe huzhinji." 
Isaiah47:6 Ndakanga ndakatsamwira vanhu vangu, ndakamhura nhaka yangu, ndikavaisa mumaoko ako; iwe hauna kuvanzwira tsitsi, wakaisa joko rako rinorema kwazvo pamusoro pavatana." 
Isaiah47:7 Ukati, “Ndichava vahosi nokusingaperi;” naizvozvo hauna kufunga zvinhu izvi, hauna kurangarira kuguma kwazvo." 
Isaiah47:8 Naizvozvo zvino chinzwa chinhu ichi, iwe unongorangarira zvinofadza, ugere zvakasimba, unoti mumwoyo mako “Ndini ndoga, hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu; handingagari ndiri chirikadzi, handingazivi kufirwa navana.”" 
Isaiah47:9 Asi zvinhu izvi zviviri zvichakuwira nechinguva chiduku, nezuva rimwechete, kufirwa navana, nouchirikadzi; zvichakuwira nechiyero chizere, pakati paun'anga hwako huzhinji, nouroyi hwako hwakawanda." 
Isaiah47:10 Nokuti wakavimba nezvakaipa zvako; wakati, “Hakuna anondiona;” wakakanganiswa nouchenjeri hwako nezivo yako, ukati mumwoyo mako, “Ndini ndoga, hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu.”" 
Isaiah47:11 Naizvozvo zvakaipa zvichakuwira, zvausingazivi kuvamba kwazvo; uchawirwa nenjodzi, yausingagoni kubvisa; kuparadzwa kuchakuwira pakarepo, kwausingazivi." 
Isaiah47:12 Zvino uya nouroyi hwako noun'anga hwako huzhinji, hwawakabata nahwo kubva pauduku hwako, zvimwe ungabatsirwa, zvimwe ungakunda." 
Isaiah47:13 Waneta nokuwanda kwamano ako; zvino, vanodudzira zvokudenga, navanocherechedza nyenyedzi, navanofembera zvomedzi mumwe nomumwe ngavasimuke, vakuponese pazvinhu zvichakuwira." 
Isaiah47:14 Tarira, vachaita samashanga, vachapiswa nomoto, havangagoni kuzvirwira pasimba romurazvo; haungavi zimbe rokudziya, kana moto ungagotwa." 
Isaiah47:15 Ndizvo zvichaita zvose zvawakabatira; vakashambadzirana newe kubva pauduku hwako, vachadzungaira mumwe nomumwe nenzira yake; pachashaikwa anokuponesa." 
Isaiah48:1 Inzwai izvi, imi imba yaJakobho, makatumidzwa zita raIsiraeri, makabuda kumvura zhinji, yaJudha; imi, munopika nezita raJehovha, muchirumbidza Mwari waIsiraeri, musingazviiti nechokwadi kana nokururama." 
Isaiah48:2 (Nokuti vanozvidza veguta dzvene, vachisendama kuna Mwari waIsiraeri; zita rake ndiJehovha wehondo)." 
Isaiah48:3 “Ndakaparadza zvinhu zvakare kubva pakutanga; zvirokwazvo, zvakabuda mumuromo mangu, ndakazvizivisa; ndakazviita kamwe–kamwe, zvikaitika." 
Isaiah48:4 Zvandakaziva kuti mwoyo wako mukukutu, nomutsipa wako runda rwedare, nehuma yako ndarira;" 
Isaiah48:5 naizvozvo ndakakuparidzira izvozvo kubva pakutanga; ndakakuzivisa izvozvo zvisati zvaitika, kuti urege kuzoti, ‘Chifananidzo changu ndicho chakaita izvozvo, mufananidzo wangu wakavezwa nomufananidzo wangu wakaumbwa ndizvo zvakarayira izvozvo.’" 
Isaiah48:6 Wakazvinzwa; tarira izvi zvose; zvino imi hamungazviparidzi here? Ndakakuzivisa zvinhu zvakavanzwa, zvawakanga usingazivi." 
Isaiah48:7 Zvasikwa zvino, zvakanga zvisipo kare; hauna kumbozvinzwa zuva rino risati rasvika; kuti urege kuti, ‘Tarirai, ndaizviziva.’" 
Isaiah48:8 Zvirokwazvo, hauna kunzwa, zvirokwazvo, hauna kuziva; zvirokwazvo, nzeve dzako dzakanga dzisina kudziurwa kubva panguva yakare; nokuti ndakaziva kuti wakaita nokunyengera, ukanzi mudariki kubva pachizvaro." 
Isaiah48:9 Ndichanonotsa kutsamwa kwangu nokuda kwezita rangu, ndichazvidzora pamusoro pako nokuda kwokurumbidzwa kwangu, kuti ndirege kukuparadza." 
Isaiah48:10 Tarira, ndakakunatsa, asi handina kuzviita sesirivha; ndakakuidza muchoto chokutambudzika." 
Isaiah48:11 “Nokuda kwangu, nokuda kwangu, ndichazviita; nokuti zita rangu ringamhurwa sei? Handingapi mumwe kukudzwa kwangu." 
Isaiah48:12 “Nditeerere, iwe Jakobho, newe Isiraeri wandakadana ndini iye, ndini wokutanga, ndini wokupedzisirawo."
