Isaiah48:13 Zvirokwazvo, ruoko rwangu rwakateya nheyo dzenyika ruoko rwangu rworudyi rwakatatamura denga rose; kana ndichizvidana, zvinosimuka pamwechete." 
Isaiah48:14 “Unganai imi mose, munzwe; ndianiko pakati pavo akaparidza zvinhu izvi? Iye anodikanwa naJehovha, achaita kuda kwake pamusoro peBhabhironi, ruoko rwake ruchava pamusoro pavaKaradhia." 
Isaiah48:15 “Ini, iyeni, ndini ndakataura izvozvo; zvirokwazvo, ndakamudana, ndakamuuyisa, achafambiswa panzira yakanaka." 
Isaiah48:16 “Swederai kwandiri, munzwe chinhu ichi; kubva pakutanga handina kutaura chinyararire;” kubva panguva yokuvamba akandituma, noMweya wake." 
Isaiah48:17 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mudzikinuri wako, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, “Ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, anokudzidzisa zvinokubatsira, anokutungamirira panzira yaunofanira kufamba nayo." 
Isaiah48:18 Haiwa! Dai wakateerera hako mirairo yangu! Rugare rwako rungadai rwakaita sorwizi, nokururama kwako samafungu egungwa!" 
Isaiah48:19 Vana vako vaiva sejecha, nezvibereko zvomuviri wako setsanga dzaro; zita rake harizaibviswa kana kuparadzwa pamberi pangu.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Ibvai paBhabhironi, tizai vaKaradhia; paridzai nezwi rokuimba, muzivise izvi, muzvireve kusvikira kumigumo yenyika; muti, “Jehovha akadzikinura muranda wake Jakobho.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Havana kunzwa nyota nguva yaakavafambisa mumarenje; akavayereresa mvura ichibva padombo, akatsemurawo dombo, mvura zhinji ikadzutuka." 
Isaiah48:22 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Vakaipa havana rugare.”" 
Isaiah49:1 Ndinzwei, imi zvivi, teererai, imi marudzi avanhu ari kure, Jehovha akandidana ndiri muchizvaro, akareva zita rangu ndichiri mudumbu ramai vangu;" 
Isaiah49:2 akaita muromo wangu somunondo unopinza; akandivanza mumumvuri wechanza chake, akandiita museve unopenya, akandichengeta mugoba rake;" 
Isaiah49:3 akati kwandiri, “Ndiwe muranda wangu; Isiraeri wandinozvirumbidza maari.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Asi ndakati, “Ndakatambura pasina, ndakapedza simba rangu pasina pazvinhu zvisina maturo; asi zvirokwazvo kururamisirwa kwangu kuri kuna Jehovha, nomubairo wangu kuna Mwari wangu.”" 
Isaiah49:5 Zvino zvanzi naJehovha, akandiumba kubva pachizvaro, kuti ndive muranda wake, ndidzosere Jakobhozve kwaari, uye kuti Isiraeri vaunganidzwezve kwaari, (nokuti ndinokudzwa pamberi paJehovha, Mwari wangu ndiye wava simba rangu);" 
Isaiah49:6 zvirokwazvo, iye akati, “Chinhu chiduku kuti uve muranda wangu kuti umutse marudzi aJakobho, nokudzosazve vakasara VaIsiraeri; ndichakuitawo chiedza chavahedheni, kuti kuponesa kwangu kusvikire kumugumo wenyika.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mudzikinuri waIsiraeri, noMutsvene wake, kunoanozvidzwa navanhu, kuno anovengwa norudzi rwose, kumuranda wavabati, “Madzimambo achaona ndokusimuka; machinda naiwo achanamata, nokuda kwaJehovha akatendeka, iye Mutsvene waIsiraeri, wakakusanangura.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Ndakakupindura nenguva yakafanira, ndakakubatsira nezuva rokuponeswa; ndichakuchengeta, nokukuita sungano yavanhu, kuti umutse nyika, nokuvagarisa nhaka dzakanga dzaparadzwa;" 
Isaiah49:9 kuti uti kuna vakasungwa, ‘Budai;’ nokuna vagere murima, ‘Zviratidzei.’ Vachadya zvokudya panzira, namafuro avo achava pazvikomo zvisina zvibereko." 
Isaiah49:10 Havangavi nenzara kana nyota, havangabayiwi nokupiswa kunyangwe nezuva, nokuti iye, anovanzwira nyasha, achavatungamirira, achavafambisa pamatsime emvura." 
Isaiah49:11 Ndichaita makomo angu ose nzira, migwagwa yangu ichakwiridzwa." 
Isaiah49:12 Tarirai, vamwe vachauya vachibva kure; tarirai, vamwe vachabva kurutivi rwokumusoro nokumavirazuva, navamwe kunyika yeSinimi.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Imbai, imi denga rose, newe nyika ufare; imi makomo imbai kwazvo, nokuti Jehovha akanyaradza vanhu vake, achinzwira tsitsi vanotambudzika." 
Isaiah49:14 Asi Zioni rakati, “Jehovha akandisiya, Ishe akandikanganwa.”" 
Isaiah49:15 “Ko mukadzi angakanganwe mwana wake waanomwisa, akasava netsitsi nomwanakomana wechizvaro chake here? Zvirokwazvo vangakanganwa zvavo, asi ini handingakukanganwi." 
Isaiah49:16 Tarira, ndakakunyora pazvanza zvangu; masvingo ako ari pamberi pangu nguva dzose." 
Isaiah49:17 Vana vako vanokurumidza; vaparadzi vako navanokuita dongo vachabuda mauri. 
Isaiah49:18 “Ringira kwose–kwose nameso ako, uone; ava vose vanoungana pamwechete, vachiuya kwauri. Noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, zvirokwazvo uchazvifukidza navo vose sechishongo, uchazvisunga chiuno navo somwenga." 
Isaiah49:19 “Nokuti, kana ari matongo ako nenzvimbo dzako dzakasiyiwa, nenyika yako yakaparadzwa, zvirokwazvo zvino haingaringani vagere mairi, navanokuminya vachava kure." 
Isaiah49:20 Vana, vawakanga watorerwa, vacharamba vachiti munzeve dzako, ‘Pano hapatiringani, tiratidzei nzvimbo patingagara.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Ipapo uchati mumwoyo mako, ‘Ndianiko akandiberekera ava, zvandakatorerwa vana vangu, ndiri ndoga, ndadzingwa, ndichidzungaira kwose–kwose? Ndianiko akarera ava? Tarirai, ndakanga ndasiyiwa ndoga; ko ava vakanga varipi?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Tarirai, ndichasimudzira marudzi ruoko rwangu, nokumisira vanhu mureza wangu; vachauya navanakomana vako vanavo pachipfuva chavo, navakunda vako vachatakurwa pamafudzi avo." 
Isaiah49:23 Madzimambo achava madzibaba anokurerai; vahosi vavo madzimai enyu anokurerai vachakotama pamberi penyu zviso zvavo zvakatarira pasi, vachinanzva guruva riri patsoka dzenyu; ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha; vanondimirira havanganyadziswi.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Ko ane simba angatorerwe zvaakapamba here, kana vatapwa vowakarurama vangarwirwa here?" 
Isaiah49:25 Asi zvanzi naJehovha, “Kunyangwe navatapwa voane simba vachamutorerwa, nezvakapambwa zvoanotyisa zvicharwirwa; nokuti ndicharwa noanorwa newe, nokuponesa vana vako." 
Isaiah49:26 Vanokumanikidza ndichavadyisa nyama yavo imene, vachabatwa neropa ravo, seinenge iri waini inonaka; vanhu vose vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha, ndini Muponesi wako, noMudzikinuri wako, Ane simba waJakobho.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Ruripiko rugwaro rwokuramba mai venyu, rwandakavaramba narwo? Kana ndakakutengesai kuna ani vandakanga ndine chikwereti navo here? Tarirai makatengeswa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvenyu, mai venyu vakarambwa nokuda kwokudarika kwenyu." 
Isaiah50:2 Ndakashaireiko munhu pakusvika kwangu? Ndakashaireiko akapindura pakudana kwangu? Ko ruoko rwangu rwatongopfupiswa kuti rukoniwe kudzikinura here? Handine simba rokurwira here? Tarirai, ndinopwisa gungwa kana ndichirituka, nzizi ndinodziita renje; hove dzadzo dzinonhuwa, nokuti hadzine mvura, dzinofa nenyota." 
Isaiah50:3 Denga rose ndinorifukidza nokusviba, chifukidziro charo ndinochiita makudza.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Ishe Jehovha akandipa rurimi rwavakadzidziswa, kuti ndizive kusimbisa vakaneta namashoko; anondimutsa mangwanani ose, anomutsa nzeve dzangu kuti ndinzwe savanodzidziswa." 
Isaiah50:5 Ishe Jehovha akadziura nzeve dzangu, handina kuramba kana kudzokera shure." 
Isaiah50:6 Ndakapira varovi musana wangu, namatama angu kuna vakataura ndebvu dzangu; handina kuvanza chiso changu pakunyadziswa nokupfirwa mate." 
Isaiah50:7 Nokuti Ishe Jehovha achandibatsira, naizvozvo handina kunyadziswa; naizvozvo ndakaita chiso changu sebwe romusarasara, ndinoziva kuti handinganyadziswi." 
Isaiah50:8 Anondiruramisira ari pedyo; ndiani acharwa neni? Ngatisimukei pamwechete; ndiani mudzivisi wangu? Ngaaswedere kwandiri. 
Isaiah50:9 Tarirai, Ishe, Jehovha achandibatsira; ndiani angandipa mhosva? Tarirai, avo vose vachasakara senguo; vachadyiwa nezvipfunho." 
Isaiah50:10 Ndianiko aripo pakati penyu anotya Jehovha, anoteerera izwi romuranda wake? Anofamba murima, asina chiedza, ngaavimbe nezita raJehovha, asendame kuna Mwari wake." 
Isaiah50:11 Tarirai, imi mose, munobatidza moto, munozvisunga zviuno nezvitsiga; fambai mumurazvo womoto wenyu, napakati pezvitsiga zvamakabatidza. Muchapiwa izvozvo noruoko rwangu, muchavata pasi muchitambudzika." 
Isaiah51:1 “Nditeererei, imi munotevera kururama, imi munotsvaka Jehovha; cherechedzai dombo pamakatemwa, negomba romugodhi pamakacherwa." 
Isaiah51:2 Cherechedzai Abhurahamu, baba venyu, naSara akakuberekai; nokuti ndakamudana achiri mumwechete, ndikamuropafadza, ndikamuita vazhinji." 
Isaiah51:3 “Nokuti Jehovha akanyaradza Zioni; akanyaradza matongo aro ose, akashandura renje raro rive seEdheni, nesango raro rive somunda waJehovha; mufaro nokufarisisa zvichawanikwamo, nokuvonga nezwi rokuimba." 
Isaiah51:4 “Ndinzwei, imi vanhu vangu; rerekai nzeve dzenyu kwandiri, imi rudzi rwangu; nokuti ndichatema murairo, zvakarurama zvangu ndichazviita chiedza chavanhu." 
Isaiah51:5 Kururama kwangu kuri pedyo, ruponeso rwangu rwabuda, maoko angu achatonga vanhu; zvivi zvichandimirira, zvichavimba noruoko rwangu." 
Isaiah51:6 Tarirai kudenga nameso enyu, mucherechedze nyika pasi; nokuti denga rose richanyangarika soutsi, nyika ichasakara senguo; vageremo vachafa sohunyunyu; asi ruponeso rwangu ruchava nokusingaperi, kururama kwangu hakungaperi." 
Isaiah51:7 “Nditeererei, imi munoziva kururama; imi vanhu vanomurairo wangu pamwoyo yenyu; musatya kuzvidza kwavanhu, musavhunduswa nokutuka kwavo." 
Isaiah51:8 Nokuti zvipfukuto zvichavadya senguo, zviundudzi zvichavadya semvere; asi kururama kwangu kuchavapo nokusingaperi, noruponeso rwangu kusvikira kumarudzi ose.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Muka, muka zvifukidze nesimba, iwe ruoko rwaJehovha; muka sapamazuva akare, sapamarudzi enguva dzakare–kare. Ko hamuzimi makagura–gura Rahabhi, mukabaya chikara here?" 
Isaiah51:10 Ko hamuzimi makapwisa gungwa, nemvura zhinji yegungwa rakadzika, akashandura nzvimbo dzakadzika dzegungwa mukapaita nzira pangayambuka vakadzikinurwa here?" 
Isaiah51:11 Vakasunungurwa vaJehovha vachadzoka, vachaenda Zioni vachiimba; mufaro usingaperi uchava pamisoro yavo, vachapiwa mufaro nokufarisisa, kuchema nokugomera kuchapera." 
Isaiah51:12 “Ini, iyeni, ndinokunyaradzai; ndiwe aniko, unotya munhu anozofa, kana Mwanakomana womunhu, achaitwa souswa;" 
Isaiah51:13 wakakanganwa Jehovha Muiti wako, akatatamura denga rose, nokuteya nheyo dzenyika; uchingotya zuva rose nokuda kwehasha dzomumanikidzi, kana achizvigadzira kuparadza here? Ko hasha dzomumanikidzi dziripi?" 
Isaiah51:14 Musungwa wakatapwa achakurumidza kusunungurwa, haangafi nokuburukira mugomba, zvokudya zvake hazvingashaikwi." 
Isaiah51:15 “Nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, anomutsa gungwa, kuti mafungu aro atinhire; Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake." 
Isaiah51:16 Ndakaisa mashoko angu mumuromo mako, ndikakufukidza mumumvuri woruoko rwangu, kuti ndivambe denga rose, nokuteya nheyo dzenyika, nditi kuZioni, ‘Imi muri vanhu vangu.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Muka, muka, simuka, iwe Jerusaremu, wakanwa mukombe wokutsamwa kwaJehovha paruoko rwake; wakanwa mukombe wose wokudzedzeresa, ukaupedza kwazvo." 
Isaiah51:18 Hakuna nomumwe pakati pavanakomana vake vose vaakabereka angamutungamirira, hakuna angamubata noruoko pakati pavanakomana vose vaakarera." 
Isaiah51:19 Zvinhu izvi zviviri zvakuwira; ndianiko achakunzwira tsitsi? Kusiyiwa nokuparadzwa, nenzara nomunondo; ndingakunyaradza sei?" 
Isaiah51:20 Vanakomana vako vaziya, vavete pamigumo yenzira dzomumusha, semhuka yabatwa mumambure; vazadzwa nokutsamwa kwaJehovha nokutuka kwaMwari wako." 
Isaiah51:21 Naizvozvo zvino chinzwa chinhu ichi, iwe unotambudzika, wakabatwa, asi asina kubatwa newaini," 
Isaiah51:22 zvanzi naShe wako Jehovha, naMwari wako, unoreverera vanhu vake, “Tarirai, ndakabvisa mukombe wokudzedzeresa paruoko rwako, iwo mukombe uzere nokutsamwa kwangu, haungazounwizve." 
Isaiah51:23 “Ndichauisa muruoko rwavanokutambudza, ivo vakati kwauri, ‘Kotama, tifambe napamusoro pako;’ iwe ukaita musana wako sapasi, senzira yomumusha inofambwa navanhu.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Muka, muka, iwe Zioni, uzvifukidze nesimba rako; pfeka nguo dzako dzakaisvonaka, iwe Jerusaremu, guta dzvene; nokuti kubva zvino hakuna asina kudzingiswa noasakanaka angapinda mukati mako." 
Isaiah52:2 Zvizunze ubve muguruva; simuka, ugare kwazvo, iwe Jerusaremu; sunungura zvisungo zviri pamutsipa wako, iwe mukunda weZioni wakatapwa." 
Isaiah52:3 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, “Makatengeswa kusina mutengo; muchadzikinurwa kusina mari.”" 
Isaiah52:4 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Vanhu vangu vakaburukira Ijipiti kare kundogarako, muAsiria akavamanikidza pasina mhosva." 
Isaiah52:5 Ko zvino ndinoonei pano; ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; vanhu vangu zvavabviswa pasina? Vanovabata ushe vanopopota, zita rangu rinongomhurwa zuva rose, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah52:6 Saka vanhu vangu vachaziva zita rangu; saka vachaziva nezuva iro kuti ndini iye anotaura; tarirai, ndini.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Dzakanaka sei pamusoro pamakomo tsoka dzoanouya namashoko akanaka, anoparidza rugare, anouya namashoko akanaka ezvinhu zvakanaka, anoparidza ruponeso, anoti kuZioni, “Mwari wako anobata ushe!”" 
Isaiah52:8 Chinzwa izwi renharirire dzako! Dzinodana namazwi, dzinoimba pamwechete; nokuti dzichaonana zviso zvakatarisana, kana Jehovha achidzokera Zioni." 
Isaiah52:9 Pururudzai nomufaro, imbai pamwechete, imi matongo eJerusaremu; nokuti Jehovha akanyaradza vanhu vake, wakadzikinura Jerusaremu." 
Isaiah52:10 Jehovha akafukura ruoko rwake rutsvene pamberi pamarudzi ose; migumo yose yenyika yakaona ruponeso rwaMwari wedu. 
Isaiah52:11 Ibvai, ibvai, budai ipapo, musanyangata chinhu chine tsvina; budai pakati paro; zvinatsei, imi munotakura nhumbi dzaJehovha." 
Isaiah52:12 Nokuti hamungabudi muchikurumidza, kana kuenda muchitiza; nokuti Jehovha achakutungamirirai; Mwari waIsiraeri achakurindirai mumashure." 
Isaiah52:13 Tarirai, muranda wangu achaita nokuchenjera, achakwiridzwa nokusimudzwa, nokukwirira kwazvo." 
Isaiah52:14 Vazhinji sezvavakashamiswa pamusoro pako, (chiso chake chakanga chakakuvadzwa kupfuura chavamwe vanhu, nechimiro chake kupfuura chavanakomana vavanhu)," 
Isaiah52:15 saizvozvo achavhundusa marudzi mazhinji; madzimambo achapfumbira miromo yawo pamusoro pake, nokuti vachaona zvavasina kumboudzwa; vachanzwisisa zvavasina kumbonzwa." 
Isaiah53:1 Ndianiko akatenda zvatakaparidzirwa? Ruoko rwaJehovha rwakaratidzwa kuna ani? 
Isaiah53:2 Nokuti akamera pamberi pake sebukira nyoro, somudzi unobuda pavhu rakaoma; haane chimiro kana umambo; kana tichimuona, haana kunaka kuti timude." 
Isaiah53:3 Akazvidzwa, nokuraswa navanhu, munhu wokurwadziwa, akaziva urwere, somunhu anovanzirwa navanhu zviso zvavo; akazvidzwa nesu hatina kumukudza." 
Isaiah53:4 Zvirokwazvo, akatakura matenda edu, nokusimudza kurwadziwa kwedu; asi isu takati akatambudzwa, akarohwa naMwari nokumanikidzwa." 
Isaiah53:5 Asi akakuvadzwa nokuda kwokudarika kwedu, akarwadziwa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvedu; kurohwa kwakativigira rugare kwakanga kuri pamusoro pake, takaporeswa namavanga ake." 
Isaiah53:6 Isu tose takanga takarasika samakwai, takatsauka mumwe nomumwe nenzira yake; asi Jehovha akaisa pamusoro pake kuipa kwedu tose." 
Isaiah53:7 Akamanikidzwa, kunyangwe zvakadaro akazvininipisa, akasashamisa muromo wake; segwayana rinoiswa kundobayiwa uye segwai risingachemi pamberi pavaveuri varo, saizvozvo haana kushamisa muromo wake." 
Isaiah53:8 Akabviswa pakumanikidzwa nokutongwa; kana vari vezero rake, ndianiko pakati pavo akarangarira kuti akagurwa akabviswa panyika yavapenyu? Akarohwa nokuda kwokudarika kwavanhu vangu." 
Isaiah53:9 Vakamupa hwiro hwake pamwechete navakaipa, akava nomupfumi pakufa kwake, kunyangwe asina kuita chisakarurama, kunyengera kusina kuwanikwa mumuromo make." 
Isaiah53:10 Asi kwaiva kuda kwaJehovha kuti arwadziwe; wakamurwarisa; kana mweya wake wauya nechipiriso chezvivi, achaona zvibereko zvake, achawedzera mazuva ake, zvinodikanwa naJehovha zvichafambiswa zvakanaka noruoko rwake." 
Isaiah53:11 Achaona zvaakatamburira nomweya wake, akagutiswa; nokuziva kwake muranda wangu akarurama acharuramisira vazhinji; achatakura zvakaipa zvavo." 
Isaiah53:12 Saka ndichamuganhurira mugove pamwechete navakuru, achagoverana zvakapambwa navane simba; nokuti akadurura mweya wake pakufa, akaverengwa pamwechete navadariki; kunyangwe zvakadaro akatakura zvivi zvavazhinji, akanyengeterera vadariki." 
Isaiah54:1 “Imba, iwe ngomwa, iwe asina kubereka; imba kwazvo, uimbise, iwe asina kumbosununguka; nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Vana voari oga vazhinji kukunda vana vomukadzi akawanikwa.’" 
Isaiah54:2 Kurisa nzvimbo yetende rako, ngavatatanure micheka yougaro hwako; usarega, asi urebese mabote ako, usimbise mbambo dzako." 
Isaiah54:3 “Nokuti uchapararira kuruoko rworudyi nokuruboshwe; marudzi avanhu achava avana vako, vachagarisa maguta aiva matongo navanhu." 
Isaiah54:4 Usatya hako, nokuti haunganyadziswi; usakanganiswa, nokuti haungavi nenyadzi; nokuti uchakanganwa kunyara kwohumhandara hwako, haungazorangariri kuzvidzwa kwohuchirikadzi hwako." 
Isaiah54:5 Nokuti Muiti wako ndiye murume wako, Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake; Mutsvene waIsiraeri ndiye Mudzikunuri wako, iye achanzi Mwari wenyika yose." 
Isaiah54:6 “Nokuti Jehovha akakudana somukadzi, akasiyiwa ane shungu pamweya, somukadzi akawanikwa achiri muduku ndokuzorambwa ndizvo zvinotaura Mwari wako." 
Isaiah54:7 Ndakakusiya nguva duku, asi ndichakuunganidzazve nenyasha huru." 
Isaiah54:8 Ndakakuvanzira chiso changu nguva duku nehasha dzakapupuma; asi ndichakunzwira nyasha nohunyoro husingaperi ndizvo zvinotaura Mudzikinuri wako. 
Isaiah54:9 Nokuti izvi zvakaita kwandiri semvura zhinji yaNowa; nokuti sezvandakapika kuti mvura zhinji yaNowa haingazofukidzizve nyika, saizvozvo ndakapika kuti handichazokutsamwirazve, kana kukutuka." 
Isaiah54:10 Nokuti makomo angabva, nezvikomo zvingabviswa, asi hunyoro hwangu haungabvi kwauri, sungano yangu yorugare haingabviswi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ane nyasha newe." 
Isaiah54:11 “Haiwa, iwe mutambudziki, wakazununguswa nedutu remhepo, usino kunyaradzwa, tarira, ndichavakira mabwe ako namavara akanaka, ndichateya nheyo dzako namabwe esafiri." 
Isaiah54:12 Ndichaita shongwe dzako namabwe anovaima, namasuwo ako namabwe anopenya, nomuganho wako wose namabwe anokosha." 
Isaiah54:13 Vana vako vose vachadzidziswa naJehovha, rugare rwavana vako ruchava rukuru." 
Isaiah54:14 Uchasimbiswa mukururama; uchava kure nokumanikidzwa, nokuti hauna chaungatya, uye kure nezvinotyisa, nokuti hakuna chingasvika kwauri." 
Isaiah54:15 Tarira, kunyangwe vakakuvamba, hazvingabvi kwandiri; ani naani anokuvamba achaparadzwa nokuda kwako." 
Isaiah54:16 Tarira, ndini ndakasika mupfuri anopfutidza moto wamazimbe, ndokuita nhumbi yakakwanira basa rake; ndakasika muparadzi, kuti aparadze." 
Isaiah54:17 Hakuna nhumbi inoumbwa kuzorwa newe ingaita chinhu; rurimi rumwe norumwe runokukwirira pakutongwa ruchakundwa newe. Ndiyo nhaka yavaranda vaJehovha, nokururama kwavo kwandiri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Isaiah55:1 “Nhai, imi mose mune nyota, uyai kumvura zhinji, noasina mari, uyai, mutenge mudye; zvirokwazvo, uyai mutenge waini nomukaka, musina mari, pasina mutengo." 
Isaiah55:2 “Munoparadzireiko mari muchitenga zvisati zviri zvokudya, nezvamakabatira muchitenga zvisingagutisi? Nditeererei zvakanaka, mudye izvo zvakanaka, mweya yenyu ifare nezvakakora." 
Isaiah55:3 Rerekai nzeve yenyu, muuye kwandiri; inzwai, mweya yenyu igorarama; ndichaita nemi sungano isingaperi, nyasha dzazvokwadi dzakapikirwa Dhavhidhi." 
Isaiah55:4 Tarirai, ndakakuita chapupu kumarudzi avanhu, ave mutungamiriri nomubati wamarudzi." 
Isaiah55:5 Tarira, uchadana rudzi rwawakanga usingazivi, norudzi rwakanga rusingakuzivi, iwe ruchamhanyira kwauri, nokuda kwaJehovha Mwari wako, nokwoMutsvene waIsiraeri; nokuti iye akakukudza." 
Isaiah55:6 “Tsvakai Jehovha achawanikwa, danai kwaari achiri pedyo." 
Isaiah55:7 Akaipa ngaasiye nzira yake, nomunhu asakarurama mirangariro yake; ngaadzokere kuna Jehovha, iye achamunzwira nyasha, nokuna Mwari wedu, nokuti achakanganwira zvikuru." 
Isaiah55:8 Nokuti ndangariro dzangu hadzizi ndangariro dzenyu, nenzira dzenyu hadzizi nzira dzangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah55:9 Nokuti denga sezvarakakwirira kupfuura nyika, saizvozvo nzira dzangu dzakakwirira kupfuura nzira dzenyu, nendangariro dzangu kupfuura ndangariro dzenyu." 
Isaiah55:10 “Nokuti mvura nechando sezvazvinoburuka zvichibva kudenga, zvisingazodzokeriko, asi zvinodiridza nyika, zvichiiberekesa nokuitungisa maruva, ichipa mudyari mbeu, nomudyi zvokudya;" 
Isaiah55:11 ndizvo zvichaita shoko rangu rinobuda mumuromo mangu; haringadzokeri kwandiri risina, asi richaita zvandinoda, richiendika pane zvandakaritumira." 
Isaiah55:12 Nokuti muchabuda nomufaro, nokufambiswa norugare; makomo nezvikomo zvichaimba nomufaro pamberi penyu; miti yose yokudondo ichauchira." 
Isaiah55:13 Panzvimbo yomuti womunzwa pachamera musaipuresi, panzvimbo yorukato pachamera mumirite; zvichava kuna Jehovha mukurumbira nechiratidzo chisingaperi, chisingazoparadzwi.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Chengetai kururamisa, muite zvakarurama; nokuti ruponeso rwangu rwodo kusvika, kururama kwangu kworatidzwa." 
Isaiah56:2 “Akaropafadzwa munhu anoita izvozvi, noMwanakomana womunhu anozvibatisisa, anochengeta Sabata kuti arege kurimhura, nokudzora ruoko rwake kuti arege kuita chinhu chakaipa.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Mutorwa akanamatira Jehovha, ngaarege kutaura achiti, “Zvirokwazvo Jehovha achandiparadzanisa navanhu vake;” nomuyuniki ngaarege kuti, “Tarirai, ndiri muti wakaoma.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pavayuniki, “Vanochengeta maSabata angu, nokusanangura zvinhu zvinondifadza, vachibatisisa sungano yangu." 
Isaiah56:5 “Ndichavapa mumba mangu nomukati mamasvingo angu chiyeudzo nezita rinopfuura ravanakomana navanasikana; ndichavapa zita risingaperi, risingazoparadzwi." 
Isaiah56:6 “Navatorwawo vanonamatira Jehovha, kuti vamushumire, nokuda zita raJehovha, nokuva varanda vake, mumwe nomumwe anochengeta Sabata kuti arege kurimhura, nokubatisisa sungano yangu;" 
Isaiah56:7 ivavo ndichavauyisa kugomo rangu dzvene, nokuvafadza muimba yangu yokunyengetera; zvipiriso zvavo zvinopiswa nezvibairo zvavo zvichagamuchirwa paatari yangu; nokuti imba yangu ichanzi imba yokunyengetera yavanhu vose." 
Isaiah56:8 Ishe Jehovha, anounganidza vakadzingwa VaIsiraeri, anoti, ‘Ndichaunganidzazve vamwe kwaari, pamwechete navake vakaunganidzwa.’ ”" 
Isaiah56:9 Imi zvikara zvose zvokusango, uyai mudye, imi zvikara zvose zvokudondo." 
Isaiah56:10 Nharire dzake mapofu, vose havane zivo; dzose imbwa dzisingagoni kutaura, dzisingagoni kuhukura, dzinorota, dzinovata pasi, dzinofarira kuvata." 
Isaiah56:11 Zvirokwazvo, imbwa dzinokara, dzisingatongoguti; ava vafudzi, vasingagoni kunzwisisa, mumwe nomumwe wakatsaukira kunzira yake, mumwe nomumwe kupfuma yake, vose–vose." 
Isaiah56:12 Vanoti, “Uyai, ndichauya newaini, tichaguta nezvinodhaka, mangwana achaita sezuva ranhasi, zuva guru–guru kwazvo.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Akarurama anoparara, asi hakuna munhu ane hanya nazvo; navanoda Mwari vanobviswa, kusina munhu anorangarira kuti vakarurama vanobviswa pazvakaipa." 
Isaiah57:2 Anopinda parugare; vanozorora panhoo dzavo, iye mumwe nomumwe, anofamba pakururama kwake." 
Isaiah57:3 Asi swederai pano, imi vanakomana vomuroyi, zvibereko zvemhombwe nechipfeve." 
Isaiah57:4 Munofara pamusoro pani? Munoshamisirani muromo wenyu, nokubudisa rurimi rwenyu? Ko hamuzi vana vokudarika, zvibereko zvenhema," 
Isaiah57:5 iyemi, munozvimutsa pakati pemioki, napasi pomuti mumwe nomumwe mutema, imi munobaya vana mumipata, pasi pemikaha yamatombo?" 
Isaiah57:6 Pakati pamabwe anotedza omupata ndipo pano mugove wako; iwo, iwo ndizvo zvawakagoverwa; ndizvo zvawakadururira chipiriso chinodururwa, zvawakavigira chipo. Ko ini ndichayananiswa naizvozvo here?" 
Isaiah57:7 Wakawadza nhoo dzako pamusoro pegomo rakareba rakakwirira; ndiko kwawakakwira kundobayira zvibairo. 
Isaiah57:8 Wakaisa chirangaridzo chako shure kwemikova nezvivhivho, nokuti wakazvifukurira mumwe, asati ari ini, ukakwira; wakakurisa nhoo dzako, ukaita sungano navo; wakada nhoo dzavo kwawakadziwana." 
Isaiah57:9 Ukaenda kuna mambo namafuta, ukawedzera zvinonhuwira zvako, ukatuma nhume dzako kure, ukazvininipisa kusvikira paSheori." 
Isaiah57:10 Wakaneta norwendo rwako rukuru; kunyangwe zvakadaro hauna kuti, “Hazvina maturo;” wakawana simba rako richivandudzwa, naizvozvo hauna kupera simba." 
Isaiah57:11 Wakatya nokuvhunduka aniko, zvawareva nhema, ukasandirangarira, nokuva nehanya? Ko ini handina kuramba ndinyerere nguva refu, ukasanditya here?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ndichaparidza kururama kwako; kana ari mabasa ako, haangakubatsiri." 
Isaiah57:13 Kana uchidanidzira, avo vawakaunganidza, ngavakurwire; asi mhepo ichavatora, mweya uchavabvisa vose; asi anovimba neni, nyika ichava yake, achagara nhaka yegomo rangu dzvene." 
Isaiah57:14 Zvichanzi, “Tutirai, tutirai, gadzirai nzira, bvisa chigumbuso panzira yavanhu vangu.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Nokuti zvanzi noAkakwirira Ari kumusoro, anogara mukusingaperi, ane zita rinonzi Dzvene, “Ndinogara pakakwirira napanzvimbo tsvene, uye noano mweya wakapwanyika anozvininipisa, kuti ndiponesezve mweya woanozvininipisa, ndiponesezve mwoyo wowakapwanyika." 
Isaiah57:16 Nokuti handingarwi nokusingaperi, handingatsamwi nguva dzose; nokuti mweya ungapera simba pamberi pangu, nemweya yandakasika." 
Isaiah57:17 “Nokuti ndakanga ndakatsamwa nokuda kwokuipa kwokuchiva kwake, ndikamurova; ndakavanza chiso changu, ndikatsamwa; akaramba achingotsauka nenzira yakada mwoyo wake." 
Isaiah57:18 “Ndakaona nzira dzake, asi ndichamuporesa, ndichamufambisawo, nokumunyaradzazve iye navanomuchema." 
Isaiah57:19 Ndini ndinosika zvibereko zvemiromo; zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Rugare, rugare kuno ari kure nokuno ari pedyo, ndichamuporesa.’" 
Isaiah57:20 Asi vakaipa vakafanana negungwa rakabvongodzwa; nokuti harigoni kuzorora, asi mvura yaro inobudisa matope namarara." 
Isaiah57:21 Zvanzi naMwari wangu, ‘Vakaipa havana rugare.’ ”" 
Isaiah58:1 Danidzira kwazvo, usarega, danidzira nezwi rako sehwamanda, uparidzire vanhu vangu kudarika kwavo, neimba yaJakobho zvivi zvavo." 
Isaiah58:2 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, vanonditsvaka zuva rimwe nerimwe, vachifarira kuziva nzira dzangu; vanokumbira kwandiri mirairo yakarurama, sorudzi runoita zvakarurama, rusingasiyi zvakarayirwa naMwari wavo; vanofarira kuswedera kuna Mwari." 
Isaiah58:3 Vanoti, “Takazvinyimireiko zvokudya, imi mukasazviona? Takatambudzireiko mweya yedu, imi mukasazviziva?” Taurirai, pazuva rokuzvinyima zvokudya munotsvaka kuzvifadza henyu, nokubata mabasa enyu ose." 
Isaiah58:4 Tarirai, munozvinyima zvokudya, kuti murwe nokukakavara, nokurova netsiva yezvakaipa, hamuzvinyimi zvokudya nhasi, kuti izwi renyu rinzwike kumusoro." 
Isaiah58:5 Ndikoko kuzvinyima zvokudya kwandakasanangura here? Ndiroro zuva munhu raanotambudza mweya wake naro here? Ndiko kukotamisa musoro wake senhokwe, nokuwarira makudza namadota pasi pake here? Izvozvo ungazviti ndiko kuzvinyima zvokudya, nezuva rinodikanwa naJehovha here?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Ko kuzvinyima zvokudya kwandakasanangura hakuzakadai here, kuti musunungure zvisungo zvezvakaipa, nokubvisa makashu ejoko, kuti akamanikidzwa aende hake, uye kuti muvhune majoko ose here?" 
Isaiah58:7 Hakuzi kuti ugovane zvokudya zvako noane nzara, uye kuti udane varombo vakadzingwa vapinde mumba mako kuti kana uchiona munhu wakashama umufukidze, uye kuti urege kuvanda venyama yako here?" 
Isaiah58:8 “Ipapo chiedza chako chichabuda sechamambakwedza, kuporeswa kwako kuchabukira nokukurumidza, kururama kwako kuchakutungamirira, nokubwinya kwaJehovha kuchakurindira mumashure." 
Isaiah58:9 Ipapo uchadana, Jehovha uchakupindura; achadanidzira iwe, iye achati, ‘Ndiri pano.’ Kana uchibvisa pakati pako joko, nokutendeka nomunwe, nokutaura zvakaipa;" 
Isaiah58:10 kana mweya wako ukava nehanya navane nzara, nokugutisa mweya woanotambudzika; ipapo chiedza chako chichabuda murima, kusvibirwa kwako kuchaita samasikati;" 
Isaiah58:11 Jehovha achakufambisa nguva dzose, achagutisa mweya wako panzvimbo dzakaoma, nokusimbisa mapfupa ako; uchava somunda wakadiridzwa, uye setsime remvura, risingapwi mvura yaro." 
Isaiah58:12 “Vachaberekwa newe vachavakazve matongo akare; uchamutsa nheyo dzamarudzi mazhinji, uye uchatumidzwa, Mugadziri wopakakoromoka, muvandudzi wenzira, kuti vanhu vagone kugarapo." 
Isaiah58:13 “Kana uchidzora gumbo rako pazuva reSabata, kuti urege kuita zvaunoda pazuva rangu dzvene, uchiti, Sabata izuva rinofadza, nezuva dzvene raJehovha rinofanira kukudzwa, uchirikudza, usingaiti zvaunoda, kana kutsvaka zvinokufadza, kana kutaura mashoko ako;" 
Isaiah58:14 ipapo uchafarira Jehovha kwazvo; neni ndichakufambisa panzvimbo dzakakwirira dzenyika ndichakugutisa nenhaka yababa vako Jakobho, nokuti muromo waJehovha akataura izvozvo.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Tarirai, ruoko rwaJehovha haruna kupfupiswa, kuti rukoniwe kuponesa, nzeve yake haina kuremerwa, kuti ikoniwe kunzwa;" 
Isaiah59:2 asi zvakaipa zvenyu zvakakuparadzanisai naMwari wenyu, zvivi zvenyu zvakakuvanzirai chiso chake, kuti arege kunzwa." 
Isaiah59:3 Nokuti maoko enyu akasvibiswa neropa, neminwe yenyu nezvakaipa; miromo yenyu yakareva nhema, rurimi rwenyu runogununu'na zvakashata." 
Isaiah59:4 Hakuna munhu anokwirira mumwe nokururama, hakuna anoreverera mumwe nezvokwadi; vanovimba nezvisina maturo, vachireva nhema; vanotora pamuviri pezvakashata, ndokubereka zvakaipa." 
Isaiah59:5 Vanochochonya mazai emvumbi, vanoruka dandira rebuwe; anodya mazai avo achafa, kana richipwanyika rinobudisa nyoka." 
Isaiah59:6 Matandira avo haangaiti nguo, havangafuki zvavakaita; mabasa avo mabasa ezvakaipa, kuita nesimba ndizvo zviri pamaoko avo." 
Isaiah59:7 Tsoka dzavo dzinomhanyira zvakaipa, vanokurumidza kuteura ropa risina mhaka; ndangariro dzavo indangariro dzezvakaipa; kuparadza nokuputsanya zviri panzira dzavo." 
Isaiah59:8 Nzira yorugare havaizivi; hakuna kururama pakufamba kwavo; vakazviitira nzira dzakaminama, ani naani anofamba nadzo haazivi rugare." 
Isaiah59:9 Naizvozvo kururamisirwa kuri kure nesu, nokururama hakusvikiri kwatiri; tinotsvaka chiedza, asi, tarirai, rima bedzi; tinotsvaka kubwinya, asi tinofamba pakasviba." 
Isaiah59:10 Tinotsvangadzira pamadziro samapofu; zvirokwazvo tinotsvangadzira savasina meso; tinogumburwa masikati sezvatinoita kana kwosviba; pakati pavapenyu takafanana navakafa. 
Isaiah59:11 Tinoomba tose samapere, tinochema zvikuru senjiva; tinotsvaka kururamisirwa; asi hakuna; tinotsvaka ruponeso, asi ruri kure nesu." 
Isaiah59:12 Nokuti kudarika kwedu kwakawanda pamberi penyu, zvivi zvedu zvinotipupurira; nokuti kudarika kwedu kunesu, kana zviri zvakaipa zvedu tinozviziva, zvinoti:" 
Isaiah59:13 Kudarikira Jehovha nokumuramba, nokutsauka tisingateveri Mwari wedu, kutaura mashoko okumanikidza nokumukira, kufunga nokutaura mashoko enhema anobva pamwoyo." 
Isaiah59:14 Kururamisa kwakadzoswa shure, kururama kumire kure; nokuti chokwadi chakawira pasi panzira yomumusha, kutendeka hakugoni kupinda." 
Isaiah59:15 Zvirokwazvo, chokwadi chinoshaikwa; anotiza zvakaipa anopambwa; Jehovha akazviona, zvikasamufadza kuti kwakanga kusina ruenzaniso." 
Isaiah59:16 Akaona kuti hakuna munhu, akashamiswa nokuti kwakanga kusina murevereri; naizvozvo ruoko rwake rwakamuvigira ruponeso, kururama kwake kwakamutsigira." 
Isaiah59:17 Akashonga kururama sechidzitiro chechipfuva, nenguwani yoruponeso pamusoro wake, akafuka nguo dzokutsiva zvikava zvokufuka zvake, akapfekedzwa nokushingaira sejasi." 
Isaiah59:18 Sezvavakaita, achavaripira saizvozvo, kutsamwa kuvadzivisi vake, nokutsiva kuvavengi vake; zvivi uchazviripira mubairo wokutsiva." 
Isaiah59:19 Naizvozvo vachatya zita raJehovha kubva kumavirazuva, noumambo hwake kubva kumabvazuva; nokuti achauya sorwizi runodira, runotinhwa nomweya waJehovha." 
Isaiah59:20 “Zvino Mudzikinuri achasvika paZioni, nokuna vanodzoka pakudarika pakati paJakobho,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah59:21 “Zvino kana ndirini, iyi ndiyo sungano yangu navo” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, “Mweya wangu, uri pamusoro pako, namashoko angu andakaisa mumuromo mako, hazvingabvi mumuromo mako, kana mumiromo yavana vako, kana mumiromo yavana vavana vako, kubva zvino kusvikira nokusingaperi” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah60:1 Simuka, uvheneke, nokuti chiedza chako chasvika, kubwinya kwaJehovha kwabuda pamusoro pako." 
Isaiah60:2 Nokuti, tarira, rima richafukidza nyika, nerima guru marudzi avanhu; asi Jehovha achabuda pamusoro pako, kubwinya kwake kuchaonekwa pamusoro pako." 
Isaiah60:3 Marudzi achauya kuchiedza chako, namadzimambo kukubwinya kwakakubudira." 
Isaiah60:4 Ringira kwose–kwose nameso ako, uone, vose vanoungana pamwechete, vachiuya kwauri; vanakomana vako vachauya vachibva kure, vakunda vako vachaberekwa pahudyu." 
Isaiah60:5 Ipapo uchazviona ukapenya nomufaro, mwoyo wako uchadedera nokufariswa; nokuti zvakawanda zvegungwa zvichaiswa kwauri, pfuma yamarudzi avanhu ichauya kwauri." 
Isaiah60:6 Ngamera zhinji zhinji dzichakufukidza, nemhuru dzengamera eMidhiani neEfa; vose veShebha vachauya, vachauya nendarama nezvinonhuwira, vachaparidza kurumbidzwa kwaJehovha." 
Isaiah60:7 Mapoka ose amakwai eKedhari achaunganidzirwa kwauri, makondohwe eNebhayoti achakushumira; zvichaiswa paatari yangu ndichizvifarira, ndichashongedza imba yokukudzwa kwangu." 
Isaiah60:8 Ndianiko ava vanobhururuka segore, senjiva dzinouya kumahwindo ezvirugu zvadzo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Zvirokwazvo, zvivi zvichandimirira, nezvikepe zveTashishi zvichatungamira zvichiuya navanakomana vako vanobva kure, vachiuya nesirivha yavo nendarama yavo kuzviisa kuzita raJehovha Mwari wako, nokuno Mutsvene waIsiraeri, nokuti ndiye wakakushongedza." 
Isaiah60:10 Vatorwa vachavaka masvingo ako, madzimambo avo achakushumira; nokuti ndakakurova nokutsamwa kwangu, asi ndakakunzwira nyasha nengoni dzangu." 
Isaiah60:11 Masuwo ako achagara akazaruka nguva dzose, haangazarirwi masikati nousiku, kuti vauyise kwauri pfuma yamarudzi avanhu namadzimambo avo, akatapwa." 
Isaiah60:12 Nokuti rudzi noushe, zvinoramba kukushumira, zvichaparara; zvirokwazvo marudzi iwayo achaparadzwa chose." 
Isaiah60:13 Zvinobwinya zveRebhanoni zvichauya kwauri, misaipuresi, nemipaini nemifiri pamwechete, kuti ndishongedze nzvimbo yeimba yangu tsvene; uye ndichabwinyisa nzvimbo yetsoka dzangu." 
Isaiah60:14 Vanakomana vavatambudzi vako vachauya kwauri vachikotama; vose vaikuzvidza vachazvikotamisa pasi–pasi petsoka dzako; vachakutumidza zita rokuti, “Guta raJehovha, Zioni roMutsvene waIsiraeri.”" 
Isaiah60:15 Wakanga wakasiyiwa nokuvengwa, kusisina munhu aipfuura nomukati mako, asi zvino ndichakuita chinhu chinorumbidzwa nokusingaperi, chinofarirwa kusvikira kumarudzi mazhinji." 
Isaiah60:16 Uchamwawo mukaka wamarudzi, uchamwa mazamu amadzimambo; ipapo uchaziva kuti ini Jehovha, ndini Muponesi wako, noMudzikinuri wako, waMasimbaose waJakobho." 
Isaiah60:17 Panzvimbo yendarira ndichauya nendarama, panzvimbo yedare ndichauya nesirivha, panzvimbo yamatanda safuri, napanzvimbo yamabwe dare. Rugare ndicharugadza ruve madzishe ako, noKururama kuve vabati vako." 
Isaiah60:18 Zvinoitwa nesimba hazvichazonzwiki panyika pamiganhu yako; asi uchatumidza masvingo ako zita rokuti, “Ruponeso, namasuwo ako Rumbidzo.”" 
Isaiah60:19 Zuva harichazovi chiedza chako masikati, mwedzi haungazokuvhenekeri nokupenya kwawo; asi Jehovha achava kwauri chiedza chisingaperi, naMwari wako kunaka kwako." 
Isaiah60:20 Zuva rako harichazoviri, mwedzi wako haungatapudziki; nokuti Jehovha achava chiedza chako chisingaperi, mazuva okuchema kwako achaguma." 
Isaiah60:21 Vanhu vako vose vachava vakarurama, vachagara nhaka yenyika nokusingaperi, vachava davi randakasima, nebasa ramaoko angu, kuti ndikudzwe." 
Isaiah60:22 Muduku achava chiuru, akadukupa achava rudzi rune simba; ini Jehovha ndichakurumidza kuzviita nenguva yazvo." 
Isaiah61:1 Mweya waIshe Jehovha uri pamusoro pangu; nokuti Jehovha akandizodza kuti ndiparidzire vanyoro mashoko akanaka; akandituma kuti ndirape vanemwoyo yakaputsika, kuti ndiparidzire vakatapwa kusunungurwa, nokuna vakasungwa kuti vachazarurirwa;" 
Isaiah61:2 kuti ndiparidzire gore rengoni dzaJehovha, nezuva rokutsiva raMwari wedu; kuti ndinyaradze vose vanochema;" 
Isaiah61:3 kuti ndigadzire vanochema paZioni vapiwe korona panzvimbo yamadota, mafuta omufaro panzvimbo yokuchema, nenguo yokurumbidza panzvimbo yomweya waziya; kuti vanzi miti yokururama, chakasimwa chaJehovha, kuti iye akudzwe." 
Isaiah61:4 Ipapo vachavaka matongo akare, vachamutsazve nzvimbo dzakaparadzwa dzokutanga, vachagadzira maguta akanga aitwa matongo, nezvose zvakaparadzwa zvamarudzi namarudzi." 
Isaiah61:5 Vatorwa vachamira vachifudza mapoka enyu amakwai, navaeni vachava varimi venyu navagadziri vemizambiringa yenyu." 
Isaiah61:6 Asi imi muchanzi vapristi vaJehovha, vanhu vachakutumidzai vashumiri vaMwari wedu; muchadya pfuma yamarudzi avanhu, muchazvirumbidza nokukudzwa kwawo." 
Isaiah61:7 Panzvimbo yokunyadziswa kwenyu, muchapiwa migove miviri; panzvimbo yokushorwa vachafarira mugove wavo; naizvozvo panyika yavo vachava nemigove miviri, vachava nomufaro usingaperi." 
Isaiah61:8 Nokuti ini Jehovha ndinoda zvakarurama, ndinovenga kupamba pamwechete nezvakaipa; ndichaviripira zvirokwazvo, uye ndichaita sungano isingaperi navo." 
Isaiah61:9 Vana vavo vachazikanwa pakati pamarudzi, nezvibereko zvavo pakati pavanhu; vose vanovaona vachavaziva, kuti ndirwo rudzi rwakaropafadzwa naJehovha." 
Isaiah61:10 Ndichafarira Jehovha kwazvo, mweya wangu uchava nomufaro munaMwari wangu; nokuti akandifukidza nguo dzoruponeso, akandipfekedza chokufuka chokururama, somuwani anoshonga korona, uye somwenga unozvishongedza noukomba hwake." 
Isaiah61:11 Nokuti nyika sezvainobudisa miti yayo, nomunda sezvaunomeresa zvakadyarwamo, saizvozvo Ishe Jehovha achameresa kururama nokurumbidzwa pamberi pamarudzi ose." 
Isaiah62:1 Nokuda kweZioni handingarambi ndinyerere, nokuda kweJerusaremu handingazorori, kusvikira kururama kwaro kuchibuda sechiedza, nokuponeswa kwaro somwenje unopfuta." 
Isaiah62:2 Marudzi avanhu achaona kururama kwako, namadzimambo ose kurumbidzwa kwako; uchatumidzwa zita idzva, richarehwa nomuromo waJehovha." 
Isaiah62:3 Iwe uchavawo korona yakanaka muruoko rwaJehovha, noukomba hwoumambo muruoko rwaMwari wako." 
Isaiah62:4 Hauchazonzi, “Musiyiwa;” nenyika yako haichazonzi dongo; asi iwe uchatumidzwa zita rinonzi “Hefizibha,” nenyika yako Bheura; nokuti Jehovha anokufarira, nenyika yako ichawanikwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Nokuti jaya sezvarinowana mhandara, saizvozvo vanakomana vako vachakuwana; uye muwani sezvaanofarira mukadzi wake, saizvozvo Mwari wako achakufarira." 
Isaiah62:6 Ndakagadza nharire pamusoro pamasvingo ako, iwe Jerusaremu; havangatongonyarari masikati nousiku; imi vayeudziri vaJehovha, regai kunyarara," 
Isaiah62:7 uye musamutendera kuzorora, kusvikira asimbisa izvozvo, kusvikira aita Jerusaremu guta rinorumbidzwa panyika." 
Isaiah62:8 Jehovha akapika noruoko rwake rworudyi, uye noruoko rwake rune simba, achiti, “Zvirokwazvo handichazopi vavengi vako zviyo zvako, zvive zvokudya zvavo, navatorwa havachazonwi waini yako itsva, yawakatamburira;" 
Isaiah62:9 asi vakazvikohwa ndivo vachazvidya, vachirumbidza Jehovha; vakaiunganidza ndivo vachainwa pamavanze eimba yangu tsvene.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Pindai, pindai napamusuwo, gadzirai nzira yavanhu; gadzirai, gadzirai mugwagwa, bvisai mabwe, simudzirai vanhu mureza." 
Isaiah62:11 Tarirai, Jehovha akaparidza shoko kusvikira kumugumo wenyika, achiti, “Udzai mukunda waZioni, muti, ‘Tarira, ruponeso rwako runouya; tarira, mubairo wake anawo, zvaanoripira zviri pamberi pake.’ ”" 
Isaiah62:12 Vachavatumidza zita rinonzi “Vanhu vatsvene, Vakadzikunurwa naJehovha; newe uchatumidzwa zita rinonzi, ‘Mutsvakwa, Guta risina kusiyiwa.’ ”" 
Isaiah63:1 Ndianiko uyu anobva Edhomu, anobva Bhozira ane nguo dzakatsvuka kwazvo? Ndiani uyo akafuka zvinobwinya, anofamba noukuru hwesimba rake? “Ndini ndinotaura nokururama, ndine simba rokuponesa.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Ko nguo yenyu yakatsvuka nei? Zvokufuka zvenyu zvakafanana nezvomunhu anotsika muchisviniro chewaini neiko? 
Isaiah63:3 “Ini ndakatsika chisviniro chewaini ndoga; kwakanga kusina munhu wamarudzi avanhu aiva neni; zvirokwazvo, ndakavatsika pakutsamwa kwangu, ndakavapwanya pahasha dzangu; ropa ravo rikatsatikira panguo dzangu, ndikasvibisa zvokufuka zvangu zvose." 
Isaiah63:4 Nokuti ndakafunga zuva rokutsiva mumwoyo mangu; gore ravakadzikinurwa vangu rasvika. 
Isaiah63:5 Ndikatarira, ndikashayiwa anobatsira, ndikashamiswa nokuti kwakanga kusina anotsigira; naizvozvo ruoko rwangu rwakandivigira ruponeso, kutsamwa kwangu ndiko kwakanditsigira." 
Isaiah63:6 Ndikatsika–tsika marudzi avanhu pakutsamwa kwangu, ndikavapengesa nedoro rokutsamwa kwangu, ndikadurura ropa roupenyu hwavo pasi.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ndicharumbidza hunyoro hwaJehovha namabasa aJehovha anofanira kurumbidzwa, nokuda kwezvose zvatakaitirwa naJehovha nezvakanaka zvizhinji kuimba yaIsiraeri, zvaakavaitira nokuda kwenyasha dzake, uye nokuda kwohunyoro hwake." 
Isaiah63:8 Nokuti akati, “Zvirokwazvo, ndivo vanhu vangu, vana vasingazoiti nokunyengera;” naizvozvo akava Muponesi wavo." 
Isaiah63:9 Pakutambudzika kwavo kwose naiyewo akanga achitambudzika, mutumwa, wakavazivisa chiso chake, akavaponesa; akavadzikinura norudo rwake netsitsi dzake, akavasimudza nokuvatakura mazuva ose akare." 
Isaiah63:10 Asi vakamumukira, nokuchemedza Mweya wake mutsvene; naizvozvo akashanduka, akava muvengi wavo, akarwa navo amene." 
Isaiah63:11 Ipapo vanhu vake vakarangarira mazuva akare, Mosesi navanhu vake, vakati, “Aripiko iye akaisa Mweya wake mutsvene pakati pavo?" 
Isaiah63:12 Aripiko iye akafambisa ruoko rwake runokudzwa parutivi rwaMosesi, akaparadzanisa mvura zhinji pamberi pavo kuti azviwanire mukurumbira usingaperi?" 
Isaiah63:13 “Aripiko iye akavafambisa napakadzika, sebhiza murenje, vakasagumburwa?”" 
Isaiah63:14 Mweya waJehovha akavazorodza, semombe dzinoburukira kumupata; saizvozvo makafambisa vanhu venyu, kuti muzviwanire mukurumbira mukuru–kuru." 
Isaiah63:15 Tarirai pasi muri kudenga, muone muri pahugaro hwenyu hutsvene hunobwinya, kushingaira kwenyu namabasa enyu ane simba aripiko? Kushuva kwomwoyo wenyu netsitsi dzenyu zvadzorwa kwandiri." 
Isaiah63:16 Nokuti muri baba vedu, kunyangwe Abhurahamu asingatizivi, naIsiraeri asingatiziururi; imi Jehovha muri baba vedu; Mudzikinuri wedu kubva kare nakare, ndiro zita renyu." 
Isaiah63:17 Haiwa, Jehovha, munotirega neiko tichitsauka panzira dzenyu, nokuomesa mwoyo yedu kuti tirege kukutyai? Dzokai nokuda kwavaranda venyu, iwo marudzi enhaka yenyu." 
Isaiah63:18 Vanhu venyu vatsvene vakanga vanayo nguva duku hayo; vadzivisi vedu vakatsika pasi imba yenyu tsvene. 
Isaiah63:19 Isu tafanana navasina kutongobatwa nemi, navasina kutumidzwa nezita renyu." 
Isaiah64:1 Haiwa, dai maibvarura denga, mukaburuka, makomo akadedera pamberi penyu," 
Isaiah64:2 sezvinoita moto kana uchipisa utsotso, nomoto kana uchivirisa mvura, kuti muzivise vadzivisi venyu zita renyu, kuti marudzi adedere pamberi penyu!" 
Isaiah64:3 Panguva yamakaita zvinhu zvinotyisa, zvatakanga tisina kutarira, mukaburuka, makomo akadedera pamberi penyu." 
Isaiah64:4 Nokuti kubva panguva yakare vanhu havana kunzwa, kana kunzwisisa nenzeve, kunyangwe neziso harina kuona Mwari kunze kwenyu, iye anobatira vanomumirira." 
Isaiah64:5 Munosangana noanofarira kuita zvakarurama, ivo vanokurangarirai panzira dzenyu; tarirai, makanga makatsamwa, nesu takatadza; takanga takadaro nguva refu, zvino tingaponeswa here?" 
Isaiah64:6 Nokuti isu tose tava soune tsvina, kururama kwedu kwose kwafanana nenguo ine tsvina; isu tose tinooma seshizha, zvakaipa zvedu zvinotibvisa semhepo." 
Isaiah64:7 Hakuna anodana zita renyu, anozvimutsa kuti akunamatireyi; nokuti makativanzira chiso chenyu, mukatinyungurusa nezvakaipa zvedu." 
Isaiah64:8 Asi zvino Jehovha, muri baba vedu; isu tiri ivhu, imi muri muumbi wedu, isu tose tiri basa roruoko rwenyu." 
Isaiah64:9 Regai kutsamwa zvikuru, Jehovha, uye regai kurangarira zvakaipa zvedu nokusingaperi; tarirai, doonai, tiri vanhu venyu." 
Isaiah64:10 Maguta enyu matsvene ashanduka renje, Zioni rashanduka renje, Jerusaremu rava dongo." 
Isaiah64:11 Imba yedu tsvene, yakanakisa, pamakarumbidzwa namadzibaba edu, yatsva nomoto; nzvimbo dzedu dzose, dzataifarira, dzaparadzwa." 
Isaiah64:12 Jehovha, mungazvidzora nokuda kwezvinhu izvi here? Mucharamba munyerere, muchititambudza zvikuru here?" 
Isaiah65:1 Ndakatendera kuti nditsvakwe navasina kundibvunza, ndakatendera kuti ndiwanikwe navasina kunditsvaka; ndakati kurudzi rwakanga rusingatumidzwi nezita rangu, “Tarirai ndini, tarirai ndini.”" 
Isaiah65:2 Ndakatambanudzira maoko angu zuva rose kurudzi rwavanhu rwakandimukira, vanofamba nenzira isakanaka, vachitevera ndangariro dzavo;" 
Isaiah65:3 vanhu vanogara vachinditambudza pachena, vanobayira zvibairo paminda, vachipisa zvinonhuwira pamusoro pezvitinha;" 
Isaiah65:4 vanogara pakati pamahwiro, vachivata panzvimbo dzakavandika; vanodya nyama yenguruve, uye muto wezvinhu zvinonyangadza uri mumidziyo yavo;" 
Isaiah65:5 vanoti, “Mira woga, usaswedera kwandiri, nokuti ndiri mutsvene kupfuura iwe.” Ava utsi mumhino dzangu, moto unopfuta zuva rose." 
Isaiah65:6 Tarirai zvakanyorwa pamberi pangu, “Handinganyarari, asi ndicharitsiva, zvirokwazvo ndicharitsiva nokutsiva kuzere," 
Isaiah65:7 zvakaipa zvenyu, nezvakaipa zvamadzibaba enyu pamwechete, vakapisa zvinonhuwira pamusoro pezvikomo; naizvozvo ndichatanga kuvayerera mabasa avo nokuyerera kuzere” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah65:8 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Zvakafanana nomunhu kana achiwana waini itsva musumbu remizambiringa, mumwe akati, ‘Usariparadza, nokuti mukomborero urimo; ndizvo zvandichaita nokuda kwavaranda vangu, kuti ndirege kuvaparadza vose.’" 
Isaiah65:9 “Ndichabudisa rudzi kuna Jakobho, nomudyi wenhaka yamakomo angu kuna Judha; vasanangurwa vangu vachagara nhaka, navaranda vangu vachagarapo." 
Isaiah65:10 “Bani reSharoni richiva mafuro amakwai, nomupata weAkori nzvimbo pangavata mombe pasi, zvichava zvavanhu vangu vakanditsvaka." 
Isaiah65:11 Asi imi munosiya Jehovha, nokukanganwa gomo rangu dzvene, imi munogadzirira Gadhi tafura, nokudirira Meni waini yakavhenganiswa." 
Isaiah65:12 “Ndichakutemerai muurawe nomunondo, imi mose muchakotamira pakubayiwa; nokuti panguva yandakadana, hamuna kupindura; panguva yandakataura, hamuna kunzwa; asi makaita zvakaipa pamberi pangu, mukasanangura zvandakanga ndisingafariri.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Tarirai, varanda vangu vachadya, asi imi muchava nenzara; tarirai, varanda vangu vachanwa, asi imi muchava nenyota; tarirai, varanda vangu vachafara, asi imi muchanyadziswa;" 
Isaiah65:14 tarirai, varanda vangu vachaimba nokufara kwomwoyo, asi imi muchachema nokurwadziwa kwomwoyo, muchaungudza nokuputsika kwomweya." 
Isaiah65:15 Imi muchasiyira vasanangurwa vangu zita renyu, rive rokutuka naro; Ishe Jehovha achakuuraya, ndokutumidza varanda vake rimwe zita;" 
Isaiah65:16 kuti ani naani anozviti ndakaropafadzwa panyika, achati ndakaropafadzwa naMwari wachokwadi; nokuti matambudziko okutanga akakanganikwa, nokuti avanzirwa meso angu." 
Isaiah65:17 “Nokuti tarirai, ndinosika denga idzva nenyika itsva; zvinhu zvakare hazvingarangarirwi, kana kufungwa nomwoyo." 
Isaiah65:18 “Asi imi farai mufarisise nokusingaperi pamusoro pezvandinosika; nokuti tarirai, ndinosika Jerusaremu rive guta romufaro, navanhu varo vave nomufaro." 
Isaiah65:19 “Ndichafarira Jerusaremu, nokuva nomufaro pamusoro pavanhu vangu; mukati maro hamuchazonzwiki izwi rokuchema, kana izwi rokuridza mhere." 
Isaiah65:20 Hapangazovipo rushiye runamazuva mashoma, kana mutana asina kusvitsa mazuva ake; nokuti mwana achafa apedza makore ane zana, nomutadzi acharohwa nokutukwa kana asvika makore ane zana." 
Isaiah65:21 Vachavaka dzimba nokugaramo; vachasima minda yemizambiringa, nokudya michero yayo." 
Isaiah65:22 Havangavaki dzimba, mumwe achizogaramo; havangasimi, mumwe achizodya; nokuti samazuva omuti, ndizvo zvichaita mazuva avanhu vangu; vatsanangurwa vangu vachapedza nguva huru vachifarira mabasa amaoko avo." 
Isaiah65:23 Havangabatiri zvisina maturo, kana kubereka vana vachakurumidza kuparadzwa; nokuti ndivo vana vavakaropafadzwa naJehovha, zvibereko zvavo zvichagara navo." 
Isaiah65:24 Zvino ndichapindura vasati vadana, ndichanzwa vachitaura." 
Isaiah65:25 Gava negwayana zvichafura pamwechete, shumba ichadya uswa senzombe, uye guruva richava zvokudya zvenyoka. Havangakuvadzi kana kuparadza pagomo rangu rose dzvene” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Kudenga ndicho chigaro changu choushe, nyika ndicho chitsiko chetsoka dzangu; mungandivakira imba yakadiniko? Ndeipiko nzvimbo pandingazorora?" 
Isaiah66:2 Nokuti zvinhu izvi zvose zvakaitwa noruoko rwangu, izvi zvinhu zvose zvakaitwa kudaro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; asi ndicharangarira munhu uyu, iye murombo ano mweya wakaputsika, anodedera neshoko rangu." 
Isaiah66:3 “Anouraya nzombe wakaita seanouraya munhu, anobayira gwayana seanovhuna mutsipa wembwa, anouya nechipiriso choupfu seanouya neropa renguruve, anopisira zvinonhuwira seanotenda chifananidzo. Zvirokwazvo, vakazvisanangurira nzira dzavo, mweya wavo unofarira zvinonyangadza zvavo." 
Isaiah66:4 Neniwo ndichasanangura zvinovadadira, ndichawisira pamusoro pavo izvo zvavanotya; nokuti panguva yandakadana, hakuna akapindura, panguva yandakataura, havana kunzwa, asi vakaita zvakaipa pamberi pangu, vakasanangura zvakanga zvisingandifadzi.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi munodedera neshoko rake, “Hama dzenyu, dzinokuvengai, dzakakudzingai nokuda kwezita rangu, dzakati, ‘Jehovha ngaaratidze umambo hwake, kuti tione mufaro wenyu; asi ndidzo dzichanyadziswa.’" 
Isaiah66:6 Inzwai mhere-mhere iri muguta, mheremhere inobva kutemberi, izwi raJehovha rinotsiva vavengi vake." 
Isaiah66:7 “Akapona asati arwadziwa, akabereka mwanakomana kurwadziwa kwake kusati kwasvika." 
Isaiah66:8 “Ndianiko akambonzwa chinhu chakadai? Ndiani akamboona zvinhu zvakadai? Nyika ingaberekwe nezuva rimwe here? Rudzi rwavanhu rungazvarwe pakarepo? Nokuti Zioni rakangoti kurwadziwa, ndokubereka vana varo." 
Isaiah66:9 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndingasvitsa pakubereka, ndikasaberekesa here? Ini, ndinoberekesa, ndingazarira chizvaro here?’ Ndizvo zvinotaura Mwari wako." 
Isaiah66:10 “Farai pamwechete neJerusaremu, mufare pamusoro paro, imi mose munorida; farai nomufaro mukuru naro, imi mose munorichema;" 
Isaiah66:11 kuti munwe, mugute namazamu okunyaradzwa kwaro; kuti muyamwe, mufadzwe nokuwanda kwembiri yaro." 
Isaiah66:12 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndicharitambanudzira rugare rwakaita sorwizi, nepfuma yamarudzi avanhu sorwizi runofema kunze; imi muchayamwa, muchaberekwa pahudyu, muchavaraidzwa pamabvi.’" 
Isaiah66:13 “Somunhu anovaraidzwa namai vake, saizvozvo ndichakuvaraidzai; muchavaraidzwa paJerusaremu." 
Isaiah66:14 Muchazviona, mwoyo wenyu uchafara, namapfupa enyu achamera sebumhudza; ruoko rwaJehovha ruchazikanwa kuna varanda vake, asi achava nehasha navavengi vake.”" 
Isaiah66:15 Nokuti tarirai, Jehovha achauya nomoto, ngoro dzake dzichafanana nechamupupuri; kuti aratidze kutsamwa kwake noukasha, nokutuka kwake nemirazvo yomoto." 
Isaiah66:16 Nokuti Jehovha achatonga vanhu vose nomoto uye nomunondo wake; vakaurayiwa naJehovha vachava vazhinji. 
Isaiah66:17 Vanozviita vatsvene navanozvinatsa kuti vaende kuminda, vachitevera mumwe uri pakati, vachidya nyama yenguruve, nechinonyangadza, nembeva, ivavo vachapera vose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:18 Nokuti ndinoziva mabasa avo nendangariro dzavo; nguva inosvika yandichaunganidza marudzi ose namarimi ose, vachauya vachiona kubwinya kwangu." 
Isaiah66:19 Ndichaisa chiratidzo pakati pavo, vanopukunyuka kwavari ndichavatumira kuna mamwe marudzi, kuna veTashishi, nePuri, neRudhi, vanopfura nouta, kuna veTubhari neJavhani, kuzvivi zviri kure, zvisina kumbonzwa mbiri yangu, kana kuona kubwinya kwangu pakati pamarudzi." 
Isaiah66:20 Vachauyisa hama dzenyu dzose dzichibva kumarudzi ose, chive chipo kuna Jehovha, vakatasva mabhiza, vari mungoro, nomungoro dzina matenga, vakatasva mahesera, namangamera, vachiuya kugomo rangu dzvene Jerusaremu, sezvinoitwa navana VaIsiraeri kana vachiuya nezvipo zvavo mumudziyo wakanaka mumba maJehovha ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:21 Ndichatorawo vamwe vavo vave vapristi navaRevhi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Isaiah66:22 Nokuti denga idzva nenyika itsva, zvandichaita sezvichagara zviripo pamberi pangu, saizvozvo rudzi rwako nezita rako zvichagara zviripo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:23 Zvino panguva iyo vanhu vose vachauya kuzonamata pamberi pangu, pakugara kwomwedzi mumwe nomumwe, napaSabata imwe neimwe ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:24 Vachabudapo vachindotarira zvitunha zvavanhu vakandidarikira; nokuti honye yavo haingafi, uye moto wavo haungadzimwi; vachava chinhu chinosemwa nevanhu vose." 
Jeremiah1:1 Mashoko aJeremiya, mwanakomana waHirikia, waiva worudzi rwavapristi vaiva paAnatoti panyika yaBhenjamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Shoko raJehovha rakauya kwaari pamazuva aJosiya, mwanakomana waAmoni, mambo waJudha, negore regumi namatatu rokubata kwake ushe." 
Jeremiah1:3 Rikauyawo pamazuva aJehoiakimu, mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, kusvikira pakupera kwegore regumi nerimwe raZedhekiya, mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, kusvikira pakutapwa kwaveJerusaremu nomwedzi wechishanu." 
Jeremiah1:4 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri, richiti," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ndakakuziva ndisati ndakuumba mudumbu ramai, ndakakuita mutsvene usati wabuda muchizvaro chamai; ndakakugadza kuti uve muporofita wamarudzi avanhu.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Ipapo ndakati, “Haiwa, Ishe Mwari, tarirai, handigoni kutaura, nokuti ndiri mwanana hangu.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Asi Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Usati ndiri mwanana; nokuti kuna ani naani wandinenge ndichikutuma, unofanira kuenda, nechinhu chipi nechipi chandinenge ndichikuraira, unofanira kuchitaura." 
Jeremiah1:8 Usatya nokuda kwavo, nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ini ndinewe, kuti ndikurwire.’ ”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Ipapo Jehovha akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akabata muromo wangu; Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Tarira, ndaisa mashoko angu mumuromo mako." 
Jeremiah1:10 Tarira, ndakugadza zuva ranhasi uve nesimba pamusoro pamarudzi nopoushe, kuti udzure nokukoromora, kuparadza nokuwisira pasi, kuvaka nokurima.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakauyazve kwandiri, richiti, “Jeremiya, unoonei?” Ndikati, “Ndinoona davi romuarimondi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Waona zvakanaka; nokuti ndinosvinurira shoko rangu, kuti ndiriite.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri rwechipiri, richiti, “Unoonei?” Ndikati, “Ndinoona gate rinovira, muromo waro unotarira kuno uri kurutivi rwokumusoro.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Kurutivi rwokumusoro ndiko kuchabuda zvakaipa zvichawira vanhu vose vagere panyika ino." 
Jeremiah1:15 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndinodana marudzi ose oushe ari kurutivi rwokumusoro; achauya, rumwe norumwe ruchaisa chigaro charwo choushe pavanopinda pamasuwo eJerusaremu, namasvingo aro kumativi ose napamaguta ose aJudha, kuzorwa nawo." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ndichareva zvandakavatongera pamusoro pezvakaipa zvavo zvose, zvavakandirasha, vakapisira vamwe vamwari zvinonhuwira, vakanamata mabasa amaoko avo." 
Jeremiah1:17 Zvino iwe, chizvisunga chiuno, usimuke, uvaparidzire zvose zvandakakuraira; usavhunduka nokuda kwavo, kuti ndirege kukuvhundusa pamberi pavo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Nokuti tarira, ndakakuita zuva ranhasi guta rakakomberedzwa, nembiru yedare, namasvingo endarira, urwe nenyika yose, namadzimambo aJudha, namachinda avo, navapristi vavo, navanhu venyika." 
Jeremiah1:19 Vacharwa newe, asi havangakukundi, nokuti ini ndinewe, kuti ndikurwire ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri, richiti," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Enda, undodana munzeve dzaveJerusaremu, uti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndakarangarira pamusoro pako hunyoro hwohuduku hwako norudo rwenguva yokuwanikwa kwako, kuti wakanditevera murenje, munyika yakanga isina kudyarwa." 
Jeremiah2:3 Isiraeri vakanga vari rudzi rutsvene kuna Jehovha, zvibereko zvitsva zvaakazviwanira; vose vanomudya vachava nemhosva; vachawirwa nezvakaipa’ ” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah2:4 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi imba yaJakobho, nemhuri dzose dzeimba yaIsiraeri," 
Jeremiah2:5 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Madzibaba enyu akawana zvisakarurama zvipiko kwandiri, zvavakaenda kure neni, zvavakatevera zvisina maturo, ivo vamene vakava vasina maturo?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Uye havana kureva, vachiti, ‘Uripiko Jehovha akatibudisa panyika yeIjipiti, akatifambisa murenje, munyika ina masango namakomba, munyika yakaoma neyomumvuri worufu, munyika isingafambi nomunhu achipfuurapo, musingagari munhu?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ndakakusvitsai munyika ine minda yakaorera, kuti mudye zvibereko zvayo nezvakanaka zvayo; asi makati mapinda, mukasvibisa nyika yangu, mukaita nhaka yangu chinhu chinonyangadza." 
Jeremiah2:8 Vapristi havana kuti, ‘Jehovha uripiko?’ Vaifambisa mirairo vakanga vasingandizivi, vafudzi vaindidarikira, vaporofita vaiporofitera Bhaari, vachitevera zvinhu zvisingabatsiri." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Saka zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndicharamba ndichikakavara nemi, ndichakakavara navana vevana venyu.’" 
Jeremiah2:10 Nokuti yambukirai kuzviwi zveSaipurasi, muone; tumai vanhu Kedhari, mufungisise zvakanaka, muone kana kwakambovapo chinhu chakadai." 
Jeremiah2:11 Ko rudzi ruripo rwakatsinhanisa vamwari varwo, ivo vasati vari vamwari here? Asi vanhu vangu vakatsinhanisa kukudzwa kwavo nezvinhu zvisingabatsiri." 
Jeremiah2:12 Shamiswa nechinhu ichi, iwe denga rose, utye zvikuru, uvhunduswe kwazvo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah2:13 Nokuti vanhu vangu vakaita zvinhu zviviri zvakaipa. Vakandisiya, ini tsime remvura mhenyu, vakazvivezera zvirongo, zvirongo zvakaputsika, zvisingagoni kuchengeta mvura." 
Jeremiah2:14 Isiraeri muranda here? Ko ndiye muranda wakaberekerwa mumba matenzi wake here? Ko zvino wapambwa seiko? 
Jeremiah2:15 Vana veshumba vakamuombera, vakarira, nokuparadza nyika yake; maguta ake akapiswa, hakuna unogaramo." 
Jeremiah2:16 Vana veMemufisi naveTapanihesi vakapedza vhudzi romusoro wako. 
Jeremiah2:17 Ko hauna kuzvitsvaira izvozvo, zvawakasiya Jehovha Mwari wako panguva yaakakufambisa panzira yake here?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Zvino unondotsvakei panzira inoenda Ijipiti, kundonwa mvura yeSihori here? Unondotsvakei panzira inoenda Asiria, kundonwa mvura yoRwizi here?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Zvakaipa zvako zvinokurova, kudzokera kwako shure kunokutuka; naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha wehondo, ‘Ziva, uone kuti chinhu chakaipa chinovava kuti wakasiya Jehovha Mwari wako, uye kuti haundityi.’" 
Jeremiah2:20 “Nokuti yatova nguva huru yawakavhuna joko, nokudambura zvisungo zvako, ukati, ‘Handidi kubatira;’ nokuti wakapfugama pachikomo chipi nechipi chakakwirira napasi pomuti upi noupi mutema uchifeva." 
Jeremiah2:21 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndakanga ndakusima uri muzambiringa wakaisvonaka, mbeu kwayo yazvokwadi; zvino wandishandukira sei ukava matavi akaipa omuzambiringa worumwe rudzi?" 
Jeremiah2:22 “Nokuti kunyangwe ukashamba nesoda, ukatora sipo zhinji, kunyangwe zvakadaro zvakaipa zvako zvakaita segwapa pamberi pangu; ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Jeremiah2:23 “Ungareva seiko, uchiti, ‘Handina kusvibiswa, handina kutevera vaBhaari?’ Cherechedza nzira yako pamupata, uzive chawakaita; uri hadzi yekamera inomhanya, inofamba nenzira dzayo;" 
Jeremiah2:24 uri hadzi yembizi yakarovera renje, inofembedza mhepo nokushuva kwayo; ndiani ungaidzora pakuviga kwayo? Dzose, dzinoitsvaka, hadzinganeti; pamwedzi wayo dzinoiwana." 
Jeremiah2:25 Usatendera rutsoka rwako kufamba usina shangu, nehuro dzako kuva nenyota. Asi iwe wakati, ‘Hazvina maturo; kwete, nokuti ndakada vatorwa, ndivo vandichatevera.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:26 Mbavha sezvainonyadziswa kana yaonekwa, saizvozvo imba yaIsiraeri yanyadziswa, ivo, namadzimambo avo, namachinda avo, navapristi vavo, navaporofita vavo;" 
Jeremiah2:27 ivo, vanoti kudanda, “Uri baba vangu;” nokubwe, “Ndiwe wakandibereka;” nokuti vakandifuratira, havana kunditarira nezviso zvavo; asi panguva yokutambudzika kwavo vachati, “Simukai, mutiponese.”" 
Jeremiah2:28 “Zvino varipiko vamwari venyu vamakazviitira? Ngavasimuke kana vachigona kukuponesai panguva yokutambudzika; nokuti kuwanda kwavamwari vako, iwe Jakobho, kwakaenzana namaguta ako." 
Jeremiah2:29 “Munokakavara neni neiko? Imi mose makandidarikira ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Jeremiah2:30 Ndakarova vana venyu pasina, havana kuteerera kurangwa; munondo wenyu ndiwo wakauraya vaporofita venyu, seshumba inoparadza." 
Jeremiah2:31 Haiwa, imi rudzi rwakadai! Wonai shoko raJehovha. Ko ini ndakanga ndiri renje kuna Isiraeri here? Kana nyika yerima guru here? Vanhu vangu vanorevereiko vachiti, ‘Tinotekeshera hedu, hatichazouyizve kwamuri?’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Ko mhandara ingakanganwa zvishongo zvayo, kana mwenga mukonde wake here? Asi vanhu vangu vakandikanganwa mazuva asingaverengwi." 
Jeremiah2:33 Haiwa, unoziva zvakanaka sei kunatsa nzira yako, kuti utsvake kudikanwa! Saka wakadzidzisa navakadzi vakaipawo nzira dzako." 
Jeremiah2:34 “Pamipendero yenguo dzako pakawanikwawo ropa ravarombo vasina mhaka; handina kuriwana pakapaziwa imba, asi pane zvizvi zvose." 
Jeremiah2:35 Kunyangwe zvakadaro iwe wakati, ‘Handina mhaka; zvirokwazvo kutsamwa kwake kwakadzorwa kwandiri.’ Tarira, ndichakutonga, zvaunoti, ‘Handina kutadza.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Unofambireiko pose pose, uchishandura nzira yako? Uchanyadziswa neIjipiti, sezvawakanyadziswa neAsiria." 
Jeremiah2:37 Naipapowo uchabva wakaisa maoko ako pamusoro wako; nokuti Jehovha akaramba vaunovimba navo, newe haungabatsirwi navo.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Zvinonzi, “Kana murume akaramba mukadzi wake, iye akabva kwaari, akandowanikwa nomumwe murume, ko murume ungadzokera kwaarizve here? Ko nyika yakadai haingasvibiswi kwazvo here? Asi iwe wakafeva navadikanwa vako vazhinji; zvino woda kudzokera kwandiri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah3:2 “Ringira meso ako kuzvikomo zvisina miti, uone; pavasina kupombora newe ndapapi? Wakavagarira panzira somuArabhia parenje; wasvibisa nyika nokufeva kwako nezvakaipa zvako." 
Jeremiah3:3 Naizvozvo wakanyimwa mvura inopfunha, nemvura yokupedzisira yakanga isipo; kunyangwe zvakadaro wakanga une huma yechipfeve, ukaramba kunyadziswa." 
Jeremiah3:4 “Ko haungatangi zvino uchidana kwandiri here, uchiti, ‘Baba vangu, ndimi muperekedzi wohuduku hwangu?’" 
Jeremiah3:5 Ko uchagara akatsamwa nokusingaperi here? Uchagara nako kusvikira pakupedzisira here? Tarira, wakataura izvozvo ukaita zvinhu zvakaipa, ukazvipedzisa.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Zvino Jehovha akatizve kwandiri, namazuva amambo Josiya, “Waona here zvakaitwa naIsiraeri pakudzokera kwavo shure? Vakakwira pagomo rimwe nerimwe rakakwirira nokupinda pasi pomuti mumwe nomumwe mutema, ndokundofevapo." 
Jeremiah3:7 Zvino vakati vapedza kuita izvozvo zvose, ini ndakati, vachadzokera kwandiri, asi havana kudzokera; kwandiri nomunun'una wavo, Judha, wokusatendeka, vakazviona." 
Jeremiah3:8 Zvino ndakaona kuti panguva yandakaramba Isiraeri, vokudzokera shure, ndikavapa rugwaro rwokuvaramba nemhaka yokufeva kwavo, kunyangwe zvakadaro munun'una wavo, ivo vaJudha, wokusatendeka, havana kutya; asi naivo vakandofevawo." 
Jeremiah3:9 Zvino nokusarangarira kwavo nyika yakasvibiswa nokufeva kwavo, vakafeva namabwe namatanda." 
Jeremiah3:10 Kunyangwe zvinhu izvi zvakadaro zvose, munun'una wavo, Judha, havana kudzokera kwandiri nomwoyo wavo wose, asi nokunyengera” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah3:11 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Isiraeri wokudzokera shure, vakaita zvakarurama kukunda Judha wokusatendeka." 
Jeremiah3:12 Enda unoparidza mashoko awa kurutivi rwokumusoro, uti, ‘Dzokai, imi Isiraeri wokudzokera shure ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; handingakutaririyi ndakatsamwa, nokuti ndine nyasha, handingarambi ndakatsamwa nokusingaperi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah3:13 Asi muzive zvakaipa zvenyu bedzi, kuti makadarikira Jehovha Mwari wenyu, mukafamba–famba muchitevera vatorwa pasi pemiti yose mitema, mukasateerera inzwi rangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.’" 
Jeremiah3:14 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Dzokai imi vana vokudzokera shure, nokuti ndiri murume wenyu; ndichakutorai, mumwe paguta rimwe, vaviri parudzi rumwe, ndichikuisai Zioni.’" 
Jeremiah3:15 “Ndichakupai vafudzi vanofadza mwoyo wangu, vachakufudzai nezivo nenjere." 
Jeremiah3:16 “Zvino kana mawanda nokuwedzerwa panyika pamazuva iwayo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha havangazoti, ‘Areka yesungano yaJehovha;’ havangaifungi, havangairangariri, havangaitsvaki, havangaiitizve." 
Jeremiah3:17 Panguva iyo vachatumidza Jerusaremu chigaro choushe chaJehovha; marudzi ose achaunganidzirwapo, paJerusaremu, nokuda kwezita raJehovha; havachazofambi nohukukutu hwemwoyo yavo yakashata." 
Jeremiah3:18 Namazuva iwayo imba yaJudha ichafamba pamwechete neimba yaIsiraeri, vachauya pamwechete vachibva kunyika yokumusoro kunyika yandakapa madzibaba enyu ive nhaka yavo.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 Asi ndakati, “Ndichakuisai sei pakati pavanga vangu, ndikupei nyika inofadza, nhaka yakaisvonaka yamarudzi akawanda;” ndikati, “Imi muchanditumidza zita rokuti, ‘Baba vangu, hamungazotsauki pakunditevera.’" 
Jeremiah3:20 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvirokwazvo, mukadzi sezvaanosiya murume wake achinyengera, saizvozvo imi makandinyengera, imi imba yaIsiraeri.’ ”" 
Jeremiah3:21 Inzwi rinonzwika kuzvikomo zvisina miti, kuchema nokunyengetera kwavana VaIsiraeri; nokuti vakaminamisa nzira dzavo, vakakanganwa Jehovha Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Dzokai, imi vana vokudzokera shure, ndichapodza kudzokera kwenyu. Tarirai, tauya kwamuri, nokuti imi muri Jehovha Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Zvirokwazvo, zvinobva kuzvikomo nemhere–mhere inobva kumakomo hazvina maturo; zvirokwazvo kuponeswa kwaIsiraeri kuri kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah3:24 Asi chinhu chinonyangadza chakaparadza basa ramadzibaba edu kubva pahuduku hwedu, makwai avo nemombe dzavo, vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Ngativatei pasi nokunyadziswa kwedu, kunyara kwedu ngakutifukidze; nokuti takatadzira Jehovha Mwari wedu, isu namadzibaba edu, kubva pahuduku hwedu kusvikira pazuva ranhasi; hatina kuterera izwi raJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah4:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Kana muchida kudzoka, imi Isiraeri, kana muchida kudzokera kwandiri, kana muchida kubvisa zvinonyangadza zvenyu pamberi pangu, hamungafaniri henyu kudzungaira." 
Jeremiah4:2 Ipapo muchapika, muchiti, ‘NaJehovha mupenyu,’ nezvokwadi, nezvakarurama, nokururama; ipapo marudzi achazviropafadza maari, nokuzvirumbidza maari.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha kuvanhu vaJudha naveJerusaremu, “Zviundirei gombo, idzva, musadyara pakati peminzwa." 
Jeremiah4:4 “Zvidzingisirei Jehovha, mubvise zvikanda zvapamberi zvomwoyo, imi vanhu vaJudha navagere Jerusaremu; kuti kutsamwa kwangu kukuru kurege kubuda somoto, upise kusina munhu unogona kuudzimura, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvamakaita.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Taurai pakati paJudha, muparidze muJerusaremu, muti “Ridzai hwamanda panyika,” danidzirai, muti, “Unganai, tindopinda mumaguta akakomberedzwa." 
Jeremiah4:6 “Simudzirai mureza kurutivi rweZioni, tizai, musamira; nokuti ndichauyisa zvakaipa zvinobva kurutivi rwokumusoro, nokuparadza kukuru." 
Jeremiah4:7 “Shumba yabuda ichibva mudenhere rayo, muparadzi wamarudzi wava munzira, wabuda panzvimbo yake, kuti aparadze nyika yenyu, maguta enyu aitwe matongo, kusina vanogaramo." 
Jeremiah4:8 “Naizvozvo zvisungei zviuno zvenyu namakudza, mucheme nokuwungudza; nokuti kutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha hakuna kudzorwa kwatiri.”" 
Jeremiah4:9 Zvino ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha nezuva iro mwoyo wamambo uchaora, nemwoyo yamachindawo; vapristi vachashamiswa navaporofita vachakanuka." 
Jeremiah4:10 Ipapo ndikati, “Haiwa, Ishe Jehovha zvirokwazvo makanyengera kwazvo vanhu ava naveJerusaremu, zvamakati, ‘Muchava norugare, nyamba munondo unobaya kusvikira pamweya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Nenguva iyo vanhu ava naveJerusaremu vachaudzwa, zvichinzi, “Tarirai mhepo inopisa, inobva kuzvikomo zvisina miti murenje, inouya kumukunda wavanhu vangu, isingavingi kurudza kana kunatsa;" 
Jeremiah4:12 mhepo ine simba, inobva ikoko, ichandiuyira; zvino ndicharevawo zvandakatonga pamusoro pavo.”" 
Jeremiah4:13 Tarirai, uchauya samakore, ngoro dzake dzichaita sechamupupuri; mabhiza ake anokurumidza kukunda makondo. Tine nhamo, nokuti taparadzwa." 
Jeremiah4:14 Haiwa, Jerusaremu, suka zvakaipa zviri pamwoyo wako, kuti uponeswe. Ndangariro dzako dzakaipa dzichagara mukati mako kusvikira rinhiko?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Nokuti izwi rinotaura richibva Dhani, rinoparidza njodzi richibva pazvikomo zveEfuremu." 
Jeremiah4:16 Udzai marudzi izvozvo; tarirai, paridzirai Jerusaremu, kuti nharirire dzinobva kunyika iri kure, dzinotaurira maguta aJudha zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah4:17 Dzinovakomberedza savarindi vanokomberedza munda, nokuti vakandimukira ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah4:18 Mufambire wako nezvawakaita ndizvo zvakakuyisira zvinhu izvi; ndiko kutadza kwako; nokuti zvinovava, nokuti zvinosvikira kumwoyo wangu." 
Jeremiah4:19 Maiwe! Ura hwangu, ura hwangu! Ndinorwadziwa mumwoyo mangu mumene; mwoyo wangu unodedera mukati mangu, handigoni kunyarara, nokuti wanzwa, iwe mweya wangu, wanzwa kurira kwehwamanda nemhere–mhere yokurwa." 
Jeremiah4:20 “Kunonzi, kuparadzwa kunotevera kuparadzwa; nokuti nyika yose yaitwa dongo; matende angu aparadzwa kamwe–kamwe, namaseiri amatende angu pakarepo." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ndichaona mureza kusvikira rinhiko, nokunzwa kurira kwehwamanda?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Nokuti vanhu vangu mapenzi, havandizivi; vakaita vana vamapenzi, vasina njere, vakachenjera pakuita zvakaipa, asi havana zivo pakuita zvakanaka.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndakatarira nyika, ndikaiona yaparadzwa, isina chinhu; ndikatarira denga rose, asi rakanga risina chiedza." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ndakatarira makomo, ndikaona achidedera, nezvikomo zvose zvichizununguka." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ndakatarira, ndikasaona munhu, neshiri dzose dzokunga dzakanga dzatiza." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ndakatarira, ndikaona nyika yakanga ichibereka zvakanaka yashanduka renje, namaguta ayo ose akanga akoromoka pamberi paJehovha, napamberi pokutsamwa kwake kukuru." 
Jeremiah4:27 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, “Nyika yose ichasiyiwa yaparadzwa, asi handingaipedzi chose.”" 
Jeremiah4:28 Nemhaka iyi nyika ichachema, nedenga rose kumusoro richasviba; nokuti ndakazvitaura, ndakafunga kuzviita, handina kuzvidemba, handingadzoki pachinhu ichi." 
Jeremiah4:29 Maguta ose anotiza nokuda kwomubvumo wavatasvi vamabhiza navafuri vouta; vanopinda mumatenhere, vanokwira pamatombo; ose akasiyiwa hakuna munhu unogaramo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Zvino iwe, kana waparadzwa, uchaiteiko? Kunyangwe ukafuka mucheka mutsvuku, kunyangwe ukazodza meso ako nomuti mutema, ungazvinatsa pasina; vadikanwa vako vanokuzvidza, vanotsvaka kukuuraya." 
Jeremiah4:31 Nokuti ndakanzwa izwi seromukadzi unosurumuka, serounotambudzika pakupona dangwe rake, izwi romukunda weZioni, unofemedzeka, unotambanudza maoko ake, achiti, “Ndine nhamo zvino! Nokuti mweya wangu waziya pamberi pavaurayi vangu!”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Mhanyai kwose–kwose panzira dzomuguta reJerusaremu, muone zvino, muzive, mutsvake pamigwagwa mikuru yaro, kana mungawana munhu, kana aripo, unoita zvakarurama, unotsvaka zvokwadi; ipapo ndicharikanganwira." 
Jeremiah5:2 Kunyangwe vachiti havo, “NaJehovha mupenyu,” zvirokwazvo vanopika nhema." 
Jeremiah5:3 Haiwa Jehovha, meso enyu haazinotsvaka zvokwadi here? Makavarova, asi havana kunzwa kurwadziwa; makavapedza, asi vakaramba kurairwa; vakaomesa zviso zvavo kupfuura dombo, vakaramba kudzoka." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ipapo ndikati, “Zvirokwazvo, ava varombo, mapenzi, nokuti havazivi nzira yaJehovha, kana murairo waMwari wavo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ndichaenda kuvakuru, ndichataura navo; nokuti ivo vanoziva nzira yaJehovha, nomurairo waMwari wavo. Asi ava vose pamwechete vakaputsa joko, vakadambura zvisungo.”" 
Jeremiah5:6 Saka shumba inobva kudondo, ichavauraya, gava rokumarenje richavaparadza, ingwe ichavandira maguta avo, mumwe nomumwe, unobudamo, uchabvamburwa; nokuti kudarika kwavo kuzhinji, nokudzokera kwavo kwawedzerwa." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Ndingakukanganwira seiko? Vana vako vakandirasha, vakapika navasati vari vamwari. Nguva yandakavagutsa kwazvo, vakapombora, vakaunganira padzimba dzezvipfeve vachiita mapoka." 
Jeremiah5:8 Vakanga vakaita samabhiza akagutswa, anongozvifambira; mumwe nomumwe wakadana mukadzi wowokwake." 
Jeremiah5:9 Ko handingarovi pamusoro pezvinhu izvi here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ko mweya wangu haungazvitsiviri parudzi rwakadai here? 
Jeremiah5:10 “Kwirai pamasvingo aro, muparadze; asi musapedza chose; bvisai matavi aro, nokuti haazi Jehovha." 
Jeremiah5:11 Nokuti imba yaIsiraeri neimba yaJudha vakaita nokunyengera kukuru kwandiri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.” 
Jeremiah5:12 Vakaramba Jehovha, vakati, “Haazi iye; hakuna chakaipa chingatiwira, hatingaoni munondo kana nzara;" 
Jeremiah5:13 vaporofita vachashanduka mhepo, shoko raJehovha harizi mavari; ngavaitirwe saizvozvo.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wehondo, “Zvamunotaura shoko iri, tarirai, ndichaita mashoko angu ave moto mumiromo yenyu, navanhu ava vave huni, vapedzwe nawo.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 Tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichauyisa pamusoro penyu rudzi runobva kure, imi imba yaIsiraeri; rudzi rwamusingazivi rurimi rwarwo, kana kunzwisisa zvavanotaura." 
Jeremiah5:16 Gobha ravo hwiro hwakashama, vose vanhu vane simba." 
Jeremiah5:17 Vachadya zvamakohwa nezvokudya zvenyu zvaifanira kudyiwa navanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu; vachadya makwai enyu nemombe dzenyu; vachadya mizambiringa yenyu nemionde yenyu; vachaputsira pasi neminondo maguta enyu akakomberedzwa, amaivimba nawo." 
Jeremiah5:18 Asi zvanzi naJehovha, “Kunyangwe napamazuva iwayo handingakupedziyi chose." 
Jeremiah5:19 Zvino kana muchinge munoti, ‘Ko Jehovha Mwari wedu wakatiitirei izvezvi zvose?’ Ipapo uti kwavari, ‘Sezvamakandirasha ini, mukashumira vamwe vamwari panyika yenyu, saizvozvo muchashumira vatorwa panyika isati iri yenyu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Taurirai izvozvi paimba yaJakobho, muzviparidzire paJudha, muchiti," 
Jeremiah5:21 “Zvino chinzwai izvozvi, imi vanhu mapenzi, musina njere; muna meso, asi hamuoni, mune nzeve, asi hamunzwi." 
Jeremiah5:22 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Hamundityi here?’ Hamudederi pamberi pangu here, ini ndakaisa jecha rive muganho wegungwa, ndikatema chirevo chisingaperi kuti rirege kuudarika? Zvino kunyangwe mafungu aro achipenga, haangakundi." 
Jeremiah5:23 Asi vanhu ava vano mwoyo wakasindimara unoramba kunzwa; vakatsauka, ndokuenda." 
Jeremiah5:24 “Havati mumwoyo yavo, ‘Zvino ngatitye Jehovha Mwari wedu, unotipa panguva yazvo mvura yokutanga neyokupedzisira, iye unotichengetera mavhiki akatarwa okukohwa.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Zvakaipa zvenyu zvakatsausa izvozvi, kutadza kwenyu kwakadzivisa kuti zvinhu zvakanaka zvirege kuuya kwamuri." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Nokuti vanhu vakaipa varipo pakati pavanhu vangu; vanorindira, savanogarira shiri; vanoteya misungo, vanobata vanhu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Sedendere, rizere neshiri, saizvozvo dzimba dzavo dzizere nokunyengera; nemhaka iyo vakura, vapfuma." 
Jeremiah5:28 Vakora, vanobwinya; zvirokwazvo vanokurira vamwe namabasa akaipa; havatambi mhaka, iyo mhaka yenherera, kuti vagare zvakanaka; havaruramisiri vanoshaiwa." 
Jeremiah5:29 “Ko handingarovi pamusoro pezvinhu izvi here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ko mweya wangu haungazvitsiviri parudzi rwakadai here?” 
Jeremiah5:30 Chinhu chinoshamisa chinosemesa chakaitwa panyika ino; 
Jeremiah5:31 vaporofita vanoporofita nhema, navapristi vanobata ushe vachirairwa navo; asi vanhu vangu vanofarira izvozvo; zvino pakupedzisira kwazvo muchaiteiko?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Tizai, imi vana vaBhenjamini, ibvai pakati peJerusaremu, muridze hwamanda paTekoa, mumutse chiratidzo paBhetirehemu; nokuti zvakaipa zvinovavarira zviri kurutivi rwokumusoro, nokuparadza kukuru." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ndichabvisa mukunda weZioni, iye wakanaka, uno nengwe." 
Jeremiah6:3 Vafudzi vachaenda kwariri vana mapoka avo; vacharidzikira matende avo kumativi ose, mumwe nomumwe uchafura panzvimbo yake." 
Jeremiah6:4 “Zvigadzirei kundorwa naro; simukai, tiende masikati. Tine nhamo, nokuti zuva rovira, nokuti mimvuri yamadekwana yareba." 
Jeremiah6:5 “Simukai, tiende usiku, tindoparadza dzimba dzamadzimambo aro.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Nokuti zvakanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Temai miti, mututire Jerusaremu murwi wokurwa nawo; ndiro guta rinofanira kurohwa, mukati maro munongova nokumanikidza bedzi." 
Jeremiah6:7 Tsime sezvarinobudisa mvura yaro, saizvozvo rinobudisa zvakaipa zvaro; kuita nesimba nokuparadza ndizvo zvinonzwika mukati maro, pamberi pangu panongova nokurwara namavanga nguva dzose." 
Jeremiah6:8 Tenda kurangwa, iwe Jerusaremu, kuti mweya wangu urege kuparadzana newe, ndirege kukuita dongo, nyika isingagari vanhu.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Vachatanha chose zvakasara zvaIsiraeri, somuzambiringa; dzoseraizve ruoko rwenyu mumatengu, sezvinoita mutanhi wemizambiringa.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ndichataura nani nokuvapupurira vanzwe? Tarirai, nzeve dzavo hadzina kudzingiswa, havagoni kunzwa; tariai, shoko raJehovha rava kwavari chinhu chinodadirwa, havarifariri." 
Jeremiah6:11 Naizvozvo ndizere nokutsamwa kwaJehovha, ndaneta kuzvidzora; “Chikudururai pamusoro pavana vari munzira dzomuguta, napamusoro peungano yamajaya; nokuti murume nomukadzi vachabatwa pamwechete, nomutana pamwechete nowava namazuva mazhinji." 
Jeremiah6:12 Dzimba dzavo dzichapiwa vamwe, minda yavo pamwechete navakadzi vavo; nokuti ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pavagere panyika,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah6:13 Nokuti kubva kuvaduku pakati pavo kusvikira kuvakuru pakati pavo mumwe nomumwe unokarira pfuma; uye kubva kuvaporofita kusvikira kuvapristi mumwe nomumwe unoita nokunyengera. 
Jeremiah6:14 Vakangopodza vanga ravanhu vangu zvishoma vachiti, “Rugare, rugare!” Izvo hakuna rugare." 
Jeremiah6:15 Ko vakanyadziswa nguva yavakaita zvinonyangadza here? Kwete havana kutongonyara, vakakoniwa kucheneruka; naizvozvo vachawa pakati pavanowa, panguva yandinovarova vachagumburwa, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah6:16 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Mirai panzira, muwone; bvunzai nzira dzakare, kuti nzira yakanaka ndeipi; mufambe mairi, mugowanira mweya yenyu zoro;” asi vakati, “Hatidi kufamba mairi.”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ndakagadza nharirire kukurindirai, ndikati, “Teererai izwi rehwamanda;” asi ivo vakati, “Hatidi kuteerera.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Naizvozvo inzwai, imi marudzi, newe ungano, muzive zviri pakati pavo." 
Jeremiah6:19 Inzwa, “Iwe nyika, tarira, ndini ndinouyisira vanhu ava zvakaipa, izvo zvibereko zvemifungo yavo, nokuti havana kuteerera mashoko angu; kana uri murairo wangu, vakauramba." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ko zvinonhuwira zvinouyirei kwandiri zvichibva Shebha, nekaramusi inobva kunyika iri kure? Zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa handizvidi, nezvibairo zvenyu hazvindifadzi." 
Jeremiah6:21 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndichaisira vanhu ava zvigumbuso, madzibaba navanakomana vavo vachagumbuswa nazvo pamwechete; munhu neshamwari yake vachaparara pamwechete.’ ”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Tarirai, vanhu vachabva kunyika yokumusoro, rudzi rukuru ruchamutswa, ruchibva kumigumo yenyika." 
Jeremiah6:23 Vakabata uta nepfumo, vane hasha havane nyasha; izwi ravo rinotinhira segungwa; vanotasva mabhiza, mumwe nomumwe wakazvigadzira, somunhu unoenda kuhondo, kuzorwa newe, iwe mukunda weZioni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Takanzwa guhu razvo, maoko edu oshaiwa simba, tabatwa nokutambudzika, nokurwadziwa sokwomukadzi unosurumuka." 
Jeremiah6:25 Regai kubudira kubundo, kana kufamba nenzira; nokuti munondo womuvengi nezvinotyisa zviri kumativi ose." 
Jeremiah6:26 Haiwa, mukunda wavanhu vangu, “Zvisunge chiuno namakudza, uumburuke mumadota; chema, somunhu unochema mwanakomana wake mumwechete, nokuchema kukuru kwazvo; nokuti muparadzi uchatiwira pakarepo.”" 
Jeremiah6:27 Ndakakuita mushori nenhare pakati pavanhu vangu, kuti uzive nokuidza nzira yavo." 
Jeremiah6:28 Vose vavo vamukiri vakaisvoipa, vanongofamba–famba vachiita makuhwa; indarira nedare, vanoita zvakashata vose." 
Jeremiah6:29 Mvuto inovhutira kwazvo, mutobvu wapera nomoto, vanoramba vachinatsa pasina, nokuti vakaipa havabviswi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Vachanzi sirivha yakarashwa, nokuti Jehovha wakavaramba." 
Jeremiah7:1 Shoko rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah7:2 “Mira pasuwo reimba yaJehovha, uparidzirepo shoko iri, uti, ‘Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi vaJudha mose munopinda napamasuwo aya kuzonamata Jehovha.’" 
Jeremiah7:3 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Ruramisai nzira dzenyu nezvamunoita, ndigokugarisai panzvimbo ino.’" 
Jeremiah7:4 Musavimba namashoko enhema, ‘Izvezvi itemberi yaJehovha, temberi yaJehovha, temberi yaJehovha.’"
