Jeremiah7:5 “Nokuti kana mukaruramisa kwazvo nzira dzenyu nezvamunoita, kana muchiita zvakarurama munhu mumwe nomumwe kuno wokwake." 
Jeremiah7:6 “Kana musingamanikidzi mutorwa, nenherera, nechirikadzi, mukasateura ropa risina mhosva panzvimbo ino, nokusatevera vamwe vamwari, vanokuisai panjodzi;" 
Jeremiah7:7 ipapo ndichakugarisai panzvimbo ino, panyika yandakapa madzibaba enyu, kubvira panguva yakare kusvikira nokusingaperi." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Tarirai, munovimba namashoko enhema, asingagoni kubatsira." 
Jeremiah7:9 Mungaba, nokuuraya, nokuita hupombwe, nokupika nhema, nokupisira Bhaari zvinonhuwira, nokutevera vamwe vapirwa vamakanga musingazivi," 
Jeremiah7:10 ndokuzouya momira pamberi pangu muimba ino, panodanwa zita rangu, muchiti, ‘Tasunungurwa;’ kuti mugoita izvi zvose zvinonyangadza here?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Ko imba ino panodanwa zita rangu rava bako ramakororo pamberi penyu here? Tarirai, ini, ini ndimene ndaona izvozvo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah7:12 Asi zvino endai kunzvimbo yangu yaiva paShiro, pandakagarisa zita rangu pakutanga, muone zvandakaiitira nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavanhu vangu Isiraeri." 
Jeremiah7:13 Zvino, zvamakaita mabasa awa ose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ini ndikataura nemi, ndichifumira mangwanani ndichitaura, imi mukasanzwa, ndikakudanai, mukasapindura." 
Jeremiah7:14 “Naizvozvo ndichaitira imba panodanwa zita rangu, yamunovimba nayo, nenzvimbo yandakakupai imi namadzibaba enyu, sezvandakaitira Shiro." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ndichakurashirai kure neni, sezvandakarasha hama dzenyu dzose, irwo rudzi rwose rwaEfuremu.”" 
Jeremiah7:16 “Naizvozvo iwe chirega kunyengeterera vanhu ava, usadanidzira nokunyengetera nokuda kwavo, kana kuvakumbira kwandiri; nokuti handingakunzwi." 
Jeremiah7:17 Hauoni here zvavanoita mumaguta aJudha nomunzira dzomuJerusaremu here? 
Jeremiah7:18 Vana vanounganidza huni, madzibaba ndokubatidza moto, vakadzi vanokanya hupfu kuti vabikire vahosi vokudenga zvingwa, uye kuti vadirire vamwe vamwari zvipiriso zvinodururwa, kuti vanditsamwise." 
Jeremiah7:19 Vanonditsamwisa here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; havainozvinetsa havo, vachingozvinyadzisa havo?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Saka zvanzi naJehovha Mwari, ‘Tarirai, kutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu zvichadururirwa panzvimbo ino, pamusoro pavanhu, napamusoro pezvipfuo, napamusoro pemiti yokubundo, napamusoro pezvibereko zvenyika; zvichapfuta, zvisingadzimwi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, “Wedzerai zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa pazvibairo zvenyu, mudye nyama yazvo." 
Jeremiah7:22 Nokuti handina kutaura namadzibaba enyu, kana kuvaraira panguva yandakavabudisa panyika yeIjipiti pamusoro pezvipiriso zvinopiswa kana zvibairo;" 
Jeremiah7:23 asi ndakavaraira chinhu ichi, ndichiti, ‘Teererai izwi rangu, ndigova Mwari wenyu, nemi muchava vanhu vangu; mufambe nenzira yose yandichakurairai, mugova nomufaro.’" 
Jeremiah7:24 Asi havana kuteerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo, asi vakafamba nokurangarira kwavo nohukukutu hwemwoyo yavo, vakadzokera shure; havana kupfuura mberi." 
Jeremiah7:25 Kubvira pazuva rokubuda kwamadzibaba enyu munyika yeIjipiti, kusvikira pazuva ranhasi, ndakakutumirai varanda vangu vose vaporofita, ndichifumira mangwanani zuva rimwe nerimwe ndichivatuma;" 
Jeremiah7:26 kunyangwe zvakadaro, havana kunditeerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo, asi vakaomesa mitsipa yavo; vakaita zvakaipa kukunda madzibaba avo." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Zvino iwe unofanira kuvataurira mashoko awa ose; asi havangakutereri; unofanira kudanawo kwavari, asi havangakupinduri." 
Jeremiah7:28 Zvino iwe uti kwavati, ‘Urwu ndirwo rudzi rusinganzwi shoko raJehovha Mwari wavo, kana kutenda kurangwa; kutendeka kwapera, kwabva chose pamiromo yavo.’" 
Jeremiah7:29 “Veura hukomba hwako, iwe Jerusaremu, uhurashire kure; undochema pazvikomo zvisina miti, nokuti Jehovha akarasha nokusiya rudzi rwaakatsamwira." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Nokuti vana vaJudha vakaita zvakaipa pamberi pangu, vakaisa zvinonyangadza zvavo muimba pakadanwa zita rangu, kuti vaisvibise ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah7:31 Vakavaka nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzeTofeti, dziri mumupata womwanakomana waHinomu, kuti vapise vanakomana navanasikana vavo mumoto, zviri zvinhu zvandisina kuvaraira, kana kufunga mumwoyo mangu." 
Jeremiah7:32 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, mazuva anouya, avasingazopaidzi Tofeti, kana mupata womwanakomana waHinomu, asi Mupata wokuuraya; nokuti vachaviga vakafa paTofeti, nokuti kuchashaikwa imwe nzvimbo.’" 
Jeremiah7:33 Mitumbu yavanhu ava zvichava zvokudya zveshiri dzokudenga nezvezvikara zvenyika; hakuna uchazvidzinga. 
Jeremiah7:34 Ipapo ndichagumisa pamaguta aJudha napanzira dzomuJerusaremu izwi rokuseka, nenzwi romufaro, nenzwi rechikomba nenzwi romwenga; nokuti nyika ichava dongo." 
Jeremiah8:1 “Nenguva iyo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha uchabvisa pamahwiro avo mapfupa amadzimambo avaJudha, namapfupa amachinda avo, namapfupa avapristi, namapfupa avaporofita, namapfupa avaigara paJerusaremu;" 
Jeremiah8:2 vachaaparadzira panopenya zuva nomwedzi nehondo yose yokudenga, izvo zvavaida, nezvavaishumira, nezvavaitevera, nezvavaivinga, nezvavainamata; haangaunganidzwi, kana kuvigwa, asi achava mupfudze panyika." 
Jeremiah8:3 Rufu ruchasanangurwa kupfuura upenyu navose vakasara panzvimbo dzose kwandakavadzingira” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo. 
Jeremiah8:4 Zvino unofanira kuti kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ko vanhu vangawa, vakasazomukazve here? Munhu ungatsauka, akasazodzoka here?’" 
Jeremiah8:5 Zvino vanhu ava veJerusaremu vakadzokereiko nokudzokera kusingatongoperi? Vanonamatira kunyengera, vanoramba kudzoka." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ndakateerera, ndikanwa, asi havana kutaura zvakarurama; hakuna munhu unochema kuipa kwake, achiti, ‘Ndaiteiko?’ Mumwe nomumwe unotsauka nenzira yake, sebhiza rinomhanya kwazvo pakurwa." 
Jeremiah8:7 Zvirokwazvo, zvimudo, riri kudenga, rinoziva nguva dzaro dzakatarwa, nenjiva nenyenganyenga nekondo dzinorangarira nguva yokuuya kwadzo, asi vanhu vangu havazivi murairo waJehovha." 
Jeremiah8:8 Munoreva seiko, muchiti, ‘Takachenjera, murairo waJehovha tinawo? Asi tarirai, chinyoreso chenhema chavanyori chinonyengera.’" 
Jeremiah8:9 Vanhu vakachenjera vakanyadziswa, vakavhunduka nokubatwa; tarirai, vakaramba shoko raJehovha, zvino vane njere dzakadiniko?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Naizvozvo ndichapa vamwe vakadzi vavo, neminda yavo ndichaipa vamwe vachaiita yavo; nokuti mumwe nomumwe wavo, kubva kuvaduku kusvikira kuvakuru, mumwe nomumwe unokarira pfuma; kubva kuvaporofita kusvikira kuvapristi mumwe nomumwe unoita nokunyengera." 
Jeremiah8:11 Vakangopodza vanga romukunda wavanhu vangu zvishoma, vachiti, ‘Rugare, rugare!’ Izvo hakuna rugare." 
Jeremiah8:12 “Ko vakanyadziswa nguva yavakaita zvinonyangadza here? Kwete, havana kutongonyara, vakakoniwa kucheneruka; naizvozvo vachawa pakati pavanowa; panguva yokurohwa kwavo vachagumburwa ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah8:13 “Ndichavapedza chose,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; “Hakungavi namazambiringa pamuzambiringa, kana maonde pamuonde, namashizha achaoma ndakaraira vachavakukura." 
Jeremiah8:14 “Tinogarireiko pasi? Unganai, tipinde mumaguta akakomberedzwa, tifirepo; nokuti Jehovha Mwari wedu wakatiuraya, akatipa mvura inouraya kuti tiinwe; nokuti takatadzira Jehovha." 
Jeremiah8:15 Takanga takatarira rugare, asi hakuna chakanaka chakasvika; takanga takatarira nguva yokuporeswa, asi tarirai, takavhunduswa." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kufemhedza kwamabhiza ake kwakanzwika achiri paDhani; nyika yose yakadedera nenzwi rokurira kwaane simba rake; nokuti asvika, apedza nyika nezvose zvirimo, neguta navose vageremo." 
Jeremiah8:17 “Nokuti tarirai, ndichatuma pakati penyu nyoka nemvumbi, dzicharamba kuroyiwa; dzichakurumai,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah8:18 Haiwa, dai ndaigona hangu kuzvinyaradza pakuchema kwangu! Mwoyo wangu waziya mukati mangu." 
Jeremiah8:19 Inzwai, izwi rokuchema kwomukunda wavanhu vangu, rinobva kunyika iri kure–kure, richiti, “Ko Jehovha haazi muZioni here? Mambo waro haazi mukati maro here? Vakanditsamwisireiko nezvifananidzo zvavo zvakavezwa, nezvavatorwa zvisina maturo?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 “Kucheka kwapera, zhizha rapfuura, asi tigere kuponeswa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Ini ndinokuvadzwa nokuda kwokukuvadzwa kwomukunda wavanhu vangu; ndinochema, ndabatwa nokuvhunduswa." 
Jeremiah8:22 Ko hakuna muti webharisami muGiriadhi here? Hakuna murapi ikoko here? Nokuti mukunda wavanhu vangu wakagoregerei kupodzwa? 
Jeremiah9:1 Haiwa, dai musoro wangu waiva nemvura zhinji, nameso angu riri tsime remisodzi, ndingadai ndaichema masikati nousiku nokuda kwavakaurayiwa vomukunda wavanhu vangu!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Haiwa, dai ndaiva nedumba rinosigarwa navafambi murenje, ndingadai ndaisiya vanhu vangu, ndikabva kwavari! Nokuti vose imhombwe, iungano yavanhu vanonyengera." 
Jeremiah9:3 “Vanokunga marimi avo, sezvavanoita huta hwavo, kuzoreva nhema; vasimba panyika, asi havaiti nezvokwadi; nokuti vanoramba vachingoita zvakaipa, havandizivi,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah9:4 Mumwe nomumwe ngaachenjerere wokwake, murege kutenda hama ipi neipi; nokuti hama imwe neimwe ichanyengera, nowokwake mumwe nomumwe uchapota–pota ana makuhwa." 
Jeremiah9:5 Mumwe nomumwe uchanyengera wokwake, haangarevi zvokwadi; vakadzidzisa marimi avo kureva nhema, vanozvinetsa nokuita zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah9:6 “Hugaro hwenyu huri pakati pokunyengera; vanoramba kundiziva nokunyengera kwavo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah9:7 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Tarirai, ndichanyausa nokuvaidza; nokuti ndingaita seiko pamusoro pomukunda wavanhu vangu?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Marimi avo miseve inouraya, anoreva zvinonyengera; munhu unoreva zvorugare kuno wokwake nomuromo wake, asi mumwoyo make unovandira." 
Jeremiah9:9 Ko handingavarovi pamusoro pezvinhu izvi here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Ko mweya wangu haungatsihwi parudzi rwakadai here?” 
Jeremiah9:10 “Ndichachema nokuwungudza pamusoro pamakomo, ndichachema pamusoro pamafuro amarenje, nokuti zvatsva, hakuna unopfuura napo; vanhu havagoni kunzwa izwi rezvipfuo; shiri dzokudenga nemhuka dzose zvatiza, zvaenda hazvo." 
Jeremiah9:11 Ndichaita Jerusaremu mirwi yamabwe, panogara makava; namaguta aJudha ndichaaita matongo, asina unogaramo.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Munhu wakachenjera, unonzwisisa izvozvi, ndianiko? Muromo waJehovha akataura naniko, kuti aparidze izvozvi? Nyika yakapedzwa nokupiswa serenje neiko, pasina unopfuura napo?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Jehovha akati, “Zvavakarasha murairo wangu wandakaisa pamberi pavo, vakasateerera izwi rangu, nokufamba nazvo," 
Jeremiah9:14 asi vakatevera hukukutu hwemwoyo yavo navaBhaari, izvo zvavakadzidziswa namadzibaba avo;" 
Jeremiah9:15 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tarirai, ndichadyisa vanhu ava gavakava, nokuvanwisa mvura yenduru." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndichavaparadzirawo pakati pamarudzi, avakanga vasingazivi ivo kunyangwe namadzibaba avo; ndichatuma munondo uvatevere, kusvikira ndavapedza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Rangarirai imi, mudane vakadzi vangachema, vauye; tumai mudane vakadzi mhizha, vauye;" 
Jeremiah9:18 ngavakurumidze vacheme pamusoro pedu, kuti meso edu ayerere misodzi, namafungiro edu adurure mvura.”" 
Jeremiah9:19 Nokuti izwi rokuchema rinonzwika richibva Zioni, richiti, “Haiwa, takaparadzwa seiko! Takanyadziswa kwazvo, nokuti tabva panyika yedu nokuti vakakoromora dzimba dzedu dzataigara.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Asi inzwai shoko raJehovha, “Imi vakadzi nzeve dzenyu ngadzinzwe shoko romuromo wake; dzidzisai vakunda venyu kuchema, mumwe nomumwe adzidzise wokwake kuwungudza." 
Jeremiah9:21 “Nokuti rufu rwakakwira pamahwindo edu, rwakapinda mudzimba dzamadzimambo edu, kuti rupedze vana vari kunze, namajaya ari panzira dzomuguta.”" 
Jeremiah9:22 Taura, uti, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvitunha zvavanhu zvichawira pasi somupfudze kubundo, setsama yehura dzinosiyiwa nomucheki, dzisina unodziunganidza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Munhu wakachenjera ngaarege kuzvirumbidza pamusoro pohuchenjeri hwake, nomunhu wesimba ngaarege kuzvirumbidza pamusoro pesimba rake, nomunhu wakapfuma ngaarege kuzvirumbidza pamusoro pepfuma yake;" 
Jeremiah9:24 asi unozvirumbidza, ngaazvirumbidze pamusoro pechinhu ichi, kuti unondinzwisisa nokundiziva ini, kuti ndini Jehovha, unoita hunyoro nokururamisira, nokururama panyika; nokuti ndinofarira zvinhu izvi” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah9:25 “Tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha mazuva anouya, andicharova vose vakadzingiswa pakati pokusadzingiswa kwavo;" 
Jeremiah9:26 vanoti; Ijipiti, naJudha, naEdhomu, navana vaAmoni, naMoabhu, navose vakaveurwa vhudzi ravo kumativi, vanogara kurenje; nokuti marudzi ose haana kudzingiswa, uye vose veimba yaIsiraeri havana kudzingiswa pamwoyo yavo.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Inzwai shoko rinotaura Jehovha kwamuri, imi imba yaIsiraeri," 
Jeremiah10:2 zvanzi naJehovha, “Regai kudzidza tsika dzamarudzi avanhu, musavhunduswa nezviratidzo zvokudenga; nokuti marudzi avanhu anovhunduswa nazvo." 
Jeremiah10:3 Nokuti tsika dzavanhu hadzina maturo; nokuti mumwe unotema muti mudondo, riri basa ramaoko omunhu unoveza nedemo." 
Jeremiah10:4 Vanoushongedza nesirivha nendarama, vanourovera nembambo nenyundo, kuti urege kuzununguka." 
Jeremiah10:5 Zvakafanana nembiru dzakavezwa, dzisingatauri; zvinofanira kutakurwa, nokuti hazvigoni kufamba. Musazvitya, nokuti hazvigoni kuita zvakaipa, kunyangwe kuita zvakanaka, hazvigoni.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Hakuna wakafanana nemi Jehovha; imi muri mukuru, zita renyu iguru nesimba raro." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ndianiko ungarega kukutyai, imi Mambo wamarudzi avanhu? Nokuti makafanira izvozvi; nokuti pakati pavakachenjera vose vamarudzi avanhu, napaushe hwavo hwose, hakuna wakafanana nemi." 
Jeremiah10:8 Asi vose pamwechete havane njere, mapenzi; dzidzo yezvifananidzo idanda zvaro." 
Jeremiah10:9 Isirivha yakapfurwa ikaita bope, yakatorwa Tashishi, nendarama inobva Ufazi, riri basa remhizha neramaoko omupfuri wendarama; zvakafukidzwa nguo dzemicheka mitema nemitsvuku; zvose ibasa ravanhu venjere." 
Jeremiah10:10 Asi Jehovha ndiye Mwari wazvokwadi; ndiye Mwari mupenyu, naMambo wokusingaperi; kana iye atsamwa nyika inodedera, marudzi avanhu haagoni kumira pahasha dzake." 
Jeremiah10:11 Itiyi kwavari, “Vamwari vasina kuita denga nenyika, ndivo vachapera panyika napasi pedenga rose.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Ndiye wakaita nyika nesimba rake, wakateya nyika nohuchenjeri hwake, wakatatamura denga rose nenjere dzake." 
Jeremiah10:13 Kana achibudisa izwi rake, kuno mubvumo wemvura zhinji kudenga; unokwidza makore pamigumo yenyika, unoita mheni kuuyisa mvura, unobudisa mhepo panovigwa pfuma yake." 
Jeremiah10:14 Munhu mumwe nomumwe wava usina njere, haane zivo; mupfuri mumwe nomumwe wendarama unonyadziswa nechifananidzo chake chaakaveza, nokuti chifananidzo chake chaakaumba, ndechenhema; hakuna mweya mazviri." 
Jeremiah10:15 Hazvina maturo, ibasa rinonyengera; panguva yokurohwa kwazvo zvichapera." 
Jeremiah10:16 Mugove waJakobho haufanani naizvozvo, nokuti ndiye muumbi wazvose; Isiraeri ndirwo rudzi rwenhaka yake; Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake." 
Jeremiah10:17 Unganidza nhumbi dzako, ubve panyika, iwe unogara wakakombwa." 
Jeremiah10:18 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, “Tarirai, nguva ino ndichaposhera kure vanhu vagere munyika ino, ndichavamanikidza, kuti vawanikwe.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Ndine nhamo nokuda kwokurwadziwa kwangu! Vanga rangu rakaipa kwazvo; asi ndakati, “Zvirokwazvo ndihwo hurwere hwangu, ndinofanira kuhutakura hangu.”" 
Jeremiah10:20 Tende rangu rakaputswa, mabote angu ose akadamburwa; vana vangu vabva kwandiri, havachiripo; hakuchina ungatatamura tende rangu, kana kumisazve micheka yetende rangu." 
Jeremiah10:21 Nokuti vafudzi vava vasina njere, havana kubvunza Jehovha; naizvozvo havana kuzofara, namapoka avo ose akapararira." 
Jeremiah10:22 Inzwai, mukurumbira! Tarirai, bope guru rinouya richibva kunyika yokumusoro, kushandura maguta aJudha ave matongo, panogara makava." 
Jeremiah10:23 Haiwa, Jehovha, ndinoziva kuti nzira yomunhu haizi yake amene; munhu, unofamba, haagoni kururamisa nhano dzake." 
Jeremiah10:24 Haiwa, Jehovha, ndirangei henyu asi muite nokururama; musazviita nokutsamwa kwenyu, kuti murege kundipedza chose." 
Jeremiah10:25 Dururirai kutsamwa kwenyu pamusoro pamarudzi avanhu vasingakuziviyi, napamusoro pamarudzi asingadani zita renyu; nokuti vakadya Jakobho, zvirokwazvo, vakamudya nokumupedza, vakaparadza hugaro hwake." 
Jeremiah11:1 Shoko rakauya kuna Jeremiya, richibva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Inzwa mashoko esungano iyi, mutaure navanhu vaJudha, navagere Jerusaremu," 
Jeremiah11:3 uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, munhu usinganzwi mashoko esungano iyi, ngaatukwe,’" 
Jeremiah11:4 aya andakaraira madzibaba enyu nezuva randakavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, muchoto chamatare, ndichiti, ‘Teererai izwi rangu, muzviite zvose sezvandakakurairai; ipapo muchava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wenyu;" 
Jeremiah11:5 kuti ndisimbise kupika kwandakapikira madzibaba enyu, kuti ndichavapa nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, sezvazvakaita zuva ranhasi.’ Ipapo ndakapindura, ndikati, ‘Ameni, Jehovha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Paridza mashoko awa ose pamaguta aJudha, napanzira dzomuJerusaremu, uchiti, ‘Inzwai mashoko esungano iyi, muaite.’" 
Jeremiah11:7 Nokuti ndakarairira madzibaba enyu kwazvo nezuva randakavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, kusvikira zuva ranhasi, ndichifumira mangwanani, ndichirairira, ndichiti, ‘Teererai izwi rangu.’" 
Jeremiah11:8 Asi havana kuteerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo, asi mumwe nomumwe wavo wakaramba achifamba nohukukutu hwomwoyo wake wakaipa; naizvozvo ndakauyisa pamusoro pavo mashoko ose esungano iyi, andakavaraira kuti vaaite, asi havana kuaita.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Rangano yakaipa yawanikwa pakati pavanhu vaJudha, napakati pavagere Jerusaremu." 
Jeremiah11:10 Vakadzokera kune zvakaipa zvamadzitateguru avo, akaramba kunzwa mashoko angu, vakatevera vamwe vamwari kuti vavashumire; imba yaIsiraeri neimba yaJudha vakaputsa sungano yangu yandakaita namadzibaba avo." 
Jeremiah11:11 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro pavo, zvavasingagoni kutiza; vachadanidzira kwandiri, asi handingavanzwi." 
Jeremiah11:12 Ipapo vamaguta aJudha navagere Jerusaremu, vachandodanidzira kuna vamwari vavanopisira zvinonhuwira; asi havangatongovaponesi panguva yokutambudzika kwavo." 
Jeremiah11:13 Nokuti iwe Judha, kuwanda kwavamwari vako kwakafanana nokuwanda kwamaguta ako; uye makavakira chinhu chinonyadzisa maatari, iwo maatari okupisira Bhaari zvinonhuwira, akawanda senzira dzomuJerusaremu.’" 
Jeremiah11:14 “Saka iwe usanyengeterera vanhu ava, kana kudana nokuda kwavo nenzwi rako kana munyengetero wako; nokuti handingavanzwi nenguva yavanodanidzira kwandiri nokuda kwokutambudzika kwavo." 
Jeremiah11:15 “Mudikanwa wangu unotsvakeiko mumba mangu, zvaakaita zvinonyangadza navazhinji? Mhiko nenyama tsvene zvingabvisa njodzi yako here? Ipapo ungafara kwazvo." 
Jeremiah11:16 Jehovha akakutumidza zita rinonzi, Muorivhi mutema, wakanaka nezvibereko zvakanaka; asi wakazovesa moto pamusoro pawo nomubvumo webope guru, matavi awo akavhuniwa." 
Jeremiah11:17 Nokuti Jehovha wehondo, iye wakakusima, wakareva zvakaipa pamusoro pako, nokuda kwezvakaipa zveimba yaIsiraeri, neimba yaJudha, zvavakaita vachinditsamwisa nokupisira kwavo Bhaari zvinonhuwira.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Jehovha akandizivisa izvozvo, ndikazviziva; ipapo mukandiratidza zvavanoita." 
Jeremiah11:19 Asi ini ndakanga ndakafanana negwayana nyoro rinoiswa kundobayiwa; ndakanga ndisingazivi kuti vakanga varangana mano akaipa pamusoro pangu, vachiti, “Ngatiparadze muti pamwechete nezvibereko zvawo, ngatimubvise chose panyika yavapenyu, zita rake rirege kuzorangarirwa.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Asi imi Jehovha wehondo, imi munotonga zvakarurama, munoidza itsvo nomwoyo, ndichaona kutsiva kwenyu kwavari, nokuti ndakakuzarurirai mhaka yangu." 
Jeremiah11:21 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pavanhu veAnatoti, vanotsvaka kukuuraya, vachiti, “Haufaniri kuporofita nezita raJehovha, kuti urege kuurayiwa namaoko edu;”" 
Jeremiah11:22 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Tarirai, ndichavarova; majaya achaurayiwa nomunondo, vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo vachaurayiwa nenzara;" 
Jeremiah11:23 havangasarirwi navanhu, nokuti ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro pavanhu veAnatoti pagore rokurohwa kwavo.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Imi Jehovha, makarurama kana ndichikakavara nemi; kunyangwe zvakadaro ndinoda kutaurirana nemi pamusoro pokururamisa kwenyu, nzira yavakaipa inomufaro neiko? Vanoita nokunyengera vanogarireiko vose vane rugare?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Imi makavasima, zvirokwazvo midzi yavo yakabata; vanokura, zvirokwazvo vanobereka zvibereko; imi muri pedyo nemiromo yavo, asi muri kure nemwoyo yavo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Asi imi Jehovha munondiziva; munondiona, munoidza mwoyo wangu kuti wakadini kwamuri; muvakweve samakwai anondobayiwa, muvagadzirire zuva rokubayiwa." 
Jeremiah12:4 Nyika ichachema, nemiriwo yenyika yose ichasvava kusvikira rinhiko? Mhuka neshiri zvinopedzwa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavageremo, nokuti vakati, “Haangaoni kuguma kwedu.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 “Kana uchinge wakamhanya navanofamba namakumbo, ukaneta ungagona seiko kuvhivhana namabhiza? Kana uchinge wakagara zvakanaka panyika yorugare, ungaita seiko pamatenhere aJodhani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 “Nokuti naidzo hama dzako naveimba yababa vako vakaita nokunyengera kwauri; naivo vakadanidzira kwauri, usavatenda, kunyangwe vachitaura mashoko akanaka newe.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 “Ndasiya imba yangu, ndarasha nhaka yangu; ndaisa mudikanwa womwoyo wangu mumaoko avavengi vake." 
Jeremiah12:8 Nhaka yangu yava kwandiri seshumba iri mudondo; yandiombera, saka ndakaivenga." 
Jeremiah12:9 Ko nhaka yangu yava kwandiri segondo rina mavara here? Makondo akaikomba kumativi ose here? Endai mundokokera zvikara zvose zvokusango, muuye nazvo zvidye." 
Jeremiah12:10 Vafudzi vazhinji vakaparadza munda wangu wemazambiringa, vakatsika mugove wangu namakumbo avo, vakaita mugove wangu unodikanwa rive renje risina chinhu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Vakauita dongo; unochema kwandiri, zvawakaitwa dongo; nyika yose yakaitwa dongo, nokuti hakuna munhu une hanya nayo." 
Jeremiah12:12 Vaparadzi vakasvika pazvikomo zvose zvisina miti murenje; nokuti munondo waJehovha unopedza kubva kumugumo mumwe wenyika kusvikira kuno mumwe mugumo wenyika; hakuna nyama ino rugare. 
Jeremiah12:13 Vakakusha zviyo, asi vakacheka minzwa; vakazvitambudza, asi havana kuwana chinhu; muchanyadziswa pamusoro pezvibereko zveminda yenyu, nokuda kwokutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro povokwangu vose vakaipa vanopamba nhaka yandakagarisa vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri, “Tarirai, ndichavadzura panyika yavo, ndichadzura veimba yaJudha pakati pavo." 
Jeremiah12:15 “Zvino kana ndavadzura, ndichadzoka, ndikavanzwira tsitsi, ndichavadzosera mumwe nomumwe kunhaka yake, nomumwe nomumwe kunyika yake." 
Jeremiah12:16 Zvino kana vachidzidza zvakanaka tsika dzavanhu vangu, kupika nezita rangu, vachiti, ‘NaJehovha mupenyu,’ sezvavakadzidzisa vanhu vangu kupika naBhaari, ipapo vachavakiswa pakati pavanhu vangu." 
Jeremiah12:17 “Asi kana vasinganzwi, ndichadzura rudzi uro, ndicharudzura nokuruparadza” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah13:1 Zvanzi naJehovha kwandiri, “Enda undozvitengera bhandi romucheka, uzvisunge chiuno naro; asi usaruisa mumvura.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Ipapo ndakatenga bhandi, sezvakarehwa neshoko raJehovha, ndikazvisunga chiuno naro." 
Jeremiah13:3 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri rwechipiri, richiti," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Tora bhandi rawatenga, riri pachiuno chako, usimuke uende kurwizi rwaYufuretesi, undoriviga mumukaha wedombo.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Ipapo ndakaenda, ndikandoriviga parwizi rwaYufuretesi, sezvandakarairwa naJehovha." 
Jeremiah13:6 Zvino mazuva mazhinji akati apfuura, Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Simuka, uende kwaYufuretesi, utorepo bhandi randakakuraira kuti urivigepo.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Ipapo ndakaenda kwaYufuretesi, ndikachera, ndikatora bhandi pandakanga ndariviga; zvino tarira, bhandi rakanga raora, risina basa chose." 
Jeremiah13:8 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Saizvozvo ndichaodza kuzvikudza kwaJudha, nokuzvikudza kukuru kweJerusaremu." 
Jeremiah13:10 Vanhu ava vakaipa, vanoramba kunzwa mashoko angu, vanofamba nohukukutu hwemwoyo yavo, vakatevera vamwe vamwari kuti vavashumire nokuvanamata, vachafanana nebhandi iri, risina basa chose.’" 
Jeremiah13:11 “Nokuti bhandi sezvarinonamatira pachiuno chomunhu, saizvozvo ndakanga ndanamatidza imba yaIsiraeri yose neimba yaJudha kwandiri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha kuti vave vanhu vangu, nembiri yangu, nokurumbidzwa kwangu, nokubwinya kwangu; asi vakaramba kuteerera." 
Jeremiah13:12 Naizvozvo unofanira kutaura shoko iri kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Mudziyo mumwe nomumwe uchazadzwa newaini;’ zvino ivo vachati kwauri, ‘Hatizivi kanhi kuti mudziyo mumwe nomumwe uchazadzwa newaini?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Ipapo uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha tarirai, vose vagere munyika ino, iwo madzimambo agere pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi, navapristi navaporofita, navose vagere Jerusaremu, ndichavazadza nokubatwa newaini." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ndichavagumirisana, madzibaba navanakomana vavo pamwechete ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Handinganzwiri tsitsi, handingadariki mumwe, kana kuva nengoni, kuti ndirege kuvaparadza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Inzwai, murerekere nzeve; musazvikudza, nokuti Jehovha akataura." 
Jeremiah13:16 Rumbidzai Jehovha, Mwari wenyu, asati auyisa rima, tsoka dzenyu dzisati dzagumburwa pamakomo erima, iye asati ashandura chiedza chamakamirira, akachiita mumvuri worufu, nokuchiita rima guru." 
Jeremiah13:17 Asi kana musingadi kuzvinzwa, mweya wangu uchakuchema pakavanda nokuda kwokuzvikudza kwenyu; meso angu achachema kwazvo, achayerera misodzi, nokuti boka raJehovha ratapwa." 
Jeremiah13:18 Iti kuna mambo nokuna mai vamambo, “Garai pasi–pasi kwazvo, nokuti zvishongo zvemisoro yenyu zvawira pasi, iyo korona yokukudzwa kwenyu.”" 
Jeremiah13:19 Maguta okurutivi rwezasi akazarirwa, hakuna unoazarura; vaJudha vakatapwa vose, vakatapwa chose–chose." 
Jeremiah13:20 “Ringira meso ako, uone vanobva kurutivi rwokumusoro. Ko boka rawakapiwa, iro boka rako rakanaka kwazvo, riripi?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Uchati kudiniko kana achiisa pamusoro pako ivo vawakadzidzisa kuva shamwari dzako vave vabati vako? Haungabatwi nokurwadziwa sokuwomukadzi unopona here? 
Jeremiah13:22 Zvino kana ukati mumwoyo mako, ‘Izvozvi zvandiwira neiko?’ Nguo dzako dzakafukurwa nezvitsitsino zvako zvakuvadzwa nemhaka yohukuru hwezvakaipa zvenyu." 
Jeremiah13:23 Ko muItiopia ungashandura ganda rake, kana ingwe mavara ayo here? Kana zvaibvira, nemiwo maigona kuita zvakanaka, iyemi makarovera kuita zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah13:24 “Saka ndichavaparadzira sehundi inopepereswa nemhepo murenje. 
Jeremiah13:25 Ndizvo zvawakagoverwa, ndiwo mugove wawakayererwa neni ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti wakandikanganwa, ukavimba nezvehama." 
Jeremiah13:26 Saka ndichafukurawo nguo dzako pamberi pako, kunyadziswa kwako kuonekwe." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndakaona kunyangadza kwako, ihwo hupombwe hwako, nokufemhedza kwako, nokunyadza kwokupombora kwako pazvikomo zvokubundo. Une nhamo, iwe Jerusaremu! Unoramba kunatswa; zvichadaro kusvikira rinhiko?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 Shoko raJehovha rakauya kuna Jeremiya pamusoro pokusanaya kwemvura. 
Jeremiah14:2 Judha vanochema, namasuwo avo anoshaiwa simba, vagere pasi vakafuka nguo nhema; kuchema kweJerusaremu kwakwira kumusoro." 
Jeremiah14:3 Vakuru vavo vanotuma varanda vavo kumvura; vanosvika kumadziva, ndokushaiwa mvura, vanodzoka nezvirongo zvisina; vakanyadziswa nokukanganiswa, vanofukidza misoro yavo." 
Jeremiah14:4 Varimi vanonyadziswa, vanofukidza misoro yavo, nokuda kwenyika yakaparuka, nokuti mvura haina kunaya panyika." 
Jeremiah14:5 Zvirokwazvo, hadzi yenondo inoberekawo musango, ndokurasha mhuru yayo, nokuti hakuna bumhudza." 
Jeremiah14:6 Mbizi dzinomira pazvikomo zvisina miti, dzichifema mhepo samakava; meso adzo aneta, nokuti hakuna huswa." 
Jeremiah14:7 “Kunyangwe zvakaipa zvedu zvichitipupurira, imi Jehovha, batai nokuda kwezita renyu; nokuti kudzokera kwedu kuzhinji; takakutadzirai." 
Jeremiah14:8 Imi chitariro chaIsiraeri, Muponesi wavo nenguva yokutambudzika, munoitireiko somutorwa panyika, uye somufambi unotsauka kuzovata usiku chete?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Munoitireiko somunhu unotya, somunhu une simba usingagoni kuponesa? Kunyangwe zvakadaro imi Jehovha muri pakati pedu, takatumidzwa nezita renyu; regai kutisiya.”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Zvanzi naJehovha kuvanhu ava, “Saizvozvo vakafarira kudzungaira, havana kudzora tsoka dzavo; naizvozvo Jehovha haana kuvafarira; zvino ucharangarira zvakaipa zvavo, nokuvarova pamusoro pezvivi zvavo.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Usanyengeterera vanhu ava uchivakumbirira zvakanaka." 
Jeremiah14:12 Kana vachizvinyima zvokudya, handinganzwi kuchema kwavo; kana vachiuya nezvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvoupfu, handingazvigamuchiri; asi ndichavapedza nomunondo, nenzara, uye nechirwere.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Ipapo ndakati, “Haiwa, Jehovha Mwari, tarirai, vaporofita vanoti kwavari, ‘Hamungaoni munondo, kana kunzwa nzara; asi ndichakupai rugare rwazvokwadi panzvimbo ino.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Vaporofita vanoporofita nhema muzita rangu; ini handina kuvatuma, ini handina kuvaraira, kana kutaura navo; vanokuporofiterai zvinonzi zvakaonekwa asi dziri nhema, nezvakaukwa, nezvisina maturo, nokunyengera kwemwoyo yavo.”" 
Jeremiah14:15 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pavaporofita vanoporofita muzita rangu, ndisina kuvatuma hangu, vachiti, “Munondo nenzara hazvingavi munyika ino; zvanzi, ‘Vaporofita avo vachapedzwa nomunondo nenzara." 
Jeremiah14:16 Navanhu vavanoporofitera vacharashwa munzira dzomuJerusaremu nemhaka yenzara nomunondo; vachashaiwa unovaviga ivo, navakadzi vavo, navanakomana vavo, navanasikana vavo; nokuti ndichadurura zvakaipa zvavo pamusoro pavo.’" 
Jeremiah14:17 “Zvino iwe chivaudza shoko iri, uti, ‘Meso angu angaayerere misodzi usiku namasikati, asarega; nokuti mhandara mukunda wavanhu vangu wakuvadzwa nokukuvadzwa kukuru, nevanga rakaipa kwazvo." 
Jeremiah14:18 Kana ndichifamba musango, tarirai, vakaurayiwa nomunondo! Kana ndichipinda muguta, tarirai, vanorwara nenzara! Nokuti vaporofita navapristi vose vanopota nenyika, vasingazivi chinhu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Maramba Judha chose here? Mweya wenyu wasema Zioni here? Matirovereiko, tikashaiwa kuporeswa? Takatarira rugare, asi hakuna chakanaka chakauya, nenguva yokuporeswa, asi tarirai, kuvhunduswa bedzi!" 
Jeremiah14:20 Haiwa Jehovha, tinoziva zvakaipa zvedu, nokutadza kwamadzibaba edu; nokuti takakutadzirai." 
Jeremiah14:21 “Regai kutisema nokuda kwezita renyu; regai kushora chigaro chokukudzwa kwenyu; rangarirai henyu, musaputsa sungano yenyu nesu." 
Jeremiah14:22 Varipo here pakati pavamwari vasina maturo vavahedheni vanganisa mvura? Denga ringanisa mvura here? Hamuzimi here, imi Jehovha Mwari wedu? Naizvozvo tichakumirirai, nokuti ndimi makaita zvinhu izvi zvose.”" 
Jeremiah15:1 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Kunyangwe Mosesi naSamueri vamire pamberi pangu, mwoyo wangu haungavi nehanya navanhu ava; uvadzinge pamberi pangu, vaende." 
Jeremiah15:2 “Zvino kana vakati kwauri, ‘Tichaendepiko?’ Uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha vakafanirwa norufu ngavaende kurufu, vakafanirwa nenzara, kunzara, navakafanirwa nokutapwa, kukutapwa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah15:3 Ndichavatumira njodzi dzamarudzi mana ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha munondo kuvauraya, nembwa kuvakwekweredza, neshiri dzokudenga nezvikara zvenyika kuvadya nokuvaparadza." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndichavadzungaidza pakati poushe hwenyika, nemhaka yaManase, mwanakomana waHezekiya, mambo waJudha, pamusoro pezvaakaita paJerusaremu." 
Jeremiah15:5 “Nokuti ndiani uchakunzwira tsitsi, iwe Jerusaremu? Ndiani uchakuchema? Ndianiko uchatsauka kuzobvunza mufaro wako?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Wakandiramba, wakadzokera shure; saka ndakatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kurwa newe, ndikakuparadza; ndaneta nokuzvidemba.’" 
Jeremiah15:7 Ndakavarudza nechokurudza pamasuwo enyika; ndakavatorera vana vavo, ndakaparadza vanhu vangu; asi havana kudzoka panzira dzavo." 
Jeremiah15:8 Chirikadzi dzavo dzandiwandira kupfuura jecha regungwa; ndakauyisira mai namajaya muparadzi panguva yamasikati; ndakawisira mai kamwe–kamwe kurwadziwa nezvinotyisa. 
Jeremiah15:9 “Iye, wakabereka vanomwe, wapera simba, wabudisa mweya wake; zuva rake rakavira achiri masikati; wakanyadziswa nokukanganiswa; vakasara vavo ndichavaurayisa nomunondo pamberi pavavengi vavo” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah15:10 Ndine nhamo mai vangu, zvakandibereka ndive munhu wenharo nomunhu wegakava panyika yose! Handina kupa chikwereti, navanhu havana kutora chikwereti kwandiri; kunyangwe zvakadaro vanondituka vose." 
Jeremiah15:11 Jehovha akati, “Zvirokwazvo, ndichakusimbisira zvakanaka; zvirokwazvo, ndichanyengeteresa muvengi wako kwauri nenguva yezvakaipa, uye nenguva yokutambudzika.”" 
Jeremiah15:12 “Ko dare ringavhuniwa here, iro dare rinobva kurutivi rwokumusoro, kana ndarira here?" 
Jeremiah15:13 “Nhumbi dzako nepfuma yako ndichazviisa kukutapwa, zvisingatengwi, nokuda kwezvivi zvako zvose pamiganhu yako yose." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndichakuendisa navavengi vako kunyika yausingazivi; nokuti moto wakabatidzwa nokutsamwa kwangu, uchapfuta pamusoro penyu.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Haiwa Jehovha, imi munoziva; ndirangarirei, mundishanyire, munditsivire vatambudzi vangu; musandibvisa pakuitira kwenyu vamwe mwoyo murefu; zivai kuti ndakatukwa nokuda kwenyu." 
Jeremiah15:16 Mashoko enyu akawanikwa, ndikaadya; mashoko enyu akava mufaro wangu nokufadzwa kwomwoyo wangu; nokuti ndakatumidzwa nezita renyu, imi Jehovha, Mwari wehondo." 
Jeremiah15:17 Handina kugara pakati peungano yavanoseka, kana kufara navo; ndakagara ndiri ndoga nokuda kworuoko rwenyu, nokuti makandizadza nokutsamwa kwenyu." 
Jeremiah15:18 Kurwadziwa kwangu kunorambireiko kuripo nokusingaperi, vanga rangu rinorambirei kurapwa, risingadi kupora? Muchava kwandiri zvirokwazvo sorukova runonyengera, semvura inopwa here?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Saka zvanzi naJehovha, “Kana ukadzoka, ndichakudzosa, kuti umire pamberi pangu; kana ukatsaura zvakanaka uchizvibvisa pane zvakaipa, uchava somuromo wangu; ivo vachadzokera kwauri, asi iwe usadzokera kwavari." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ndichakuita kuna vanhu ava rusvingo rwendarira rwakasimbiswa; vacharwa newe asi havangakukundi, nokuti ini ndinewe ndikuponese nokukurwira." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndichakurwira pamaoko avakaipa, nokukudzikinura pamaoko avanotyisa.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandirizve, richiti," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Rega kuwana mukadzi kana kuva navanakomana kana vanasikana panzvimbo ino. 
Jeremiah16:3 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pavanakomana napamusoro pavanasikana vanoberekerwa panzvimbo ino, napamusoro pamadzimai avo akavabereka, napamusoro pamadzibaba avo akavabereka panyika ino," 
Jeremiah16:4 Vachafa norufu rwakaipa kwazvo; havangachemwi kana kuvigwa; vachava somupfudze panyika; vachapedzwa nomunondo uye nenzara; zvitunha zvavo zvichava zvokudya zveshiri dzokudenga nezvikara zvenyika. 
Jeremiah16:5 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Usapinda mumba yokuchema, usavawungudzira kana kuvachema;’ nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndabvisa rugare rwangu pavanhu ava, ihwo hunyoro hwangu nenyasha dzangu.’" 
Jeremiah16:6 “Vakuru navaduku vose vachafa munyika ino; havangavigwi, navanhu havangavachemi, kana kuzvicheka nokuzviveura nokuda kwavo;" 
Jeremiah16:7 vanhu havangavameduriri chingwa pakuchema kwavo, vachiti vavanyaradze pamusoro pavakafa, uye vanhu havangavapi mukombe wokunyaradza vanwe pamusoro pababa vavo kana mai vavo." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Newe usapinda muimba yomutambo, kuti ugare navo, uchidya nokunwa." 
Jeremiah16:9 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tarirai, ndichagumisa panzvimbo ino, muchizviona pamazuva enyu, izwi rokuseka, nenzwi romufaro, nenzwi rechikomba nenzwi romwenga.’" 
Jeremiah16:10 “Zvino kana uchizivisa vanhu ava mashoko awa ose, vachati kwauri, ‘Jehovha wakarevereiko zvakaipa izvi zvikuru zvose pamusoro pedu? Kutadza kwedu ndokwei? Zvivi zvedu ndezvei, zvatakaitira Jehovha Mwari wedu?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Ipapo iwe uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, nokuti madzibaba enyu akandisiya, vakatevera vamwe vamwari, nokuvashumira nokuvanamata, vakandisiya ini, vakasachengeta murairo wangu;" 
Jeremiah16:12 zvino imi makaita zvakaipa kupfuura madzibaba enyu; nokuti tarirai, munofamba mumwe nomumwe nohukukutu hwomwoyo wake wakaipa, muchiramba kunditerera." 
Jeremiah16:13 Saka ndichakudzingai panyika ino ndichikuisai kunyika yamakanga musingazivi, kunyangwe imi kunyangwe madzibaba enyu; ipapo muchashumira vamwe vamwari masikati nousiku, nokuti handingakunzwiriyi ngoni.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:14 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, “Tarirai, mazuva anouya, avachasizoti, ‘NaJehovha mupenyu, wakabvisa vana VaIsiraeri panyika yeIjipiti;’" 
Jeremiah16:15 asi ‘NaJehovha mupenyu, wakabvisa vana VaIsiraeri kunyika yokumusoro, nokunyika dzose dzaakanga avadzingira kwadziri. Ndichavadzoserazve kunyika yavo yandakapa madzibaba avo.’" 
Jeremiah16:16 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndichandodana vabati vazhinji vehove, ivo vachavabata sehove; pashure ndichandodana vavhimi vazhinji, ivo vachavavhima pamakomo ose nezvikomo zvose, napamapako ose amatombo." 
Jeremiah16:17 Nokuti meso angu anoona nzira dzavo dzose, hazvina kuvanzika pamberi pangu, zvakaipa zvavo hazvina kuvanziwa pameso angu." 
Jeremiah16:18 Ndichatanga kuvatsivira zvakaipa zvavo nezvivi zvavo kaviri, nokuti vakasvibisa nyika yangu nezvitunha zvezvinhu zvavo zvinosemesa, nokuzadza nhaka yangu nezvinonyangadza zvavo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Imi Jehovha, simba rangu, nenhare yangu, nohutiziro hwangu pazuva rokutambudzika, marudzi achauya kwamuri achibva kumigumo yenyika, achiti, “Madzibaba edu akagara nhaka yenhema dzoga, zvinhu zvisina maturo, nezvinhu zvisingabatsiri.”" 
Jeremiah16:20 “Ko munhu ungazviitira vamwari vasati vari vamwari here? 
Jeremiah16:21 Naizvozvo, tarirai, ndichavazivisa, ndichavazivisa panguva ino chete ruoko rwangu nesimba rangu; vachaziva kuti zita rangu ndiJehovha.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 “Zvivi zvaJudha zvakanyorwa nepeni yamatare, nomuromo wedaimani; zvakatemwa pamahwendefa emwoyo yavo, napanyanga dzamaatari enyu;" 
Jeremiah17:2 nguva dzose kana vana vavo vachirangarira maatari avo nemiti yavo yakatsaurwa pamiti mitema pazvikomo zvakakwirira. 
Jeremiah17:3 Iwe gomo rangu riri kusango, nhumbi dzako nepfuma yako yose ndichazvitapisa, nenzvimbo dzako dzakakwirira, nokuda kwezvivi zvenyu zviri mumiganhu yenyu yose." 
Jeremiah17:4 Nemi, iyemi mumene, mucharega nhaka yenyu yandakakupai; ndichakuitai varanda vavavengi venyu munyika yamusingazivi, nokuti makabatidza moto pakutsamwa kwangu, uchapfuta nokusingaperi.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Ngaatukwe iye munhu unovimba nomumwe munhu, unoita nyama yomunhu ruoko rwake, uno mwoyo unotsauka kuna Jehovha." 
Jeremiah17:6 Nokuti uchafanana negwenzi murenje, haangaoni kana zvakanaka zvichisvika, asi uchagara panzvimbo dzakaoma kwazvo murenje, munyika yebare isingagarwi navanhu." 
Jeremiah17:7 Wakaropafadzwa iye munhu unovimba naJehovha, wakaita Jehovha chivimbo chake." 
Jeremiah17:8 Nokuti uchava somuti wakasimwa pamvura, unotuma midzi yawo kurwizi, usingatyi kana kupisa kuchisvika, asi mashizha awo achava matema; haungarangariri pagore rokusanaya kwemvura, kana kurega kubereka zvibereko." 
Jeremiah17:9 Mwoyo unonyengera kupfuura zvinhu zvose, wakaora chose, ndiani ungauziva?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Ini Jehovha, ndinonzvera mwoyo, ndinoidza itsvo, kuti ndipe mumwe nomumwe zvakafanira mugarire wake, uye zvakafanira zvibereko zvamabasa ake.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Segwari rinogarira mazai arisina kukandira rimene, ndizvo zvakaita iye unozviwanira pfuma nokusarurama; ichamusiya pakati pamazuva ake, pakupedzisira kwake richava benzi." 
Jeremiah17:12 Nzvimbo yeimba yedu tsvene chigaro choushe chakaisvonaka, chakanga chakakwirira kubva pakutanga." 
Jeremiah17:13 Imi Jehovha, tariro yaIsiraeri, vose vanokurashai vachanyadziswa; vanotsauka kwandiri vachanyorwa muvhu, nokuti vakarasha Jehovha, iro tsime remvura mhenyu." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ndiporesei Jehovha, ipapo ndichaporeswa; ndiponesei, ipapo ndichaponeswa; nokuti ndimi wandinorumbidza." 
Jeremiah17:15 Tarirai, vanoti kwandiri, “Shoko raJehovha riripiko? Ngariuye zvino.”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Kana ndirini, handina kukurumidza kusakuteverai somufudzi, handina kushuva zuva renjodzi; imi munoziva; zvakabuda mumoromo mangu zvakanga zviri pamberi penyu." 
Jeremiah17:17 Musava kwandiri chinhu chinotyisa; imi muri hutiziro hwangu nezuva rezvakaipa. 
Jeremiah17:18 Vanonditambudza ngavanyadziswe, asi ini ndirege kunyadziswa; ngavavhunduswe ivo, asi ini ndirege kuvhunduswa; uyisai kwavari zuva rezvakaipa, muvaparadze nokuparadza kwakapamhidzirwa." 
Jeremiah17:19 Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Enda undomira pasuwo ravana vavanhu, panopinda madzimambo aJudha, napavanobuda, napamasuwo ose eJerusaremu;" 
Jeremiah17:20 uti kwavari, ‘Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi madzimambo aJudha, navaJudha vose, navose vagere Jerusaremu vanopinda napamasuwo awa.’" 
Jeremiah17:21 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvichenjerei, murege kutakura mutoro nezuva reSabata, kana kupinda nawo napamusuwo eJerusaremu;" 
Jeremiah17:22 musabuda makatakura mutoro padzimba dzenyu nezuva reSabata, kana kubate basa ripi neripi; asi mutsaure zuva reSabata, sezvandakaraira madzibaba enyu.’" 
Jeremiah17:23 Asi havana kuterera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo; asi vakaomesa mitsipa yavo kuti varege kunzwa, varege kudzidziswa." 
Jeremiah17:24 “Zvino zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Kana mukanatsa kunditerera, mukasapinda nomutoro napamasuwo eguta rino nezuva reSabata, asi muchitsaura zuva reSabata, musingabati basa ripi neripi naro;" 
Jeremiah17:25 ipapo pachapinda napamasuwo eguta rino madzimambo namachinda anogara pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi, anofamba nengoro namabhiza, iwo namachinda awo, navarume vaJudha, navagere Jerusaremu; guta rino richavapo nokusingaperi.’" 
Jeremiah17:26 “Vachabva kumaguta aJudha, napanzvimbo dzakapoteredza Jerusaremu, napanyika yaBhenjamini, napanyika yamapani, napanyika yamakomo, nokurutivi rwezasi, vachiuya nezvipiriso zvinopiswa, nezvibairo, nezvipiriso zvohupfu, nezvinonhuwira, vachiuya nezvokuwonga nazvo kuimba yaJehovha." 
Jeremiah17:27 Asi kana mukaramba kunditerera, mukaramba kutsaura zuva reSabata, muchitakura mutoro muchipinda nawo napamasuwo eJerusaremu nezuva reSabata, ipapo ndichabatidza moto pamasuwo aro, uchapedza dzimba dzamambo dzeJerusaremu, usingazodzimwi.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Shoko rakauya kuna Jeremiya, richibva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Simuka, uburukire kuimba yomuumbi wehari; ipapo ndichakuzivisa mashoko angu.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Zvino ndakaburukira kuimba yomuumbi wehari, ndikamuwana achibata basa pamakuyo." 
Jeremiah18:4 Zvino mudziyo waakanga achiita nevhu wakati washatiswa mumaoko omuumbi, akaumbazve naro mumwe mudziyo, sezvaakafunga iye muumbi wehari." 
Jeremiah18:5 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Nhai, imi imba yaIsiraeri, handingagoni kuita nemi sezvinoita muumbi uyu wehari here? Tarirai, ivhu sezvarakaita muruoko rwomuumbi wehari, ndizvo zvamakaita muruoko rwangu, imi imba yaIsiraeri." 
Jeremiah18:7 Nenguva yandichataura pamusoro porudzi rwavanhu, napamusoro poushe, kuti ndicharudzura, nokuruputsa, nokuruparadza;" 
Jeremiah18:8 kana rudzi urwo, rwandakataura zvinhu izvi pamusoro parwo, rukazvidzora pazvakaipa zvarwo, ini ndichazvidemba pamusoro pezvakaipa zvandakafunga kuvaitira." 
Jeremiah18:9 Uye nenguva yandichataura pamusoro porudzi rwavanhu, napamusoro poushe, kuti ndicharuvaka nokurusima;" 
Jeremiah18:10 kana vakaita zvinhu zvakaipa pamberi pangu, vakasaterera izwi rangu, ipapo ndichazvidemba pamusoro pezvakanaka zvandakanga ndichiti ndichavaitira.’" 
Jeremiah18:11 Naizvozvo zvino, taura navanhu vaJudha navagere Jerusaremu, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, tarirai, ndinokufungirai zvakaipa, ndinorangana mano akaipa pamusoro penyu; zvino dzokai mumwe nomumwe panzira yake yakaipa, mugadzire nzira dzenyu namabasa enyu.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 “Asi ivo vanoti, ‘Hazvina maturo, nokuti tichafamba sezvatinofunga, mumwe nomumwe wedu uchaita nohukukutu hwomwoyo wake wakaipa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, “Zvino bvunzai pakati pamarudzi, kuti ndiani wakambonzwa zvakadai; mhandara yaIsiraeri yakaita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo." 
Jeremiah18:14 “Ko chando chakachena chapaRebhanoni chingashaikwa padombo rokusango here? Mvura inotonhora, inoyerera ichibva kure, ingapwa here?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Nokuti vanhu vangu vakandikanganwa, vakapisira vamwari venhema zvinonhuwira; ivo vakagumbuswa panzira dzavo, pamakwara akare–kare, kuti vafambe nenzira dzinotsauka, panzira isina kugadzirwa." 
Jeremiah18:16 “Kuti vaite nyika yavo chishamiso nechinoridzirwa murudzi nokusingaperi; mumwe nomumwe unopfuurapo uchashamiswa, nokudzungudza musoro wake." 
Jeremiah18:17 Ndichavaparadzira pamberi pavavengi vavo sezvinoita mhepo inobva kumabvazuva; ndichavafuratira, handingavatariri nechiso, nezuva rokutambudzika kwavo.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Ipapo vakati, “Uyai, tirangane mano akaipa pamusoro paJeremiya; nokuti murairo haungashaikwi kumupristi, kana kurairira kunowakachenjera, kana shoko kumuporofita. Uyai, timurove norurimi, tirege kuva nehanya nerimwe ramashoko ake." 
Jeremiah18:19 “Jehovha, nditererei, munzwe izwi ravanokakavara neni." 
Jeremiah18:20 Zvakaipa zvingatsiwa nezvakanaka here? Nokuti vakacherera mweya wangu gomba. Rangarirai kumira kwangu pamberi penyu kuti ndivareverere zvakanaka, kuti nditsause kutsamwa kwenyu kwavari." 
Jeremiah18:21 Saka sundirai vana vavo panzara, muvaregere pasimba romunondo; vakadzi vavo ngavatorerwe vana vavo, vave chirikadzi; varume vavo ngavaurawe norufu, namajaya avo aurawe nomunondo pakurwa." 
Jeremiah18:22 “Kuchema ngakunzwike padzimba dzavo, kana muchivauyisira kamwe–kamwe boka ravarwi; nokuti vakachera gomba, kuti vandibate; vakavanzira tsoka dzangu misungo." 
Jeremiah18:23 Asi imi Jehovha munoziva mano avo ose avakada kundiuraya nawo; musavakanganwira zvakaipa zvavo, kana kudzima zvivi zvavo pamberi penyu; asi ngavawisirwe pasi pamberi penyu; muvaitire zvamunoda nenguva yokutsamwa kwenyu.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Enda undotenga chirongo chakaumbwa nomuumbi wehari, unavamwe vakuru vavanhu navamwe vakuru vavapristi;" 
Jeremiah19:2 ipapo uende kumupata womwanakomana waHinomu, uripo pavanopinda pasuwo rezvaenga zvehari, uparidzirepo mashoko andichakuudza;" 
Jeremiah19:3 uti, ‘Inzwa shoko raJehovha, imi madzimambo aJudha navagere Jerusaremu,’ zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tarirai, ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro penzvimbo ino, nzeve dzomumwe nomumwe unozvinzwa dzichawunga." 
Jeremiah19:4 Nokuti vakandisiya, vakashandura nzvimbo ino, vakapisirapo zvinonhuwira kuna vamwe vamwari vavakanga vasingazivi, ivo namadzibaba avo namadzimambo aJudha, vakazadza nzvimbo ino neropa ravasina mhosva," 
Jeremiah19:5 vakavaka nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzaBhaari, kuti vapisire Bhaari vanakomana vavo pamoto zvive zvipiriso zvinomupisirwa; izvo, zvandisina kuvaraira, kana kuzvitaura, zvandisina kufunga mumwoyo mangu.’" 
Jeremiah19:6 Naizvozvo tarirai, mazuva anouya ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha nzvimbo ino haichazonzi Tofeti, kana Mupata womwanakomana waHinomu, asi Mupata woKuurayiwa." 
Jeremiah19:7 Ndichakonesa mano aJudha naveJerusaremu panzvimbo ino; ndichavawisa nomunondo pamberi pavavengi vavo, uye namaoko avanotsvaka kuvauraya; zvitunha zvavo ndichazvipa shiri dzokudenga nezvikara zvenyika, zvive zvokudya zvazvo." 
Jeremiah19:8 “Guta rino ndichariita chishamiso nechinhu chinoridzirwa muridzo; mumwe nomumwe unopfuura napo uchashamiswa achiridza muridzo nokuda kwamatambudziko aro ose. 
Jeremiah19:9 Ndichavadyisa nyama yavanakomana vavo nenyama yavanasikana vavo; mumwe nomumwe uchadya nyama yeshamwari yake pakukombwa kwaro napakumanikidzwa kwavachamanikidzwa nako navavengi vavo navanotsvaka kuvauraya.” 
Jeremiah19:10 Zvino unofanira kuputsa chirongo pamberi pavarume vakaenda newe," 
Jeremiah19:11 ugoti kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Saizvozvo ndichaputsa vanhu ava neguta rino, sezvinoputswa mudziyo womuumbi wehari, usingabviri kuzogadzirwazve; zvino vachaviga vakafa paTofeti nokuti kuchashaikwa imwe nzvimbo." 
Jeremiah19:12 Ndizvo zvandichaitira nzvimbo ino navagerepo, ndiite guta rino seTofeti ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah19:13 Dzimba dzeJerusaremu, nedzimba dzamadzimambo aJudha, dzakasvibiswa, dzichaita senzvimbo yeTofeti, idzo dzimba dzose dzavakapisira pamatenga adzo zvinonhuwira kuhondo dzokudenga, nokudururira vamwe vamwari zvipiriso zvinodururwa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Ipapo Jeremiya wakabva Tofeti, kwaakanga atumwa naJehovha kundoporofita; akandomira muruvazhe rwemba yaJehovha akati kuvanhu vose," 
Jeremiah19:15 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tarirai, ndichauyisa pamusoro peguta rino napamusoro pemisha yaro yose, zvakaipa zvose zvandakataura pamusoro paro; nokuti vakaomesa mitsipa yavo, kuti varege kunzwa mashoko angu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Zvino Pashuri, mwanakomana womupristi Imeri, mutariri mukuru mumba maJehovha, wakanzwa Jeremiya achiporofita zvinhu izvi." 
Jeremiah20:2 Ipapo Pashuri wakarova muporofita Jeremiya, akamusunga mumatanda aiva pasuwo rokumusoro raBhenjamini, raiva mumba maJehovha." 
Jeremiah20:3 Zvino fume mangwanani Pashuri akasunungura Jeremiya pamatanda. Ipapo Jeremiya akati kwaari, “Jehovha haana kukutumidza zita rinonzi Pashuri, asi rinonzi Magorimisabhibhi." 
Jeremiah20:4 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarira, ndinokuita chinhu chinotyisa, chichakutyisa iwe umene neshamwari dzako dzose; vachaparadzwa nomunondo wavavengi vavo, meso ako achazviona; ndichaisa Judha rose mumaoko amambo weBhabhironi, iye uchavatapira Bhabhironi, nokuvauraya nomunondo." 
Jeremiah20:5 Uyezve, ndichaisa pfuma yose yeguta rino, nezvose zvavakawana, nezvose zvavo zvinokosha, zvirokwazvo, nepfuma yose yamadzimambo aJudha, ndichazviisa mumaoko avavengi vavo; ivo vachavapamba, nokuvatapa, nokuenda navo Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah20:6 Newe Pashuri, navose vagere mumba mako, muchatapwa; iwe uchandosvika Bhabhironi, uchandofirapo, nokuvigwapo, iwe neshamwari dzako dzose, dzawaiporofitera nhema.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Imi Jehovha makandigombedzera, ndikagombedzerwa; imi mune simba kupfuureni, mukakunda; ndakaitwa chinhu chinosekwa zuva rose, mumwe nomumwe unondiseka." 
Jeremiah20:8 Nokuti ndinoti kana ndotaura, ndodanidzira; ndinodanidzira, ndichiti, “Zvinoitwa nesimba nokuparadza!” Nokuti shoko raJehovha rakaitwa kwandiri chinhu chinoshoorwa, nechinhu chinosekwa zuva rose." 
Jeremiah20:9 Kana ndichiti, “Handichamurangariri, kana kutaura nezita rake,” ipapo mumwoyo mangu mava somoto unopfuta, wakapfigirwa mumapfupa angu; ndaneta nokutsungirira, handichagoni." 
Jeremiah20:10 Nokuti ndakanzwa makuhwa avazhinji, zvinotyisa pamativi ose. “Pomerai, isu tigomupomera, ndizvo zvinotaura shamwari dzangu dzose dzinodikanwa neni, vanotarira kuparadzwa kwangu; zvimwe uchanyengerwa, tikamukunda, tikazvitsivira kwaari.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Asi Jehovha uneni semhare inotyisa; saka vamanikidzi vangu vachagumburwa, havangakundi; vachanyadziswa kwazvo, nokuti havana kuita nohuchenjeri, nokunyadzwa nokusingaperi, kusingazokanganikwi." 
Jeremiah20:12 Asi imi Jehovha wehondo, imi, munoidza vakarurama, munoona itsvo nomwoyo, ngandione kutsiva kwenyu kwavari; nokuti ndakakuzarurirai imi mhaka yangu." 
Jeremiah20:13 Imbirai Jehovha, rumbidzai Jehovha; nokuti wakarwira mweya wounoshaiwa pamaoko avaiti vezvakaipa." 
Jeremiah20:14 Zuva randaberekwa naro ngaritukwe; zuva randakaberekwa namai vangu ngarirege kuropafadzwa. 
Jeremiah20:15 Munhu ngaatukwe wakazivisa baba vangu shoko rokuti, “Maberekerwa mwanakomana,” akavafadza kwazvo." 
Jeremiah20:16 Munhu uyo ngaave samaguta akaparadzwa naJehovha, akasazvidemba; ngaanzwe kuchema mangwanani nemhere panguva yamasikati;" 
Jeremiah20:17 zvaakarega kundiuraya ndichiri muchizvaro; saizvozvo mai vangu vangadai vaiva hwiro hwangu, vairamba vane mimba." 
Jeremiah20:18 Ndakabudireiko pachizvaro, kuti ndione kutambudzika nokuchema, kuti mazuva angu apere nokunyadziswa?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Shoko, rakauya kuna Jeremiya, richibva kuna Jehovha, panguva yakatuma mambo Zedhekiya kwaari Pashuri mwanakomana waMarikija, naZefaniya mwanakomana waMaaseya mupristi, achiti," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Dotibvunziraiwo kuna Jehovha, nokuti Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi worwa nesu; zvimwe Jehovha ungatiitira chishamiso chakafanana namabasa ake ose anoshamisa, kuti abve kwatiri.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Ipapo Jeremiya akati kwavari, “Itiyi kuna Zedhekiya," 
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, tarirai, ndichadzosa nhumbi dzokurwa dziri mumaoko enyu, dzamunorwa nadzo namambo weBhabhironi navaKaradhia vanokukombai kunze mukati meguta rino." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ini ndimene ndicharwa nemi nechanza chakatambanudzwa noruoko rune simba, nokutsamwa nehasha, neshungu kwadzo." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ndicharova vagere muguta rino, vanhu nezvipfuo zvose; zvichafa nechirwere chakaipa." 
Jeremiah21:7 Pashure ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichaisa Zedhekiya mambo waJudha, navaranda vake navanhu vake, ivo vakasara muguta rino, vakapukunyuka pachirwere, napamunondo, napanzara, mumaoko aNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, nomumaoko avavengi vavo, nomumaoko avanotsvaka kuvauraya; iye uchavarova nomunondo unopinza, haangavaregi, kana kuvanzwira ngoni, kana kuva nenyasha navo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Iwe uti kuvanhu ava, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndinoisa pamberi penyu nzira youpenyu nenzira yorufu.’" 
Jeremiah21:9 “Ani naani unorambira muguta rino uchaurayiwa nomunondo nenzara nechirwere; asi ani naani unobuda akaenda kuvaKaradhia vanokukombai, iye uchararama, upenyu hwake huchava kwaari chinhu chaakapamba." 
Jeremiah21:10 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndakaratidza guta rino chiso changu kuti ndiriitire zvakaipa, ndirege kuriitira zvakanaka; richaiswa mumaoko amambo weBhabhironi, iye ucharipisa nomoto.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:11 Zvino kana iri imba yamambo waJudha, inzwai shoko raJehovha," 
Jeremiah21:12 “Nhai imba yaDhavhidhi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha tongai zvakarurama mangwanani, murwire wakabirwa muruoko rwounomumanikidza, kuti kutsamwa kwangu kurege kubuda somoto, kuchipfuta kusina ungakudzima, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvamabasa enyu." 
Jeremiah21:13 Tarira, ndine mhosva newe, iwe ugere mumupata, padombo romubani ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; imi, munoti, ‘Ndiani uchapinda mudzimba dzedu?’" 
Jeremiah21:14 Ndichakurovai zvakaenzana nezvibereko zvamabasa enyu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ndichabatidza moto mudondo raro, uchapedza zvose zvakaripoteredza.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Burukira kumba kwamambo waJudha, undotaurapo shoko iri," 
Jeremiah22:2 uti, ‘Inzwa shoko raJehovha, iwe mambo waJudha, ugere pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi, iwe navaranda vako, navanhu vako vanopinda napamasuwo awa.’" 
Jeremiah22:3 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tongai zvakarurama nezvakatendeka, murwire wakabirwa muruoko rwounomumanikidza; mutorwa, nenherera, nechirikadzi, regai kuvaitira zvisakarurama, regai kuvaitira nesimba; uye musateura ropa risina mhosva panzvimbo ino.’" 
Jeremiah22:4 Nokuti kana muchiita chinhu ichi nomwoyo wose, pamasuwo eimba iyi pachapinda madzimambo, achagara pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi, achifamba nengoro nokutasva mabhiza, iye navaranda vake navanhu vake." 
Jeremiah22:5 Asi kana mukaramba kunzwa mashoko awa, ndinopika neni ndimene, kuti imba ino ichava dongo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah22:6 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Uri Giriadhi kwandiri, nomusoro weRebhanoni; asi zvirokwazvo ndichakuita renje, namaguta asingagarwi navanhu.’" 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndichakugadzirira vaparadzi, mumwe nomumwe ane nhumbi dzake dzokurwa; vachatema misidhari yenyu inodikanwa, vachiikandira mumoto." 
Jeremiah22:8 Marudzi mazhinji avanhu achapfuura napaguta rino, mumwe nomumwe uchati kunowokwake, ‘Jehovha wakaitireiko guta rino guru zvakadaro?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 “Ipapo vachapindura, vachiti, ‘Nokuti vakasiya sungano yaJehovha, Mwari wavo, vakanamata vamwe vamwari, vachivashumira.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Musachema wakafa, kana kumuwungudzira; asi mucheme kwazvo iye unoenda, nokuti haangadzokizve, kana kuona zvenyika yake yaakaberekerwa." 
Jeremiah22:11 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro paSharumi, mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, wakabata ushe panzvimbo ino, “Iye haangadzokeripozve;" 
Jeremiah22:12 asi kwaakatapirwa, ndiko kwaachandofirako; haangazoonizve nyika ino.”" 
Jeremiah22:13 Une nhamo iye unovaka imba yake nokusarurama, namakamuri ake okumusoro achiita zvisakarurama; unobatisa wokwake asingamupi chinhu, asingamupi mubairo wokubata kwake;" 
Jeremiah22:14 iye, unoti, “Ndichazvivakira imba huru namakamuri okumusoro akafara, achizviitira mahwindo; zvino yoitirwa denga romusidhari, ichizodzwa muti mutsvuku.”" 
Jeremiah22:15 “Ko ungabata ushe, zvaunotsvaka kupfuura vamwe nemisidhari here? Ko baba vako havana kudya nokunwa, vachiita zvakarurama nezvakatendeka here?” Ipapo vakagara nomufaro." 
Jeremiah22:16 Vaitamba mhaka dzavarombo navanoshaiwa; ipapo vaiva nomufaro. “Ko izvozvi hakuzi kundiziva here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Jeremiah22:17 Asi meso ako nomwoyo wako hazvirangariri zvimwe, asi kuchiva kwako nokuteura ropa risina mhosva, nokumanikidza, nokuita nesimba; kuti uzviite." 
Jeremiah22:18 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro paJehoiakimu mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, ‘Havangamuchemi,’ vachiti, ‘Haiwa, munun'una wangu!’ Kana, ‘Haiwa, hanzvadzi!’ Havangachemi, vachiti, ‘Haiwa, ishe!’ Kana, ‘Haiwa, hukuru hwake!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 “Uchavigwa sokuvigwa kwembongoro, uchakweverwa nokurashwa kunze kwamasuwo eJerusaremu.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 Kwirai Rebhanoni, mudanidzire; danidzirai nenzwi renyu paBhashani; danidzirai muri paAbharimi; nokuti vadikani venyu vose vakaparadzwa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Ndakataura newe pakufara kwako; asi iwe wakati, “Handidi kunzwa.” Ndiwo wakanga uri mutoo wako kubvira pahuduku hwako, kuti hauna kuteerera izwi rangu." 
Jeremiah22:22 Mhepo ichaparadza vafudzi vako vose, navadikani vako vachatapwa; zvirokwazvo nenguva iyo uchanyadziswa nokukanganiswa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvako zvose." 
Jeremiah22:23 Haiwa, iwe, ugere Rebhanoni, unovaka dendere rako mumisidhari, uchanzwisisa hurombo kwazvo sei kana uchizowirwa nokurwadziwa, sokurwadziwa kwomukadzi unosurumuka!" 
Jeremiah22:24 “Noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha kunyangwe Konia, mwanakomana waJehoiakimu, mambo waJudha, aiva chindori chokutsikisa nacho paruoko rwangu rworudyi, kunyangwe zvakadaro ndaikubvisa ipapo." 
Jeremiah22:25 Ndichakuisa murwoko rwavanotsvaka kukuuraya, nomuruoko rwaivo vaunotya, muruoko rwaNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, nomumaoko avaKaradhia." 
Jeremiah22:26 Iwe namai vako vakakubereka ndichakudzingirai kune imwe nyika kwamusina kuberekerwa; ipapo muchandofirapo. 
Jeremiah22:27 Asi kunyika kunopanga mwoyo yavo kudzokera, havangadzokeriko." 
Jeremiah22:28 “Ko munhu uyu Konia mudziyo wakaputsika unozvidzwa here? Iye mudziyo usingafadzi munhu here? Vakadzingirweiko, iye navana vake, vakadzingirwa kunyika yavasingazivi?”" 
Jeremiah22:29 Iwe nyika, nyika, nyika, inzwa izwi raJehovha." 
Jeremiah22:30 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nyora kuti munhu uyu haana vana, munhu usingazofari pamazuva ake; nokuti hakuchina murume pakati pavana vake uchava nomufaro, uchagara pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi, achibata ushe hwaJudha.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Vane nhamo vafudzi vanoparadza nokuparadzira makwai amafuro angu! Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Jeremiah23:2 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, pamusoro pavafudzi vanofudza vanhu vangu, “Makaparadzira makwai angu, mukaadzinga, mukasaatarira; tarirai, ndichakurovai nokuda kwezvakaipa zvamabasa enyu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ndichaunganidza vakasara vamakwai angu kunyika dzose kwandakanga ndaadzingira, ndichaadzosera kumafuro awo; achaberekana nokuwanda." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ndichaagadzira vafudzi vanoafudza; haangazotyi kana kuvhunduswa, hakuna nerimwe ringashaikwa ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 “Tarirai,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, “Mazuva achauya, andichamutsira Dhavhidhi bukira rakarurama, iye uchabata ushe ari mambo, uchaita nohuchenjeri nokururama achiita zvakarurama panyika." 
Jeremiah23:6 “Pamazuva ake Judha vachaponeswa, naIsiraeri vachagara vakachengetwa; zita rake raachatumidzwa ndirori, ‘Jehovha ndiye kururama kwedu.’" 
Jeremiah23:7 “Naizvozvo, tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha mazuva anouya, avasingazoti, ‘NaJehovha mupenyu, wakabudisa vana VaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti;’" 
Jeremiah23:8 asi, ‘NaJehovha mupenyu, wakabudisa rudzi rweimba yaIsiraeri munyika yokumusoro, achivaperekedza, nomunyika dzose kwandakanga ndavadzingira. Ivo vachagara munyika yavo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Kana vari vaporofita, mwoyo wangu wakaputsika mukati mangu; mapfupa angu ose anozununguka, ndakaita somunhu wakabatwa, somunhu wakundwa newaini, nokuda kwaJehovha, uye nokuda kwamashoko ake matsvene." 
Jeremiah23:10 Nokuti nyika izere nemhombwe; nokuti nyika inochema nemhaka yokutuka; mafuro erenje akaoma; zvavanovavarira zvakaipa, simba ravo harizakarurama." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Nokuti vaporofita navapristi vose vanomhura Jehovha; zvirokwazvo, mumba mangu ndakawana zvakaipa zvavo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah23:12 “Naizvozvo nzira yavo ichava kwavari senzvimbo dzinotedza murima; vachatinhwa, ndokuwiramo; nokuti ndichavauyisira zvakaipa pagore rokurohwa kwavo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah23:13 Ndakaona hupenzi kuvaporofita veSamaria; vakaporofita naBhaari, vakarasisa vanhu vangu Isiraeri." 
Jeremiah23:14 Kuvaporofita veJerusaremu ndakaonawo chinhu chinonyangadza, vanoita hupombwe, nokufamba nenhema; vanosimbisa maoko avanoita zvakaipa, naizvozvo hakuna nomumwe unodzoka pazvakaipa zvake; vose vava kwandiri seSodhoma, navagerepo seGomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo pamusoro pavaporofita, ‘Tarirai, ndichavadyisa gavakava, ndichavanwisa mvura yenduru; nokuti kumhura Jehovha kwakabuda kuvaporofita veJerusaremu kukaenda kunyika yose.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Regai kuteerera mashoko avaporofita vanokuporofiterai; vanokupai tariro pasina, vanotaura zvavakaona pamwoyo yavo, zvisati zviri izvo zvinobuda mumuromo waJehovha.”" 
Jeremiah23:17 Vanoramba vachiti kuna vanondizvidza, Jehovha wakati, “Muchava norugare; uye kuno mumwe nomumwe unofamba nohukukutu hwomwoyo wake, vanoti, ‘Hakuna chakaipa chingakuwira.’" 
Jeremiah23:18 “Nokuti ndiani wakamira parangano yaJehovha, akaona nokunzwa shoko rake? Ndiani wakateerera akanzwa shoko rake?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Tarirai, dutu remhepo raJehovha, iko kutsamwa kwake, rabuda, zvirokwazvo dutu rechamupupuri; richamonereka pamisoro yavakaipa." 
Jeremiah23:20 Kutsamwa kwaJehovha hakungadzoki, kusvikira azviita, apedza ndangariro dzomwoyo wake; pamazuva okupedzisira muchazvinzwisisa kwazvo.”" 
Jeremiah23:21 “Ini handina kutuma vaporofita ava, kunyangwe zvakadaro vakamhanya; ini handina kutaura navo, kunyangwe zvakadaro vakaporofita." 
Jeremiah23:22 “Asi dai vakanga vamira parangano yangu, vangadai vakanzwisa vanhu vangu mashoko angu, vakavadzora panzira yavo yakaipa, napazvakaipa zvamabasa avo." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Ko ini ndiri Mwari uri pedyo, ndisati ndiri Mwari uri kure here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah23:24 Ko munhu uripo ungavanda panzvimbo dzisingazikanwi, ini ndikasamuona here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Ko ini handizadzi denga nenyika here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah23:25 Ndakanzwa zvakarehwa navaporofita, vanoporofita nhema muzita rangu, vachiti, ‘Ndarota hope, ndarota hope.’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Ko izvi zvichavapo pamwoyo yavaporofita vanoporofita nhema kusvikira rinhi, ivo vaporofita vezvinonyengera zvemwoyo yavo?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Ivo, vanofunga kukanganisa vanhu vangu zita rangu nokurota kwavo, kwavanoudza mumwe nomumwe hama yake, madzibaba avo sezvavakakanganwa zita rangu nokunamata Bhaari." 
Jeremiah23:28 Muporofita, wakarota, ngaaudze kurota kwake; une shoko rangu, ngaataure shoko rangu nokutendeka. Mashanga nezviyo zvakaenzana pai? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah23:29 “Shoko rangu harina kufanana nomoto here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; uye senyundo inoputsanya dombo here? 
Jeremiah23:30 Naizvozvo, tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, handina hukama navaporofita, vanoba mashoko angu mumwe nomumwe kuno wokwake." 
Jeremiah23:31 Tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, handina ukama navaporofita, vanoreva namarimi avo, vachiti, ‘Ndiye unodaro.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, handina hukama navanoporofita kurota kwavo kwenhema, vachiudza vamwe, vachirashisa vanhu vangu nenhema dzavo uye nokuzvirumbidza kwavo kusina maturo; kunyangwe zvakadaro handina kuvatuma, kana kuvaraira; uye havatongobatsiri vanhu ava, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Zvino kana vanhu ava, kana muporofita kana mupristi, vakakubvunza, vachiti, ‘Chirevo chaJehovha ndechipiko?’ Ipapo uti kwavari, ‘Chirevo chei!’ Ini ndichakurasai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah23:34 Kana ari muporofita, kana mupristi, kana vanhu, kana vachiti, ‘Chirevo chaJehovha; ndicharova munhu uyo neimba yake.’" 
Jeremiah23:35 Ndizvo zvamunofanira kuti, mumwe nomumwe kuno wokwake, nomumwe nomumwe kuhama yake, ‘Jehovha wakapindurei? Jehovha wakataurei?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Musazoti chirevo chaJehovha; nokuti shoko romunhu mumwe nomumwe ndicho chirevo chake; nokuti makakanganisa mashoko aMwari mupenyu, aJehovha wehondo, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah23:37 “Uti kumuporofita, ‘Jehovha wakakupindurei? Jehovha wakataurei?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Asi kana mukati, ‘Chirevo chaJehovha;’ zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvamunoreva shoko iri, muchiti, chirevo chaJehovha,’ ini zvandakatuma shoko kwamuri ndichiti, ‘Musati, chirevo chaJehovha;’" 
Jeremiah23:39 naizvozvo tarirai, ndichakukanganwai chose, ndichakurashai kure neni, imi, neguta randakakupai imi namadzibaba enyu;" 
Jeremiah23:40 ndichauyisa pamusoro penyu kushoorwa kusingaperi, nokunyadziswa kusingaperi, zvisingazokanganikwi.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Zvino Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi wakati atapa Jekonia mwanakomana waJehoiakimu, mambo waJudha, namachinda aJudha, pamwechete navavezi navapfuri, paJerusaremu, akavaisa Bhabhironi, Jehovha akandiratidza, ndikaona tswanda mbiri dzina maonde dzakanga dzakaiswa pamberi petemberi yaJehovha." 
Jeremiah24:2 Imwe tswanda yakanga ina maonde akanaka kwazvo, samaonde anotanga kuibva; asi imwe tswanda yakanga ina maonde akaipa kwazvo, asingabviri kudyiwa nokuipa kwawo." 
Jeremiah24:3 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Unowoneiko Jeremiya?” Ini ndikati, “Maonde; maonde akanaka, akanaka kwazvo, asi akaipa kwazvo, asingabviri kudyiwa nokuipa kwawo.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri, richiti," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Sezvakaita maonde awa akanaka, ndizvo zvandicharangarira nomwoyo wakanaka vatapwa vaJudha, vandakatuma vabve panyika ino vaende kunyika yavaKaradhia." 
Jeremiah24:6 Nokuti ndichavatarira nameso angu nomwoyo wakanaka, ndivadzoserezve kunyika ino; ndichavavaka, handingavakoromori; ndichavasima, handingavadzuri." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndichavapa mwoyo wokundiziva, kuti ndini Jehovha; ivo vachava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wavo; nokuti vachadzokera kwandiri nomwoyo wavo wose.’" 
Jeremiah24:8 “Uye, sezvakaita maonde akaipa, asingabviri kudyiwa nokuipa kwawo, zvirokwazvo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndizvo zvandichaita Zedhekiya mambo waJudha, namachinda ake, navakasara veJerusaremu, vakasara panyika ino, navagere panyika yeIjipiti." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ndichavaita chinhu chinotyisa pakati poushe hwose hwenyika, vaitirwe zvakaipa, vave chinhu chinoshoorwa, neshumo, nechinosekwa nechinotukwa panzvimbo dzose kwandichavadzingira." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ndichatuma pakati pavo munondo, nenzara, nechirwere, kusvikira vapera munyika yandakavapa ivo namadzibaba avo.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Shoko, rakauya kuna Jeremiya pamusoro pavanhu vose vaJudha, negore rechina raJehoiakimu, mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha; ndiro gore rokutanga raNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi," 
Jeremiah25:2 iro rakataurwa nomuporofita Jeremiya kuvanhu vose vaJudha, navose vagere Jerusaremu, achiti," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Kubva pagore regumi namatatu raJosiya mwanakomana waAmoni, mambo wavaJudha, kusvikira pazuva rino, makore aya ana makumi maviri namatatu, shoko raJehovha raiuya kwandiri, ndikakutaurirai, ndichimuka mangwanani, ndichitaura; asi imi hamuna kuteerera." 
Jeremiah25:4 Jehovha akatuma kwamuri varanda vake vose vaporofita, achimuka mangwanani, achivatuma, asi imi hamuna kuteerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzenyu kuti munzwe," 
Jeremiah25:5 vachiti, ‘Dzokai zvino mumwe nomumwe panzira yake yakaipa, napazvakaipa zvamunoita, mugare munyika yamakapiwa naJehovha, imi namadzibaba enyu, kubva kare nakare kusvikira pakusingaperi;" 
Jeremiah25:6 regai kutevera vamwe vamwari kuti muvashumire, nokuvanamata, murege kunditsamwisa namabasa amaoko enyu; ini ndigorega kukuitirai zvakaipa.’" 
Jeremiah25:7 “Asi hamuna kunditerera, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, kuti munditsamwise namabasa amaoko enyu, muitirwe zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Naizvozvo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo, zvamusina kunzwa mashoko angu," 
Jeremiah25:9 tarirai, ndichatuma shoko kumarudzi ose ari kurutivi rwokumusoro, ndivauyise, nokuna Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, muranda wangu, ndivauyise varwe nenyika ino, navageremo, namarudzi awa ose akaipoteredza; ndichavaparadza chose, nokuvaita chishamiso nechinoridzirwa muridzo, namatongo nokusingaperi." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ndichabvisawo kwavari izwi rokuseka nenzwi rokufara, nenzwi rechikomba, nenzwi romwenga, nenzwi ramakuyo, nechiedza chomwenje." 
Jeremiah25:11 Nyika ino yose richava dongo, nechishamiso; marudzi awa achabatira mambo weBhabhironi makore ana makumi manomwe." 
Jeremiah25:12 “Zvino kana makore ana makumi manomwe apera ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndicharova mambo weBhabhironi, norudzi urwo pamusoro pezvakaipa zvavo, nenyika yavaKaradhia; ndichaiita matongo nokusingaperi." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ndichauyisa pamusoro penyika iyo mashoko angu ose andakataura pamusoro payo, zvose zvakanyorwa mubhuku iyi, zvakaporofitwa naJeremiya pamusoro pamarudzi ose." 
Jeremiah25:14 “Nokuti marudzi mazhinji namadzimambo makuru vachavasunga ivo vamene vave varanda vavo; ini ndichavaripira zvakaenzana nokubata kwavo, nezvakaenzana nebasa ramaoko avo.”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, wakati kwandiri, “Tora mukombe uyu wewaini yokutsamwa kwangu paruoko rwangu, unwisepo marudzi ose andinokutumira kwaari." 
Jeremiah25:16 Vachanwa, nokudzedzereka, nokupenga, nokuda kwomunondo wandichatuma pakati pavo.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Ipapo ndakatora mukombe paruoko rwaJehovha, ndikanwisa marudzi ose, andakatumirwa kwaari naJehovha;" 
Jeremiah25:18 vaiti Jerusaremu, namaguta aJudha, namadzimambo awo, namachinda awo, kuti vaitwe dongo, nechishamiso, nechinoridzirwa muridzo, nechinotukwa, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
Jeremiah25:19 NaFarao mambo weIjipiti, navaranda vake, namachinda ake, navanhu vake vose;" 
Jeremiah25:20 namarudzi ose akavengana, namadzimambo ose enyika yeUzi, namadzimambo ose enyika yavaFirisitia, neAshikeroni, neGaza, neEkironi, navakasara veAshidhodhi;" 
Jeremiah25:21 naEdhomu, naMoabhu, navana vaAmoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 namadzimambo ose eTaya, namadzimambo ose eSidhoni, namadzimambo echiwi chiri mhiri kwegungwa;" 
Jeremiah25:23 neDhedhani, neTema, neBuzi, navose vakaveurwa vhudzi ravo kumativi;" 
Jeremiah25:24 namadzimambo ose eArabhia, namadzimambo ose amarudzi akavengana vanogara kurenje;" 
Jeremiah25:25 namadzimambo ose eZimiri, namadzimambo ose eEramu, namadzimambo ose avaMedhia;" 
Jeremiah25:26 namadzimambo ose okumusoro, kure napedyo, mumwe nomumwe; noushe hwose hwenyika, huri pasi pose; mambo weSheshaki uchanwa shure kwazvo." 
Jeremiah25:27 Zvino iwe uti kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Inwai, mubatwe, murutse, muwe, murege kuzosimukazve, nokuda kwomunondo wandichatuma pakati penyu.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 “Zvino kana vachiramba kutora pamukombe paruoko rwako kuti vanwe, ipapo uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, munofanira kunwa, zvirokwazvo!’" 
Jeremiah25:29 Nokuti tarirai ndinotanga kuitira zvakaipa guta rakatumidzwa nezita rangu; zvino imi mungaregwa chose musingarohwi here? Hamungaregwi musingarohwi; nokuti ndichadana munondo pamusoro pavose vagere panyika, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Jeremiah25:30 “Naizvozvo iwe uvaporofitire mashoko awa ose, uti kwavari, ‘Jehovha uchaomba ari kumusoro, uchabudisa izwi rake ari pahugaro hwake hutsvene; uchaombera mafuro ake; uchapururudzira vose vagere panyika, sezvinoita vanotsika mazambiringa." 
Jeremiah25:31 Mubvumo uchasvika pamugumo wenyika chaipo; nokuti Jehovha une gakava namarudzi; uchatonga nyama yose; kana vari vakaipa, uchavaisa kumunondo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Tarirai, zvakaipa zvichabuda kuno rumwe rudzi zvichienda kuno rumwe rudzi, nedutu guru remhepo richamutswa kumigumo yenyika.”" 
Jeremiah25:33 Nezuva iro vakaurayiwa naJehovha vachavapo kubva kuno mumwe mugumo wenyika kusvikira kuno mumwe mugumo wenyika; havangachemwi, kana kuunganidzwa, kana kuvigwa; vachava mupfudze pasi pose." 
Jeremiah25:34 Wungudzai, imi vafudzi, mucheme; wumburukai mumadota, imi vakuru vamapoka; nokuti mazuva okuurayiwa kwenyu asvika kwazvo, nookuparadzirwa kwenyu, muchawira pasi somudziyo unodikanwa." 
Jeremiah25:35 Vafudzi vachashaiwa matizire, navakuru vamapoka mupukunyukire." 
Jeremiah25:36 Inzwai izwi rokuchema kwavafudzi, nokuwungudza kwavakuru vamapoka! Nokuti Jehovha unoparadza mafuro avo." 
Jeremiah25:37 Mafuro orugare anoparadzwa nokutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha. 
Jeremiah25:38 Wakabva paanovanda seshumba; nokuti nyika yavo yava chishamiso, nokuda kwokunyanya kwomunondo unomanikidza, uye nokuda kwokutsamwa kwake kukuru." 
Jeremiah26:1 Zvino pakuvamba kwokubata ushe hwaJehoiakimu mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, shoko iri rakabva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Mira paruvazhe rweimba yaJehovha, uudze maguta ose aJudha, anouya kuzonamata mumba maJehovha, mashoko ose andinokuraira kuti uvaudze; usatapudza kunyangwe neshoko rimwe." 
Jeremiah26:3 Zvimwe vangaterera, vakadzoka mumwe nomumwe panzira yake yakaipa; kuti ndizvidembe pamusoro pezvakaipa zvandinofunga kuvaitira nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo zvavanoita.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:4 Uti kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Kana musingadi kundinzwa, kuti mufambe nomurairo wangu, wandakaisa pamberi penyu," 
Jeremiah26:5 kuti munzwe mashoko avaranda vangu vaporofita, vandinotuma kwamuri, ndichimuka mangwanani ndichivatuma, asi hamuna kunzwa;" 
Jeremiah26:6 zvino ndichaita imba ino ive seShiro, neguta rino ndichariita chinhu chinotukwa namarudzi ose enyika.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Vapristi navaporofita navanhu vose vakanzwa Jeremiya achitaura mashoko awa mumba maJehovha. 
Jeremiah26:8 Zvino Jeremiya wakati apedza kutaura zvose zvaakanga arairwa naJehovha kuti audze vanhu vose, vapristi navaporofita navanhu vose vakamubata, vachiti, “Zvirokwazvo, uchafa iwe." 
Jeremiah26:9 Wakaporofitirei nezita raJehovha, uchiti, ‘Imba ino ichava seShiro, guta rino richava dongo, risina unogaramo?’ ” Vanhu vose vakaunganira Jeremiya mumba maJehovha." 
Jeremiah26:10 Zvino machinda aJudha akati anzwa zvinhu izvi, vakauya vachibva kuimba yamambo vakaenda kuimba yaJehovha, vakagara pasi panopindwa pasuwo idzva reimba yaJehovha." 
Jeremiah26:11 Ipapo vapristi navaporofita vakataura namachinda uye navanhu vose, vachiti, “Munhu uyu wakafanira rufu, nokuti wakaporofitera guta rino zvakaipa, sezvamakanzwa nenzeve dzenyu.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Ipapo Jeremiya wakataura namachinda ose uye navanhu vose, achiti, “Jehovha ndiye wakandituma kuti ndiporofitire imba ino neguta rino mashoko ose amakanzwa." 
Jeremiah26:13 Naizvozvo zvino natsai nzira dzenyu nezvamunoita, muterere izwi raJehovha Mwari wenyu; ipapo Jehovha uchazvidemba pamusoro pezvakaipa zvaakareva pamusoro penyu." 
Jeremiah26:14 “Asi kana ndirini, tarirai, ndiri mumaoko enyu; ndiitirei zvakanaka nezvakarurama pakuona kwenyu." 
Jeremiah26:15 Asi muzive zvirokwazvo, kuti kana mukandiuraya ini, muchauyisa mhosva yeropa risina mhaka pamusoro penyu, napamusoro peguta rino, napamusoro pavageremo; nokuti zvirokwazvo Jehovha akandituma kwamuri kuti nditaure mashoko awa ose munzeve dzenyu.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Ipapo machinda navanhu vose vakati kuvapristi navaporofita, “Munhu uyu haafaniri rufu, nokuti wakataura nesu nezita raJehovha Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Zvino vamwe vavakuru venyika vakasimuka, vakataura neungano yose yavanhu, vachiti," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mikaya muMorashitiri wakaporofita pamazuva aHezekiya mambo waJudha; akataura navanhu vose vaJudha, achiti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Zioni richarimwa somunda, neJerusaremu richava mirwi yamabwe, negomo reimba richaita senzvimbo dzakakwirira dzedondo.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 “Ko Hezekiya mambo waJudha, navaJudha vose vakamuuraya here? Ko haana kutya Jehovha, akanyengetera Jehovha, Jehovha akazvidemba pamusoro pezvakaipa zvaakanga areva pamusoro pavo here? Saizvozvo tingatadzira mweya yedu kwazvo.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Uyezve, kwakanga kuno munhu waiporofita nezita raJehovha, wainzi Uriya, mwanakomana waShemaia weKiriatijearimi; iye wakaporofita zvakaipa pamusoro peguta rino nenyika ino zvakafanana namashoko ose aJeremiya." 
Jeremiah26:21 Zvino mambo Jehoiakimu, navakuru vake vose, namachinda ose, vakati vanzwa mashoko ake, mambo akatsvaka kumuuraya; asi Uriya wakati achizvinzwa akatya, akatizira Ijipiti." 
Jeremiah26:22 Mambo Jehoiakini akatuma vanhu Ijipiti, vaiti Erinatani mwanakomana waAkibhori, navamwe vanhu naye, vaende Ijipiti;" 
Jeremiah26:23 akandotora Uriya Ijipiti, vakauya naye kuna mambo Jehoiakimu, iye ndokumuuraya nomunondo, akakandira chitunha chake mumarinda avanhu vasingakudzwi." 
Jeremiah26:24 Asi ruoko rwaAhikami mwanakomana waShafani rwakabatsira Jeremiya, vakasamuisa mumaoko avanhu kuti vamuuraye." 
Jeremiah27:1 Pakuvamba kwokubata ushe kwaJehoiakimu mwanakomwana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, shoko iri rakasvika kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah27:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha kwandiri, ‘Zviitire zvisungo namatanda uzviise pamutsipa wako;" 
Jeremiah27:3 uzvitumire kuna mambo waEdhomu, nokuna mambo waMoabhu, nokuna mambo wavana vaAmoni, nokuna mambo weTaya, nokuna mambo weSidhoni, noruoko rwenhume dzinouya Jerusaremu kuna Zedhekiya mambo waJudha;’" 
Jeremiah27:4 utume shoko navo kuna tenzi wavo, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, mundoti kuna tenzi wenyu,’" 
Jeremiah27:5 ‘Ini ndakaita nyika, navanhu nezvipfuo zviri pasi pose, nesimba rangu guru uye noruoko rwangu rwakatambanudzwa; zvino ndinozvipa wandinoti ndiye wakafanirwa nazvo.’" 
Jeremiah27:6 Zvino ini ndakaisa nyika idzi dzose muruoko rwaNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, muranda wangu; nemhuka dzose dzebundo ndakamupawo kuti dzimushumire." 
Jeremiah27:7 Marudzi ose achamushumira, iye nomwanakomana wake, kusvikira nguva yenyika yake yasvikawo; ipapo marudzi mazhinji namadzimambo makuru achamuita muranda wavo." 
Jeremiah27:8 “Zvino rudzi rupi norupi noushe hwupi nohwupi vanoramba kushumira iye Nebukadhineza mambo waBhabhironi, vanoramba kuisa mutsipa wavo pasi pejoko ramambo weBhabhironi, rudzi urwo ndicharurova nomunondo uye nenzara, nechirwere chakaipa, kusvikira ndavapedza noruoko rwake ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah27:9 Asi kana murimi, regai kuteerera vaporofita venyu, kana vauki venyu, kana kurota kwenyu, kana vafemberi venyu, kana varoyi venyu, vanotaura nemi, vachiti, ‘Hamungashumiri mambo weBhabhironi;" 
Jeremiah27:10 nokuti vanokuporofiterai nhema, kuti muiswe kure nenyika yenyu, kuti ini ndikudzingirei kunze, muparare.’" 
Jeremiah27:11 Asi rudzi, ruchaisa mutsipa warwo pasi pejoko ramambo weBhabhironi, nokumushumira, rudzi urwo ndicharutendera kugara munyika yarwo, vachairima, nokugaramo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah27:12 “Zvino ndikataura naZedhekiya mambo waJudha mashoko awa ose, ndichiti, ‘Isai mitsipa yenyu pasi pejoko ramambo weBhabhironi, mumushumire iye navanhu vake, murarame." 
Jeremiah27:13 Muchafireiko, imi navanhu venyu, nomunondo, uye nenzara, nechirwere chakaipa, sezvakataura Jehovha pamusoro porudzi runoramba kushumira mambo weBhabhironi?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Regai kuteerera mashoko avaporofita vanotaura kwamuri vachiti, “Hamungashumiri mambo weBhabhironi;” nokuti vanokuporofiterai nhema."
