Jeremiah27:15 Nokuti ini handina kuvatuma ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha asi vanoporofita nhema nezita rangu; kuti ndikudzingirei kunze, mupere, imi navaporofita vanokuporofiterai.’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Ndakataurawo navapristi, uye navanhu ava vose, ndikati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Regai kuteerera mashoko avaporofita venyu vanokuporofiterai,’ vachiti, ‘Tarirai, midziyo yeimba yaJehovha yodokudzoswa ichibva Bhabhironi; nokuti vanokuporofiterai nhema." 
Jeremiah27:17 Regai kuvaterera; shumirai mambo weBhabhironi, murarame; guta rino richaitwa dongo neiko?’" 
Jeremiah27:18 Asi kana vari vaporofita, kana shoko raJehovha rinavo, ngavanyengetere Jehovha wehondo zvino, kuti midziyo yakasara mumba maJehovha nomumba mamambo waJudha, napaJerusaremu, irege kuenda Bhabhironi.”" 
Jeremiah27:19 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo pamusoro pembiru, napamusoro pegungwa, napamusoro pezvigadziko, napamusoro pemidziyo yakasara muguta rino;" 
Jeremiah27:20 zvisina kutorwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, panguva yaakatapa Jekonia, mwanakomana waJehoiakimu, mambo wavaJudha, paJerusaremu, akamuisa Bhabhironi, pamwechete navakuru vose vavaJudha naveJerusaremu;" 
Jeremiah27:21 nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, pamusoro pemidziyo yakasara mumba maJehovha, nomumba mamambo waJudha, napaJerusaremu," 
Jeremiah27:22 “Ichandoiswa Bhabhironi, ikagarako, kusvikira zuva randichavashanyira ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ipapo ndichavauyisazve, ndikavadzosera kunzvimbo ino.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Zvino pagore irero, pakuvamba kwokubata ushe kwaZedhekiya mambo waJudha, pagore rechina, nomwedzi wechishanu, Hanania mwanakomana waAzuri muporofita, waiva weGibheoni, akataura neni mumba maJehovha, vapristi navanhu vose varipo, akati," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Ndavhuna joko ramambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah28:3 Makore maviri asati apera kwazvo, ndichadzoserazve kunzvimbo ino midziyo yose yeimba yaJehovha, yakatorwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi panzvimbo ino, akaiisa Bhabhironi;" 
Jeremiah28:4 ndichadzoserazve kunzvimbo ino Jekonia mwanakomana waJehoiakimu mambo waJudha, pamwechete navatapwa vose vaJudha, vakaenda Bhabhironi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti ndichavhuna joko ramambo weBhabhironi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Ipapo muporofita Jeremiya akati kumuporofita Hanania, vapristi navanhu vose varipo vamire mumba maJehovha," 
Jeremiah28:6 iye muporofita Jeremiya akati, “Ameni, Jehovha ngaaite zvakadaro; Jehovha nagaasimbise mashoko ako awakaporofita, adzoserezve midziyo yeimba yaJehovha, navose vakatapwa, vabve Bhabhironi vauye kunzvimbo ino." 
Jeremiah28:7 Asi zvino chinzwa shoko iri randinotaura munzeve dzako, nomunzeve dzavanhu vose." 
Jeremiah28:8 Vaporofita, vakanditangira ini newe, vakaporofitera nyika zhinji, noushe hukuru, vachireva zvokurwa, nenzara, nechirwere chakaipa." 
Jeremiah28:9 “Muporofita, unoporofita zvorugare, kana shoko romuporofita uyo rikaitika, muporofita uyo uchazivikanwa kuti wakatumwa naJehovha zvirokwazvo.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Ipapo muporofita Hanania wakabvisa joko pamutsipa womuporofita Jeremiya, akarivhuna." 
Jeremiah28:11 Zvino Hanania akataura pamberi pavanhu vose, achiti, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Saizvozvo ndichavhuna joko raNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi pamitsipa yamarudzi ose makore maviri asati apera kwazvo.’ ” Muporofita Jeremiya ndokuenda zvake." 
Jeremiah28:12 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakauya kuna Jeremiya, muporofita Hanania apedza kuvhuna joko pamutsipa womuporofita Jeremiya, zvichinzi," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Enda undoudza Hanania, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, wavhuna majoko amatanda, asi waita panzvimbo yazvo majoko esimbi.’" 
Jeremiah28:14 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Ndakaisa joko resimbi pamitsipa yamarudzi awa ose, kuti ashumire Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi; achamushumira, uye ndakamupawo mhuka dzebundo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Ipapo muporofita Jeremiya wakati kumuporofita Hanania, “Chinzwa zvino, Hanania, Jehovha haana kukutuma, asi iwe unotendisa vanhu ava nhema." 
Jeremiah28:16 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarira, ndichakudzinga pasi pose; uchafa nhaka, nokuti wakataura zvinomukira Jehovha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Naizvozvo muporofita Hanania wakafa negore iro nomwedzi wechinomwe. 
Jeremiah29:1 Zvino awa ndiwo mashoko orugwaro rwakatumwa nomuporofita Jeremiya ari paJerusaremu kuvakuru vakanga vasara kuna vakatapwa, nokuvapristi nokuvaporofita, nokuvanhu vose, vakanga vakatapwa paJerusaremu naNebhukadhineza, vakaiswa Bhabhironi," 
Jeremiah29:2 (Shure kwokubva paJerusaremu kwamambo Jekonia, namai vake, navaranda, namachinda aJudha neeJerusaremu, navavezi, navapfuri)," 
Jeremiah29:3 noruoko rwaErasa, mwanakomana waShafani, naGemaria, mwanakomana waHirikia, vakanga vatumwa Bhabhironi naZedhekiya mambo waJudha kuna Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi achiti," 
Jeremiah29:4 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, kuna vose vakatapwa, vandakatapisa Jerusaremu vaiswe Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah29:5 “Zvivakirei dzimba, mugaremo; simai minda, mudye zvibereko zvayo;" 
Jeremiah29:6 wanai vakadzi, mubereke vanakomana navanasikana; wanisai vanakomana venyu vakadzi, navanasikana venyu muvaise kuvarume, kuti vabereke vanakomana navanasikana, muwandeko, murege kutapudzwa." 
Jeremiah29:7 Mutsvake rugare rweguta kwandakakutapisai, murinyengeterere kuna Jehovha; nokuti norugare rwaro imi muchava norugarewo." 
Jeremiah29:8 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Vaporofita venyu, vari pakati penyu, navauki venyu, ngavarege kukunyengerai; regai kuteerera kurota kwenyu kwamunoroteswa.’" 
Jeremiah29:9 “Nokuti vanokuporofiterai nhema nezita rangu; ini handina kuvatuma, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah29:10 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, “Kana makore makumi manomwe aperera Bhabhironi, ndichakushanyirai, nokukusimbisirai shoko rangu rakanaka, ndichikudzoserai kunzvimbo ino." 
Jeremiah29:11 Nokuti ndinoziva ndangariro dzandinorangarira pamusoro penyu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, ndangariro dzorugare, dzisati dziri dzezvakaipa, kuti ndikupei mugumo une tariro." 
Jeremiah29:12 Muchadana kwandiri, muchandonyengetera kwandiri, neni ndichakunzwai." 
Jeremiah29:13 Muchanditsvaka, mukandiwana, kana muchinditsvaka nomwoyo wenyu wose." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ndichawanikwa nemi, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, ndichakudzosai pakutapwa kwenyu, nokukuunganidzai kumarudzi ose, nokunzvimbo dzose kwandakanga ndakudzingirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ndichakudzoseraizve kunzvimbo kwandakanga ndakutapisai." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Zvamakati, ‘Jehovha wakatimutsira vaporofita paBhabhironi;’" 
Jeremiah29:16 zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pamambo ugere pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi, napamusoro pavanhu vose vagere muguta rino, idzo hama dzenyu dzisina kuenda nemi pakutapwa kwenyu;" 
Jeremiah29:17 zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Tarirai, ndichatuma pamusoro pavo munondo, nenzara, nechirwere chakaipa, ndichavaita samaonde akaipa kwazvo, asingabviri kudyiwa nokuipa kwawo." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndichateverera nomunondo, nenzara, nechirwere chakaipa; ndichavaita chinhu chinotyisa ushe hwose hwenyika, vave chinhu chinotukwa, nechishamiso, nechinoridzirwa muridzo, nechinoshoorwa pakati pamarudzi ose kwandakavadzingira;" 
Jeremiah29:19 zvavasina kuteerera mashoko angu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, andakatuma kwavari navaranda vangu vaporofita, ndichimuka mangwanani ndichivatuma; asi makaramba kuteerera, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah29:20 Naizvozvo chinzwai shoko raJehovha, imi mose makatapwa, vandakadzinga paJerusaremu ndikavaisa Bhabhironi.’" 
Jeremiah29:21 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, pamusoro paAhabhi mwanakomana waKoraia, napamusoro paZedhekiya mwanakomana waMaaseia, vanokuporofiterai nhema nezita rangu, ‘Tarirai, ndinovaisa muruoko rwaNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi; iye uchavauraya pamberi penyu;" 
Jeremiah29:22 vatapwa vose vaJudha, vari Bhabhironi, vachatora kwavari shoko rokutuka naro,’ vachiti, ‘Jehovha akuite saZedhekiya uye saAhabhi,’ vakagochwa pamoto namambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah29:23 “Nokuti vakaita nohupenzi pakati paIsiraeri, vakaita hupombwe navakadzi vovokwavo, vakareva mashoko enhema nezita rangu, andisina kuvaraira; ini ndini ndinoziva, ndini chapupu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Zvino kuna Shemaia muNeheramite, unofanira kutaura uchiti," 
Jeremiah29:25 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Zvawakatuma magwaro nezita rako kuvanhu vose vari paJerusaremu, nokuna Zefaniya mwanakomana womupristi Maaseia, nokuvapristi vose,’ uchiti," 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Jehovha wakakuita mupristi panzvimbo yomupristi Jehoiadha, kuti mumba maJehovha muve navatariri, kuti asunge mumatanda namaketani mumwe nomumwe unopenga, achizviita muporofita.’" 
Jeremiah29:27 “Ko zvino wakaregerei kutuka Jeremiya weAnatoti, unozviita muporofita pamberi penyu," 
Jeremiah29:28 zvaakatuma shoko kwatiri paBhabhironi, achiti, ‘Nguva irefu, vakai dzimba mugaremo; simai minda, mudye zvibereko zvayo?’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Zvino mupristi Zefaniya akaravira muporofita Jeremiya rugwaro urwu. 
Jeremiah29:30 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakauya kuna Jeremiya, richiti," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Tumira vakatapwa vose shoko rinoti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro paShemaia muNeheramiti, Shemaia zvaakakuporofiterai, ini ndisina kumutuma, akakutendisai nhema,’" 
Jeremiah29:32 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndicharova Shemaia muNeheramiti, navana vake; haangavi nomunhu ungagara pakati pavanhu ava, uye haangaoni zvakanaka zvandichaitira vanhu vangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha nokuti wakataura zvinomukira Jehovha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Shoko, rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Nyora mashoko ose andakakuudza mubhuku." 
Jeremiah30:3 Nokuti, tarirai, mazuva anouya, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, andichadzosa vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri navaJudha pakutapwa kwavo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ndichavadzosera kunyika yandakapa madzibaba avo, ive yavo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Awa ndiwo mashoko akataura Jehovha pamusoro paIsiraeri napamusoro paJudha. 
Jeremiah30:5 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, “Takanzwa izwi rinodederesa, rinotyisa, risati riri norugare." 
Jeremiah30:6 Bvunzai zvino muwone kana murume ungagona kusurumuka; ndinowonereiko murume mumwe nomumwe akaisa maoko ake pachiuno chake somukadzi unosurumuka, nezviso zvose zvakacheneruka?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Maiwe! Nokuti zuva iro iguru, hakuna rakafanana naro; inguva yokutambudzika kwaJakobho; asi uchasunungurwa pazviri." 
Jeremiah30:8 “Zvino nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo ndichavhuna joko rake pamutsipa wako, ndichadambura zvisungo zvako; vatorwa havangazomuiti muranda wavo;" 
Jeremiah30:9 asi vachashumira Jehovha Mwari wavo, naDhavhidhi mambo wavo, wandichavamutsira." 
Jeremiah30:10 Naizvozvo usatya hako, iwe Jakobho muranda wangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; usavhunduka hako, iwe Isiraeri, nokuti tarira, ndichakuponesa uri kure, navana vako kunyika kwavakatapirwa; Jakobho uchadzoka, uchagara akagadzikana anorugare, hakuna ungamutyisa." 
Jeremiah30:11 Nokuti ndinewe, kuti ndikuponese, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti ndichagumisa chose marudzi ose kwandakakuparadzira, asi iwe handingakugumisi chose; asi ndichakuranga nokururama, handingatongokuregi usina kurohwa.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, “Kukuvadzwa kwako hakubviri kuporeswa, vanga rako rakaipa kwazvo." 
Jeremiah30:13 Hakuna unoreverera mhaka yako, kuti urapwe; hauna mishonga inoporesa." 
Jeremiah30:14 Vose vaikuda vakukanganwa, havakuvingi, nokuti ndakakukuvadza nevanga romuvengi, uye nokurova kwoune hasha, nokuda kwohukuru hwezvakaipa zvako, nokuti zvivi zvako zvakanga zvawanda." 
Jeremiah30:15 Unochemeiko pamusoro pokukuvadzwa kwako? Kurwadziwa kwako hakubviri kuporeswa. Ndakakuitira zvinhu izvi, nokuda kwohukuru hwezvakaipa zvako, nokuti zvivi zvako zvakanga zvawanda." 
Jeremiah30:16 Naizvozvo vose vanokudya vachadyiwawo; vadzivisi vako vose, mumwe nomumwe wavo, vachatapwa; vanokupamba vachapambwa, vose vanokuparadza, ndichavaisa kukuparadzwa." 
Jeremiah30:17 Nokuti ndichakudzosera mufaro pamuviri, ndichakuporesa mavanga ako, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, zvavakakutumidza zita rinonzi Murashwa, vachiti, ‘NdiZioni zvaro, hakuna munhu une hanya naro.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:18 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndichadzosazve kutapwa kwamatende aJakobho, nokunzwirwa hugaro hwake tsitsi; guta richavakwa pamusoro pegomo raro, imba yamambo ichagarwa sezvakafanira." 
Jeremiah30:19 Kuwonga nenzwi ravanofara richabudapo; ndichavawanza, havangavi vashoma, ndichavakudza varege kuva vaduku." 
Jeremiah30:20 Vana vavo vachava sakare, neungano yavo ichamiswa pamberi pangu, ndicharova vose vanovamanikidza." 
Jeremiah30:21 Muchinda wavo uchava mumwe wavo, mubati wavo uchabuda pakati pavo; ndichamuswededza, aswedere kwandiri; nokuti ndianiko wakatsunga kuswedera kwandiri? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah30:22 Imi muchava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wenyu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Tarirai, dutu guru remhepo yaJehovha, idzo hasha dzake, rabuda, riri dutu guru rine simba; richaputsikira pamisoro yavakaipa." 
Jeremiah30:24 Kutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha hakungadzoki, kusvikira apedza, kusvikira aita zvose zvaakafunga mumwoyo make; muchazvinzwisisa pamazuva okupedzisira." 
Jeremiah31:1 “Nenguva iyo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, ndichava Mwari wamarudzi ose aIsiraeri, naivo vachava vanhu vangu." 
Jeremiah31:2 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Vanhu vakapukunyuka pamunondo, ivo VaIsiraeri, vakawana nyasha murenje, panguva yandakandovazorodza.’" 
Jeremiah31:3 Jehovha akazviratidza kwandiri ari kure, akati, ‘Zvirokwazvo, ndakabuda norudo rusingaperi, naizvozvo ndakakukweva nohunyoro." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndichakuvakazve, ipapo uchava wakavakwa, iwe mhandara yaIsiraeri; uchashongedzwazve ngoma dzako, uchabuda kundotamba navanofara." 
Jeremiah31:5 Uchasimazve minda yemizambiringa pamakomo eSamaria; vasimi vachasima nokudya zvibereko zvayo.’ 
Jeremiah31:6 Nokuti zuva richasvika, naro nharirire dzichadana pamakomo aEfuremu, dzichiti, ‘Simukai imi, tikwire Zioni kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, “Imbirai Jakobho nomufaro, pururudzirai mukuru wamarudzi; paridzirai, rumbidzai muti, ‘Jehovha, ponesai vanhu venyu, ivo vakasara VaIsiraeri.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Tarirai, ndichavauyisa vachibva kunyika yokumusoro, ndichavaunganidza kumigumo yenyika, pamwechete namapofu, navanokamhina, navakadzi vava nomuviri pamwechete navanosurumuka; vachadzokera kuno riri boka guru." 
Jeremiah31:9 Vachauya vachichema, ndichavaperekedza vachinyengetera; ndichivafambisa panzizi dzemvura zhinji, nenzira yakarurama, pavasingazogumburwi; nokuti ndiri baba kuna Isiraeri, Efuremu idangwe rangu.”" 
Jeremiah31:10 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi marudzi, muriparidzire pazviwi zviri kure, muti, “Wakaparadzira Isiraeri, ndiye uchavaunganidza, nokuvachengeta, sezvinoita mufudzi boka rake." 
Jeremiah31:11 Nokuti Jehovha akadzikinura Jakobho, akamurwira muruoko rwounopfuura nesimba." 
Jeremiah31:12 Vachauya vachiimba panzvimbo yakakwirira yeZioni, vachayerera semvura kune zvakanaka zvaJehovha, kuzviyo, nokuwaini itsva, nokumafuta, nokuzvibereko zvamakwai nemombe; mweya wavo uchava somunda wakadiridzwa, havangatongovi nokusuwazve." 
Jeremiah31:13 Ipapo mhandara ichafara nokutamba, namajaya navatana pamwechete; nokuti ndichashandura kuchema kwavo uve mufaro, ndichavanyaradza, nokuvafadza pakusuwa kwavo." 
Jeremiah31:14 “Ndichagutisa mweya yavapristi namafuta, uye vanhu vangu vachaguta nezvakanaka zvangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Izwi rinonzwika muRama, rokuwungudza nokuchema kukuru, Racheri unochema vana vake; unoramba kunyaradzwa pamusoro pavana vake, nokuti havachipo." 
Jeremiah31:16 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Dzora izwi rako pakuchema, nameso ako pamisodzi, nokuti basa rako richaripirwa mubairo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; vachadzokazve vachibva kunyika yavavengi vavo." 
Jeremiah31:17 Mugumo wako une tariro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; vana vako vachadzokerazve kumiganhu yavo.’" 
Jeremiah31:18 Zvirokwazvo ndakanzwa Efuremu achizvichema, achiti, ‘Imi makandirova, ndikarohwa semhuru isina kupingudzwa; ndidzoserei imi, ipapo ndichadzoka, nokuti imi muri Jehovha Mwari wangu.’" 
Jeremiah31:19 Zvirokwazvo, ndakati ndadzoka, ndikatendeuka, ndakati ndarairirwa, ndikazvirova pahudyu; ndakanyadziswa, zvirokwazvo, ndakanyara, nokuti ndakatakura kushoorwa kwohuduku hwangu." 
Jeremiah31:20 Ko Efuremu ndiye mwanakomana wangu unodikanwa here? Ndiye mwana unondifadza here? Nokuti nguva dzose kana ndichimutuka, ndinoramba ndichimurangarira kwazvo; naizvozvo mwoyo wangu unomuchemera; zvirokwazvo, ndichamunzwira nyasha, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Zvimisirei shongwe dzenzira, zviitirei zvani; rerekerai mwoyo yenyu kunzira huru, iyo nzira yamakafamba nayo; dzokazve, mhandara yaIsiraeri, dzokerazve kumaguta ako awa." 
Jeremiah31:22 Ucharamba uchifambiramo kusvikira rinhiko, iwe mukunda wokudzokera shure? Nokuti Jehovha akasika chinhu chitsva panyika, chokuti mukadzi uchambundikira murume.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, “Vachataurazve shoko iri munyika yaJudha nomumaguta ayo, kana ndichidzosazve kutapwa kwavo, vachiti, ‘Jehovha ngaakuropafadze, iwe hugaro hwokururama, iwe gomo rohutsvene.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 “Judha namaguta avo ose vachagaramo pamwechete, varimi navanofamba namapoka avo." 
Jeremiah31:25 Nokuti ndakagutsa mweya wakaneta, nomweya mumwe nomumwe, unokusuwa, ndakausimbisa." 
Jeremiah31:26 Ipapo ndakamuka, ndikaona; hope dzangu dzingandizipira." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, mazuva anouya, andichadyara paimba yaIsiraeri napaimba yaJudha mbeu dzavanhu nembeu dzezvipfuo." 
Jeremiah31:28 Zvino sezvandakavarindira, ndichidzura nokukoromora nokuwisira pasi nokuparadza nokutambudza, saizvozvo ndichavarindira ndivake nokusima ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.’" 
Jeremiah31:29 Namazuva awo havangazoti, ‘Madzibaba akadya mazambiringa anovava; meno avana ndokurwadzira.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Asi mumwe nomumwe uchafira zvakaipa zvake; mumwe nomumwe, unodya mazambiringa anovava, meno ake acharwadzira.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 “Tarirai, mazuva anouya, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, andichaita sungano itsva neimba yaIsiraeri, neimba yaJudha." 
Jeremiah31:32 Haingafanani nesungano yandakaita namadzibaba avo namazuva andakavabata ruoko ndikavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, vakaputsa sungano yangu iyo, kunyangwe ndakanga ndiri murume kwavari ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah31:33 Asi heyi sungano yandichaita neimba yaIsiraeri shure kwamazuva iwayo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, ‘Ndichaisa murairo wangu mukati mavo, ndichaunyora pamwoyo yavo; ini ndichava Mwari wavo, ivo vachava vanhu vangu.’" 
Jeremiah31:34 Havangazodzidzisani, mumwe nomumwe nowokwake, mumwe nomumwe nehama yake, achiti, ‘Ziva Jehovha; nokuti vachandiziva vose, kubva kuvaduku pakati pavo, kusvikira kuvakuru pakati pavo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti ndichakanganwira kuipa kwavo, nezvivi zvavo handingazozvirangariri.’" 
Jeremiah31:35 Zvanzi naJehovha, iye unopa zuva rive chiedza masikati, nemirairo yomwedzi neyenyenyedzi zvive chiedza usiku, iye unomutsa gungwa, kuti mafungu aro atinhire, Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake." 
Jeremiah31:36 Kana mirairo iyi ikabva pamberi pangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, ipapo vana VaIsiraeriwo vangagumawo kuva rudzi pamberi pangu nokusingaperi." 
Jeremiah31:37 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Kana denga kumusoro richibvira kuyerwa, nenheyo dzenyika pasi dzichibvira kunzverwa, ipapo neniwo ndicharasha vana vose VaIsiraeri nokuda kwezvose zvavakaita, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.’" 
Jeremiah31:38 “Tarirai, mazuva anouya, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, achavakirwa Jehovha guta kubva pashongwe yaHananeri kusvikira kusuwo rekona." 
Jeremiah31:39 Uye tambo yokuyera nayo ichapfuura ichiruramira kuchikomo cheGarebhi, ndokudzoka kusvikira paGoa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Mupata wose wezvitunha nowamadota, neminda yose kusvikira kurukova Kidhironi, kusvikira kukona resuwo ramabhiza kurutivi rwamabvazuva, zvichava zvitsvene kuna Jehovha; hazvingazodzurwi, kana kuparadzwa nokusingaperi.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Shoko rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Jehovha negore regumi raZedhekiya mambo waJudha, riri gore regumi namasere raNebhukadhineza." 
Jeremiah32:2 Zvino nenguva iyo mambo wehondo yeBhabhironi wakanga akakomberedza Jerusaremu; asi muporofita Jeremiya wakanga akapfigirwa muruvazhe rwavarindi, rwakanga ruri mumba mamambo waJudha." 
Jeremiah32:3 Nokuti Zedhekiya mambo waJudha wakanga amupfigira, achiti, “Unoporofitireiko uchiti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, tarirai, ndichaisa guta rino muruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi, iye ucharikunda;’" 
Jeremiah32:4 Zedhekiya mambo waJudha haangapukunyuki pamaoko avaKaradhia, asi uchaiswa zvirokwazvo muruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi, vachataurirana nemiromo yavo, nokuonana nameso avo;" 
Jeremiah32:5 iye uchandoisa Zedhekiya Bhabhironi, agareko kusvikira ndichimushanyira, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; kunyangwe mukarwa navaKaradhia hamungakundi?”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremiya akati, “Shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri, richiti," 
Jeremiah32:7 ‘Tarira, Hanameri mwanakomana waSharumi, sekuru vako, uchauya kwauri, achiti, “Zvitengere munda wangu uri paAnatoti, nokuti ndiwe une simba rokuudzikinura nokuutenga.” ’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Naizvozvo Hanameri mwanakomana wasekuru vangu wakauya kwandiri muruvazhe rwavarindi, sezvakarehwa neshoko raJehovha, akati kwandiri, “Donditengera hako munda wangu uri paAnatoti, riri munyika yaBhenjamini, nokuti ndiwe une simba rokugara nhaka, ndiwe unofanira kudzikinura; chizvitengera iwo.” Ipapo ndakaziva kuti ishoko raJehovha." 
Jeremiah32:9 Ndikatenga munda wakanga uri paAnatoti kuna Hanameri mwanakomana wasekuru vangu, ndikamuyerera mari, mashekeri esirivha ane gumi namanomwe." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ndikanyora rugwaro rwokutenga, ndikarunamatidza, ndikadana zvapupu, ndikamuyerera mari pachiyero." 
Jeremiah32:11 Ipapo ndikatora rugwaro rwokutenga, irwo rwakanga rwakanamatidzwa, sezvakarehwa nomurairo netsika, norumwe rwakanga rwakashama," 
Jeremiah32:12 ndikapa Bharuki mwanakomana waNeria, mwanakomana waMaseia, rugwaro rwokutenga, Hanameri mwanakomana wasekuru vangu aripo, nezvapupu zvakanga zvasimbisa rugwaro rwokutenga zviripo, navaJudha vose vakanga vagere muruvazhe rwavarindi varipo." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ndikaraira Bharuki pamberi pavo, ndichiti," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tora magwaro awa okutenga, rugwaro urwu rwokutenga rwakanamatidzwa, norugwaro urwu rwakashama, uzviise mumudziyo wevhu, zvigaremo mazuva mazhinji.’" 
Jeremiah32:15 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Dzimba neminda yemizambiringa zvichazotengwazve munyika ino.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Zvino ndakati ndapa Bharuki mwanakomana waNeria rugwaro rwokutenga, ndikanyengetera kuna Jehovha, ndichiti," 
Jeremiah32:17 “Haiwa, Ishe Jehovha! Tarirai, imi makaita denga rose napasi nesimba renyu guru noruoko rwenyu rwakatambanudzwa, hakuna chinhu chingakukonai imi;" 
Jeremiah32:18 imi, munonzwira tsitsi vane zviuru zvamazana, nokutsiva zvakaipa zvamadzibaba muchipfuva chavana vavo vanovatevera, iye mukuru, Mwari une simba, Jehovha wehondo, ndiro zita rake;" 
Jeremiah32:19 wakakura panjere, une simba pakubata, meso ake anosvinurira nzira dzose dzavana vavanhu, kuti ape mumwe nomumwe sezvaakabata, nezvakafanira zvibereko zvamabasa ake;" 
Jeremiah32:20 iye, wakaisa zviratidzo nezvishamiso panyika yeIjipiti kusvikira pazuva ranhasi, pakati paIsiraeri napakati pavamwe vanhu; mukazviitira mbiri sezvazvakaita nezuva ranhasi;" 
Jeremiah32:21 mukabudisa vanhu venyu VaIsiraeri panyika yeIjipiti, nezviratidzo nezvishamiso nechanza chine simba, noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, uye nokutyisa kukuru;" 
Jeremiah32:22 mukavapa nyika ino, yamakapikira madzibaba avo kuti muchavapa, iri nyika inoyerera mukaka nohuchi;" 
Jeremiah32:23 vakapinda, vakaiita yavo; asi havana kuteerera izwi renyu, kana kufamba nemirairo yenyu; havana kutongoita chinhu chimwe chezvose zvamakavaraira kuti vazviite; naizvozvo makauyisa izvi zvose pamusoro pavo." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Tarirai, mirwi yokurwa yasvika paguta kuti varikunde; guta raiswa mumaoko avaKaradhia vanorwa naro, nokuda kwomunondo nenzara nechirwere chakaipa; zvamakataura zvaitika, tarirai, munozviona." 
Jeremiah32:25 Zvino imi Ishe Jehovha, makati kwandiri, ‘Chitengera munda nemari, udane zvapupu, kunyangwe zvakadaro guta raiswa mumaoko avaKaradhia.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jeremiya, richiti," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Tarira, ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyama yose, kune chinhu chingandikona here?" 
Jeremiah32:28 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarira ndichaisa guta rino mumaoko avaKaradhia, nomumaoko aNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, iye ucharikunda.’" 
Jeremiah32:29 “VaKaradhia, vanorwa neguta rino, vachauya vachitungidza guta rino, vachiripisira, pamwechete nedzimba dzavakabayira pamatenga adzo zvinonhuwira kuna Bhaari, nokudururira vamwe vamwari zvipiriso zvinodururwa, kuti vanditsamwise." 
Jeremiah32:30 Nokuti vana VaIsiraeri navana vaJudha vaingoita zvakaipa zvoga pamberi pangu kubva pahuduku hwavo; nokuti vana VaIsiraeri vakangonditsamwisa bedzi namabasa amaoko avo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah32:31 Nokuti guta rino rakamutsa kutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu kubva pazuva ravakarivaka kusvikira zuva ranhasi, kuti ndiribvise pamberi pangu," 
Jeremiah32:32 nokuda kwezvakaipa zvose zvavana VaIsiraeri navana vaJudha, zvavakaita vachinditsamwisa, ivo namadzimambo avo, namachinda avo, navapristi vavo, navaporofita vavo, navanhu vaJudha, navagere Jerusaremu." 
Jeremiah32:33 “Vakandifuratira, havana kunditarira nezviso zvavo; kunyangwe ndaivadzidzisa, ndichimuka mangwanani ndichivadzidzisa, asi havana kuteerera nokutenda kurangwa." 
Jeremiah32:34 “Asi vakaisa zvinonyangadza zvavo mumba yakatumidzwa zita rangu, kuti vaisvibise." 
Jeremiah32:35 Vakavaka mitunhu yaBhaari, iri mumupata womwanakomana waHinomu, kuti vapinzire Moreki vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo mumoto, chinhu chandisina kuvaraira, kana chandisina kufunga mumwoyo mangu, kuti vaite chinhu ichi chinonyangadza, vachitadzisa Judha.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri pamusoro peguta rino, ramunoti rakaiswa muruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi nomunondo, nenzara uye nechirwere chakaipa," 
Jeremiah32:37 “Tarirai, ndichavaunganidza kunyika dzose kwandakanga ndavadzingira nokutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu, uye neshungu dzangu huru, ndichavadzoserazve kunzvimbo ino, nokuvagarisa vakachengetwa." 
Jeremiah32:38 Ivo vachava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndichavapa mwoyo mumwe nenzira imwe, kuti vanditye nokusingaperi, vaitirwe zvakanaka ivo, navana vavo vanovatevera." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndichaita navo sungano isingaperi, handingadzoki pakuvatevera kuti ndivaitire zvakanaka; ndichaisa kutya mumwoyo yavo kuti vanditye, kuti varege kuzotsauka kwandiri." 
Jeremiah32:41 Zvirokwazvo, ndichavafarira kuti ndivaitire zvakanaka, ndichavasima zvirokwazvo munyika ino nomwoyo wangu wose uye nomweya wangu wose." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Sezvandakauyisa zvakaipa izvi zvikuru zvose pamusoro pavanhu ava, saizvozvowo ndichauyisa pamusoro pavo zvakanaka zvose zvandakavapikira." 
Jeremiah32:43 Minda ichatengwa munyika ino yamunoti idongo, haina vanhu kana zvipfuo, yaiswa mumaoko avaKaradhia.’" 
Jeremiah32:44 “Vanhu vachatenga minda nemari, nokunyora magwaro okutenga, nokuanamatidza, nokudana zvapupu, panyika yaBhenjamini, napanzvimbo dzakapoteredza Jerusaremu, nomumaguta aJudha, nomumaguta enyika yamakomo, nomumaguta amapani, nomumaguta orutivi rwezasi; nokuti ndichadzosa kutapwa kwavo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve rwechipiri kuna Jeremiya, achakapfigirwa muruvazhe rwavarindi, richiti," 
Jeremiah33:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha, iye unozviita, iye Jehovha unozviumba nokuzvisimbisa, Jehovha ndiro zita rake," 
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Danai kwandiri, ndichakupindurai, ndichakuratidzai zvinhu zvikuru zvakavanzika, zvamusingazivi.’" 
Jeremiah33:4 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri pamusoro pedzimba dzeguta rino, napamusoro pedzimba dzamadzimambo aJudha, dzakakoromorwa kuzorwa nemirwi yokurwa neminondo," 
Jeremiah33:5 ‘Vanouya havo kuzorwa navaKaradhia, asi vanodzizadza nezvitunha zvavanhu vandakauraya nokutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu, ndikavanzira guta rino chiso changu nokuda kwokuipa kwavo kwose.’" 
Jeremiah33:6 Tarirai, ndichavavigira mufaro pamuviri nokupora, ini ndichavaporesa; ndichavaratidza rugare rwakawanda nezvokwadi yakawanda." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ndichadzosa kutapwa kwaJudha nokutapwa kwaIsiraeri, ndichavavaka sapakutanga." 
Jeremiah33:8 “Ndichavanatsa pazvakaipa zvavo zvose zvavakanditadzira nazvo, ndichakanganwira zvakaipa zvavo zvose zvavakanditadzira nazvo, nezvavakandidarikira nazvo." 
Jeremiah33:9 Guta rino richava kwandiri mbiri yomufaro, nokurumbidzwa nokukudzwa, pamberi pamarudzi ose enyika, achanzwa zvakanaka zvose zvandichavaitira; vachatya nokudedera pamusoro pezvakanaka zvose norugare rwose zvandicharivigira.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Panzvimbo ino yamunoti yakaparadzwa, haina vanhu kana zvipfuo, imo mumaguta aJudha, nomunzira dzomuJerusaremu, mangova nedongo, musina vanhu vageremo, kana zvipfuo, pachanzwikazve" 
Jeremiah33:11 izwi romufaro nokufarisisa, izwi rechikomba nenzwi romwenga, nenzwi ravanoti, ‘Wongai Jehovha wehondo,’ nokuti Jehovha akanaka, nokuti ngoni dzake dziripo nokusingaperi; uye neravanouya nezvipiriso zvokuwonga mumba maJehovha. Nokuti ndichadzosa kutapwa kwenyika zvive sapakutanga ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Panzvimbo ino yakaparadzwa, isina vanhu kana zvipfuo, napamaguta aripo, pachavazve namafuro avafudzi, vanovatisa makwai avo pasi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mumaguta enyika yamakomo, mumaguta amapani, mumaguta orutivi rwezasi, napanyika yaBhenjamini, napanzvimbo dzakapoteredza Jerusaremu, nomumaguta aJudha, makwai achapfuurazve pasi poruoko rwounoaverenga, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah33:14 “Tarirai, mazuva anouya, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, andichaita shoko iro rakanaka randakataura pamusoro peimba yaIsiraeri napamusoro peimba yaJudha." 
Jeremiah33:15 “Namazuva iwayo, nenguva iyo, ndichamedzera Dhavhidhi davi rokururama; iye ucharuramisira vanhu nokuita zvakarurama panyika." 
Jeremiah33:16 Namazuva iwayo Judha vachaponeswa, Jerusaremu richagara rakachengetwa; zita rarichatumidzwa nderiri, ‘Jehovha ndiye kururama kwedu.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Dhavhidhi haangatongoshaiwi munhu unogara pachigaro choushe cheimba yaIsiraeri;" 
Jeremiah33:18 navapristi vaRevhi havangashaiwi munhu pamberi pangu ungapisa zvipiriso zvinopiswa nokupisa zvipiriso zvoupfu, nokugara achibayira.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jeremiya richiti," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Kana mungagona kuputsa sungano yangu yamasikati nesungano yangu yousiku, kukarega kuva namasikati nousiku nenguva yazvo;" 
Jeremiah33:21 ipapo sungano yangu naDhavhidhi muranda wangu ingaputswawo, akasava nomwanakomana ungabata ushe pachigaro chake choushe; saizvozvowo navaRevhi, vapristi, vashumiri vangu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:22 Hondo yokudenga sezvaisingabviri kuverengwa, kana jecha regungwa kuyerwa, saizvozvo ndichawanza vana vaDhavhidhi muranda wangu, navaRevhi vanondishumira." 
Jeremiah33:23 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jeremiya richiti," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Haurangariri zvakataurwa navanhu ava, zvavakati, ‘Marudzi maviri akatsaurwa naJehovha, akaraswa naye?’ Saizvozvo vanozvidza vanhu vangu, vachiti havachiri rudzi pamberi pavo." 
Jeremiah33:25 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Kana sungano yangu yamasikati nousiku isipo, kana ndisina kutemera denga napasi mirairo;" 
Jeremiah33:26 ipapo ndicharashawo vana vaJakobho, navaDhavhidhi muranda wangu, kuti ndirege kutora vamwe vavana vake vave vabati vavana vaAbhurahamu naIsaka naJakobho; nokuti ndichadzosa kutapwa kwavo nokuvanzwira nyasha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Shoko, rakasvika kuna Jeremiya, richibva kuna Jehovha, panguva iyo Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, nehondo yake yose, noushe hwose hwenyika hwakanga hwakabatwa naye, namarudzi ose, vachirwa neJerusaremu namaguta ose aro, richiti," 
Jeremiah34:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Enda, undotaura naZedhekiya mambo waJudha,’ uti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, tarira, ndichaisa guta rino muruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi, iye ucharipisa nomoto;" 
Jeremiah34:3 newe haungapukunyuki paruoko rwake, asi zvirokwazvo uchabatwa, nokuiswa muruoko rwake; meso ako achaona meso amambo weBhabhironi, muchataurirana nemiromo yenyu, iwe uchaenda Bhabhironi.’" 
Jeremiah34:4 Asi chinzwa shoko raJehovha, iwe Zedhekiya mambo waJudha, zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pako, iwe haungaurawi nomunondo;" 
Jeremiah34:5 iwe uchafa norugare; sezvavakapisira madzimababa ako, iwo madzimambo akare akakutangira, saizvozvo vachakupisirawo; vachakuchema vachiti, ‘Haiwa ishe!’ Nokuti ndini ndakataura shoko iro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Ipapo muporofita Jeremiya akataura mashoko aya ose kuna Zedhekiya mambo waJudha paJerusaremu," 
Jeremiah34:7 nenguva yakarwa hondo yamambo weBhabhironi neJerusaremu uye namaguta ose aJudha akanga asara, neRakishi neAzeka, nokuti ndiyo yakanga yasara pamaguta aJudha, ari maguta akakombwa norusvingo." 
Jeremiah34:8 Shoko, rakasvika kuna Jeremiya, richibva kuna Jehovha, mambo Zedhekiya aita sungano navanhu vose vakanga vari Jerusaremu, achivaparidzira kuti vakasunungurwa," 
Jeremiah34:9 kuti mumwe nomumwe unofanira kutendera muranda wake, nomumwe nomumwe mushandiri wake, waiva muHebheru, murume kana mukadzi, kuti aende hake; kuti kurege kuva nomuJudha unoita hama yake muranda." 
Jeremiah34:10 Machinda ose navanhu vose vakateerera, ivo vakanga vatenda sungano, kuti mumwe nomumwe atendere muranda wake nomumwe nomumwe mushandiri wake kuti vaende havo, kuti kurege kuzova nomunhu unovaita varanda; vakateerera, vakavatendera kuenda." 
Jeremiah34:11 Asi pashure vakashanduka, vakadzosa varanda navashandiri, vavakanga vambotendera kuenda, vakavamanikidzazve kuti vave varanda navashandiri." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Jehovha richiti," 
Jeremiah34:13 “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Ndakaita sungano namadzibaba enyu, panguva yandakavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, muimba youranda,’ ndichiti," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Kana makore manomwe apera, munofanira mumwe nomumwe kutendera hama yake muHebheru kuti aende hake, iye wakanga akatengeswa kwauri, akakubatira makore matanhatu, unofanira kumutendera kuti aende hake, abve kwauri; asi madzibaba enyu haana kunditeerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo.’" 
Jeremiah34:15 Zvino imi makanga madzoka henyu, mukaita zvakarurama pamberi pangu, zvamakaparidzira mumwe nomumwe hama yake kuti ungasunungurwa; makanga maita sungano pamberi pangu muimba panodanwa zita rangu." 
Jeremiah34:16 “Asi makadzoka, mukamhura zita rangu, mukadzosa mumwe nomumwe muranda wake nomumwe nomumwe mushandiri wake, vamakanga matendera kuti vaende havo nokuda kwavo, mukavamanikidzazve kuti vave varanda navashandiri venyu." 
Jeremiah34:17 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Hamuna kunditeerera, mukaparidzira mumwe nomumwe hama yake nomumwe nomumwe wokwake kuti ungasunungurwa hake; tarirai, ini ndinokuparidzirai kuti muchasunungurirwa munondo, nechirwere chakaipa, nenzara, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ndichakuitai chinhu chinotyisa ushe hwose hwenyika.’" 
Jeremiah34:18 Varume vakadarika sungano yangu, vakasaita mashoko esungano yavakaita neni, ndichavaita semhuru yavakagura napakati vakapfuura napakati penhindi dzayo;" 
Jeremiah34:19 machinda aJudha, namachinda eJerusaremu, navaranda vavo, navapristi, navanhu vose venyika, vakapfuura napakati penhindi dzemhuru," 
Jeremiah34:20 ivo ndichavaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo, nomumaoko avanotsvaka kuvauraya, zvitunha zvavo zvichava zvokudya zveshiri dzokudenga nezvezvikara zvenyika." 
Jeremiah34:21 Naiye Zedhekiya mambo waJudha namachinda ake ndichavaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo nomumaoko ehondo yamambo weBhabhironi, vakaenda vachibva kwamuri." 
Jeremiah34:22 Tarirai, ndichavaraira nokuvadzosera kuguta rino, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; vacharwa naro, nokurikunda, nokuripisa nomoto; ndichaita maguta aJudha matongo, asina vanogaramo.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Shoko, rakasvika kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Jehovha namazuva aJehoiakimu, mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, richiti," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Enda kuimba yavaRekabhi, utaure navo, uuye navo mumba maJehovha, mune imwe kamuri, uvape waini vanwe.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Ipapo ndakatora Jaazania mwanakomana waJeremiya, mwanakomana waHabhazania, nehama dzake, navanakomana vake vose, neimba yose yavaRekabhi." 
Jeremiah35:4 Ndikavaisa mumba maJehovha, mukamuri yavanakomana vaHanani mwanakomana waIghidhari, munhu waMwari, yaiva pedyo nekamuri yamachinda, yakanga iri pamusoro pekamuri yamachinda, yakanga iri pamusoro pekamuri yaMaaseia mwanakomana waSharumi, mutariri wechikumbaridzo." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ndikagadza pamberi pavanakomana veimba yavaRekabhi mbiya dzizere newaini nemikombe, ndikati kwavari, “Inwai waini.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Asi ivo vakati “Hatinganwi waini, nokuti Jonadhabhi mwanakomana waRekabhi, baba vedu, vakatiraira vachiti, ‘Regai kunwa waini, imi, navanakomana venyu nokusingaperi;" 
Jeremiah35:7 uye musavaka dzimba, kana kudyara mbeu, kana kurima minda yemizambiringa, kana kuva nazvo; asi munofanira kugara mumatende mazuva enyu ose, kuti mugare mazuva mazhinji munyika mamunogara muri vatorwa.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 “Zvino takateerera izwi raJonadhabhi mwanakomana waRekabhi, baba vedu, pazvose zvavakaraira, vachiti tirege kunwa waini mazuva edu ose, isu, navakadzi vedu;" 
Jeremiah35:9 kana kuzvivakira dzimba matingagara; uye hatina minda yemizambiringa, kana mimwe minda, kana mbeu;" 
Jeremiah35:10 asi takagara mumatende, tikateerera, tikaita zvose sezvatakarairwa naJonadhabhi baba vedu." 
Jeremiah35:11 Asi Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi wakati achisvika munyika ino, tikati, ‘Hendei, tiende Jerusaremu nokuti tinotya hondo yavaKaradhia, uye tinotya hondo yavaSiria; naizvozvo tigere Jerusaremu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jeremiya, richiti," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Enda undoudza varume vaJudha, navagere Jerusaremu,’ uti, ‘Hamutendi kurangwa, kuti muterere mashoko angu here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.’" 
Jeremiah35:14 Mashoko aJonadhabhi mwanakomana waRekabhi, aakaraira vanakomana vake, kuti varege kunwa waini, anotererwa; kusvikira zuva ranhasi havanwi, nokuti vanoteerera murairo wababa wavo. Asi ini ndakataura nemi, ndichimuka mangwanani ndichitaura; asi hamuna kunditerera." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ndakatumawo kwamuri varanda vangu vose vavaporofita, ndichimuka mangwanani, ndichivatuma, ndichiti, ‘Dzokai zvino mumwe nomumwe panzira yake yakaipa, munatse zvamunoita, murege kutevera vamwe vamwari muchivashumira, ipapo muchagara panyika yandakakupai imi namadzibaba enyu; asi hamuna kurerekera nzeve dzenyu, kana kunditeerera.’" 
Jeremiah35:16 “Vanakomana vaJonadhabhi mwanakomana waRekabhi vakateerera murairo wababa wavo, waakavaraira, asi vanhu ava havana kunditeerera;" 
Jeremiah35:17 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri; ‘Tarirai, ndichauyisa pamusoro paJudha napamusoro pavose vagere Jerusaremu zvakaipa zvose zvandakareva pamusoro pavo; nokuti ndakataura navo, asi havana kunzwa, ndakavadana, asi havana kudavira.’" 
Jeremiah35:18 “Zvino Jeremiya akati kuimba yavaRekabhi, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, zvamakateerera murairo waJonadhabhi baba venyu, mukachengeta zvirevo zvavo zvose, mukaita zvose sezvamakarairwa navo;’" 
Jeremiah35:19 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, iye Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Jonadhabhi mwanakomana waRekabhi haangashaiwi munhu ungamira pamberi pangu nokusingaperi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Zvino negore rechina raJehoiakimu mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, shoko iri rakasvika kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Tora rugwaro rwakapetwa unyoremo mashoko ose andakakuudza pamusoro paIsiraeri, napamusoro paJudha, napamusoro pamarudzi ose, kubva pazuva randakataura newe, kubva pamazuva aJosiya kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Jeremiah36:3 “Zvimwe imba yaJudha vachanzwa zvakaipa zvose zvandinofunga kuvaitira, kuti vadzoke mumwe nomumwe panzira yake yakaipa, ndivakanganwire kuipa kwavo nezvivi zvavo.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Ipapo Jeremiya wakadana Bharuki mwanakomana waNeria, Bharuki akanyora parugwaro rwakapetwa mashoko ose aJehovha akabva mumuromo waJeremiya, aakataura kwaari." 
Jeremiah36:5 Jeremiya akaraira Bharuki, achiti, “Ini ndakadziviswa, handigoni kupinda mumba maJehovha." 
Jeremiah36:6 Naizvozvo chienda iwe, undorava murugwaro rwakapetwa, mawanyora zvakabva pamuromo wangu, mashoko aJehovha zvinzwike nenzeve dzavanhu mumba maJehovha pazuva rokuzvinyima zvokudya; uye uaravewo anzwike nenzeve dzavaJudha vose vanobuda mumaguta avo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Zvimwe kunyengetera kwavo kuchasvika pamberi paJehovha, vakadzoka mumwe nomumwe panzira yake yakaipa; nokuti kutsamwa nehasha zvakarehwa naJehovha pamusoro pavanhu ava kwakakura kwazvo.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Bharuki mwanakomana waNeria akaita zvose sezvaakarairwa nomuporofita Jeremiya, akarava mubhuku mashoko aJehovha mumba maJehovha." 
Jeremiah36:9 Zvino negore rechishanu raJehoiakimu mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, nomwedzi wepfumbamwe, vanhu vose veJerusaremu, navanhu vose vakanga vabva kumaguta aJudha vachiuya Jerusaremu, vakatara zuva rokuzvinyima zvokudya pamberi paJehovha." 
Jeremiah36:10 Ipapo Bharuki akarava mubhuku mashoko aJeremiya mumba maJehovha, mukamuri yaGemaria mwanakomana womunyori Shafani, muruvazhe rwokumusoro, pavaipinda pasuwo idzva reimba yaJehovha, vanhu vose vachizvinzwa nenzeve dzavo." 
Jeremiah36:11 Zvino Mikaia mwanakomana waGemaria, mwanakomana waShafani, wakati anzwa mashoko ose aJehovha mubhuku," 
Jeremiah36:12 akaburukira kumba kwamambo, mukamuri yomunyori, wanei, machinda ose agerepo, vaiti, Erishama munyori, naDheraia mwanakomana waShemaia, naErinatani mwanakomana waAkibhori, naGemaria mwanakomana waShafani, naZedhekiya mwanakomana waHanania, namachinda ose." 
Jeremiah36:13 Ipapo Mikaia akavaparidzira mashoko ose aakanzwa, Bharuki achirava mubhuku vanhu vachizvinzwa nenzeve dzavo." 
Jeremiah36:14 Naizvozvo machinda ose akatuma Jehudhi mwanakomana waNetania, mwanakomana waSheremiya, mwanakomana waKushi, kuna Bharuki, achiti, “Bata muruoko rwako rugwaro rwakapetwa mawakarava zvichanzwika nenzeve dzavanhu, uuye.” Ipapo Bharuki mwanakomana waNeria wakabata rugwaro rwakapetwa muruoko rwake, akaenda kwavari." 
Jeremiah36:15 Vakati kwaari, “Zvino chigara pasi, uirave tinzwe nenzeve dzedu.” Ipapo Bharuki wakavaravira vakanzwa nenzeve dzavo." 
Jeremiah36:16 Zvino vakati vanzwa mashoko ose, vakatarirana vachitya, vakati kuna Bharuki, “Zvirokwazvo tichaudza mambo mashoko awa ose.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Vakabvunza Bharuki, vachiti, “Zvino chitiudza kuti wakanyora mashoko awa ose sei, achibva mumuromo make.”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Ipapo Bharuki akavapindura, akati, “Wakandiparidzira mashoko awa ose nomuromo wake, ndikaanyora neingi mubhuku.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Ipapo machinda akati kuna Bharuki, “Endai mundovanda, iwe naJeremiya, kurege kuva nomunhu unoziva kwamuri.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Ivo ndokupinda kuna mambo muruvazhe, asi vakanga vaviga rugwaro rwakapetwa mukamuri yomunyori Erishama; vakaudza mambo mashoko ose achizvinzwa nenzeve dzake." 
Jeremiah36:21 Ipapo mambo akatuma Jehudhi kundotora rugwaro rwakapetwa, iye akandorutora mukamuri yomunyori Erishama. Jehudhi akaravira mambo achizvinzwa nenzeve dzake, namachinda ose akanga amire namambo ivo vachinzwa nenzeve dzavo." 
Jeremiah36:22 Zvino mambo wakanga agere muimba yakavakirwa nguva yechando nomwedzi wepfumbamwe, moto uchipfuta pamberi pake pachaenga." 
Jeremiah36:23 Zvino Jehudhi wakati apedza kurava zvikamu zvitatu kana zvina, mambo ndokuzvicheka nebanga ndokuzvikandira mumoto wakanga uri muchaenga, kusvikira rugwaro rwakapetwa rwose rwapedzwa nomoto wakanga uri muchaenga." 
Jeremiah36:24 Asi havana kutya, kana kubvarura nguo dzavo, kunyangwe mambo kunyangwe nomumwe wavaranda vake vakanzwa mashoko awa ose." 
Jeremiah36:25 Erinatani naDheraia naGemaria vakanga vanyengetera havo mambo kuti arege kupisa rugwaro rwakapetwa, asi haana kuvateerera." 
Jeremiah36:26 Mambo akaraira Jerameeri mwanakomana waAzirieri, naSheremiya mwanakomana waAbhidheeri, kuti vabate munyori Bharuki nomuporofita Jeremiya; asi Jehovha akavavanza." 
Jeremiah36:27 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jeremiya, mambo apisa rugwaro rwechimononorwa, namashoko akanga anyorwa naBharuki achibva mumuromo waJeremiya, richiti," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Chitorazve rumwe rugwaro rwechimononorwa unyoremozve mashoko ose okutanga, akanga ari murugwaro rwechimononorwa rwokutanga, rwakapiswa naJehoiakimu mambo waJudha." 
Jeremiah36:29 Uye pamusoro paJehoiakimu mambo wavaJudha, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, wapisa rugwaro urwu rwechimononorwa,’ uchiti, ‘Wanyorereimo’ uchiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo mambo weBhabhironi uchauya kuparadza nyika ino, nokubvisapo vanhu nezvipfuwo?’" 
Jeremiah36:30 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro paJehoiakimu mambo waJudha, ‘Haangavi nomumwe uchagara pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi; chitunha chake chichakandirwa kunze masikati kana kuchipisa, nohusiku kana kune chando." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ndichamurova iye navana vake navaranda vake nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo; ndichauyisa pamusoro pavo, napamusoro pavagere Jerusaremu, napamusoro pavarume vaJudha, zvakaipa zvose zvandakareva pamusoro pavo, asi havana kuterera.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Ipapo Jeremiya wakatora rumwe rugwaro rwachimononorwa, akarupa munyori Bharuki, mwanakomana waNeria, iye akanyoramo mashoko ose akabva mumuromo waJeremiya, aiva mubhuku rakapiswa nomoto naJehoiakimu mambo waJudha; mamwe mashoko mazhinji akafanana nawo akawedzerwawo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Zvino Zedhekiya mwanakomana waJosiya wakabata ushe ari mambo panzvimbo yaKonia mwanakomana waJehoiakimu, wakanga apiwa ushe munyika yaJudha naNebhukadhineza mambo waBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah37:2 Asi iye, kunyangwe varanda vake, kana vanhu venyika, havana kuteerera mashoko aJehovha, aakataura nomuporofita Jeremiya." 
Jeremiah37:3 Zvino mambo Zedhekiya wakatuma Jehukari mwanakomana waSheremiya, naZefania mwanakomana womupristi Maaseia, kuno muporofita Jeremiya, achiti, “Tinyengeterere hako zvino kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Zvino Jeremiya wakanga achingopinda nokubuda hake pakati pavanhu, nokuti vakanga vachigere kumusunga mutorongo." 
Jeremiah37:5 Hondo yaFarao yakanga yabvawo Ijipiti; zvino vaKaradhia, vakanga vakakomba Jerusaremu, vakati vachinzwa zvavo, vakarega kukomba Jerusaremu." 
Jeremiah37:6 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kumuporofita Jeremiya, richiti," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, itiyi kuna mambo waJudha wakakutumai kuzondibvunza, ‘Tarirai, hondo yaFarao, yakauya kuzokubatsirai, ichadzokera Ijipiti kunyika yavo." 
Jeremiah37:8 VaKaradhia vachauyazve vachirwa neguta rino; vacharikunda, nokuripisa nomoto.’" 
Jeremiah37:9 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Musazvinyengera henyu,’ muchiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo, vaKaradhia vachabva kwatiri, nokuti havangabvi.’" 
Jeremiah37:10 “Nokuti kunyangwe maikunda henyu hondo yose yavaKaradhia, vanorwa nemi, kukangosara kwavari vanhu vakakuvadzwa bedzi, kunyangwe zvakadaro vaisimuka, mumwe nomumwe mutende rake, vakapisa guta rino nomoto.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Zvino hondo yavaKaradhia yakati yarega kukomba Jerusaremu nemhaka yokutya hondo yaFarao," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremiya akabuda Jerusaremu achida kuenda kunyika yavaBhenjamini, kuzopiwa mugove wakepo pakati pavanhu vake." 
Jeremiah37:13 Zvino wakati ari pasuwo raBhenjamini, mumwe mukuru wavarindi akasvikapo, wainzi Irija mwanakomana waSheremiya, mwanakomana waHanania, iye akabata muporofita Jeremiya, achiti, “Iwe wotishandukira uchienda kuvaKaradhia.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremiya akati, “Inhema, handikushandukiriyi ndichienda kuvaKaradhia.” Asi haana kumuteerera; ipapo Irija akabata Jeremiya, akandomuisa kumachinda." 
Jeremiah37:15 Machinda akaitira Jeremiya hasha, akamurova, ndokumuisa mutorongo mumba momunyori Jonatani; nokuti vakanga vaiita torongo." 
Jeremiah37:16 Zvino Jeremiya wakati apinda mutorongo yegomba, nomumakamuri ayo, Jeremiya akagaramo mazuva mazhinji," 
Jeremiah37:17 mambo Zedhekiya akatuma nhume kuzomutora, mambo akamubvunza chinyararire mumba make, achiti, “Kune shoko rinobva kuna Jehovha here?” Jeremiya akati, “Ririko.” Akatiwo, “Imi muchaiswa muruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Jeremiya akatiwo kuna mambo Zedhekiya, “Ndakakutadzirai neiko, imi, kana varanda venyu, kana vanhu ava, zvamakandisunga mutorongo?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Ko zvino vaporofita venyu varipi, ivo vaikuporofiterai, vachiti, ‘Mambo weBhabhironi haangauyi kuzorwa nemi, kana kurwa nenyika ino?’" 
Jeremiah37:20 Zvino chidonzwai henyu, ishe wangu mambo; kunyengetera kwangu ngakusvike pamberi penyu, kuti murege kundidzosazve kumba kwomunyori Jonatani, ndirege kufirapo.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Ipapo mambo Zedhekiya wakatema chirevo, vakaisa Jeremiya kuruvazhe rwavarindi, vakamupa zuva rimwe nerimwe bundu rechingwa, raibva munzira yomuguta yainzi yavabiki vechingwa, kusvikira chingwa chose chapera muguta. Saizvozvo Jeremiya akagara muruvazhe rwavarindi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Zvino Shefatia mwanakomana waMatani, naGedharia mwanakomana waPashuri, naJukari mwanakomana waSheremiya, naPashuri mwanakomana waMarikija, vakanzwa mashoko akataurwa naJeremiya kuvanhu vose, achiti," 
Jeremiah38:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ani naani unorambira muguta rino uchaurayiwa nomunondo, nenzara, uye nechirwere chakaipa, asi anobuda akaenda kuvaKaradhia uchararama, upenyu hwake huchava kwaari chinhu chakapambwa, uchararama.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:3 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Zvirokwazvo guta rino richaiswa mumaoko ehondo yamambo weBhabhironi, iye acharikunda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Ipapo machinda akati kuna mambo, “Tinokumbira kuti munhu uyu aurawe, nokuti unoshaisa simba maoko avarwi vakasara muguta rino, namaoko avanhu vose nokutaura kwake mashoko akadai kwavari; nokuti munhu uyu haatsvaki mufaro wavanhu ava asi kuti vave nenjodzi.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Mambo Zedhekiya ndokuti, “Tarirai, uri pamaoko enyu, nokuti mambo haangaiti chinhu chamusingadi.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Ipapo vakatora Jeremiya, vakamukandira mugomba raMarikija mwanakomana wamambo, rakanga riri muruvazhe rwavarindi; vakaburusa Jeremiya namabote. Mugomba makanga musina mvura asi matope; Jeremiya akanyura mumatope." 
Jeremiah38:7 Zvino muItiopia Ebhedhimereki, waiva muranda mumba mamambo, wakati anzwa kuti vakaisa Jeremiya mugomba (zvino mambo wakanga agere musuwo raBhenjamini)." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebhedhimereki akabuda mumba mamambo, akataura namambo, achiti," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Ishe wangu mambo, vanhu ava vakaita zvakaipa pazvose zvavakaitira muporofita Jeremiya, wavakakandira mugomba; zvino iye unenge uchafira panzvimbo iyo paari, nemhaka yenzara; nokuti hakuchina chingwa muguta.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Ipapo mambo akaraira muItiopia Ebhedhimereki, akati, “Tora pano vanhu vana makumi matatu, unobudisa muporofita Jeremiya mugomba asati afa.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ipapo Ebhedhimereki akatora vanhu ivavo, akaenda navo mumba mamambo pasi pechivigiro chepfuma, akatorapo mamvemve nenguo dzakasakara, akazviburusira namabote mugomba kuna Jeremiya." 
Jeremiah38:12 MuItiopia Ebhedhimereki akati kuna Jeremiya, “Zvino chiisai mamvemve awa nenguo dzakasakara muhapwa dzenyu munyasi mamabote.” Jeremiya akaita saizvozvo." 
Jeremiah38:13 Naizvozvo vakakwidza Jeremiya namabote, vakamubudisa mugomba, Jeremiya akagara muruvazhe rwavarindi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Ipapo mambo Zedhekiya akatuma nhume akauyisa muporofita Jeremiya kwaari pamukova wechitatu uri mumba maJehovha; mambo akati kuna Jeremiya, “Ndichakubvunza shoko; usandivanzira chinhu.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Ipapo Jeremiya akati kuna Zedhekiya, “Kana ndikakuzivisai izvozvo, hamungatongondiurayi here? Kana ndikakupai zano, hamunganditereri.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Naizvozvo mambo Zedhekiya wakapikira Jeremiya chinyerere, akati, “NaJehovha mupenyu, wakatipa upenyu uhwu, handingakuurayi, kana kukuisa mumaoko avanhu ava vanotsvaka kukuuraya.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Ipapo Jeremiya akati kuna Zedhekiya, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Kana mukatenda kuenda kumachinda amambo weBhabhironi, mweya wenyu uchararama, neguta rino haringapiswi nomoto; imi muchararama, neimba yenyu.’" 
Jeremiah38:18 Asi kana mukaramba kuenda kumachinda amambo mumaoko avaKaradhia, ivo vacharipisa nomoto, nemi hamungapukunyuki pamaoko avo.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Ipapo mambo Zedhekiya akati kuna Jeremiya, “Ndinotya vaJudha, vakatishandukira vakaenda kuvaKaradhia, zvimwe vangandiisa mumaoko avo, ivo vakandiseka.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Asi Jeremiya wakati, “Havangakusiyi kwavari. Chiteererai henyu izwi raJehovha, sezvandinokuudzai; ipapo muchava nomufaro, nomweya wenyu uchararama." 
Jeremiah38:21 Asi kana mukaramba kuenda, heri shoko randakaziviswa naJehovha," 
Jeremiah38:22 ‘Tarirai, vakadzi vose vakasara mumba mamambo waJudha, vachabudisirwa kumachinda amambo weBhabhironi;’ zvino vakadzi avo vachati, ‘Shamwari dzenyu dzinodikanwa nemi ndidzo dzakakunyengerai, dzikakukundai; zvino tsoka dzenyu zvadzanyura mumatope, vokufuratirai.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 Vachabudisira vakadzi venyu vose navana venyu kuvaKaradhia; nemiwo hamungapukunyuki pamaoko avo asi muchabatwa noruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi; imi muchapisisa guta rino nomoto.” 
Jeremiah38:24 Ipapo Zedhekiya akati kuna Jeremiya, “Ngakurege kuva nomunhu unoziviswa mashoko awa, ipapo iwe haungaurawi." 
Jeremiah38:25 “Asi kana machinda akanzwa kuti ndakataura newe, vakauya kwauri, vachiti, ‘Chitizivisa zvino zvawaudza mambo; usativanzira izvozvo, isu tigosakuuraya; uyewo zvose zvawakaudzwa namambo.’" 
Jeremiah38:26 “Ipapo uti kwavari, ‘Ndakasvitsa munyengetero wangu kuna mambo, kuti arege kundidzosa kumba kwaJonatani, kuti ndifireko.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Zvino machinda ose akauya kuna Jeremiya, akamubvunza, akavaudza mashoko awa ose sezvakanga zvarairwa namambo. Naizvozvo vakarega kuzotaura naye, nokuti shoko rakanga risina kuzikanwa." 
Jeremiah38:28 Naizvozvo Jeremiya wakaramba agere muruvazhe rwavarindi kusvikira zuva rakakundwa Jerusaremu. 
Jeremiah39:1 Zvino Jerusaremu rakati rakundwa, negore repfumbamwe raZedhekiya mambo waJudha, nomwedzi wegumi, Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi akauya nehondo yake yose kuzorwa neJerusaremu, ndokurikomba." 
Jeremiah39:2 Zvino negore regumi nerimwe raZedhekiya, nomwedzi wechina, nezuva repfumbamwe romwedzi vakakoromora rusvingo rweguta," 
Jeremiah39:3 machinda ose amambo weBhabhironi akapinda, akagara pasi musuwo rapakati, vaiti Nerigarisharezeri, naSamigarinebho, naSherisekimu mukuru wavaranda, naNerigarisharezeri mukuru wen'anga, pamwechete namachinda ose amambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah39:4 Zvino Zedhekiya mambo waJudha navarwi vose vakati vachivaona vakatiza, vakabuda muguta usiku, vachienda nenzira yokumunda wamambo, napasuwo raiva pakati pamasvingo maviri; akabuda achienda kumapani." 
Jeremiah39:5 Asi hondo yavaKaradhia yakadzingana navo, vakabata Zedhekiya pamapani eJeriko; zvino vakati vamubata, vakaenda naye kuna Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi paRibhira munyika yeHamati, iye akamutonga." 
Jeremiah39:6 Ipapo mambo weBhabhironi akauraya vanakomana vaZedhekiya paRibhira iye akataririra; uye mambo weBhabhironi wakaurayawo vakuru vose vaJudha. 
Jeremiah39:7 Akatumburawo meso aZedhekiya, akamusunga namaketani kuti amuise Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah39:8 VaKaradhia vakapisa imba yamambo, nedzimba dzavanhu nomoto, vakakoromora masvingo eJerusaremu." 
Jeremiah39:9 Ipapo Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akatapa vanhu vakanga vasara muguta, navashanduki vakanga vauya kwaari, navamwe vanhu vakanga vasara, akavaisa Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah39:10 Asi Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi wakasiya munyika yaJudha vamwe varombo vavanhu, vakanga vasina chinhu, akavapa minda yemizambiringa nemimwe minda nenguva iyo." 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebhukadhineza weBhabhironi akaraira Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi pamusoro paJeremiya achiti," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Mumubate, mumuchengete zvakanaka, murege kumuitira chakaipa; asi mumuitire sezvaanotaura kwamuri.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Naizvozvo Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akatuma nhume, naNebhushazibhani, mukuru wavaranda, naNerigarisharezeri mukuru wen'anga, navatariri vakuru vose vamambo weBhabhironi," 
Jeremiah39:14 ivo vakatuma nhume, vakandotora Jeremiya muruvazhe rwavarindi, vakamuisa kuna Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, mwanakomana waShafani, kuti aende naye kumusha kwake. Naizvozvo wakagara pakati pavanhu." 
Jeremiah39:15 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jeremiya, panguva yaakanga akapfigirwa muruvazhe rwavarindi richiti," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Enda, utaure naEbhedhimereki muItiopia, uti, zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, tarira, ndichaitira guta rino sezvandakareva, ndichariitira zvakaipa, handingariitira zvakanaka; zvichaitika nezuva iro iwe uchizviona." 
Jeremiah39:17 Asi iwe ndichakurwira nezuva iro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; iwe haungaiswi mumaoko avanhu vaunotya." 
Jeremiah39:18 Nokuti zvirokwazvo ndichakuponesa, haungaurawi nomunondo, asi upenyu hwako huchava kwauri chinhu chakapambwa, zvawakavimba neni, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Shoko rakabva kuna Jehovha, rikasvika kuna Jeremiya, asunungurwa paRama naNebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi, nguva yaakanga amubata akasungwa namaketani pakati pavatapwa vose veJerusaremu navaJudha, vakanga votapwa vachiiswa Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah40:2 Mukuru wavarindi akatora Jeremiya, akati kwaari, “Jehovha Mwari wako wakareva zvakaipa izvi pamusoro penzvimbo ino;" 
Jeremiah40:3 zvino Jehovha wazvisvitsa, akaita sezvaakataura; zvamakatadzira Jehovha, mukasateerera izwi rake, nemhaka iyo chinhu ichi chakauya pamusoro penyu." 
Jeremiah40:4 “Zvino tarira, ndinokusunungurira nhasi maketani ari paruoko rwako. Kana uchiti zvakanaka kuenda neni Bhabhironi, chiuya, ini ndichakuchengeta zvakanaka; asi kana uchiti zvakaipa kuenda neni Bhabhironi, chirega hako; tarira, nyika yose iri pamberi pako; chienda hako kwaunoti zvakanaka nezvakarurama kuti uende.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Zvino wakati achigere kuenda, akati, “Dzokera kuna Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, mwanakomana waShafani, wakagadzwa namambo weBhabhironi ave mubati wamaguta aJudha, undogara naye pakati pavanhu; kana chienda hako kwaunoti zvakanaka kuti uende.” Naizvozvo mukuru wavarindi akamupa zvokudya nechipo, akamuendisa." 
Jeremiah40:6 Ipapo Jeremiya akaenda kuna Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami paMizipa, akagara naye pakati pavanhu vakanga vakasiyiwa munyika." 
Jeremiah40:7 Zvino vakuru vose vehondo, vakanga vari kumasango, ivo navanhu vavo, vakati vachinzwa kuti mambo weBhabhironi wakanga agadza Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami ave mubati munyika iyo, akaisa pamaoko ake varume navakadzi navana, navaiva varombo kwazvo panyika, vakanga vasina kutapirwa Bhabhironi," 
Jeremiah40:8 vakauya kuna Gedharia paMizipa, vaiti, Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania, naJohanani naJonatani vanakomana vaKarea, naSeraia mwanakomana waTanhumeti, navanakomana vaEfai muNetofati, naJezania mwanakomana womuMaakatiti, ivo navanhu vavo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, mwanakomana waShafani, akavapikira, ivo navanhu vavo, achiti, “Musatya kushumira vaKaradhia; garai henyu panyika, mushumire mambo weBhabhironi, mugova nomufaro." 
Jeremiah40:10 Kana ndirini, tarirai, ndichagara paMizipa, kuti ndimire pamberi pavaKaradhia, vachauya kwatiri; asi imi, unganidzai waini nezvibereko zvezhizha namafuta, muzviise mumidziyo yenyu, mugare mumaguta enyu amakakunda.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Saizvozvowo, vaJudha vose, vaiva paMoabhu, navaiva pakati pavana vaAmoni, napaEdhomu, navaiva panyika dzose, vakati vachinzwa kuti mambo weBhabhironi wakanga asiya vamwe vaJudha, akagadza Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, mwanakomana waShafani ave mubati wavo;" 
Jeremiah40:12 ipapo vaJudha vose vakadzoka pose pavakanga vadzingirwa, vakauya kunyika yaJudha, kuna Gedharia paMizipa, vakaunganidza waini nezvibereko zvizhinji kwazvo zvezhizha." 
Jeremiah40:13 NaJohananiwo, mwanakomana waKarea, navakuru vose vehondo vaiva kumasango, vakauya kuna Gedharia paMizipa," 
Jeremiah40:14 vakati kwaari, “Munoziva here kuti Bhaarisi, mambo wavana vaAmoni, wakatuma Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania kuzokuurayai?” Asi Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami haana kuvatenda." 
Jeremiah40:15 Ipapo Johanani mwanakomana waKarea akataura naGedharia paMizipa chinyerere, akati, “Nditenderei henyu kuenda ndindouraya Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania, hakungavi nomunhu uchazviziva; ko iye ungakuurayirei, kuti vaJudha vose vakaungana kwamuri vapararire, navakasara vaJudha vaparare?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Asi Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami akati kuna Johanani mwanakomana waKarea, “Usaita chinhu ichi, nokuti unoreva nhema pamusoro paIshimaeri.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Zvino nomwedzi wechinomwe Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania, mwanakomana waErishama worudzi rwamambo, mumwe wavanyai vakuru vamambo, wakauya ana varume vane gumi naye kuna Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami paMizipa, vakadyapo zvokudya pamwechete paMizipa." 
Jeremiah41:2 Ipapo Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania navarume vane gumi vaiva naye vakasimuka, vakabaya Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, mwanakomana waShafani, nomunondo, vakamuuraya, iye wakanga agadzwa namambo weBhabhironi ave mubati wenyika iyo." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishimaeri akaurayawo vaJudha vose vaiva naye, naiye Gedharia paMizipa, navaKaradhia vakawanikwapo, vaiva varwi." 
Jeremiah41:4 Zvino nezuva rechipiri rokuuraya kwake Gedharia, kusisina munhu wakazviziva," 
Jeremiah41:5 vamwe varume vakasvikapo vachibva Shekemu neShiro neSamaria, varume vana makumi masere, ndebvu dzavo dzakaveurwa nenguo dzavo dzakabvarurwa, vakanga vazvicheka–chekawo, vakabata mumaoko avo zvipiriso zvohupfu nezvinonhuwira, kuti vazviise mumba maJehovha." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ipapo Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania wakabuda paMizipa kundovachingamidza, akafamba achingochema; zvino wakati achisangana navo, akati kavari, “Uyai kuna Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Zvino vakati vachisvika pakati peguta, Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania akavauraya, ndokuvakanda mukati megomba, iye navarume vaakanga anavo." 
Jeremiah41:8 Asi pakati pavo pakanga pana varume vane gumi vakati kuna Ishimaeri, “Musatiuraya, nokuti tine zvimwe zvatakaviga kusango, zvinoti, zviyo nebhari namafuta nohuchi.” Naizvozvo akarega, akasavauraya pakati pehama dzavo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Zvino gomba iro makakandira Ishimaeri zvitunha zvavanhu vaakanga auraya, pamwechete naGedharia (ndiro rakanga raitwa namambo Asa nemhaka yokutya Bhaasha mambo waIsiraeri), Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania wakarizadza navakaurayiwa." 
Jeremiah41:10 Ipapo Ishimaeri akatapa vanhu vose vakanga vasara paMizipa, vakaisa naNebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi kuna Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, ivo vakunda vamambo, navanhu vose vakanga vasara paMizipa; Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania wakavatapa, akabvapo achida kuenda kuvana vaAmoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Asi Johanani mwanakomana waKarea, navakuru vose vehondo vaiva naye, vakati vachinzwa zvakaipa zvose zvakaitwa naIshimaeri mwanakomana waNetania," 
Jeremiah41:12 vakatora varume vose, vakandorwa naIshimaeri mwanakomana waNetania, vakamuwana ari pamvura zhinji iri paGibheoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Zvino vanhu vose vaiva naIshimaeri vakati vachiona Johanani mwanakomana waKarea, navakuru vose vehondo vaiva naye, vakafara." 
Jeremiah41:14 Naizvozvo vanhu vose vakanga vatapwa naIshimaeri paMizipa vakatendeuka vakadzoka, vakaenda kuna Johanani mwanakomana waKarea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Asi Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania wakatiza Johanani ana varume vasere, akaenda kuvana vaAmoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Ipapo Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navakuru vose vehondo vaiva naye vakatora vanhu vose vakanga vasara, vaakanga arwira kuna Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania paMizipa, ambouraya Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, vaiti, varume varwi navakadzi navana navaranda, vaakanga adzosa paGibheoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Vakabva, vakandogara paGerutikimhami, riri paBhetirehemu, vachiti vagozoenda Ijipiti," 
Jeremiah41:18 nokuda kwavaKaradhia, nokuti vakanga vachivatya, Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetania zvaakauraya Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, wakanga aitwa mubati wenyika iyo namambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah42:1 Zvino vakuru vose vehondo, naJohanani mwanakomana waKarea naJezania mwanakomana waHoshaia, navanhu vose kubva kuvaduku kusvikira kuvakuru, vakaswedera," 
Jeremiah42:2 vakati kumuporofita Jeremiya, “Tinokumbira kuti munyengetero wedu usvitswe pamberi penyu, mutinyengeterere kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu, munyengeterere ava vose vakasara (nokuti takasara tiri vashoma kuna vaiva vazhinji, sezvamunotiona nameso enyu)," 
Jeremiah42:3 kuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu atiratidze nzira yatinofanira kufamba nayo nechinhu chatinofanira kuita.” 
Jeremiah42:4 Ipapo muporofita Jeremiya akati kwavari, “Ndakunzwai; tarirai, ndichanyengetera kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu sezvamakareva namashoko enyu; zvino chinhu chipi nechipi chamunopindurwa naJehovha, ndichakuzivisai icho, handingatongokuvanziriyi chinhu.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Ipapo vakati kuna Jeremiya, “Jehovha ngaave chapupu chazvokwadi chakatendeka pakati pedu, kana tikarega kuita mashoko ose amunozotumwa nawo kwatiri naJehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Jeremiah42:6 Kana richinge rakanaka, kana richinge rakaipa, tichateerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wedu, watinokutumirai kwaari; kuti tive nomufaro, kana tichiteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Zvino mazuva ane gumi akati apera, shoko raJehovha rikasvika kuna Jeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Ipapo akadana Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navakuru vose vehondo vaiva naye navanhu vose, kubva kuvaduku kusvikira kuvakuru," 
Jeremiah42:9 akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, wamakanditumira kwaari kuti ndisvitse munyengetero wenyu pamberi pake." 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Kana muchinge muchada kugara munyika ino, ini ndichakuvakai, handingakukoromoriyi, ndichakusimai, handingakudzuriyi; nokuti ndinozvidemba pamusoro pezvakaipa zvandakakuitirai.’" 
Jeremiah42:11 “Musatya henyu mambo weBhabhironi, iye wamunotya; musatya henyu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti ndinemi, kuti ndikuponesei nokukurwirai paruoko rwake." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ndichakunzwirai nyasha, kuti iye ave nenyasha nemi, akudzosei kunyika yenyu." 
Jeremiah42:13 Asi kana mukati, ‘Hatidi kugara munyika ino,’ saizvozvo musingateereri izwi raJehovha Mwari wenyu," 
Jeremiah42:14 muchiti, ‘Kwete, tichaenda kunyika yeIjipiti, kwatisingazooni kurwa, kana kunzwa izwi rehwamanda, kana kunzwa nzara yezvokudya, tichandogarako;’" 
Jeremiah42:15 naizvozvo zvino chinzwai shoko raJehovha, imi vakasara vaJudha, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, kana muchiramba makaratidza zviso zvenyu kuti muende Ijipiti, kundogarako muri vatorwa;" 
Jeremiah42:16 ipapo munondo wamunotya uchakubataipo panyika yeIjipiti; nenzara yamunotya ichakutevererai kwazvo paIjipiti, ndipapo pamuchandofira." 
Jeremiah42:17 Ndizvo zvichaitirwa varume vose vanoratidza zviso zvavo kuti vaende Ijipiti, kundogarako vari vatorwa; vachafa nomunondo, nenzara, uye nechirewe; hakuna mumwe wavo uchasara kana kupukunyuka pazvakaipa zvandichauyisa pamusoro pavo.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Kutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu sezvazvakadururwa pamusoro pavagere Jerusaremu, saizvozvo hasha dzangu dzichadururwa pamusoro penyu, kana muchipinda Ijipiti; muchava chinhu chinotukwa, nechishamiso, nechinomhurwa, nechinoshoorwa; nenzvimbo ino hamungazoionizve.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Jehovha wakataura pamusoro penyu, imi vakasara vaJudha, achiti, ‘Regai kuenda Ijipiti; zivai kwazvo kuti ndakakupupurirai nhasi.’" 
Jeremiah42:20 Nokuti makanyengera mweya yenyu; nokuti makanditumira kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu, muchiti, ‘Tinyengetererei kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu, zvose zvicharehwa naJehovha Mwari wedu, mutizivise izvozvo, tichazviita.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Zvino nhasi ndakuzivisai izvozvo, asi hamuna kuteerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wenyu pachinhu chimwe chaakanditumira nacho kwamuri." 
Jeremiah42:22 Naizvozvo zvino zivai kwazvo kuti muchafa nomunondo, nenzara, uye nechirwere chakaipa panzvimbo iyo yamunoda kuenda kwairi kundogarako muri vatorwa.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Zvino Jeremiya wakati apedza kuudza vanhu mashoko ose aJehovha Mwari wavo, aakanga atumwa nawo kwavari naJehovha Mwari wavo, iwo mashoko awa ose," 
Jeremiah43:2 ipapo Azaria mwanakomana waHoshaia, naJohanani mwanakomana waKarea, navarume vose, vaizvikudza, vakataura vachiti, kuna Jeremiya, “Unoreva nhema, Jehovha Mwari wedu haana kukutuma kuzoti, ‘Musaenda Ijipiti kundogarapo muri vatorwa;" 
Jeremiah43:3 asi Bharuki mwanakomana waNeria ndiye unokumutsa pamusoro pedu, kuti tiiswe mumaoko avaKaradhia, kuti vatiuraye nokutitapira Bhabhironi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Naizvozvo Johanani mwanakomana waKarea, navakuru vose vehondo, navanhu vose, havana kuteerera izwi raJehovha, kuti vagare munyika yaJudha." 
Jeremiah43:5 Asi Johanani mwanakomana waKarea, navakuru vose vehondo, vakatora vose vakasara vaJudha, vakanga vadzoka kumarudzi ose kwavakadzingirwa, vachida kugara vari vatorwa munyika yaJudha," 
Jeremiah43:6 vaiti, varume navakadzi navana navakunda vamambo nomunhu upi noupi akanga asiyiwa naNebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi kuna Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, mwanakomana waShafani, pamwechete naJeremiya muporofita, naBharuki mwanakomana waNeria," 
Jeremiah43:7 vakandosvika kunyika yeIjipiti; nokuti havana kuteerera izwi raJehovha; vakandosvika Tapanihesi. 
Jeremiah43:8 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jeremiya paTapanihesi richiti," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Tora mabwe makuru muruoko rwako, uavige muvhu pakati pezvitina, pavanopinda napo paimba yaFarao naTapanihesi, vanhu vose vaJudha vachizviona;" 
Jeremiah43:10 ugoti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, mwari waIsiraeri, Tarirai, ndichatuma shoko kundotora Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, muranda wangu, ndiise chigaro chake choushe pamusoro pamabwe awa andakaviga; uchawirira pamusoro pawo jira rake rinobwinya." 
Jeremiah43:11 Uchauya achirova nyika yeIjipiti; vakafanira rufu vachaiswa kurufu, vakafanira kutapwa vachaiswa kukutapwa, vakafanira munondo vachaiswa kumunondo." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ndichabatidza moto mudzimba dzavamwari veIjipiti; uchadzipisa nokuvatapa; uchafuka nyika yeIjipiti somufudzi unofuka nguo yake, uchabvapo norugare." 
Jeremiah43:13 Uchaputsawo shongwe dzeBheti-shemeshi, riri munyika yeIjipiti; dzimba dzavamwari veIjipiti uchadzipisa nomoto.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Shoko rakasvika kuna Jeremiya pamusoro pavaJudha vose vakanga vagere panyika yeIjipiti, vakanga vagere Migidhori neTapanihesi neMemufisi nomunyika yePatirosi, richiti," 
Jeremiah44:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Makaona zvakaipa zvose zvandakauyisa pamusoro peJerusaremu napamusoro pamaguta ose aJudha; zvino tarirai, nhasi ava matongo, hapachina munhu unogaramo," 
Jeremiah44:3 nemhaka yezvakashata zvavo zvavakaita, zvakanditsamwisa, vachindopisa zvinonhuwira, nokushumira vamwe vamwari, vavakanga vasingazivi, ivo kana imi kana madzibaba enyu.’" 
Jeremiah44:4 Asi ndakakutumirai varanda vangu vose vaporofita, ndichimuka mangwanani ndichivatuma, ndichiti, ‘Haiwa, regai kuita chinhu ichi chinonyangadza, chandinovenga.’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Asi havana kuteerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo kuti vadzoke pazvakashata zvavo, vakarega kupisira vamwe vamwari zvinonhuwira." 
Jeremiah44:6 “Naizvozvo hasha dzangu nokutsamwa kwangu zvakadururwa, zvikatungidzwa mumaguta aJudha nomunzira dzomuJerusaremu; zvino aparadzwa ava matongo, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Naizvozvo zvino zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Munotadzirireiko mweya yenyu nechinhu chakaipa chikuru ichi, kuti muparadzirwe varume navakadzi navacheche navanomwa pakati paJudha, kuti murege kusarirwa nomumwe;" 
Jeremiah44:8 zvamunonditsamwisa namabasa amaoko enyu, muchipisira vamwe vamwari zvinonhuwira munyika yeIjipiti kwamakaenda kundogara muri vatorwa; mugoparadzwa, muve chinotukwa nechinoshoorwa pakati pamarudzi ose enyika?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Makanganwa here zvakashata zvamadzibaba enyu nezvakashata zvamadzimambo aJudha, nezvakashata zvavakadzi vavo, nezvakashata zvenyu, nezvakashata zvavakadzi venyu, zvavakaita munyika yaJudha nomunzira dzomuJerusaremu?’" 
Jeremiah44:10 “Kusvikira zuva ranhasi havana kuzvininipisa, kana kutya, kana kufamba nomurairo wangu kana nezvirevo zvangu, zvandakaisa pamberi penyu napamberi pamadzibaba enyu." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tarirai, ndichakutarisana newe kuti ndikuitirei zvakaipa, kuti ndiparadze Judha rose." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ndichabvisa vakasara vose vaJudha, vakaratidza zviso zvavo kuti vaende kunyika yeIjipiti kundogarako vari vatorwa, vachaparadzwa vose; vachaparadzwa nomunondo nenzara, vachafa nomunondo nenzara kubva kuvaduku kusvikira kuvakuru; vachava chinhu chinotukwa, nechishamiso, nechinomhurwa, nechinoshoorwa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Nokuti ndicharova vagere munyika yeIjipiti, sezvandakarova Jerusaremu nomunondo nenzara uye nechirwere chakaipa;" 
Jeremiah44:14 kuti kurege kuva nomumwe wakasara waJudha, vakaenda kunyika yeIjipiti kundogarako vari vatorwa, ungapukunyuka kana ungasara, kuti adzokere kunyika yaJudha, kwavanoshuva kudzokera kuti vagarekozve; nokuti hakuna ungadzokera, asi vakapukunyuka.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Ipapo varume vose, vaiziva kuti vakadzi vavo vanopisira vamwe vamwari zvinonhuwira, navakadzi vose, vakanga vamirepo, ungano huru, ivo vanhu vose vakanga vagere munyika yeIjipiti, naPatirosi, vakapindura Jeremiya vachiti," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Kana riri shoko rawakatiudza nezita raJehovha, hatingakutereri." 
Jeremiah44:17 Asi zvirokwazvo tichaita shoko rimwe nerimwe rakabuda mumiromo yedu, tichapisira vahosi vokudenga zvinonhuwira, nokuvadururira zvipiriso zvinodururwa, sezvatakaita isu namadzibaba edu namadzimambo edu namachinda edu, pamaguta aJudha nomunzira dzomuJerusaremu; nokuti nenguva iyo taiva nezvokudya zvizhinji, taifara pamuviri, tikasaona njodzi." 
Jeremiah44:18 Asi kubvira panguva yatakarega kupisira vahosi vokudenga zvinonhuwira, nokuvadururira zvipiriso zvinodururwa, takashaiwa zvose, tikapedzwa nomunondo nenzara." 
Jeremiah44:19 “Zvino panguva yatakapisira vahosi vokudenga zvinonhuwira, nokuvadururira zvipiriso zvinodururwa, ko taivaitira zvingwa zvokuvanamata nazvo, tikavadururira zvipiriso zvinodururwa, tisina varume vedu here?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Ipapo Jeremiya akati kuvanhu vose, kuvarume nokuvakadzi, kuna ivo vanhu vose vakanga vamupindura saizvozvo, akati," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Zvinonhuwira zvamaipisa mumaguta aJudha nomunzira dzomuJerusaremu, imi namadzibaba enyu namadzimambo enyu namachinda enyu navanhu vose venyika, ko Jehovha haana kuzvirangarira here? Hazvina kufungwa mumwoyo make here?" 
Jeremiah44:22 “Kusvikira Jehovha akakoniwa kuzova nomwoyo murefu, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvamabasa enyu, uye nokuda kwezvinonyangadza zvamaiita; naizvozvo nyika yenyu rava dongo, nechinoshamisa nechinotukwa, isina unogaramo, sezvazvakaita zuva ranhasi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Zvamakapisa zvinonhuwira, zvamakatadzira Jehovha, mukasateerera izwi raJehovha, mukasafamba nomurairo wake, kana nezvirevo zvake, kana nezvaakapupura, naizvozvo zvakaipa izvi zvakakuwirai, sezvakakuwirai, sezvazvakaita zuva ranhasi.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Zvino Jeremiya akatiwo kuvanhu vose nokuvakadzi vose, “Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi vaJudha vose vari munyika yeIjipiti," 
Jeremiah44:25 zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Imi navakadzi venyu makataura nemiromo yenyu, mukazviita namaoko enyu,’ muchiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo, mhiko dzedu dzatakapika tichadziita, kuti tichapisira vahosi vokudenga zvinonhuwira, nokuvadururira zvipiriso zvinodururwa;’ zvino chisimbisai henyu mhiko dzenyu, itai henyu mhiko dzenyu." 
Jeremiah44:26 Zvino chinzwai shoko raJehovha, imi vaJudha vose vagere munyika yeIjipiti, ‘Tarirai, ndakapika nezita rangu guru ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha kuti zita rangu harichazorehwi nomuromo womunhu upi noupi waJudha munyika yose yeIjipiti,’ zvichinzi, ‘NaIshe Jehovha mupenyu!’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Tarirai, ndinovarindira ndivaitire zvakaipa, ndirege kuvaitira zvakanaka; vanhu vose vaJudha vari munyika yeIjipiti vachaparadzwa nomunondo nenzara, kusvikira vapera vose." 
Jeremiah44:28 Vanopukunyuka pamunondo vachabva munyika yeIjipiti vachidzokera kunyika yaJudha, vava vashoma; vakasara vose vaJudha, vakanga vaenda kunyika yeIjipiti kundogarako vari vatorwa, vachaziva kuti shoko richava nesimba nderani, rangu kana ravo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Zvino ichi ndicho chichava chiratidzo kwamuri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha kuti ndichakurovai panzvimbo ino, kuti muzive kuti mashoko angu achava nesimba kukuitirai zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah44:30 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndichaisa Farao Hofira mambo weIjipiti, mumaoko avavengi vake, nomumaoko avanotsvaka kumuuraya, sezvandakaisa Zedhekiya mambo waJudha mumaoko aNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, vaiva muvengi wake, waitsvaka kumuuraya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Shoko, rakataurwa nomuporofita Jeremiya kuna Bharuki mwanakomana waNeria, panguva yaakanyora mashoko aya mubhuku, zvichibva mumuromo waJeremiya, negore rechina raJehoiakimu mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, richiti," 
Jeremiah45:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, kwauri, iwe Bharuki," 
Jeremiah45:3 iwe wakati, ‘Ndine nhamo zvino, nokuti Jehovha akawedzera kuchema pakurwadziwa kwangu; ndaneta nokugomera kwangu, ndinoshaiwa zororo.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “Zvino chiti, kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, tarira, chandakavaka ndichachikoromorazve, chandakasima ndichachidzurazve; ndizvo zvandichaitira nyika yose.’" 
Jeremiah45:5 Iwe unozvitsvakira zvinhu zvikuru here? Usazvitsvaka; nokuti tarira, ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro penyama yose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; asi ndichakupa upenyu hwako chive chinhu chakapambwa panzvimbo dzose kwaunoenda.”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Shoko raJehovha, rakasvika kumuporofita Jeremiya pamusoro pamarudzi." 
Jeremiah46:2 Pamusoro peIjipiti; pamusoro pehondo yaFaraoneko mambo weIjipiti, yakanga iri parwizi Yufuretesi paKakemishi, yakakundwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi negore rechina raJehoiakimu mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha." 
Jeremiah46:3 “Gadzirai nhoo duku nenhoo huru, muswedere kunorwiwa." 
Jeremiah46:4 Sungai mabhiza, kwirai imi vatasvi, mumire makadzika ngowani dzenyu; rodzai mapfumo, pfekai nguo dzamatare." 
Jeremiah46:5 “Ndakazviwonereiko? Vakanganiswa, vadzokera shure; mhare dzavo dzakundwa, dzatiza, hadzicheukiri shure, kutya kuri pamativi ose, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah46:6 Vanomhanyisa ngavarege kutiza, mhare ngadzirege kupukunyuka; kurutivi rwokumusoro, parwizi rwaYufuretesi, vakagumburwa vakawira pasi." 
Jeremiah46:7 “Ndianiko uyo unokwira sorwizi rwaNairi, mvura yarwo inotamba senzizi?" 
Jeremiah46:8 “Ijipiti rinokwira saNairi, mvura yarwo inotamba senzizi; rinoti, ‘Ndichakwira, ndichafukidza nyika, ndichaparadza maguta navageremo.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 Kwira, imi mabhiza, fambisai imi ngoro, mhare ngadzibude, vanoti, Kushi naPuti vanoshonga nhoo, navaRudhi vanobata nokuwembura huta." 
Jeremiah46:10 Nokuti zuva iro izuva raShe, Jehovha wehondo, zuva rokutsiva kuti azvitsivire vadzivisi vake; munondo uchadya nokuguta, uchanwa ropa ravo ukaguta, nokuti Ishe, Jehovha wehondo, une chibayiro chake kunyika yokumusoro parwizi rwaYufuretesi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Kwira uende Giriadhi, undotorako muti webharisami, iwe mhandara, mukunda weIjipiti; wawanza mishonga mizhinji isina maturo, hauporeswi." 
Jeremiah46:12 Marudzi akanzwa zvokunyadziswa kwako, nyika izere nokuchema kwako; nokuti mhare dzakabonderana nemhare, vose vaviri vakawira pasi.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Shoko, rakaudzwa muporofita Jeremiya naJehovha, richireva muuyire waNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi nomukundire wake nyika yeIjipiti." 
Jeremiah46:14 “Paridzirai paIjipiti, zivisai paMigidhori, zivisai paMemufisi napaTapanihesi, muti, ‘Simukai muzvigadzire, nokuti munondo wakadya zviri kumativi ako ose." 
Jeremiah46:15 Mhare dzako dzakabviswa neiko? Havana kumira, nokuti Jehovha akavadzinga.’" 
Jeremiah46:16 Wakagumbusa vazhinji, zvirokwazvo mumwe wakawira pamusoro pomumwe; vakati, ‘Simukai, tiendezve kuvanhu vedu, nokunyika kwatakaberekerwa, titize munondo unomanikidza.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Vakadanidzirako, vachiti, ‘Farao mambo weIjipiti iguhu zvaro, wakarega nguva yakatarwa ichipfuura.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 “Noupenyu hwangu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Mambo, une zita rinonzi Jehovha wehondo, “Zvirokwazvo uchauya akaita seTabhori pakati pamakomo, uye seKameri pagungwa." 
Jeremiah46:19 Iwe mukunda unogara Ijipiti, zvigadzirire kutapwa, nokuti Memufisi richaitwa dongo, richapiswa, risina unogaramo."
