Jeremiah46:20 Ijipiti imhorombe yakaisvonaka, asi huhu rinobva kurutivi rwokumusoro rasvika, rasvika." 
Jeremiah46:21 “Navanhu varo vanoripirwa, vari mukati maro, vakafanana nemhuru dzomudanga, nokuti naivo vakadzoka, vakatiza pamwechete, havana kumira; nokuti zuva renjodzi yavo rakauya pamusoro pavo, iyo nguva yokurohwa kwavo." 
Jeremiah46:22 Mubvumo waro uchava sowenyoka, nokuti vachafamba nehondo, vachandorwa navo namatemo, savatemi vemiti." 
Jeremiah46:23 Vachatema dondo raro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, nokuti havanganzverwi, nokuti vakawanda kupfuura mhashu, havangaverengwi." 
Jeremiah46:24 Mukunda weIjipiti uchanyadziswa, uchaiswa mumaoko avanhu vanobva kurutivi rwokumusoro.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Jehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, unoti, “Tarirai, ndicharova Amoni neNo, naFarao, neIjipiti navamwari varo, namadzimambo aro, iye Farao navose vanovimba naye." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ndichavaisa mumaoko avanotsvaka kuvauraya, nomumaoko aNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, nomumaoko avaranda vake; zvino pashure richagarwa, sapamazuva akare ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah46:27 Asi usatya hako, iwe Jakobho, muranda wangu, usavhunduswa, iwe Isiraeri; nokuti tarira, ndichakuponesa uri kure, navana vako vari panyika kwavakatapirwa; Jakobho uchadzoka, uchanyarara nokuzorora, hakuna ungamutyisa." 
Jeremiah46:28 Usatya hako, iwe Jakobho, muranda wangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, nokuti ndinewe; nokuti ndichapedza kwazvo marudzi ose kwandakakudzingira; asi iwe handingakupedzi, asi ndichakuranga ndichiita nokururama, handingakuregi usina kurohwa.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Shoko raJehovha, rakasvika kumuporofita Jeremiya pamusoro pavaFirisitia, Farao achigere kukunda Gaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, mvura zhinji inokwira ichibva kurutivi rwokumusoro, ichava rwizi runopapfuma, ichafukidza nyika nezvose zvirimo, neguta navageremo; vanhu vachachema, navose vagere munyika vachawungudza.’" 
Jeremiah47:3 Kana vachinzwa kutinhira kwokutsika kwamahwanda amabhiza ake ane simba, nokumhanyisa kwengoro dzake, nokuvirima kwamakumbo engoro dzake, madzibaba haacheukiri kuvana vawo nokuneta kwamaoko avo;" 
Jeremiah47:4 nemhaka yezuva iro, rinouya kuparadza vaFirisitia vose, nokuparadza paTaya neSidhoni mubatsiri mumwe nomumwe wakasara; nokuti Jehovha uchaparadza vaFirisitia, ivo vakasara vechiwi cheKafitori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza rava nemhanza, Ashikeroni raparadzwa, izvo zvakanga zvasara zvomupata wavo; ucharamba uchizvitema kusvikira rinhiko?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Haiwa, iwe munondo waJehovha, uchashaiwa zororo kusvikira rinhiko? Dzokera mumuhara wako, zorora, unyarare." 
Jeremiah47:7 Unganyarara seiko, Jehovha zvaakakuraira? Pamusoro peAshikeroni napamusoro pemhenderekedzo yegungwa, ndipo paakazviraira.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Pamusoro paMoabhu. “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Nebho rine nhamo, nokuti raparadzwa; Kiriataimu ranyadziswa, rakundwa; Mishigabhi ranyadziswa, ravhunduswa.’" 
Jeremiah48:2 Mbiri yaMoabhu haichipo; paHeshibhoni vakarangana zvakaipa pamusoro pavo, vachiti, ‘Uyai, tivaparadze, varege kuzova rudzi.’ Newewo Madhimeni, uchanyaradzwa, munondo uchakutevera." 
Jeremiah48:3 Inzwai izwi rokuchema rinobva Horonaimi, ‘Kuparadzwa nokukoromorwa kukuru!’" 
Jeremiah48:4 Moabhu vaparadzwa; vanana vavo vakanzwika vachichema. 
Jeremiah48:5 Nokuti vachakwira nomukwidzwa weRuhiti vachingochema; nokuti pamatenusirwa eHoronaimi vakanzwa njodzi yokuchema kwokuparadzwa. 
Jeremiah48:6 ‘Tizai, muponese mweya yenyu, mufanane negwenzi murenje.’" 
Jeremiah48:7 Nokuti zvamakavimba namabasa enyu nepfuma yenyu, muchakundwawo; Kemoshi vachaenda kwavanotapwa, vapristi vavo namachinda avo pamwechete." 
Jeremiah48:8 Muparadzi uchawira guta rimwe nerimwe, hakuna guta richapukunyuka; mupata uchapararawo, nebani richaparadzwa, sezvakataura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah48:9 Ipai Moabhu mapapiro, vabhururuke, vaende; maguta avo achava matongo, anoshaiwa unogaramo." 
Jeremiah48:10 Ngaatukwe unobate basa raJehovha asina hanya naro; ngaatukwe unodzora munondo wake paropa. 
Jeremiah48:11 “Moabhu vakanga vane zororo kubva pahuduku hwavo, vakagara pamasese avo, havana kudururwa vachibviswa mumudziyo, uye havana kutapwa; naizvozvo kuzipa kwavo kwakarambira mukati mavo, nokunhuwira kwavo hakuna kushanduka." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Naizvozvo tarirai, mazuva anouya ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha andichatuma kwavari vanomimina; ivo vachavamimina, vachadurura midziyo yavo chose, nokuputsanya hari dzavo." 
Jeremiah48:13 Moabhu vachanyara pamusoro peKemoshi, sezvakanyadziswa imba yaIsiraeri pamusoro peBhetieri, ravaivimba naro." 
Jeremiah48:14 Munotaura seiko, muchiti, ‘Tiri mhare, vanhu vakatsunga pakurwa?’" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moabhu vaparadzwa, vakwira mumaguta avo, majaya avo akasanangurwa akaburuka kundourayiwa ndizvo zvinotaura Mambo, une zita rinonzi Jehovha wehondo." 
Jeremiah48:16 “Njodzi yaMoabhu yava pedyo yodokuuya, nhamo yavo yokurumidza kuuya." 
Jeremiah48:17 Vachemei, imi mose makavapoteredza, imi mose munoziva zita ravo; muti, ‘Haiwa, tsvimbo yakasimba, iwo mudonzvo wakanaka, zvavhunika sei!’" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Iwe mukunda unogara Dhibhoni, buruka pakukudzwa kwako, ugare pane nyota, nokuti muparadzi waMoabhu wauya kuzorwa newe, waparadza nhare dzako." 
Jeremiah48:19 Iwe unogara Aroeri, mira panzira utarire; bvunza unotiza nounopukunyuka, uti, ‘Chiiko chaitwa?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moabhu vakanyadziswa, nokuti vakakoromorwa. Wungudzai mucheme, muzviparidzire paArinoni kuti Moabhu vaparadzwa." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Zvirokwazvo, kutongwa kwasvika panyika yamapani, paHoroni, napaJaza, napaMefaati," 
Jeremiah48:22 napaDhibhoni, napaNebho, napaBhetidhibhirataimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 napaKiriataimu, napaBhetigamuri, napaBhetimeoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 napaKerioti, napaBhozira, napamaguta ose enyika yavaMoabhu, kure kana pedyo." 
Jeremiah48:25 Runyanga rwaMoabhu rwagurwa, ruoko rwavo rwavhuniwa ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Muvape doro vabatwe, nokuti vakaita manyawi pamberi paJehovha; Moabhu vachawumburuka mumarutsi avo, vachasekwawo." 
Jeremiah48:27 Nokuti Isiraeri havana kusekwa nemi here? Vakawanikwa pakati pamakororo here? Nokuti nguva dzose kana muchimureva iye munodzungudza misoro yenyu. 
Jeremiah48:28 “Imi mugere panyika yaMoabhu, ibvai mumaguta, mugare mudombo, muve senjiva inovaka dendere rayo pamativi amawere." 
Jeremiah48:29 Takanzwa kuzvikudza kwaMoabhu, kuti vanozvikudza kwazvo; nokuzvirumbidza kwavo, namanyawi omwoyo wavo." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ndinoziva hasha dzavo, kuti hadzina maturo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; kuzvirumbidza kwavo hazvina kuita chinhu." 
Jeremiah48:31 Naizvozvo ndichawungudza pamusoro paMoabhu, zvirokwazvo ndichadanidzira pamusoro pavaMoabhu vose; vachachema vanhu veKiriheresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ndichakuchemera, iwe muzambiringa weSibhima, nokuchema kunopfuura kuchema kwaJazeri; matavi ako akadarika gungwa, akandosvika pagungwa raJazeri; muparadzi wawira zvibereko zvako zvezhezha namazambiringa ako." 
Jeremiah48:33 “Mufaro nokufara zvabviswa pamunda wakanga uchibereka zvakanaka napanyika yaMoabhu; ndakagumisa waini pazvisviniro, hakuna vachatsika vachipururudza, kupururudza hakungavi kupururudza." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Kubva pakuchema kweHeshibhoni kusvikira Ereare, nokusvikira Jahazi, vakanzwisa izwi ravo, kubva Zoari kusvikira Horonaimi neEgiratisherishiya; nokuti nemvura zhinji yeNimirimi ichaparadzwa." 
Jeremiah48:35 “Ndichagumisawo pakati paMoabhu ani naani unobayira panzvimbo dzakakwirira, naiye unopisira vamwari vake zvinonhuwira ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Naizvozvo mwoyo wangu unorira pamusoro paMoabhu senyere, nomwoyo wangu unorira senyere pamusoro pavanhu veKiriheresi; naizvozvo zvakawanda zvaakazviwanira zvapera." 
Jeremiah48:37 Nokuti misoro yose yava nemhanza, nendebvu dzose dzaveurwa; maoko ose atemwa, nezviuno zvose zvina masaga." 
Jeremiah48:38 Pamatenga edzimba dzaMoabhu, napanzira dzomumisha yavo kuwungudza kuripo pose; nokuti ndaputsa Moabhu somudziyo usingafadzi munhu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah48:39 Vakoromorwa sei! Vanowungudza sei! Moabhu vakafuratira sei nokunyadziswa! Saizvozvo Moabhu vachava chinhu chinosekwa nechinotyisa pakati pavose vanovapoteredza.” 
Jeremiah48:40 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, “Tarirai, uchabhururuka segondo, uchatambanudzira mapapiro ake kuzorwa naMoabhu." 
Jeremiah48:41 Maguta akundwa, nhare dzakundwa, nezuva iro mwoyo yemhare dzaMoabhu ichaita somwoyo womukadzi pakurwadziwa kwake." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moabhu vachaparadzwa, varege kuva rudzi rwavanhu, nokuti vakazvikudza pamberi paJehovha." 
Jeremiah48:43 Kutya nehuzha nomusungo zvasvika kwauri, iwe ugere panyika yaMoabhu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah48:44 Unotiza chinotyisa uchawira muhuzha; unokwira achibuda muhuzha uchabatwa nomusungo, nokuti ndichauyisa pamusoro pavo, ipo pamusoro paMoabhu, gore rokurohwa kwavo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah48:45 Vakatiza vamire pamumvuri weHeshibhoni vasina simba, nokuti moto wabuda paHeshibhoni, nomurazvo pakati paSihoni, waparadza mativi aMoabhu nemisoro yavanoda kurwa." 
Jeremiah48:46 Mune nhamo, imi Moabhu! Vanhu veKemoshi vapera; nokuti vanakomana venyu vatapwa, navakunda venyu vaiswa kukutapwa." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Asi namazuva okupedzisira ndichadzosa kutapwa kwaMoabhu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.” Ndipo panosvika kutongwa kwaMoabhu. 
Jeremiah49:1 Pamusoro pavana vaAmoni. Zvanzi naJehovha, “Ko Isiraeri havana vanakomana here? Havana vagari venhaka here? Ko Marikami wagarireiko nhaka yaGadhi, vanhu vake vanogarirei mumaguta ake?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, mazuva anosvika, andichanzwisa vanhu mhere yokurwa neRabha ravana vaAmoni; richaitwa murwi wamatongo; ipapo VaIsiraeri vachadya nhaka yavakambodya nhaka yavo.’" 
Jeremiah49:3 Wungudza iwe Heshibhoni, nokuti Ai raparadzwa; chemai imi vakunda vaRebha, zvisungei zviuno namasaga, wungudzai, mumhanye kwose kwose pakati pezhowa, nokuti Marikami uchatapwa, iye navapristi namachinda ake pamwechete." 
Jeremiah49:4 Unozvirumbidzireiko pamusoro pamipata, pamusoro pomupata wako unoyerera, iwe mukunda wokudzokera shure, iwe wokuvimba nepfuma yako, uchiti, ‘Ndianiko ungarwa neni?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 “Tarira, ndichauyisa pamusoro pako kutya vose vanokupoteredza, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe, Jehovha wehondo; muchadzingwa mumwe nomumwe ipo paakatarira, hakuna ungazounganidza vanodzungaira." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Asi pashure ndichadzosa kutapwa kwavana vaAmoni, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Pamusoro paEdhomu. Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Ko paTemani hapachina huchenjeri here? Mano arova kuna vakangwara here? Huchenjeri hwavo hwanyangarika here?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Tizai, mudzoke, garai makadzika, imi mugere paDhedhani; nokuti ndichauyisa njodzi yaEsau pamusoro pake nenguva yandichamurova nayo." 
Jeremiah49:9 Kana vakohwi vamizambiringa vakasvika kwauri, havangasiyi mamwe mazambiringa angazokohiwa here? Kana mbavha dzikasvika usiku havangaparadzi kusvikira varinganwa here?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Ndakafukura Esau, ndazarura nzvimbo dzake dzakavanda, haangagoni kuvanda; vana vake vaparadzwa, nehama dzake nowokwake; iye haachipo." 
Jeremiah49:11 Siya nherera dzako, ini ndichadziraramisa, chirikadzi dzako ngadzivimbe neni." 
Jeremiah49:12 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, vakanga vasina kufanira kunwa pamukombe, vachanwa zvirokwazvo; ko zvino iwe ndiwe ucharegwa chose usingarohwi here? Haungaregwi usingarohwi, asi uchanwa zvirokwazvo.’" 
Jeremiah49:13 Nokuti ndakapika neni ndimene, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha kuti Bhozira richaitwa chishamiso nechinoshoorwa, nedongo rechinotukwa; maguta aro ose achava matongo nokusingaperi.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Ndakanzwa mashoko anobva kuna Jehovha, nhume yakatumwa pakati pamarudzi, ichiti, “Unganai, muuye kuzorwa naro, musimukire kurwa." 
Jeremiah49:15 Nokuti tarirai, ndakakuita muduku pakati pamarudzi, nounozvidzwa pakati pavanhu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Kana kuri kutyisa kwako, kuzvikudza kwomwoyo wako kwakakunyengera, iwe ugere mumikaha yedombo, unozvisimbisa pakakwirira pazvikomo; kunyangwe ukavaka dendere rako pakakwirira segondo, ndichakubvisapo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edhomu vachaitwa chishamiso, mumwe nomumwe unopfuura napo uchashamiswa, ucharidza muridzo pamusoro pamatambudziko avo ose." 
Jeremiah49:18 Sapakutsindikirwa kweSodhoma neGomora namamwe maguta akanga ari pedyo hakuna munhu uchagaramo, hakuna Mwanakomana womunhu uchavamo ari mutorwa." 
Jeremiah49:19 Tarirai, uchauya seshumba achibva mumatenhere aJodhani kuzorwa nohugaro hwakasimba; nokuti ndichavatizisapo pakarepo; wakatsaurwa ndiye wandichagadzapo; nokuti ndiani wakafanana neni? Ndiani uchanditarira nguva? Mufudzi ungamira pamberi pangu ndiani?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Naizvozvo chinzwai chirevo chaJehovha chaakatema pamusoro paEdhomu, nemifungo yake yaakafunga pamusoro pavagere paTemani. Zvirokwazvo vachavakwekweredza, ivo vaduku vamapoka avo; zvirokwazvo mafuro avo achashamiswa pamusoro pavo." 
Jeremiah49:21 “Nyika inodedera nokuda kwomubvumo wokuwira kwavo pasi; kuchema kuripo kunonzwika kusvikira kuGungwa Dzvuku. 
Jeremiah49:22 Tarirai, uchakwira achibhururuka segondo, uchatambanudzira mapapiro ake kuzorwa neBhozira, nezuva iro mwoyo yemhare dzaEdhomu ichaita somwoyo womukadzi pakurwadziwa kwake.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 “Pamusoro peDhamasikosi. Hamati ranyadziswa, neAripadhi, nokuti akanzwa mashoko akaipa, akanyauka; kutambudzika kuripo pagungwa, harigoni kuzorora." 
Jeremiah49:24 Dhamasikosi rapera simba, rakatendeukira kutiza, rakabatwa nokudedera; rakabatwa nokurwadziwa nokuchema somukadzi unosurumuka." 
Jeremiah49:25 “Haiwa, guta rairumbidzwa rakasiyiwa sei, iro guta romufaro wangu?" 
Jeremiah49:26 “Naizvozvo majaya aro achawira pasi munzira dzaro, varwi vose vachanyarara nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ndichabatidza moto murusvingo rweDhamasikosi, uchaparadza dzimba dzoushe dzaBhenihadhadhi.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Pamusoro paKedhari napamusoro poushe hweHazoru hwakakundwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi. Zvanzi naJehovha, “Simukai, muende kuna Kedhari, mundoparadza vanhu vokumabvazuva." 
Jeremiah49:29 Vachatora matende avo namapoka avo amakwai, vachazvitorera micheka yavo inoremberedzwa, nemidziyo yavo yose, namakamera avo vachienda nazvo; vachadanidzira kwavari, vachiti, ‘Zvinotyisa zviripo kumativi ose!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Tizai, endai kure, garai makadzika, imi vagere Hazori, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi wakarangana pamusoro penyu, wakakufungirai mano akaipa." 
Jeremiah49:31 Simukai, muende kundorwa norudzi rwakazorora, runogara rusina hanya, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; rusina masuwo kana zvipfigiso, runogara rwoga." 
Jeremiah49:32 Makamera avo achatapwa nezvipfuo zvavo zvizhinji zvichapambwa; ndichavaparadzira kumativi ose kunobva mhepo, ivo vakaveurwa mativi evhudzi ravo, ndichavauyisira njodzi yavo ichibva kumativi ose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah49:33 “Hazori huchava hugaro hwamakava, nedongo nokusingaperi; hakuna munhu ungagaramo, hakuna mwanakomana womunhu uchavamo ari mutorwa.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Shoko raJehovha, rakasvika kumuporofita Jeremiya pamusoro paEramu, pakutanga kwokubata ushe kwaZedhekiya mambo waJudha, richiti," 
Jeremiah49:35 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Tarirai, ndichavhuna huta hwaEramu, icho chinhu chikuru chesimba ravo." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndichauyisira pamusoro paEramu mhepo ina dzichibva kumativi mana okudenga, ndichavaparadzira kumativi iwo mana kunobva mhepo; hakungavi norudzi rumwe kusingasviki ivo vakadzingwa vaEramu.’" 
Jeremiah49:37 “Ndichavhundusa Eramu pamberi pavavengi vavo napamberi pavanotsvaka kuvauraya; ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro pavo, iko kutsamwa kwangu kukuru, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ndichatuma munondo uvateverere kusvikira ndavapedza." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ndichaisa chigaro changu choushe maEramu, ndiparadze mambo namachinda vabvepo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah49:39 Asi namazuva okupedzisira ndichadzosazve kutapwa kwaEramu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Shoko, rakataurwa naJehovha pamusoro peBhabhironi, napamusoro penyika yavaKaradhia nomuporofita Jeremiya." 
Jeremiah50:2 “Paridzirai pakati pamarudzi, muzvizivise, musimudze mureza, muzvizivise, murege kuvanza, muti, ‘Bhabhironi rakundwa, Bheri wanyadziswa, Merodhaki wavhunduswa; zvifananidzo zvavo zvanyadziswa, matanda avo avhunika.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 “Nokuti rudzi ruriko runobva kurutivi rwomusoro kuzorwa naro, ruchaita nyika yaro dongo, hakuna uchagaramo; vatiza, vaenda, vanhu nezvipfuo." 
Jeremiah50:4 “Namazuva iwayo, nenguva iyo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, vana VaIsiraeri vachauya, ivo navana vaJudha pamwechete; vachafamba vachingochema, vachitsvaka Jehovha Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Vachabvunza Zioni, vakaringira zviso zvavo ikoko, vachiti, ‘Uyai tizviise kuna Jehovha nesungano isingaperi, isingakanganikwi.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Vanhu vangu akanga ari makwai akarashika, vafudzi vavo vakavarashisa, vakavatsausira kumakomo, vakafamba vachibva kumakomo vachienda kuzvikomo, vakakanganwa nzvimbo yavo yokuzorora." 
Jeremiah50:7 “Vose vaivawana vaivadya, navadzivisi vavo vaiti, ‘Hatina mhosva, nokuti vakatadzira Jehovha, ihwo hugaro hwokururama, iye Jehovha, tariro yamadzibaba avo.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 Tizai mubve pakati peBhabhironi, budai panyika yavaKaradhia, muve senhongo pamberi pamapoka amakwai." 
Jeremiah50:9 “Nokuti tarirai, ndichamutsira Bhabhironi nokuuyisira boka ramarudzi makuru anobva kunyika yokumusoro; vachazvigadzira kuzorwa naro, richakundwa noko; miseve yavo ichava seyemhare yakangwara, isingadzoki isina chayakabata." 
Jeremiah50:10 Nyika yeKaradhia ichava chinhu chakapambwa; vose vanoipamba vachaguta ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Jeremiah50:11 “Kunyangwe makafara, kunyangwe muchifarisisa, iyemi munoparadza nhaka yangu, kunyangwe muchikwakuka setsiru rinopura zviyo, muchirira samabhiza ane simba," 
Jeremiah50:12 mai venyu vachanyadziswa kwazvo, ivo vakakuberekai vachakanganiswa; tarirai, vachava rudzi ruri shure kwaose, nesango, nenyika yakaoma, nerenje." 
Jeremiah50:13 Nemhaka yokutsamwa kwaJehovha haringagarwi, asi richava dongo chose; mumwe nomumwe unopfuura napaBhabhironi uchashamiswa, ucharidza muridzo pamusoro pamatambudziko aro ose." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Muzvigadzire imi mose munofura nohuta kuzorwa neBhabhironi kumativi ose, rifurei, regai kuchengeta miseve, nokuti rakatadzira Jehovha." 
Jeremiah50:15 Pururudzai kumativi aro ose, razvirega, shongwe dzaro dzawa, masvingo aro akoromorwa; nokuti ndiko kutsiva kwaJehovha; zvitsivei pamusoro paro, sezvarakaita muriitirewo." 
Jeremiah50:16 Paradzai mudyari paBhabhironi, naiye unobata nejeko panguva yokucheka; nemhaka yokutya munondo unomanikidza, mumwe nomumwe uchatendeukira kunowokwake, mumwe nomumwe uchatizira kunyika yake." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Isiraeri igwai rakadzingwa–dzingwa, shumba dzakaridzinga; pakutanga mambo weAsiria wakamudya, zvino pakupedzisira Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi wakavhuna mapfupa ake." 
Jeremiah50:18 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Tarirai, ndicharova mambo weBhabhironi nenyika yake, sezvandakarova mambo weAsiria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndichadzosera Isiraerizve kumafuro avo, vachafura paKarimeri napaBhashani, mweya wavo uchagutiswa pazvikomo zvaEfuremu napaGiriadhi.’" 
Jeremiah50:20 Namazuva iwayo nenguva iyo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha zvakaipa zvaIsiraeri zvichatsvakwa, asi hazvingavipo, nezvivi zvaJudha, asi hazvingawanikwi; nokuti ndichakanganwira vandakasiya." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Endai mundorwa nenyika yeMerataimu, murwe nayo uye navagere Pekodhi; urayai, muparadze chose zviri shure kwavo, muite zvose zvandakakurairai ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah50:22 Mubvumo wokurwa uri munyika, nowokuparadza kukuru." 
Jeremiah50:23 Nyundo yenyika yose yagurwa–gurwa nokuvhuniwa sei! Bhabhironi rava dongo sei pakati pamarudzi! 
Jeremiah50:24 Ndakakuteyera musungo, ukabatwawo, iwe Bhabhironi, ukasazviziva; wakawanikwa, ukabatwawo, nokuti wakarwa naJehovha." 
Jeremiah50:25 Jehovha akazarura chivigiro chepfuma yake, akabudisa nhumbi dzokurwa dzokutsamwa kwake, nokuti Ishe Jehovha wehondo une basa raanofanira kubata panyika yavaKaradhia." 
Jeremiah50:26 Uyai murwe nayo muchibva kumativi ose, zarurai matura aro, muite mirwi, muriparadze chose, regai kusiya chinhu charo." 
Jeremiah50:27 Urayai nzombe dzaro dzose, ngadziburukire kundourayiwa. Vane nhamo, nokuti zuva ravo rasvika, iyo nguva yokurohwa kwavo." 
Jeremiah50:28 “Inzwai izwi ravanotiza navanopukunyuka panyika yeBhabhironi, kundoparidzira paZioni kutsiva kwaJehovha Mwari wedu, iko kutsiva kwetemberi yake." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Kokerai vafuri varwe neBhabhironi, ivo vose vanofura nohuta; rikomberedzei nemisasa yenyu yokurwa, kurege kuva nomumwe unopukunyuka; muritsive parakabata napo, zvose zvarakaita iro muriitire saizvozvo nokuti rakaita manyawi pamberi paJehovha, pamberi poMutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Jeremiah50:30 Naizvozvo majaya aro achawira pasi munzira dzaro, navarwi varo vose vachanyarara nezuva iro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Tarira, ndine mhosva newe, iwe wokuzvikudza, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha wehondo; nokuti zuva rako rasvika, nguva yandichakurova nayo." 
Jeremiah50:32 Unozvikudza uchagumburwa nokuwira pasi, hakuna ungamusimudza; ini ndichabatidza moto mumaguta ake, uchapedza vose vakamupoteredza." 
Jeremiah50:33 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Vana VaIsiraeri navana vaJudha vakamanikidzwa pamwechete; vose, vakavatapa, vakavabata, vanoramba kuvaregedza.’" 
Jeremiah50:34 Asi Mudzikinuri wavo une simba, Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake; iye uchavareverera mhaka yavo kwazvo, kuti azorodze nyika, nokushaisa vagere Bhabhironi zororo." 
Jeremiah50:35 Munondo uri pamusoro pavaKaradhia, napamusoro pavagere Bhabhironi, napamusoro pamachinda aro, napamusoro pavachenjeri varo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah50:36 Munondo uri pamusoro pavana manyawi, vachava mapenzi; munondo uri pamusoro pemhare dzaro, vachavhunduka." 
Jeremiah50:37 Munondo uri pamusoro pamabhiza avo, napamusoro pengoro dzavo, napamusoro pavanhu vose vakavengana mukati maro, vachava savakadzi; munondo uri pamusoro pepfuma yaro, ichapambwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Kuoma kuri pamusoro pemvura yaro, ichapwa; nokuti inyika yemifananidzo yakavezwa, vanopengera zvifananidzo." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Naizvozvo zvikata zvamarenje zvichagaramo, pamwechete namapere, nemhou dzichagaramo; hapangazogarwi nokusingaperi, hakuna ungagaramo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Jeremiah50:40 “Mwari sezvaakaparadza Sodhoma neGomora namamwe maguta akanga akabatana nawo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha saizvozvo hakuna munhu ungagaramo, hakuna mwanakomana womunhu uchavamo ari mutorwa." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Tarirai, rudzi rwavanhu runobva kurutivi rwokumusoro, rudzi rukuru namadzimambo mazhinji achamutswa abve kumigumo yenyika." 
Jeremiah50:42 “Vakabata huta nepfumo, vane hasha, havane nyasha; mazwi avo anotinhira segungwa, vakatasva mabhiza, mumwe nomumwe wakashongedzwa somurwi, kuzorwa newe, iwe mukunda weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah50:43 Mambo weBhabhironi wakanzwa guhu ravo, maoko ake akashaiwa simba, wabatwa nokutambudzika nokurwadziwa sokwomukadzi unosurumuka." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Tarirai, uchauya seshumba achibva kumatenhere aJodhani kuzorwa nohugaro hwakasimba; nokuti ndichavatizisapo pakarepo; wakatsaurwa ndiye wandichagadzapo; nokuti ndiani wakafanana neni? Ndiani uchanditarira nguva? Mufudzi ungamira pamberi pangu ndiani?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Naizvozvo chinzwai chirevo chaJehovha chaakatema pamusoro peBhabhironi, nemifungo yake yaakafunga pamusoro penyika yavaKaradhia, ‘Zvirokwazvo vachavakwekweredza, ivo vaduku vamapoka avo; zvirokwazvo mafuro avo achashamiswa pamusoro pavo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Nyika inodedera nomubvumo wokukundwa kweBhabhironi, kuchema kunonzwika pakati pamarudzi ose.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Tarirai, ndichamutsira Bhabhironi navagere Rebhikamai mhepo inoparadza." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndichatumira Bhabhironi varudzi vacharirudza, vachabudisa zvose zviri munyika yaro, nokuti nezuva rokutambudzika vacharikomberedza kumativi ose." 
Jeremiah51:3 Mupfuri ngaapfure nohuta hwake ani naani unopfura nohuta nounozvisimudza ane nguo dzake dzokurwa, regai kunzwira tsitsi majaya aro, paradzai chose hondo yaro yose." 
Jeremiah51:4 Vachawira pasi vaurayiwa panyika yavaKaradhia, vabayiwa munzira dzaro." 
Jeremiah51:5 Nokuti Isiraeri naJudha havana kurashwa naMwari wavo, naJehovha wehondo, kunyangwe nyika yavo izere nemhosva pamberi poMutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Tizai mubve mukati meBhabhironi, mumwe nomumwe aponese upenyu hwake; regai kuparadzwa mukati mezvakaipa zvaro, nokuti inguva yokutsiva kwaJehovha, iye uchariripidzira." 
Jeremiah51:7 Bhabhironi wakanga uri mukombe wendarama muruoko rwaJehovha, wakabatisa nyika yose; marudzi avanhu akanwa waini yawo, saka marudzi akapenga." 
Jeremiah51:8 Bhabhironi rakawira pasi pakarepo rikaparadzwa; wungudzai pamusoro paro, torai muti webharisami kurapa kurwadziwa kwaro, zvimwe ringapora." 
Jeremiah51:9 Taida kuporesa Bhabhironi, asi harina kupora; risiyei, mumwe nomumwe wedu aende kunyika yake, nokuti mhosva yaro yasvikira kudenga, yasimudzirwa kumakore." 
Jeremiah51:10 “Jehovha wakaratidza kururama kwedu; uyai, tiparidze paZioni basa raJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah51:11 “Rodzai miseve, batisai nhoo! Jehovha wakamutsa mweya yamadzimambo avaMidhia, nokuti murangariro wake ndowokuparadza Bhabhironi, nokuti ndiko kutsiva kwaJehovha, iko kutsiva kwetemberi yake." 
Jeremiah51:12 “Simudzirai masvingo eBhabhironi mureza, simbisai varindi, isaipo nharirire, gadzirai vanovandira, nokuti Jehovha akafunga nokuita zvaakataura pamusoro pavagere Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah51:13 Iwe ugere pamvura zhinji, une pfuma zhinji, kuguma kwako kwasvika, icho chiyero chezvawakawana nokunyengera." 
Jeremiah51:14 Jehovha wehondo wakapika naiye amene, achiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo ndichakuzadza navanhu semhashu, ivo vachakupururudzira.’" 
Jeremiah51:15 “Ndiye wakaita nyika nesimba rake, wakateya nyika nohuchenjeri hwake, wakatatamura denga rose nenjere dzake." 
Jeremiah51:16 “Kana achibudisa izwi rake, kuno mubvumo wemvura zhinji kudenga; unokwidza makore pamigumo yenyika, unoita mheni kuuyisa mvura, unobudisa mhepo panovigwa pfuma yake." 
Jeremiah51:17 “Munhu mumwe nomumwe wava usina njere, haane zivo; mupfuri mumwe nomumwe wendarama unonyadziswa nechifananidzo chake chaakaveza, nokuti chifananidzo chaakaumba, ndechenhema; hakuna mweya mazviri." 
Jeremiah51:18 Hazvina maturo, ibasa rinonyengera; panguva yokurohwa kwazvo zvichapera." 
Jeremiah51:19 Mugove waJakobho haufanani naizvozvi, nokuti ndiye muumbi wazvose; Isiraeri ndirwo rudzi rwenhaka yake; Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake." 
Jeremiah51:20 “Iwe uri nyundo yangu nenhumbi dzangu dzokurwa; newe ndichaputsanya marudzi avanhu; newe ndichaparadza ushe; 
Jeremiah51:21 newe ndichaputsanya bhiza nomutasvi waro; newe ndichaputsanya ngoro nounofamba nayo; 
Jeremiah51:22 newe ndichaputsanya murume nomukadzi; newe ndichaputsanya mutana nomuduku; newe ndichaputsanya mujaya nemhandara; 
Jeremiah51:23 newe ndichaputsanya murimi nenzombe dzake mbiri; newe ndichaputsanya vabati navakuru. 
Jeremiah51:24 “Ndicharipidzira Bhabhironi navose vagere Karadhia zvakaipa zvavo zvose zvavakaita Zioni pamberi penyu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Jeremiah51:25 “Tarira, ndine mhosva newe, iwe gomo rokuparadza, rinoparadza nyika yose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kwauri, ndichakukungurusa pamabwe, ndichakuita gomo rakatsva." 
Jeremiah51:26 Havangatori kwauri ibwe rekona, kana ibwe renheyo; asi uchava dongo nokusingaperi, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Simudzai mureza panyika, ridzai hwamanda pakati pamarudzi, gadzirai marudzi kuzorwa naro, kokerai ushe hweArarati neMini neAshikenazi kuzorwa naro, gadzai mukuru wehondo kuzorwa naro, uyisai mabhiza semhashu dzinoparadza." 
Jeremiah51:28 Gadzirai marudzi kuzorwa naro, iwo madzimambo avaMidhia, navabati vavo, navakuru vavo vose, nenyika yose yavakabata." 
Jeremiah51:29 Nyika inodedera nokurwadziwa; nokuti zvakafunga Jehovha kuitira Bhabhironi zvakasimba, kuti aite nyika yeBhabhironi dongo, isina unogaramo." 
Jeremiah51:30 “Mhare dzeBhabhironi dzarega kurwa, vakarambira munhare dzavo, simba ravo rakapera, vava savakadzi; vakapisa dzimba dzaro, zvipfigiso zvaro zvakavhuniwa." 
Jeremiah51:31 “Imwe nhume ichamhanya kundosangana neimwe, mumwe wakatumwa kundosangana nomumwe, kuzivisa mambo weBhabhironi kuti guta rake rakundwa kumativi ose." 
Jeremiah51:32 Uye kuti mazambuko abatwa, kuti mapani eshanga apiswa nomoto, kuti varwi vavhunduswa." 
Jeremiah51:33 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Mukunda weBhabhironi wakaita seburiro nenguva yokupura; kwasara nguva duku, iye ndokusvikirwa nenguva yokucheka.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi wandidya, wandipwanya, wandiita mudziyo usina chinhu, wandimedza seshato, razadza zidumbu raro nezvinozipa zvangu, wandidzinga.”" 
Jeremiah51:35 Ugere Zioni uchati, “Zvakaipa zvandakaitirwa ini nenyama yangu ngazvive pamusoro peBhabhironi;” Jerusaremu richati, “Ropa rangu ngarive pamusoro pavagere Karadhia.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, “Tarira, ndichakureverera mhaka yako, ndichakutsiva; ndichapwisa gungwa raro, ndichaomesa tsime raro." 
Jeremiah51:37 Bhabhironi richaitwa mirwi yamabwe, hugaro hwamakava, chinhu chinoshamisa, chinoridzirwa muridzo, pasina unogaramo." 
Jeremiah51:38 Vachaomba pamwechete savana veshumba, vachaganya savana veshumba." 
Jeremiah51:39 Kana vamutswa mwoyo ndichavaitira mutambo, ndichavabatisa newaini, kuti vafare, vavate hope dzisingaperi, varege kuzomukazve ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah51:40 “Ndichavaburusira kwavanondobayiwa samakwayana, samakondobwe pamwechete nenhongo." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Sheshaki rakundwa sei! Guta rairumbidzwa nenyika yose rapindwa sei! Bhabhironi rava dongo sei pakati pamarudzi! 
Jeremiah51:42 Gungwa rakwira rasvika Bhabhironi, rafukidzwa namafungu aro mazhinji." 
Jeremiah51:43 Maguta aro ava matongo, nyika yakaoma nerenje, nenyika musingagari munhu, hakuna Mwanakomana womunhu unopfuura napo." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ndichatonga Bheri paBhabhironi, ndichabudisa mumuromo make chaakanga amedza, marudzi avanhu haachazovangiri kwariri; zvirokwazvo rusvingo rwaBhabhironi ruchawa." 
Jeremiah51:45 “Imi vanhu vangu, budai mukati maro, muzviponese mumwe nomumwe pakutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha." 
Jeremiah51:46 Mwoyo yenyu irege kuora, musatya guhuzve nerimwe gore shure kwaizvozvo; panyika vachaitirana simba, mubati mumwe achirwa nomumwe." 
Jeremiah51:47 Naizvozvo tarirai, mazuva anouya andichatonga mifananidzo yakavezwa yaBhabhironi; nyika yaro yose ichanyadziswa, vakaurayiwa varo vose vachawira pasi mukati maro." 
Jeremiah51:48 “Ipapo denga nenyika nezvose zviri mukati mazvo zvichaimba nomufaro pamusoro peBhabhironi, nokuti vaparadzi vachauya kwariri vachibva kurutivi rwokumusoro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah51:49 Imi vakaurayiwa VaIsiraeri, Bhabhironi rinofanira kuwawo, sezvakawira pasi paBhabhironi vakaurayiwa venyika yose." 
Jeremiah51:50 “Imi makapukunyuka pamunondo, endai, musamira; rangarirai Jehovha muri kure, fungai Jerusaremu pamwoyo yenyu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Takanyadziswa, nokuti takanzwa kushoorwa, kunyara kwakafukidza zviso zvedu, nokuti vatorwa vakapinda munzvimbo tsvene dzeimba yaJehovha." 
Jeremiah51:52 Naizvozvo, tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha mazuva anouya andichatonga mifananidzo yaro yakavezwa; vakakuvadzwa vachagomera kwose panyika yaro." 
Jeremiah51:53 Kunyangwe Bhabhironi rikakwira kudenga, kunyangwe rikasimbisa pakakwirira pane simba raro, kunyangwe zvakadaro vaparadzi vachabva kwandiri vachiendako, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah51:54 Inzwai izwi rokuchema rinobva Bhabhironi, nerokuparadzwa kukuru rinobva panyika yavaKaradhia!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Nokuti Jehovha unoparadza Bhabhironi, uchanyaradzamo mubvumo mukuru; mafungu avo anotinhira semvura zhinji, mubvumo wamazwi avo anonzwika." 
Jeremiah51:56 “Nokuti muparadzi wasvika kwariri, iko Bhabhironi, mhare dzaro dzakundwa, huta hwavo hwavhuniwa–vhuniwa; nokuti Jehovha ndiMwari wokutsiva, ucharipidzira zvirokwazvo." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndichabatisa newaini machinda aro navakachenjera varo, vabati varo navakuru varo, nemhare dzaro, vachavata hope dzisingaperi, havangazomuki ndizvo zvinotaura Mambo, une zita rinonzi Jehovha wehondo.”" 
Jeremiah51:58 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Masvingo akafara eBhabhironi achakoromorwa chose, namasuwo aro marefu achapiswa nomoto; vanhu vachabatira zvisina maturo, namarudzi achabatira moto; vachaneta." 
Jeremiah51:59 “Ndiro shoko, rakarairwa Seraia mwanakomana waNeria, mwanakomana waMaseia, nomuporofita Jeremiya, nguva yaakaenda Bhabhironi naZedhekiya mambo waJudha negore rechina rokubata kwake ushe. Zvino Seraia wakanga ari murairi mukuru parwendo." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremiya akanyora mubhuku zvakaipa zvose zvaifanira kuwira Bhabhironi, iwo mashoko ose akanyorwa pamusoro peBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah51:61 Jeremiya akati kuna Seraia, ‘Kana wasvika Bhabhironi rangarira kuti urave mashoko awa ose.’" 
Jeremiah51:62 “Uti, ‘Haiwa Jehovha, makataura pamusoro penzvimbo ino, kuti muchaiparadza, kuti kusava nounogaramo, kana munhu kana zvipfuo, asi kuti richava dongo nokusingaperi.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Zvino kana wapedza kurava bhuku iri, unofanira kusungira ibwe pairi, ndokuikandira mukati morwizi rwaYufuretesi;" 
Jeremiah51:64 uchiti, ‘Saizvozvo Bhabhironi richanyura, haringazobudizve, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvandichauyisa pamusoro paro; vachaneta.’ ” Ndipo panoguma mashoko aJeremiya." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedhekiya wakatanga kubata ushe ava namakore ana makumi maviri nerimwe, akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore ane gumi nerimwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Hamutari mukunda waJeremiya weRibhina." 
Jeremiah52:2 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha netsika dzose dzaJehoiakimu. 
Jeremiah52:3 Nokuti izvozvo zvakaitirwa Jerusaremu naJudha nokuda kwokutsamwa kwaJehovha, kusvikira avarashira kure kwaari; Zedhikia akamukira mambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah52:4 Zvino negore repfumbamwe rokubata kwake ushe, nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva regumi romwedzi, Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi akasvika, iye nehondo yake yose, kuzorwa neJerusaremu, vakadzika matende avopo, vakarikomba nenhare." 
Jeremiah52:5 Naizvozvo guta rakakombwa kusvikira pagore regumi nerimwe ramambo Zedhekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Zvino nomwedzi wechina, nezuva repfumbamwe romwedzi, nzara ikanyanya kwazvo paguta, vanhu venyika vakashaiwa zvokudya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Vakaputsa rusvingo rweguta, vanhu vose vehondo vakatiza, vakabuda muguta usiku nenzira yesuwo, pakati pamadziro maviri aiva pamunda wamambo; (zvino vaKaradhia vakanga vakakomba guta); vakaenda nenzira yokurenje." 
Jeremiah52:8 Asi hondo yavaKaradhia yakatevera mambo, vakabata Zedhekiya pamapani eJeriko, hondo yake yose ikapararira ikabva kwaari." 
Jeremiah52:9 Zvino vakabata mambo, vakaenda naye kuna mambo weBhabhironi paRibhira munyika yeHamati, iye akamutongerapo." 
Jeremiah52:10 Mambo weBhabhironi akauraya vanakomana vaZedhekiya iye achizviona, akaurayawo machinda ose aJudha paRibhira." 
Jeremiah52:11 Akatumbura meso aZedhekiya, mambo weBhabhironi akamusunga namatare, akamuisa Bhabhironi, akamusunga mutorongo kusvikira pazuva rokufa kwake." 
Jeremiah52:12 Zvino nomwedzi wechishanu, nezuva regumi romwedzi, negore regumi namapfumbamwe ramambo Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi, waimira pamberi pamambo weBhabhironi, wakasvika Jerusaremu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Akapisa imba yaJehovha, neimba yamambo; akapisawo dzimba dzose dzeJerusaremu, dzimba dzose huru, nomoto." 
Jeremiah52:14 Hondo yose yavaKaradhia, yakanga ino mukuru wavarindi, ikaputsa masvingo ose eJerusaremu kunhivi dzose." 
Jeremiah52:15 Ipapo Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akatapa vamwe varombo chaivo vavanhu, navamwe vanhu vakanga vasara muguta, navakanga vanyengera vakaenda kuna mambo weBhabhironi, navavakanga vasara kuvazhinji." 
Jeremiah52:16 Asi Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akasiya vamwe varombo chaivo venyika, kuti vave varimi veminda yemizambiringa nemimwe minda." 
Jeremiah52:17 VaKaradhia vakaputsanya mbiru dzendarira dzakanga dziri mumba maJehovha, nezvingoro, nedziva rendarira, zvakanga zviri mumba maJehovha, vakaenda nendarira yazvo yose Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah52:18 Vakatorawo hari nefoshoro nembato dzemwenje, nembiya, nezvirongo, nenhumbi dzose dzendarira dzavaibata nadzo." 
Jeremiah52:19 Nemikombe, nezvaenga zvomoto, nembiya, nehari, nezvitimiko zvemwenje, nezvirongo, nemidziyo, zvose zvakanga zviri zvendarama nezvose zvakanga zviri zvesirivha, mukuru wavarindi akazvitora." 
Jeremiah52:20 Mbiru mbiri, nedziva rimwe, nehando gumi nembiri dzendarira dzaiva pasi pezvingoro, zvakanga zvaitirwa imba yaJehovha naSoromoni, kurema kwendarira yenhumbi idzi dzose kwakanga kusingagoni kuyerwa." 
Jeremiah52:21 Zvino kana dziri mbiru, kureba kwembiru imwe kwakasvika makubhiti ane gumi namasere; pakuyera tambo yakasvika makubhiti ane gumi namaviri rwakarupoteredza; pakukora yakasvika minwe mina; mukati makanga mune mhango." 
Jeremiah52:22 Yakanga ino musoro wendarira pamusoro payo, kureba kwomusoro mumwe kwakasvika makubhiti mashanu, uye kwakanga kune zvakarukwa namatamba zvaipoteredza musoro, zvose zviri zvendarira; nembiru yechipiri yakanga yakafanana neyiyi, namatambawo" 
Jeremiah52:23 Pamativi pakanga pana matamba makumi mapfumbamwe namatanhatu; matamba ose akasvika zana pane zvakarukwa pamativi ose. 
Jeremiah52:24 Mukuru wavarindi akatora Seraia Mupristi Mukuru, naZefania mupristi wechipiri, navarindi vatatu vomukova;" 
Jeremiah52:25 napaguta akatora mukuru waitarira varume vehondo, navarume vanomwe vaisionana namambo, vaakawana muguta, nomunyori womukuru wehondo, waiunganidza vanhu venyika, navarume vana makumi matanhatu vavanhu venyika, vaakawana mukati meguta." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akavatora, akavaisa kuna mambo weBhabhironi paRibhira." 
Jeremiah52:27 Mambo weBhabhironi akavabaya, akavauraya paRibhira, panyika yeHamati. Naizvozvo vaJudha vakatapwa panyika yavo." 
Jeremiah52:28 Ndivo vanhu vakatapwa naNebhukadhineza; negore rechinomwe vaJudha vane zviuru zvitatu namakumi maviri navatatu; 
Jeremiah52:29 negore regumi namasere raNebhukadhineza wakatapa paJerusaremu vanhu vana mazana masere namakumi matatu navaviri, akaenda navo;" 
Jeremiah52:30 negore ramakumi maviri namatatu raNebhukadhineza, Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi wakatapa kuvaJudha vanhu vana mazana manomwe namakumi mana navashanu; vanhu vose vaiva zviuru zvina namazana matatu." 
Jeremiah52:31 Zvino negore ramakumi matatu namanomwe rokutapwa kwaJehoiakini mambo waJudha, nomwedzi wegumi nemiviri, nezuva ramakumi maviri namashanu romwedzi, Evhirimerodhaki mambo weBhabhironi negore rokutanga rokubata kwake ushe, akakudza musoro waJehoiakini mambo wavaJudha, akamubvisa mutorongo;" 
Jeremiah52:32 akataura naye nomwoyo munyoro, akakudza chigaro chake choushe kukunda zvigaro zvoushe zvamadzimambo akanga anaye paBhabhironi," 
Jeremiah52:33 akashandura nguo dzake dzokusungwa. Jehoiakini akaramba achidya zvokudya pamberi pake mazuva ose oupenyu hwake. 
Jeremiah52:34 Kana zviri zvokurarama nazvo, waisipiwa zvokurarama nazvo namambo weBhabhironi nguva dzose, zuva rimwe nerimwe mugove waro, kusvikira zuva rokufa kwake, namazuva ose oupenyu hwake." 
Lamentations1:1 Haiwa, guta, rakanga rizere navanhu, rinogara sei riri roga! Iro, rakanga riri guru pakati pamarudzi, rava sechirikadzi! Iro, rakanga riri vamwoyo pakati penyika, rovigira mutero." 
Lamentations1:2 Rinochema zvikuru usiku, misodzi yaro iri pamatama aro; pakati pavadikanwi varo vose rinoshaiwa muvaraidzi, shamwari dzaro dzose dzarinyengera, dzashanduka vavengi varo." 
Lamentations1:3 Judha aenda kuutapwa nokuda kwokutambudzika, nokuda kwokubatiswa zvikuru; vanogara pakati pamarudzi, asi havawane zororo, vose vaidzingana navo vakanovata pakamanikana." 
Lamentations1:4 Nzira dzeZioni dzinochema, nokuti hakuna anouya kumutambo, masuwo aro ose akaparadzwa, vapristi varo vanogomera, mhandara dzaro dzinotambudzika, iro romene rinovavirwa." 
Lamentations1:5 Vadzivisi varo ndivo vava vakuru, vavengi varo vanofara; nokuti Jehovha akaritambudza nemhaka yokudarika kwaro kuzhinji; vana varo vaduku vakaenda kuutapwa pamberi pomudzivisi." 
Lamentations1:6 Kunaka kwake kwose kwakabva pamukunda weZioni; machinda ake aita senondo dzinoshaiwa mafuro, akatiza asine simba pamberi poanodzingana nawo." 
Lamentations1:7 Namazuva okutambudzika nokudzungaira kwaro, Jerusaremu rinorangarira zvose zvairifadza kubva pamazuva akare; panguva yakawira vanhu varo pamaoko omudzivisi, kusina wakaribatsira, vadzivisi vakariona, vakaseka kuparadzwa kwaro." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusaremu rakatadza zvikuru kwazvo, naizvozvo raitwa sechinhu chisakanaka; vose vairikudza, vorishora, nokuti vakaona kushama kwaro, zvirokwazvo, rakagomera, rikadzokera shure." 
Lamentations1:9 Tsvina yaro yakanga iri panguo yaro, harina kurangarira kuguma kwaro; naizvozvo rakanyura zvinoshamisa, harina munyaradzi; tarirai, Jehovha, kutambudzika kwangu, nokuti muvengi wazvikudza." 
Lamentations1:10 Mudzivisi atambanudzira ruoko rwake kune zvose zvaro zvinofadza; nokuti rakaona marudzi achipinda panzvimbo yaro tsvene, vamakanga marayira pamusoro pavo kuti varege kupinda paungano yenyu." 
Lamentations1:11 Vanhu varo vose vanogomera, vanotsvaka zvokudya; vakapa zvinhu zvavo zvinofadza kuti zvive zvokudya zvokusimbisa mweya yavo; tarirai, Jehovha, muone; nokuti ndaitwa wakazvidzwa." 
Lamentations1:12 Nhai, imi mose munopfuura, hamuna hanya nazvo here? Tarirai muone kana kuchema kuripo kwakafanana nokuchema kwangu, kwakauyiswa pamusoro pangu, kwandakatambudzwa nako naJehovha nezuva rokutsamwa kwake kukuru." 
Lamentations1:13 Akatuma moto mumapfupa angu, zvichibva kumusoro, akavakunda; akadzikira tsoka dzangu mumbure, akandidzosera shure; akandiparadza nokundishaisa simba zuva rose." 
Lamentations1:14 Joko rokudarika kwangu kuzhinji rakasungwa noruoko rwake; zvakarukwa, zvaiswa pamutsipa wangu, zvandishaisa simba rangu; Ishe akandiisa mumaoko avasingagoni kudzivisa." 
Lamentations1:15 Ishe akashaisa simba mhare dzangu dzose dzakandipoteredza, akakokera ungano yakatarwa kuzondipwanyira majaya angu; Ishe akatsika mukunda mhandara yaJudha sapachisviniro." 
Lamentations1:16 Ndinochema nokuda kwezvinhu izvi, maziso angu anoyerera misodzi, nokuti munyaradzi, aifanira kusimbisa mweya wangu, uri kure neni; vana vangu vasiyiwa, nokuti muvengi akunda." 
Lamentations1:17 Zioni rinotambanudza maoko aro, hakuna angarinyaradza; Jehovha akarayira pamusoro paJakobho, kuti vakamupoteredza vave vadzivisi vake; Jerusaremu riri pakati pavo sechinhu chakanaka." 
Lamentations1:18 Jehovha akarurama, nokuti ndakamukira murairo wake; doteererai imi vanhu vose, muone kuchema kwangu; mhandara dzangu namajaya angu aenda kuutapwa." 
Lamentations1:19 Ndakadana vaindida, asi vakandinyengera; vapristi vangu navakuru vangu vakaparara muguta, panguva yavakanga vachizvitsvakira zvokudya kusimbisa mweya yavo." 
Lamentations1:20 Tarirai, Jehovha, nokuti ndiri panjodzi, mwoyo wangu unotambudzika; mwoyo wangu washanduka mukati mangu, nokuti ndakakumukirai kwazvo; kunze munondo unonditorera vana, mumba makaita somuno rufu." 
Lamentations1:21 Vakandinzwa ndichigomera, hakuna anondinyaradza; vavengi vangu vose vakanzwa nhamo dzangu, vanofara kuti makazviita; muchauyisa zuva ramakatara, ipapo vachafanana neni." 
Lamentations1:22 Zvakaipa zvavo zvose ngazviuye pamberi penyu; muvaitire ivo sezvamakandiitira ini nokuda kwokudarika kwangu kwose; nokuti kugomera kwangu kuzhinji, mwoyo wangu washaiwa simba." 
Lamentations2:1 Ishe akafukidza sei mukunda weZioni negore rokutsamwa kwake! Akabvisa kunaka kwaIsiraeri akazvikandira pasi, akasarangarira chitsiko chake nezuva rokutsamwa kwake." 
Lamentations2:2 Ishe akaparadza ugaro hwose hwaJakobho, akasanzwira tsitsi; pakutsamwa kwake akawisira pasi nhare dzomukunda waJudha; akadziwisira pasi; akamhura ushe namachinda ahwo." 
Lamentations2:3 Nokutsamwa kukuru akagura nyanga dzose dzaIsiraeri; akadzosa ruoko rwake rworudyi pamberi pomuvengi, akapisa muna Jakobho somurazvo womoto unopedza zvose kumativi ose." 
Lamentations2:4 Akakunga uta hwake somuvengi, akamira noruoko rwake somudzivisi, akauraya vose vaifadza meso; akadurura kutsamwa kwake somoto patende romukunda weZioni." 
Lamentations2:5 Ishe wava somuvengi, akamedza Isiraeri; akamedza dzimba dzavo dzose dzoushe, akaparadza nhare dzavo; akawanzira mukunda waJudha kuchema nokurira." 
Lamentations2:6 Akabvisa ruzhowa rwake nesimba sorwomunda; akaparadza nzvimbo yake yokuungana; Jehovha akakanganwisa paZioni ungano yakatarwa neSabata, akashora madzimambo navapristi neshungu dzokutsamwa kwake." 
Lamentations2:7 Jehovha akarasa atari yake, akasema nzvimbo yake tsvene, akaisa masvingo edzimba dzavo dzoushe mumaoko omuvengi; vakaita bope mumba maJehovha, sapazuva reungano yakatarwa." 
Lamentations2:8 Jehovha akafunga kuparadza rusvingo rwomukunda weZioni; akatatanura tambo yokuyera, haana kudzosa ruoko rwake pakuparadza; akachemedza nhare norusvingo, zvinopera simba pamwechete." 
Lamentations2:9 Masuwo aro akanyura pasi, akaparadza nokuvhuna zvipfigiso zvaro; mambo waro namachinda aro vari pakati pamarudzi asina murairo. Zvirokwazvo vaporofita varo havana zvavanoratidzwa naJehovha." 
Lamentations2:10 Vakuru vomukunda weZioni vagere pasi, vanoramba vanyerere; vakakushira guruva pamisoro yavo, vakazvisunga zviuno namasaga; mhandara dzeJerusaremu dzakakotamisa misoro yadzo pasi." 
Lamentations2:11 Meso angu apera nemisodzi, mwoyo wangu unotambudzika; chiropa changu chadururirwa pasi, nemhaka yokuparadzwa kwomukunda wavanhu vangu, nokuti vanana navanoyamwa vanoziya munzira dzomuguta." 
Lamentations2:12 Vanoti kuna madzimai avo, “Zviyo newaini zviripiko?” Vachingoziya munzira dzomuguta savakakuvadzwa, mweya yavo ichidururirwa pachipfuva chamadzimai avo." 
Lamentations2:13 Ndichakupupureiko? Ndichakufananidza nei, iwe mukunda weJerusaremu? Ndichakuenzanisa nei, kuti ndikunyaradze, iwe mhandara mukunda weZioni? Nokuti pawakaparadzwa pakakura segungwa, ndiani achakuporesa?" 
Lamentations2:14 Vaporofita vako vakakuonera zviratidzo zvenhema nezvoupenzi; havana kubudisa zvakaipa zvako, kuti vadzose kutapwa kwako, asi vakakuonera zvirevo zvenhema nezvinokutapisa." 
Lamentations2:15 Vose vanopfuura vachaita nondo pamusoro pako, vanoridza muridzo nokudzungudzira mukunda weJerusaremu misoro yavo, vachiti, “Ko ndiro guta rainzi navanhu rakanaka–naka kwazvo, mufaro wenyika yose?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Vavengi vako vose vakakushamisira miromo yavo; vanoridza muridzo nokugeda–geda meno, vanoti, “Tariparadza; zvirokwazvo ndiro zuva ratakanga takatarira; tariwana, tariona.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Jehovha akaita izvo zvaakafunga, akapedzisa shoko rake raakaraira pamazuva akare; akawisira pasi, akasava netsitsi; akafadza muvengi pamusoro pako, akasimudza runyanga rwavadzivisi vako." 
Lamentations2:18 Mwoyo yavo yakadana kuna Ishe. Iwe rusvingo rwomukunda weZioni, misodzi ngaiyerere sorwizi masikati nousiku, usazorora, mboni yeziso rako isarega kuchema." 
Lamentations2:19 Muka, danidzira usiku, pakutanga kwenguva dzose; durura mwoyo wako semvura pamberi paJehovha; simudzira maoko ako kwaari nokuda kwoupenyu hwavana vako, vanoziya nenzara pakuvamba kwenzira imwe neimwe yomuguta." 
Lamentations2:20 Tarirai, Jehovha, muone vamakaitira zvakadai! Ko vakadzi vangadye zvibereko zvavo, ivo vana vari pamaoko here? Ko vapristi navaporofita vangaurawe panzvimbo tsvene yaishe here?" 
Lamentations2:21 Majaya navatana vavete pasi munzira dzomuguta; mhandara dzangu namajaya angu vaurayiwa nomunondo; makavauraya nezuva rokutsamwa kwenyu, makavabaya, hamuna kuvanzwira tsitsi." 
Lamentations2:22 Makadaidza zvinondityisa pamativi ose, sapazuva reungano yakatarwa; hakuna akapukunyuka kana akasara pazuva rokutsamwa kwaJehovha; vandakabata mumaoko navandakarera vapedzwa nomuvengi wangu." 
Lamentations3:1 Ndini munhu akaona kutambudzika neshamhu yokutsamwa kwake. 
Lamentations3:2 Akanditungamirira akandifambisa murima ndisina chiedza. 
Lamentations3:3 Zvirokwazvo anogara achingondiramba zuva rose noruoko rwake. 
Lamentations3:4 Akasakadza nyama yangu neganda rangu, akavhuna mapfupa angu." 
Lamentations3:5 Akandivakira rusvingo kuzorwa neni, Aakandikomberedza nenduru nokurwadziwa." 
Lamentations3:6 Akandigarisa panzvimbo dzine rima, savanhu vakanguva vafa." 
Lamentations3:7 Akandikomberedza norusvingo, kuti ndirege kugona kubuda; akaremesa ngeketani dzangu." 
Lamentations3:8 Zvirokwazvo, kana ndichidana nokuridza mhere, anodzivisa munyengetero wangu." 
Lamentations3:9 Akadzivira nzira dzangu norusvingo rwamabwe akavezwa, akakanganisa nzira dzangu." 
Lamentations3:10 Kwandiri akaita sebere rinovandira, seshumba iri panzvimbo dzisingazikanwi." 
Lamentations3:11 Akatsausa nzira dzangu, akandibvarura–bvarura, akandiita renje." 
Lamentations3:12 Akakunga uta hwake, akandiita chinhu chokuposhera nomuseve." 
Lamentations3:13 Akapinza miseve yegoba rake mutsvo dzangu. 
Lamentations3:14 Ndava chinhu chinosekwa navanhu vangu vose, nechiimbo chavo zuva rose." 
Lamentations3:15 Akandigutisa nezvinovava, akandinwisa gavakava." 
Lamentations3:16 Akapedza meno angu norubwe, akandifukidza namadota." 
Lamentations3:17 Makarashira mweya wangu kure norugare, ndakakanganwa kuti zvakanaka zvakadini." 
Lamentations3:18 Ini ndikati, “Simba rangu rapera, nezvandakanga ndakatarira kuna Jehovha.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Rangarirai kutambudzika kwangu nenhamo yangu, iro gavakava nenduru." 
Lamentations3:20 Mweya wangu uchangozvirangarira nazvino, uri kutambudzika kwazvo." 
Lamentations3:21 Ndinozvifunga izvo, naizvozvo ndine tariro." 
Lamentations3:22 Nokuda kwounyoro hwaJehovha tigere kupedzwa, nokuti tsitsi dzake hadziperi." 
Lamentations3:23 Mangwanani ose zvava zvitsva; kutendeka kwenyu kukuru. 
Lamentations3:24 Jehovha ndiwo mugove wangu, ndizvo zvinotaura mweya wangu; naizvozvo ndichavimba naye." 
Lamentations3:25 Jehovha anoitira zvakanaka vanomumirira, naiwo mweya unomutsvaka." 
Lamentations3:26 Zvakanaka kuti munhu avimbe naJehovha, amirire ruponeso rwaJehovha anyerere," 
Lamentations3:27 zvakanaka kuti munhu atakure joko rake achiri muduku. 
Lamentations3:28 Ngaagare ari oga anyerere, nokuti ndiye akariisa pamusoro pake." 
Lamentations3:29 Ngaaise muromo wake muguruva; zvimwe tariro ichipo. 
Lamentations3:30 Ngaarinzire dama rake kune anomurova, ngaagutiswe nokushorwa." 
Lamentations3:31 Nokuti Ishe haangadzingi nokusingaperi. 
Lamentations3:32 Nokuti kunyangwe akachemedza, achanzwira tsitsi nokuwanda kwengoni dzake" 
Lamentations3:33 Nokuti haatambudzi nomwoyo wake, haachemedzi vana vavanhu." 
Lamentations3:34 Kuti vasungwa vose venyika vatsikwe pasi petsoka," 
Lamentations3:35 kuti zvakarurama zvomunhu zvikanganiswe pamberi poWokumusoro–soro," 
Lamentations3:36 kuti munhu arege kururamisirwa pamhaka yake, Ishe haafari naizvozvo." 
Lamentations3:37 Ndianiko angataura, zvikaitika, kana Ishe asingazvirayiri?" 
Lamentations3:38 Ko zvakaipa nezvakanaka hazvibudi pamuromo woWokumusoro–soro here? 
Lamentations3:39 Ko munhu mupenyu anonyunyutirei, kana iye munhu achirohwa pamusoro pezvivi zvake?" 
Lamentations3:40 Ngatinzvere nokuedza nzira dzedu, titendeukirezve kuna Jehovha." 
Lamentations3:41 Ngatisimudze mwoyo yedu namaoko edu kuna Mwari ari kudenga. 
Lamentations3:42 Takadarika nokumumukira simba; imi hamuna kutikanganwira 
Lamentations3:43 Makazvifukidza nokutsamwa, mukadzingana nesu, makauraya, hamuna kunzwira tsitsi." 
Lamentations3:44 Makazvifukidza negore kuti kurege kuva nomunyengetero ungapindapo. 
Lamentations3:45 Makatiita marara nezvinorashwa pakati pamarudzi avanhu. 
Lamentations3:46 Vavengi vedu vose vakatishamisira miromo yavo. 
Lamentations3:47 Kutya nehunza zvasvika kwatiri nokupedzwa nokuparadzwa. 
Lamentations3:48 Ziso rangu rinoyerera nzizi dzemvura pamusoro pokuparadzwa kwomukunda wavanhu vangu. 
Lamentations3:49 Ziso rangu rinodurura misodzi, hariregi, harigumi," 
Lamentations3:50 kusvikira Jehovha achitarira achiona ari kudenga. 
Lamentations3:51 Ziso rangu rinorwadzisa mweya wangu nemhaka yavakunda vose veguta rangu. 
Lamentations3:52 Vakadzingana neni zvikuru seshiri, ivo, vanondivenga ndisina mhaka." 
Lamentations3:53 Vakaparadza upenyu hwangu mugomba, vakakandira ibwe pamusoro pangu." 
Lamentations3:54 Mvura zhinji yakafukidza musoro wangu; ndakati, “Ndapera.”" 
Lamentations3:55 Ndakadana zita renyu, Jehovha, ndiri mugomba rakadzika kwazvo." 
Lamentations3:56 Makanzwa izwi rangu; regai kundivanzira nzeve yenyu pakufema kwangu nokuchema kwangu. 
Lamentations3:57 Makaswedera nezuva randakadana kwamuri, makati, “Usatya.”" 
Lamentations3:58 Ishe, imi makandireverera mhaka dzomweya wangu, makadzikinura upenyu hwangu." 
Lamentations3:59 Haiwa Jehovha, makaona kusaruramisirwa kwangu, nditongerei mhaka yangu." 
Lamentations3:60 Makaona kutsiva kwavo kwose, namano avo ose pamusoro pangu." 
Lamentations3:61 Makanzwa kushora kwavo, Jehovha, namano avo ose pamusoro pangu," 
Lamentations3:62 iyo miromo yavakandimukira nezvavakandifungira zuva rose. 
Lamentations3:63 Tarirai kugara kwavo pasi nokusimuka kwavo; ndiri chiimbo chavo. 
Lamentations3:64 Imi muchavatsiva, Jehovha, zvakafanira nebasa ramaoko avo." 
Lamentations3:65 Muchavapa kuwoma kwomwoyo, ndiko kutuka kwenyu pamusoro pavo." 
Lamentations3:66 Muchadzingana navo makatsamwa, nokuvaparadza pasi pedenga raJehovha." 
Lamentations4:1 Haiwa, ndarama yasviba sei! Ndarama yakaisvo–naka yashanduka sei! Mabwe enzvimbo tsvene arashirwa pamharadzano dzenzira dzomuguta." 
Lamentations4:2 Vanakomana vanodikanwa veZioni vakafanana nendarama yakaisvo–naka, haiwa vakanzi vakaita sezvirongo zvevhu sei, iro basa romuumbi wehari!" 
Lamentations4:3 Kunyangwe namakava anobudisa mazamu, achiyamwisa vana vawo; mukunda wavanhu vangu wava nehasha semhou murenje." 
Lamentations4:4 Rurimi rwomwana unomwa runonamatira mumukanwa womuromo wake nenyota; vanana vanokumbira chingwa, asi hakuna munhu anovamedurira." 
Lamentations4:5 Avo vaisidya zvinozipa, varaswa munzira dzomuguta; vairerwa vakafuka micheka mitsvuku, zvino votsivama pamaturunhuru." 
Lamentations4:6 Nokuti zvakaipa zvomukunda wavanhu vangu zvinopfuura zvivi zveSodhoma, iro rakaparadzwa kamwe–kamwe kusina maoko akaribata." 
Lamentations4:7 Machinda aro akanga akapfuura chando nokunaka, akanga akachena kupfuura mukaka, akanga akatsvuka pamuviri kupfuura makorari, pakuonekwa akanga akaita sesafaya." 
Lamentations4:8 Zviso zvavo zvasviba kupfuura mazimbe, havazikanwi munzira dzomuguta; ganda ravo rinonamatira mapfupa avo, raoma, rafanana nedanda." 
Lamentations4:9 Vakaurayiwa nomunondo vakaita nani kuna vakaurayiwa nenzara; nokuti ava vaonda, vabayiwa nokushayiwa zvibereko zveminda." 
Lamentations4:10 Maoko avakadzi vaiva nomwoyo munyoro akabika vana vavo, zvikava zvokudya zvavo pakuparadzwa kwomukunda wavanhu vangu." 
Lamentations4:11 Jehovha akaita zvaakanga achida nokutsamwa kwake, akadurura hasha dzake huru; akabatidza moto paZioni, akapedza nheyo dzaro." 
Lamentations4:12 Madzimambo enyika haana kutenda, kunyangwe navose vagere panyika yose, kuti mudzivisi nomuvengi vachapinda pamasuwo eJerusaremu." 
Lamentations4:13 Zvakaitwa nokuda kwezvivi zvavaporofita varo, nezvakaipa zvavapristi varo, vakateura ropa ravakarurama mukati maro." 
Lamentations4:14 Vanodzungaira samapofu munzira dzomuguta, vakasvibiswa neropa, naizvozvo vanhu havagoni kubata nguo dzavo." 
Lamentations4:15 Vakadanidzira kwavari vachiti, “Ibvai, makan'ora! Ibvai, ibvai, regai kutibata!” Panguva yokutiza nokudzungaira kwavo, vanhu vakati pakati pamarudzi; “Havangazogarizve pano vari vatorwa.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakavaparadzira; haachavi nehanya navo; havana kurangarira vapristi, havana kukudza vakuru." 
Lamentations4:17 Meso edu anongopera nazvino achitarira rubatsiro rwedu pasina; pakutarira kwedu takatarira rudzi rusingagoni kutiponesa. 
Lamentations4:18 Vanoronda makwara edu, naizvozvo hatigoni kufamba munzira dzomuguta redu; kuguma kwedu kwava pedyo, mazuva edu asvika, nokuti kuguma kwedu kwasvika." 
Lamentations4:19 Avo vakadzingana nesu, vakamhanyisa kupfuura makondo okudenga; vakadzingana nesu pamakomo, vakatigarira murenje." 
Lamentations4:20 Mweya wemhino dzedu, iye muzodzwa waJehovha, wakabatwa muhunza dzavo; iye watakati, “Pamumvuri wake ndipo patichararama pakati pamarudzi.”" 
Lamentations4:21 Farisisa, uve nomufaro, iwe mukunda weEdhomu, ugere panyika yeUzi; mukombe uchasvika kwauriwo; uchabatwa newaini ukazvifukura." 
Lamentations4:22 Kurohwa kwezvakaipa zvako kwapera, iwe mukunda weZioni; haachazokutapisizve; iye achakurova pamusoro pezvakaipa zvako, iwe mukunda weEdhomu; iye achafukura zvivi zvako." 
Lamentations5:1 Rangarirai Jehovha, zvakatiwira; tarirai, muone kushorwa kwedu." 
Lamentations5:2 Nhaka yedu yaenda kuvatorwa, nedzimba dzedu kune vokumwe." 
Lamentations5:3 Tiri nherera navasina baba; madzimai edu akaita sechirikadzi. 
Lamentations5:4 Takanwa mvura yedu tichiita zvokutenga nemari; huni dzedu takadzitengeserwa. 
Lamentations5:5 Vanodzingana nesu vari pamitsipa yedu; taneta hatine zororo. 
Lamentations5:6 Takatambanudzira ruoko rwedu kuna vaIjipiti, nokuna vaAsiria, kuti tigute zvokudya." 
Lamentations5:7 Madzibaba edu akatadza, zvino havachipo; isu takatakura zvakaipa zvavo." 
Lamentations5:8 Varanda vanotibata ushe, hakuna angatirwira pamaoko avo." 
Lamentations5:9 Tinozviwanira zvokudya zvedu upenyu hwedu huri panjodzi, nemhaka yomunondo uri kurenje." 
Lamentations5:10 Ganda redu rasviba sechoto, nemhaka yokupisa kukuru kwenzara." 
Lamentations5:11 Vakachinyira vakadzi paZioni, nemhandara pamaguta aJudha." 
Lamentations5:12 Machinda akasungirirwa namaoko avo, vakuru havana kukudzwa." 
Lamentations5:13 Majaya akatakura guyo, vana vakagumburwa nokurema kwehuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Vakuru vakarega kusvika pasuwo, majaya akarega kuimba kwavo." 
Lamentations5:15 Mufaro womwoyo wedu waguma; kutamba kwedu kwashanduka kuchema. 
Lamentations5:16 Korona yawa pamisoro yedu; tine nhamo! Nokuti takatadza. 
Lamentations5:17 Nemhaka iyi mwoyo yedu yapera simba; nemhaka yezvinhu izvi meso edu haachaoni zvakanaka; 
Lamentations5:18 nokuda kwegomo reZioni, rava dongo; makava anofambapo." 
Lamentations5:19 Imi Jehovha muripo nokusingaperi; chigaro chenyu choushe chiripo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi. 
Lamentations5:20 Munotikanganwireiko nokusingaperi, munotirasireiko nguva huru yakadai?" 
Lamentations5:21 Tidzoserei kwamuri, Jehovha, ipapo tichadzoka; vandudzai mazuva edu ave sakare." 
Lamentations5:22 Asi makatirasa chose here? Makatitsamwira zvikuru here? 
Ezekiel1:1 Zvino negore ramakumi matatu, nomwedzi wechina, nezuva rechishanu romwedzi, ini ndiri pakati pavakatapwa parwizi rwaKebhari, kudenga kwakazarurwa, ndikaona zvandakaratidzwa zvaMwari." 
Ezekiel1:2 Nezuva rechishanu romwedzi, riri gore rechishanu rokutapwa kwamambo Jehoiakini," 
Ezekiel1:3 shoko raJehovha rakasvika kumupristi Ezekieri, mwanakomana waBhuzi, munyika yavaKaradhia, parwizi rwaKebhari; ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pake ipapo" 
Ezekiel1:4 Ndikatarira, ndikaona dutu remhepo richibva kurutivi rwokumusoro, riri gore guru rino moto wairamba uchipenya, rakakomberedzwa nokubwinya, nomukati maro, imo mukati momoto, mune chinhu chaipenya sedare." 
Ezekiel1:5 Zvino mukati mazvo mukabuda zvakanga zvakaita sezvipenyu zvina. Zvakanga zvakadai: Zvakanga zvakafanana nomunhu; 
Ezekiel1:6 chimwe nechimwe chaiva nezviso zvina, nechimwe nechimwe chazvo chaiva namapapiro mana." 
Ezekiel1:7 Makumbo azvo akanga akarurama, pasi petsoka dzadzo pakanga pakaita sapasi petsoka dzemhuru; dzaipenya sendarira yakabwinyiswa." 
Ezekiel1:8 Zvakanga zvina maoko omunhu pasi pamapapiro azvo kumativi azvo mana; zvose zviri zvina zvakanga zvakadai pazviso zvazvo namapapiro azvo: 
Ezekiel1:9 Mapapiro azvo akanga akabatana; hazvina kutsauka pakufamba kwazvo, asi chimwe nechimwe chairuramira mberi pakufamba kwacho." 
Ezekiel1:10 Kana zviri zviso zvazvo pakuonekwa kwazvo, zvaiva nechiso chomunhu; zvose zviri zvina zvaiva nechiso cheshumba kurutivi rworudyi; zvose zviri zvina zvaiva nechiso chenzombe kurutivi rworuboshwe; zvose zviri zvina zvaiva nechiso chegondowo." 
Ezekiel1:11 Zviso zvazvo namapapiro azvo zvakanga zvakaparadzana kumusoro; mapapiro maviri echimwe nechimwe akanga akabatana, asi maviri akanga akafukidza muviri wazvo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Chimwe nechimwe chairuramira mberi pakufamba kwacho; kwaida kufamba mweya, ndiko kwazvaifamba; hazvina kutsauka pakufamba kwazvo." 
Ezekiel1:13 Kana zviri zvipenyu pakuonekwa kwazvo, zvakanga zvakafanana namazimbe omoto anopfuta, zvakafanana namazhenje; moto wairamba uchifamba pakati pezvipenyu; moto waipenya, nomukati momoto maibuda mheni." 
Ezekiel1:14 Zvipenyu zvaimhanya zvichidzoka, zvakafanana nokupenya kwemheni." 
Ezekiel1:15 Zvino ndakati ndichitarira zvipenyu izvo, ndikaona gumbo rimwe rengoro riri pasi kurutivi rwezvipenyu izvo, kurutivi rumwe norumwe rwezviso zvacho." 
Ezekiel1:16 Makumbo awo pakuonekwa kwawo nomuitirwo wawo zvakanga zvakafanana nebheriri; ose ari mana akanga akafanana; pakuonekwa kwawo napamuitirwo wawo zvakanga zvakaita segumbo rimwe riri mukati merimwe gumbo. 
Ezekiel1:17 Pakufamba kwawo akafamba kumativi awo mana; haana kutsauka pakufamba kwawo. 
Ezekiel1:18 Kana ari makango awo, akanga akakwirira uye achityisa; makango awo mana akanga azere nameso kwose–kwose." 
Ezekiel1:19 Zvino kana zvipenyu zvofamba, makumbo ofambawo parutivi rwazvo, kana zvipenyu zvokwidzwa zvichibva pasi, naiwo makumbo okwidzwawo." 
Ezekiel1:20 Pose–pose kwaida kufamba mweya, ndiko kwazvaifamba, makumbo ndokukwidzwa pamwechete nazvo, nokuti mweya wechipenyu wakanga uri mumakumbo." 
Ezekiel1:21 Kana izvo zvofamba, iwo ofamba; kana izvo zvomira zvichibva pasi, makumbo okwidzwa pamwechete nazvo; nokuti mweya wechipenyu wakanga uri mumakumbo." 
Ezekiel1:22 Kumusoro kwemisoro yezvipenyu kwakanga kune chinhu chakafanana nedenga, rakanga rakaita sekiristaro inotyisa, rakatatamurwa pamusoro pemisoro yazvo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Pasi pedenga mapapiro azvo akanga akarurama, rimwe rakabatana nerimwe; chimwe nechimwe chazvo chakanga china mapapiro maviri aifukidza muviri wacho kurutivi rwowuno, nechimwe nechimwe chaiva namapapiro maviri aifukidza kurutivi rweseri." 
Ezekiel1:24 Zvino kana zvofamba, ndainzwa kuunga kwamapapiro azvo zvichiita sokuunga kwemvura zhinji, sezwi reane simba rose, somubvumo webope wakaita sokutinhira kwehondo; kana zvomira, zvaipeta mapapiro azvo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Kwakanga kunenzwi kumusoro kwedenga raiva pamusoro pemisoro yazvo; kana zvomira, zvaideredza mapapiro azvo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Kumusoro kwedenga rakanga riri pamusoro pemisoro yazvo, kwakanga kune chinhu chakafanana nechigaro chohushe, chaiita sebwe resafiri; pachinhu chakafanana nechigaro chohushe kwakanga kuno mufananidzo womunhu agere pamusoro pacho." 
Ezekiel1:27 Zvino ndakaona zvakaita sedare rinopenya, zvakafanana nomoto mukati mazvo kumativi ose, zvakabva pakaita sechiuno chake zvichikwira kumusoro; zvino kubva ipapo pakaita sechiuno chake zvichienda pasi ndakaona chakaita somoto; iye akanga akakomberedzwa nokubwinya kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel1:28 Sezvakaita murarawungu uri mugore nezuva remvura, ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita kubwinya pakuonekwa kwahwo kumativi ose. Ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita kubwinya kwaJehovha. Zvino ndakati ndichizviona, ndikawira pasi nechiso changu, ndikanzwa izwi romumwe akanga achitaura." 
Ezekiel2:1 Akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, mira namakumbo ako, ini nditaure newe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Zvino akati achitaura neni, Mweya ndokupinda mukati mangu, akandimisa namakumbo angu; ndikanzwa akanga achitaura neni." 
Ezekiel2:3 Iye akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, ndinokutumira kuvana VaIsiraeri, kumarudzi anomukira simba, akandimukira simba ini; ivo namadzibaba avo vakandidarikira, kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Ezekiel2:4 Vana vane zviso zvisina kunyara nemwoyo mikukutu; ndinokutumira kwavari, iwe uti kwavari, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel2:5 ‘Zvino ivo, kana vachida kunzwa, kana vasingadi nokuti ivo imba inondimukira simba, vachaziva kuti muporofita akanga aripo pakati pavo.’" 
Ezekiel2:6 “Asi iwe, mwanakomana womunhu, usavatya ivo, usatya mashoko awo, kunyangwe uri pakati porukato neminzwa, ugere pakati pezvinyavada; usatya mashoko avo, usavhunduswa nezviso zvavo, nokuti ivo imba inondimukira simba." 
Ezekiel2:7 Asi iwe unofanira kuvaudza mashoko angu, kana vachida kunzwa, kana vasingadi; nokuti vanondimukira simba kwazvo." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Asi iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, teerera zvandinokuudza; usandimukira simba, sezvinondimukira imba iyo; shamisa muromo wako udye zvandichakupa.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Zvino ndakati ndichitarira, ndikaona ruoko rwakatambanudzirwa kwandiri; tarira, bhuku yakapetwa yakanga irimo;" 
Ezekiel2:10 akaipetenura pamberi pangu; yakanga yakanyorwa mukati nokunze, makanga makanyorwa mariro, nokuchema, nenhamo." 
Ezekiel3:1 Ipapo akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, chidya chaunowana; chidya rugwaro urwu rwakapetwa uende, undotaura neimba yaIsiraeri.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Ipapo ndakashamisa muromo wangu, iye akandidyisa rugwaro rwakapetwa." 
Ezekiel3:3 Akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, dyisa dumbu rako, ugutise hura hwako norugwaro rwechimononorwa urwu rwandinokupa.” Ipapo ndikarudya, rukava mumukanwa wangu sohuchi nokuzipa." 
Ezekiel3:4 Zvino akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, famba uende kuimba yaIsiraeri, utaure kwavari mashoko angu." 
Ezekiel3:5 “Nokuti hautumwi kurudzi runo mutauriro usingazikanwi norurimi rwakaoma, asi kuimba yaIsiraeri;" 
Ezekiel3:6 hautumwi kumarudzi mazhinji ano mutauriro usingazikanwi norurimi rwakaoma, vausingagoni kunzwisisa mashoko avo. Zvirokwazvo, dai ndaikutuma kwavari vangadai vaikunzwa." 
Ezekiel3:7 Asi imba yaIsiraeri icharamba kukunzwa, nokuti havadi kundinzwa ini, nokuti imba yose yaIsiraeri vane huma dzakaoma, nomwoyo mikukutu." 
Ezekiel3:8 Tarira, ndinoomesa chiso chako sezvakaita zviso zvavo, nehuma yako sezvakaita huma dzavo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Ndakaomesa huma yako sedhaimani rinokunda musarasara; usavatya, usavhunduswa nezviso zvavo, nokuti ivo iimba inondimukira simba.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Akatiwo kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, mashoko angu ose andichataura kwauri, uagamuchire mumwoyo mako, uanzwe nenzeve dzako." 
Ezekiel3:11 Famba uende kuna vari mukutapwa, kuvana vavanhu vako, utaure navo uvaudze uti, ‘Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, kana vachida kunzwa, kana vasingadi.’ ”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Ipapo Mweya akandisimudza, ndikanzwa shure kwangu mubvumo wokuunga kukuru, zvichiti, “Kubwinya kwaJehovha ngakurumbidzwe panzvimbo yake.”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Ndikanzwa mubvumo wamapapiro ezvipenyu, achigunzvana, nomubvumo wamakumbo engoro kumativi azvo, uri mubvumo wokuunga kukuru." 
Ezekiel3:14 Ipapo Mweya wakandisimudza, ndokundibvisapo; ndikaenda ndine shungu, mweya wangu wakatsamwa; ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu nesimba." 
Ezekiel3:15 Zvino ndakasvika kuna vaiva mukutapwa paTeriabhibhi, vakanga vagere parwizi rwaKebhari, ipapo pavakanga vagere; ini ndikagarapo pakati pavo mazuva manomwe ndichishayiwa mashoko." 
Ezekiel3:16 Zvino mazuva manomwe akati apera, shoko raJehovha rikasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ndakakuita nharirire yeimba yaIsiraeri; naizvozvo chinzwa shoko rinobva mumuromo mangu, uvanyevere panzvimbo yangu." 
Ezekiel3:18 “Kana ini ndikati kuno akaipa, ‘Zvirokwazvo uchafa,’ iwe ukasamunyevera, kana kutaura zvinonyevera akaipa panzira yake yakaipa, kuti aponese upenyu hwake, munhu uyu akaipa achafira muzvakaipa zvake, asi ropa rake ndicharibvunza paruoko rwako." 
Ezekiel3:19 Asi kana iwe ukanyevera akaipa, akasatendeuka pazvakaipa zvake, kana panzira yake yakaipa, iye achafira muzvakaipa zvake, asi iwe waponesa hako mweya wako." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Uyezve, kana munhu akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, ini ndikaisa chigumbuso pamberi pake, achafa; zvausina kumunyevera, achafira muzvivi zvake; zvakarurama zvaakaita hazvingarangarirwi, asi ropa rake ndicharibvunza paruoko rwako." 
Ezekiel3:21 “Asi kana ukanyevera munhu akarurama, kuti akarurama arege kutadza, iye akasatadza, zvirokwazvo achararama, nokuti wakateerera kunyeverwa, newe waponesa mweya wako.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu ipapo, akati kwandiri, “Simuka, uende kubani, ndichataura newe ipapo.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Zvino ndakasimuka, ndikaenda kubani, ndikaona kubwinya kwaJehovha kumirepo, kwakafanana nokubwinya kwandakaona parwizi rwaKebhari; ndikawira pasi nechiso changu." 
Ezekiel3:24 Ipapo Mweya akapinda mandiri, akandimisa namakumbo angu, akataura neni, akati kwandiri, “Enda, undozvipfigira mumba mako." 
Ezekiel3:25 Asi iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira, vachauya nezvisungo kwauri, vachakusunga nazvo, kuti urege kubudira pakati pavo;" 
Ezekiel3:26 ini ndichanamatirisa rurimi rwako mumukanwa wako, kuti uve mbeveve, urege kuva murayiri wavo; nokuti ivo iimba inondimukira simba." 
Ezekiel3:27 Asi kana ndichitaura newe, ndichashamisa muromo wako, iwe ugoti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, anonzwa ngaanzwe, anoramba, ngaarambe; nokuti ivo iimba inondimukira simba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel4:1 “Zvino iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, tora chidhinha uchigadzike pamberi pako, ufananidzirepo guta, iro reJerusaremu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Zvino urikombe nehondo, urivakire nhare dzokurwa naro, uritutire murwi wokurwa nawo; uriisire misasa, nokurikomberedza kumativi ose nezvokugumura kuriputsa." 
Ezekiel4:3 Zvino utore gango redare, urigadze pakati pako neguta, ruve rusvingo rwedare; zvino urinzire chiso chako kwariri, ipapo richava guta rakakombwa nehondo, iwe ndiwe ucharikomba. Ichi chichava chiratidzo kuimba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Uyezve, uvate pasi parutivi rwako rworuboshwe, uise pamusoro parwo zvakaipa zveimba yaIsiraeri; mazuva aunovata parutivi urwo ndiyo nguva yauchatakura zvakaipa zvavo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Nokuti ndakatara makore ezvakaipa zvawo aenzane namazuva ako, mazuva ana mazana matatu namakumi mapfumbamwe; saizvozvo uchatakura zvakaipa zveimba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel4:6 Zvino kana wapedza mazuva awa, uvate pasi norutivi rwako rworudyi, kuti utakure zvakaipa zveimba yaJudha; ndakakutarira mazuva ana makumi mana, zuva rimwe nerimwe rifananidze gore." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Urinzire chiso chako wakatarira kukombwa kweJerusaremu ruoko rwako rwakafukurwa; ugoporofita pamusoro paro. 
Ezekiel4:8 “Tarira, ndinokusunga nezvisungo, urege kutendeukira kuno rumwe rutivi, kusvikira wapedza mazuva okukomba kwako." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Zvino utorewo zviyo nebhari nenyimo nenyemba namapfunde neema uzviise mumudziyo mumwe, ugozviitira chingwa nazvo; unofanira kuchidya mazuva aunovata pasi parutivi rwako, iwo mazuva ana mazana matatu namakumi mapfumbamwe." 
Ezekiel4:10 Zvokudya zvako zvaunofanira kudya, zvichayerwa kurema kwazvo, mashekeri ana makumi maviri nezuva rimwe nerimwe; uchazvidya nguva nenguva." 
Ezekiel4:11 Unofanira kunwawo mvura yakayerwa, chechitanhatu chehini; uchainwa nguva nenguva." 
Ezekiel4:12 Unofanira kuzvidya zvakafanana nezvingwa zvebhari, unofanira kuzvibika pamberi pavo nendove inobudiswa navanhu.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Jehovha akati, “Saizvozvo vana VaIsiraeri vachadya zvokudya zvavo zvakan'ora pakati pamarudzi kwandichavadzingira.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Ipapo ndikati, “Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha! Tarirai mweya wangu hauna kumbosvibiswa; nokuti kubva pauduku hwangu kusvikira zvino, handina kumbodya chakafa choga, kana chakaurayiwa nezvikara, nenyama yakan'ora haina kumbopinda mumuromo mangu.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Ipapo akati kwandiri, “Tarira, ndakupa ndove yemombe panzvimbo yendove yavanhu, unofanira kugadzira zvokudya zvako nayo.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Akatiwo kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira ndichavhuna mudonzvo wezvokudya paJerusaremu; vachadya zvokudya zvakayerwa vachitya, vachanwa mvura yakayerwa, vachivhunduka;" 
Ezekiel4:17 kuti vashayiwe zvokudya nemvura, vavhunduke mumwe nomumwe, vapere muzvakaipa zvavo.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 “Zvino iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, tora munondo unopinza; uutore chive chisvo kwauri, ugoveura nawo musoro wako nendebvu dzako, ipapo utore chiyero chokuyera nacho, ndokukamura vhudzi." 
Ezekiel5:2 Zvino chetatu charo upise nomoto pakati peguta, kana mazuva okukombwa kwaro apera; utorewo chimwe chetatu, ugotema nomunondo kumativi aro ose; uye chetatu uparadzire kumhepo, ipapo ini ndichavhomora munondo shure kwavo." 
Ezekiel5:3 Zvino utorewo rimwe shomanene, urisungire munguo dzako." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ipapo utorezve rimwe raro, urikandire mumoto, uchiripisa mumoto; ipapo pachabudira moto kuimba yose yaIsiraeri.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Iri ndiro Jerusaremu ndakariisa pakati pamarudzi, rakapoteredzwa nedzimwe nyika kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel5:6 Asi rakaramba mitemo yangu richiita zvakaipa kupfuura mamwe marudzi, nokuramba zvandakarayira kupfuura dzimwe nyika dzakaripoteredza; nokuti ivo vakaramba mitemo yangu, nezvandakarayira havana kufamba mazviri." 
Ezekiel5:7 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Zvamune hasha kupfuura marudzi akakukomberedzai, mukasafamba mune zvandakarayira nokusachengeta mitemo yangu, kunyangwe kuita nemitemo yamarudzi akakupoteredzai;’" 
Ezekiel5:8 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, ini, iyeni, ndine mhaka nemi, ndichaita zvandakatonga pakati penyu mamwe marudzi achizviona." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ndichaita pakati penyu zvandisina kumboita, uye handingatongoitizve zvakadai, nemhaka yezvinonyangadza zvenyu zvose.’" 
Ezekiel5:10 Naizvozvo madzibaba achadya vanakomana vavo mukati mako, navanakomana vachadya madzibaba avo; ndichakuitira zvandakatonga, ndichaparadzira vakasara vako kumhepo dzose." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Saka noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha zvirokwazvo, zvawakasvibisa nzvimbo yangu tsvene nezvose zvako zvinosemesa nezvose zvako zvinonyangadza, saka neni ndichabva kwamuri, ziso rangu haringakupembedzi, handingavi netsitsiwo." 
Ezekiel5:12 Chetatu chako chichafa nechirwere chakaipa, uye vachapedzwa nenzara mukati mako; chetatu chichaparadzwa nomunondo kumativi ako, nechimwe chikamu chetatu ndichachiparadzira kumhepo dzose, nokuvhomora munondo shure kwavo." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Saizvozvo kutsamwa kwangu kuchapera, nehasha dzangu kwavari ndichadzigumisa, ndikanyaradzwa; vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakataura nokushingayira kwangu, kana ndapedza hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ndichakuita dongo nechinhu chinoshorwa pakati pamarudzi anokupoteredza, zvichionekwa navose vanopfuura napo." 
Ezekiel5:15 “Saizvozvo chichava chinhu chinoshorwa nechinosekwa, chinonyevera nechinoshamisa, kumarudzi ose anokupoteredza, kana ndichikuitira zvandakatonga ndakatsamwa, ndiine hasha, ndichikutukai nehasha; ini Jehovha, ndini ndakataura izvozvo;" 
Ezekiel5:16 kana ndichituma pamusoro pavo miseve yakaipa yenzara, ine basa rokuparadza, yandichatuma kuti ikuparadzeyi. Ndichawedzera nzara pamusoro penyu, nokuvhuna mudonzvo wenyu wezvokudya." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ndichatuma pamusoro penyu nzara nezvikara zvakaipa zvichakutorerai vana; chirwere chakaipa neropa zvichapfuura napakati pako; ndichauyisa munondo pamusoro pako. Ini Jehovha, ndini ndakataura izvozvo.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kumakomo aIsiraeri, uporofite pamusoro pawo," 
Ezekiel6:3 uti, ‘Imi makomo aVaIsiraeri, inzwai shoko raIshe Jehovha, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kumakomo nokuzvikomo, kumipata nokumapani, tarirai, ini, iyeni, ndichauyisa munondo pamusoro penyu, ndichaparadza nzvimbo dzenyu dzakakwirira." 
Ezekiel6:4 Maatari enyu achaitwa matongo, nezvifananidzo zvenyu nezuva zvichakoromorwa; vanhu venyu, vakaurayiwa, ndichavawisira pasi pamberi pezvifananidzo zvenyu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndicharadzika zvitunha zvavana VaIsiraeri pamberi pezvifananidzo zvavo; ndichaparadzira mapfupa enyu pamativi ose amaatari enyu.’ 
Ezekiel6:6 “Pose pamugere maguta achaparadzwa, nenzvimbo dzakakwirira dzichaitwa matongo, kuti maatari enyu aparadzwe aitwe matongo, nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvikoromorwe zvigume, nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvezuva zvitemwe, nezvamakabata zvose zviparadzwe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Vakaurayiwa vachawira pasi pakati penyu, nemi muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndichachengeta vakasara, nokuti vamwe venyu vachavapo vachapukunyuka pamunondo pakati pamarudzi kana muchiparadzirwa kunyika dzose." 
Ezekiel6:9 Zvino vakapukunyuka pakati penyu vachandirangarira pakati pamarudzi, kwavachatapirwa, kana ndaputsa mwoyo yavo yokufeva, yakandirasa, nameso avo aipata achitevera zvifananidzo zvavo; vachazvisema ivo vomene pamusoro pezvakaipa zvavakaita pazvinyangadzo zvavo zvose." 
Ezekiel6:10 Zvino ivo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha; handina kureva pasina kuti ndichavaitira zvakaipa izvozvo.” 
Ezekiel6:11 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Rova noruoko rwako, tsikisa pasi norutsoka rwako, uti, ‘Maiwe!’ Nokuda kwezvinonyangadza zvakaipa zvose zveimba yaIsiraeri; nokuti vachaurayiwa nomunondo nenzara nechirwere chakaipa." 
Ezekiel6:12 Ari kure achafa nechirwere chakaipa, ari pedyo achaurayiwa nomunondo, akasara akachengetwa achafa nenzara; saizvozvo ndichapedza hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Imi muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana vanhu vavo, vakaurayiwa, vari pakati pezvifananidzo zvavo vakakomberedza maatari avo, pachikomo chimwe nechimwe chakakwirira, napamusoro pemisoro yose yamakomo, napasi pomuti pomuoki mumwe nomumwe mukobvu, ipo panzvimbo dzose pavaipisira zvifananidzo zvavo zvose zvinonhuwira zvakanaka." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pavo, nyika ndichaiita dongo nokuiparadza, kubva parenje kusvikira Dhibhira, pose pavanogara; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kunyika yaIsiraeri, ‘Kuguma, kuguma kwasvika pamakona mana enyika.’" 
Ezekiel7:3 “Zvino kuguma kwasvika kwauri, ini ndichatuma kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pako, ndichakutonga zvakafanira nzira dzako; ndichauyisa pamusoro pako zvinonyangadza zvako zvose." 
Ezekiel7:4 Ziso rangu haringakupembedzi, handingavi netsitsiwo; asi ndichauyisa nzira dzako pamusoro pako, nezvinonyangadza zvako zvichava pakati pako; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel7:5 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Njodzi, njodzi imwechete, tarirai, inouya.’" 
Ezekiel7:6 Kuguma kwasvika, kuguma kwasvika; kunokumukira mangwanani; tarirai, kwasvika." 
Ezekiel7:7 “Dzoro rako rasvika, iwe ugere panyika; nguva yasvika, zuva rava pedyo, zuva rebope, risati riri rokupururudza pamusoro pamakomo." 
Ezekiel7:8 “Zvino ndobva ndodururira hasha dzangu pamusoro pako, ndichapedza kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pako, nokukutonga zvakafanira nzira dzako; ndichauyisa zvinonyangadza zvako zvose pamusoro pako." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ziso rangu haringapembedzi, handingavi netsitsiwo; ndichauyisa pamusoro pako zvakafanira nzira dzako; zvinonyangadza zvako zvichava pakati pako; zvino muchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndinorova.”" 
Ezekiel7:10 Tarirai zuva, tarirai rosvika; dzoro rako rabuda; shamhu yatumbuka, kuzvikudza kwabukira." 
Ezekiel7:11 Kuita nesimba kwamuka, kwaita shamhu yezvakashata; hakuna chichasara kwavari, kana pavanhu vavo vazhinji, kana papfuma yavo; hakungavi nechinhu chakanaka pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel7:12 Nguva yasvika, zuva rava pedyo; mutengi ngaarege kufara, mutengesi ngaarege kuchema; nokuti kutsamwa kuri pamusoro pavanhu vose venyika." 
Ezekiel7:13 Nokuti mutengesi haangadzokeri kune chakatengeswa, kunyangwe vachiri vapenyu; nokuti zvakaonekwa pamusoro pavazhinji vose venyika hazvingadzoswi; hakuna angazvisimbisa nezvakaipa zviri pamugariro wake." 
Ezekiel7:14 Vakaridza hwamanda, vakagadzira zvose asi hakuna anoenda kundorwa; nokuti kutsamwa kwangu kuri pamusoro pavazhinji vose venyika." 
Ezekiel7:15 Munondo uri kunze, chirwere chakaipa nenzara zviri mukati; ari kusango achaurayiwa nomunondo; ari muguta achaparadzwa nenzara nechirwere chakaipa." 
Ezekiel7:16 Asi vanopukunyuka pakati pavo vachapukunyuka; vachava pamakomo senjiva dzemipata, vachichema vose, mumwe nomumwe pamusoro pezvakaipa zvake." 
Ezekiel7:17 Maoko ose achashayiwa simba, mabvi ose achati rukutu semvura." 
Ezekiel7:18 Vachazvisunga zviuno namasaga, vachafukidzwa nokutya kukuru, kunyara kuchava pazviso zvose, nemhanza pamisoro yavo yose." 
Ezekiel7:19 Vacharasha sirivha yavo panzira dzomumusha, nendarama yavo ichava sechinhu chisina kunaka; sirivha yavo nendarama yavo hazvingagoni kuvarwira nezuva rokutsamwa kwaJehovha; hazvingagutisi mweya yavo kana kuzadza hura hwavo, nokuti ndicho chaiva chigumbuso chezvakaipa zvavo."
