Ezekiel7:20 Kana huri ukomba hwavo hwakanaka, vakaita manyawi nazvo; asi vakaita nazvo zvifananidzo zvezvinonyangadza zvavo nezvezvinosemesa zvavo; naizvozvo ndichachiita kwavari sechinhu chisina kunaka." 
Ezekiel7:21 “Ndichachiisa mumaoko avatorwa chive chinhu chakapambwa, ivo vachachisvibisa.”" 
Ezekiel7:22 “Ndicharambawo kuvatarira nechiso changu, vachasvibisa pfuma yangu; mbavha dzichapindamo, dzichiisvibisa." 
Ezekiel7:23 Itai ngetani, nokuti nyika izere nemhaka dzeropa, guta rizere nokuita nesimba." 
Ezekiel7:24 “Naizvozvo ndichauyisa marudzi akanyanya kuipa kwazvo, ivo vachatora dzimba dzavo; ndichagumisawo manyawi avane simba, nenzvimbo dzavo tsvene dzichasvibiswa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Njodzi inouya; vachatsvaka rugare, asi harungavipo." 
Ezekiel7:26 “Njodzi ichateverwa nenjodzi, guhu richateverwa neguhu; vachandotsvaka kumuporofita zvaakaona, asi murairo uchanyangarikira mupristi, namano achashaikwa kuvakuru." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mambo achachema, muchinda achafuka kuparadza, namaoko avanhu venyika achakanganiswa; ndichavaitira zvakafanira nzira dzavo, ndichavatonga sezvavakafanira; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Zvino negore rechitanhatu, nomwedzi wechitanhatu, nezuwa reshanu romwedzi, ini ndigere mumba mangu, navakuru vaJudha vagere pamberi pangu, ruoko rwaIshe Jehovha ndokuwira pamusoro pangu." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ipapo ndikatarira ndikaona mufananidzo unenge somoto; kubva pakaita sechiuno chake zvichienda pasi, kwakanga kunomoto, kubva pachiuno chake zvichikwira kumusoro zvinenge kubwinya, sedare rinopenya." 
Ezekiel8:3 Akatambanudza zvakanga zvakaita soruoko, akandibata nezhumu romusoro wangu, Mweya akandisimudza pakati pedenga nenyika, ndokundiisa paJerusaremu ndichiratidzwa zviratidzo naMwari, kumukova wesuwo roruvanze rwomukati unotarira kurutivi rwokumusoro, pakanga pane chigaro chechifananidzo chegodo, chinomutsa godo." 
Ezekiel8:4 Zvino tarira, kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakanga kuripo, zvakafanana nezvandakaona mubani." 
Ezekiel8:5 Ipapo akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza meso ako kurutivi rwokumusoro.” Ipapo ndakaringira meso angu kurutivi rwokumusoro, ndikaona kurutivi rwokumusoro rwesuwo reatari chifananidzo ichi chegodo chimire panopindwa napo." 
Ezekiel8:6 Akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, unoona zvavanoita here? Izvo zvinonyangadza zvikuru zvinoitwa pano neimba yaIsiraeri, kuti ini ndibve ndiende kure nenzvimbo yangu tsvene here? Asi uchaonazve zvimwe zvinonyangadza zvikuru.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Akandiisa kumukova woruvanze; zvino ndakati ndichitarira, ndikaona pakakoromoka parusvingo." 
Ezekiel8:8 Zvino akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, chera zvino parusvingo;” zvino ndakati ndachera parusvingo, ndikaona mukova." 
Ezekiel8:9 Akati kwandiri, “Pinda, undoona zvinonyangadza zvakashata zvavanoita pano.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Ipapo ndakapinda, ndikaona; tarira, mifananidzo yamarudzi ose ezvinokambaira pasi, nemhuka dzinonyangadza, nezvifananidzo zvose zveimba yaIsiraeri zvakafananidzwa parusvingo kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel8:11 Pamberi pazvo pakanga pamire varume vana makumi manomwe vavakuru veimba yaIsiraeri; pakati pavo pakanga pamire Jaazania mwanakomana waShafani, mumwe nomumwe akabata hadyana yake yezvinonhuwira muruoko rwake; munhuwi wegore rezvinonhuwira ukaramba uchikwira." 
Ezekiel8:12 Ipapo akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, waona here zvinoitwa navakuru veimba yaIsiraeri murima, mumwe nomumwe mukamuri yake yemifananidzo? Nokuti vanoti, ‘Jehovha haationi; Jehovha akabva panyika ino.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Akatiwo kwandiri, “Uchaonazve zvimwe zvinonyangadza zvikuru zvavanoita.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Ipapo akandiisa kumukova wesuwo reimba yaJehovha rakanga riri kurutivi rwokumusoro; ndikaona vakadzi vagerepo vachichema Tamuzi. 
Ezekiel8:15 Zvino akati kwandiri, “Wazviona here, iwe Mwanakomana womunhu? Uchaona zvimwe zvinonyangadza zvinopfuura izvo.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Ipapo akandiisa muruvanze rwomukati rweimba yaJehovha; tarira, pamukova wetemberi yaJehovha pakati pebiravira neatari, kwakanga kuna varume vanenge makumi maviri navashanu, vakafuratira temberi yaJehovha, zviso zvavo zvakaringira kurutivi rwamabvazuva; vakanga vachinamata zuva kurutivi rwamabvazuva." 
Ezekiel8:17 Zvino akati kwandiri, “Wazviona here, iwe Mwanakomana womunhu? Chinhu chiduku here kuimba yaJudha, kuti vaite zvinonyangadza zvavanoita pano? Nokuti vakazadza nyika nokuita nesimba, vakadzoka vomutsa kutsamwa kwangu; tarira vanoisa davi kumhino dzavo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Naizvozvo neniwo ndichaita nehasha; ziso rangu haringapembedzi, handingavi netsitsi; kunyangwe vakadanidzira munzeve dzangu nezwi guru, handingavanzwi.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Ipapo akadanidzira munzeve dzangu nezwi guru, achiti, “Swededzai vatariri veguta, mumwe nomumwe ane nhumbi yake yokuparadza muruoko rwake.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Zvino tarira, varume vatanhatu vakabva nenzira yesuwo rokumusoro, riri kurutivi rwokumusoro, mumwe nomumwe ane zvombo zvake muruoko rwake, nomumwe murume pakati pavo akafuka mucheka werineni, ano runyanga rweingi rwomunyori pachiuno chake. Vakapinda, vakandomira parutivi rweatari yendarira." 
Ezekiel9:3 Zvino kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakanga kwakwira kuchibva pakerubhi, pakwakanga kuri, kukasvika kuchikumbaridzo cheimba; akadana murume akanga akafuka mucheka werineni, akanga ano runyanga rweingi rwomunyori pachiuno chake." 
Ezekiel9:4 Jehovha akati kwaari, “Pfuura napakati peguta, napakati peJerusaremu, uise chiratidzo pahuma dzavanhu vanogomera nokuchema pamusoro pezvinonyangadza zvose zvinoita mukati maro.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Asi kuna vamwe wakati, ini ndichizvinzwa, “Pfuurai nomuguta muchimutevera, muuraye; ziso renyu ngarirege kupembedza, musava netsitsi;" 
Ezekiel9:6 urayai vose vatana namajaya nemhandara navanana navakadzi; asi regai kuswedera kuno mumwe ane chiratidzo; mutange panzvimbo yangu tsvene.” Ipapo vakatanga navatana vakanga vari pamberi peimba. 
Ezekiel9:7 Akati kwavari, “Svibisai imba, muzadze mavanze navakaurayiwa; chibudai.” Vakabuda, vakauraya muguta." 
Ezekiel9:8 Zvino vakati vachiuraya, ini ndasiyiwa ndiri ndoga, ndikawira pasi nechiso changu, ndikachema, ndichiti, “Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha! Ko munoparadza vose vakasara VaIsiraeri pakudurura kwenyu hasha dzenyu pamusoro peJerusaremu here?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Ipapo akati kwandiri, “Zvakaipa zveimba yaIsiraeri naJudha zvakakura kwazvo, nyika izere neropa, neguta rizere nezvisakarurama; nokuti vanoti, ‘Jehovha akabva panyika, Jehovha haaoni." 
Ezekiel9:10 Neni, kana ndirini, ziso rangu haringapembedzi, handingavi netsitsi, asi ndichauyisa zvavakaita pamisoro yavo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Zvino tarira, murume akanga akafuka mucheka werineni, akanga ano runyanga rweingi pachiuno chake, akadzoka neshoko, akati, “Ndaita sezvamakandirayira.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Zvino ndakatarira, ndikaona padenga rakanga riri pamusoro pemisoro yamakerubhi chinhu chakaonekwa pamusoro pawo chakaita sebwe resafire, chakanga chakafanana nechigaro choushe." 
Ezekiel10:2 Akataura nomunhu akanga akafuka mucheka werineni, akati, “Pinda pakati pamakumbo anomonereka, imo munyasi mekerubhi, uzadze maoko ako ose namazimbe anobva pakati pamakerubhi, uakushe pamusoro peguta.” Iye akapinda, ini ndichizviona." 
Ezekiel10:3 Zvino makerubhi akanga amire parutivi rworudyi rweimba, panguva yokupinda kwomurume uyu; gore rikazadza ruvanze rwomukati." 
Ezekiel10:4 Kubwinya kwaJehovha kukakwira kuchibva pakerubhi, kukamira pamusoro pechikumbaridzo cheimba, imba ikazadzwa negore, noruvanze rwakazarawo nokupenya kwokubwinya kwaJehovha." 
Ezekiel10:5 Mubvumo wamapapiro amakerubhi wakanzwika kusvikira kuruvanze rwokunze, sezwi raMwari waMasimbaose, kana achitaura." 
Ezekiel10:6 Zvino akati araira murume akanga akafuka mucheka werineni, achiti, “Tora moto pakati pamakumbo anomonereka, pakati pamakerubhi,” akapinda, akandomira parutivi rwerimwe gumbo." 
Ezekiel10:7 Kerubhi rikatambanudzira ruoko rwaro ruchibuda napakati pamakerubhi kumoto wakanga uri pakati pamakerubhi, rikatorapo moto ndokuuisa muruoko rwoakanga akafuka mucheka werineni, iye ndokuutora ndokubuda." 
Ezekiel10:8 Zvino mukati mamakerubhi makaonekwa chakafanana noruoko rwomunhu pasi pamapapiro awo. 
Ezekiel10:9 Zvino ndakatarira, ndikaona makumbo mana engoro pamativi amakerubhi, rimwe gumbo kurutivi rwekerubhi rimwe, nerimwe gumbo kurutivi rwerimwe kerubhi; pakuonekwa kwawo makumbo akanga akaita sebwe rebheriri." 
Ezekiel10:10 Pakuonekwa kwawo ose ari mana akanga akafanana, zvakaita segumbo rimwe rengoro mukati merimwe gumbo rengoro." 
Ezekiel10:11 Pakufamba kwawo akafamba kumativi awo mana; haana kutsauka pakufamba kwawo, asi kwakanga kwakatarira musoro ndiko kwaakaenda; haana kutsauka pakufamba kwawo." 
Ezekiel10:12 Muviri wawo wose, nemisana yawo, namaoko awo, namapapiro awo, namakumbo engoro, zvakanga zvizere nameso kumativi ose, pamakumbo awo ose ari mana." 
Ezekiel10:13 Kana ari makumbo, ndakanzwa achitumidzwa zvinomonereka." 
Ezekiel10:14 Rimwe nerimwe rakanga rine zviso zvina; chiso chokutanga chakanga chiri chiso chekerubhi, chiso chechipiri chakanga chiri chiso chomunhu, chechitatu chiso cheshumba, nechechina chiso chegondo." 
Ezekiel10:15 Zvino makerubhi ndokubhururuka achikwira; ndicho chipenyu chandakaona parwizi Kebhari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Zvino kana makerubhi ofamba, makumbo engoro ofamba kurutivi rwawo; kana makerubhi achinge osimudza mapapiro awo achida kubhururuka achibva panyika, namakumbo awowo haana kubva kurutivi rwawo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Kana omira naiwo omirawo; kana obhururuka achikwira naiwo obhururukawo achikwira nawo; nokuti mweya wechipenyu wakanga uri mukati mawo. 
Ezekiel10:18 Ipapo kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakabuda pachikumbaridzo cheimba, ndokumira pamusoro pamakerubhi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Makerubhi ndokusimudza mapapiro awo, ndokubhururuka achibva panyika, ini ndichiaona achibuda, anamakumbo engoro pamativi awo; akamira pamukova wesuwo rokumabvazuva reimba yaJehovha; kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakanga kuri nechokumusoro kwawo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ndicho chipenyu chandakaona panyasi paMwari waIsiraeri parwizi rwaKebhari; ndikaziva kuti makerubhi. 
Ezekiel10:21 Rimwe nerimwe rakanga rine zviso zvina, nerimwe nerimwe rakanga rina mapapiro mana; pasi pamapapiro awo pakanga pane zvakafanana namaoko omunhu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Kana zviri zviso zvavo pakuonekwa kwazvo, zvakanga zviri zviso zviya zvandakaona parwizi rwaKebhari, pakuonekwa kwazvo naizvo zvimene; rimwe nerimwe rairuramira mberi pakufamba kwaro." 
Ezekiel11:1 Zvino Mweya wakandisimudza, ndokundiisa kusuwo ramabvazuva reimba yaJehovha, raitarira kumabvazuva; ndikaona pamukova wesuwo varumwe vana makumi maviri navashanu, ndikaona pakati pavo Jaazania mwanakomana waAzuri, naPeratia mwanakomana waBhenaia, machinda avanhu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, ava ndivo varume vanofunga zvakaipa, vanorayirira mano akaipa muguta rino;" 
Ezekiel11:3 vanoti, ‘Nguva ichigere kuswedera yokuvaka dzimba, guta igate, isu tiri nyama.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 “Naizvozvo chivaporofitera, Mwanakomana womunhu, chiporofita.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Ipapo Mweya waJehovha akawira pamusoro pangu, akati kwandiri, “Taura, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, ndizvo zvamakataura, imi imba yaIsiraeri; nokuti ndinoziva zvamunofunga mundangariro dzenyu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Makawanza vamakauraya muguta rino, makazadza nzira dzaro navakaurayiwa.’" 
Ezekiel11:7 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Vamakauraya, vamakaradzika mukati maro, ndiyo nyama, guta rino igate, asi imi muchabudiswa mukati maro." 
Ezekiel11:8 Makatya munondo; ini ndichauyisa munondo pamusoro penyu,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ini ndichakubudisai mukati maro, ndichakuisai mumaoko avatorwa, ndichaita zvandakatonga pakati penyu." 
Ezekiel11:10 “Muchaurayiwa nomunondo; ndichakutongai munyika yaIsiraeri, zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel11:11 Guta rino haringavi gate renyu, nemi hamungavi nyama mukati maro; ndichakutongai munyika yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel11:12 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, nokuti hamuna kufamba nemitemo yangu kana kuita zvandakarayira, asi makatevera mirairo yamarudzi anokupoteredzai.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Zvino ndakati ndichiporofita, Peratia mwanakomana waBhenaia akafa. Ipapo ndakawira pasi nechiso changu, ndikachema nezwi guru ndichiti, “Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha! Moda kupedza chose vakasara VaIsiraeri here?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Mwanakomana womunhu, hama dzako, idzo hama dzako, vanhu vorudzi rwako, neimba yose yaIsiraeri, ivo vose, ndivo vakanzi navagere Jerusaremu, ‘Ibvai kure naJehovha, nyika ino yakapiwesu, ive yedu.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 “Naizvozvo uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, zvandakavabvisa, ndikavaisa kure pakati pamarudzi, uye zvandakavaparadzira pakati penyika, ndichava kwavari nzvimbo tsvene nguva duku kunyika idzo kwavakaenda kwadziri;’" 
Ezekiel11:17 naizvozvo uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ndichakuunganidzai mubve pakati pamarudzi, ndichakukokerai mubve panyika kwamakaparadzirwa, ndigokupai nyika yaIsiraeri.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 “Vachadzokerako nokubvisamo zvose zvayo zvinosemesa nezvose zvayo zvinonyangadza. 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndichavapa mwoyo mumwe, nokuisa mweya mutsva mukati menyu; ndichabvisa mwoyo webwe munyama yavo, ndokuvapa mwoyo wenyama;" 
Ezekiel11:20 kuti vafambe nemitemo yangu, vachengete zvandakarayira nokuzviita; ivo vachava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wavo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Asi kana vari ivo, vane mwoyo inotevera mwoyo yezvinhu zvavo zvinosemesa nezvinonyangadza, ndichauyisa zvavakaita pamisoro yavo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel11:22 Ipapo makerubhi akasimudza mapapiro awo, namakumbo engoro akanga ari pamativi awo; kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakanga kuri nechokumusoro kwavo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Kubwinya kwaJehovha ndokukwira kuchibva mukati meguta, ndokumira pamusoro pegomo riri kumabvazuva eguta." 
Ezekiel11:24 Ipapo Mweya wakandisimudza ndokundiisa Karadhia kuna vakatapwa, ndichizvioneswa noMweya waMwari. Zvino chiratidzo chandakanga ndaona chakakwidzwa chichibva kwandiri." 
Ezekiel11:25 Ipapo ndakaudza vakatapwa zvinhu zvose zvandakaratidzwa naJehovha. 
Ezekiel12:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ugere pakati pavanhu veimba inondimukira simba, vana meso okuona, asi havaoni, vane nzeve dzokunzwa, asi havanzwi; nokuti iimba inondimukira simba." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Naizvozvo iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, zvirongedzere nhumbi dzokutama nadzo, utame masikati, vachizviona; unofanira kutama uchibva panzvimbo yako uchienda kune imwe nzvimbo, vachizviona; zvimwe vangazofunga, kunyangwe iri imba inondimukira simba." 
Ezekiel12:4 “Unofanira kubudisa nhumbi dzako masikati vachizviona, dziite senhumbi dzokutama nadzo; zvino madekwana iwe umene unofanira kubuda vachizviona, sezvinoita vanhu kana votama." 
Ezekiel12:5 Zvino uboore rusvingo vachizviona, ubudise nhumbi dzako napo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Unofanira kudzitakura pafudzi rako vachizviona, ndokudzibudisa kwasviba; unofanira kufukidza chiso chako, kuti urege kuona zvenyika; nokuti ndakakuita chiratidzo kuimba yaIsiraeri.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Ini ndikaita sezvandakarayirwa; ndakabudisa nhumbi dzangu masikati, dzakaita senhumbi dzokutama nadzo, madekwana ndikabhovhora rusvingo noruoko rwangu; ndakadzibudisa kwasviba, ndikadzitakura pafudzi rangu vachizviona." 
Ezekiel12:8 Zvino mangwanani shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Mwanakomana womunhu, imba yaIsiraeri, iyo imba inondimukira, havana kuti kwauri, ‘Unoiteiko?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, chirevo ichi chinoreva muchinda weJerusaremu neimba yose yaIsiraeri iri pakati pavo.’" 
Ezekiel12:11 Uti, ‘Ndini chiratidzo chenyu; sezvandakaita ini, ndizvo zvavachaitirwa ivo; vachatama vachitapwa.’" 
Ezekiel12:12 Muchinda ari pakati pavo achatakura nhumbi dzake pafudzi rake kwasviba, ndokubuda; vachabhovhora rusvingo kuti vadzibudise napo; achafukidza meso ake, nokuti haangaoni nyika nameso ake." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndichakandawo mumbure wangu pamusoro pake, achabatwa mumusungo wangu; ndichamuisa Bhabhironi kunyika yavaKaradhia; asi haangaioni, kunyangwe zvakadaro achafirako." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ndichaparadzira kumhepo dzose vose vakamupoteredza vangamubatsira, namapoka ake ose ndichavavhomorera munondo ndichivateverera." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichivadzingira pakati pamarudzi, nokuvaparadzira kunyika dzose." 
Ezekiel12:16 Asi ndichapukunyusa vashoma vavo pamunondo nenzara nechirwere chakaipa; kuti vandoparidza pakati pamarudzi kwavanosvika zvinonyangadza zvavo zvose; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.” 
Ezekiel12:17 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikawo kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Mwanakomana womunhu, idya zvokudya zvako nokubvunda nokunwa mvura yako nokudedera nokutya;" 
Ezekiel12:19 uti kuvanhu venyika iyi, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha pamusoro pavagere Jerusaremu nenyika yaIsiraeri, vachadya zvokudya zvavo vachitya nokunwa mvura yavo vachikanganiswa, kuti nyika yaro iitwe dongo, yatorerwa zvose zvayo, nemhaka yokuita nesimba yavose vanogaramo.’" 
Ezekiel12:20 Maguta anogarwa navanhu achaparadzwa, nenyika ichaitwa dongo; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Mwanakomana womunhu, tsumo ndeyeiko yamunayo munyika yaIsiraeri, inoti, ‘Mazuva anoramba achiwedzerwa, asi zvakaoneswa zvose hazviitiki?’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Naizvozvo vaudze, uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ndichagumisa tsumo iyi, havangazobati nayo iri tsumo pakati paIsiraeri;’ asi uti kwavari, ‘Mazuva ava pedyo nokuitika kwezvose zvakaoneswa.’" 
Ezekiel12:24 Nokuti pakati peimba yaIsiraeri hapangazovi kuoneswa kwenhema kana kuporofita kunobata kumeso. 
Ezekiel12:25 “Nokuti ndini Jehovha; ndichataura, neshoko randichataura richaitika, haringazononoswi; nokuti pamazuva enyu, iwe imba inondimukira simba, ndichataura shoko nokuriitawo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel12:26 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira, veimba yaIsiraeri vanoti, ‘Zvaakaoneswa ndezvamazuva ari kure anozouya, anoporofita zvenguva dziri kure.’" 
Ezekiel12:28 Naizvozvo uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, hakuna shoko rimwe ramashoko angu richazononoka, asi shoko randichataura richaitika,’ ” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, porofitera vaporofita VaIsiraeri vanoporofita, uti kuna ivo vanoporofita zvinobva mumwoyo mavo, inzwai imi shoko raJehovha.”" 
Ezekiel13:3 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Vane nhamo vaporofita mapenzi, vanotevera mweya yavo, vasina chavakaona." 
Ezekiel13:4 Aiwa Isiraeri, vaporofita venyu vakafanana namakava pamatongo." 
Ezekiel13:5 Hamuna kukwira muchipinda pakakoromorwa, kana kugadzira rusvingo rweimba yaIsiraeri, kuti mumire pakurwa pazuva raJehovha." 
Ezekiel13:6 Vakaona zvinonyengera nokuporofita kwenhema, ivo vanoti, Jehovha anoti! Asi Jehovha haana kuvatuma, zvino vakati shoko ravo richasimbiswa." 
Ezekiel13:7 “Hamuna kuona zvinonyengera here, hamuna kutaura kwenhema here, zvamakati, ‘Jehovha anoti; kunyangwe zvakadaro handina kutaura?’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Zvamakatura zvinonyengera, nokuona nhema, naizvozvo, tarirai, ndine mhaka nemi, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ruoko rwangu rucharwa navaporofita vanoona zvinonyengera navanoporofita nhema; havangarangani navanhu vangu, havanganyorwi mazita avo parugwaro rweimba yaIsiraeri, havangapindi munyika yaIsiraeri; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:10 Nokuti zvirokwazvo, nokuti vakanyengera vanhu vangu, vachiti, ‘Rugare!’ Izvo hakuna rugare; kana vovaka rusvingo, tarira, vovhuwa nesuko." 
Ezekiel13:11 Chiudza avo vanoruvhuwa nesuko, kuti ruchakoromoka; mvura ichauya ichinaya kwazvo, ine, mabwe makuru echimvuramabwe, muchawa, nedutu remhepo richarutsemutsa." 
Ezekiel13:12 “Zvino tarirai, kana rusvingo rwakoromoka havangati kwamuri here, ‘Ko suko ramakuvhuwa naro riripiko?’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndicharutsemutsa zvirokwazvo nedutu remhepo nehasha dzangu; mvura ichanaya kwazvo nokutsamwa kwangu, namabwe makuru echimvuramabwe nehasha dzangu, kurupedza chose." 
Ezekiel13:14 Saizvozvo ndichakoromora rusvingo rwamakavhuwa nesuko, nokuruwisira pasi, kusvikira nheyo dzarwo dzafukurwa; ruchakoromoka, nemi muchaparadzwa mukati marwo; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:15 “Saizvozvo ndichapedza hasha dzangu parusvingo, napamusoro pavakaruvhuwa nesuko; ndichati kwamuri, ‘Rusvingo haruchipo, navakaruvhuwa havachipo;" 
Ezekiel13:16 ivo vaporofita VaIsiraeri vanoporofita pamusoro peJerusaremu, vachirionera zviratidzo zvorugare, izvo hakuna rugare,’ ” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:17 Asi iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kuvakunda vavanhu vako, ivo vanoporofita zvinobva mumwoyo yavo, uporofite pamusoro pavo," 
Ezekiel13:18 uti, “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Vane nhamo vakadzi vanosonera zvifukidzo papfundo dzamaoko, vanoita micheka yokufukidza misoro yavanhu vapi navapi, kuti vavhime mweya.’ Munoda kuvhima mweya yavanhu vangu, muchida kuzviponesera mweya iyeyo!" 
Ezekiel13:19 Makandimhura pakati pavanhu vangu nokuda kwetsama dzebari nezvimedu zvezvingwa, kuti muuraye mweya isingafaniri kufa, nokuponesa mweya isingafaniri kurarama, muchirevera vanhu vangu nhema, ivo vanoteerera nhema dzenyu.”" 
Ezekiel13:20 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Tarirai, ndine mhaka nezvifukidzo zvenyu zvamunovhima nazvo mweya yavanhu seshiri, ndichazvibvarura pamaoko enyu; ndicharegedza mweya, iyo mweya yamunovhima seshiri." 
Ezekiel13:21 Nemicheka yenyu ndichaibvarurawo, ndirwire vanhu vangu pamaoko enyu, varege kuzova mumaoko enyu kuti muvavhime; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:22 “Nokuti nenhema dzenyu makarwadza mwoyo wowakarurama, wandisina kuchemedza, mukasimbisa maoko owakaipa, kuti arege kudzoka panzira yake yakaipa, aponeswe;" 
Ezekiel13:23 naizvozvo hamuchazoonizve zviratidzo zvinonyengera kana kuuka zvinoukwa; ini ndicharwira vanhu vangu pamaoko enyu; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.” 
Ezekiel14:1 Zvino vamwe vakuru VaIsiraeri vakauya kwandiri, vakagara pasi pamberi pangu." 
Ezekiel14:2 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Mwanakomana womunhu, vanhu ava vakapinza zvifananidzo zvavo mumwoyo yavo, nokuisa chigumbuso chezvakaipa zvavo pamberi pavo; zvino ndingatongotenda kubvunzwa navo here?" 
Ezekiel14:4 “Naizvozvo taura navo, uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, munhu mumwe nomumwe weimba yaIsiraeri anopinza zvifananidzo zvake mumwoyo make, nokuisa chigumbuso chezvakaipa zvake pamberi pake, akauya kumuporofita, ini Jehovha ndichamupindura zvakafanira izvozvo, zvakafanira kuwanda kwezvifananidzo zvake;" 
Ezekiel14:5 kuti ndibate imba yaIsiraeri mumwoyo yavo, nokuti vava vatorwa kwandiri nemhaka yezvifananidzo zvavo.’" 
Ezekiel14:6 “Naizvozvo iti kuimba yaIsiraeri, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, dzokai, mufuratire zvifananidzo zvenyu, mufuratidze zvinonyangadza zvenyu zvose zviso zvenyu.’" 
Ezekiel14:7 Nokuti mumwe nomumwe weimba yaIsiraeri, kana wavatorwa vagere panyika yaIsiraeri, anoparadzana neni, achipinza zvifananidzo zvake mumwoyo make, nokuisa chigumbuso chezvakaipa zvake pamberi pake, akauya kumuporofita kuti iye andibvunze nokuda kwake, ini Jehovha ndichamupindura ndimene;" 
Ezekiel14:8 ndicharatidza munhu uyo chiso changu ndimuitire zvakaipa, ndichamuita chishamiso nechiratidzo netsumo, ndichamubvisa pakati pavanhu vangu; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Zvino kana muporofita akanyengerwa, akataura shoko, ini Jehovha, ndini ndanyengera muporofita uyo, ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pake, ndimuparadze pakati pavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel14:10 Vachava nemhosva yavo; zvakaipa zvomuporofita zvichaenzana nezvakaipa zvaanobvunza kwaari; 
Ezekiel14:11 kuti imba yaIsiraeri irege kuzotsauka kwandiri, kana kuzozvisvibisa nokudarika kwavo kwose, asi vave vanhu vangu, neni ndive Mwari wavo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel14:12 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Mwanakomana womunhu, kana kune nyika ichinge yanditadzira nokudarika, ini ndikatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro payo, ndikavhuna mudonzvo wezvokudya zvayo, ndikatuma nzara pamusoro payo, nokuparadzapo vanhu nezvipfuwo;" 
Ezekiel14:14 kunyangwe vanhu ava vatatu, Nowa naDhanieri naJobho, vakavamo, vangarwira mweya yavo yoga nokururama kwavo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel14:14 kunyangwe vanhu ava vatatu, Nowa naDhanieri naJobho, vakavamo, vangarwira mweya yavo yoga nokururama kwavo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Kana ndikafambisa zvikara munyika, zvikaipedzera vana, ikaitwa dongo, kukasava nomunhu angagona kufambamo nemhaka yezvikara;" 
Ezekiel14:16 kunyangwe varume ava vatatu vaivamo, noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha havangarwiri vanakomana kana vanasikana; ivo voga vangarwirwa, asi nyika ichaitwa dongo." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Zvimwe kana ndikauyisa munondo pamusoro penyika iyo, ndikati, ‘Munondo, pfuura napakati penyika!’ Ndikaparadzamo vanhu nezvipfuwo;" 
Ezekiel14:18 kunyangwe varume ava vatatu vaivamo, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha havangarwiri vanakomana kana vanasikana; asi ivo vomene voga vangwarwirwa." 
Ezekiel14:19 Zvimwe kana ndikatuma chirwere chakaipa munyika iyo, ndikadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro payo neropa, kuti ndiparadzemo vanhu nezvipfuwo;" 
Ezekiel14:20 kunyangwe Nowa naDhanieri naJobho vaivamo, noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, havangwarwiri mwanakomana kana mwanasikana; vangarwira mweya yavo yoga nokururama kwavo.”" 
Ezekiel14:20 kunyangwe Nowa naDhanieri naJobho vaivamo, noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, havangwarwiri mwanakomana kana mwanasikana; vangarwira mweya yavo yoga nokururama kwavo.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndoda, kana ndikatuma pamusoro peJerusaremu zvakaipa zvina zvandakavatongera, zvinoti, munondo nenzara nezvikara zvakaipa nechirwere chakaipa, kuti ndiparadzemo vanhu nezvipfuwo!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Asi tarirai, vamwe vakasara vacharegwamo vachapukunyuka, vachatapwa, vari vanakomana navanasikana; tarirai, vachasvika kwamuri, muchaona nzira yavo nezvavanoita; ipapo muchanyaradzwa pamusoro pezvakaipa zvandakauyisa pamusoro peJerusaremu, pamusoro pezvose zvandakauyisa pamusoro paro." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ivo vachakunyaradzai, kana muchiona nzira yavo nezvavanoita; ipapo muchaziva kuti handina kuita pasina zvose zvandakaitamo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel15:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, muti womuzambiringa unopfuura mimwe miti yose neiko, iro davi romuzambiringa riri pakati pemiti iri kudondo?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Danda ringatorwapo rokuita basa naro here? Kana vanhu vangatorapo mbambo yokuturikisa mudziyo upi noupi here? 
Ezekiel15:4 “Tarirai, unokandirwa mumoto dzive huni; moto wapedza miromo miviri yawo, napakati watsvawo, zvino uchabatsira pabasa here?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Tarirai, uchakanaka hauna kukwanira basa chose; ndoda zvino kana moto waupedza, kana watsva, ungakwaniri basa here!”" 
Ezekiel15:6 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Somuti womuzambiringa pakati pemiti iri kudondo, wandakaisa kumoto dzive huni, saizvozvo ndakaisa vagere Jerusaremu pakuparadzwa." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndichavaratidza chiso changu ndivaitire zvakaipa; vakabuda pamoto, asi moto uchavapedza; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichivaratidza chiso changu ndivaitire zvakaipa." 
Ezekiel15:8 “Ndichaparadza nyika, nokuti vakandidarikira,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, zivisa Jerusaremu zvinonyangadza zvaro," 
Ezekiel16:3 uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha Jerusaremu: Kwawakabva nokwawakaberekwa ndiko kunyika yaVaKenani; baba vako vakanga vari muAmori, namai vako vakanga vari muHiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Kana kuri kuberekwa kwako, pazuva rokuzvarwa kwako rukuvhute rwako haruna kugurwa, uye hauna kushambidzwa nemvura kuti unake; hauna kutongokwizwa nomunyu, kana kuputirwa mumachira." 
Ezekiel16:5 Hakuna ziso rakakunzwira tsitsi, kana kukuitira chinhu chimwe chezvinhu izvi, nokuva nengoni newe; asi wakarashirwa kusango, nokuti vakasema upenyu hwako nezuva rokuzvarwa kwako.’" 
Ezekiel16:6 “Ndakapfuura kwauri, ndikakuona uchipfakanyika muropa rako, ndikati kwauri uri muropa rako, ‘Rarama!’ Zvirokwazvo, ndakati kwauri uri muropa rako, ‘Rarama!’" 
Ezekiel16:7 Ndakakuita vazhinji kwazvo sezvinomera kusango, ukawanda nokukura, ukasvikira pahukomba hwakaisvonaka; mazamu ako akakura, nevhudzi rako rakamera, asi wakanga usina kufuka, wakashama." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ndakapfuura kwauri, ndikakutarira, ndikaona kuti nguva yako yakanga iri nguva yorudo. Ipapo ndakawarira nguo yangu pamusoro pako, ndikafukidza kushama kwako; zvirokwazvo, ndakakupikira, ndikaita sungano newe, iwe ukava wangu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Ipapo ndakakushambidza nemvura; zvirokwazvo, ndakashambidza ropa rako kwauri, ndikakuzodza namafuta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ndakakufukidzawo nezvakarukwa, ndikakupfekedza shangu dzamatehwe, ndakakusunga chiuno nomucheka wakaisvonaka, ndikakufukidza nesirika." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ndakakushongedza hukomba, ndikaisa zvishongo zvamaoko pazvanza zvako, nengetani pamutsipa wako." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ndikaisa chindori pamhino dzako, nezvishongo zvenzeve panzeve dzako, nekorona yakanaka pamusoro wako." 
Ezekiel16:13 Wakazvishongedza nendarama nesirivha, zvokufuka zvako zvakanga zviri zvomucheka wakaisvonaka nesirika nezvakarukwa; wakadya hupfu hwakatsetseka nohuchi namafuta; hwakanga hwakanaka kwazvo, ukapfuurira mberi kusvikira kuhushe." 
Ezekiel16:14 Mbiri yako yokun aka kwako yakapararira pakati pamarudzi, nokuti yakanga yakakwana kwazvo nokuda kwoumambo hwangu hwandakanga ndaisa pamusoro pako,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Asi iwe wakavimba nokunaka kwako, ukapata nokuda kwembiri yako, ukadurura kupata kwako kuno mumwe nomumwe waipfuura napo, kukava kwake." 
Ezekiel16:16 Wakatora dzimwe nguo dzako, ukazviitira nzvimbo dzakakwirira, dzakashongedzwa namavara mazhinji, ukandopata pamusoro padzo. Zvinhu zvakadai hazvizaifanira kuuya kana kuitika." 
Ezekiel16:17 “Zvishongo zvako zvakanaka wakazvitora pandarama yangu nesirivha yangu, zvandakanga ndakupa, ukazviitira zvifananidzo zvavarume, ukapata nazvo;" 
Ezekiel16:18 ukatora nguo dzako dzakarukwa, ukazvifukidza nadzo, ukagadza mafuta angu nezvinonhuwira zvangu pamberi pazvo." 
Ezekiel16:19 “Zvokudya zvangu zvandakakupa, ihwo hupfu hwakatsetseka namafuta nohuchi zvandakakupa kuti uzvidye, wakazvigadza pamberi pazvo, zviite hwema hunonhuwira; ndizvo zvawakati,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Uyezve, wakatora vanakomana vako navanasikana vako, vawakandiberekera, ukazvibayira ivo, kuti vadyiwe. Ko kupata kwako chakanga chiri chinhu chiduku here," 
Ezekiel16:21 zvawakazouraya vana vangu, ukazvipa ivo, kuti uzvipinzire ivo mumoto here?" 
Ezekiel16:22 “Zvino pakati pezvinonyangadza zvako zvose nokupata kwako hauna kurangarira mazuva ohuduku hwako, panguva yawakanga usino kufuka, wakashama, uchipfakanyika muropa rako." 
Ezekiel16:23 Zvino shure kwezvakaipa zvako zvose haiwa, une nhamo, une nhamo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:24 “Wakazvivakira nzvimbo yokufeva nokuzviitira nzvimbo yakakwirira panzira dzose dzomumusha. 
Ezekiel16:25 Wakavaka nzvimbo yako yakakwirira pakuvamba kwenzira imwe neimwe, ukashandura kunaka kwako zvikava zvinonyangadza, ukafukurira vose vanopfuura tsoka dzako, ukawanza kupata kwako." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wakafevawo naVaIjipiti, vakanga vagere pedyo newe, vane miviri mikuru; ukawanza kupata kwako, kuti unditsamwise." 
Ezekiel16:27 Naizvozvo tarira, ndakatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pako, ndikatapudza zvokudya zvako zvaunodya misi yose, ndikakuisa kuna vanokuvenga vakuitire sokuda kwavo, ivo vakunda vavaFirisitia vakanyadziswa nomufambiro wako wakashata." 
Ezekiel16:28 “Wakapatawo navaAsiria, nokuti wakanga usingagoni kuguta; zvirokwazvo, wakapata navo, asi hauna kuringaniswa nazvo." 
Ezekiel16:29 Wakawanzawo kupata kwako kusvikira kunyika yavashambadziri, iko kuKaradhia; kunyangwe zvakadaro hauna kuringaniswa nazvo." 
Ezekiel16:30 “Mwoyo wako unoshaiwa simba sei,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha “Zvaunoita zvinhu izvi zvose, zvinoitwa nechifeve chisinganyari;" 
Ezekiel16:31 zvaunovaka nzvimbo yako yokufeva pakuvamba kwenzira imwe neimwe, nokuita nzvimbo yako yakakwirira panzira imwe neimwe yomumusha; asi hauna kuita sechifeve, zvawakashora muripo." 
Ezekiel16:32 Aiwa! Mukadzi akawanikwa anofeva! Anogamuchira vatorwa panzvimbo yomurume wake! 
Ezekiel16:33 Zvifeve zvose zvinopiwa zvipo, asi iwe unopa vadikanwi vako vose zvipo, uchivaripira, kuti vauye kwauri vachibva kumativi ose nokuda kwokupata kwako." 
Ezekiel16:34 “Iwe wakasiyana navamwe vakadzi pakupata kwako, zvakusina unokutevera kupata newe; uye zvaunopa muripo iwe, asi iwe haupiwi muripo, naizvozvo wakasiyana navamwe.”" 
Ezekiel16:35 Naizvozvo iwe chifeve, chinzwa shoko raJehovha," 
Ezekiel16:36 zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndarira yako zvayakadururwa, nokunyadza kwako zvakwakafukurwa nokupata kwako navadikanwi vako, uye nokuda kwezvifananidzo zvose zvezvinonyangadza zvako, neropa ravana vako, rawakazvipa;" 
Ezekiel16:37 naizvozvo tarira, ndichaunganidza vadikanwi vako vose, vawakafarirana navo, navose vawakanga uchida, pamwechete navose vawakanga uchivenga; ndichakuunganidzira ivo vachibva kumativi ose, nokuvafukurira kunyadza kwako, kuti vaone kunyadza kwako kwose." 
Ezekiel16:38 “Ndichakutonga sezvinotongwa vakadzi voutere navanoteura ropa; ndichauyisa pamusoro pako ropa rehasha negodo. 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndichakuisawo mumaoko avo; vachakoromora nzvimbo yako yokufeva, nokuputsa nzvimbo dzako dzakakwirira; vachakubvisira nguo dzako, nokukutorera zvishongo zvako zvakanaka; vachakusiya usina chokufuka wakashama." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Vachauyawo neungano kuzorwa newe, ivo vachakutaka namabwe nokubvoora neminondo yavo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Vachapisa dzimba dzako nomoto, nokukuitira zvakatongwa pamberi pavakadzi vazhinji; ndichakuregesa kupata kwako, iwe hauchazovapi muripo." 
Ezekiel16:42 Saizvozvo ndichazorodza hasha dzangu kwauri, godo rangu richabva kwauri; ndichanyarara, ndikasazova nokutsamwa." 
Ezekiel16:43 Zvausina kurangarira mazuva ohuduku hwako, asi wakanditsamwisa nezvinhu izvi zvose, naizvozvo, tarira, ndichauyisa zvawakaita pamusoro wako,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; haungazoiti zvakashata izvozvo nezvinonyangadza zvako zvose." 
Ezekiel16:44 “Tarira, mumwe nomumwe anobata netsumo, achabata tsumo iyi pamusoro pako, achiti, ‘Sezvakaita mai, ndizvo zvakaita mwanasikana wavo.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Iwe uri mwanasikana wamai vako, vanosema murume wavo navana vavo; iwe uri munun'una wavakoma vako, vakasema varume vavo navana vavo; amai vako vakanga vari muHiti, nababa vako muAmori." 
Ezekiel16:46 “Mukoma wako ndiSamaria, anogara kuruboshwe rwako, iye navanasikana vake; munun'una wako anogara kurudyi rwako, ndiSodhoma navanasikana vake." 
Ezekiel16:47 Asi hauna kufamba nenzira dzavo, kana kuita zvinonyangadza zvavo; asi izvo wakati zviduku, wakavapfura ivo vose nenzira dzako dzakaora." 
Ezekiel16:48 Noupenyu hwangu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha munun'una wako Sodhomu, “Iye navanasikana vake, havana kuita sezvawakaita iwe navanasikana vako." 
Ezekiel16:49 Tarira, zvakaipa zvomunun'una wako Sodhomu hezvi: Kuzvikudza, zvokudya zvakawandisa, nokuzorora kusina hanya nechinhu, ndizvo zvaakanga anazvo navanasikana vake; haana kusimbisa ruoko rwavarombo navanoshayiwa." 
Ezekiel16:50 Vakanga vana manyawi vakaita zvinonyangadza pamberi pangu; saka ndichizviona ndakavabvisa. 
Ezekiel16:51 “Kunyangwe neSamaria harina kuita hafu yezvivi zvako; asi iwe wakawanzisa zvinonyangadza zvako kupfuura zvavo, ukapembedza vanun'una vako nezvinonyangadza zvako zvose zvawakaita." 
Ezekiel16:52 “Iwe chiva nemhosva yezvinonyadzisa zvako, zvawakapembedza vanun'una vako; nokuda kwezvivi zvako zvawakaita zvinonyangadza kupfuura zvavo, ivo vava vakarurama kupfuura iwe; zvirokwazvo, chisvodeswa iwe, uve nokunyadziswa kwako, zvawakapembedza vanun'una vako.”" 
Ezekiel16:53 “Ndichadzosazve kutapwa kwavo, iko kutapwa kweSodhomu navanasikana varo, nokutapwa kweSamaria navanasikana varo, nokutapwa kwavatapwa vako vari pakati pavo;" 
Ezekiel16:54 kuti iwe uve nokunyadziswa kwako, unyare pamusoro pezvose zvawakaita uchivanyaradza." 
Ezekiel16:55 Vanun'una vako Sodhomu navanasikana vake vachadzokera kumugariro wavo wakare, naSamaria navanasikana vake vachadzokera kumugariro wavo wakare, newe navanasikana vako muchadzokera kumugariro wenyu wakare." 
Ezekiel16:56 Nokuti munun'una wako Sodhomu haana kurehwa nomuromo wako nezuva rokuzvikudza kwako," 
Ezekiel16:57 zvakashata zvako zvisati zvafukurwa, sapanguva yokushorwa kwako navanasikana veSiria navose vakavapoteredza, vanasikana vavaFirisitia, vanokuzvidza kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel16:58 Une mhosva yezvakashata zvako nezvinonyangadza zvako,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:59 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndichakuitirawo sezvawakaita iwe, wakashora kupika pakuputsa kwako sungano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndicharangarira sungano yangu yandakaita newe pamazuva ohuduku hwako, ndisimbise sungano isingaperi newe." 
Ezekiel16:61 Ipapo ucharangarira nzira dzako; uchanyara, kana uchigamuchira vakoma vako navanun'una vako; ndichakupa ivo, vave vanasikana vako, asi hazvingaitwi pamusoro pesungano yako." 
Ezekiel16:62 “Ndichasimbisa sungano yangu newe; zvino uchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha; 
Ezekiel16:63 kuti urangarire, usvodeswe, urege kuzoshamisa muromo wakozve nokuda kwokunyara kwako, kana ndakukanganwira zvose zvawakaita,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel17:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, taurira veimba yaIsiraeri chirahwe, ureve mufananidzo kwavari;" 
Ezekiel17:3 uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, gondo guru rina mapapiro makuru neminhenga mirefu, rina mambava mazhinji ana mavara–mavara, rakasvika Rebhanoni, rikatora musoro womuSidhari;" 
Ezekiel17:4 rikavhuna davi rokumusoro pamatavi aro manyoro, rikaenda naro kunyika yavashambadziri, ndokuriisa muguta ravatengesi.’" 
Ezekiel17:5 Rakatorawo dzimwe mbeu dzenyika, ndokudzikavira pavhu rakaorera, rikadziisa parutivi rwemvura zhinji, rikadzisima semiti yemikonachando." 
Ezekiel17:6 Davi rikamera, rikaita muzambiringa unotanda wakapfupika, kuti matavi awo atarire kwariri, nemidzi yawo ive pasi pawo; saizvozvo rakaita muzambiringa, wakabudisa matavi nokutungira hutavi huduku." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Zvino kwakanga kune rimwe gondozve rina mapapiro makuru namambava mazhinji; zvino tarira muzambiringa uyu wakarerekera midzi yawo kwariri nokutungirawo matavi aro kwariri, zvichibva pandima pawakanga wakasimwa, kuti riudiridze." 
Ezekiel17:8 “Wakanga wakasimwa pavhu rakanaka pane mvura zhinji, kuti ubudise matavi, nokubereka michero, uve muzambiringa wakanaka." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Zvino iwe uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, muti ucharamba uchifara here?’ Ko gondo haringadzuri midzi yawo, nokugura michero yawo, kuti mashizha awo achangobukira, aome here? Hakungadikanwi ruoko rune simba, kana vanhu vazhinji, kuudzura nemidzi yawo." 
Ezekiel17:10 “Zvirokwazvo, tarira, zvawasimwa ucharamba uchifara here? Haungaomi chose kana ukarohwa nemhepo inobva mabvazuva here? Uchaomera pandima pawakanga wamera.”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Zvino uti kuimba inondimukira simba, ‘Hamuzivi here kuti zvinhu izvi zvinoreveiko?’ Chivaudza, uti, ‘Tarira mambo weBhabhironi wakasvika Jerusaremu, akabata mambo waro, namachinda aro, akandovaisa Bhabhironi kwaari." 
Ezekiel17:13 Akatora mumwe worudzi rwamambo, akaita sungano naye; akamupikisawo, akabvisa vane simba venyika;" 
Ezekiel17:14 kuti ushe huderere, kuti hurege kukura, asi hurambe huripo huchichengeta sungano yake.’" 
Ezekiel17:15 Asi wakazomumukira achituma nhume dzake Ijipiti, kuti apiwe mabhiza navanhu vazhinji. Ko acharamba achingofara here? Anoita zvinhu zvakadai achapukunyuka here? Angaputsa sungano akapukunyuka here?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Panzvimbo panogara mambo, akamuita mambo, waakashora kupika kwake, nokuputsa sungano yake, ipapo paari, pakati peBhabhironi, ndipo paachifira." 
Ezekiel17:17 Kunyangwe naFarao nehondo yake ine simba neboka rake guru haangamubatsiri pakurwa, kana vachitutira mirwi yokurwa nokuvaka nhare, kuti vaparadze vanhu vazhinji." 
Ezekiel17:18 Nokuti wakashora kupika nokuputsa kwake sungano; tarira, akapika noruoko rwake, kunyangwe zvakadaro akaita izvozvi zvose haangapukunyuki.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Noupenyu hwangu, kupika kwangu kwaakashora nesungano yangu yaakaputsa, zvirokwazvo ndichauyisa mhosva yadzo pamusoro pomusoro wake." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndichakanda mumbure wangu pamusoro pake, achabatwa nomusungo wangu, ndichamuisa Bhabhironi ndimutongeko pamusoro pokudarika kwake kwaakandidarikira nako." 
Ezekiel17:21 Vose vanotiza vamapoka ake ose vachaurayiwa nomunondo, navakasara vachaparadzirwa kumativi mana enyika; zvino muchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndini ndakataura izvozvo.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndichatora ini rutavi padavi rokumusorosoro romusidhari, ndirusime; pamatavi aro manyoro okumusoro ndichavhuna rumwe rutsva, ndirusime pamusoro pegomo refu rakakwirira;" 
Ezekiel17:23 pagomo refu raIsiraeri ndipo pandicharusima; ruchabudisa matavi, nokubereka michero, nokuva musidhari wakanaka kwazvo, pasi pawo pachagara shiri dzina mapapiro amarudzi ose; dzichagara mumumvuri wamatavi awo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Zvino miti yose yokusango ichaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakaderedza muti murefu, ndikakwiridza muti wakazvidzwa, nokuomesa muti munyoro, ndikameresa muti wakaoma. Ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, ndikazviita.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Ndokudiniko kana muchibata netsumo iyi panyika yaIsiraeri, muchiti, ‘Madzibaba akadya mazambiringa anovava, meno avana ndokuhwadzira?’" 
Ezekiel18:3 Noupenyu hwangu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, “Hamungagoni kuzobata netsumo iyi pakati paIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel18:4 Tarirai, mweya yose ndeyangu; mweya wababa ndowangu, saizvozvo nomweya womwanakomanawo; mweya unotadza, uchafa." 
Ezekiel18:5 Asi kana munhu achinge akarurama, achiita zvomurairo nezvakarurama," 
Ezekiel18:6 asina kudya pamakomo, kana kutarira nameso ake kuzvifananidzo zveimba yaVaIsiraeri, kana kuchinyira mukadzi wowokwake, kana kuswedera kumukadzi ari kumwedzi kwake," 
Ezekiel18:7 asina kuitira vamwe zvakaipa, akadzosera rubato rwake kuno wakatora chikwereti, asina kutora chinhu achipamba, akapa vane nzara zvokudya zvake, akafukidza akashama nenguo;" 
Ezekiel18:8 asina kuita mhindu, kana kutora mhindu yemichero, akadzora ruoko rwake pazvakaipa, akaruramisa kwazvo pamhaka yomunhu nehama yake," 
Ezekiel18:9 akafamba nemitemo yangu, akachengeta zvandakarayira, kuti aite zvamazvokwadi; iye akarurama, zvirokwazvo achararama,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Kana iye akabereka mwanakomana riri gororo, kana muteuri weropa, kana anoita chimwe chezvinhu izvi," 
Ezekiel18:11 asingaiti chinhu chimwe chaizvozvo zvakanaka, akadya pamakomo, akachinyira mukadzi wowokwake," 
Ezekiel18:12 akaitira varombo navanoshayiwa zvakaipa, akatora achipamba, asina kudzosera rubatso, akatarira zvifananidzo nameso ake, akaita zvinonyangadza," 
Ezekiel18:13 akaita mhindu, kana kutora mhindu yemichero; ko iye achararama here? Haangararami. Akaita izvi zvose zvinonyangadza, zvirokwazvo achafa; ropa rake richava pamusoro pake." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Zvino, tarira, kana akabereka mwanakomana, anoona zvivi zvose zvababa vake, zvavakaita, akazviona hake, akasaita zvakadai;" 
Ezekiel18:15 asina kudya pamakomo, kana kutarira nameso ake zvifananidzo zveimba yaVaIsiraeri, kana kuchinyira mukadzi wowokwake," 
Ezekiel18:16 asina kuitira vamwe zvakaipa, asina kutora chinhu achireva rubato, asina kutora chinhu achipamba, asi akapa vane nzara zvokudya zvake, nokufukidza akashama nechokufuka;" 
Ezekiel18:17 akadzora ruoko rwake pakuitira varombo zvakaipa, asina kutora mhindu kana mhindu yemichero, akaita zvandakarayira, nokufamba nemitemo yangu; iye haangafi nokuda kwezvakaipa zvababa vake, zvirokwazvo achararama." 
Ezekiel18:18 Kana vari baba vake, zvavakamanikidza zvikuru, nokupamba zvinhu zvomunun'una wake, akaita zvisina kunaka pakati pavanhu vake, tarirai, iye achafa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Asi imi munoti, ‘Mwanakomana anoregereiko kuva nemhosva yezvakaipa zvababa vake?’ Kana mwanakomana achinge aita zvinorehwa nomurairo nezvakarurama, akachengeta mitemo yangu yose, akaiita, zvirokwazvo achararama." 
Ezekiel18:20 Munhu anotadza, ndiye achafa; mwanakomana haangavi nemhosva yezvakaipa zvababa vake, nababa havangavi nemhosva yezvakaipa zvomwanakomana wavo; kururama kwowakarurama kuchava pamusoro pake, nokuipa kwowakaipa kuchava pamusoro pake." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Asi kana akaipa akatendeuka pazvivi zvake zvose zvaakaita, akachengeta mitemo yangu yose, akaita zvinorehwa nomurairo nezvakarurama, zvirokwazvo achararama, haangafi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Kudarika kwake kwose kwaakaita hakungarangarirwi pamusoro pake; achararama nokuda kwezvakarurama zvaakaita. 
Ezekiel18:23 Ko ini ndingatongofarira rufu rwowakaipa here?” Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; “Handizinofarira kudzoka kwake panzira yake, ararame here?" 
Ezekiel18:24 “Asi kana akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, akaita zvinonyangadza zvose zvinoitwa nomunhu akaipa, ko angararama here? Mabasa ake akarurama aakaita haangatongorangarirwi; nokuda kwokudarika kwake, kwaakadarika nako, nezvivi zvake zvaakaita, achafa nokuda kwazvo." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Asi imi munoti, ‘Nzira yaIshe haina kururama.’ Zvino chinzwai, imi mhuri yaVaIsiraeri, nzira yangu haina kururama here? Ko nzira dzenyu hadzizi idzo dzisina kururama here?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Kana munhu akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, akafa nokuda kwazvo; achafa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvaakaita." 
Ezekiel18:27 Uyezve, kana munhu akaipa akatsauka pazvakaipa zvake zvaakaita, akazoita zvinorehwa nomurairo nezvakarurama, achaponesa upenyu hwake." 
Ezekiel18:28 “Zvaakarangarira, akatsauka pakudarika kwake kwose kwaakaita, zvirokwazvo achararama, haangafi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Kunyangwe zvakadaro, VaIsiraeri vanoti, ‘Nzira yaIshe haina kururama.’ Nhai, mhuri yaVaIsiraeri, nzira dzangu hadzina kururama here? Hadzizi nzira dzenyu dzisakarurama here?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Naizvozvo ndichakutongai, imi mhuri yaVaIsiraeri, mumwe nomumwe zvakafanira nzira dzake,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha. “Dzokai, mutendeuke pakudarika kwenyu kwose; kuti chirege kuva chigumbuso chezvakaipa kwamuri." 
Ezekiel18:31 Rashai kure nemi kudarika kwenyu kwose, kwamakadarika nako, muzviitire mwoyo mitsva nemweya mitsva; nokuti muchafireiko, imi mhuri yaVaIsiraeri?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Nokuti handifariri rufu rwounofa,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; naizvozvo tendeukai, murarame." 
Ezekiel19:1 Zvino iwe, imba mariro pamusoro pamachinda aIsiraeri," 
Ezekiel19:2 uti, “Mai vako vaiva aniko?” Vaiva shumbakadzi, yaivata pakati peshumba, ichirera vana vayo pakati peshumba duku." 
Ezekiel19:3 Zvino yakarera mumwe mwana wayo, ikava shumba duku, ikadzidza kubata zvaingauraya, ikapedza vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Marudzi avanhu akainzwawo ikabatwa muhuzha yavo, vakaiisa kunyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel19:5 Zvino yakati ichiona kuti yanyengerwa, kuti tariro yanyangarika, ikatorazve mumwe mwana wayo, ikaiita shumba duku." 
Ezekiel19:6 Iyo ikafamba–famba pakati peshumba; ikava shumba duku, ikadzidza kubata zvaingauraya, ikapedza vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Ikaziva dzimba dzavo dzohushe, ikaparadza maguta avo; nyika nezvose zvayo ikava dongo, nokuda kwokuwomba kwayo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Ipapo marudzi avanhu venyika dzakapoteredza akarwa nayo, vakakandira mumbure wavo pamusoro payo, ikabatwa muhuzha yavo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Vakaiisa muchirugu chine zvikokowono, vakandoiisa kuna mambo weBhabhironi; vakaiisa munhare, kuti izwi rayo rirege kuzonzwika pamakomo aIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel19:10 Mai vako vakanga vakaita somuzambiringa, panguva yokuzorora kwako, wakanga wakasimwa pamvura; wakabereka zvakanaka, una matavi mazhinji, nokuda kwemvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel19:11 Ukava namatanda makobvu okuita tsvimbo dzavaibata hushe, musoro wawo ukakwirira kumusoro pakati pamatavi makobvu, ukaonekwa kumusoro–soro pamwechete namashizha awo mazhinji." 
Ezekiel19:12 Asi wakadzurwa nehasha, ukakandirwa pasi, mhepo inobva mabvazuva ikaomesa michero yawo, matanda awo makobvu akavuniwa, ndokuoma, moto ukaapedza." 
Ezekiel19:13 Zvino wasimwa murenje, munyika yakaoma ine nyota." 
Ezekiel19:14 Moto wabuda padanda ramatavi awo, ukapedza michero yawo, hapachine danda rine simba ringaita tsvimbo yokubata ushe. Awa ndiwo mariro, uye achazova mariro." 
Ezekiel20:1 Zvino negore rechinomwe, nomwedzi wechishanu, nezuva regumi romwedzi, vamwe vakuru VaIsiraeri vakauya kuzobvunza Jehovha, vakagara pasi pamberi pangu." 
Ezekiel20:2 Shoko raJehovha rikasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mwanakomana womunhu, taura navakuru VaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, mauya kuzondibvunza ini here? Noupenyu hwangu,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha handidi kubvunzwa nemi." 
Ezekiel20:4 Chivatonga, Mwanakomana womunhu, chivatonga! Chivazivisa zvinonyangadza zvamadzibaba avo;" 
Ezekiel20:5 uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, nezuva randakatsanangura Isiraeri, ndikasimudzira vana veimba yaJakobho ruoko rwangu, nokuzvizivisa kwavari munyika yeIjipiti, musi wandakavasimudzira ruoko rwangu,’ ndichiti, ‘Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu;’" 
Ezekiel20:6 nezuva iroro ndakavasimudzira ruoko rwangu, kuti ndichavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti ndivaise kunyika yandakavatsvakira, kunoyerera mukaka nouchi, iyo yaiva hukomba hwenyika dzose." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ndikati kwavari, ‘Rasai, mumwe nomumwe, zvinonyangadza zvameso ake, murege kuzvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zveIjipiti; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.’" 
Ezekiel20:8 Asi vakandimukira simba, vakaramba kunditeerera; havana kurasa, mumwe nomumwe wavo, zvinonyangadza meso avo, havana kusiya zvifananidzo zveIjipiti. Ipapo ndakati ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo, kuti ndipedze kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pavo pakati penyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel20:9 Asi ndakazviita nokuda kwezita rangu, kuti rirege kumhurwa pamberi pamarudzi avanhu, mavakanga vagere, vandakazvizivisa kwavari pamberi pavo, ndichivabudisa munyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Naizvozvo ndakavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, ndikavaisa kurenje." 
Ezekiel20:11 “Ndikavapa mitemo yangu, nokuvaratidza zvandakarayira, zvinoti kana munhu achizviita ararame nazvo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ndakavapawo maSabata angu, chive chiratidzo pakati pangu navo, kuti vazive kuti ndini Jehovha, ndinovaita vatsvene." 
Ezekiel20:13 Asi imba yaIsiraeri yakandimukira simba murenje; havana kufamba nemitemo yangu, vakaramba zvandakarayira, zvinoti kana munhu achizvichengeta, achararama nazvo; vakamhura zvikuru maSabata angu. Ipapo ndakati ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo murenje, kuti ndivapedze." 
Ezekiel20:14 Asi ndakazviita nokuda kwezita rangu, kuti rirege kumhurwa pamberi pamarudzi andakavabudisa pamberi pawo." 
Ezekiel20:15 Ndakavasimudzirawo ruoko rwangu murenje, kuti handingavaisi kunyika yandakanga ndavapa, kunoerera mukaka nouchi, iyo yaiva hukomba hwenyika dzose;" 
Ezekiel20:16 nokuti vakaramba zvandavakarayira, vakasafamba nemitemo yangu, vakamhura maSabata angu; nokuti mwoyo yavo yakatevera zvifananidzo zvavo." 
Ezekiel20:17 “Kunyangwe zvakadaro ziso rangu rakavapembedza, ndikasavaparadza, kana kuvapedza chose murenje." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ndikati kuvana vavo murenje, ‘Regai kufamba nemitemo yamadzibaba enyu, kana kuchengeta zvavakarayira, kana kuzvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvenyu." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu; fambai nemitemo yangu, muchengete zvandakarayira, muzviite;" 
Ezekiel20:20 maSabata angu ngaave matsvene kwamuri; zvigova chiratidzo pakati pangu nemi, kuti muzive kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.’" 
Ezekiel20:21 “Asi vana vakandimukira simba, havana kufamba nemitemo yangu, kana kuchengeta zvandakarayira kuti vazviite, zvinoti kana munhu akazviita, achararama nazvo; vakamhura maSabata angu. Ipapo ndakati ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo, kuti ndipedze kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pavo murenje." 
Ezekiel20:22 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndakadzosa ruoko rwangu, ndikaita nokuda kwezita rangu, kuti rirege kumhurwa pamberi pamarudzi, andakavabudisa pamberi pawo." 
Ezekiel20:23 “Ndakavasimudzirawo ruoko rwangu murenje, kuti ndichavaparadzira pakati pamarudzi nokuvadzingira kunyika dzose;" 
Ezekiel20:24 nokuti havana kuita zvandakavarayira, asi vakaramba mitemo yangu, nokumhura maSabata angu, meso avo akatarira zvifananidzo zvamadzibaba avo." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ndakavapawo mitemo yakanga isina kunaka, nezvakarayirwa zvavakanga vasingagoni kurarama nazvo;" 
Ezekiel20:26 ndikavasvibisa nezvipo zvavo, zvavakapinza mumoto zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro, kuti ndivaparadze, vagoziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Naizvozvo Mwanakomana womunhu, taura neimba yaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, Madzibaba enyu akandimhurawo pachinhu ichi, kuti vakandidarikira.’" 
Ezekiel20:28 Nokuti ndakati ndavaisa kunyika, yandakavasimudzira ruoko kuti ndichavapa iyo, vakatsvaka zvikomo zvose zvirefu nemiti yose mikobvu, vakabayirapo zvibairo zvavo, vakauyapo nezvipo zvavo zvainditsamwisa; ndipowo pavakaita hwema hwavo hunonhuwira, vakadururirapo zvipiriso zvavo zvinodururwa." 
Ezekiel20:29 “Ipapo ndikati kwavari, ‘Ko nzvimbo yakakwirira kwamunoenda, inoti kudiniko?’ Naizvozvo zita rayo rinonzi ‘Bhama’ kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Ezekiel20:30 Naizvozvo chiti kuimba yaIsiraeri, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ko munozvisvibisa sezvakaita madzibaba enyu here? Munopata muchitevera zvinonyangadza zvavo here?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Kana muchiuya nezvipo zvenyu, kana muchipinza vanakomana venyu mumoto, munozvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvenyu kusvikira zuva ranhasi here? Zvino ndingabvunzwa nemi here, imi imba yaIsiraeri? Noupenyu hwangu,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, handidi kubvunzwa nemi;" 
Ezekiel20:32 izvo zvinopinda mumirangariro yenyu hazvingatongoitiki chose, zvamunoti, ‘Tinoda kufanana namamwe marudzi, navanhu vedzimwe nyika, vanoshumira matanda namabwe." 
Ezekiel20:33 Noupenyu hwangu,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha. Zvirokwazvo ndichava mambo wenyu nechanza chine simba noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, uye nehasha dzakadururwa." 
Ezekiel20:34 “Ndichakubudisai pakati pamarudzi, nokukuwunganidzai kunyika kwamakanga makaparadzirwa, nechanza chine simba noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, uye nehasha dzakadururwa;" 
Ezekiel20:35 ndichakuisa kurenje ramarudzi avanhu, ndigokutongaipo, tichionana nameso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Sezvandakatonga madzibaba enyu murenje renyika yeIjipiti, saizvozvo ndichakutongai imi,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Ndichakuverengai netsvimbo yomufudzi, nokukuisai muchisungo chesungano;" 
Ezekiel20:38 ndichabvisa pakati penyu vakandimukira simba navakandidarikira, ndichavabudisa panyika pavagere vari vatorwa, asi havangapindi munyika yaIsiraeri; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel20:39 “Kana murimi, imba yaIsiraeri, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha endai imi mundoshumira mumwe nomumwe zvifananidzo zvake, asi pashure muchanditeerera; hamuchazomhuri zita rangu dzvene nezvipo zvenyu uye nezvifananidzo zvenyu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Nokuti pagomo rangu dzvene, pagomo rakakwirira raIsiraeri, ndipo pandichashumirwa munyika neimba yose yaIsiraeri, ivo vose; ndipo pandichavagamuchira, ndipo pandichareva zvibairo zvenyu, nezvitsva zvezvipo zvenyu, pamwechete nezvinhu zvenyu zvose zvitsvene." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ndichakugamuchirai sohwema hunonhuwira, panguva yandinokubudisai pakati pamarudzi avanhu, ndichikuunganidzai panyika kwamakanga makaparadzirwa; ndichazviratidza kwamuri ndiri Mutsvene pamberi pamarudzi avanhu." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichikuisai munyika yaIsiraeri, kunyika yandakasimudzira madzibaba enyu ruoko rwangu ndichiti ndichavapo iyo." 
Ezekiel20:43 “Zvino mucharangarirapo nzira dzenyu, nezvose zvamakaita, zvamakazvisvibisa nazvo; muchazvisema pamusoro pezvakaipa zvenyu zvose zvamakaita." 
Ezekiel20:44 Zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichikuitirai izvozvo nokuda kwezita rangu, ndisingaiti zvakafanira nzira dzenyu dzakaipa kana zvakafanira zvakaora zvamakaita, imi imba yaIsiraeri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel20:45 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kurutivi rwezasi, udonhedze shoko rako kurutivi rwezasi, uporofite pamusoro pedondo romusango kurutivi rwezasi;" 
Ezekiel20:47 uti kudondo kurutivi rwezasi, ‘Inzwa shoko raJehovha, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, tarira, ndichabatidza moto mukati mako, uchapedza muti mumwe nomumwe mutema mukati mako, nomuti mumwe nomumwe wakaoma; murazvo unopfuta haungadzimwi, asi zviso zvose kubva kurutivi rwezasi kusvikira kurutivi rwokumusoro zvichapiswa nawo." 
Ezekiel20:48 Vanhu vose vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndini ndakaubatidza; haungadzimwi.’ 
Ezekiel20:49 “Ipapo ndikati, ‘Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha!’ Vanoti pamusoro pangu, ‘Ko haazi mutauri wemifananidzo here?’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kurutivi rweJerusaremu, udonhedze shoko rako kurutivi rwenzvimbo tsvene, uporofite pamusoro penyika yaIsiraeri;" 
Ezekiel21:3 uti kunyika yaIsiraeri, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, ndichavhomora munondo wangu mumuhara wawo, ndichaparadza pakati penyu vakarurama navakaipa." 
Ezekiel21:4 Zvino zvandichaparadza pakati penyu vakarurama navakaipa, munondo wangu uchabuda mumuhara wawo kundorwa nevanhu vose kubva kurutivi rwezasi kusvikira kurutivi rwokumusoro;" 
Ezekiel21:5 vanhu vose vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakavhomora munondo wangu mumuhara wawo; hauchazodzokeripozve. 
Ezekiel21:6 Naizvozvo, gomera, iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, gomera pamberi pavo, chiuno chako chivhunike nokuchema kukuru kuvepo.’" 
Ezekiel21:7 “Zvino kana vachiti kwauri, ‘Unogomera neiko?’ Uti kwavari, ‘Nemhaka yamashoko, nokuti anouya; mwoyo mumwe nomumwe uchanyauka, maoko ose achashayiwa simba, mweya mumwe nomumwe uchati rukutu, mabvi ose achashayiwa simba semvura; tarirai, anouya, achaitika,’ ” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel21:8 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita, uti, zvanzi naJehovha, iti ‘Munondo, munondo! Warodzwa, wabwinyiswa;" 
Ezekiel21:10 warodzwa, kuti uhuraye, wabwinyiswa, kuti uve semheni; zvino isu tingagofara here? Itsvimbo yohushe yomwanakomana wangu, inozvidza miti yose.’" 
Ezekiel21:11 Wakapiwa kuti ubwinyiswe, kuti ubatwe nawo; munondo warodzwa, zvirokwazvo wabwinyiswa, kuti uiswe muruoko rwomuurayi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Chema, uungudze, iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, nokuti iwe uri pamusoro pavanhu vangu, uri pamusoro pamachinda ose aIsiraeri, akaiswa kumunondo pamwechete navanhu vangu; naizvozvo uzvirove pahudyu." 
Ezekiel21:13 “Nokuti kuidzwa kwavapo; zvino todiniko kana iwo munondo, unozvidza, waperawo? Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Zvino Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita, rovanya maoko ako; munondo ngauwedzerwe kusvikira katatu, iwo munondo wavakakuvadzwa zvikuru; ndiwo munondo womukuru, wakakuvadzwa zvikuru, unovamanikidza." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ndakaisa munondo wakavhomorwa pamisuwo yavo yose, kuti mwoyo yavo inyauswe, nokugumburwa kwavo kuwande; aiwa! Wakaitwa semheni, wakatesvererwa kuuraya." 
Ezekiel21:16 Zvirongedze, iwe munondo, enda kurudyi, zvigadzire uende kuruboshwe, kwose kunotarira mativi ako akarodzwa." 
Ezekiel21:17 “Neniwo ndicharovanya maoko angu, ndichanyaradza hasha dzangu; ini Jehovha, ndakazvitaura.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, chizvitarira nzira mbiri, dzingauya nadzo munondo wamambo weBhabhironi idzedzo mbiri dzinofanira kubva kunyika imwe; zvino uveze ruoko, uruvezere pakuvamba kwenzira inoenda kuguta." 
Ezekiel21:20 Utare nzira, ingauya nawo munondo, kusvikira Rabha ravana vaAmoni, naJudha mukati meJerusaremu rakakombwa norusvingo." 
Ezekiel21:21 Nokuti mambo weBhabhironi akanga amire pamharadzano dzenzira, pakuvamba kwenzira mbiri, kuti abvunze nokuuka, akazunungusa miseve, akabvunza terafimi, ndokucherechedza chiropa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Muruoko rwake rworudyi makanga mune zvakaukwa pamusoro peJerusaremu, kuti vaise zvokugumura, vashamise muromo unodanira kuuraya, vadanidzire kwazvo namazwi, vaise zvokugumura pamasuwo, vatutire mirwi yokurwa, vavakire nhare dzokurwa." 
Ezekiel21:23 Asi zvichava kwavari sokuuka kwenhema pamberi pavo, ivo vakavapikira mhiko; asi iye acharangarira kusarurama kwavo, kuti vabatwe." 
Ezekiel21:24 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Zvamakandiyeudzira zvakaipa zvenyu, kudarika kwenyu zvakwakafukurwa, zvivi zvenyu zvichionekwa pane zvose zvamunoita, zvamakarangarirwa, muchabatwa noruoko.’" 
Ezekiel21:25 “Zvino iwe, iwe wakaipa, wakakuvadzwa zvikuru, muchinda waIsiraeri, wakasvikirwa nezuva rako panguva yezvakaipa zvokupedzisira," 
Ezekiel21:26 zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Ngowani youpristi inofanira kubva, korona inofanira kubva, hazvingarambi zviripo; kwiridzai zviri pasi, muderedze zviri kumusoro.’" 
Ezekiel21:27 “Matongo, matongo, ndichazviita matongo, nezvizvi hazvingarambi zviripo, kusvikira iye mwene wazvo achisvika; ndichamupa iye izvo." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Zvino iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, chiporofita, uti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha pamusoro pavana vaAmoni, pamusoro pokushorwa kwavo; iwe uti, ‘Munondo, munondo wavhomorwa, wabwinyisirwa kuuraya, kuti upedze, uve semheni;’" 
Ezekiel21:29 vachikuonera zvakaratidzwa zvenhema, zvachikuukira nhema, kuti uiswe pamitsipa yavakaipa vakakuvadzwa zvikuru, vasvikirwa nezuva ravo panguva yezvakaipa zvokupedzisira." 
Ezekiel21:30 “Ngaudzoserwe mumuhara wawo. Apo pawakasvikwa iwe, panyika yawakaberekerwa, ndipo pandichakutonga." 
Ezekiel21:31 “Ndichadurura kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pako, ndichafuridzira pamusoro pako nomoto wehasha dzangu, ndichakuisa mumaoko avanhu vanopenga, vanoziva kwazvo kuparadza." 
Ezekiel21:32 Iwe uchava huni dzomoto; ropa rako richava pakati penyika; hauchazorangarirwi, nokuti ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Zvino iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, tonga, chitonga guta reropa, urizivise zvinonyangadza zvaro zvose." 
Ezekiel22:3 Uti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Iwe guta, rinoteura ropa mukati maro, kuti nguva yaro isvike, rinozviitira zvifananidzo, kuti risvibiswe nazvo!’" 
Ezekiel22:4 Wapara mhaka nokuda kweropa rako rawakateura, wasvibiswa nezvifananidzo zvawakaita; waswededza mazuva ako, wasvika pamakore ako; naizvozvo ndakakuita chinhu chinoshorwa pamberi pamamwe marudzi, nechinosekwa nenyika dzose." 
Ezekiel22:5 Vari pedyo newe, navari kure, vachakuseka, iwe une zita rakasvibiswa, uzere nebope." 
Ezekiel22:6 “Tarira, machinda aIsiraeri akapinda mukati mako, mumwe nomumwe nesimba rake, kuzoteura ropa." 
Ezekiel22:7 Baba namai vakazvidzwa mukati mako, vatorwa vakamanikidzwa mukati mako, nherera nechirikadzi dzakaitirwa zvakaipa mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:8 Iwe wakashora zvinhu zvangu zvitsvene, wakamhura maSabata angu." 
Ezekiel22:9 Vanhu vana makuhwa vakapinda mukati mako kuzoteura ropa, vakadya pamusoro pamakomo mukati mako, vakaita zvinonyadzisa mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:10 Vakafukura kunyadza kwamadzibaba avo mukati mako, vakaninipisa mukati mako mukadzi wakanga asina kunaka nokuva kumwedzi kwake." 
Ezekiel22:11 Mumwe akaita zvinonyangadza nomukadzi womunun'una wake, mumwe wakachinyira mukadzi womwana wake, mumwezve mukati mako wakaninipisa hanzvadzi yake, mukunda wababa vake." 
Ezekiel22:12 Vakagamuchira zvipo mukati mako kuzoteura ropa; iwe wakatora mhindu yemari neyemichero, wakazvifumisa uchimanikidza wokwako, ukandikanganwa,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Naizvozvo, tarira, ndakarovanya maoko angu pamusoro pepfuma yako yawakawana nokunyengera, napamusoro peropa rako rakanga riri mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:14 Ko mwoyo wako ungatsunga, kana maoko ako angasimba here pamazuva andichakutonga? Ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, ndichazviita." 
Ezekiel22:15 “Ndichakuparadzira pakati pamarudzi, nokukudzingira kunyika dzose; ndichapedza tsvina yako mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:16 “Uchazvimhurisa pamberi pamamwe marudzi; zvino uchazoziva kuti ndini Jehovha.” 
Ezekiel22:17 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mwanakomana womunhu, imba yaIsiraeri yaita samarara kwandiri; vose vakaita sendarira netini nedare nomutobvu mukati mevira; vakaita samarara esirivha." 
Ezekiel22:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Mose zvamava marara, naizvozvo, tarirai, ndichakuunganidzirai mukati meJerusaremu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Sezvavanounganidzira sirivha nendarira nedare nomutobvu netini mukati mevira, kuti vapfutidzire moto pamusoro pazvo, vazvinyause, saizvozvo ndichakuunganidzai nokutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu, ndikuiseimo, ndikunyausei." 
Ezekiel22:21 Zvirokwazvo, ndichakuunganidzai, nokupfutidza moto wehasha dzangu pamusoro penyu; muchanyauswa mukati maro." 
Ezekiel22:22 Sirivha sezvainonyauswa mukati mevira, saizvozvo imi muchanyauswa mukati maro; zvino muchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro penyu.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mwanakomana womunhu uti kwairi, ‘Iwe uri nyika isina kunatswa, isina kunisirwa mvura nezuva reshungu dzangu.’" 
Ezekiel22:25 Vaporofita vayo vakaita rangano mukati mayo; seshumba inoomba ichibvanzura chayabata, saizvozvo vakapedza mweya yavanhu; vakatora pfuma nezvinokosha, vakawanza chirikadzi mukati mayo." 
Ezekiel22:26 Vapristi vayo vakaparadza murairo wangu, vakamhura zvinhu zvangu zvitsvene; havana kutsaura pakati pezvitsvene nezvisati zviri zvitsvene, kana kuzivisa vanhu kusiyana kwezvisina kunaka nezvakanaka, vakatsinzina meso avo varege kuona maSabata angu; ini ndamhurwa pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Machinda ayo mukati mayo vakafanana namapere anobvanzura zvaabata, vachiteura ropa nokuparadza mweya, kuti vawane pfuma vachinyengera." 
Ezekiel22:28 “Vaporofita vayo vakavayuwira nesuko, vachiona zvinonyengera nokuvaukira zvenhema vachiti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, izvo Jehovha haana kutaura.’" 
Ezekiel22:29 “Vanhu venyika vakamanikidza nokupamba; zvirokwazvo vakatambudza varombo navanoshayiwa, vakamanikidza mutorwa asina mhaka hake." 
Ezekiel22:30 Zvino ndakatsvaka pakati pavo munhu angagadzira rusvingo, angamira pakakoromoka pamberi pangu achirwira nyika, kuti ndirege kuiparadza; asi handina kuwana nomumwe." 
Ezekiel22:31 Naizvozvo ndakadurura shungu dzangu pamusoro pavo; ndakavapedza nomoto wehasha dzangu; ndakauyisa zvavakaita pamisoro yavo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel23:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, kwakanga kuna vakadzi vaviri, vanasikana vamai vamwe;" 
Ezekiel23:3 ivo vakapata muIjipiti, vakapata vachiri vaduku; mazamu avo akanyangatwa ipapo, minyatso yohumhandara hwavo yakabatwa–batwapo." 
Ezekiel23:4 “Mazita avo akanga ari Ohora, mukuru, naOhoribha munun'una wake; ivo vakazova vangu, vakabereka vanakomana navanasikana. Zvino kana ari mazita avo, Samaria ndiOhora, Jerusaremu ndiOhoribha." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ohora wakapata, ari wangu, akadana navadikanwi vake, ivo vaAsiria vaigara pedyo naye," 
Ezekiel23:6 vaifuka micheka mitema, vaiva vabati namadzishe, ose ari majaya anodikanwa, vatasvi vaifamba namabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:7 Iye akapata navo, ivo varume vakatsaurwa vose pakati peAsiria, zvino waizvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvavose vaidikanwa naye." 
Ezekiel23:8 “Uye haana kuzorega kupata kwake kwaakabva nako Ijipiti; nokuti varume vakavata naye achiri muduku, vakabata–bata minyatso yohumhandara hwake, vakadurura hupombwe hwavo pamusoro pake." 
Ezekiel23:9 “Naizvozvo ndakamuisa mumaoko avadikanwi vake, mumaoko avaAsiria, vaakadana navo." 
Ezekiel23:10 Ivo vakafukura kunyadza kwake, vakatora vanakomana navanasikana vake, vakamuuraya iye nomunondo, zita rake rikazosekwa pakati pavakadzi; nokuti vakamutonga." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Zvino munun'una wake Ohoribha wakazviona hake, kunyangwe zvakadaro iye wakanga akanyanya pakudana kwake navadikanwi, uye kupata kwake kwakapfuura kupata kwomukuru wake." 
Ezekiel23:12 “Iye akadana navaAsiria, vaiva vabati namadzishe, vaigara pedyo naye, vakafuka zvakaisvonaka kwazvo, vari vatasvi vanofamba namabhiza, ose ari majaya anodikanwa." 
Ezekiel23:13 Zvino ndakaona kuti wasvibiswa; ivo vose vakafamba nenzira imwe. 
Ezekiel23:14 “Akawedzera kupata kwake; nokuti wakaona zvifananidzo zvavarume pamadziro, zviri zvifananidzo zvaKaradhia, zvakaitwa nomuti mutsvuku," 
Ezekiel23:15 vakasunga zviuno zvavo nebhandi, vane ngowani dzemicheka pamisoro yavo, vose vakaita samachinda kana vachionekwa, vakafanana navaBhabhironi paKaradhia, iyo nyika yokuberekwa kwavo." 
Ezekiel23:16 Zvino wakati achivaona, akavada kwazvo, akatuma nhume kwavari paKaradhia." 
Ezekiel23:17 VaBhabhironi vakauya kwaari ari panhoo dzorudo, vakamusvibisa nohupombwe hwavo, iye akasvibiswa pamwechete navo, mweya wake ukazorambana navo." 
Ezekiel23:18 “Zvino wakati afukura kupata kwake, nokufukura kunyadza kwake, mweya wangu ukarambana naye, mweya wangu sezvawakarambana nomukuru wake." 
Ezekiel23:19 “Kunyangwe zvakadaro akaramba achiwedzera kupata kwake, achirangarira mazuva ohuduku hwake, aakapata nawo panyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel23:20 Akadana zvikuru navadikanwi vake, vane nyama yakaita senyama yembongoro, uye zvinobudiswa navo zvakaita sezvinobudiswa namabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:21 Zvino ukayeudzwa zvakashata zvohuduku hwako, panguva yawakabatwa–batwa minyatso yako navaIjipiti nokuda kwamazamu ohumhandara hwako." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Naizvozvo iwe Ohoribha, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha tarira, ndichakumutsira vadikanwi vako, vakazorambwa nomweya wako; ndichavauyisa kwauri kuzorwa newe kumativi ose;" 
Ezekiel23:23 vanoti, vaBhabhironi, navaKaradhia vose, Pekodhi naShoa naKoa, navaAsiria pamwechete navo, iwo majaya anodikanwa, vose vari vabati namadzishe, machinda navarume vane mbiri, vose vakatasva mabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:24 Vachauya kuzorwa newe nenhumbi dzokurwa, nengoro, nezvinofamba namakumbo engoro, neboka ravanhu vazhinji; vachazvirongedza kuzorwa newe nenhoo huru nenhoo duku nengowani kumativi ose; ini ndichavapa simba rokutonga, vakutonge nokutonga kwavo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndichamutsa godo rangu kuzorwa newe, ivo vakuitire hasha; vachabvisa mhino dzako nenzeve dzako, vakasara kwauri vachaurayiwa nomunondo; vachatora vanakomana vako navanasikana vako; vakasara kwauri vachapera nomoto." 
Ezekiel23:26 Vachakubvisirawo nguo dzako, nokukutorera hukomba hwako hwakanaka." 
Ezekiel23:27 “Saizvozvo ndichakugumisira zvakashata zvako nokupata kwako kwawakabva nako kunyika yeIjipiti, kuti urege kuzozvitarirazve nameso ako, kana kuzorangarira Ijipiti." 
Ezekiel23:28 “Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarira, ndichakuisa mumaoko avaunovenga, mumaoko aivo vakarambwa nomweya wako;" 
Ezekiel23:29 ivo vachakuitira ruvengo, vachakutorera zvose zvawakabatira, vakakurega usina chawakafuka wakashama; kunyadza kwokupata kwako kuchafukurwa, zvakaipa zvako pamwechete nokupata kwako.’" 
Ezekiel23:30 “Uchaitirwa zvinhu izvi nemhaka yokuti wakapata namarudzi avanhu, uye nemhaka yokuti wakasvibiswa nezvifananidzo zvavo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Iwe wakafamba nenzira yomukuru wako; saka ndichaisa mukombe wake muruoko rwako. 
Ezekiel23:32 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Uchanwira pamukombe womukuru wako, wakadzika mukuru; uchasekwa nokudadirwa, nokuti iwe une zvizhinji zvirimo." 
Ezekiel23:33 Uchazara nokubatwa nokuchema; mukombe womukuru wako Samaria mukombe wokushamiswa nokuparadzwa. 
Ezekiel23:34 Uchaunwa nokuupedza chose, uchatsenga zvaenga zvawo, nokubvanzura mazamu ako; nokuti ndini ndakataura izvozvo,’ ” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel23:35 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Zvawakandikanganwa, ukandirasira shure kwako, naizvozvo chiva nemhosva yezvakashata zvako, neyokupata kwako.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Jehovha akatiwo kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, chitonga Ohora naOhoribha, uvazivise zvinonyangadza zvavo." 
Ezekiel23:37 “Nokuti wakafeva, ropa riri pamaoko avo; wakafeva nezvifananidzo zvavo; vakapinzawo vanakomana vavo vavakandiberekera mumoto, kuti zvidyiwe nazvo." 
Ezekiel23:38 Vakandiitirawo chinhu ichi, vakasvibisawo nzvimbo yangu tsvene nezuva iro, vakamhura maSabata angu." 
Ezekiel23:39 “Nokuti vakati vabayira zvifananidzo zvavo vana vavo, vakapinda nezuva iro munzvimbo yangu tsvene kuti vaimhure; tarirai, ndizvo zvavakaita mukati meimba yangu." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Makatumawo nhume kundodana varume vanobva kure nhume yakatumwako kwavari ivo vakauya, iwe ukazvishamba nokuda kwavo, ukazodza meso ako nomuti, nokuzvishongedza nezvishongo," 
Ezekiel23:41 ukagara panhoo dzakaisvonaka, dzakanga dzakagadzirirwa tafura pamberi padzo, pawakagadzika zvinonhuwira zvangu namafuta angu." 
Ezekiel23:42 Izwi ravazhinji vakanga vachifara rakanga rinaye; zvino pamwechete navarume vakabva kuvazhinji, vakauya navakariri vedoro, vaibva kurenje, vakaisa zvishongo pamaoko avo, nekorona dzakanaka pamisoro yavo.”" 
Ezekiel23:43 Zvino ndakati kuna iye akanga apera nokufeva kwake, “Zvino vachaita hupombwe naye, naiye navo." 
Ezekiel23:44 “Ipapo vakapinda kwaari, sezvavanopinda kuchipfeve; saizvozvo vakapinda kuna Ohora naOhoribha, ivo vakadzi vakashata." 
Ezekiel23:45 Naizvozvo varume vakarurama vachavatonga sezvinotongwa zvipfeve, sezvinotongwa vakadzi vakateura ropa, nokuti zvipfeve, ropa riri pamaoko avo.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndichauyisa boka ravarwi kuzorwa navo, ndichavaregera kuti vadzungaidzwe kwose–kwose vapambwe." 
Ezekiel23:47 Boka iro richavataka namabwe, nokuvabaya neminondo yavo; vachauraya vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo, nokupisa dzimba dzavo nomoto." 
Ezekiel23:48 Saizvozvo ndichagumisa zvakashata panyika, kuti vakadzi vose vadzidziswe kuti varege kutevera zvakashata zvenyu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Vachakutsivirai zvakashata zvenyu, imi muchava nezvivi zvezvifananidzo zvenyu, zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Zvino negore repfumbamwe, nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva regumi romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, nyora zita nezuva, rezuva iro rino. Mambo weBhabhironi akaswedera Jerusaremu nezura irero." 
Ezekiel24:3 “Ureve mufananidzo kuimba inondimukira, uti kwavari zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Gudza gate, rigadze, udirewo mvura mariri;" 
Ezekiel24:4 unganidziramo nhindi dzaro, ndindi dzose dzakanaka, chidya nebandauko; rizadze namapfupa akatsanangurwa." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tora rakatsanangurwa pakati pamakwai, nesvinga rehuni pasi pamapfupa, rivirise kwazvo, mapfupa aro abikwe mukati maro.’ ”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Guta reropa rine nhamo, negate rine ngura mukati maro, risina kubvisirwa ngura yaro! Budisamo nhindi imwe neimwe; rigere kutongerwa." 
Ezekiel24:7 Nokuti ropa raro riri mukati maro, rakariisa paruware rusine chinhu, harina kuridururira pasi, kuti ririfukidze neguruva." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ndakaisa ropa raro paruware rusine chinhu, rirege kufukidzwa, kuti hasha dzangu dzimutswe kuzotsiva.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Guta rine ropa, rine nhamo! Ndichakurisawo svinga rehuni." 
Ezekiel24:10 “Tutirai huni, pfutidzai moto, bikai nyama zvakanaka, kodzai muto, mapfupa atsve." 
Ezekiel24:11 Zvino urigadze pamazimbe awo risina chiro, ripise, ndarira yaro itsvuke, matsvina aro anyauke mukati maro, kuti ngura yaro ipere." 
Ezekiel24:12 Rakandinetsa nokubata zvikuru; kunyangwe zvakadaro ngura yaro haibvi mukati maro; ngura yaro ngaiiswe mumoto! 
Ezekiel24:13 “Tsvina yako ine zvakashata; zvandakakunatsa, ukasanatswa, haungazonatswi patsvina yako, kusvikira ndanyaradza hasha dzangu pamusoro pako." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, zvichaitika, ini ndichazviita, handingadzoki, handingapembedzi, kana kuzvidemba; vachakutonga sezvakafanira nzira dzako, sezvakafanira zvawakaita,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel24:15 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikawo kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira, ndinokutorera pakarepo norufu unodikanwa nameso ako, asi haufaniri kuchema kana kuungudza, nemisodzi yako haifaniri kuyerera." 
Ezekiel24:17 “Gomera, asi ngazvirege kunzwika, usachema wakafa; sungira zvishongo mumusoro wako, upfeke shangu dzako patsoka dzako; usapfumbira muromo wako, kana kudya zvokudya zvavanhu.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Ipapo ndakataura navanhu mangwanani, madekwana mukadzi wangu akafa, ndikaita mangwanani sezvandakarayirwa." 
Ezekiel24:19 Zvino vanhu vakati kwandiri, “Ko haungatiudziwo kuti zvinhu izvi zvinoti kudini kwatiri, zvaunoita zvakadaro here?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Zvino ndikati kwavari, “Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Taura neimba yaIsiraeri,’ uti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha ‘Tarirai, ndichamhura nzvimbo yangu tsvene, yamunozvikudza nayo muchiti isimba renyu, inodikanwa nameso enyu, inonzwira tsitsi nemweya yenyu; vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vamakasiya, vachaurayiwa nomunondo.’" 
Ezekiel24:22 “Ipapo muchaita sezvandakaita ini, hamungapfumbiri miromo yenyu, kana kudya zvokudya zvavanhu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Zvishongo zvenyu zvichava pamisoro yenyu, neshangu dzenyu patsoka dzenyu; hamungachemi kana kuungudza, asi muchapera muzvakaipa zvenyu, muchigomerana." 
Ezekiel24:24 Saizvozvo Ezekieri achava chiratidzo kwamuri; zvose zvaakaita iye, nemi muchazviitawo; kana zvichisvika, muchaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel24:25 “Zvino kana uriwe, mwanakomana womunhu, nomusi wandichavatorera simba ravo, ivo mufaro wechakanaka chavo, chinodikanwa nameso avo, icho chinodikanwa nemweya yavo, vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo," 
Ezekiel24:26 ko nomusi uyo unopukunyuka haangauyi kwauri kuti akuudze izvozvo munzeve dzako here? 
Ezekiel24:27 Nomusi uyo muromo wako uchashamisirwa wakapukunyuka, uchataura, haungazovi mbeveve; saizvozvo uchava chiratidzo kwavari; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kuvana vaAmoni, uporofite pamusoro pavo;" 
Ezekiel25:3 uti kuvana vaAmoni, ‘Inzwai shoko raIshe Jehovha,’ zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, imi zvamakati, ‘Toko!’ Pamusoro penzvimbo yangu tsvene, panguva yokumhurwa kwayo, napamusoro penyika yaIsiraeri panguva yokuitwa kwayo dongo, napamusoro peimba yaJudha, panguva yokutapwa kwavo;" 
Ezekiel25:4 naizvozvo tarirai, ndichakuisai kuvana vamabvazuva muve vavo, vachaisa misasa yavo pakati penyu, vachavaka dzimba dzavo pakati penyu; vachadya michero yenyu, nokunwa mukaka wenyu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Rabha ndichariita mafuro engamera, nenyika yavana vaAmoni nzvimbo inovata makwai; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel25:6 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Zvamakarovanya maoko enyu, nokutsikisa netsoka dzenyu, mukafara pamusoro penyika yaIsiraeri muchivazvidza nemweya yenyu yose;" 
Ezekiel25:7 zvino tarirai, ndakatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro penyu, ndichakuisai kumarudzi muve sechinhu chakapambwa; ndichakubvisai pakati pamarudzi, ndichakupedzai panyika dzose; ndichakuparadzai, zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Moabhu naSeiri zvavanoti, ‘Tarirai, imba yaJudha yakafanana namarudzi ose;’" 
Ezekiel25:9 naizvozvo, tarirai, ndichazarura rutivi rwenyika yaMoabhu kubva kumaguta, kubva kumaguta aro ari kumiganhu yaro, ihwo hukomba hwenyika, anoti: Bhetijeshimoti neBhaarimeoni neKiriataimi," 
Ezekiel25:10 ndichazvipa vana vokumabvazuva, pamwechete navana vaAmoni, ive yavo, kuti vana vaAmoni varege kuzorangarirwa pakati pamarudzi;" 
Ezekiel25:11 ndichatonga Moabhu; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.” 
Ezekiel25:12 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Edhomu zvavakatsiva imba yaJudha, vakapara mhaka kwazvo, vakazvitsivira kwavari;" 
Ezekiel25:13 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro paEdhomu, ndichaparadzapo vanhu nezvipfuwo, ndichaiita dongo kubva paTemani, vachaurayiwa nomunondo kusvikira paDhedhani.’"
