Ezekiel25:14 “Ndichazvitsivira kuna Edhomu namaoko avanhu vangu Isiraeri; vachaitira Edhomu zvakarehwa nokutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu, vachaziva kutsiva kwangu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel25:15 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “VaFirisitia zvavakazvitsivira, vakatsiva vachizvidza nemweya yavo, vachida kuparadza nokuvenga kusingaperi," 
Ezekiel25:16 naizvozvo, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pavaFirisitia, ndichabvisa vaKereti nokuparadza vakasara pamhenderekedzo dzegungwa." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndichazvitsivira kwavari nokutsiva kukuru nokutuka kwehasha; vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichiuyisa kutsiva kwangu pamusoro pavo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Zvino negore regumi nerimwe, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, Tire zvarakati pamusoro peJerusaremu, ‘Toko waro! Raputsika, iro raiva suwo ramarudzi; roringira kwandiri, zvino ini ndichazadzwazve, iro zvaraitwa dongo.’" 
Ezekiel26:3 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, iwe Tire, ndichauyisa marudzi mazhinji kuzorwa newe, sezvinouyisa gungwa mafungu aro." 
Ezekiel26:4 Vachaparadza masvingo eTire, nokukoromora shongwe dzaro; ndicharitsvairira guruva raro, riite soruware rusine chinhu." 
Ezekiel26:5 Richava nzvimbo panonikwa mimbure pakati pegungwa, nokuti ndakazvitaura ini,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; richava kumarudzi sechinhu chakapambwa." 
Ezekiel26:6 Vakunda varo vari kuruwa vachaurayiwa nomunondo; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.” 
Ezekiel26:7 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Tarirai, ndichauyisira Tire Nebhukadhirezari mambo weBhabhironi, mambo wamadzimambo, achibva kurutivi rwokumusoro ana mabhiza nengoro navatasvi vamabhiza, nehondo navanhu vazhinji." 
Ezekiel26:8 Iye achauraya nomunondo vakunda vako vari kuruwa, achakuvakira nhare dzokurwa newe, nokukututira murwi wokurwa." 
Ezekiel26:9 Achamisa zvokugumura pamasvingo ako, achakoromora shongwe dzako nematombo." 
Ezekiel26:10 “Nokuwanda kwamabhiza ake guruva rawo richakufukidza; masvingo ako achadengenyeka nomutsindo wavatasvi vamabhiza, namakumbo engoro, nengoro, panguva yaachapinda pamasuwo ako, somupindirwo weguta rakakoromorerwa rusvingo." 
Ezekiel26:11 “Achatsika nzira dzako dzose dzomuguta namahwamanda amabhiza ake, achauraya vanhu vako nomunondo, neshongwe dzinoratidza simba renyu dzichawira pasi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Vachapamba pfuma yako nokukutorera zvokushambadzira zvako, vachakoromora masvingo ako, nokuparadza dzimba dzako dzinofadza; vachaisa mabwe ako namatanda ako neguruva rako mukati memvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel26:13 “Ndichagumisa mazwi enziyo dzako, kurira kwembira dzako hakungazonzwiki." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndichakuita ruware rusine chinhu, uchava nzvimbo panonikwa mimbure; hauchazovakwizve, nokuti ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Ezekiel26:15 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kuTire, “Ko zvivi hazvingadengenyeki here nokutinhira kwokuwa kwako, kana vanhu vako vakakuvadzwa vachigomera, kana vanhu vachiurayiwa mukati mako here?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Nenguva iyo machinda ose okugungwa achabhuruka pazvigaro zvawo zvohushe, vachaisa pasi nguo dzavo dzohushe nokubvisa zvokufuka zvavo zvakarukwa; vachafuka kudedera, vachagara pasi vachingodedera vachishamiswa pamusoro pako." 
Ezekiel26:17 “Vachaita mariro pamusoro pako, vachiti kwauri, ‘Aiwa, wakaparadzwa sei, iwe wakanga wakagarwa navanhu vaiziva kufamba negungwa, iro guta rakanga rine mbiri, rakanga rine simba pagungwa, iro navanhu varo, vaityisa vose vagereko.’" 
Ezekiel26:18 “Zvino zvivi zvichadengenyeka nezuva rokuwa kwako; zvirokwazvo, zvivi zviri mugungwa zvichavhunduka nokubviswa kwako." 
Ezekiel26:19 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Nenguva yandichakuita guta dongo, sezvakaita maguta asina vanhu, nenguva yandichauyisa gungwa rakadzika pamusoro pako, ukafukidzwa nemvura zhinji;" 
Ezekiel26:20 nenguva iyo ndichakuburusa pamwechete navanoburukira mugomba, kuvanhu vekare; ndichakugarisai panzvimbo dziri pasi dzenyika, pakanga panamatongo kare nakare, pamwechete navanoburukira mugomba, kuti urege kugarwa navanhu; asi ndichaisa mufaro munyika yavapenyu.’" 
Ezekiel26:21 “Asi iwe ndichakuita chinhu chinotyisa, haungazovipo; kunyangwe ukatsvakwa, haungawanikwizve nokusingaperi,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel27:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, ita mariro pamusoro peTaya;" 
Ezekiel27:3 uti kuTaya, ‘Nhai iwe ugere pavanopinda pagungwa, iwe unoshambadzirana namarudzi avanhu pazvivi zvizhinji, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha,’ iwe Taya, wakati, ‘Ndakakwana pakunaka.’" 
Ezekiel27:4 Nyika yako iri mumwoyo wamakungwa; vavaki vako vakakwanisa kunaka kwako. 
Ezekiel27:5 Vakaita mapuranga ako ose nemisipiresi inobva Seniri; vakatora musidhari weRebhanoni kukuitira danda rechikepe. 
Ezekiel27:6 Matanda ako okukwasva nawo vakaaita nemioki yeBhashani; vakaita zvigaro zvako pazvikepe nenyanga dzenzou dzakavezerwa mumapuranga emipaini yakabva kuzvivi zveSaipurasi. 
Ezekiel27:7 Maseiri ako aiva omucheka wakaisvonaka, wakasonerwa hukomba, aibva Ijipiti, kuti uve mureza wako; denga rako raiva romucheka mutema nomutsvuku waibva kuzvivi zveErisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 “Vakanga vagere Sidhoni neArivhadhi ndivo vaiva vakwasvi vako; vanhu vako vakachenjera, iwe Taya, vakanga vari mukati mako, ndivo vaiva vafambisi vezvikepe zvako." 
Ezekiel27:9 Vakuru veGebhari navakachenjera varo vaiva mukati mako vachikugadzirira paisvinirira mvura; zvikepe zvose zvegungwa zvaiva mukati mako pamwechete navafambisi vazvo kuti vashambadzirane newe. 
Ezekiel27:10 “Vanhu vePezhia neRidhia neRibhia vaiva muhondo yako, vaiva varwi vako; vaiturikira mukati mako nhoo dzavo nengowani dzavo; vaikuitira mbiri." 
Ezekiel27:11 Varume veArivhadhi vaiva pamusoro pamasvingo ako kumativi ose pamwechete nehondo yako, nemhare dzaiva pamusoro peshongwe dzako; vaiturika nhoo dzavo pamasvingo ako kumativi ose, vaikwanisa kunaka kwako." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Tashishi raishambadzirana newe nokuda kwepfuma zhinji yamarudzi ose, vakatenga nhumbi dzako nesirivha nedare netini nomutobvu." 
Ezekiel27:13 Nyika dzeJavhani, Tubhari, neMesheki ndivo vaitengerana newe, vaitenga nhumbi dzako nemiviri yavanhu nemidziyo yendarira." 
Ezekiel27:14 Veimba yaTogarima vakatenga nhumbi dzako namabhiza namabhiza ehondo namahesera. 
Ezekiel27:15 Varume veDhedhani ndivo vaitengerana newe; zvivi zvizhinji zvaiva nzvimbo pawaitengesa noruoko rwako; vaiuya nenyanga dzenzou namatanda omushuma kuzotsinhanha newe. 
Ezekiel27:16 Nyika yeSiria yaishambadzirana newe nokuda kwezvizhinji zvako zvakaitwa namaoko; vakatenga nhumbi dzako namabwe esimaragidhino, nomucheka mutema, nezvakarukwa, nomucheka wakaisvonaka, nekorari, namabwe anovaima." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judha nenyika yaIsiraeri ndivo vaitengerana newe; vaitenga nhumbi dzako nezviyo zveMiniti, nezvinotapira, nohuchi, namafuta, nebharisami." 
Ezekiel27:18 Dhamasikosi raishambadzirana newe richitenga zvizhinji zvako zvakaitwa namaoko, nokuda kwepfuma zhinji yamarudzi ose, newaini yeHeribhoni nemvere chena." 
Ezekiel27:19 Nyika dzeVedhani neJavhani dzakatenga nhumbi dzako nechinda; dare rinobwinya, nekasia, nekaramo ndizvo zvakanga zviri pakati penhumbi dzako." 
Ezekiel27:20 “Dhedhani raikutengesera micheka inokosha yokutasvisa mabhiza nayo. 
Ezekiel27:21 Nyika yeArabhia namachinda ose enyika yeKedhari ndivo vaitenga pamaoko enyu; makwayana namakondohwe nembudzi ndizvo zvavaitenga kwauri. 
Ezekiel27:22 Vatengesi veShebha neRaama ndivo vaitengerana newe; vaishambadzira nhumbi dzako nezvinonhuwira zvakaisvonaka, namabwe ose anokosha, nendarama." 
Ezekiel27:23 Harani neChane neEdheni ivo vatengesi veShebha neAshuri neKirimadhi ndizvo vaitengerana newe. 
Ezekiel27:24 Ndivo vaitengerana newe nenhumbi dzakatsaurwa, nenguo dzemicheka mitema nezvakarukwa, namabhokisi ezvokufuka zvinokosha, akasungwa namabote, akavezwa nemisidhari, pakati penhumbi dzako." 
Ezekiel27:25 Zvikepe zveTashishi ndizvo zvaitakura nhumbi dzako, iwe ukazadzwa, ukaitirwa mbiri mumwoyo yamakungwa." 
Ezekiel27:26 Vakwasvi vako vakakuisa kumvura zhinji; mhepo yokumabvazuva yakakuputsa mumwoyo wamakungwa. 
Ezekiel27:27 Pfuma yako, nenhumbi dzako, nezvokutengesa zvako, vafambisi vezvikepe zvako, navarairi vazvo, navagadziri vako panosinirira mvura, navashambadziri venhumbi dzako, navarwi vako vose, vari mukati mako, navanhu vako vazhinji vari mukati mako, zvose zvichawira mumwoyo wamakungwa nezuva rokuparadzwa kwako." 
Ezekiel27:28 Mafungu achadengenyeka nomubvumo wokudanidzira kwavarairi vezvikepe zvako. 
Ezekiel27:29 Vose vanobata namatanda okukwasva, ivo vafambisi navarairi vose vapagungwa, vachaburuka pazvikepe zvavo; vachamira pamhenderekedzo," 
Ezekiel27:30 vachadana namazwi avo pamusoro pako, vachachema kwazvo; vachikushira guruva pamisoro yavo; vachaumburukira, mumadota;" 
Ezekiel27:31 vachazviveurira misoro nokuda kwako, vachazvisunga zviuno namasaga, vachikuchema nemweya ine shungu kwazvo nokuchema kukuru." 
Ezekiel27:32 Pakuchema kwavo vachakuitira mariro, vachachema pamisoro pako, vachiti, ‘Ndianiko wakatongofanana neTaya, wakaita saiye wakaparadzwa mukati megungwa?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Panguva yakaenda nhumbi dzako kumakungwa, wakagutisa vanhu vazhinji; wakafumisa madzimambo enyika nepfuma yako zhinji nezvawaitengesa." 
Ezekiel27:34 Panguva yawakaputswa namakungwa mukati memvura zhinji yakadzika, nhumbi dzako navanhu vako vose zvakawira pasi mukati mako." 
Ezekiel27:35 Vose vagere pazvivi vanoshamiswa pamusoro pako, madzimambo avo anotya kwazvo; zviso zvavo zvinodedera." 
Ezekiel27:36 Vatengesi pakati pamarudzi avanhu vanokuridzira muridzo, wava chinhu chinotyisa, haungatongozovipo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, iti kumuchinda weTaya, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Mwoyo wako zvawakazvikudza,’ iwe ukati, ‘Ini ndiri mwari, ndigere pachigaro chaMwari pakati pamakungwa,’ kunyangwe zvakadaro, uri munhu hako, hauzi Mwari, kunyangwe wakamisa mwoyo wako somwoyo waMwari;" 
Ezekiel28:3 tarira, unokunda Dhanieri pakuchenjera kwako, hakuna chakavanzika chausingazivi iwe;" 
Ezekiel28:4 wakazviwanira pfuma nohuchenjeri hwako uye nokuziva kwako, ukazviwanira ndarama nesirivha muzvivigiro zvepfuma yako;" 
Ezekiel28:5 wakawedzera pfuma yako nohuchenjeri hwako hukuru uye nokushambadzira kwako, mwoyo wako ukazvikudza nokuda kwepfuma yako;" 
Ezekiel28:6 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Zvawakamisa mwoyo wako somwoyo waMwari,’" 
Ezekiel28:7 naizvozvo tarira, ndinouyisa vatorwa pamusoro pako, ivo vanotyisa pakati pamarudzi ose; vachavhomorera kunaka kwohuchenjeri hwako minondo yavo, vachasvibisa kubwinya kwako." 
Ezekiel28:8 “Vachakuburusira kugomba; uchafa norufu rwavanourayiwa mumwoyo wamakungwa. 
Ezekiel28:9 Ko ungazoreva pamberi pounokuuraya, uchiti, ‘Ndini Mwari?’ Asi uri munhu, hauzi Mwari, muruoko rwaiye unokukuvadza." 
Ezekiel28:10 Uchafa norufu rwousina kudzingiswa namaoko avatorwa; nokuti ndini ndakataura izvozvo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel28:11 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mwanakomana womunhu, itira mambo weTaya mariro, uti kwaari, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Iwe wokuisa chisimbiso chako pachiyero, uzere nohuchenjeri, hwakakwana pakunaka.’" 
Ezekiel28:13 Wakanga uri paEdheni, mumunda waMwari; wakanga wakafukidzwa namabwe anokosha amarudzi ose, anoti, saridhio netopasi nedhaimani neberiri, neonikisi nejasipiri nesafiri nesimaragidhino nekaribhunikuri; ngoma dzako nenyere dzako dzakanga dzakaitwa nendarama mukati mako, zvakagadzirwa nezuva rokusikwa kwako." 
Ezekiel28:14 Iwe wakanga uri kerubhi rakazodzwa, raifukidzira areka, ndikakugadza ukava pamusoro pegomo dzvene raMwari; waifamba–famba pakati pamabwe omoto." 
Ezekiel28:15 Wakanga wakakwana panzira dzako kubva pazuva rokusikwa kwako, kusvikira kusarurama kwakawanikwa mukati mako." 
Ezekiel28:16 Nokuwanda kwokushambadzira kwako vakazadza mukati mako nokuita nesimba, ukatadza; naizvozvo ndakakudzinga pagomo raMwari ndichiti uri chinhu chinomhurwa, ndikakuparadza, iwe kerubhi raifukidzira areka, ndikakubvisa pakati pamabwe omoto." 
Ezekiel28:17 Mwoyo wako wakazvikudza nokuda kwokunaka kwako; wakaodza huchenjeri hwako nokuda kwokubwinya kwako; ndakakuwisira pasi, ndakakuisa pamberi pamadzimambo kuti vakuone." 
Ezekiel28:18 Nokuwanda kwezvakaipa zvako, nokusarurama kwokushambadzira kwako, wakamhura nzvimbo dzako tsvene; naizvozvo ndakabudisa moto mukati mako; wakakupedza, ndikakushandura ukava madota panyika pamberi pavose vanokuona." 
Ezekiel28:19 Vose, vanokuziva pakati pamarudzi avanhu, vachashamiswa pamusoro pako; wava chinhu chinotyisa, haungazovi chinhu nokusingaperi.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kurutivi rweSidhoni, uporofite pamusoro paro," 
Ezekiel28:22 uti, zvanzi nashe Jehovha, ‘Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, iwe Sidhoni; ndichakudzwa mukati mako; vanhu vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, nenguva yandinoita mukati maro izvo zvandakatonga, ndichiitwa mutsvene mukati maro.’" 
Ezekiel28:23 Nokuti ndichatuma chirwere chakaipa mukati maro, neropa munzira dzaro; vakakuvadzwa vachawira pasi mukati maro, kana munondo uchiuya pamusoro paro kumativi ose; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel28:24 “Hapachazovi norukato runobaya imba yaIsiraeri, kana munzwa unokuvadza pakati pavaivakomberedza, vaivashora; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Nenguva yandinenge ndaunganidza imba yaIsiraeri kumarudzi avanhu kwavakanga vakaparadzirwa, ndikaitwa mutsvene pakati pamberi pamarudzi, nenguva iyo vachagara munyika yavo yandakapa muranda wangu Jakobho." 
Ezekiel28:26 Vachagaramo vakachengetwa; zvirokwazvo, vachavaka dzimba, nokusima minda yemizambiringa, vachagara vakachengetwa, kana ndaita zvandakatonga pamusoro pavose vakavapoteredza vanovashora; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Zvino negore regumi, nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva regumi namaviri romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kuna Farao mambo weIjipiti, uporofite pamusoro pake napamusoro peIjipiti rose." 
Ezekiel29:3 Taura uti, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, iwe Farao mambo weIjipiti, iwe shato huru uvete pakati penzizi dzako,’ ukati, ‘Rwizi rwangu ndorwangu, ndakazviitira irwo.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Ndichaisa zvikokoono mushaya dzako, ndichanamatidza hove dzenzizi dzako pamakwande ako, ndichakubvisa mukati menzizi dzako pamwechete nehove dzose dzenzizi dzako dzakanamatira pamakwende ako." 
Ezekiel29:5 “Ndichakurashira kurenje, iwe nehove dzose dzenzizi dzako, uchawira pasi pabani pakachena, haungakokerwi kana kuunganidzwa; ndakakuisa kuzvikara zvapasi neshiri dzokudenga, uve zvokudya zvavo.”" 
Ezekiel29:6 “Vose vagere Ijipiti vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, nokuti vakanga vakaita setsvimbo yorutsanga kuimba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel29:7 Vakati vachibata ruoko rwako, iwe ukavhunika, ukatsemura mafudzi avo ose; vakati vachisendama pamisoro pako, iwe ukavhunika, ukamisa zviuno zvavo zviri zvoga." 
Ezekiel29:8 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarira, ndinouyisa munondo pamusoro pako, ndichaparadza pakati pako vanhu nezvipfuwo.’" 
Ezekiel29:9 “Nyika yeIjipiti ichava dongo renzvimbo yakaparadzwa zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. Zvayakati, ‘Rwizi ndorwangu, ndini ndakaruita," 
Ezekiel29:10 naizvozvo, tarira, ndine mhaka newe uye nenzizi dzako, ndichaita nyika yeIjipiti nzvimbo yakaparadzwa chose nedongo, kubva pashongwe yeSevhene kusvikira pamuganho weItiopia.’" 
Ezekiel29:11 Hakuna munhu achapfuura napo norutsoka rwake, norutsoka rwechipfuo harungapfuuri napo, haingagarwi navanhu makore makumi mana." 
Ezekiel29:12 Nyika yeIjipiti ndichaiita dongo pakati penyika dzakaitwa matongo, namaguta ayo achaitwa matongo makore makumi mana pakati pamaguta akaitwa matongo; ndichaparadzira vaIjipiti pakati pamarudzi avanhu, nokuvadzingira kunyika dzose.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Kana makore makumi mana apera, ndichaunganidza VaIjipiti kumarudzi avanhu kwandakanga ndavaparadzira;" 
Ezekiel29:14 ndichadzosazve kutapwa kweIjipiti, ndichavadzoserazve kunyika yePatirosi, kunyika kwavakaberekerwa; vachavapo hushe hwakazvidzwa." 
Ezekiel29:15 Huchava ushe hunozvidzwa kupfuura ushe hwose, hahungazozvimisizve kukunda mamwe marudzi; ndichavatapudza, varege kuzotongazve mamwe marudzi paushe hwavo." 
Ezekiel29:16 “Imba yaIsiraeri haingazovimbi nahwo, huchindiyeudzira zvakaipa zvavo, kana vachicheukira kwavari; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Zvino negore ramakumi maviri namanomwe, nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mwanakomana womunhu, Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, wakabatisa hondo yake basa guru rokurwa neTaya; misoro yose yakasvotorwa namafudzi ose akasvuuka; kunyangwe zvakadaro iye nehondo yake havana kupiwa mubairo neTaya pamusoro pebasa raakabata achirwa navo." 
Ezekiel29:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, nyika yeIjipiti ndichaipa Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi; iye uchatapa vanhu vayo vazhinji, nokutora zvaachapamba, nokutora zvaachatapa; ndizvo zvichava mubairo wehondo yake." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndakamupa iye nyika yeIjipiti, uve muripo wake wezvaakabatira, nokuti vakandibatira ini,’ ” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Nezuva iro ndichamedzera imba yaIsiraeri runyanga, newe ndichakupa muromo wakashamiswa pakati pavo; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita, uti, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Ungudzai! Aiwa, zuva rakaipa sei!’" 
Ezekiel30:3 Nokuti zuva rava pedyo, izuva ramakore; ichava nguva yamarudzi avanhu." 
Ezekiel30:4 Munondo uchauya pamusoro peIjipiti, kurwadziwa kukuru kuchavapo paItiopia, kana vakaurayiwa vachiparadzwa muIjipiti; vachabvisa vanhu vayo vazhinji, nenheyo dzayo dzichakoromorwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 “Itiopia neRibhia, neRidhia, navanhu vose vakavengana, neKubhi, navana venyika vakaita sungano, vachaparadzwa pamwechete navo nomunondo.”" 
Ezekiel30:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Naivo vanotsigira Ijipiti vachaparadzwa; kuzvikudza kwesimba rayo kuchaderera; vachaparadzwamo nomunondo kubva paMigidhori kusvikira paSevhene." 
Ezekiel30:7 Vachava dongo pakati penyika dzakaitwa matongo, namaguta ayo achava pakati pamaguta akaitwa matongo." 
Ezekiel30:8 Zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndaisa moto paIjipiti, vabatsiri vayo vose vaparadzwa." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Nezuva iro nhume dzichabva kwandiri nezvikepe kundotyisa vaItiopia vasine hanya; vachava nokurwadziwa kukuru, sapazuva reIjipiti; nokuti, tarirai, zvinouya.”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndichagumisawo vanhu vazhinji veIjipiti noruoko rwaNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi." 
Ezekiel30:11 “Iye navanhu vake vaanavo, vanotyisa zvikuru pakati pamarudzi, vachauyiswamo kuzoparadza nyika; vachavhomorera Ijipiti minondo yavo, nokuzadza nyika navakaurayiwa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndichapwisa mvura yenzizi, nokutengesa nyika mumaoko avanhu vakaipa; nyika ndichaiita dongo, nezvose zvirimo, noruoko rwavatorwa; ini Jehovha, ndakataura izvozvo.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndichaparadzawo zvifananidzo, nemifananidzo ndichaigumisa paMemufisi; hapangazovi nomuchinda kunyika yeIjipiti; ndichaisa kutya panyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel30:14 Patirosi ndichariita dongo, paZoani ndichaisa moto, ndichaita zvandakatonga pamusoro peNo." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro peSini, iyo nhare yeIjipiti; ndichaparadza vanhu vazhinji veNo." 
Ezekiel30:16 “Ndichaisa moto paIjipiti; Sini richabatwa nokurwadziwa kukuru, No richaparadzwa, Memufisi richava navavengi masikati." 
Ezekiel30:17 Majaya eAvheni neePibhesheti achaurayiwa nomunondo, maguta awa achatapwa." 
Ezekiel30:18 PaTapanesi masikati achaita rima, kana ndichivhunapo majoko eIjipiti, kuzvikudza kwesimba raro kuchapera mukati maro; kana riri iro, richafukidzwa negore, vakunda varo vachatapwa." 
Ezekiel30:19 Saizvozvo ndichaita zvandakatonga pamusoro peIjipiti; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Zvino negore regumi nerimwe, nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva rechinomwe romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ndavhuna ruoko rwaFarao mambo weIjipiti; zvino tarira, haruna kupomberwa, kuti rurapwe, nemishonga, rupomberwe mucheka, kuti ruve nesimba rokubata munondo." 
Ezekiel30:22 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndine mhaka naFarao mambo weIjipiti, ndichavhuna maoko ake, irwo rune simba norumwe rwakavhunika; ndichawisa pasi munondo uri paruoko rwake." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndichaparadzira vaIjipiti pakati pamarudzi, ndichavadzingira kunyika dzose." 
Ezekiel30:24 Asi ndichasimbisa maoko amambo weBhabhironi, nokuisa munondo wangu muruoko rwake; asi ndichavhuna maoko aFarao, uchagomera pamberi pake sezvinogomera munhu akakuvadzwa ari pakufa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndichatsigira maoko amambo weBhabhironi, asi maoko aFarao acharemberera pasi; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichiisa munondo wangu muruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi, iye akautambanudzira pamusoro penyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndichaparadzira vaIjipiti pakati pamarudzi avanhu, nokuvadzingirira kunyika dzose; zvino vachazoziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Zvino negore regumi nerimwe, nomwedzi wechitatu, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, iti kuna Farao mambo weIjipiti, nokuvanhu vake vazhinji, ‘Iwe wakafanana nani paukuru hwako?’" 
Ezekiel31:3 “Tarira, muAsiria akanga ari musidhari paRebhanoni, akanga ana mashizha akanaka, nomumvuri wakaita sowendo, wakareba kwazvo; musoro wawo wakanga uri kumakore." 
Ezekiel31:4 Mvura zhinji yakaumeresa, mvura yapasi–pasi yakaukurisa; nzizi dzayo dzaierera pose pakasimwa, yaisvitsa migero yayo kumiti yose yesango." 
Ezekiel31:5 Naizvozvo muti uyu wakakura kupfuura miti yose yesango, matavi awo akawanda, uye matavi awo akareba nemvura zhinji, nenguva yokumera kwawo." 
Ezekiel31:6 Shiri dzose dzokudenga dzakavaka matendere adzo mumatavi awo, nemhuka dzose dzesango dzakabereka vana vadzo pasi pamatavi, awo; marudzi makuru ose avanhu akagara mumumvuri wawo." 
Ezekiel31:7 “Saizvozvo wakanga wakanaka pakukura kwawo, napakureba kwamatavi awo; nokuti midzi yawo yakanga iri mumvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel31:8 Misidhari mumunda waMwari yakanga isingagoni kuudzitira; miti yemipaini haina kufanana nohutavi hwawo, nemipurani yakanga isina kufanana namatavi awo; kwakanga kusina muti mumunda waMwari wakanga wakafanana nawo pakunaka kwawo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndakauita zvakanaka nokuwanda kwamatavi awo, naizvozvo miti yose yeEdheni, yaiva mumunda waMwari, yaiugodora." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Zvawakakura zvikuru iwe, akaisa musoro wake pakati pamakore, mwoyo wake ukazvikudza nokuda kwokureba kwake," 
Ezekiel31:11 ndichamuisa muruoko rwoune simba pakati pamarudzi avanhu, iye achamuitira zvawakafanira; ndakamudzinga nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake.’" 
Ezekiel31:12 Vatorwa, ivo vanotyisa pakati pamarudzi, vakamutema vakamurega, matavi ake akawira pamusoro pamakomo nomumipata yose, matavi ake akavhunikira pahova dzose dzenyika; vanhu vose venyika vabva pamumvuri wake, vakamusiya." 
Ezekiel31:13 Shiri dzose dzekudenga dzichagara padanda rake rakawa, mhuka dzose dzesango dzichava pamatavi ake;" 
Ezekiel31:14 kuti miti yose iri pamvura irege kuzvikudza nokureba kwayo, kana kusvitsa misoro yayo mumakore, neine simba pakati payo irege kumira ichizvikudza iyo miti yose inonwa mvura; nokuti yose yakatarirwa rufu, iende kunzvimbo dzapasi dzenyika, pakati pavana vavanhu, pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba.”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Nezuva raakaburukira kuSheori, ndakarayira kuti vanhu vacheme; ndakafukidza pakadzika nokuda kwake, ndikadzora nzizi dzapo, mvura zhinji ikamiswa; ndakarayira Rebhanoni kumuchema, miti yose yokusango ikati rukutu nokuda kwake." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ndakadederesa marudzi ose nokutinhira kwokuwa kwake, nenguva yandakamukandira muSheori, pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba; miti yose yeEdheni, iyo yakatsaurwa yakaisvonaka yeRebhanoni, iyo yose inonwa mvura, ikavaraidzwa panzvimbo dzapasi dzenyika." 
Ezekiel31:17 Yakaburukirawo naye kuSheori kuna ivo vakaurayiwa nomunondo; zvirokwazvo, ndivo vaiva ruoko rwake, vaigara mumumvuri wake pakati pamarudzi." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Iwe wakafanana naniko pakubwinya nohukuru pakati pemiti yeEdheni? Kunyangwe zvakadaro uchaburuswa pamwechete nemiti yeEdheni kunzvimbo dzapasi dzenyika; uchavata pasi pakati pavasina kudzingiswa, pamwechete navakaurayiwa nomunondo. Ndiye Farao navanhu vake vazhinji,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel32:1 Zvino negore regumi namaviri, nomwedzi wegumi nemiviri, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, itira Farao mambo weIjipiti mariro, uti kwaari, ‘Iwe wakanga wakafananidzwa neshumba duku pakati pamarudzi; asi uri shato huru mumakungwa; wakabuda munzizi dzako, ukabvongodza mvura netsoka dzako, nokusvibisa nzizi dzavo.’" 
Ezekiel32:3 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Ndichakanda mumbure wangu pamusoro pako neboka ravanhu vazhinji, ivo vachakubata nomumbure wangu." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndichakusiya panyika, ndichakurasira kusango pakachena, ndichamharisa shiri dzose dzokudenga pamusoro pako, ndichagutisa zvikara zvenyika dzose newe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ndichayanika nyama yako pamusoro pamakomo, nokuzadza mipata nokukwirira kwako." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndichadiridzawo nyika neropa rako rinoerera richibva kwauri, kusvikira kumakomo; hova dzichazadzwa newe." 
Ezekiel32:7 Kana ndichikudzima, ndichafukidza denga, nokudzima nyenyedzi dzaro; ndichafukidza zuva negore, nomwedzi haungabudisi chiedza chawo." 
Ezekiel32:8 Zviedza zvose zvedenga, zvinopenya, ndichazvidzima pamusoro pako, ndichiisa rima panyika yako, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.’" 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ndichawodzawo mwoyo yamarudzi mazhinji avanhu, kana ndichisvitsa kuparadzwa kwako pakati pamarudzi, nokunyika dzawakanga usingazivi iwe." 
Ezekiel32:10 “Zvirokwazvo, ndichashamisa marudzi mazhinji avanhu pamusoro pako, madzimambo avo achakutya zvikuru kwazvo, kana ndichitendeka munondo wangu pamberi pavo; vachadedera nguva dzose, mumwe nomumwe achadedera nokuda kwoupenyu hwake, nezuva rokuparadzwa kwako.”" 
Ezekiel32:11 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Munondo wamambo waBhabhironi uchauya pamusoro pako." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndicharayira minondo yavane simba kuparadza vanhu vako vazhinji; ivo vose ndivo vanotyisa pakati pamarudzi, vachaparadza kuzvikudza kweIjipiti, navanhu vayo vazhinji vachaparadzwa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndichaparadzawo zvipfuwo zvayo zvose zviri kunhivi dzemvura zhinji, hakungazovi norutsoka rwomunhu ruchabvongodza, kana mahwanda ezvipfuwo angazoibvongodza." 
Ezekiel32:14 Ipapo ndichachenesa mvura yavo, nokuyeredza nzizi dzavo samafuta, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel32:15 Zvino nenguva yandichaita nyika yeIjipiti dongo rakaparadzwa, nyika yakatorerwa zvayakanga izere nazvo, nenguva yandicharova vose vageremo, nenguva iyo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel32:16 Awa ndiwo mariro avachachema nawo; vakunda vamarudzi vachachema nawo; vachachema nawo pamusoro peIjipiti navanhu vose vayo vazhinji,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel32:17 Zvino negore regumi namaviri, nezuva regumi namashanu rwomwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ungudza pamusoro pavanhu vazhinji veIjipiti, uvawisire pasi, iyo nyika navakunda vamarudzi ane mbiri, kusvikira kunzvimbo dziri pasi penyika, pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:19 Unopfuura aniko pakunaka? Buruka, ugondoradzikwa kuna vasina kudzingiswa." 
Ezekiel32:20 “Vachawa pakati pavakaurayiwa nomunondo; Ijipiti yakatemerwa munondo, chiikweverai pasi, iyo navanhu vayo vazhinji." 
Ezekiel32:21 “Vane simba pakati pemhare vachataura naye navanomubatsira, vari pakati peSheori; vaburukirako, vavete vanyerere, ivo vasina kudzingiswa, vaurayiwa nomunondo." 
Ezekiel32:22 “Ashuri riripo neboka raro rose; marinda aro akarikomberedza, vose vakaurayiwa, vakawiswa pasi nomunondo;" 
Ezekiel32:23 marinda aro akaiswa kumicheto yegomba, boka raro rakakomberedza rinda raro; vose vakaurayiwa, vakawiswa pasi nomunondo, ivo vaityisa munyika yavapenyu." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Eramu riripo navanhu varo vazhinji vose vakakomberedza rinda raro, vose vakaurayiwa, vakawiswa pasi nomunondo, ivo vakaburukira kunzvimbo dzapasi dzenyika vasina kudzingiswa, ivo vaityisa munyika yavapenyu, vakava nemhosva yezvinonyadzisa zvavo, pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:25 Rakaisirwa nhoo pakati pavakaurayiwa pamwechete navanhu varo vazhinji vose, marinda aro akarikomberedza; vose havana kudzingiswa, vakaurayiwa nomunondo; nokuti vaityisa munyika yavapenyu, vakava nemhosva yezvinonyadzisa zvavo, pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba; rakaiswa pakati pavakaurayiwa." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesheki neTubhari aripo navanhu vavo vose vazhinji; marinda awo akakomberedza; vose havana kudzingiswa, vakaurayiwa nomunondo, nokuti vaityisa munyika yavapenyu." 
Ezekiel32:27 Havangavati pakati pemhare dzakaurayiwa dzavasina kudzingiswa, vakaburukira kuSheori vane nhumbi dzavo dzokurwa, vakaisa minondo yavo pasi pemisoro yavo, zvakaipa zvavo zviri pamusoro pamapfupa avo; nokuti vaityisa mhare munyika yavapenyu." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Asi iwe uchaputswa pakati pavasina kudzingiswa, uchavata pakati pavakaurayiwa nomunondo." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edhomu riripo, namadzimambo aro namachinda aro ose, akaradzikwa pakati pavakaurayiwa nomunondo, kunyangwe aiva nesimba; vachavata pakati pavasina kudzingiswa, uye pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Machinda okurutivi rwokumusoro aripo, iwo ose, navaSidhoni vose vakaburukira pasi pamwechete navakaurayiwa; vakanyadziswa nokuda kwokutyisa kwakabva pasimba ravo, vavete, vasina kudzingiswa, pamwechete navakaurayiwa nomunondo, vane mhosva yezvinonyadzisa zvavo pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Farao achavaona, ndokunyaradzwa pamusoro pavanhu vake vose vazhinji, iye Farao nehondo yake yose, yakaurayiwa nomunondo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel32:32 “Nokuti ndakaisa kutyisa kwake panyika yavapenyu; iye acharadzikwa pakati pavasina kudzingiswa, pakati pavakaurayiwa nomunondo, iye Farao navanhu vake vose vazhinji,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel33:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, taura navana vavanhu vako, uti kwavari, ‘Kana ndichiisa munondo panyika, vanhu venyika iyoyo vakazvitsaurira munhu pakati pavo, vakamuita nharirire yavo;" 
Ezekiel33:3 zvino kana iye akaona munondo uchisvika panyika, akaridza hwamanda, akanyevera vanhu;" 
Ezekiel33:4 ipapo ani naani anonzwa kurira kwehwamanda, akasatenda kunyeverwa, kana munondo ukasvika, ukamubvisa, ropa rake richava pamusoro wake, iye amene." 
Ezekiel33:5 Akanzwa kurira kwehwamanda, akasatenda kunyeverwa, ropa rake richava pamusoro pake; dai akatenda kunyeverwa, angadai akaponesa mweya wake." 
Ezekiel33:6 Asi kana nharirire ikaona munondo ichiuya, akasaridza hwamanda, vanhu vakasanyeverwa, munondo ukasvika, ukabvisa mumwe pakati pavo, wabviswa hake nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake, asi ropa rake ndicharibvunza paruoko rwenharirire.’ ”" 
Ezekiel33:7 “Saizvozvowo iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, ndakakuita nharirire paimba yaIsiraeri; naizvozvo chinzwa shoko rinobuda mumuromo mangu, uvanyevere panzvimbo yangu." 
Ezekiel33:8 Kana ini ndikati kune wakaipa, ‘Iwe munhu wakaipa, uchafa zvirokwazvo, iwe ukasataura kuti unyevere munhu wakaipa panzira yake, munhu uyo wakaipa achafa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake, asi ropa rake ndicharibvunza paruoko rwako.’" 
Ezekiel33:9 Asi kana ukanyevera wakaipa pamusoro penzira yake, uchiti atendeuke pairi, akasatendeuka panzira yake, iye achafa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake, asi iwe warwira hako mweya wako.”" 
Ezekiel33:10 Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, uti kuimba yaIsiraeri, “Imi munotaura, muchiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo, kudarika kwedu nezvivi zvedu zviri pamusoro pedu, tinopera nokuda kwazvo; zvino tichararama seiko?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 “Uti kwavari, ‘Noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha handifariri rufu rwowakaipa, asi kuti wakaipa atendeuke panzira yake; tendeukai, tendeukai panzira dzenyu dzakaipa, nokuti muchafireiko, imi imba yaIsiraeri?’" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, uti kuvana vavanhu vako, ‘Kururama kwowakarurama hakungamurwiri nezuva rokudarika kwake; uye kana kuri kuipa kwowakaipa haangaparadzwi nako nezuva raanotendeuka pakuipa kwake; nowakarurama haangararami nako nezuva raanotadza.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Kana ndichiti kuno wakarurama, kuti zvirokwazvo achararama, kana akavimba nokururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, hakuna basa rimwe rake rakarurama richarangarirwa; asi nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake zvaakaita, achafa nokuda kwazvo." 
Ezekiel33:14 Uyezve, kana ndikati kune wakaipa, ‘Zvirokwazvo uchafa;’ kana akatendeuka pazvivi zvake, akazoita zvakarairwa nezvakarurama;" 
Ezekiel33:15 kana akaipa akadzosazve rubato, akadzoserazve zvaakanga apamba, akafamba nemitemo youpenyu, asingaiti zvakaipa, zvirokwazvo achararama, haangafi." 
Ezekiel33:16 “Hakuna chivi chimwe chake chaakaita chicharangarirwa pamusoro pake; akaita zvakarayirwa nezvakarurama, zvirokwazvo achararama." 
Ezekiel33:17 “Kunyangwe zvakadaro vana vavanhu vako vanoti, ‘Nzira yaIshe haina kururama;’ asi kana vari ivo, nzira yavo ndiyo isina kururama." 
Ezekiel33:18 Kana akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, achafa nokuda kwazvo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Uye kana akaipa akatendeuka pakuipa kwake, akaita zvakarayirwa nezvakarurama, achararama nazvo." 
Ezekiel33:20 “Kunyangwe zvakadaro munoti, ‘Nzira yaIshe haina kururama.’ Aiwa, imba yaIsiraeri, ndichakutonga mumwe nomumwe wenyu zvakafanira nzira dzake.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Zvino negore regumi namaviri rokutapwa kwedu, nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva reshanu romwedzi, mumwe akanga apukunyuka muJerusaremu akasvika kwandiri, achiti, “Guta rakundwa.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Zvino ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu madekwana, iye akapukunyuka asati asvika; akanga ashamisa muromo wangu, kusvikira iye achisvika kwandiri mangwanani; muromo wangu ukashamiswa, ndikasazova mbeveve." 
Ezekiel33:23 Shoko raJehovha rikasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mwanakomana womunhu, vanhu vagere panzvimbo idzo dzakaparadzwa munyika yaIsiraeri, vanotaura vachiti, ‘Abhurahamu akanga ari mumwechete, akagara nhaka yenyika; asi isu tiri vazhinji, nyika yapiwesu ivo nhaka yedu.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Naizvozvo chiti kwavari, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Munodya nyama pamwechete neropa, muchitarira zvifananidzo zvenyu nameso enyu nokuteura ropa; zvino mungapiwa nyika sei?’" 
Ezekiel33:26 “Munovimba nomunondo wenyu, munoita zvinonyangadza, munochinya mumwe nomumwe wenyu mukadzi wowokwake; zvino mungapiwa nyika sei?" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Chiti kwavari, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Noupenyu hwangu, zvirokwazvo vari panzvimbo dzakaparadzwa vachaparadzwa nomunondo, ari kubani ndichamuisa kuzvikara kuti adyiwe nazvo; vari munhare nomumapako vachafa nechirwere chakaipa." 
Ezekiel33:28 Nyika ndichaiita dongo nechishamiso, kuzvikudza kwayo pamusoro pesimba rayo kuchapera, namakomo aVaIsiraeri achaitwa matongo, kuti kurege kuzova nomunhu unopfuura napo.’" 
Ezekiel33:29 “Zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndaita nyika dongo nechishamiso, nokuda kwezvinonyangadza zvavo zvose zvavakaita.”" 
Ezekiel33:30 “Asi kana uriwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, vana vavanhu vako vanokureva vari pamasvingo avo nomumikova yedzimba dzavo, vanotaurirana mumwe nomumwe achiti kuhama yake, ‘Douya hako, unzwe shoko rinobva kuna Jehovha." 
Ezekiel33:31 Vanouya kwauri sezvinoita vanhu, vanogara pamberi pako sezvinoita vanhu vangu, vanonzwa mashoko ako, asi havaaiti; nokuti vanotaura zvorudo nemiromo yavo, asi mwoyo yavo inotevera pfuma yavo.’" 
Ezekiel33:32 “Zvino tarira, iwe wakaita kwavari somunhu anovaimbira sorwiyo rworudo runoimbwa nounezwi rinofadza, unogona kuridza mbira kwazvo, nokuti vanonzwa mashoko ako, asi havaaiti." 
Ezekiel33:33 “Zvino kana izvi zvichiitwa nokuti zvirokwazvo hazvimboregi kuitika, nenguva iyo vachaziva kuti muporofita akanga ari pakati pavo.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita pamusoro pavafudzi VaIsiraeri, porofita, uti kwavari, kuna ivo vafudzi, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Vane nhamo ivo vafudzi VaIsiraeri vanozvifudza! Ko vafudzi havafaniri kufudza makwai here?’" 
Ezekiel34:3 Munodya mafuta munofuka makushe awo, munobaya akakora asi, hamufudzi makwai." 
Ezekiel34:4 Hamuna kusimbisa anoshayiwa simba, kana kurapa anorwara, kana kudzosa akadzingwa, kana kundotsvaka akarasika, asi makaabata nesimba nehasha." 
Ezekiel34:5 Akapararira, nokuti akanga asina mufudzi, akava zvokudya zvezvikara zvose zvokusango, akapararira." 
Ezekiel34:6 Makwai angu akadzungaira pamakomo ose, napachikomo chimwe nechimwe chakakwirira, zvirokwazvo makwai angu akapararira pasi pose, hakuna akaaronda nokuatsvaka." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Naizvozvo imi vafudzi, inzwai shoko raJehovha." 
Ezekiel34:8 Noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha zvirokwazvo, makwai angu zvaakapambwa, zvaakava zvokudya zvezvikara zvose zvokusango, nokuti kwakanga kusina mufudzi, navafudzi vangu zvavasina kuronda makwai angu, asi vafudzi vangu vakazvifudza ivo, vakasafudza makwai angu;" 
Ezekiel34:9 naizvozvo, imi vafudzi, inzwai shoko raJehovha." 
Ezekiel34:10 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndine mhaka navafudzi, ndichabvunza makwai angu pamaoko avo, nokuvadzivisa kuzofudza makwai, uye vafudzi havangazozvifudzi ivo; ndicharwira makwai angu pamiromo yavo, kuti arege kuzova zvokudya zvavo.’" 
Ezekiel34:11 “Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, ini, ini ndimene, ndicharonda makwai angu nokuatsvaka.’" 
Ezekiel34:12 “Mufudzi sezvaanotsvaka boka rake, nezuva raari pakati pamakwai ake akapararira kwose, saizvozvo ndichatsvaka makwai angu, ndichaarwira panzvimbo dzose kwaakapararira nezuva ramakore nererima." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndichaabudisa pakati pamarudzi avanhu, nokuaunganidza kunyika dzose, ndiasvitse kunyika yawo, ndichaafudza pamakomo aIsiraeri, pahova napanzvimbo dzose dzenyika dzakagarwa navanhu." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndichaafudza namafuro akanaka, danga rawo richava pamakomo akakwirira aIsiraeri; achavata ipapo pasi mudanga rakanaka, achafura pamafuro engamera mumakomo aIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel34:15 “Ini ndimene ndichava mufudzi wamakwai angu, ndichaavatisa pasi, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ndichatsvaka akarasika, ndichadzosa akadzingwa, ndichapombera akavhunika, ndichasimbisa anorwara; asi akakora naane simba ndichaaparadza; ndichaafudza zvakarurama." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Kana murimi boka rangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha tarirai ndinotonga pakati pamakwai namakwai, pakati pamakondobwe nenhongo." 
Ezekiel34:18 Ko munoti chinhu chiduku here zvamakafura pamafuro akanaka, zvino motsika netsoka dzenyu mafuro enyu akasara?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Kana ari makwai angu, anodya zvamakatsika netsoka dzenyu, nokunwa zvamakabvongodza netsoka dzenyu." 
Ezekiel34:20 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kwavari, ‘Tarirai, ini, iyeni, ndichatonga pakati pamakwai akakora namakwai akaonda.’" 
Ezekiel34:21 Zvamunosunda norutivi nefudzi, muchitunga asine simba nenyanga dzenyu, kusvikira maaparadzira kwose," 
Ezekiel34:22 naizvozvo ndichaponesa boka rangu, kuti arege kuzopambwa; ndichatonga pakati pamakwai namakwai." 
Ezekiel34:23 “Ndichaamutsira mufudzi mumwe woga, iye achaafudza, iye muranda wangu Dhavhidhi; iye uchaafudza, iye achava mufudzi wawo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ini Jehovha ndichava Mwari wavo, nomuranda wangu Dhavhidhi achava muchinda pakati pavo; ini Jehovha ndakataura izvozvo." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndichaita navo sungano yorugare, ndichapedza zvikara panyika yavo, vachagara zvakanaka murenje, nokuvata mumatondo." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ndichavaita ropafadzo ivo nenzvimbo dzakapoteredza chikomo changu; ndichapfunhisa mvura nenguva yayo, mashoko anoropafadza achavapo." 
Ezekiel34:27 Miti iri kusango ichabereka zvibereko zvayo, nenyika ichabereka zvayo, vachagara zvakanaka panyika yavo; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, nenguva yandinovhuna matanda ejoko ravo, nokuvarwira pamaoko avaivabatisa." 
Ezekiel34:28 Havangazovi chinhu chinopambwa namarudzi avanhu, nezvikara zvenyika hazvingavaparadzi; asi vachagara zvakanaka, hakuna angavatyisa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndichavameresera miti inorumbidzwa, havangazofa nenzara munyika yavo, kana kuzoshorwa namarudzi avanhu." 
Ezekiel34:30 “Zvino vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha Mwari wavo ndinavo, uye kuti ivo, iyo imba yaIsiraeri, ndivo vanhu vangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel34:31 “Asi imi, makwai angu, makwai anofudzwa neni, muri vanhu, neni ndiri Mwari wenyu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel35:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kugomo reSeiri, uporofite pamusoro paro," 
Ezekiel35:3 uti kwariri, zanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, iwe gomo reSeiri, ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kwauri, ndichakuita dongo nechishamiso." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ndichaparadza maguta ako, iwe uchava dongo; zvino uchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’" 
Ezekiel35:5 “Nokuti wakavenga vana VaIsiraeri nokuvenga kusingaperi, ukavaisa pasimba romunondo nenguva yenjodzi yavo, nenguva yezvakaipa zvokupedzisira;" 
Ezekiel35:6 naizvozvo noupenyu hwangu; ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, ndichakugadzirira ropa, ropa richakuteverera; zvausina kuvenga ropa, ropa richakuteverera." 
Ezekiel35:7 Saizvozvo ndichaita gomo reSeiri chishamiso nedongo; ndichaparadza mariri vanofamba napo navanodzoka napo. 
Ezekiel35:8 Ndichazadza makomo aro navanhu varo vakaurayiwa; muzvikomo zvako nomumipata yako napahova dzako dzose ndipo pachawa vakauyirawa nomunondo. 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndichakuita dongo nokusingaperi, maguta ako haangagarwi; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Zvawakati, ‘Marudzi awa maviri nenyika idzi mbiri zvichava zvangu, zvichava nhaka yedu, kunyangwe Jehovha akanga aripo;’" 
Ezekiel35:11 naizvozvo noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha ndichaita zvakafanira kutsamwa kwako, uye zvakafanira godo rako rawakavaitira nokuvenga kwako; zvino ini ndichazvizivisa pakati pavo, kana ndichikutonga iwe." 
Ezekiel35:12 Iwe uchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakanzwa kumhura kwako kwose kwawakataura pamusoro pamakomo aIsiraeri, uchiti, ‘Akaparadzwa, takaapiwa isu zvive zvokudya zvedu.’" 
Ezekiel35:13 “Makazvikudza kwandiri nemiromo yenyu, makawanza mashoko enyu kwandiri; ndazvinzwa." 
Ezekiel35:14 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Kana nyika yose ichifara, ndichakuita iwe dongo.’" 
Ezekiel35:15 Sezvawakafara pamusoro penhaka yeimba yaIsiraeri, nemhaka yokuti yakaitwa dongo, saizvozvo ndichakuitirawo; uchava dongo, iwe gomo reSeiri, neEdhomu rose, izvo zvose zvaro; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita pamusoro pamakomo aIsiraeri, uti, “Imi makomo aIsiraeri, inzwai shoko raJehovha.”" 
Ezekiel36:2 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Muvengi wako zvaakati pamusoro pako, ‘Toko waro!’ Uye, nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzekare inhaka yedu;" 
Ezekiel36:3 naizvozvo porofita, uti, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Nemhaka iyi, zvavakakuitai dongo, nokukumedzai kumativi ose, kuti muve nhaka yamarudzi avanhu akasara, zvamakarehwa nemiromo yavanotaura, mukaitirwa makuhwa navanhu;’" 
Ezekiel36:4 naizvozvo, imi makomo aIsiraeri, inzwai shoko raIshe Jehovha, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kumakomo nokuzvikomo nokuhova nokumipata nokunzvimbo dzakaparadzwa nokumaguta akasiyiwa, ava chinhu chinopambwa nechinosekwa namarudzi akasara anoapoteredza;" 
Ezekiel36:5 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Zvirokwazvo, ndakataura nomoto wegodo rangu pamusoro pavakasara vamarudzi napamusoro peEdhomu rose, ivo vakazvitorera nyika yangu vachiti ive nhaka yavo, vachingofara nomwoyo wavo wose vachishora nemweya yavo, kuti vairasire kure ipambwe.’" 
Ezekiel36:6 “Naizvozvo porofita pamusoro penyika yaIsiraeri, uti kumakomo nokuzvikomo, nokuhova nokumipata, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai ndakataura negodo rangu nokutsamwa kwangu, nokuti makashorwa namarudzi;’" 
Ezekiel36:7 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Ndakapika ndichiti, zvirokwazvo marudzi anokupoteredza kwose, ndiwo achashorwa." 
Ezekiel36:8 Asi imi, makomo aIsiraeri, muchabudisa matavi enyu, nokuberekera vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri michero nokuti vava kuda kusvika.’" 
Ezekiel36:9 Nokuti tarirai, ndinemi, ndichatsaukira kwamuri, mucharimwa nokudyarwa;" 
Ezekiel36:10 ndichawanza vanhu pamusoro pako, iyo imba yose yaIsiraeri, ivo vose; maguta achagarwa, namatongo achavakwa;" 
Ezekiel36:11 ndichawanza pamusoro penyu vanhu nezvipfuwo, vachawanda nokuberekana; ndichagarisa vanhu mukati menyu, sezvamakanga makaita kare, nokukuitirai zvakanaka zvinopfuura zvapakuvamba kwenyu; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel36:12 Zvirokwazvo, ndichafambisa vanhu pamusoro penyu, ivo vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri; vachakuita wavo, uchava nhaka yavo, kubva zvino haungazovatoreri vana vavo." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Zvavanoti kwauri, iwe uri nyika inopedza vanhu, wakatorera rudzi rwako vana;" 
Ezekiel36:14 naizvozvo hauchazopedzi vanhu, kana kuzotorera rudzi rwako vana,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha;" 
Ezekiel36:15 handichazokunzwisi kunyadziswa kwamarudzi, haungazoshorwi navanhu, haungazogumbusi rudzi rwako,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel36:16 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Mwanakomana womunhu, nguva yavakagara panyika yavo, imba yaIsiraeri yakaisvibisa nomufambiro wavo nezvavaiita; mufambiro wavo pamberi pangu wakanga wakaita setsvina yomukadzi ari kumwedzi kwake." 
Ezekiel36:18 Naizvozvo ndakateurira hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo nemhaka yeropa ravakateurira pamusoro penyika, zvavakaisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvavo;" 
Ezekiel36:19 ndikavaparadzira pakati pamarudzi, vakadzingirwa kunyika dzose; ndakavatonga zvakafanira mufambiro wavo nezvavakaita." 
Ezekiel36:20 Zvino vakati vachisvika kumarudzi, kwavakaenda, vakamhura zita rangu dzvene, nokuti vanhu vakati pamusoro pavo, ‘Ava ndivo vanhu vaJehovha, vakabuda panyika yake.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Asi ndakanga ndine hanya nezita rangu dzvene, rakanga ramhurwa neimba yaIsiraeri pakati pamarudzi kwavakaenda." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Naizvozvo chiti kuimba yaIsiraeri, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Handiiti chinhu ichi nokuda kwako, iwe imba yaIsiraeri, asi nokuda kwezita rangu dzvene ramakamhura pakati pamarudzi kwamakaenda.’" 
Ezekiel36:23 “Zita rangu guru ndichariita dzvene, iro rakamhurwa pakati pamarudzi, ramakamhura imi pakati pavo; zvino marudzi achaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, nenguva yandichaitwa mutsvene mamuri pamberi pavo, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel36:24 Nokuti ndichakubvisai pakati pamarudzi, nokukuunganidzai kunyika dzose, ndikuisei kunyika yenyu." 
Ezekiel36:25 “Ndichasasa mvura yakachena pamusoro penyu, muve vakachena; ndichakunatsai matsvina enyu ose nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvose." 
Ezekiel36:26 Ndichakupaiwo mwoyo mutsva, nokuisa mukati menyu mweya mutsva; ndichabvisa mwoyo webwe panyama yenyu, ndikupei mwoyo wenyama." 
Ezekiel36:27 “Uye ndichaisa Mweya wangu mukati menyu, nokukufambisai nemitemo yangu; muchachengeta zvandakarayira nokuzviita." 
Ezekiel36:28 Muchagara munyika yandakapa madzibaba enyu; muchava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wenyu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ndichakuponesai patsvina yenyu yose; ndichadana zviyo, nokuzviwanza, handingakuremedziyi nenzara." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndichawanza michero yemiti, nezvinomera muminda, kuti murege kuzoshorwa namarudzi avanhu zvichinzi mune nzara." 
Ezekiel36:31 Ipapo mucharangarira mufambiro wenyu wakaipa, nezvamakaita zvisina kunaka; muchazvisema mumene pamusoro pezvakaipa zvenyu nezvinonyangadza zvenyu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Handiiti izvozvi nokuda kwenyu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha muzive izvozvo; nyarai muve nenyadzi pamusoro pomufambiro wenyu, imi imba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel36:33 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Nezuva randichakunatsai pazvakaipa zvenyu zvose, ndichagarisa vanhu mumaguta, namatongo achavakwa." 
Ezekiel36:34 Nyika yakanga iri dongo icharimwa, iyo yakanga iri dongo pamberi pavose vaipfuura napo." 
Ezekiel36:35 Ipapo vachati, ‘Nyika iyi yaiva dongo, yafanana nomunda weEdheni; maguta akanga akaparadzwa akasiyiwa aiva matongo, iwo avakirwa ogarwa.’" 
Ezekiel36:36 Ipapo marudzi akasara kumativi enyu ose achaziva kuti ini Jehovha, ndini ndakavaka nzvimbo idzo dzaiva matongo, ndikasimazve pakanga pakaparadzwa; ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, ndichazviita.”" 
Ezekiel36:37 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Asi ndinoda kukumbirwa chinhu ichi neimba yaIsiraeri, kuti ndivaitire izvozvo; ndichavawanzira vanhu, vave seboka ramakwai." 
Ezekiel36:38 Sezvakaita boka ramakwai anobayirwa Jehovha, sezvakaita boka ramakwai muJerusaremu pamitambo yakatarwa, saizvozvo maguta aiva matongo achazadzwa namapoka avanhu; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu, akandibudisa noMweya waJehovha, akandondiisa pakati pomupata; iwo wakanga uzere namapfupa;" 
Ezekiel37:2 akandipfuudza napakati pawo kumativi ose; tarirai, aivapo akawanda kwazvo pakachena pamupata; uye tarirai, akanga akaoma kwazvo." 
Ezekiel37:3 Akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana, mapfupa aya angararama here?” Ndikapindura, ndikati, “Imi Ishe Jehovha munozviziva.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Zvino akatizve kwandiri, “Porofita pamusoro pamapfupa aya, uti kwaari, ‘Imi mapfupa akaoma, inzwai shoko raJehovha.’" 
Ezekiel37:5 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kumapfupa aya, ‘Tarirai, ndichapinza mweya mukati menyu, muchararamazve." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndichaisa marunda pamusoro penyu, nokuuyisa nyama pamusoro penyu, nokukufukidzai neganda, nokuisa mweya mukati menyu, murarame; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Ipapo ndakaporofita sezvandakarayirwa; zvino ndakati ndichiporofita, mubvumo ukavapo, uye, tarira, kudengenyeka kwenyika kwakavapowo; mapfupa akaswederana, pfupa rimwe kune rimwe pfupa raro." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ndikatarira, wane marunda avapo pamusoro pawo, nyama ikauya, ganda rikaafukidza pamusoro payo; asi makanga musina mweya mukati mawo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Ipapo akati kwandiri, “Porofitera kumhepo, porofita, Mwanakomana womunhu, uti kumhepo, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Uya uchibva kumativi mana anobva mhepo, iwe mweya, ufuridzire pamusoro pavava vakaurayiwa, kuti vararame.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Ipapo ndakaporofita sezvaakandirayira, mweya ukapinda mukati mavo, vakararama, vakamira netsoka dzavo, iri hondo huru kwazvo." 
Ezekiel37:11 Zvino akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, mapfupa aya ndiyo imba yose yaIsiraeri. Tarira ivo vanoti, ‘Mapfupa edu aoma, tariro yedu yaenda, taparadzwa chose.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Naizvozvo porofita, uti kwavari zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndichazarura marinda enyu, ndichakukwidzai mubve mumarinda enyu, imi vanhu vangu; ndichakusvitsai munyika yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel37:13 Muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndazarura marinda enyu, ndikakukwidzai mubve mumarinda enyu, imi vanhu vangu." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ndichaisa mweya wangu mukati menyu, murarame, ndichakuisai munyika yenyu; zvino muchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura ndikazviita,’ ” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Ezekiel37:15 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, tora rutanda rumwe, unyore pamusoro parwo, kuti, ‘ZvaJudha, nezvevana VaIsiraeri shamwari dzake;’ ipapo utore rumwe rutanda, unyore pamusoro parwo, kuti, ‘ZvaJosefa, rutanda rwaEfuremu, nezveimba yose yaVaIsiraeri shamwari dzake;’" 
Ezekiel37:17 zvino uzvibatanidzire matanda iwawo, ruve rutanda rumwe, ruve rumwe muruoko rwako." 
Ezekiel37:18 Zvino kana vana vavanhu vako vakataura newe vachiti kwauri, ‘Haungatizivisi zvaunoda kuratidza nezvinhu izvi here?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 Iwe uti kwavari, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndichatora rutanda rwaJosefa, ruri muruoko rwaEfuremu, namarudzi aIsiraeri shamwari dzake; ndichavaisa kwaruri, kurutanda rwaJudha, ndivaite rutanda rumwe, vachaita rumwe muruoko rwangu.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 “Zvino matanda aunonyora pamusoro pawo anofanira kuva muruoko rwako vazvione. 
Ezekiel37:21 Ipapo uti kwavari, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndichabvisa vana VaIsiraeri pakati pamarudzi, kwavakaenda, ndichavaunganidza vabve kumativi ose, ndivaise kunyika yavo;" 
Ezekiel37:22 ndichavaita rudzi rumwe panyika, pamakomo aIsiraeri; mambo mumwe uchava mambo wavose, havangazovi marudzi maviri, uye havangatongozovi ushe huviri hwakaparadzana;" 
Ezekiel37:23 havangazozvisvibisi nezvifananidzo zvavo, kana nezvinhu zvavo zvinosemesa, kana nechinhu chipi nechipi chavanodarika nacho; asi ndichavaponesa pose pavagere, pavaitadza, nokuvanatsa; saizvozvo vachava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wavo.’" 
Ezekiel37:24 “Muranda wangu Dhavhidhi achava mambo wavo; vose vachava nomufudzi mumwe; vachafambawo nezvandakarayira, nokuchengeta mitemo yangu, vachiita." 
Ezekiel37:25 “Vachagara munyika yandakapa Jakobho muranda wangu, maigara madzibaba enyu; vachagaramo, ivo navana vavo, navana vevana vavo, nokusingaperi; Dhavhidhi muranda wangu achava muchinda wavo nokusingaperi." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ndichaitawo sungano yorugare navo, ichava sungano isingaperi navo; ndichavaisapo, nokuvawanza, nokuisa nzvimbo yangu tsvene pakati pavo nokusingaperi." 
Ezekiel37:27 Tabhenakeri yanguo ichava pakati pavo; ini ndichava Mwari wavo, naivo vachava vanhu vangu." 
Ezekiel37:28 Zvino marudzi achaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, anoita VaIsiraeri vatsvene, kana nzvimbo yangu tsvene iri pakati pavo nokusingaperi.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ratidza chiso chako kuna Gogi, wenyika yaMagogi, uporofite pamusoro pake," 
Ezekiel38:3 uti, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Tarira ndine mhaka newe, iwe Gogi, muchinda waRoshi naMesheki naTubhari;" 
Ezekiel38:4 ndichakutsausa, nokukuisa zvikokoono mushaya dzako; ndichakubudisa, iwe nehondo yako yose, mabhiza navatasvi vamabhiza, vose vakafuka nguo dzose dzokurwa, boka guru vane nhoo huru nenhoo duku, vose vakabata minondo;" 
Ezekiel38:5 vaPezhia navaKushi navaRibhia pamwechete navo, vose vane nhoo nengowani dzokurwa;" 
Ezekiel38:6 naGomeri namapoka ake ose, neimba yaTogarima kumativi okumusoro–soro, namapoka ake ose, marudzi mazhinji avanhu anewe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Gara wakazvigadzira, zvirokwazvo uzvigadzire, iwe namapoka ako ose akaungana kwauri, iwe uve mutungamiriri wavo." 
Ezekiel38:8 Kana mazuva mazhinji apfuura, uchashanyirwa; pamakore okupedzisira uchapinda munyika yakarwirwa nomundo, yakaunganidzwa ichibva kumarudzi mazhinji, pamakomo aIsiraeri, aigara akaparadzwa; asi yadzoswa ichibva kumarudzi avanhu, vose vachagara zvakanaka." 
Ezekiel38:9 Ipapo iwe uchakwira, uchauya sedutu remhepo, uchava segore rinofukidza nyika iwe, namapoka ako ose, navanhu vazhinji vanewe.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:10 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Nezuva iro mwoyo wako uchapindwa nemirangariro, uchafunga zano rakaipa;" 
Ezekiel38:11 uchiti, ‘Ndichaenda kunyika ine misha isina kuvakirwa; ndichaenda kuna vane rugare, vagere zvakanaka, vose vagere vasina masvingo, vasina zvipfigiso kana masuwo;" 
Ezekiel38:12 nditoreko zvandingapamba nezvandingatapa; kuti utambanudzire ruoko rwako kuzorwa nenzvimbo dzakanga dzaparadzwa dzinogarwa zvino, nokurudzi rwakaunganidzwa kumarudzi avanhu, vakawana zvipfuwo nepfuma, vagere pakati penyika.’" 
Ezekiel38:13 Shebha neDhedhani navashambadziri veTashishi, pamwechete neshumba duku dzose dzapo, vachati kwauri, ‘Wauya kuzotora zvakapambwa here? Waunganidza boka rako kuzotora zvakatapwa kuti utore zvipfuwo nepfuma, kuti utore zvakapambwa zvizhinji here?’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:14 Naizvozvo, Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita uti kuna Gogi, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Zuva iro kana vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri vachigara zvakanaka, ko iwe haungazvizivi here?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Zvino iwe uchauya, uchibva kuugaro hwako kumativi okumusoro–soro, iwe navanhu vazhinji vanewe, vose vakatasva mabhiza, riri boka guru nehondo ine simba;" 
Ezekiel38:16 uchauya kuzorwa navanhu vangu VaIsiraeri, wakaita segore rinofukidza nyika; zvino namazuva okupedzisira ndichakuuyisa kuti urwe nenyika yangu kuti marudzi andizive, kana ndaitwa mutsvene pakati pako, iwe Gogi, ivo vachizviona." 
Ezekiel38:17 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Ko ndiwe wandakareva nenguva yakare navaranda vangu vaporofita VaIsiraeri, vaiporofita namazuva iwayo vachiita makore mazhinji, kuti ndichakuuyisa kuzorwa navo here?’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:18 “Zvino nezuva iro kana Gogi achiuya kuzorwa nenyika yaIsiraeri, hasha dzangu dzichakwira mumhino dzangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel38:19 Nokuti ndakataura negodo rangu uye nomoto wehasha dzangu, ndichiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo, nezuva iro kuzununguka kukuru kuchavapo panyika yaIsiraeri;" 
Ezekiel38:20 nokudaro kuti hove negungwa, neshiri dzokudenga, nemhuka dzesango, nezvinokambayira zvose zvinokambayira panyika, navanhu vose vari pasi pose, zvichazununguka pamberi pangu, namakomo achawiswa pasi, namawere achawira pasi, norusvingo rumwe norumwe ruchawira pasi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndichadana munondo uuye kuzorwa naye kumakomo angu ose,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; munondo womunhu mumwe nomumwe ucharwa nehama yake." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ndichamutonga nechirwere chakaipa neropa; ndichanisa pamusoro pake, napamusoro pamapoka ake, napamusoro pamarudzi mazhinji avanhu vanaye, mvura inoturuka, nechimvuramabwe chikuru, nomoto nesurufa." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ini ndichazvikurisa, nokuzviita mutsvene, nokuzvizivisa pamberi pamarudzi mazhinji; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita pamusoro paGogi, uti, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, iwe Gogi, muchinda waRoshi, naMesheki naTubhari;" 
Ezekiel39:2 ndichakutsausa, nokukutungamirira, nokukuuyisa uchibva kumativi okumusoro–soro; ndichakusvitsa pamakomo aIsiraeri;" 
Ezekiel39:3 ndicharova uta hwako hubve muruoko rwako rworuboshwe, nokuwisira pasi miseve yako iri muruoko rwako rworudyi." 
Ezekiel39:4 Uchaparadzwa pamakomo aIsiraeri, iwe namapoka ako ose, namarudzi avanhu anewe; ndichakupa iwe shiri dzamakondo dzamarudzi ose, nezvikara zvesango, kuti udyiwe nazvo." 
Ezekiel39:5 Uchawira pakachena pabani; nokuti ini ndakazvitaura, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ndichatuma moto kuna Magogi, nokuna vagere zvakanaka pazvivi; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel39:7 Ndichazivisa zita rangu dzvene pakati pavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri; handichatenderi kuti zita rangu dzvene rimhurwe; marudzi avanhu achaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, iye Mutsvene waIsiraeri.”" 
Ezekiel39:8 “Tarirai, zvinouya, zvichaitwa, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha ndiro zuva randareva." 
Ezekiel39:9 Vagere mumaguta aIsiraeri vachabuda, vachavesa moto nenhumbi dzokurwa nokudzipisa, zvinoti nhoo duku nenhoo huru, nouta nemiseve, netsvimbo namapfumo; vachavesa moto nazvo vachiita makore manomwe;" 
Ezekiel39:10 naizvozvo havangandotori huni kusango, kana kundodzitema kumatondo, nokuti vachavesa moto nenhumbi dzokurwa; vachaparadza vaivaparadza, nokupamba vaivapamba,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Zvino nezuva iro ndichapa Gogi nzvimbo yamarinda pakati paVaIsiraeri, mumupata wavafambi kurutivi rwamabvazuva rwegungwa; izvozvo zvichadzivisa vanopfuura napo; ipapo vachaviga Gogi navanhu vake vazhinji vose, ndokupatumidza zita rinonzi, ‘Hamonigogi.’" 
Ezekiel39:12 Imba yaIsiraeri ichapedza mwedzi minomwe ichivaviga, kuti vanatse nyika." 
Ezekiel39:13 Zvirokwazvo, vanhu vose venyika vachavaviga; ichava mbiri kwavari nezuva randichakudzwa naro, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel39:14 Vachatsaura vanhu vanobata basa misi yose, vachapota nenyika pamwechete navanopfuura napo, vachiviga vakasiyiwa pachena, kuti vanatse nyika; kana mwedzi minomwe yapera vachacherechedza pose." 
Ezekiel39:15 Vanopfuura napanyika vachapfuura havo; zvino ani naani kana achinge achiona pfupa romunhu, achaisapo chiratidzo, kusvikira vavigi vachiriviga mumupata waHamonigogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Hamoni richava zitawo reguta. Saizvozvo vachanatsa nyika.” 
Ezekiel39:17 Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Taura neshiri dzamarudzi ose, nemhuka dzose dzesango, uti, ‘Unganai, muuye muungane muchibva kumativi ose, muuye kuchibayiro chikuru pamakomo aIsiraeri, kuti mudye nyama nokunwa ropa.’" 
Ezekiel39:18 “Muchadya nyama yavane simba, nokunwa ropa ramachinda enyika, ramakondohwe, neramakwayana, nerembudzi, nerenzombe, zvose zviri zvakakodzwa zveBhashani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Muchadya zvakakora kusvikira maguta, nokunwa ropa kusvikira mabatwa, zvechibayiro chandakakubayirai." 
Ezekiel39:20 “Muchaguta patafura rangu namabhiza nengoro, navanhu vane simba, navarwi vamarudzi ose,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel39:21 “Ndichaisa mbiri yangu pakati pamarudzi avanhu, marudzi ose achaona kutonga kwandakaita, noruoko rwangu rwandakaisa pamusoro pavo." 
Ezekiel39:22 Naizvozvo imba yaIsiraeri ichaziva kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo, kubva pazuva iro zvichienda mberi." 
Ezekiel39:23 Marudzi ose achaziva kuti imba yaIsiraeri yakatapwa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo, nokuti vakandidarikira, ndikavavanzira chiso changu; naizvozvo ndakavaisa mumaoko avadzivisi vavo, vakaparadzwa vose nomunondo." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ndakavaitira zvakafanira kusanaka kwavo nokudarika kwavo, ndikavavanzira chiso changu.”" 
Ezekiel39:25 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Zvino ndichadzosa kutapwa kwaJakobho, nokunzwira imba yose yaIsiraeri nyasha; ndichashingairira zita rangu dzvene." 
Ezekiel39:26 “Vachava nemhosva yokunyadziswa kwavo neyokudarika kwavo kwavakandidarikira nako, kana vachizogara zvakanaka munyika yavo, kusina anozovatyisa;" 
Ezekiel39:27 kana ndavadzosa kumarudzi avanhu, nokuvaunganidza kunyika dzavavengi vavo, ndikazviita mutsvene pamberi pamarudzi mazhinji." 
Ezekiel39:28 “Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo, zvandakavatapisa pakati pamarudzi, ndikavaunganidzirazve munyika yavo; handingatongozosiyi mumwe wavopo;" 
Ezekiel39:29 uye handingazovavanziri chiso changu; nokuti ndakadurura mweya wangu pamusoro peimba yaIsiraeri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel40:1 Zvino negore ramakumi maviri namashanu rokutapwa kwedu, pakutanga kwegore, nezuva regumi romwedzi, negore regumi namana rakatevera kurohwa kweguta, nezuva iroro, ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu." 
Ezekiel40:2 Pane zvandakaratidzwa naMwari, akandisvitsa munyika yaIsiraeri, akandiisa pagomo refu–refu, pakanga pane chinhu chakanga chakafanana neguta kurutivi rwezasi." 
Ezekiel40:3 Akandiisako; zvino tarira, kwakanga kuno murume, pakuonekwa kwake akanga akaita sendarira, aine tambo yerineni muruoko rwake, norutsanga rwokuyeresa narwo; akamira pasuwo." 
Ezekiel40:4 Murume uyo akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira nameso ako, inzwa nenzeve dzako, urangarire nomwoyo wako zvose zvandichakuratidza; nokuti wakasvitswa pano kuti ndikuratidze izvozvo; paridzira imba yaIsiraeri zvose zvaunoona.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Zvino tarira, kwakanga kuno rusvingo rwakapoteredza imba nechokunze; muruoko rwomurume uyo makanga muno rutsanga rwokuyeresa narwo, rwakasvika mamita matanhatu pakureba kwarwo, rimwe nerimwe richiitawo mita imwe nohupamhi hwechanza; ipapo akayera ukobvu hworusvingo, hukaita rutsanga rumwe, nokureba rutsanga rumwe." 
Ezekiel40:6 Zvino wakasvika pasuwo rakatarira kurutivi rwamabvazuva, akakwira nezvikwiriso zvaro, akayera chikumbaridzo chesuwo, zvikaita rutsanga rumwe, nechimwe chikumbaridzozve, zvikaita rutsanga rumwe." 
Ezekiel40:7 Kamuri imwe neimwe yavarindi yakanga yakaita rutsanga rumwe pakureba, norutsanga rumwe paupamhi; pakati pamakamuri pakanga pana mamita mashanu; uye chikumbaridzo chesuwo pabiravira resuwo kurutivi rweimba chakaita rutsanga rumwe." 
Ezekiel40:8 Akayerawo biravira resuwo kurutivi rweimba, zvikaita rutsanga rumwe." 
Ezekiel40:9 Ipapo akayera biravira resuwo, zvikaita mamita masere, nembiru dzaro, mamita maviri; biravira resuwo rakanga riri kurutivi rweimba." 
Ezekiel40:10 Makamuri esuwo rokumabvazuva aiva matatu nechemberi namatatu necheseri, ose matatu aiva nechiyero chimwe, nembiru dzaiva nechiyero chimwe nechemberi necheseri." 
Ezekiel40:11 Akayera upamhi hwomukova hwesuwo, zvikaita mamita ane gumi; nokureba kwesuwo, mamita ane gumi namatatu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Kwakanga kuno rumhanda pamberi pamakamuri, rwakaita mita rimwe nechemberi, norumhanda rwakaita mita rimwe necheseri." 
Ezekiel40:13 Akayera suwo kubva padenga rekamuri imwe kusvikira padenga reimwe, zvikaita mamita makumi maviri namashanu pakufara; mukova mumwe wakatarisana nomumwe mukova." 
Ezekiel40:14 Akaitawo mbiru, dzakasvika mamita makumi matanhatu; ruvanze rwakanga rwakapoteredza suwo kusvikira pambiru." 
Ezekiel40:15 Zvino kubva pamberi pesuwo, pavanopinda napo, kusvikira pamberi pebiravira resuwo romukati, zvakaita mamita makumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel40:16 Mumakamuri makanga muna mahwindo akapfigwa, nomumbiru dzawo mukati mesuwo kumativi ose, saizvozvowo pamabiravira; mahwindo akanga aripowo kumativi ose nechomukati; pambiru imwe neimwe pakanga pane miti yemichindwe." 
Ezekiel40:17 Zvino akandiisa muruvanze rokunze, ndikaona makamuri neguva rakarongwa namabwe, zvakaitirwa ruvanze kumativi ose; kwakanga kuna makamuri makumi matatu paguva rakarongwa." 
Ezekiel40:18 Guva rakarongwa rakanga riri kurutivi rwamasuwo, rakaenzana pakureba kwaro namasuwo, iro guva rakarongwa rapasi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Zvino wakayera hupamhi kubva pamberi pesuwo rapazasi kusvikira kunze pamberi poruvanze rwomukati, zvikaita mamita ane zana, kurutivi rwamabvazuva nokurutivi rwokumusoro." 
Ezekiel40:20 Wakayerawo kureba nohupamhi hwesuwo roruvanze rwokunze rakatarira kurutivi rwokumusoro. 
Ezekiel40:21 Makamuri aro aiva matatu nechemberi, namitatu necheseri; mbiru dzaro namabiravira aro zvakanga zvakaenzana nechiyero chesuwo rokutanga; kureba kwaro kwakasvika mamita makumi mashanu nohupamhi mamita makumi maviri namashanu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Mahwindo aro, namabiravira aro, nemichindwe yaro zvakanga zvakaenzana nechiyero chesuwo rakatarira kurutivi rwamabvazuva; vanhu vaikwirako nezvikwiriso zvinomwe; mabiravira aro akanga ari pamberi paro." 
Ezekiel40:23 Muruvazhe rwomukati makanga mune suwo rakatarisana nerimwe suwo, kurutivi rwokumusoro nokurutivi rwamabvazuva; akayera kubva kune rimwe suwo kusvikira kune rimwe suwo zvikaita makubhiti ane zana." 
Ezekiel40:24 Zvino akaenda neni kurutivi rwezasi, ndikaona suwo kurutivi rwezasi; akayera mbiru dzaro namabiravira aro nezviyero izvozvo." 
Ezekiel40:25 Mahwindo aivapo mukati maro nomumabiravira aro kumativi ose, akafanana namahwindo iwayo; pakureba kwazvo zvakaita mamita makumi mashanu, nokufara kwazvo mamita makumi maviri namashanu." 
Ezekiel40:26 Kwakanga kune zvikwiriso zvinomwe zvokukwira nazvo kwariri; mabiravira aro akanga ari pamberi paro; uye rakanga rine michindwe pambiru dzaro, mumwe nechemberi nomumwe necheseri." 
Ezekiel40:27 Kwakanga kune suwo paruvanze rwomukati kurutivi rwezasi; akayera kubva kune rimwe suwo kusvikira kune rimwe suwo kurutivi rwezasi zvikaita mamita ane zana. 
Ezekiel40:28 Zvino wakandiisa kuruvanze rwomukati kusuwo rezasi; akayera suwo rezasi nezviyero izvozvi; 
Ezekiel40:29 namakamuri aro, nembiru dzaro, namabiravira aro nezviyero izvozvi; kwakanga kuna mahwindo mukati maro nomumabiravira aro kumativi ose; zvakanga zvakaita makubhiti makumi mashanu pakureba, namamita makumi maviri namashanu pahupamhi." 
Ezekiel40:30 Kwakanga kuna mabiravira kumativi ose, akaita mamita makumi maviri namashanu pakureba, namamita mashanu pahupamhi." 
Ezekiel40:31 Mabiravira aro akanga akatarira kuruvanze rwokunze; kwakanga kune michindwe pambiru dzaro; chikwiriso charo chakanga chine kwiriso zvisere. 
Ezekiel40:32 Zvino wakandiisa muruvanze rwomukati kurutivi rwamabvazuva, akayera suwo nezviyero izvozvi;" 
Ezekiel40:33 namakamuri aro, nembiru dzaro, namabiravira aro nezviyero izvozvi; makanga muna mahwindo mukati maro nomumabiravira aro kumativi ose; zvakaita mamita makumi mashanu pakureba, namamita makumi maviri namashanu pahupamhi." 
Ezekiel40:34 Mabiravira aro akanga akatarira kuruvazhe rwokunze; kwakanga kune michindwe pambiru dzaro, nechemberi necheseri; chikwiriso charo chakanga chine zvikwiriso zvisere." 
Ezekiel40:35 Zvino wakandiisa kusuwo rokumusoro, akariyera nezviyero izvi;" 
Ezekiel40:36 makamuri aro, nembiru dzaro, namabiravira aro; makanga muna mahwindo mukati maro kumativi ose; pakureba zvakaita mamita makumi mashanu, napahupamhi mamita makumi maviri namashanu." 
Ezekiel40:37 Mbiru dzaro dzakanga dzakatarira kuruvanze rwokunze; kwakanga kune michindwe yakavezwa pambiru dzaro, nechemberi necheseri; chikwiriso charo chakanga chine zvikwiriso zvisere." 
Ezekiel40:38 Pambiru pamasuwo pakanga pane kamuri yaiva nomukova wayo; ndipo pavaisuka zvipiriso zvinopiswa. 
Ezekiel40:39 Mubiravira resuwo makanga muna matafura uku maviri nechemberi, namatafura maviri necheseri, pokubayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvibairo zvezvivi nezvibairo zvemhosva." 
Ezekiel40:40 Kurutivi rwokunze, kana munhu achikwira kundopinda pasuwo kurutivi rwokumusoro kwakanga kuna matafura maviri, uye kuno rumwe rutivi rwebiravira resuwo, kwakanga kuna matafura maviri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Kwakanga kuna matafura mana kune rumwe rutivi, namatafura mana kurutivi rweseri, kurutivi rwesuwo, matafura masere paibayirwa zvibairo." 
Ezekiel40:42 Kwakanga kuna matafura mana amabwe akavezwa, ezvipiriso zvinopiswa; pakureba akasvika mita nehafu, pahupamhi mita nehafu, pakukwirira mita nehafu; ndipo pavakaisa nhumbi dzavaibayira nadzo zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvibairo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Zvikokooni, zvakanga zvakaita soupamhi hwechanza pakureba kwazvo, zvakanga zvakasungirwa kumativi ose; pamatafura pakanga pane nyama yokuvonga." 
Ezekiel40:44 Kunze kwesuwo romukati kwakanga kuna makamuri avaimbi voruvanze rwomukati, rwaiva kurutivi rwesuwo rokumusoro; iwo akatarira kurutivi rwezasi, rimwe kurutivi rwamabvazuva richitarira kurutivi rwokumusoro." 
Ezekiel40:45 Zvino akati kwandiri, “Kamuri iri, rakatarira kurutivi rwezasi, nderavapristi, ivo vachengeti vebasa reimba;" 
Ezekiel40:46 kamuri, rakatarira kurutivi rwokumusoro, nderavapristi, vachengeti vebasa reatari; ndivo vanakomana vaZadhoki, vanobva pakati pavanakomana vaRevhi, vachiswedera kuna Jehovha kuzomushumira.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 Zvino akayera ruvanze, zvikaita mamita ane zana pakureba, namamita ane zana paupamhi, mativi mana akaenzana; atari yakanga iri pamberi peimba." 
Ezekiel40:48 Zvino akandiisa pabiravira reimba, akayera mbiru imwe neimwe yebiravira, zvikaita makubhiti mashanu kune rumwe rutivi, namamita mashanu kurutivi rweseri; upamhi hwesuwo hwakaita mamita matatu kune rumwe rutivi mamita matatu kurutivi rweseri." 
Ezekiel40:49 Kureba kwebiravira kwakanga kuchiita mamita makumi maviri, noupamhi mamita ane gumi nerimwe, ipapo pazvikwiriso zvavaikwira nazvo; pambiru dzesuwo pakanga pane dzimwe mbiru, imwe kuno rumwe rutivi, neimwe kurutivi rweseri." 
Ezekiel41:1 Zvino wakandiisa kutemberi, akayera mbiru, zvikaita mamita matanhatu paupamhi kurutivi rumwe, namamita matanhatu paupamhi kuno rumwe rutivi, ndihwo upamhi hwetabhenakeri." 
Ezekiel41:2 Upamhi hwomukova hwakaita mamita ane gumi; mativi omukova akaita mamita mashanu kurutivi rumwe, namamita mashanu kuno rumwe rutivi; akayera kureba kwazvo, zvikaita mamita makumi mana, noupamhi mamita makumi maviri." 
Ezekiel41:3 Zvino akapinda mukati, akayera mbiru imwe neimwe yomukova, zvikaita mamita maviri, nomukova mamita matanhatu, noupamhi hwomukova mamita manomwe." 
Ezekiel41:4 Akayera kureba kwawo zvikaita mamita makumi maviri, nohupamhi, mamita makumi maviri pamberi petemberi; akati kwandiri, “Iyi ndiyo nzvimbo tsvene–tsvene.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Ipapo akayera madziro eimba, zvikaita mamita matanhatu, uye hupamhi hwekamuri rimwe nerimwe rokumativi, zvikaita mamita mana, zvichipoteredza imba kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel41:6 Makamuri okumativi akanga akaturikidzwa akaita matatu, rimwe riri pamusoro perimwe, zvikaitwa runa makumi matatu; akanga akavakirwa mukati mamadziro eimba aiva kurutivi rwamakamuri okumativi, kuti atsigirwe nawo; haana kutsigirwa namadziro eimba." 
Ezekiel41:7 Makamuri okumativi akawedzera upamhi pakupoteredza kwawo imba, achikwirira nokukwirira; nokuti kupoteredzwa kweimba kwakaramba kuchikwirira kumativi ose eimba; naizvozvo imba yakawedzera upamhi pakukwirira kwayo; naizvozvo munhu aikwira achibva pakamuri rezasi kusvikira kune rokumusoro, achipfuura napakamuri rapakati." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ndakaonawo kuti paimba pakanga pana pamwe pakakwirira kumativi ose; nheyo dzemukamuti okumativi dzakasvika rutsanga rwose, mamita matanhatu kusvikira pakusangana kwamadziro." 
Ezekiel41:9 Ukobvu hwechidziro chamakamuri okumativi nechokunze, hwakaita mamita mashanu; saizvozvowo nzvimbo, yakasiyiwa, yaiva yamakamuri okumativi eimba." 
Ezekiel41:10 Pakati pamakamuri paiva nenzvimbo yakaita mamita ana makumi maviri yaipoteredza imba kumativi ose. 
Ezekiel41:11 Mikova yamakamuri okumativi yakanga ichitarira kurutivi rwenzvimbo yaiva yoga, mumwe mukova kurutivi rwokumsuro, mumwe mukova kurutivi rwezasi, upamhi hwenzvimbo yaiva yoga hwakaita mamita mashanu kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel41:12 Imba yakanga iri pamberi penzvimbo, yaiva yoga kurutivi rwamavirazuva, yakaita mamita makumi manomwe paupamhi hwayo; chidziro cheimba kumativi ose chakaita mamita mashanu paukobvu, namamita makumi mapfumbamwe pakureba." 
Ezekiel41:13 Saizvozvo akayera imba, ikaita mamita ane zana pakureba; uye nzvimbo yaiva yoga, neimba namadziro ayo, zvikaita mamita ane zana pakureba;" 
Ezekiel41:14 uye hupamhi hweimba nechemberi kwayo, nokwenzvimbo yaiva yoga kurutivi rwamabvazuva, zvikaita mamita ane zana." 
Ezekiel41:15 Zvino akayera kureba kweimba pamberi penzvimbo yaiva yoga, yakanga iri shure kwayo, namabiravira ayo kuno rutivi rumwe nokuno rumwe rutivi, zvikaita mamita ane zana; uye temberi yomukati, namabiravira oruvanze;" 
Ezekiel41:16 nezvikumbaridzo, namahwindo akanga akapfigwa, namabiravira akapoteredza makamuri matatu akaturikidzwa, akatarisana nechikumbaridzo, akanga akaroverwa matanda kumativi ose, kubva pasi kusvikira kumahwindo, asi mahwindo akanga akafukidzwa," 
Ezekiel41:17 kusvikira kumusoro kwomukova, kusvikira kuimba yomukati nokunze, nokuchidziro chose kumativi ose mukati nokunze, nezviyero zvazvo." 
Ezekiel41:18 Zvakanga zvakaitwa zvina makerubhi nemichindwe; kwakanga kuno muchindwe pakati pekerubhi rimwe nerimwe, uye kerubhi rimwe nerimwe rakanga rine zviso zviviri;" 
Ezekiel41:19 naizvozvo kwakanga kune chiso chomunhu chakatarira kumuchindwe kurutivi rumwe, nechiso cheshumba duku chakatarira kumuchindwe kuno rumwe rutivi; ndizvo zvazvakanga zvakaitwa paimba yose kumativi ose;" 
Ezekiel41:20 kubva pasi kusvikira kumusoro kwomukova kwakanga kuna makerubhi nemichindwe; saizvozvowo pachidziro chetemberi. 
Ezekiel41:21 Kana iri temberi, mbiru dzemikova dzakanga dzina mativi mana akaenzana; kana iri nzvimbo tsvene pamberi payo yakanga yakafanana netemberi." 
Ezekiel41:22 Aritari yakanga yakavezwa namatanda, yakasvika mamita matatu pakukwirira kwayo, nokureba kwayo mamita maviri; makona ayo, nokureba kwayo, namadziro ayo, zvakanga zvakavezwa namatanda; akati kwandiri, “Iri ndiro tafura riri pamberi paJehovha.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Temberi nenzvimbo tsvene zvakanga zvine mikova miviri. 
Ezekiel41:24 Mukova mumwe nomumwe wakanga una masasa maviri, masasa maviri aitendereka; masasa maviri pamukova mumwe, uye masasa maviri pane mumwe." 
Ezekiel41:25 Paari, ipo pamasasa etemberi, pakanga pakavezwa makerubhi nemichindwe, zvakafanana nezvakaitwa pamadziro; pakanga pane chikumbaridzo chamatanda nechapamberi pebiravira nechokunze." 
Ezekiel41:26 Kwakanga kuna mahwindo akapfigwa nemichindwe kurutivi rumwe nokuno rumwe rutivi, kumativi ebiravira; ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita makamuri okumativi eimba nezvikumbaridzo." 
Ezekiel42:1 Zvino akandibudisira kuruvanze rwokunze, nenzira inoenda kurutivi rwokumusoro; akandiisa mukamuri rakatarisana nenzvimbo yaiva yoga, yakanga yakatarisana neimba kurutivi rwokumusoro." 
Ezekiel42:2 Pamberi porutivi rwakareba, rwakasvika mamita ane zana, kwakanga kuno mukova worutivi rwokumusoro, uye upamhi hwakaita mamita makumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Pakatarisana namamita makumi maviri oruvanze rwomukati, uye pakatarisana neguva rakarongwa roruvanze rwokunze, kwakanga kuna mabiravira akatarisana, akaturikidzwa ari matatu." 
Ezekiel42:4 Pamberi pamakamuri pakanga pane nzvimbo yokufamba ichipinda mukati yakaita mamita ane zana; mikova yazvo yakanga yakatarira kurutivi rwokumusoro. 
Ezekiel42:5 Asi makamuri okumusoro akanga ari maduku kuna mamwe, nokuti mabiravira akanga achiatapudzira, kupfuura apasi naapakati mukati meimba." 
Ezekiel42:6 Nokuti akanga akaturikidzwa, ari matatu, asine mbiru dzakaita sembiru dzamavanze; naizvozvo okumusoro akanga akamanikana kupfuura apasi naapakati zvichibva pasi." 
Ezekiel42:7 Rusvingo rwakanga ruri kunze kurutivi rwamakamuri kuruvanze rwokunze pamberi pamakamuri, rwakasvika mamita makumi mashanu pakureba." 
Ezekiel42:8 Nokuti kureba kwamakamuri akanga ari muruvanze rwokunze kwakasvika mamita makumi mashanu, asi tarira, pamberi petemberi akaita mamita ane zana." 
Ezekiel42:9 Pasi pamakamuri awa ndipo pakanga pane mukova wokurutivi rwamabvazuva, kana munhu achipinda kwaari achibva kuruvanze rwokunze." 
Ezekiel42:10 Mukati moupamhi hworusvingo rworuvanze kurutivi rwamabvazuva, pamberi penzvimbo yaiva yoga, napamberi peimba, pakanga pana makamuri." 
Ezekiel42:11 Nzira yakanga iri pamberi pawo yakanga yakafanana nenzira yamakamuri okurutivi rwokumusoro; sezvakanga zvakaita kureba kwawo, ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita upamhi hwawo; pokubuda pawo pose pakanga pakafanana nokurongerwa kwawo nemikova yawo." 
Ezekiel42:12 Sezvakanga zvakaita mikova yamakamuri akanga ari kurutivi rwezasi, saizvozvo kwakanga kuno mukova pakuguma kwenzira, iyo nzira yakanga yakaruramira pamberi porusvingo kurutivi rwamabvazuva, kana munhu achipinda mukati mawo." 
Ezekiel42:13 Zvino akati kwandiri, “Makamuri okurutivi rwokumusoro namakamuri okurutivi rwezasi, ari pamberi penzvimbo iro yoga, ndiwo makamuri matsvene, panofanira kudyiwa zvinhu zvitsvene–tsvene navapristi vari pedyo naJehovha; ndipo pavachafanira kuisa zvinhu zvitsvene–tsvene, nezvipiriso zvoupfu, nezvipiriso zvezvivi, nezvipiriso zvemhosva; nokuti inzvimbo tvsene." 
Ezekiel42:14 Kana vapristi vapinda, havafaniri kuzobuda panzvimbo tsvene vachienda kuruvanze rwokunze, asi vanofanira kuisapo nguo dzavo dzavanoshumira nadzo, nokuti idzo itsvene; asi vanofanira kufuka dzimwe nguo, ndokuzoswedera kune zvavanhu.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Zvino akati apedza kuyera imba yomukati, akandibudisa nenzira yesuwo rakatarira kurutivi rwamabvazuva, akapayera kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel42:16 Akayera kurutivi rwamabvazuva norutsanga rwokuyera narwo, zvikaita tsanga dzina mazana mashanu, norutsanga rwokuyera narwo kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel42:17 Akayera kurutivi rwokumusoro norutsanga rwokuyera narwo kumativi ose, zvikaita tsanga dzina mazana mashanu." 
Ezekiel42:18 Akayera kurutivi rwezasi norutsanga rwokuyera narwo, zvikaita tsanga dzina mazana mashanu." 
Ezekiel42:19 Akadzoka kurutivi rwamavirazuva, akayera norutsanga rwokuyera narwo, zvikaita tsanga dzina mazana mashanu." 
Ezekiel42:20 Akapayera kumativi ose mana; pakanga pane rusvingo rwakapoteredza, rwakanga rwakaita zviyero zvina mazana mashanu pakureba, namazana mashanu pahupamhi, kuti ruparadzanise pakati pezvitsvene nezvisati zviri zvitsvene." 
Ezekiel43:1 Pashure akandiisa kusuwo, iro suwo rakatarira kurutivi rwamabvazuva." 
Ezekiel43:2 Zvinotarira, kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakabva kurutivi rwamabvazuva; izwi rake rakanga rakaita somubvumo wemvura zhinji; pasi pakapenya nokubwinya kwake." 
Ezekiel43:3 Zvakanga zvakafanana nezvandakaona, izvo zvandakaona nguva yandakauya kuzoparadza guta; zvandakaona zvino zvakanga zvakafanana nezvandakaona parwizi rwaKebhari; ini ndikawira pasi nechiso changu." 
Ezekiel43:4 Kubwinya kwaJehovha kukapinda mumba nenzira yesuwo rakatarira kurutivi rwamabvazuva. 
Ezekiel43:5 Mweya ukandisimudza, ukandiisa muruvanze rwomukati; zvino tarira, kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakazadza imba." 
Ezekiel43:6 Zvino ndikanzwa mumwe achitaura neni ari mumba; mumwe murume akamira neni.
