Daniel9:25 Naizvozvo chiziva unzwisise, kuti kubva pakutemwa kwomurairo wokuvandudza nokuvaka Jerusaremu kusvikira kune wakazodzwa, iye muchinda, zvichaita vhiki nomwe; uye vhiki dzina makumi matanhatu nembiri dzichavapo dzokuvakwa kwaro, rine misika nemigwagwa, asi zvichaitwa nenguva yokutambudzika." 
Daniel9:26 Zvino kana vhiki idzo dzina makumi matanhatu nembiri dzapera, akazodzwa achabviswa, akasara asina chinhu; vanhu vomuchinda, anozouya, vachaparadza guta nenzvimbo tsvene; asi kuguma kwazvo kuchauya nokukukurwa, kurwa kuchavapo nokuparadzwa kwakatema, kusvikira pakuguma.’" 
Daniel9:27 Zvino iye achaita sungano yakasimba navazhinji vhiki imwe; pakati pevhiki achagumisa chibayiro nechipo, zvino muparadzi achasvika nebapiro rezvinonyangadza; kusvikira pakuguma kwazvo kwakagara kwakatarwa, kutsamwa kuchadururirwa pamusoro pezvakaparadzwa.”" 
Daniel10:1 Negore rechitatu raKoreshi mambo wePeresia, chimwe chinhu chakaratidzwa Dhanieri, ainzi Bheteshazari; chinhu icho chakanga chiri chechokwadi, chiri chokurwa kukuru; akanzwisisa chinhu icho, nokuziva kududzirwa kwezvaakaratidzwa." 
Daniel10:2 “Namazuva iwayo ini Dhanieri ndakanga ndichichema vhiki nhatu dzose. 
Daniel10:3 Ndakanga ndisingadyi zvokudya zvinozipa, kunyangwe nenyama newaini hazvina kupinda mumuromo mangu, uye handina kutongozora mafuta kusvikira vhiki nhatu dzose dzapera." 
Daniel10:4 “Zvino nezuva ramakumi maviri namana romwedzi wokutanga, ndakati ndiri pamhenderekedzo yorwizi rukuru, irwo Hidhekeri," 
Daniel10:5 ndikaratidza meso angu, ndikatarira, ndikaona murume akapfeka hanzu dzerineni, akasunga chiuno chake nendarama yakaisvonaka yeUfazi;" 
Daniel10:6 muviri wake wakanga wakaita sebheriri, chiso chake chakapenya semheni, meso ake akapfuta samazhenje, maoko ake netsoka dzake zvakanga zvakafanana nendarira yakakweshwa, uye kutinhira kwamashoko ake kwakaita sokutinhira kwavazhinji." 
Daniel10:7 “Zvino ini Dhanieri ndakaona izvo zvakaratidzwa ini ndoga; nokuti varume vakanga vaneni havana kuona zvakaratidzwa; asi vakabatwa nokudedera kukuru, vakatiza kundovanda." 
Daniel10:8 Ini ndikasiyiwa ndiri ndoga, ndikaona chinhu ichi chikuru chandakaratidzwa, ndikapererwa nesimba; nokuti kunaka kwechiso changu kwakashanduka kuipa mukati mangu, ndikasazova nesimba." 
Daniel10:9 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndakanzwa kutinhira kwamashoko ake; zvino ndakati ndichinzwa kutinhira kwamashoko ake, ndikabatwa nehope kwazvo ndivete pachiso changu, chiso changu chakatarira pasi." 
Daniel10:10 Ipapo tarira, ruoko rwakandibata, rukandimisa namabvi angu nezvanza zvamaoko angu ndichidzedzereka." 
Daniel10:11 “Akati kwandiri, ‘Iwe Dhanieri, murume anodikanwa kwazvo, chinzwisisa mashoko andinotaura kwauri, umire kwazvo; nokuti ndatumwa kwauri iwe zvino.’ Aakati ataura shoko iro kwandiri, ndikamira ndichidedera." 
Daniel10:12 “Ipapo akati kwandiri, ‘Usatya Dhanieri, nokuti kubva pazuva rokutanga rawakafunga nomwoyo wako wose kunzwisisa nokuzvininipisa pamberi paMwari wako, mashoko ako akanzwikwa; ndauya nokuda kwamashoko ako." 
Daniel10:13 Asi muchinda woushe hwavaPeresia akandidzivisa mazuva ana makumi maviri nerimwe; asi tarira, Mikaeri, mumwe wamachinda makuru, akauya kuzondibatsira, ndikasarako kuna madzimambo avaPeresia." 
Daniel10:14 Zvino ndauya kuzokuzivisa zvichaitirwa vanhu vako namazuva okupedzisira; nokuti zvawakaratidzwa ndezvamazuva mazhinji achazouya.’ 
Daniel10:15 “Zvino akati ataura neni namashoko iwayo, ndikaramba ndakatarira pasi nechiso changu, ndikashayiwa shoko." 
Daniel10:16 Ipapo tarira, mumwe akafanana navanakomana vavanhu akagunzva miromo yangu; zvino ndikashamisa muromo wangu, ndikataura, ndikati kuna iye akanga amire pamberi pangu, ‘Aiwa, ishe wangu, ndabatwa nokutya kukuru, handichina simba nokuda kwezvandakaratidzwa." 
Daniel10:17 Nokuti muranda washe wangu uyu angataura seiko nashe wangu uyu? Nokuti kana ndirini, pakarepo ndakasara ndisina simba, uye ndakanga ndisisina mweya mukati mangu.’" 
Daniel10:18 “Ipapo mumwe akafanana nomunhu akandibatazve, akandisimbisa." 
Daniel10:19 Akati, ‘Iwe murume anodikanwa kwazvo, usatya hako; rugare ruve newe, iva nesimba, iva nesimba.’ Zvino akati achitaura neni, ndikasimbiswa, ndikati, ‘Ishe wangu ngaataure hake, nokuti makandisimbisa.’" 
Daniel10:20 “Zvino akati, ‘Unoziva chandakauyira kwauri here? Zvino ndichadzokera kundorwa nomuchinda wePeresia; kana ndabvapo, tarira, muchinda weGirisi achauya." 
Daniel10:21 Asi ndichakuudza zvakanyorwa murugwaro rwechokwadi; asi hakuna anozvisimbisa kundorwa navava pamwechete neni, asi Mikaeri muchinda wenyu.’" 
Daniel11:1 “Kana ndirini, negore rokutanga raDhariusi muMedhia, ini ndakasimuka kundomutsigira nokumusimbisa." 
Daniel11:2 “Zvino ndichakuzivisa chokwadi. Tarira, paPeresia pachamukazve madzimambo matatu; wechina achava mupfumi kupfuura ivavo vose; zvino kana asimba kwazvo nepfuma yake, achamutsa vamwe vose kuzorwa noushe hweGirisi." 
Daniel11:3 “Zvino mambo ane simba achamuka, achabata ushe nesimba guru, achiita sezvaanoda." 
Daniel11:4 Kana amuka, ushe hwake huchaputswa, ndokuparadzirwa kumhepo ina dzokudenga, asi hahungaendi kuvazukuru vake, uye hahungaenzani nesimba raakabata naro iye; nokuti ushe hwake huchadzurwa, ndokupiwa vamwe kunze kwaivavo." 
Daniel11:5 “Mambo wezasi achava nesimba, nomumwe wamachinda ake; zvino iye achamupfuura nesimba, ndokubata ushe; ushe hwake huchava ushe hukuru." 
Daniel11:6 Kana mamwe makore apfuura, vachaita sungano; mukunda wamambo wezasi achaenda kuna mambo wokumusoro kuzotsvaka sungano, asi iye mukunda haangarambi ane simba roruoko rwake; kunyangwe naiye mambo haangamiri, nesimba roruoko rwake; asi mukunda, navakauya naye, naiye akamubereka, naiye akamusimbisa nenguva idzo vachaiswa kukuparadzwa." 
Daniel11:7 Asi pabukira remidzi yake mumwe achamuka panzvimbo yake; iye acharwa namambo wokumusoro, acharwa navo nokuvakunda." 
Daniel11:8 Achatapawo vamwari vavo, pamwechete nemifananidzo yavo yakaumbwa, nemidziyo yavo yakanaka yesirivha nendarama, achindozviisa Ijipiti; ipapo acharega mambo wokumusoro mamwe makore." 
Daniel11:9 Achapindawo muushe hwamambo wezasi, asi achazodzokera kunyika yake." 
Daniel11:10 “Vanakomana vake vachandorwa, vachaunganidza boka guru ravarwi, richauya, nokupararira, ndokupfuura neseri; ipapo richadzoka ndokuzorwa kusvikira panhare yake." 
Daniel11:11 Zvino mambo wezasi achatsamwa, achandorwa naye, naiye mambo wokumusoro; asi iye achakokera boka guru, boka iro richaiswa mumaoko ake." 
Daniel11:12 Boka iro richatapwa, zvino mwoyo wake uchazvikudza; uchaparadza vana makumi ezviuru, asi haangakundi." 
Daniel11:13 “Zvino mambo wokumusoro achadzoka, ndokukokera boka guru kune rokutanga; achauya pakupera kwenguva dziya, dziya dzamakore ane hondo huru nenhumbi zhinji." 
Daniel11:14 Nenguva idzo vazhinji vachamukira mambo wezasi; uye vana vavanopenga pakati pavanhu vako vachazvikudza, kuti vasimbise zvawakaratidzwa; asi vachaparadzwa." 
Daniel11:15 Zvino mambo wokumusoro achasvika, ndokuvatutira murwi wokurwa, ndokukunda guta rakavakirwa kwazvo; hondo dzezasi handingagoni kumira, kunyangwe navanhu vake vakatsaurwa, uye vachashayiwa simba rokumira naro." 
Daniel11:16 Asi uyo anouuya kuzorwa naye achaita sezvaanoda, hakuna angamira pamberi pake; zvino iye achamira panyika yakaisvonaka, akabata kuparadza muruoko rwake." 
Daniel11:17 “Ipapo achashingaira kuuya nesimba roushe hwake hwose, ane sungano yake; achaita izvozvo, achamupa mwanasikana wavakadzi, kuti amuparadze; asi zvichakona, haana chaachawana." 
Daniel11:18 Shure kwaizvozvo acharatidza chiso chake kuzvivi, ndokukunda zvizhinji; asi mumwe mukuru wehondo achagumisa kushoora kwake; achadzosera kushoora kwake kuna iye amene." 
Daniel11:19 Ipapo acharatidza chiso chake kunhare dzenyika yake; asi achagumburwa nokuwa, ndokushayikwa." 
Daniel11:20 “Zvino panzvimbo yake kuchamuka mumwe achatuma muteresi kupfuura napakaisvonaka paushe hwake, asi kana mazuva mashoma apera uchaparadzwa, zvisingaitwi nokutsamwa kana nokurwa." 
Daniel11:21 “Panzvimbo yake kuchamuka munhu anofanira kuzvidzwa, akanga asina kupiwa kukudzwa kwoushe; asi iye achasvika nenguva yokufara kwavanhu, ndokutora ushe nokubata kumeso." 
Daniel11:22 Hondo dzinokukura dzichakukurwa pamberi pake, dzichaparadzwa; zvirokwazvo, naiye muchinda wesunganowo." 
Daniel11:23 Kana apedza kuita sungano navo, achavanyengera; nokuti achakwirira, nokuva nesimba navanhu vashoma." 
Daniel11:24 Nenguva yokufara kwavanhu achapinda pamativi akaorera enyika; achaita zvisina kumboitwa namadzibaba ake, kunyangwe namadzibaba amadzibaba ake; achaparadzira pakati pavo zvaakatapa nezvaakapamba nenhumbi; achatanda mano ake pamusoro penhare, asi nenguva bedzi." 
Daniel11:25 “Ipapo achamutsira mambo wezasi simba rake nomwoyo wake, ane hondo huru kwazvo ine simba; asi haangamiri, nokuti vachamutandira mano." 
Daniel11:26 Vanodya zvokudya zvake, ndivo vachamuparadza; hondo yake ichapararira, vazhinji vachawira pasi vaurayiwa." 
Daniel11:27 Kana ari madzimambo awo maviri, mwoyo yavo ichada kuita zvakashata, vachareva nhema vari patafura rimwe; asi hazvingabatsiri, nokuti kuguma kuchasvika nenguva yakatarwa." 
Daniel11:28 Ipapo achadzokera kunyika yake nenhumbi zhinji; mwoyo wake uchavenga sungano, achaita sezvaanoda, ndokudzokera kunyika yake." 
Daniel11:29 “Nenguva yakatarwa achadzoka, ndokusvika kunyika yezasi; asi nenguva yokupedzisira hazvingaiti sapakutanga." 
Daniel11:30 Nokuti zvikepe zveKitimi zvichauya kuzorwa naye; naizvozvo achaora mwoyo, ndokudzoka akatsamwa pamusoro pesungano, ndokuita sezvaanoda; achadzoka, ndokuva nehanya navakaramba sungano tsvene." 
Daniel11:31 Hondo dzichamutswa naye, dzichamhura nzvimbo tsvene, iye nhare, vachabvisa chipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, ndokumutsa chinonyangadza chinoparadza." 
Daniel11:32 Vanoitira sungano zvakaipa, achavatsausa nokubata kumeso; asi vanhu vanoziva Mwari wavo, vachava nesimba, vachaita mabasa makuru." 
Daniel11:33 Vakachenjera pakati pavanhu vachadzidzisa vazhinji; asi vachaparadzwa nomunondo, uye nomurazvo womoto, uye nokutapwa, uye nokupambwa mazuva mazhinji." 
Daniel11:34 Zvino kana voparadzwa vachabatsirwa nokubatsirwa kuduku; asi vazhinji vachazviisa kwavari nokubata kumeso. 
Daniel11:35 Vamwe vavo vakachenjera vachaparadzwa, kuti vaedzwe, vacheneswe, kusvikira kunguva yokupedzisira; nokuti nguva yokupedzisira ichigere kusvika." 
Daniel11:36 “Mambo uyo achaita sezvaanoda; achazviita mukuru, achazvikudza achiti ndinopfuura vamwari vose, achataura zvinhu zvinoshamisa pamusoro paMwari wavamwari; iye achafara pane zvaanoita kusvikira kutsamwa kwapera, nokuti zvakatemwa zvichaitika." 
Daniel11:37 Uye haangavi nehanya navamwari vamadzibaba ake, kana norudo rwavakadzi, haangavi nehanya namwari upi noupi; nokuti achazvikudza achiti ndakapfuura vose." 
Daniel11:38 Asi panzvimbo yazvo achakudza mwari wenhare; mwari wakanga asingazikanwi namadzibaba ake, ndiye waachakudza nendarama nesirivha namabwe anokosha nezvinhu zvinodikanwa." 
Daniel11:39 Acharwa nenhare dzakaisvobata achibatsirwa namwari wavatorwa; ani naani anodikanwa naye, iye achakudzwa naye zvikuru; achavabatisa ushe pamusoro pavanhu vazhinji, achivagovera nyika uve mubairo wavo." 
Daniel11:40 “Zvino nenguva yokupedzisira mambo wezasi achapesana naye; mambo wokumusoro achauya kuzorwa naye sechamupupuri, ane ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza nezvikepe zvizhinji; achapinda munyika idzo, ndokupararira, ndokupfuura neseri." 
Daniel11:41 Achapindawo munyika yakaisvonaka, nyika zhinji dzichakundwa, asi idzi dzicharwirwa paruoko rwake, dzinoti Edhomu, neMoabhu norutivi rwakanaka rwavana vaAmoni." 
Daniel11:42 Achatambanudzirawo ruoko rwake kune dzimwe nyika; nyika yeIjipiti haingapukunyuki. 
Daniel11:43 Asi achava anesimba pamusoro pepfuma yendarama nesirivha, napamusoro pezvinhu zvose zvinokosha zveIjipiti; vaRibhia navaItiopia vachatevera makwara ake." 
Daniel11:44 Asi mashoko anobva kumabvazuva nokumusoro achamuvhundusa; ipapo achabuda nehasha kwazvo kundoparadza nokupedza chose vazhinji. 
Daniel11:45 Achadzika matende ake oushe pakati pegungwa negomo dzvene rakaisvonaka; kunyangwe zvakadaro achasvika pakuguma kwake, achashayiwa anomubatsira." 
Daniel12:1 “Nenguva iyo Mikaeri achasimuka, iye muchinda mukuru anochengeta vana vavanhu vako; ipapo nguva yenjodzi ichavapo, isina kumbovapo yakadaro kubva pakumuka kwamarudzi avanhu kusvikira nguva iyo; nenguva iyo vanhu vako vacharwirwa, ivo vose vakanyorwa mubhuku." 
Daniel12:2 Zvino vazhinji vavavete muvhu rapasi vachamuka, vamwe vachamukira upenyu usingaperi, vamwe kukunyadziswa nokuzvidzwa kusingaperi." 
Daniel12:3 Vakachenjera vachapenya sokupenya kwokudenga, uye vanodzorera vazhinji kukururama vachapenya senyenyedzi nokusingaperi–peri." 
Daniel12:4 “Asi iwe Dhanieri, vanza mashoko, unamire bhuku rechisimbiso, kusvikira kunguva yokupedzisira; vazhinji vachamhanya pose–pose, nezivo ichawanda." 
Daniel12:5 “Ipapo ini Dhanieri ndakatarira, ndikaona vamwe vaviri, mumwe pamhenderekedzo yorwizi nechouno mhiri, mumwe pamhenderekedzo yorwizi nechemhiri." 
Daniel12:6 Mumwe akati kumurume akanga akapfeka hanzu dzerineni, akanga ari pamusoro pemvura yorwizi, ‘Inguva yakadini kusvikira pakuguma kwezvishamiso izvi?’" 
Daniel12:7 Ndikanzwa murume akanga akapfeka hanzu dzerinei, akanga ari pamusoro pemvura yorwizi, achisimudzira kudenga ruoko rwake rworudyi noruoko rwake rworuboshwe, achipika naiye anorarama nokusingaperi, kuti zvichaita nguva imwe, nedzimwe nguva, nehafu yenguva; kana vapedza kuputsanya simba ravanhu vatsvene, izvi zvose zvichapedziswa." 
Daniel12:8 “Ndikanzwa, asi handina kuzvinzwisisa; ipapo ndikati, ‘Aiwa ishe wangu, kupera kwezvinhu izvi ndokweiko?’" 
Daniel12:9 “Iye akati, ‘Chienda hako, iwe Dhanieri; nokuti mashoko awa akavanzwa nokunamirwa nechisimbiso kusvikira panguva yokupedzisira.’" 
Daniel12:10 Vazhinji vachazvinatsa nokuzvichenesa nokubviswa tsvina, asi vakaipa vachaita zvakaipa; hakuna pakati pavakaipa achanzwisisa, asi vakachenjera ndivo vachanzwisisa." 
Daniel12:11 “Kubva panguva yokubviswa kwechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, nokumutswa kwechifananidzo chinonyangadza chinoparadza, zvichaita mazuva ane chiuru chimwe namazana maviri namakumi mapfumbamwe." 
Daniel12:12 Akaropafadzwa anoramba achimirira kusvikira pamazuva ane chiuru chimwe namazana matatu namakumi matatu namashanu. 
Daniel12:13 “Asi iwe chienda hako kusvikira kuguma kwavapo; nokuti iwe achazorora, ndokumukirazve mugove wako pakupera kwamazuva iwayo.”" 
Hosea1:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Hosiya mwanakomana waBheeri, namazuva aUziya naJotami naAhazi naHezekiya, madzimambo aJudha, uye namazuva aJerobhoami mwanakomana waJoashi, mambo waIsiraeri." 
Hosea1:2 Pakutanga kwokutaura kwaJehovha naHosiya, Jehovha akati kuna Hosiya, “Enda undozvitorera mukadzi woufeve navana voufeve; nokuti nyika inofeva zvikuru, zvavakasiyana naJehovha.”" 
Hosea1:3 Naizvozvo akaenda akatora Gomeri mukunda waDibhiraimi, iye akanaka pamuviri akamuberekera mwanakomana." 
Hosea1:4 Jehovha akati kwaari, “Mutumidze zita rinonzi ‘Jezireri,’ nokuti kwasara chinguva chiduku, ipapo ndichatsiva ropa reJezireri paimba yaJehu, nokugumisa ushe hweimba yaIsiraeri." 
Hosea1:5 Zvino nezuva iro ndichavhuna uta hwaIsiraeri mumupata weJezireri.” 
Hosea1:6 Akanakazve pamuviri, ndokubereka mwanasikana. Jehovha akati kwaari, “Mutumidze iye zita rinonzi ‘Roruhama;’ nokuti handichazonzwiri imba yaIsiraeri nyasha nditongovakanganwire." 
Hosea1:7 Asi ndichanzwira imba yaJudha nyasha, ndichavaponesa naJehovha Mwari wavo, handingavaponesi nouta, kana nomunondo, kana nokurwa, kana namabhiza, kana navatasvi vamabhiza.”" 
Hosea1:8 Zvino akati arumura Roruhama, akanakazve pamuviri, akabereka mwanakomana." 
Hosea1:9 Jehovha akati, “Mutumidze zita rinonzi ‘Roami;’ nokuti imi hamuzi vanhu vangu, neni handingavi Mwari wenyu.”" 
Hosea1:10 Kunyangwe zvakadaro kuwanda kwavana VaIsiraeri kuchaita sejecha regungwa, risingabviri kuyerwa kana kuverengwa; zvichaitika kuti paya pakanga panzi kwavari, “Hamuzi vanhu vangu,” ndipapo pazvichanzi kwavari, “Muri vanakomana vaMwari mupenyu.”" 
Hosea1:11 Vana vaJudha navana VaIsiraeri vachaunganidzwa pamwechete, vachazvigadzira mukuru mumwe, ndokubva panyika ino, nokuti zuva reJezireri richava guru." 
Hosea2:1 Itiyi kuna vanun'una venyu, “Ama;” nokuhanzvadzi dzenyu, “Ruhama.”" 
Hosea2:2 Kakavarai namai venyu, kakavarai; nokuti haazi mukadzi wangu, neni handizi murume wake; ngaabvise kufeva kwake pachiso chake, nokupata kwake pakati pamazamu ake;" 
Hosea2:3 kuti ndirege kumukumurira nguo dzake dzose, ndimuite sezvaakanga akaita nezuva rokuzvarwa kwake, ndimuite serenje, ndimushandure ave nyika yakaoma, ndimuuraye nenyota." 
Hosea2:4 Zvirokwazvo handinganzwiri vana vake nyasha, zvavari vana voufeve;" 
Hosea2:5 nokuti mai vavo vakafeva; vakavabereka vakaita zvinonyadzisa, nokuti vakati, “Ndichatevera vadikani vangu, vanondipa zvokudya zvangu nemvura yangu, namakushe angu neshinda yangu, namafuta angu nezvokunwa zvangu.”" 
Hosea2:6 Naizvozvo tarira, ndichasosera nzira yako neminzwa, ndichamuvakira rusvingo, kuti arege kuwana nzira dzake." 
Hosea2:7 Achatevera vadikani vake, asi haangavabati; achavatsvaka, asi haangavawani; ipapo achati, “Ndichadzokera kumurume wangu wokutanga, nokuti nenguva iyo ndaifara kupfuura zvino.”" 
Hosea2:8 Nokuti akanga asingazivi kuti ndini ndaimupa zviyo, newaini namafuta, nokumuwanzira sirivha nendarama, zvavaibatira Bhaari nazvo." 
Hosea2:9 Saka ndichamutorera zviyo zvangu nenguva yazvo, newaini yangu itsva nenhambo yazvo, ndichabvisa makushe angu neshinda yangu zvaifanira kufukidza kushama kwake." 
Hosea2:10 Zvino ndichafukura kunyadzisa kwake pamberi pavadikani vake, hakuna angamurwira paruoko rwangu." 
Hosea2:11 Ndichagumisawo mufaro wake wose, nemitambo yake, nenguva dzake dzokugara kwomwedzi, namaSabata ake, newungano dzake dzose dzakatarwa." 
Hosea2:12 Ndichaparadza mizambiringa yake nemionde yake, yaaiti, “Ndiwo mubairo wangu wandakapiwa navadikani vangu; ndichazviita dondo, mhuka dzokusango dzichazvidya." 
Hosea2:13 Ndichamuranga nokuda kwamazuva avaBhaari, vaaipisira zvinonhuwira, azvichishonga nezvindori zvake zvenzeve nezvishongo zvake, akatevera vadikani vake, akandikangwanwa,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Hosea2:14 Saka tarirai, ndichamunyengera nokumuisa kurenje, ndichitaura zvinofadza mwoyo wake." 
Hosea2:15 Ndichamupa minda yake yemizambiringa zvichibva ipapo, nomupata waAkori uve mukova wetariro kwaari; achapindura aripo, sapamazuva ousikana hwake, uye sapazuva raakabuda panyika yeIjipiti." 
Hosea2:16 Zvino nezuva iro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, uchandidaidza kuti Murume Wangu, haungazondaidzi kuti Bhaari." 
Hosea2:17 Nokuti ndichabvisa mazita avaBhaari mumuromo make, havangazozikanwi namazita avo." 
Hosea2:18 Nezuva iro ndichavaitira sungano nemhuka dzokusango, neshiri dzokudenga, nezvinokambaira zvapasi; ndichavhuna uta nomundo nehondo panyika, ndivavatise pasi vakachengetwa." 
Hosea2:19 Ndichakupfimba uve wangu nokusingaperi; zvirokwazvo ndichakupfimba uve wangu nokururama, nokururamisira, nounyoro, nenyasha." 
Hosea2:20 Ndichakuita kuti uve wangu nokutendeka; ipapo uchaziva Jehovha. 
Hosea2:21 Zvino nezuva iro ndichapindura, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichapindura denga rose, iro richapindura nyika;" 
Hosea2:22 nyika ichapindura zviyo, newaini, namafuta; izvo zvichapindura Jezireri." 
Hosea2:23 Ndichazvisimira iye panyika; ndichamunzwira nyasha, iye akanga asina kunzwirwa nyasha; ndichati kuna ivo vakanga vasi vanhu vangu, “Imi muri vanhu vangu,” ivo vachati, “Imi muri Mwari wedu.”" 
Hosea3:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Chiendazve, undoda mukadzi anodikanwa nomurume wake, asi chiri chifeve, sezvinoda Jehovha vana VaIsiraeri, kunyangwe vachitsaukira kuna vamwe vamwari, vachida mapundu amazambiringa.”" 
Hosea3:2 Naizvozvo ndakamutenga namasirivha ane gumi namashanu, nehomeri netereki yebhari;" 
Hosea3:3 ndikati kwaari, “Uchafanira kundimirira mazuva mazhinji; haufaniri kupata, haufaniri kuva mukadzi womumwe murume; neniwo ndichaita saizvozvo kwauri." 
Hosea3:4 Nokuti vana VaIsiraeri vachagara mazuva mazhinji vasina mambo, vasina muchinda, vasina zvibairo, vasina shongwe, vasina efodhi kana terafimi." 
Hosea3:5 Pashure vana VaIsiraeri vachadzoka vachitsvaka Jehovha Mwari wavo naDhavhidhi mambo wavo; vachauya kuna Jehovha vachitya, nokuunyoro hwake namazuva okupedzisira.”" 
Hosea4:1 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, “Imi vana VaIsiraeri, nokuti Jehovha ane gakava navanhu vagere munyika ino, nokuti hakuna zvokwadi, kana unyoro, kana kuziva Mwari munyika ino." 
Hosea4:2 Hakuna zvimwe asi kupika, nokunyengera, nokuuraya, nokuba, nokuita upombwe; vanopaza dzimba, kuteura ropa kunoramba kuchitevera kuteura ropa." 
Hosea4:3 Saka nyika ichachema, mumwe nomumwe ageremo achapera simba, pamwechete nemhuka dzesango neshiri dzokudenga; naidzo hove dzegungwa dzichabviswa." 
Hosea4:4 “Ngakurege kuva nomunhu anokakavara kana munhu anotuka; nokuti vanhu vako vakaita savanokakavara nomupristi. 
Hosea4:5 Iwe uchagumburwa masikati, nomuporofita achagumburwawo pamwechete newe usiku; ndichaparadza mai vako." 
Hosea4:6 Vanhu vangu vaparadzwa nokushaiwa zivo; zvawaramba zivo, neni ndichakurambawo, kuti urege kuva mupristi wangu; zvawakanganwa murairo waMwari wako, neniwo ndichakanganwa vana vako." 
Hosea4:7 “Vakati vachiwanda, kunditadzira kwavo kukawandawo, ndichashandura kukudzwa kwavo ndikuite kunyadziswa." 
Hosea4:8 Vakaguta nezvinobva pazvivi zvavanhu vangu, vanopanga nemwoyo yavo zvakaipa zvavo." 
Hosea4:9 “Saka zvakaita vanhu, ndizvo zvichaita mupristiwo; ndichavarova pamusoro penzira dzavo, ndichavaripidzira zvavanobata." 
Hosea4:10 Vachadya, asi havangaguti; vachapata, asi havangawandi, nokuti vakarega kuva nehanya naJehovha." 
Hosea4:11 “Kufeva newaini newaini, itsva, zvinobvisa njere." 
Hosea4:12 Vanhu vangu vanobvunza mano padanda ravo, vanoziviswa netsvimbo yavo; nokuti mweya wokupeva wakavatadzisa, vakapata, ndokurasa Mwari wavo." 
Hosea4:13 Vanobayira pamusoro pamakomo, vanopisira zvinonhuwira pazvikomo, napasi pemioki, nemipopirari, nemiterebhini, nokuti mimvuri yayo yakanaka; naizvozvo vakunda venyu vanopata, mwenga yenyu inofeva." 
Hosea4:14 Handingarovi vakunda venyu kana vachipata, nemwenga yenyu kana ichifeva; nokuti varume vanoenda vari voga nezvifeve, vanobayira navakadzi vanofeva; vanhu vasinganzwisisi vachaparadzwa." 
Hosea4:15 Kunyangwe imi, Isiraeri, muchipata, Judha ngavarege kupara mhaka; musasvika Girigari, musakwira Bhetiavheni, uye musapika, muchiti, ‘NaJehovha mupenyu!’" 
Hosea4:16 “Nokuti Isiraeri vanakoma, setsiru rinokoma; zvino Jehovha achavafudza segwayana panzvimbo mhamhi." 
Hosea4:17 Efuremu anonamatirana nezvifananidzo, muregei." 
Hosea4:18 Zvavanonwa zvinovava; vanoramba vachipata; vabati vavo vanofarira zvikuru zvinonyadzisa. 
Hosea4:19 Mhepo yakavaputira namapapiro ayo; vachanyadziswa nokuda kwezvibairo zvavo. 
Hosea5:1 “Inzwai shoko iri, imi vapristi, teererai imi imba yaIsiraeri, rerekerai nzeve dzenyu, imi imba yamambo; nokuti ndimi munotongwa; nokuti makanga muri musungo paMizipa, nomumbure wakadzikwa paRabhori." 
Hosea5:2 Vakandimukira vakapinda kwazvo pakuora, asi ndichavatuka vose." 
Hosea5:3 Ndinoziva Efuremu, Isiraeri havana kuvanzika pamberi pangu; nokuti zvino iwe Efuremu, wakapata, Isiraeri vakasvibiswa.”" 
Hosea5:4 “Zvavakaita hazvivatenderi kudzokera kuna Mwari wavo; nokuti mweya wokufeva uri mukati mavo, havazivi Jehovha." 
Hosea5:5 “Kuzvikudza kwaIsiraeri kunovapupurira pachena; saka Isiraeri naEfuremu vachagumburwa pazvakaipa zvavo, Judha vachagumburwawo pamwechete navo." 
Hosea5:6 “Vachaenda namakwai avo nemombe dzavo kundotsvaka Jehovha, asi havangamuwani; akaenda kure navo." 
Hosea5:7 Vakanyengera Jehovha, nokuti vakabereka vana vasati vari vavo; zvino mutambo wokugara kwomwedzi uchavapedza pamwechete neminda yavo." 
Hosea5:8 “Ridzai mumanzi paGibhia, nehwamanda paRama; ridzai mhere paBhetiavheni; vari shure kwako, iwe Bhenjamini!" 
Hosea5:9 “Nyika yaEfuremu ichaitwa matongo nezuva rokutukwa; ndakazivisa pakati paIsiraeri zvichazovapo zvirokwazvo. 
Hosea5:10 “Machinda aJudha akafanana navanobvisa chiratidzo chemiganhu; ndichadurura kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pawo semvura. 
Hosea5:11 “Efuremu akamanikidzwa, akapwanyiwa nokutongwa, nokuti akanga achitenda kutevera murairo wavanhu." 
Hosea5:12 “Naizvozvo ndichava kuna Efuremu sechipfunho, uye sokuora kuimba yaJudha." 
Hosea5:13 “Efuremu akati achiona kurwara kwake, naJudha vanga rake, Efuremu akaenda Asiria, akatuma nhume kuna mambo Jarebhi; asi iye haagoni kukuporesai, kana kuporesa vanga renyu." 
Hosea5:14 “Nokuti ndichava seshumba kuna Efuremu, uye seshumba duku kuimba yaJudha; ini, iyeni, ndichabvambura ndokuenda; ndichavatapa, hakuna angavarwira." 
Hosea5:15 “Ndichaenda ndichidzokera kunzvimbo yangu, kusvikira vatenda kutadza kwavo, vakatsvaka chiso changu; pakutambudzika kwavo vachanditsvaka nomwoyo wose.”" 
Hosea6:1 “Uyai, tidzokera kuna Jehovha; nokuti akabvambura, asi achatipodzazve; akarova, asi achatisungazve patakakuvara." 
Hosea6:2 Kana mazuva maviri apera achatiraramisa, nezuva rechitatu achatimutsazve, tirarame pamberi pake." 
Hosea6:3 Ngatimuzive, ngatishingaire kuziva Jehovha; kubuda kwake kwakatemwa sokwamangwanani; achauya kwatiri semvura, semvura yokuteverera inodiridza nyika.”" 
Hosea6:4 “Aiwa, Efuremu, ndichakuitei? Aiwa, Judha ndichakuitei? Nokuti kunaka kwenyu kwakaita semhute yamangwanani, uye sedova rinokurumidza kuenda." 
Hosea6:5 Naizvozvo ndakavatema navaporofita; ndakavauraya namashoko omuromo wangu, zvandakatonga zvakaita sechiedza chinobuda." 
Hosea6:6 Nokuti ndinoda rudo, handidi zvibairo, uye kuziva Mwari kupfuura zvipiriso zvinopiswa." 
Hosea6:7 “Asi vakadarika sungano saAdhamu, ndipapo pavakandinyengera." 
Hosea6:8 Giriadhi iguta ravanoita zvakaipa, rina mwakwapa eropa." 
Hosea6:9 Sezvakaita makororo anovandira munhu, saizvozvo boka ravapristi rinouraya panzira inoenda Shekemi; zvirokwazvo, vakaita zvinonyadzisa." 
Hosea6:10 Paimba yaIsiraeri ndakaona chinhu chinonyangadza kwazvo, pakati paEfuremu pane hufeve, Isiraeri vakasvibiswa." 
Hosea6:11 “Newewo, Judha, wakagadzirirwa kukohwa, nenguva yandinodzosa kutapwa kwavanhu vangu." 
Hosea7:1 “Kana ndichirapa Isiraeri, kuipa kwaEfuremu kwoonekwa nezvakashata zveSamaria; nokuti vanonyengera, mbavha inopinda mukati uye boka ramakororo rinoparadza kunze." 
Hosea7:2 “Asi havafungi mumwoyo yavo kuti ndinorangarira zvakaipa zvavo zvose; zvino zvavakaita zvinovakomberedza, zviri pamberi pangu.”" 
Hosea7:3 “Vanofadza mambo nezvakashata zvavo, namachinda nenhema dzavo." 
Hosea7:4 Vose imhombwe; vakafanana nechoto chakaveserwa nomubiki wechingwa; unorega kukuchidzira moto, kana akanya bundu rechingwa, kusvikira ravira." 
Hosea7:5 Nezuva ramambo wedu machinda akarwariswa nokupisa kwewaini; iye akatambanudza ruoko rwake pamwechete navaseki. 
Hosea7:6 Nokuti vakagadzira mwoyo yavo sechoto, vachivandira; mubiki wavo wechingwa unovata usiku hwose, mangwanani chinopfuta somurazvo womoto.”" 
Hosea7:7 “Vanopisa vose sechoto, vanoparadza vatongi vavo; madzimambo avo ose akawira pasi, hakuna nomumwe pakati pavo anodana kwandiri." 
Hosea7:8 “Efuremu ndiye anozvivenganisa namamwe marudzi, Efuremu chingwa chisina kushandurwa." 
Hosea7:9 Vatorwa vakapedza simba rake, asi iye haazvizivi; zvirokwazvo vhudzi rake rochena pose pose, asi iye haazvizivi." 
Hosea7:10 Kuzvikudza kwaIsiraeri kunopupura pamberi pake, asi havana kudzokera kuna Jehovha Mwari wavo, kana kumutsvaka, kunyangwe izvi zvose zvakadaro." 
Hosea7:11 Efuremu akaita senjiva isina mano, isina njere; vanodana Ijipiti, vanoenda Asiria." 
Hosea7:12 Kana vachienda, ndichakandira mumbure wangu pamusoro pavo, ndichavakwevera pasi seshiri dzokudenga; ndichavaranga sezvavakaudzwa paungano yavo." 
Hosea7:13 “Vane nhamo ivo nokuti vakatsauka kwandiri; ngavaparadzwe, nokuti vakandidarikira; kunyangwe ndakanga ndichida kuvadzikinura, vakandirevera nhema." 
Hosea7:14 “Havana kudana kwandiri nemwoyo yavo, asi vanoungudza panhoo dzavo; vanounganira zviyo newaini itsva, vanondimukira." 
Hosea7:15 Kunyangwe ndakavadzidzisa nokusimbisa maoko avo, kunyangwe zvakadaro vanofunga kundiitira zvakaipa." 
Hosea7:16 Vanodzoka, asi havadzokeri kuna iye ari kumusoro; vakafanana nouta hunonyengera; machinda avo achaparadzwa nomunondo nokuda kwehasha dzamarimi avo; ndiko kuchava kusekwa kwavo panyika yeIjipiti.”" 
Hosea8:1 “Isa hwamanda pamuromo wako. Zvinouya segondo kuzorwa neimba yaJehovha, nokuti vakadarika sungano yangu nokutadzira murairo wangu." 
Hosea8:2 Vachadana kwandiri, vachiti, ‘Mwari wangu, isu VaIsiraeri tinokuzivai.’" 
Hosea8:3 Isiraeri vakarasha zvakanaka; muvengi wavo achavateverera. 
Hosea8:4 “Vakagadza madzimambo, asi havana kurairwa neni; vakazvitsaurira machinda, ini ndisingazvizivi; vakazviitira zvifananidzo nesirivha uye nendarama yavo, kuti zviparadzwe." 
Hosea8:5 “Mhuru yako, iwe Samaria, inonyangadza; kutsamwa kwangu kwakavamukira; vachanonoka kusvikira rinhiko kuva vakanaka?" 
Hosea8:6 Nokuti chinhu ichi chakabvawo kuVaIsiraeri; mupfuri wakachiita, hachizi Mwari; zvirokwazvo, mhuri yeSamaria ichaputswa–putswa." 
Hosea8:7 Nokuti vanodyara mhepo, vachacheka chamupupuri; havane zviyo pamunda; chipande hachingavigiri hupfu; kunyangwe chikabereka, zvichamedzwa navatorwa." 
Hosea8:8 Isiraeri vakamedzwa; zvino vava pakati pamarudzi somudziyo usingadikanwi nomunhu. 
Hosea8:9 Nokuti vakaenda Asiria, sembizi inongozvifambira iri yoga; vaEfuremu vakazvitsvakira shamwari vachidziripira." 
Hosea8:10 Zvirokwazvo, kunyangwe vachizvitsvakira idzo pakati pamarudzi, ndichavaunganidza zvino, votanga kutapudzwa nemhaka yokuremedzwa namambo wamachinda." 
Hosea8:11 “Efuremu zvaakawanza maatari okutadza nawo, maatari ake akamutadzisa." 
Hosea8:12 Ndakamunyorera mashoko ane zviuru zvine gumi omurairo wangu, asi vanoti ndezvavatorwa." 
Hosea8:13 Kana zviri zvibairo zvezvipiriso zvangu, vanobayira nyama ndokuidya; asi Jehovha haana kuzvigamuchira; zvino ucharangarira zvakaipa zvavo, nokuvarova pamusoro pezvivi zvavo; vachadzokera Ijipiti." 
Hosea8:14 “Nokuti Isiraeri vakakanganwa Muiti wavo, vakavaka dzimba dzoushe; Judha vakawanza maguta akakomberedzwa namasvingo; asi ini ndichatuma moto kumaguta avo, uchapedza dzimba dzoushe dzawo.”" 
Hosea9:1 Regai kufara, imi Isiraeri, muchifarisisa samarudzi avanhu; nokuti makapata, muchisiya Mwari wenyu; makada mubairo wokufeva pamapuriro ose ezviyo." 
Hosea9:2 Buriro nechisviniro chewaini hazvingavagutsi, waini ichavanyengera." 
Hosea9:3 Havangagari munyika yaJehovha; asi Efuremu achadzokera Ijipiti, vachadya zvokudya zvine tsvina paAsiria." 
Hosea9:4 Havangadiriri Jehovha waini, zvibairo zvavo hazvingamufadzi; zvibairo zvavo zvichaita kwavari sezvokudya zvavanochema; vose, vanozvidya, vachasvibiswa, nokuti zvokudya zvavo ndezvavo zvoga, hazvingasviki mumba yaJehovha." 
Hosea9:5 Muchabateiko nezuva reungano dzakatarwa, nezuva remitambo yaJehovha?" 
Hosea9:6 Nokuti tarirai, vakabva nokuda kwokuparadzwa, asi VaIjipiti vachavaunganidza, veMemifisi vachavaviga; rukato ruchavatorera zvinhu zvavo zvesirivha zvinofadza; minzwa ichava mumatende avo." 
Hosea9:7 “Mazuva okurohwa asvika, mazuva okutsiva asvika; Isiraeri vachazviziva; muporofita ibenzi, munhu anomweya anopenga, nemhaka yokuwanda kwezvakaipa zvenyu, uye nokuti ruvengo rukuru." 
Hosea9:8 Efuremu mushori kuna Mwari wangu; kana ari muporofita, rugombe rwomuteyi weshiri ruri munzira dzake dzose, noruvengo muimba yaMwari wake." 
Hosea9:9 “Vakazvishatisa zvikuru kwazvo, sapamazuva eGibhia; acharangarira zvakaipa zvavo, achavarova pamusoro pezvivi zvavo." 
Hosea9:10 “Ndakawana Isiraeri vakaita samazambiringa murenje; ndakaona madzibaba enyu vakaita sezvibereko zvakatanga kuibva pamuonde panguva yawo yokubereka yokutanga; asi vakasvika paBhaaripeori, vakazviisa kune zvinonyadzisa, vakaitwa zvinonyangadza vachifanana nezvaidikanwa navo." 
Hosea9:11 “Kana vari Efuremu, kukudzwa kwavo kuchabhururuka seshiri; kubereka hakungavipo, kana kukurirwa, kana kunaka pamuviri." 
Hosea9:12 Kunyangwe vakarera vana vavo, ndichavatorera ivo, kusvikira kusisina munhu; zvirokwazvo, vachava nenhamowo, kana ini ndavasiya.”" 
Hosea9:13 Sezvandakatsaura Taya, Efuremu vakasimwa pakanaka; asi Efuremu vachabudisira muurayi vana vavo." 
Hosea9:14 Chivapai, Jehovha muchavapeiko? Chivapai zvizvaro zvinoshaya namazamu asina mukaka." 
Hosea9:15 “Zvakaipa zvavo zvose zviri paGirigari, nokuti ndipo pandakavavenga; nemhaka yezvakaipa zvavanoita ndichavadzinga paimba yangu, handichavadi; machinda avo ose akandimukira." 
Hosea9:16 Efuremu varohwa, mudzi wavo waoma, havangazobereki zvibereko; zvirokwazvo, kunyangwe vakabereka, ndichavauraya vadikanwa vakaberekwa nezvizvaro zvavo.”" 
Hosea9:17 Mwari wangu achavarasha, nokuti havana kumunzwa; vachava vadzungairi pakati pamarudzi avanhu." 
Hosea10:1 VaIsiraeri mudzambiringa unotanda zvakanaka, unobereka zvibereko zvawo; zvibereko zvavo zvakati zvichiwanda, vakawanzawo maatari avo; nyika yavo yakati ichifara, ivo vakazviitirawo shongwe dzakanaka." 
Hosea10:2 Mwoyo yavo inonyengera, zvino vachapiwa mhaka; acharova maatari avo, achaparadza shongwe dzavo." 
Hosea10:3 Zvirokwazvo, zvino vachati, “Hatina mambo, nokuti hatityi Jehovha; kana ari mambo angatiitireiko?”" 
Hosea10:4 Vanotaura mashoko asina maturo, vanopika nhema pakuita kwavo sungano; naizvozvo kutongwa kwavo kunomera somuti unouraya mumihoronga yomunda." 
Hosea10:5 Vagere Samaria vachatya mhuru dzeBhetiavheni; nokuti vanhu varo vachaichema, navapristi varo vaiifarira, nokuda kwokukudzwa kwayo, nokuti kwabva kwairi." 
Hosea10:6 Ichaiswawo Asiria, chive chipo chamambo Jarebhi; Efuremu vachanyadziswa, Isiraeri vachanyadziswa namano avo." 
Hosea10:7 Kana riri Samaria, mambo waro waparadzwa sechipande pamusoro pemvura." 
Hosea10:8 Nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzeAvheniwo, izvo zvivi zvaIsiraeri, dzichaparadzwa; munzwa norukato zvichamera pamaatari avo; zvino vachati kumakomo, “Tifukidzei,” nokuzvikomo, “Wirai pamusoro pedu.”" 
Hosea10:9 “Aiwa, Isiraeri, makatadza kubva pamazuva eGibhia; ndipo pavakamira; ko vachakundwa nehondo inorwa navana vezvakaipa paGibhia here?" 
Hosea10:10 Nguva yandinoda ndichavaranga; marudzi avanhu achavaunganira kana vakasungirwa pazvisakarurama zvavo zviviri. 
Hosea10:11 “Efuremu itsiru rakapingudzwa, rinofarira kupura zviyo; asi ini ndimene ndasvika pamutsipa waro wakanaka, ndaisa mutasvi pamusoro paEfuremu; Judha vacharima, Jakobho achaputsa mavhinga ake." 
Hosea10:12 Zvidyarirei mukururama, mugocheka zvorudo; undai makombo enyu, nokuti inguva yokutsvaka Jehovha, kusvikira achiuya achikunisirai zvakarurama." 
Hosea10:13 Makarima zvakashata, makacheka zvakaipa, makadya zvibereko zvenhema, nokuti makanga muchivimba nenzira yenyu, uye nokuwanda kwemhare dzenyu." 
Hosea10:14 Naizvozvo bope richamuka pakati pavanhu venyu, nhare dzenyu dzose dzichaparadzwa, Sharimani sezvaakaparadza Bhetiaribheri nezuva rokurwa; mai vakaputsanyiwa pamwechete navana vavo." 
Hosea10:15 Ndizvo zvamuchaitirwa neBhetieri nemhaka yokushata kwenyu kukuru; mambo waIsiraeri achaparadzwa chose mambakwedza.” 
Hosea11:1 “Isiraeri achiri mwana muduku, ndaimuda, ndikadana mwanakomana wangu abve Ijipiti." 
Hosea11:2 Vaporofita vachinyanya kuvadana, ivo vakanyanya kuvatiza; vakabayira vaBhaari, nokupisira zvifananidzo zvakavezwa zvinonhuwira." 
Hosea11:3 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ini ndakadzidzisa Efuremu kufamba; ndakavatakura mumaoko angu, asi havana kuziva kuti ndini ndakavaporesa." 
Hosea11:4 Ndakavakakata namabote omunhu, nezvisungo zvorudo; ndakava kwavari somunhu anobvisa joko pashaya dzavo, ndikagadza zvokudya pamberi pavo." 
Hosea11:5 “Havangadzokeri kunyika yeIjipiti, asi muAsiria ndiye achava mambo wavo, nokuti vakaramba kudzokera kwandiri." 
Hosea11:6 Munondo uchava nehasha pakati pamaguta avo, uchapedza zvipfigiso zvavo nokuzviparadza, nemhaka yamano avo." 
Hosea11:7 Vanhu vangu vanoramba vachida kudzokera shure vachindisiya; kunyangwe vachidanwa kune Wokumusoro, havatongosimuki." 
Hosea11:8 Ndingakuregedza seiko, iwe Isiraeri? Ndingakuita seiko seAdhima? Ndingakuenzanisa seiko neZebhoimi? Mwoyo wangu washanduka mukati mangu, tsitsi dzangu dzamutswa pamwechete." 
Hosea11:9 Handingaiti nokutsamwa kwangu kukuru, handingadzoki ndichiti ndiparadze Efuremu; nokuti ndiri Mwari, handizi munhu, ndini Mutsvene pakati penyu, handingauyi ndakatsamwa." 
Hosea11:10 “Vachatevera Jehovha, achiomba seshumba; nokuti uchaomba, vana vachauya vachidedera vachibva mavirazuva." 
Hosea11:11 “Vachauya seshiri vachibva Ijipiti, senjiva vachibva panyika yeAsiria; ini ndichavagarisa mudzimba dzavo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Hosea11:12 “Efuremu akandikombera nenhema, uye imba yaIsiraeri nokunyengera; Judha vanongoramba vachipenga pamberi paMwari, pamberi paiye Mutsvene akatendeka." 
Hosea12:1 “Efuremu vanozvigutisa nemhepo, vanoteverera mhepo yokumabvazuva; vanoramba vachiwedzera nhema nokuparadza; vanoita sungano neAsiria, uye mafuta anoiswa Ijipiti.”" 
Hosea12:2 Jehovha ane gakava naJudhawo, acharova Jakobho pamusoro penzira dzake, achamuripira pamusoro pezvaakaita." 
Hosea12:3 Muchizvaro akabata chichitsinho chomukuru wake, ava nesimba romurume akaita mitsimba naMwari;" 
Hosea12:4 zvirokwazvo, akaita mitsimba nomutumwa akakunda; akachema, akamunyengetera; akamuwana paBhetieri, akataurapo nesu," 
Hosea12:5 iye Jehovha, Mwari wehondo; Jehovha ndiro zita rokumurangarira naro." 
Hosea12:6 Naizvozvo chidzokera kuna Mwari wako; chengeta rudo noruenzaniso, urambe uchimirira Mwari wako." 
Hosea12:7 “Iye muKenani, zviyero zvinonyengera zviri muruoko rwake, anofanira kumanikidza." 
Hosea12:8 Asi Efuremu anoti, ‘Zvirokwazvo, ndapfuma, ndazviwanira pfuma; pamabasa angu ose havangawani kwandiri zvakaipa zvezvivi.’" 
Hosea12:9 Asi ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, kubva panyika yeIjipiti; ndichakugarisaizve mumatende, sapamazuva emitambo yakatarwa." 
Hosea12:10 “Ndakataurawo navaporofita, ndikawanza zvandakavaratidza; ndakavataurira zvifananidzo nemiromo yavaporofita." 
Hosea12:11 “Ko paGiriadhi pane zvakaipa here? Havana maturo chose; vanobaya nzombe paGirigari; zvirokwazvo maatari avo akaita matutu amabwe pamihoronga yeminda.” 
Hosea12:12 Jakobho akatizira kunyika yeArami, Isiraeri akabatira mukadzi, akafudza makwai kuti awane mukadzi." 
Hosea12:13 Jehovha akabudisa Isiraeri paIjipiti nomuporofita, akazochengetwa nomuporofita." 
Hosea12:14 Efuremu vakatsamwisa Jehovha zvikuru; naizvozvo mhaka yeropa rake ichasiyiwa kwaari, Ishe wake achadzosera kuzvidzwa kwake kwaari." 
Hosea13:1 Efuremu vakati vachitaura, kudedera kukavapo; vakazvikudza pakati paIsiraeri; asi akati apara mhaka naBhaari, akafa." 
Hosea13:2 Asi zvino vanongoramba vachiwedzera zvivi zvavo, vakazviitira zvifananidzo zvakaumbwa nesirivha yavo, zviri zvifananidzo zvenjere dzavo, zvose zviri basa remhizha; zvino vanoti pamusoro pazvo, “Vanobayira mhuru ngavadzisvete.”" 
Hosea13:3 Saka vachaita semhute yamangwanani, sedova rinokurumidza kunyangarika, sehundi inopepereswa nechamupupuri paburiro, soutsi hwechoto hunobuda napaburi." 
Hosea13:4 “Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndini Jehovha Mwari wako kubva panyika yeIjipiti; hamuzivi mumwe mwari asi ini, hakuna mumwe muponesi kunze kwangu." 
Hosea13:5 Ndakakuzivai murenje, munyika yakaoma kwazvo." 
Hosea13:6 Zvavakapiwa mafuro akanaka, vakaguta; vakaguta, mwoyo yavo ikazvikudza, naizvozvo vakandikanganwa." 
Hosea13:7 Saka ndava kwavari seshumba, ndichavagarira panzira sengwe;" 
Hosea13:8 ndicharwa navo sebheya rakatorerwa vana varo, ndichatsemura chifukidziro chomwoyo wavo; ndichavadyirapo seshumbakadzi; zvikara zvichavabvamburanya." 
Hosea13:9 “Ndizvo zvichakuparadzai, imi Isiraeri, zvamunorwa neni, ini mubatsiri wenyu." 
Hosea13:10 Ko zvino mambo wenyu aripi, akuponesei mumaguta enyu ose? Ko vatongi venyu varipi, vamaiti, ‘Tipei mambo namachinda?’" 
Hosea13:11 Ndakakupai mambo pakutsamwa kwangu, ndikamubvisazve nehasha dzangu." 
Hosea13:12 “Zvakaipa zvaEfuremu zvakasungwa pamwechete, zvivi zvake zvakachengetwa." 
Hosea13:13 Kurwadziwa kwomukadzi anosurumuka kuchasvika kwaari; iye mwanakomana asina njere; nokuti kana nguva ichisvika, haaswederi pakuzvarwa." 
Hosea13:14 Ndichavadzikinura pasimba reSheori here? Ndichavadzikinura parufu here? Aiwa, rufu, denda rako riripiko? Aiwa, Sheori, rumborera rwako ruripiko? Tsitsi dzakavigwa kubva kumeso kwangu." 
Hosea13:15 Kunyangwe akabereka zvibereko pakati pehama dzake, mhepo yokumabvazuva ichasvika, iri mhepo yaJehovha inobva kurenje; chitubu chake chichapwa, tsime yenhumbi dzose dzinodikanwa." 
Hosea13:16 “Samaria richava nemhosva yaro, nokuti vakamukira Mwari wavo; vachaparadzwa nomunondo, vacheche vavo vachaputsanyiwa, vakadzi vavo vane mimba vachatumburwa.”" 
Hosea14:1 Aiwa, imi Isiraeri, dzokerai kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu, nokuti makagumburwa nezvakaipa zvenyu." 
Hosea14:2 Endai namashoko, mudzokere kuna Jehovha, muti kwaari, “Bvisai zvakaipa zvose, mugamuchire zvinhu zvakanaka, ipapo tichakupai miromo yedu, zvive zvibairo zvedu." 
Hosea14:3 Asiria havangatiponesi; hatingatasvi mabhiza, hatingazoti kubasa ramaoko edu. Ndimi vamwari vedu; nokuti nherera dzinowana nyasha kwamuri.”" 
Hosea14:4 “Ndichaporesa kudzokera kwavo shure, ndichavada nokuda kwangu; nokuti kutsamwa kwangu kwabviswa kwavari." 
Hosea14:5 Ndichava sedova kuna Isiraeri, vachatunga seruva, vachatanda midzi yavo seRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:6 Matavi avo achatanda, kunaka kwavo kuchafanana nomuorivhi, nokunhuwira kwavo sokweRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:7 “Vanogara mumumvuri wavo vachadzoka, vachararama sezviyo, nokutunga maruva somuzambiringa; kurumbidzwa kwavo kuchafanana newaini yeRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:8 “Efuremu, ndichineiko nezvifananidzo? Ndakapindura, ndine hanya naye; ndakafanana nomuonde mutema, zvibereko zvako zvichawanikwa kwandiri.”" 
Hosea14:9 Ndianiko akachenjera, anzwisise zvinhu izvi, kana akangwara, azvizive? Nokuti nzira dzaJehovha dzakarurama, vakarurama vachafamba nadzo; asi vadariki vachawa madziri." 
Joel1:1 Shoko raJehovha, rakasvika kuna Joere mwanakomana waPetueri." 
Joel1:2 “Inzwai chinhu ichi, imi vatana, murereke nzeve dzenyu, imi mose mugere munyika ino. Ko zvakadai zvakamboitwa pamazuva enyu, kana pamazuva amadzibaba enyu here?" 
Joel1:3 Udzai vana venyu izvozvo, vana venyu vaudzewo vana vavo, navana vavo vaudze rumwe rudzi runotevera." 
Joel1:4 Zvakasiyiwa nomuteteni, zvakadyiwa nemhashu; zvakasiyiwa nemhashu, zvakadyiwa negwatakwata; zvakasiyiwa negwatakwata, zvakadyiwa nomupedzachose." 
Joel1:5 Mukai, imi vakabatwa nedoro, mucheme; ungudzai, imi mose munonwa waini, nemhaka yewaini inonaka, nokuti yabviswa pamiromo yenyu." 
Joel1:6 Nokuti rumwe rudzi rwasvika panyika yangu, rwakasimba, rusingaverengwi; meno arwo meno eshumba, runa meno makuru eshumbakadzi." 
Joel1:7 Rwakaparadza muzambiringa wangu, nokuvhuna muonde wangu; rwakausvuura kwazvo, nokuuwisira pasi; matavi awo acheneswa." 
Joel1:8 Chemai semhandara yakazvisunga chiuno namasaga nokuda kwomurume woumhandara hwayo. 
Joel1:9 Chipiriso choupfu nechipiriso chinonwiwa zvabviswa paimba yaJehovha; vapristi, ivo vashumiri vaJehovha, vanochema." 
Joel1:10 Munda waparadzwa, nyika inochema; nokuti zviyo zvaparadzwa, waini itsva yapwa, mafuta apera." 
Joel1:11 Nyarai imi varimi, ungudzai imi varimi vemizambiringa, nokuda kwezviyo nebhari; nokuti zvakaberekwa neminda zvaparadzwa." 
Joel1:12 Muzambiringa wasvava, muonde unoshaiwa simba, mutamba nomuchindwewo, nomuepero, nemiti yose yomunda yaoma; mufaro wavanakomana vavanhu wapera." 
Joel1:13 Zvisungei zviuno namasaga, mucheme imi vapristi; ungudzai imi vashumiri veatari; uyai muvate usiku hwose makapfeka masaga, imi vashumiri vaMwari wangu; nokuti chipiriso choupfu nechipiriso chinonwiwa zvadziviswa paimba yaMwari wenyu." 
Joel1:14 Tsaurai zuva rokuzvinyima zvokudya, danai vanhu kuungano yakatarwa, kokerai vakuru navose vagere panyika kuimba yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, mudane kuna Jehovha." 
Joel1:15 Aiwa, zuva iro here! Nokuti zuva raJehovha rava pedyo, richasvika richiparadza richibva kuna waMasimbaose." 
Joel1:16 Ko zvokudya hazvina kubviswa pamberi pedu, nomufaro nokufarisisa paimba yaMwari wedu here!" 
Joel1:17 Mbeu dzinoorera pasi pamavhinga adzo; matura aparadzwa, tsapi dzaputswa; nokuti zviyo zvafa." 
Joel1:18 Zvipfuwo zvinogomera sei! Mapoka emombe akanganiswa, nokuti hazvichina mafuro; zvirokwazvo, mapoka amakwai aparadzwa." 
Joel1:19 Aiwa, Jehovha, ndinodana kwamuri, nokuti moto wapedza mafuro erenje, murazvo wapisa miti yose yokusango." 
Joel1:20 Zvirokwazvo, mhuka dzokusango dzinochemera kwamuri, nokuti hova dzemvura dzapwa, uye moto wapedza mafuro erenje." 
Joel2:1 “Ridzai hwamanda paZioni, muridze mhere pagomo rangu dzvene; vose vagere panyika ngavadedere nokuti zuva raJehovha rinouya, nokuti rava pedyo;" 
Joel2:2 richava zuva rerima nokusviba, zuva ramakore nerima guru, samambakwedza akawarirwa pamakomo; richauya ruri rudzi rukuru rune simba; rwakadaro haruna kumbovapo, uye harungazovipo shure kwavo, kusvikira pamakore amarudzi mazhinji avanhu." 
Joel2:3 Moto unoparadza pamberi pavo, murazvo unopfuta shure kwavo; nyika yakaita somunda weEdheni pamberi pavo, uye serenje rakaparadzwa shure kwavo; zvirokwazvo, hakuna wakapukunyuka kwavari." 
Joel2:4 Pakuonekwa kwavo vakafanana namabhiza; savatasvi vamabhiza, ndiko kumhanya kwavo." 
Joel2:5 Kuuruka kwavo pamusoro pamakomo kunoita somubvumo wengoro, somubvumo womurazvo womoto unoparadza mashanga, savanhu vane simba vakagadzirirwa kurwa." 
Joel2:6 Kana vachisvika, vanhu vose vanotya kwazvo, zviso zvose zvinocheneruka." 
Joel2:7 Vanomhanya savanhu vane simba, vanokwira rusvingo savarwi, vanofamba mumwe nomumwe nenzira yake, havatongotsauki pamisara yavo." 
Joel2:8 “Havasundidzirani, mumwe nomumwe unofamba negwara rake; vanopwanya napakati penhumbi dzokurwa, vasingatsauki." 
Joel2:9 Vanowira guta, vanomhanyira pamusoro porusvingo, vanokwira vachipinda mudzimba, vanopinda napamawindo sembavha." 
Joel2:10 Nyika inodedera pamberi pavo, denga rose rinobvunda, zuva nomwedzi zvinosviba, nyenyedzi dzinodzora kupenya kwadzo." 
Joel2:11 Jehovha anobudisa izwi rake pamberi pehondo yake, nokuti hondo yake ihuru kwazvo; nokuti muiti wezvaakataura une simba; nokuti zuva raJehovha iguru, rinotyisa kwazvo, ndianiko angatsunga naro?" 
Joel2:12 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha nazvino tendeukirai kwandiri nomwoyo yenyu yose, muchizvinyima zvokudya, muchichema nokuungudza;" 
Joel2:13 bvarurai mwoyo yenyu, murege kubvarura nguo dzenyu, mutendeukire kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu; nokuti ane ngoni nenyasha, anononoka kutsamwa, ane tsitsi zhinji, uye anozvidemba pakuitira vanhu zvakaipa." 
Joel2:14 Ndiani angaziva, zvimwe angadzoka akazvidemba, akasiya mukomborero kana achibva, zvimwe chipiriso choupfu kana chipiriso chinonwiwa zvamungavigira Jehovha Mwari wenyu?" 
Joel2:15 “Ridzai, hwamanda paZioni, tsaurai zuva rokuzvinyima zvokudya, danai vanhu kuungano yakatarwa;" 
Joel2:16 kokerai vanhu, natsai ungano, kokerai vakuru, unganidzai vana, navanomwa pamazamu; muwani ngaabude paimba yacho nomwenga paimba yake yokuvata." 
Joel2:17 Vapristi, ivo vashumiri vaJehovha, ngavacheme pakati pebiravira neatari, vati, ‘Aiwa, Jehovha, regai vanhu venyu, musaisa nhaka yenyu pakushoorwa, kuti marudzi avanhu avaseke;’ vangareveiko pakati pamarudzi avanhu, vachiti, ‘Mwari wavo aripiko?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Ipapo Jehovha akava negodo pamusoro penyika yake, akanzwira vanhu vake tsitsi." 
Joel2:19 Jehovha akapindura, akati kuvanhu vake, “Tarirai, ndichakutumirai zviyo, newaini itsva, namafuta, mugoguta nazvo; handichakuitiyi chinhu chinoshoorwa pakati pamarudzi;" 
Joel2:20 asi ndichabvisa kure nemi hondo inobva kurutivi rwokumusoro, ndichiidzingira kunyika yakaoma yakaparadzwa, rutivi rwayo pamberi rwakatarira kugungwa rokumabvazuva, norutivi rwayo rweshure kugungwa rokumavirazuva; kunhuwa kwayo kuchakwira, norwema rwayo rwakaipa ruchakwira, nokuti yakaita zvinhu zvikuru." 
Joel2:21 Rega hako kutya, iwe nyika, fara ufarisise; nokuti Jehovha akaita zvinhu zvikuru." 
Joel2:22 Regai kutya, imi mhuka dzesango; nokuti mafuro erenje anobukira, nokuti miti inobereka zvibereko zvayo, mionde nemizambiringa zvinovigira vanhu simba razvo." 
Joel2:23 Naizvozvo farai, imi vana veZioni, mufarisise muna Jehovha Mwari wenyu; nokuti anokupai mudzidzisi wokururama, uye anokunisirai mvura, mvura yokutanga nemvura yokuteverera, nomwedzi wokutanga." 
Joel2:24 Mapuriro achazara nezviyo, uye zvisviniro zvichapafuma waini namafuta." 
Joel2:25 Ndichakudzoseraizve makore amakadyirwa nemhashu, negwatakwata, nomupedzachose, nomuteteni, iyo hondo yangu huru yandakatuma pakati penyu." 
Joel2:26 Muchadya zvakawanda, mukarumbidza zita raJehovha Mwari wenyu, wakakuitirai zvinoshamisa; vanhu vangu havangatongonyadziswi nokusingaperi." 
Joel2:27 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndiri pakati paIsiraeri, kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu, uye kuti hakuna mumwe; vanhu vangu havangatongonyadziswi nokusingaperi." 
Joel2:28 “Zvino shure kwaizvozvo ndichadurura Mweya wangu pamusoro penyama yose; vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vachaporofita, vatana venyu vacharota hope, namajaya enyu achaona zviratidzo;" 
Joel2:29 ndichadururawo Mweya wangu pamusoro pavaranda napamusoro pavashandiri namazuva iwayo. 
Joel2:30 Ndicharatidza zvishamiso kudenga napanyika, zvinoti: Ropa nomoto neshongwe dzoutsi." 
Joel2:31 Zuva richashanduka rima, mwedzi uchashanduka ropa, zuva guru raJehovha rinotyisa risati rasvika." 
Joel2:32 Zvino ani naani anodana zita raJehovha acharwirwa; nokuti pagomo reZioni napaJerusaremu ndipo pachava navakapukunyuka, sezvakataura Jehovha, napakati pavakasara ndipo pachava vakadanwa naJehovha." 
Joel3:1 “Nokuti tarirai, namazuva iwayo nenguva iyo, kana ndichidzosa kutapwa kwaJudha neJerusaremu," 
Joel3:2 ndichaunganidza marudzi ose avanhu, nokuaburusira kumupata waJehoshafati; ndichavatongapo pamusoro pavanhu vangu napamusoro penhaka yangu Isiraeri, vakaparadzirwa navo pakati pamarudzi avanhu; vakagovana nyika yangu," 
Joel3:3 vakakanda mijenya pamusoro pavanhu vangu, vakatenga chifeve nomukomana, vakatengesa musikana vachipiwa waini, kuti vainwe." 
Joel3:4 Zvirokwazvo, imi Taya neSidhoni nenyika dzose dzaFirisitia, munoreveiko kwandiri? Munoda kunditsiva here? Kana mukanditsiva, ndichakudzoserai zvamakaita pamisoro yenyu pakarepo nokukurumidza." 
Joel3:5 Zvamakatora sirivha yangu nendarama yangu, mukandoisa mutemberi dzenyu zvinhu zvangu zvakanaka zvinodikanwa," 
Joel3:6 mukatengesa vana vaJudha navana veJerusaremu kuvanakomana vavaGiriki, kuti muvabvisire kure nenyika yavo;" 
Joel3:7 tarirai, ndichavamutsa panzvimbo kwamakandovatengesa, ndidzosere pamisoro yenyu zvamakaita;" 
Joel3:8 ndichatengesa vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu mumaoko avana vaJudha, ivo vachandovatengesa kuvanhu veShebha, kurudzi ruri kure, nokuti Jehovha akataura izvozvo." 
Joel3:9 “Paridzirai izvozvi pakati pamarudzi; zvigadzirirei kurwa; kurudzirai varume vane simba; varwi vose ngavaswedere, vaende kundorwa." 
Joel3:10 Pfurai mapadza enyu ive minondo, namapanga enyu okuchekerera miti ave mapfumo; asine simba ngaati, ‘Ndine simba.’" 
Joel3:11 Chimbidzikai, muuye, imi marudzi ose akapoteredza, muungane; imi Jehovha, mhare dzenyu ngadziburukireko." 
Joel3:12 Marudzi avanhu ngaamuke, aende kumupata waJehoshafati; nokuti ndipo pandichagara ndichitonga marudzi ose akapoteredza." 
Joel3:13 Isai jeko renyu mumunda, nokuti zviyo zvaibva; uyai musvine, nokuti chisviniro chewaini chazara, zvisviniro zvinopa pfuma; nokuti kushata kwavo kwakura." 
Joel3:14 Vazhinji zhinji, vazhinji zhinji varipo mumupata wokutonga! Nokuti zuva raJehovha rava pedyo mumupata wokutonga." 
Joel3:15 Zuva nomwedzi zvasviba, nyenyedzi dzinobvisa kupenya kwadzo." 
Joel3:16 Jehovha achaomba ari paZioni, achanzwisa izwi rake ari paJerusaremu; denga rose nenyika zvichadengenyeka; asi Jehovha uchava utiziro hwavanhu vake, nenhare yavana VaIsiraeri." 
Joel3:17 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu, agere paZioni, iro gomo rangu dzvene; ipapo Jerusaremu richava guta dzvene, hakuna vatorwa vanozopfuura napo." 
Joel3:18 Zvino nezuva iro makomo achadonha waini inotapira, zvikomo zvichayerera mukaka, uye hova dzose dzaJudha dzichayerera mvura zhinji; mumba maJehovha muchabuda tsime, richadiridza mupata weShitimi." 
Joel3:19 Ijipiti richava dongo, uye Edhomu richava renje rakaparadzwa, nemhaka yesimba rakaitirwa vana vaJudha, zvavakateura ropa risina chipomerwa panyika yavo." 
Joel3:20 Asi Judha vachavapo nokusingaperi, uye Jerusaremu kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Joel3:21 Ndichapembedza ropa ravo randisina kumbopembedza; nokuti Jehovha anogara paZioni.” 
Amos1:1 Mashoko aAmosi, waiva mumwe wavafudzi veTekoa, aakaona pamusoro paIsiraeri namazuva aUziya mambo waJudha, uye namazuva aJerobhoami mwanakomana waJoashi mambo waIsiraeri, makore maviri achigere kusvika okudengenyeka kwenyika." 
Amos1:2 Akati, “Jehovha uchaomba ari paZioni, achanzwisa izwi rake ari paJerusaremu; mafuro avafudzi achachema, musoro weKarimeri uchaoma.”" 
Amos1:3 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nemhaka yokuti Dhamasiko vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakapura Giriadhi nemipuro yamatare." 
Amos1:4 Asi ndichatuma moto mumba maHazaeri, uchapedza dzimba dzohushe dzaBhenihadhadhi." 
Amos1:5 Ndichavhuna chihuri cheDhamasikosi, nokuparadza vagere mumupata weAvheni nowakabata tsvimbo youshe paBhetiedheni; vanhu veSiria vachatapirwa Kiri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos1:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nemhaka yokuti Gaza vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwazvo; nokuti vakatapa rudzi rwose, kundovaisa kuna Edhomu." 
Amos1:7 Asi ndichatuma moto kurusvingo rweGaza, uchapedza dzimba dzaro dzoushe." 
Amos1:8 Ndichaparadza vagere Ashidhodhi nowakabata tsvimbo youshe paAshikeroni; ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kurwa naEkironi; vakasara vavaFirisitia vachaparadzwa,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos1:9 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nemhaka yokuti Taya yakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwayo; nokuti vakaisa rudzi rwose kuna Edhomu vakasarangarira sungano yohukama hwavo." 
Amos1:10 Asi ndichatuma moto kurusvingo rweTaya, uchapedza dzimba dzaro dzoushe.”" 
Amos1:11 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nemhaka yokuti Edhomu akadarika, katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwake; nokuti akateverera munun'una wake nomunondo, akarasha tsitsi dzose, kutsamwa kwake kukaramba kuchingobvambura, akaramba ane hasha nokusingaperi." 
Amos1:12 Asi ndichatuma moto paTemani, uchapedza dzimba dzoushe dzeBhozira.”" 
Amos1:13 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nemhaka yokuti vanhu vaAmoni vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakatumbura vakadzi vakanga vane mimba veGiriadhi, kuti vakurise nyika yavo." 
Amos1:14 Asi ndichabatidza moto parusvingo rweRabha, uchapedza dzimba dzaro dzoushe, vachidanidzira nezuva rokurwa, nedutu guru remhepo nezuva rechamupupuri;" 
Amos1:15 mambo wavo achatapwa, iye pamwechete namachinda ake,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos2:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nemhaka yokuti Moabhu vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakapisa mapfupa amambo waEdhomu kusvikira aita madota." 
Amos2:2 Asi ndichatuma moto kuvaMoabhu, uchapedza dzimba dzoushe dzeKerioti; Moabhu vachafa nebope nokudanidzira uye nokurira kwehwamanda;" 
Amos2:3 ndichaparadza vatongi pakati pavo; nokuuraya machinda avo ose pamwechete navo,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos2:4 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nemhaka yokuti Judha vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakaramba murairo waJehovha, vakasachengeta mitemo yake, vakarashiswa nenhema dzavo dzakateverwa namadzibaba avo." 
Amos2:5 Asi ndichatuma moto kuna Judha, uchapedza dzimba dzoushe dzeJerusaremu.”" 
Amos2:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Nemhaka yokuti Isiraeri vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakatengesa vakarurama nesirivha, uye anoshaiwa, vachipiwa shangu mbiri;" 
Amos2:7 ndivo vanoshuva kuona guruva rapasi pamusoro womurombo, vachitsausa nzira yomunhu munyoro; munhu nababa vake vachienda vose kumusikana mumwe, kuti vamhure zita rangu dzvene;" 
Amos2:8 vanovata pasi pamaatari ose panguo dzakatorwa dzichiitwa rubatso, vanonwa waini yavakaripiswa, mumba maMwari wavo." 
Amos2:9 “Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndakaparadza VaAmori pamberi pavo, ivo vakanga vakareba semisidhari, vane simba semioki; kunyangwe zvakadaro ndakaparadza zvibereko zvavo kumusoro nemidzi yavo pasi." 
Amos2:10 Ndakakubudisaiwo munyika yeIjipiti, ndikakufambisai murenje makore makumi mana, kuti mundopiwa nyika yaVaAmori." 
Amos2:11 Ndakamutsawo vaporofita pakati pavanakomana venyu, navaNaziri pakati pavanakomana venyu, navaNaziri pakati pamajaya enyu. Handizvo here, imi vana VaIsiraeri?" 
Amos2:12 Asi makapa vaNaziri waini vanwe, nokuraira vaporofita, muchiti, ‘Regai kuporofita.’" 
Amos2:13 Tarirai, ndichakutsikirirai pasi, sezvinotsikirira ngoro izere nemwanda." 
Amos2:14 Anomhanyisa achakoniwa kutiza, vane simba havangasimbisi simba ravo, kunyangwe nemhare haingazvirwiri." 
Amos2:15 Kunyangwe anobata uta haangamiri, anetsoka dzinomhanyisa haangazvirwiri; kunyangwe akatasva bhiza haangarwiri upenyu hwake;" 
Amos2:16 ane mwoyo mukuru pakati pemhare achatiza akashama nezuva iro,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos3:1 Inzwai shoko iri rakataurwa naJehovha pamusoro penyu, imi vana VaIsiraeri, pamusoro porudzi rwose rwandakabudisa panyika yeIjipiti, ndichiti," 
Amos3:2 “Ndimi moga vandakaziva pakati pamarudzi ose enyika; naizvozvo ndichakurovai pamusoro pezvakaipa zvenyu zvose.” 
Amos3:3 Ko vaviri vangafamba pamwechete vasina kumbotenderana here? 
Amos3:4 Ko shumba ingaomba mudondo isina chayakuruma here? Ko shumba duku ingarira mubako rayo isina chayakabata here? 
Amos3:5 Ko shiri ingawira pasi mumusungo paisina kudzikirwa rugombe here? Ko musungo ungaurukira kumusoro usina chawakabata here? 
Amos3:6 Ko hwamanda ingaridzwa muguta, vanhu vakasatya here? Ko guta ringawirwa nezvakaipa, Jehovha asina kuzviita here?" 
Amos3:7 Zvirokwazvo, Ishe Jehovha haangaiti chinhu, asina kumbozivisa varanda vake vaporofita zvakavanzika zvake." 
Amos3:8 Shumba yaomba; ndiani angarega kutya? Ishe Jehovha akataura; ndiani angarega kuporofita? 
Amos3:9 Paridzirai mudzimba dzoushe paAshidhodhi, nomudzimba dzoushe munyika yeIjipiti, muti, “Unganai pamakomo eSamaria, muone bope guru riripo, nokumanikidzwa kuri mukati maro." 
Amos3:10 Nokuti havazivi kuita zvakarurama ndizvo,” zvinotaura Jehovha ivo vanounganidza kumanikidza nokupamba mudzimba dzavo dzoushe." 
Amos3:11 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Muvengi aripo, pose pose panyika; iye achakubvisira simba rako, uye dzimba dzako dzoushe dzichapambwa.”" 
Amos3:12 Zvanzi naJehovha, “Mufudzi sezvaanobvuta pamuromo weshumba makumbo maviri kana chipande chenzveve, saizvozvo vana VaIsiraeri vachabvutwawo, ivo vagere Samaria pamucheto wouvato, uye pamitsamiro yemicheka yesiriki yomubhedha." 
Amos3:13 Inzwa, mupupurire imba yaJakobho,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, Mwari wehondo." 
Amos3:14 “Nokuti nezuva randicharova Isiraeri pamusoro pokudarika kwavo, ndicharovawo maatari eBhetieri; nyanga dzeatari dzichagurwa nokuwira pasi." 
Amos3:15 Ndichaputsa dzimba dzechando pamwechete nedzimba dzezhizha; dzimba dzenyanga dzenzou dzichaparadzwa, uye dzimba huru dzichapera,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:1 Inzwai shoko iri, imi mhou dzeBhashani, dziri mugomo reSamaria, imi munomanikidza varombo, munopwanya vanoshaiwa, munoti kumadzishe enyu, “Uyai nezvokunwa tinwe.”" 
Amos4:2 Ishe Jehovha akapika noutsvene hwake, achiti, “Tarirai, mazuva achauya pamusoro penyu, avachakukwevai nezvikoono, uye vakasara venyu nezviredzo zvehove." 
Amos4:3 Muchabuda napakakoromoka, mumwe nomumwe paakatarisana napo; mucharashirwa Harimoni,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:4 “Uyai Bhetieri, mudarike; uyai Girigari, muwedzere kudarika; uyai nezvibairo zvenyu mangwanani ose, uye zvegumi zvenyu pazuva rimwe nerimwe retatu;" 
Amos4:5 uyai nechibayiro chokuvonga chezvakaviriswa, muraire zvipiriso zvomwoyo, muzviparidze; nokuti ndizvo zvinokufadzai, imi vana VaIsiraeri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:6 “Ndakakupaiwo meno akachena pamaguta enyu ose, nokushaiwa zvokudya panzvimbo dzenyu dzose; kunyangwe zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:7 “Ndakakunyimawo mvura, kukohwa kuchigere mwedzi mitatu; pane rimwe guta; imwe nzvimbo ikanaisirwa mvura, nzvimbo isina kunaisirwa mvura ikaoma." 
Amos4:8 Naizvozvo vanhu vamaguta maviri kana matatu vakadzungairira kune rimwe guta kundonwa mvura, vakasagungwa; kunyangwe zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:9 “Ndakakurovai nenyunje nokuvhuvha; muteteni wakapedza minda yenyu mizhinji, neminda yenyu yemizambiringa, nemionde yenyu, nemiorivhi yenyu; kunyangwe zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:10 “Ndakatuma pakati penyu chirwere chakaipa sezvakaitwa Ijipiti; majaya enyu ndakaauraya nomunondo, ndikatapa mabhiza enyu; ndakasvitsa kunhuwa kwemisasa yenyu imo mumhino dzenyu; kunyangwe zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:11 “Ndakaparadza maguta pakati penyu, Mwari sezvaakaparadza Sodhoma neGomora, imi mukaita sechitsika chakabvutwa pamoto; kunyangwe zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:12 “Saka ndichakuitirai izvi, imi Isiraeri; zvino zvandichakuitirai izvi, zvigadzirei kusangana naMwari wenyu, imi Isiraeri.”" 
Amos4:13 Nokuti tarirai, iye, anoumba makomo, anosika mhepo, anozivisa munhu zviri mumurangariro wake, anoshandura mangwanani rikava rima, anotsika panzvimbo dzenyika dzakakwirira, Jehovha Mwari wehondo, ndiro zita rake." 
Amos5:1 Inzwai shoko iri randinokuchemai naro, imi imba yaIsiraeri." 
Amos5:2 Mhandara yaIsiraeri yawira pasi; haangazomukizve; wawiswa pasi panyika yake, hakuna angamumutsazve." 
Amos5:3 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Paimba yaIsiraeri guta, rakabuda kundorwa navane chiuru chamazana, richasara nezana roga, uye rakabuda nezana richasara negumi.”" 
Amos5:4 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kuimba yaIsiraeri, “Nditsvakei, murarame;" 
Amos5:5 asi regai kutsvaka Bhetieri, kana kupinda Girigari, kana kupfuurira Bheerishebha; nokuti Girigari richatapwa zvirokwazvo, Bhetieri richarova.”" 
Amos5:6 Tsvakai Jehovha, murarame; kuti arege kupfuta paimba yaJosefa somoto unopedza zvose, kukasava nomunhu anoudzima paBhetieri." 
Amos5:7 Imi, munoshandura kururamisira muchikuita segavakava, muchiwisira kururama pasi," 
Amos5:8 tsvakai iye, akaita nyenyedzi dzeChimutanhatu nedzeOrioni, anoshandura mumvuri worufu achiuita mangwanani, anodzima masikati achiaita usiku, anodana mvura yegungwa, ndokuidururira panyika (Jehovha ndiro zita rake);" 
Amos5:9 anouyisira vane simba kuparadza kunokurumidza, kuparadza ndokuwira nhare." 
Amos5:10 Vanovenga anovaraira pasuwo, vanosema anotaura zvakarurama." 
Amos5:11 Zvino zvamunotsika murombo pasi, muchitora dzimba dzamabwe akavezwa, asi hamungagarimo, makasima minda yemizambiringa inofadza, asi hamunganwi waini yayo." 
Amos5:12 Nokuti ndinoziva kuti kudarika kwenyu kuzhinji, uye kuti zvivi zvenyu zvikuru, kwazvo, iyemi, munomanikidza vakarurama, munogamuchira fufuro, muchiramba anoshaiwa pasuwo." 
Amos5:13 Saka akangwara achanyarara nenguva yakadai, nokuti inguva yakaipa." 
Amos5:14 Tsvakai zvakanaka, murege kutsvaka zvakaipa, kuti murarame, ipapo Jehovha, Mwari wehondo achava nemi, sezvamunoreva." 
Amos5:15 Vengai zvakaipa, mude zvakanaka, mururamisire vanhu musuwo; zvimwe Jehovha, iye Mwari wehondo, achanzwira nyasha vakasara vaJosefa." 
Amos5:16 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, iye Mwari wehondo, iye Ishe, “Kuchema kuchavapo panzira dzose huru, panzira dzose dzomumusha vachati, ‘Maiwe! Maiwe!’ Vachadana varimi kuzochema, navanoziva nziyo dzemariro kuzoungudza." 
Amos5:17 Kuungudza kuchavapo paminda yose yemizambiringa; nokuti ndichapfuura napakati penyu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos5:18 Mune nhamo imi munoshuva zuva raJehovha! Zuva raJehovha munorida neiko? Richava rima, hachingavi chiedza." 
Amos5:19 Zvichaita somunhu anotiza shumba, ndokusangana nebere; kana seanopinda mumba, akabata pamadziro noruoko rwake, ndokurumwa nenyoka." 
Amos5:20 Ko zuva raJehovha haringavi rima, rikarega kuva chiedza here? Haringati, Zi! Kwazvo, risina kupenya here?" 
Amos5:21 “Ndinovenga nokuzvidza mitambo yenyu, handingatongofadzwi neungano dzenyu dzakatarwa." 
Amos5:22 Zvirokwazvo, kunyangwe mukandivigira zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvoupfu, handingazvigamuchiri; handingavi nehanya nezvipiriso zvenyu zvokuvonga zvezvipfuwo zvenyu zvakakodzwa." 
Amos5:23 Bvisai pamberi pangu ruzha rwenziyo dzenyu, nokuti handidi kunzwa kurira kwembira dzenyu." 
Amos5:24 Asi ruenzaniso ngakuyerere semvura, uye kururama sorwizi runongoramba ruchidira." 
Amos5:25 “Nhai imba yaIsiraeri, makandivigira zvibairo nezvipo murenje makore ana makumi mana here?" 
Amos5:26 Zvirokwazvo, makatakura Sikuti mambo wenyu, neKijuni zvifananidzo zvenyu, iyo nyenyedzi yamwari wenyu, wamakazviitira." 
Amos5:27 Naizvozvo ndichakutapisai mberi kweDhamasikosi,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, anezita rinonzi Mwari wehondo." 
Amos6:1 Vane nhamo vagere zvakanaka paZioni, navagere pakasimba mugomo reSamaria, ivo vanhu vane mbiri vorudzi rukuru pakati pamarudzi, kunoenda imba yaIsiraeri!" 
Amos6:2 Pfuurirai Karine, muone; kubva ipapo endai Hamati, iro guta guru; zvino muende Gati ravaFirisitia; ivo vakakurira ushe hwohuno here? Nyika yavo ihuru kune yenyu here?" 
Amos6:3 Iyemi, munoti zuva rakaipa richiri kure, muchiswededza zvigaro panoitwa nesimba;" 
Amos6:4 imi, munovata pamibhedha yenyanga dzenzou, muchizamura pauvato hwenyu, muchidya makwayana amapoka, nemhuru dziri mukati mechirugu;" 
Amos6:5 munoimba nziyo dzisina maturo mbira dzichiridzwa, munozviitira zvinoridzwa saDhavhidhi;" 
Amos6:6 imi, munonwa waini nemidziyo yokubayira, muchizora mafuta akaisvonaka; asi hamuna hanya nokukuvadzwa kwaJosefa." 
Amos6:7 Naizvozvo zvino vachatapwa nowokutanga vanotapwa; ipapo ruzha rwavanozamura ruchapfuura. 
Amos6:8 Ishe Jehovha akapika naiye amene ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, iye Mwari wehondo achiti, “Ndinosema kuzvikudza kwaJakobho, ndinovenga dzimba dzavo dzoushe; naizvozvo ndinoisa guta nezvose zvirimo kuvavengi vavo.”" 
Amos6:9 Zvino kana varume vane gumi vakasara mumba imwe vachafa. 
Amos6:10 Kana hama yomunhu wakafa ichiuya kumutora iye anozomupisa, ichibvisa mapfupa mumba, ikati kuno ari mukati–kati meimba, “Kuchinomumwe newe here?” Iye akati, “Kwete!” Ipapo uchati, “Nyarara, nokuti hazvina kufanira kuti tireve zita raJehovha.”" 
Amos6:11 Nokuti tarirai, Jehovha anoraira, iye achakoromora imba huru, neimba duku ichaita mitswe." 
Amos6:12 Ko mabhiza angamhanya paruware here? Ko pangarimwa nemombe here? Nokuti makashandura ruenzaniso mukaruita nduru, nezvibereko zvokururama mukazviita gavakava;" 
Amos6:13 iyemi, munofarira chinhu chisina maturo, muchiti, “Hatina kuzviwanira nyanga nesimba redu here?”" 
Amos6:14 “Nokuti tarirai, ndichakumutsirai rumwe rudzi, imi imba yaIsiraeri,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, iye Mwari wehondo; ruchakutambudzai kubva pavanopinda paHamati kusvikira kurukova rwerenje." 
Amos7:1 Hezvi zvandakaratidzwa naIshe Jehovha. Tarira, akawumba mhashu, mabukira okupedzisira achitanga kubukira; tarirai, akanga ari mabukira okupedzisira kucheka kwamambo kwapera." 
Amos7:2 Zvino dzakati dzapedza kudya uswa hwenyika, ndikati, “Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha, chikanganwirai henyu; Jakobho angamira seiko, zvaari muduku?”" 
Amos7:3 Jehovha akazvidya mwoyo pamusoro pechinhu ichi, Jehovha akati, “Hazvingaitwi.”" 
Amos7:4 Hezvi zvandakaratidzwa naIshe Jehovha. Tarirai, Ishe Jehovha akadana moto kuti arwe nawo; akapedza gungwa rakadzika, akavavarira kudya nenyikawo." 
Amos7:5 Ipapo ndakati, “Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha, chiregai henyu; Jakobho angamira seiko, zvaari muduku?”" 
Amos7:6 Jehovha akazvidemba pamusoro pechinhu ichi, Ishe Jehovha akati, “Nezvizviwo hazvingaitwi.”" 
Amos7:7 Hezvi zvaakandiratidza, tarirai, Ishe akanga amire pamadziro akanga akaitwa netambo yokuyeresa, akabata tambo yokuyeresa muruoko rwake." 
Amos7:8 Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Amosi unooneiko?” Ini ndikati, “Tambo yokuyeresa nayo.” Zvino Ishe akati, “Tarirai, ndichaisa tambo yokuyeresa pakati pavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri, handichatongovadarikizve;" 
Amos7:9 nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzaIsaka dzichaitwa matongo, uye nzvimbo tsvene dzaIsiraeri dzichaparadzwa; ndichamukira imba yaJerobhoamu nomunondo.”" 
Amos7:10 Zvino Amaziya mupristi weBhetieri akatuma nhume kuna Jerobhoamu mambo waIsiraeri, achiti, “Amosi akarangana pakati peimba yaIsiraeri kukuurayai; nyika haigoni kufara namashoko ake ose." 
Amos7:11 Nokuti Amosi anoti, ‘Jerobhoamu achaurayiwa nomunondo, Isiraeri vachatapwa zvirokwazvo vachibviswa panyika yavo.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Amaziya akatiwo kuna Amosi, “Iwe muoni, enda, utizire kunyika yaJudha, undodyapo zvokudya, uporofitepo;" 
Amos7:13 asi urege kuzoporofitazve paBhetieri; nokuti inzvimbo tsvene yamambo, imba yamadzimambo.”" 
Amos7:14 Ipapo Amosi akapindura, akati kuna Amaziya, “Ini ndakanga ndisi muporofita, ndakanga ndisi mwanakomana womuporofita; asi ndakanga ndiri mufudzi nomurimi wemionde," 
Amos7:15 Jehovha akanditora ndichitevera makwai, Jehovha akati kwandiri, ‘Enda, undoporofita kuvanhu vangu VaIsiraeri.’" 
Amos7:16 Zvino iwe chinzwa shoko raJehovha, iwe unoti, ‘Rega kuporofita pamusoro paIsiraeri, rega kudonhedza shoko pamusoro peimba yaIsaka;’" 
Amos7:17 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Mukadzi wako achava chifeve muguta, vanakomana vako navanasikana vako vachaparadzwa nomunondo, uye nyika yako ichaganhurwa notambo yokuyeresa narwo; iwe amene uchafira munyika isakanaka, uye VaIsiraeri vachatapwa zvirokwazvo vachibviswa panyika yavo.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Hezvi zvandakaratidzwa naIshe Jehovha, tarirai, tswanda ine zvibereko zvezhizha." 
Amos8:2 Akati, “Amosi, unooneiko?” Ini ndikati, “Tswanda ine zvibereko zvezhizha.” Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Kuguma kwasvikira vanhu vangu VaIsiraeri, handichatongovadarikizve." 
Amos8:3 Nziyo dzetemberi dzichashanduka kuungudza nezuva iro,” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; zvitunha zvichavapo zvizhinji, vachazvikandira kunze kwose vanyerere." 
Amos8:4 Inzwai chinhu ichi, iyemi, munoda kumedza vanoshaiwa, nokuparadza varombo venyika," 
Amos8:5 muchiti, “Kugara kwomwedzi kuchapfuura rinhiko, kuti titengese zviyo? Uye Sabata, kuti tizarure matura ezviyo? Tichatapudza efa, nokukurisa shekeri, tichinyengera nezviyero zvinonyengera;" 
Amos8:6 kuti titenge varombo nesirivha, navanoshaiwa tichipiwa shangu mbiri, tichitengesa makoto ezviyo?”" 
Amos8:7 Jehovha akapika noukuru hwaJakobho, achiti, “Zvirokwazvo, handingatongokanganwi rimwe ramabasa avo nokusingaperi." 
Amos8:8 Ko nyika haingadederi pamusoro pechinhu ichi, mumwe nomumwe agerepo haangachemi here? Zvirokwazvo, izara soRwizi Nairi, icharaswa-raswa ndokudererazve, seNairi, rweIjipiti." 
Amos8:9 Zvino nezuva iroro ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha ndichavirisa zuva masikati makuru, ndichaisa rima panyika achiri masikati." 
Amos8:10 Ndichashandura mitambo yenyu kuve kuchema, nenziyo dzenyu dzose kuve kurira kwokuchema; ndichafukidza zviuno zvose masaga, nokuita misoro yose mhazha; ndichazviita sapanochemwa mwanakomana akazvarwa ari mumwechete, nokuguma kwazvo sezuva rakaipa kwazvo." 
Amos8:11 “Tarirai, mazuva anouya ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha andichatuma nzara panyika, isati iri nzara yezvokudya, kana nyota yemvura, asi yokunzwa mashoko aJehovha." 
Amos8:12 Vachadzungaira vachibva kugungwa vachienda kugungwa, vachibva kumusoro vachienda mabvazuva; vachamhanya pose pose vachitsvaka shoko raJehovha, asi havangariwani." 
Amos8:13 Nezuva iro mhandara dzakanaka namajaya vachaziya nenyota. 
Amos8:14 Vanopika vezvivi zveSamaria, vachiti, ‘Namwari wako mupenyu, iwe Dhani; uye, Nenzira yeBheerishebha mhenyu, ivo vachawira pasi, vakasazomukazve.’ ”" 
Amos9:1 Ndakaona Ishe amire parutivi rweatari, akati, “Rova misoro yembiru, kuti zvikumbaridzo zvidedere, uzviputsanye pamisoro yavo yose; ndichauraya wokupedzisira pakati pavo nomunondo; hakuna nomumwe wavo achatiza, hakuna nomumwe wavo achapukunyuka." 
Amos9:2 Kunyangwe vakachera kusvikira paSheori, ruoko rwangu ruchandovatorapo; kunyangwe vakakwira kusvikira kudenga, ndichavaburusapo." 
Amos9:3 “Kunyangwe vakandovanda pamusoro peKameri, ndichavatsvaka nokuvabvisapo; kunyangwe vakavanda meso angu pakudzika kwegungwa, ndicharaira nyoka kundovarumapo." 
Amos9:4 Kunyangwe vakatapwa navavengi vavo, ndicharaira munondo kundovaurayapo; ndicharatidza meso angu kwavari kuti ndivaitire zvakaipa, ndirege kuvaitira zvakanaka.”" 
Amos9:5 Nokuti Ishe Jehovha wehondo ndiye unobata nyika ikanyauka, vose vageremo vachachema; ichakwira yose soRwizi, ichadederazve soRwizi rweIjipiti;" 
Amos9:6 ndiye anovaka makamuri ake kudenga, wakateya denga rake panyika; iye anodana mvura zhinji yegungwa achiidururira panyika pose; Jehovha ndiro zita rake." 
Amos9:7 “Nhai, imi vana VaIsiraeri, ko hamuzi kwandiri savana veItiopia here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Handizini ndakabudisa Isiraeri panyika yeIjipiti here, navaFirisitia paKafitori, navaSiria paKiri here?" 
Amos9:8 Tarirai, meso aIshe Jehovha anoona ushe hunotadza, ndichahuparadza ndihubvise panyika pose, asi handingaparadzi chose imba yaJakobho ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos9:9 “Nokuti tarirai, ndicharaira, ndichapepeta imba yaIsiraeri pakati pamarudzi ose, sezvinopepetwa zviyo mumusero, kunyangwe zvakadaro tsanga imwe duku–duku haingawiri pasi." 
Amos9:10 Vatadzi vose vavanhu vangu vachaurayiwa nomunondo, ivo vanoti, ‘Zvakaipa hazvingatibati, hazvingasvikiri kwatiri.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 “Nezuva iro ndichamutsa tabherinakeri yaDhavhidhi yakawira pasi, nokudzivirapo pakakoromorwa; ndichamutsazve matongo ayo, ndichaivakazve sezvayakanga yakaita pamazuva akare;" 
Amos9:12 kuti vazvitorere zvakasara zvaEdhomu, namarudzi ose akatumidzwa nezita rangu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, anoita izvozvi." 
Amos9:13 “Tarirai, mazuva anouya,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha “Murimi achabata mucheki, nomusvini wemizambiringa achabata anodyara mbeu; makomo achadonha waini inozipa, uye zvikomo zvose zvichanyauka." 
Amos9:14 “Ndichadzosa kutapwa kwavanhu vangu VaIsiraeri, vachavaka maguta akaparadzwa, vachigaramo; vachasima minda yemizambiringa, vachinwa waini yayo; vacharimawo mimwe minda, vachidya zvibereko zvayo." 
Amos9:15 Ndichavasima panyika yavo, havangazodzurwizve panyika yavo yandakavapa,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Obadiah1:1 Zvakaonekwa naObhadhiya. Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha pamusoro paEdhomu, “Takanzwa mashoko akabva kuna Jehovha, nhume yatumwa pakati pamarudzi ichiti, ‘Simukai, ngativamukire kuzorwa navo.’" 
Obadiah1:2 “Tarirai, ndakakuitai vaduku pakati pamarudzi, makazvidzwa kwazvo." 
Obadiah1:3 “Kuzvikudza kwemwoyo yenyu kwakakunyengerai, iyemi, mugere mumikaha yamatombo, munougaro hwakakwirira, vanoti mumwoyo yavo, ‘Ndianiko ungatiwisira pasi?’" 
Obadiah1:4 “Kunyangwe mukabhururukira kumusoro segondo, uye kunyangwe dendere renyu rikaiswa pakati penyenyedzi, ndichakuwisiraipo pasi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Obadiah1:5 Dai mbavha dzaisvika kwamuri, kana makororo usiku (aiwa, makaparadzwa sei!) havazaiba kusvikira varinganiswa here? Dai vatanhi vamazambiringa vaisvika kwamuri, havazaisiya mamwe mazambiringa aripo here?" 
Obadiah1:6 Zvinhu zvaEsau zvakanzverwa sei! Pfuma yavo, yakavanzwa, yakafukunurwa sei!" 
Obadiah1:7 Vanhu vose vaiva nesungano nemi, vakakuperekedzai kusvikira kumuganho; vanhu, vaigara norugare nemi, vakakunyengerai, vakakukundai; vanodya zvokudya zvenyu, vanokuteyerai musungo pasi penyu, havana njere mukati mavo." 
Obadiah1:8 Ko handingaparadzi nezuva iro vachenjeri pakati paEdhomu, nenjere pagomo raEsau here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Obadiah1:9 Mhare dzako, iwe Temani, ndichavhunduka, kuti vose vapere nokuurayiwa pagomo raEsau." 
Obadiah1:10 Uchafukidzwa nokunyara nemhaka yokuti wakamukira munun'una wako simba, uchaparadzwa nokusingaperi." 
Obadiah1:11 Nezuva ramakanga mumirepo makatarisana navo, nezuva ravakatorera pfuma yavo navatorwa, vasi venyika iyo vachipinda masuwo avo, vachikanda mijenya pamusoro peJerusaremu, nemiwo makanga makaita somumwe wavo." 
Obadiah1:12 Asi regai kutarira zuva romunun'una wenyu, muchifarira zuva renjodzi yavo, murege kufara pamusoro pavana vaJudha nezuva rokuparadzwa kwavo; uye regai kutaura muchizvikudza nezuva rokumanikidzwa kwavo." 
Obadiah1:13 Regai kupinda pasuwo ravanhu vangu nezuva renhamo yavo; regai kutarira njodzi yavo nezuva renhamo yavo, regai kuvatorera pfuma yavo nezuva renhamo yavo." 
Obadiah1:14 Regai kumira pamharadzano, kuti muparadze vanhu vavo vanopukunyuka; regai kuisa kuvavengi vavo vanhu vavo vakasara nezuva rokumanikidzwa kwavo." 
Obadiah1:15 Nokuti zuva raJehovha raswedera kumarudzi ose; sezvamakaitira vamwe, muchaitirwawo saizvozvo; zvamakaita zvichadzokera pamisoro yenyu." 
Obadiah1:16 Nokuti sezvamakanwa pagomo rangu dzvene, saizvozvo marudzi ose acharamba achinwa; zvirokwazvo, vachanwa, nokumedza, vachaita savasina kumbovapo." 
Obadiah1:17 Asi pagomo reZioni ndipo pachava navakapukunyuka, richava gomo dzvene; imba yaJakobho ichadzoserwa nhaka yayo." 
Obadiah1:18 Imba yaJakobho ichava moto, imba yaJosefa murazvo womoto, uye imba yaEsau mashanga; vachapisa vamwe pakati pavo, nokuvapedza; hakuchina vachasarira imba yaEsau, nokuti Jehovha akataura izvozvo." 
Obadiah1:19 Vokurutivi rwezasi vachatora gomo raEsau, vokumapani vachatora nyika yavaFirisitia; vachatora nyika yaEfuremu nenyika yeSamaria; Bhenjamini vachatora nyika yeGiriadhi." 
Obadiah1:20 Vatapwa vehondo iyi yavana VaIsiraeri, vagere pakati pa VaKenani, vachatora nyika kusvikira Zarefati; vatapwa veJerusaremu, vari Sefaradhi, vachatora maguta okurutivi rwezasi." 
Obadiah1:21 Vaponesi vachakwira pagomo reZioni kuzotonga gomo raEsau; ushe huchava hwaJehovha.” 
Jonah1:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jona mwanakomana waAmitai, richiti," 
Jonah1:2 “Simuka, uende Ninivha, riya guta guru, undoriparidzira, nokuti kuipa kwavo kwakwira pamberi pangu.”" 
Jonah1:3 Asi Jona akasimuka achida kutizira Tashishi abve pamberi paJehovha; akaburukira Jopa, akawana chikepe chakanga choenda Tashishi, akabudisa mari yacho yokufamba, ndokupinda mukati macho, kuti aende navo Tashishi abve pamberi paJehovha." 
Jonah1:4 Asi Jehovha akatuma mhepo inopenga pagungwa, dutu guru rikamuka pagungwa, chikepe chikashumba kuputsika." 
Jonah1:5 Ipapo vafambisi vechikepe vakatya, mumwe nomumwe akadana kuna Mwari wake, vakarashira mugungwa nhumbi dzakanga dziri muchikepe, kuti vachireruse. Asi Jona akanga aburukira mukati–kati mechikepe, akavata pasi, nokubatwa nehope chaidzo." 
Jonah1:6 Ipapo mwene wechikepe akauya kwaari, akati kwaari, “Nhai, iwe muvati, wakaita seiko? Simuka, dana kuna Mwari wako, zvimwe Mwari angatirangarira, tikasaparara.”" 
Jonah1:7 Zvino mumwe nomumwe wakati kushamwari yake, “Uyai tikande mijenya, tizive kuti njodzi iyi yatiwira nokuda kwaani.” Ipapo vakakanda mijenya, mujenya ukabata Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Zvino vakati kwaari, “Chitiudza hako, kuti njodzi iyi yatiwira nokuda kwaani; basa rako ndereiko? Wabvepiko? Nyika yako ndeipi? Uri worudzi rupi?”" 
Jonah1:9 Iye akati kwavari, “Ndiri muHebheru, ndinotya Mwari wokudenga, akaita gungwa nenyika yakaoma.”" 
Jonah1:10 Ipapo varume vakatya kwazvo–kwazvo, vakati kwaari, “Chiiko ichi chawaita?” Nokuti varume vakanga vachiziva kuti anotiza pamberi paJehovha, nokuti akavaudza." 
Jonah1:11 Zvino vakati kwaari, “Tichakuiteiko, kuti gungwa ritinyararire?” Nokuti gungwa rakaramba richinyanya kupenga." 
Jonah1:12 Iye akati kwavari, “Ndisimudzei, mundikandire mugungwa, ipapo gungwa richakunyararirai; nokuti ndinoziva kuti dutu iri guru rakuwirai nokuda kwangu.”" 
Jonah1:13 Kunyangwe zvakadaro varume vakakwasva nesimba vachiidza kudzokera kunyika; asi vakakoniwa, nokuti gungwa rakaramba richinyanya kuvapengera." 
Jonah1:14 Naizvozvo vakadana kuna Jehovha, vakati, “Tinokunyengeterai, imi Jehovha, tinokunyengeterai, kuti tirege kuparara nokuda kwoupenyu hwomunhu uyu, murege kutisundira mhosva yeropa risina mhaka; nokuti imi Jehovha makaita sezvamakada henyu.”" 
Jonah1:15 Ipapo vakasimudza Jona, vakamukandira mugungwa, gungwa rikanyarara pakupenga kwaro." 
Jonah1:16 Ipapo varume vakatya Jehovha kwazvo–kwazvo, vakabayira Jehovha chibayiro, nokumupikira mhiko." 
Jonah1:17 Jehovha akatuma hove huru kundomedza Jona, Jona akava mudumbu rehove mazuva matatu nousiku hutatu." 
Jonah2:1 Ipapo Jona akanyengetera kuna Jehovha Mwari wake ari mudumbu rehove.
