Jonah2:2 Akati, “Ndakadana kuna Jehovha ndiri munhamo yangu, Akandipindura; Ndakadana ndiri mudumbu reSheori, Imi mukanzwa izwi rangu." 
Jonah2:3 Nokuti makandikandira makadzika, mukati momwoyo wegungwa, Mvura zhinji yakanga yandikomberedza; Mafungu enyu namapoporodzi enyu akapfuura napamusoro pangu." 
Jonah2:4 Ndikati, ‘Ndarashwa, hamuchandioni;’ Asi ndicharingirazve kuTemberi yenyu tsvene." 
Jonah2:5 Mvura zhinji yakandikomberedza, kusvikira kumweya wangu; Pakadzika pakanga pandipoteredza; Maharanga akanga amonera musoro wangu." 
Jonah2:6 Ndakaburukira kumavambiso amakomo; Nyika nezvipfigiso zvayo zvakandipfigiramo nokusingaperi; kunyangwe zvakadaro makabudisa upenyu hwangu pagomba, imi, Jehovha Mwari wangu." 
Jonah2:7 Mweya wangu wakati uchiziya mukati mangu, ndikarangarira Jehovha; Munyengetero wangu ukapinda kwamuri muTemberi yenyu tsvene." 
Jonah2:8 Vanorangarira zvisina maturo zvenhema Vanorasha nyasha yavo. 
Jonah2:9 Asi ndichakubairai nezwi rokuvonga; Ndicharipa zvandapika. Ruponeso runobva kuna Jehovha.” 
Jonah2:10 Jehovha akataura nehove, ikandorutsira Jona panyika yakaoma." 
Jonah3:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika rwechipiri kuna Jona, richiti," 
Jonah3:2 “Simuka, uende Ninivha, riya guta guru, undoriparidzira zvandichakuraira kuti uparidze.”" 
Jonah3:3 Ipapo Jona akasimuka, akaenda Ninivha, sezvaakarairwa neshoko raJehovha. Zvino Ninivha raiva guta guru–guru, rwendo rwamazuva matatu kupfuura nomo." 
Jonah3:4 Jona akatanga kupinda muguta, achifamba rwendo rwezuva rimwe, akadana, achiti, “Kwasara mazuva makumi mana, ipapo Ninivha richaparadzwa.”" 
Jonah3:5 Vanhu veNinivha vakatenda Mwari, vakatara nguva yokuzvinyima zvokudya, vakafuka masaga, kubva kuvakuru pakati pavo kusvikira kuvaduku pakati pavo." 
Jonah3:6 Shoko rikasvika kuna mambo weNinivha, akasimuka pachigaro chake choushe, akabvisa nguo yake, akafuka saga, nokugara mumadota." 
Jonah3:7 Akaraira, akaparidza muNinivha rose chirevo chamambo nechavakuru vake achiti, “Vanhu kana zvipfuwo, kana mombe kana makwai, ngazvirege kutongoravira chinhu, ngazvirege kufura kana kunwa mvura;" 
Jonah3:8 asi vanhu nezvipfuwo ngazvifukidzwe masaga, ngavadane kuna Mwari nesimba; ngavatendeuke mumwe nomumwe panzira yake yakaipa napakuita nesimba namaoko ake." 
Jonah3:9 “Ndianiko angaziva, zvimwe Mwari ungadzoka akazvidemba, akadzoka pakutsamwa kwake kukuru, tikarega kuparadzwa?”" 
Jonah3:10 Mwari akaona zvavakaita, kuti vakatendeuka panzira yavo yakaipa, Mwari akazvidemba pamusoro pezvakaipa zvaakati ndichavaitira; akasazviita." 
Jonah4:1 Asi zvakaodza mwoyo waJona kwazvo, akatsamwa." 
Jonah4:2 Akanyengetera Jehovha, akati, “Aiwa, Jehovha, handizvo zvandakataura, ndichiri munyika yangu here? Saka ndakachimbidzika kutizira Tashishi; nokuti ndakanga ndichiziva kuti muri Mwari ane nyasha, ane ngoni, asingachimbidziki kutsamwa, azere nounyoro, muchizvidemba pamakafunga kuuyisa zvakaipa." 
Jonah4:3 Saka Jehovha, zvino chinditorerai henyu upenyu hwangu; nokuti zviri nani kwandiri kuti ndife pakuti ndirarame.”" 
Jonah4:4 Jehovha akati, “Zvakanaka here zvawatsamwa?”" 
Jonah4:5 Ipapo Jona akabuda muguta, akandogara kurutivi rwamabvazuva rweguta, akazvivakirapo musasa, ndokugaramo mumumvuri, achiti ndigoona zvichaitirwa guta." 
Jonah4:6 Jehovha Mwari ndokuraira muti womuchindwe, akaumeresa kumusoro kwaJona, kuti uve mumvuri pamusoro wake, shungu dzake dzinyaradzwe. Zvino Jona akafarira kwazvo muti womuchindwi." 
Jonah4:7 Asi nezuva rakatevera Mwari akaraira gonye mangwanani, rikamunya muchindwi, ukasvava." 
Jonah4:8 Zvino zuva rakati richibuda, Mwari akaraira mhepo inopisa inobva mabvazuva; zuva rikabaya musoro waJona, akaziya, akakumbira kuti afe hake, akati, “Zviri nani kwandiri kuti ndife pakuti ndirarame.”" 
Jonah4:9 Mwari akati kuna Jona, “Zvakanaka here zvawatsamwira muchindwi?” Akati, “Zvakanaka kuti nditsamwe, kusvikira parufu pamene.”" 
Jonah4:10 Jehovha akati, “Iwe wakanga une tsitsi nomuti womuchindwi wausina kutamburira, kana kuumeresa, iwo, wakamera nousiku humwe, ukapararazve nousiku humwe;" 
Jonah4:11 ko zvino ini handizaifanira kuva netsitsi neNinivha, riya guta guru, muna vanhu vanopfuura zviuru zvine zana namakumi maviri, vasingazivi kuti ruoko rwavo rworudyi kana ruoko rwavo rworuboshwe ndorupi, uye zvipfuwo zvizhinji here?”" 
Micah1:1 “Shoko raJehovha, rakauya kuna Mika weMoresheti namazuva aJotamu naAhazi naHezekiya, madzimambo aJudha, raakaona pamusoro peSamaria neJerusaremu." 
Micah1:2 “Inzwai imi marudzi avanhu, imi mose; teerera iwe nyika, nezvose zvirimo; Ishe Jehovha ngaakupupurirei, iye Ishe ari mutemberi yake tsvene." 
Micah1:3 Nokuti tarirai, Jehovha anobuda panzvimbo yake, achaburuka nokutsika panzvimbo dzakakwirira dzenyika." 
Micah1:4 Makomo achanyauka pasi pake, mipata ichapamuka senamo yakaiswa pamoto, semvura inodururwa pamawere." 
Micah1:5 “Zvose izvi zvinoitwa nokuda kwokudarika kwaJakobho, uye nokuda kwezvivi zveimba yaIsiraeri. Kudarika kwaJakobho ndokweiko? Harizi Samaria here? Nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzaJudha ndedzipiko? Harizi Jerusaremu here?" 
Micah1:6 Saka Samaria ndichariita somurwi wamabwe musango, senzvimbo dzingasimwa mizambiringa; ndichakandira mabwe aro mumupata, ndichifukunura nheyo dzaro." 
Micah1:7 Mifananidzo yaro yose yakavezwa ichaputswa–putswa, mibairo yaro yose ichapiswa nomoto, uye ndichaparadza zvifananidzo zvaro zvose; nokuti rakazviunganidza izvo uri mubairo wechifeve, naizvozvi zvichadzokerazve kumubairo wechifeve." 
Micah1:8 “Nemhaka iyi ndichachema nokuungudza, ndichafamba ndisina nguo ndakashama, ndichaungudza samakava nokurira semhou." 
Micah1:9 Nokuti mavanga aro haadi kupora, nokuti zvasvika kuna Judhawo; zvasvikira pasuwo ravanhu vangu, ipo paJerusaremu." 
Micah1:10 “Musazvireva paGati, regai kutongochema; paBheti–re–Afura ndakaumburuka muguruva." 
Micah1:11 Chibva uende, iwe ugere Shafiri, wakashama uchinyara; agere Zaanani haana kubuda kuungudza paBheti–ezeri kuchakutorera pokumira." 
Micah1:12 Nokuti agere Maroti anomirira zvikuru chinhu chakanaka, nokuti zvakaipa zvakaburuka zvichibva kuna Jehovha zvikasvikira kusuwo reJerusaremu." 
Micah1:13 Iwe ugere Rakishi, sunga mabhiza pangoro; ndiro rakatanga kuisa mukunda weZioni pazvivi, nokuti kudarika kwaIsiraeri kwakawanikwa mauri." 
Micah1:14 Saka iwe uchapa Moresheti–gati chipo chokuonekana; dzimba dzeAkizibhi dzichava chinhu chinonyengera madzimambo aIsiraeri. 
Micah1:15 “Iwe ugere Maresha, ndichakuuyisira mumwe achakukunda; vakakudzwa VaIsiraeri vachasvika paAdhurami." 
Micah1:16 Zviitire mhanza, veura vhudzi rako pamusoro pavana vaunofarira; kurisa mhanza yako seyegondo, nokuti vakatapwa kure newe." 
Micah2:1 “Vane nhamo vanofunga zvakaipa vachiita zvisakarurama panhovo dzavo! Vanozviita mangwanani kana kwoedza, nokuti simba rokuzviita riri mumaoko avo." 
Micah2:2 Vanochiva minda, ndokuipamba, nedzimba, dzokuzvitorera idzo; vanomanikidza murume neimba yake, murume nenhaka yake." 
Micah2:3 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Tarirai, ndinofungira rudzi urwu zvakaipa, hamungagoni kubvisa mitsipa yenyu pazvivi, hamungafambi namanyawi, nokuti inguva yakaipa.’" 
Micah2:4 Nezuva iro vachataura mufananidzo pamusoro penyu, nokuchema nokuchema kwokurira, vachiti, ‘Takaparadzwa chose, iye unopa vamwe mugove wavanhu vangu, aiwa wanditorera ini sei! Minda yedu anoigovera vanomumukira.’" 
Micah2:5 “Saka iwe uchashaiwa munhu anokukandira tambo yokuyera nhaka yako paungano yaJehovha. 
Micah2:6 Regai kuporofita ndizvo zvavanoporofita ivo. Kana vasingaporofiti pamusoro pezvinhu izvi, kushora kwavo hakungaperi." 
Micah2:7 Nhai imi munonzi imba yaJakobho, Mweya waJehovha wafupiswa here? Ndiwo mabasa ake here? Ko mashoko angu haangaitiri zvakanaka anofamba nokururama here?" 
Micah2:8 “Asi mazuva ano vanhu vangu vakandimukira somuvengi; munobvisa jasi panguo dzavanopfuura havo norugare vasingadi kurwa. 
Micah2:9 Munodzinga vakadzi vavanhu vangu padzimba dzavo dzinofadza; munoteerera vana vavo vaduku mbiri yangu nokusingaperi. 
Micah2:10 Simukai, muende, nokuti haizi nzvimbo yokuzorora pano, nemhaka yetsvina inoparadza nokuparadza kwakaipa kwazvo." 
Micah2:11 Kana munhu aripo, anofambira mhepo nenhema, anoreva nhema achiti, ‘Ndichakuporofitira zvewaini nezvinonwiwa zvinodhaka,’ ndiye achava muporofita wavanhu ava." 
Micah2:12 “Zvirokwazvo ndichakuunganidzai imi mose, imi Jakobho; zvirokwazvo ndichaunganidza vakasara VaIsiraeri; ndichavaisa pamwechete samakwai muchirugu, seboka ramakwai pakati pamafuro awo; vachaita ruzha rukuru nokuwanda kwavanhu." 
Micah2:13 Mupatsanuri wakavatungamirira; vakapatsanura, vakapfuurira kusuwo, vakabuda napo; mambo wavo wakavatungamirira, Jehovha ari pamberi pavo.”" 
Micah3:1 Ini ndakati, “Chinzwai henyu, imi vakuru vaJakobho, navabati veimba yaIsiraeri. Ko hamusaifanira kuziva kururamisira vanhu here?" 
Micah3:2 Iyemi, munovenga zvakanaka, muchida zvakaipa, munovhiya vanhu ganda ravo, muchibvambura nyama yavo pamapfupa avo;" 
Micah3:3 imi, munodyawo nyama yavanhu vangu, muchisvuura ganda ravo, munovhuna mapfupa avo, muchiaguranya, sezvinoiswa muhari, senyama iri mugate." 
Micah3:4 Ipapo vachadana kuna Jehovha, asi haangavapinduri; zvirokwazvo achavavanzira chiso chake nenguva iyo, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavakaita pamabasa avo." 
Micah3:5 Zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pavaporofita, vakatsausa vanhu vangu, vanoruma nameno avo, vachidana vachiti, ‘Rugare!’ Asi asingaisi chinhu mumiromo yavo, vanomumukira hondo." 
Micah3:6 Naizvozvo muchasvikirwa nousiku, kuti murege kuva nechamunoona; muchava nerima, kuti murege kuuka; zuva richavirira vaporofita, chiedza chamasikati chichavasvibira." 
Micah3:7 Vaoni vachanyadziswa, navauki vachakanganiswa; zvirokwazvo, vose vachapfumbira ndebvu dzavo, nokuti hakuna mhinduro inobva kuna Mwari." 
Micah3:8 “Asi kana ndirini, ndizere nesimba pamwechete noMweya waJehovha, nokutonga nokutsunga, kuti ndiparidzire Jakobho kudarika kwavo, uye Isiraeri zvivi zvavo." 
Micah3:9 Chinzwai henyu chinhu ichi, imi vakuru veimba yaJakobho, navabati veimba yaIsiraeri, iyemi, munosema ruenzaniso, nokuminamisa zvose zvakarurama." 
Micah3:10 Munovaka Zioni neropa, uye Jerusaremu nezvakaipa." 
Micah3:11 Vakuru varo vanotamba mhaka kuti vapiwe zvipo, vapristi varo vanodzidzisa kuti vapiwe mubairo, vaporofita varo vanouka kuti vapiwe mari; kunyangwe zvakadaro vanosendamira kuda Jehovha vachiti, ‘Ko Jehovha haazi pakati pedu here? Hatingawirwi nezvakaipa.’" 
Micah3:12 Naizvozvo Zioni richarimwa somunda nemhaka yenyu, Jerusaremu richaitwa mirwi yamabwe, uye gomo reimba yaJehovha senzvimbo dzakakwirira dzokudondo." 
Micah4:1 “Asi namazuva okupedzisira gomo reimba yaJehovha richagadzwa pamisoro yamakomo, richakwiridzwa kumusoro kwezvikomo; marudzi avanhu achamhanyira kwariri." 
Micah4:2 Marudzi mazhinji achaenda, achiti, ‘Uyai, hendei kugomo raJehovha nokuimba yaMwari waJakobho; iye achatidzidzisa nzira dzake, uye isu tichafamba namakwara ake. Nokuti paZioni ndipo pachabuda murairo, napaJerusaremu shoko raJehovha.’" 
Micah4:3 Iye achatonga pakati pamarudzi mazhinji, acharuramisira marudzi ane simba ari kure; vachapfura minondo yavo vachiiita mapadza, namapfumo avo vachiaita mapanga okuchekerera miti; rudzi rumwe harungazosimudziri rumwe rudzi munondo, havangazodzidzi kurwa." 
Micah4:4 Asi mumwe nomumwe achagara pasi pomuzambiringa wake napasi pomuonde wake, hakuna angazovatyisa, nokuti muromo waJehovha wehondo wakataura izvozvo." 
Micah4:5 Nokuti marudzi ose avanhu anofamba, rumwe norumwe nezita ramwari warwo; asi isu tichafamba nezita raJehovha Mwari wedu nokusingaperi–peri." 
Micah4:6 “Nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichaunganidza vanokamhina, ndichaunganidza vakadzingwa, navakatambudzwa neni;" 
Micah4:7 vaikamhina ndichavaita vakasara, uye vakanga vakarashirwa kure ndichavaita rudzi rwakasimba; Jehovha achavabata ushe pagomo reZioni kubva zvino nokusingaperi." 
Micah4:8 “Zvino iwe, rutura rwamakwai, iwe chikomo chomukunda weZioni, zvichasvika kwauri, zvirokwazvo ushe hwokutanga huchasvika, ihwo ushe hwomukunda weJerusaremu." 
Micah4:9 Zvino munodanidzireiko? Hakuna mambo pakati penyu here, chipangamazano wenyu aparara here, zvamabatwa nokurwadziwa sokwomukadzi anosununguka?" 
Micah4:10 Chirwadziwa, utambure nokusurumuka, iwe mukunda weZioni, somukadzi ari pakasurumuka; nokuti zvino uchabuda muguta, uchandogara kusango, uchandosvika Bhabhironi; ipapo uchandorwirwa, Jehovha uchakudzikinurapo pamaoko avavengi vako." 
Micah4:11 Zvino marudzi mazhinji avanhu akakuunganira, anoti, ‘Ngaasvibiswe, meso edu ngaaone Zioni.’" 
Micah4:12 Asi havazivi zvinofungwa naJehovha, havanzwisisi zvaakatema; nokuti wakavaunganidza semwanda paburiro." 
Micah4:13 “Simuka upure, iwe mukunda weZioni, nokuti runyanga rwako ndicharuita dare, uye mahwanda ako ndichaaita ndarira; uchaputsanya marudzi mazhinji; zvavakazviwanira ndichazvitsaurira Jehovha, pfuma yavo ndichapa Ishe wenyika yose." 
Micah5:1 “Zvino muchafanira kuungana makaita mapoka, iwe mukunda wamapoka; muvengi wakatikomba, vacharova mutongi waIsiraeri netsvimbo padama rake." 
Micah5:2 “Asi iwe Bhetirehemu Efurata, muduku kwazvo pakati pezviuru zvamazana zvaJudha, kwauri kuchandibudira mumwe achava mubati pakati paIsiraeri; mabudiro ake ndaakare, pamazuva akare–kare." 
Micah5:3 “Naizvozvo uchavaisa kuvavengi vavo, kusvikira panguva yokuzvara kwaiye anosurumuka; ipapo hama dzake, dzakasara, dzichadzoka navana VaIsiraeri." 
Micah5:4 Achamira, ndokufudza makwai ake nesimba raJehovha, noumambo hwezita raJehovha Mwari wake; zvino vachagara zvakanaka, nokuti zvino achava mukuru kusvikira kumigumo yenyika." 
Micah5:5 Iye achava rugare rwedu. Kana muAsiria achipinda munyika yedu, kana achitsika mudzimba dzedu dzoushe, tichamutsa vafudzi vanomwe namachinda masere pakati pavanhu kuti varwe naye." 
Micah5:6 Ivo vachaparadza nyika yeAsiria nomunondo, nenyika yaNimurodhi painopindwa napo; iye achatirwira kumuAsiria, kana achinge achipinda nyika yedu nokutsika mukati memiganhu yedu." 
Micah5:7 “Ipapo vakasara vaJakobho vachava pakati pamarudzi mazhinji avanhu sedova rinobva kuna Jehovha, semvura inonaya pauswa, zvisingamiriri munhu kana kugarira vanakomana vavanhu." 
Micah5:8 Vakasara vaJakobho vachava pakati pendudzi pakati pamarudzi mazhinji avanhu, seshumba pakati pemhuka dzomudondo, seshumba duku pakati pamapoka amakwai, inoti kana ichipfuurapo, inotsika nokubvamburanya, kusina anorwira." 
Micah5:9 Ruoko rwenyu ngarusimudzirwe kumusoro kwavadzivisi venyu, vavengi venyu vose ngavaparadzwe." 
Micah5:10 “Zvino nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichaparadza mabhiza enyu pakati penyu, nokuputsa ngoro dzenyu;" 
Micah5:11 ndichaparadza maguta enyika yenyu, nokukoromora nhare dzenyu dzose." 
Micah5:12 Ndichaparadza uroyi pamaoko enyu, hamungazovi navafemberi;" 
Micah5:13 ndichaparadza mifananidzo yenyu yakavezwa neshongwe dzenyu pakati penyu; hamungazonamati mabasa amaoko enyu; 
Micah5:14 ndichadzura miti yenyu yakatsaurwa pakati penyu, ndichaparadza maguta enyu." 
Micah5:15 Ndichatsiva marudzi asina kuteerera ndichiita nokutsamwa nehasha. 
Micah6:1 “Chinzwai zvino zvinorehwa naJehovha. Simuka, ita nharo pamberi pamakomo, zvikomo ngazvinzwe izwi rako." 
Micah6:2 Chinzwai, imi makomo, rukave rwaJehovha, nemi nheyo dzenyika dzinogara dziripo; nokuti Jehovha anorukave navanhu vake, achaita nharo naIsiraeri." 
Micah6:3 Nhai, imi vanhu vangu, ndakakuiteiko? Ndakakunetsai neiko? Ndipindurei." 
Micah6:4 Nokuti ndakakubudisai panyika yeIjipiti, ndikakudzikinurai paimba youranda, ndikatuma pamberi penyu Mosesi naAroni naMiriami." 
Micah6:5 Aiwa, vanhu vangu, rangarirai zvino zvakaranganwa naBharaki mambo waMoabhu, uye zvaakapindurwa naBharami mwanakomana waBheori; rangarirai zvakaitwa kubva paShitimi kusvikira Girigari, kuti muzive zvakarurama zvamakaitirwa naJehovha." 
Micah6:6 “Ndichauya nei pamberi paJehovha, ndichikotamira pamberi paMwari wokumusoro? Ndichauya pamberi pake nezvibairo zvinopiswa, nemhuru dzakaita gore rimwe here?" 
Micah6:7 Ko Jehovha ungafadzwa namakondohwe ane chiuru chezana, kana nenzizi dzamafuta dzine zviuru zvine gumi here? Ndingamuvigira dangwe rangu pamusoro pokudarika kwangu, icho chibereko chomuviri wangu pamusoro pezvivi zvomweya wangu here?" 
Micah6:8 “Iye wakakuzivisa, iwe munhu, kuti zvakanaka ndezvipi; chinotsvakwa naJehovha kwauri chiiko, asi kuti uite zvakarurama, ude unyoro, uye ufambe uchizvininipisa pamberi paMwari wako?" 
Micah6:9 “Izwi raJehovha rinodana kuguta, akachenjera achatya zita renyu; teererai shamhu, nowakairaira." 
Micah6:10 Ko pfuma yezvakashata ichipo mumba yowakashata here, uye chiyero chakatapudzwa chinonyangadza here?" 
Micah6:11 “Ko ndingava wakachena kana ndine zviyero zvakashata, nehomo yezviyereso zvinonyengera here?" 
Micah6:12 Nokuti vapfumi veguta vazere nokuita nehasha, vageremo vakareva nhema, rurimi rwavo mumuromo wavo runonyengera." 
Micah6:13 Saka neniwo ndakakurovai vanga rakaipa kwazvo; ndakakuitai dongo nokuda kwezvivi zvenyu. 
Micah6:14 Muchadya, asi hamungaguti, kushoorwa kwenyu kuchava pakati penyu; muchabvisa nhumbi dzenyu, asi hamungadzichengeti, idzo dzamunochengeta, ndichadziparadzisa nomunondo." 
Micah6:15 Muchakusha, asi hamungacheki, muchasvina maorivhi, asi hamungazori mafuta, muchasvina mazambiringa, asi hamunganwi waini." 
Micah6:16 Nokuti zvakatemwa naOmiri zvinochengetwa, namabasa ose eimba yaAhabhi, imi munofamba nokurangarira kwavo, kuti ndikuitei dongo imi, navageremo chinhu chinoridzirwa muridzo; imi muchava nemhosva yokushoorwa kwavanhu vangu." 
Micah7:1 “Ndine nhamo ini! Nokuti ndava sapanguva kana michero yakapera kukohwiwa, kana zvakasara zvamazambiringa zvaunganidzwa; hakuchine sumbu rimwe ringadyiwa, mweya wangu unodokwairira muchero womuonde waibva." 
Micah7:2 Vanhu vanoda Mwari vakaparara panyika, hakuchina vakarurama pakati pavanhu; vose vakavandira kuteura ropa, mumwe nomumwe anovhima hama yake nomumbure." 
Micah7:3 Maoko avo anongotsvaka zvakaipa kuti vazviite nomwoyo wose; machinda anokumbira, vatongi vanovinga mubairo; mukuru anotaura zvakashata zviri mumwoyo make; vanozviruka pamwechete saizvozvo." 
Micah7:4 Akanaka kupfuura vose akaita sorukato, akarurama kupfuura vose anopfuura ruzhowa rweminzwa; zuva renharirire dzenyu rasvika, iro zuva rokurohwa kwenyu, zvino kukanganiswa kwavo kuchavapo." 
Micah7:5 Regai kuvimba nowamunogara naye, regai kutenda shamwari, rega kutaura zviri mumwoyo wako kumukadzi avete pachipfuva chako." 
Micah7:6 “Nokuti mwanakomana anozvidza baba, mwanasikana anomukira mai vake, nomukadzi womwana vamwene vake; vavengi vomunhu ndivo vanhu veimba yake." 
Micah7:7 “Asi kana ndirini ndichatarira kuna Jehovha, ndichamirira Mwari woruponeso rwangu; Mwari wangu uchandinzwa." 
Micah7:8 “Usafara pamusoro pangu iwe muvengi wangu; kana ndikawira pasi, ndichasimukazve; kana ndigere murima, Jehovha achava chiedza changu." 
Micah7:9 Ndichatakura kutsamwa kwaJehovha, nokuti ndakamutadzira, kusvikira achindireverera mhosva yangu, nokundiruramisira mhaka yangu; uchandibudisira kuchiedza, ndichaona kururama kwake." 
Micah7:10 Ipapo muvengi wangu achazviona, kunyara kuchafukidza iye anoti kwandiri, ‘Jehovha Mwari wako aripiko?’ Meso angu achamuona; zvino achatsikirwa pasi samatope ari panzira dzomumusha." 
Micah7:11 “Zuva rokuvaka masvingo enyu richasvika, nezuva iro miganhu ichatarwa nokure." 
Micah7:12 Nezuva iro vachauya kwamuri, vachibva Asiria nokumaguta eIjipiti, nokunyika inobva Ijipiti ichisvikira kuRwizi, nokubva kune rimwe gungwa, kusvikira kune rimwe gungwa, nokubva kune rimwe gomo kusvikira kune rimwe gomo." 
Micah7:13 Kunyangwe zvakadaro nyika ichava dongo, nemhaka yavageremo, nemhaka yezvibereko zvamabasa avo." 
Micah7:14 “Fudzai vanhu venyu netsvimbo yenyu, iwo makwai ari nhaka yenyu, anogara ari oga mudondo pakati peKarimeri; ngaachere paBhashani neGireadhi, sapamazuva akare." 
Micah7:15 Ndichavaratidza zvinhu zvinoshamisa sapamazuva okubuda kwenyu munyika yeIjipiti. 
Micah7:16 Marudzi avanhu achazviona akanyara pamusoro pesimba ravo rose; vachafumbatira miromo yavo namaoko avo, nzeve dzavo hadzinganzwi." 
Micah7:17 Vachananzva guruva senyoka; vachabuda panzvimbo dzavo dzokuvanda vachidedera sezvinokambaira zvenyika; vachauya kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu vachitya, vachakutyai." 
Micah7:18 “Ndianiko Mwari akafanana nemi, anokanganwira zvakaipa, anopfuura kudarika kwavakasara venhaka yake? Haangagari akatsamwa nokusingaperi, nokuti anofarira kuva nenyasha." 
Micah7:19 Achatinzwira tsitsizve, achatsika zvakaipa zvedu pasi petsoka dzake; muchakandira zvivi zvavo zvose mukudzika kwegungwa." 
Micah7:20 Muchaitira Jakobho zvokwadi yenyu, naAbhurahamu nyasha dzenyu, idzo dzamakapikira madzibaba edu kubva pamazuva akare.”" 
Nahum1:1 “Chirevo chaMwari pamusoro peNinivha. Bhuku yezvakaonekwa naNahumi muErikoshi. 
Nahum1:2 “Jehovha ndiye Mwari ane godo, anotsiva; Jehovha anotsiva, azere nehasha; Jehovha anotsiva vadzivisi vake, anochengetera vavengi vake hasha dzake." 
Nahum1:3 Jehovha haakurumidzi kutsamwa, une simba guru, haangatongopembedzi ane mhosva; nzira yaJehovha iri pakati pechamupupuri nedutu, makore iguruva retsoka dzake." 
Nahum1:4 Anotuka gungwa, achiri omesa, anopwisa nzizi dzose; Bhashani rinoshaiwa simba, uye Karimeri, ruva reRebhanoni rinoshaiwa simba." 
Nahum1:5 Makomo anodedera pamberi pake, zvikomo zvinonyauka; nyika inosimuka pamberi pake, zvirokwazvo, iyo nyika yavose vagerepo." 
Nahum1:6 Ndiani angamira pamberi pehasha dzake? Ndiani angaramba amire pakutsamwa kwake kukuru? Hasha dzake dzakadururwa somoto, matombo akaputsanyiwa naye." 
Nahum1:7 Jehovha akanaka, inhare nezuva rokutambudzika; iye anoziva vanotizira kwaari." 
Nahum1:8 Asi achaparadza kwazvo nzvimbo yeguta nemvura inokukura, achidzingana navavengi vake kusvikira murima." 
Nahum1:9 Munorangarireiko pamusoro paJehovha? Iye achaparadza chose; nhamo haingamukizve rwechipiri. 
Nahum1:10 Nokuti kunyangwe kupindana-pindana seminzwa, kana kuita savakabatwa nezvavakanwa, vachaparadzwa chose samashanga akaoma." 
Nahum1:11 “Mumwe akabuda pakati penyu anorangarira zvakaipa pamusoro paJehovha, anorangana zvisina maturo." 
Nahum1:12 Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Kunyangwe vane simba ravo rose, vakawandawo, kunyangwe zvakadaro vachatemwa, iye achaparara. Kunyangwe ndakakutambudzai, handingazokutambudziyizve.’" 
Nahum1:13 Zvino ndichavhuna joko rake, ribve kwamuri, ndichadamburanya zvisungo zvenyu." 
Nahum1:14 “Jehovha akaraira pamusoro penyu, kuti vezita renyu varege kuzodyarwazve; mumba mavamwari venyu ndichaparadza zvifananidzo zvakavezwa nezvifananidzo zvakaumbwa; ndichakuchererai hwiro; nokuti makashata kwazvo." 
Nahum1:15 “Tarirai pamakomo tsoka dzounouya namashoko akanaka, anoparidza rugare! Itai mitambo yenyu, imi Judha, itai zvamakapika, nokuti akaipa haangazopfuurizve napakati penyu; akaparadzwa chose." 
Nahum2:1 “Muputsanyi auya kuzorwa nemi; rindirai nhare, tarirai nzira, simbisai zviuno zvenyu, itai nesimba renyu kwazvo." 
Nahum2:2 “Nokuti Jehovha anodzosa kurumbidzwa kukuru kwaJakobho sokurumbidzwa kukuru kwaIsiraeri; nokuti vapambi vakavapamba, vakaparadza matavi emizambiringa yavo." 
Nahum2:3 Nhovo dzemhare dzake dzakatsvukiswa, varume vakatsunga vakapfeka nguo tsvuku; (matare engoro anopenya nezuva rokuzvigadzira kwake, mapfumo ake emisipiresi anosimudzwa.)" 
Nahum2:4 Ngoro dzinovirima munzira dzomumusha, dzinobonderana pamapani, dzakafanana namazhenje, dzinomhanya semheni." 
Nahum2:5 Unorangarira vakuru vake, vanogumburwa pakufamba kwavo, vanomhanyira kurusvingo rwaro pakagadzirwa chitaviridzo." 
Nahum2:6 Masuwo enzizi akazarurwa, imba yamambo yakanyauka." 
Nahum2:7 Shoko ratemwa, rokuti, rakafukurwa, rakatapwa, vashandiri varo vanochema namazwi akaita seenjiva, vachizvirova zvipfuva zvavo." 
Nahum2:8 Asi kubva kare Ninivha rakanga rakaita sedziva remvura; kunyangwe zvakadaro vanotiza. Vanodana vachiti, ‘Mirai, mirai!’ Asi hakuna anocheuka." 
Nahum2:9 Pambai sirivha, pambai ndarama; nokuti kuwanda kwazvo hakuperi, iyo pfuma yenhumbi dzakaisvonaka." 
Nahum2:10 Harina chinhu, rinoshaiwa zvose, rava dongo; mwoyo unonyauka, mabvi anobonderana, kurwadziwa kuripo pazviuno zvose, zviso zvavose zvacheneruka." 
Nahum2:11 “Bako reshumba riripi? Panodyira shumba duku ndapapi? Ndapapi panofamba shumba nehadzi yayo nomwana weshumba, kusina anodzikarudza?" 
Nahum2:12 Shumba yaibvamburanya zvakaringana vana vayo, yaidzipira hadzi dzayo, yaizadza mapako ayo nezvayairuma, nenzimba dzayo nezvayaibata." 
Nahum2:13 “Tarirai, ndine mhaka nemi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo ndichapisa ngoro dzaro dziite utsi, munondo uchapedza shumba dzenyu duku; ndichabvisa zvawakapamba panyika, izwi renhume dzako haringatongonzwikizve." 
Nahum3:1 “Guta reropa rine nhamo! Rizere nenhema nokupamba; zvakapambwa hazviperimo. 
Nahum3:2 Kurira kwetyava, nomubvumo wokutinhira kwamakumbo engoro, nowokutsika kwamabhiza, nengoro dzinonjarika," 
Nahum3:3 nowavatasvi vanomhanyisa, nomunondo unopenya, nepfumo rinovaima, navazhinji vakaurayiwa, nomurwi mukuru wezvitunha; zvitunha hazviperi, vanogumburwa nezvitunha zvavo;" 
Nahum3:4 nemhaka yokufeva kuzhinji kwechifeve chakanaka pakudikanwa, iye mwene wouroyi, anotengesa marudzi avanhu nokufeva kwake, nemhuri dzavanhu nouroyi hwake." 
Nahum3:5 Tarira, ndine maka newe ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo ndichakufukura ndiise nguo dzako kuchiso chako; ndicharatidza marudzi ose kushama kwako, uye ushe hwose kunyara kwako." 
Nahum3:6 “Ndichakandira pamusoro pako tsvina inosemesa, nokukushatisa, nokukuita chinhu chinotarirwa navose." 
Nahum3:7 Ipapo vose vanokuona vachakutiza, vachiti, ‘Ninivha raparadzwa, ndiani acharichema? Ndichakutsvakirepi vanyaradzi?’ ”" 
Nahum3:8 Ko iwe unopfuura No–amoni, rakanga rakavakwa pakati penzizi, rakanga rakapoteredzwa nemvura; rusvingo rwaro raiva gungwa, namadziro aro raiva gungwazve?" 
Nahum3:9 Itiopia neIjipiti raiva simba raro, rakanga risina mugumo; Ribhia aiva mubatsiri wako." 
Nahum3:10 Kunyangwe zvakadaro vakazoenda naro, rakatapwa; vana varo vaduku vakaputsanyiwa pakuvamba kwenzira dzose dzomumusha; vakakanda mijenya pamusoro pavaikudzwa pakati pavo, vakuru varo vose vakasungwa namangetani." 
Nahum3:11 Newewo uchabatwa newaini, uchandovanda; newewo uchandotsvaka nhare nemhaka yomuvengi wako." 
Nahum3:12 Nhare dzako dzose dzichafanana nemionde ina maonde otanga kuibva; kana ichizunzwa, anowira mumuromo woanodya." 
Nahum3:13 Tarira, vanhu vako pakati pako vakaita savakadzi; masuwo enyika yako azarurirwa vavengi vako kwazvo; moto wapedza zvipfigiso zvako." 
Nahum3:14 Zvicherere mvura yokunwa pakukombwa kwako, simbisa nhare dzako, pinda mudope ukanye ivhu, ubate foroma." 
Nahum3:15 Moto uchakupedzapo, munondo uchakuparadza, uchakupedza segwatakwata; zviitei vazhinji segwatakwata, zviitei vazhinji semhashu." 
Nahum3:16 Makawanza vatengesi venyu vakapfuura nyenyedzi dzokudenga; gwatakwata rinoparadza, ndokubhururuka richienda." 
Nahum3:17 Machinda enyu akaita semhashu, vakuru venyu semhashu zhinji zhinji, dzinovata pazhowa kana kune chando, asi kana zuva rabuda dzinobhururuka dzichienda, hadzichazikanwi kwadziri." 
Nahum3:18 Vafudzi vako vanotsimwaira, iwe mambo weAsiria, vakakudzwa vako vanyarara, vanhu vako vakapararira pamakomo, hakuna angavaunganidza." 
Nahum3:19 Kukuvadzwa kwako hakungarapwi, vanga rako rakaipa kwazvo; vose vanonzwa guhu rako vachakuitira nondo; nokuti ndianiko akanga asingatambudzwi nguva dzose nezvakashata zvako?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Shoko raMwari rakaonekwa nomuporofita Habhakuku. 
Habakkuk1:2 “Aiwa, Jehovha, ndichadana kusvikira rinhiko, imi musinganzwi? Ndinodana kwamuri pamusoro pokuitirwa simba, asi hamundiponesi." 
Habakkuk1:3 Munondiratidzireiko zvakaipa, munotarireiko zvisakarurama? Nokuti kuparadza nokuitira vamwe simba zviri pamberi pangu; rukave ruripo, uye kukakavara kunomuka." 
Habakkuk1:4 Saka murairo haune simba, uye kururamisira vamwe hakuchaonekwi; nokuti vakashata vanokomba vakarurama; saka kururamisira vamwe kunongoonekwa kwakaminama." 
Habakkuk1:5 “Tarirai pakati pamarudzi, muone, mushamiswe kwazvo–kwazvo; nokuti ndinobate basa pamazuva enyu, ramucharamba kutenda kunyangwe muchizviudzwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Nokuti tarirai, ndinomutsa vaKaradhia, rudzi rune hasha runopenga, vanofamba panyika pose, kuti vazvitorere ugaro husati huri hwavo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Vanotyisa nokukarudza; kutonga kwavo nokukudzwa kwavo kunobva kwavari vamene. 
Habakkuk1:8 “Mabhiza avowo anomhanya achipfuura ingwe, ane hasha kupfuura mapere amadekwana; vatasvi vavo vamabhiza vanomhanya vachiuruka, zvirokwazvo vatasvi vavo vamabiza vanouya vachibva kure, vanobhururuka segondo rinokurumidzira kudya." 
Habakkuk1:9 Vanouya vose kuzoita simba; zviso zvavo zvakatarira mberi; vanounganidza vatapwa sejecha. 
Habakkuk1:10 “Zvirokwazvo vanodadira madzimambo, machinda anosekwa navo; vanoseka nhare dzose, nokuti vanodzitutira guruva ndokudzikunda." 
Habakkuk1:11 Ipapo vanopfuura semhepo, ndokuenda, asi vane mhosva, ivo vanoita simba ravo mwari wavo." 
Habakkuk1:12 “Imi Jehovha, Mwari wangu, Mutsvene wangu, hamuzakavapo kubva pakutanga–tanga here? Isu hatingafi. Jehovha, imi makatema kuti vatonge, nemi dombo, makavaisapo kuti varange," 
Habakkuk1:13 Imi, muna meso akaisvonaka, asingadi kutarira zvakaipa, musingadi kuona zvisakarurama, munotaririreiko vanonyengera, muchinyarara kana akashata achimedza akamupfuura nokururama;" 
Habakkuk1:14 muchiita vanhu sehove dzegungwa, sezvinokambaira, zvisina mubati?" 
Habakkuk1:15 “Vanovaredza vose nechiredzo chavo, vanovabata mumumbure wavo, vachivaunganidzira murutava rwavo; naizvozvo vanofara kwazvo vano mufaro." 
Habakkuk1:16 Naizvozvo vanobayira mumbure wavo, nokupisira rutava rwavo zvinonhuwira, nokuti mugove wavo wakakora nazvo, zvokudya zvavo zvawanda." 
Habakkuk1:17 “Zvino vangadurura zviri mumumbure wavo, vakaramba vachiuraya marudzi avanhu here?" 
Habakkuk2:1 “Ndichandomira panzvimbo yangu yokurindira, ndichazviisa panharirire yangu, ndichatarira ndione zvaachataura neni, uye zvandingapindura pamusoro pokuchema kwangu." 
Habakkuk2:2 “Jehovha akandipindura, akati, ‘Nyora zvawaratidzwa, zvionekwe kwazvo pamahwendefa, kuti zvigone kurahwa noanomhanya." 
Habakkuk2:3 Nokuti zvakaratidzwa izvi ndezvenguva yakatarwa, zvovavarira kuguma, hazvingarevi nhema; kunyangwe zvikanonoka, uzvimirire, nokuti zvichauya zvirokwazvo, hazvingaiti nguva huru." 
Habakkuk2:4 Tarirai, mweya wavo una manyawi, hauna kururama mukati mavo; asi akarurama achararama nokutenda kwake." 
Habakkuk2:5 “ ‘Uyezve, zvirokwazvo, waini inonyengera, murume anozvikudza, asingagari kumba kwake, akashamisa kukara kwake seSheori, akafanana norufu; haangaguti, asi anozviunganidzira marudzi ose, unozvikokerera marudzi ose avanhu.’" 
Habakkuk2:6 Ko ava vose havangaimbi rwiyo pamusoro pake, nokumudadira nechirabwe, vachiti, ‘Ane nhamo anowanza zvisati zviri zvake! Kusvikira rinhiko? Uye anozviremedza nezvikwereti!’" 
Habakkuk2:7 “Vachakurumai havangasimuki pakarepo, vanokumanikidzai havangamuki here, imi mukapambwa navo?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Imi zvamakapamba marudzi mazhinji, vose vakasara vamarudzi avanhu vachakupambai imi, nemhaka yeropa ravanhu, uye nemhaka yokuti makaitira nyika simba, neguta navose vageremo." 
Habakkuk2:9 “Ane nhamo unozviwanira imba yake pfuma yakaipa, kuti aise dendere rake kwakakwirira, kuti arwirwe paruoko rwezvakaipa!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Makaranganira imba yenyu zvinonyadza, zvamakaparadza marudzi mazhinji avanhu, mukatadzira mweya wenyu." 
Habakkuk2:11 Nokuti ibwe richadanidzira riri parusvingo, danda riri mudenga richapindura." 
Habakkuk2:12 “Ane nhamo anovaka musha neropa, anovamba guta nezvakaipa!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Tarirai, hazvina kubva kuna Jehovha wehondo here kuti vanhu vabatire moto, uye kuti marudzi avanhu azvinetse nokuda kwezvisina maturo?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Nokuti nyika yose ichazadzwa nokuziva kubwinya kwaJehovha, mvura sezvainofukidza pasi pegungwa." 
Habakkuk2:15 “Ane nhamo anopa wokwake zvinodhaka azvinwe, anovhenganisiramo uturu hwenyu, muchimudhakisawo, kuti muone kushama kwavo!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Mazvigutisa nezvinonyadzisa panzvimbo yezvinokudzwa; chinwai nemiwo, muve soasina kudzingiswa; mukombe worudyi rwaJehovha uchasvikira kwamuri, zvinonyadzisa zvakaipa zvichauya pamusoro pokukudzwa kwenyu." 
Habakkuk2:17 Nokuti zvakaipa zvakaitirwa Rebhanoni zvichakufukidzai imi, uye kuparadzwa kwezvipfuwo kwakazvityisa; nemhaka yeropa ravanhu, nemhaka yezvakaipa zvakaitirwa nyika, neguta, navose vageremo." 
Habakkuk2:18 “Mufananidzo wakavezwa unobatsireiko, zvawavezwa nomuvezi wawo; kana mufananidzo wakaumbwa, iwo mudzidzisi wenhema, iye wakauumba zvaanovimba nawo, zvaakaita zvifananidzo zvisingagoni kutaura?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Ane nhamo anoti kudanda, ‘Muka! Kana kubwe risingagoni kutaura. Simuka! Zvinu izvi zvingadzidzisa here?’ Tarirai, zvakanamirwa nendarama nesirivha, asi hakuna mweya mukati mazvo napaduku." 
Habakkuk2:20 “Asi Jehovha ari mutemberi yake tsvene, nyika yose ngairambe inyerere pamberi pake.”" 
Habakkuk3:1 Munyengetero womuporofita Habhakuku, unoimbwa neShigionoti." 
Habakkuk3:2 “Aiwa, Jehovha, ndakanzwa mashoko enyu, ndikatya; Aiwa, Jehovha, mutsai basa renyu pakati pamakore; Rizivisei pakati pamakore; Pakutsamwa kwenyu rangarirai nyasha." 
Habakkuk3:3 Mwari anouya achibva Temani, Naiye Mutsvene achibva pagomo reParani. Sera. Umambo hwake hunofukidza denga rose, Nyika izere nokurumbidzwa kwake." 
Habakkuk3:4 Kupenya kuripo kwakafanana nechiedza; kwezuva kunobuda paruoko rwake, Simba rake rinovandapo." 
Habakkuk3:5 Denda rakaipa rinomutungamirira, Mazimbe omoto anobuda patsoka dzake." 
Habakkuk3:6 Anomira achiyera nyika; Anotarira, ndokuparadza marudzi avanhu; Makomo asingaperi anopararira; Zvikomo zvisingaperi zvinokotama; Nzira dzake ndedzekare–kare." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ndinoona matende eKushani ari panhamo; Micheka yamatende enyika yeMidhiani anodedera. 
Habakkuk3:8 Ko Jehovha akatsamwira nzizi here? Hasha dzenyu dzakamukira nzizi here? Kutsamwa kwenyu kwakamukira gungwa here, Zvamunotasva mabhiza enyu, Muchifamba nengoro dzenyu dzoruponeso?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Uta hwenyu hwakafukurwa kwazvo; Shamhu dzakapikirwa neshoko renyu. Makaparura nyika nenzizi. 
Habakkuk3:10 Makomo akakuonai akatya, Kudira kwemvura kwakapfuura; Pakadzika pakabudisa izwi rapo, Pakasimudzira maoko apo kumusoro." 
Habakkuk3:11 Zuva nomwedzi zvakamira paugaro hwazvo, Zvichiona chiedza chemiseve yenyu ichipfuura, Zvichiona kupenya kwepfumo renyu rinobwinya." 
Habakkuk3:12 Makatsika nyika makatsamwa, Makapura ndudzi mune hasha." 
Habakkuk3:13 Makabuda kuzoponesa vanhu venyu, Kuzoponesa muzodziwa wenyu; Makakuvadza musoro wemba yowakaipa, Muchifukura nheyo kusvikira kumutsipa wayo." 
Habakkuk3:14 Makabvoora misoro yavarwi vake namapfumo ake; Vakauya sechamupupuri kundiparadza; Kufara kwavo kwakaita sokwavanopedza varombo pakavanda. 
Habakkuk3:15 Makatsika gungwa namabhiza enyu, Iwo murwi wemvura zhinji.”" 
Habakkuk3:16 “Ndakanzwa, muviri wangu ukadedera, Miromo yangu yakadedera ndichinzwa izwi; Kuora kwakapinda mumapfupa angu, ndikadedera pandakanga ndiri, Nokuti ndinofanira kumirira zuva renjodzi ndinyerere, Kana iye, anozorwa navanhu, achivawira." 
Habakkuk3:17 Nokuti kunyangwe muonde ukasatunga maruva, Nemizambiringa ikashaiwa zvibereko, Kunyangwe kubereka kwomuorivhi kukakona, Neminda ikasabereka zvokudya; Kunyangwe makwai akapera muchirugu, Nemombe dzikashaikwa mumatanga," 
Habakkuk3:18 Kunyangwe zvakadaro ndichafara kwazvo muna Jehovha, Ndichava nomufaro muna Mwari woruponeso rwangu." 
Habakkuk3:19 Jehovha Ishe isimba rangu, Anoita tsoka dzangu dzive setsoka dzehadzi yenondo, Anondifambisa pamatunhu angu akakwirira. Kumutungamiriri wokuimba, nemitengeranwa yangu.”" 
Zephaniah1:1 Shoko raJehovha, rakasvika kuna Zefaniya, mwanakomana waKushi, mwanakomana waGedharia, mwanakomana waAmaria, mwanakomana waHezekiya, namazuva aJosiya, mwanakomana waAmoni, mambo waJudha." 
Zephaniah1:2 “Ndichaparadza chose zvinhu zvose zviri pasi pose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Zephaniah1:3 Ndichaparadza vanhu nezvipfuwo; ndichaparadza shiri dzokudenga, nehove dzegungwa, nezvigumbuso pamwechete navakaipa; ndichabvisa vanhu pasi pose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kuna Judha, nokuna vose vagere Jerusaremu; ndichabvisa vakasara vaBhaari panzvimbo ino, nezita ravaKemarimi pamwechete navapristi;" 
Zephaniah1:5 navanonamata hondo dzokudenga pamatenga edzimba, navanamati, vanopika naJehovha vachipikawo naMarikami;" 
Zephaniah1:6 navakadzoka pakutevera Jehovha, navasina kutsvaka Jehovha kana kumubvunza." 
Zephaniah1:7 “Nyararai pamberi paIshe Jehovha, nokuti zuva raJehovha rava pedyo; vakakokwa naye wakavaita vatsvene." 
Zephaniah1:8 Zvino nezuva rechibayiro chaJehovha ndicharova machinda navanakomana vamambo, navose vakapfeka nguo dzavatorwa." 
Zephaniah1:9 Nezuva iro ndicharova vose vanodarika chikumbaridzo, vanozadza imba yatenzi wavo nokupambara nokunyengera." 
Zephaniah1:10 “Zvino nezuva iro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, kuchanzwika mhere inobva pasuwo rehove, nokuchema kunobva kurutivi rutsva rweguta, nokukoromoka kukuru kunobva kumakomo." 
Zephaniah1:11 Chemai imi mugere Makiteshi; nokuti vanhu vose veKenani vapera, vose vakanga vakapfuma sirivha vabviswa." 
Zephaniah1:12 Zvino nenguva iyo ndichanzvera Jerusaremu nemwenje; ndicharova varume vagere pamasese avo, vanoti mumwoyo yavo, ‘Jehovha haangaiti zvakanaka, uye haangaiti zvakaipa.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Pfuma yavo ichaitwa zvakapambwa, nedzimba dzavo matongo; zvirokwazvo, vachavaka dzimba, asi havangagarimo; vachasima minda yemizambiringa, asi havanganwi waini yayo." 
Zephaniah1:14 “Zuva guru raJehovha rava pedyo, rava pedyo, rinokurumidza kwazvo, iro izwi rezuva raJehovha; mhare inochemapo zvikuru kwazvo." 
Zephaniah1:15 Zuva iro izuva rokutsamwa, zuva rokutambudzika nokumanikidzwa, zuva rokurashwa nokuparadzwa, zuva rerima nerokusviba, zuva ramakore nerezarima guru," 
Zephaniah1:16 zuva rehwamanda neremhere, zvinoridzirwa maguta akakomberedzwa namasvingo neshongwe dzakakwirira." 
Zephaniah1:17 “Ndichauyisira vanhu kumanikidzwa, kuti vafambe samapofu, nokuti vakatadzira Jehovha; ropa ravo richadururwa seguruva, nenyama yavo sendove." 
Zephaniah1:18 “Sirivha yavo kunyangwe ndarama yavo hazvingagoni kuvarwira nezuva rokutsamwa kwaJehovha; asi nyika yose ichapedzwa nomoto wegodo rake; nokuti achapedza, zvirokwazvo achapedza zvinotyisa, vose vagere panyika." 
Zephaniah2:1 “Unganai, zvirokwazvo unganai, imi rudzi rusinganyari;" 
Zephaniah2:2 chirevo chisati chabereka, zuva risati rapfuura sehundi, kutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha kusati kwauya pamusoro penyu, zuva rokutsamwa kwaJehovha risati rauya pamusoro penyu." 
Zephaniah2:3 Tsvakai Jehovha, imi mose vanyoro venyika, imi makachengeta mitemo yake; tsvakai kururama, tsvakai unyoro; zvimwe mungavandika nezuva rokutsamwa kwaJehovha." 
Zephaniah2:4 “Nokuti Gaza richasiyiwa, Ashikeroni richaitwa dongo; vachadzinga Ashidhodhi masikati makuru, Ekironi richadzurwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Vane nhamo vagere panyika iri pagungwa, irwo rudzi rwavaKeteti! Shoko raJehovha rinokutuka, iwe Kenani, nyika yavaFirisitia; ndichakuparadza, kuti parege kuzova anogarapo." 
Zephaniah2:6 Mhenderekedzo dzegungwa dzichava mafuro ana mapako avafudzi nezvirugu zvamakwai. 
Zephaniah2:7 Mhenderekedzo dzichava dzavakasara veimba yaJudha; vachafudzapo makwai avo; vachavata pasi madekwana mudzimba dzeAshikeroni; nokuti Jehovha Mwari wavo achavashanyira nokudzosa kutapwa kwavo. 
Zephaniah2:8 “Ndakanzwa kuzvidzwa kwaMoabhu, nokutuka kwavana vaAmoni, kwavakazvidza nako vanhu vangu, vachiita manyawi pamuganho wavo." 
Zephaniah2:9 Naizvozvo noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Zvirokwazvo, Moabhu vachaita seSodhoma, navana vaAmoni seGomora, nyika yorukato, namakomba omunyu, namatongo nokusingaperi;’ vanhu vangu vakasara vachavaita chinhu chakatapwa, vakasara vorudzi rwangu vachavagara nhaka." 
Zephaniah2:10 “Ndizvo zvavachapiwa nokuda kwokuzvikudza kwavo, nokuti vakazvidza vanhu vaJehovha wehondo nokuzvikudza kwavari." 
Zephaniah2:11 Jehovha achavatyisa kwazvo, nokuti achaparadza vamwari vose venyika; vanhu vachamunamata iye, mumwe nomumwe achibva panzvimbo yake, naizvo zvivi zvose zvendudzi." 
Zephaniah2:12 “Nemiwo veItiopia, muchaurayiwa nomunondo wangu." 
Zephaniah2:13 Achatambanudzira ruoko rwake kurutivi rwokumusoro, ndokuparadza Asiria; Ninivha achariita dongo, riome serenje." 
Zephaniah2:14 Zvipfuwo zvichavata pasi mukati maro, idzo mhuka dzamarudzi ose; hukurwizi nenungu zvichavata pamisoro yembiru dzaro; izwi rokurira kwazvo richanzwika pamahwindo; kuparadzwa kuchavapo pazvikumbaridzo; nokuti wakafukunura zvakavezwa zvemisidhari." 
Zephaniah2:15 Iri ndiro guta raigara nomufaro risina hanya, raiti mumwoyo maro, ‘Ndini, hakuchino mumwe kunze kwangu!’ Haiwa, raitwa dongo sei, nzvimbo inovata mhuka! Mumwe nomumwe anopfuura napo acharidza muridzo, achizunungusa ruoko rwake." 
Zephaniah3:1 “Rine nhamo iro guta rinomukira Jehovha, rakasvibiswa, rinomanikidza!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Harina kuteerera izwi, harina kutenda kurangwa, harina kuvimba naJehovha, harina kuswedera kuna Mwari waro." 
Zephaniah3:3 Machinda aro mukati maro ishumba dzinoomba, vatongi varo mapere amadekwana, asingasiyi chinhu kusvikira mangwanani." 
Zephaniah3:4 Vaporofita varo vanhu vakareruka vanonyengera; vapristi varo vakamhura nzvimbo tsvene, vakaitira murairo simba." 
Zephaniah3:5 Jehovha uri mukati maro akarurama, haangaiti zvakaipa; zuva rimwe nerimwe mangwanani anobudisa pachena kururamisa kwake, asingadariki; asi asina kururama haazivi kunyara." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Ndakaparadza ndudzi, shongwe dzavo ava matongo; nzira dzavo dzomumisha ndakadziparadza, hakuchina anopfuura napo; maguta avo akaparadzwa, hakuna vanhumo, hakuna agerepo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ndakati, ‘Unditye chete; tenda kurangwa;’ ipapo paanogara hapazaiparadzwa, sezvandakaraira zvose pamusoro pake; asi vakafumira mangwanani, vakasvibisa zvose zvavakaita." 
Zephaniah3:8 Naizvozvo, ndimirirei ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha kusvikira zuva randichasimuka kuzopamba; nokuti ndatonga kuti ndichaunganidza ndudzi dzavanhu, kuti ndikokere ushe hwose, ndidire pamusoro pavo hasha dzangu, iko kutsamwa kwangu kukuru; nokuti nyika yose ichapedzwa nomoto wegodo rangu." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Nokuti nenguva iyo ndichavigira vanhu rurimi rwakachena, kuti vose vadane zita raJehovha, vamushumire nomwoyo mumwe." 
Zephaniah3:10 Vanamati vangu, iye mukunda wavanhu vangu vakaparadzirwa, vachandivigira chipiriso changu vachibva mhiri kwenzizi dzeItiopia." 
Zephaniah3:11 Nezuva iro haunganyadziswi pamusoro pamabasa ako ose, awakandidarikira nawo; nokuti nenguva iyo ndichabvisa pakati pako vanhu vako vanofarisisa vachizvikudza; haungazovi namanyawi pagomo rangu tsvene." 
Zephaniah3:12 Asi ndicharega mukati mako vanhu vanotambudzika navarombo; ivo vachavimba nezita raJehovha. 
Zephaniah3:13 Vakasara VaIsiraeri havangaiti zvakaipa, kana kureva nhema; rurimi runonyengera harungawanikwi mumiromo yavo; nokuti vachafura nokuvata pasi, hakuna angavatyisa." 
Zephaniah3:14 Imba, iwe mukunda weZioni, pururudza, iwe Isiraeri; fara ufarisise nomwoyo wako wose, iwe mukunda weJerusaremu." 
Zephaniah3:15 Jehovha akabvisa zvawakatongerwa, wakadzinga muvengi wako; mambo waIsiraeri, iye Jehovha, ari pakati pako, haungazoonizve zvakaipa." 
Zephaniah3:16 Nezuva iro vachati kuJerusaremu, ‘Usatya hako iwe; iwe Zioni, maoko ako ngaarege kushaiwa simba." 
Zephaniah3:17 Jehovha Mwari wako ari mukati mako, iye ane simba, achaponesa; achakufarira nomufaro; uchanyarara parudo rwake; achakufarira nokupururudza.’" 
Zephaniah3:18 Ndichaunganidza vanochemera ungano yakatarwa, ivo vaibva kwamuri, vairemerwa nokuzvidzwa kwavo." 
Zephaniah3:19 Tarirai, nenguva iyo ndichatonga vose vanokumanikidza, ndichaponesa vanokamhina, nokuunganidza vakadzingwa; ndichavaitira mbiri nezita rakanaka, ivo vainyadziswa panyika yose." 
Zephaniah3:20 Nenguva iyo ndichakuuyisai, nenguva iyo ndichakuunganidzai, nokuti ndichakuitirai zita rakanaka nembiri pakati pendudzi dzose dzenyika kana ndichidzosa kutapwa kwenyu, imi muchizviona ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Haggai1:1 Negore rechipiri ramambo Dhariasi, nomwedzi wechitanhatu, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika nomuporofita Hagai kuna Zerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, mubati waJudha, nokuna Joshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, richiti," 
Haggai1:1 Negore rechipiri ramambo Dhariasi, nomwedzi wechitanhatu, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika nomuporofita Hagai kuna Zerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, mubati waJudha, nokuna Joshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, richiti," 
Haggai1:2 “Jehovha wehondo unotaura, achiti, ‘Vanhu ava vanoti nguva ichigere kusvika, iyo nguva yokuvakwa kweimba yaJehovha.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika nomuporofita Hagai, richiti," 
Haggai1:4 “Ko zvino inguva yamungagara imi mudzimba dzenyu dzakashongedzwa namatanda, imba ino riri dongo here?”" 
Haggai1:5 Zvino zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Cherechedzai zvamakaita." 
Haggai1:6 Makakusha zvizhinji, asi makacheka zvishoma; munodya, asi hamuguti; munonwa, asi hamugungwi; munofuka, asi hakuna unodziyirwa; unobatira mubairo unobatira kuti azvichengete muhombodo yakabvooka.”" 
Haggai1:7 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Cherechedzai zvamakaita." 
Haggai1:8 Kwirai mugomo, muuye namatanda, muvake imba iyi; ini ndichaifarira, uye ini ndichakudzwa ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Haggai1:9 “Makafunga kuwana zvizhinji, tarirai, zvakangoita zvishoma; makati mazviisa kumusha, ini ndikafuridzira pamusoro pazvo. Nemhaka yeiko? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo. Nemhaka yeimba yangu riri dongo, mumwe nomumwe wenyu achimhanyira kumba kwake." 
Haggai1:10 Saka denga rakaramba nedova nemhaka yenyu, nenyika inoramba nezvibereko zvayo." 
Haggai1:11 Ndakadana kuwoma kuuye panyika, napamakomo, napazviyo, napawaini itsva, napamafuta, napane zvinoberekwa nevhu, napavanhu, napazvipfuwo, napamabasa ose amaoko avanhu.”" 
Haggai1:12 Ipapo Zerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, naJoshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, navanhu vose vakanga vasara, vakateerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wavo, namashoko omuporofita Hagai, sezvaakanga atumwa naJehovha Mwari wavo; vanhu vakatya pamberi paJehovha." 
Haggai1:12 Ipapo Zerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, naJoshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, navanhu vose vakanga vasara, vakateerera izwi raJehovha Mwari wavo, namashoko omuporofita Hagai, sezvaakanga atumwa naJehovha Mwari wavo; vanhu vakatya pamberi paJehovha." 
Haggai1:13 Ipapo Hagai, nhume yaJehovha, wakataura navanhu sezvaakarairwa neshoko rakatumwa naJehovha, akati, “Ndinemi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.”" 
Haggai1:14 Jehovha akamutsa mweya waZerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, mubati waJudha, nomweya waJoshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, nomweya wavanhu vose vakanga vasara, vakauya vakabata paimba yaJehovha wehondo, Mwari wavo," 
Haggai1:14 Jehovha akamutsa mweya waZerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, mubati waJudha, nomweya waJoshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, nomweya wavanhu vose vakanga vasara, vakauya vakabata paimba yaJehovha wehondo, Mwari wavo," 
Haggai1:15 nezuva ramakumi maviri namana romwedzi wechitanhatu, negore rechipiri ramambo Dhariusi." 
Haggai2:1 Nomwedzi wechinomwe, nezuva ramakumi maviri nerimwe romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika nomuporofita Hagai, richiti," 
Haggai2:2 “Zvino chitaura naZerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, mubati waJudha, naJoshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, navanhu vose vakasara, uti," 
Haggai2:2 “Zvino chitaura naZerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, mubati waJudha, naJoshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, navanhu vose vakasara, uti," 
Haggai2:3 ‘Ndiani wakasara pakati penyu, wakadeya kuona imba ino pakubwinya kwayo kwokutanga?’ Zvino munoiona yakadiniko? Pakuona kwenyu haina kuita sapasina here?" 
Haggai2:4 Asi zvino chiva nesimba, iwe Zerubhabheri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; newe Joshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, iva nesimba; nemi vanhu vose venyika, ivai nesimba, mubate ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti ndinemi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Haggai2:4 Asi zvino chiva nesimba, iwe Zerubhabheri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; newe Joshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukuru, iva nesimba; nemi vanhu vose venyika, ivai nesimba, mubate ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti ndinemi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Haggai2:5 Ndiro shoko resungano yandakaita nemi, nguva yamakabuda Ijipiti, mweya wangu uchigere pakati penyu; regai kutya." 
Haggai2:6 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Kamwe chete, kwasara chinguva chiduku, ndichazunungusa denga rose, nenyika negungwa, nenyika yakaoma;" 
Haggai2:7 ndichazunungusa ndudzi dzose; zvose zvinodikanwa nendudzi dzose zvichauya; ndichazadza imba ino nokubwinya,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Haggai2:8 Sirivha ndeyangu, nendarama ndeyangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Haggai2:9 Kubwinya kwokupedzisira kweimba ino kuchapfuura kwokutanga ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo; panzvimbo ino ndichapa rugare ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo.” 
Haggai2:10 Nezuva ramakumi maviri namana romwedzi wepfumbamwe, negore rechipiri raDhariasi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika nomuporofita Hagai, richiti," 
Haggai2:11 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Chibvunza vapristi pamusoro pomuriro,’ uti," 
Haggai2:12 ‘Kana munhu achitakura nyama tsvene mumupendero wenguo yake, akagunzva nomupendero chingwa, kana zvakabikwa, kana waini, kana mafuta, kana zvokudya zvipi nezvipi, ko zvava zvitsvene here?’ ” Vapristi vakapindura, vakati, “Kwete.”" 
Haggai2:13 Ipapo Hagai akati, “Kana munhu, wakasvibiswa nemhaka yokubata chitunha, akagunzva chinhu chimwe chaizvozvi, ko chasvibiswa here?” Vapristi vakapindura, vakati, “Chasvibiswa.”" 
Haggai2:14 Ipapo Hagai akapindura, akati, “Ndizvo zvakaita vanhu ava norudzi urwu pamberi pangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ndizvo zvakaita zvose zvavanoita namaoko avo, uye zvavanobayirapo zvakasvibiswa." 
Haggai2:15 Zvino fungai henyu kubva pazuva ranhasi muchidzokera shure, ibwe rimwe richigere kuiswa pamusoro pebwe muTemberi yaJehovha." 
Haggai2:16 Nenguva iyo yose kana munhu achinge asvika pamurwi wezviyo zvezviyero zvina makumi maviri, zvaingovapo zvine gumi; kana munhu akasvika pachisviniro chewaini achiti ndinochera hari dzina makumi mashanu, dzaingovapo dzina makumi maviri." 
Haggai2:17 Ndakakurovai nenyunje nokuvhuvha nechimvuramabwe pamabasa ose amaoko enyu; asi hamuna kutendeukira kwandiri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Haggai2:18 Chifungai henyu kubva pazuva ranhasi muchidzokera shure, kubva pazuva ramakumi maviri namana romwedzi wepfumbamwe, kubva pazuva rakateyiwa nheyo dzeTemberi yaJehovha, fungai izvozvo." 
Haggai2:19 Ko mbeu ichimo mudura here? Zvirokwazvo, muzambiringa nomuonde nomutamba nomuorivhi hazvina kubereka; kubva pazuva rino ndichakuropafadzai.”" 
Haggai2:20 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika rwechipiri kuna Hagai nezuva ramakumi maviri namana romwedzi, richiti," 
Haggai2:21 “Taura naZerubhabheri, mubati waJudha, uti, ‘Ndichazunungusa denga rose nenyika;" 
Haggai2:22 ndichawisira pasi zvigaro zvoushe; ndichaparadza simba roushe hwendudzi; ndichawisira pasi ngoro navanofamba nadzo; mabhiza navanotasva achawira pasi, mumwe nomumwe nomunondo wehama yake.’" 
Haggai2:23 Nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo ndichakutora iwe, Zerubhabheri, muranda wangu, mwanakomana waShearitieri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichakuita sechisimbiso; nokuti ndakakusanangura ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Nomwedzi worusere, negore rechipiri raDhariasi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Zekariya, mwanakomana waBherekia, mwanakomana womuporofita Idho, richiti," 
Zechariah1:2 “Jehovha akatsamwira madzibaba enyu zvikuru. 
Zechariah1:3 Naizvozvo chiti kwavari, zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Dzokerai kwandiri, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo neni ndichadzokera kwamuri,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Zechariah1:4 “Regai kuva samadzibaba enyu, nokuti vaporofita vokutanga vakadanidzira kwaari, vachiti, zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Dzokai, zvino panzira dzenyu dzakaipa napazvakaipa zvenyu zvamunoita; asi havana kunzwa kana kunditeerera,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Zechariah1:5 Madzibaba enyu aripiko? Naivo vaporofita vangararama nokusingaperi here? 
Zechariah1:6 Asi mashoko angu nemitemo yangu, zvandakaraira varanda vangu, ivo vaporofita, hazvina kubata madzibaba enyu here? Ivo vakadzoka, vakati, ‘Jehovha wehondo sezvaakafunga kutiitira, zvakafanira mabasa edu nezvakafanira zvatakaita, ndizvo zvaakatiitira.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Nezuva ramakumi namana romwedzi wegumi nomumwe, uri mwedzi weShabhati, negore rechipiri raDhariasi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Zekariya mwanakomana waBherekia, mwanakomana womuporofita Idho, richiti," 
Zechariah1:8 “Ndakatarira usiku, ndikaona murume akatasva bhiza dzvuku, akamira pakati pemiti yemimirite yaiva mumupata; shure kwake kwakanga kunamabhiza matsvuku namashora namachena.”" 
Zechariah1:9 Ipapo ndikati, “Nhai, ishe wangu, zviiko izvi?” Mutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni akati kwandiri, “Ndichakuratidza kuti izvi zvinyi.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Murume akanga amire pakati pemiti yemimirite akapindura, akati, “Ava ndivo vakatumwa naJehovha kupota–pota nenyika yose.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Ivo vakapindura mutumwa waJehovha akanga amire pakati pemiti yemimirite, vakati, “Takapota–pota nenyika yose, wane nyika yose inyerere ichizorora.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Ipapo mutumwa waJehovha akapindura, akati, “Aiwa, Jehovha wehondo, mucharamba musinganzwiri nyasha Jerusaremu namaguta aJudha amakatsamwira makore ano ana makumi manomwe kusvikira rinhiko?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Ipapo Jehovha akapindura mutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni, mashoko akanaka anonyaradza." 
Zechariah1:14 Ipapo mutumwa, akanga achitaurirana neni, akati kwandiri, “Danidzira, uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ndine godo pamusoro peJerusaremu, godo guru." 
Zechariah1:15 Ndakatsamwira kwazvo ndudzi dzavanhu dzakazorora, nokuti ndakanga ndakatsamwa zvishoma, asi ivo vakanyanyisa nhamo.’" 
Zechariah1:16 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndakadzokera Jerusaremu ndine nyasha zhinji; imba yangu ichavakwamo’ ” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo uye tambo yokuyeresa ichatambanudzirwa pamusoro peJerusaremu." 
Zechariah1:17 Danidzirazve, uti, “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Maguta angu achapa pfuma mufarozve, Jehovha achanyaradzazve Zioni, achazvisanangurirazve Jerusaremu.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Zvino ndakaratidza meso angu ndikatarira, ndikaona nyanga ina." 
Zechariah1:19 Ipapo ndikati kumutumwa, wakanga achitaurirana neni, “Zviiko izvi?” Akandipindura, akati, “Ndidzo nyanga dzakaparadzira Judha naIsiraeri neJerusaremu.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Jehovha akandiratidza vapfuri vana. 
Zechariah1:21 Ipapo ndikati, “Ava vauya kuzoitei?” Iye akataura, akati, “Ndidzo nyanga dzakaparadzira Judha, kusvikira kusina munhu akasimudza musoro wake; asi ava vauya kuzovatyisa, kuwisira pasi nyanga dzendudzi dzavanhu dzakasimudzira nyika yaJudha runyanga rwavo vachida kuvaparadzira.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Zvino ndakaratidza meso angu, ndikatarira, ndikaona murume akabata tambo yokuyera muruoko rwake." 
Zechariah2:2 Ipapo ndikati, “Unoendepiko?” Iye akati kwandiri, “Kundoyera Jerusaremu, ndione kufara kwaro nokureba kwaro.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Zvino tarira, mutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni, akabuda, mumwe mutumwa akandomuchingamidza," 
Zechariah2:4 akati kwaari, “Mhanya, undotaura nejaya iri, uti, ‘Jerusaremu richagara semisha isina masvingo, nokuda kwokuwanda kwavanhu nezvipfuwo zvirimo.’" 
Zechariah2:5 “Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ini ndichava kwariri sorusvingo rwomoto rwakapoteredza, ini ndichava kubwinya kwaro mukati maro.’" 
Zechariah2:6 “Nhai, imi tizai panyika yokumusoro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; nokuti ndakakuparadzirai semhepo ina dzokudenga,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Zechariah2:7 “Nhai, Zioni, tiza, iwe ugere nomukunda weBhabhironi." 
Zechariah2:8 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Wakanditumira kundudzi dzakakupambai imi, kuti ndiwane kukudzwa; nokuti unokugunzvai imi, unogunzva mboni yeziso rake.’ ”" 
Zechariah2:9 Nokuti tarirai, ndichazunungusa ruoko rwangu pamusoro pavo, vachava chinhu chakapambwa kuna ivo vaivabatira; ipapo muchaziva kuti Jehovha wehondo ndiye akandituma." 
Zechariah2:10 “Imba, ufare, iwe mukunda weZioni; nokuti tarira, ndinouya, ndichagara mukati mako,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Zechariah2:11 Ndudzi zhinji dzichanamatira Jehovha nezuva iro, vakava vanhu vangu; ndichagara mukati mako, ipapo iwe uchaziva kuti ndiye Jehovha wehondo wakandituma kwauri." 
Zechariah2:12 Judha vachagarwa nhaka naJehovha, uchava mugove wake munyika tsvene, uchazvisanangurirazve Jerusaremu." 
Zechariah2:13 Nyararai imi nyama yose pamberi paJehovha; nokuti wamuka paugaro hwake hutsvene.

Zechariah3:2 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, “Jehovha ngaakutuke, iwe Satani; zvirokwazvo, Jehovha, wakazvisanangurira Jerusaremu, ngaakutuke; ko ichi hachizi chitsiga chakabvutwa pamoto here?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Zvino Joshua akanga akafuka nguo dzine tsvina, amire pamberi pomutumwa." 
Zechariah3:3 Zvino Joshua akanga akafuka nguo dzine tsvina, amire pamberi pomutumwa." 
Zechariah3:4 Akapindura, akataura navakanga vamire pamberi pake, achiti, “Bvisai nguo dzake dzine tsvina.” Akati kwaari, “Tarira, ndakabvisa zvakaipa zvako, ndichakupfekedza nguo dzomutambo.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Ini ndikati, “Ngavamudzike ngowani yakachena pamusoro wake.” Ipapo vakamudzika ngowani yakachena pamusoro wake, vakamupfekedza nguo; zvino mutumwa waJehovha akanga amirepo." 
Zechariah3:6 Mutumwa waJehovha akapupura kuna Joshua, achiti,"
