Zechariah3:7 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Kana ukafamba nenzira dzangu, kana ukachengeta zvandakakuraira, ipapo uchatonga imba yangu, uye uchachengetawo mavazhe angu, ini ndichakupa mapindire pakati pavamire pano." 
Zechariah3:8 Zvino chinzwa iwe Joshua, Mupristi Mukuru, iwe neshamwari dzako dzigere pamberi pako; nokuti varume ava chiratidzo; nokuti tarirai, ndichauyisa muranda wangu, davi." 
Zechariah3:8 Zvino chinzwa iwe Joshua, Mupristi Mukuru, iwe neshamwari dzako dzigere pamberi pako; nokuti varume ava chiratidzo; nokuti tarirai, ndichauyisa muranda wangu, davi." 
Zechariah3:9 Nokuti tarirai ibwe randakaisa pamberi paJoshua; pabwe rimwe pana meso manomwe; tarirai, ndichatema runyoro rwaro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo ndichabvisa zvakaipa zvenyika iyo nezuva rimwe." 
Zechariah3:9 Nokuti tarirai ibwe randakaisa pamberi paJoshua; pabwe rimwe pana meso manomwe; tarirai, ndichatema runyoro rwaro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo ndichabvisa zvakaipa zvenyika iyo nezuva rimwe." 
Zechariah3:10 Nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo muchadana mumwe nomumwe wenyu shamwari yake agare pasi pomudzambiringa napasi pomuonde.’ ” 
Zechariah4:1 Zvino mutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni akasvikazve, akandimutsa, somunhu anomutswa pahope dzake." 
Zechariah4:2 Akati kwandiri, “Unooneiko?” Ini ndikati, “Ndakatarira, ndikaona chigadzikiro chomwenje chendarama yose, chine hadyana yacho pamusoro pacho, nemwenje yacho minomwe iri pamusoro pacho; mwenje mumwe nomumwe uri pamusoro pacho une mbombi nomwe;" 
Zechariah4:3 uye miti miviri yemiorivhi parutivi rwacho, mumwe kurutivi rworudyi rwehariyana, nomumwe kurutivi rworuboshwe.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Ndikapindura ndikataura nomutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni, ndichiti, “Izvi zviiko, ishe wangu?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Ipapo mutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni, akapindura, akati, kwandiri, “Hauzivi here kuti izvi zviiko?” Ini ndikati, “Kwete, ishe wangu.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Ipapo akapindura, akataura neni, achiti, “Ndiro shoko raJehovha kuna Zerubhabheri, rinoti, ‘Hazviitwi nehondo kana nesimba, asi noMweya wangu,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Zechariah4:7 Ndiwe aniko, iwe gomo guru? Pamberi paZerubhabheri uchaitwa bani, iye achabudisa ibwe rokumusoro, achidanidzira achiti, ‘Nyasha, nyasha ngadzive kwariri.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri richiti," 
Zechariah4:9 “Maoko aZerubhabheri akateya nheyo dzeimba ino, maoko ake achaipedzisawo; ipapo iwe uchaziva kuti Jehovha wehondo ndiye akandituma kwauri." 
Zechariah4:10 “Nokuti ndiani akashora zuva rezvinhu zviduku? Nokuti achafara zvikuru, achaona tambo yokuyeresa muruoko rwaZerubhabheri; awa ndiwo meso aJehovha anofamba pose pose panyika yose." 
Zechariah4:11 “Ipapo ndakapindura, ndikati kwaari, ‘Ko miorivhi iyi miviri kurutivi rworudyi rwechigadziko nokurutivi rworuboshwe zvinoti kudiniko?’ ”" 
Zechariah4:12 Ndikapindurazve rwechipiri, ndikati kwaari, “Ko matavi awa maviri nomuorivhi ari kumativi emiromo miviri, inodira mafuta endarama pairi, anoti kudiniko?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Akandipindura, akati, “Hauzivi here kuti izvi zvinyiko?” Ini ndikati, “Kwete, ishe wangu.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Zvino akati, “Ava ndivo vaviri vakazodzwa, vamire pamberi paShe wenyika yose.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Zvino ndakaratidza meso anguzve, ndikatarira, ndikaona rugwaro rwechimononorwa ruchibhururuka." 
Zechariah5:2 Akati kwandiri, “Unooneiko? Ndikapindura, ndikati, ‘Ndinoona rugwaro rwechimononorwa runobhururuka; kureba kwarwo mukubhiti ana makumi maviri, noupamhi hwarwo makubhiti ane gumi.’ ”" 
Zechariah5:3 Ipapo akati kwandiri, “Ndiko kutuka kunobudira pamusoro penyika yose; nokuti mumwe nomumwe anoba achaparadzwa kuno rumwe rutivi sezvazvakanyorwamo; uye mumwe nomumwe anopika achaparadzwa kuno rumwe rutivi sezvazvakanyorwamo." 
Zechariah5:4 Ndichabudisa kutuka ikoko ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo kupinde mumba moanoba nomumba moanopika nhema nezita rangu; kuchagara pakati peimba yake, kuchiipedza iyo pamwechete namatanda ayo nemabwe ayo.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Zvino mutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni akabuda, akati kwandiri, “Chiratidza meso ako zvino, uone chinobudapo.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ini ndikati, “Chiiko?” Iye akati, “Ichi ndicho chivi chavo panyika yose.” Akatizve, “Ndizvo zvavakaita panyika yose;”" 
Zechariah5:7 (zvino ndikaona tarenta romutobvu ruchisimudzwa); ndikaona mukadzi agere mukati meefa. 
Zechariah5:8 Akati, “Uyu ndiye Zvakashata; akamuwisira pasi mukati mebhasikiti [efa,] akakandira mutobvu unorema pamusoro pomuromo wayo.”" 
Zechariah5:9 Ipapo ndakaratidza meso angu, ndikatarira, ndikaona vakadzi vaviri vachibuda, mhepo iri mumapapiro avo; zvino vakanga vana mapapiro akafanana namapapiro ezimuda; ivo vakasimudza efa, ikava pakati penyika nedenga." 
Zechariah5:10 Ipapo ndikati kumutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni, “Vanondoisepiko bhasikiti?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Iye akati kwandiri, “Kundoivakira imba panyika yeShinari; kana yapera achandoiswapo panzvimbo yayo.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Zvino ndakaratidza meso anguzve, ndikatarira, ndikaona ngoro ina dzichibuda pakati pamakomo maviri; makomo iwayo akanga ari makomo endarira." 
Zechariah6:2 Ngoro yokutanga yakanga ina mabhiza matsvuku; ngoro yechipiri mabhiza matema; 
Zechariah6:3 ngoro yechitatu mabhiza machena, ngoro yechina mabhiza mapfumbu ane simba." 
Zechariah6:4 Ipapo ndakapindura, ndikati kumutumwa akanga achitaurirana neni, “Zviiko izvi, ishe wangu?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Mutumwa akapindura, akati kwandiri, “Izvezvi ndidzo mhepo ina dzokudenga, dzinobuda padzakanga dzimire pamberi paShe wenyika yose.”" 
Zechariah6:6 Ngoro ina mabhiza matema inobudira kunyika yokumusoro; machena akaatevera; namapfumbu akabudira kunyika yezasi. 
Zechariah6:7 Ane simba akabudawo, akatsvaka kuenda kuti apote–pote nenyika yose; ikati, “Ibvai pano, mupote–pote nenyika yose.”" 
Zechariah6:8 Ipapo akadanidzira kwandiri, akataura neni, achiti, “Tarira, vanoenda kunyika yokumusoro, vakanyaradza mweya wangu kunyika yokumusoro.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Zechariah6:10 “Tora vamwe kuna vakatapwa, vanoti Heridhai, naTobhiya, naJedhaia; uuye nezuva irero upinde mumba maJosiya mwanakomana waZefania, kwavakasvika vachibva Babhironi;" 
Zechariah6:11 utore kwavari sirivha nendarama, uite korona, uidzike pamusoro waJoshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukukru;" 
Zechariah6:11 utore kwavari sirivha nendarama, uite korona, uidzike pamusoro waJoshua mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, Mupristi Mukukru;" 
Zechariah6:12 utaure naye, uchiti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, tarira, murume ane zita rinonzi Davi; iye achakura panzvimbo yake, iye achavaka temberi yaJehovha;" 
Zechariah6:13 ndiye achavaka temberi yaJehovha; iye achava noumambo, uye achagara pachigaro chake achibata ushe; achava mupristi pachigaro chake choushe; rangano yorugare ichava pakati pavo ivo vaviri." 
Zechariah6:14 Korona dzichava dzaHeremi, naTobhiya, naJedhaia, naHeni mwanakomana waZefania, chive chiyeudzo mutemberi yaJehovha.’" 
Zechariah6:15 “Vari kure vachauya vachivaka temberi yaJehovha; ipapo muchaziva kuti Jehovha wehondo ndiye akanditumira kwamuri. Izvezvi zvichaitika kana muchiteerera zvakanaka izwi raJehovha Mwari wenyu.” 
Zechariah7:1 Zvino negore rechina ramambo Dhariasi shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Zekariya nezuva rechina romwedzi wepfumbamwe, iwo weKisirevhi." 
Zechariah7:2 Zvino vanhu veBhetieri vakanga vatuma Sharezeri naRegemimereki, navanhu vavo, kundokumbira nyasha kuna Jehovha," 
Zechariah7:3 nokutaura navapristi veimba yaJehovha wehondo navaporofita, vachiti, “Ko ndochema nomwedzi wechishanu, ndichizviparadzanisa navamwe, sezvandaiita makore awa mazhinji here?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Ipapo shoko raJehovha wehondo rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Zechariah7:5 “Taura navanhu vose venyika ino, navapristi, uti, ‘Zvamaizvinyima zvokudya muchichema nomwedzi wechishanu nowechinomwe, makore ano ana makumi manomwe, maitongozvinyima zvokudya nokuda kwangu, nokuda kwangu here?" 
Zechariah7:6 Kana muchidya, kana muchinwa, hamuzvidyiri nokuzvinwira here?’ ”" 
Zechariah7:7 Ko haazi mashoko aJehovha aakadanidzira navaporofita vakare, Jerusaremu richakagarwa navanhu richinomufaro, iro namaguta aro ose akaripoteredza, nenyika yezasi yenyika yamapani dzichina vanhu." 
Zechariah7:8 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Zekariya, richiti," 
Zechariah7:9 “Ndizvo zvakataura Jehovha wehondo, achiti, ‘Ruramisirai kwazvo pakutonga, mumwe nomumwe aitire hama yake unyoro netsitsi;" 
Zechariah7:10 regai kumanikidza chirikadzi, kana nherera, kana mutorwa, kana murombo; kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu anofungira hama yake zvakaipa pamwoyo pake.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Asi vakaramba kuteerera, vakabvisa fudzi ravo, nokudzivira nzeve dzavo kuti varege kunzwa." 
Zechariah7:12 Zvirokwazvo, mwoyo yavo vakaiita sedhaimani, kuti varege kunzwa murairo namashoko akatumwa naJehovha wehondo noMweya wake navaporofita vakare; saka kutsamwa kukuru kwakabuda kuna Jehovha wehondo." 
Zechariah7:13 Zvino sezvaakadana, ivo vakaramba kunzwa, saizvozvo ivo vachadanawo, ini ndichiramba kunzwa ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo;" 
Zechariah7:14 asi ndichavaparadzira nechamupupuri pakati pendudzi dzose dzavakanga vasingazivi. Naizvozvo nyika yakava dongo shure kwavo, kukasava nomunhu akaenda kana kudzoka neko; nokuti vakaparadza nyika yakanga ichifadza.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha wehondo rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Zechariah8:2 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Ndine godo pamusoro peZioni, godo guru, ndine godo pamusoro paro, dziri shungu kwadzo.’" 
Zechariah8:3 “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Ndakadzokera paZioni, ndichagara pakati peJerusaremu; Jerusaremu richanzi guta rezvokwadi, uye gomo raJehovha richanzi gomo dzvene.’" 
Zechariah8:4 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Vatana navachembere vachagarazve munzira dzomuguta reJerusaremu, murume mumwe nomumwe ano mudonzvo wake nemhaka yokukwegura kwake." 
Zechariah8:5 Nzira dzomuguta dzichazara navakomana navasikana vanotamba munzira dzaro.’ 
Zechariah8:6 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Kana zvichishamisa pamberi pavanhu ava vakasara namazuva iwayo, ko zvingashamisa pamberi pangu here?’ Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Zechariah8:7 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Tarirai, ndichaponesa vanhu vangu kunyika yamabvazuva, nokunyika yamavirira;" 
Zechariah8:8 ndichavauyisa, vagare pakati peJerusaremu; vachava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wavo nezvokwadi nokururama.’" 
Zechariah8:9 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Maoko enyu ngaasimbe, iyemi munonzwa mashoko awa mazuva ano pamiromo yavaporofita, vaivapo nezuva rakateyiwa nheyo dzeimba yaJehovha wehondo, iyo temberi, kuti ivakwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Nokuti mazuva iwayo asati asvika, kwakanga kusino mubairo womunhu kana mubairo wezvipfuwo; kwakanga kusino rugare kuno aibuda kana kune aipinda, nemhaka yomudzivisi, nokuti ndairwisanisa vanhu vose mumwe nomumwe nowokwake." 
Zechariah8:11 “ ‘Asi zvino handichazovi kuna vanhu ava vakasara sapamazuva akare,’ ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Zechariah8:12 Nokuti mbeu yorugare ichavapo; muzambiringa uchabereka zvibereko zvawo, nyika ichabereka zvayo, denga richabudisa dova raro; vanhu ava vakasara ndichavagarisa nhaka yezvinhu izvi zvose." 
Zechariah8:13 Zvino sezvamaiva chinhu chakatukwa pakati pendudzi dzavanhu, imi imba yaJudha nemi imba yaIsiraeri, saizvozvo ndichakuponesai, muve chinhu chinoropafadza. Regai kutya, asi maoko enyu asimbe.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Sezvandakafunga kukuitirai zvakaipa, nguva yandakatsamwiswa namadzibaba enyu, ini ndikasazvidemba ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo;" 
Zechariah8:15 saizvozvowo ndakafunga mazuva ano kuitira Jerusaremu zvakanaka uye neimba yaJudhawo; regai kutya. 
Zechariah8:16 Hezvi zvinhu zvamunofanira kuita: Mumwe nomumwe ngaareve zvokwadi kuno wokwake; tongai nezvokwadi norugare mumasuwo enyu; 
Zechariah8:17 kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu anofungira wokwake zvakaipa mumwoyo make; musada kupika kwenhema; nokuti zvinhu izvi zvose ndinozvivenga,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Zechariah8:18 Zvino shoko raJehovha wehondo rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Zechariah8:19 “Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Kuzvinyima zvokudya nomwedzi wechina, nokuzvinyima zvokudya nomwedzi wechishanu, nokuzvinyima zvokudya nomwedzi wechinomwe, nokuzvinyima zvokudya nomwedzi wegumi, zvinofanira kuva kuimba yaJudha mufaro nokufarisisa, nemitambo ino mufaro; saka idai zvokwadi norugare.’ ”" 
Zechariah8:20 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, “Ndudzi dzavanhu dzichauyazve, navagere mumaguta mazhinji;" 
Zechariah8:21 vagere muguta rimwe vachaenda kune rimwe, vachiti, ‘Handei, tichimbidzike kundokumbira nyasha kuna Jehovha, tindotsvaka Jehovha wehondo; neni ndichaendawo.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Zvirokwazvo, ndudzi zhinji dzavanhu namarudzi ane simba achauya kuzotsvaka Jehovha wehondo paJerusaremu, nokukumbira nyasha kuna Jehovha." 
Zechariah8:23 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Namazuva iwayo varume vane gumi pandimi dzose dzendudzi dzavanhu vachabata nguo yomunhu ari muJudha,’ vachiti, ‘Tichaenda newe, nokuti takanzwa kuti Mwari anemi.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Chirevo cheshoko raJehovha pamusoro penyika yeHadhiraki, uye paDhamasikosi ndipo parichagara; nokuti ziso raJehovha rinotarira vanhu nendudzi dzose dzaIsiraeri;" 
Zechariah9:2 uye Hamatiwo, rakabatana navo; uye Taya neSidhoni, nokuti vakachenjera kwazvo." 
Zechariah9:3 Taya rakazvivakira nhare, rikazviunganidzira sirivha seguruva, nendarama yakaisvonaka samatope ari munzira dzomumusha." 
Zechariah9:4 Tarirai, Jehovha acharikunda, achawisira simba raro mugungwa; richapedzwa nomoto." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashikeroni richazviona, ndokutya; uye Gazawo, rikarwadziwa zvikuru; uye Ekironi, nokuti richanyadziswa pane zvarakatarira; mambo achaparara paEkironi, Ashikeroni haringagarwi navanhu." 
Zechariah9:6 “Mwanakomana woupombwe achagara paAshidhodhi, uye ndichaparadza kuzvikudza kwavaFirisitia." 
Zechariah9:7 “Ndichabvisa ropa mumuromo make, nezvinonyangadza zvake zviri pakati pameno ake; iyewo achasarira Mwari wedu; achava somuchinda paJudha, uye Ekironi somuJebhusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Ndichakomberedza imba yangu nemisasa ndidzivirire hondo, kurege kuva nomunhu anopfuura napo kana kudzoka napo; hakungazovi nomumanikidzi anofamba napo; nokuti zvino ndazviona nameso angu.”" 
Zechariah9:9 Fara kwazvo, iwe mukunda weZioni; pururudza iwe mukunda weJerusaremu; tarira, mambo wako anouya kwauri; ndiye akarurama, ndiye anokunda; anozvininipisa, akatasva mbongoro, iyo mhuru mwana wembongoro." 
Zechariah9:10 “Ndichaparadza ngoro pakati paEfuremu, namabhiza paJerusaremu; uta hwokurwa huchaparadzwa; uchataurira ndudzi dzavanhu rugare; ushe hwake huchabva pagungwa kusvikira kumigumo yenyika.”" 
Zechariah9:11 “Kana uriwewo, nokuda kweropa resungano yako, ndakasunungura vasungwa vako mugomba risine mvura." 
Zechariah9:12 “Dzokerai kunhare imi vasungwa vane tariro; iko nhasi ndinokuudzai kuti ndichakupai migove miviri. 
Zechariah9:13 Nokuti ndakazvikungira Judha souta, ndikaisamo Efuremu semiseve; ndichamutsa vanakomana vako, iwe Zioni, varwe navanakomana vako, iwe Girisi; ndichakuita somunondo wemhare.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Jehovha achaonekwa pamusoro pavo, museve wake uchabuda semheni; Ishe Jehovha acharidza hwamanda, achafamba nezvamupupuri zvinobva zasi." 
Zechariah9:15 Jehovha wehondo achavadzitira; vachaparadza, vachatsika pasi mabwe echipfuramabwe; vachanwa, vachiita ruzha savanhu vakabatwa newaini; vachazadzwa sembiya, samakona eatari." 
Zechariah9:16 Jehovha Mwari wavo achavaponesa nezuva iro seboka ravanhu vake; nokuti vachafanana namabwe ekorona, anovaima kumusoro kwenyika yake." 
Zechariah9:17 Nokuti kufara kwavo kuchava kukuru sei, nokunaka kwavo kuchava kukuru sei! Zviyo zvichakurisa majaya, waini itsva ichakurisa mhandara." 
Zechariah10:1 Kumbirai kuna Jehovha mvura nenguva yemvura yokupedzisira, achavapa mvura inonaya kwazvo, mumwe nomumwe ave nezvinomera mumunda." 
Zechariah10:2 Nokuti terafimi dzakataura zvisina maturo, vawuki vakaona nhema, vakaudza vanhu kurota kwenhema, vanovaraidza pasina; saka vanozviindira samakwai, vanotambudzika nokushaiwa mufudzi." 
Zechariah10:3 Kutsamwa kwangu kwakamukira vafudzi, ndicharova mutungamiriri; nokuti Jehovha wehondo wakashanyira boka rake, iyo imba yaJudha, achavaita sebhiza rake rakanaka pakurwa." 
Zechariah10:4 Kwaari kuchabva ibwe rekona, kwaari mbambo, kwaari uta hwehondo, kwaari vabati vose pamwechete." 
Zechariah10:5 Vachava semhare dzinotsika vavengi vadzo pasi pakurwa mumatope enzira dzomumusha; vacharwa nokuti Jehovha anavo; vatasvi vamabhiza vachanyadziswa. 
Zechariah10:6 “Ndichasimbisa imba yaJudha, ndichaponesa imba yaJosefa, nokuvadzoserazve, nokuti ndichavanzwira nyasha; vachava savanhu vasina kurashwa neni; nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo, ndichavanzwa." 
Zechariah10:7 VaEfuremu vachava semhare, mwoyo yavo ichafara savanhu vakabatwa newaini; zvirokwazvo vana vavo vachazviona, vakafara; mwoyo yavo ichafara muna Jehovha." 
Zechariah10:8 “Ndichavaridzira muridzo, ndivaunganidze; nokuti ndakavadzikinura; vachawanda sezvavaiwanda kare." 
Zechariah10:9 Ndichavakusha pakati pendudzi dzavanhu; vachandirangarira kunyika dziri kure; vachararama pamwechete navana vavo, vakadzoka." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndichavadzosazve panyika yeIjipiti, ndichavaunganidza ndichavabvisa paAsiria; ndichavasvitsa kunyika yeGireadhi neRebhanoni; vachashaiwa pokugara." 
Zechariah10:11 Achafamba nomugungwa rokutambudzika, acharova mafungu mugungwa, pakadzika pose muNairi pachapwa; kuzvikudza kweAsira kuchaderedzwa, tsvimbo youshe yeIjipiti ichabviswa." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndichavasimbisa muna Jehovha, vachafamba muzita rangu,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Zechariah11:1 Zarura mikova yako, iwe Rebhanoni, kuti moto upedze misidhari yako." 
Zechariah11:2 Ungudza iwe musipiresi, nokuti musidhari wawira pasi, nokuti miti yakanaka kwazvo yaparadzwa; ungudzai, imi miouku yeBhashani, nokuti dondo risingabviri kupindwa ratemwa." 
Zechariah11:3 Inzwai izwi rokuungudza kwavafudzi! Nokuti kukudzwa kwavo kwaparadzwa; inzwai izwi rokuwomba kwavana veshumba! Nokuti kuzvikudza kwaJodhani kwaitwa dongo. 
Zechariah11:4 Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari wangu, “Fudza makwai anozourayiwa;" 
Zechariah11:5 iwo anourayiwa navana vawo, vasina mhosva; vanoatengesa vanoti, ‘Jehovha ngaavongwe, nokuti ndakapfuma;’ vafudzi vawo havane tsitsi nawo.”" 
Zechariah11:6 “Nokuti handichazovi netsitsi navagere munyika ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; asi tarirai, ndichaisa vanhu avo, mumwe nomumwe muruoko rwookwake, nomuruoko rwamambo wake; vachaparadza nyika, ini ndisingavarwiri paruoko rwavo.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Saka ini ndakafudza makwai aizourayiwa, zvirokwazvo aiva makwai aizourayiwa, zvirokwazvo aiva makwai anonzwisa urombo. Ndikatora tsvimbo mbiri, imwe ndikaitumidza zita rinonzi, “Kunaka,” imwe ndikaitumidza zita rinonzi “Zvisungo;” ndikafudza makwai." 
Zechariah11:8 Ndikaparadza vafudzi vatatu nomwedzi mumwe, nokuti mweya wangu wakanga waneta navo, nemweya yavo yakandisemawo." 
Zechariah11:9 Ipapo ndikati, “Handichadi kukufudzai; chinoda kufa ngachife hacho, chinofanira kuparadza, ngachiparadzwe hacho; akasara ngaadye mumwe nomumwe nyama yomumwe.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Ipapo ndakatora tsvimbo yangu yainzi, “Kunaka,” ndikaivhuna–vhuna, kuti ndiputse sungano yangu yandakanga ndaita nendudzi dzose dzavanhu." 
Zechariah11:11 Ikavhuniwa nezuva iro; naizvozvo varombo pakati pamakwai, vakanditerera, vakaziva kuti ishoko raJehovha." 
Zechariah11:12 Ndikati kwavari, “Kana muchiti zvakanaka, chindipai mubairo wangu; kana zvisakanaka, regai.” Ipapo vakandiyerera mubairo wangu, masirivha ana makumi matatu." 
Zechariah11:13 Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Chizvikandira kumuwumbi wehari; ndiwo mutengo wakanaka wandakatengwa nawo navo.” Ini ndikatora masirivha ana makumi matatu, ndikaakandira kumuwumbi wehari mumba maJehovha." 
Zechariah11:14 Ipapo ndikavhuna–vhuna imwe tsvimbo yangu, yainzi, “Zvisungo,” kuti ndiputse ukama hwaiva pakati paJudha naIsiraeri." 
Zechariah11:15 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Chitorazve nhumbi dzomufudzi bedzi." 
Zechariah11:16 Nokuti tarirai, ndichamutsa panyika ino mufudzi asingavi nehanya naakarashika, kana kutsvaka akapararira, kana kurapa akavhunika, kana kufudza anovata; asi achadya nyama yaakakora, nokubvamburanya mahwanda awo." 
Zechariah11:17 Ane nhamo mufudzi asina maturo, anosiya makwai! Munondo uchatema ruoko rwake neziso rake rorudyi; ruoko rwake ruchaoma chose, uye ziso rake rorudyi richasvibirwa chose.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Chirevo cheshoko raJehovha pamusoro paIsiraeri. Zvanzi naJehovha, iye anotambanudza denga rose, anoteya nheyo dzenyika, nokuumba mweya womunhu mukati make," 
Zechariah12:2 “Tarirai, ndichaita Jerusaremu mukombe wokudzedzeresa ndudzi dzose dzavanhu vakapoteredza; uchavawo pamusoro paJudha pakukombwa kweJerusaremu." 
Zechariah12:3 Nezuva iro ndichaita Jerusaremu ibwe rinoremedza ndudzi dzose dzavanhu; vose vanozvitakudza iro vachakuvadzwa kwazvo; ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzichariunganira kuzorwa naro. 
Zechariah12:4 Nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndicharova bhiza rimwe nerimwe nokutya, nomutasvi waro nokupenga; ndichasvinudzira imba yaJudha meso angu, nokurova bhiza rimwe nerimwe rendudzi dzavanhu nokupofumara." 
Zechariah12:5 Ipapo madzishe aJudha achati mumwoyo mavo, ‘Vagere Jerusaremu ndivo simba redu muna Jehovha wehondo, Mwari wavo.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Nezuva iro ndichaita madzishe aJudha segango romoto pakati pehuni, uye sezhenje romoto pakati pezvisote; vachaparadza ndudzi dzose dzavanhu vakapoteredza, kuruoko rworudyi nokuruoko rworuboshwe; veJerusaremu vachagarazve panzvimbo yavo, ipo paJerusaremu." 
Zechariah12:7 “Jehovha achatanga kuponesawo matende aJudha, kuti kukudzwa kweimba yaDhavhidhi nokukudzwa kwavagere Jerusaremu kurege kupfuura kukudzwa kwaJudha." 
Zechariah12:8 Nezuva iro Jehovha achadzitira vagere Jerusaremu; anoshaiwa simba pakati pavo nezuva iro achava saDhavhidhi; imba yaDhavhidhi ichava saMwari, somutumwa waJehovha pamberi pavo." 
Zechariah12:9 Zvino nezuva iro ndichatsvaka kuparadza ndudzi dzose dzavanhu dzinomukira Jerusaremu. 
Zechariah12:10 “Ndichadira mweya wenyasha nowokunyengetera pamusoro peimba yaDhavhidhi, napamusoro pavagere Jerusaremu; vachanditarira ini, wavakabvowora; vachamuchema iye, somunhu unochema mwanakomana wake mumwechete, vachava neshungu kwazvo pamusoro pake, somunhu ane shungu pamusoro pomwana wake wedangwe." 
Zechariah12:11 “Nezuva iro paJerusaremu pachava nokuchema kukuru, sokuchema kweHadhadhihimoni mumupata waMegidhoni." 
Zechariah12:12 Nyika ichachema, veimba imwe neimwe vari voga; veimba yaDhavhidhi vari voga, navakadzi vavo vari voga, veimba yaNatani vari voga, navakadzi vavo vari voga;" 
Zechariah12:13 naveimba yaRevhi vari voga, navakadzi vavo vari voga; veimba yavaShimei vari voga, navakadzi vavo vari voga;" 
Zechariah12:14 nedzimba dzose dzakasara, veimba imwe neimwe vari voga, navakadzi vavo vari voga." 
Zechariah13:1 “Nezuva iro imba yaDhavhidhi navagere Jerusaremu vachadziurirwa tsime, rokusuka zvivi netsvina." 
Zechariah13:2 Zvino nezuva iro,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo, “Ndichabvisa mazita ezvifananidzo panyika, arege kuzorangarirwa; ndichabudisawo vaporofita nemweya yetsvina panyika.”" 
Zechariah13:3 Zvino kana ani naani achiporofita, baba vake namai vake, vakamubereka, vachati kwaari, “Haungararami, nokuti unoreva nhema nezita raJehovha; baba vake namai vake, vakamubereka, vachabvovora kana achiporofita." 
Zechariah13:4 Zvino nezuva iro vaporofita vachanyadziswa mumwe nomumwe nechaanoona, kana achiporofita, havangapfeki nguo yemvere vachiti tinonyengera vanhu;" 
Zechariah13:5 asi achati, ‘Handizi muporofita, ndiri murimi wevhu; nokuti ndakaitwa muranda kubva pauduku hwangu.’" 
Zechariah13:6 “Kana mumwe akati kwaari, ‘Ko mavanga aya ari pakati pezvanza zvako ndeeiko?’ Ipapo achapindura, achiti, ‘Ndipo pandakakuvadzwa mumba meshamwari dzangu.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 “Muka, iwe munondo, urwe nomufudzi wangu, uye munhu shamwari yangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo; rova mufudzi, makwai agoparadzirwa; ini ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kuvaduku." 
Zechariah13:8 “Zvino munyika yose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha migove miviri ichaparadzwa ndokufa; asi wechitatu acharegwamo. 
Zechariah13:9 Mugove wechitatu ndichaupinza mumoto, ndichavanatsa sezvinonatswa sirivha, ndichavaidza sezvinoidzwa ndarama. Vachadana zita rangu, ini ndichavanzwa; ini ndichati, ‘Ndivo vanhu vangu,’ ivo vachati, ‘Jehovha ndiMwari wangu.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Tarirai, zuva raJehovha rinosvika, nenguva iyo zvawakapamba zvichagoverwa mukati mako." 
Zechariah14:2 Nokuti ndichaunganidza ndudzi dzose dzavanhu kuzorwa neJerusaremu; guta richakundwa, dzimba dzichapambwa, navakadzi vavo vachachinyiwa; hafu yeguta vachatapwa, asi vakasara vavanhu havangabviswi muguta." 
Zechariah14:3 Ipapo Jehovha achabuda, ndokurwa nendudzi idzedzo, sezvaakarwa nezuva rehondo." 
Zechariah14:4 Nezuva iro tsoka dzake dzichamira pagomo reMiorivhi, riri pamberi peJerusaremu kurutivi rwamabvazuva; gomo reMiorivhi richapamuka napakati, zvichibva kumabvazuva zvichienda kumavirazuva, kukavapo mupata mukuru kwazvo; imwe hafu yegomo ichatsedukira kurutivi rwokumusoro, imwe hafu yaro kurutivi rwezasi." 
Zechariah14:5 Muchatiza nomumupata wamakomo angu, nokuti mupata wamakomo uchandosvika paAzeri; zvirokwazvo muchatiza, sezvamakatiza kudengenyeka kwenyika pamazuva aUziya mambo waJudha; ipapo Jehovha Mwari wangu achauya, navatsvene vose pamwechete newe." 
Zechariah14:6 Zvino nezuva iro chiedza chichashaikwa, zvinopenya zvichadzimwa." 
Zechariah14:7 Asi richava zuva rimwe rinozikanwa naJehovha, hapangavi namasikati kana usiku, asi nenguva yamadekwana chiedza chichavapo." 
Zechariah14:8 Zvino nezuva iro mvura mhenyu zhinji ichabuda muJerusaremu; imwe hafu yayo ichayerera kugungwa rokumabvazuva, imwe hafu yayo kugungwa rokumavirazuva; zvichaitwa pazhizha napachando." 
Zechariah14:9 Jehovha achava Mambo wenyika yose; nezuva iro Jehovha achava mumwechete, nezita rake rimwechete." 
Zechariah14:10 Nyika yose ichaita sebani, zvichibva Gebha kusvikira paRimoni, kurutivi rwezasi rweJerusaremu; iro richakwiridzwa, richagara panzvimbo yaro, kubva pasuwo raBhenjamini kusvikira kunzvimbo yesuwo rokutanga, kusvikira kusuwo rekona, nokubva kurutura rwaHananeri kusvikira kuzvisviniro zvewaini zvamamabo." 
Zechariah14:11 Vanhu vachagaramo; kutukwa hakungazovipo, asi Jerusaremu richagara rakachengetwa." 
Zechariah14:12 Uku ndiko kurova Jehovha kwaacharova nako ndudzi dzose dzavanhu vakarwa neJerusaremu, nyama yavo ichaora vamire namakumbo avo, meso avo achaorera mumakomba awo, norurimi rwavo ruchaorera mumiromo yavo." 
Zechariah14:13 Zvino nezuva iro kunyonganiswa kukuru kunobva kuna Jehovha kuchavapo pakati pavo; mumwe nomumwe achabata ruoko rwowokwake, uye ruoko rwake ruchasimudzirwa ruoko rwowokwake." 
Zechariah14:14 Judha vacharwawo paJerusaremu; pfuma yendudzi dzose dzavanhu vakapoteredza ichaunganidzwa, inoti ndarama, nesirivha, nenguo, zvizhinji kwazvo." 
Zechariah14:15 Sezvakaita kurohwa uku, ndizvo zvichaitawo kurohwa kwamabhiza namahesera, nengamera, nembongoro, nezvipfuwo zvose zvichavapo pamisasa iyo." 
Zechariah14:16 Zvino vose vakasara vendudzi dzose dzakarwa neJerusaremu, vachakwira gore rimwe nerimwe kundonamata Mambo, iye Jehovha wehondo, nokutamba mutambo wamatumba." 
Zechariah14:17 Ani naani pamarudzi enyika asingakwiri Jerusaremu kundonamata Mambo, Jehovha wehondo, haanganisirwi mvura." 
Zechariah14:18 Kana rudzi rwaVaIjipiti rusingakwiri, vakasasvikapo, naivo vachavingwa nokurohwa Jehovha waacharova nako ndudzi dzavanhu dzinoramba kukwira kundotamba mutambo wamatumba." 
Zechariah14:19 Uku ndiko kurohwa kwaVaIjipiti nokurohwa kwendudzi dzose dzinoramba kukwira kundotamba mutambo wamatumba. 
Zechariah14:20 Nezuva iro pamatare anorira amabhiza pachanyorwa, pachiti, “ZVITSVENE KUNA JEHOVHA;” nehari dziri mumba maJehovha dzichafanana nembiya dziri pamberi peatari." 
Zechariah14:21 Zvirokwazvo, hari imwe neimwe paJerusaremu napaJudha ichava tsvene kuna Jehovha wehondo; vose vanoda kubayira vachauya vachidzitora, kuzobikiramo; nezuva iro hapachazovi nomuKenani mumba maJehovha wehondo." 
Malachi1:1 Chirevo cheshoko raJehovha kuna Isiraeri chakatumwa naMaraki. 
Malachi1:2 “Ndakakudai ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Kunyangwe zvakadaro imi munoti, ‘Makatida neiko?’ Ko Esau akanga asi mukoma waJakobho here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; kunyangwe zvakadaro ini ndakada Jakobho;" 
Malachi1:3 asi Esau ndakamuvenga, ndikaita makomo ake matongo, ndikapa makava amarenje nhaka yake." 
Malachi1:4 “Kunyangwe Edhomu vakati, ‘Takaparadzwa hedu, asi tichadzoka tikavakazve matongo;’ zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ‘Vachavaka, asi ini ndichakoromora;’ vanhu vachavatumidza, nyika yezvakaipa, uye vanhu vakatsamwirwa naJehovha nokusingaperi." 
Malachi1:5 “Meso enyu achaona, mukati, ‘Jehovha anokudzwa munyika yose yaIsiraeri.’" 
Malachi1:6 “Mwanakomana anokudza baba vake, nomuranda anokudza tenzi wake; zvino kana ndiri baba venyu, kukudzwa kwangu kuripiko? Kana ndiri tenzi, kutyiwa kwangu kuripiko? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo kwamuri, imi vapristi vanozvidza zita rangu. Zvino imi moti, ‘Tinozvidza zita renyu neiko?’" 
Malachi1:7 Munondivigira chingwa chine tsvina paatari yangu. Zvino moti, ‘Takakusvibisai neiko?’ Pakutaura kwenyu muchiti, ‘Tafura yaJehovha ngaizvidzwe hayo.’" 
Malachi1:8 Kana muchindivigira chakapofumara chive chibayiro, hazvina kuipa here? Kana muchindivigira chinokamhina nechinorwara hazvina kuipa here? Chizvivigirai mubati wenyu; ungakufarirai here? Kana ungakugamuchirai here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi1:9 “Zvino chikumbirai henyu nyasha dzaMwari, kuti atinzwire ngoni. Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi1:10 Aiwa, dai kwaiva nomumwe wenyu waizarira hake mikova, kuti murege kubatidza moto paatari yangu pasina! Handikufaririyi imi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo handingagamuchiri chamunondivigira namaoko enyu." 
Malachi1:11 Nokuti kubva pakubuda kwezuva kusvikira pakuvira kwaro zita rangu richakudzwa pakati pavahedheni; pose pose zvinonhuwira zvichavigirwa zita rangu, uye chipiriso chisina tsvina; nokuti zita rangu richakudzwa pakati pavahedheni ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi1:12 Asi imi munozvimhura, zvamunoti, ‘Tafura yaJehovha yakasvibiswa, zvibereko zvayo, izvo zvokudya zvayo, ngazvizvidzwe hazvo.’" 
Malachi1:13 Munotiwo, ‘Tarirai zvinonetsa sei!’ Mazvishora ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo; makandivigira zvakapambwa, nezvinokamhina, nezvinorwara; ndizvo zvamunondivigira chipiriso; zvino ndingazvigamuchira pamaoko enyu here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Malachi1:14 Asi munyengeri ngaatukwe ane gondohwe pakati pamakwai ake, ndokupika nokubayira Ishe chinhu chakaremara; nokuti ndiri Mambo mukuru ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo zita rangu rinotyisa pakati pavahedheni." 
Malachi2:1 “Zvino imi vapristi, chinzwai uyu murairo unouya kwamuri." 
Malachi2:2 Kana imi musingadi kunzwa, kana musingadi kuita nomwoyo wenyu zvandakaraira kuti mukudze zita rangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo ipapo ndichatuma kutuka pamusoro penyu, ndichatuka ropafadzo dzenyu; zvirokwazvo ndatozvituka, nokuti hamuzviiti nomwoyo wenyu." 
Malachi2:3 Tarirai, ndichatuka vana venyu, ndichamhamira ndove kuzviso zvenyu, iyo ndove yemitambo yenyu; muchabviswa pamwechete naro." 
Malachi2:4 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini ndakakutumirai murairo uyu, kuti sungano yangu ive naRevhi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi2:5 “Sungano yangu navo yakanga iri youpenyu norugare; ndakavapa izvo kuti vanditye, vakanditya, vakadedera nokuda kwezita rangu." 
Malachi2:6 Murairo wezvokwadi wakanga uri mumuromo wavo, kusarurama hakuna kuwanikwa pamiromo yavo; vakafambidzana neni norugare nokururama, vakadzora vazhinji pazvakaipa." 
Malachi2:7 Nokuti miromo yomupristi inofanira kuchengeta zivo, vanhu vanofanira kubvunza murairo pamusoro wake; nokuti ndiye nhume yaJehovha wehondo." 
Malachi2:8 Asi imi makatsauka panzira; makagumbusa vazhinji pamurairo; makasvibisa sungano yaRevhi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo. 
Malachi2:9 Saka ndakakuitai vanhu vanozvidzwa navanorambwa navanhu vose, zvamusina kuchengeta nzira dzangu, mukatsaura vanhu pakutonga murairo." 
Malachi2:10 “Ko isu tose hatina baba vamwe here? Haazi Mwari mumwe wakatisika here? Tinogonyengerana neiko mumwe nomumwe hama yake, tichimhura sungano yamadzibaba edu?" 
Malachi2:11 Judha vakanyengera, chinhu chinonyangadza chaitwa pakati paIsiraeri napaJerusaremu; nokuti Judha vakamhura nzvimbo tsvene yaJehovha, inodikanwa naye, vakawana mukunda wamwari wavatorwa." 
Malachi2:12 Munhu anoita zvakadai, Jehovha achamubvisira pamatende aJakobho, anodana neanopindura, neanovigira Jehovha wehondo zvipiriso." 
Malachi2:13 Munoitawo izvozvi: Munofukidza atari yaJehovha nemisodzi, nokuchema, nokugomera, naizvozvo haacharangariri chipiriso, kana kuchigamuchira nomufaro pamaoko enyu." 
Malachi2:14 Kunyangwe zvakadaro munoti, ‘Nemhaka yeiko?’ Nokuti Jehovha akanga ari chapupu pakati pako nomukadzi woujaya hwako, wawakanyengera, kunyangwe ari shamwari yako, nomukadzi wako wawakaita sungano yako naye." 
Malachi2:15 Ko haana kuita mumwechete, kunyangwe akanga ane mumwe Mweya wakasara here? Zvino wakaitireiko mumwechete? Wakatsvaka rudzi rwaMwari. Saka chenjererai mweya yenyu, kurege kuva nomumwe anonyengera mukadzi woujaya hwake." 
Malachi2:16 Nokuti ndinovenga kurambana ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri uye munhu anofukidza nguo yake nokumanikidza ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo; saka chenjererai mweya yenyu, kuti murege kunyengera." 
Malachi2:17 “Makanetsa Jehovha namashoko enyu. Kunyangwe zvakadaro munoti, ‘Takamunetsa neiko?’ Pakutaura kwenyu, muchiti, ‘Mumwe nomumwe anoita zvakaipa, vakanaka pamberi paJehovha, ndivo vaanofarira;’ kana: ‘Mwari wezvakarurama aripiko?’" 
Malachi3:1 “Tarirai, ndinotuma nhume yangu, iye achandigadzirira nzira yangu pamberi pangu; ipapo Ishe, wamunotsvaka, achasvika pakarepo patemberi yake, iye Mutumwa wesungano, wamunoshuva, tarirai, anouya ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi3:2 Asi ndiani ungatsunga nezuva rokuuya kwake? Ndiani angamira kana achionekwa? Nokuti akafanana nomoto womunatsi, nesipo yomusuki." 
Malachi3:3 Iye achagara pasi akafanana nomunatsi nomuchenesi wesirivha; achachenesa vanakomana vaRevhi, nokuvanatsa sendarama nesirivha; ipapo vachavigira Jehovha zvipiriso nokururama." 
Malachi3:4 Ipapo chipiriso chaJudha neJerusaremu zvichafadza Jehovha, sapamazuva akare, sapamakore apakutanga–tanga." 
Malachi3:5 “Ndichaswedera kwamuri kuti nditonge; ndichava chapupu chinokurumidza pamusoro pavaroyi, napamusoro pemhombwe, napamusoro pavanopika nhema, napamusoro pavanomanikidza mushandiri pamubairo wake, nechirikadzi, nenherera, napamusoro pavanodzinga vatorwa, vasingandityi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi3:6 “Nokuti ini Jehovha handishanduki, saka imi, vanakomana vaJakobho, mugere kuparadzwa." 
Malachi3:7 “Kubva pamazuva amadzibaba enyu makatsauka pane zvandakaraira, mukasazvichengeta. Dzokerai kwandiri, neni ndichadzokera kwamuri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo. Asi imi munoti, ‘Tichadzoka pazvinhu zvipi?’" 
Malachi3:8 Ko munhu angabira Mwari here? Kunyangwe zvakadaro munondibira. Asi imi munoti, ‘Takakubirai pazvinhu zvipi?’ Pane zvegumi nezvipiriso zvinotsaurwa." 
Malachi3:9 Makatukwa nokutuka; nokuti munondibira, urwo rudzi urwu rwose." 
Malachi3:10 Uyai nezvegumi zvose muimba yokuvigira, kuti zvokudya zvivepo mumba mangu, mundiidze naizvozvi zvino ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo muone kana ndisingakuzarurirei mahwindo okudenga, ndikakudururirai mukomborero wamuchashaiwa pokuisa." 
Malachi3:11 Ndichatukawo udyi nokuda kwenyu, arege kuparadza zvibereko zveminda yenyu; nemizambiringa yenyu haingazuki zvibereko zvayo mumunda, nguva isati yasvika ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi3:12 Ndudzi dzose dzichati muri vanhu vakafara; nokuti muchava nyika inofadza ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo. 
Malachi3:13 “Mashoko enyu akanga ari makukutu kwandiri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Kunyangwe zvakadaro, munoti, ‘Takataureiko pamusoro penyu?’" 
Malachi3:14 Imi makati, ‘Hazvina maturo kushumira Mwari;’ takawaneiko zvatakachengeta zvaakaraira, zvatakafamba takapfeka nguo dzokuchema pamberi paJehovha wehondo?" 
Malachi3:15 Zvino tinoti vanozvikudza ndivo vakafara; zvirokwazvo, vanoita zvakaipa ndivo vanovakiswa; zvirokwazvo, vanoidza Mwari vachipukunyuka." 
Malachi3:16 “Ipapo vaitya Jehovha vakataurirana, Jehovha akateerera, akanzwa, bhuku yokurangaridza ikanyorwa pamberi pake, nokuda kwavanotya Jehovha, vachirangarira zita rake." 
Malachi3:17 Vachava vangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo ivo vangu chaivo, nezuva randichazviita; ndichavanzwira tsitsi, somunhu anonzwira tsitsi mwanakomana wake anomubatira." 
Malachi3:18 Ipapo muchaonazve kusiyana kwowakarurama nowakaipa, kwoanoshumira Mwari noasingamushumiri." 
Malachi4:1 “Nokuti tarirai, zuva rinouya; rinopisa sechoto; ipapo vose vanozvikudza, navose vanoita zvakaipa, vachava samashanga; zuva rinouya, richavapisa, rikasavasiyira mudzi kana davi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi4:2 Asi imi, munotya zita rangu, muchabudirwa nezuva rokururama, rinokuporesa pasi pamapapiro aro; muchabuda muchitamba semhuru dzomuchirugu." 
Malachi4:3 Muchatsikira vakaipa pasi; nokuti vachava madota pasi petsoka dzenyu, nezuva randichaita izvozvi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Malachi4:4 “Rangarirai murairo waMosesi muranda wangu, wandakamuraira paHorebhi, waVaIsiraeri, vose, izvo zvandakatema nezvandakaraira." 
Malachi4:5 “Tarirai, ndichakutumirai muporofita Eriya, zuva iro guru raJehovha, rinotyisa, risati rasvika." 
Malachi4:6 Iye achadzorera mwoyo yamadzibaba kuvana, nemwoyo yavana kuna madzibaba avo, kuti ndirege kuuya ndirove nyika nokutuka.”" 
Luke3:25 mwanakomana waMatatiasi, mwanakomana waAmosi, mwanakomana waNaumi, mwanakomana waEsiri, mwanakomana waNagai," 
Luke3:32 mwanakomana waJese, mwanakomana waJobhedhi, mwanakomana waBhoasi, mwanakomana waSara, mwanakomana waNasoni," 
Acts7:45 Yakati yagamuchirwa namadzibaba edu, vakapinda nayo naJoshua munyika yavahedheni, vakadzingwa naMwari pamberi pamadzibaba edu, kusvikira pamazuva aDhavhidhi;" 
Hebrews4:8 Nokuti dai Joshua akanga avapa zororo, haazaizoreva rimwe zuva pashure." 
James5:11 Tarirai, vakatsunga mwoyo tinoti vakaropafadzwa; makanzwa zvokutsungirira kwaJobho, akaona Ishe zvaakavavarira naye, kuti Ishe ano mwoyo munyoro kwazvo, ane tsitsi."
